Genesis1:1 E bakto Allah nyepta'agi alam dunnya," 
Genesis1:2 bume reya gi' ta' etemmo bangonna ban gi' ta' etemmo karowanna kabadha'anna. Kabbi gi' katotoban tase' raja. Dineng tase' raja jareya omba'na raja tor petteng calemodan, tape kobasana Allah ngabang e bagiyan attassa aeng." 
Genesis1:3 Allah adhabu, “Mara tera'!” Kabadha'an laju tera'." 
Genesis1:4 Allah ngoladi ja' tera' jareya bagus. Se tera' laju epalaen dhari se petteng. 
Genesis1:5 Se tera' jareya eparenge nyama “Seyang”, dineng se petteng eparenge nyama “Malem”. Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng settong." 
Genesis1:6 Allah adhabu, “Mara metto kubah se raja sopaja aeng reya daddiya dhu bagiyan, ban bagiyan se dhadhuwa' jareya sopaja ta' acampowa pole.” Se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon. Daddi Allah la abadhi kubah se malaen aeng se badha e baba'anna dhari aeng se badha e attasanna." 
Genesis1:7  
Genesis1:8 Kubah jareya eparenge nyama “Langnge'”. Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng dhuwa'. 
Genesis1:9 Saellana jareya Allah adhabu, “Mara aeng se badha e baba'anna langnge' reya agili akompol ka settong kennengngan, sopaja tana etangaleyana.” Se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon." 
Genesis1:10 Tana jareya eparenge nyama “Tenggangan” ban aeng se masettong eparenge nyama “Tase'”. Ban Allah senneng ngoladi jareya. 
Genesis1:11 Allah laju adhabu pole, “Mara tana makalowar samacemma ka'-bungka'an se ngasellagi gi-bigi ban se ngasellagi wa'-buwa'an.” Se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon." 
Genesis1:12 Daddi tana makalowar samacemma bu-tombuwan se ngasellagi gi-bigi ban wa'-buwa'an. Allah ngoladi ja' jareya kabbi bagus. 
Genesis1:13 Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng tello'. 
Genesis1:14 Saellana jareya Allah adhabu, “Mara e langnge' kalowar rang-barang se tera' sopaja bume tera'a, kaangguy malaen seyang dhari malem, sarta kaangguy noduwagi sa'at parmola'anna are, taon ban are rajana agama.” Se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon." 
Genesis1:15  
Genesis1:16 Daddi Allah la abadhi barang tera' se raja dhadhuwa', iya areya are se ngobasane seyang, ban bulan se ngobasane malem, sarta tang-bintang." 
Genesis1:17 Jareya kabbi bi' Allah esaba' e langnge' epanera'e bume," 
Genesis1:18 epangobasae seyang ban malem, sarta kaangguy malaen se tera' dhari se petteng. Ban Allah senneng ngoladi jareya." 
Genesis1:19 Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng empa'. 
Genesis1:20 Saellana jareya Allah adhabu, “Mara e dhalem aeng agaremmet samacemma mahlok se odhi', ban e bang-abang pabannya' mano' ber-abberran.”" 
Genesis1:21 Daddi Allah la nyepta'agi keban tase' se ja-raja ban samacemma mahlok se odhi' agaremmet e dhalem aeng, sarta samacemma mano'. Ban Allah senneng ngoladi jareya." 
Genesis1:22 Allah aberkadi jareya kabbi, dhabuna, “Mara adhu'-budhu' ban atamba bannya' mossa'e aeng tase', ban no'-mano' sopaja atamba'a bannya'.”" 
Genesis1:23 Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng lema'. 
Genesis1:24 Saellana jareya Allah adhabu, “Mara bume makalowar samacemma keban, se notot ban se kesset, se raja ban se kene' sarta keban se agalajar.” Apa se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon." 
Genesis1:25 Daddi Allah la abadhi keban se notot ban se kesset sarta keban se agalajar. Ban Allah senneng ngoladi jareya. 
Genesis1:26 Saellana jareya Allah adhabu, “Mara sateya ja' agabaya manossa se merep Sengko' ban ba'na, sopaja manossa jareya ngobasane bume, ko'-juko', no'-mano' ban sakabbinna keban laenna, se notot ban se kesset sarta ban-keban se agalajar e tana.”" 
Genesis1:27 Daddi Allah nyepta'agi manossa se merep Salerana dibi'. Manossa se ecepta'agi jareya badha se lalake' badha se babine' 
Genesis1:28 Allah laju aberkadi manossa se lalake' ban babine' jareya, sarta adhabu, “Mara ba'na pabannya' na' potona sopaja toronanna ba'na mossa'e ban ngobasane bume. Kobasae ko'-juko' ban no'-mano' sarta sakabbinna keban laenna." 
Genesis1:29 Sakabbinna bu-tombuwan se ngasellagi gi-bigi ban wa'-buwa'an bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na menangka kakanna ba'na. 
Genesis1:30 Tape no'-mano' sarta ban-keban laenna bi' Sengko' eberri'ana rebba ban bu-tombuwan laenna menangka kakanna.” Se edhabuwagi Allah jareya kalakon kabbi. 
Genesis1:31 Allah ngoladi sabarang se ebadhi Salerana jareya ce' bagussa kabbi. Malem la lebat pas agante laggu. Jareya are se kapeng ennem. 
Genesis2:1 Daddi alam dunnya la mare ecepta'agi kabbi. 
Genesis2:2 E are se kapeng petto' sabarang se elampa'agi Allah la mare kabbi, ban Allah pas aistirahat." 
Genesis2:3 Are se kapeng petto' jareya laju eberkadi pas ekusussagi ka Salerana, sabab e are se kapeng petto' jareya Allah aistirahat saellana mare se nyepta'agi alam dunnya." 
Genesis2:4 Kantha jareya caretana langnge' ban bume e bakto ecepta'agi. E bakto GUSTE Allah abadhi alam dunnya," 
Genesis2:5 e bume gi' tadha' ne-bine se nyelbi' ban gi' tadha' bu-tombuwan, sabab GUSTE Allah gi' ta' matoron ojan ban gi' tadha' oreng se agaraba tana." 
Genesis2:6 Tape aeng la molae nyerrep dhari baba sampe' kole'na bume bacca. 
Genesis2:7 GUSTE Allah laju mondhut tana sakone', pas ebadhi manossa, manossa jareya eparenge nyaba se maodhi', se eserrobbagi ka dhalem lobangnga elongnga; daddi manossa jareya pas odhi'." 
Genesis2:8 Saellana jareya GUSTE Allah pas abadhi bun-kebbunan e Eden, mongging temor; manossa se ebadhi gella' esaba' e jadhiya." 
Genesis2:9 GUSTE Allah laju matombu samacemma ka'-bungka'an se gus-bagus, se ngasellagi wa'-buwa'an se man-nyaman. E nga'-tengnga'anna bun-kebbunan jareya badha bungkana kaodhi'an, ban bungkana pangataowan parkara se becce' ban se juba'." 
Genesis2:10 Bun-kebbunan jareya tanana bacca polana egili'i songay dhari Eden; e lowarra Eden songay jareya acangka empa'. 
Genesis2:11 Cangkana se nomer settong nyamana Pison, agili ngobengnge nagara Hawila." 
Genesis2:12 E jadhiya ngasellagi emmas morne ban mennyan se malarat sareyanna, sarta to-bato mamatan." 
Genesis2:13 Songay se nomer dhuwa' nyamana Gihon; aengnga agili ngobengnge nagara Kus. 
Genesis2:14 Songay se nomer tello' nyamana Tigris, agili e temoranna Asyur. Ban songay se nomer empa' nyamana Efrat." 
Genesis2:15 Saellana jareya GUSTE Allah pas nyaba' manossa gella' e bun-kebbunan Eden, kaangguy agarab ban meyara bun-kebbunan jareya." 
Genesis2:16 GUSTE Allah pas adhabu ka manossa jareya, “Ba'na olle ngakan buwana sakabbinna ka'-bungka'an e bun-kebbunan reya," 
Genesis2:17 kajabana buwana bungkana pangataowan parkara se becce' ban se juba'. Mon ba'na ngakan buwa jareya, sanatkala jareya keya ba'na bakal mateya.”" 
Genesis2:18 GUSTE Allah laju adhabu, “Ta' becce' mon manossa reya kadibi'an. Bi' Sengko' egabayyagiya kanca se cocok, me' olle abanto manossa reya.”" 
Genesis2:19 GUSTE Allah laju mondhut tana se pas ebadhi samacemma keban se odhi' e tana ban se odhi' e bang-abang. Ban-keban jareya bi' GUSTE Allah ebakta ka manossa gella', terro ngagaliya ba' enyama'ana apa tong-settongnga keban jareya bi' manossa gella'. Nyamana saneyap keban jareya ngala' dhari nyama baberri'na manossa jareya." 
Genesis2:20 Daddi sakabbinna keban se odhi' e tenggangan ban se odhi' e bang-abang eberri'i nyama bi' manossa jareya. Tape ban-keban jareya tadha' settonga se ekennenga gabay kanca se cocok se abantowa aba'na. 
Genesis2:21 Saellana jareya manossa gella' bi' GUSTE Allah epatedhung sampe' ngeddha, ban teppa'na manossa jareya tedhung, GUSTE Allah mondhut sala settonga tolang roso'na, lampadda pas etotobi ban daging." 
Genesis2:22 Tolang roso' jareya laju ebadhi oreng babine', pas ebakta ka manossa gella'." 
Genesis2:23 Manossa jareya laju ngoca', “Areya' oreng se padha ban sengko' – tolang dhari tang tolang, ban daging dhari tang daging. Bi' sengko' enyama'ana babine', polana oreng reya ekala' dhari lalake'.”" 
Genesis2:24 Jareya asal molana oreng lalake' adina'agi rama ebuna apolong ban binena, ban se kadhuwa jareya pas daddi settong." 
Genesis2:25 Oreng lalake' ban babine' jareya padha abangkang, tape padha ta' andhi' rassa todhus." 
Genesis3:1 Olar reya keban se paleng salenter dhari sakabbinna keban se ebadhi GUSTE Allah. Olar jareya atanya ka babine' gella', “Apa ba'na ban lalake' rowa bi' Guste Allah ta' eparengngagi ngakan buwana sakabbinna ka'-bungka'an se badha e bun-kebbunan reya?”" 
Genesis3:2 Saodda babine' jareya, “Buwana sabadhana ka'-bungka'an e bun-kebbunan reya olle ekakan," 
Genesis3:3 kajabana buwana kajuwan se badha e nga'-tengnga'anna bun-kebbunan reya. Bi' Guste Allah buwana ta' eparengngagi kakan otaba esedding. Mon larangan jareya eterrak, tanto sengko' mate.”" 
Genesis3:4 Olar gella' ngoca', “Enja', ba'na ta' kera mate." 
Genesis3:5 Guste Allah adhabu kantha jareya sabab la ngagali mon ba'na ban lalake' rowa ngakan buwa jareya tanto pekkeranna pas tabukka', pas padha ban Guste Allah, tao ka parkara se becce' ban se juba'.”" 
Genesis3:6 Babine' jareya nangale'e ja' kajuwan jareya lebur ban buwana mon ekakan tanto nyaman. Ca'na pekkerra, ce' nyamanna mon aba'na pas daddi penter. Daddi buwana kajuwan jareya pas epetthek, terros ekakan, se lake' eberri'i keya, sarta pas noro' ngakan." 
Genesis3:7 Gi' buru mare se ngakan buwana kajuwan jareya, pekkeranna pas tabukka', se kadhuwa jareya laju tao ja' aba'na padha abangkang. Daddi laju padha ngala' dhaunna ara, ebung-sambung epanotobi badanna." 
Genesis3:8 E baja asar e are jareya keya oreng lake' bine' gella' ngedhing GUSTE Allah alomampa e dhalem bun-kebbunan, se kadhuwa jareya pas ngetek e antarana ju-kajuwan sopaja ta' eoladi GUSTE Allah." 
Genesis3:9 Tape GUSTE Allah adhabu epakaja, “Badha e dhimma ba'na, manossa?”" 
Genesis3:10 Se lake' nyaot, “Abdidalem mereng Junandalem badha e bun-kebbunan ka'dhinto, abdidalem tako', polana abdidalem abangkang; daddi abdidalem ngetek.”" 
Genesis3:11 Dhabuna GUSTE Allah, “Sapa se malae ja' ba'na abangkang? Apa ba'na ngakan buwana kajuwan se bi' Sengko' ta' ebagi kakan rowa?”" 
Genesis3:12 Lalake' jareya nyaot, “Babine' paparengnga Junandalem ka'dhinto ngatore abdidalem buwana kajuwan ka'dhissa', daddi sareng abdidalem laju eteddha.”" 
Genesis3:13 GUSTE Allah adhabu ka babine' jareya, “Arapa ba'na me' kantha jareya?” Saodda babine' jareya, “Abdidalem etepo olar, kantos abdidalem neddha buwana kajuwan ka'dhissa'.”" 
Genesis3:14 GUSTE Allah pas adhabu ka olar jareya, “Polana tengkana ba'na se kantha jareya, bi' Sengko' ba'na eokoma; dhari sakabbinna keban, pera' ba'na se kodu nanggung babaston reya: ba'na kodu agalajar ngangguy tabu'na, ban saomorra kodu ngakan abu." 
Genesis3:15 Bi' Sengko' ba'na epamosowana ban babine' reya, toronanna ba'na ban toronanna babine' reya bakal amosowana; cethagga ba'na bakal eparemmoga bi' toronanna babine' reya, dineng ba'na bakal ngekke'a tombedda toronanna.”" 
Genesis3:16 Saellana jareya GUSTE Allah pas adhabu ka babine' gella', “Mon ba'na teppa'na ngandhung bi' Sengko' epatamba'a malarat, mon rembi'a epasajana sake'. Maske kantha jareya ba'na gi' bakal pagguna barai ka lakena, ban ba'na bakal ekobasa'ana lakena jareya.”" 
Genesis3:17 Saellana jareya GUSTE Allah pas adhabu ka se lake', “Ba'na ngedhingngagi cacana binena, pas ngakan buwa se bi' Sengko' ta' ebagi kakan rowa. Lantaran tengkana ba'na se kantha jareya, tana reya bi' Sengko' ebastowa. Saomorra ba'na kodu alako berra' sopaja olleya kakan se cokop dhari tana reya." 
Genesis3:18 Dhari tana reya bakal tombuwa onbut se adhuri, ban bu-tombuwan alas bakal daddiya kakanna ba'na." 
Genesis3:19 Ba'na kodu alako berra' makalowar pello koneng mon terro olleya hasel dhari tana reya, sampe' ba'na mate abali ka tana pole, sabab ba'na reya asalla dhari tana, daddi kodu abali daddi tana.”" 
Genesis3:20 Bi' manossa gella' binena enyamae Hawa, sabab babine' jareya daddi ebuna sakabbinna manossa." 
Genesis3:21 Bi' GUSTE Allah Adam ban Hawa ebadhiyagi rasogan dhari kole'na keban, pas eagemmagi ka se kadhuwa jareya." 
Genesis3:22 GUSTE Allah adhabu, “Sateya manossa reya la daddi merep bi' Sengko' ban ba'na, tao ka parkara se becce' ban se juba'. Daddi kodu ejaga sopaja ta' sampe'a ngakan buwana bungkana kaodhi'an, me' olle ta' odhi' salanjangnga.”" 
Genesis3:23 Daddi GUSTE Allah laju ngojuk manossa jareya dhari Bun-kebbunan Eden, epakon agarap tana se daddi asalla badanna." 
Genesis3:24 Saellana manossa jareya eojuk, e temoranna bun-kebbunan jareya, e jalan se elebadi mon maso'a ka Bun-kebbunan Eden jareya, bi' GUSTE Allah esaba'i rub-kerub se akalembang, sarta epasange peddhang se rabbang se apoter kaangguy ajaga jalan se nojju ka bungkana kaodhi'an rowa." 
Genesis4:1 Saellana jareya Adam apolong tedhung ban Hawa, rajina. Babine' jareya pas bubut, sarta babar lalake', pas adhabu, “Kalaban partolonganna Pangeran sengko' andhi' ana' lalake'.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Kain." 
Genesis4:2 Saellana jareya Hawa pas babar lalake' pole, enyamae Habil. Habil daddi oreng ngowan dumba, tape Kain daddi oreng tane." 
Genesis4:3 Ta' abit saellana jareya Kain ngala' sabagiyan dhari hasella tanena, egabay kurban ka PANGERAN." 
Genesis4:4 Habil ngatorragi kurban keya, iya areya budhu'na embi' dumbana se sareyang, budhu'na dumba jareya esambelli, bagiyanna se paleng bagus ekagabay kurban ka PANGERAN. PANGERAN kasokan ka Habil ban kurbanna," 
Genesis4:5 tape ta' kasokan ka Kain ban kurbanna. Kain laju ce' peggella, mowana nyarotheng." 
Genesis4:6 Daddi PANGERAN adhabu ka Kain, “Arapa ba'na me' peggel? Arapa ba'na me' theng-nyarotheng?" 
Genesis4:7 Mon ba'na alako becce', tanto ba'na mesem; tape mon ba'na atengka juba', atena ba'na esemma'e dusa. Dusa jareya ngobasa'ana ba'na, tape ba'na kodu makala gudha'anna.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kain pas ngoca' ka Habil, “Mara ja' entara ka teggal.” Sanapa'na ka jadhiya, Habil epokol bi' Kain, terros epate'e." 
Genesis4:9 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Kain, “Kemma Habil, ale'na ba'na?” Saodda Kain, “Ta' oneng. Masa' abdidalem ajaga'a ale'?”" 
Genesis4:10 PANGERAN adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' ngalakone barang se nako'e jareya? Dharana ale'na ba'na aera' ka Sengko' dhari dhalem tana, akantha sowara se acerreng menta babales." 
Genesis4:11 Daddi sateya bi' Sengko' ba'na ebastowa, tabuwang jau dhari tana se anganga ngesep dharana ale'na ba'na se epate'e bi' tanangnga ba'na jareya." 
Genesis4:12 Mon ba'na agarap tana, ba'na ta' kera olle hasel pa-apa dhari tana jareya; ba'na bakal le-ngalleya san-kassannagi, akantha buronan se ta' andhi' kennengngan e bume.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kain mator ka PANGERAN, “Okomanna Junandalem talebat berra', abdidalem ta' kellar se nyandhanga." 
Genesis4:14 Abdidalem etondhung dhari tana ka'dhinto, jau dhari ajunanna Junandalem. Abdidalem bakal le-ngalleya san-kassannagi, akadi buronan se ta' gadhuwan kennengngan e bume. Daddi manabi abdidalem tapanggi sareng pasera'a saos, tanto abdidalem laju epate'e.”" 
Genesis4:15 PANGERAN adhabu, “Enja', ta' kera. Mon ba'na epate'e oreng, menangka babales, oreng se mate'e ba'na jareya ban oreng laenna, kabbi sampe' kapetto, bakal mateya epate'e oreng keya.” Bi' PANGERAN Kain laju eparenge tandha menangka parengeddan ka sapa'a bai se tatemmo bi' Kain sopaja ta' sampe'a epate'e." 
Genesis4:16 Kain laju ondur dhari ajunanna PANGERAN, pas enneng e tana Nod, e temoranna Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Kain ban binena andhi' ana' lalake' se enyamae Henokh. Saellana jareya Kain laju maddek kottha se enyamae Henokh, epapadha ban nyamana ana'na." 
Genesis4:18 Henokh andhi' ana' Irad. Irad andhi' ana' Mehuya'el, ban Mehuya'el andhi' ana' Metusa'el, ban Metusa'el andhi' ana' Lamekh." 
Genesis4:19 Lamekh andhi' bine dhadhuwa', Ada ban Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada andhi' ana' Yabal. Yabal jareya se daddi bangatowana bangsa se meyara ebin ban abengko e dhalem kemah. 
Genesis4:21 Yabal andhi' ale' nyamana Yubal; toronanna Yubal jareya se daddi tokang soleng ban tokang maen calempong. 
Genesis4:22 Zila andhi' ana' nyamana Tubal-Kain; toronanna Tubal-Kain daddi pandhi se agabay rang-barang dhari dimbaga ban besse. Tubal-Kain andhi' ale' babine', nyamana Na'ama." 
Genesis4:23 Lamekh ngoca' ka binena se kadhuwa, “Ada ban Zila, mara edhingngagi. Sengko' mate'e oreng lalake' dha-ngodha, polana sengko' epokol bi' oreng jareya, sampe' sengko' loka." 
Genesis4:24 Mon oreng kapetto epate'e oreng menangka babalessa matena Kain, bakal badha'a oreng pettong polo petto' se kodu epate'e mon sengko' epate'e oreng.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adam ban Hawa kaagungan Pottra lalake' pole. Ca'na se bine', “Allah apareng ana' lalake' pole ka sengko', gantena Habil se epate'e Kain.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Set." 
Genesis4:26 Set andhi' ana' lalake' se enyamae Enos. E bakto jareya oreng molae nyebbut asmana PANGERAN menangka baktena oreng ka Salerana. 
Genesis5:1 Areya' dhaftarra toronanna Adam. (E bakto Allah nyepta'agi manossa, manossa jareya epamerep Salerana." 
Genesis5:2 Se ecepta'agi lalake' ban babine', laju eberkadi sarta eparenge nyama “manossa”.)" 
Genesis5:3 E bakto aomor saratos tello polo taon Adam kaagungan pottra lalake' se merep salerana, nyamana Set." 
Genesis5:4 Saellana jareya Adam gi' odhi' ballung atos taon aggi' sarta kaagungan pottra lalake' ban babine' laenna pole. 
Genesis5:5 Adam seda e bakto aomor sangang atos tello polo taon. 
Genesis5:6 E bakto aomor saratos lema' taon Set andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Enos. 
Genesis5:7 Saellana jareya Set gi' odhi' ballung atos petto' taon aggi' sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole. 
Genesis5:8 Set mate e bakto aomor sangang atos dhubellas taon. 
Genesis5:9 E bakto aomor sangang polo taon Enos andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Kenan. 
Genesis5:10 Saellana jareya Enos gi' odhi' ballung atos lema bellas taon aggi' sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole. 
Genesis5:11 Enos mate e bakto aomor sangang atos lema' taon. 
Genesis5:12 E bakto aomor pettong polo taon Kenan andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Mahalale'el. 
Genesis5:13 Saellana jareya Kenan gi' odhi' ballung atos pa' polo taon aggi' sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole. 
Genesis5:14 Kenan mate e bakto aomor sangang atos sapolo taon. 
Genesis5:15 E bakto aomor sabidak lema' taon Mahalale'el andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Yared. 
Genesis5:16 Saellana jareya Mahalale'el gi' odhi' ballung atos tello polo taon aggi', sarta andhi' ana', lalake' ban babine' laenna pole." 
Genesis5:17 Mahalale'el mate e bakto aomor ballung atos sangang polo lema' taon. 
Genesis5:18 E bakto aomor saratos sabidak dhuwa' taon Yared andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Henokh. 
Genesis5:19 Saellana jareya Yared gi' odhi' ballung atos taon aggi', sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole." 
Genesis5:20 Yared mate e bakto aomor sangang atos sabidak dhuwa' taon. 
Genesis5:21 E bakto aomor sabidak lema' taon Henokh andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Metusalah. 
Genesis5:22 Saellana jareya Henokh gi' odhi' esto ka Allah tello ratos taon aggi', sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole." 
Genesis5:23 Daddi Henokh odhi' sampe' aomor tello ratos sabidak lema' taon. 
Genesis5:24 Sarrena salanjangnga odhi' esto ka Allah, Henokh laju elang epondhut bi' Allah." 
Genesis5:25 E bakto aomor saratos ballung polo petto' taon Metusalah andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Lamekh. 
Genesis5:26 Saellana jareya Metusalah gi' odhi' pettong atos ballung polo dhuwa' taon aggi', sarta andhi' ana' babine' ban lalake' laenna pole." 
Genesis5:27 Metusalah mate e bakto aomor sangang atos sabidak sanga' taon. 
Genesis5:28 E bakto aomor saratos ballung polo dhuwa' taon Lamekh andhi' ana' lalake'. 
Genesis5:29 Ca'na Lamekh, “Kana' reya bakal daddiya panglepor ate ka sengko' sabala e bakto alako berra' agarap tana se la ebasto bi' PANGERAN.” Daddi kana' jareya bi' Lamekh enyamae Ennoh." 
Genesis5:30 Saellana jareya Lamekh gi' odhi' lema ratos sangang polo lema' taon aggi', sarta andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' laenna pole." 
Genesis5:31 Lamekh mate e bakto aomor pettong atos pettong polo petto' taon. 
Genesis5:32 Saellana aomor lema ratos taon Ennoh andhi' ana' lalake' katello, iya areya Sem, Ham ban Yafet." 
Genesis6:1 Saellana manossa reya atamba bannya' e bume, sarta alahirragi ana' babine' sabannya'na," 
Genesis6:2 lok-mahlok Illahi nangale'e ja' babine'an jareya din-raddin. Daddi pas padha mele bang-sebang, se ekaleburi, laju ekabine." 
Genesis6:3 PANGERAN adhabu, “Bi' Sengko' manossa reya ta' epaodhi'a salanjangnga, sabab manossa reya mahlok se ta' langgeng. Molae dhari sateya omorra manossa reya bi' Sengko' ta' epalebbiya dhari saratos dhu polo taon.”" 
Genesis6:4 E jaman jareya, bariya keya e jaman saellana jareya, e bume reya badha reng-oreng se badanna talebat raja ban talebat kowat, jareya toronanna babine'anna manossa ollena ban lok-mahlok Illahi gella'. Reng-oreng jareya kaetong oreng se kowat tor bangalan, pahlawan se kasohor." 
Genesis6:5 E naleka PANGERAN ngoladi ja' manossa e bume reya sajan atamba kajahadanna, ban pekkeranna ros-terrosan juba'," 
Genesis6:6 Salerana laju arassa kasta se abadhi manossa sarta nyaba' manossa jareya e bume. Panggaliyanna ce' kocebana. 
Genesis6:7 Sampe' adhabu kantha reya, “Sengko' ce' kastana nyepta'agi manossa ban no'-mano' sarta ban-keban laenna reya. Daddi sateya bi' Sengko' epatompessa kabbi.”" 
Genesis6:8 Tape Ennoh ekaneserre bi' PANGERAN. 
Genesis6:9 Areya' caretana Ennoh. Ennoh reya kaagungan pottra katello, nyamana Sem, Ham ban Yafet. Ennoh ta' tao agabay sala, ban e jaman jareya pera' Ennoh malolo se teppa' tengka gulina. Orengnga alem." 
Genesis6:10  
Genesis6:11 Tape reng-oreng laenna monggu ka pangoladanna Allah padha juba' tengkana, ban e man-dhimman padha jem-kejjem." 
Genesis6:12 Allah ngoladi ka dunnya reya, ban ngagali ja' dunnya reya rosak, sabab manossana padha juba' kabbi odhi'na." 
Genesis6:13 Allah adhabu ka Ennoh, “Sengko' la motossagi mamosna'a manossa reya kabbi. Bi' Sengko' epatompessa epatadha'a karena, sabab bume reya possa' bi' kakejjemmanna manossa jareya." 
Genesis6:14 Kassa' ba'na agabay parao dhari kaju se bagus, pobuwi keng-pangkeng; bagiyan lowar ban bagiyan dhalemma kole'e ban pakal." 
Genesis6:15 Lanjangnga kagabay saratos tello polo tello meter, lebarra dhu lekor meter, ban tenggina tello bellas meter." 
Genesis6:16 Parao jareya pasange ata'; e antarana ata' ban bagiyan erengnga parao jareya ella'e pa' polo empa' sentimeter. Parao jareya pasoson tello', e bagiyan erengnga pasange labang settong." 
Genesis6:17 Sengko' madhatengnga banjir ka bume reya sopaja mahlok se odhi' padha'a mate kabbi. Sabarang se badha e bume reya bakal mateya kabbi. 
Genesis6:18 Tape Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan ban ba'na. Ba'na ban binena, ban na'-ana'na sarta binena na'-ana'na, maso' kabbi ka dhalem parao jareya." 
Genesis6:19 Ba'na kodu ngeba keya samacemma keban ban samacemma mano' sajudhu ebang, pamaso' ka parao jareya, me' olle gi' badha se odhi'." 
Genesis6:20  
Genesis6:21 Ja' kaloppae ngeba sango, apa'a bai se ekakana ba'na ban sakabbinna se noro' ba'na e parao jareya.”" 
Genesis6:22 Ennoh alampa'agi sabarang se epakonnagi bi' Allah jareya. 
Genesis7:1 PANGERAN adhabu ka Ennoh, “Sengko' tao ja' pera' ba'na manossa se ajalannagi Tang parenta. Daddi kassa' ba'na ban saessena bengkona maso' ka parao rowa." 
Genesis7:2 Giba keya samacemma mano' ban samacemma keban se halal pettong judhu ebang, dineng keban se haram sajudhu ebang bai. Parlona sopaja samacemma keban ban mano' ta' sampe'a mate kabbi, me' olle badha se pas adhu'-budhu' e bume." 
Genesis7:3  
Genesis7:4 Pettong are aggi' Sengko' matorona ojan se ta' kera badha terrangnga pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda, sopaja lok-mahlok se odhi' se ecepta'agi Sengko' padha'a tompes kabbi.”" 
Genesis7:5 Ennoh alampa'agi sakabbinna papakonna PANGERAN jareya. 
Genesis7:6 E bakto banjir jareya dhateng, yuswana Ennoh nem atos taon." 
Genesis7:7 Ennoh ban rajina, ban tra-pottrana sarta binena tra-pottrana, laju padha maso' ka dhalem paraona sopaja salamedda dhari banjir jareya." 
Genesis7:8 Samacemma mano' ban keban, se halal ban se haram, dhu-sajudhu ebang" 
Genesis7:9 maso' ka parao jareya abareng Ennoh, akantha se edhabuwagi Allah ka Ennoh." 
Genesis7:10 Saellana olle pettong are dhari jareya, bume topo ban banjir." 
Genesis7:11 E naleka yuswana Ennoh la nem atos taon, e tanggal petto bellas bulan dhuwa', somberra aeng se badha e dhalem bume reya leddu' kabbi, jalanna aeng e langnge' padha beddhul." 
Genesis7:12 Ojan toron, abidda pa' polo are pa' polo malem." 
Genesis7:13 E are jareya keya, Ennoh ban rajina maso' ka paraona, abareng ban pottrana se katello, iya areya Sem, Ham ban Yafet sarta binena pottrana se katello jareya." 
Genesis7:14 Samacemma mano' ban keban, se epeyara oreng ban se odhi' e alas, se raja otaba se kene', epamaso' ka parao jareya." 
Genesis7:15 Lok-mahlok se odhi' jareya maso' dhu-sajudhu ka dhalem paraona, abareng ban Ennoh," 
Genesis7:16 menorot se epakonnagi Allah ka Ennoh. Saellana kabbi padha maso', labangnga parao jareya laju ekanceng bi' PANGERAN." 
Genesis7:17 Banjirra terros ta' nyorot sampe' pa' polo are; aengnga ongga sampe' parao jareya ngambang. 
Genesis7:18 Aengnga sajan tenggi, ban parao jareya ajalan egiba aeng." 
Genesis7:19 Aengnga sajan tenggi sampe' nong-gunong se paleng tenggi nyellem ta' etangale'e. 
Genesis7:20 Aeng jareya gi' terros atamba tenggi sampe' pettong meter e attasanna konco'na nong-gunong. 
Genesis7:21 Mahlok se odhi' e bume padha mate kabbi, epatompes bi' Allah: manossa, keban ban no'-mano' tadha' karena. Se gi' odhi' coma Ennoh ban reng-oreng sarta ban-keban se badha e parao jareya." 
Genesis7:22  
Genesis7:23  
Genesis7:24 Aeng jareya paggun ta' endha' nyorot sampe' saratos saeket are abidda. 
Genesis8:1 Allah emot ka Ennoh ban sakabbinna keban se badha e paraona, laju madhateng angen; daddi aeng pas molae nyorot." 
Genesis8:2 Somberra aeng e dhalem bume ban jalanna aeng e langnge' etotop kabbi, daddi ojanna se derres laju terrang;" 
Genesis8:3 banjir jareya nyorot saellana olle saratos saeket are. 
Genesis8:4 E tanggal petto bellas bulan petto' parao jareya kandhas e sala settongnga konco'na pagunongan Ararat. 
Genesis8:5 Aeng sajan nyorot terros, ban e tanggal settong bulan sapolo, konco'na nong-gunong molae katon." 
Genesis8:6 Saellana olle pa' polo are abidda, Ennoh mokka' candhelana parao jareya settong," 
Genesis8:7 laju ngocol mano' dhangdhang settong. Dhangdhang jareya ta' abali pole, terros ngabber adel-peddel sampe' aengnga banjir jareya asat." 
Genesis8:8 Sabatara jareya Ennoh ngocol dara, terro ngagaliya apa banjirra la asat." 
Genesis8:9 Tape sarrena tana gi' katotoban aeng, dara jareya ta' nemmo panengga'an, laju abali ka paraona; Ennoh makalowar astana dhari candhelana paraona, darana pas nongko' ka astana jareya, laju epamaso' ka paraona." 
Genesis8:10 Ennoh anante' pettong are aggi', pas ngocol pole dara gella'." 
Genesis8:11 E baja sar-asar dara jareya abali, ngeba dhaunna jaitun se cengngar e cocco'na. Daddi Ennoh ngagali ja' banjirra la nyorot." 
Genesis8:12 Ennoh anante' pettong are aggi', darana pas eocol pole; dara jareya tadha' abali." 
Genesis8:13 E naleka yuswana Ennoh nem atos settong taon, e tanggal settong bulan settong, aeng la asat onggu. Ennoh mokka' ata'na paraona, ngoladi san-kassannagi, laju ngagali ja' tana la molae kerreng." 
Genesis8:14 E tanggal petto lekor bulan dhuwa' bume reya la ce' kerrengnga. 
Genesis8:15 Allah adhabu ka Ennoh," 
Genesis8:16 “Mara sateya ba'na ban binena, na'-ana'na ba'na ban binena na'-ana'na jareya kalowar dhari paraona." 
Genesis8:17 Pakalowar no'-mano' ban kebanna kabbi, me' olle padha adhu'-budhu' mossa'e bume.”" 
Genesis8:18 Daddi Ennoh laju kalowar dhari paraona, abareng ban rajina, tra-pottrana ban binena tra-pottrana jareya." 
Genesis8:19 Bariya keya keban ban no'-mano' padha kalowar dhari parao jareya abareng ban bangsana bang-sebang. 
Genesis8:20 Ennoh laju abadhi mezba kaangguy kennengnganna kabakteyan ka PANGERAN. Saellana jareya laju mondhut no'-mano' sarta ban-keban laenna se halal, eatorragi ka PANGERAN menangka kurban obbaran e attassa mezba jareya." 
Genesis8:21 Bauna tor-ator jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. PANGERAN adhabu e dhalem panggaliyanna, “Sengko' ta' abastowa bume reya pole pera' polana kasala'anna manossa, maske Sengko' tao ja' molae gi' kene' manossa reya la juba' pekkeranna. Sengko' ta' mateyana sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' e bume reya pole akantha se gi' buru reya." 
Genesis8:22 Saabidda bume reya gi' badha, bakal terrosa badha mosemma oreng namen ban mosem anye, mosem cellep ban mosem panas, mosem nemor ban mosem nembara', seyang ban malem.”" 
Genesis9:1 Saellana jareya Allah laju aberkadi Ennoh ban tra-pottrana, sarta pas adhabu, “Mara ana'-rana' pabannya', sopaja na' potona ba'na mossa'e bume reya." 
Genesis9:2 Keban, no'-mano' e bang-abang ban juko' e dhalem aeng bakal tako'a kabbi ka ba'na. Jareya kabbi bi' Sengko' epassra'agiya ka dhalem kakobasa'anna ba'na." 
Genesis9:3 Ban-keban jareya kabbi, sarta bu-tombuwan se biru, bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na, gabay kakanna." 
Genesis9:4 Coma daging se gi' badha dharana ta' olle kakan, sabab e dhalem dhara jareya gi' badha nyabana mahlok se odhi'." 
Genesis9:5 Mon badha oreng mate'e oreng laen, oreng se mate'e jareya bi' Sengko' eokoma. Keban se mate'e manossa bi' Sengko' eokoma mate keya." 
Genesis9:6 Sengko' agabay manossa epamerep ban Sengko' dibi'; daddi pa'-sapa'a mate'e oreng, oreng jareya bakal epateyana oreng keya." 
Genesis9:7 Mara ba'na ana'-rana' pabannya', sopaja na' potona ba'na mossa'ana bume reya.”" 
Genesis9:8 Allah adhabu ka Ennoh ban ka tra-pottrana," 
Genesis9:9 “Sateya Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan ban ba'na sarta ban na' potona ba'na," 
Genesis9:10 bariya keya ban sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' se abareng ba'na, iya areya sakabbinna mano', ebin ban keban se kalowar abareng ban ba'na dhari parao reya." 
Genesis9:11 Tang parjanjiyan ban ba'na kantha reya: Sengko' ajanji ja' molae dhari sateya reya mahlok se odhi' e bume reya bi' Sengko' ta' epatompessa bi' banjir akantha se sateya reya pole, ta' bakal badha'a pole banjir se marosaga saantero bume.”" 
Genesis9:12 Allah pas adhabu pole, “Menangka tandhana Tang parjanjiyan se langgeng ban ba'na, ban sakabbinna mahlok se odhi'," 
Genesis9:13 Sengko' nyaba'a Tang gandhiba e langnge', menangka tandhana Tang parjanjiyan ban dunnya." 
Genesis9:14 Mon Sengko' madhateng ondhem se notobi langnge', sarta pas badha andhang se etangale'e e langnge' jareya," 
Genesis9:15 Sengko' bakal enga'a ka Tang janji ka ba'na ban ka sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' ja' Sengko' ta' madhatengnga banjir se matompes sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' e bume reya pole. 
Genesis9:16 Mon badha andhang e ondhem, Sengko' tanto nangale'e andhang jareya, ban Sengko' bakal ngenga'ana parjanjiyan se langgeng e antarana Sengko' ban sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' e bume reya." 
Genesis9:17 Jareya tandhana Tang parjanjiyan bi' sakabbinna mahlok se odhi' e bume reya.” 
Genesis9:18 Tra-pottrana Ennoh se kalowar dhari parao rowa iya areya Sem, Ham ban Yafet. (Ham reya eppa'na Kana'an.)" 
Genesis9:19 Pottrana Ennoh se katello jareya se noronnagi manossa se mencar daddi sabume reya. 
Genesis9:20 Ennoh daddi oreng tane, kaetong oreng se atane anggur dha'-adha' kadibi'." 
Genesis9:21 E settong are, samarena adha'ar aengnga anggur, Ennoh mabu', pas asaren abangkang e kemahna." 
Genesis9:22 E bakto Ham, eppa'na Kana'an nangale'e eppa'na, pas ecareta'agi ka tan-taretanna se badha e lowar." 
Genesis9:23 Sem ban Yafet ngala' juba se ebarbar e budhiyanna balikadda, eteggu' ekadhuwai dhari bauna bang-sebang, laju ajalan nyorot maso' ka kemah se ekennengnge eppa'na. Jubana laju esapo'agi ka eppa'na; se masang ta' addhep ka eppa'na sopaja ta' nangaleya ka eppa'na se abangkang." 
Genesis9:24 Saellana Ennoh emot dhari mabu'na, sarta meyarsa tengkana pottra bungsona ka salerana," 
Genesis9:25 laju adhabu, “Mandar ta' salamedda ba'na, Kana'an! Ba'na bakal daddiya dunorra tan-taretanna." 
Genesis9:26 Poji PANGERAN, Allahna Sem! Kana'an bakal daddiya dunorra Sem." 
Genesis9:27 Moga-moga Allah namba'ana berkadda ka Yafet kalaban malebar kennengnganna. Moga-moga toronanna apolonga ban toronanna Sem. Tape Kana'an bakal daddiya dunorra Yafet.” 
Genesis9:28 Saellana banjir jareya Ennoh gi' odhi' tello ratos saeket taon aggi'. 
Genesis9:29 Ennoh seda e bakto yuswana sangang atos saeket taon. 
Genesis10:1 Areya' toronanna Sem, Yafet ban Ham, tra-pottrana Ennoh. Samarena banjir, se katello jareya andhi' ana' lalake'." 
Genesis10:2 Na'-ana'na Yafet iya areya Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yawan, Tubal, Mesekh ban Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 Toronanna Gomer iya areya oreng Askenas, Rifat ban Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Toronanna Yawan iya areya oreng Elisa, Spanyol, Siprus ban Rodes." 
Genesis10:5 Jareya bangatowana sa-bangsa se badha e salanjangnga paseser ban e lo-polo. Jareya kabbi toronanna Yafet, saneyap bangsa ban suku neng e nagarana bang-sebang, sarta andhi' basa bi'-dibi'." 
Genesis10:6 Na'-ana'na Ham iya areya Kus, Messer, Libiya ban Kana'an." 
Genesis10:7 Toronanna Kus iya areya Seba, Hawila, Sabta, Ra'ema ban Sabtekha. Toronanna Ra'ema iya areya oreng Syeba ban Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Kus andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Nimrod, se daddi oreng se dha'-adha' kadibi' neggu' kakobasa'an e dunnya, se matellok sa-bangsa." 
Genesis10:9 Kalaban partolonganna PANGERAN Nimrod daddi panganjur raja. Daddi oreng seggut ngoca', “Moga-moga bi' PANGERAN ba'na epadaddiya panganjur raja akantha Nimrod.”" 
Genesis10:10 Dha'-adha'na se tamaso' karaja'anna iya areya Babil, Erekh ban Akad, se padha tamaso' Babilonia." 
Genesis10:11 Dhari jadhiya Nimrod entar ka Asyur, pas maddek kottha Niniwe, Rehobot-Ir, Kalah," 
Genesis10:12 ban Resen se badha e antarana Niniwe ban Kalah. Jareya padha kottha raja kabbi. 
Genesis10:13 Toronanna Messer iya areya oreng Lidiya, Anamim, Lehabim, Naftuhim," 
Genesis10:14 Patrusim, Kasluhim ban Kaftorim. Bangsa Kasluhim jareya bangatowana bangsa Filistin." 
Genesis10:15 Na'-ana'na Kana'an iya areya Sidon se sareyang, ban Het." 
Genesis10:16 Kana'an jareya tamaso' keya bangatowana bangsa Yebusi, Amori, Girgasi," 
Genesis10:17 oreng Hewi, Arki, Sini," 
Genesis10:18 oreng Arwadi, Semari ban Hamati. Ku-suku Kana'an jareya pas mencar ka man-dhimman." 
Genesis10:19 Dhaerana oreng Kana'an jareya atamba lebar dhari Sidon ka lao', ka Gerar sampe' ka seddi'na Gaza, ka temor ka Sodom, Gomora, Adma ban Zebo'im sampe' ka seddi'na Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Jareya kabbi toronanna Ham. Saneyap bangsa ban suku padha neng e nagarana bang-sebang, sarta padha andhi' basa bi'-dibi'." 
Genesis10:21 Sem, kaka'na Yafet, jareya bangatowana bangsa Ibrani." 
Genesis10:22 Na'-ana'na Sem iya areya Elam, Asyur, Arpakhsad, Lud ban Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Toronanna Aram iya areya oreng Us, Hul, Geter ban Mas." 
Genesis10:24 Arpakhsad andhi' ana' Selah, ban Selah andhi' ana' Eber." 
Genesis10:25 Eber andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa; se sareyang nyamana Peleg, polana e jamanna sa-bangsa aca-pecca; se bungso nyamana Yoktan." 
Genesis10:26 Toronanna Yoktan reya oreng Almodad, Selef, Hazar-Mawet ban Yerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Uzal, Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimail, Syeba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofir, Hawila ban Yobab. Jareya kabbi toronanna Yoktan." 
Genesis10:30 Dhaera kennengnganna reng-oreng jareya malanjang dhari Mesa sampe' ka Sefar, iya areya tana pagunongan e bagiyan temor." 
Genesis10:31 Jareya kabbi toronanna Sem. Saneyap bangsa ban suku padha neng e nagarana bang-sebang, sarta padha andhi' basa bi'-dibi'." 
Genesis10:32 Jareya kabbi toronanna Ennoh, menorot garissa toronanna bang-sebang. Reng-oreng jareya se noronnagi sa-bangsa e dunnya reya saellana banjir raja rowa." 
Genesis11:1 Dha'-adha'na manossa e dunnya reya pera' andhi' settong basa sarta padha oca'na. 
Genesis11:2 E bakto reng-oreng jareya alalana ka temor, laju napa' ka settong tana e Babilonia, tana jareya laju ekennengnge." 
Genesis11:3 E settong are reng-oreng jareya ngoca' kantha reya, “Mara ja' agabaya bata, pas obbar pagali.” Reng-oreng jareya pas agabay bata, ekagabaya bengko, sarta agabay etter se egabay panyekka'na to-bato jareya." 
Genesis11:4 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya pole, “Sateya mara ja' maddegga kottha, pobuwi manara se tenggina napa' ka langnge', sopaja sengko' ban ba'na bisa'a kasohor ban ta' sa-tapesa pole e bume reya.”" 
Genesis11:5 PANGERAN toron ngoladi kottha ban manara gabayanna manossa jareya," 
Genesis11:6 pas adhabu, “Reng-oreng reya asalla dhari settong bangsa se pera' ngangguy settong basa; areya coma parmola'anna sabarang se bakal elakonana reng-oreng jareya. Ta' saapa pole abidda reng-oreng jareya bakal bisa'a ngalakone apa'a bai se ekaterrowe." 
Genesis11:7 Daddi mara ja' torona, basana reng-oreng jareya pasalbut sampe' oreng se settong ta' ngarte ka cacana oreng settonga.”" 
Genesis11:8 Daddi bi' PANGERAN reng-oreng jareya epasalebbudan ka saantero bume. Se maddek kottha ta' epaterros. 
Genesis11:9 Jareya sababba arapa kottha jareya me' sampe' sateya enyamae Babil, sabab e jadhiya PANGERAN masalbut basana manossa, ban dhari jadhiya sa-bangsa padha asalebbudan ka sabingkerra bume." 
Genesis11:10 Areya' toronanna Sem. Dhu taon saellana banjir raja rowa, e bakto aomor saratos taon, Sem andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Arpakhsad." 
Genesis11:11 Saellana jareya Sem gi' odhi' lema ratos taon aggi' sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole. 
Genesis11:12 E bakto aomor tello polo lema' taon Arpakhsad andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Selah. 
Genesis11:13 Saellana jareya Arpakhsad gi' odhi' pa' ratos tello' taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:14 E bakto aomor tello polo taon Selah andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Eber. 
Genesis11:15 Saellana jareya Selah gi' odhi' pa' ratos tello taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:16 E bakto aomor tello polo empa' taon Eber andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Peleg. 
Genesis11:17 Saellana jareya Eber gi' odhi' pa' ratos tello polo taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:18 E bakto aomor tello polo taon, Peleg andhi' ana' lalake', nyamana Rehu." 
Genesis11:19 Saellana jareya Peleg gi' odhi' dhu ratos sangang taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:20 E bakto aomor tello polo dhuwa' taon Rehu andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Serug. 
Genesis11:21 Saellana jareya Rehu gi' odhi' dhu ratos petto' taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:22 E bakto aomor tello polo taon Serug andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Nahor. 
Genesis11:23 Saellana jareya Serug gi' odhi' dhu ratos taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:24 E bakto aomor sangang lekor taon Nahor andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Terah. 
Genesis11:25 Saellana jareya Nahor gi' odhi' saratos sangang bellas taon aggi', sarta gi' andhi' ana' lalake' ban babine' en-laenna pole." 
Genesis11:26 E bakto aomor pettong polo taon Terah andhi' ana' lalake' katello, iya areya Abram, Nahor ban Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Areya' toronanna Terah, iya areya eppa'na Abram, Nahor ban Haran. Haran andhi' ana' lalake', nyamana Lud." 
Genesis11:28 Haran mate e tana kalahiranna, iya areya e Ur e Babilonia, e bakto jareya eppa'na gi' odhi'." 
Genesis11:29 Abram araji Sarai, ban Nahor araji Milka ana'na Haran. Haran gi' andhi' ana' lalake' laen, nyamana Yiska." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai jareya jubeng, ta' bisa kaagungan pottra." 
Genesis11:31 Terah ngalle dhari Ur e Babilonia abareng ban Abram pottrana, Lud bajana, sarta Sarai mantona, iya areya rajina Abram. Maksodda ngalleya ka Kana'an. Tape sanapa'na ka Haran pas ambu sarta laju ako-bengko e jadhiya." 
Genesis11:32 Terah seda e jadhiya e bakto yuswana dhu ratos lema' taon. 
Genesis12:1 PANGERAN adhabu ka Abram, “Dina'agi nagarana ba'na jareya, bariya keya la-balana ban bengkona eppa'na, pas mangkat ka nagara laen se bi' Sengko' eduduwagiya ka ba'na." 
Genesis12:2 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana na' poto sabannya'na, ban na' potona ba'na bakal daddiya bangsa raja. Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberkadana, ban nyamana epakalonta'a, ban ba'na bakal madhatengnga berkat ka oreng laenna." 
Genesis12:3 Sengko' aberkadana reng-oreng se aberkadi ba'na, ban abastowa reng-oreng se abasto ba'na. Ban polana ba'na, Sengko' aberkadana sakabbinna bangsa e bume reya.”" 
Genesis12:4 Daddi Abram laju mangkat dhari Haran menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. Lud noro' keya. E bakto jareya yuswana Abram pettong polo lema' taon. 
Genesis12:5 Abram abakta rajina se anyama Sarai, ponakanna se anyama Lud, bariya keya sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na ban nor-dunorra se ollena makompol e Haran. Abram sabalana laju mangkat ka tana Kana'an. Sanapa'na ka Kana'an" 
Genesis12:6 Abram meyos san-kassannagi e nagara jareya, sampe' napa' ka settong kajuwan se karamat e Moreh, iya areya kennengnganna oreng ajalannagi kabakteyan e Sikhem. (E bakto jareya nagara jareya gi' ekennengnge oreng Kana'an.)" 
Genesis12:7 PANGERAN ngaton ka Abram pas adhabu, “Nagara reya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na sana'potona.” Abram pas abadhi mezba e jadhiya, eatorragi ka PANGERAN se ngaton ka salerana jareya." 
Genesis12:8 Saellana jareya Abram meyos terros ka lao', ka bagiyan se bannya' gunongnga e temoranna kottha Betel. E jadhiya Abram laju maddek kemah e bagiyan se badha e temorra Betel ban e bara'na kottha Ai. Laen dhari jareya Abram abadhi keya mezba sarta pas abakte ka PANGERAN." 
Genesis12:9 Saellana jareya Abram laju nerrossagi parjalananna dhari settong kennengngan ka kennengngan laenna ka tana Negeb e bagiyan lao'na Kana'an. 
Genesis12:10 E bakto e Kana'an badha laep raja, Abram laju meyos dha' lao' sampe' napa' ka Messer, maksodda ngongseya sampe' laep jareya mare." 
Genesis12:11 E bakto napa' ka batessa Messer, Abram adhabu ka Sarai, rajina, “Ba'na reya raddin, le'." 
Genesis12:12 Mon oreng Messer nangale'e ba'na, tanto padha nyangka ja' ba'na tang bine, sengko' tanto pas epate'e, tape ba'na ta' epama-baramma." 
Genesis12:13 Daddi ba'na ngako tang ale' bai, sopaja polana ngabas ba'na sengko' ta' epate'e ban etarema kalaban bagus.”" 
Genesis12:14 Bendher onggu, saellana maso' ka Messer, reng-oreng Messer nangale'e ja' Sarai reya ce' raddinna." 
Genesis12:15 Ba-ponggaba karaton se nangale'e Sarai jareya mator ka ratona ja' rajina Abram jareya ce' raddinna; daddi Sarai pas egiba ngadhep ka karaton. 
Genesis12:16 Rato Messer narema Abram kalaban bagus polana terro ka babine' jareya. Abram eparenge dumba ban embi', sape ban hemar, onta ban nor-dunor lalake'an ban babine'an." 
Genesis12:17 Tape polana Sarai ekabine rato, PANGERAN madhateng panyaket se nako'e, se ekenneng panyaket jareya iya areya rato ban reng-oreng se badha e karaton." 
Genesis12:18 Abram edikane bi' rato. Dhabuna rato ka Abram, “Ba'na reya baramma? Me' ta' abala ja' babine' reya binena ba'na?" 
Genesis12:19 Arapa bi' ba'na me' eako taretanna sampe' ekabine bi' sengko'? Sateya, reya' giba binena, pas ondur dhari dhinna'.”" 
Genesis12:20 Rato makon ba-ponggabana ngaterragi Abram kalowar dhari nagarana, abareng ban rajina sarta abakta sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na." 
Genesis13:1 Abram ngalle dhari Messer meyos ka dhaja ka Tana Negeb e bagiyan lao'na Kana'an asareng ban rajina sarta abakta dhi'-andhi'na, Lud noro' ngalle keya." 
Genesis13:2 Abram ce' sogina; bannya' dumba ban embi'na, sape, emmas ban salaka." 
Genesis13:3 Abram alomampa dhari kennengngan se settong ka kennengngan laenna, dhari Tana Negeb sampe' ka Betel; pas ambu e antarana Betel ban Ai, se sabellunna jareya bi' salerana tao ekennengnge maddek kemahna," 
Genesis13:4 ban ebadhiyagi mezba. E jadhiya Abram abakte ka PANGERAN. 
Genesis13:5 Lud se abareng ban Abram jareya andhi' dumba, sape ban kemah keya." 
Genesis13:6 Tape tana jareya ta' cokop mon ekadhuwai, sabab ebinna se kadhuwa jareya talebat bannya'na." 
Genesis13:7 Daddi oreng se ngowan ebinna Abram seggut atokar ban oreng se ngowan ebinna Lud. (E bakto jareya tana jareya gi' ekennengnge bangsa Kana'an ban bangsa Feris.) 
Genesis13:8 Daddi Abram adhabu ka Lud, “Sengko' ban ba'na reya sabala'an, daddi ta' becce' mon reng-oreng se alako ka sengko' atokaran ban reng-oreng se alako ka ba'na." 
Genesis13:9 Daddi lebbi becce' mara ba'na ban sengko' apesa bai. Mara ba'na se mele. Mon ba'na ngennengngana bagiyan kacer, sengko' ennengnga e bagiyan kangan, mon ba'na ngennengngana bagiyan kangan, sengko' ennengnga e kacer.”" 
Genesis13:10 Lud ngabas ka sakalenglengnga laju nangale'e ja' Cora Yordan, sampe' ka kottha Zowar bannya' aengnga kabbi, padha ban Bun-kebbunanna PANGERAN, padha ban tana Messer. (Kantha jareya kabadha'anna sabellunna PANGERAN mamosna Sodom ban Gomora.)" 
Genesis13:11 Daddi Lud mele sakabbinna Cora Yordan, pas ngalle ka temor. Se kadhuwa jareya laju apesa." 
Genesis13:12 Abram paggun alenggi e Kana'an, dineng Lud paggun neng e antarana tha-kottha e Cora Yordan jareya, akemah e seddi'anna Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Dineng kottha Sodom reya ekennengnge reng-oreng se talebat jahadda ban bannya' dusana ka PANGERAN. 
Genesis13:14 Saellana Lud ngalle apesa ban Abram, PANGERAN adhabu ka Abram, “Kodda' ba'na ngabas ka sakalenglengnga, dhari kennengnganna ba'na se manjeng jareya." 
Genesis13:15 Nagara se etangale'e ba'na jareya bi' Sengko' ebagiya kabbi ka ba'na ban ka na' potona ba'na sopaja daddiya andhi'na ba'na ban na' potona saterrossa. 
Genesis13:16 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana na' poto se talebat bannya'na, sampe' ta' ekenneng bitong. Akantha bannya'na abu e bume se ta' ekenneng bitong oreng, kantha jareya bannya'na na' potona ba'na." 
Genesis13:17 Sateya kassa' entare bagiyanna nagara reya kabbi, sabab tana jareya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na.”" 
Genesis13:18 Daddi Abram laju ngalle parkemahanna, pas neptep e seddi'anna ka'-bungka'an se karamat kennengnganna kabakteyan e Mamre e seddi'na Hebron; e jadhiya Abram abadhi mezba se eatorragi ka PANGERAN." 
Genesis14:1 Badha rato kaempa, iya areya Rato Amrafel dhari Babilonia, Rato Ariyokh dhari Elasar, Rato Kedorlaomer dhari Elam, ban Rato Tideyal dhari Goyim." 
Genesis14:2 To-rato jareya aperrang ban rato laenna se kalema bannya'na, iya areya: Rato Bera dhari Sodom, Rato Birsya dhari Gomora, Rato Syinab dhari Adma, Rato Syemeber dhari Zebo'im, ban rato nagara Bela se esebbut keya nagara Zowar." 
Genesis14:3 Rato se kalema jareya areng-bareng makompol tantarana e Cora Sidim, se sateya enyamae Tase' Mate." 
Genesis14:4 Ra-nagara jareya ekobasae Rato Kedorlaomer dhubellas taon abidda, tape e taon se kapeng tello bellas padha aberonta' kabbi." 
Genesis14:5 E taon se kapeng pa' bellas, Kedorlaomer ban tu-sakutuna dhateng ngeba tantarana, bangsa Refa'im epakala e Asyterot-Karna'im, bangsa Zuzim e Ham, bangsa Emin e Syawe-Kiryata'im," 
Genesis14:6 ban bangsa Hori e pagunongan Edom. Sa-bangsa jareya eserser terros sampe' napa' gan Elparan e penggirra sagara beddhi. 
Genesis14:7 Saellana jareya reng-oreng se nyerser gella' padha abali ka En-Mispat se sateya enyamae Kades, ban makala sakabbinna dhaerana bangsa Amalek, bariya keya bangsa Amori se neng e Hazezon-Tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Saellana jareya rato Sodom, rato Gomora, rato Adma, rato Zebo'im, ban rato Bela se esebbut keya Zowar ngator tantarana e Cora Sidim," 
Genesis14:9 laju aperrang ban Rato Kedorlaomer dhari Elam, Rato Tideyal dhari Goyim, Rato Amrafel dhari Babilonia, ban Rato Ariyokh dhari Elasar; daddi rato kalema ngadhebbi rato kaempa." 
Genesis14:10 Cora jareya bannya' somorra aspalla. E bakto rato dhari Sodom ban Gomora aehteyar buruwa dhari paperrangan jareya, pas labu ka mor-somor jareya. Laenna se gi' odhi' ahasel buru ka nong-gunong." 
Genesis14:11 Sabarang se badha e Sodom ban Gomora, tamaso' kakanan, egiba kabbi bi' moso dhari nagara se pa'-empa' gella'. Saellana jareya moso padha ondur." 
Genesis14:12 Sarrena Lud, ponakanna Abram rowa bengkona neng e Sodom, daddi Lud ban dhi'-andhi'na kabbi egiba moso keya." 
Genesis14:13 Tape badha oreng lalake' kasorang se ngenneng buru. Oreng jareya notorragi kadaddiyan gella' ka Abram, oreng Ibrani se kalenggiyanna e seddi'na ka'-bungka'an se karamat kennengnganna kabakteyanna Mamre, oreng Amori rowa. Mamre ban tan-taretanna, iya areya Eskol ban Aner, akanca ban Abram." 
Genesis14:14 E bakto Abram meyarsa ja' ponakanna etangkep moso, laju makompol reng-oreng e parkemahanna se padha penter aperrang, bannya'na tello ratos ballu bellas oreng. Rato se kaempa gella' laju eserser sampe' gan kottha Dan." 
Genesis14:15 E jadhiya reng-orengnga bi' Abram egi-bagi epadaddi pan-barampan bagiyan. E baja malem mosona eserrang ban epakala. Mosona jareya eserser sampe' ka Hoba e dhaja'anna Damsyik. 
Genesis14:16 Kabbi rang-barang rampasan ahasel erebbu' pole dhari mosona, bariya keya Lud ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na, sarta babine'an ban reng-oreng tawanan laenna." 
Genesis14:17 Saellana mennang aperrang bi' Rato Kedorlaomer ban to-rato sakutuna, Abram pas abali ka kalenggiyanna. Rato Sodom ngamba' e Cora Syawe se enyamae keya Cora Rato." 
Genesis14:18 Melkisedek, rato Salem se arangkep daddi imamma Allah Se Mahatenggi, abakta roti ban anggur, laju eatorragi ka Abram." 
Genesis14:19 Melkisedek laju aberkadi Abram, pas adhabu, “Moga-moga Abram eberkadana bi' Allah Se Mahatenggi, se nyepta'agi langnge' ban bume!" 
Genesis14:20 Molja'agi Allah Se Mahatenggi, se mamennang junandalem ka mosona.” Dhari sabarang se erampas pole dhari so-mosona rowa, saparpolonna bi' Abram eparengngagi ka Melkisedek." 
Genesis14:21 Rato Sodom mator ka Abram, “Ampon, pondhut sadajana barang rampasan paneka, namong ra'yat abdidalem manabi kengeng eso'ona balina.”" 
Genesis14:22 Tape Abram adhabu, “Kaula asompa e ajunanna PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahatenggi, se abadhi langnge' sareng bume," 
Genesis14:23 kaula ta' ngala'a dhi'-andhi'na sampeyan, sanajjan namong bennang salambar otabana talena sapatu. Daddi e budhi are sampeyan ta' kera adhabu, ‘Abram rowa sogi polana sengko'.’" 
Genesis14:24 Kaula ta' ngala'a pa-ponapa kaangguy kaparlowan kaula dibi'. Kaula namong poron narema ponapa se ampon eangguy sareng reng-oreng kaula. Namong ca-kanca kaula, enggi paneka Aner, Eskol sareng Mamre, diggal me' olle mondhut bagiyanna bang-sebang.”" 
Genesis15:1 Saellana jareya PANGERAN ngaton ka Abram, laju adhabu, “Ja' tako', Abram, Sengko' alindhungana ba'na dhari babaja; ban pole bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana opa se talebat rajana.”" 
Genesis15:2 Abram nyaot, “Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, Pangeran kaula, ponapa gunana opa paparengnga Junandalem ka abdidalem? Sareng Junandalem abdidalem ta' eparenge ana', daddi se bakal narema'a sangkolan dhari abdidalem Eliyezer, dunor abdidalem oreng Damsyik ka'dhissa'.”" 
Genesis15:3  
Genesis15:4 Tape PANGERAN adhabu pole, “Se narema'a sangkolanna ba'na ana'na ba'na dibi', banne dunorra.”" 
Genesis15:5 PANGERAN laju abakta Abram ka lowar, pas adhabu, “Kodda' bitong bintang e langnge' rowa; bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana toronan se bannya'na padha ban bintang e langnge' jareya.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abram parcaja ka PANGERAN, daddi Abram katarema ban ekasokane bi' PANGERAN." 
Genesis15:7 Saellana jareya PANGERAN adhabu pole ka Abram, “Sengko' reya PANGERAN se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari nagara Ur e Babilonia, Sengko' magiya tana reya ka ba'na.”" 
Genesis15:8 Abram atanya, “Adhu, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, Pangeran kaula, kadi ponapa abdidalem ka'dhinto se onenga ja' tana ka'dhinto bakal daddiya gadhuwan abdidalem?”" 
Genesis15:9 PANGERAN adhabu, “Kassa' Sengko' ngala'agi sape babine' settong, embi' babine' settong, ban dumba lake' settong, omorra se padha tello taonan. Ngala'agi keya keteran ban dara settong ebang.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abram mondhut ban-keban se edhabuwagi PANGERAN gella'. Sape, embi' ban dumbana esambelli, eseba' dhuwa. Ba'-saseba'na esaba' epadhep-adhebban, epadaddi dhu jijir. Tape no'-mano'na ta' eseba' dhuwa." 
Genesis15:11 Dagingnga ban-keban jareya eentare no'-mano' se ngakanan babathang, tape bi' Abram eagga sampe' buru kabbi." 
Genesis15:12 E bakto para' compet are, Abram asaren ce' ngeddhana. O-tao panggaliyanna pas arassa ce' tako'na." 
Genesis15:13 PANGERAN adhabu, “Kaenga'e, ya, na' potona ba'na bakal daddiya oreng manca e nagara laen; e nagara jareya na' potona ba'na bakal epadaddiya dunor sarta bakal eseksa'a odhi'na sampe' pa' ratos taon abidda." 
Genesis15:14 Tape bangsa se nyeksa na' potona ba'na jareya bi' Sengko' eokoma, ban e bakto na' potona ba'na jareya ondura dhari nagara jareya bakal ngeba'a arta sabannya'na." 
Genesis15:15 Ba'na dibi' bakal odhi'a sampe' ce' towana; ba'na bakal mateya kalaban taremtem, laju ekoburragi." 
Genesis15:16 Saellana pa' toronan, buru na' potona ba'na jareya abaliya dha' enna', sabab bangsa Amori bi' Sengko' gi' ta' eojuga sampe' bangsa jareya talebat jahadda, daddi kodu eokom.”" 
Genesis15:17 E bakto are la compet ban petteng, o-tao pas badha apoy se ngokos ban obur se rabbang e antarana thok-ketthoganna daging gella'." 
Genesis15:18 E bakto jareya PANGERAN laju mabadha parjanjiyan ban Abram, dhabuna, “Bi' Sengko' tana reya ebagiya kabbi ka na' potona ba'na, molae dhari batessa nagara Messer sampe' ka Songay Efrat," 
Genesis15:19 iya areya tanana bangsa Keni, Kenas, Kadmon," 
Genesis15:20 Het, Feris, Refa'im," 
Genesis15:21 Amori, Kana'an, Girgasi ban Yebus.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarai, rajina Abram, ta' kaagungan pottra, tape kaagungan dunor babine' dhari Messer, Hagar nyamana." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai mator ka Abram, “Sampeyan oneng, bi' PANGERAN kaula ta' eparenge ana'. Daddi langkong sae sampeyan asaren sareng dunor kaula saos. Pasera oneng pola dunor kaula ganeka pas gadhuwan ana' dhari sampeyan.” Abram cocok ka panemmona Sarai jareya." 
Genesis16:3 Daddi bi' Sarai Hagar jareya eatorragi ka Abram, epadaddi sellerra. E bakto jareya Abram la sapolo taon se alenggi e Kana'an." 
Genesis16:4 Abram asaren ban Hagar, Hagar laju ngandhung. Tape e bakto tao ja' aba'na ngandhung, Hagar laju sombong, ta' parduli ka lora bine'na jareya." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai mator ka Abram, “Kaula se ngatorragi Hagar, dunor kaula, ka sampeyan. Tape molae Hagar oneng ja' aba'na ngandhung, kaula laju ekababa'agi. Ganeka salana sampeyan. Moga-moga PANGERAN se motosana, pasera se lerres, sampeyan otaba kaula.”" 
Genesis16:6 Dhabuna Abram, “Hagar jareya dunorra ba'na, ba'na kobasa; daddi epabaramma'a bai bi' ba'na, soka'na ba'na.” Sarai pas ce' kejjemma ka Hagar, sampe' Hagar buru." 
Genesis16:7 Malaekadda PANGERAN manggi'i Hagar e seddi'na settong somber e sagara beddhi, e jalan ka ra-ara Syur." 
Genesis16:8 Dhabuna malaekat jareya, “Hagar, dunorra Sarai, ba'na dhari dhimma, ban entara dha' emma?” Hagar nyaot, “Abdidalem buru dhari compo'epon lora abdidalem.”" 
Genesis16:9 Dhabuna malaekat jareya, “Kassa' ba'na abali ka lorana, pas ladine pateppa', tarema maske eseksa.”" 
Genesis16:10 Malaekat jareya adhabu pole, “Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana na' poto se talebat bannya'na, sampe' ta' ekenneng bitong." 
Genesis16:11 Ba'na bakal rembi'a lalake'; ana' jareya nyamae Isma'il, sabab PANGERAN la meyarsa tangessa ba'na." 
Genesis16:12 Ana'na ba'na jareya bakal odhi'a akantha hemar alasan; bakal alabana ka sakabbinna oreng, ban bakal elabana bi' sakabbinna oreng. Odhi'na bakal tapesa'a dhari la-balana.”" 
Genesis16:13 PANGERAN se abu-dhabu ka aba'na jareya bi' Hagar laju esebbut “Junandalem ka'dhinto El-Roi,” sabab ca'na pekkerra, “Gu ta' e dhinna' sengko' la nangale'e Salerana se ngoladi sengko'?”" 
Genesis16:14 Daddi somor jareya bi' oreng enyamae somor Lahai-Roi, artena, “Somorra Se Odhi' Se Ngoladi Sengko',” kennengnganna badha e antarana Kades ban Bered." 
Genesis16:15 Hagar pas rembi' lalake', bi' Abram, eppa'na, enyamae Isma'il." 
Genesis16:16 E bakto Hagar rembi' jareya yuswana Abram ballung polo ennem taon. 
Genesis17:1 E bakto yuswana Abram sangang polo sanga' taon, PANGERAN ngaton sarta adhabu ka salerana, “Sengko' reya Allah Se Mahakobasa. Mara ba'na pata'at ka Sengko', ban odhi' patadha' calena." 
Genesis17:2 Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan ban ba'na sarta aberri'a na' poto sabannya'na ka ba'na.” 
Genesis17:3 Abram laju asojud, ban Allah adhabu," 
Genesis17:4 “Areya' Tang parjanjiyan ka ba'na: Bi' Sengko' ba'na epadaddiya bangatowana bangsa sabannya'na. Nyamana ba'na sateya bi' Sengko' eoba'a daddi Ibrahim, banne Abram pole." 
Genesis17:5  
Genesis17:6 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana na' poto sabannya'na, ban e antarana na' potona ba'na jareya badha se padha'a daddi rato. Na' potona ba'na jareya bakal talebat bannya'na sampe' daddi sa-bangsa." 
Genesis17:7 Sengko' neptebbana Tang janji ka ba'na ban ka na' potona, ron-temoron, ban parjanjiyan jareya langgeng. Sengko' daddiya Allahna ba'na ban na' potona." 
Genesis17:8 Sateya ba'na badha e tana reya menangka oreng manca. Tape tana jareya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na ban ka na' potona. Tana Kana'an bi' Sengko' epadaddiya andhi'na ba'na ban na' potona salanjangnga, ban Sengko' bakal daddiya Allahna na' potona ba'na jareya.”" 
Genesis17:9 Allah adhabu pole ka Ibrahim, “Ba'na kodu neptebbi parjanjiyan jareya keya, banne pera' ba'na malolo, tape ba'na ban na' potona." 
Genesis17:10 Areya' Tang parjanjiyan e antarana Sengko' ban ba'na ban na' potona ba'na se kodu eteptebbi, iya areya: ba'na ban na' potona se lalake' kodu asonnat." 
Genesis17:11 Molae sateya, sakabbinna babaji' lalake' se la aomor ballung are kodu esonnat; katantowan reya kaangguy na' potona ba'na, ban nor-dunor se lahir e bengkona ba'na ban se ebelli ba'na dhari nagara manca. Sonnat jareya menangka tandhana parjanjiyan e antarana Sengko' ban ba'na." 
Genesis17:12  
Genesis17:13 Oreng se lahir e bengkona ba'na ban se ollena melle, kabbi kodu esonnat. Jareya menangka tandha lahiriyah se noduwagi ja' parjanjiyan e antarana Sengko' ban ba'na jareya langgeng." 
Genesis17:14 Lalake'an se ta' esonnat ta' ekenneng anggep Tang ommat pole, sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' neptebbi parjanjiyan jareya.”" 
Genesis17:15 Dhabuna Allah ka Ibrahim, “Molae sateya binena ba'na jareya ja' nyamae Sarai; nyamana oba daddi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Binena ba'na bi' Sengko' eberkadana, ban epaandhi'a ana' lalake' dhari ba'na. Bi' Sengko' Sara epadaddiya ebu se noronnagiya sa-bangsa; e antarana toronanna bakal badha'a se padha daddi rato.”" 
Genesis17:17 Ibrahim asojud ka tana, tape sambi agella' e dhalem panggaliyanna. Ca'na panggaliyanna, “Dhu dhimma se badha'a lalake' se la aomor saratos taon se andhi'a ana'? Ban dhimma Sara se andhi'a ana', ja' omorra la sangang polo taon?”" 
Genesis17:18 Ibrahim mator ka Allah, “Kadi ponapa manabi Isma'il saos se epadaddi ahli waris abdidalem?”" 
Genesis17:19 Tape Allah adhabu, “Enja'. Sara binena ba'na jareya bakal ngandhunga ban rembi'a lalake'. Kana' jareya nyamae Ishak. Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan se langgeng ban kana' jareya sarta ban na' potona." 
Genesis17:20 Tape parnyo'onanna ba'na parkara Isma'il bi' Sengko' ekabbulana keya. Daddi bi' Sengko' Isma'il eberkadana ban eberri'ana na' poto sabannya'na. Isma'il jareya bakal daddiya bangatowana dhubellas suku, ban na' potona bi' Sengko' epadaddiya bangsa se raja." 
Genesis17:21 Tape Sengko' neptebbana Tang parjanjiyan ban Ishak, ana'na ba'na se elahirragiya Sara, taon dhateng, ra-kera baja teya.”" 
Genesis17:22 Saellana mare se abu-dhabu ka Ibrahim, Allah laju adinggallagi Ibrahim." 
Genesis17:23 Saellana jareya Ibrahim alampa'agi dhabuna Allah. Pottrana, Isma'il, esonnat; bariya keya lalake'an se badha e compo'na, tamaso' sakabbinna oreng se lahir e compo'na, ban nor-dunorra se ollena mondhut." 
Genesis17:24 E bakto asonnat, yuswana Ibrahim sangang polo sanga' taon," 
Genesis17:25 dineng Isma'il omorra tello bellas taon. 
Genesis17:26 Ibrahim ban pottrana asonnat e dhalem settong are. 
Genesis17:27 Bariya keya nor-dunorra. 
Genesis18:1 Saellana jareya PANGERAN ngaton ka Ibrahim e seddi'anna ka'-bungka'an se karamat andhi'na Mamre. E bakto jareya are ce' panassa, Ibrahim teppa'na agi-lenggi e adha'na labangnga kemahna." 
Genesis18:2 E bakto adhanga, Ibrahim ngoladi badha oreng katello ngadek e jadhiya. Ibrahim laju ngadek pas ngendhing nyander ka reng-oreng jareya. Sambi asojud" 
Genesis18:3 Ibrahim mator, “Guste, ngereng padha eatorana lenggi ka kemah abdidalem; junandalem padha eladinana sareng abdidalem." 
Genesis18:4 Ngereng sareng abdidalem engala'agiya aeng sopaja junandalem padha kengenga abacco. Ngereng bu-ambu lesso e babana kajuwan ka'dhinto. 
Genesis18:5 Sareng abdidalem junandalem eatorana dha'ar sakadarra, sopaja junandalem padha'a cengngar pole, kaangguy nerrossagi parjalanan. Manabi junandalem alenggi ka kemah abdidalem, ka'dhinto padha sareng manabi junandalem apareng kahormadan ka abdidalem. Daddi ngereng ja' nolak, eatorana lenggi.” Dhabuna se katello jareya, “Iya, mara, sengko' nyepperra. Apa se ekakarep ba'na, la mara, lakone.”" 
Genesis18:6 Ibrahim dhing-ngendhing maso' ka dhalem kemahna, pas adhabu ka Sara, “Mara duliyan ngala' teppong se paleng bagus tello taker, kagabay roti.”" 
Genesis18:7 Saellana jareya Ibrahim berka' ka kennengnganna ebinna, pas mondhut budhu'na sape se lempo ban alpo' dagingnga. Budhu'na sape jareya eparengngagi ka kabulana, epakon sambelli terros eola." 
Genesis18:8 Ibrahim laju mondhut susu, ceng-keccengnga susu ban daging gella', laju eatorragi ka tamoyya. Tamoy se katello jareya adha'ar, eladine Ibrahim dibi' e baba'anna kajuwan gella'." 
Genesis18:9 Saellana jareya tamoy se katello gella' adhabu, “Badha e dhimma Sara, binena ba'na?” “Badha e dhalem kemah,” atorra Ibrahim." 
Genesis18:10 Sala settonga tamoy se katello jareya adhabu, “Sangang bulan aggi' Sengko' dha' enna'a pole. E bakto jareya Sara bakal andhi'a ana' lalake'.” E bakto jareya Sara meyarsa'agi dhari budhina labangnga kemah se badha e budhiyanna tamoy jareya." 
Genesis18:11 Ibrahim ban Sara jareya la ce' seppona, ban Sara la ambu se dhateng kotorra." 
Genesis18:12 Daddi Sara agella' e dhalem atena, sambi apekker, “Sengko' la towa ban kero', dhu dhimma se gi' bisa'a terro apolonga tedhung ban tang lake? Apa pole tang lake la seppo keya.”" 
Genesis18:13 PANGERAN adhabu ka Ibrahim, “Arapa Sara me' agella' ban ta' parcaja ja' aba'na gi' bisa andhi' ana' maske omorra la towa?" 
Genesis18:14 Apa badha barang se mohal monggu ka PANGERAN? Sengko' la ngoca', sangang bulan aggi' Sengko' dha' enna'a pole, e bakto jareya Sara bakal andhi'a ana' lalake'.”" 
Genesis18:15 Sara tako', daddi ta' ngako, atorra, “Abdidalem ta' agella'.” Tape PANGERAN adhabu, “Enja', ba'na gella' pajat agella'.”" 
Genesis18:16 Saellana jareya tamoy se katello gella' gubar. Bi' Ibrahim eaterragi sampe' gan settong kennengngan. Dhari kennengngan jareya tamoy se katello buru ngoladi ka Sodom. 
Genesis18:17 Ca'na dhabuna PANGERAN e dhalem panggaliyanna, “Apa se ejalannagiya Sengko' reya ta' eroseya'agiya ka Ibrahim!" 
Genesis18:18 Na' potona gu ta' bakal daddiya bangsa raja tor kobasa? Lantaran Ibrahim sakabbinna bangsa e bume reya bi' Sengko' eberkadana. 
Genesis18:19 Sengko' la mele Ibrahim epanyorowa na'-ana'na ban na' potona sopaja ta'ada ka Sengko' ban ngalakone sabarang se bendher ban adil, sopaja Sengko' neptebbana sakabbinna Tang janji ka Ibrahim rowa.”" 
Genesis18:20 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka Ibrahim, “Ce' bannya'na serrona oreng parkara Sodom ban Gomora, ban dusana talebat berra'na." 
Genesis18:21 Daddi Sengko' torona dha' essa', mareksa'a, apa se ekaedhing Sengko' jareya bendher apa enja'.”" 
Genesis18:22 Tamoyya se kadhuwa terros meyos ka Sodom, tape PANGERAN paggun badha e seddi'na Ibrahim." 
Genesis18:23 Ibrahim nyemma'e PANGERAN, laju mator, “Ponapa sareng Junandalem reng-oreng se ta' sala badhi epateyana epasarengnga reng-oreng se sala?" 
Genesis18:24 Manabi e kottha ka'dhissa' badha oreng se sae saeket oreng, ponapa kottha ka'dhissa' sareng Junandalem paggun epaancora? Ponapa sareng Junandalem ta' eparengngana sapora sopaja se saeket oreng salamedda?" 
Genesis18:25 Ampon ja' sapaneka, Guste. Sabab manabi sapaneka reng-oreng se ta' sala tanoro' eokom epasareng reng-oreng se sala. Ka'dhinto barang se mohal. Kadi ponapa hakimma dunnya me' aparenga potosan se ta' adil?”" 
Genesis18:26 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Mon e Sodom badha oreng saeket se ta' sala, kottha jareya bi' Sengko' esapora'a kabbi lantaran oreng se saeket jareya.”" 
Genesis18:27 Ibrahim mator pole, “Nyo'ona sapora abdidalem lancang mabangal nyambung pamator ka Junandalem, Guste. Abdidalem ka'dhinto namong manossa se tadha' argana." 
Genesis18:28 Manabi oreng se sae namong badha pa' polo lema', banne saeket, ponapa kottha ka'dhissa' sareng Junandalem epaancora namong amarga bannya'na oreng se sae korang kalema?” Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Mon badha pa' polo lema' oreng se teppa' e dhissa', kottha jareya bi' Sengko' ta' epamosna'a.”" 
Genesis18:29 Ibrahim mator pole, “Kadi ponapa manabi namong badha pa' polo oreng?” Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Sengko' maburunga Tang neyat jareya lantaran oreng se pa' polo jareya.”" 
Genesis18:30 Ibrahim terros mator pole, “Junandalem ja' duka, Guste, manabi abdidalem mator pole. Kadi ponapa manabi oreng se sae namong badha tello polo?” Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Mon Sengko' nemmo tello polo oreng, Tang neyat jareya epaburunga.”" 
Genesis18:31 Ibrahim gi' mator pole, “Nyo'ona sapora abdidalem, lancang mabangal materros pamator ka Junandalem, Guste. Kadi ponapa manabi se sae namong badha dhu polo oreng?” Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Sengko' burung ta' mamosna'a kottha jareya lantaran se dhu polo oreng jareya.”" 
Genesis18:32 Dhi-budhina Ibrahim mator, “Junandalem ja' duka, Guste. Abdidalem matora sakaleyan aggi' saos. Kadi ponapa manabi se sae namong badha sapolo oreng?” Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Mon badha sapolo oreng, kottha jareya bi' Sengko' burung ta' epaancora.”" 
Genesis18:33 Saellana mare se abu-dhabu ban Ibrahim, PANGERAN laju adinggallagi Ibrahim, ban Ibrahim laju gubar." 
Genesis19:1 E bakto malaekat se kadhuwa gella' napa' ka Sodom e baja asar e are jareya, Lud teppa'na ju'-toju' e labang sakethengnga kottha. E bakto nangale'e malaekat se kadhuwa jareya, Lud manjeng, laju nyander ka seddi'anna. Sanapa'na ka seddi'anna, Lud laju asojud," 
Genesis19:2 pas mator, “Ngereng eatorana lenggi ka compo', guste. Diggal abdidalem se aladinana. Junandalem abacco e compo', pas kelem e ka'dhissa'. Lagguepon kengeng abungo gu-laggu, pas nerrossagi parjalanan.” Malaekat se kadhuwa jareya adhabu, “Enja', sakalangkong. Dina sengko' ngenebba e lon-alon bai.”" 
Genesis19:3 Lud ce' maksana, daddi dhi-budhina se kadhuwa jareya nyepper ka bengkona Lud. Lud nyoro la-kabulana agabay roti se ta' eragi'i. Saellana mare eparanta, tamoy se kadhuwa jareya laju adha'ar." 
Genesis19:4 Sabellunna tamoy se kadhuwa jareya maso' asareya, reng-oreng Sodom ngeppong bengkona Lud. Sakabbinna lalake'an, towa ngodha tadha' se ceccer padha noro' ngeppong." 
Genesis19:5 Reng-oreng jareya aera' ka Lud, oca'na, “Kemma tamoyya ba'na se ngenep e dhinna' rowa? Mara duliyan pakalowar, passra'agi, ekapolonga tedhung bi' sengko' kabbi, ekambuliyana.”" 
Genesis19:6 Lud kalowar, tape labangnga bengkona eparapet dhari lowar," 
Genesis19:7 pas ngoca' ka reng-oreng Sodom jareya, oca'na, “Tan-taretan, ampon ja' sapaneka." 
Genesis19:8 Kaula andhi' ana' babine' kadhuwa, gi' padha paraban. Diggal ana' kaula ganeka bai bi' kaula ebagiya ka sampeyan, epakadiya ponapa sareng sampeyan, kasokanna. Tape tamoy kaula ja' le'-ole', sabab kaula wajib ajaga kasalameddanna reng-oreng ka'issa'.”" 
Genesis19:9 Tape reng-oreng jareya ngoca' ka Lud, “Mara menggir! Ba'na reya neng e dhinna' oreng manca, me' nya'-bannya' caca. Mara menggir! Mon enja', ba'na eajara epalebbiya berra' dhari tamoyya rowa!” Lud pas ejungka'agi. Reng-oreng jareya laju arebbu'an se narja'a labang." 
Genesis19:10 Tape bi' tamoy se kadhuwa gella' Lud etaja' epakadhalem. Labangnga bengkona pas ekanceng dhari dhalem. 
Genesis19:11 Reng-oreng se badha e lowaranna labangnga epabuta kabbi, daddi padha ta' nangale'e e dhimma labangnga." 
Genesis19:12 Tamoy se kadhuwa rowa adhabu ka Lud, “Sapa'an balana ba'na? Ana' lalake'an ban babine'an, manto ban la-bala laenna se badha e kottha reya, ajak kabbi, giba nyengga dhari dhinna'," 
Genesis19:13 kottha reya bi' sengko' epamosna'a. PANGERAN la meyarsa serrona oreng parkara tengkana oreng kottha reya se talebat juba'na; sengko' reya eotos dha' enna' epakon matompes kottha Sodom reya.” 
Genesis19:14 Daddi Lud pas entar ka bakalla ana' babine'na se kadhuwa, oca'na, “Mara jaga, duli nyengga dhari kottha reya, sabab kottha reya epamosna'a bi' PANGERAN.” Tape bakalla ana'na se kadhuwa jareya padha nyangka Lud pera' agaja'." 
Genesis19:15 E bakto para' seyang malaekat se kadhuwa gella' makon Lud sopaja duliyan, dhabuna, “Mara duliyan! Giba binena ban ana' babine'na se kadhuwa jareya, sopaja ba'na ta' noro'a mate polana kajahadanna kottha reya.”" 
Genesis19:16 Lud gi' mangmang. Tape PANGERAN neser ka Lud jareya; daddi bi' tamoyya se kadhuwa gella' Lud ban binena sarta ana' babine'na se kadhuwa padha etonton egiba ka lowarra kottha jareya. 
Genesis19:17 Malaekat se settong adhabu, “Duli berka' mon ba'na terro salamedda! Ja' atole, ban ja' ambu e Cora Yordan. Terros buru ka gunong, me' olle ba'na ta' mate.”" 
Genesis19:18 Lud mator, “Adhu, guste, ampon abdidalem sabala ka'dhinto ja' pakon buru ka gunong." 
Genesis19:19 Lerres Junandalem ampon nolong abdidalem dhari babaja pate. Namong gunong ka'dhissa' gi' ce' jauna, dhaggi' abdidalem gi' ecapo' jugan sareng balai ka'dhinto, mate sabellunna napa' ka ka'dhissa'." 
Genesis19:20 Mangken oladi, ka'dhissa' badha kottha ne'-kene', se ta' pate jau dhari ka'dhinto. Kadi ponapa manabi abdidalem buru ka ka'issa' saos, me' olle salamet?”" 
Genesis19:21 Malaekat jareya adhabu, “Iya mara, parnyo'onanna ba'na jareya bi' sengko' ekabbulana. Kottha jarowa ta' epatompessa." 
Genesis19:22 Mara duliyan, berka'! Mon ba'na gi' ta' dha' essa', sengko' gi' ta' ngenneng apa-rapa.” Daddi kottha jareya enyamae Zowar, artena kottha kene'." 
Genesis19:23 Are la moncar e bakto Lud napa' ka Zowar. 
Genesis19:24 PANGERAN laju matoron ojan balirang se rabbang ka kottha Sodom ban Gomora. 
Genesis19:25 Kottha se dhadhuwa' jareya epaancor, bariya keya sakabbinna Cora Yordan ban sakabbinna pandhudhu'na sarta sakabbinna bu-tombuwanna." 
Genesis19:26 Tape binena Lud atole, laju aoba daddi cangga dhari buja." 
Genesis19:27 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Ibrahim dhing-ngendhing ka kennengnganna se ngadek e ajunanna PANGERAN ba'ari'anna. 
Genesis19:28 Ibrahim nondhu' ngoladi ka baba, ka kottha Sodom ban Gomora ban sakabbinna Cora Yordan. Ibrahim ngoladi okos dhari tana jareya, tadha' bidana ban okossa tomang se talebat rajana." 
Genesis19:29 Tape e bakto Allah maancor tha-kottha e cora kennengnganna bengkona Lud rowa, Allah teptep emot ka Ibrahim, daddi Lud laju etolong epaburu sampe' salamet." 
Genesis19:30 Sarrena Lud tako' se terrosa enneng e Zowar, daddi pas ngalle ka pagunongan, abareng ban ana' bine'na se kadhuwa, pas terros enneng e dhalem guwa e jadhiya." 
Genesis19:31 Ca'na ana'na se sareyang ka ale'na, “Eppa' la towa, ban sanagara reya tadha' oreng lalake' se ekenneng kalake sengko' ban ba'na sopaja andhi'a ana'." 
Genesis19:32 Daddi mara eppa' pamabu'; mon la mabu', ba'na ban sengko' pas tedhung ban eppa', me' olle sengko' ban ba'na bisa andhi' ana', materros toronanna eppa'.”" 
Genesis19:33 E malem jareya eppa'na epangenom anggur sampe' mabu'. Saellana jareya, ana'na se sareyang pas tedhung ban eppa'na, tape eppa'na ta' apangrasa." 
Genesis19:34 Kalagguwanna, ana' se sareyang gella' ngoca' ka ale'na, “Malemma sengko' tedhung ban eppa'; dhaggi' lem-malem mara pamabu' pole, pas gante ba'na tedhung ban eppa'. Daddi sengko' ban ba'na pas padha bisa andhi' ana'.”" 
Genesis19:35 Daddi e baja malem Lud epamabu' pole bi' na'-ana'na. Saellana jareya ana'na se nomer dhuwa' pas apolong tedhung ban eppa'na, tape Lud ta' apangrasa." 
Genesis19:36 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ana'na Lud se kadhuwa jareya ngandhung dhari eppa'na dibi'. 
Genesis19:37 Se sareyang rembi' lalake', enyamae Mo'ab. Mo'ab jareya se daddi bangatowana bangsa Mo'ab se sateya reya." 
Genesis19:38 Ana'na se nomer dhuwa' rembi' lalake' keya, enyamae Ben-Ami, se daddi bangatowana bangsa Amon se sateya reya." 
Genesis20:1 Ibrahim ngalle dhari Mamre ka bagiyan lao'na tana Kana'an, pas neptep e antarana Kades ban Syur. Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya, e bakto gi' alenggi e Gerar," 
Genesis20:2 Ibrahim adhabu ja' Sara jareya ale'na. Daddi Rato Abimelekh dhari Gerar makon oreng ngeba Sara ka salerana. 
Genesis20:3 E baja malem Allah ngaton ka rato jareya e dhalem sopennana, laju adhabu, “Ba'na kodu mate, sabab ba'na ngala' binena oreng.”" 
Genesis20:4 Tape Abimelekh gi' ta' nyedding Sara, daddi laju mator, “Adhu, GUSTE, Pangeran! Abidalem ta' sala! Ponapa Junandalem mateyana abdidalem sareng bangsa abdidalem?" 
Genesis20:5 Ibrahim dibi' se adhabu ja' babine' ka'dhinto ale'na, sarengngan jugan babine' ka'dhinto ngoca' sapaneka jugan. Abdidalem ngala' babine' ka'dhinto kalaban maksod se sae sareng ate se berse, daddi abdidalem ta' sala.”" 
Genesis20:6 Allah laju adhabu pole e dhalem sopennana, “Iya bendher, Sengko' tao ja' ba'na pajat ngala' babine' jareya kalaban ate se berse. Lantaran jareya bi' Sengko' ba'na elang-alange sopaja ta' agabaya dusa ka Sengko', ban Sengko' ba'na ta' ebagi nyedding ka babine' jareya." 
Genesis20:7 Daddi sateya mara babine' jareya pabali ka lakena. Sabab lakena nabbi, nabbi jareya bakal nyo'onnagiya ba'na ka Sengko' sopaja ba'na ta' mateya. Tape mon ba'na ta' endha' mabali babine' jareya, ba'na ban ra'yadda masthe mate!”" 
Genesis20:8 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Abimelekh adikane para ponggabana, laju eparenge oneng parkara kadaddiyan jareya. Ponggabana padha katako'an kabbi." 
Genesis20:9 Saellana jareya Abimelekh adikane Ibrahim, laju adhabu, “Sampeyan me' sapaneka ka kaula? Ponapa salana kaula ka sampeyan, me' sampeyan madhateng mosiba paneka ka kaula ban ka karaja'an kaula? Ta' sae ganeka." 
Genesis20:10 Ponapa maksodda sampeyan?” 
Genesis20:11 Dhabuna Ibrahim, “Ca'epon pekker abdidalem e ka'dhinto tadha' oreng se tako' ka Allah, daddi abdidalem tanto epate'e manabi badha oreng se terro ka raji abdidalem." 
Genesis20:12 Sarengngan pole Sara ka'dhinto pajat ale' abdidalem, tonggal eppa' laen ebu, sareng abdidalem laju ekabine." 
Genesis20:13 Daddi e bakto Allah makon abdidalem adinggallagi compo'na eppa', epakon entar ka nagara manca, abdidalem ngoca' ka raji abdidalem, ‘Mon ba'na taresna ka sengko', mon badha oreng atanya ba'na abala ja' sengko' reya kaka'na ba'na.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Saellana jareya Abimelekh mabali Sara ka Ibrahim. Laen dhari jareya Ibrahim eparenge dumba ban sape, dunor lalake'an ban babine'an." 
Genesis20:15 Dhabuna rato jareya ka Ibrahim, “Paneka nagara kaula; sampeyan kengeng alenggi e ka'imma'a saos se ekasokane.”" 
Genesis20:16 Saellana jareya rato adhabu ka Sara, “Kaka'na sampeyan bi' kaula ampon eparenge pesse saebu salaka menangka bukte ka sadajana oreng ja' sampeyan gi' socce. Sampeyan ta' sala.”" 
Genesis20:17 Polana kadaddiyan jareya babine'an e karatonna Abimelekh bi' PANGERAN epajubeng kabbi. Ibrahim laju nyo'on ka Allah. Allah laju mabaras Abimelekh, rajina ban nor-dunor babine'anna, sampe' babine'an jareya bisa andhi' ana' pole." 
Genesis20:18  
Genesis21:1 PANGERAN aberkadi Sara, noro' janjina se edhabuwagi ka Ibrahim." 
Genesis21:2 Sara bubut, pas babar lalake' e bakto Ibrahim la seppo. Kana' jareya lahir e are ban baja se edhabuwagi Allah ka Ibrahim." 
Genesis21:3 Bi' Ibrahim pottrana jareya enyamae Ishak. 
Genesis21:4 E bakto pottrana jareya aomor ballung are, bi' Ibrahim esonnat, menorot se edhabuwagi Allah ka salerana." 
Genesis21:5 E bakto Ishak lahir, yuswana Ibrahim la saratos taon." 
Genesis21:6 Dhabuna Sara, “Allah la apareng kagumbira'an ka sengko' sampe' sengko' bisa agella'. Reng-oreng se ngedhing kabar reya tanto noro' gumbira ban agella' keya.”" 
Genesis21:7 Sara adhabu pole, “Sapa lamba' se ngoca'a ka Ibrahim ja' Sara ngembana ana'? Nyatana sengko' rembi' onggu maske tang lake la towa.”" 
Genesis21:8 Ishak atamba raja, ban e bakto kana' jareya epesa, Ibrahim ajang-onjang ce' rajana." 
Genesis21:9 E settong are Sara ngoladi Isma'il, pottrana Ibrahim ban Hagar, babine' Messer rowa, teppa'na en-maenan ban Ishak, pottrana dibi'." 
Genesis21:10 Sara mator ka Ibrahim, “Tore pona, tondhung dunor ka'issa' sareng ana'na. Ana'na babine' ganeka ja' parenge bagiyan dhari sangkolan se eparengngagiya sampeyan ka Ishak, ana' kaula.”" 
Genesis21:11 E bakto meyarsa jareya panggaliyanna Ibrahim arassa rekong, sabab Isma'il pottrana keya." 
Genesis21:12 Tape Allah adhabu ka Ibrahim, “Ba'na ta' osa rekong mekkere Hagar dunorra ba'na ban ana'na jareya. Torodi apa oca'na Sara jareya, sabab toronan se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka ba'na bakal lahira dhari Ishak." 
Genesis21:13 Tape ana'na dunor jareya bi' Sengko' eberri'ana na' poto se bannya' keya, se daddiya settong bangsa. Sabab ana'na dunor jareya ana'na ba'na keya.”" 
Genesis21:14 Kalagguwanna bi' Ibrahim Hagar eparenge roti ban kanthong dhari kole' aesse aeng menangka sango e parjalananna. Ana'na epagindhung ka ebuna. Saellana jareya babine' buru pas esoro ondur. Daddi Hagar laju ondur, ajalan san-kassannagi e ra-ara Bersyeba." 
Genesis21:15 E bakto aeng e kanthongnga rowa la tadha' sakale, ana'na laju esaba' e babana but-ombut," 
Genesis21:16 aba'na dibi' pas toju' e kennengngan laen se jauna ra-kera saratos meter dhari jadhiya. Ca'na pekkerra, “Sengko' ta' mangga nangaleyana tang ana' mate.” Daddi sambi toju' babine' jareya laju nanges." 
Genesis21:17 Allah meyarsa tangessa Isma'il. Dhari langnge' laju badha malaekadda Allah adhabu ka Hagar, “Apa se ekasossa ba'na, Hagar? Ella, ja' tako'. Allah la meyarsa sowarana ana'na ba'na." 
Genesis21:18 Kassa' entare ana'na, emban padhiyem. Sabab toronanna ana'na ba'na jareya bakal daddiya bangsa se raja.”" 
Genesis21:19 Allah pas mokka' matana Hagar, daddi Hagar laju nangale'e badha somor. Hagar entar ka somor jareya, laju ngala' aeng ebaddhai kanthongnga, ana'na pas eenome." 
Genesis21:20 Isma'il atamba raja sarta terros etolonge Allah. Se ekennengnge ra-ara Paran, daddi panganjur se penter." 
Genesis21:21 Bi' ebuna epabine'e oreng Messer. 
Genesis21:22 E bakto jareya Abimelekh ban Pikhol, panglimana tantarana manggi'i Ibrahim. Abimelekh adhabu, “Allah nolonge sampeyan e dhalem ponapa'a saos se eastane sampeyan." 
Genesis21:23 Daddi ngereng samangken sampeyan asompa e ajunanna Allah, ja' sampeyan ta' co-ngocowa ka kaula, otabana ka na'-ana' kaula, otabana ka toronan kaula. Kaula ampon becce' ka sampeyan, daddi sampeyan kodu sapaneka jugan ka kaula sareng ka nagara se ekennengnge sampeyan paneka.”" 
Genesis21:24 Atorra Ibrahim, “Enggi, abdidalem asompa.”" 
Genesis21:25 Tape saellana jareya Ibrahim aserro ka Abimelekh parkara somor se erampas bi' di-abdina Abimelekh. 
Genesis21:26 Dhabuna Abimelekh, “Kaula ta' oneng pasera se alako sapaneka. Sampeyan ta' oneng mator ka kaula, ban kaula buru samangken mereng parkara paneka.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ibrahim laju ngatore dumba ban sape ka Abimelekh, ban oreng se kadhuwa jareya laju mabadha parjanjiyan." 
Genesis21:28 Ibrahim malaen budhu'na dumba papetto' dhari ba-dumba laenna. 
Genesis21:29 Abimelekh mareksane, “Aponapa me' epalaen?”" 
Genesis21:30 Dhabuna Ibrahim, “Ngereng pondhut budhu'na dumba se papetto' ka'dhinto menangka tandha ja' junandalem ngakowe ja' abdidalem se ngale somor ka'dhinto.”" 
Genesis21:31 Daddi kennengngan jareya laju enyamae Bersyeba, sabab e kennengngan jareya se kadhuwa jareya asompa." 
Genesis21:32 Saellana mabadha parjanjiyan e Bersyeba jareya, Abimelekh ban Pikhol laju abali ka nagarana oreng Filistin." 
Genesis21:33 Ibrahim laju namen bungkana tamariska e Bersyeba jareya, ban sajjegga jareya kennengngan jareya ekagabay kennengnganna abakte ka PANGERAN, Allah se langgeng." 
Genesis21:34 Saellana jareya Ibrahim abak abit alenggi e nagarana oreng Filistin. 
Genesis22:1 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Allah nyoba' Ibrahim. Ibrahim edikane. “Ibrahim! Ibrahim!” dhabuna. Saodda Ibrahim, “Ka'dhinto, Guste!”" 
Genesis22:2 Allah adhabu, “Kassa' ba'na entar ka tana Moriya. Giba Ishak, ana'na ba'na se pera' settong rowa, se talebat ekaase'e bi' ba'na. Ana'na ba'na jareya gabay kurban obbaran menangka tor-ator ka Sengko', e settong gunong se dhaggi' eduduwagiya bi' Sengko'.”" 
Genesis22:3 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Ibrahim thok-ngetthok kaju se epangobbara kurbanna. Kaju jareya ebuwa' e hemarra. Ibrahim pas mangkat ka kennengngan se edhabuwagi Allah, asareng ban Ishak sarta kabulana kadhuwa." 
Genesis22:4 Saellana olle tello are, kennengngan jareya la katon ka Ibrahim."
