Genesis22:5 Ibrahim pas adhabu ka kabulana se kadhuwa gella', “Ba'na anante' e dhinna' bai; hemarra reya edina'a e dhinna' keya. Sengko' ban tang ana' entara dha' essa', abakteya ka Allah. Dhaggi' mon la mare, sengko' abaliya dha' enna'.”" 
Genesis22:6 Kajuna bi' Ibrahim epapekol ka Ishak, dineng salerana dibi' abakta ladding ban mardha. Se kadhuwa pas alomampa asareng." 
Genesis22:7 Ca'na Ishak, “Pa'.” Saodda Ibrahim, “Apa, Na'?” Ishak atanya, “Kaju ban mardhana ampon badha. Ka'imma budhu'na dumbana se ebadhiya kurban?”" 
Genesis22:8 Saodda Ibrahim, “Allah dibi' se nyadhiya'agiya budhu'na dumbana jareya.” Se kadhuwa pas terros alomampa." 
Genesis22:9 Sanapa'na ka kennengngan se edhabuwagi Allah gella', Ibrahim pas abadhi kennengnganna kurban. Kajuna etata e attasanna; pottrana etale'e, esaba' e kennengnganna kurban gella', e attasanna kajuna." 
Genesis22:10 Saellana jareya Ibrahim laju mondhut laddingnga epanyambelliya pottrana. 
Genesis22:11 Tape Ibrahim laju meyarsa sowarana malaekadda PANGERAN dhari langnge', “Ibrahim! Ibrahim!” Saodda Ibrahim, “Ka'dhinto, Guste!”" 
Genesis22:12 Dhabuna Allah kalaban parantara'anna malaekat gella', “Ja' pate'e kana' jareya, ja' pama-baramma. Sabab sateya Sengko' tao ja' ba'na tako' ka Allah, ban ta' eman massra'agi ka Sengko' ana'na ba'na se pera' settong tadha' pole jareya.”" 
Genesis22:13 Ibrahim atole ka bara' ka temor, ka dhaja ka lao', laju ngoladi badha dumba lake' settong, tandhu'na tacangke' ka but-ombut. Ibrahim mondhut dumba jareya, laju ebadhi kurban ka Allah menangka gantena pottrana." 
Genesis22:14 Bi' Ibrahim kennengngan jareya enyamae “PANGERAN nyadhiya'agi”. Daddi sampe' sateya oreng ngoca', “E attassa gunongnga PANGERAN nyadhiya'agi se ekaparlo.”" 
Genesis22:15 Malaekadda PANGERAN aera' ka Ibrahim sakaleyan aggi' dhari langnge'," 
Genesis22:16 “Areya' dhabuna PANGERAN: Sengko' asompa'a kalaban Tang nyama dibi', ja' bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana berkat se talebat rajana. Sarrena ba'na atoro' ka Sengko' ban ta' berra' ngurbannagi ana'na se pera' settong jareya ka Sengko'," 
Genesis22:17 Sengko' ajanji ba'na eberri'ana toronan se ce' bannya'na, akantha bannya'na bintang e langnge', akantha bannya'na beddhi e paseser. Na' potona ba'na bakal mennanga ka so-mosona." 
Genesis22:18 Lantaran ba'na ban toronanna, sa-bangsa e bume bakal narema'a berkat kabbi – sabab ba'na atoro' ka Sengko'.”" 
Genesis22:19 Saellana jareya Ibrahim abali ka kennengnganna kabulana se kadhuwa gella', pas laju padha abareng mangkat ka Bersyeba. Ibrahim terros maggun alenggi e Bersyeba jareya." 
Genesis22:20 Ibrahim kaagungan kaka' anyama Nahor. Saellana kadaddiyan e Gunong Moriya rowa Ibrahim narema kabar ja' Milka, binena Nahor, andhi' ana' kaballu, iya areya:" 
Genesis22:21 Us se sareyang, Bus ale'na, Kemuwel se daddi eppa'na Aram," 
Genesis22:22 Kesed, Hazo, Pildas, Yidlaf ban Betuwel." 
Genesis22:23 Betuwel jareya eppa'na Ribka. Jareya ana'na Milka se kaballu ollena ban Nahor, taretanna Ibrahim." 
Genesis22:24 Dineng sellerra Nahor se anyama Reyuma andhi' ana' keya, iya areya Tebah, Gaham, Tahasy ban Ma'akha." 
Genesis23:1 E bakto yuswana saratos petto lekor taon," 
Genesis23:2 Sara seda e Hebron e tana Kana'an. Ibrahim sossa, laju molar polana rajina seda." 
Genesis23:3 Saellana jareya jinazana edinggallagi. Ibrahim laju meyos manggi'i reng-oreng Het se badha e nagara jareya, dhabuna," 
Genesis23:4 “Kaula e ka'iya oreng manca; kaula nyo'ona tolong, ngobangana tanana sampeyan, kaula parlo ngoburragiya raji kaula.”" 
Genesis23:5 Sambidda reng-oreng jareya, “Panjennengngan ka'dhinto pamimpin raja se badha e ka'dhinto; daddi ngereng sareyagi rajina e pasareyan se paleng sae gadhuwanna bangsa abdina. Bangsa abdina padha perak kengeng nyadhiya'agi pasareyan kaagem rajina panjennengngan.”" 
Genesis23:6  
Genesis23:7 Saellana jareya Ibrahim pas asojud e adha'anna reng-oreng Het jareya," 
Genesis23:8 pas adhabu, “Manabi sampeyan ehlas raji kaula ekoburragi e ka'iya, kaula nyo'ona tolong so'onnagi ka Efron, pottrana Zohar," 
Genesis23:9 Guwa Makhpela kaagunganna, se badha e penggirra teggalla ka'issa', bi' kaula eobangana, saponapa'a saos argana. Tana ganeka sareng kaula ebadhiya tana koburan.”" 
Genesis23:10 E bakto jareya Efron dibi' teppa'na badha e jadhiya, toju' bi' reng-oreng Het laenna e kennengnganna kompolan e labang sakethengnga kottha jareya. Efron nyaot, esakse'e reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, oca'na," 
Genesis23:11 “Ampon ta' osa obange; teggal sareng guwa ka'issa' sareng abdina eatorragiya ka panjennengngan, badhi pasareyanna rajina panjennengngan; bangsa abdina menangka saksena.”" 
Genesis23:12 Ibrahim ngendhep e adha'na reng-oreng Het jareya," 
Genesis23:13 laju adhabu ka Efron, ekaedhing bi' reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Ngereng peyarsa'agi. Teggal ganeka sareng kaula eobangana. Ngereng tarema obangnga, daddi kaula bisa ngoburragi raji kaula e ka'issa'.”" 
Genesis23:14 Saodda Efron," 
Genesis23:15 “Tana se argana namong pa' ratos pesse salaka, ponapa artena ka panjennengngan sareng ka abdina? Ampon, eatore, rajina sareyagi e ka'issa'.”" 
Genesis23:16 Ibrahim saroju' ka argana, laju ngetong pesse salaka se bannya'na esebbuttagi bi' Efron, iya areya pa' ratos pesse salaka, menorot tembangan se eangguy para sodagar, esakse'e reng-oreng Het se padha badha e jadhiya." 
Genesis23:17 Daddi tanana Efron se badha e Makhpela e temorra Mamre jareya pas ekaandhi' Ibrahim. Tamaso' teggalla ban guwana sarta ka'-bungka'anna, bariya keya ka'-bungka'an se badha e tes-batessa." 
Genesis23:18 Tana jareya epassra'agi ka Ibrahim, esakse'e reng-oreng Het se hadir e kompolan e labang sakethengnga kottha jareya." 
Genesis23:19 Saellana jareya Ibrahim laju nyareyagi Sara, rajina, e guwa Makhpela, iya areya e Hebron, e tana Kana'an." 
Genesis23:20 Daddi teggal ban guwana oreng Het jareya pas ekaandhi' Ibrahim, epadaddi tana koburan." 
Genesis24:1 Ibrahim la ce' seppona, ban eberkadi PANGERAN e dhalem parkara apa'a bai." 
Genesis24:2 E settong are Ibrahim adhabu ka kabulana se paleng towa, se epassrae ngoros sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na, “Mara saba' tanangnga ba'na e antarana tang kang-pekang. Mara sateya ba'na asompa kalaban asmana PANGERAN, Allah se ngobasane langnge' ban bume, ja' bi' ba'na tang ana' ta' enyareyagiya bine ana'na oreng e nagara Kana'an reya." 
Genesis24:3  
Genesis24:4 Ba'na kodu entar ka tang kampong; nyareyagi paraban se egabaya binena Ishak, dhari tang la-bala dibi'.”" 
Genesis24:5 Kabulana jareya mator, “Kadi ponapa manabi parabanna ta' poron adinggallagi nagarana kaangguy noro' abdina ka ka'dhinto? Ponapa pottrana panjennengngan epakona meyos ka nagara asalla panjennengngan?”" 
Genesis24:6 Dhabuna Ibrahim, “Senga'! Ja' sampe' tang ana' egiba dha' essa' maske baramma'a!" 
Genesis24:7 PANGERAN, Allah se ngobasane langnge' abakta sengko' kalowar dhari bengkona tang eppa' ban dhari nagarana tang la-bala; PANGERAN la asompa marengngagiya nagara reya ka sengko' ban ka tang na' poto. Daddi PANGERAN masthe ngotos malaekadda epanolonge ba'na sopaja ba'na bisa'a nemmo paraban se egabaya binena tang ana'." 
Genesis24:8 Mon paraban jareya ta' endha' noro' ba'na dha' enna', ba'na bebas dhari sompana. Tape, maske baramma'a, tang ana' ta' olle giba dha' essa'.”" 
Genesis24:9 Daddi kabulana Ibrahim jareya pas nyaba' tanangnga e antarana kang-pekangnga Ibrahim lorana, pas asompa ajalannagiya apa se epakonnagi Ibrahim jareya." 
Genesis24:10 Kabulana Ibrahim jareya laju ngala' ontana lorana sapolo meggi', sarta acem-macem barang laenna se aji, pas mangkat ka kottha kennengnganna bengkona Nahor; iya areya e dhaja'anna Mesopotamia." 
Genesis24:11 Sanapa'na, ta-ontana epaambu e seddi'anna somor e lowarra kottha. E bakto jareya baja asar, baktona babine'an entar nyello' aeng ka somor." 
Genesis24:12 Kabulana Ibrahim jareya nyo'on ka Allah, oca'na, “Adhu, Guste PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Ibrahim lora abdidalem, nyo'ona tolong sopaja e are mangken abdidalem kengenga ajalannagi papakonna lora abdidalem." 
Genesis24:13 Samangken abdidalem manjeng e seddi'na somor se badhi eentare ban-paraban se nyello'a aeng. 
Genesis24:14 Abdidalem ngoca'a sapaneka ka sala settonga paraban se nyello' aeng gapaneka, ‘Mara, ra, patoron kelmo'na, sengko' menta'a aengnga, ngenoma.’ Manabi babine' gapaneka nyaot, ‘Ngereng eatore. Ontana sampeyan bi' kaula engala'agiya aeng jugan,’ sareng abdidalem gapaneka eanggebba menangka tandha ja' paraban gapaneka se epele Junandalem kaagem rajina Ishak, abdiepon Junandalem. Abdidalem tanto pas oneng ja' Junandalem pajat neptebbi parjanjiyannepon sareng Ibrahim, lora abdidalem.”" 
Genesis24:15 Sabellunna mare se adu'a pas badha babine', nyamana Ribka, nyo'on kelmo'na. Ribka jareya ana'na Betuwel, reng towana Betuwel jareya Nahor ban Milka, dineng Nahor reya kaka'na Ibrahim." 
Genesis24:16 Ribka jareya ce' raddinna, gi' ngodha ban paraban. Ribka entar ka somor jareya, ngesse'e kelmo'na, samarena laju ajalan, moleya." 
Genesis24:17 Kabulana Ibrahim gella' berka' nyander ka seddi'anna, pas ngoca', “Mara, ra, Na', sengko' menta'a aengnga se e kelmo'na jareya, sengko' terro ngenoma.”" 
Genesis24:18 Saodda Ribka, “Ngereng eatore.” Kelmo'na laju epatoron. Kabulana Ibrahim gella' ngenom, nyordhuk aengnga dhari kelmo'na se eteggu'i Ribka." 
Genesis24:19 Samarena oreng jareya ngenom, Ribka ngoca', “Ontana sampeyan bi' kaula engala'agiya aeng jugan, me' olle padha ngenom epatobuk.”" 
Genesis24:20 Aeng e kelmo'na rowa pas etotta' ka baddhana pangenomanna ontana. Saellana jareya, Ribka pas berka' ka somor nyello' aeng pole sampe' ta-onta jareya padha tobuk kabbi se ngenom." 
Genesis24:21 Kabulana Ibrahim gella' pera' ngabassagi malolo, ta' ca'-ngoca' pa-apa, terro taowa apa bi' PANGERAN eparenge partolongan sopaja ehteyarra ahasela." 
Genesis24:22 Saellana ontana mare eenome kabbi, kabulana Ibrahim jareya laju makalowar anteng emmas se larang, epasang ka elongnga Ribka, ban gellang emmas se ja-raja dhadhuwa', epasang ka lengngenna." 
Genesis24:23 Ca'na oreng jareya, “Sapa eppa'na ba'na, Na'? E compo'na eppa'na ba'na ba' badha'a kennengngan mon sengko' sakanca ngamponga ngenep?”" 
Genesis24:24 Saodda Ribka, “Eppa' kaula nyamana Betuwel, pottrana Nahor sareng Milka." 
Genesis24:25 Manabi sampeyan kelemma, e compo' badha kennengngan. Jugan bannya' darameyan sareng pakanna ebin.”" 
Genesis24:26 Kabulana Ibrahim jareya pas asojud amolja'agi PANGERAN," 
Genesis24:27 oca'na, “Molja'agi PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Ibrahim, tang lora. Sabab PANGERAN neptebbi janjina ka Ibrahim, tang lora; sengko' etonton epatemmo ban balana.”" 
Genesis24:28 Babine' gella' laju berka' ka bengkona ebuna pas nyareta'agi sakabbinna kadaddiyan gella'. 
Genesis24:29 Ribka jareya andhi' taretan lalake', nyamana Laban. Laban nangale'e anteng e elongnga ale'na ban gellang e lengngenna, sarta ngedhing caretana ale'na parkara sabarang se ekoca'agi lalake' gella'. Daddi Laban laju gancangan kalowar dhari bengkona entar ka kabulana Ibrahim se gi' jeng-manjeng ban ta-ontana e seddi'anna somor rowa." 
Genesis24:30  
Genesis24:31 Ca'na Laban, “Ngereng eatore lenggi ka compo'. Sampeyan eberkadi PANGERAN! Aponapa me' gi' ngadek e ka'iya? Ngereng kelem e compo'. E ka'issa' ampon esadhiya'agi kennengngan, jugan ampon esadhiya'agi kennengnganna ta-ontana.”" 
Genesis24:32 Daddi kabulana Ibrahim jareya laju maso' ka bengkona Laban. Bi' Laban mowadanna ontana epatoron, ontana epakane ban eberri'i darameyan. Kabulana Ibrahim sakanca padha engala'agi aeng bacco." 
Genesis24:33 E bakto eangka'e kakanan, kabulana Ibrahim jareya ngoca', “Kaula gi' ta' neddha'a manabi gi' ta' manapa' pessenna lora kaula.” Ca'na Laban, “Ngereng, eatore.”" 
Genesis24:34 “Kaula paneka kabulana Ibrahim,” ca'na oreng jareya molae acareta." 
Genesis24:35 “PANGERAN apareng berkat se talebat rajana ka lora kaula. Lora kaula epasogi. Eparenge dumba sareng embi', sape, onta sareng hemar, emmas sareng salaka, sareng dunor lalake'an sareng babine'an." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, rajina, kaagungan pottra lalake' e bakto Ibrahim ampon talebat seppona. Sadajana harta kaagunganna sareng Ibrahim esangkollagi ka pottrana gapaneka." 
Genesis24:37 Sareng Ibrahim kaula epakon asompa ja' kaula atoro'a ka papakonna. Ca'epon dhabuna, ‘Senga', tang ana' ja' nyareyagi bine ana'na oreng e nagara Kana'an reya." 
Genesis24:38 Nyareyagi balana kaomma tang eppa' bai. Daddi kassa' sateya ba'na entar ka nagarana tang eppa'.’ 
Genesis24:39 Kaula atanya, ‘Kadi ponapa manabi parabanna ta' poron noro' abdina ka ka'dhinto?’" 
Genesis24:40 Lora kaula adhabu sapaneka, ‘PANGERAN se esemba sengko' molae lamba' tanto ngotos malaekadda epakon nolonge ba'na sopaja ba'na ahasela nyareyagi bine tang ana', paraban dhari tang bangsa, iya areya la-balana tang eppa'." 
Genesis24:41 Mon ba'na la entar ka tang bala, tape ba'na etolak, ba'na bebas dhari sompana.’" 
Genesis24:42 E bakto kaula gella' napa' ka somor ka'issa', kaula nyo'on sapaneka ka PANGERAN, ‘Adhu, Guste PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Ibrahim, lora abdidalem, nyo'ona tolong, Guste, sopaja abdidalem ahasela e dhalem ajalannagi papakon ka'dhinto." 
Genesis24:43 Samangken abdidalem badha e seddi'anna somor ka'dhinto. Manabi badha paraban dhateng nyello'a aeng, abdidalem ngoca'a: Mara, ra, sengko' menta'a aengnga sakone', nyordhuga dhari kelmo'na." 
Genesis24:44 Manabi paraban gapaneka nyaot: Ngereng eatore. Ontana sampeyan bi' kaula engala'agiya aeng jugan, me' olle padha ngenom epatobuk, sareng abdidalem eanggebba menangka tandha ja' paraban gapaneka peleyanna Junandalem kaagem pottrana lora abdidalem.’" 
Genesis24:45 Kaula gi' ta' lastare se nyo'on e dhalem ate, Ribka dhateng nyo'on kelmo', laju entar ka somor nyello'a aeng. Kaula ngoca' ka kana' ganeka, ‘Na', mara, ra, sengko' menta'a aengnga sakone', terro ngenoma.’" 
Genesis24:46 Kana' gapaneka duli matoron kelmo'na, laju ngoca', ‘Ngereng, eatore, ta-ontana sampeyan bi' kaula eenomana jugan.’ Daddi kaula pas ngenom, dineng Ribka ngenome ta-onta kaula." 
Genesis24:47 Kaula pas atanya, ‘Sapa eppa'na ba'na, Na'?’ Saodda, ‘Eppa' kaula Betuwel, pottrana Nahor sareng Milka.’ Kaula laju masang anteng ka elongnga, sareng gellang ka lengngenna." 
Genesis24:48 Kaula pas asojud abakte ka PANGERAN, amolja'agi PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Ibrahim lora kaula, se nonton kaula epatapanggi sareng balana lora kaula; kantos kaula tapanggi sareng pottra bine'na sampeyan, se sareng kaula eso'ona badhi judhuna pottrana lora kaula." 
Genesis24:49 Samangken, ngereng dhabuwagi, ponapa sampeyan kasokan noduwagi kataresna'an sareng kaestowan ka lora kaula; manabi bunten, dhabuwagi jugan, sopaja kaula onenga pas aponapa'a kaula paneka.”" 
Genesis24:50 Laban ban Betuwel nyaot, “Parkara paneka dhari PANGERAN asalla, daddi banne kaula se kodu motose." 
Genesis24:51 Paneka' Ribka badha e ka'iya; eatore bakta, badhi binena pottrana lorana sampeyan, menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN dibi'.”" 
Genesis24:52 E bakto ngedhing jawaban jareya, kabulana Ibrahim jareya laju asojud abakte ka PANGERAN." 
Genesis24:53 Saellana jareya pas makalowar kalambi se rang-larang, pareyasan dhari emmas ban salaka, se pas ebagi ka Ribka. Kaka' ban ebuna eberri'i rang-barang se rang-larang keya." 
Genesis24:54 Saellana jareya, kabulana Ibrahim ban ca-kancana pas ngakan ban ngenom, terros pas ngenep e jadhiya. E bakto la jaga kalagguwanna, kabulana Ibrahim jareya ngoca', “Kaula palemana ka compo'na lora kaula.”" 
Genesis24:55 Kaka' ban ebuna Ribka ngoca', “Diggal Ribka me' gi' enneng ban kaula dhimen samenggu otaba sapolo are aggi', saamponna ganeka kengeng bakta.”" 
Genesis24:56 Tape kabulana Ibrahim ngoca', “Ampon kaula ja' panante' pole. Sareng PANGERAN parjalanan kaula eparenge ahasel; daddi samangken kaula palemana.”" 
Genesis24:57 Saodda kaka' ban ebuna Ribka, “Samangken Ribka saos olok. Kadi ponapa ca'epon Ribka.”" 
Genesis24:58 Daddi Ribka pas eolok. Ca'na kaka' ban ebuna, “Ba'na endha' noro' oreng reya?” Saodda Ribka, “Enggi, poron.”" 
Genesis24:59 Daddi kaka' ban ebuna ngedine Ribka noro' kabulana Ibrahim ban reng-orengnga, Ribka ebarengnge anjuna se la towa se la abit ngabula ka oreng towana." 
Genesis24:60 Kaka' ban ebuna aberkadi Ribka, oca'na, “Ribka, ba'na mandar bannya'a toronanna! Na' potona ba'na mandar ngobasa'ana tha-kotthana so-mosona!”" 
Genesis24:61 Ribka ban bareng babine'anna pas padha akes-rengkes, saellana jareya laju padha ongga ka ontana bang-sebang, terros mangkat noro' kabulana Ibrahim." 
Genesis24:62 Sabatara jareya Ishak teppa'na dhateng dhari ra-ara, lebat e somor se anyama “Lahai-Roi”, se artena “Somorra Pangeran Se Ajaga Sengko'”. Ishak jareya kalenggiyanna e Tana Negeb e bagiyan lao'na Kana'an." 
Genesis24:63 E settong are e baja asar Ishak kalowar dhari kemahna, laju lan-jalanan e talon, pas ngoladi badha ta-onta dhateng ka jadhiya." 
Genesis24:64 E bakto nangale'e Ishak, Ribka toron dhari ontana," 
Genesis24:65 pas atanya ka kabulana Ibrahim, “Pasera lalake' se ajalan ka'anja e talon ka'issa'?” “Ka'issa' lora kaula,” saodda kabulana Ibrahim. Ribka laju ngala' salendhangnga, etopowagi ka mowana." 
Genesis24:66 Kabulana Ibrahim laju nyareta'agi ka Ishak sabarang se la elakone aba'na. 
Genesis24:67 Ishak laju ngeba Ribka maso' ka kemahna se lamba' ekalenggi'i Sara, ebuna. Ribka pas ekabine Ishak. Ishak neser ka Ribka, daddi atena talepor maske ebuna la seda." 
Genesis25:1 Ibrahim araji pole, olle babine' se anyama Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Rajina jareya ngalahirragi pottra se anyama: Zimran, Yoksan, Medan, Midian, Isybak, ban Su'ah." 
Genesis25:3 Yoksan reya eppa'na Syeba ban Dedan, ban toronanna Dedan reya oreng Asyur, oreng Letus, ban oreng Leum." 
Genesis25:4 Na'-ana'na Midian iya areya: Efa, Efer, Henokh, Abida ban Elda'a. Jareya kabbi toronanna Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Bi' Ibrahim sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na eparengngagi ka pottrana se anyama Ishak; 
Genesis25:6 tape gi' odhi'na Ibrahim bannya' areng-pareng ka tra-pottrana dhari ji-rajina se laen. Saellana jareya tra-pottrana jareya epakon ngalle ka tana e temorra Kana'an, me' olle padha jau dhari pottrana se anyama Ishak." 
Genesis25:7 Ibrahim seda e bakto la ce' seppona, yuswana saratos pettong polo lema' taon." 
Genesis25:8  
Genesis25:9 Bi' tra-pottrana se anyama Ishak ban Isma'il laju esareyagi e Guwa Makhpela se kennengnganna e teggal e temoranna Mamre. Gi' lamba'na teggal jareya andhi'na Efron ana'na Zohar, oreng Het," 
Genesis25:10 tape bi' Ibrahim la epondhut dhari oreng Het jareya. Sara, rajina Ibrahim, ekoburragi e jadhiya keya." 
Genesis25:11 Saellana Ibrahim seda, Allah aberkadi Ishak, pottrana Ibrahim. E bakto jareya Ishak alenggi e seddi'anna somor se anyama “Lahai-Roi” se artena “Somorra Pangeran Se Ajaga Sengko'”." 
Genesis25:12 Isma'il reya pottrana Ibrahim ban Hagar, dunorra Sara." 
Genesis25:13 Isma'il kaagungan pottra dhubellas, menorot giliranna kalahiranna, tra-pottrana jareya iya areya: Nebayot, Kedar, Adbe'el, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Misyma, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Tema, Yetur, Nafis ban Kedma." 
Genesis25:16 Tra-pottrana Isma'il jareya daddi bangatowana dhubellas suku bangsa, dineng disa ban parkemahanna esebbut menorot ma-nyamana tra-pottrana Isma'il jareya." 
Genesis25:17 Isma'il seda e bakto yuswana saratos tello polo petto' taon. 
Genesis25:18 Toronanna Isma'il jareya ngennengnge dhaera Hawila sampe' ka Syur se badha e temorra Messer se nojju ka Asyur. Odhi'na tapesa dhari toronanna Ibrahim. 
Genesis25:19 Areya' caretana toronanna Ishak pottrana Ibrahim. 
Genesis25:20 Yuswana Ishak pa' polo taon e bakto akabin ban Ribka, ana'na Betuwel, oreng Mesopotamia; Ribka jareya taretanna Laban." 
Genesis25:21 Ishak nyo'onnagi Ribka ka PANGERAN, polana Ribka jubeng. Parnyo'onanna ekabbuli bi' PANGERAN. Ribka bubut." 
Genesis25:22 Bubudda kembar. Ban sabellunna babaji' se dhadhuwa' jareya lahir, e dhalem gandhu'anna ebuna akeket. Ca'na Ribka, “Arapa sengko' me' kodu nyandhang se kantha reya?” Ribka laju nyo'on petodu ka PANGERAN." 
Genesis25:23 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka babine' jareya, “E dhalem tabu'na ba'na badha bangsa dhadhuwa'; bangsa se dhadhuwa' jareya amosowan; se settong akowadan dhari settonganna; se towa'an bakal daddiya abdina se ngodha'an.”" 
Genesis25:24 Saellana napa' baktona, Ribka babar kembar lalake' kabbi dhadhuwa'." 
Genesis25:25 Se sareyang kole'na abak mera, akantha juba se ekagabay dhari kaen se abulu, daddi kana' jareya enyamae Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Saellana jareya pas kalowar se ngodha'an. E bakto babaji' se nomer dhuwa' jareya kalowar, tanangnga neggu'i tombedda Esau ce' sekkenna, daddi kana' jareya laju enyamae Yakub. E bakto kana' se kadhuwa jareya lahir, yuswana Ishak sabidak taon." 
Genesis25:27 Na'-kana' se kadhuwa jareya atamba raja. Esau daddi panganjur, ce' penterra ababurun, lebur enneng e lon-talon ban e ra-ara. Dineng Yakub orengnga anteng ban aleburan enneng e bengkona." 
Genesis25:28 Ishak aneserran ka Esau polana Ishak dujan ka daging ollena Esau ababurun, tape Ribka aneserran ka Yakub." 
Genesis25:29 E settong are, teppa'na Yakub aola kacang mera, Esau dhateng dhari ababurun. Tabu'na lapar," 
Genesis25:30 laju ngoca' ka Yakub, “Sengko' ce' laparra. Mara, ra, sengko' menta'a kacang merana sakone'.” Lantaran jareya Esau enyamae Edom." 
Genesis25:31 Saodda Yakub, “Iya, mara, tape bagi ka sengko' gallu ha' sareyangnga ba'na.”" 
Genesis25:32 Ca'na Esau, “Iya, mara. Sengko' ce' laparra, kantha se mateya rassana. Apa gunana ha' sareyang jareya ka sengko'?”" 
Genesis25:33 Oca'na Yakub, “Mara asompa gallu.” Esau asompa, ha' sareyangnga ebagi ka Yakub." 
Genesis25:34 Bi' Yakub Esau eberri'i roti ban essop kacang merana. Esau ngakan ban ngenom, saellana jareya laju ondur. Daddi Esau nganggep ha' sareyang jareya tadha' gunana." 
Genesis26:1 E jaman jareya laju badha laep pole akantha gi' jamanna Ibrahim. Ishak ngadhep ka Abimelekh, ratona oreng Filistin, e Gerar, laju nyo'on edi alenggiya e jadhiya." 
Genesis26:2 Kan nyo'on kantha jareya polana PANGERAN ngaton ka salerana laju adhabu, “Ba'na ja' entar ka Messer; neng e nagara reya bai, kantha se la eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na." 
Genesis26:3 Sengko' ajaga'a ban aberkadana ba'na. Tana reya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na ban na' potona. Sengko' neptebbana Tang janji ka Ibrahim ramana ba'na. 
Genesis26:4 Sengko' aberri'a ka ba'na toronan sabannya'na, akantha bannya'na bintang e langnge', ban sakabbinna tana reya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka toronanna ba'na jareya. Sakabbinna bangsa e bume bakal nyo'ona ka Sengko' sopaja bi' Sengko' eberkadana epakantha toronanna ba'na." 
Genesis26:5 Sengko' aberkadana ba'na, polana Ibrahim ngestowagi Tang parenta ban neggu'i sakabbinna Tang hokom ban Tang parenta.”" 
Genesis26:6 Daddi Ishak laju alenggi e Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 E bakto reng-oreng e jadhiya nanya'agi Ribka, Ishak adhabu ja' Ribka jareya ale'na, banne rajina. Ishak tako' epate'e bi' reng-oreng jareya polana terro ngaandhi'a Ribka se raddin." 
Genesis26:8 Saellana Ishak abak abit se alenggi e jadhiya, e settong are Rato Abimelekh ngoladi ka baba dhari candhelana, laju ngoladi Ishak teppa'na neng-sennengngan bi' Ribka." 
Genesis26:9 Daddi Abimelekh laju adikane Ishak, sarta adhabu, “Daddi babine' ganeka rajina sampeyan! Aponapa sampeyan me' adhabu ale'na?” Dhabuna Ishak, “Ca'epon abdidalem tako' abdidalem me' epate'e manabi mator ja' ka'dhinto raji abdidalem.”" 
Genesis26:10 “Sampeyan me' sapaneka ka bangsa kaula?” dhabuna Abimelekh. “Sala settong e antarana ra'yat kaula bisa saos tedhung apolong sareng rajina sampeyan ganeka, manabi kantos kadaddiyan sapaneka, ganeka salana sampeyan, banne salana bangsa kaula.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimelekh laju maenga' sakabbinna ra'yadda, dhabuna, “Pa'-sapa'a se la-nyala ka oreng reya otaba ka rajina, bi' sengko' eokoma mate.”" 
Genesis26:12 Ishak nabur bibit e tana jareya, ban saellana olle sataon hasella saratos kalena se etamen, sabab eberkadi bi' PANGERAN." 
Genesis26:13 Ishak sajan sogi sarta pas daddi ce' sogina. 
Genesis26:14 Ishak ekabaji'i bi' oreng Filistin polana bannya' dunorra, bannya' dumbana ban sapena." 
Genesis26:15 Daddi mor-somor se ekale bi' nor-dunorra Ibrahim gi' odhi'na laju etotobi tana kabbi bi' reng-oreng Filistin. 
Genesis26:16 Abimelekh laju adhabu ka Ishak, “Sampeyan tore nyengla dhari ka'iya. Sampeyan samangken akobasa'an dhari bangsa kaula.”" 
Genesis26:17 Daddi Ishak nyengla dhari tana jareya, laju akemah e Cora Gerar, sarta alenggi e jadhiya abak abit." 
Genesis26:18 Mor-somor se ekale gi' jamanna Ibrahim, se etotobi tana bi' reng-oreng Filistin satadha'na Ibrahim, bi' Ishak laju ekale pole. Mor-somor jareya paggun enyamae akantha se enyama'agi bi' ramana." 
Genesis26:19 E bakto la-kabulana Ishak ngale somor e Cora Gerar jareya laju nemmo somber se ce' lebburra. 
Genesis26:20 Tape reng-oreng ngowan Gerar atokar ban reng-oreng ngowanna Ishak. Ca'na reng-oreng ngowan jareya, “Aeng reya tang andhi'.” Daddi bi' Ishak somor jareya enyamae Esek, artena “Tokar”." 
Genesis26:21 La-kabulana Ishak ngale somor laenna, tape pas daddi tokar pole. Daddi somor jareya bi' Ishak enyamae Sitna, artena “Parmosowan”." 
Genesis26:22 Saellana jareya Ishak ngalle dhari jadhiya, laju ngale somor pole. Se jareya ta' daddi tokar. Daddi somor jareya bi' Ishak enyamae Rehobot, artena “Kabebasan”. Dhabuna, “Sateya sengko' ban ba'na bi' PANGERAN eparenge kabebasan neng e nagara reya, e dhinna' sengko' ban ba'na bakal ma'mora.”" 
Genesis26:23 Saellana jareya Ishak meyos ka Bersyeba. 
Genesis26:24 E malem jareya PANGERAN ngaton sarta adhabu, “Sengko' reya Allahna ramana ba'na Ibrahim. Ba'na ja' tako'; Sengko' alindhunge ba'na. Sengko' aberkadana ba'na ban ba'na bi' Sengko' eberri'ana toronan sabannya'na lantaran Tang janji ka Tang abdi Ibrahim.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ishak laju abadhi mezba, pas abakte ka PANGERAN e kennengngan jareya. Ishak akemah e jadhiya, dineng di-abdina laju ngale somor laen." 
Genesis26:26 E settong are Abimelekh rabu dhari Gerar manggiyana Ishak, asareng ban Ahuzat, panasehadda, ban Pikhol, panglimana tantarana." 
Genesis26:27 Dhabuna Ishak, “Aponapa samangken sampeyan me' padha manggi'i kaula, mangkana gi' dhimen kaula ekamoso sareng etondhung dhari nagarana sampeyan?”" 
Genesis26:28 Saodda reng-oreng jareya, “Samangken kaula oneng ja' sampeyan elindhunge sareng PANGERAN; daddi noro' manggi kaula langkong sae kaula sareng sampeyan mabadha parjanjiyan. Ngereng sampeyan asompa" 
Genesis26:29 ja' sampeyan ta' alakowa juba' ka bangsa kaula, pakadi kaula sadaja se ta' oneng alako juba' ka sampeyan. Bangsa kaula ampon sae ka sampeyan, sampeyan eedine ngalle kalaban taremtem. Ampon terrang ka kaula ja' sampeyan eberkadi PANGERAN.”" 
Genesis26:30 Saellana jareya reng-oreng buru bi' Ishak eka'-angka'e, kabbi pas padha adha'ar ban nom-ngenom." 
Genesis26:31 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu se kadhuwa jareya padha adhabuwagi janjina se eessa'agi ban sompa. Ishak laju ngater tamoyya, ban saellana jareya se kadhuwa laju apesa menangka oreng se akanca." 
Genesis26:32 E are jareya keya la-kabulana Ishak dhateng ngatore oneng parkara somor se la ekale. Atorra, “Abdina ampon manggi somber.”" 
Genesis26:33 Somor jareya bi' Ishak laju enyamae Syeba, artena “Sompa”. Jareya asal molana kottha jareya enyamae Bersyeba." 
Genesis26:34 E bakto aomor pa' polo taon, Esau araji babine' kadhuwa dhari suku Het, iya areya Yudit ana'na Be'eri, ban Basmat ana'na Elon." 
Genesis26:35 Babine' se kadhuwa jareya masossa odhi'na Ishak ban Ribka. 
Genesis27:1 Ishak la seppo tor buta. E settong are Esau, pottrana se sareyang, edikane, dhabuna, “Na'!” Saodda Esau, “Ponapa, Pa'?”" 
Genesis27:2 Dhabuna Ishak, “Ba'na tao sengko' la towa, ta' etemmo bila se mateya." 
Genesis27:3 Daddi kassa' kala' pana ban gandhibana, pas mangkat ka alas, nyare keban." 
Genesis27:4 Ollena pas ola panyaman, kantha jan-dujananna sengko' rowa. Mon la massa' giba dha' enna'. Mon bi' sengko' la mare ekakan, bi' sengko' ba'na pas eberkadana, pongpong sengko' gi' ta' mate.”" 
Genesis27:5 Teppa'na Ishak abu-dhabu ka Esau, Ribka meyarsa'agi. Daddi e bakto Esau mangkat aburuwa keban ka alas," 
Genesis27:6 Ribka adhabu ka Yakub, “Gi' buru sengko' ngedhing eppa'na adhabu kantha reya ka Esau," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Kassa' entar aburu, dagingnga ola panyaman, bagi ka sengko'. Mon bi' sengko' la mare ekakan, bi' sengko' ba'na eberkadana e ajunanna PANGERAN sabellunna sengko' mate.’" 
Genesis27:8 Sateya Na', edhingngagi tang caca reya, ban toro' pagu-onggu." 
Genesis27:9 Kassa' ba'na entar ka kennengnganna ebinna eppa'na, ngala' budhu'na embi' se lempo dhadhuwa'. Bi' sengko' eola'agiya jan-dujananna eppa'na." 
Genesis27:10 Mon la mare pas giba ka eppa'na, soro dha'ar. Saellana jareya tanto ba'na bi' eppa'na eberkadi sabellunna seda.”" 
Genesis27:11 Yakub mator ka ebuna, “Kadi ponapa, ja' reng badanna Esau abulu, kaula bunten." 
Genesis27:12 Olle daddi eppa' agagap ka kaula, tanto sareng eppa' kaula esanggu co-ngoco; dhaggi' kaula la'-mala' ebasto, banne eberkadi.”" 
Genesis27:13 Dhabuna ebuna, “Dina sengko' se nanggunga babaston jareya Na'. Lakone bai apa tang oca'. Kassa' ngala' budhu'na embi' jareya.”" 
Genesis27:14 Daddi Yakub pas ngala' budhu'na embi' dhadhuwa', eatorragi ka ebuna; Bi' ebuna laju eola, jan-dujananna Ishak." 
Genesis27:15 Saellana jareya Ribka mondhut kalambina Esau se paleng bagus se esaba' e bengkona, laju eangguyyagi ka Yakub." 
Genesis27:16 Kole'na embi' gella' ebetbeddagi ka lengngenna Yakub ban ka bagiyanna le'erra se ta' abulu. 
Genesis27:17 La'-ola'anna se nyaman jareya ebagi ka Yakub, epapolong ban roti gabayanna dibi'." 
Genesis27:18 Yakub entar ka eppa'na, laju ngoca', “Pa'.” Saodda Ishak, “Apa, sapa ba'na reya?”" 
Genesis27:19 Saodda Yakub, “Kaula Esau, Pa', pottra sareyangnga sampeyan. Pessennanna sampeyan ampon lastare. Ngereng alenggi, paneka' dha'ar daging ollena kaula se ababurun, ampon eola. Ngereng dha'ar, pas berkadi kaula.”" 
Genesis27:20 Dhabuna Ishak, “Me' ce' lekkassa ba'na olle keban buruwan?” Saodda Yakub, “PANGERAN, Allahna sampeyan se abanto kaula.”" 
Genesis27:21 Dhabuna Ishak, “Mara dha' enna'an, Na', me' olle sengko' ngenneng agagap ba'na. Sengko' terro taowa apa ba'na reya Esau ongguwan apa enja'.”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakub nyander ka seddi'na eppa'na. Bi' eppa'na pas egagap. “Sowarana akantha Yakub, tape lengngenna Esau,” dhabuna Ishak." 
Genesis27:23 Ishak ta' ngagali ja' jareya Yakub sabab lengngenna abulu akantha lengngenna Esau. Ishak para' aberkadana Yakub," 
Genesis27:24 tape pas mangmang, daddi atanya pole, “Ba'na reya Esau ongguwan, ya?” Saodda Yakub, “Enggi.”" 
Genesis27:25 Dhabuna Ishak, “Kemma daging la'-ola'anna ba'na, bi' sengko' ekakana. Mon la mare, bi' sengko' ba'na eberkadana.” Yakub ngatorragi daging jareya ka Ishak, epabareng ban anggur se egabay aeng dha'arra." 
Genesis27:26 Eppa'na pas adhabu, “Dha' enna'an, Na'. Mara seyom sengko'.”" 
Genesis27:27 E bakto Yakub nyeyom eppa'na, eppa'na ngedhing bauna kalambina Esau, daddi Yakub laju eberkadi. Dhabuna, “Bauna tang ana' padha ban bauna teggal se eberkadi PANGERAN." 
Genesis27:28 Moga-moga bi' Guste Allah ba'na eparengngana ebbun dhari langnge', ban teggalla ba'na moga epalandhuwa! Moga-moga Allah marengana ba'na gandum ban anggur!" 
Genesis27:29 Moga-moga sa-bangsa daddiya abdina ba'na ban ku-suku bangsa atelloga ka ba'na. Moga-moga ba'na ngobasa'ana la-balana, ban moga-moga na' potona ba'na asojuda kabbi ka ba'na. Moga-moga oreng se abasto ba'na ekennenga babaston, ban reng-oreng se aberkadi ba'na kaparengana berkat keya.”" 
Genesis27:30 Ishak la mare aberkadi Yakub. E bakto Yakub buru ondur, Esau laju dhateng dhari se ababurun." 
Genesis27:31 Ollena dagingnga la eola epanyaman, pas egiba ka eppa'na. Ca'na Esau, “Pa', ngereng alenggi, paneka' daging ollena kaula se aburu, ngereng dha'ar, manabi lastare, kaula pas berkadi.”" 
Genesis27:32 “Ba'na reya sapa?” ca'na Ishak. Saodda Esau, “Kaula pottra sareyangnga sampeyan, Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Ishak ce' takerjadda, sampe' ngetter sabadan, dhabuna, “Mon bariya sapa se nyambelli keban buruwan gella', sarta ngeba ka sengko' dagingnga se la eola gella' rowa? Bi' sengko' gi' buru mare ekakan sabellunna ba'na dhateng. Bi' sengko' oreng jareya la eberkadi; daddi berkat jareya salanjangnga ekaandhi' oreng jareya.”" 
Genesis27:34 E bakto ngedhing dhabuna eppa'na jareya, Esau laju nanges rat-tharadan sambi ngoca', “Ngereng kaula berkadi jugan, Pa'!”" 
Genesis27:35 Dhabuna Ishak, “Sengko' la etepo ale'na ba'na. Berkat se samasthena etarema ba'na la ekala'.”" 
Genesis27:36 Ca'na Esau, “Paneka ampon kadhukaleyanna kaula eco-koco. Patot ban nyamana Yakub. Ha' sareyangnga kaula ampon ekala', samangken berkat se samasthena etarema kaula ekala' jugan. Ponapa sampeyan ta' kaagungan karena berkat se kengeng eparengngagi ka kaula, Pa'?”" 
Genesis27:37 Dhabuna Ishak, “Bi' sengko' ale'na ba'na la epadaddi lorana ba'na, la-balana bi' sengko' epadaddi dunorra kabbi, gandum ban anggur bi' sengko' la esangowagi keya. Sateya sengko' ta' andhi' pa-apa pole se ekenneng bagi ka ba'na, Na'!”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau gi' maksa nyo'on ka eppa'na, “Ponapa sampeyan pera' kaagungan berkat samacem, Pa'? Ngereng kaula berkadi jugan, Pa'!” Samarena jareya Esau laju nanges pole." 
Genesis27:39 Ishak adhabu, “Ba'na ta' kera nemmo gaggarra ebbun dhari langnge', ta' kera andhi' teggal se landhu." 
Genesis27:40 Ba'na bakal olleya pangoreban dhari peddhangnga, tape ba'na bakal daddiya dunorra ale'na. Nangeng mon ba'na aberonta', ba'na bakal lopoda dhari kakobasa'anna.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau sake' ate ka Yakub polana berkadda eppa'na ebagi ka Yakub jareya. Ca'na pekkerra, “Eppa' la para' seda'a; samarena kasossa'an jareya bi' sengko' Yakub epateyana.”" 
Genesis27:42 Tape e bakto Ribka meyarsa maksodda Esau jareya, laju adikane Yakub, pas adhabu, “Edhingngagi, Na', Esau amaksod malessa sake'na atena, mateyana ba'na." 
Genesis27:43 Daddi sateya, Na', mara ba'na patoro' oca'. Kassa' duli buru ka bengkona tang taretan se anyama Laban e Haran." 
Genesis27:44 Ba'na neng e jadhiya gallu kaangguy sabatara, sampe' kaka'na ba'na elang peggella," 
Genesis27:45 sarta loppa ka lalakonna ba'na se mapeggel atena jareya. Bi' sengko' ba'na pas esorowa kone'e. Sengko' ta' terro kaelangana ana' dhadhuwa' e dhalem saare.” 
Genesis27:46 Ribka mator ka Ishak, “Kaula ce' caremmedda ka reng-oreng manca binena Esau ka'issa'. Manabi Yakub abine oreng Het jugan, kaula tanto mate.”" 
Genesis28:1 Ishak laju adikane Yakub. Yakub eberkadi, pas epessen kantha reya, “Ba'na ja' abine oreng Kana'an." 
Genesis28:2 Kassa' ba'na entar ka Mesopotamia ka bengkona Betuwel, embana ba'na, ba'na abine e dhissa', menta sala settonga ana'na majadhi'na ba'na se anyama Laban." 
Genesis28:3 Moga-moga ba'na ban binena eberkadana Allah Se Mahakobasa, ban moga-moga ba'na eparengngana bannya' ana'na, sopaja ba'na daddiya bangatowana sa-bangsa!" 
Genesis28:4 Moga-moga Allah aberkadana ba'na ban toronanna akantha se aberkadi Ibrahim, sopaja tana se ekennengnge ba'na reya, se la eparengngagi ka Ibrahim bi' Allah, ekaandhi'a ba'na!”" 
Genesis28:5 Bi' Ishak Yakub epakon mangkat ka Mesopotamia, ka oreng se anyama Laban, iya areya ana'na Betuwel oreng Aram rowa, kaka'na Ribka se andhi' ana' Yakub ban Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau ngedhing ja' bi' Ishak Yakub la eberkadi sarta epakon entar nyare bine ka Mesopotamia. Esau ngedhing keya ja'e bakto aberkadi Yakub, Ishak adhabu sopaja Yakub ta' abine oreng Kana'an." 
Genesis28:7 Esau tao ja' Yakub atoro' ka dhabuna eppa'na ban ebuna, laju entar ka Mesopotamia." 
Genesis28:8 Daddi Esau ngarte ja' Ishak ta' lebur ka babine' Kana'an. 
Genesis28:9 Daddi Esau laju entar ka Isma'il, pottrana Ibrahim, laju abine ana'na Isma'il se anyama Mahalat, ale'na Nebayot." 
Genesis28:10 Yakub pas mangkat ka Haran dhari Bersyeba. 
Genesis28:11 E bakto compet are napa' ka settong kennengngan, pas ngenep e jadhiya. Yakub ngala' bato, pas marobbu, batona ekabantal." 
Genesis28:12 Teppa'na tedhung laju amempe nangale'e andha se manjeng e bume; konco'na andha jareya napa' ka langnge'. Kat-malaekat ongga toron e andha jareya. 
Genesis28:13 PANGERAN ngadek e erenganna, pas adhabu, “Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna Ibrahim ban Ishak. Tana se ekatedhunge ba'na jareya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na ban na' potona." 
Genesis28:14 Na' potona ba'na bakal bannya'na akantha bannya'na beddhi e bume ban bakal mencara ka bara' ban ka temor, ka dhaja ban ka lao'; ban lantaran ba'na ban na' potona, Sengko' aberkadana sakabbinna bangsa e bume." 
Genesis28:15 Mon ba'na entar dha' emma'a bai, bi' Sengko' terros ebarengngana ban elindhungana. Ban pole, bi' Sengko' ba'na epabaliya pole ka nagara reya. Sengko' ta' adina'agiya ba'na, ban sabarang se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka ba'na bi' Sengko' eteptebbana kabbi.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yakub ngedhing, pas ngoca', “PANGERAN badha e dhinna', e kennengngan reya, sengko' buru tao!”" 
Genesis28:17 Yakub arassa tako', laju ngoca', “Marengessa kennengngan reya! Tantona reya kalenggiyanna Allah, labang sakethengnga sowarga.”" 
Genesis28:18 Kalagguwanna Yakub jaga gu-laggu. Batona se ekabantal ekala', pas epamanjeng menangka bato parengeddan. Bato jareya eserame mennya' jaitun menangka tandha ja' bato jareya eatorragi ka Allah." 
Genesis28:19 Kennengngan jareya laju enyamae Betel. Lamba' nyamana Lus. 
Genesis28:20 Yakub laju asompa ka Allah, oca'na, “Manabi Junandalem asarengnge sareng ajaga abdidalem e dhalem parjalanan ka'dhinto, marenge abdidalem teddha'an sareng salenan," 
Genesis28:21 kantos abdidalem salamet abali ka kalenggiyanna eppa'. Junandalem, Guste PANGERAN, badhi daddiya Allah se esemba'a abdidalem." 
Genesis28:22 Abdidalem ngatorragiya ka Junandalem saparpolonna dhari sadajana se eparengngagi Junandalem ka abdidalem. Bato parengeddan e epamanjeng sareng abdidalem ka'dhinto badhi kennengngan kaangguy abakte ka Junandalem.” 
Genesis29:1 Yakub nerrossagi parjalananna entar ka tana e temorranna Kana'an. 
Genesis29:2 Se ajalan pas napa' ka settong somor se badha e tengnga teggal. E seddi'na somor jareya badha dumba tello ambalan padha arendhu, ba-dumba jareya biyasana eenome e somor jareya. Somor jareya ekodhunge bato se raja." 
Genesis29:3 Mon ba-dumba se eenomana la padha napa' ka jadhiya, reng-oreng ngowanna pas magulu' kodhungnga somorra, epakapenggir. Ba-dumbana pas padha eenome. Mon la mare, kodhungnga somor jareya pas epobu pole areng-bareng." 
Genesis29:4 Yakub atanya ka reng-oreng ngowan gella', “Sampeyan dhari ka'imma?” “Dhari Haran,” saodda reng-oreng jareya." 
Genesis29:5 Yakub atanya pole, “Sampeyan ponapa kennal ka Laban, pottrana Nahor?” “Enggi, kennal,” ca'na reng-oreng ngowan jareya." 
Genesis29:6 “Kadi ponapa kabadha'anna Laban?” ca'na Yakub. “Sae,” ca'na reng-oreng ngowan gella'. “Ka'issa' pottrana, Rahel, ngenomana embi' sareng dumbana.”" 
Genesis29:7 Ca'na Yakub, “Samangken gi' aban, gi' banne baktona dumba epamaso' ka kandhang. Aponapa me' ta' eenome gallu, pas ocol pole me' olle ngamba?”" 
Genesis29:8 Saodda reng-oreng ngowan jareya, “Mon samangken gi' ta' bisa. Dhaggi' mon reng-oreng ngowan pon padha dhateng ban dumbana, buru kodhungnga somor ka'issa' epagulu' ekambuli'i. Buru ba-dumba eenome.”" 
Genesis29:9 Teppa'na Yakub acaca bi' reng-oreng ngowan gella', Rahel napa' ka jadhiya ban ba-dumbana." 
Genesis29:10 E baktona nangale'e Rahel dhateng ngeba ba-dumbana majadhi'na se anyama Laban, Yakub laju entar ka somor gella', magulu' batona sarta pas ngenome ba-dumbana Rahel." 
Genesis29:11 Saellana jareya Yakub pas nyeyom Rahel, sarta laju nanges dhari peragga." 
Genesis29:12 Ca'na Yakub, “Sengko' reya balana eppa'na ba'na, ana'na Ribka.” Rahel berka' abala ka eppa'na." 
Genesis29:13 Ban e bakto eppa'na ngedhing kabar parkara ponakanna jareya, laju berka' ngone'e Yakub. Yakub egellu' tor eseyom, laju egiba ka bengkona. Saellana Yakub mare acareta dhari adha' sampe' mare parkara apa se la kadaddiyan," 
Genesis29:14 Laban laju ngoca', “Pajat bendher, ba'na reya gi' tang dhara dibi'.” Yakub apolong e jadhiya sabulan abidda." 
Genesis29:15 Ca'na Laban ka Yakub, “Ba'na ta' olle alako ka sengko' ta' kalaban olle bajaran maske ba'na reya tang bala. Ba'na menta'a bajaran barampa?”" 
Genesis29:16 Laban andhi' ana' babine' kadhuwa, se towa'an nyamana Liya, se ngodha'an nyamana Rahel." 
Genesis29:17 Liya orem matana, tape Rahel bagus badanna tor raddin robana." 
Genesis29:18 Yakub terro ka Rahel, daddi laju ngoca', “Kaula poron alako pettong taon manabi kaula eedine abine Rahel.”" 
Genesis29:19 Sambidda Laban, “Lebbi becce' Rahel bi' sengko' ebagi ka ba'na etembang ka oreng laen. Ba'na la enneng dhinna' ban sengko'.”" 
Genesis29:20 Yakub alako pettong taon abidda polana terro ka Rahel; bakto se pettong taon jareya ekarassa pera' pan-barampan are amarga kataresna'anna ka Rahel. 
Genesis29:21 Yakub laju ngoca' ka Laban, “Baktona ampon napa'. Samangken kaula nyo'ona edi akabina sareng pottrana sampeyan.”" 
Genesis29:22 Daddi Laban pas ajang-onjang ce' bannya'na. Oreng padha eonjang kabbi. 
Genesis29:23 Tape se egiba ka Yakub e malem jareya Liya, banne Rahel. Daddi Yakub apolong tedhung ban Liya. (" 
Genesis29:24 Bi' Laban Liya eberri'i dunor bine'na se anyama Zilpa, esoro gabay pangladinna.)" 
Genesis29:25 Buru kalagguwanna Yakub tao ja' se ekapolong tedhung jareya Liya. Yakub laju entar ka Laban sarta ngoca', “Aponapa kaula me' epacara paneka bi' sampeyan? Kaula alako polana terro abineya Rahel. Aponapa sampeyan me' co-ngoco?”" 
Genesis29:26 Sambidda Laban, “Noro' adad e dhinna' ana' se ngodha'an ta' olle alake ajangadha'i se towa'an." 
Genesis29:27 Nante' gallu sampe' jang-onjangan se samenggu abidda reya la mare. Rahel bi' sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na mon ba'na endha' alako pettong taon aggi'.” 
Genesis29:28 Yakub ngenggi'i, ban saellana jang-onjangan se samenggu abidda jareya la mare, bi' Laban Rahel ebagi ka Yakub menangka binena. (" 
Genesis29:29 Bi' Laban Rahel eberri'i dunor bine'na se anyama Bilhah, esoro gabay pangladinna.)" 
Genesis29:30 Yakub tedhung apolong ban Rahel keya, ban kataresna'anna ka Rahel alebbiyan dhari kataresna'anna ka Liya. Saellana jareya Yakub alako ka Laban pettong taon aggi'." 
Genesis29:31 E bakto PANGERAN ngoladi ja' Liya ta' pate ekataresnae bi' Yakub etembang Rahel, bi' PANGERAN Liya epaandhi' ana', tape Rahel paggun ta' andhi' ana'." 
Genesis29:32 Liya ngandhung laju rembi' lalake'. Ca'na Liya, “PANGERAN ngoladi ka tang kasossa'an, ban sateya tang lake tanto neser ka sengko'.” Daddi ana'na pas enyamae Ruben." 
Genesis29:33 Liya ngandhung pole laju rembi' lalake' keya. Ca'na Liya, “PANGERAN apareng ana' reya ka sengko' polana PANGERAN meyarsa ja' sengko' ta' ekataresnae tang lake.” Daddi ana'na jareya enyamae Simeyon." 
Genesis29:34 Liya gi' ngandhung pole ban rembi' lalake' keya. Ca'na Liya, “Sateya tang lake tanto acekka'an ka sengko' sabab sengko' la ngalahirragi ana' lalake' katello.” Daddi ana'na jareya enyamae Lewi." 
Genesis29:35 Saellana jareya Liya gi' ngandhung pole sarta rembi' lalake' pole. Ca'na Liya, “Sateya sengko' asokkora ka PANGERAN.” Daddi ana'na jareya enyamae Yehuda. Saellana jareya Liya pas ta' andhi' ana' pole." 
Genesis30:1 Tape Rahel paggun ta' andhi' ana'. Daddi atena pas arassa baji' ka taretanna, oca'na ka Yakub, “Tore kaula paandhi' ana'. Mon bunten kaula bango' mateya.”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakub laju peggel ka Rahel, pas ngoca', “Sengko' reya banne Allah. Allah dibi' se mata'andhi' ana' ba'na.”" 
Genesis30:3 Ca'na Rahel, “Paneka' Bilha, dunor kaula; pondhut sampeyan, kapolong asare, me' olle andhi' ana'. Ana'na ekala'a kaula. Daddi kaula bisa ngemban ana' kalaban parantara'anna Bilha.”" 
Genesis30:4 Daddi Bilha laju ekabine Yakub, sarta pas ekapolong tedhung." 
Genesis30:5 Bilha laju ngandhung, pas rembi' lalake'." 
Genesis30:6 Ca'na Rahel, “Allah la apareng kaadilan nolonge sengko'. Tang parnyo'onan ekabbuli, sengko' eparenge ana' lalake'.” Daddi kana' jareya laju enyamae Dan." 
Genesis30:7 Bilha ngandhung pole, pas rembi' lalake' keya." 
Genesis30:8 Ca'na Rahel, “Sengko' aperrang amba' pate ban tang taretan, sateya sengko' mennang.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Naftali." 
Genesis30:9 E bakto Liya apangrasa ja' aba'na ta' kera andhi' ana' pole, dunorra se anyama Zilpa laju ebagi ka Yakub esoro kabine." 
Genesis30:10 Zilpa laju andhi' ana' dhari Yakub, ana'na lalake'." 
Genesis30:11 Ca'na Liya, “Pojur sengko' reya.” Daddi kana' jareya laju enyamae Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Zilpa pas andhi' ana' lalake' pole dhari Yakub. 
Genesis30:13 Ca'na Liya, “Saapa sennengnga tang ate! Sateya reng-oreng babine'an bakal ngoca'a ja' sengko' reya pojur onggu.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Asyer." 
Genesis30:14 E bakto mosemma oreng anye, Ruben entar ka teggal, pas nemmo bu-tombuwan se nyamana dudaim. Ruben ngala' buwana, egiba ka Liya, ebuna. Ca'na Rahel ka Liya, “Mara, ra, sengko' berri'i buwana dudaim ollena ana'na se nemmo e teggal jareya, sakone' bai.”" 
Genesis30:15 Saodda Liya, “Apa gi' ta' cokop, ba'na ngala' tang lake? Sateya ba'na gi' menta'a dudaim ollena tang ana' se nemmo e teggal.” Ca'na Rahel, “Mon sengko' eberri'i buwana dudaim ollena ana'na ba'na se nemmo e teggal jareya, dhaggi' lem-malem Yakub olle tedhung ban ba'na.”" 
Genesis30:16 E are jareya Yakub mole dhari teggal e baja asar. Bi' Liya esanderri. Ca'na Liya, “Dhaggi' lem-malem sampeyan asaren ban kaula, sabab kaula ampon majar sareng buwana dudaim ollena ana' kaula se nemmo e teggal.” Daddi e malem jareya Yakub tedhung ban Liya." 
Genesis30:17 Parnyo'onanna Liya ekabbuli bi' Allah. Liya ngandhung, pas rembi' lalake'. Jareya ana'na ban Yakub se nomer lema'." 
Genesis30:18 Ca'na Liya, “Sengko' eparenge opa bi' Allah polana sengko' ngatorragi tang dunor ka tang lake.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Isakhar." 
Genesis30:19 Liya pas ngandhung pole, laju rembi' lalake'. Jareya ana'na ban Yakub se nomer ennem." 
Genesis30:20 Ca'na Liya, “Paparengnga Allah ka sengko' reya talebat bagussa. Sateya tang lake tanto enneng ban sengko', sabab sengko' la alahirragi ana' lalake' kaennem.” Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Zebulon." 
Genesis30:21 Saellana jareya Liya rembi' pole, babine', enyamae Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Allah laju emot ka Rahel. Parnyo'onanna Rahel ekabbuli, apareng ana' ka Rahel jareya." 
Genesis30:23 Rahel ngandhung, pas rembi' lalake'. Ca'na Rahel, “Allah la maelang tang kanespa'an; sengko' eparenge ana'.”" 
Genesis30:24 Daddi kana' jareya enyamae Yusup. Ca'na Rahel pole, “Mandar sengko' bi' PANGERAN eparengngana ana' lalake' settong aggi'.”" 
Genesis30:25 Saellana Rahel rembi' Yusup, Yakub mator ka Laban, “Kaula nyo'ona edi palemana ka nagara kaula." 
Genesis30:26 Bine kaula se kadhuwa sareng na'-ana' kaula ollena se alako ka sampeyan, bi' kaula padha ebakta'a sadaja. Sampeyan oneng kaula ampon alako amba' pate.”" 
Genesis30:27 Ca'na Laban, “Mara edhingngagi gallu: Sengko' la tao ja' PANGERAN aberkadi sengko' polana ba'na." 
Genesis30:28 Mara ngoca' barampa opa se epenta'a ba'na.” 
Genesis30:29 Saodda Yakub, “Sampeyan ampon oneng dibi' ja' kaula alako amba' pate; sape dumbana sampeyan atamba bannya' polana epeyara kaula." 
Genesis30:30 Sabellunna badha kaula, dhi'-andhi'na sampeyan sakone', samangken sampeyan ampon ce' sogina. PANGERAN ampon aberkadi sampeyan polana kaula. Samangken ampon baktona kaula alakowa kaangguy kaparlowanna ana' bine kaula dibi'.”" 
Genesis30:31 Ca'na Laban, “Daddi barampa se ebajarragiya sengko' ka ba'na?” Atorra Yakub, “Ampon kaula ta' osa parenge opa pa-ponapa. Kaula gi' terrosa meyara'a ebinna sampeyan, sokor sampeyan kasokan narema parnyo'onan kaula paneka:" 
Genesis30:32 Kaula nyo'ona edi are mangken ajalana lebada e nga'-tengnga'anna embi' sareng dumbana sampeyan; kaula ngala'a saneyap budhu'na dumba se celleng, sareng budhu'na embi' se lang-belling otabana se toltol. Ganeka saos opa se eso'ona kaula." 
Genesis30:33 E bingkeng are gampang saos ka sampeyan manabi terro onenga ponapa kaula paneka jujur otaba bunten. Mon sampeyan meyos mareksa'a opa kaula, laju ngoladi badha embi' se ta' toltol otabana lang-belling, otabana dumba se ta' celleng, tanto sampeyan oneng ja' ganeka kaula ollena ngeco'.”" 
Genesis30:34 Ca'na Laban, “Iya, nyaman! Sengko' narema ka katantowanna ba'na jareya!”" 
Genesis30:35 Tape e are jareya Laban malaen sakabbinna embi' lake' se lorek otaba lang-belling ban sakabbinna embi' pangorbi se lang-belling, toltol otaba se badha te-potena; bariya keya ba-dumba se celleng padha epalaen. Ban-keban jareya esoro owan ka na'-ana'na," 
Genesis30:36 sarta pas esoro giba pajau dhari Yakub, sampe' ka kennengngan se jauna tello are parjalanan. Embi' ban dumba re-karena laju epaoros ka Yakub." 
Genesis30:37 Yakub laju ngala' ca'-ranca' se gi' biru dhari bungkana hawar, bungkana badam ban bungkana barangan; kole'na sabagiyan ekolbit, sampe' ranca' jareya padha katon lang-belling." 
Genesis30:38 Ca'-ranca' jareya esaba' e adha'anna ban-keban jareya, e dhalem baddhana nom-enomanna, sabab embi' ban dumba jareya kapprana nyake mon teppa'na ngenoma." 
Genesis30:39 Daddi mon bi'-embi' jareya esake e adha'anna ca'-ranca' gella', budhu'na lorek otaba lang-belling otabana toltol kabbi." 
Genesis30:40 Yakub malaen ba-dumbana, laju epaaddhep ka bi'-embi' se lorek ban celleng. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Yakub andhi' ebin dibi' ban ebinna jareya epalaen dhari ebinna Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Mon ban-keban se baras teppa'na ake-sake, Yakub nyaba' ca'-ranca' se ekolbit gella' e adha'anna, e baddhana nom-enomanna." 
Genesis30:42 Tape ca'-ranca' jareya ta' esaba' e adha'anna ban-keban se ta' kowat. Daddi sakabbinna keban se pote jareya ta' kowat, ban jareya se daddi andhi'na Laban; dineng ban-keban se celleng, se lang-belling ban se toltol jarowa kowat, ban jareya se daddi andhi'na Yakub." 
Genesis30:43 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Yakub laju ce' sogina. Embi' ban dumbana bannya', bariya keya ontana, mar-hemarra ban nor-dunorra." 
Genesis31:1 Yakub ngedhing na'-ana'na Laban ngoca' kantha reya, “Yakub la ngala' sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na eppa'. Dhi'-andhi'na Yakub kabbi asalla dhari dhi'-andhi'na eppa'.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakub nangale'e keya ja' Laban ta' baranca akantha dha'-adha'na ka aba'na. 
Genesis31:3 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka Yakub, “Kassa' ba'na abali ka nagarana eppa'na ban ka la-balana ba'na. Sengko' se abarengngana ba'na.”" 
Genesis31:4 Saellana jareya Yakub nyoro oreng ngolok Rahel ban Liya, esoro amon-temmon ban aba'na neng e kennengnganna embi' ban dumbana." 
Genesis31:5 Ca'na Yakub ka se kadhuwa jareya, “Sengko' nangale'e ja' eppa'na ba'na la ta' baranca pole ka sengko', ta' akantha ba'-lamba'na; tape Allah se esemba tang eppa' ajaga sengko'." 
Genesis31:6 Ba'na padha tao keya ja' sengko' reya alako ka eppa'na ba'na amba' pate. 
Genesis31:7 Maske kantha jareya sengko' gi' etepo, tang opa eoba sampe' sapolo kale. Tape bi' Allah eppa'na ba'na ta' epanneng alako jahat ka sengko'." 
Genesis31:8 E bakto eppa'na ba'na adhabu, ‘Embi' se toltol daddiya opana ba'na,’ embi'na kabbi padha abudhu' abulu toltol. E bakto eppa'na adhabu, ‘Embi' se lang-belling daddiya opana ba'na,’ embi'na kabbi padha abudhu' lang-belling." 
Genesis31:9 Allah mondhut ebinna eppa'na ba'na, eparengngagi ka sengko'." 
Genesis31:10 E bakto mosemma embi' akabin, sengko' amempe nangale'e bi'-embi' lake' se teppa'na ake-sake kabbi padha lorek, toltol ban lang-belling." 
Genesis31:11 Allah kalaban ropa malaekat adhabu ka sengko' e dhalem mempe jareya, dhabuna, ‘Yakub!’ Sengko' nyaot, ‘Ka'dhinto.’" 
Genesis31:12 Malaekat jareya adhabu pole, ‘Abas, embi' lake' se nyake rowa buluna lorek, toltol ban lang-belling kabbi. Jareya bi' Sengko' pajat epakantha jareya polana Sengko' nangale'e baramma Laban ka ba'na." 
Genesis31:13 Sengko' reya Allah se tao ngaton ka ba'na e Betel. E dhissa' ba'na ngatorragi bato menangka parengeddan, se bi' ba'na eserame mennya' jaitun e attasanna; e jadhiya ba'na asompa ka Sengko'. Sateya mara ba'na akes-rengkes, pas nyengla dhari nagara reya, mole ka nagarana la-balana ba'na.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Liya ban Rahel laju nyaot, “Dhari sadaja dhi'-andhi'na eppa' ampon tadha' pole bagiyanna se ekasangkola kaula." 
Genesis31:15 Kaula padha eanggep oreng manca. Kaula paneka padha ejuwal, dineng pessena se etarema ampon epatadha' sadaja." 
Genesis31:16 Sadajana se epondhut Allah dhari eppa' paneka sanyatana gadhuwan kaula se kadhuwa paneka, sareng gadhuwanna na'-ana' kaula. Ngereng lampa'agi ponapa se edhabuwagi sareng Allah ka sampeyan.”" 
Genesis31:17 Yakub laju akes-rengkes, moleya ka eppa'na e nagara Kana'an. Ne-binena ban na'-ana'na epaongga ka ontana, embi' ban dumbana egiba kabbi, epajalan e adha'anna, bariya keya sabarang dhi'-andhi'na se ekaolle e Mesopotamia." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 E bakto jareya Laban teppa'na badha e teggal agunteng buluna ba-dumbana, ban e bakto jareya Rahel ngeco' ca-arca andhi'na eppa'na se egabay panjagana ana' binena." 
Genesis31:20 Yakub ngakkale Laban, se mangkat ta' asa'-kasa'." 
Genesis31:21 Dhi'-andhi'na egiba kabbi, laju mangkat ru-kaburu. Pamangkadda alengka Songay Efrat terros nojju ka bagiyan Pagunongan Gileyad." 
Genesis31:22 Saellana olle tello are buru badha se abala ka Laban ja' Yakub buru. 
Genesis31:23 Laban laju makompol reng-orengnga, laju areng-bareng padha nyerser Yakub sampe' pettong are abidda, sampe' ecapo' e bagiyan pagunongan Gileyad." 
Genesis31:24 E baja malem Allah ngaton ka Laban e dhalem mempena, laju adhabu, “Senga', ba'na ta' olle ngara Yakub maske pera' ban oca' sakeccap.”" 
Genesis31:25 E bakto jareya Yakub la masang kemah e settong pagunongan, dineng Laban ban reng-orengnga maddek kemah keya neng e pagunongan Gileyad." 
Genesis31:26 Ca'na Laban ka Yakub, “Arapa ba'na me' ngakkale sengko', ngeba buru tang ana' se kadhuwa, epakantha se ngeba bujungan perrang?" 
Genesis31:27 Arapa ba'na me' ngakkale sengko', ondur ta' asa'-kasa', ta' amet ka sengko'? Ja' sakenga ba'na amet, ba'na tanto eater sambi etoro'e nyanyeyanna mosik terbang ban calempong." 
Genesis31:28 Ba'na la'-mala' ta' aberri' kasempadan ka sengko' kaangguy nyeyom tang ana' ban tang kompoy menangka tandha se apesa'a. Tengkana ba'na jareya budhu onggu! 
Genesis31:29 Sengko' cokop kowat kaangguy alako jahat ka ba'na, tape malemma Allah se esemba eppa'na ba'na maenga' ka sengko' ja' sengko' ta' olle ngara ba'na." 
Genesis31:30 Sengko' tao ja' ba'na se ondur dhari tang bengko lantaran ba'na ce' terrona se moleya ka bengkona, tape arapa ba'na me' ngeco' ca-arca se ajaga essena tang bengko?”" 
Genesis31:31 Ca'na Yakub, “Kaula kan ondur ta' asa'-kasa' polana tako' sampeyan ta' marengngagi tra-pottrana ngereng kaula." 
Genesis31:32 Parkara ca-arcana sampeyan, manabi orengnga se ngeco' sareng sampeyan epanggi, sareng kaula eokoma mate. Ngereng pareksa, ponapa barangnga sampeyan ganeka badha e ka'iya. Manabi badha, eatore pondhut. Reng-oreng se noro' kaula me' olle daddi saksena.” Yakub ta' tao ja' Rahel se ngeco' arca jareya." 
Genesis31:33 Laban laju nyaloksak kemahna Yakub. Saellana jareya laju mareksa kemahna Liya ban ka kemahna bareng babine' se kadhuwa rowa, tape arca jarowa ta' etemmo. Dhi-budhina laju maso' ka kemahna Rahel." 
Genesis31:34 Tape arca jareya bi' Rahel la ekala', esaba' ka dhalem kanthongnga pa-kapana ontana, dineng aba'na dibi' toju' e attassa pa-kapa jareya. Kemahna Rahel jareya bi' Laban esaloksak epabalattra, tape arca jareya ta' etemmo." 
Genesis31:35 Rahel laju mator ka eppa'na, “Sampeyan ja' duka ka kaula, Pa'; kaula ta' kengeng manjeng manggi'i sampeyan, polana kaula kalerressan dhateng kotorra.” Laban nyare'e epatete, tape ta' ahasel nemmo arca jareya." 
Genesis31:36 Daddi Yakub laju peggel. “Ponapa kajahadanna kaula?” patanyana epasomengnget. “Ponapa sala kaula me' sampe' eserser sareng sampeyan? 
Genesis31:37 Samangken, saamponna nyaloksak sadajana barang kaula, ponapa sampeyan ampon manggi barangnga sampeyan se elang ganeka? Ngereng pakalowar barang ganeka, saba' e ka'iya, sopaja reng-oreng se noro' kaula sareng se ngereng sampeyan kengeng nengale sareng laju oneng pasera se lerres e antarana sampeyan sareng kaula." 
Genesis31:38 Ampon dhu polo taon kaula akompol sareng sampeyan. Dumba sareng embi'na sampeyan ampon adhu'-budhu' sabannya'na, ban kaula ta' oneng neddha embi' lake'na sampeyan maske settonga." 
Genesis31:39 Manabi badha se ekakan burun alas sareng kaula ta' ebakta ka sampeyan, tape kaula dibi' se agante'e. Se ekeco' oreng e baja seyang otaba malem bi' sampeyan esoro gante'e ka kaula." 
Genesis31:40 Kaula serreng kapanasan e baja seyang, sareng kacellebban e baja malem. Kaula serreng ta' ngeddha tedhung." 
Genesis31:41 Kadi gapaneka kabadha'an kaula saabidda alako ka sampeyan, dhu polo taon abidda. Pa' bellas taon abidda kaula alako se terro ngaandhi'a pottrana sampeyan se kadhuwa, sareng nem taon pole se alako se terro ngaandhi'a embi' sareng dumba paneka. Saabidda dhu polo taon ganeka sampeyan ngoba opa kaula kantos sapolo kale." 
Genesis31:42 Saompamaepon kaula ta' ekabellasi sareng Allahna bangatowana kaula, enggi paneka Allah se esemba Ibrahim sareng Ishak, tanto kaula bi' sampeyan epakon ondur ta' kalaban ngeba pa-ponapa. Namong Allah ngoladi kasossa'an kaula sareng lalakon kaula, sarengngan malemma Allah ampon apareng kapotosan.”" 
Genesis31:43 Saodda Laban ka Yakub, “Babine' se kadhuwa jareya tang ana'; ana'na se kadhuwa jareya tang kompoy, ba-dumbana tang andhi' keya. Sanyatana, sabarang se etangale'e ba'na e dhinna' reya tang andhi'. Tape sengko' ta' ngenneng apa-rapa sopaja tang ana' ban tang kompoy pagguna neng e dhinna'." 
Genesis31:44 Daddi mara ba'na ban sengko' sateya agabay parjanjiyan, ban mara nyoson bato menangka tandhana parjanjiyan jareya.”" 
Genesis31:45 Daddi Yakub laju ngala' bato, pas epamanjeng menangka bato parengeddan." 
Genesis31:46 Reng-orengnga laju esoro ngala' bato, batona laju etombuk. Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya padha ngakan e seddi'anna tombuganna bato gella'." 
Genesis31:47 Bi' Laban tombuganna bato jareya enyamae Yegar-Sahaduta, tape bi' Yakub enyamae Galed." 
Genesis31:48 Ca'na Laban ka Yakub, “Tombuganna bato reya daddiya parengeddan ka sengko' ban ka ba'na.” Jareya sababba kennengngan jareya laju enyamae Galed." 
Genesis31:49 Laban ngoca' pole, “Moga-moga PANGERAN ngoladana sengko' ban ba'na saabidda sengko' ban ba'na apesa e jauna.” Daddi kennengngan jareya laju enyamae Mizpa." 
Genesis31:50 Laban ngoca' pole, “Mon ba'na jahat ka tang ana' se kadhuwa jareya, otabana mon ba'na abine babine'an laen, maske sengko' ta' tao, kaenga'e ja' Allah ngoladi ka sengko' ban ka ba'na." 
Genesis31:51 Areya' tombuganna bato, bato parengeddan e antarana sengko' ban ba'na." 
Genesis31:52 Tombuganna bato reya, ban bato parengeddan reya, menangka sakse ka sengko' ban ka ba'na, ja' sengko' ta' olle ngalebadi tombuganna bato reya nyerrangnga ba'na, ban ba'na ta' olle ngalebadi tombuganna bato reya otaba bato parengeddan reya kaangguy nyerrangnga sengko'." 
Genesis31:53 Allah se esemba Ibrahim ban se esemba tang eppa' Nahor, se daddiya hakim se ngadilana sengko' ban ba'na.” Yakub laju asompa demi Allah se esemba Ishak, eppa'na, ja' aba'na neptebbana janji jareya." 
Genesis31:54 Yakub laju nyambelli settong keban, laju eatorragi ka Allah menangka kurban e attassa gumo' jareya. Saellana jareya reng-orengnga laju epakompol eajak ngakan areng-bareng. Samarena ngakan reng-oreng jareya padha ngenep e gumo' jareya." 
Genesis31:55 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Laban nyeyom ana' ban kompoyya menangka amet, laju aberkadi na'-ana'na ban poy-kompoyya jareya, samarena pas mole ka kennengnganna dibi'." 
Genesis32:1 E bakto Yakub nerrossagi parjalananna laju esanderri kat-malaekat. 
Genesis32:2 E bakto ngoladi kat-malaekat jareya, Yakub adhabu, “Areya tantarana Allah.” Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Mahana'im." 
Genesis32:3 Yakub laju ngotos oreng, epamangkat kaadha' ka Seir e baba Edom, esoro nyare kaka'na." 
Genesis32:4 Reng-oreng jareya bi' Yakub esoro ngoca' kantha reya ka Esau, “Badha pessennepon Yakub sapaneka, ‘Kaula akompol sareng Laban kantos abit." 
Genesis32:5 Samangken kaula ampon gadhuwan sape, hemar, dumba, embi', dunor lalake'an sareng babine'an. Kaula ngatore kabar ka sampeyan, guste, kalaban pangarep moga-moga sampeyan kasokana narema kaula.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 E bakto la abali ka kennengnganna Yakub, reng-oreng otosan jareya mator, “Abdina ampon apanggi sareng Esau, kaka'na panjennengngan. Samangken Esau parappa'na ajalan ka ka'dhinto, ngamba'a panjennengngan, abakta oreng pa' ratos.”" 
Genesis32:7 Ngedhing oca' jareya Yakub ce' tako'na. Reng-oreng se ekabareng laju ebagi epadaddi dhu bagiyan; bariya keya dumba ban sapena ban ontana. 
Genesis32:8 Ca'na pekkerra, “Mon Esau nyerrang se sabagiyan, bagiyan settonganna gi' ngenneng buru.”" 
Genesis32:9 Yakub laju adu'a, oca'na, “Adhu, Guste Allah se esemba Ibrahim emba abdidalem sareng Ishak eppa' abdidalem, peyarsa'agi parnyo'onan abdidalem, GUSTE. Sareng Junandalem abdidalem epakon abali ka nagara abdidalem, akompol sareng la-bala abdidalem. Junandalem adhabu badhi ngator sadajana sopaja tadha'a alangan pa-ponapa ka abdidalem." 
Genesis32:10 Abdidalem ta' pantes narema kabellasan sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem akadi se ampon kalakon. E bakto abdidalem alengka Songay Yordan abdidalem ta' ngeba pa-ponapa kajabana tongket. Samangken abdidalem abali ka ka'dhinto abakta reng-oreng sareng bin-ebin se epecca daddi dhu bagiyan ka'dhinto. 
Genesis32:11 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, Guste, sopaja ta' kantosa ekaneyaja Esau, taretan abdidalem. Abdidalem tako' manabi Esau nyerrang sareng mate'e abdidalem sadaja, tamaso' jugan babine'an sareng na'-kana'." 
Genesis32:12 Kaemodi ja' Junandalem ampon adhabu badhi ngator sadajana sopaja abdidalem ta' manggiya alangan pa-ponapa, sareng aparenga toronan sabannya'na ka abdidalem, toronan se bannya'epon kantos ta' ekenneng bitong, akadi bannya'na beddhi e paseser.”" 
Genesis32:13 E malem jareya Yakub ngenep e jadhiya. Kalagguwanna ebinna laju epele, ebagiya ka Esau menangka le-olle. Le-ollena jareya acem-macem, iya areya: embi' babine' dhu ratos meggi' ban lalake' dhu polo meggi', dumba babine' dhu ratos meggi' ban lalake' dhu polo meggi', onta se gi' nyosowe ban budhu'na tello polo meggi', sape babine' pa' polo meggi' ban lalake' sapolo meggi', hemar babine' dhu polo meggi' ban lalake' sapolo meggi'." 
Genesis32:14  
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Ban-keban jareya esa-pesa epadaddi pan-barampan bagiyan, yan-sabagiyanna epassra'agi ka settong kabulana, esoro jaga. Ca'na Yakub ka la-kabulana jareya, “Kassa' mangkat kaadha'. E antarana bagiyan se settong ban settonganna kodu eella'e.”" 
Genesis32:17 Ka kabulana se nomer settong Yakub ngoca', “Mon tang taretan Esau tatemmo ban ba'na sarta atanya, ‘Sapa lorana ba'na? Ba'na entara dha'emma? Andhi'na sapa ban-keban se eerengngagi ba'na jareya?’" 
Genesis32:18 Saodi kantha reya, ‘Gadhuwanna Yakub, abdiepon Esau, badhi eatorragiya ka Esau, lorana. Yakub dibi' gi' badha e bingkeng.’ ” Kabulana se kapeng dhuwa', kapeng tello', ban sakabbinna se esoro ajaga ban-keban gella', padha eparenta'agi kantha jareya keya. Ca'na pekkerra pola le-olle jareya bisa macellep atena Esau, daddi mon tatemmo sopaja Esau bisa'a nyapora kasala'anna." 
Genesis32:19  
Genesis32:20  
Genesis32:21 Le-olle jareya esoro giba kaadha', dineng aba'na dibi' gi' ngenep e parkemahanna." 
Genesis32:22 E malem jareya Yakub jaga se tedhung, laju alengka Songay Yabok, ngeba binena se kadhuwa, sellerra se kadhuwa ban ana'na se sabellas oreng." 
Genesis32:23 Saellana reng-oreng jareya la epalengka songay kabbi, Yakub laju ngeba dhi'-andhi'na alengka songay jareya keya." 
Genesis32:24 Samarena, Yakub dibi' gi' nyeccer e budhi, kadibi'an, ta' noro' alengka songay jareya. O-tao pas badha oreng lalake', oreng jareya laju akeket ban Yakub sampe' para' seyang." 
Genesis32:25 E bakto oreng jareya arassa ja' ta' kera bisa'a makala Yakub, Yakub laju epokol epateppa' e bangkongnga, sampe' tolangnga bangkongnga jareya locot dhari cacopona." 
Genesis32:26 Oreng jareya adhabu, “Mara, sengko' ocol, sateya la para' moncara are.” “Bunten, junandalem ta' eocola, kajabana manabi abdidalem eberkadi dhimen,” atorra Yakub." 
Genesis32:27 “Sapa nyamana ba'na?” dhabuna oreng jareya. “Yakub,” saodda." 
Genesis32:28 Dhabuna oreng jareya, “Molae sateya nyamana ba'na banne Yakub pole. Ba'na la akeket ban Allah sarta ban manossa, ban ba'na mennang; daddi nyamana ba'na sateya oba daddi Isra'il.”" 
Genesis32:29 Atorra Yakub, “Samangken ngereng abdidalem parenge oneng pasera asmana junandalem.” Tape oreng jareya adhabu, “Ba'na ta' osa tao ka tang nyama.” Saellana jareya Yakub laju eberkadi." 
Genesis32:30 Ca'na Yakub, “Sengko' nangale'e Allah, dhep-adhebban, tape sengko' gi' odhi'.” Daddi kennengngan jareya bi' Yakub enyamae Peniel." 
Genesis32:31 E bakto are la moncar, Yakub laju mangkat dhari Peniel. Pajalanna abak dippang polana tolangnga bangkongnga se locot dhari cacopona gella'." 
Genesis32:32 Sampe' sateya oreng Isra'il ta' endha' ngakan daging e bagiyanna cacopona tolangnga bangkong, polana Yakub ekenneng pokol e bagiyan jareya." 
Genesis33:1 Yakub nangale'e Esau dhateng ngeba oreng pa' ratos. Daddi na'-ana'na laju egi-bagi, sabagiyan epabareng Liya, sabagiyan epabareng Rahel ban sellerra se kadhuwa." 
Genesis33:2 Sellerra ban na'-ana'na esaba' e adha', Liya ban na'-ana'na esaba' e budhiyanna, dineng Rahel ban Yusup esaba' e dhi-budhi." 
Genesis33:3 Yakub ajalan e dha'-adha' kadibi'. Sambi nyander ka kaka'na, Yakub asojud sampe' pettong kale." 
Genesis33:4 Tape Esau pas nyander ka Yakub. Yakub laju egellu' ekaloskos. Se kadhuwa laju padha nanges. 
Genesis33:5 E bakto nangale'e babine'an ban na'-ana'na jareya kabbi, Esau atanya, “Sapa se ekabareng ba'na reya?” “Paneka ana' kaula sadaja,” ca'na Yakub. “Paparengnga Allah ka kaula.”" 
Genesis33:6 Saellana jareya sellerra se kadhuwa padha nyander abareng ban na'-ana'na, pas asojud." 
Genesis33:7 Samarena pas egante bi' Liya ban na'-ana'na, ban dhi-budhina Rahel ban Yusup padha nyander, pas padha asojud kabbi." 
Genesis33:8 Ca'na Esau, “Apa maksodda reng-oreng laenna se tatemmo kaadha' ban sengko' gella' rowa?” Ca'na Yakub, “Nyo'ona kabellasanna sampeyan.”" 
Genesis33:9 Tape Esau ngoca', “Tang dhi'-andhi' bannya', Le', ba'na ta' osa ari'-berri' ka sengko'.”" 
Genesis33:10 Ca'na Yakub, “Ampon, ja' sapaneka! Manabi sampeyan ampon neser ka kaula, tarema'agi le-olle kaula ka'issa'. Monggu ka kaula, nengale robana sampeyan saos padha sareng manabi kaula nengale Allah, sabab sampeyan ce' saena ka kaula." 
Genesis33:11 Panyo'on kaula, tarema'agi tor-ator kaula ka'issa'. Allah bellas ka kaula, sadajana kaparlowan kaula ecokobi, tadha' korangnga.” Yakub ce' maksana, sampe' dhi-budhina Esau endha' narema le-ollena Yakub jareya." 
Genesis33:12 Ca'na Esau, “Mara terros mangkat bai. Sengko' ajalana kaadha'.”" 
Genesis33:13 Ca'na Yakub, “Sampeyan oneng na'-ana' kaula paneka ta' kowat, kaula jugan kodu te-ngate ajaga dumba sareng sape kaula se nyosowe. Manabi egiring epagancang, sanare namong saare, tanto ebin gapaneka mate sadaja." 
Genesis33:14 Eatore sampeyan meyos kaadha', kaula ngerenga re-lere. Kaula ajalana menorot kakowadanna ebin kaula, kantos nyapo' ka sampeyan e Edom.”" 
Genesis33:15 Ca'na Esau, “Mon kantha jareya reng-oreng se egiba sengko' reya bi' sengko' sabagiyan edina'a ka ba'na.” Tape ca'na Yakub, “Ampon ta' osa pot-repot, kaula namong terro masennengnga sampeyan.”" 
Genesis33:16 Daddi e are jareya Esau abali ka Edom. 
Genesis33:17 Tape Yakub entar ka Sukot, pas maddek bengko e jadhiya, ebinna egabayyagi kandhang. Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Sukot." 
Genesis33:18 E dhalem parjalanan dhari Mesopotamia Yakub napa' salamet ka Sikhem e nagara Kana'an. E jadhiya laju maddek kemah e temorra kottha jareya. 
Genesis33:19 Saellana jareya Yakub laju melle tana andhi'na na'-ana'na Hemor, eppa'na Sikhem, argana saratos pesse salaka. Tana jareya se egabay kennengnganna kemahna." 
Genesis33:20 Yakub pas agabay mezba e jadhiya, se enyamae “Allahna Isra'il reya Allah”." 
Genesis34:1 E settong are, Dina, ana'na Yakub ollena ban Liya, entar ka babine'an Kana'an." 
Genesis34:2 E bakto Sikhem, ana'na Hemor oreng Hewi se daddi rato e baba jadhiya nangale'e Dina, Dina laju egiba buru pas eparkosa." 
Genesis34:3 Tape Sikhem pas arassa lebur ka Dina, Dina pas ecacae sopaja leburra keya ka aba'na." 
Genesis34:4 Ca'na Sikhem ka eppa'na, “Tore paraban ka'issa' penta'agi, ekabineya kaula.”" 
Genesis34:5 Yakub ngedhing ja' ana'na eparkosa, tape e bakto jareya na'-ana'na teppa'na badha e teggal, daddi tapaksa neng-enneng, ta' ngenneng apa-rapa, sabellunna na'-ana'na mole." 
Genesis34:6 Hemor, eppa'na Sikhem, entar ka Yakub, aparembagana parkara jareya." 
Genesis34:7 Tape e bakto jareya ana' lalake'anna Yakub padha mole dhari talon. E bakto ngedhing parkara jareya, na'-ana'na Yakub takerjat ban talebat peggella. Sabab arosak ana'na Yakub padha ban ya-nyeya bangsa Isra'il." 
Genesis34:8 Ca'na Hemor ka Yakub, “Ana' kaula lebur ka pottrana sampeyan. Daddi kaula nyo'ona lellana sampeyan, sareng kaula pottrana eso'ona, ejudhuwagiya sareng ana' kaula ka'dhissa'." 
Genesis34:9 Ngereng sampeyan sareng kaula mabadha parjanjiyan: bangsana sampeyan kengeng abine babine'an bangsa kaula, sapaneka jugan sabaligga." 
Genesis34:10 Sampeyan sadaja padha kengeng alenggi e nagara paneka akompol sareng bangsa kaula; e ka'imma'a saos se ekasokane sampeyan. Sampeyan kengeng aponapa'a saos e nagara paneka.” 
Genesis34:11 Sikhem pas mator ka eppa'na Dina ban ka tan-taretanna, “Ngereng kabbuli parnyo'onan kaula paneka. Ponapa saos se eso'ona sampeyan, sareng kaula etorodana." 
Genesis34:12 Ngereng dhabuwagi tor-ator ponapa se ekasokane sampeyan, sareng tantowagi mas kabinna. Ponapa se ekasokane sampeyan bi' kaula etorodana, sokor kaula eedine araji kana' ka'dhissa'.”" 
Genesis34:13 Sarrena Sikhem la arosak kahormadanna Dina, ale'na na'-ana'na Yakub jareya, daddi Sikhem laju etepo bi' na'-kana' jareya." 
Genesis34:14 Ca'na na'-ana'na Yakub ka oreng se kadhuwa jareya, “Kaula malo manabi ale' alake oreng se ta' asonnat." 
Genesis34:15 Kaula coma bisa narema manabi sampeyan norodi sarat paneka: Sampeyan kodu padha sareng bangsa kaula, enggi paneka sadajana lalake'anna sampeyan kodu esonnat." 
Genesis34:16 Saamponna, buru kaula narema'a usulla sampeyan parkara kabin campor paneka. Bangsa kaula neptebba e nga'-tengnga'anna sampeyan, ban daddi settong bangsa bi' sampeyan." 
Genesis34:17 Namong manabi sampeyan ta' kasokan narema sarat ganeka, sareng kaula ale' ekala'a pole. Saamponna ganeka kaula sadaja laju nyengla'a dhari ka'iya.”" 
Genesis34:18 Hemor ban Sikhem padha kasokan narema sarat jareya," 
Genesis34:19 sabab Sikhem talebat leburra ka ana'na Yakub, ban pole Sikhem jareya e antarana sabala'anna tamaso' se paleng ehormadi." 
Genesis34:20 Hemor ban Sikhem pas meyos ka kennengnganna reng-oreng akompol e labang sakethengnga kottha, pas adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya," 
Genesis34:21 “Reng-oreng Isra'il reya sanyatana kanca. Daddi mara dina me' olle apolong ban ba'na e nagara reya; panneng maske entara dha' emma'a bai. Nagara reya cokop lebar maske etamba'ana reng-oreng jareya. Dhaggi' ba'na bisa abine oreng Isra'il, ban oreng Isra'il bisa abine oreng bangsana ba'na." 
Genesis34:22 Tape reng-oreng jareya endha' apolonga ban ba'na, ban daddi sabangsa ban ba'na, mon ba'na endha' narema settong sarat, iya areya: sakabbinna lalake'an bangsana ba'na kodu padha asonnat akantha bangsa Isra'il." 
Genesis34:23 Dhaggi' ebinna bangsa jareya, ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na, bakal ekaandhi'a ba'na keya. Daddi mara tarema sarat jareya me' olle bangsa jareya endha' apolong ban ba'na.”" 
Genesis34:24 Reng-oreng kottha se akompol e jadhiya padha saroju' ka panemmona Hemor ban Sikhem, daddi saneyap oreng lalake' se dibasa e kottha jareya laju padha asonnat." 
Genesis34:25 Saellana olle tello are dhari jareya, e bakto lalake'an e nagara jareya gi' padha kasake'an polana se asonnat, Simeyon ban Lewi, iya areya kaka'na Dina, ana'na Yakub, laju ngala' peddhangnga, maso' ka kottha ta' asa'-kasa', mate'e sakabbinna lalake'an e jadhiya," 
Genesis34:26 tamaso' Hemor ban Sikhem. Dina laju ekone'e dhari bengkona Sikhem, terros egiba buru." 
Genesis34:27 Saellana mate'e reng-oreng e kottha jareya, na'-ana'na Yakub se laenna arampok kottha jareya, menangka babalessa sake' atena ka bangsa jareya polana Dina eparkosa." 
Genesis34:28 Kabbi padha ekala': embi' ban dumbana, sape ban hemarra, sabarang se badha e dhalem kottha ban e teggal." 
Genesis34:29 Rang-barang se aji ekala' kabbi, babine'an ban na'-kana' etawan, essena ko-bengko padha erampas." 
Genesis34:30 Ca'na Yakub ka Simeyon ban Lewi, “Ba'na padha masossa sengko'. Sateya oreng Kana'an ban oreng Feris ban sakabbinna oreng e nagara reya tanto padha amoso ka sengko'. Tang oreng ta' bannya'; mon reng-oreng kottha reya padha nyerrang sengko', tang ana' bine tanto tadha' karena.”" 
Genesis34:31 Tape se kadhuwa jareya nyaot, “Masa' kaula neng-ennengnga saos ale' epakantha sondel!”" 
Genesis35:1 E settong are Allah adhabu ka Yakub, “Sengko' reya Allah se ngaton ka ba'na e bakto ba'na buru dhari kaka'na, Esau. Kassa' ba'na duliyan entar ka Betel. Pas enneng e jadhiya, ban Sengko' maddeggagi mezba.”" 
Genesis35:2 Yakub laju ngoca' ka ana' binena ban ka reng-oreng se abareng ban aba'na, “Sengko' ban ba'na kabbi mangkada dhari dhinna', entara ka Betel. E dhissa' sengko' maddegga mezba se eatorragiya ka Allah se nolong sengko' e bakto sengko' ngadhebbi kasossa'an, ban se ajaga sengko' dha' emma'a bai sengko' ajalan. Daddi mara buwang kabbi sakabbinna ba-dibana bangsa manca se esempen ba'na; mara kabbi padha ababerse, ban ngangguy kalambi se berse.”" 
Genesis35:3  
Genesis35:4 Reng-oreng jareya laju massra'agi ka Yakub ca-arcana diba manca se esempen e jadhiya sarta teng-anteng andhi'na. Jareya kabbi bi' Yakub ebendhem e baba'anna kajuwan raja e seddi'anna kottha Sikhem. 
Genesis35:5 E bakto Yakub ban ana' binena mangkat, reng-oreng kottha e ma'-semma'na jareya bi' Allah padha epaandhi' rassa katako'an, daddi kabbi padha tadha' se nyerser Yakub ban rombonganna." 
Genesis35:6 Yakub ban reng-oreng laenna laju padha napa' ka tana Kana'an e kottha Betel se lamba' enyamae Lus. 
Genesis35:7 E jadhiya Yakub maddek mezba ban kennengngan jareya enyamae “El-Betel”, sabab Allah ngaton ka aba'na e jadhiya e bakto buru dhari kaka'na." 
Genesis35:8 E kennengngan jareya keya Debora, anjuna Ribka, mate, laju ebendhem e babana kajuwan raja e lao'na kottha. Daddi kajuwan jareya enyamae “Kajuwan Tanges”." 
Genesis35:9 Saellana Yakub abali dhari Mesopotamia, Allah ngaton pole ka aba'na ban apareng berkadda." 
Genesis35:10 Dhabuna Allah, “Ba'na ta' enyama'ana Yakub pole; sateya ba'na enyama'ana Isra'il.” Daddi bi' Allah Yakub enyamae Isra'il." 
Genesis35:11 Allah laju adhabu pole, “Sengko' reya Allah Se Mahakobasa. Pabannya' na' potona ba'na! Ba'na bakal noronnagiya sa-bangsa ban daddi bangatowana to-rato." 
Genesis35:12 Nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagi ka Ibrahim ban Ishak, bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na ban ka na' potona ba'na.”" 
Genesis35:13 Saellana jareya Allah laju adinggallagi Yakub. 
Genesis35:14 E kennengnganna Allah se abu-dhabu jareya, Yakub maddek bato parengeddan. Bato jareya eatorragi ka Allah sambi eselene anggur ban mennya' jaitun e attassa." 
Genesis35:15 Kennengngan jareya enyamae “Betel”. 
Genesis35:16 Saellana jareya Yakub ban rombonganna ngalle dhari Betel. E bakto gi' abak jau dhari Efrata, Rahel napa' baktona se rembi'a. Tape parembi'na malarat." 
Genesis35:17 E bakto sake'na la ce' talebadda, dhukon rana'na ngoca', “Pakowat, Rahel, pottrana sampeyan lalake' pole.”" 
Genesis35:18 Tape Rahel la para' napa'a ka ajalla, ban e bakto laresa ana'na laju enyamae Ben-Oni, tape bi' eppa'na kana' jareya enyamae Benyamin." 
Genesis35:19 Jinazana Rahel jareya laju ekoburragi e penggirra lorong ka Efrata, se sateya anyama Betlehem." 
Genesis35:20 Yakub maddek bato parengeddan e jadhiya, ban sampe' sateya koburanna Rahel jareya gi' etandhai ban bato jareya." 
Genesis35:21 Saellana jareya Yakub nerrossagi parjalananna, pas masang kemah e settong kennengngan se ngadhep ka manara Eder." 
Genesis35:22 Sabatara badha e kennengngan jareya, Ruben tedhung apolong ban Bilha, sellerra eppa'na. Yakub ngedhing parkara jareya, laju talebat peggella. Yakub andhi' ana' dhubellas oreng." 
Genesis35:23 Ana' ollena ban Liya iya areya Ruben (ana' sareyangnga Yakub), Simeyon, Lewi, Yehuda, Isakhar ban Zebulon." 
Genesis35:24 Ana' ollena ban Rahel iya areya Yusup ban Benyamin. 
Genesis35:25 Ollena ban Bilha, dunorra Rahel, iya areya Dan ban Naftali." 
Genesis35:26 Ollena ban Zilpa, dunorra Liya, iya areya Gad ban Asyer. Na'-kana' jareya kabbi lahir e Mesopotamia." 
Genesis35:27 Yakub laju napa' ka kalenggiyanna eppa'na, Ishak, neng e Mamre e seddi'na Hebron. (Gi' lamba' Ibrahim, embana, alenggi e jadhiya keya.)" 
Genesis35:28 E bakto jareya Ishak la ce' seppona, yuswana saratos ballung polo taon," 
Genesis35:29 laju seda, pas esareyagi bi' tra-pottrana, iya areya Esau ban Yakub." 
Genesis36:1 Areya' toronanna Esau aliyas Edom. 
Genesis36:2 Esau binena tatello', babine' dhari Kana'an, iya areya: Ada, ana'na Elon, oreng Het; Oholibama ana'na Ana kompoyya Zibeyon, oreng Hewi;" 
Genesis36:3 Basmat, ana'na Isma'il, ale'na Nebayot." 
Genesis36:4 Ada andhi' ana' Elifas, Basmat andhi' ana' Rehuwel," 
Genesis36:5 ban Oholibama andhi' ana' Yeus, Yaelam ban Korah. Na'-kana' jareya kabbi lahir e Kana'an." 
Genesis36:6 Saellana jareya Esau laju ngalle ka nagara laen ta' apolong ban Yakub, ana' binena egiba kabbi, bariya keya sakabbinna oreng se badha e bengkona, ebinna ban dhi'-andhi'na ollena se alako e Kana'an." 
Genesis36:7 Kan apesa dhari Yakub polana tana se ekennengnge ekadhuwai ban Yakub la ta' nyokobi ka kaparlowanna se kadhuwa jareya. Sabab ebinna la padha ce' bannya'na, daddi Esau ban Yakub ta' ngenneng akompol terros." 
Genesis36:8 Daddi Esau laju ngalle ka kennengngan se anyama Edom e pagunongan Seir. 
Genesis36:9 Areya' toronanna Esau, bangatowana oreng Edom." 
Genesis36:10 Binena se anyama Ada andhi' ana' lalake' kasorang, nyamana Elifas. Ban Elifas andhi' ana' lalake' kalema, iya areya: Téman, Omar, Zefo, Gaetam ban Kenas. Elifas andhi' seller, nyamana Timna. Timna andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Amalek. Binena Esau se anyama Basmat andhi' ana' lalake' kasorang se anyama Rehuwel. Ban Rehuwel andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya Nahat, Zerah, Syama ban Miza." 
Genesis36:11  
Genesis36:12  
Genesis36:13  
Genesis36:14 Binena se anyama Oholibama, iya areya ana'na Ana, kompoyya Zibeyon, andhi' ana' lalake' katello, iya areya Yeus, Yaelam ban Korah." 
Genesis36:15 Areya' kapalana ku-suku toronanna Esau: Elifas, ana' sareyangnga Esau, bangatowana ku-suku se kasebbut e baba reya: Téman, Omar, Zefo, Kenas, Korah, Gaetam ban Amalek." 
Genesis36:16 Ku-suku jareya kabbi toronanna Ada, binena Esau." 
Genesis36:17 Rehuwel, ana'na Esau, bangatowana ku-suku se kasebbut e baba reya: Nahat, Zerah, Syama ban Miza. Ku-suku jareya kabbi toronanna Basmat, binena Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Ku-suku se kasebbut e baba reya toronanna Esau dhari binena se anyama Oholibama ana'na Ana, iya areya: Yeus, Yaelam ban Korah." 
Genesis36:19 Ku-suku jareya kabbi toronanna Esau. 
Genesis36:20 Pandhudhu' aslina Tana Edom ebagi daddi ku-suku toronanna Seir, oreng Hori. Ku-suku jareya iya areya: Lotan, Syobal, Zibeyon, Ana, Disyon, Ezer ban Disyan." 
Genesis36:21  
Genesis36:22 Lotan reya bangatowana marga Hori ban Heman. (Lotan andhi' taretan bine', iya areya Timna.)" 
Genesis36:23 Syobal reya bangatowana marga: Alwan, Manahat, Ebal, Syefo ban Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Zibeyon andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Aya ban Ana. (Ana jareya se nemmo ber-somberra aeng panas e ra-ara, e bakto aba'na parappa'na ngowan mar-hemarra eppa'na.)" 
Genesis36:25 Ana reya eppa'na Disyon, ban Disyon bangatowana marga: Hemdan, Esyban, Yitran ban Keran. Ana andhi' keya ana' bine' kasorang, nyamana Oholibama." 
Genesis36:26  
Genesis36:27 Ezer bangatowana marga: Bilhan, Za'awan ban Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Disyan bangatowana marga Us ban Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Areya' ku-suku Hori e nagara Edom: Lotan, Syobal, Zibeyon, Ana, Disyon, Ezer ban Disyan." 
Genesis36:30  
Genesis36:31 Sabellunna badha rato se marenta e Isra'il, to-rato se kasebbut e baba reya alir-gilir marenta Tana Edom: Bela ana'na Beor dhari Dinhaba. Yobab ana'na Zera dhari Bozra.
