Husyam dhari dhaera Téman. Hadad ana'na Bedad dhari Awit (Hadad jareya se makala oreng Midian e dhalem paperrangan e dhaera Mo'ab). Samla dhari Masreka. Saul dhari Rehobot e penggir songay. Ba'al-Hanan ana'na Akhbor. Hadar dhari Pahu (binena anyama Mehetabe'el, ana'na Matred, kompoyya Mezahab)." 
Genesis36:32  
Genesis36:33  
Genesis36:34  
Genesis36:35  
Genesis36:36  
Genesis36:37  
Genesis36:38  
Genesis36:39  
Genesis36:40 Esau reya bangatowana ku-suku Edom reya: Timna, Alwa, Yetet, Oholibama, Ela, Pinon, Kenas, Téman, Mibzar, Magdiyel ban Iram. Saneyap tana se ekennengnge ku-suku jareya enyamae menorot nyamana suku jareya." 
Genesis36:41  
Genesis36:42  
Genesis36:43  
Genesis37:1 Yakub neptep alenggi e nagara Kana'an, kalenggiyanna eppa'na." 
Genesis37:2 Areya' caretana kalowargana: E bakto Yusup, pottrana Yakub, aomor petto bellas taon, lakona ngowan embi' ban dumba abareng ban ka'-kaka'na, iya areya na'-ana'na Bilha ban Zilpa, sellerra eppa'na. Yusup mamadul ka eppa'na parkara tengka polana ka'-kaka'na se juba'." 
Genesis37:3 Yakub aneserran ka Yusup etembang ka tra-pottrana se laen, sabab Yusup jareya lahir e bakto Yakub la seppo. Bi' Yakub Yusup ebadhiyagi juba se ce' bagussa." 
Genesis37:4 E bakto tan-taretanna tao ja' eppa'na aneserran ka Yusup etembang ka tra-pottrana se laen, tan-taretanna jareya laju ce' baji'na ka Yusup sampe' ta' endha' acaca manes sakale ka ale'na jareya." 
Genesis37:5 E settong malem Yusup amempe, ban e bakto mempena jareya ecareta'agi ka tan-taretanna, tan-taretanna jareya sajan ce' baji'na ka Yusup." 
Genesis37:6 Ca'na Yusup, “Mara edhingngagi, ya; sengko' amempe." 
Genesis37:7 Pangrasana sengko' ban ba'na kabbi badha e teggal agintel gandum. Tang gintelan sodek, dineng gintelanna ba'na kabbi badha e sakalenglengnga tang gintelan, padha mennot akantha se asojud ka tang gintelan jareya.”" 
Genesis37:8 “Pangrasana ba'na daddiya rato, marenta'a tan-taretanna kabbi?” ca'na tan-taretanna jareya. Daddi tan-taretanna jareya sajan atamba baji' ka Yusup polana mempe jareya ban polana sabarang se ecareta'agi parkara tan-taretanna jareya ka eppa'na." 
Genesis37:9 Yusup pas amempe pole, sarta laju acareta ka tan-taretanna, “Sengko' amempe pole; pangrasana sengko' nangale'e are, bulan ban bintang sabellas meggi' asojud ka sengko'.”" 
Genesis37:10 Mempe jareya bi' Yusup ecareta'agi keya ka eppa'na. Bi' eppa'na Yusup edukane, dhabuna, “Mempe apa jareya? Pangrasana ba'na, sengko' ban ebuna ban tan-taretanna ba'na entara asojud ka ba'na?”" 
Genesis37:11 Yusup ekadenggi'i bi' ka'-kaka'na, tape parkara jareya kabbi bi' eppa'na terros esempen e dhalem panggaliyanna." 
Genesis37:12 E settong are, e naleka ka'-kaka'na Yusup entar ka Sikhem ngowana embi' ban dumbana ramana," 
Genesis37:13 Yakub adhabu ka Yusup, “Kassa', ra, ba'na entar ka Sikhem, ka'-kaka'na ba'na ngowan dumba e dhissa'.” Sambidda Yusup, “Enggi, Pa'.”" 
Genesis37:14 Dhabuna eppa'na, “Tenggu, apa ka'-kaka'na ban ba-dumbana padha ta' nemmo aral pa-apa kabbi; mon la mare pas mole, sengko' balai.” Daddi bi' eppa'na Yusup eater sampe' gan Cora Hebron. Yusup napa' ka Sikhem," 
Genesis37:15 laju ajalan ka bara' ka temor ta' etemmo tojjuwanna. Pas badha oreng lalake' nangale'e Yusup se kantha jareya. Oreng jareya atanya, “Sampeyan nyare ponapa?”" 
Genesis37:16 “Nyare ka'-kaka' kaula, ngowan dumba,” ca'na Yusup. “Ponapa sampeyan nengale, ba' badha e ka'imma, gi'?”" 
Genesis37:17 Ca'na oreng gella', “Gella' pajat badha e ka'iya, samangken pon tadha'. Pangedhingnga kaula ca'epon entara ka Dotan.” Daddi Yusup pas nyosol ka'-kaka'na ban etemmo e Dotan onggu." 
Genesis37:18 Dhari jauna Yusup la etangale'e bi' tan-taretanna. Sabellunna Yusup napa' ka jadhiya, tan-taretanna padha asakongkel sarta motose mateyana Yusup." 
Genesis37:19 Ca'na tan-taretanna jareya, “Abas, wa, tokang mempe rowa entar dha' enna'." 
Genesis37:20 Mara pate'e, mayyidda pas ontallagi ka dhalem sala settongnga somor se kerreng. Ka eppa' kabala ekakan burun alas. Mara pas tenggu, baramma daddina pe-mempena rowa.”" 
Genesis37:21 Ruben ngedhing cacana tan-taretanna jareya, laju aehteyar nolonga Yusup. “Ella, ja' pate'e,” oca'na." 
Genesis37:22 “Cabbur ka somor e ra-ara reya bai, tape ja' pokol ban ja' paloka.” Ruben ngoca' kantha jareya polana andhi' karep nolonga Yusup dhari somor jareya, pas egiba'a mole ka eppa'na." 
Genesis37:23 E baktona Yusup napa' ka kennengngan gella', bi' tan-taretanna jubana se ce' bagussa laju ebit-sebbit." 
Genesis37:24 Saellana jareya Yusup laju ecabbur ka somor se kerreng gella'. 
Genesis37:25 Teppa'na tan-taretanna Yusup jareya ngakan, laju nangale'e badha kafilahna oreng Isma'il se dhateng dhari Gileyad entara ka Messer. Ta-ontana ebuwa'i palappa ban kismis." 
Genesis37:26 Ca'na Yehuda ka tan-taretanna, “Apa gunana mate'e ale' sarta notobi roseya jareya?" 
Genesis37:27 Mara ale' juwal ka reng-oreng Isma'il rowa bai. Daddi ale' ta' osa esake'e; sabab maske baramma'a Yusup jareya gi' taretanna sengko' ban ba'na, dhara ban daging dibi'.” Tan-taretanna saroju'," 
Genesis37:28 ban e bakto badha gar-sodagar Midian lebat e jadhiya, Yusup epakalowar bi' ka'-kaka'na dhari somor gella' laju ejuwal ka reng-oreng Isma'il. Argana dhu polo pesse salaka. Saellana jareya Yusup laju egiba ka Messer." 
Genesis37:29 Ruben abali ka somor gella', maksodda makalowara Yusup. Tape Yusup la tadha' e somor jareya. Daddi Ruben pas nyebbit kalambina menangka tandha sossana atena." 
Genesis37:30 Saellana jareya Ruben pas abali ka kennengnganna tan-taretanna, laju ngoca', “Ale' tadha' e somor rowa! Pas baramma sateya?”" 
Genesis37:31 Tan-taretanna Yusup pas nyambelli embi' settong; jubana Yusup ecabbur ka dharana embi' buru. 
Genesis37:32 Juba se la buddhak bi' dhara jareya egiba ka eppa'na, atorra, “Kaula manggi juba paneka. Ponapa paneka gadhuwanna pottrana sampeyan?”" 
Genesis37:33 Yakub emot ka juba jareya, dhabuna, “Iya, bendher! Tantona tang ana' ekakan burun alas. Tang ana' Yusup la ebit-sebbit burun alas!”" 
Genesis37:34 Yakub nyebbit rasoganna, laju ngagem rasogan karong menangka sossana panggaliyanna. Sampe' abit Yakub se molar polana pottrana jareya." 
Genesis37:35 Tra-pottrana lake' bine' padha nyander alepora panggaliyanna, tape Yakub ta' kasokan elepor oreng. “Sampe' mate sengko' ta' kera ambu se nangese tang ana'.” Daddi Yakub sossa terros polana kaelangan pottrana jareya." 
Genesis37:36 Sabatara jareya, e Messer, bi' reng-oreng Midian rowa Yusup ejuwal ka Potifar, parwirana rato, se daddi kapalana pangawalla karaton." 
Genesis38:1 Ra-kera e bakto jareya Yehuda ngalle ta' apolong ban tan-taretanna, pas akompol ban Hira, lalake' se asalla dhari Adulam." 
Genesis38:2 E jadhiya Yehuda kennal ban babine' Kana'an, ana'na Suwa, laju ekabine." 
Genesis38:3 Saellana jareya binena pas rembi' lalake', bi' eppa'na enyamae Er." 
Genesis38:4 Ana'na se nomer dhuwa' lalake' keya, enyamae Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Ana'na se nomer tello' lalake' pole, ban enyamae Syela. E bakto Syela lahir Yehuda teppa'na badha e Kezib." 
Genesis38:6 Ana'na se sareyang se anyama Er bi' Yehuda epabine'e Tamar. 
Genesis38:7 Er jareya juba' tengkana, daddi PANGERAN duka; Er laju epate'e." 
Genesis38:8 Yehuda laju ngoca' ka Onan, ale'na Er, “Kassa' ba'na tedhung ban randhana kaka'na. Lakone kawajibanna ba'na ka randhana kaka'na jareya, sabab ba'na taretanna lakena; kalaban cara se kantha jareya kaka'na ba'na bisa andhi' toronan.”" 
Genesis38:9 Tape Onan tao ja' na'-ana'na ta' kera ekaandhi' aba'na dibi'. Daddi, sabban akompol tedhung ban randhana kaka'na jareya, mannena epagili kalowar sopaja kaka'na ta' bisa'a andhi' toronan." 
Genesis38:10 Tengkana se kantha jareya maduka PANGERAN, daddi bi' PANGERAN Onan epate'e keya." 
Genesis38:11 Saellana jareya Yehuda ngoca' ka mantona se anyama Tamar jareya, “Kassa' ba'na mole ka bengkona reng towana; ba'na neng e jadhiya, terros daddi randha sampe' Syela tang ana' la raja.” Kan ngoca' kantha jareya polana Yehuda tako' Syela epate'e keya bi' Pangeran akantha taretanna se kadhuwa. Daddi Tamar mole ka bengkona oreng towana." 
Genesis38:12 Ta' abit saellana jareya binena Yehuda mate. Saellana elang kasossa'anna, Yehuda ngajak Hira, kancana se dhari Adulam rowa, entar ka Timna, kennengnganna ba-dumbana egunteng buluna." 
Genesis38:13 Tamar ngedhing kabar ja' mattowana entara ka Timna aguntenga buluna dumbana. 
Genesis38:14 Tamar laju asalen, kalambi randhana ebukka', asalen kalambi laen. Mowana etotobi, saellana jareya laju toju' e labang sakethengnga kottha Ena'im, e lorong ka Timna. Tamar tao onggu ja' Syela, ana'na Yehuda se bungso, la raja, tape aba'na gi' ta' epakabin ban lalake' jareya." 
Genesis38:15 E naleka Yehuda nangale'e Tamar, babine' jareya esanggu sondel polana mowana etotobi." 
Genesis38:16 Yehuda nyander ka seddi'anna e penggir lorong jareya, laju ngoca', “Mara, sengko' tedhunga ban ba'na.” Yehuda ta' tao ja' babine' jareya mantona dibi'. Tamar nyaot, “Sampeyan aparenga saponapa?”" 
Genesis38:17 Yehuda ngoca' pole, “Bi' sengko' ba'na eberri'ana budhu'na embi' settong.” Saodda Tamar, “Sae, sokor badha tanggunganna sampe' sampeyan ngeremmagi embi' ganeka.”" 
Genesis38:18 “Tanggungan apa se epenta'a ba'na?” ca'na Yehuda. Saodda Tamar, “Eccabba sampeyan ban talena, jugan tongkedda sampeyan ganeka.” Barang se dhadhuwa' jareya bi' Yehuda ebagi ka Tamar. Se kadhuwa jareya laju tedhung apolong; Tamar laju ngandhung." 
Genesis38:19 Tamar mole ka bengkona, totobba mowana ebukka' sarta laju ngangguy kalambi randhana pole." 
Genesis38:20 Ta' saapa abidda saellana jareya, Yehuda nyoro Hira, kancana rowa, ngaterragi embi' gella' sarta esoro menta balina rang-barangnga se ebagi menangka tanggungan. Tape Hira ta' tatemmo ban babine' jareya." 
Genesis38:21 Hira anya-tanya ka reng-oreng e Ena'im, “E ka'imma sondel se biyasana atogu e penggir lorong paneka?” “E ka'anja ta' oneng badha sondel,” saodda reng-oreng jareya." 
Genesis38:22 Hira abali ka Yehuda, laju ngoca', “Ta' epanggi. Ca'epon lalake'an se etanyae kaula, e ka'issa' ta' oneng badha sondel.”" 
Genesis38:23 Ca'na Yehuda, “La dina tang rang-barang jareya me' olle eteggu' babine' jareya, sokor sengko' ta' malo. Sengko' la aehteyar majarana, tape bi' ba'na orengnga ta' etemmo.”" 
Genesis38:24 Ra-kera tello bulan saellana jareya Yehuda ngedhing kabar ja' Tamar, mantona, daddi sondel ban sateya ngandhung. Yehuda laju marenta'agi, “Kala' babine' jareya, pas obbar pasampe' mate!”" 
Genesis38:25 E bakto egiba ka lowar, Tamar apessennan ka mattowana, oca'na, “Kaula epangandhung bi' oreng se andhi' rang-barang paneka. Oladdagi, pas orossagi pasera se gadhuwan eccap sareng talena, jugan tongket paneka.”" 
Genesis38:26 Yehuda tao ka rang-barang jareya, laju ngoca', “Babine' jareya ta' sala. Sengko' ta' ajalannagi tang kawajiban ka oreng jareya; masthena babine' jareya bi' sengko' epakabin ban tang ana', Syela.” Yehuda pas ta' tao tedhung apolong ban Tamar pole." 
Genesis38:27 E bakto la napa' sa'adda se rembi'a, pas etemmo ja' ana'na Tamar kembar." 
Genesis38:28 Teppa'na rembi'a, babaji'na se settong kalowar tanangnga. Bi' dhukonna tanang jareya etagenne pas etale'e bi' bennang mera. Oca'na, “Paneka se kalowar kaadha'.”" 
Genesis38:29 Tape tanangnga babaji' jareya maso' pole, ban babaji' settonganna kalowar kaadha'. Dhukon jareya pas ngoca', “Daddi bariya carana ba'na se kalowara!” Daddi babaji' se kalowar kaadha' jareya enyamae Peres." 
Genesis38:30 Saellana jareya buru kalowar ale'na se e tanangnga badha bennang merana. Kana' jareya enyamae Zerah. 
Genesis39:1 Bi' reng-oreng Isma'il Yusup egiba ka Messer, laju ejuwal ka Potifar, parwirana rato se daddi kapalana pangawalla karaton." 
Genesis39:2 Yusup etolong bi' PANGERAN, daddi apa'a bai se elakone masthe ahasel. Yusup jareya apolong e compo'na lorana, oreng Messer gella'." 
Genesis39:3 Lorana nengale ja' Yusup jareya etolong bi' PANGERAN sampe' apa'a bai se elakone masthe ahasel. 
Genesis39:4 Daddi Yusup ekaleburi bi' Potifar, laju epadaddi pangladin pribadhina; Yusup edika'agi ngoros compo'na ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na." 
Genesis39:5 Polana Yusup, molae dhari jareya PANGERAN aberkadi oreng Messer jareya ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na se badha e dhalem bengkona tor e gal-teggalla." 
Genesis39:6 Bi' Potifar dhi'-andhi'na esoro oros ka Yusup kabbi, daddi Potifar ta' noro' mekkere pa-apa kajabana parkara dha'arra dibi'. Yusup reya bagus robana ban manes cacana." 
Genesis39:7 Ta' saapa abidda se badha e jadhiya, laju ekaterrowe rajina Potifar; Yusup eajak tedhung apolong." 
Genesis39:8 Tape Yusup ta' endha', laju mator, “Nyo'ona sapora, Dinnaju, sadajana se badha e compo' ka'dhinto sareng guste Potifar eparcaja'agi ka abdina, kantos Potifar dibi' ta' noro' ngoros pa-ponapa." 
Genesis39:9 E ka'dhinto kakobasa'an abdina padha sareng kakobasa'anna guste Potifar. Tadha' barang se ta' eparcaja'agiya ka abdina kajabana panjennengngan. Kadi ponapa abdina se alakowa barang juba' kadi gapaneka sareng abadhi dusa ka Guste Allah?” 
Genesis39:10 Maske sabban are rajina Potifar terros nyacae, Yusup teptep ta' endha' eajak tedhung ban rajina lorana." 
Genesis39:11 Tape, e settong are, e bakto Yusup maso' ka dhalem roma alalakona, kabendherran la-kabula laenna tadha' e jadhiya kabbi." 
Genesis39:12 Rajina Potifar nyandhak jubana Yusup sambi adhabu, “Mara ja' tedhunga ban sengko'.” Tape Yusup ajeng-gujeng sampe' jubana locot, cekka' ka astana rajina Potifar, laju buru ka lowar, kalambina paggun badha e astana babine' jareya." 
Genesis39:13 E bakto rajina Potifar ngoladi ja' Yusup buru kalowar ban jubana cekka' e astana," 
Genesis39:14 laju ra'-era'an ka la-kabulana, “Abas reya'! Oreng Ibrani se egiba tang lake ka bengko reya ya-nyeya sengko' ban tang lake. Oreng Ibrani jareya maso' ka tang kamar, sengko' epaksa ekapolonga tedhung, tape sengko' atharat sakellarra." 
Genesis39:15 E bakto ngedhing sengko' atharat, oreng jareya laju buru ka lowar, jubana ceccer e tang seddi'an.”" 
Genesis39:16 Jubana Yusup jareya bi' rajina Potifar gi' esaba' sampe' rakana rabu. 
Genesis39:17 Sagubarra Potifar, rajina duli notorragi careta jareya ka rakana, atorra, “Oreng Ibrani se egiba ba'na dha' enna' rowa maso' ka tang kamar sarta korang ajar ka sengko'." 
Genesis39:18 Tape e bakto sengko' atharat laju buru ka lowar, jubana ceccer e dhinna'.”" 
Genesis39:19 Lorana Yusup talebat dukana. 
Genesis39:20 Yusup epakon tangkep laju epamaso' ka penjara, epapolong ban reng-oreng okoman laenna." 
Genesis39:21 Tape Yusup ros-terrosan etolong tor eberkadi bi' PANGERAN, sampe' Yusup ekaleburi bi' kapalana penjara." 
Genesis39:22 Yusup epassrae ngoros reng-oreng okoman laenna, tor epassrae tanggung jawab parkara sakabbinna lalakon e penjara jareya." 
Genesis39:23 Daddi kapalana penjara jareya ta' osa ro'-noro' ngoros pa-apa se la epassra'agi ka Yusup, sabab Yusup etolonge PANGERAN sampe' apa'a bai se elakone ahasel kabbi." 
Genesis40:1 Ta' sabarampa abidda dhari jareya badha pangladinna rato kadhuwa se agabay sala ka ratona. Se settong tokang gabayya nom-enomanna rato, settonganna tokang rotina." 
Genesis40:2 Rato ce' dukana ka pangladinna se kadhuwa jareya," 
Genesis40:3 laju adhabu sopaja se kadhuwa jareya epamaso' ka penjara se badha e compo'na kapalana pangawalla karaton; Yusup badha e jadhiya keya. 
Genesis40:4 Abit keya se kadhuwa jareya e penjara; bi' kapalana pangawalla karaton Yusup epadaddi pangladinna se kadhuwa jareya. 
Genesis40:5 E settong malem tokang gabayya nom-enoman ban tokang rotina rato se badha e penjara jarowa amempe. Artena mempena jareya ta' padha. 
Genesis40:6 E bakto Yusup entar ka se kadhuwa jareya kalagguwanna, se kadhuwa buru katon sossa." 
Genesis40:7 Yusup atanya, “Aponapa sampeyan samangken me' padha katon sossa?”" 
Genesis40:8 Sambidda se kadhuwa buru, “Malemma kaula bi' kanca paneka padha amempe, ban e ka'iya tadha' oreng se onenga ngarte'e mempe ganeka.” Ca'na Yusup, “Namong Guste Allah se oneng ngarte'e mempe. Tore careta'agi ka kaula kadi ponapa mempena sampeyan ganeka.”" 
Genesis40:9 Tokang gabayya nom-enomanna rato jareya ngoca', “E dhalem mempe ganeka pangrasana badha bungkana anggur e adha'an kaula." 
Genesis40:10 Bungkana anggur ganeka acangka tello'. Dhaunna gi' buru nyelbi', laju kalowar kembang ban buwana lebba', padha sa'-massa'." 
Genesis40:11 Kaula teppa' neggu' gellassa rato, daddi bi' kaula anggur gella' epetthek, laju eperres ka gellas ganeka; anggurra bi' kaula laju eatorragi ka rato.”" 
Genesis40:12 Ca'na Yusup, “Artena kantha paneka: Ranca' se tatello' artena tello are." 
Genesis40:13 Tello are aggi' sampeyan bakal epakalowara dhari penjara paneka bi' rato. Salana sampeyan bakal esapora'a, ban sampeyan bakal epabaliya epalako kadi asalla. Sampeyan bakal ngangka'agiya anggur ka rato akadi ba'-lamba'na." 
Genesis40:14 Tape mon kabadha'anna sampeyan pon nyaman pole, kaula kaenga'e, gi'; kaula careta'agi ka rato, nyo'ona tolong me' olle kaula epakalowar dhari penjara paneka." 
Genesis40:15 Sabab sanyatana kaula paneka ekeco' dhari nagarana oreng Ibrani; sarengngan pole e nagara Messer paneka kaula ta' oneng alako juba', daddi ta' sapantessa kaula paneka eokom e penjara.”" 
Genesis40:16 E bakto tokang roti gella' ngedhing ja' mempena tokang gabayya nom-enomanna rato jarowa bagus artena, laju ngoca' ka Yusup, “Kaula amempe keya. Pangrasana kaula nyo'on budhak asoson tello'." 
Genesis40:17 Budhak se tas-attas aesse jajan acem-macem, dhadha'aranna rato, tape jajan ganeka ecocco' no'-mano'.”" 
Genesis40:18 Ca'na Yusup, “Artena mempena sampeyan sapaneka: Budhak se tello'an artena tello are." 
Genesis40:19 Tello are aggi' sampeyan bakal epakalowara sareng rato, saamponna laju epakon ketthok le'erra. Badanna sampeyan epakona gantong e settong cangga, saamponna ganeka dagingnga sampeyan laju ekakan no'-mano'.”" 
Genesis40:20 Saellana olle tello are dhari jareya, teppa' are kalahiranna rato. Rato ajang-onjang ce' bannya'na; ponggabana eonjang kabbi. Rato laju adhabu sopaja tokang gabayya nom-enomanna ban tokang rotina epakalowara dhari penjara ban terros egiba ka adha'anna sakabbinna ponggaba karaton." 
Genesis40:21 Tokang gabayya nom-enoman jareya epalako pole akantha se asal," 
Genesis40:22 tape kapalana tokang roti rowa eokom mate. Cocok ban katerranganna Yusup. 
Genesis40:23 Tape tokang gabayya nom-enoman jarowa pas ce' loppana ka Yusup, ta' enga' sakale." 
Genesis41:1 Saellana olle dhu taon, rato Messer asopenna, pangrasana akantha se ngadek e penggirra Songay Nil." 
Genesis41:2 E bakto jareya laju badha sape papetto' kalowar dhari songay. Sapena po-lempo, kole'na ngennyer. Sape jareya padha ngakan rebba e penggirra songay." 
Genesis41:3 Saellana jareya laju badha sape laen, bannya'na papetto' keya. Badanna koros, kare tolang ban kole'. Pe-sape se koros jareya nyander ka pe-sape se lempo, manjeng e seddi'anna, e penggirra songay gella'." 
Genesis41:4 Pe-sape se lempo gella' ekakan bi' pe-sape se koros sampe' tadha' kabbi. Saellana jareya rato laju abungo. 
Genesis41:5 Rato buru laju tangeddha pole, sarta asopenna pole. Pangrasana badha gandum sabungka abuwa pettong gagang, padha ras-merras ban la towa." 
Genesis41:6 Ta' abit pas nyolbu' gandum pettong gagang pole, kabbi padha kepa' tor kero' ekenneng angen dhari sagara beddhi." 
Genesis41:7 Gandum se ras-merras gella' ekakan bi' gandum se kepa' sampe' epatadha'. Rato abungo, laju apangrasa ja' salerana asopenna." 
Genesis41:8 Kalagguwanna rato jareya ngalengsang, daddi laju makon adikane sakabbinna tokang tennongnga ban sakabbinna oreng se penter e sanagara Messer. Rato notorragi sopennana, tape kabbi padha tadha' se taowa ngarte'e." 
Genesis41:9 Tokang gabayya nom-enomanna rato laju mator ka ratona, “Samangken abdidalem tapaksa mator ja' abdidalem gadhuwan sala." 
Genesis41:10 Junandalem oneng duka ka abdidalem sareng ka kapalana tokang roti. Abdidalem, jugan kapalana tokang roti, sareng junandalem laju epamaso' ka penjara e compo'epon kapalana pangawalla karaton." 
Genesis41:11 E settong malem kapalana tokang roti sareng abdidalem padha amempe, dineng mempeepon kapalana tokang roti sareng mempe abdidalem ta' padha artena." 
Genesis41:12 E penjara ka'dhissa' badha oreng lalake' Ibrani, gi' ngodha, dunorrepon kapalana pangawalla karaton. Kapalana tokang roti sareng abdidalem padha notorragi mempe gella' ka oreng Yahudi gapaneka; sareng oreng gapaneka laju eparenge oneng artena." 
Genesis41:13 Sadajana cocok akadi se ekoca'agi oreng gapaneka: sareng junandalem abdidalem epabali ka lalakon se asal, dineng kapalana tokang roti ka'dhissa' eokom mate.”" 
Genesis41:14 Rato makon oreng ngone'e Yusup. Sanatkala jareya keya Yusup epakalowar dhari penjara. Obu'na ecokor, kalambina esalene. Samarena pas egiba ngadhep ka rato." 
Genesis41:15 Dhabuna rato, “Sengko' amempe tape tadha' oreng se taowa artena. Sengko' ngedhing kabar ja' ba'na tao ngarte'e mempe.”" 
Genesis41:16 Atorra Yusup, “Manabi abdidalem ta' oneng, guste. Namong Guste Allah se badhi nerrangngagiya arteepon.”" 
Genesis41:17 Rato adhabu, “Sengko' amempe manjeng e penggirra Songay Nil." 
Genesis41:18 E bakto jareya pangrasana badha sape papetto' kalowar dhari songay. Sapena po-lempo, kole'na ngennyer. Sape jareya padha ngakan rebba e penggirra songay." 
Genesis41:19 Saellana jareya pas badha sape laen, bannya'na papetto' keya. Badanna koros, kare kole' ban tolang. Sajjegga odhi' sengko' ta' tao nangale'e sape se juba'na kantha jareya e sanagara Messer reya." 
Genesis41:20 Sape se po-lempo jareya ekakan kabbi bi' pe-sape se koros sampe' tadha' karena. 
Genesis41:21 Tape pe-sape se koros jareya gi' paggun koros. Samarena jareya sengko' pas ngedhing. 
Genesis41:22 Ta' sabarampa abidda sengko' tatedhung pole sarta pas amempe pole. Pangrasana sengko' nangale'e badha gandum sabungka abuwa pettong gagang, padha ras-merras ban la towa." 
Genesis41:23 Ta' abit pas nyolbu' gandum pettong gagang pole, kabbi padha kepa' tor kero' ekenneng angen dhari sagara beddhi." 
Genesis41:24 Gandum se ras-merras gella' ekakan bi' gandum se kepa' sampe' epatadha'. Tang mempe jareya bi' sengko' la etotorragi ka kang-tokang tennong, tape tadha' se taowa ngarte'e.”" 
Genesis41:25 Atorra Yusup, “Sopenna se dhu macem ka'dhinto arteepon padha; Guste Allah apareng oneng ka junandalem ponapa se bakal elampa'agiya." 
Genesis41:26 Sape papetto' se po-lempo arteepon pettong taon, ban gandum se pettong gagang arteepon pettong taon jugan. Arteepon padha." 
Genesis41:27 Sape se koros se papetto' se kalowar jang bingkengan, sareng gandum pettong gagang se kepa' sareng kero' polana ekenneng angen dhari sagara beddhi, arteepon mosem laep se pettong taon abittepon." 
Genesis41:28 Kadi se ampon eatorragi sareng abdidalem gella', Guste Allah apareng oneng ka junandalem ponapa se bakal elampa'agiya." 
Genesis41:29 Pettong taon abittepon nagara Messer badhi ma'mora. 
Genesis41:30 Salastarena pas badhi dhatengnga mosem laep se abittepon pettong taon jugan. Jaman ma'mor gapaneka bakal ta' ekaemodana oreng sabab mosem laeppepon talebat sarana, kantos sanagara tadha' bu-tombuwan sakale." 
Genesis41:31  
Genesis41:32 Junandalem asopenna dhu kale, arteepon: Allah ampon neptebbagi ponapa se badhi elampa'agiya, sarengngan pole parkara gapaneka badhi kalakona ta' abit pole." 
Genesis41:33 Samangken langkong sae junandalem mele oreng se penter sareng bicaksana, parenge kakobasa'an ngator nagara." 
Genesis41:34 Junandalem jugan kodu ngangkat ba-ponggaba laennepon. Ba-ponggaba gapaneka parenge kakobasa'an makompol saparlemanna hasellepon palabija saabidda jaman ma'mor se pettong taon gapaneka. Palabija se ampon epakompol gapaneka pakon tompo' e tha-kottha sareng pakon jaga. 
Genesis41:35  
Genesis41:36 Gandum gapaneka parlo ebadhi teddha'an saabittepon mosem laep se pettong taon e Messer. Kalaban jalan kadi gapaneka ra'yat Messer bakal lopoda dhari kalaparan.” 
Genesis41:37 Rato ban ba-ponggabana padha nganggep panemmona Yusup jareya teppa'. 
Genesis41:38 Dhabuna rato ka ba-ponggabana jareya, “Ta' kera badha oreng laen se ateppa'an dhari Yusup, sabab Yusup reya etolonge Erroh Allah dibi'.”" 
Genesis41:39 Dhabuna rato ka Yusup, “Bi' Allah ba'na la eparenge ngataowe parkara reya kabbi, daddi terrang ba'na reya apenterran ban lebbi bicaksana etembang bi' reng-oreng laenna." 
Genesis41:40 Bi' sengko' ba'na epassra'ana tang nagara, orossagi pateppa'. Tang ra'yat kabbi bakal atoro'a ka parentana ba'na. Pera' sengko' malolo se lebbi kobasa dhari ba'na. Sateya bi' sengko' ba'na epadaddiya gubennor Messer.”" 
Genesis41:41 Saellana jareya rato mokka' sesserra dhari rajunganna. Sesser jareya eoker epasange satempella karaja'an. Saellana ebukka', sesser jareya laju epobu ka rajunganna Yusup sambi adhabu, “Sateya bi' sengko' ba'na epadaddi gubennor Messer.” Saellana jareya Yusup laju epangagem juba linen se alos, epobuwagi rato dibi', sarta pas ekalonge rantay emmas." 
Genesis41:42  
Genesis41:43 Samarena, Yusup laju eparenge kareta karaja'an se nomer dhuwa' menangka teteyanna; pangawal kahormadanna rato ajalan e adha'anna kareta jareya sambi ra'-era'an, “Menggir! Menggir!” Daddi Yusup la epadaddi gubennor sanagara Messer." 
Genesis41:44 Dhabuna rato ka Yusup, “Sengko' reya rato – ban sateya sengko' ngomommagi ja' sapa'a bai se badha e Messer reya ta' olle ngalakone apa'a bai mon ta' olle edi dhari ba'na.”" 
Genesis41:45 Bi' rato jareya Yusup laju eparenge asma Messer, iya areya Zafnat-Pa'aneah. Laen dhari jareya Yusup eparenge raji se asmana Asnat, pottrana Potifera se daddi imam e kottha Heliopolis. Yusup yuswana tello polo taon e bakto molae ngalampa'agi lalakonna menangka pangabdiyanna ka rato Messer. Yusup mangkat dhari karaton terros alengleng e saanterona nagara." 
Genesis41:46  
Genesis41:47 E dhalem bakto pettong taon se ma'mor, hasella tana wa-ngalowa." 
Genesis41:48 Hasella gandum jareya bi' Yusup epakompol, esaba' e tha-kottha. E saneyap kottha esempen gandum hasella gal-teggal e sabingkerra." 
Genesis41:49 Gandum ollena makompol jareya talebat bannya'na, akantha bannya'na beddhi e penggir tase', daddi bi' Yusup la ta' etaker pole." 
Genesis41:50 Sabellunna mosem laep jareya molae, Yusup kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa dhari rajina se anyama Asnat." 
Genesis41:51 Dhabuna Yusup, “Bi' Allah sengko' la epaloppa ka sakabbinna tang kasangsara'an ban ka la-balana tang eppa'.” Daddi pottrana se nomer settong jareya eparenge nyama Manasye." 
Genesis41:52 Yusup adhabu kantha reya keya, “Bi' Allah sengko' eparenge ana' dhadhuwa' e dhalem tang kasossa'an,” daddi pottrana se nomer dhuwa' jareya eparenge nyama Efraim." 
Genesis41:53 Bakto pettong taon e dhalem kama'moran se ekarassa'agi ne'madda e nagara Messer la lebat. 
Genesis41:54 Mosem laep se pettong taon abidda molae dhateng, cocok akantha se la edhabuwagi Yusup. E nagara en-laenna e dunnya oreng padha kalaparan, tape e Messer badha parsadhiya'anna kakanan." 
Genesis41:55 E naleka ra'yat Messer molae kalaparan, kabbi laju padha nyo'on gandum ka rato. Bi' rato reng-oreng jareya epakon nyabis ka Yusup, sarta epakon atoro' ka pa-apa se edhabuwagi Yusup." 
Genesis41:56 Kalaparan jareya atamba sara tor balattra daddi sanagara, daddi Yusup molae mokka' sakabbinna gudhang, sarta ajuwal gandum ka reng-oreng Messer." 
Genesis41:57 Dhari man-dhimman e sabingkerra bume reng-oreng entar ka Messer melleya gandum ka Yusup, sabab kalaparan jareya neng e man-dhimman pajat ce' sarana." 
Genesis42:1 E bakto Yakub meyarsa ja' e Messer badha gandum, laju adhabu ka tra-pottrana, “Ba'na me' manyaman malolo?" 
Genesis42:2 Sengko' ngedhing e Messer badha gandum; kassa' entar melle dha' essa', sopaja sengko' ban ba'na ta' sampe'a mate kalaparan kabbi.”" 
Genesis42:3 Daddi taretanna Yusup se laen ebu se kasapolo oreng jareya pas entar melleya gandum ka Messer. 
Genesis42:4 Tape Benyamin, taretanna Yusup se tonggal eppa' tonggal ebu, ta' ebagi noro', polana tako' nemmo calaka'." 
Genesis42:5 Tra-pottrana Yakub entar melleya gandum ka Messer abareng ban reng-oreng laenna, sabab sa-Kana'an padha kalaparan." 
Genesis42:6 Se ajuwal gandum ka reng-oreng dhari sabingkerra dunnya jareya iya areya Yusup, se daddi gubennor Messer. Daddi tan-taretanna Yusup jareya sanapa'na ka Messer laju asojud ka tana e adha'anna ale'na." 
Genesis42:7 E bakto ngoladi reng-oreng jareya Yusup emot ja' jareya tan-taretanna, tape Yusup tha-kantha ta' kennal. Laju adhabu ka tan-taretanna jareya epakasar, “Ba'na oreng dhimma?” “Abdidalem oreng Kana'an, nyabis ka ka'dhinto terro ngobangana gandum,” saodda tan-taretanna jareya." 
Genesis42:8 Maske Yusup emot ka tan-taretanna jareya, tape tan-taretanna padha ta' enga' ka salerana." 
Genesis42:9 Yusup pas emot ka se asopenna parkara tan-taretanna jareya, laju adhabu, “Ba'na reya ta-mata; ba'na dha' enna' nalektegana e dhimma kakoranganna tang nagara.”" 
Genesis42:10 “Bunten, guste!” saodda tan-taretanna jareya. “Abdidalem abdiepon junandalem, ka ka'dhinto namong ngobangana gandum." 
Genesis42:11 Abdidalem ka'dhinto sataretan, guste. Abdidalem oreng sae sadaja, banne ta-mata.”" 
Genesis42:12 Dhabuna Yusup, “Lecek! Ba'na dha' enna' nalektegana e dhimma kakoranganna tang nagara reya.”" 
Genesis42:13 Atorra tan-taretanna jareya, “Abdidalem ka'dhinto sataretan dhubellas, guste, tonggal eppa', se alenggi e Kana'an. Se settong ampon seda, ban se bungso asarengnge eppa' e compo'.”" 
Genesis42:14 “Pajat teppa' kantha tang oca',” dhabuna Yusup, “ba'na reya ta-mata." 
Genesis42:15 Bi' sengko' ba'na eojiya. Sengko' asompa kalaban asmana rato ja' ba'na ta' ebagiya kalowar dhari nagara reya mon ale'na ba'na se bungso ta' egiba dha' enna'. 
Genesis42:16 Sala settong e antarana ba'na mole ngone'e; se laen etahana e dhinna' sampe' oca'na ba'na ekenneng bukteyagi. Mon enja', demi asmana rato, ba'na reya ta-mata ongguwan.”" 
Genesis42:17 Saellana jareya tan-taretanna epamaso' ka penjara tello are abidda. 
Genesis42:18 E are se kapeng tello' Yusup adhabu ka tan-taretanna jareya, “Sengko' reya oreng se tako' ban ta'at ka Allah. Ba'na bi' sengko' epasalamedda tape badha saradda." 
Genesis42:19 Kaangguy abukteyagi ja' ba'na oreng jujur, sala settong e antarana ba'na etahana e penjara se ekennengnge ba'na sateya reya. Se laen olle mole ngeba gandum se ebelliya ba'na kaangguy sabalana se teppa'na kalaparan." 
Genesis42:20 Saellana jareya ba'na kodu abali dha' enna' ngeba ale'na se bungso. Jareya menangka bukte ja' cacana ba'na jareya bendher, ban ba'na bi' sengko' ta' eokoma mate.” Tan-taretanna Yusup narema potosanna gubennor jareya," 
Genesis42:21 sarta laju padha ngoca', “Tenggu, sateya sengko' ban ba'na padha nanggung kasossa'an reya polana kasala'anna sengko' ban ba'na ka ale' lamba' rowa. Ba'na kabbi padha tao saapa kasangsara'anna ale' e bakto jareya, tape e bakto menta tolong, sengko' ban ba'na padha ta' marduli. Daddi sateya sengko' ban ba'na nanggung kasangsara'an reya sateya.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ca'na Ruben, “Lamba' sengko' gu ta' la ngoca' ka ba'na sopaja ale' ja' pama-baramma. Tape ba'na ta' endha' ngedhingngagi. Sateya matena etanggungngagi ka sengko' ban ba'na kabbi.”" 
Genesis42:23 Yusup ngarte ka cacana tan-taretanna jareya, tape tan-taretanna ta' tao, sabab tan-taretanna jareya mon acaca ban Yusup ngangguy juru basa." 
Genesis42:24 Yusup nyengga, laju nanges. Saellana ngenneng abu-dhabu pole, laju abali ka kennengnganna tan-taretanna. Simeyon esoro giba, esoro tale'e e adha'anna tan-taretanna." 
Genesis42:25 Yusup makon sopaja rong-karong andhi'na tan-taretanna eesse'e gandum, ban pessena epamaso' ka karongnga bang-sebang. Bariya keya sopaja tan-taretanna jareya esangowe se ekakana e jalan. Papakonna jareya ejalannagi kabbi." 
Genesis42:26 Saellana jareya tan-taretanna Yusup mowa' gandum ollena melle jarowa ka hemarra, samarena pas padha mangkat dhari jadhiya." 
Genesis42:27 E settong kennengngan reng-oreng jareya ambu, ngenebba. Sala settong e antarana badha se mokka' karongnga gandumma, makanana hemarra, laju nemmo pessena e attasanna gandumma." 
Genesis42:28 “Tang pesse epabali,” oca'na aera' ka tan-taretanna. “Abas, ya, badha e tang karong!” Atena reng-oreng jareya arassa tako'. Kabbi padha saleng atanya sambi katako'an, “Epabaramma'a sengko' reya bi' Allah?”" 
Genesis42:29 Sanapa'na ka Kana'an tan-taretanna Yusup jareya nyareta'agi ka eppa'na pa-apa se la ealame e Messer. 
Genesis42:30 Oca'na, “Gubennor Messer ka'issa' padhabuna ce' kasarra ka kaula. Ponapa pole kaula sataretan paneka earane ata-matae nagarana." 
Genesis42:31 Kaula ampon mator, ‘Abdidalem oreng e-sae, banne ta-mata, abdidalem oreng jujur." 
Genesis42:32 Abdidalem sataretan sadajana dhubellas, padha tonggal eppa'; se settong seda, dineng se bungso asarengnge eppa' e Kana'an.’" 
Genesis42:33 Gubennor ganeka adhabu, ‘Sengko' terro abukteyagiya apa ba'na reya oreng jujur onggu. Sala settong e antarana ba'na kodu neng e dhinna', ta' olle mole; se laen olle mole ngeba gandum ka la-balana se kalaparan." 
Genesis42:34 Kone'e ale'na ba'na se bungso, giba dha' enna' ka sengko'. Buru sengko' parcaja ja' ba'na banne ta-mata, ja' ba'na pajat oreng jujur. Taretanna ba'na se etahan bi' sengko' pas epabaliya ka ba'na, ban ba'na olle neng e nagara reya, olle adagang sakencengnga.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Saellana jareya, e bakto reng-oreng jareya padha mokka' karongnga bang-sebang, laju padha nemmo kanthongnga pessena bang-sebang se aesse pesse. Daddi kabbi laju padha katako'an, bariya keya eppa'na." 
Genesis42:36 Eppa'na laju adhabu, “Apa ba'na terro sengko' kaelangana tang ana' kabbi? Yusup la tadha'; Simeyon la tadha'. Sateya ba'na ngeba'a Benyamin keya. Sengko' se nanggung kasossa'an!”" 
Genesis42:37 Ruben laju mator ka eppa'na, “Manabi Benyamin ta' ebakta abali sareng kaula, ana' kaula se lalake' kadhuwa pate'e sadaja. Diggal kaula se ajaga'a, tanto Benyamin abali ka sampeyan.”" 
Genesis42:38 Tape Yakub adhabu, “Enja'! Benyamin ta' olle giba! Kaka'na la mate, sateya pera' kare Benyamin malolo se ekaandhi' sengko'. Sengko' tako' e dhalem parjalanan Benyamin pas nemmo calaka'. Sengko' la towa; mon gi' kodu nanggung kasossa'an se kantha jareya sengko' tanto mate.”" 
Genesis43:1 Kalaparan e Kana'an sajan sara. 
Genesis43:2 Saellana gandumma Yakub ban la-balana se ollena melle dhari Messer rowa la tadha' kabbi, Yakub adhabu ka tra-pottrana, “Kassa', ra, entar ka Messer pole, melle gandum.”" 
Genesis43:3 Atorra Yehuda ka eppa'na, “Gubennor Messer ampon apareng parengeddan kerras ja' kaula sataretan ta' kengeng abali ngadhep ka salerana mon ta' ngeba ale'." 
Genesis43:4 Mon bi' sampeyan ale' eparengngagi noro', kaula sataretan entara ka'assa' pole ngobangana gandum." 
Genesis43:5 Tape manabi Benyamin ta' eparengngagi noro', kaula ta' entara, sabab gubennor ka'issa' ampon adhabu ja' kaula padha ta' kengeng ngadhep ka ka'issa' mon ale' ta' noro'.”" 
Genesis43:6 Dhabuna Yakub, “Arapa ba'na ma' masossa sengko', abala ka oreng jareya ja' ba'na gi' andhi' ale'?”" 
Genesis43:7 Saodda tra-pottrana, “Oreng ka'issa' ros-terrosan atanya parkara kaula sataretan, jugan parkara la-bala kaula, dhabuna, ‘Apa eppa'na ba'na gi' odhi'? Apa ba'na ta' andhi' taretan lake' laenna?’ Kaula sataretan tapaksa nyaot sabendherra. Dhari ka'imma kaula se onenga ja' gubennor ganeka makona ngeba ale' ka ka'assa'?”" 
Genesis43:8 Yehuda laju mator ka eppa'na, “Diggal, pona, Pa', ale' me' olle noro'. Diggal kaula se nanggunga. Mon eparengngagi, kaula ban tan-taretan pas duliya mangkat, me' olle padha tadha' se mate kalaparan." 
Genesis43:9 Kaula dibi' se daddi tanggunganna. Mon bi' kaula ale' ta' ekenneng giba abali ka ka'dhinto e dhalem kabadha'an salamet ta' korang pa-ponapa, kaula nanggunga okomanna saomorra." 
Genesis43:10 Ja' sakenga ta' abit parana se te'-nante'an, tantona kaula ban tan-taretan laenna ampon abali dhu kale dhari Messer.”" 
Genesis43:11 Eppa'na laju adhabu, “Mon pajat kodu kantha jareya, ba'na ngeba hasella nagara reya se paleng bagus: kismis, maddu, palappa, komere ban buwana badam." 
Genesis43:12 Ngeba keya pesse tekel dhuwa', sabab pesse se etemmo e karongnga ba'na rowa kodu epabali. Pola jareya sakeng kalero." 
Genesis43:13 La giba ale'na, tape duli abali, ya." 
Genesis43:14 Moga-moga bi' Allah Se Mahakobasa gubennor jareya eparengngana neser ka ba'na, sopaja Benyamin ban Simeyon epabaliya ka ba'na. Dineng sengko' reya, mon pajat la kodu kaelangan tang na'-ana', dhu baramma'a pole.”" 
Genesis43:15 Daddi tan-taretanna Yusup jareya ngeba tor-ator jareya ban pesse se bannya'na tekel dhuwa'na; saellana laju mangkat ka Messer abareng Benyamin. Sanapa'na ka jadhiya laju ngadhep ka Yusup. 
Genesis43:16 E bakto Yusup ngoladi Benyamin abareng ban tan-taretanna jareya, laju adhabu ka kabulana se ngapalae orosanna compo'na, “Giba reng-oreng reya ka tang bengko. Bi' sengko' epangakana abareng ban sengko' dhaggi' ban-aban. Daddi sambelli ebin settong, terros paranta.”" 
Genesis43:17 Kabula gella' ajalannagi apa se edhabuwagi Yusup, pas ngeba tan-taretanna Yusup jareya ka kalenggiyanna gubennor." 
Genesis43:18 E bakto egiba ka kalenggiyanna Yusup, tan-taretanna padha katako'an ban apekker, “Sengko' sataretan reya egiba dha' enna' kabbi polana pesse se etemmo badha e dhalem karong e bakto entar dha' enna' se jang adha'an rowa. Sengko' sataretan kabbi tanto pas ejebbak daksakala; mar-hemar rowa tanto ekala', dineng sengko' sataretan tanto laju padha ekagabay dunor kabbi.”" 
Genesis43:19 Daddi, sanapa'na ka labangnga kalenggiyanna Yusup, tan-taretanna jareya atanya ka oreng se ngapalae orosan compo'na Yusup gella'," 
Genesis43:20 “Ta' langkong, guste. Kaula sataretan paneka gi' dhimen oneng entar ka'anja ngobangana gandum." 
Genesis43:21 E bakto palemana e tengnga lorong kaula sadaja ambu, kelemma. E bakto mokka' karong baddhana gandum ka'issa', neng-oneng kaula sataretan padha manggi pesse se epamajar gandum padha badha e attassa gandumma bang-sebang. Kaula padha ta' oneng pasera se nyaba' pesse ganeka. Samangken pesse ganeka bi' kaula ebakta sadaja, ebajarragiya ka sampeyan. Laen dhari pesse ganeka, kaula jugan abakta pesse terro ngobangana gandum pole.”" 
Genesis43:22  
Genesis43:23 Kabulana Yusup jareya ngoca', “Ampon ta' osa tako'. Ja' kobater. Allahna sampeyan, Allah se epojja eppa'na sampeyan, ganeka se nyaba' pesse ganeka e dhalem karongnga sampeyan. Kaula ampon narema pessena sampeyan se ekabajar gandum ka'issa'.” Saellana jareya Simeyon epakalowar, pas egiba ka tan-taretanna;" 
Genesis43:24 samarena, kabbi laju padha egiba ka dhalem bengko jareya. Reng-oreng jareya eberri'i aeng baccona soko; mar-hemarra eberri'i pakan." 
Genesis43:25 Saellana jareya, tan-taretanna Yusup nyadhiya'agi le-ollena se eatorragiya ka Yusup mon rabu e baja beddhuk, sabab reng-oreng jareya ebalai ja' epangakana abareng ban Yusup." 
Genesis43:26 E bakto Yusup napa' ka bengko jareya, tan-taretanna ngatorragi le-ollena sambi asojud e adha'anna." 
Genesis43:27 Yusup mareksane parkara kabadha'anna tan-taretanna jareya, pas adhabu, “Ba'na la nyareta'agi ka sengko' parkara eppa'na se la towa rowa. Baramma kabadha'anna sateya? Apa gi' odhi'? Ban baras?”" 
Genesis43:28 Saodda tan-taretanna, “Abdiepon junandalem, eppa' abdidalem, gi' odhi' sareng baras.” Tan-taretanna jareya laju asojud e adha'na Yusup." 
Genesis43:29 E bakto ngoladi Benyamin, ale'na, Yusup adhabu, “Daddi reya ale'na ba'na se bungso se ecareta'agi ba'na rowa? Moga-moga Allah aberkadana ba'na, Na'.”" 
Genesis43:30 Panggaliyanna Yusup arassa seksek polana kerrong ka ale'na, sampe' para' ta' kowada ngampet, daddi laju duli nyengga daksakala, maso' ka kamarra pas molar e jadhiya." 
Genesis43:31 Saellana jareya laju araop, pas kalowar pole; panggaliyanna ewat-kowattagi, sarta laju makon sopaja dha'arra eparanta." 
Genesis43:32 Yusup epadha'ar e meja settong, dineng tan-taretanna e meja laen. Reng-oreng Messer se badha e jadhiya ngakan e meja laenna pole, sabab oreng Messer apangrasa apes mon ngakan apolong ban oreng Ibrani." 
Genesis43:33 Tan-taretanna se toju' padha ngadhep ka Yusup, epajajar menorot gilirra omorra molae dhari se paleng towa sampe' ka se paleng ngodha. E bakto nangale'e katoju'anna se egilir menorot omorra jareya, tan-taretanna Yusup padha saleng pandeng kaheranan." 
Genesis43:34 Tan-taretanna jareya engala'agi kakanan dhari mejana Yusup. Benyamin eberri'i lema kalena ka'-kaka'na. Reng-oreng jareya laju padha ngakan abareng sampe' kennyang. 
Genesis44:1 Sabatara jareya Yusup adhabu ka kabulana se ngoros kaparlowanna compo'na, “Karongnga reng-oreng rowa esse'e bi' gandum pa ce' possa'na; mon gi' kellara se ngeba tambai pole. Pessena pamaso' ka karongnga bang-sebang, saba' e attassa gandumma." 
Genesis44:2 Tang piala salaka rowa pamaso' keya ka karongnga kana' se bungso, papolong ban pessena gandumma.” Kabulana jareya ajalannagi papakon buru." 
Genesis44:3 Kalagguwanna teng-petteng tan-taretanna Yusup jareya mangkat moleya ngeba hemarra bang-sebang. 
Genesis44:4 Gi' ta' jau dhari kottha, Yusup adhabu ka kapalana kabula se ngoros kaparlowanna compo'na, “Duli serser reng-oreng rowa. Mon la ecapo' koca' kantha reya, ‘Arapa ba'na me' males kabecce'an ban kajuba'an?" 
Genesis44:5 Arapa ba'na me' ngeco' piala salakana tang lora?’ Piala jareya eagem mon adha'ar nom-enoman, bariya keya eagem mon anojum. Ba'na reya ce' darakana onggu.”" 
Genesis44:6 E bakto tan-taretanna Yusup se eserser jareya la ecapo', kabulana Yusup gella' laju ngoca'agi pa-apa se edhabuwagi lorana." 
Genesis44:7 Saodda tan-taretanna Yusup, “Ponapa maksodda sampeyan adhabu sapaneka? Kaula padha asompa'a ja' kaula padha ta' atengka kadi ganeka!" 
Genesis44:8 Sampeyan dibi' ampon oneng ja' pesse se etemmo badha e dhalem karong e attassa gandum kaula bang-sebang, ebakta abali dhari Kana'an, epabaliya ka sampeyan. Daddi aponapa'a kaula me' ngeco'a piala salaka e compo'na lorana sampeyan?" 
Genesis44:9 Mon pajat badha e antarana kaula sataretan paneka se ngerrep piala ganeka, eatore okom mate; se laen badhi dunorra sampeyan.”" 
Genesis44:10 Ca'na kabulana Yusup gella', “Iya, mara. Tape se kodu daddi tang dunor coma se etemmo ngeco' piala jarowa; se laenna olle mole.”" 
Genesis44:11 Tan-taretanna Yusup jareya laju padha matoron sarta mokka' karongnga bang-sebang. 
Genesis44:12 Bi' kabulana Yusup rong-karong jareya epareksa epatete, molae dhari karong andhi'na se sareyang sampe' ka andhi'na se bungso, ban piala jareya etemmo e dhalem karongnga Benyamin." 
Genesis44:13 Tan-taretanna padha sossa, sampe' padha nyebbit kalambina bang-sebang. Buwadanna epaongga pole ka hemarra bang-sebang, saellana jareya laju padha abali ka kottha." 
Genesis44:14 E bakto Yehuda ban tan-taretanna napa' ka compo'na Yusup, Yusup gi' badha e jadhiya, kabbi laju padha asojud e ajunanna." 
Genesis44:15 Dhabuna Yusup, “Ba'na me' atengka kantha jareya? Apa ba'na ta' tao ja' oreng kantha sengko' reya bisa tao ka sabarang tengkana ba'na kalaban elmo nojum?”" 
Genesis44:16 “Dhu matora ponapa pole abdidalem, guste?” saodda Yehuda. “Kadi ponapa abdidalem sataretan ka'dhinto se kengenga alaban sareng noduwagiya ja' abdidalem padha ta' sala? Allah ampon mokka' kasala'an abdidalem sataretanan. Samangken ka'dhinto abdidalem sataretan sadajana daddi dunorra junandalem; banne namong ale' se e dhalem karongnga epanggi badha pialana ka'dhissa'.”" 
Genesis44:17 Dhabuna Yusup, “Enja'! Sengko' ta' amaksod kantha jareya! Pera' oreng se e dhalem karongnga etemmo badha tang piala jareya se daddiya tang dunor. Se laen olle mole sakarebba ka eppa'na.”" 
Genesis44:18 Yehuda nyander ka adha' ka seddi'na Yusup. “Ta' langkong, guste; abdidalem nyo'ona edi tor-matora. Ja' duka, guste; junandalem padha sareng rato Messer dibi'." 
Genesis44:19 Junandalem oneng mareksane ka abdidalem sataretan ka'dhinto, ‘Apa ba'na gi' andhi' eppa' ban taretan laenna?’" 
Genesis44:20 Abdidalem nyaot, ‘Eppa' ampon seppo, dineng ale' lahir e bakto eppa' ampon seppo. Ale' gapaneka gadhuwan kaka' tonggal ebu, namong ampon seda. Daddi samangken ka'dhinto pottrana ebuna kana' se kadhuwa gapaneka namong kare settong, ban eppa' ce' neserra ka ale' se settong gapaneka.’" 
Genesis44:21 Sareng junandalem abdidalem sataretan epakon abakta ale' gapaneka ka ka'dhinto, polana junandalem terro ngoladana;" 
Genesis44:22 abdidalem laju mator ja' kana' gapaneka ta' kengeng apesa dhari eppa'na; manabi apesa dhari eppa'na, eppa'na tanto seda." 
Genesis44:23 Junandalem laju adhabu, ‘Ba'na ta' olle ngadhep sengko' pole mon ale'na ta' egiba.’" 
Genesis44:24 Sanapa'na ka compo' abdidalem manapa' dhabuna junandalem ka eppa'. 
Genesis44:25 Saamponnepon eppa' laju makon abdidalem sataretan nyabis pole ka ka'dhinto pole, ngobangana teddha'an." 
Genesis44:26 Abdidalem mator, ‘Ta' kengeng, Pa'. Kaula ta' eedine ngadhep mon ale' ta' noro'. Kaula coma ngenneng entar ka'assa' mon ale' noro'.’" 
Genesis44:27 Eppa' laju adhabu, ‘Ba'na tao ja' Rahel, tang bine, pera' andhi' ana' dhadhuwa'." 
Genesis44:28 Se sareyang la tadha'. Tantona ebit-sebbit burun alas, sabab sampe' sateya sengko' ta' tao nangale'e pole kana' jareya." 
Genesis44:29 Mon se bungso reya egiba keya bi' ba'na, ban e jalan pas badha pa-apa, sengko' tanto mate polana kasossa'an se epadhateng ba'na jareya, sabab sengko' la towa.’ ”" 
Genesis44:30 “Daddi, guste,” atorra Yehuda ka Yusup, “manabi abdidalem paleman ka eppa' ta' abakta ale', tanto eppa' pas seda. Nyabana agantong ka kana' ka'dhinto. Eppa' ampon ce' seppona, daddi manabi abdidalem ngeba kasossa'an ka'dhinto tanto andaddiyagi talajana eppa'." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Laen dhari ka'dhinto abdidalem ampon ajanji ka eppa' ja' abdidalem daddi tanggunganna ale'. Abdidalem mator ka eppa', manabi abdidalem ta' abakta ale' paleman ka eppa', abdidalem se nanggunga okomanna saomorra." 
Genesis44:33 Daddi, abdidalem nyo'ona, guste, dinggal abdidalem cekka'a e ka'dhinto daddiya dunorra junandalem aganteya ale'; dinggal ale' me' olle paleman sareng ka'-kaka'na." 
Genesis44:34 Kadi ponapa abdidalem se abaliya ka eppa' manabi ale' ta' noro' paleman? Abdidalem ta' kowat dhaggi' nengalana mosiba se etanggunga eppa'.” 
Genesis45:1 Yusup ta' kowat pole ngampet panggaliyanna e adha'na ba-ponggabana. Daddi laju epakon nyengla kabbi dhari jadhiya, sopaja salerana ngennenga notorragi ka tan-taretanna sapa salerana se sabendherra." 
Genesis45:2 Saellana kabbi padha nyengga Yusup laju molar epakaja, sampe' ekaedhing reng-oreng Messer se badha e lowar, ban kabar jareya sampe' kapeyarsa ka karaton." 
Genesis45:3 Yusup adhabu ka tan-taretanna, “Sengko' reya Yusup. Eppa' gi' odhi', ya?” E bakto ngedhing parkara jareya tan-taretanna ce' tako'na sampe' ta' ngenneng nyaot." 
Genesis45:4 Yusup laju adhabu, “Mara dha' enna'.” Tan-taretanna jareya nyander, ban Yusup laju adhabu pole, “Sengko' reya Yusup, se bi' ba'na ejuwal ka Messer rowa." 
Genesis45:5 Ella ja' tako' ban ja' nyala'agi aba'na polana ba'na ajuwal sengko'. Sabendherra Allah dibi' se abakta sengko' dha' enna' epajangadha'i ba'na kaangguy masalamedda oreng se bannya'. 
Genesis45:6 Sateya reya jaman laep gi' buru olle dhu taon; gi' lema taon aggi' oreng ta' kera nyalaga ban ta' kera anye. 
Genesis45:7 Allah se abakta sengko' dha' enna' ajangadha'i ba'na, polana masalamedda ba'na kalaban jalan se makasambu' ate reya, sopaja ba'na ban toronanna odhi'a terros." 
Genesis45:8 Daddi sanyatana banne ba'na se mowang sengko' dha' enna', tape Allah se abakta sengko'. Sengko' epadaddi ponggabana rato se paleng tenggi e Messer. Sengko' epassrae kakobasa'an ngoros roma tanggana ban sabingkerra nagara Messer." 
Genesis45:9 Sateya kassa' ba'na kabbi duli mole; atorragi ka eppa' ja' Yusup, pottrana, apessen kantha reya, ‘Kaula bi' Allah epadaddi pangobasana saantero nagara Messer; ngereng sampeyan enggal meyos ka Messer." 
Genesis45:10 Sampeyan kengeng alenggi e dhaera Gosyen, Pa', semma' sareng kaula; sampeyan, tra-pottrana sareng ja-bajana, dumba sareng embi'na, sape sareng ponapa'a saos kaagunganna sampeyan." 
Genesis45:11 Manabi sampeyan alenggi e Gosyen, kaula bisa ajaga sampeyan. Mosem laep paneka gi' abit, gi' kare lema taon aggi'. Kaula terro sopaja sampeyan sabala, jugan sareng ebinna, ja' kantos kakorangan pa-ponapa.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 Yusup adhabu pole, “Sateya ba'na padha nangale'e dibi', bariya keya ba'na, Benyamin, ja' sengko' reya Yusup onggu." 
Genesis45:13 Atorragi ka eppa' saapa rajana tang kakobasa'an e dhinna', e Messer reya, ban careta'agi ka eppa' pa-apa se etangale'e ba'na. Mon la mare, pas duli abali, eppa' giba dha' enna'.”" 
Genesis45:14 Saellana jareya Yusup agellu' Benyamin, ale'na, laju molar. Benyamin nanges keya sambi agellu' Yusup keya." 
Genesis45:15 Saellana jareya, sambi gi' molar, Yusup agellu' tan-taretanna sarta eseyom gan settong. Saellana jareya tan-taretanna molae acaca ban Yusup." 
Genesis45:16 E bakto rato e karaton meyarsa kabar ja' tan-taretanna Yusup padha dhateng, rato ban ba-ponggabana padha noro' perak kabbi." 
Genesis45:17 Rato laju adhabu ka Yusup, “Kassa' tan-taretanna ba'na soro ngeba gandum, soro buwa' ka mar-hemarra, pas soro mole ka Kana'an," 
Genesis45:18 soro ngone'e eppa'na ban la-balana, soro ngalle dha' enna'. Bi' sengko' eberri'ana tana se paleng bagus e Messer; eppa'na ba'na sabalana bakal odhi'a ta' kakorangan, la'-mala' bi-talebbi dhari hasella tanana e dhinna'." 
Genesis45:19 Dhari dhinna' tan-taretanna ba'na pagibai ta-kareta, me' olle etompa' binena ban na'-ana'na se gi' ne'-kene', ban epangone'e eppa'na." 
Genesis45:20 Rang-barangnga se ta' ekenneng giba soro dina; sabab pa-apa se paleng bagus e sanagara Messer bakal ekaandhi'a eppa'na ba'na ban tan-taretanna.” 
Genesis45:21 Tra-pottrana Yakub ajalannagi dhabuna rato jareya. Bi' Yusup eparenge pan-barampan kareta, menorot dhabuna rato, bariya keya sango se ekaparlo e jalan." 
Genesis45:22 Tan-taretanna jareya padha eparenge kalambi anyar sasettel ebang, tape Benyamin eparenge tello ratos pesse salaka ban kalambi anyar lema settel." 
Genesis45:23 Eppa'na ekereme hemar lake' sapolo meggi' se ebuwadi rang-barang se paleng bagus e Messer, ban hemar babine' sapolo meggi' se ebuwadi gandum, roti ban kakanan laenna se edha'ara eppa'na dhalem parjalanan ka Messer." 
Genesis45:24 Saellana jareya Yusup ngaterragi tan-taretanna se mangkada, sambi adhabu, “Ja' atokaran e jalan.”" 
Genesis45:25 Tan-taretanna Yusup jareya padha mangkat dhari Messer, mole ka Kana'an, ka eppa'na." 
Genesis45:26 “Yusup gi' odhi', Pa'!” ca'na reng-oreng jareya ka eppa'na. “Samangken ngobasane sanagara Messer!” E bakto meyarsa kabar jareya Yakub tababeggen ban ta' parcaja." 
Genesis45:27 Tape saellana tra-pottrana notorragi sakabbinna se edhabuwagi Yusup, ban e bakto ngoladi ta-kareta se ekeremmagi Yusup epangoneyana eppa'na ka Messer, Yakub pas cengngar pole." 
Genesis45:28 “Tang ana' gi' odhi'!” dhabuna. “Pera' jareya se ekaterrowe sengko'! Sengko' entara ngabas tang ana' sabellunna sengko' mate!” 
Genesis46:1 Yakub arengkesse sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na, laju meyos ka Bersyeba; e jadhiya Yakub ngatorragi kurban ka Allah se esemba Ishak, eppa'na." 
Genesis46:2 E baja malem Allah ngaton ka Yakub, laju adhabu, “Yakub, Yakub!” “Ka'dhinto, Guste,” sambidda Yakub." 
Genesis46:3 “Sengko' reya Allah, se esemba eppa'na ba'na,” dhabuna Allah. “Ba'na ta' osa tako' se entara ka Messer. Bi' Sengko' na' potona ba'na epadaddiya bangsa se raja e dhissa'." 
Genesis46:4 Sengko' abarengngana ba'na e dhalem parjalanan ka Messer. Na' potona ba'na bi' Sengko' egiba'a abali ka nagara reya. Yusup bakal badha'a e seddi'anna ba'na e bakto ba'na la napa' ka ajalla.” 
Genesis46:5 Yakub laju meyos dhari Bersyeba. Tra-pottrana nolonge maongga eppa'na ban ji-rajina sarta na'-kana' se gi' ne'-kene' ka kareta se ekereme rato Messer. 
Genesis46:6 Reng-oreng jareya kabbi padha ngeba sakabbinna keban bu-obuwanna ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na se ollena makompol e Kana'an. Saellana jareya kabbi laju padha mangkat ka Messer. Yakub abakta sakabbinna na' potona, iya areya" 
Genesis46:7 tra-pottrana lake' bine', ban ja-bajana lake' bine'." 
Genesis46:8 Na' potona Yakub se noro' ka Messer iya areya: Ruben pottra sareyangnga 
Genesis46:9 ban na'-ana'na: Henokh, Palu, Hezron ban Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeyon, ban na'-ana'na: Yemuwel, Yamin, Ohad, Yakhin, Zohar ban Saul, ana' ollena ban binena se dhari Kana'an." 
Genesis46:11 Lewi ban na'-ana'na: Gerson, Kehat ban Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Yehuda ban na'-ana'na: Syela, Peres ban Zerah; dineng ana'na Yehuda se laenna iya areya Er ban Onan, mate e Kana'an. Na'-ana'na Peres: Hezron ban Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Isakhar ban na'-ana'na: Tola, Pu'a, Ayyub ban Simron." 
Genesis46:14 Zebulon ban na'-ana'na: Sered, Elon ban Yahle'el." 
Genesis46:15 Jareya kabbi tra-pottrana Yakub ollena ban Liya se lahir e Mesopotamia. Salaen dhari jareya badha pole pottrana babine' nyamana Dina. Daddi toronanna Yakub dhari rajina se anyama Liya kabbi bannya'na tello polo tello' oreng. 
Genesis46:16 Gad ban na'-ana'na: Zefon, Hagi, Syuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi ban Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Asyer ban na'-ana'na: Yimna, Yiswa, Yiswi ban Beriya sarta Serah taretan bine'na. Na'-ana'na Beriya iya areya Heber ban Malkiyel." 
Genesis46:18 Oreng se nem bellas jareya toronanna Yakub dhari Zilpa, iya areya dunor bine' baberri'na Laban ka Liya, ana' bine'na." 
Genesis46:19 Rahel, rajina Yakub, kaagungan pottra dhadhuwa', iya areya Yusup ban Benyamin." 
Genesis46:20 E Messer Yusup olle ana' dhadhuwa', iya areya Manasye ban Efraim se elahirragi bi' rajina se anyama Asnat, ana'na Potifera, se daddi imam e Heliopolis." 
Genesis46:21 Na'-ana'na Benyamin iya areya: Bela, Bekher, Asybel, Gera, Na'aman, Ehi, Ros, Mupim, Hupim ban Ared." 
Genesis46:22 Oreng se pa' bellas jareya toronanna Yakub dhari rajina se anyama Rahel. 
Genesis46:23 Saterrossa iya areya Dan ban ana'na, Husim." 
Genesis46:24 Naftali ban na'-ana'na: Yahze'el, Guni, Yezer ban Syilem." 
Genesis46:25 Oreng se kapetto jareya toronanna Yakub dhari Bilha, dunor babine' baberri'na Laban ka Rahel, ana'na." 
Genesis46:26 Toronanna Yakub se entar ka Messer kabbi bannya'na sabidak ennem oreng, ta' tamaso' to-mantona." 
Genesis46:27 Tra-pottrana Yusup se lahir e Messer kadhuwa, daddi sabalana Yakub se napa' ka Messer kabbi badha pettong polo oreng." 
Genesis46:28 Bi' Yakub Yehuda epakon mangkat kaadha', epakon manggi'i Yusup sarta nyo'on sopaja Yusup ngamba'a eppa'na e Gosyen." 
Genesis46:29 Yusup nete'e karetana ngamba'a eppa'na e Gosyen. E bakto se kadhuwa jareya tatemmo, Yusup laju agellu' eppa'na sambi molar." 
Genesis46:30 Dhabuna Yakub ka Yusup, “Sateya sengko' halal tekka'a mateya, sabab sengko' la nangale'e ba'na, ban la tao ja' ba'na gi' odhi'.”" 
Genesis46:31 Yusup laju adhabu ka tan-taretanna ban la-balana se laen, “Sengko' gi' entara mator ka rato ja' tang tan-taretan ban tang la-bala se dhari Kana'an la dhateng kabbi." 
Genesis46:32 Sengko' matora ja' ba'na kabbi oreng ngowan, se dhateng dha' enna' ngeba sakabbinna ebinna ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na." 
Genesis46:33 Mon ba'na etembali rato sarta etanya'agi apa lakona ba'na," 
Genesis46:34 ja' pakalero, mator ja' molae lamba' lakona ba'na ngowan ebin, akantha bangatowana. Daddi ba'na tanto pas eedine neptep e dhaera Gosyen.” Yusup adhabu kantha jareya polana oreng Messer ta' endha' akompol ban oreng ngowan." 
Genesis47:1 Yusup laju ngajak taretanna se kalema, ebakta ngadhep ka rato. Atorra Yusup, “Eppa' sareng tan-taretan abdidalem ampon rabu, abakta embi' sareng dumbana, sape sareng sadaja dhi'-andhi'epon. Samangken sadajana padha badha e Gosyen.” Tan-taretanna jareya pas ekennallagi ka rato." 
Genesis47:2  
Genesis47:3 Dhabuna rato, “Lalakonna ba'na apa?” Atorra tan-taretanna Yusup, “Abdidalem oreng ngowan sadaja, guste, akadi sadajana bangatowa abdidalem gi' jaman dhimen." 
Genesis47:4 Abdidalem padha entar ka Messer ka'dhinto terro apo'-compo'a e nagara ka'dhinto, amarga mosem laep e Kana'an talebat berra'epon, kantos tadha' rebba se kengenga eteddha embi' sareng dumba abdidalem. Daddi abdidalem sadaja nyo'ona lellana junandalem sopaja eedinana neptep e dhaera Gosyen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Dhabuna rato ka Yusup, “Sateya eppa' ban tan-taretanna ba'na la napa' dha' enna'." 
Genesis47:6 Anggep bai nagara Messer reya andhi'na ba'na dibi'. Dina eppa'na ba'na ban tan-taretanna me' olle padha neng e Gosyen, bagiyanna nagara Messer se paleng bagus. Mon la-balana ba'na jareya badha se sanggup, passrae soro ngoros tang ebin.”" 
Genesis47:7 Bi' Yusup eppa'na ebakta keya ka rato, epakennal. Yakub aberkadi rato jareya," 
Genesis47:8 dineng rato jareya adhabu, “Saponapa yuswana sampeyan?”" 
Genesis47:9 Dhabuna Yakub, “Abdidalem ampon saratos tello polo taon odhi' alalana. Odhi' abdidalem se saratos tello polo taon ka'dhinto possa' sareng kasossa'an, sarengngan ta' saponapa abidda manabi ebandhingngagi sareng yuswaepon bangatowana abdidalem se odhi'epon alalana jugan.”" 
Genesis47:10 Saellana jareya Yakub laju amet, sabellunna gubar gi' apareng berkadda ka rato." 
Genesis47:11 Bi' Yusup eppa' ban tan-taretanna epaneptep e Messer. Kabbi padha eparenge tana e kennengngan se paleng bagus e nagara jareya, iya areya e seddi'anna kottha Rameses, akantha se la edhabuwagi rato." 
Genesis47:12 Yusup nyadhiya'agi pa-apa se parlo edha'ara eppa'na, tan-taretanna ban sakabbinna balana se laen, sampe' ka se paleng kene'." 
Genesis47:13 Mosem laep jareya ce' sarana, sampe' e man-dhimman tadha' pa-apa se ekennenga kakan. Ra'yat Messer ban Kana'an padha lo'lo' dhari laparra." 
Genesis47:14 Mon badha reng-oreng se melle gandum, pessena bi' Yusup epakompol laju egiba ka karaton." 
Genesis47:15 Saellana reng-oreng Messer ban Kana'an la ta' andhi' pesse pole, laju padha nyabis ka Yusup sarta mator, “Nyo'ona gandumma, guste! Kaneserre abdidalem, manabi bunten tanto padha mate sadaja. Abdidalem sadaja padha ta' gadhuwan pesse pole, ampon tadha' karena.”" 
Genesis47:16 Dhabuna Yusup, “Mon pessena ba'na la tadha', giba ebinna dha' enna', porop ban gandum.”" 
Genesis47:17 Daddi reng-oreng jareya padha ngeba ebinna, eatorragi ka Yusup. Bi' Yusup reng-oreng jareya eparenge gandum menangka gantena jaranna, dumbana, embi'na, sapena ban hemarra. Daddi e taon jareya Yusup apareng gandum ka ra'yat, rop-poroban bi' ebinna jareya." 
Genesis47:18 Sataon saellana jareya ra'yat nyabis pole ka Yusup sambi mator, “Abdidalem ta' leng-ngalenga ka junandalem, guste, abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan pesse sakale, ebin abdidalem ampon daddi kaagunganna junandalem. Abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan pa-ponapa pole se eatorragiya ka junandalem, kajabana badan sareng tana." 
Genesis47:19 Kaneserre abdidalem, manabi bunten tanto padha mate sadaja! Sopaja teggal abdidalem ta' kantosa tadha' orengnga. Ngereng pondhut badan sareng tana abdidalem, porop sareng teddha'an. Abdidalem daddiya dunorrepon rato, tana abdidalem badhi daddiya kaagunganna rato. Ngereng abdidalem nyo'ona gandumma epanyambunga nyaba, sareng nyo'ona ne-bine etabura e teggal!”" 
Genesis47:20 Sakabbinna tana e Messer bi' Yusup epondhut, epadaddi kaagunganna rato. Sakabbinna oreng Messer tapaksa ajuwal tanana sabab mosem laep jareya ce' sarana. Sakabbinna tana e Messer la daddi kaagunganna rato." 
Genesis47:21 Sakabbinna oreng Messer la epadaddi dunorra rato bi' Yusup. 
Genesis47:22 Tana se ta' epondhut pera' tanana para imam. Para imam jareya ta' parlo ajuwal tanana sabab la padha olle sombangan dhari rato kaangguy kaparlowanna odhi'na. 
Genesis47:23 Dhabuna Yusup ka ra'yat, “Daddi badan ban tanana ba'na bi' sengko' la ebelli epadaddi kaagunganna rato. Areya' ne-bine mon etamenna e teggalla ba'na." 
Genesis47:24 Mon ba'na anye, saparlemanna kodu eatorragi ka rato. Lebbina olle kagabay ne-bine tor ekakan ba'na sabala.”" 
Genesis47:25 Atorra reng-oreng jareya, “Junandalem ampon nolong abdidalem sadaja kantos padha salamet. Junandalem ce' saena ka abdidalem, guste, daddi abdidalem sadaja padha halal daddi dunorrepon rato.”" 
Genesis47:26 Parkara jareya bi' Yusup laju ekagabay dhang-ondhang e nagara Messer, iya areya saparlemanna hasel tane kodu eatorragi ka rato. Sampe' sateya dhang-ondhang jareya gi' paggun bai. Pera' tanana para imam se ta' eatorragi ka rato." 
Genesis47:27 Reng-oreng Isra'il neptep e dhaera Gosyen. Neng e jadhiya laju padha daddi sogi ban bannya' na' potona. 
Genesis47:28 Yakub se alenggi e Messer abidda petto bellas taon, sampe' yuswana saratos pa' polo petto' taon." 
Genesis47:29 E bakto para' napa'a ka ajalla, Yakub adikane Yusup, pottrana. Dhabuna ka Yusup, “Mara saba' tanangnga ba'na e antarana tang kang-pekang sarta asompa ja' ba'na ta' ngoburragiya sengko' e Messer reya." 
Genesis47:30 Sengko' koburragi e kennengnganna tang para bangatowa; giba tang mayyit dhari nagara reya, pas koburragi pakompol e koburanna tang para bangatowa.” Atorra Yusup, “Ponapa dhabuna sampeyan bi' kaula ejalannagiya sadaja.”" 
Genesis47:31 Dhabuna Yakub, “Mara asompa ja' ba'na pajat ajalannagiya ongguwan.” Yusup laju asompa, dineng Yakub pas asokkor e pasareyanna." 
Genesis48:1 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Yusup ekabari ja' eppa'na songkan sanget. Daddi Yusup laju meyos ngoladi eppa'na, sambi abakta pottra lalake'na se kadhuwa, iya areya Efraim ban Manasye." 
Genesis48:2 E bakto Yakub meyarsa ja' Yusup rabu, laju ja-ngaja alenggi e pasareyanna." 
Genesis48:3 Dhabuna Yakub ka Yusup, “Allah Se Mahakobasa ngaton ka sengko' e Lus, iya areya e tana Kana'an, sarta aberkadi sengko'." 
Genesis48:4 Dhabuna ka sengko' kantha reya, ‘Sengko' aberri'a na' poto sabannya'na ka ba'na, sopaja toronanna ba'na daddiya bangsa sabannya'na. Nagara reya bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka na' potona ba'na me' olle ekaandhi' salanjangnga.’ ”" 
Genesis48:5 Yakub pas adhabu pole, “Yusup, ana'na ba'na Efraim ban Manasye, se lahir e Messer reya sabellunna sengko' napa' dha' enna', bi' sengko' eanggep padha ban tang ana' dibi', tadha' bidana ban Ruben tor Simeyon." 
Genesis48:6 Mon ba'na andhi' ana' lalake' pole, bi' sengko' ta' eanggebba tang ana'. Sangkolan kaangguy na'-kana' jareya bakal etarema'a dhari Efraim ban Manasye." 
Genesis48:7 Sengko' neptebbagi kantha jareya polana ebuna ba'na, Rahel. Ebuna ba'na jareya tadha' omorra e Kana'an, ta' jau dhari Efrata, e bakto sengko' teppa' badha e dhalem parjalanan abali dhari Mesopotamia. Sengko' ce' ngennessa.” (Efrata jareya sateya enyamae Betlehem.)" 
Genesis48:8 E bakto Yakub ngoladi pottrana Yusup se kadhuwa laju mareksane, dhabuna, “Sapa kana' reya?”" 
Genesis48:9 Sambidda Yusup, “Ana' kaula, paparengnga Allah ka kaula neng e Messer paneka.” Dhabuna Yakub, “Giba dha' enna', bi' sengko' eberkadana.”" 
Genesis48:10 Yakub la rabeng sabab la seppo, daddi pangoladanna ta' terrang. Yusup abakta pottrana se kadhuwa, epasemma' ka eppa'na; na'-kana' se kadhuwa jareya bi' Yakub egellu' tor ekaloskos." 
Genesis48:11 Dhabuna Yakub ka Yusup, “Sengko' ta' nyangka ja' tatemmowa ban ba'na pole, tape sateya bi' Guste Allah sengko' la'-mala' epanangale na'-ana'na ba'na keya.”" 
Genesis48:12 Saellana jareya ana'na se kadhuwa bi' Yusup epatoron dhari reba'anna eppa'na. Yusup dibi' laju asojud e ajunanna eppa'na. 
Genesis48:13 Saellana jareya bi' Yusup Efraim esaba' e kaceranna, dineng Manasye se sareyang esaba' e kangananna." 
Genesis48:14 Tape Yakub nompangngagi astana se kangan ka cethagga Efraim se badha e kaceranna, sanajjan Efraim jareya se angodha'an, ban astana se kacer etompangngagi ka cethagga se towa'an, Manasye, se badha e kanganna." 
Genesis48:15 Saellana jareya Yakub laju aberkadi Yusup, dhabuna, “Allah se esemba tang bangatowa Ibrahim ban Ishak, se nonton sengko' sampe' sateya reya." 
Genesis48:16 Salerana jareya malaekat se malopot tang aba' dhari samacemma babaja. Moga Allah jareya aberkadana na'-kana' reya. Moga lantaran na'-kana' se kadhuwa reya tang nyama ban asmana Ibrahim ban Ishak ekaenga'ana oreng saterrossa. Moga se kadhuwa reya bannya'a na' potona ban bannya' toronanna e bume reya.” 
Genesis48:17 Yusup ta' senneng e bakto ngoladi eppa'na nompangngagi astana se kangan ka cethagga Efraim; daddi astana eppa'na jareya laju etagenne, ealleya ka cethagga Manasye." 
Genesis48:18 Dhabuna Yusup ka eppa'na, “Kalero, Pa'. Paneka' se towa'an; ngereng tompangngagi astaepon sampeyan se kangan ka cethagga.”" 
Genesis48:19 Tape eppa'na ta' kasokan, sambi adhabu, “Sengko' tao, Na', sengko' tao. Na' potona Manasye bakal daddiya bangsa se raja kakobasa'anna keya. Tape ale'na bakal lebbiya raja kakobasa'anna, ban na' potona ale'na bakal daddiya sa-bangsa se raja kakobasa'anna.”" 
Genesis48:20 Daddi e are jareya Yakub aberkadi kana' se kadhuwa jareya sambi adhabu, “Reng-oreng Isra'il bakal nyebbuda ma-nyamana ba'na mon aberkadi oreng. Reng-oreng Isra'il bakal ngoca'a kantha reya, ‘Moga-moga bi' Allah ba'na epapadha'a bi' Efraim ban Manasye.’ ” Daddi bi' Yakub nyamana Efraim esebbut sabellunna Manasye." 
Genesis48:21 Yakub pas adhabu ka Yusup, “Ba'na tao ja' sengko' la para' mateya, tape Guste Allah bakal nolonga ba'na, sarta bakal abakta'a ba'na abali ka nagarana bangatowana." 
Genesis48:22 Dhaera Sikhem se landhu, ollena sengko' arebbu' dhari oreng Amori kalaban ngangguy peddhang ban pana, bi' sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na, banne ka tan-taretanna ba'na.”" 
Genesis49:1 Yakub adikane tra-pottrana, laju adhabu, “Mara padha dha' enna' kabbi, neng e seddi'anna sengko'. Bi' sengko' ebala'ana kabbi apa se bakal kadaddiyana ka ba'na e budhi are:" 
Genesis49:2 Mara akompol kabbi, na'-ana'na Yakub, mara padha edhingngagi dhabuna Isra'il, eppa'na ba'na." 
Genesis49:3 Ruben, tang ana' se sareyang, ba'na reya tang kakowadan, ana' se dha'-adha' ollena sengko' menangka oreng lake'. Ba'na se paleng gaga' ban se paleng kowat e antarana tang na'-ana'." 
Genesis49:4 Ba'na padha ban banjir raja, tape ba'na ta' bakal daddiya se paleng penting, sabab ba'na tedhung ban tang seller, macemmer katedhunganna eppa'na." 
Genesis49:5 Simeyon ban Lewi sataretan; sanjatana padha eangguy ngalakone kakerrasan. 
Genesis49:6 Sengko' ta' ro'-noro'a e dhalem parembaganna se ta' ekaedhing oreng laenna, bariya keya sengko' ta' noro'a e dhalem kompolanna se padha asakongkellan, sabab tang ana' se kadhuwa jareya mate'e oreng kalaban napso amara sarta madippang theng-bantheng pera' parlo nyare kasennengnganna atena." 
Genesis49:7 Amarana se kadhuwa jareya ce' paranana, ban peggella atena daddi sababba se kadhuwa jareya talebat kejjemma, daddi bakal ekennenga babastonna Pangeran. Toronanna bi' sengko' epacar-kalacera sanagara Isra'il, epatapencara e antarana sa-bangsa." 
Genesis49:8 Yehuda, ba'na bakal ealemma bi' tan-taretanna, ba'na nyekkella le'erra so-mosona, tan-taretanna ba'na bakal asojuda kabbi ka ba'na." 
Genesis49:9 Yehuda padha bi' macan se mate'e mosona, laju abali ka rongkangnga; akaleya' laju marobbu tedhunga, tadha' oreng se bangala ca-nganca." 
Genesis49:10 Yehuda bakal neggu'a tongkedda karaja'an, na' potona bakal marenta'a salanjangnga. Sa-bangsa bakal majara pajek ka nagarana sarta asojud mator sandika e adha'anna." 
Genesis49:11 Hemarra ban budhu'na epangger ka bungkana anggur, ka bungkana anggur se paleng bagus, kalambina esassa bi' anggur se mera akantha dhara." 
Genesis49:12 Matana mera polana ngenom anggur, gigina pote polana ngenom susu." 
Genesis49:13 Zebulon bakal ako-bengkowa e seddi'na tase'; penggir serengnga daddiya palabbuwanna pal-kapal, batessa nagarana bakal napa'a ka Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 Isakhar tadha' bidana ban hemar se tedhung ngonjur ban karanjang buwadanna se gi' cekka' e kangan kacerra badanna. 
Genesis49:15 Kennengngan jareya etangale'e ce' bagussa, nagara jareya talebat leburra, daddi pas ngendha' narema buwadan e balikadda epaksa epadaddi dunor epalako ce' berra'na." 
Genesis49:16 Ba'na, Dan, bakal marenta'a bangsana toronanna ba'na daddiya suku se padha ban ku-suku Isra'il laenna." 
Genesis49:17 Ba'na bakal padha'a ban olar e penggir lorong, olar se mandi opassa e penggir jalan, se ngekke' tombedda jaran sampe' se nompa' labu ajungkelang ka baba." 
Genesis49:18 Adhu, GUSTE, abdidalem anante' kasalameddan paparengngepon Junandalem." 
Genesis49:19 Gad, ba'na bakal eserranga gal-bigal, tape ba'na bakal alabana sarta abigal reng-oreng se abigala ba'na jareya." 
Genesis49:20 Asyer, nagarana ba'na ngasellagiya kakanan ta' sakera-kera, kakananna ba'na man-nyaman padha ban dha'aranna rato." 
Genesis49:21 Naftali padha ban manjangan, se berka' sanyamanna e dhalem alas, dhu'-budhu'na ce' leburra abasanna." 
Genesis49:22 Yusup padha ban hemar se gi' ngodha e seddi'na somberra aeng, padha ban hemar alas se ka'-berka' e lambungnga gunong." 
Genesis49:23 Bi' mosona eserrang ce' kejjemma, eserser ngangguy gandhiba ban pana." 
Genesis49:24 Tape gandhibana Yusup paggun ce' kokona, lengngenna kowat parana, polana partolonganna Allah Se Mahakobasa, Allah se esemba Yakub, se ajaga ban se nolonge Isra'il salanjangnga." 
Genesis49:25 Se nolonge ba'na Allah se esemba eppa'na, Allah Se Mahakobasa se aberkadi ba'na, se apareng ojan dhari langnge' ban aeng dhari dhalem bume, se apareng ebin ban dhu'-budhu'na." 
Genesis49:26 Se apareng gandum ban bang-kembangan. Berkadda Allah alebbiyan dhari essena nong-gunong se ce' towana. Moga-moga berkat jareya torona ka Yusup, ka dhaina tang ana' se paleng istimewa e antarana tan-taretanna." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamin padha ban pate' alas se galak; mon gi' laggu nyargep mangsana, bila malem laju egi-bagi.”" 
Genesis49:28 Jareya suku Isra'il, se dhubellas bannya'na, sarta dhabuna eppa'na ka pottrana bang-sebang menangka dhabu dhi-budhina e bakto apesa'a." 
Genesis49:29 Saellana jareya Yakub laju abaseyat ka tra-pottrana, “Sateya sengko' akompola ban tang bangsa se la mate. Mon sengko' la mate, bendhem pakompol ban para tang bangatowa e guwa se badha e teggalla Efron oreng Het rowa," 
Genesis49:30 iya areya se badha e Makhpela, e bagiyan temorra Mamre, e nagara Kana'an. Guwa ban teggal jareya ebelli Ibrahim dhari Efron, ekagabaya tana koburan." 
Genesis49:31 Ibrahim ban rajina, Sarah, esareyagi e jadhiya, bariya keya Ishak ban rajina, Ribka; Liya bi' sengko' ebendhem e jadhiya keya." 
Genesis49:32 Guwa ban teggal jareya la ebelli dhari oreng Het. Daddi sengko' bendhem e jadhiya keya, ya.”" 
Genesis49:33 Saellana mare se ayat-baseyat jareya, Yakub marobbu, laju seda." 
Genesis50:1 Yusup marobbu ka badanna eppa'na sambi molar ban ngaloskos mowana. 
Genesis50:2 Saellana jareya laju apareng parenta sopaja jinazana eppa'na ebalsem. 
Genesis50:3 Se abalsem sampe' pa' polo are abidda, kantha kapprana abidda mon oreng abalsem jinaza. Reng-oreng Messer noduwagi kasossa'anna sampe' pettong polo are abidda." 
Genesis50:4 Saellana lebat bakto se pettong polo are kaangguy noduwagi kasossa'an jareya Yusup adhabu ka ba-ponggabana rato, “Sengko' menta'a tolong matorragi kantha reya ka rato:" 
Genesis50:5 ‘E bakto eppa' para' seda'a, abdidalem epakon ajanji jinazana eppa' esareyagiya e palowadan se ampon esadhiya'agi dibi' sareng eppa', enggi ka'dhinto neng e Kana'an. Daddi abdidalem nyo'ona edi dhimen badhi ngoburragiya eppa'; manabi ampon lastare abdidalem abaliya pole ka ka'dhinto.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Dhabuna rato, “Kassa' la mangkat, koburragi eppa'na menorot se la ejanjiyagi bi' ba'na.”" 
Genesis50:7 Daddi Yusup laju meyos nyareyagiya eppa'na. Sakabbinna ponggaba ban para seppo karaton, sakabbinna pamimpin e Messer padha noro' ngater." 
Genesis50:8 Ana' binena, tan-taretanna ban la-balana eppa'na se laen padha noro' kabbi. Se ta' noro', sarta paggun neng e dhaera Gosyen, coma na'-ana'na reng-oreng jareya kabbi se gi' ne'-kene', dumba ban embi'na tor ebinna." 
Genesis50:9 Se ngaterragi badha se padha nompa' kareta ban nompa' jaran. Se ngaterragi jareya talebat bannya'na. 
Genesis50:10 Sanapa'na ka Goren-Ha'atad e temoranna Songay Yordan, reng-oreng jareya padha nanges agingging epakaja sampe' abit; Yusup mabadha opacara kaangguy noduwagiya kasossa'an pettong are abidda." 
Genesis50:11 E bakto reng-oreng Kana'an nangale'e reng-oreng jareya padha nanges e Goren-Ha'atad jareya, laju padha ngoca', “Ce' ngennessa opacarana reng-oreng Messer mon noduwagiya kasossa'anna polana kapateyan!” Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Abel-Mizraim." 
Genesis50:12 Daddi tra-pottrana Yakub la ajalannagi apa se edhabuwagi Yakub. 
Genesis50:13 Jinazana egiba ka Kana'an, laju esareyagi e Guwa Makhpela e temorranna Mamre, e teggal se ebelli Ibrahim dhari Efron oreng Het kaangguy tana koburan." 
Genesis50:14 Samarena nyareyagi eppa'na, Yusup laju abali ka Messer, asareng ban tan-taretanna ban sakabbinna oreng se ngater dhari Messer." 
Genesis50:15 Saellana eppa'na seda, tan-taretanna Yusup padha ngoca', “Baramma mon Yusup gi' sake' ate ban gi' amaksod malessa kajahadanna sengko' ban ba'na ka aba'na gi' lamba' rowa?”" 
Genesis50:16 Daddi tan-taretanna jareya pas apessennan kantha reya ka Yusup, “Sabellunna eppa' seda," 
Genesis50:17 eppa' abaseyat ka sengko' sataretan sopaja ngoca' kantha reya ka ba'na, ‘Berri'i sapora tan-taretanna ba'na se nganeyaja ba'na lamba' rowa.’ Daddi sateya tan-taretanna ba'na reya, iya areya abdina Allah se esemba eppa'na ba'na, nyo'ona sapora ka ba'na polana se la nganeyaja ba'na lamba' rowa.” Yusup molar e bakto narema pessen jareya." 
Genesis50:18 Saellana jareya tan-taretanna padha dhateng dibi' laju asojud e ajunanna Yusup. “Sengko' reya abdina ba'na kabbi,” ca'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Genesis50:19 Tape Yusup adhabu, “Ella, ta' osa tako'. Sengko' reya banne Allah." 
Genesis50:20 Ba'na padha nganeyaja sengko', tape panganeyaja'anna ba'na jareya bi' Guste Allah la eoba epadaddi kabecce'an kaangguy nolong odhi'na reng-oreng sabannya'na se sampe' sateya gi' odhi' polana kadaddiyan lamba' rowa." 
Genesis50:21 Tadha' se parlo ekatako'e bi' ba'na. Sakabbinna kabutowanna ba'na ban na'-ana'na bi' sengko' ecokobana.” Daddi atena tan-taretanna jareya padha ayem saellana ngedhing dhabuna Yakub se ce' nyamanna jareya. 
Genesis50:22 Yusup terros alenggi e Messer ban la-balana eppa'na. E bakto seda yuswana saratos sapolo taon. 
Genesis50:23 Yusup gi' sempat ngoladi tra-pottrana ban ja-bajana Efraim; bariya keya gi' sempat mondhut na'-ana'na Makhir, iya areya poy-kompoyya Manasye." 
Genesis50:24 Dhabuna Yusup ka tan-taretanna, “Sengko' la para' mateya, tape Guste Allah tanto abanto ba'na kabbi, sarta masthe abakta ba'na kabbi abali ka nagara se la ejanjiyagi ka Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub.”" 
Genesis50:25 Saellana jareya la-balana bi' Yusup epakon asompa. “Mara ajanji ka sengko',” ca'na dhabuna, “mon ba'na kabbi bi' Allah ebakta abali ka nagara jareya, tang badan giba'agi keya.”" 
Genesis50:26 Daddi Yusup seda e Messer e bakto yuswana saratos sapolo taon. Jinazana ebalsem ban ebaddhai petthe. 
Exodus1:1 Yakub se ajuluk Isra'il ngalle ka Messer asareng tra-pottrana ban ana' binena bang-sebang. Tra-pottrana Yakub jareya iya areya: 
Exodus1:2 Ruben, Simeyon, Lewi ban Yehuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakhar, Zebulon, Benyamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan, Naftali, Gad ban Asyer." 
Exodus1:5 Na' potona Yakub bannya'na pettong polo oreng; tape pottrana se anyama Yusup la badha e Messer kaadha'. 
Exodus1:6 Yusup pas seda, bariya keya tan-taretanna, ban sakabbinna oreng Isra'il se dhat-endhit omorra bi' Yusup jareya." 
Exodus1:7 Tape toronanna, iya areya oreng Isra'il, bannya' na' potona; dhari bannya'na sampe' mossa'e tana Messer." 
Exodus1:8 Saellana jareya Messer pas eparenta rato se ta' kennal ka Yusup. 
Exodus1:9 Rato jareya adhabu ka ra'yadda, “Bangsa Isra'il reya ce' bannya'na ban ce' kowadda, alebbiyan dhari oreng Messer bannya'na." 
Exodus1:10 Sateya mara padha nyare jalan sopaja oreng Isra'il reya ta' atamba'a pole bannya'na. Sabab mon epanneng babaja; tako' mon badha perrang pas nolonge moso, pas ondur dhari dhinna'.”" 
Exodus1:11 Daddi reng-oreng Isra'il epalako berra', tor ejaga bi' reng-oreng Messer se kejjem; epaksa alako kaangguy kaparlowanna rato, iya areya maddek tha-kottha Pitom ban Ra'amses se egabay pusadda panyempennanna sabarang kaparlowan." 
Exodus1:12 Tape sajan eseksa oreng Isra'il sajan atamba bannya' ban sajan bannya' bagiyanna tana Messer se ekennengnge. Reng-oreng Messer molae arassa tako'. 
Exodus1:13 Daddi oreng Isra'il laju eseksa epace'kejjemma, sarta ekadunor, odhi'na ce' nyangsarana. Epalako berra' e yek-proyek pambangonan ban e gal-teggalla oreng Messer. Reng-oreng Messer ta' andhi' ate neser sakale ka oreng Isra'il." 
Exodus1:14  
Exodus1:15 Rato Messer apareng papakon keya ka Sifra ban Pu'a, iya areya kon-dhukon rana' se biyasana nolonge marembi' babine'an Ibrani, dhabuna," 
Exodus1:16 “Mon ba'na nolonge marembi' babine'an Isra'il, mon babaji'na lalake', pate'e; mon babine', dina ja' pama-baramma.”" 
Exodus1:17 Tape kon-dhukon rana' jareya padha tako' ka Allah, daddi padha ta' atoro' ka dhabuna ratona; ji'-babaji' lalake' se lahir tadha' se epateyana." 
Exodus1:18 Daddi dhukon se kadhuwa jareya pas etembali bi' rato; ca'na dhabuna rato jareya, “Arapa ba'na me' kantha jareya? Ji'-babaji' lalake' se lahir jareya me' ta' epate'e?”" 
Exodus1:19 Saodda dhukon se kadhuwa jareya, “Babine'an Ibrani ta' padha sareng babine'an Messer. Manabi rembi' ce' gampangnga; sabellunnepon abdidalem dhapa', babaji'na ampon kalowar.”" 
Exodus1:20 Sarrena kon-dhukon jareya tako' ka Allah, daddi bi' Allah eparenge berkadda ban eparenge na' poto. Bangsa Isra'il sajan atamba bannya' ban sajan atamba kowat." 
Exodus1:21  
Exodus1:22 Dhi-budhina rato apareng parenta kantha reya ka ra'yadda, “Mon badha oreng Ibrani rembi' lalake', buwang babaji' jareya ka Songay Nil; mon babaji'na babine', dina panneng.”" 
Exodus2:1 E jaman jareya badha oreng lalake' Lewi abine babine' dhari sukuna dibi'. 
Exodus2:2 Babine' jareya ngandhung, pas rembi' lalake'; robana ce' bagussa, daddi bi' ebuna eerrep, sampe' tello bulan abidda." 
Exodus2:3 Tape tantona ta' ekenneng errep ros-terrosan. Daddi ebuna pas agabay karanjang dhari rebba mendhong, elabur ban pakal sarta etter. Ana'na pas epamaso' ka karanjang jareya, ban karanjangnga laju esaba' e ba-rebba se tombu e penggirra Songay Nil." 
Exodus2:4 Embugga babaji' jareya ngetek, manjeng abak jau dhari kennengngan jareya, ngabassagi ba' baramma'a daddina ale'na." 
Exodus2:5 Kabendherran pottrena rato meyos ka songay jareya, aserama. Bu' embanna padha anante' sambi lan-jalanan e penggirra songay. O-tao pottre gella' ngoladi badha karanjang tasangsang e ba-rebba. Pottre jareya laju nembali bu' embanna, epakon ngala' karanjang jareya." 
Exodus2:6 Karanjang jareya ebukka', pottre pas ngoladi essena babaji'. Babaji' jareya nanges, ban pottre arassa neser ka kana' jareya. Dhabuna, “Tantona reya ana'na oreng Yahudi.”" 
Exodus2:7 Embugga babaji' gella' nyander, laju atanya, “Ponapa junandalem enyareyagiya babine' Yahudi epakona nyepsebbi kana' ka'dhinto?”" 
Exodus2:8 “Iya, kassa' nyareyagi,” dhabuna pottre. Daddi kana' jareya laju ngolok ebuna babaji' jareya dibi'." 
Exodus2:9 Dhabuna pottre ka babine' jareya, “Giba babaji' reya, sosowe ban rabaddagi. Bi' sengko' ba'na eopa'ana.” Daddi bi' babine' jareya babaji'na egiba, laju esosowe sarta erabat." 
Exodus2:10 Saellana abak raja, kana' jareya pas eaterragi ka pottrena rato. Bi' pottre pas epondhut ana', sarta pas enyamae Mosa. Ca'na panggaliyanna polana ollena ngangkes dhari dhalem aeng." 
Exodus2:11 Saellana dibasa, Mosa laju manggi'i reng-oreng sabangsana. Mosa ngoladi ja' bangsana, iya areya bangsa Yahudi, epaksa alako berra'. E settong are Mosa ngoladi badha oreng Messer mate'e oreng Yahudi." 
Exodus2:12 Mosa ngas-balingasan ka kangan ka kacer; saellana ngoladi ja' tadha' oreng se nangale'e, oreng Messer gella' pas epate'e. Mayyidda ebendhem e dhalem beddhi." 
Exodus2:13 Kalagguwanna Mosa kalowar pole. E jadhiya ngoladi badha oreng Yahudi kadhuwa teppa'na akeket. Dhabuna Mosa ka oreng se sala, “Aponapa sampeyan me' atokaran sabangsana?”" 
Exodus2:14 Ca'na oreng jareya, “Aponapa'a sampeyan me' ros-orosan, me' ta' kala ka rato? Ponapa samangken sampeyan mateyana kaula, akantha se mate'e oreng Messer ka'issa'?” Mosa pas tako', sabab ca'na panggaliyanna tantona: “badha oreng se tao ja' salerana mate'e oreng Messer rowa.”" 
Exodus2:15 Naleka rato meyarsa parkara jareya laju nyare akkal mateyana Mosa. Tape Mosa laju buru ka Midian. E settong are, teppa'na Mosa alenggi e seddi'anna settong somor, pas badha babine'an kapetto. Babine'an jareya ana'na Yitro, imamma oreng Midian, entar ka jadhiya nyello'a aeng eenommagiya ka embi' ban dumbana eppa'na." 
Exodus2:16
