Exodus19:7 Mosa pas toron, makompol para pamimpinna oreng Isra'il, pas marenge oneng ka reng-oreng jareya sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka salerana." 
Exodus19:8 Reng-oreng Isra'il nyaot abareng, “Sadajana dhabuna PANGERAN bi' kaula ejalannagiya.” Mosa ngatorragi jawabanna bangsa jareya ka PANGERAN." 
Exodus19:9 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Sengko' entara ka ba'na aropa'a ondhem se kandel sopaja reng-oreng Isra'il ngedhinga mon Sengko' acaca ka ba'na, bariya keya sopaja Tang ommat jareya parcaja'a ka ba'na." 
Exodus19:10 Sateya kassa' ba'na entar ka bangsa jareya, kabbi soro nyocce'e aba' sateya ban lagguna; kalambina soro sassa." 
Exodus19:11 Sadhumalem kodu la siyap kabbi. E are jareya Sengko' torona ka Gunong Sinay, e jadhiya oreng bakal nangaleyana kabbi ka Sengko'." 
Exodus19:12 E sakalenglengnga gunong jareya pobuwi tandha menangka bates se olle elebadi oreng. Balai reng-oreng jareya ta' olle ongga ka gunong jareya, la'-mala' nyemma'e bates jareya bai ta' olle. Pa'-sapa'a se ngalebadi bates jareya bakal eokoma mate;" 
Exodus19:13 oreng jareya kodu egarujuk ban bato, otaba epana, ban ta' olle esedding sapa'a bai. Atoran reya kodu etoro' bi' manossa, bariya keya bi' keban; se nedda' bates gella' kodu eokom mate. Tape mon badha monyena tarompet se lanjang, buru reng-oreng jareya olle ongga ka gunong jareya.”" 
Exodus19:14 Saellana jareya Mosa toron dhari gunong pas makon reng-oreng Isra'il sopaja ayap-siyap ajalannagiya kabakteyan. Dhabuna Mosa, “Sadhumalem ba'na kodu la siyap ban sabellunna jareya lalake'an ta' olle apolong tedhung ban binena.” Bangsa Isra'il pas molae ayap-siyap sarta padha nyassa kalambina." 
Exodus19:15  
Exodus19:16 E are se kapeng tello, teppa' gu-laggu, pas badha kelap ban galudhuk. E attassa gunong badha ondhem se kandel, reng-oreng ngedhing monyena tarompet ce' kajana. Sampe' reng-oreng e parkemahan jareya ngetter katako'en." 
Exodus19:17 Mosa abakta reng-oreng Isra'il kalowar dhari parkemahan epatemmowa ban Allah, kabbi padha manjeng e babana gunong jareya." 
Exodus19:18 Gunong Sinay katotoban okos sabab PANGERAN rabu aropa apoy. Kokos jareya ngebbul padha ban kokossa kennengnganna pangobbaran, reng-oreng padha ngetter dhari tako'na." 
Exodus19:19 Monyena tarompet sajan kaja. Mosa tor-mator ka Allah ban Allah nyaodi dhari dhalem galudhuk. 
Exodus19:20 PANGERAN pas toron ka attassa konco'na Gunong Sinay, nembali Mosa, epakon ongga ka konco'na gunong jareya. Daddi Mosa pas ongga," 
Exodus19:21 dhabuna PANGERAN, “Kassa' ba'na toron paenga' reng-oreng rowa, ja' bagi ngalebadi bates polana terro nangaleyana Sengko'. Mon larangan reya ta' etoro', reng-oreng jareya tanto bannya' se mate." 
Exodus19:22 Mam-imam se terro nyemma'a ka Sengko' kodu nyocce'e aba' gallu; mon enja', bi' Sengko' eokoma.”" 
Exodus19:23 Atorra Mosa ka PANGERAN, “Reng-oreng ka'dhinto ta' kera ongga, sabab Junandalem ampon adhabu ja' sadajana ommat se badha e ka'dhinto kodu nganggep gunong ka'dhinto kennengngan se socce, daddi kodu eparenge bates e sakalenglengnga.”" 
Exodus19:24 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Kassa' la toron, pas abali dha' enna' abareng ban Harun. Tape mam-imam ban ra'yat ta' olle ngalebadi bates polana nyemma'a ka Sengko'. Mon maksa, bi' Sengko' eokoma.”" 
Exodus19:25 Mosa pas toron manggi'i bangsana, manapa' dhabuna PANGERAN ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Exodus20:1 Dhabuna Allah," 
Exodus20:2 “Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na se ekadunor oreng." 
Exodus20:3 Ja' nyemba ka lah-illah laenna kajabana Sengko'. 
Exodus20:4 Ja' agabay arca se padha ban apa'a bai se badha e langnge', se padha ban sabarang se badha e bume otaba se badha e dhalem aeng e baba'anna bume." 
Exodus20:5 Ja' nyemba otaba abakte ka ca-arca jareya, sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, ban Sengko' ta' endha' epapadha ban apa'a bai. Reng-oreng se baji' ka Sengko' bi' Sengko' eokom sampe' toronan se kapeng tello' ban empa'." 
Exodus20:6 Tape Sengko' taresna ka abun-ebun oreng toronanna reng-oreng se taresna ka Sengko' ban se atoro' ka Tang parenta. 
Exodus20:7 Ja' ban-saromban nyebbut Tang nyama, sabab Sengko', PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, ngokoma sapa'a bai se ban-saromban nyebbut Tang nyama." 
Exodus20:8 Raya'agi ban hormadi are Sabat menangka are se socce. 
Exodus20:9 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'i nem are kaangguy alalakon," 
Exodus20:10 tape are se kapeng petto' are Sabadda PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na. Are jareya angguy abakte ka Sengko', e are jareya ba'na ta' olle alalakon, tamaso' na'-ana'na ba'na, nor-dunorra, keban peyara'anna, ban reng-oreng manca se badha e nagarana ba'na." 
Exodus20:11 E dhalem nem are Sengko', PANGERAN, agabay bume, langnge', tase' raja ban saessena, tape e are se kapeng petto' Sengko' ambu ta' alalakon pole. Lantaran jareya Sengko' aberkadi are Sabat ban masocce are jareya." 
Exodus20:12 Hormadi rama ebuna sopaja ba'na lanjanga omorra e nagara se bi' Sengko', PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, ebagi ka ba'na." 
Exodus20:13 Ja' mate e oreng. 
Exodus20:14 Ja' azina. 
Exodus20:15 Ja' co'-ngeco'. 
Exodus20:16 Ja' metenna oreng. 
Exodus20:17 Ja' terro ngala'a dhi'-andhi'na oreng; ja' terro ngala'a binena oreng, dunorra, dumbana otaba sapena, hemarra otaba apa'a bai andhi'na oreng laen.”" 
Exodus20:18 E bakto ngedhing monyena kelap saleng pacenthar ban sowarana tarompet, sarta nangale'e dhap-keddhap ban gunong ngokos, oreng Isra'il padha katako'en, kabbi laju padha majau." 
Exodus20:19 Atorra reng-oreng jareya ka Mosa, “Sampeyan saos se abu-dhabu ka kaula, kaula padha merengngagiya; manabi Allah se abu-dhabu ka kaula, tanto kaula padha mate sadaja.”" 
Exodus20:20 Dhabuna Mosa, “Ella ta' osa tako'. Allah rabu dha' enna' coma nyoba'a ba'na, sopaja ba'na terrosa atoro' ka papakonna ban ta' agabaya dusa.”" 
Exodus20:21 Tape reng-oreng Isra'il paggun manjeng majau pera' Mosa malolo se nyemma' ka ondhem se petteng se ekalenggi'i Allah. 
Exodus20:22 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala ka oreng Isra'il, ja' Sengko' ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Ba'na la tao dibi' baramma Sengko', PANGERAN, acaca ka ba'na dhari langnge'." 
Exodus20:23 Ba'na ja' agabay arca dhari salaka otaba emmas se bi' ba'na esemba'a salaenna dhari Sengko'. 
Exodus20:24 Kaangguy abakte ka Sengko' ba'na kodu agabay mezba dhari tana; mon ba'na ngurbannagiya embi' dumba ban sape menangka kurban obbaran ban kurban kasalameddan, kurban jareya saba' e attassa mezba jareya. Sengko' entara ka saneyap kennengngan se bi' Sengko' eteptebbagi menangka kennengnganna ba'na abakte ka Sengko', ban e jadhiya Sengko' aberkadana ba'na." 
Exodus20:25 Mon mezba se bi' ba'na eangguya abakte ka Sengko' jareya ekagabay dhari bato, ja' ngangguy bato se eketthok bi' pa'a', sabab mon batona eketthok bi' pa'a', meja jareya ta' olle angguy egabay kennengnganna kurban ka Sengko' pole." 
Exodus20:26 Ja' agabay mezba se tenggi sampe' mon nyaba'a kurban ka attasanna kodu nae' ka andha, sopaja bagiyanna badanna ba'na se ta' pantes etangale'e oreng ta' sampe'a etangale oreng.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala ka oreng Isra'il sopaja padha'a atoro' ka sakabbinna atoran reya:" 
Exodus21:2 Mon ba'na melle dunor bangsana dibi', dunor jareya kodu alako ka ba'na nem taon abidda. E taon se kapeng petto' dunor jareya kodu epabebas ban ta' osa epentae bajaran pa-apa." 
Exodus21:3 Mon dunor jareya padhatengnga kadibi'an, gi' ta' abine, paondurra kodu kadibi'an keya, ta' olle ngeba bine. Tape mon oreng jareya padhatengnga ngeba bine, binena olle giba." 
Exodus21:4 Mon lorana se mabine'e, dineng binena pas andhi' ana' lalake' otaba babine', bine ban na'-ana'na jareya daddi andhi'na lorana, ta' olle noro' dunor jareya e bakto ondura saellana epabebas." 
Exodus21:5 Tape mon dunor jareya ngoca' neser ka binena, ka na'-ana'na ban ka lorana, sarta ngoca' ta' terro epabebasa," 
Exodus21:6 lorana kodu ngeba dunor jareya ka kennengnganna kabakteyan. E jadhiya dunor buru esoro manjeng nyandhar ka labang otabana canggana labangnga kennengnganna kabakteyan ban lorana pas kodu alobange kopengnga dunor jareya. Dunor jareya pas kodu daddi dunorra oreng jareya saomorra. 
Exodus21:7 Mon oreng ajuwal ana' babine'na epadaddi dunor, babine' jareya ta' epabebas saellana olle nem taon, daddi banneyan ban dunor lalake'." 
Exodus21:8 Mon dunor babine' jareya ejuwal ka lalake' se terro ngabineya babine' jareya, tape lorana ta' lebur ka babine' jareya, dunor jareya kodu ejuwal pole ka eppa'na. Babine' jareya ta' olle ejuwal ka oreng manca, sabab mon kantha jareya lorana ta' adil ka babine' jareya, iya areya ta' neptebbi janjina." 
Exodus21:9 Mon oreng melle dunor babine' egabaya binena ana'na, dunor jareya kodu epakantha ana'na dibi'." 
Exodus21:10 Mon ana' lalake'na jareya abine pole, ana'na jareya paggun andhi' kawajiban nanggung kakanna ban angguyya sarta tedhung apolong ban binena se nomer settong." 
Exodus21:11 Mon lalake' jareya ta' ajalannagi kawajiban se tatello' jareya, binena kodu epabebas ban ta' osa epentae bajaran pa-apa.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Sapa se mokol oreng sampe' mate, kodu eokom mate." 
Exodus21:13 Tape mon se mate'e jareya ta' etengnget, oreng jareya olle buru ka settong kennengngan se eduduwagiya bi' Sengko', e jadhiya oreng jareya aman." 
Exodus21:14 Tape mon oreng polana peggel pas etengnget mate'e oreng, saellana pas buru ka Tang mezba sopaja amana, oreng jareya kodu egiba dhari kennengnganna mezba jareya, pas okom mate." 
Exodus21:15 Sapa se mokol eppa' otaba ebuna, kodu eokom mate." 
Exodus21:16 Sapa se ngeba buru oreng, kodu eokom mate, ta' parduli apa oreng se egiba buru jareya la ejuwal otabana gi' badha e bengkona." 
Exodus21:17 Sapa se abasto eppa' otaba ebuna kodu eokom mate. 
Exodus21:18 Mon badha oreng atokar, se settong mokol se laen ngangguy bato otaba aguco bi' tanangnga, tape ta' epate'e, oreng jareya ta' olle eokom. Mon oreng se epokol jareya sampe' ta' ngenneng jaga dhari katedhunganna polana se epokol jareya," 
Exodus21:19 tape pas ngenneng jaga ban ajalan pole ngangguy tongket, oreng se mokol jareya kodu arabat se epokol jareya sarta nanggung karogiyanna saabidda sake'na." 
Exodus21:20 Sapa se mokol dunor lalake'na otaba dunor babine'na sampe' mate, kodu eokom." 
Exodus21:21 Tape mon dunor jareya ta' mate sampe' saare otaba dhu are, lorana ta' olle eokom sabab dunor jareya andhi'na dibi'. Karogiyanna se etanggung polana kaelangan dunorra jareya la daddi okomanna." 
Exodus21:22 Mon badha reng-oreng lake' atokar ban sala settong e antarana abentor babine' se ngandhung sampe' kalabuwan, tape ta' nyandhang loka e bagiyan laenna, oreng jareya kodu majar dhindha se esebbuttagi bi' lakena sarta ebendherragi ban kim-hakim." 
Exodus21:23 Tape mon babine' jareya calaka' sampe' mate, okomanna kajahadan jareya iya areya nyaba majar nyaba," 
Exodus21:24 mata majar mata, gigi majar gigi, tanang majar tanang, soko majar soko," 
Exodus21:25 loka majar loka, loka ekenneng obbar majar loka ekenneng obbar, bara majar bara." 
Exodus21:26 Sapa se mokol matana dunorra sampe' buta, kodu mabebas dunor jareya menangka tebbusanna matana." 
Exodus21:27 Mon oreng mokol dunorra sampe' potong gigina, dunor jareya kodu epabebas menangka tebbusanna gigina.”" 
Exodus21:28 “Mon sape lake' nyodhuk oreng sampe' mate, sape jareya kodu egarujuk sampe' mate, dagingnga ta' olle kakan, tape orengnga se andhi' ta' olle eokom." 
Exodus21:29 Mon sape lake' jareya la biyasa nyodhugan, dineng se andhi' la epaenga', tape ta' ajaga keban jareya, mon sape jareya nyodhuk oreng pole sampe' orengnga mate, keban jareya kodu egarujuk sampe' mate, ban se andhi' kodu eokom mate keya." 
Exodus21:30 Tape mon se andhi' sape jareya eedine majar tebbusan, oreng jareya kodu majar barampa'a bai se epenta dhari aba'na kaangguy nebbus nyabana." 
Exodus21:31 Mon se mate polana se esodhuk sape jareya na'-kana' lalake' otaba babine', atoranna padha kantha jareya keya." 
Exodus21:32 Mon se mate esodhuk sape jareya dunor lalake' otaba babine', se andhi' sape jareya kodu majar tello polo pesse salaka ka oreng se andhi' dunor, ban sape jareya kodu egarujuk sampe' mate." 
Exodus21:33 Oreng se ngala' totobba somor, otabana ngale somor pas ta' etotobi, pas badha sape otaba hemar tabalusok ka dhalem somor jareya," 
Exodus21:34 se andhi' somor jareya kodu majar karogiyan ka se andhi', tape keban se mate jareya olle kala'." 
Exodus21:35 Mon sapena oreng nyodhuk sapena oreng laen, se kadhuwa jareya kodu ajuwal sapena se gi' odhi', pessena kodu ekadhuwai; dagingnga keban se mate kodu ekadhuwai keya." 
Exodus21:36 Tape mon la etemmo ja' sape jareya andhi' kabiyasa'an nyodhuk, dineng se andhi' ta' endha' ajaga, oreng jareya kodu agante'e sape se mate bi' sapena se gi' odhi', sape se mate olle kala'.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Oreng se ngeco' sape otaba dumba, pas esambelli otaba ejuwal, kodu agante'e sape lalema' menangka gantena sape settong, ban dumba pa'-empa' menangka gantena dumba settong." 
Exodus22:2 Oreng jareya kodu agante'e barang keco'anna. Mon oreng jareya ta' andhi' pa-apa, aba'na dibi' kodu ejuwal ekagabay dunor menangka gantena barang keco'anna. Mon se ekeco' jareya sape, hemar otaba dumba, ban etemmo gi' odhi' badha e oreng jareya, ebin jareya kodu egante'e, ebin settong egante'e dhadhuwa'. Mon e baja malem badha maleng se ekenneng pega' teppa'na co'-ngeco' e dhalem bengkona oreng, pas epokol sampe' mate, oreng se mate'e jareya ta' sala. Tape mon kadaddiyan jareya e bakto yang-seyang, oreng se mate'e eanggep sala." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 Mon oreng ngowan ebinna neng e settong teggal otaba kebbun anggur, dineng keban jareya pas ajalan sanyamanna ban ngakan hasella teggalla oreng laen, se andhi' keban jareya kodu agante'e karogiyan bi' hasel se paleng bagus dhari teggalla otaba kebbun anggurra dibi'." 
Exodus22:6 Sapa se ngodhi'i apoy e teggalla dibi', ban apoyya jareya laju alatlat ka teggalla oreng laen sampe' makatonon gandumma se gi' teppa'na tombu e teggal jareya otabana gintelanna gandumma se gi' buru eanye, oreng se ngodhi'i apoy jareya kodu aberri' gantena karogiyan." 
Exodus22:7 Mon badha oreng narema patoro'an pesse otabana barang se raja argana, tape barang patoro'an jareya e settong are ekeco' oreng, mon malengnga ekenneng tangkep, maleng jareya kodu mabali tekel dhuwa'na." 
Exodus22:8 Tape mon malengnga ta' etemmo, oreng se narema patoro'an jareya kodu giba ka kennengnganna kabakteyan, e jadhiya oreng jareya kodu asompa ja' barang patoro'an jareya ta' ekeco' aba'na dibi'." 
Exodus22:9 Mon badha oreng atokar polana arta, apa arta jareya aropa sape, hemar, dumba, kalambi otabana apa'a bai, se elang laju etemmo pole, oreng se ngako ja' barang jareya andhi'na, kodu egiba ka kennengnganna kabakteyan. Oreng se bi' Allah enyata'agi sala, kodu majar tekel dhuwa'na ka oreng se andhi'." 
Exodus22:10 Mon badha oreng se epatoro'e hemar, sape, dumba otaba ebin laenna andhi'na oreng laen, dineng ebin jareya laju mate otaba potong sokona otaba erampok oreng, tadha' saksena," 
Exodus22:11 oreng se narema patoro'an jareya kodu egiba ka kennengnganna kabakteyan, e jadhiya soro asompa, ja' ebin se epatoro' ka aba'na jareya ta' ekeco' dibi'. Mon ebin jareya pajat ta' ekeco' oreng se epatoro'e jareya, oreng se andhi' kodu nanggung karogiyan, ban oreng se epatoro'e ta' osa majar gantena karogiyan." 
Exodus22:12 Mon ebin jareya ekeco' oreng se epatoro'e jareya, oreng jareya kodu agante'e karogiyan ka se andhi'." 
Exodus22:13 Mon ebin jareya ekakan burun alas, oreng se epatoro'e kodu noduwagi re-karena tolangnga menangka bukte ka se andhi', ban ta' osa agante'e karogiyan." 
Exodus22:14 Mon badha oreng ngenjam ebin ka oreng laen, ban ebin jareya potong sokona, otabana mate e bakto se andhi' tadha' e jadhiya, se ngenjam kodu agante'e karogiyan." 
Exodus22:15 Tape mon e bakto kadaddiyan jareya orengnga se andhi' badha e jadhiya, se ngenjam ta' osa agante'e karogiyan. Mon ebin jareya ebin sewa'an, karogiyanna jareya etotop ban bajaranna sewa.”" 
Exodus22:16 “Pa'-sapa'a se agudha paraban se gi' ta' abakalan sarta ngapolong tedhung paraban jareya, kodu majar mas kabin sarta ngabin paraban jareya." 
Exodus22:17 Tape mon bi' eppa'na se babine' lalake' jareya ta' etarema, lalake' jareya gi' kodu majar pesse se bannya'na padha ban mas kabin kaangguy paraban." 
Exodus22:18 Saneyap babine' se daddi tokang seher kodu epate'e. 
Exodus22:19 Oreng se apolong tedhung ban keban kodu epate'e. 
Exodus22:20 Pa'-sapa'a se ngatorragi kurban ka lah-illah laen salaenna Sengko', PANGERAN, kodu eokom mate." 
Exodus22:21 Ja' nganeyaja otaba ta' adil ka oreng manca; kaenga'e ja' lamba' neng e Messer ba'na daddi oreng manca keya. 
Exodus22:22 Ja' nganeyaja oreng randha ban ka na'-kana' jatim. 
Exodus22:23 Mon ba'na nganeyaja randha ban na'-kana' jatim, Sengko', PANGERAN, ngedhingngagiya sowarana reng-oreng jareya mon aserro menta tolong ka Sengko'." 
Exodus22:24 Sengko' tanto peggel, ban ba'na bi' Sengko' epamateya e dhalem perrang, sampe' binena ba'na daddi randha ban na'-ana'na ba'na daddi jatim." 
Exodus22:25 Mon ba'na maenjam pesse ka oreng se mesken e antarana Tang ommat, ja' akantha tokang maenjama pesse se menta budhu' ka oreng se ngenjam." 
Exodus22:26 Mon ba'na ngala' jubana oreng menangka tanggunganna otang, juba jareya kodu pabali sabellunna compet are," 
Exodus22:27 sabab juba jareya dhi'-andhi'na se settong tadha' pole se ekasapo'a maanga'a badanna. Mon ta' epabali, apa pole se ekagabaya sapo' e bakto tedhung? Mon oreng jareya aserro menta tolong ka Sengko', bi' Sengko' eedhingngagiya sabab Sengko' neserran." 
Exodus22:28 Ja' acaca juba' parkara Allah ban ja' abasto pamimpinna bangsana ba'na. 
Exodus22:29 Mon la napa' ka baktona, atorragi ka Sengko' sabagiyan dhari hasella gandumma ba'na, sabagiyan dhari aengnga anggurra ban mennya' jaitunna. Atorragi ka Sengko' na'-ana' sareyangnga ba'na se lalake'," 
Exodus22:30 bariya keya sape ban dumba lake'na se sareyang. Dina ban-keban jareya me' apolong ban korbina sampe' pettong are, saellana jareya laju atorragi ka Sengko' e are se kapeng ballu'." 
Exodus22:31 Ba'na reya Tang ommat, daddi ba'na ta' olle ngakan dagingnga keban apa'a bai se ekakan burun alas; daging jareya bagi ka pate'.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Ja' ngabarragi sabarang se ta' bendher, ban ja' nolonge oreng se sala kalaban nyakse'e barang se ta' bendher." 
Exodus23:2 Ja' ro'-noro' oreng bannya' se alako jahat otaba nyakse'e barang se ta' bendher sampe' kaadilan pas daddi lopot. 
Exodus23:3 Ja' ada'-bida'agi oreng e dhalem parkara pangadilan, maske se eadili oreng ta' andhi'." 
Exodus23:4 Mon ba'na kabendherran nangale'e sape otaba hemarra andhi'na mosona buru sarta posang, giba pabali ka se andhi'." 
Exodus23:5 Mon hemarra mosona ba'na labu polana berra' gallu ban-gibanna, tolonge oreng jareya majaga hemarra; ja' onduri." 
Exodus23:6 Paadil ka oreng se ta' andhi' mon oreng jareya aparkara ka pangadilan. 
Exodus23:7 Ja' markara'agi oreng ka pangadilan ban ja' daddi sababba oreng se ta' sala sampe' eokom mate, sabab Sengko' masthe ngokom oreng se atengka kantha jareya." 
Exodus23:8 Ja' narema'an go'-sogo', sabab go'-sogo' reya mabuta matana oreng sampe' ta' nangale'e barang se bendher ban marogi reng-oreng se ta' sala." 
Exodus23:9 Ja' nganeyaja'an oreng manca; ba'na tao baramma rassana daddi oreng manca, sabab lamba' ba'na oreng manca keya e Messer.”" 
Exodus23:10 “Nem taon abidda ba'na olle namenne teggalla ban ngala' hasella. 
Exodus23:11 Tape e taon se kapeng petto' tana jareya kodu panneng. Sataon jareya ba'na ta' olle makompol apa'a bai se tombu dibi' e jadhiya. Dina me' olle ekala' oreng se mesken, ban karena me' olle ekakan burun alas. Pakantha jareya keya kebbunna anggurra ban ka-bungkana jaitunna ba'na." 
Exodus23:12 Nem are e dhalem samenggu ba'na olle alalakon, tape e are se kapeng petto' ba'na kodu aistirahat, sopaja ebinna, nor-dunorra ban reng-oreng manca se alako ka ba'na ngenneng aistirahat keya." 
Exodus23:13 Edhingngagi kabbi se ekoca'agi Sengko' reya. Ja' nyemba lah-illah laen, la'-mala' nyebbut nyamana bai ta' olle.”" 
Exodus23:14 “Sabban taon ba'na kodu mabadha paraya'an tello kale kaangguy ngormat Sengko'. 
Exodus23:15 E dhalem bulan Abib, e bakto se la etantowagi, ba'na kodu araya'agi Pesta Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i, carana akantha se la eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na, sabab e dhalem bulan jareya ba'na ondur dhari Messer. Ja' ngakan roti se eragi'i saabidda paraya'an se pettong are jareya. Sabban ba'na entar abakte ka Sengko' kodu ngeba tor-ator." 
Exodus23:16 Raya'agi Pesta Anye e bakto ba'na molae molong hasella teggalla. Raya'agi Pesta Ranggun Dhaun e aher taon e bakto ba'na makompol hasella kebbun anggur ban kebbun wa'-buwa'anna. 
Exodus23:17 Tello kale sataon e bakto ebadha'agi paraya'an jareya, oreng lalake'an kodu dhateng abakte kabbi ka Sengko', GUSTE Allahna." 
Exodus23:18 Ja' ngeba roti se eragi'i e bakto ba'na ngurbannagi ebin ka Sengko'. Gajina keban se ekurbannagi ka Sengko' saabidda paraya'an-paraya'an jareya ta' olle epangenep sampe' kalagguwanna. 
Exodus23:19 Sabban taon ba'na kodu ngeba ka padalemmanna Sengko', PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, gandum se eketthok ba'na dha'-adha' kadibi' e bakto anye. Dagingnga budhu'na dumba otaba budhu'na embi' ta' olle eola bi' aeng sosona korbina.”" 
Exodus23:20 “Sengko' ngotosa Tang malaekat epajangadha'ana ba'na, epajaga'a ba'na e dhalem parjalanan ban epangeba'a ba'na ka kennengngan se la esadhiya'agi bi' Sengko'." 
Exodus23:21 Gateyagi malaekat jareya ban toro' apa oca'na. Ja' alaban, sabab malaekat jareya Tang otosan, ban malaekat jareya ta' kera nyapora pa'-sapa'a ka se alaban." 
Exodus23:22 Mon ba'na atoro' ka malaekat jareya ban ngalakone sabarang se eparenta'agi Sengko', Sengko' aperranga ngadhebbana so-mosona ba'na." 
Exodus23:23 Tang malaekat ajangadha'ana ba'na, ngeba'a ba'na ka nagarana bangsa Amori, Het, Feris, Kana'an, Hewi ban Yebus; sa-bangsa jareya bi' Sengko' epatompessa kabbi." 
Exodus23:24 Ba'na ja' nyemba ca-arca se esemba sa-bangsa jareya, ban ja' nerowe tengka polana se nyemba ka ca-arca jareya. Paancor ca-arcana jareya ban pagujur gu-tugu brahalana." 
Exodus23:25 Mon ba'na abakte ka Sengko', PANGERAN, Allahna, ba'na bi' Sengko' eberkadana, eberri'ana kakanan tor nom-enoman, ban ba'na bi' Sengko' epajauwa dhari samacemma panyaket." 
Exodus23:26 E nagarana ba'na bakal tadha'a babine' se kalabuwan otaba jubeng. Bi' Sengko' ba'na epalanjanga omor. 
Exodus23:27 Sa-bangsa se eentare ba'na bi' Sengko' epatako'a ka Sengko'; ban epasalebbudana kabbi; mosona ba'na bakal abaliya, buru katako'an." 
Exodus23:28 Sengko' madhatengnga nyarowan, sampe' sa-bangsa Hewi, Kana'an ban Het padha buru sopaja ba'na ngennenga terros maju." 
Exodus23:29 Sa-bangsa jareya bi' Sengko' ta' eojuga sakaleyan e dhalem sataon, sabab mon kantha jareya tanana dhaggi' ta' taoros, tanto burun alas se lak-galak pas padha dhateng ban ba'na ta' kellar ngadhebbi." 
Exodus23:30 Daddi bi' Sengko' sa-bangsa jareya eojuga gan sakone', sampe' na' potona ba'na cokop bannya' se ngobasa'ana tana jareya." 
Exodus23:31 Tes-batessa nagarana ba'na bi' Sengko' eteptebbagiya dhari Tellok Akaba sampe' ka Songay Efrat, ban dhari Tase' Tengnga sampe' ka sagara beddhi. Ba'na bi' Sengko' epangobasa'ana pandhudhu' e nagara jareya, ban ba'na bisa ngojuk reng-oreng jareya e bakto ba'na maju arebbu'a nagara jareya." 
Exodus23:32 Ja' mabadha parjanjiyan ban sa-bangsa jareya otabana ban lah-illahna. 
Exodus23:33 Reng-oreng jareya ja' bagi neng e nagarana ba'na, sopaja ba'na ta' nyemba ka lah-illahna ban agabay dusa ka Sengko'. Mon ba'na nyemba ka lah-illahna sa-bangsa jareya, ba'na tabalusok ka dhalem jebbak maot.”" 
Exodus24:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Mara dha' enna' ka seddi'anna Sengko', ka attas gunong reya, giba Harun, Nadab ban Abihu, ban para pamimpinna bangsa Isra'il bannya'na pettong polo oreng; pas asojud nyemba ka Sengko' dhari jauna." 
Exodus24:2 Pera' ba'na malolo se olle nyemma' ka Sengko', se laen ta' olle. Ra'yat laenna ta' olle noro' ongga ka gunong reya.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mosa laju manggi'i ommadda, ban reng-oreng jareya pas eparenge oneng parkara sakabbinna atoran ban papakonna PANGERAN gella'. Oreng Isra'il padha nyaot abareng, oca'na, “Sadaja dhabuna PANGERAN sareng kaula etoro'a.”" 
Exodus24:4 Mosa laju nyerrat sakabbinna papakonna PANGERAN jareya. Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Mosa abadhi mezba ban tugu bato dhubellas meggi' menangka tandhana suku Isra'il se bannya'na dhubellas. 
Exodus24:5 Mosa laju makon ngangodhadan lalake'an sopaja ngatorragiya kurban obbaran ban nyambelli pe-sape lake' menangka kurban kasalameddan ka PANGERAN. 
Exodus24:6 Dharana sape jareya bi' Mosa sabagiyan esaba' e jembung, sabagiyan laenna eserammagi ka mezba." 
Exodus24:7 Samarena jareya Mosa laju mondhut ketab parjanjiyan se aesse papakonna PANGERAN, essena bi' Mosa emaos epakaja. Reng-oreng Isra'il laju padha ngoca', “Sadajana dhabuna PANGERAN bi' kaula etoro'a, sareng elakonana.”" 
Exodus24:8 Mosa laju mondhut dhara se ebaddhai bung-jembung gella', pas eserammagi ka reng-oreng Isra'il. Dhabuna, “Areya' dhara se daddi segella parjanjiyanna PANGERAN ban ba'na, se ebadha'agi bi' PANGERAN e bakto marengngagi papakonna reya.”" 
Exodus24:9 Saellana jareya Mosa, Harun, Nadab, Abihu ban pamimpinna oreng Yahudi se bannya'na pettong polo oreng, padha ongga ka gunong." 
Exodus24:10 Reng-oreng jareya padha nangale'e Allahna Isra'il ngadek e attasanna barang se katon akantha palesteran se ekagabay dhari mamatan se barnana bungo akantha langnge'. 
Exodus24:11 Pamimpinna bangsa Isra'il jareya la padha nangale'e Allah; tape padha tadha' se epamateya. Saellana jareya kabbi laju padha ngakan ban ngenom areng-bareng. 
Exodus24:12 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Mara nyander ka seddi'anna Sengko' e attas gunong reya. E dhinna' bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana bato dhadhuwa', iya areya bato se bi' Sengko' la etolese sakabbinna Tang hokom, kom-hokom jareya kodu eajarragi ka bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Exodus24:13 Mosa ban Yusak, se biyasana abanto Mosa jareya, pas ayap-siyap, Mosa ongga ka gunong kalenggiyanna Allah jareya." 
Exodus24:14 Mosa apessen ka para pamimpinna bangsa Isra'il se laen, “Nante' e dhinna' sampe' sengko' ban Yusak abali. Harun ban Hur paggun neng bi' ba'na e dhinna'. Mon badha parlona, kabala ka se kadhuwa jareya, me' olle eoros epamare.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mosa ongga ka Gunong Sinay, e jadhiya laju katotoban ondhem se kandel." 
Exodus24:16 Sonar kahadiranna PANGERAN toron ka attassa gunong jareya, noro' pangabasanna oreng Isra'il, sonar jareya akaton akantha apoy se rabbang e konco'na gunong. Nem are abidda gunong jareya katotoban ondhem gella'. E are se kapeng petto' PANGERAN adikane Mosa dhari ondhem jareya," 
Exodus24:17  
Exodus24:18 Mosa pas terros ongga sampe' maso' ka dhalemmanna ondhem jareya. Pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda Mosa badha neng e jadhiya terros. 
Exodus25:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Exodus25:2 “Reng-oreng Isra'il soro ngeba tor-ator ka Sengko'. Tarema apa'a bai se terro eatorragiya. 
Exodus25:3 Tor-ator jareya kodu aropa: emmas, salaka ban paronggu;" 
Exodus25:4 kaen linen se alos, kaen wol se bungo, bungo terrong ban mera, kaen dhari buluna embi';" 
Exodus25:5 kole'na dumba lake' se ecellup epamera, kole' se alos, kaju akasia," 
Exodus25:6 mennya'na damar, racegan se epobuwa ka mennya' opacara ban kaangguy dupa se ro'om," 
Exodus25:7 mamatan acem-macem se egabaya rarengganna efod ban totobba dhadhana Imam Agung. 
Exodus25:8 Bangsa jareya soro agabayyagi Sengko' kemah se ekennengngana Sengko' sopaja Sengko' ngennenga apolong ban reng-oreng jareya. 
Exodus25:9 Kemah ban parlengkabanna kodu ekagabay menorot Tang rancana; bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana baramma Tang rancana jareya.” 
Exodus25:10 “Ba'na agabay petthe dhari kaju akasia se lanjangnga saratos sapolo sentimeter, lebar ban tenggina padha sabidak ennem sentimeterran." 
Exodus25:11 Bagiyan dhalem ban lowarra lapese emmas morne, ban e sakalenglengnga bagiyan attas pobuwi palepet dhari emmas." 
Exodus25:12 Kaangguy kaju kol-pekolla gabayyagi long-kolong emmas pa'-empa', pacekka' ka roso'na se pa'-empa', dhadhuwa' salaja." 
Exodus25:13 Kol-pekolla kagabay dhari kaju akasia, kole'e emmas," 
Exodus25:14 kol-pekol jareya pamaso' ka long-kolongnga se badha e so'-roso'na petthe jareya. 
Exodus25:15 Kaju kol-pekol jareya kodu terros badha e long-kolongnga jareya, ta' olle bukka'." 
Exodus25:16 Papan bato se dhadhuwa' se aesse ta-parenta se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na rowa saba' e dhalemmanna petthe jareya. 
Exodus25:17 Kodhungnga petthe jareya kagabay dhari emmas morne, lanjangnga saratos sapolo sentimeter ban lebarra sabidak ennem sentimeter." 
Exodus25:18 Pas agabay kerub dhadhuwa' dhari emmas tempa'an," 
Exodus25:19 saba' e konco'na kodhungnga petthe jareya, settong e saneyap konco'na. Kerub se dhadhuwa' jareya kodu acampo ban kodhungnga petthe jareya," 
Exodus25:20 padhep-adhebban, ban kalembangnga pamenthang e attassa petthe jareya." 
Exodus25:21 Saba' bato se dhadhuwa' jarowa e dhalem petthe jareya, pas pobu kodhungnga e attasanna." 
Exodus25:22 E jadhiya Sengko' atemmowa ban ba'na, ban dhari attassa kodhungnga jareya, e antarana kerub se dhadhuwa' gella', Sengko' aberri'a parenta se kodu epanapa' ka bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Ba'na agabay meja dhari kaju akasia se lanjangnga ballung polo ballu' sentimeter, lebarra pa' polo empa' sentimeter, ban tenggina sabidak ennem sentimeter." 
Exodus25:24 Meja jareya kole'e emmas morne, sakalenglengnga pobuwi palepet dhari emmas." 
Exodus25:25 Sakalenglengnga pobuwi penggir se lebarra pettong satengnga sentimeter ban e sakalenglengnga penggir jareya pobuwi palepet dhari emmas. 
Exodus25:26 Agabay long-kolong dhari emmas, pasang e padduna se pa'-empa' e sokona." 
Exodus25:27 Long-kolong jareya kaangguy panyekka'anna kol-pekol sopaja meja jareya ekennenga osong. 
Exodus25:28 Kol-pekolla kodu kagabay dhari kaju akasia ban ekole'e bi' emmas. 
Exodus25:29 Agabay reng-pereng, ker-cangker, dhi-gendhi ban bung-tobung kaangguy tor-ator aengnga anggur. Parlengkabanna meja jareya kabbi kodu kagabay dhari emmas morne." 
Exodus25:30 Meja jareya kodu saba' e adha'na Petthe Parjanjiyan, ban e attassa meja jareya masthe terros badha roti sasajinna.”" 
Exodus25:31 “Ba'na agabay ko'-tongko'na damar dhari emmas morne. Bagiyan langganna ban gu'-teggu'na kodu ekagabay dhari emmas tempa'an; bang-kembang rarenggan, tamaso' bungkella kodu masettong ban langganna tor gu'-teggu'na." 
Exodus25:32 E gu'-teggu'na jareya kodu pobuwi cangka nem-ennem, ja-salajana tello cangka." 
Exodus25:33 Saneyap cangka kodu epobuwi rarenggan aropa kembangnga badam se badha bungkella tatello' ebang. 
Exodus25:34 E gu'-teggu'na kodu pobuwi rarenggan aropa kembangnga badam se gi' mekko pa'-empa', genna' ban bungkella." 
Exodus25:35 E baba'anna saneyap cangka sapasang jareya kodu epobuwi kembang se mekko settong. 
Exodus25:36 Ko'-tongko'na damar ban cet-pocedda kembangnga sarta ka-cangkana kodu ekagabay dhari emmas bungkol se ta' ethok-ketthok, se tempa'an morne." 
Exodus25:37 Agabay damar papetto', pobu ka ko'-tongko'na damar jareya, carana mobu ator sopaja tera'na nyonar ka adha'anna." 
Exodus25:38 Pakakas se eangguya aberse'e sombuna ban tatagga damarra kodu ekagabay dhari emmas morne. 
Exodus25:39 Emmas se ekagabaya ko'-tongko'na damar jareya ban parlengkabanna sagenna'na berra'na kodu tello polo lema' kilogram. 
Exodus25:40 Jaga sopaja ko'-tongko'na damar jareya sakabbinna menorot conto se bi' Sengko' la eduduwagi ka ba'na e gunong reya.” 
Exodus26:1 “Bagiyan dhalemma Kemah Socce rowa, iya areya Kemah kennengnganna kahadiranna Sengko', kagabay dhari kaen linen alos sapolo potong, etennon ban wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera. Kaen jareya solam ban gambarra kerub." 
Exodus26:2 Tong-sapotongnga kodu padha okoranna, lanjangnga dhubellas meter ban lebarra dhu meter." 
Exodus26:3 Se lema potong jai' padaddi settong, bariya keya se lema potongnga." 
Exodus26:4 E penggirra kaen sambungan se dhadhuwa' jareya padha pobuwi panyangke'an dhari kaen bungo; 
Exodus26:5 e penggirra kaen sambungan se settong pobuwi panyangke'an saeket meggi', ban e penggirra kaen sambungan settonganna saeket meggi' keya." 
Exodus26:6 Pas agabay ke'-cangke' dhari emmas saeket meggi' kaangguy nyambung kaen sambungan se dhadhuwa' gella' me' olle acampo daddi settong. 
Exodus26:7 Ata'na kemah jareya kagabay dhari kaen se ekagabay dhari buluna embi', bannya'na sabellas potong." 
Exodus26:8 Tong-sapotongnga papadha okoranna, lanjangnga tello bellas meter ban lebarra dhu meter." 
Exodus26:9 Se lema potong sambung pasettong, se nem potongnga sambung padaddi settong keya. Sambungan se kapeng ennem kodu eleppet arampe dhuwa' kaangguy notobi bagiyan adha'na Kemah." 
Exodus26:10 Kaen sambungan se kapeng settong pobuwi panyangke'an saeket meggi' e penggirra, ban bariya keya kaen sambungan se kapeng dhuwa'." 
Exodus26:11 Agabay e'-kae' dhari paronggu saeket meggi', kae'agi ka panyangke'an gella' sopaja kaen sambungan se dhadhuwa' gella' ekennenga sambung pasettong daddi ata'na Kemah jareya." 
Exodus26:12 Lebbina kaen se satengnga potong pagantong gabay panotobba bagiyan budhina Kemah. 
Exodus26:13 Lebbina kaen se lebarra saeket sentimeter e salanjangnga Kemah jareya panneng pagantong e gir-penggirra Kemah jareya, gabay panotobba." 
Exodus26:14 Agabay totop dhadhuwa' aggi' kaangguy bagiyan lowarra Kemah, se settong dhari kole'na dumba lake' se epamera, ban settonganna dhari kole' se alos." 
Exodus26:15 Bidhagga rangkana Kemah se manjeng kagabay dhari kaju akasia. 
Exodus26:16 Tong-settongnga tenggina pa' meter ban lebarra sabidak ennem sentimeter. 
Exodus26:17 Saneyap rangka pobuwi poros dhadhuwa' sapasang, daddi ka-rangka jareya ekenneng sambung se settong ban settonga." 
Exodus26:18 Bagiyan lao'na Kemah pasange dhu polo bidhak," 
Exodus26:19 ngangguy langgan dhari salaka pa' polo meggi', saneyap bidhak e baba'anna pobuwi langgan dhadhuwa'." 
Exodus26:20 Bagiyan dhajana Kemah pasange rangka bidhak dhu polo meggi'; 
Exodus26:21 pasange langgan salaka pa' polo meggi', saneyap bidhak e baba'anna pobuwi langgan dhadhuwa'." 
Exodus26:22 Bagiyan budhina Kemah e bagiyan bara', pasange bidhak nem-ennem" 
Exodus26:23 padduna e bagiyan budhi pasange bidhak dhadhuwa'. 
Exodus26:24 Ka-rangkana du-paddu jareya kodu sambung e bagiyanna sokona, terros sampe' ka bagiyan attassa. Rangka se dhadhuwa' se daddi padduna kodu ekagabay kantha jareya." 
Exodus26:25 Daddi kabbi rangkana badha baballu' ban langgan salakana nem bellas, settong rangka e baba'anna ngangguy langgan dhadhuwa'." 
Exodus26:26 Agabay kaju se malang dhari akasia lema bellas meggi', se lalema' pasang e bagiyan erengnga Kemah se salaja," 
Exodus26:27 lalema'na pasang e bagiyan salajanna, ban lalema'na pasang e bagiyan budhina Kemah se e bara'." 
Exodus26:28 Kaju se malang se e tengnga kodu epasang tenggina satengngana tenggina rangka, dhari konco'na Kemah se settong ka konco' settonganna." 
Exodus26:29 Rangkana Kemah ban ju-kaju se malang jareya kodu ekole'e emmas. Long-kolong se epanyekkennana ju-kaju jareya kodu dhari emmas keya. 
Exodus26:30 Kemah jareya kodu epaddek menorot rancana se bi' Sengko' la ekabala ka ba'na e attas gunong reya. 
Exodus26:31 Agabay bir-tabirra labang dhari linen alos se etennon bi' wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera. Kaen jareya solam ban gambarra rub-kerub." 
Exodus26:32 Bir-tabir jareya gantong ka cangga pa'-empa' se ekagabay dhari kaju akasia se ekole'e emmas, pobuwi ke'-cangke' emmas ban panongko' ka langgan dhari salaka pa'-empa'." 
Exodus26:33 Kaen jareya saba' e baba'anna ke'-cangke' e ata'na Kemah. Petthe Parjanjiyan se aesse bato se dhadhuwa' jareya saba' e budhiyanna kaen bir-tabir jareya. Kaen jareya menangka bates se malaen Rowangan Se Socce dhari Rowangan Se Mahasocce. 
Exodus26:34 Kodhungnga Petthe Parjanjiyan jareya saba' e attassa petthena. 
Exodus26:35 Mezba kodu esaba' e lowaranna Rowangan Se Mahasocce e bagiyan dhajana Kemah, dineng ko'-tongko'na damarra saba' e bagiyan lao'na Kemah jareya." 
Exodus26:36 Gabayyagi bir-tabirra labangnga Kemah jareya dhari kaen linen se alos se etennon bi' wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera, pobuwi rarenggan solaman." 
Exodus26:37 Bir-tabir jareya kodu gabayyagi cangga lalema' dhari kaju akasia se ekole'e bi' emmas se padha esambung ban ke'-cangke' emmas lalema'. Gabayyagi langgan lalema' dhari paronggu kaangguy ga-cangga jareya.” 
Exodus27:1 “Ba'na agabay mezba dhari kaju akasia. Pamasagi, lanjang ban lebarra padha dhuwa' koma dhuwa' meter, ban tenggina settong koma tello' meter." 
Exodus27:2 E saneyap padduna se e attas pasange e'-kae' se asambung ban mezbana. Kabbi kodu ekole'e paronggu. 
Exodus27:3 Gabayyagi nay-pennay baddhana abuna gaji se eobbar, kop-sekkop, bung-tobung, pu-garpu ban baddhana apoy. Parabut jareya kabbi kodu ekagabay dhari paronggu." 
Exodus27:4 Nganggi' kaba' paronggu pobuwi long-kolong pa'-empa' e paddu babana se pa'-empa' gabay panyekka'anna kaju kol-pekolla. 
Exodus27:5 Kaba' se la eanggi' jareya tenggina kodu saparona tenggina mezba, ban kodu le'-le'agi ka mezba bagiyan babana." 
Exodus27:6 Agabay kol-pekol dhadhuwa' dhari kaju akasia se ekole'e paronggu," 
Exodus27:7 pas pamaso' ka long-kolong e penggirra mezba se dhu kalaja e bakto ngosong mezba jareya. 
Exodus27:8 Mezba jareya kagabay dhari kaju se ngarongkong, menorot rancana se eduduwagi Sengko' ka ba'na e attas gunong reya.”" 
Exodus27:9 “Gabayyagi taneyan e sakalenglengnga Tang Kemah, pasange bir-tabir dhari kaen linen se alos. E bagiyan lao' lanjangnga kodu pa' polo empa' meter," 
Exodus27:10 cekka'agi ka cangga dimbaga se bannya'na dhu polo meggi', saneyap cangga pobuwi langgan dhari paronggu keya, tape e'-kae' ban panyekkadanna e'-kae'na dhari salaka." 
Exodus27:11 E bagiyan dhajana pakantha jareya keya. 
Exodus27:12 E bagiyan bara' lanjangnga bir-tabirra dhu lekor meter, pacekka' ka cangga sapolo meggi' ban cangga jareya pobuwi langgan sapolo meggi' keya." 
Exodus27:13 E bagiyan temorra, se badha labangnga, lanjangnga bir-tabirra dhu lekor meter." 
Exodus27:14 E kangan kacerra labang jareya kodu epobuwi bir-tabir se lanjangnga tong-settongnga ennem koma ennem meter, sarta ngangguy cangga tatello' se badha langganna tatello'." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 Labangnga pobuwi bir-tabir se lanjangnga sangang meter dhari linen alos se etennon dhari wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera sarta ngangguy rarenggan solaman. Kaangguy panyekka'anna bir-tabir jareya gabayyagi cangga pa'-empa' se epacekka' ka langgan pa'-empa'." 
Exodus27:17 Sakabbinna cangga e pakarangan jareya kodu esambung ban palang dhari salaka; ke'-cangke'na kagabay dhari salaka, dineng langganna dhari paronggu." 
Exodus27:18 Bir-tabir e sakalenglengnga taneyan jareya lanjangnga pa' polo empa' meter, lebarra dhu lekor meter ban tenggina dhuwa' koma dhuwa' meter. Bir-tabirra kodu kagabay dhari kaen linen se alos, ban langganna dhari paronggu." 
Exodus27:19 Parabut se eangguy e Kemah jareya, sa'-pasa'na Kemah ban sa'-pasa'na bir-tabirra kodu dhari paronggu kabbi.”" 
Exodus27:20 “Parenta'agi ka reng-oreng Isra'il soro ngeba mennya' jaitun se morne ban se paleng bagus kaangguy damar e dhalemmanna Tang Kemah sopaja damar jareya bisa'a odhi' terros. 
Exodus27:21 Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu ngoros damar dhari ri'-bari' sampe' kalagguwanna gu-laggu e kennengnganna Sengko' hadir, jareya e lowaranna bir-tabir se badha e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan. Parenta reya kodu ejalannagi salanjangnga bi' oreng Isra'il ron-temoron.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Olok Harun kaka'na ba'na rowa ban na'-ana'na Nadab, Abihu, Eleyazar ban Itamar. Kabbi soro ja' apolong ban reng-oreng Isra'il sopaja bisa'a daddi imam se aladinana Sengko'." 
Exodus28:2 Harun gabayyagi pangangguyya imam, me' olle katon agung ban lebur abasanna." 
Exodus28:3 Olok sakabbinna kang-tokang jai' se bi' Sengko' la eberri'i kaahliyan, balai soro agabay pangangguyya Harun sopaja Harun bisa'a daddi imam se malolo aladine Sengko'." 
Exodus28:4 Balai keya kang-tokang jai' jareya soro agabay totobba dhadha, efod, juba, kameja solaman, surban ban sabbu'. Reng-oreng jareya kodu agabayyagi pangangguy jareya kaangguy Harun ban na'-ana' lalake'anna sopaja bisa'a daddi imam se aladinana Sengko'." 
Exodus28:5 Kalambi jareya kodu ekagabay dhari wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera, bennang emmas ban linen se alos. Laen dhari jareya efod gella' kodu erengga ban solaman." 
Exodus28:6  
Exodus28:7 Talena bau dhadhuwa' se egabay panyekka'anna efod jareya kodu ejai'agi ka penggirra. 
Exodus28:8 Efod jareya pobuwi sabbu' tennonan alos dhari bahan se padha ban kalambina, jai'agi ka efod jareya sopaja daddiya settong bagiyan." 
Exodus28:9 Ngala' bato dalima dhadhuwa'. Nyare kemmasan se ahli soro ngokerragi e bato jareya ma-nyamana ana'na Yakub se dhubellas. Toles noro' giliranna omorra, settong bato tolese nyama nem-ennem. Bato mamatan se dhadhuwa' jareya kodu epasang e dhalem ban-embanna mamatan se dhari emmas, sarta saba' e talena bauna efod menangka tandha parengeddanna suku Isra'il se dhubellas rowa. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Harun ngeba nyamana ku-suku jareya e bauna, daddi Sengko', PANGERAN, terrosa enga' ka ku-suku jareya. Salaenna ban-emban emmas se dhadhuwa' jareya," 
Exodus28:10  
Exodus28:11  
Exodus28:12  
Exodus28:13 kodu kagabay keya rantay dhadhuwa' dhari emmas morne se epente akantha tale, pasang ka ban-embanna mamatan se dhari emmas jareya.”" 
Exodus28:14  
Exodus28:15 “Gabayyagi totobba dhadha kaangguy Imam Agung se kodu eangguy mon terro taowa apa se daddi kasokanna Allah. Se ekagabay totobba dhadha jareya ban solamanna kodu padha ban se ekagabay efod. 
Exodus28:16 Bangonna masagi empa', eleppet dhuwa', lanjang ban lebarra padha dhu lekor sentimeter." 
Exodus28:17 Totobba dhadha jareya pobuwi mamatan pa' baris. E baris se kapeng settong bato dalima, topas ban biduri sepah." 
Exodus28:18 E baris se kapeng dhuwa' jamerrut, mamatan bungo ban enten." 
Exodus28:19 E baris se kapeng tello' lazuwardi, akek ban kacobung." 
Exodus28:20 E baris se kapeng empa' pirus, jakut ban ratna campaka. Mamatan se dhubellas macem jareya kodu etale'e bi' tale emmas." 
Exodus28:21 Saneyap mamatan kodu eokere sala settonga nyamana ana'na Yakub se dhubellas menangka tandha parengeddanna ku-suku Isra'il. 
Exodus28:22 Totobba dhadha jareya gabayyagi rantay dhadhuwa' dhari emmas morne se epente akantha tale. 
Exodus28:23 Gabayyagi keya long-kolong emmas dhadhuwa', pasang e konco' se dhadhuwa' e bagiyan attassa totobba dhadha jareya;" 
Exodus28:24 rantay emmassa se dhadhuwa' maso'agi ka long-kolong jareya. 
Exodus28:25 Konco' settonganna rantay se dhadhuwa' jareya taleyagi ka ban-embanna mamatan se dhari emmas se dhadhuwa' gella', sopaja totobba dhadhana ekennenga sambung bi' bagiyan adha'na talena bauna efod jareya." 
Exodus28:26 Gabayyagi long-kolong emmas dhadhuwa' aggi', pas pasang ka totobba dhadha e konco' babana bagiyan dhalemma se nyedding ka efod." 
Exodus28:27 Saellana jareya pas agabay long-kolong emmas dhadhuwa' aggi', pasang e bagiyan adha'na talena bauna efod se dhadhuwa' e bagiyan baba e seddi'anna sambunganna jai'an kelleman, e attasanna sabbu' se dhari tennonan alos." 
Exodus28:28 Long-kolong totobba dhadhana kodu sambung ban tale bungo ka long-kolongnga efod sopaja totobba dhadha jareya pagguna badha e attassa sabbu' ban ta' locot. 
Exodus28:29 E bakto Harun maso' ka Rowangan Se Socce kodu ngeba nyamana ku-suku Isra'il se eoker e totobba dhadhana sopaja Sengko', PANGERAN, teptebba enga' ka Tang ommat." 
Exodus28:30 Urim ban Tumim saba' e totobba dhadhana jareya, paangguy ka Harun mon ngadhebba ka Sengko'. Mon teppa'na kantha jareya Harun kodu ngangguy totobba dhadha ros-terrosan, sopaja Harun taowa apa se ekakarep Sengko' ka ommat Isra'il.”" 
Exodus28:31 “Juba se eangguy e attassa efod jareya kodu dhari wol bungo kabbi. 
Exodus28:32 Juba jareya pobuwi lobangnga le'er, ban lobangnga le'er jareya kodu epakowat ban pita tennonan me' olle ta' gampang beddha." 
Exodus28:33 E sakalenglengnga penggir babana kodu epobuwi rarenggan aropa dalima dhari wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera, lang-selleng ban ceng-lonceng dhari emmas." 
Exodus28:34  
Exodus28:35 Juba jareya kodu eangguy Harun mon teppa'na atugas menangka imam. E bakto ngadhebba ka Sengko' e Rowangan Se Socce, otaba mon kalowara dhari kennengngan jareya, ceng-lonceng jareya tanto pas amonye, sopaja Harun ta' mateya." 
Exodus28:36 Gabayyagi rarenggan dhari emmas morne ngangguy okeran tolesan ca'-oca' se amonye, ‘Kaangguy PANGERAN malolo.’" 
Exodus28:37 Rarenggan jareya taleyagi ka surbanna ngangguy tale bungo terrong towa. 
Exodus28:38 Rarenggan emmas jareya kodu epasang e dhaina Harun, sopaja Sengko', PANGERAN, endha'a narema sakabbinna tor-ator se egiba oreng Isra'il ka Sengko', maskeya e dhalem ngatorragi kurban jareya reng-oreng jareya agabay sala." 
Exodus28:39 Kamejana Harun kodu etennon dhari linen se alos. Gabayyagi keya surban dhari linen alos ban sabbu' se esolam. 
Exodus28:40 Na'-ana'na Harun gabayyagi keya kameja, sabbu' ban surban sopaja padha katon agung ban lebur abasanna." 
Exodus28:41 Kalambi jareya angguyyagi ka Harun ban na'-ana'na. Reng-oreng jareya mennya'e mennya' jaitun, kalaban cara se kantha jareya reng-oreng jareya etahbissagi ban emalolowagi daddi imam se aladinana Sengko'." 
Exodus28:42 Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya gabayyagi katho' pandha' dhari kaen linen, lanjangnga dhari tengngana sampe' ka pokangnga kaangguy notobi bagiyanna badanna se ta' patot etangale'e oreng." 
Exodus28:43 Katho' jareya kodu eangguy terros e bakto maso' ka dhalem Tang Kemah otabana mon nyemma'e mezba kaangguy ajalannagi kabakteyan menangka imam e Rowangan Se Socce, sabab mon mam-imam jareya bagiyanna badanna se ta' patot etangale'e ta' etotobi, sampe' etangale'e oreng laen, mam-imam jareya tanto mate. Atoran reya kodu ejalannagi salanjangnga bi' Harun ban na' potona.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Kantha reya carana mon atahbissagiya Harun ban na'-ana'na sopaja ngennenga daddi imam se aladinana Sengko'. Ngala' sape lalake' se gi' ngodha settong ban dumba lalake' dhadhuwa' se padha tadha' calena. 
Exodus29:2 Agabay adunna roti se ta' eragi'i dhari teppong darigu se paleng bagus. Sabagiyan dhari adun jareya kagabay roti se ngangguy mennya' jaitun, se sabagiyanna ta' osa ngangguy mennya' jaitun, ban karena kagabay jajan se ebulidi mennya'." 
Exodus29:3 Pas baddhai cettheng, atorragi ka Sengko' pabareng ban kurban sape lalake' ban dumba se dhadhuwa' gella'." 
Exodus29:4 Harun ban na'-ana'na soro entar ka labangnga Tang Kemah pas soro mandhi noro' atoranna agama. 
Exodus29:5 Harun pangangguy angguyya imam, iya areya: kameja, efod, juba se notobi efod, totobba dhadha ban sabbu'." 
Exodus29:6 Surbanna pasang e cethagga, e surban jareya pasange jamang dhari emmas se eokere tolesan ‘Kaangguy PANGERAN malolo’." 
Exodus29:7 Pas ngala' mennya' opacara, selennagi ka cethagga, mennya'agi." 
Exodus29:8 Saellana jareya olok na'-ana'na, pangangguy kameja ban sabbu'," 
Exodus29:9 sarta pangangguy surban. Kantha jareya carana mon atahbissagiya Harun ban na'-ana'na. Harun ban na'-ana'na jareya sarta ban na' potona kodu daddi imam se aladinana Sengko' salanjangnga. 
Exodus29:10 Saellana jareya budhu'na sape se lalake' gella' giba ka adha'anna Tang Kemah. Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu nompangngagi tanangnga e cethagga keban jareya. 
Exodus29:11 Sape jareya sambelli e adha'anna Sengko', e labangnga Kemah." 
Exodus29:12 Sabagiyan dharana sape jareya kala', buliddagi ka dhu'-tandhu'na mezba jareya ngangguy garigi'na. Karena dharana totta' ka bagiyan babana mezba." 
Exodus29:13 Saellana jareya kala' kabbi gaji se notobi essena tabu'na, bagiyan se paleng bagus dhari atena ban bingselanna se dhadhuwa' bi' gajina, jareya kabbi saba' e attassa mezba, laju obbar menangka tor-ator ka Sengko'." 
Exodus29:14 Daging, kole' ban perro'na sape lalake' gella' kodu obbar e lowaranna parkemahan. Jareya tor-ator kaangguy pangamponanna dusana para imam." 
Exodus29:15 Saellana jareya dumba se lalake' gella' kala' settong. Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu nompangngagi tanangnga e attassa cethagga keban jareya. 
Exodus29:16 Saellana jareya keban jareya laju sambelli, kala' dharana pas serammagi ka mezba, iya areya ka bagiyan gir-penggirra se pa'-empa'." 
Exodus29:17 Dumba lake' jareya kodu ethok-ketthok. Essena tabu'na ban pokangnga kodu bacco, pas saba' e attassa cethagga sarta e attassa thok-ketthoganna badanna se laen." 
Exodus29:18 Dumba lake' jareya kabbi atorragi e mezba menangka kurban obbaran. Sengko' senneng ngedhing bauna kurban jareya. 
Exodus29:19 Kala' dumba lake' settonganna, iya areya dumba lake' se eangguya pantahbisan. Harun ban na'-ana'na soro nompangngagi tanangnga e attassa cethagga keban jareya." 
Exodus29:20 Dumba lake' jareya pas sambelli, dharana kala' sakone', buliddagi ka kopeng kanganna Harun ban na'-ana'na, ka pol-empolanna tanang kanganna ban ka pol-empolanna soko kanganna. Karena dharana serammagi ka mezba, ka bagiyan penggirra se pa'-empa'." 
Exodus29:21 Kala' sakone' dhara se badha e attassa mezba ban mennya' opacarana sakone', laju ketessagi ka Harun ban ka na'-ana'na ban ka kalambina. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Harun ban na'-ana'na ban kalambina la emalolowagi kaangguy Sengko'." 
Exodus29:22 Kala' gajina dumba lake' jareya, bunto'na se badha gajina, lapesanna gaji e essena tabu'na, bagiyanna atena se paleng bagus, bingselanna se dhadhuwa' ban gajina, sarta pokang kanganna." 
Exodus29:23 Dhari cetthengnga roti se la eatorragi ka Sengko' kala' roti se acem-macem, cem-samacemma kala' settong: settong roti se ekagabay ban mennya' jaitun, settong se ta' ngangguy mennya', settong jajan." 
Exodus29:24 Kakanan jareya kabbi saba' e tanangnga Harun ban e tanangnga na'-ana'na, pas soro atorragi ka Sengko' menangka tor-ator kusus." 
Exodus29:25 Roti ban jajan jareya pas kala' dhari Harun ban na'-ana'na laju obbar e attassa mezba, e attassa kurban obbaran gella'. Sengko' senneng ngedhing bauna kurban jareya." 
Exodus29:26 Kala' dhadhana dumba lake' jareya kagabay tor-ator se kusus ka Sengko'. Kurban jareya bagiyanna ba'na. 
Exodus29:27 E dhalem opacara pantahbisanna imam, dhadha ban pokangnga dumba lake' se eangguy e dhalem opacara jareya kodu egabay tor-ator se kusus sarta palaen kaangguy para imam." 
Exodus29:28 Areya' Tang potosan se ta' olle oba: mon Tang ommat entar ngatorragi kurban pardhameyan, dhadha ban pokangnga keban se ekagabay kurban jareya bagiyanna para imam. Jareya tor-atorra Tang ommat ka Sengko'." 
Exodus29:29 Pangangguyya kabakteyan andhi'na Harun kodu esangkollagi ka na'-ana'na, me' olle eangguy e bakto etahbissagi." 
Exodus29:30 Ana'na Harun se daddi imam agante eppa'na ban maso' ka Tang Kemah parlo ngalakone kabakteyan e Rowangan Se Socce, kodu ngangguy pangangguy jareya pettong are abidda." 
Exodus29:31 Kala' dagingnga dumba lake' se eangguy e dhalem opacara pantahbisanna Harun ban na'-ana'na jareya, laju ola e settong kennengngan se socce." 
Exodus29:32 Daging jareya ban re-karena roti se badha e cettheng kodu ekakan bi' Harun ban na'-ana'na neng e labangnga Tang Kemah. 
Exodus29:33 Bariya keya kakanan se ekurbannagi e dhalem opacara palebbaranna dusa e bakto pantahbisan kodu ekakan bi' reng-oreng jareya. Pera' imam se olle ngakan kakanan se la ekusussagi kaangguy Sengko' jareya. 
Exodus29:34 Mon kalagguwanna gi' badha karena daging otaba roti jareya, karena buru kodu eobbar pasampe' tadha', ban ta' olle kakan, sabab la esocceyagi kaangguy Sengko' malolo." 
Exodus29:35 Opacara pantahbisanna Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu ejalannagi pettong are benteng, akantha se la eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na." 
Exodus29:36 Sabban are ba'na kodu ngatorragi kurban sape lake' sopaja dusa esapora'a. Kurban jareya masocce mezba. Saellana jareya mezba buru kodu emennya'e mennya' jaitun sopaja mezba jareya ekusussagi kaangguy Sengko'. 
Exodus29:37 Jalannagi jareya sabban are saabidda pettong are. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya mezba jareya daddi socce onggu; apa'a bai, se nyedding ka mezba jareya kodu epassra'agi ka Pangeran, ban sapa'a bai se nyedding mezba jareya bakal calaka'a polana kakowadanna kasocceyanna.”" 
Exodus29:38 “Sabban are, salanjangnga, e mezba jareya kodu ekurbannagi dumba dhadhuwa' se aomor sataon." 
Exodus29:39 Se settong gabay tor-ator baja laggu, settonganna gabay tor-ator e baja malem." 
Exodus29:40 Budhu'na dumba kaangguy tor-ator e baja laggu jareya kodu elambane teppong darigu se paleng bagus sakilo ecampor ban mennya' jaitun se morne saliter. Pas campore aeng anggur saliter. 
Exodus29:41 Budhu'na dumba se egabay tor-ator e baja malem kodu ekurbannagi kantha jareya keya, iya areya elambane teppong, mennya' jaitun ban aeng anggur. Sengko' senneng ngedhing bauna kurban obbaran jareya." 
Exodus29:42 Salanjangnga jaman, kurban obbaran jareya kodu eatorragi e adha'anna Sengko' e labangnga Tang Kemah. E jadhiya Sengko' atemmowa ban ba'na sarta acaca'a ka ba'na." 
Exodus29:43 E jadhiya Sengko' atemmowa ban bangsa Isra'il, ban cajana kahadiranna Sengko' e jadhiya bakal masocceya kemah ban mezba jareya." 
Exodus29:44 Sengko' masocceya kemah ban mezba jareya. Harun ban na'-ana'na bi' Sengko' epalaena dhari reng-oreng laenna me' olle daddi imam se aladinana Sengko'. 
Exodus29:45 Sengko' ennengnga apolong ban bangsa Isra'il, ban daddiya Allahna." 
Exodus29:46 Bangsa Isra'il bakal taowa ja' Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna se ngeba aba'na kalowar dhari Messer, sopaja Sengko' ngennenga apolong ban reng-oreng jareya. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna reng-oreng jareya.”" 
Exodus30:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Agabay mezba dhari kaju akasia, gabay kennengnganna pangobbaranna dupa." 
Exodus30:2 Mezba jareya kodu masagi empa', lanjang ban lebarra padha pa' polo lema' sentimeter, ban tenggina sangang polo sentimeter. E padduna se pa'-empa' pobuwi dhu'-tandhu' se asambung manyettong ban mezba jareya." 
Exodus30:3 Bagiyan attassa, tamaso' penggirra se pa'-empa' ban dhu'-tandhu'na kodu ekole'e emmas morne ban e sakalenglengnga pobuwi palepet emmas." 
Exodus30:4 Agabay long-kolong dhadhuwa' pobu e baba'anna palepedda penggirra se dhadhuwa' kaangguy panyekka'anna kaju kol-pekolla mezba jareya. 
Exodus30:5 Kol-pekol jareya kodu kagabay dhari kaju akasia ban kodu ekole'e emmas. 
Exodus30:6 Mezba jareya saba' e bagiyan lowarra kaen se badha e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan. E jadhiya kennengnganna Sengko' mon atemmowa ban ba'na. 
Exodus30:7 Sabban gi' laggu, mon Harun entar aberseyana damar, kodu ngobbar dupa se ro'om e attassa mezba jareya." 
Exodus30:8 Bariya keya mon ngodhi'ana damar e baja malem. Tor-ator se aropa dupa jareya kodu ejalannagi ron-temoron salanjangnga. 
Exodus30:9 Ja' nyaba' tor-ator e mezba jareya se aropa dupa larangan, kurban keban otaba kurban sasajin; bariya keya ja' nyelen kurban aeng anggur e jadhiya." 
Exodus30:10 Sataon sakaleyan Harun kodu mabadha opacara masocce mezba kalaban cara ngetesse tandhu'na se pa'-empa' ban dharana ebin se ekurbannagi kaangguy pangamponanna dusa. Se kantha jareya kodu ejalannagi sabban taon salanjangnga. Mezba jareya kodu socce kabbi ban ekusussagi ka Sengko'.” 
Exodus30:11 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Exodus30:12 “Mon ba'na mabadha caca jiwana bangsa Isra'il, saneyap lalake'an kodu majar ka Sengko' pesse tebbusanna aba'na me' olle ta' ekenneng balai e bakto caca jiwa jareya ebadha'agi." 
Exodus30:13 Saneyap oreng se noro' ebitong e dhalem caca jiwa jareya kodu majar pesse se bannya'na la etantowagi menorot arga neng e Tang Kemah, menangka tor-ator ka Sengko'." 
Exodus30:14 Saneyap oreng se ebitong e dhalem caca jiwa jareya, iya areya lalake'an se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas kodu massra'agi pesse tor-ator jareya." 
Exodus30:15 Se sogi ta' osa aberri' lebbi, ban se mesken ta' olle aberri' korang e bakto majar pesse panebbussa aba'na." 
Exodus30:16 Penta pesse jareya dhari bangsa Isra'il, pakompol, pas angguy kagabay kaparlowanna kabakteyan e dhalem Tang Kemah. Jareya kabbi pesse panebbussa reng-oreng jareya, ban Sengko' bakal enga'a terros kaangguy ajaga kasalameddanna reng-oreng jareya.”" 
Exodus30:17 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Exodus30:18 “Agabay cemmong dhari paronggu se langganna dhari paronggu keya. Cemmong jareya saba' e antarana Kemah ban mezba, pas esse'e aeng." 
Exodus30:19 Aeng jareya kaangguy Harun ban na'-ana'na mon maccowana tanang ban sokona 
Exodus30:20 sabellunna maso' ka Kemah otabana entara ka mezba ngeba'a kurban obbaran. Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu maccowe tanang ban sokona me' olle ta' mate. Jareya atoran se kodu etoro' bi' Harun ban na'-ana'na sarta na' potona salanjangnga.” 
Exodus30:21  
Exodus30:22 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Exodus30:23 “Ngala' racegan se paleng bagus, emmor se ancar nem kilo, manes jangan tello kilo, tebbu ro'om tello kilo, kaju teja nem kilo." 
Exodus30:24 Jareya kabbi tembang menorot tembangan se eangguy e Tang Kemah. Tamba'agi mennya' jaitun pa' liter," 
Exodus30:25 laju agabay mennya'na upacara, se ecampor akantha mennya' ro'om." 
Exodus30:26 Camporan jareya angguy amennya'e Tang Kemah, Petthe Parjanjiyan," 
Exodus30:27 meja ban sakabbinna parlengkabanna, ko'-tongko'na damar ban parlengkabanna, mezba kennengnganna pangobbaranna dupa," 
Exodus30:28 mezba kennengnganna kurban obbaran ban sakabbinna parlengkabanna, sarta cemmong baddhana aeng ban panongko'anna." 
Exodus30:29 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya rang-barang jareya bi' ba'na ekusussagi kaangguy Sengko', sopaja kabbi daddiya socce. Apa'a bai se tasedding ka mezba jareya kodu epassra'agi ka Pangeran, ban sapa'a bai se nyedding ka meja jareya bakal calaka'a polana kakowadanna kasocceyanna." 
Exodus30:30 Harun ban na'-ana'na mennya'e keya, ban tahbissagi padaddi imam se aladinana Sengko'." 
Exodus30:31 Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il ja' mennya' opacara jareya salanjangnga pera' eangguy e dhalem aladine Sengko' malolo. 
Exodus30:32 Mennya' jareya ta' olle selen ka reng-oreng biyasa. Ja' agabay mennya' se ngangguy camporan kantha jareya keya. Mennya' jareya socce ban kodu eanggep barang se socce. 
Exodus30:33 Oreng se agabay mennya' kantha jareya, otabana ngangguy mennya' jareya kaangguy oreng se banne imam, ta' eanggep anggotana Tang ommat pole.”" 
Exodus30:34 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Ngala' racegan acem-macem papadha bannya'na, iya areya gettana karet, kole'na lokan, gettana rasamala ban dupa se morne." 
Exodus30:35 Jareya campor kabbi, kagabay dupa se ro'om. Tambai buja sopaja dupa jareya pagguna morne ban socce." 
Exodus30:36 Sabagiyan dhari dupa jareya kodu etoto paalos. Giba ka Tang Kemah, laju tabur e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan. Dupa jareya kodu eanggep barang se socce se malolo eangguy e dhalem aladine Sengko'." 
Exodus30:37 Ja' agabay dupa se camporanna padha ban jareya kaangguy kaparlowanna ba'na dibi'. 
Exodus30:38 Sapa se agabay dupa kantha jareya kaangguy om-ro'om, ta' eanggep anggotana Tang ommat pole.”" 
Exodus31:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Exodus31:2 “Sengko' la mele Bezale'el ana'na Uri, kompoyya Hur dhari suku Yehuda," 
Exodus31:3 bi' Sengko' eberri'i Tang kobasa. Bi' Sengko' eberri'i pangarteyan, ban kacakebban e dhalem samacemma karya seni," 
Exodus31:4 kaangguy agabay rancangan se marlowagi kaahliyan sarta agabay rancangan jareya dhari emmas, salaka ban paronggu;" 
Exodus31:5 kaangguy agangse bato mamatan se bi' Sengko' etata'a; kaangguy ngoker kaju ban kaangguy samacemma karya seni laenna. 
Exodus31:6 Aholiyab, ana'na Ahisamakh dhari suku Dan, bi' Sengko' la epele keya epanolongana Bezale'el. Kang-tokang se penter bi' Sengko' eberri'i kaahliyan keya, sopaja padha'a tao agabay apa'a bai se eparenta'agi Sengko':" 
Exodus31:7 Tang Kemah, Petthe Parjanjiyan ban kodhungnga, sakabbinna parabudda Kemah," 
Exodus31:8 iya areya meja ban parlengkabanna, panongko'anna damar dhari emmas morne ban parlengkabanna, mezba kennengnganna pangobbaranna dupa," 
Exodus31:9 mezba kennengnganna kurban obbaran ban sakabbinna parlengkabanna, cemmongnga aeng ban panongko'anna," 
Exodus31:10 pangangguyya kabakteyan se eangguya Harun ban na'-ana'na, se kodu eangguy mon teppa'na ajalannagi lalakonna imam," 
Exodus31:11 mennya'na opacara, ban dupa ro'om kaangguy Rowangan Se Socce. Rang-barang jareya kabbi kodu ekagabay persis ban petodu se esebbuttagi Sengko' ka ba'na.”" 
Exodus31:12 PANGERAN makon ka Mosa 
Exodus31:13 sopaja ngomommagi ka bangsa Isra'il, “Raya'agi are Sabat, are se bi' Sengko' la eteptebbagi menangka are istirahat. Are jareya salanjangnga daddi parengeddan e antarana ba'na ban Sengko', sopaja ba'na taowa ja' Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban pole ja' bi' Sengko' ba'na la epadaddi Tang ommat dibi'." 
Exodus31:14 Are istirahat jareya kodu ehormadi menangka are se socce. Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'i nem are kaangguy alalakon, tape are se kapeng petto' jareya are raja se ekusussagi kaangguy abakte ka Sengko'. Pa'-sapa'a se ta' ngargai are jareya, kalaban alalakon e are jareya, kodu eokom mate." 
Exodus31:15  
Exodus31:16 Bangsa Isra'il kodu araya'agi are Sabat jareya ron-temoron menangka tandhana parjanjiyan. 
Exodus31:17 Are jareya settong parengeddan se teptep e antarana bangsa Isra'il ban Sengko', sabab Sengko', PANGERAN, agabay langnge' ban bume e dhalem bakto nem are, ban e are se kapeng petto' Sengko' ambu ta' alalakon pole sarta laju aistirahat.”" 
Exodus31:18 Samarena abu-dhabu ban Mosa e attassa Gunong Sinay, Allah marengngagi ka Mosa papan bato se dhadhuwa' se bi' Allah la etolese kon-papakonna." 
Exodus32:1 E bakto bangsa Isra'il nangale ja' Mosa ce' abidda ta' gellem toron dhari gunong, kabbi laju padha agaribbung e seddi'na Harun, pas ngoca' kantha reya, “Ba' badha ponapa ba'nengan, me' Mosa se mimpin bangsa kaula kalowar dhari Messer ka'issa' tadha' abali; daddi tore kaula sadaja badhiyagi illah me' olle bangsa kaula paneka badha se mimpin.”" 
Exodus32:2 Dhabuna Harun, “Mara bukka' teng-anteng emmassa binena, ban anteng se eangguy na'-ana'na ba'na kabbi, pakompol dha' enna'.”" 
Exodus32:3 Reng-oreng jareya laju padha mokka' teng-anteng emmassa, pas eatorragi ka Harun." 
Exodus32:4 Bi' Harun emmas jareya elejjur, pas etotta' ka dhalem pajitha'an, ekagabay pe-sapeyan emmas. Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Isra'il, areya' allahna ba'na ban sengko', se ngeba bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer!”" 
Exodus32:5 Harun pas maddek mezba e adha'anna pe-sapeyan emmas jareya, pas adhabu, “Lagguna badha paraya'an kaangguy abakte ka PANGERAN.”" 
Exodus32:6 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu reng-oreng Isra'il ngeba ban-keban se egabaya kurban obbaran ban se egabaya kurban salameddan. Reng-oreng jareya pas ju'-toju' kan-ngakan ban nom-ngenoman, saellana pas padha jaga neng-sennengngan." 
Exodus32:7 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kassa' ba'na duli toron abali ka kennengnganna, sabab Tang ommat se bi' ba'na egiba kalowar dhari Messer rowa alako jahat." 
Exodus32:8 Reng-oreng jareya la ta' endha' atoro' ka Tang parenta; agabay pe-sapeyan dhari emmas se elejjur; pe-sapeyan jareya esemba ban engeba'agi ban-kurban. Pe-sapeyan emmas jareya eako allahna se nolong makalowar aba'na dhari nagara Messer. 
Exodus32:9 Sengko' tao ja' reng-oreng jareya ce' cengkalla. 
Exodus32:10 Sateya ba'na ta' osa ngoddi lang-ngalange Sengko'. Sengko' peggel, bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya epatompessa kabbi. Tape ba'na ban na' potona bi' Sengko' epadaddiya bangsa se raja.”" 
Exodus32:11 Tape Mosa nyo'on ka GUSTE Allahna, atorra, “GUSTE, aponapa Junandalem me' kantos duka sapaneka ka ommadda? Ommat ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem gu ta' etolong epakalowar dhari Messer kalaban kakowadanna sareng kakobasa'anna Junandalem?" 
Exodus32:12 Manabi sareng Junandalem ommat Isra'il ka'dhinto epamate sadaja, tanto bangsa Messer padha ngoca' ja' bangsa Isra'il ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem ebakta kalowar dhari Messer namong parlo epamateya sadaja neng e gunong ka'dhinto? Ampon ja' duka, GUSTE; ngereng oba neyattepon Junandalem, ja' kantos bangsa ka'dhinto epacalaka'." 
Exodus32:13 Kaemodi abdiepon Junandalem Ibrahim, Ishak sareng Yakub. Kaemodi Junandalem ampon asompa marengana se katello gapaneka na' poto se bannya'na padha sareng bannya'na bintang e langnge'. Junandalem asompa jugan tana se ejanjiyagi Junandalem ka'dhissa' bakal ekaandhi'a na' potona Ibrahim, Ishak sareng Yakub salanjangnga.”" 
Exodus32:14 Daddi PANGERAN pas ngoba neyadda ban burung se alampa'agiya ancamanna kaangguy neba'agi balai ka bangsa jareya. 
Exodus32:15 Mosa toron abali dhari gunong jareya abakta bato se dhadhuwa' se la badha tolesanna e adha' budhina, tolesan jareya aesse papakonna Allah." 
Exodus32:16 Allah dibi' se abadhi papan bato jareya ban se ngokerragi papakonna e papan jareya. 
Exodus32:17 E bakto toron dhari gunong jareya Yusak meyarsa oreng Isra'il rat-tharadan ce' rammena. Ca'na Yusak ka Mosa, “Kadiya badha paperrangan e parkemahan.”" 
Exodus32:18 Dhabuna Mosa, “Katonna banne sowarana oreng se mennang otabana kala perrang; arowa sowarana oreng anyanye.”" 
Exodus32:19 Sanapa'na ka seddi'anna parkemahan Mosa ngoladi pe-sapeyan emmas rowa ban reng-oreng se teppa'na padha atari. Mosa pas ce' dukana, sampe' papan bato se dhadhuwa' se ebakta dhari attas gunong gella' ebantengngagi e babana gunong jareya sampe' lejjar." 
Exodus32:20 Pe-sapeyan emmas gabayanna reng-oreng Isra'il rowa epondhut, eobbar, pas etette sampe' alos akantha bubu'. Bubu' jareya ecampor ban aeng, pas epakon enom ka reng-oreng Isra'il." 
Exodus32:21 Dhabuna Mosa ka Harun, “Ba'na epabaramma bi' reng-oreng rowa me' sampe' reng-oreng jareya bi' ba'na epanneng alako dusa se kantha jareya rajana?”" 
Exodus32:22 Ca'na Harun, “Ella ba'na ja' gigir ka sengko'; ba'na tao dibi' reng-oreng reya talebat jahadda." 
Exodus32:23 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya ka sengko', ‘Ba' badha ponapa ba'nengan, me' Mosa se mimpin bangsa kaula kalowar dhari Messer ka'issa' tadha' abali; daddi tore kaula sadaja badhiyagi illah me' olle bangsa kaula paneka badha se mimpin.’" 
Exodus32:24 Daddi bi' sengko' reng-oreng jareya esoro makompol angguyya se dhari emmas, kabbi padha massra'agi angguyya se dhari emmas jareya ka sengko'. Bi' sengko' pas elejjur e apoy ekagabay pe-sapeyan.”" 
Exodus32:25 Mosa ngagali ja' reng-oreng Isra'il jareya bi' Harun etorot sakarebba, sampe' kabbi padha ekala'-gella' bi' so-mosona." 
Exodus32:26 Daddi Mosa pas ngadek e labangnga parkemahan jareya, laju aera', “Pa-sapa se gi' ngabdiya ka PANGERAN, akompol dha' enna' kabbi!” Suku Lewi padha nyander ka seddi'na Mosa kabbi." 
Exodus32:27 Dhabuna Mosa ka reng-oreng jareya, “Badha dhabuna PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il, ba'na epakon ngala' peddhangnga bang-sebang, pas ajalan sabalattrana e parkemahan reya, molae dhari labang reya ka labang laenna, sambi mate'e tan-taretanna, ca-kancana ban ga-tatanggana.”" 
Exodus32:28 Suku Lewi ajalannagi papakon jareya, pas mate'e oreng bannya'na ra-kera tello ebu oreng e dhalem saare jareya." 
Exodus32:29 Dhabuna Mosa ka reng-oreng Lewi, “Are teya ba'na massra'agi aba' malolo daddi imam se ngabdi ka PANGERAN kalaban mate'e na'-ana' lalake'anna ban tan-taretan lalake'anna dibi', daddi bi' PANGERAN ba'na padha eparenge berkadda kabbi.”" 
Exodus32:30 Kalagguwanna Mosa adhabu ka reng-oreng Isra'il, “Ba'na padha ngalakone dusa se ce' rajana. Tape sateya sengko' ongga'a ka gunong pole ngadhebba PANGERAN; pola sengko' me' olle nyo'onnagi sopaja dusana ba'na jareya esapora'a.”" 
Exodus32:31 Mosa laju ngadhep pole ka PANGERAN, pas mator, “Reng-oreng Isra'il ampon abadhi dusa se ce' rajana, abadhi illah dhari emmas se esemba." 
Exodus32:32 Moga Junandalem kasokana nyapora dusana reng-oreng ka'dhinto, manabi bunten, langkong sae kosot saos nyama abdidalem dhari bukuepon reng-oreng se odhi'.”" 
Exodus32:33 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Se ekosoda nyamana dhari ketab jareya coma oreng se dusa ka Sengko'." 
Exodus32:34 Sateya kassa' mangkat, pimpin bangsa Isra'il jareya ka kennengngan se bi' Sengko' la ekoca'agi ka ba'na. Tang malaekat abarengngana ba'na terros, tape e settong bakto reng-oreng se dusa jareya bi' Sengko' eokoma.”" 
Exodus32:35 Daddi reng-oreng Isra'il bi' PANGERAN epakenneng panyaket polana maksa Harun agabay pe-sapeyan emmas. 
Exodus33:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Mara mangkat dhari dhinna' abareng ban bangsa se bi' ba'na egiba dhari Messer reya ka nagara se bi' Sengko' ejanjiyagi ka Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub ban na' potona." 
Exodus33:2 Sengko' nyorowa Tang malaekat epangaterra ba'na. Sengko' ngojuga bangsa Kana'an, Amori, Het, Feris, Hewi ban Yebus." 
Exodus33:3 Nagara se eentarana ba'na jareya sogi tor landhu. Tape Sengko' dibi' ta' abarengngana ba'na sopaja bi' Sengko' ba'na ta' epamateya, sabab ba'na reya settong bangsa se cengkal.”" 
Exodus33:4 Saellana jareya PANGERAN makon Mosa abala kantha reya ka bangsa Isra'il, “Ba'na reya bangsa se cengkal. Saompamana Sengko' abarengnge ba'na maske pera' sakejja', tanto bi' Sengko' ba'na epamate kabbi. Mara bukka' pareyasanna ba'na jareya, Sengko' pas nantowagiya epabaramma'a ba'na bi' Sengko'.” Saellana ngedhing dhabuna PANGERAN jareya, reng-oreng Isra'il ce' sossana. Pareyasanna laju ebukka' kabbi. Daddi, samangkadda dhari Gunong Sinay, bangsa Isra'il ta' ngangguy pareyasan pole." 
Exodus33:5  
Exodus33:6  
Exodus33:7 Sabban bangsa Isra'il akemah, Mosa mondhut Kemah pas epasang abak jau dhari parkemahanna reng-oreng jareya. Kemah jareya enyamae Kemah Socce, ban pa'-sapa'a se marlowagi babala'anna PANGERAN, entar ka jadhiya." 
Exodus33:8 Mon Mosa meyos ka Kemah jareya, reng-oreng Isra'il padha manjeng e adha'anna kemahna bang-sebang sambi ngabassagi Mosa sampe' maso' ka dhalem Kemah gella'." 
Exodus33:9 Saellana Mosa maso' pas badha ondhem se aropa cangga se toron sarta pas ambu e adha'na labangnga Kemah jareya. Dhari ondhem jareya PANGERAN abu-dhabu ka Mosa. 
Exodus33:10 E bakto reng-oreng Isra'il nangale'e ondhem se aropa cangga gella' e labangnga Kemah Socce, kabbi padha asojud e labangnga kemahna bang-sebang." 
Exodus33:11 PANGERAN abu-dhabu dhep-adhebban bi' Mosa, padha ban oreng se acaca bi' kancana. Saellana jareya Mosa pas abali ka parkemahan. Tape Yusak ana'na Nun, oreng ngodha se biyasana nolonge Mosa, paggun neng e Kemah jareya." 
Exodus33:12 Atorra Mosa ka PANGERAN, “Lerres Junandalem makon abdidalem mimpin reng-oreng Isra'il ka'dhinto ka nagara ka'dhissa', namong Junandalem gi' tadha' dhabuna pasera se sareng Junandalem epakona nolonge abdidalem. GUSTE, Junandalem adhabu ja' Junandalem oneng ka abdidalem sareng lebur ka abdidalem." 
Exodus33:13 Manabi lerres saka'dhinto, ngereng dhabuwagi ka abdidalem ponapa kasokanna Junandalem, sopaja abdidalem kengenga ngabdi ka Junandalem sareng masenneng Junandalem terros. Kaemodi ja' bangsa ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem ampon epele epadaddi ommattepon Junandalem dibi'.”" 
Exodus33:14 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Sengko' dibi' se nontona ban alindhungana ba'na sopaja ba'na ngaandhi'a tana se la ejanjiyagi Sengko' rowa.”" 
Exodus33:15 Atorra Mosa, “Manabi Junandalem ta' nolonge abdidalem sadaja, abdidalem ja' pakon mangkat saos dhari ka'dhinto." 
Exodus33:16 Kadi ponapa oreng laen se onenga ja' Junandalem lebur ka ommattepon manabi ommat ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem ta' etolonge? Lantaran Junandalem asarengnge abdidalem sareng bangsa abdidalem sadajana, daddi sa-bangsa padha oneng ja' ommattepon Junandalem bida sareng sa-bangsa laenna e bume.”" 
Exodus33:17 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Parnyo'onanna ba'na bi' Sengko' ekabbulana, sabab Sengko' la tao ka ba'na ban lebur ka ba'na.”" 
Exodus33:18 Atorra Mosa pole, “GUSTE, ngereng abdidalem panengale kamolja'annepon Junandalem.”" 
Exodus33:19 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Sengko' lebada e adha'anna ba'na, ban ba'na bakal nangaleyana sakabbinna Tang kamolja'an. Bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana Tang nyama se socce. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban Sengko' reya noduwagi kamora'anna Tang ate ban kabellasan ka reng-oreng peleyan Sengko' dibi'." 
Exodus33:20 Ba'na ta' olle ngabas Tang roba sabab pa-sapa se ngabas Tang roba tanto mate. 
Exodus33:21 Tape e seddi'anna Sengko' reya badha gumo' bato; ba'na olle manjeng e jadhiya. 
Exodus33:22 E bakto sonar kahadiranna Sengko' lebat e jadhiya, bi' Sengko' ba'na e saba'a e ke'-lekke'na gumo' jareya sarta etotobana bi' Tang tanang sampe' Sengko' la lebat." 
Exodus33:23 Saellana jareya Tang tanang ealleya sopaja ba'na bisa'a nangale'e Sengko' dhari budhi, tape ta' bisa nangale'e Tang roba.”" 
Exodus34:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kassa' ngetthok papan bato dhadhuwa' papadha ban se sabbanna, bi' Sengko' etolesana ca'-oca' akantha se etoles Sengko' e bato se bi' ba'na epalejjar rowa." 
Exodus34:2 Ba'na asiyap lagguna gu-laggu, pas ongga ka Gunong Sinay ngadhep ka Sengko' e konco'na gunong jareya." 
Exodus34:3 Ja' ngajak pa-sapa; ta' olle badha oreng e dhimma'a bai e gunong reya; ta' olle badha dumba otaba sape se ngamba e babana gunong reya.” 
Exodus34:4 Daddi Mosa laju ngetthok papan bato dhadhuwa', ban kalagguwanna gi' laggu bato jareya ebakta ongga ka Gunong Sinay menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN." 
Exodus34:5 PANGERAN toron e dhalem ondhem, ngadek e seddi'na Mosa, pas nyebbuttagi asmana se socce, iya areya PANGERAN." 
Exodus34:6 Saellana jareya PANGERAN lebat e ajunanna Mosa sambi adhabu epakaja, “Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allah se neserran ban bellas ase, Sengko' sabbar, neserran ban esto." 
Exodus34:7 Sengko' taresna ban esto ka manossa sampe' abun-ebun toronan, ban nyapora dusana manossa; tape Sengko' ta' loppa aberri' okoman ka oreng se agabay dusa, ban okoman jareya bakal etanggunga keya bi' na' potona sampe' toronan se kapeng tello' otaba empa'.”" 
Exodus34:8 Mosa duli asojud ka tana abakte ka Pangeran," 
Exodus34:9 laju mator, “Guste, manabi Junandalem pajat kasokan ka abdidalem, ngereng Junandalem asarengnge bangsa abdidalem ka'dhinto. Lerres reng-oreng ka'dhinto cengkal, namong kasokana Junandalem nyapora dusa sareng kasala'anna abdidalem sadaja; kasokana Junandalem narema reng-oreng ka'dhinto menangka ommattepon Junandalem.”" 
Exodus34:10 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Sateya Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan ban bangsa Isra'il. E adha'anna reng-oreng jareya Sengko' mabadha'a kaajiban-kaajiban se gi' ta' tao kadaddiyan e antarana sa-bangsa se kemma'a bai e bume reya. Sa-bangsa bakal padha'a nangaleyana sakabbinna kaajiban se epabadha'a bi' Sengko', sabab Sengko', PANGERAN mabadha'a sabarang se nako'e e adha'anna ba'na." 
Exodus34:11 Toro' kom-hokom se etarema ba'na dhari Sengko' are teya reya. Sengko' ngojuga bangsa Amori, Kana'an, Het, Feris, Hewi ban Yebus e baktona ba'na maju." 
Exodus34:12 Senga' te-ngate, ja' sampe' ba'na mabadha parjanjiyan ban reng-oreng e nagara se emaso'ana ba'na, sabab jareya bisa daddi jebbak se madhateng pate ka ba'na." 
Exodus34:13 Sabaligga, pagujur ba-mezbana bangsa jareya, paancor gu-tuguna se karamat ban ta'-tatta' ga-canggana Asyora, brahala se esemba bangsa jareya." 
Exodus34:14 Ba'na ja' nyemba illah laenna, sabab Sengko' reya, PANGERAN, Allah se ta' endha' epapadha bi' apa'a bai." 
Exodus34:15 Ja' mabadha parjanjiyan bi' bangsa e nagara jareya, sabab e bakto bangsa jareya abakte sarta ngeba kurban ka lah-illahna, ba'na tanto tagudha terro noro'a ngakan kurban se egiba ka lah-illahna jareya." 
Exodus34:16 Mon na'-ana'na ba'na abine babine'an e nagara jareya, babine'an jareya tanto nyacae ana' lalake'anna ba'na sopaja nyemba'a ka lah-illah se esemba bangsana." 
Exodus34:17 Ja' agabay ban ja' nyemba lah-illah se ekagabay dhari logam. 
Exodus34:18 Raya'agi Pesta Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i. Akantha se la eparenta'agi Sengko', ba'na kodu ngakan roti se ta' eragi'i pettong are abidda e dhalem bulan Abib, sabab e bulan jareya ba'na kalowar dhari Messer." 
Exodus34:19 Ana' sareyang se lalake' sarta budhu'na ebinna se sareyang se lalake' daddi Tang andhi' kabbi. 
Exodus34:20 Tape budhu'na hemar se sareyang kodu etebbus ban budhu'na dumba menangka gantena. Mon ba'na ta' endha' nebbus, le'erra hemar jareya kodu papotong. Ana' sareyang se lalake' kodu etebbus kabbi. Sapa'a bai ta' olle ngadhep ka Sengko' mon ta' ngeba tor-ator." 
Exodus34:21 Ba'na bisa alalakon nem are abidda; e are se kapeng petto' ba'na ta' olle alalakon, maske e mosem nyalaga otaba mosem anye." 
Exodus34:22 Raya'agi Pesta Anye e bakto ba'na molae anye hasella gandumma se dha'-adha'. Bariya keya raya'agi Pesta Bengko Un-dhaunan e aher taon, e bakto ba'na molong wa'-buwa'an." 
Exodus34:23 Sataon tello kale lalake'an kodu entar abakte ka Sengko', PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Isra'il." 
Exodus34:24 Saellana Sengko' ngojuk sa-bangsa mosona ba'na, sarta la malebar dhaerana ba'na, ta' kera badha pole se bangala arebbu' nagarana ba'na e bakto ba'na entar araya'agi Pesta Roti se Ta' Eragi'i, Pesta Anye ban Pesta Bengko Un-dhaunan." 
Exodus34:25 Mon ba'na ngeba kurban keban sambelliyan, ja' ngeba tor-ator roti se eragi'i. Keban se egabay kurban e bakto paraya'an Paska kodu epaabi' e malem jareya keya, ta' olle badha karena sampe' kalagguwanna." 
Exodus34:26 Sabban taon ba'na kodu ngeba hasella gandumma se eanye dha'-adha' ka Padalemman Socce. Dagingnga budhu'na dumba otaba embi' ta' olle eola bi' aeng sosona korbina.” 
Exodus34:27 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Toles Tang oca' jareya kabbi, sabab adhasar ka ca'-oca' jareya Sengko' mabadha parjanjiyan ban ba'na sarta ban reng-oreng Isra'il.”" 
Exodus34:28 Mosa alenggi e jadhiya ban PANGERAN pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda. Saabidda jareya Mosa ta' adha'ar roti ban ta' adha'ar aeng sakale. Ca'-oca' se esebbuttagi e dhalem parjanjiyan gella', iya areya Papakonna Allah se Sapolo, eserrat e papan bato se dhadhuwa' gella'." 
Exodus34:29 E bakto Mosa toron dhari Gunong Sinay sambi abakta papan bato se aesse Papakonna Allah se Sapolo rowa, raena tera' polana mare abu-dhabu ban PANGERAN; tape Mosa dibi' ta' ngagali parkara jareya." 
Exodus34:30 Harun ban reng-oreng Isra'il nangale'e raena Mosa se tera' jareya, daddi padha tako' se nyemma'a." 
Exodus34:31 Tape bi' Mosa reng-oreng jareya edikane, daddi Harun ban pin-pamimpinna oreng Isra'il jareya padha nyander, Mosa pas abu-dhabu ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Exodus34:32 Saellana jareya reng-oreng Isra'il padha agaribbung e seddi'anna Mosa, ban Mosa laju manapa' ka reng-oreng Isra'il jareya kom-hokom se etarema salerana dhari PANGERAN e Gunong Sinay." 
Exodus34:33 Samarena abu-dhabu ka bangsana jareya, Mosa pas notobi raena ban dhung-kodhung." 
Exodus34:34 Mon maso'a ka Kemah ngadhebba ka PANGERAN polana tor-matora, dhung-kodhungnga ebukka'. Mon kalowar dhari Kemah jareya Mosa pas manapa' ka reng-oreng Isra'il pa-apa se epakonnagi PANGERAN ka salerana," 
Exodus34:35 reng-oreng Isra'il masthe nangale'e raena Mosa jareya tera'. Mosa pas notobi raena ban dhung-kodhungnga, terros sampe' mon la napa' baktona pole tor-matora ka PANGERAN e dhalem Kemah." 
Exodus35:1 Mosa makompol sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il, laju adhabu, “Areya' papakonna PANGERAN ka ba'na:" 
Exodus35:2 Badha nem are kaangguy alalakon, tape are se kapeng petto' jareya are kaangguy istirahat, are raja se ekusussagi kaangguy abakte ka PANGERAN. Sapa se alalakon e are Sabat kodu eokom mate." 
Exodus35:3 E are jareya, ba'na ngodhi'i apoy e bengkona bai ta' olle.”" 
Exodus35:4 Dhabuna Mosa ka sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il, “Areya' papakonna PANGERAN:" 
Exodus35:5 Ngeba tor-ator ka PANGERAN. Pa'-sapa'a se akarep kodu ngeba tor-ator emmas, salaka ban paronggu;" 
Exodus35:6 kaen linen se alos, kaen wol bungo, bungo terrong ban mera; kaen dhari buluna embi';" 
Exodus35:7 kole'na dumba lake' se epabarna mera; kole' se alos, kaju akasia," 
Exodus35:8 mennya'na damar; racegan kaangguy mennya'na opacara ban kaangguy dupa ro'om; 
Exodus35:9 mamatan dalima ban mamatan laenna se egabaya rarengganna efod ban totobba dhadhana Imam Agung.” 
Exodus35:10 “Sakabbinna oreng se ahli e antarana ba'na kodu entar agabay sabarang se epakonnagi PANGERAN, iya areya:" 
Exodus35:11 Kemah, ata'na ban totobba bagiyan lowarra, ke'-cangke'na ban barangkana, ju-kajuna se malang, pangpangnga labang ban panongko'anna;" 
Exodus35:12 Petthe Parjanjiyan ban kaju kol-pekolla, kodhungnga ban kaen bir-tabirra;" 
Exodus35:13 meja ban kaju kol-pekolla, sakabbinna parlengkabanna ban roti sasajin;" 
Exodus35:14 ko'-tongko'na damar kaangguy matera' ban parlengkabanna, damar ban mennya'na;" 
Exodus35:15 mezba pangobbaranna dupa ban kaju kol-pekolla, mennya'na opacara, dupa se ro'om; bir-tabirra labangnga Kemah," 
Exodus35:16 mezba kennengnganna kurban obbaran ban ca'-raca'na dhari paronggu, kaju kol-pekolla ban sakabbinna parlengkabanna; cemmong pabaccowan ban panongko'anna," 
Exodus35:17 bir-tabirra taneyan, ga-cangga ban panongko'anna, bir-tabirra labang sakethengnga taneyan,"
