Leviticus13:31 Mon menorot pamareksa'anna imam bagiyan se sake' jareya ta' katon keldem, tape e bagiyan jareya tadha' obu' otaba janggu' se celleng, oreng jareya kodu epanyengla dhari kennengnganna oreng bannya' pettong are abidda." 
Leviticus13:32 E are se kapeng petto', oreng jareya kodu epareksa pole bi' imam, mon panyaket jareya ta' alatlat sarta e bagiyan jareya tadha' obu'na otaba janggu'na se abak koneng, ban pole katonna ta' keldem," 
Leviticus13:33 oreng jareya kodu nyokor obu'na otaba janggu'na e sakalenglengnga bagiyan se sake'. Saellana jareya oreng jareya kodu epanyengla dhari kennengnganna oreng bannya' pettong are abidda. 
Leviticus13:34 E are se kapeng petto' imam kodu mareksa oreng jareya pole. Mon panyakedda ta' alatlat ban bagiyan jareya katonna ta' keldem, oreng jareya kodu enyata'agi berse ban kodu nyassa angguyya." 
Leviticus13:35 Tape mon saellana enyata'agi berse panyakedda laju alatlat," 
Leviticus13:36 oreng jareya kodu epareksa pole bi' imam. Mon bendher panyaket jareya pajat alatlat, imam ta' parlo mareksa pole apa obu' otaba janggu'na oreng jareya daddi koneng, sabab la terrang ja' oreng jareya najjis." 
Leviticus13:37 Tape mon menorot panemmona imam panyaket jareya ta' alatlat, ban e kennengngan jareya tombu obu' ban janggu' se celleng, panyaket jareya la baras, ban imam kodu anyata'agi ja' oreng jareya berse." 
Leviticus13:38 Mon badha oreng lalake' otaba babine' e kole'na metto lak-bellak pote," 
Leviticus13:39 imam kodu mareksa oreng jareya. Mon lak-bellak jareya katonna pote beddeng, oreng jareya pera' etemmo pora', ban enyata'agi berse." 
Leviticus13:40 Mon oreng lalake' daddi buthak e bagiyan budhina otaba bagiyan adha'na cethagga, oreng jareya ta' najjis." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Tape mon e bagiyan buthagga jareya metto bara se abarna pote ra'-sora' mera, oreng jareya nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk." 
Leviticus13:43 Imam kodu mareksa oreng jareya, mon pajat badha se bara, se barnana pote ra'-sora' mera," 
Leviticus13:44 imam kodu anyata'agi ja' oreng jareya najjis polana nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk e cethagga. 
Leviticus13:45 Oreng se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk kodu akalambi se dha-beddha ban obu'na egambak ta' esoroy. Mowana bagiyan baba kodu etotobi sambi ra'-era'an, “Najjis! Najjis!”" 
Leviticus13:46 Saabidda nyandhang panyaket jareya oreng jareya najjis ban kodu neng e lowarra parkemahan, jau dhari reng-oreng laenna." 
Leviticus13:47 Mon badha kalambi otabana kaen dhari wol otaba linen," 
Leviticus13:48 otaba kole' otaba apa'a bai se ekagabay dhari kole', se daddi ambung," 
Leviticus13:49 ban rang-barang se ambung jareya ra'-sora' biru otaba ra'-sora' mera, ambungnga jareya tamaso' macemma se alatlat ban kodu eduduwagi ka imam." 
Leviticus13:50 Imam kodu mareksa barang jareya, sarta pas manyengla barang jareya pettong are abidda." 
Leviticus13:51 E are se kapeng petto' imam jareya kodu mareksa pole barang gella', ban mon ambungnga jareya gi' alatlat, barang jareya najjis." 
Leviticus13:52 Barang jareya kodu eobbar bi' imam, sabab ambungnga jareya tamaso' macemma se alatlat, daddi kodu eobbar epamosna." 
Leviticus13:53 Tape mon menorot pamareksa'anna imam ambungnga jareya ta' alatlat ka barang jareya," 
Leviticus13:54 imam jareya kodu marenta'agi sopaja barang jareya esassa ban epanyengla pettong are aggi' abidda. 
Leviticus13:55 Saellana jareya pas kodu epareksa pole bi' imam, mon ambungnga jareya ta' aoba barnana, barang jareya paggun najjis ban kodu eobbar, maske ambungnga jareya pera' badha e bagiyan adha'na otaba e bagiyan budhina." 
Leviticus13:56 Tape mon menorot pamareksa'anna imam ambungnga jareya la ngorange, bagiyan se ambung e kaen otaba kole' jareya kodu esebbit." 
Leviticus13:57 Mon saellana jareya pas badha ambungnga pole, barang jareya kodu eobbar bi' se andhi'." 
Leviticus13:58 Mon saellana esassa otaba eassae ambungnga jareya elang, barang jareya kodu esassa otaba eassae pole, buru eanggep berse." 
Leviticus13:59 Kantha jareya atoran-atoranna parkara barang se ambung, se aropa kalambi otaba kaen dhari linen otaba wol, otabana apa'a bai se ekagabay dhari kole'." 
Leviticus14:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus14:2 “Areya' atoran-atoranna opacarana nyocce'e oreng se baras dhari panyaket kole' budhuk. E bakto oreng jareya enyata'agiya ja' berse, kodu egiba ka imam," 
Leviticus14:3 imam kodu ngeba oreng jareya ka lowarra parkemahan. Mon menorot pamareksa'an oreng jareya la baras," 
Leviticus14:4 imam kodu nyoro oreng jareya ngeba mano' se gi' odhi' ban se ta' haram dhadhuwa', ban kaju comara salonjur, tale mera ban hisop saranca'." 
Leviticus14:5 Mano' se settong jareya kodu esambelli e attassa pennay tana se aesse aeng berse dhari somber. 
Leviticus14:6 Mano' settonganna ban kaju comarana, tale merana ban hisop gella' kodu ecabbur ka dhalem dharana mano' se la esambelli jareya." 
Leviticus14:7 Dharana mano' jareya bi' imam kodu eketessagi pettong kale ka oreng se la baras jareya, ban imam pas anyata'agi ja' oreng jareya berse. Saellana jareya mano' se gi' odhi' jareya kodu eocol ka ra-ara." 
Leviticus14:8 Oreng buru kodu nyassa kalambina, nyokor obu'na sampe' epatadha', pas mandhi. Oreng jareya pas berse, sarta olle maso' ka dhalem parkemahan, tape sampe' pettong are aggi' gi' ta' olle maso' ka dhalem kemahna dibi'." 
Leviticus14:9 E are se kapeng petto' oreng jareya kodu nyokor sakabbinna obu'na, bariya keya janggu'na, alessa ban sakabbinna bulu se badha e badanna. Saellana jareya pas kodu nyassa kalambina, terros mandhi. Buru saellana jareya oreng jareya pas berse." 
Leviticus14:10 E are se kapeng ballu' oreng jareya kodu ngeba budhu'na dumba lake' dhadhuwa' ban budhu'na dumba bine' settong se omorra sataon, se padha tadha' calena, bariya keya teppong tello kilo se la ecampor ban mennya' jaitun sapartellon liter menangka kurban sasajin." 
Leviticus14:11 Imam pas kodu ngeba oreng jareya ban tor-atorra ka adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. 
Leviticus14:12 Imam jareya kodu ngala' budhu'na dumba se lake' settong ban mennya' jaitun se sapartellon liter kaangguy kurban tebbusanna kasala'an ban ngatorragi jareya ka PANGERAN menangka kurban kusus se daddi bagiyanna imam. 
Leviticus14:13 Budhu'na dumba jareya bi' imam kodu esambelli e kennengngan se pera' egabay kennengnganna panyambelliyanna keban kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa ban kurban obbaran. Dumba jareya kodu esambelli e jadhiya sabab kurban tebbusanna kasala'an ban pangamponanna dusa reya talebat soccena, ban daddi bagiyanna imam." 
Leviticus14:14 Imam kodu ngala' dharana budhu'na dumba jareya sakone', laju ebuliddagi ka kopeng kanganna oreng se enyata'agiya berse gella', sarta ka pol-empolan tanang kanganna ban ka pol-empolanna soko kanganna." 
Leviticus14:15 Saellana jareya imam ngala' mennya' jaitun sakone' pas eselen ka pa'-dapa'na tanangnga dibi' se kacer. 
Leviticus14:16 Saellana jareya imam nyabbur garigi'na tanang kanganna ka dhalem mennya' e tanang kacerra gella' pas eketessagi pettong kale ka Kemah Socce. 
Leviticus14:17 Karena mennya' se badha e tanangnga pas kodu ebuliddagi sakone' ka bagiyan-bagiyan se la ebulidi dhara gella', iya areya kopeng kanganna, pol-empolanna tanang kanganna, ban pol-empolanna soko kanganna oreng se enyata'agiya la berse jareya." 
Leviticus14:18 Karena mennya' se badha e pa'-dapa'na tanangnga jareya kodu epobu ka attassa cethagga oreng jareya. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam mabadha opacara nyocce'e oreng jareya e ajunanna PANGERAN. 
Leviticus14:19 Saellana jareya imam kodu ngatorragi kurban pangamponanna dusa sopaja oreng se najjis jareya daddi berse. Samarena jareya imam kodu nyambelli keban se egabaya kurban obbaran," 
Leviticus14:20 kurban jareya kodu eatorragi epabareng ban kurban sasajin e mezba. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam mabadha opacara nyocce'e oreng jareya, ban oreng jareya pas daddi berse." 
Leviticus14:21 Mon oreng jareya ta' andhi' ban ta' kowat, kaangguy kurban tebbusanna kasala'an olle pera' ngeba budhu'na dumba lake' malolo menangka kurban kusus ka PANGERAN, se daddi bagiyanna imam. Laen dhari jareya oreng buru kodu ngeba teppong sakilo ecampor ban mennya' jaitun kaangguy kurban sasajin, ban mennya' jaitun sapartellon liter." 
Leviticus14:22 Bariya keya pejji otaba budhu'na poter dhadhuwa' se settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa ban settonganna kaangguy kurban obbaran. 
Leviticus14:23 Tor-ator jareya kabbi kodu egiba ka imam e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce e are se kapeng ballu' e dhalem opacara se ebadha'agi kaangguy nyocce'e aba'na jareya. 
Leviticus14:24 Imam ngala' budhu'na dumba ban mennya' jaitunna, pas eatorragi menangka tor-ator kusus ka PANGERAN se daddi bagiyanna imam." 
Leviticus14:25 Saellana jareya imam kodu nyambelli budhu'na dumbana, dharana sakone' ebuliddagi ka kopeng kanganna oreng se enyata'agiya berse gella', ka pol-empolanna tanang kanganna, ka pol-empolanna soko kanganna." 
Leviticus14:26 Imam kodu nyelen mennya' jareya sakone' ka pa'-dapa'na tanangnga dibi' se kacer," 
Leviticus14:27 laju ngetessagi mennya' jareya bi' garigi'na tanang kanganna ka Kemah Socce sampe' pettong kale. 
Leviticus14:28 Karena mennya' e tanangnga pas kodu ebuliddagi sakone' ka bagiyan-bagiyan se la ebulidi dhara gella', iya areya kopeng kanganna, pol-empolanna tanang kanganna ban pol-empolanna soko kanganna oreng se enyata'agiya berse gella'." 
Leviticus14:29 Karena mennya'na kodu eselen ka attassa cethagga oreng jareya kaangguy opacara nyocce'e aba'na e ajunanna PANGERAN. 
Leviticus14:30 Saellana jareya imam kodu ngatorragi sala settong dhari pejji otaba budhu'na poter se dhadhuwa' gella' 
Leviticus14:31 kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa, dineng pejji ban poter settonganna kaangguy kurban obbaran se epabareng ban kurban sasajinna. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam gella' mabadha opacara nyocce'e oreng jareya e ajunanna PANGERAN." 
Leviticus14:32 Jareya atoranna opacara kaangguy oreng se ta' andhi' se la baras dhari panyaket kole' budhuk se enyata'agiya la berse.” 
Leviticus14:33 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Leviticus14:34 “Mon bangsa Isra'il la maso' ka Kana'an, nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka bangsa jareya, mon bagiyanna bengkona badha se kot-lokoden kodu atoro' ka atoran-atoran reya." 
Leviticus14:35 Pa'-sapa'a se nemmo badha bagiyan se kot-lokoden e bengkona, kodu abala ka imam." 
Leviticus14:36 Sabellunna dhateng mareksa bagiyan se kot-lokoden, imam jareya kodu marenta'agi sopaja apa'a bai se badha e dhalem bengko jareya epakalowar. Mon enja', apa'a bai se badha e dhalem bengko jareya daddi najjis. Saellana jareya imam pas kodu entar ka bengko jareya" 
Leviticus14:37 kaangguy mareksa bagiyan se kot-lokoden jareya. Mon badha bagiyan se lak-bellak se barnana ra'-sora' biru otaba ra'-sora' mera se abasanna akaton nyerrep ka dhalem geddhungnga," 
Leviticus14:38 imam kodu nyengla dhari bengko jareya ban bengko jareya kodu ekonci pettong are abidda. 
Leviticus14:39 E are se kapeng petto' imam kodu entar ka jadhiya, mareksa pole. Mon ambungnga jareya alatlat," 
Leviticus14:40 imam jareya kodu marenta'agi sopaja to-batona geddhung se kot-lokoden jareya ebungkar ban bagiyan dhalemma geddhungnga bengko jareya kodu ekerrek kabbi, to-bato wang-buwanganna sarta lolo rek-kerreganna kodu ebuwang ka settong kennengngan se najjis e lowar kottha." 
Leviticus14:41  
Leviticus14:42 To-bato se epakalowar jareya pas kodu egante'e bato se anyar, ban geddhungnga kodu ekole'e bi' lolo se anyar." 
Leviticus14:43 Mon kot-lokot jareya tombu pole, mangkana to-batona bengko jareya la egante'e ban dhung-geddhungnga la ekerrek ban ekole'e pole," 
Leviticus14:44 imam kodu entar mareksa bengko jareya pole. Mon kot-lokot jareya alatlat, bengko jareya najjis" 
Leviticus14:45 ban kodu epagujur. To-batona, ju-kajuna ban sakabbinna lolona kodu egiba ka kennengngan se najjis e lowar kottha." 
Leviticus14:46 Pa'-sapa'a se maso' ka bengko jareya sabatara gi' ekonci, oreng jareya najjis sampe' baja compet are." 
Leviticus14:47 Pa'-sapa'a se tedhung otabana ngakan e bengko jareya kodu nyassa kalambina. 
Leviticus14:48 Tape mon imam dhateng mareksa ban kot-lokot jareya ta' tombu pole samarena dhung-geddhungnga egante'e kole', imam kodu anyata'agi ja' bengko jareya berse, sabab kot-lokot jareya la elang kabbi." 
Leviticus14:49 Kaangguy nyocce'e bengko jareya, imam kodu ngala' mano' dhadhuwa', kaju comara, tale mera ban hisop." 
Leviticus14:50 Mano'na se settong kodu esambelli e attassa pennay tana se aesse aeng se gi' buru ngala' dhari somber. 
Leviticus14:51 Kaju comarana, talena se mera, hisop ban mano'na se gi' odhi' kodu ecabbur ka dhalem dharana mano' se la esambelli gella' ban ka dhalem aeng se gi' buru ngala' dhari somber jareya. Ban bengko jareya kodu eketesse pettong kale." 
Leviticus14:52 Mano' se gi' odhi' kodu eocol ka ra-ara e lowar kottha. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam mabadha opacara nyocce'e bengko jareya, ban bengko jareya laju berse." 
Leviticus14:53  
Leviticus14:54 Jareya atoran-atoranna panyaket kole' budhuk," 
Leviticus14:55 bu-tombu, poro otabana lak-bellak pote otabana ra-bara e badan; bariya keya atoranna bi-kalambi se ambung ban bengko se kot-lokoden." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Atoran-atoran reya gunana kaangguy nantowagi apa settong barang berse otaba najjis.” 
Leviticus15:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Leviticus15:2 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il: Mon badha oreng lalake' kalowaran le-ngalelle polana panyaket matakao, se ngalelle jareya najjis," 
Leviticus15:3 iya areya se la agili ka lowar otabana se gi' badha e dhalem. 
Leviticus15:4 Kennengngan se ekatoju'i otaba ekatedhunge oreng jareya najjis. 
Leviticus15:5 Oreng se nyedding ka oreng se kalowaran le-ngalelle jareya otaba nyedding ka katedhunganna, otabana toju' e kennengngan lampadda ekatoju'i oreng jareya, otaba ecopae oreng jareya, kodu nyassa angguyya pas mandhi, ban oreng jareya najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:6  
Leviticus15:7  
Leviticus15:8  
Leviticus15:9 Pa-kapa otabana apa'a bai se ekatoju'i oreng se kalowaran le-ngalelle jareya daddi najjis. 
Leviticus15:10 Pa'-sapa'a se nyedding ka sabarang lampadda ekatoju'i oreng jareya, daddi najjis sampe' compet are. Pa'-sapa'a se ngeba barang lampadda ekatoju'i oreng jareya, kodu nyassa angguyya, pas mandhi, ban oreng jareya najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:11 Mon oreng se kalowaran le-ngalelle jareya tanangnga ta' abacco gallu laju nyedding ka oreng laen, oreng se esedding jareya kodu nyassa angguyya pas mandhi, ban oreng jareya najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:12 Polo' tana se esedding oreng jareya kodu epabella ban pakakas kaju se ekenneng sedding kodu ekorae. 
Leviticus15:13 Mon la baras oreng jareya kodu anante' pettong are aggi'. Saellana pas kodu nyassa angguyya sarta mandhi e somber, ban oreng jareya laju berse." 
Leviticus15:14 E are se kapeng ballu' oreng jareya kodu ngeba pejji otabana budhu'na poter dhadhuwa' ka adha'anna Kemah Socce, sarta pas epassra'agi ka imam." 
Leviticus15:15 Imam kodu ngatorragi mano' se settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa, ban se settonganna kaangguy kurban obbaran. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam mabadha opacara nyocce'e oreng jareya e Tang Kemah Socce." 
Leviticus15:16 Mon oreng lalake' kalowar manne, oreng jareya kodu mandhi sabadan, tape teptep najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:17 Barang apa'a bai se ekagabay dhari kaen otaba kole' se ngenneng ka manne jareya kodu esassa; barang jareya najjis sampe' compet are. 
Leviticus15:18 Saellana oreng lalake' ban babine' mare apolong tedhung, se lalake', bariya keya se babine', pas kodu mandhi, tape lalake' otaba babine' jareya teptep najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:19 Babine' se dhateng kotorra najjis pettong are abidda. Pa'-sapa'a se nyedding ka babine' jareya najjis sampe' compet are. 
Leviticus15:20 Apa'a bai se ekatoju'i otaba ekatedhunge babine' jareya saabidda aba'na gi' dhateng kotorra, daddi najjis." 
Leviticus15:21 Pa'-sapa'a se nyedding ka lampadda se ekatedhunge otaba ekatoju'i babine' se teppa'na dhateng kotorra jareya, kalambina kodu esassa ban orengnga kodu mandhi, ban oreng jareya najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Mon oreng lalake' tedhung apolong ban babine' se teppa'na dhateng kotorra, lalake' jareya daddi najjis keya pettong are abidda, ban sabarang se ekatedhunge lalake' jareya daddi najjis." 
Leviticus15:25 Mon oreng babine' kalowaran dhara sampe' pan-barampan are e lowarra baktona dhateng kotorra, otabana dharana ta' ampet saellana lebat baktona dhateng kotorra, babine' jareya najjis saabidda dharana gi' kalowar, akantha se mon dhateng kotorra." 
Leviticus15:26 Kennengngan se ekatedhunge otaba ekatoju'i babine' jareya saabidda bakto jareya daddi najjis. 
Leviticus15:27 Pa'-sapa'a se nyedding ka kennengngan jareya daddi najjis. Oreng jareya kalambina kodu esassa, pas mandhi, ban oreng jareya najjis sampe' compet are." 
Leviticus15:28 Saellana dharana ampet, babine' jareya kodu anante' pettong are aggi'. Buru saellana jareya aba'na berse." 
Leviticus15:29 E are se kapeng ballu' babine' jareya kodu ngeba pejji otaba budhu'na poter dhadhuwa' ka imam e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. 
Leviticus15:30 Mano' se settong kodu eatorragi menangka kurban pangamponanna dusa, ban settonganna kaangguy kurban obbaran. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya imam mabadha opacara nyocce'e babine' jareya e Tang Kemah Socce." 
Leviticus15:31 Ba'na kodu maenga' bangsa Isra'il sopaja agateyagi bila aba'na se najjis ban bila se enja', sopaja ta' manajjis Kemah Socce se badha e nga'-tengnga'anna parkemahanna bangsa jareya. Mon reng-oreng jareya manajjis Kemah jareya, reng-oreng jareya bakal mateya.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Jareya atoranna oreng lalake' se kalowar le-ngalelle polana sake' matakao otaba mon kalowar mannena," 
Leviticus15:33 parkara babine' se teppa'na dhateng kotorra, ban parkara lalake' se tedhung ban babine' se teppa'na dhateng kotorra." 
Leviticus16:1 Saellana pottrana Harun se kadhuwa padha mate e bakto ngatorragi apoy se ta' ekasokane PANGERAN, PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa," 
Leviticus16:2 dhabuna, “Kabala ka Harun taretanna ba'na rowa, mon maso'a ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce se epesa ban bir-tabir rowa, pera' olle mon teppa'na bakto se la etantowagi malolo, sabab e jadhiya Sengko' ngaton e dhalem ondhem e attassa kodhungnga Petthe Parjanjiyan. Mon Harun ta' atoro' ka parenta reya, tanto mate." 
Leviticus16:3 Mon Harun maso'a ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce jareya kodu ngeba tor-ator sape lake' se gi' ngodha kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa ban dumba lake' kaangguy kurban obbaran.” 
Leviticus16:4 Laen dhari jareya Harun kodu atoro' ka atoran-atoran reya. Sabellunna maso' ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce kodu mandhi gallu, pas ngangguy pangangguyya imam, iya areya kalambi, katho' pandha', sabbu' ban surban, se ekagabay dhari kaen linen kabbi." 
Leviticus16:5 Saellana jareya ommat Isra'il kodu massra'agi embi' lake' dhadhuwa' ka Harun kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa ban dumba lake kaangguy kurban obbaran. 
Leviticus16:6 Harun kodu ngatorragi sape lake' kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa kaangguy aba'na dibi' ban sabalana. 
Leviticus16:7 Embi' lake' se dhadhuwa' gella' kodu egiba ka adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. 
Leviticus16:8 E jadhiya Harun kodu ngellot ngangguy bato dhadhuwa', bato se settong epobuwi tandha “kaator ka PANGERAN” ban settonganna “kaator ka Azazel”." 
Leviticus16:9 Embi' se kapele kaangguy PANGERAN kodu egabay kurban pangamponanna dusa. 
Leviticus16:10 Embi' se kapele kaangguy Azazel kodu esaba' dhi'-odhi' e ajunanna PANGERAN, pas eagga ka ra-ara kaangguy Azazel, sopaja dusana bangsa Isra'il esapora'a." 
Leviticus16:11 Saellana ngatorragi ban nyambelli sape lake' kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusana dibi' ban sabalana," 
Leviticus16:12 Harun kodu ngala' baddhana apoy dhari mezba, baddhana apoy jareya kodu eesse'e mardha sarta dupa se alos dhu pergem, pas giba ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce." 
Leviticus16:13 Dupa jareya kodu eobbar e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan, sampe' okossa notobi kodhungnga Petthe jareya, sampe' ta' etangale'e bi' Harun, sabab mon Harun nangale'e totobba Petthe Parjanjiyan jareya, tanto mate." 
Leviticus16:14 Harun pas kodu ngala' dharana sape jareya sakone'; dhara jareya pas kodu eketessagi ban garigi'na ka bagiyan adha'na totobba Petthe Parjanjiyan ban pettong kale ka adha'anna Petthe. 
Leviticus16:15 Samarena jareya Harun kodu nyambelli embi' kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusana ommat Isra'il. Dharana embi' jareya kodu egiba ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce, pas eketessagi ka bagiyan adha'na totobba Petthe Parjanjiyan ban ka bagiyan adha'na Petthe, akantha se ngettessagi dharana sape lake' rowa." 
Leviticus16:16 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Harun nyocce'e Rowangan Se Mahasocce dhari najjissa bangsa Isra'il ban dhari sa-dusana bangsa jareya. Kemah Socce kodu esocce'e polana badha e nga'-tengnga'anna parkemahanna bangsa Isra'il ban ekenneng najjissa bangsa jareya. 
Leviticus16:17 Molae dhari bakto Harun maso' ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce ngatorragiya kurban kaangguy pangamponanna dusa jareya sampe' kalowar dhari jadhiya, ta' olle badha oreng settonga e dhalem Kemah jareya. Saellana mare ajalannagi opacara kaangguy aba'na dibi', kaangguy sabalana ban kaangguy bangsa Isra'il," 
Leviticus16:18 Harun kodu kalowar, pas entar ka mezba kennengnganna kurban obbaran kaangguy nyocce'e mezba jareya. Dharana sape ban dharana embi' gella' kodu ekala' sakone' pas ebuliddagi ka dhu'-tandhu' e du-padduna mezba." 
Leviticus16:19 Dhara jareya kodu eketessagi bi' garigi'na sakone' sampe' pettong kale ka attassa mezba. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya mezba jareya epasocce dhari najjissa bangsa Isra'il, sopaja daddiya socce." 
Leviticus16:20 Saellana mabadha opacara nyocce'e Rowangan Se Mahasocce ban bagiyan en-laenna e Kemah Socce ban mezbana, Harun kodu ngatorragi ka PANGERAN embi' se gi' odhi' se kapele kaangguy Azazel." 
Leviticus16:21 Tanangnga kodu etompangngagi ka cethagga embi' jareya sambi ngakowagi sakabbinna kasala'anna, dusana ban sabarang tengkana bangsa Isra'il se ta' atoro' ka papakonna PANGERAN. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya sakabbinna kasala'anna bangsa Isra'il ealle ka attassa cethagga embi' jareya. Pas kodu badha oreng se etugassagi ngagga embi' jareya ka ra-ara." 
Leviticus16:22 Embi' jareya ngeba sa-dusana bangsa Isra'il ka tana kajal se ta' ekennengnge oreng, ban kodu eocol e ra-ara." 
Leviticus16:23 Saellana jareya Harun kodu maso' ka dhalem Kemah, mokka' pangangguyya imamma se eangguy baktona maso' ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce, ban pangangguy jareya kodu edina e jadhiya." 
Leviticus16:24 Saellana jareya Harun kodu mandhi e kennengngan se etantowagi kaangguy kaparlowan jareya malolo, pas asalen ngangguy kalambina dibi'. Samarena pas kodu kalowar ngatorragi kurban obbaran kaangguy pangamponanna dusana dibi' ban dusana bangsa Isra'il." 
Leviticus16:25 Gajina keban se egabay kurban pangamponanna dusa jareya kodu eobbar e mezba. 
Leviticus16:26 Oreng se ngocol embi' se kapele kaangguy Azazel e ra-ara rowa kodu nyassa kalambina sarta mandhi sabellunna mole ka parkemahan. 
Leviticus16:27 Sape lake' ban embi' se egabaya kurban pangamponanna dusa, se dharana egiba maso' ka Rowangan Se Mahasocce kaangguy pangamponanna dusa, kodu egiba ka lowaranna parkemahan pas eobbar. Kole'na, dagingnga, essena tabu'na keban se dhadhuwa' jareya kodu eobbar kabbi." 
Leviticus16:28 Oreng se ngobbar jareya kodu nyassa kalambina pas mandhi sabellunna mole ka parkemahan. 
Leviticus16:29 Atoran-atoran reya kodu etoro' salanjangnga. E tanggal sapolo bulan petto', oreng Isra'il ban oreng manca se apolong e antarana bangsa Isra'il jareya kodu apowasa ban ta' olle alalakon, sabab are jareya are se talebat soccena. E are jareya kodu ebadha'agi opacara kaangguy nyocce'e bangsa Isra'il dhari sakabbinna dusana sopaja daddiya berse." 
Leviticus16:30  
Leviticus16:31  
Leviticus16:32 Imam Agung se la etahbissagi kaangguy aladine Allah malolo menangka gantena eppa'na, kodu ajalannagi opacara kaangguy nyocce'e bangsa jareya. E bakto ajalannagi opacara imam jareya kodu ngangguy pangangguy dhari kaen linen se pera' ekagabay kaparlowan jareya malolo," 
Leviticus16:33 pas ajalannagi opacara kaangguy nyocce'e Rowangan Se Mahasocce, bagiyan en-laenna e Kemah Socce, mezba, mam-imam ban sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il." 
Leviticus16:34 Opacara jareya kodu ebadha'agi sataon sakaleyan kaangguy nyocce'e bangsa Isra'il dhari sa-dusana. Jareya atoran-atoran se kodu etoro' salanjangnga. Mosa alampa'agi akantha se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka salerana. 
Leviticus17:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus17:2 “Kabala ka Harun ban na'-ana'na ban ka sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il. 
Leviticus17:3 Mon oreng Isra'il ngatorragi sape, dumba otabana embi' ka PANGERAN, keban jareya kodu esambelli e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. Mon esambelli e kennengngan laen, oreng jareya ta' atoro' ka hokom polana magili dhara, daddi ta' eanggep ommadda Allah pole." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Maksodda papakon jareya sopaja bangsa Isra'il ngeba ka Kemah Socce ban-keban tor-atorra se biyasana esambelli e talon. Tor-ator jareya wajib egiba ka imam e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce ban esambelli e jadhiya menangka kurban salameddan. 
Leviticus17:6 Imam kodu nyerammagi dharana keban jareya ka sakalenglengnga penggirra mezba e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce, ban ngobbar gajina sopaja bauna masennengnga panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Leviticus17:7 Bangsa Isra'il kodu teptep esto ka PANGERAN ban ta' olle nyambelli keban se ekagabay kurban ka jin-ejjin se jahat. Atoran jareya kodu etoro' salanjangnga. 
Leviticus17:8 Mon oreng Isra'il otaba oreng manca se apolong ban oreng Isra'il ngatorragi kurban obbaran otaba kurban laenna 
Leviticus17:9 ka PANGERAN, kurban jareya kodu eatorragi e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. Mon eatorragi e kennengngan laenna, oreng jareya ta' eanggep ommadda Allah pole.”" 
Leviticus17:10 “Mon oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca se apolong ban oreng Isra'il ngakan daging se gi' badha dharana, oreng jareya bakal eokoma bi' Sengko' ban ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole." 
Leviticus17:11 Nyabana saneyap mahlok badha e dhalem dharana. Daddi Sengko' nyoro nyerammagiya dhara ka attassa mezba sopaja sa-dusana ommat esapora'a. Dhara, iya areya nyaba, malebbar dusa." 
Leviticus17:12 Lantaran jareya bangsa Isra'il otabana oreng manca se apolong ban bangsa Isra'il ta' olle ngakan daging se gi' badha dharana. 
Leviticus17:13 Mon oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca se apolong ban oreng Isra'il e bakto ababurun mega' mano' otaba keban laen se ta' haram, dharana keban jareya kodu epakalowar ka tana sarta pas etotobi tana." 
Leviticus17:14 Nyabana saneyap mahlok badha e dhalem dharana, daddi Sengko' alarang bangsa Isra'il ngakan daging se gi' badha dharana. Pa'-sapa'a se ngalakone barang larangan reya ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole." 
Leviticus17:15 Saneyap oreng Isra'il otaba oreng manca se ngakan dagingnga keban se mate biyasa otabana mate eceppa' burun alas, kalambina kodu esassa sarta pas mandhi ban anante' sampe' compet are, buru daddi berse." 
Leviticus17:16 Mon ta' ajalannagi se kantha jareya, oreng jareya kodu nanggung okoman dhari Sengko', PANGERAN.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus18:2 “Kabala ka reng-oreng Isra'il Tang oca' reya: Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus18:3 Ba'na ja' nero tengkana oreng e Messer se tao ekennengnge ba'na, otabana oreng e Kana'an, nagara se sateya reya eentarana ba'na, ban ba'na bi' Sengko' eaterragiya ka jadhiya sateya reya." 
Leviticus18:4 Toro' Tang kom-hokom ban lakone sakabbinna Tang parenta. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus18:5 Toro' sakabbinna atoran ban kom-hokom se bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka ba'na. Mon bi' ba'na jareya elakone, odhi'na ba'na bakal salamedda. Sengko' reya PANGERAN.”" 
Leviticus18:6 PANGERAN apareng atoran-atoran reya. Lalake' ban babine' se gi' kaetong bala semma' ta' olle apolong tedhung. 
Leviticus18:7 Ba'na ta' olle tedhung apolong ban ebuna dibi', sabab jareya ha'na eppa'na." 
Leviticus18:8 Ba'na ta' olle ya-nyeya eppa'na kalaban tedhung apolong ban sala settong dhari binena eppa'na se laen. 
Leviticus18:9 Ta' olle tedhung apolong ban taretan bine'na otaba taretan kaballun bine'na, se eparaja sabengko ban ba'na otaba se eparaja e kennengngan laen." 
Leviticus18:10 Ja' tedhung apolong ban kompoyya; jareya matodhusan ka ba'na dibi'. 
Leviticus18:11 Ba'na ta' olle apolong tedhung ban taretan bine'na se tonggal eppa' otaba se tonggal ebu, sabab jareya taretanna ba'na keya." 
Leviticus18:12 Ba'na ta' olle apolong tedhung ban majadhi' bine'na se sataretan ban eppa'na otaba ban ebuna. 
Leviticus18:13  
Leviticus18:14 Ba'na ta' olle tedhung apolong ban binena taretanna eppa'na, sabab jareya binena majadhi'na ba'na." 
Leviticus18:15 Ba'na ta' olle tedhung apolong ban mantona," 
Leviticus18:16 otaba ban binena taretanna. 
Leviticus18:17 Ba'na ta' olle apolong tedhung ban ana'na otaba ban kompoyya dhari ana' lake'na otaba dhari ana' bine'na. Olle daddi jareya gi' sabala'an ban ba'na, ban jareya tamaso' lalakon se cemmer." 
Leviticus18:18 Ta' olle abine taretanna binena, mon binena ba'na jareya gi' odhi'." 
Leviticus18:19 Ja' apolong tedhung ban babine' se gi' teppa'na dhateng kotorra, sabab babine' jareya najjis." 
Leviticus18:20 Ja' apolong tedhung ban binena oreng; sabab jareya andaddiyagi ba'na najjis. 
Leviticus18:21 Ja' magi sala settong dhari ana'na ba'na kaangguy ekagabay kurban ka Molokh, sabab jareya tamaso' lalakon se ya-nyeya asmana Allah, PANGERANna ba'na." 
Leviticus18:22 Oreng lalake' ta' olle apolong tedhung ban lalake'; jareya lalakon se ekabaji'i bi' Allah. 
Leviticus18:23 Lalake' otaba babine' ta' olle apolong tedhung ban keban; jareya lalakon se manajjis ba'na. 
Leviticus18:24 Ja' manajjis aba' ban kon-lalakon jareya, sabab kalaban cara se kantha jareya sa-bangsa se ngennengnge Kana'an sabellunna ba'na manajjis aba'na. Lantaran jareya bangsa jareya eojuk bi' Sengko' sopaja ba'na ngennenga ngennengnge nagara jareya." 
Leviticus18:25 Bangsa jareya ngalakone sabarang se majitjit, sampe' tanana daddi najjis. Daddi bi' Sengko' eokom, ta' eedine ngennengnge nagara jareya. Tape ba'na maske baramma'a ta' olle ngalakone sabarang se kantha jareya. Ba'na kabbi, oreng Isra'il ban oreng manca se akompol ban oreng Isra'il, kodu atoro' ka atoran ban parenta se dhari Sengko'," 
Leviticus18:26  
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 sopaja ba'na bi' Sengko' ta' eokom ban ta' eojuk dhari tana jareya akantha reng-oreng se ta' kennal ka Sengko', PANGERAN, se ngennengnge nagara jareya sabellunna ba'na." 
Leviticus18:29 Ba'na tao ja' pa'-sapa'a se ngalakone sabarang lalakon se majitjit jareya bakal ta' eanggebba Tang ommat pole. 
Leviticus18:30 PANGERAN laju adhabu, “Toro' sakabbinna parenta dhari Sengko' jareya, ja' nero tengkana reng-oreng se ngennengnge tana Kana'an sabellunna ba'na, ban ba'na ja' manajjis aba' ban kon-lalakon jareya. Sengko' reya PANGERAN Allahna ba'na.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala ka ommat Isra'il Tang parenta reya: Ba'na kodu socce, sabab Sengko', PANGERAN Allahna ba'na, socce." 
Leviticus19:2  
Leviticus19:3 Saneyap oreng kodu padha hormat ka rama ebuna, ban kodu araya'agi are Sabat akantha se la eparenta'agi bi' Sengko'. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:4 Ja' nyemba brahala. Ja' agabay arca dhari logam ban ja' nyemba arca se kantha jareya. Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:5 Mon ba'na ngatorragi kurban salameddan aropa keban, toro' atoran-atoran se la etantowagi bi' Sengko', sopaja kurban jareya bisa'a etarema bi' Sengko'." 
Leviticus19:6 Dagingnga kodu kakan e are bakto keban jareya esambelli otaba kalagguwanna. Karena daging se gi' badha saellana lebat tello are kodu eobbar epatadha', sabab daging jareya haram." 
Leviticus19:7 Mon karena daging jareya gi' ekakan, kurban jareya bi' Sengko' ta' etarema." 
Leviticus19:8 Pa'-sapa'a ngakan daging jareya sala polana ta' ngargai barang se la eatorragi ka Sengko' malolo. Oreng jareya ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole. 
Leviticus19:9 Mon ba'na anye, ja' metthek gandum se tombu e gir-penggirra teggalla, ban ja' abali makompola re-karena gandum se gi' badha e teggalla saellana anye." 
Leviticus19:10 Ja' abali ka kebbunna anggurra kaangguy makompol re-karena buwana anggur se gi' badha e bungkana saellana epetthek dha'-adha'na. Bariya keya wa'-buwa'an se la gaggar ja' kala'. Dina me' olle ekala' oreng mesken otabana oreng manca. Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:11 Ja' co'-ngeco', nepo otabana lecegan." 
Leviticus19:12 Ja' ajanji bit Tang nyama mon ba'na ta' amaksod neptebbana janji jareya, sabab kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na ya-nyeya Tang nyama. Sengko' GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:13 Ja' merres sasamana otabana arampas barangnga. Opana oreng se alako ka ba'na ja' tahan maske pera' samalem. 
Leviticus19:14 Ja' abasto oreng kopok ban ja' nyaba' bato e jalan se elebadi oreng buta sopaja oreng buta jareya ta' tatandhung. Ba'na kodu tako' ban hormat ka Sengko', sabab Sengko' GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:15 Pajujur mon ngadili parkara; ja' nolonge oreng se mesken, ban ja' patako' ka oreng sogi." 
Leviticus19:16 Ja' mabalattra petenna e antarana reng-oreng sabangsana ba'na dibi', me' olle ba'na ta' daddi lantaranna matena sasamana. Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus19:17 Ja' nyempen sake' ate ka sapa'a bai. Mon ba'na atokar ban sapa'a bai, pamare gallu orosan jareya, me' olle ba'na ta' dusa polana oreng laen." 
Leviticus19:18 Ja' males sake' ate ka oreng ban ja' baji' ka oreng laen, tape taresnae sasamana pakantha taresnana ba'na ka aba'na dibi'. Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus19:19 Toro' Tang parenta kabbi. Ja' malake'e ebin ban ebin laen se ta' padha macemma. Ja' namen bibit dhu macem e dhalem settong kebbun otaba teggal. Ja' ngangguy kalambi se etennon bi' bennang dhu macem. 
Leviticus19:20 Mon badha oreng lalake' ajanji ajuwala dunor bine'na ka lalake' laen kaangguy ekasellera, dineng oreng se melle dunor jareya gi' ta' majar, ban oreng se ajuwal dunor jareya tedhung apolong ban dunor jareya, se kadhuwa jareya kodu padha eokom, tape ta' olle eokom mate, sabab maske baramma'a babine' jareya gi' dunorra." 
Leviticus19:21 Lalake' jareya kodu ngeba dumba lake' ka adha'na Tang Kemah Socce menangka kurban tebbusanna kasala'an. 
Leviticus19:22 Imam kodu ngurbannagi dumba jareya e dhalem opacara panyocceyan, sopaja dusana oreng jareya esapora'a. Sengko', Allah, tanto pas nyapora dusana oreng jareya." 
Leviticus19:23 Mon ba'na la maso' ka nagara Kana'an, ban la namen acem-macem bungkana wa'-buwa'an e jadhiya, saabidda tello taon se dha'-adha'na wa'-buwa'an jareya kodu eanggep haram, ta' olle kakan." 
Leviticus19:24 E taon se kapeng empa' buwana kabbi kodu eatorragi ka Sengko', PANGERAN, menangka tandha sokkor." 
Leviticus19:25 E taon se kapeng lema' buru buwana olle ekakan ba'na. Mon atoran reya bi' ba'na etoro' kabbi, bungkana wa'-buwa'anna ba'na bakal sajana bannya' buwana. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:26 Ja' ngakan dhara. Ja' ngangguy mo-elmo gaib. 
Leviticus19:27 Ja' agunteng obu' e bagiyan erengnga cethagga, ban ja' nyokor janggu'." 
Leviticus19:28 Ba'na ja' alokae kole'na kaangguy masange dha-tandha otabana alokae badanna menangka tandha ja' ba'na sossa polana kapateyan. Sengko' reya PANGERAN. 
Leviticus19:29 Ja' magaggar darajadda' ana' bine'na ba'na kalaban nyoro ana'na ba'na jareya daddi sondel e kowel. Mon ba'na ngalakone se kantha jareya, ba'na macemmer nagarana, ban tengka se ta' pantes bakal bannya'a e nagara jareya." 
Leviticus19:30 Raya'agi are Sabat ban hormadi kennengngan se la kusus kaangguy kaparlowan abakteya ka Sengko'. Sengko' reya PANGERAN. 
Leviticus19:31 Ja' menta babala'an ka dhukon se ahubungan ban arrohna reng-oreng mate. Mon ba'na ngalakone jareya, ba'na najjis. Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:32 Hormadi oreng towana. Ba'na pahormat ban patako' ka Sengko', sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus19:33 Ja' juba' ate ka oreng manca se badha e nagarana ba'na. 
Leviticus19:34 Ka reng-oreng manca jareya ba'na papadha ban ka reng-oreng sabangsana dibi' ban taresnae reng-oreng jareya akantha kataresna'anna ba'na ka aba'na dibi'. Kaenga'e ja' ba'na dibi' tao daddi oreng manca e Messer. Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus19:35 Ja' nepo oreng laen ngangguy okoran palsu, tembangan otaba ker-taker palsu." 
Leviticus19:36 Angguy meterran, tembangan ban ker-taker se bendhe. Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, ban Sengko' la ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer." 
Leviticus19:37 Toro' sakabbinna Tang hokom ban Tang parenta reya. Sengko' reya PANGERAN.” 
Leviticus20:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus20:2 “Kabala kantha reya ka bangsa Isra'il: Pa'-sapa'a e antarana oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca se apolong ban oreng Isra'il, se ngurbannagi ana'na ka diba Molokh, kodu egarujuk ban bato pasampe'mate ban ra'yat." 
Leviticus20:3 Oreng se ngurbannagi ana'na ka Molokh, manajjis Tang Kemah ban ngapessagi Tang nyama se socce. Oreng jareya bi' Sengko' eokoma ban ta' eanggebba Tang ommat pole." 
Leviticus20:4 Tape mon oreng laenna padha ta' parduli ka apa se la elakone oreng jareya ban ta' mate'e oreng jareya menangka okoman," 
Leviticus20:5 Sengko' dibi' se ngokoma oreng jareya ban ana' binena ban sakabbinna oreng se padha ta' esto keya ka Sengko' ban abakte ka Molokh. Reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' ta' eanggebba Tang ommat pole. 
Leviticus20:6 Oreng se entar menta babala'an ka dhukon se ahubungan ban roh-errohna oreng mate, bi' Sengko' eokoma ban ta'e eanggebba Tang ommat pole." 
Leviticus20:7 Jaga sopaja ba'na teptep socce, sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus20:8 Toro' Tang kom-hokom, sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN se nantowagi ba'na kaangguy Sengko' malolo.”" 
Leviticus20:9 PANGERAN apareng atoran-atoran reya, “Oreng se abasto eppa' ban ebuna kodu eokom mat; oreng jareya mate polana salana dibi'." 
Leviticus20:10 Mon oreng Isra'il azina ban binena oreng sabangsana, oreng jareya ban babine'na kodu eokom mate." 
Leviticus20:11 Oreng lalake' se tedhung apolong ban sala settong dhari binena eppa'na, ngapessagi eppa'na. Lalake' jareya ban babine'na kodu eokom mate." 
Leviticus20:12 Mon oreng lalake' tedhung apolong ban mato bine'na, se kadhuwa kodu eokom mate. Se kadhuwa jareya azina, ban mate lantaran salan dibi'." 
Leviticus20:13 Mon oreng lalake' apolong tedhung ban lalake' laen, se kadhuwa jareya ngalakone barang cemmer, daddi kodu padha eokom mate. Se kadhuwa jareya mate polana salan dibi'." 
Leviticus20:14 Mon oreng lalake' abine oreng babine' ban ebuna babine' jareya, se katello jareya kodu eobbar sampe' mate kabbi, sabab se katello jareya ngalakone barang se cemmer. Lalakon se kantha jareya ta' olle badha e antarana ba'na." 
Leviticus20:15 Mon oreng lalake' tedhung apolong ban keban, oreng ban keban jareya kodu epate'e." 
Leviticus20:16 Mon oreng babine' tedhung apolong ban keban, babine' ban keban jareya kodu epate'e. Reng-oreng jareya mate lantaran salana dibi'." 
Leviticus20:17 Mon oreng lalake' abine taretan bine'na dibi', otaba taretan bine'na se tonggal eppa' otaba tonggal ebu, reng-oreng jareya ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole. Reng-oreng jareya alako barang se cemmer, kodu nanggung okoman polana salana dibi'." 
Leviticus20:18 Mon oreng lalake' apolong tedhung ban babine' se parappa'na dhateng kotorra, se kadhuwa jareya ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole, sabab ta' atoro' atoran se madaddi oreng berse menorot atoranna agama." 
Leviticus20:19 Mon oreng lalake' apolong tedhung ban majadhi' bine'na, se kadhuwa jareya kodu nanggung okomanna kasala'anna dibi'." 
Leviticus20:20 Mon oreng lalake' tedhung ban binena majadhi'na, oreng jareya ngapessagi majadhi' lake'na. Lalake' ban babine' jareya kodu nanggung okomanna salana dibi'. Saomorra se kadhuwa jareya ta' kera andhi' ana'." 
Leviticus20:21 Mon oreng lalake' ngala' binena taretanna, jareya ngalakone barang se cemmer, ban ngapessgi taretanna. Sampe' mate se kadhuwa jareya ta' kera andhi' ana'.”" 
Leviticus20:22 PANGERAN adhabu, “Toro' sakabbinna Tang hokom ban parenta, sopaja ba'na bi' Sengko' ta' eojuga dhari nagara Kana'an, sateya reya Sengko' ngeba'a ba'na dha' essa'." 
Leviticus20:23 Ja' nero adad kabiyasa'anna bangsa se badha e dhissa'; bagnsa jareya bi' Sengko' eojuga, sopaja ba'na ngennenga maso' ka nagarana, sabab Sengko' jitjit ka tengkana bangsa se jahar jareya." 
Leviticus20:24 Tape tana se landhu tor ma'mor reya bi' Sengko' la ejanjiyagi ka ba'na, daddi bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na me' olle ekaandhi' ba'na. Sengko' reya PANGERAN Allahna ba'na se malaen ba'na dhari sa-bangsa laenna." 
Leviticus20:25 Daddi ba'na kodu tao abida'agi antarana ban-keban sarta no'-mano' se halal ban se haram. Ja' ngakan keban otaban mano' se haram. Bi' Sengko' ban-keban jareya la enyata'agi ja' haram, daddi mon bi' ba'na ekakan, ba'na daddi najjis." 
Leviticus20:26 Bi' Sengko' ba'na epalaen dhari sa-bangsa laenna sopaja ba'na daddiya Tang andhi' malolo. Ba'na kodu socce sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN ban Sengko' reya socce. 
Leviticus20:27 Oreng lalake' otaba babine' se ahubungan ban roh-errohna oreng mate kodu egarujuk sampe' mate. Sapa'a bai se ngalakone jareya kodu nanggung okomanna, mate polana salan dibi'.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala ka mam-imam toronanna Harun: Oreng se daddi imam ta' olle manajjis aba'na lantaran noro' entar ka opacarana ngoburragi oreng mate mon se mate jareya balana," 
Leviticus21:2 kajabana mon se mate jareya ebuna, eppa'na, ana'na, taretan lake'na," 
Leviticus21:3 otabana taretan bine'na se gi' ta' alake se apolong e bengkona. 
Leviticus21:4 Imam ta' olle manajjis aba'na lantaran entar ka opacarana ngoburragi oreng mate, mon se mate jareya la-balana binena." 
Leviticus21:5 Imam ta' olle agundhul sabagiyan dhari cethagga ban ta' olle nyokor janggu'na otaba alokae badanna ngangguy barang se tajem kaangguy noduwagi ja' aba'na sossa. 
Leviticus21:6 Imam jareya Tang andhi' malolo, ban ta' olle majuba' Tang nyama. Imam ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka Sengko', molana kodu socce." 
Leviticus21:7 Imam ta' olle abine babine' bekkas sondel, otabana babine' se ta' paraban otaba babine' se atellak ban lakena, sabab imam reya Tang andhi'." 
Leviticus21:8 Bangsa Isra'il kodu ngakone ja' imam reya oreng se kaangguy Sengko' malolo, sabab imam jareya ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka Sengko'. Sengko' reya PANGERAN; Sengko' socce ban Sengko' masocce Tang ommat." 
Leviticus21:9 Mon ana' babine'na imam badha se daddi sondel, babine' jareya ngapessagi eppa'na ban kodu eobbar sampe' mate." 
Leviticus21:10 Imam Agung reya la etahbissagi kalaban eselene mennya' opacara ka attassa cethagga sarta kalaban epangangguy kalambina Imam Agung, daddi obu'na ta' olle salsal polana ta' esoroy, ban ta' olle nyebbit kalambina polana noduwagiya ja' atena sossa." 
Leviticus21:11 Imam reya la eatorragi ka Sengko', epadaddi andhi'na Sengko', daddi ta' olle manajjis aba'na, ta' olle keya manajjis Tang Kemah lantaran kalowar dhari jadhiya entara maso' ka bengko se badha jinazana, maske jareya jinazana eppa'na dibi' otaba ebuna dibi'." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Imam reya pera' olle abine ban paraban dhari sukuna dibi'. Ta' olle akabin ban randha otaba babine' se etellak bi' lakena, otabana babine' bekkas sondel." 
Leviticus21:14  
Leviticus21:15 Mon atoran reya ta' etoro', na'-ana'na se koduna socce, bakal najjissa. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban imam jareya bi' Sengko' la epadaddi Imam Agung malolo.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus21:17 “Kabala kantha reya ka Harun: Toronanna ba'na se ena badanna ta' olle ngeba kurban kakanan ka Sengko'. Atoran reya kodu eangguy salanjangnga. 
Leviticus21:18 Oreng se ngatorragi kurban ta' olle ena badanna; se emaksod iya areya se buta otaba dippang, se rosak mowana otaba bagiyanna badanna," 
Leviticus21:19 se dhingkol otaba se dippang sokona," 
Leviticus21:20 se bungko' ban se cabul, se sake' mata otaba andhi' panyaket kole'; otaba se ekobiri." 
Leviticus21:21 Saneyap toronanna Imam Harun se ena badanna ta' olle ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka Sengko'. 
Leviticus21:22 Tape olle ngakan kakanan se ekurbannagi, iya areya kurban kakanan se socce otaba se talebat soccena." 
Leviticus21:23 Lantaran oreng jareya ena badanna, ta' olle entar ka seddi'anna bir-tabir se mesa Rowangan Se Socce otabana mezba. Bariya keya ta' olle manajjis rang-barang se la eteptebbagi kaangguy Sengko' malolo, sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban Sengko' se nantowagi rang-barang jareya kaangguy Sengko' malolo.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Jareya atoran-atoran se epanapa' Mosa ka Harun ban tra-pottrana, ban ka saneyap bangsa Isra'il." 
Leviticus22:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus22:2 “Kabala ka Harun ban na'-ana'na: Patete mon ngoros sabarang se eatorragi bangsa Isra'il ka Sengko' malolo, sopaja ba'na ta' majuba'a Tang nyama se socce. Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus22:3 Mon sala settong dhari toronanna ba'na se teppa'na najjis nyander ka seddi'anna tor-ator se socce se bi' bangsa Isra'il eatorragi ka Sengko' malolo, oreng jareya ta' olle aladine pole e mezba. Atoran reya kodu eangguy salanjangnga. Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus22:4 Toronanna Harun se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk, otabana sake' matakao sampe' kalowaran le-ngalelle, ta' olle ngakan tor-ator se socce sabellunna aba'na enyata'agi berse. Imam daddi najjis mon nyedding ka barang se najjis lantaran nyedding ka mayyit, otabana mon aba'na kalowar manne," 
Leviticus22:5 otabana mon nyedding ka keban otaba ka oreng se najjis. 
Leviticus22:6 Imam se najjis polana jareya, paggun najjis sampe' compet are. Ban saellana compet are gi' ta' olle ngakan kakanan se eatorragi ka Sengko' sabellunna mandhi." 
Leviticus22:7 Saellana compet are imam jareya berse ban olle ngakan kakanan se eatorragi ka Sengko' jareya, sabab pajat jareya kakanna." 
Leviticus22:8 Imam ta' olle ngakan dagingnga keban se mate biyasa, otaba se eceppa' burun alas. Mon imam ngakan daging jareya, daddi najjis. Sengko' reya PANGERAN." 
Leviticus22:9 Mam-imam kodu padha atoro' ka sakabbinna atoran se dhari Sengko'. Mon enja', mam-imam jareya sala, ban bakal mateya lantaran ta' atoro' ka atoran-atoran se socce. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban Sengko' se nantowagi mam-imam jareya kaangguy Sengko' malolo." 
Leviticus22:10 Pera' balana imam jareya dibi' se olle noro' ngakan tor-ator se eatorragi ka Sengko' malolo; oreng laenna ta' olle, maske apolong bengko ban imam jareya, bariya keya kabulana." 
Leviticus22:11 Tape nor-dunor se ebelli bi' obangnga imam jareya dibi, otabana se lahir e bengkona imam jareya, olle noro' ngakan kakanan bagiyanna imam jareya." 
Leviticus22:12 Ana' bine'na imam se alake oreng se banne imam, ta' olle noro' ngakan tor-ator jareya." 
Leviticus22:13 Tape mon babine' jareya la randha otaba etellak bi' lakena ban ta' andhi' ana', sarta abali ka bengkona eppa'na ban daddi tanggunganna imam jareya, olle ngakan kakanan bagiyanna eppa'na. Pera' ana' binena imam se olle ngakan kakanan se eatorragi ka Sengko'." 
Leviticus22:14 Mon oreng se banne ana' binena imam ta' etengnget ngakan kakanan se la eatorragi ka Sengko', oreng jareya kodu agante'e ka imam, etambai dhu polo persenna." 
Leviticus22:15 Mam-imam ta' olle manajjis tor-ator se emaksottagi ka angguy Sengko' malolo," 
Leviticus22:16 sabab mon tor-ator jareya epanneng ekakan bi' oreng se ta' andhi' ha', daddi najjis. Parkara jareya andaddiyagi oreng jareya sala ban madhateng okoman ka aba'na. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, ban Sengko' se masocce tor-ator jareya.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus22:18 “Kabala ka Harun ban ka na'-ana' sarta ka sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il atoran-atoran reya: Mon oreng Isra'il otaba oreng manca se apolong ban bangsa Isra'il ngatorragi kurban obbaran kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat otaba kaangguy kurban sokalella," 
Leviticus22:19 keban se ekurbannagi kodu lalake' ban ta' olle badha calena sopaja etarema'a bi' Sengko'. 
Leviticus22:20 Ja' ngatorragi keban se badha calena, sabab Sengko' ta' endha' narema." 
Leviticus22:21 Mon oreng ngatorragi ka Sengko' kurban salameddan kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat otaba kaangguy kurban sokalella, kebanna ta' olle badha calena, me' olle kurbanna etarema bi' Sengko'." 
Leviticus22:22 Keban se buta, se potong tolangnga otaba se loka, se etombuwi babudun se badha nanana, se nyandhang panyaket kole' otaba akorengan, ja' atorragi ka Sengko'. Keban se kantha jareya ja' atorragi ka Sengko' kaangguy kurban kakanan e mezba." 
Leviticus22:23 Keban se ta' samporna badanna olle kagabay kurban sokalella; tape kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat keban se kantha jareya t'a kera etarema bi' Sengko'. 
Leviticus22:24 Keban se pellerra rosak polana takampe', loka, mesmes otabana ebuwang, ja' atorragi ka Sengko'. Ta' olle badha kadaddiyan se kantha jareya e nagarana ba'na." 
Leviticus22:25 Ebin ollena dhari oreng manca ta' olle ekagabay kurban dhadha'aran. Keban se kantha jareya eanggep ena ban ta' etarema bi' Sengko'.” 
Leviticus22:26 Mon sape, dumba otaba embi' gi' buru abudhu', budhu'na jareya ta' olle epesa dhari korbina sampe' pettong are. Buru saellana jareya keban jareya ekenneng tarema kaangguy kurban dhadha'aran." 
Leviticus22:27  
Leviticus22:28 Korbina sape, dumba otabana embi' ja' kurbannagi pabareng ban budhu'na e dhalem settong are." 
Leviticus22:29 Mon ba'na ngatorragi kurban sokkoran ka Sengko', lakone jareya menorot atoran, sopaja kurban jareya etarema'a bi' Sengko'." 
Leviticus22:30 Kurban jareya kodu ekakan e are jareya keya, ja' sampe' badha karena sampe' kalagguwanna." 
Leviticus22:31 “Toro' Tang parenta jareya kabbi; Sengko' reya PANGERAN. 
Leviticus22:32 Ja' majuba' Tang nyama se socce. Bangsa Isra'il kodu nyemba ka Sengko', Se Mahasocce. Sengko' reya PANGERAN se masocce ba'na;" 
Leviticus22:33 Sengko' se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer, sopaja Sengko' daddiya Allahna ba'na. Sengko' reya PANGERAN.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus23:2 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il atoran-atoran parkara paraya'an agama, se kodu eomommagi menangka are raja kaangguy kabakteyan; kabala kantha reya." 
Leviticus23:3 Badha nem are se olle angguy alako, tape are se kapeng petto', iya areya are Sabat, kodu egabay are istirahat se kaangguy PANGERAN malolo. E are jareya ba'na kodu mabadha kompolan kaangguy ajalannagi kabakteyan, ban ta' olle alalakon." 
Leviticus23:4 Areya' re-are raja se eteptebbagi PANGERAN, ban se kodu eomommagi e bakto se la etantowagi.”" 
Leviticus23:5 “Are Raja Paska se eraya'agi kaangguy amolja'agi PANGERAN, molae dhari baktona compet are e tanggal pa' bellas bulan settong." 
Leviticus23:6 Kalagguwanna, tanggal lema bellas, molae paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i, pettong are abidda ba'na ta' olle ngakan roti se eragi'i." 
Leviticus23:7 Pettong are abidda ba'na kodu ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka PANGERAN. E are se kapeng settong ban se kapeng petto' e dhalem paraya'an jareya, ba'na kodu mabadha kompolan kaangguy mabadha kabakteyan, ban ta' olle alako berra'.”" 
Leviticus23:8  
Leviticus23:9 Mon ba'na la napa' ka nagara se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka ba'na, ban makompol hasella tana, gintelanna gandum se eanye dha'-adha' kadibi' kodu giba ka imam." 
Leviticus23:10  
Leviticus23:11 E are saellana are Sabat, imam kodu ngatorragi gandum jareya menangka tor-ator sokkoran ka PANGERAN, sopaja PANGERAN sennengnga ka ba'na." 
Leviticus23:12 E are baktona ba'na ngatorragi gandum jareya, ba'na kodu ngatorragi keya budhu'na dumba lake' settong se tadha' calena, se aomor sataon, menangka kurban obbaran." 
Leviticus23:13 Menangka kurban kakanan ba'na kodu ngatorragi teppong dhu kilo ecampore mennya' jaitun. Bauna kurban kareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. Laen dhari jareya atorragi keya aengnga anggur saliter. 
Leviticus23:14 Sabellunna ngeba tor-ator jareya ka PANGERAN, ba'na ta' olle ngakan gandum se anyar jareya maske sakone'a, se aropa gandum matta, otabana se epanggang otaba etono aropa roti. Atoran reya kodu etoro' bi' na' potona ba'na kabbi salanjangnga." 
Leviticus23:15 Molae are samarena Sabat, e bakto ba'na ngatorragi gintelanna gandum se dha'-adha'na ka PANGERAN, ba'na kodu ngetong bakto pettong menggu." 
Leviticus23:16 E are se kapeng saeket, iya areya e are saellana Sabat se kapeng petto', ba'na kodu ngeba kurban sasajin ka PANGERAN." 
Leviticus23:17 Saneyap kalowarga kodu ngatorragi roti dhadhuwa' menangka kurban sokkoran ka PANGERAN. Saneyap roti kodu ekagabay dhari teppong alos dhu kilo, epobuwi ragi, ban kodu eatorragi ka PANGERAN menangka tor-ator hasella tana se dha'-adha'." 
Leviticus23:18 Salaenna roti jareya, bangsa Isra'il kodu ngatorragi keya budhu'na dumba papetto' se aomor sataon, sape lake' se gi' ngodha settong, ban embi' dhadhuwa'. Kabbi ta' olle badha calena ban kodu eatorragi menangka kurban obbaran ka PANGERAN, epabareng ban kurban sasajin sarta kurban aengnga anggur. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Leviticus23:19 Ba'na kodu ngatorragi keya embi' lake' settong menangka kurban pangamponanna dusa, sarta dumba lake' dhadhuwa' se omorra sataon menangka kurban salameddan." 
Leviticus23:20 Roti ban budhu'na dumba se dhadhuwa' jareya bi' imam kodu eatorragi menangka tor-ator sokkoran ka PANGERAN, kurban jareya daddi bagiyanna imam. Tor-ator jareya kabbi socce." 
Leviticus23:21 E are jareya ba'na kodu mabadha kompolan kaangguy mabadha kabakteyan ban ta' olle alako berra'. Atoran reya kodu etoro' bi' na' potona ba'na salanjangnga, e dhimma'a bai se ekennengnge." 
Leviticus23:22 Mon ba'na anye, gandum se tombu e gir-penggirra teggalla ja' anye, ban ja' abali samarena anye makompola re-karena gandum se gi' ceccer e teggal. Dina jareya me' olle ekala' oreng mesken ban oreng manca. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus23:23 Tanggal settong bulan petto' kodu eraya'agi menangka are kaangguy istirahat malolo. Are jareya etandhai ban monyena calempong, ban ba'na kodu mabadha kompolan kaangguy abadha'agi kabakteyan." 
Leviticus23:24  
Leviticus23:25 Atorragi kurban kakanan ka PANGERAN ban ja' alako berra' e are jareya. 
Leviticus23:26 Tanggal sapolo bulan petto' reya are opacara taonan kaangguy pangamponanna dusana bangsa Isra'il. E are jareya ba'na kodu apowasa ban mabadha kompolan kaangguy abadha'agi kabakteyan sarta ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka PANGERAN. 
Leviticus23:27  
Leviticus23:28 Ja' alalakon, sabab are jareya are pangamponanna dusa, me' olle ba'na esapora e ajunanna Guste Allahna." 
Leviticus23:29 Pa'-sapa'a kanngakan e are jareya, ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole." 
Leviticus23:30 Ban pa'-sapa'a alalakon e are jareya, eokoma mate bi' Sengko' dibi'." 
Leviticus23:31 Atoran reya kodu etoro' bi' na' potona ba'na kabbi, e dhimma'a bai se ekennengnge." 
Leviticus23:32 Molae dhari baktona compet are e tanggal sanga' bulan jareya sampe' baktona compet are e tanggal sapolo, ba'na kodu araya'agi are Sabat, are se kaangguy istirahat malolo. Saare benteng ba'na kodu apowasa." 
Leviticus23:33 Pesta Ranggun Dhaun emolae tanggal lema bellas bulan petto', abidda pettong are." 
Leviticus23:34  
Leviticus23:35 Saabidda pettong are jareya, sabban are ba'na kodu ngatorragi kurban kakanan. E are se kapeng settong ban se kapeng ballu' ba'na kodu mabadha kompolan kaangguy abadha'agi kabakteyan ban ngatorragi kurban kakanan ka PANGERAN. Ja' alako berra' e are jareya." 
Leviticus23:36  
Leviticus23:37 Jareya kabbi re-are raja agama se eteptebbagi PANGERAN ban se kodu eomommagi bi' ba'na. E dhalem paraya'an jareya kabbi ba'na kodu amolja'agi PANGERAN kalaban mabadha kompolan kaangguy abadha'agi kabakteyan ban ngatorragi kurban kakanan, kurban obbaran, kurban sasajin, kurban keban ban kurban aengnga anggur, bannya'na menorot se ekaparlo sabban arena." 
Leviticus23:38 Paraya'an jareya kabbi menangka tamba'anna re-are Sabat biyasa, daddi tor-ator se acem-macem jareya menangka tamba'an keya ka tor-atorra ba'na se biyasa, tamba'anna kurbanna ba'na kaangguy nebbus neyat, otabana kurban sokalella se eatorragi ba'na ka PANGERAN." 
Leviticus23:39 Samarena anye, molae tanggal lema bellas bulan petto', ba'na kodu mabadha paraya'an pettong are abidda. Are se kapeng settong ban are se kapeng ballu' pera' kaangguy istirahat malolo." 
Leviticus23:40 E are se kapeng settong ba'na kodu metthek wa'-buwa'an se paleng bagus dhari kebbunna, bariya keya un-dhaunna palma ban ca'-ranca'na ju-kajuwan se rampa', pas amolae paraya'an kagumbira'an kaangguy ahormadi Guste Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus23:41 Paraya'an jareya kodu ejalannagi pettong are abidda. Atoran reya kodu ejalannagi bi' na' potona ba'na salanjangnga. 
Leviticus23:42 Pettong are abidda bangsa Isra'il kodu neng e dhalem ko-bengkowan dhaun kabbi," 
Leviticus23:43 sopaja na' potona ba'na taowa ja' Sengko', PANGERAN, nyoro bangsa Isra'il neng e bengko kene' se saderhana, e bakto ngeba bangsa jareya kalowar dhari Messer. Sengko', PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus23:44 Daddi Mosa manapa' ka bangsa Isra'il atoran-atoran parkara carana mabadha paraya'an-paraya'an kaangguy ahormadi PANGERAN. 
Leviticus24:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus24:2 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il, soro ngala' mennya' jaitun se morne ban se paleng bagus, esseyagi ka mar-damar e dhalem Kemah Socce, sopaja damar jareya ekennenga odhi'i ros-terrosan." 
Leviticus24:3 Sabban malem Harun kodu ngodhi'i mar-damar jareya ban ngator sopaja mar-damar jareya terrosa odhi' sampe' gu-laggu, e lowaranna bir-tabir se notobi Petthe Parjanjiyan e Rowangan Se Mahasocce. Parenta reya kodu ejalannagi bi' na' potona ba'na salanjangnga." 
Leviticus24:4 Harun kodu ngoros mar-damar se badha e panongko'anna se ekagabay dhari emmas morne jarowa sopaja mar-damar jareya terrosa odhi' salanjangnga e dhalem Kemah Socce.” 
Leviticus24:5 Ngala' teppong se paleng bagus dhubellas kilo, kagabay roti se bunter dhubellas meggi', tong-settongnga sakilo." 
Leviticus24:6 Jajar roti jareya padaddi dhu jijir, jir-sajijirra bannya'na nem-ennem, e attassa meja se akole' emmas morne se badha e dhalem Kemah Socce." 
Leviticus24:7 Roti se dhu jijir jareya pobuwi mennyan se morne menangka tandha ja' roti jareya kurban kakanan se eatorragi ka PANGERAN. 
Leviticus24:8 Sabban are Sabat kodu badha roti se esajiyagi e dhalem Kemah Socce. Jareya kawajibanna bangsa Isra'il salanjangnga. 
Leviticus24:9 Roti jareya bagiyanna Harun ban na' potona, se kodu ngakan roti jareya e kennengngan se etantowagi kaangguy kaparlowan jareya malolo, sabab roti jareya bagiyan se paleng socce dhari kurban kakanan se eatorragi ka PANGERAN kaangguy bagiyanna para imam." 
Leviticus24:10 E parkemahanna oreng Isra'il badha oreng lalake' kasorang. Oreng jareya eppa'na oreng Messer ban ebuna oreng Isra'il, nyamana Selomit, ana'na Dibri dhari suku Dan. E settong are oreng jareya atokar ban oreng Isra'il e parkemahan. E bakto atokar, oreng jareya abasto Allah. Daddi oreng jareya bi' reng-oreng Isra'il egiba ka Mosa," 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 ban etahan sambi anante' potosanna PANGERAN se nantowagiya okomanna. 
Leviticus24:13 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Leviticus24:14 “Giba oreng jareya ka lowaranna parkemahan. Saneyap oreng se ngedhing oreng jareya abasto kodu nompangngagi tanangnga ka cethagga oreng jareya kaangguy nyakse'e ja' oreng jareya sala. Saellana jareya sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il kodu agarujuk oreng jareya ban bato sampe' mate. 
Leviticus24:15 Saellana jareya kabala ka bangsa Isra'il: pa'-sapa'a abasto Allah kodu nanggung okomanna," 
Leviticus24:16 ban kodu eokom mate. Sapa'a bai se abasto PANGERAN kodu egarujuk ban bato bi' sakabbinna ommat Isra'il sampe' mate. Hokom jareya kodu eangguy ka oreng Isra'il ban ka oreng manca se neptep apolong ban oreng Isra'il. 
Leviticus24:17 Pa'-sapa'a se mate'e oreng laen kodu eokom mate. 
Leviticus24:18 Pa'-sapa'a se mate'e ebin andhi'na oreng laen kodu agante'e. Dhasarra iya areya ‘nyaba gante nyaba’. 
Leviticus24:19 Mon oreng maloka oreng laen, oreng jareya kodu ebales epaloka keya." 
Leviticus24:20 Mon mapotong tolangnga oreng, tolangnga dibi' kodu epapotong keya; mon mabuta matana oreng salaja, matana dibi' kodu epabuta salaja keya. Mon mokol oreng sampe' potong gigina, gigina dibi' kodu epapotong keya. Pandha'na, apa'a bai se ejalannagi oreng jareya sampe' andaddiyagi oreng laen ena badanna, kodu ebalessagi ka aba'na." 
Leviticus24:21 Pa'-sapa'a se mate'e ebin kodu agante'e, tape pa'-sapa'a mate'e manossa kodu eokom mate." 
Leviticus24:22 Hokom reya kodu eangguy ka ba'na kabbi, reng-oreng Isra'il, bariya keya ka oreng manca se neptep apolong ban ba'na, sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Saellana Mosa manapa' dhabuna PANGERAN jareya ka bangsa Isra'il, oreng se abasto Allah gella' laju egiba ka lowarra parkemahan, pas egarujuk ban bato sampe' mate. Daddi bangsa Isra'il ajalannagi apa se la epakonnagi PANGERAN ka Mosa." 
Leviticus25:1 E attas Gunong Sinay PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa," 
Leviticus25:2 “Kabala kantha reya ka bangsa Isra'il: Mon ba'na la maso' ka nagara se bi' PANGERAN eparengngagi ka ba'na rowa, ba'na kodu ngormat PANGERAN kalaban cara se kantha reya: Sabban taon se kapeng petto' ba'na ta' olle agarap tana." 
Leviticus25:3 Nem taon abidda ba'na kodu namenne gal-teggalla, notto ka-bungkana anggur e kebbunna ban makompol hasella tanana." 
Leviticus25:4 Tape sabban taon se kapeng petto' kodu atorragi ka PANGERAN malolo. Daddi saabidda sataon jareya tanana ta' olle egarap. Gal-teggal ta' olle etamenne ban ka-bungkana anggurra ta' olle totto. 
Leviticus25:5 La'-mala' gandum se tombu dibi' otabana anggur e bungkana se ta' etotto, ta' olle polong otaba esempen sabab taon jareya taon istirahat monggu ka tana." 
Leviticus25:6 Sanajjan e taon jareya tanana ba'na ta' egarap, tana jareya bakal madhatengnga hasel keya se daddiya kakanna ba'na, nor-dunorra, la-kabulana, ban reng-oreng manca se apolong ban ba'na." 
Leviticus25:7 Bariya keya kaangguy pakanna ebinna ba'na ban burun alas e nagarana ba'na. Sabarang se kalowar dhari tana jareya olle kakan.” 
Leviticus25:8 “Etong pettong kale pettong taon, daddi kabbi pa' polo sanga' taon." 
Leviticus25:9 Saellana jareya, e tanggal sapolo bulan petto', iya areya e are pangamponanna dusa, soro oreng nope calampong e man-dhimman e sabingkerra nagara." 
Leviticus25:10 Taon se kapeng saeket jareya kodu socceyagi. E taon jareya ba'na kodu ngomommagi kabebasan ka reng-oreng sanagarana. E taon jareya sabarang dhi'-andhi'na oreng se la ejuwal kodu epabali ka se andhi' dha'-adha' otaba ka na' potona. Pa'-sapa'a se ejuwal epadaddi dunor kodu epabali ka balana. 
Leviticus25:11 Ja' namenne teggalla. Gandum se tombu dibi' ta' olle eanye, ban buwana anggur e kebbunna se bungkana ta' etotto ta' olle epolong." 
Leviticus25:12 Taon jareya taon se socce monggu ka ba'na. Ba'na pera' olle ngakan sabarang se tombu dibi' e teggalla. 
Leviticus25:13 E dhalem taon jareya sakabbinna tana se la ejuwal kodu epabali ka orengnga se andhi' dha'-adha'. 
Leviticus25:14 Daddi, mon ba'na ajuwal tana ka sasamana oreng Isra'il, otaba melle tana dhari oreng Isra'il, ja' sampe' ba'na ta' jujur e dhalem ajuwal belli jareya." 
Leviticus25:15 Argana tana jareya kodu eteptebbagi menorot bannya'na taon saabidda tana jareya bisa madhateng hasel sampe' ka taon e baktona tana jareya kodu epabali pole. 
Leviticus25:16 Mon taonna bannya', argana tana jareya larang. Tape mon taonna sakone', argana kodu epamodha, sabab se ejuwal bannya'na hasella tanana." 
Leviticus25:17 Ja' nepo oreng se padha Isra'illa, tape ba'na kodu patako' ka PANGERAN, Allahna.”" 
Leviticus25:18 “Toro' sakabbinna hokom ban papakonna PANGERAN, me' olle ba'na aman odhi'na e nagara jareya." 
Leviticus25:19 Tana e nagara jareya madhatengnga hasel sopaja ba'na cokoba kakanna ban aman odhi'na e jadhiya. 
Leviticus25:20 Tape olle daddi badha oreng se atanya apa se ekakana saabidda taon se kapeng petto' e bakto tana ta' olle etamenne ban hasella ta' olle ekala'. 
Leviticus25:21 E taon se kapeng ennem PANGERAN aberkadana tana sopaja hasella cokoba ekakan tello taon. 
Leviticus25:22 Ban e bakto ba'na namenne teggalla e taon se kapeng ballu', hasella tana e taon se kapeng ennem gi' badha se ekennenga kakan ba'na. La'-mala' parsadhiya'anna kakanna ba'na gi' bakal cokoba sampe' napa' baktona ba'na makompola hasella tanana e taon jareya.”" 
Leviticus25:23 “Tanana ba'na ta' olle ejuwal saterrossa, sabab tana jareya banne andhi'na ba'na, jareya kaagunganna PANGERAN. Ba'na pera' akantha oreng manca se eedine ngangguy tana jareya." 
Leviticus25:24 Mon badha oreng ajuwal tana, se andhi' dha'-adha' kodu eberri'i ha' kaangguy nebbus tana jareya." 
Leviticus25:25 Mon oreng Isra'il daddi mesken sampe' tapaksa ajuwal tanana, la-balana se paleng semma' kodu nebbus tana jareya." 
Leviticus25:26 Mon tadha' oreng se nebbussagi, tape se andhi' tana jareya e budhi are olle daddi pas sogi pole, sarta andhi' pesse cokop kaangguy epanebbusa tanana," 
Leviticus25:27 oreng se andhi' tana jareya kodu majar ka oreng se melle tanana saargana hasella tanana e dhalem on-taon se bakal dhatengnga sampe' ka Taon Pabaliyan se bakal dhateng. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya oreng buru narema balina tanana. 
Leviticus25:28 Tape mon oreng jareya ta' kellar nebbus tanana, oreng se melle teptep kobasa ka tana jareya sampe' Taon Pabaliyan se bakal dhatengnga. E dhalem taon jareya tana jareya kodu epabali ka orengnga se andhi'." 
Leviticus25:29 Mon oreng ajuwal bengko e dhalem kottha se epagari bato sakalenglengnga, oreng jareya andhi' ha' nebbus bengkona jareya e dhalem bakto sataon kaetong dhari tanggal baktona bengko jareya ejuwal." 
Leviticus25:30 Tape mon bengko jareya ta' etebbus e dhalem bakto sataon, ha'na kaangguy nebbus bengko jareya elang. Bengko jareya teptep daddi andhi'na oreng se melle ban na' potona. E dhalem Taon Pabaliyan, bengko jareya ta' osa epabali." 
Leviticus25:31 Kaangguy bengko e disa se ta' epagari bato sakalenglengnga atoranna padha ban atoranna tana: se andhi' bengko dha'-adha' andhi' ha' nebbus, ban bengko jareya kodu epabali e dhalem Taon Pabaliyan." 
Leviticus25:32 Tape oreng Lewi andhi' ha' bila'a bai nebbus dhi'-andhi'na e tha-kottha se eteptebbagi daddi kotthana. 
Leviticus25:33 Mon oreng Lewi ajuwal bengkona e sala settong dhari kottha jareya ban ta' etebbus, bengko jareya kodu epabali ka aba'na e dhalem Taon Pabaliyan. Sabab bengkona oreng Lewi e tha-kotthana jareya teptep ha'na reng-oreng Lewi jareya e antarana bangsa Isra'il." 
Leviticus25:34 Tape talon e sabingkerra tha-kotthana suku Lewi ta' olle ejuwal. Jareya andhi'na oreng Lewi kaangguy salanjangnga.” 
Leviticus25:35 “Mon oreng sabangsana ba'na se apolong sanagara badha se daddi mesken ban ta' andhi' se ekakana ban se eangguya, ba'na kodu nyokong oreng jareya pakantha se nyokong oreng manca sopaja oreng jareya bisa'a terros odhi' e ma'-semma'na ba'na." 
Leviticus25:36 Ja' menta budhu' dhari pa-apa se epaenjam ba'na ka oreng jareya, tape ba'na kodu patako' ka Allahna, ban dina reng-oreng jareya odhi' apolong ban ba'na. Bariya keya ba'na ja' ngala' ontong dhari kakanan se ejuwal ba'na ka oreng jareya." 
Leviticus25:37  
Leviticus25:38 Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer, se aberri' nagara Kana'an ka ba'na, sopaja Sengko' daddiya Allahna ba'na.”" 
Leviticus25:39 “Mon oreng sabangsana ba'na se abengko e ma'-semma'na ba'na daddi mesken sampe' tapaksa ajuwal aba'na ka ba'na, oreng jareya ta' olle esoro alako lalakonna dunor." 
Leviticus25:40 Oreng jareya kodu apolong ban ba'na menangka kabula ban alako ka ba'na sampe' napa' ka Taon Pabaliyan. 
Leviticus25:41 E bakto jareya oreng jareya ban na'-ana'na olle kalowar dhari bengkona ba'na ban abali ka la-balana ban ka tanana bangatowana. 
Leviticus25:42 Oreng Isra'il reya dunorra PANGERAN, se abakta bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer; daddi reng-oreng Isra'il ta' olle ejuwal epadaddi dunor." 
Leviticus25:43 Daddi oreng Isra'il se ajuwal aba'na ka ba'na ta' olle ekasare bi' ba'na, ba'na kodu patako' ka Allahna." 
Leviticus25:44 Mon ba'na parlo dunor, ba'na olle melle dhari sa-bangsa e ma'-semma'na ba'na." 
Leviticus25:45 Ba'na olle keya melle na'-ana'na oreng manca se abengko e antarana ba'na. Na'-ana'na oreng manca se lahir e nagarana ba'na olle ekaandhi' ba'na," 
Leviticus25:46 ban olle esangkollagi ka na'-ana'na ba'na, epadaddi dunorra na'-ana'na ba'na saomorra. Tape oreng se padha Isra'illa ta' olle ekasare." 
Leviticus25:47 Mon badha oreng manca se abengko e ma'-semma'na ba'na daddi sogi, ban badha sasamana oreng Isra'il se daddi mesken sampe' ajuwal aba'na ka oreng manca jareya otaba ka la-balana oreng manca jareya," 
Leviticus25:48 oreng Isra'il jareya teptep andhi' ha' kaangguy etebbus bi' sala settong dhari taretan lake'na," 
Leviticus25:49 otabana majadhi' lake'na otabana sapopona otabana sala settong dhari bala semma'na. Otabana, mon oreng jareya dibi' e settong bakto kellar, olle nebbus aba'na dibi'." 
Leviticus25:50 Dunor jareya kodu arembak ban oreng se melle aba'na, se kadhuwa kodu ngetong barampa taon abidda eetong molae dhari bakto oreng jareya ejuwal epadaddi dunor sampe' ka Taon Pabaliyan se bakal dhateng, argana tebbusanna pas eteptebbagi. Argana tebbusanna kodu eteptebbagi noro' etonganna gaji se ebajarragi ka oreng se daddi kabula." 
Leviticus25:51 Dunor jareya kodu mabali sabagiyan dhari argana aba'na e bakto ebelli," 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 se bannya'na padha ban gajina oreng se daddi kabula saabidda on-taon se gi' ta' ejalane. Dunor jareya ta' olle ekasare bi' lorana. 
Leviticus25:54 Mon oreng jareya ta' ekenneng tebbus bi' sala settongnga cara jareya, oreng jareya ban na'-ana'na kodu epabebas e dhalem Taon Pabaliyan samarena jareya." 
Leviticus25:55 Oreng Isra'il ta' olle epadaddi dunor saomorra sabab bangsa Isra'il reya dunorra PANGERAN, se abakta bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na.”" 
Leviticus26:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Ba'na ja' agabay brahala otaba arca otabana pelar bato otabana bato se eoker kaangguy esemba. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na." 
Leviticus26:2 Raya'agi re-are Sabat ban hormadi kennengngan se pera' eangguy nyemba ka Sengko' malolo. Sengko' reya PANGERAN. 
Leviticus26:3 Mon ba'na e dhalem odhi'na atoro' ka Tang atoran-atoran ban ka Tang ta-parenta," 
Leviticus26:4 Sengko' matorona ojan teppa' baktona, sopaja tana madhatengnga hasel ban ka'-bungka'an abuwa'a." 
Leviticus26:5 Hasella tanana ba'na bakal talebat bannya'a, sampe' mon la dhapa' baktona molonga anggur, ba'na gi' bakal teppa'na anye gandum. Ban mon la napa' baktona namenna gandum, ba'na gi' bakal teppa'na molong buwana anggur. Ba'na bakal ta' kakorangana kakan ban odhi' aman taremtem e nagarana." 
Leviticus26:6 Sengko' ajaga'a kaamananna nagarana ba'na sopaja ba'na ngennenga tedhung taremtem ban ta' tako' ka sapa'a bai. Run-burun alas se babaja epamosna'a dhari nagarana ba'na, ban ta' kera badha perrang pole e nagarana ba'na." 
Leviticus26:7 Ba'na bakal mennanga ka so-mosona; 
Leviticus26:8 ba'na kalema bakal ngennenga makala moso saratos, ban ba'na saratos bakal ngennenga makala moso sapolo ebu." 
Leviticus26:9 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberkadana ban epabannya'a na' potona. Apa se la ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka ba'na tanto eteptebbi bi' Sengko'. 
Leviticus26:10 Hasella tanana ba'na bakal talebat bannya'a sampe' cokop ekakan sataon. La'-mala' ba'na bakal tapaksa'a makalowar lebbina hasella tanana se laju sopaja ngennenga nyempen hasella tanana se anyar. 
Leviticus26:11 Sengko' badha'a e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na e dhalem Tang Kemah Socce, ban Sengko' ta' nolaga ba'na." 
Leviticus26:12 Sengko' abarengngana ba'na terros; Sengko' daddiya Allahna ba'na ban ba'na daddiya Tang ommat. 
Leviticus26:13 Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer sopaja ba'na ta' ekadunora oreng pole. Kakobasa'an se nyeksa ba'na la epotel bi' Sengko', ban ba'na la epamardika.”" 
Leviticus26:14 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Mon ba'na ta' ngedhingngagi ka Sengko' ban ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta, ba'na eokoma." 
Leviticus26:15 Mon ba'na ta' endha' atoro' ka atoran-atoran ban ta-parentana Sengko' ban marosak parjanjiyan se epabadha Sengko' ban ba'na," 
Leviticus26:16 bi' Sengko' ba'na eokoma. Bi' Sengko' ba'na epadhatengngana balai, panyaket bato' kerreng ban panas se ta' ekenneng pabaras, sampe' matana ba'na buta ban ba'na odhi' nyangsara. Ba'na bakal namennana tanana tape ta' ngakan hasella, sabab so-mosona ba'na dhateng ban ba'na bakal epakala'a, ban sabarang se etamen ba'na bakal epatadha'a." 
Leviticus26:17 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eokoma, sampe' ba'na epakala ban so-mosona ban ekobasae reng-oreng se baji' ka ba'na. Ba'na bakal katako'ana parana sampe' ba'na buru, maske tadha' oreng se nyerser." 
Leviticus26:18 Mon saellana nyandhang sakabbinna okoman jareya ba'na gi' ta' atoro' keya ka Sengko', okomanna bi' Sengko' etamba'ana daddi pettong kalena." 
Leviticus26:19 Ba'na talebat angga'na, tape bi' Sengko' ba'na econglettagiya. Ta' kera badha ojan, sampe' tanana ba'na bakal kerrenga ban daddi gali akantha besse." 
Leviticus26:20 Lalakonna ba'na se berra' ta' kera badha ollena, sabab tanana ba'na ta' kera madhateng hasel, ban men-tamennanna ba'na ta' kera abuwa." 
Leviticus26:21 Mon ba'na gi' pagguna terros alaban ka Sengko' ban ta' atoro' ka Sengko', okomanna ba'na bi' Sengko' etamba'ana pettong kalena." 
Leviticus26:22 Sengko' madhatengnga run-burun alas ka nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na. Run-burun alas jareya bakal nyeppa'a na'-ana'na ba'na, mate'e ebinna ba'na ban matadha'a ba'na sampe' kare sakone', ban lan-jalan e nagarana ba'na bakal seppeya." 
Leviticus26:23 Mon saellana narema okoman jareya kabbi ba'na gi' ta' endha' ngedhingngagi ka Sengko', ban gi' terros alaban ka Sengko'," 
Leviticus26:24 bi' Sengko' ba'na eajara ban eokoma aberra'an pettong kalena dhari se la kajalanan. 
Leviticus26:25 Sengko' madhatengnga paperrangan ka nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na menangka okoman lantaran ba'na ta' neptebbi parjanjiyanna Sengko' ban ba'na. Ban mon ba'na akompol e dhalem kotthana nyareya salamet, Sengko' madhatengnga panyaket se ta' ekenneng pabaras, sampe' ba'na tapaksa atellok ka mosona." 
Leviticus26:26 Ba'na bakal ta' andhi'a pa-apa se ekakana, sampe' oreng babine' sapolo pera' marlowagi pangeppanan settong kaangguy ngeppan roti se ekaandhi' oreng sapolo jareya. Kakanan jareya bakal erangsuma, tape samarena ngakan rangsuman jareya ba'na gi' pagguna lapar." 
Leviticus26:27 Mon saellana narema okoman jareya kabbi ba'na gi' terros alaban ka Sengko' ban ta' endha' atoro' ka Sengko'," 
Leviticus26:28 Sengko' bakal peggella ban ngajara ba'na, ngokoma ba'na epaberra'ana pettong kalena dhari se la kajalanan." 
Leviticus26:29 Ba'na bakal kalaparana, sampe' ba'na ngakan na'-ana'na dibi'." 
Leviticus26:30 Sengko' maancora ngan-kennengnganna pamojja'anna ba'na e nong-gunong, magujura ba-mezbana kennengnganna pangobbaranna dupana, ban ngontallagiya yit-mayyidda ba'na ka attassa la-brahalana ba'na se la gujur jareya. Tang ate bakal baji'a ka ba'na." 
Leviticus26:31 Tha-kotthana ba'na bi' Sengko' epagujura, ngan-kennengnganna pamojja'anna epaancora ban ban-kurbanna ta' etarema'a." 
Leviticus26:32 Nagarana ba'na epatompessa epatadha'a karena, sampe' so-mosona ba'na se ngobasane nagara jareya takerjat nangale'e saapa rajana karosagan jareya." 
Leviticus26:33 Sengko' madhatengnga paperrangan e nagarana ba'na, ban ba'na epacar-mencar e ra-nagara manca. Gal-teggalla ba'na bakal ta' taorosa, ban tha-kotthana bakal possa'a ban jur-gujuranna bengko." 
Leviticus26:34 E bakto jareya, sabatara ba'na ebuwang ka ra-nagarana so-mosona, tanana ba'na se ta' tao epanneng sakale e bakto ekennengnge ba'na, bakal ta' taorosa ban olleya kasempadan kaangguy aistirahat." 
Leviticus26:35  
Leviticus26:36 Reng-orengnga ba'na se ebuwang e nagara laen, bi' Sengko' epadaddiya katako'an, sampe' monyena dhaun se etongngo' angen bai andaddiyagi kabbi padha buru. Ba'na bakal buruwa akantha se eserser moso e dhalem paperrangan, ban ba'na bakal labuwa maske tadha' moso se nyerser e seddi'anna ba'na." 
Leviticus26:37 Ba'na bakal buruwa ban saleng tabentor, maske tadha' oreng se nyerser. Ban ba'na ta' kera ngenneng alaban ka so-mosona." 
Leviticus26:38 Ba'na bakal mateya e pambuwangan, epatompes e tanana so-mosona." 
Leviticus26:39 Sabagiyan dhari ba'na se gi' odhi' e nagarana so-mosona bakal sangsara'a odhi'na lantaran dusana dibi' ban dusana bangatowana. 
Leviticus26:40 Tape na' potona ba'na bakal ngakowana dusana dibi' ban dusana bangatowana se alaban ka Sengko' ban ta' atoro' ka Sengko'," 
Leviticus26:41 sampe' madhateng okoman ka reng-oreng jareya, se ban Sengko' laju eojuk ebuwang ka nagarana so-mosona. Dhi-budhina, mon toronanna ba'na la passra ka Sengko' ban la ajalannagi okoman lantaran dusana se alaban ka Sengko'," 
Leviticus26:42 Sengko' ngenga'ana Tang parjanjiyan ban Yakub, Ishak tor Ibrahim, Sengko' nganyarrana Tang janji se aberri'a tana rowa ka Tang bangsa." 
Leviticus26:43 Tape tana jareya kodu epakosong gallu, pandhudhu'na se asal kodu epanyengla, sopaja tana jareya ngennenga aistirahat ongguwan. Ban Tang ommat kodu ajalannagi sakabbinna okoman se eteba'agi Sengko' lantaran Tang ommat jareya ta' endha' atoro' ka Tang atoran-atoran ban Tang parenta." 
Leviticus26:44 Tape sanajjan gi' badha'a e nagarana moso sakale, reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' ta' edina'agiya otaba epatompessa salanjangnga. Sabab mon reng-oreng jareya kabbi bi' Sengko' epatompes, artena Sengko' maburung Tang parjanjiyan ka reng-oreng jareya, mangkana Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna reng-oreng jareya." 
Leviticus26:45 Sengko' nganyarrana parjanjiyan se epabadha Sengko' bi' bangatowana reng-oreng jareya, e bakto Sengko' noduwagi Tang kakobasa'an ka sakabbinna bangsa kalaban ngeba Tang ommat kalowar dhari Messer, sopaja Sengko', PANGERAN, daddiya Allahna.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Jareya kom-hokom ban papakon se eparengngagi PANGERAN e attassa Gunong Sinay ka Mosa kaangguy bangsa Isra'il. 
Leviticus27:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala kantha reya ka reng-oreng Isra'il: Mon badha oreng se eatorragi ka PANGERAN kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat se kusus, oreng jareya ekenneng tebbus bi' pesse se bannya'na akantha se kasebbut e baba reya," 
Leviticus27:2  
Leviticus27:3 iya areya menorot arga e Kemah Socce: – e attassa sabidak taon: lalake': 15 pesse salaka babine': 10 pesse salaka – antara dhu polo sampe' sabidak taon: lalake': 50 pesse salaka babine': 30 pesse salaka – antara lema sampe' dhu polo taon: lalake': 20 pesse salaka babine': 10 pesse salaka – e babana lema taon: lalake': lema pesse salaka babine': tello pesse salaka 
Leviticus27:4  
Leviticus27:5  
Leviticus27:6  
Leviticus27:7  
Leviticus27:8 Mon oreng se aneyat jareya talebat meskenna sampe' ta' kellar majar arga se eteptebbagi, oreng jareya kodu ngeba oreng se la eatorragi ka PANGERAN gella' ka imam. Imam kodu neptebbagi arta se amandhaban menorot kakowadanna oreng jareya." 
Leviticus27:9 Mon neyat jareya parkara keban se halal se ekenneng tarema menangka tor-ator ka PANGERAN, oreng se andhi' neyat jareya ta' olle morobi keban se ekaneyat jareya bi' keban laenna, sabab pa-apa se eatorragi ka PANGERAN daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN. Mon bi' oreng jareya keban buru eporobi keya, keban se dhadhuwa' jareya daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN kabbi." 
Leviticus27:10  
Leviticus27:11 Tape mon neyat jareya parkara keban se haram se ta' ekenneng tarema menangka tor-ator ka PANGERAN, oreng se aneyat kodu ngeba keban jareya ka imam." 
Leviticus27:12 Imam jareya se bakal nantowagiya argana menorot kabadha'anna keban jareya. Ban arga se la etantowagi jareya arga mate. 
Leviticus27:13 Mon keban jareya terro etebbusa, oreng jareya kodu majar sabannya'na argana etambai dhu polo persenna." 
Leviticus27:14 Mon oreng ngatorragi bengkona ka PANGERAN, imam kodu nantowagi argana menorot kabadha'anna bengko jareya. Arga se etantowagi jareya arga mate." 
Leviticus27:15 Mon bengko jareya terro etebbusa, oreng jareya kodu majar sabannya'na argana etambai dhu polo persenna." 
Leviticus27:16 Mon oreng ngatorragi sabagiyan dhari teggalla ka PANGERAN argana kodu etantowagi menorot bannya'na bibit se ekaparlo mon teggal jareya etamennana. Etonganna argana gandum sabban dhu polo kilona sapolo pesse salaka.
