Leviticus27:17 Mon tana jareya eatorragi ka PANGERAN molae dhari Taon Pabaliyan, argana kodu ebajar sagenna'na." 
Leviticus27:18 Mon tana jareya eatorragi ka PANGERAN samarena Taon Pabaliyan, imam kodu nakser arga kontanna menorot bannya'na karena taon sampe' ka Taon Baktona Li-mabali se bakal dhateng, pas nantowagi arga se amodha'an." 
Leviticus27:19 Mon teggal se eatorragi jareya terro etebbusa, oreng jareya kodu majar sabannya'na argana etambai dhu polo persenna." 
Leviticus27:20 Mon teggal jareya bi' orengnga ejuwal sabellunna etebbus dhari PANGERAN, oreng jareya ta' andhi' ha' pole kaangguy nebbus teggalla." 
Leviticus27:21 E dhalem Taon Pabaliyan se bakal dhatengnga, teggal jareya daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN salanjangnga, sarta pas epadaddi andhi'na para imam." 
Leviticus27:22 Mon oreng ngatorragi ka PANGERAN teggal ollena melle," 
Leviticus27:23 imam kodu nakser argana menorot bannya'na karena taon sampe' Taon Pabaliyan se bakal dhatengnga. Saellana jareya oreng jareya kodu majar argana e are jareya keya. Pesse jareya daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN. 
Leviticus27:24 E dhalem Taon Pabaliyan, teggal jareya kodu epabali ka se andhi' dha'-adha' otaba ka toronanna." 
Leviticus27:25 Sakabbinna arga kodu etantowagi menorot arga e Kemah Socce. 
Leviticus27:26 Budhu' sareyangnga ebin, iya areya budhu'na sape, budhu'na dumba otabana budhu'na embi', jareya kaagunganna PANGERAN, daddi ta' olle kagabay kurban sokalella." 
Leviticus27:27 Tape budhu' sareyangnga keban se haram olle etebbus menorot arga e Kemah Socce, etambai dhu polo persenna. Mon ta' etebbus, keban jareya olle ejuwal ka oreng laen menorot arga e Kemah Socce." 
Leviticus27:28 Sabarang se la eatorragi ka PANGERAN ta' kalaban ngangguy syarat, se aropa manossa, keban otaba tana, ta' olle ejuwal otaba etebbus. Jareya daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN salanjangnga." 
Leviticus27:29 La'-mala' manossa se la eatorragi ka PANGERAN ta' kalaban ngangguy syarat ta' olle etebbus; oreng jareya kodu epate'e. 
Leviticus27:30 Saparpolonna dhari sakabbinna hasella tana, se aropa gandum otaba wa'-buwa'an, kaagunganna PANGERAN." 
Leviticus27:31 Mon sabagiyan dhari hasel jareya etebbusa, oreng jareya kodu majar argana se la etantowagi, etambai dhu polo persenna." 
Leviticus27:32 Dhari ebin, sabban sapolo, se settong kaagunganna PANGERAN. Mon ebin jareya ebitong, saneyap ebin se nomer sapolo daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN." 
Leviticus27:33 Se andhi' ebin jareya ta' olle mele kemma se bagus kemma se juba'. Bariya keya ebin jareya ta' olle eporobi. Mon bi' se andhi' jareya eporobi, ebin se dhadhuwa' jareya kabbi daddi kaagunganna PANGERAN ban ta' olle etebbus.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Jareya kabbi papakonna PANGERAN se edhabuwagi ka Mosa e Gunong Sinay, se epakon panapa' ka bangsa Isra'il." 
Numbers1:1 E tanggal settong bulan dhuwa' e dhalem taon se kapeng dhuwa' saellana bangsa Isra'il nyengla dhari Messer, PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa e dhalem Kemah Socce e ra-ara Sinay." 
Numbers1:2 Dhabuna, “Ba'na ban Harun kodu mabadha caca jiwana sakabbinna ommat Isra'il, menorot kaomma ban kalowargana bang-sebang. Cathet nyamana lalake'an" 
Numbers1:3 se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas se sanggup daddi tantara. Reng-oreng jareya kodu edhaftar menorot pasukanna bang-sebang. 
Numbers1:4 Dhari saneyap suku penta settong pamimpinna kaom soro abanto ba'na.” 
Numbers1:5 Areya' nyamana reng-oreng se epele dhari ommat se esorowa abanto Mosa ban Harun ban se daddi pamimpinna saneyap suku, iya areya: Suku" 
Numbers1:6 Suku Pemimpin Ruben Elizur ana'na Syedeyur Simeyon Selumiyel ana'na Zurisyadai Yehuda Nahason ana'na Aminadab Isakhar Netane'el ana'na Zuwar Zebulon Eliyab ana'na Helon Efraim Elisama ana'na Amihud Manasye Gamaliyel ana'na Pedazur Benyamin Abidan ana'na Gideyoni Dan Ahiyezer ana'na Amisyadai Asyer Pagiyel ana'na Okhran Gad Elyasaf ana'na Rehuwel Naftali Ahira ana'na Enan 
Numbers1:7 Kalaban bantowanna oreng se dhubellas jareya Mosa ban Harun 
Numbers1:8 makon sakabbinna ommat akompol e tanggal settong bulan dhuwa', silsilahna reng-oreng jareya pas esoson menorot om-kaomma se badha e dhalem saneyap sukuna. Nyamana lalake'an se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas ecathet ban ebitong," 
Numbers1:9 akantha se epakonnagi bi' PANGERAN. Jareya kabbi elampa'agi bi' Mosa e ra-ara Sinay. 
Numbers1:10 Lalake'an se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas se sanggup daddi tantara, nyamana ecathet menorot kaomma e dhalem sukuna, molae dhari Ruben, pottra sareyangnga Yakub sampe' ka Naftali. Bannya'na reng-oreng jareya:" 
Numbers1:11 Suku Bannya'na Ruben 46.500 Simeyon 59.300 Gad 45.650 Yehuda 74.600 Isakhar 54.400 Zebulon 57.400 Efraim 40.500 Manasye 32.200 Benyamin 35.400 Dan 62.700 Asyer 41.500 Naftali 53.400 Kabbi: 603.550 
Numbers1:12 Reng-oreng Lewi ta' edhaftar epapolong ban ku-suku laenna, 48sabab PANGERAN la adhabu kantha reya ka Mosa, 49“E bakto ba'na nyathet nyamana ban bannya'na reng-oreng Isra'il se sanggup daddi tantara, suku Lewi ta' osa cathet. 50Reng-oreng Lewi soro ngoros Tang Kemah ban but-parabudda. Kawajibanna reng-oreng Lewi jareya mekol Tang Kemah ban but-parabudda sarta ngoros Kemah jareya, ban mon akemah kodu neng e sakalenglengnga Tang Kemah. 51Mon ba'na mangkada, reng-oreng Lewi se kodu abungkar Tang Kemah jareya, ban mon ba'na ambuwa, oreng Lewi keya se kodu maddek Kemah jareya. Salaenna oreng Lewi, sapa'a bai se nyemma' ka Kemah jareya kodu eokom mate. 52Reng-oreng Isra'il laenna kodu maddek kemahna e kennengnganna, e seddi'anna bul-ombulla pasukanna bang-sebang. 53Tape oreng Lewi kodu akemah e sakalenglengnga Tang Kemah, kennengnganna panyempennanna Tang kom-hokom. Reng-oreng Lewi jareya kodu ajaga Kemah jareya sopaja ta' sampe'a badha oreng se entar ka seddi'anna, sopaja Sengko' ta' sampe'a ngokom ommat Isra'il.” 54Daddi oreng Isra'il ajalannagi sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa." 
Numbers2:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers2:2 “E bakto maddek parkemahan, oreng Isra'il kodu akemah e seddi'anna bul-ombulla bang-sebang, menorot kaomma bi'-dibi'. Sakabbinna parkemahan jareya kodu epaddek e sakalenglengnga Tang Kemah, tape pajauwi sakone'.”" 
Numbers2:3 E bagiyan temor, laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla Yehuda kodu akemah menorot pasukanna ban pamimpinna bang-sebang se kantha reya sosonanna: Suku Pamimpinna Bannya'na orengnga Yehuda Nahason ana'na Aminada 74.600 Isakhar Netane'el ana'na Zuwar 54.400 Zebulon Eliyab ana'na Helon 57.400 Kabbi: 186.400 Laskarra Yehuda kodu mangkat dha'-adha' kadibi'."

Numbers2:5  
Numbers2:6

Numbers2:9  
Numbers2:10 E bagiyan lao', laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla Ruben, kodu akemah menorot pasukan ban pamimpinna bang-sebang se kantha reya sosonanna: Suku Pamimpinna Bannya'na orengnga Ruben Elizur ana'na Syedeyur 46.500 Simeyon Selumiyel ana'na Zurisyadai 59.300 Gad Elyasaf ana'na Rehuwel 45.650 Kabbi: 151.450 Kasatuwanna Ruben kodu mangkat giliran se kapeng dhuwa'."

Numbers2:16  
Numbers2:17 Saellana jareya, e nga'-tengnga'anna laskar Isra'il laenna, suku Lewi ajalan, mekol Kemah Socce. Se mangkat padha ban carana se akemah, iya areya padha akompol e seddi'anna bul-ombulla bang-sebang." 
Numbers2:18 E bagiyan bara', laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla Efraim akemah menorot pasukanna ban pamimpinna bang-sebang, se kantha reya sosonanna: Suku Pamimpinna Bannya'na orengnga Efraim Elisama ana'na Amihud 40.500 Manasye Gamaliyel ana'na Pedazur 32.200 Benyamin Abidan ana'na Gideyoni 35.400 Kabbi: 108.100 Kasatuwanna Efraim kodu ajalan e budhiyanna suku Lewi, daddi mangkat giliran se nomer tello'."

Numbers2:24  
Numbers2:25 E bagiyan dhaja, laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla Dan kodu akemah menorot pasukan ban pamimpinna se kantha reya sosonanna: Suku Pamimpinna Bannya'na orengnga Dan Ahiyezer ana'na Amisyadai 62.700 Asyer Pagiyel ana'na Okhran 41.500 Naftali Ahira ana'na Enan 53.400 Kabbi: 157.600 Kasatuwanna Dan mangkat dhi-budhi kadibi'." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27

Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31  
Numbers2:32 Bannya'na oreng Isra'il se ecathet e dhalem kasatuwan-kasatuwan menorot pasukanna bang-sebang badha nem atos tello' ebu lema ratos saeket oreng. 
Numbers2:33 Akantha se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa, oreng Lewi ta' ecathet epakompol ban reng-oreng Isra'il laenna." 
Numbers2:34 Oreng Isra'il ajalannagi sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa. Kabbi padha akemah e sakalenglengnga bul-ombulla bi'-dibi', ban mangkat menorot kaomma ban sukuna." 
Numbers3:1 Areya' toronanna Harun ban Mosa e bakto PANGERAN abu-dhabu ka Mosa e attas Gunong Sinay. 
Numbers3:2 Harun kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa: Nadab se sareyang, pas Abihu, Eleyazar ban Itamar." 
Numbers3:3 Se kaempa jareya padha etahbissagi epadaddi imam ngangguy opacara eselene mennya' e attassa serana. 
Numbers3:4 Tape Nadab ban Abihu seda e ra-ara beddhi Sinay, e bakto ngadhep ka PANGERAN ngatorragi apoy se ta' halal. Se kadhuwa jareya ta' kaagungan pottra, daddi e bakto Harun gi' odhi', Eleyazar ban Itamar se abakte daddi imam." 
Numbers3:5 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers3:6 “Olok suku Lewi soro ngadhep ka ba'na, reng-oreng jareya kabbi padha soro aladine Harun." 
Numbers3:7 Kabbi kodu ajalannagi lalakon e Tang Kemah Socce, iya areya aladine imam ban sakabbinna ommat." 
Numbers3:8 Reng-oreng jareya kodu ngoros parabudda Tang Kemah Socce, ban ajalannagi lalakon e Tang Kemah jareya menangka gantena reng-oreng Isra'il." 
Numbers3:9 Dhari bangsa Isra'il, pera' suku Lewi se bi' Sengko' epele epadaddi pangladin se teptep se kodu aladine Harun ban na' potona." 
Numbers3:10 Tape ba'na kodu ngangkat Harun ban na'-ana'na kaangguy ajalannagi lalakonna imam; sapa'a bai, oreng laenna, se ngoddi ngalakonana lalakon jareya kodu eokom mate.”" 
Numbers3:11 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers3:12 “Sateya reng-oreng Lewi bi' Sengko' epadaddi Tang andhi'. E bakto Sengko' mate'e sakabbinna ana' sareyang e Messer, sakabbinna ana' sareyangnga oreng Isra'il ban sakabbinna budhu' sareyangnga ebinna bi' Sengko' eteptebbagi daddi Tang andhi' malolo. Menangka gantena ana' sareyangnga oreng Isra'il, Sengko' sateya ngala' suku Lewi, se epadaddi Tang andhi' malolo. Sengko' reya PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 E ra-ara beddhi Sinay PANGERAN makon Mosa 
Numbers3:15 abadhi dhaftarra reng-oreng Lewi menorot kaomma ban kalowargana bang-sebang; saneyap ana' lalake' se aomor sabulan ka attas kodu ecathet nyamana. 
Numbers3:16 Papakon jareya bi' Mosa elampa'agi. 
Numbers3:17 Lewi andhi' ana' lalake' katello: Gerson, Kehat ban Merari, bangatowana om-kaom se enyamae menorot nyamana se katello jareya. Gerson andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa: Libni ban Simei. Kehat andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa: Amram, Yizhar, Hebron ban Uziyel. Merari andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa: Mahli ban Mosi. Jareya bangatowana om-kaom se enyamae menorot nyamana reng-oreng jareya." 
Numbers3:18  
Numbers3:19  
Numbers3:20  
Numbers3:21 Se tamaso' suku Gerson iya areya kaom Libni ban Simei. 
Numbers3:22 Bannya'na lalake'anna kaom Gerson se aomor sabulan ka attas se ecathet badha pettong ebu lema ratos oreng. 
Numbers3:23 Kaom jareya ekapalae Elyasaf ana'na Lael. E parkemahanna bangsa Isra'il kaom jareya ngala' kennengngan e bagiyan bara' e budhina Kemah Socce. 
Numbers3:24  
Numbers3:25 Lakona kaom jareya kodu ngoros Kemah Socce, ban kodhungnga bagiyan dhalem ban bagiyan lowar, bir-tabirra labangnga," 
Numbers3:26 bir-tabirra taneyan e sakalenglengnga Kemah ban mezba, sarta bir-tabirra labangnga taneyan jareya ban talena. Reng-oreng jareya wajib ngalakone sakabbinna lalakon se badha hubunganna ban rang-barang jareya." 
Numbers3:27 Se tamaso' suku Kehat iya areya kaom Amram, Yizhar, Hebron ban Uziyel." 
Numbers3:28 Lalake'an se aomor sabulan ka attas dhari kaom jareya bannya'na ballung ebu nem atos oreng. Reng-oreng jareya wajib ngoros rang-barang e Kemah Socce. 
Numbers3:29 Kaom jareya ekapalae Elisafan ana'na Uziyel. E parkemahan, kaom jareya ngala' kennengngan e bagiyan lao'na Kemah Socce." 
Numbers3:30  
Numbers3:31 Reng-oreng jareya wajib ngoros Petthe Parjanjiyan, meja, ko'-tongko'na damar, ba-mezba, but-parabut se eangguy para imam e Rowangan Se Socce, ban bir-tabir se malaen Rowangan Se Socce. Reng-oreng jareya wajib ngalakone sakabbinna lalakon se badha hubunganna ban rang-barang jareya." 
Numbers3:32 Kapalana suku Lewi reya Eleyazar, pottrana Harun. Eleyazar jareya se ajaga reng-oreng se wajib alako e Rowangan Se Socce." 
Numbers3:33 Se tamaso' suku Merari iya areya kaom Mahli ban Mosi. 
Numbers3:34 Lalake'an se aomor sabulan ka attas dhari kaom jareya bannya'na kabbi nem ebu dhu ratos oreng. 
Numbers3:35 Kapalana kaom jareya Zuriyel ana'na Abihail. E parkemahan kaom jareya ngala' kennengngan e dhaja'anna Kemah Socce. 
Numbers3:36 Reng-oreng jareya se kodu ngoros rangkana Kemah Socce, lo'-balo'na, ga-canggana, langganna, ban sakabbinna pakakas tor sakabbinna lalakon se badha hubunganna ban rang-barang jareya," 
Numbers3:37 bariya keya ga-cangga, panongko'anna ga-cangga, ji-paji ban le-talena taneyan lowar." 
Numbers3:38 Mosa ban Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu masang kemahna e adha'anna Kemah Socce e bagiyan temor. Reng-oreng jareya wajib ajalannagi opacara kabakteyan kaangguy bangsa Isra'il e Rowangan Se Socce. Salaenna reng-oreng jareya, sapa'a bai se ngoddi ajalannagiya lalakon jareya kodu eokom mate." 
Numbers3:39 Lalake'anna suku Lewi se aomor sabulan ka attas se ecathet bi' Mosa menorot kaomma bang-sebang menorot papakonna PANGERAN, bannya'na kabbi dhu lekor ebu oreng." 
Numbers3:40 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Sakabbinna ana' lalake' sareyangnga oreng Isra'il Tang andhi'. Cathet nyamana na'-kana' jareya se omorra sabulan ka attas. Tape menangka gantena Sengko' anyata'agi reng-oreng Lewi daddi Tang andhi' kabbi. Sengko' PANGERAN! Bariya keya ebinna oreng Lewi bi' Sengko' enyata'agi daddi gantena sakabbinna budhu' sareyangnga ebinna bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Numbers3:41  
Numbers3:42 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya; nyamana ana' lalake' se sareyang 
Numbers3:43 se aomor sabulan ka attas ecathet kabbi. Bannya'na kabbi dhu lekor ebu dhu ratos pettong polo tello' oreng. 
Numbers3:44 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers3:45 “Reng-oreng Lewi jareya padaddi Tang andhi' malolo menangka gantena ana' lalake'anna oreng Isra'il se sareyang, bariya keya ebinna oreng Lewi menangka gantena ebinna oreng Isra'il." 
Numbers3:46 Sarrena ana' lalake'anna oreng Isra'il se sareyang abannya'an dhu ratos pettong polo tello' dhari bannya'na oreng Lewi, lebbina jareya kodu etebbus." 
Numbers3:47 Rang-sorangnga kodu etebbus ban pesse salaka lalema' menorot arga e Tang Kemah; 
Numbers3:48 bajarragi pesse jareya ka Harun ban na'-ana'na.” 
Numbers3:49 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya," 
Numbers3:50 mondhut pesse salaka saebu tello ratos sabidak lema'," 
Numbers3:51 laju epassra'agi ka Harun ban tra-pottrana. 
Numbers4:1 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa ban Harun 
Numbers4:2 mabadha caca jiwana oreng Lewi dhari kaom Kehat menorot balana bang-sebang," 
Numbers4:3 pas nyathet nyamana sakabbinna oreng lalake'an se aomor tello polo sampe' saeket taon, se cocok kaangguy epassrae lalakon e Kemah Socce." 
Numbers4:4 Lalakon jareya iya areya ngoros rang-barang se paleng socce. 
Numbers4:5 PANGERAN marengngagi atoran-atoran reya ka Mosa: Mon la baktona abungkar parkemahan, Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu maso' ka Kemah Socce, matoron bir-tabir se badha e adha'na Petthe Parjanjiyan, ban notobi petthe jareya bi' kaen buru." 
Numbers4:6 Saellana jareya petthe buru pas kodu ekodhunge pole ban kole' se alos, ban e attasanna pas ebarbari kaen bungo, mon la mare kaju pekolanna pas kodu epasang." 
Numbers4:7 Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu masang kaen bungo terrong e meja se egabay panyaba'anna roti sasajin ka PANGERAN, ban e attassa meja jareya kodu epasange reng-pereng, baki baddhana dupa, baki baddhana tor-ator, ban gendhi baddhana anggur tor-ator. Roti sasajin kodu badha terros e meja jareya." 
Numbers4:8 Jareya kabbi kodu etotobi ban kaen mera, e attasanna pas etompange ban kole' se alos. Saellana jareya pas pasang kaju kol-pekolla." 
Numbers4:9 Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu mondhut kaen bungo, totobbagi ka ko'-tongko'na damar ban ka mar-damarra, bariya keya pakakas se eangguy aberse'e sombuna ban panadha'anna, ban sakabbinna baddhana mennya' jaitun." 
Numbers4:10 Ko'-tongko'na damar ban sakabbinna parabudda kodu ebungkos ban kole' se alos, samarena pas kodu esaba' e attassa pangosonganna." 
Numbers4:11 Saellana jareya Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu masang kaen bungo e attassa mezba se dhari emmas rowa, e attasanna pas ekodhunge ban kole' se alos, samarena, pas masang kaju kol-pekolla mezba jareya." 
Numbers4:12 But-parabut se eangguy ajalannagi kabakteyan e Rowangan Se Socce kodu ekala' kabbi, pas ebundu' ngangguy kaen bungo, laju etotobi ban kole' se alos, sarta pas esaba' e attassa pangosonganna." 
Numbers4:13 Abuna gaji se badha e mezba kodu eberse'e, saellana jareya, mezba jareya pas kodu epobuwi kaen bungo terrong e attasanna." 
Numbers4:14 Ban e attassa jareya Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu nyaba' sakabbinna parabut se eangguy e dhalem kabakteyan e meja jareya: baddhana apoy, garpu, panyosso'an ban jembung. Jareya kabbi pas kodu etotobi ban kole' se alos, samarena, kaju kol-pekolla pas kodu epasang." 
Numbers4:15 Mon napa' ka baktona abungkara parkemahan, Harun ban tra-pottrana kodu maso' ka dhalem Kemah Socce, pas ngodhunge rang-barang se badha e jadhiya ban but-parabudda Rowangan Se Socce; saellana jareya buru reng-oreng Kehat olle entar ka jadhiya kaangguy ngosong rang-barang jareya. Tape reng-oreng Kehat jareya ta' olle nyedding ka rang-barang jareya; mon larangan jareya ta' etoro', reng-oreng jareya tanto mate. Jareya kabbi se wajib elakone kaom Kehat mon Kemah jareya ealleya." 
Numbers4:16 Eleyazar pottrana Harun wajib ngoros Kemah Socce ban mennya'na damar, dupa, kurban gandum kaangguy sasajin se teptep, ban mennya'na opacara, sarta sabarang se badha e dhalem Kemah Socce jareya." 
Numbers4:17 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers4:18 “Jaga ja' sampe' kaom Kehat mosna dhari antarana oreng Lewi; 
Numbers4:19 ja' sampe' padha mate lantaran entar ka seddi'anna rang-barang se paleng socce. Sopaja ta' sampe'a kantha jareya, Harun ban na'-ana'na kodu maso', nyaba' reng-oreng e kennengnganna lalakonna bang-sebang, sarta noduwagi pa-apa se kodu egiba." 
Numbers4:20 Tape mon oreng Kehat maso' ka dhalem Kemah ngabasa rang-barang se socce jareya, tanto reng-oreng jareya mate.”" 
Numbers4:21 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa 
Numbers4:22 mabadha caca jiwana oreng Lewi dhari kaom Gerson menorot balana bang-sebang. 
Numbers4:23 Mosa kodu nyathet nyamana sakabbinna lalake'an se aomor tello polo sampe' saeket taon se ekenneng passrae lalakon e Kemah Socce. 
Numbers4:24 Reng-oreng jareya eberri' kawajiban ngangko' rang-barang reya: 
Numbers4:25 kaen tendhana Kemah jareya, totobba bagiyan dhalemma, totobba bagiyan lowarra, totop e bagiyan attassa se ekagabay dhari kole' se alos, kaen bir-tabirra labangnga," 
Numbers4:26 bir-tabir ban le-talena taneyan e sakalenglengnga Kemah ban mezba, bir-tabirra labangnga taneyan, ban sakabbinna parabut se eangguy masang sakabbinna rang-barang jareya. Reng-oreng jareya wajib ngalakone sakabbinna lalakon se ahubungan ban rang-barang jareya." 
Numbers4:27 Mosa ban Harun kodu ajaga sopaja lalakon se epassra'agi Harun ban tra-pottrana ka reng-oreng Gerson jareya elakone, ban sopaja rang-barang se kodu eangko', eangko' ongguwan." 
Numbers4:28 Jareya kawajibanna reng-oreng Gerson e dhalem Kemah; kawajiban-kawajiban jareya kodu elakone epimpin Itamar, pottrana Imam Harun." 
Numbers4:29 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa mabadha caca jiwana oreng Lewi dhari kaom Merari menorot balana bang-sebang. 
Numbers4:30 Mosa kodu nyathet nyamana lalake'an se omorra tello polo sampe' saeket taon se ekenneng passrae kawajiban alalakon e Kemah Socce. 
Numbers4:31 Reng-oreng jareya eberri'i kawajiban ngangko' ka-rangkana Kemah jareya, lo'-balo'na, ga-canggana ban langganna." 
Numbers4:32 Bariya keya ga-canggana taneyan e sakalenglengnga Kemah jareya sarta langganna ga-cangga jareya, ke'-cangke'na ban le-talena sarta sakabbinna pakakas se ekaparlo kaangguy maddek Kemah jareya. Saneyap oreng ewajibbagi ngeba rang-barang se la etantowagi." 
Numbers4:33 Jareya kabbi kawajibanna kaom Merari; sakabbinna lalakonna reng-oreng jareya e Kemah Socce kodu ejalannagi epimpin Itamar, pottrana Imam Harun." 
Numbers4:34 Menorot dhabuna PANGERAN, Mosa, Harun ban para pamimpinna ommat mabadha caca jiwana kaom se tatello' e dhalem suku Lewi, iya areya Kehat, Gerson ban Merari. Caca jiwa jareya ejalannagi gan sabala. Nyamana lalake'an se aomor tello polo sampe' saeket taon se ekenneng passrae kawajiban alalakon e Kemah Socce ecathet kabbi. Areya' hasella:" 
Numbers4:35 Kaom Bannya'na orengnga Kehat 2.750 Gerson 2.630 Merari 3.200 Kabbi: 8.580 
Numbers4:36 Menorot dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, saneyap oreng ecathet ban eberri' tanggung jawab bang-sebang parkara apa se kodu eladine ban apa se kodu eangko'." 
Numbers5:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers5:2 “Parenta'agi ka oreng Isra'il: Reng-oreng se nyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk, otabana panyaket matakao, otabana se la nyedding ka mayyit, kabbi kodu padha epakalowar dhari parkemahanna oreng Isra'il." 
Numbers5:3 Reng-oreng jareya kodu esoro nyengga sopaja ta' manajjis parkemahan, se ekennengnge Sengko' ban Tang ommat.”" 
Numbers5:4 Oreng Isra'il ajalannagi papakon jareya ban makalowar sakabbinna oreng se kantha jareya dhari parkemahan. 
Numbers5:5 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers5:6 “Kabala ka reng-oreng Isra'il: Mon oreng ta' esto ka Sengko' ban agabay sala ka oreng laen," 
Numbers5:7 oreng jareya kodu ngakone dusana ban nebbus kasala'anna sagenna'na, etambai dhu polo persenna ka oreng se eparogi jareya." 
Numbers5:8 Tape mon oreng se eparogi jareya la mate ban ta' andhi' ana' otaba bala se semma', tebbusanna kasala'an jareya kodu eatorragi ka Sengko', ban daddi bagiyanna imam. Tebbusanna kasala'an jareya ta' tamaso' dumba lake' kaangguy opacara palebbaranna dusana oreng se sala jareya." 
Numbers5:9 Bariya keya apa'a bai se eatorragi oreng Isra'il ka Sengko', tor-ator se emaksottagi ka Sengko' malolo, daddi bagiyanna imam se narema tor-ator jareya." 
Numbers5:10 Pa-apa se epassra'agi ka imam daddi bagiyanna imam jareya.” 
Numbers5:11 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa 
Numbers5:12 marengngagi atoran-atoran reya ka reng-oreng Isra'il: Olle daddi badha lalake' se andhi' panyangka juba' ka binena, nyangka binena ta' esto ka aba'na ban macemmer aba'na dibi' lantaran tedhung apolong ban lalake' laen. Tape lakena jareya ta' yakin, sabab binena se alako kantha jareya tek-ngetek. Tadha' saksena, ban binena jareya ta' tajuguk teppa'na alako cemmer jareya. Otabana olle daddi oreng lalake' andhi' panyangka juba' ka se bine', mangkana binena ta' alako serong." 
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14  
Numbers5:15 E dhalem parkara se dhu macem jareya, lalake' buru kodu ngeba binena ka imam. Lalake' jareya kodu ngeba keya tor-ator se ekaparlo, iya areya teppong gandum sakilo. Teppong jareya ta' olle epobuwi mennya' jaitun otaba dupa, sabab jareya tor-ator panyangka se juba' ban maksodda nandha'agiya badhana panyangka juba' dhari lake ka binena." 
Numbers5:16 Imam kodu nyoro babine' jareya entar ka adha'na mezba ban manjeng ngadhep ka PANGERAN. 
Numbers5:17 Saellana jareya imam kodu ngala' pennay tana ban ngesse'e pennay jareya bi' aeng socce sakone', pas ngala' abu sakone' dhari palesteranna Kemah Socce, abu jareya kodu epamaso' ka dhalem aeng gella' sopaja pae'a." 
Numbers5:18 Saellana jareya imam buru kodu abarbar obu'na babine' jareya, ban nyaba' teppong tor-ator panyangka se juba' ka tanangnga, dineng imam jareya dibi' kodu neggu' pennay se aesse aeng se pae' se madhateng babaston." 
Numbers5:19 Saellana jareya imam kodu nyompa babine' jareya kantha reya, “Mon ba'na ta' azina, ba'na lopot dhari babaston se epadhateng aeng reya." 
Numbers5:20 Tape mon ba'na la azina," 
Numbers5:21 mandar nyamana ba'na bi' PANGERAN epadaddiya babaston e antarana bangsana ba'na. Mandar bi' PANGERAN kamalowanna ba'na epakero'a ban tabu'na epakembunga. 
Numbers5:22 Aeng se madhateng babaston reya bakal maso'a ka tabu'na ba'na sampe' tabu'na ba'na kembung ban kamalowanna ba'na kero'.” Babine' jareya kodu nyaot, “Kaula mator enggi; moga-moga sareng PANGERAN epasapaneka'a.”" 
Numbers5:23 Imam jareya pas kodu noles babaston jareya e dalubang gulungan, tolesan jareya pas ekosot ban aeng se pae' rowa." 
Numbers5:24 Imam jareya pas nyoro babine' jareya ngenom aeng se pae' se madhateng babaston gella'. Mon eenom, aeng jareya madhateng rassa sake'." 
Numbers5:25 Imam kodu ngala' tor-ator se aropa teppong dhari tanangnga babine' gella' pas eatorragi ka ajunanna PANGERAN, terros egiba ka mezba." 
Numbers5:26 Saellana jareya pas kodu ngala' teppong sapergem menangka tandha ja' teppong jareya kabbi la eatorragi ka PANGERAN, teppong jareya pas eobbar e attassa mezba. Dhi-budhina aeng gella' pas eenommagi ka babine' jareya." 
Numbers5:27 Mon babine' jareya pajat azina onggu, samarema ngenom aeng jareya pas arassa ce' sake'na; tabu'na kembung ban kamalowanna laju kero'. Nyamana bakal daddiya babaston e antarana bangsana." 
Numbers5:28 Tape mon ta' sala, babine' jareya ta' ekenneng babaston ban gi' bisa andhi' ana'." 
Numbers5:29 Kantha jareya atoranna mon badha lalake' se andhi' panyangka juba' ja' binena alako serong ban lalake' laen. Babine' jareya kodu eadhebbagi ka PANGERAN, egiba ka adha'anna mezba, ban imam kodu ajalannagi atoran gella' ka babine' jareya." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Lakena lopot dhari kasala'an, tape binena mon etemmo ja' sala, kodu nanggung okomanna." 
Numbers6:1 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa 
Numbers6:2 marengngagi atoran-atoran reya ka oreng Isra'il: Saneyap lalake' otaba babine' se andhi' neyat odhi'a ngabdi ka PANGERAN malolo menangka oreng nazir," 
Numbers6:3 ta' olle ngenom aeng anggur otabana towa'. Ta' olle ngenom nom-enoman apa'a bai se ekagabay dhari buwana anggur otabana wa'-buwa'an laenna. Oreng jareya ta' olle ngakan buwana anggur se gi' cengngar otabana se kerreng, otabana apa'a bai se asalla dhari bungkana anggur; bigina otabana konco'na balakka' ta' olle." 
Numbers6:4  
Numbers6:5 Saabidda ajalannagi neyadda, obu'na ta' olle ketthok otaba ecokor. Saabidda jareya obu'na ban janggu'na kodu epanneng, epalanjang. Oreng jareya kodu ajalannagi neyadda sampe' mare baktona pangabdiyanna aba'na ka PANGERAN malolo." 
Numbers6:6 Obu'na jareya menangka tandha ja' aba'na ngabdi ka Allah malolo. Saabidda jareya oreng jareya ta' olle manajjis aba'na; ta' olle nyemma'e mayyit, maske mayyidda eppa'na, ebuna otaba taretanna sakale." 
Numbers6:7  
Numbers6:8 Saabidda anyama oreng nazir, oreng jareya malolo ngabdi ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers6:9 Mon obu'na oreng nazir se la eatorragi malolo ka PANGERAN daddi najjis lantaran oreng jareya badha e seddi'na oreng se mate dadagan, oreng jareya kodu anante' pettong are abidda; saellana jareya obu' ban janggu'na kodu ecokor, buru aba'na daddi berse pole." 
Numbers6:10 E are se kapeng ballu' oreng jareya kodu ngeba poter otaba pejji dhadhuwa'; mano' jareya kodu egiba ka imam e labangnga Kemah Socce. 
Numbers6:11 Mano'na se settong kodu eatorragi ka imam menangka kurban palebbaranna dusa, ban settonganna menangka kurban obbaran kaangguy maelang najjissa aba'na. E are jareya keya oreng jareya kodu ngatorragi pole obu'na ka PANGERAN malolo," 
Numbers6:12 ban nganyare pamassra'anna aba'na menangka oreng nazir. Bakto se la kajalanan battal lantaran obu'na najjis. Menangka kurban tebbusanna kasala'anna oreng jareya kodu ngatorragi budhu'na dumba se gi' aomor sataon. 
Numbers6:13 Mon oreng nazir la mare ngessa'agi neyadda, pas kodu mabadha opacara. Oreng jareya kodu eaterragi ka adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce" 
Numbers6:14 sambi ngeba tor-ator ka PANGERAN aropa ebin tatello' se tadha' calena: budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon kaangguy kurban obbaran, budhu'na dumba babine' se aomor sataon kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa, ban dumba lake' kaangguy kurban salameddan." 
Numbers6:15 Oreng jareya kodu ngatorragi keya roti se ta' eragi'i sacettheng, iya areya roti se kandel se ekagabay dhari teppong se paleng bagus se ecampor bi' mennya' jaitun, ban jajan se ebulidi mennya' jaitun. Laen dhari jareya oreng buru kodu ngatorragi keya kurban sasajin ban kurban aeng anggur." 
Numbers6:16 Imam kodu ngeba jareya kabbi ka ajunanna PANGERAN, pas ngatorragi kurban pangamponanna dusa sarta kurban obbaran." 
Numbers6:17 Kurban roti se sacettheng gella' kodu eatorragi epabareng ban dumba lake' gella' menangka kurban salameddan. Bariya keya kurban sasajin ban kurban aeng anggur gella' kodu eatorragi ka PANGERAN. 
Numbers6:18 Oreng nazir jareya kodu nyokor obu'na e labangnga Kemah Socce, obu' jareya kodu eontallagi ka dhalem apoy kennengnganna kurban salameddan se teppa'na eobbar." 
Numbers6:19 Saellana jareya, imam ngala' pokang adha'na dumba lake'na se la eola, laju esaba' ka tanangnga oreng nazir jareya etoro'e roti se kandel sarta jajan se dhari cettheng gella' settong ebang." 
Numbers6:20 Saellana jareya imam kodu ngatorragi kakanan jareya menangka tor-ator ka PANGERAN; jareya bagiyan se socce se daddi bagiyanna imam, salaenna dhadha ban pokangnga dumba lake' se menorot atoran pajat daddi bagiyanna imam. Buru saellana jareya oreng nazir buru olle ngenom aengnga anggur." 
Numbers6:21 Jareya atoranna kaangguy oreng nazir; tape mon oreng nazir ajanjiyagi kurban se ngalebbi'i rat-saradda neyadda, oreng jareya kodu pateppa' ajalannagi janji jareya." 
Numbers6:22 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers6:23 “Kabala ka Harun ban na'-ana'na mon aberkadi oreng Isra'il soro ngangguy ca'-oca' kantha reya: 
Numbers6:24 Moga-moga PANGERAN aberkadana ban ajaga'a ba'na. 
Numbers6:25 Moga-moga PANGERAN saeya ban lamba'a ka ba'na. 
Numbers6:26 Moga-moga PANGERAN bellasa ban aparenga kataremtemman ka ba'na. 
Numbers6:27 Mam-imam kodu nyebbut Tang nyama e bakto aberkadi oreng Isra'il. Mon se kantha jareya ejalannagi, reng-oreng Isra'il bi' Sengko' eberkadana.”" 
Numbers7:1 Saellana Mosa mare se maddek Kemah Socce, Kemah jareya ban but-parabudda ebulidi mennya' opacara menangka tandha Kemah jareya eatorragi ka PANGERAN. Bariya keya mezba ban but-parabudda." 
Numbers7:2 Saellana jareya para pamimpinna Isra'il, iya areya para kapalana suku se ngoros caca jiwa," 
Numbers7:3 ngeba tor-ator se eatorragi ka ajunanna PANGERAN; tor-ator jareya aropa jikar nem-ennem ban sape dhubellas: saneyap pamimpin kadhuwa nyombang jikar settong, ban saneyap settong pamimpin nyombang sape settong. Samarena reng-oreng jareya ngatorragi jikar ban sapena," 
Numbers7:4 PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa," 
Numbers7:5 “Tarema tor-ator jareya, angguy ngangko' Tang Kemah; passra'agi kabbi ka oreng Lewi sabab kawajibanna oreng Lewi jareya ngangko' Tang Kemah.”" 
Numbers7:6 Kar-jikar ban pe-sape jareya bi' Mosa laju epassra'agi ka oreng Lewi. 
Numbers7:7 Jikar dhadhuwa' ban sape pa'-empa' eparengngagi ka reng-oreng Gerson," 
Numbers7:8 jikar pa'-empa' ban sape baballu' eparengngagi ka reng-oreng Merari, menorot kaparlowanna lalakonna reng-oreng jareya se ekapalae Itamar, pottrana Imam Harun." 
Numbers7:9 Tape reng-oreng Kehat ta' narema jikar otaba sape dhari Mosa, sabab rang-barang socce se daddi tanggunganna reng-oreng jareya kodu epekol e bauna." 
Numbers7:10 Para pamimpin jareya ngeba keya tor-ator kaangguy araya'agiya opacarana pantahbisanna mezba. E bakto kabbi la padha ranta se ngeba'a tor-atorra ka adha'anna mezba," 
Numbers7:11 PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa, “Kabala ka reng-oreng jareya ja' sabban are sampe' dhubellas are abidda sala settong dhari para pamimpin jareya kodu ngatorragi kurbanna kaangguy opacarana pantahbisanna mezba.”" 
Numbers8:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kabala ka Harun mon nyaba' damar se papetto' e ko'-tongko'na, soro saba' pateppa' me' olle nyonare bagiyan adha'na ko'-tongko'na damar jareya.”" 
Numbers8:2  
Numbers8:3 Harun alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya. Mar-damar gella' esaba' epaaddhep ka bagiyan adha'na ko'-tongko'na damar jareya. 
Numbers8:4 Sokona damar jareya dhari attas sampe' ka baba ekagabay dhari emmas tempa'an kabbi, menorot conto se epatengale ka Mosa bi' PANGERAN." 
Numbers8:5 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers8:6 “Palaennagi reng-oreng Lewi jareya dhari reng-oreng Isra'il laenna, pas badha'agi opacara nyocce'e reng-oreng jareya" 
Numbers8:7 kalaban cara se kantha reya: reng-oreng jareya ketesse aeng kaangguy opacara panyocceyan, saellana pas soro acokor sabalattrana badanna ban nyassa kalambina. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya reng-oreng jareya berse." 
Numbers8:8 Saellana pas soro ngala' sape lake' se gi' ngodha settong sarta kurban sasajin dhari teppong se paleng bagus ecampore mennya'. Bariya keya sape lake' laen settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa. 
Numbers8:9 Ommat Isra'il pas pakompol, ban reng-oreng Lewi soro manjeng e adha'anna Tang Kemah." 
Numbers8:10 Ommat Isra'il kodu nompangngagi tanangnga e attassa cethagga reng-oreng Lewi. 
Numbers8:11 Harun laju kodu ngatorragi reng-oreng Lewi jareya menangka tor-ator dhari reng-oreng Isra'il se malolo ka Sengko', me' olle reng-oreng jareya ngenneng ajalannagi lalakonna kaangguy Sengko'." 
Numbers8:12 Reng-oreng Isra'il jareya pas kodu nompangngagi tanangnga ka attassa cethagga sape lake' se dhadhuwa' jareya; se settong kodu eatorragi menangka kurban palebbaranna dusa, ban settonganna kaangguy kurban obbaran. Kalaban upacara se kantha jareya oreng Lewi esocce'e." 
Numbers8:13 Reng-oreng Lewi jareya kagabay kurban se malolo ka Sengko', pas soro aladine Harun ban na'-ana'na." 
Numbers8:14 Kalaban opacara jareya ba'na malaen oreng Lewi dhari oreng Isra'il laenna, sopaja reng-oreng Lewi jareya daddiya Tang andhi'." 
Numbers8:15 Saellana jareya, buru reng-oreng jareya andhi' ha' alako e dhalem Tang Kemah." 
Numbers8:16 Bi' Sengko' reng-oreng Lewi jareya ekagabay gantena sakabbinna ana' lalake'an Isra'il se sareyang; daddi reng-oreng jareya Tang andhi' malolo. 
Numbers8:17 E bakto Sengko' mate'e sakabbinna ana' sareyang e Messer, ana' lalake' sareyangnga oreng Isra'il ban saneyap keban se sareyang bi' Sengko' epadaddi Tang andhi' malolo." 
Numbers8:18 Sateya menangka gantena sakabbinna ana' sareyangnga oreng Isra'il, Sengko' ngala' reng-oreng Lewi," 
Numbers8:19 ban reng-oreng Lewi jareya bi' Sengko' epassra'agi ka Harun ban na'-ana'na, menangka tor-atorra bangsa Isra'il me' olle ngenneng ngalakone kawajiban kaangguy oreng Isra'il e dhalem Tang Kemah. Bariya keya sopaja reng-oreng jareya nyo'onnagi sapora kaangguy bangsa Isra'il sopaja bangsa jareya ta' ekennenga balai mon nyander tasemma' gallu ka kennengngan se socce jareya.”" 
Numbers8:20 Daddi Harun, Mosa ban sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il ngatorragi oreng Lewi ka PANGERAN, menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa." 
Numbers8:21 Reng-oreng Lewi jareya nyocce'e aba'na ban nyassa angguyya. Saellana jareya, bi' Harun laju eatorragi ka PANGERAN menangka tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN. Laen dhari jareya Harun mabadha opacara nyocce'e reng-oreng Lewi jareya." 
Numbers8:22 Oreng Isra'il ngalakone sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa parkara oreng Lewi. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya oreng Lewi narema ha' kaangguy alako e dhalem Kemah Socce, se epimpin bi' Harun ban tra-pottrana." 
Numbers8:23 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers8:24 “Saneyap oreng Lewi se aomor sagame' taon ka attas, kodu ngalakone kawajibanna e dhalem Tang Kemah," 
Numbers8:25 mon omorra la saeket taon la ta' wajib pole ngalakone lalakon jareya; 
Numbers8:26 olle nolonge oreng Lewi laenna se ngalakone kawajibanna e dhalem Tang Kemah, tape ta' olle neggu' lalakon jareya dibi'. Kantha jareya carana ba'na ngator lalakonna reng-oreng Lewi.”" 
Numbers9:1 E bulan settong e dhalem taon se kapeng dhuwa' saellana bangsa Isra'il nyengla dhari Messer, PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa e Sagara Beddhi Sinay." 
Numbers9:2 Dhabuna, “E tanggal pa' bellas bulan reya, molae bakto para' compet are, oreng Isra'il kodu araya'agi Paska menorot atoran se la eteptebbagi.”" 
Numbers9:3  
Numbers9:4 Daddi Mosa makon bangsa Isra'il araya'agi Paska. 
Numbers9:5 Reng-oreng jareya araya'agi Paska buru e Sagara Beddhi Sinay e bakto para' compet are e tanggal pa' bellas bulan settong. Reng-oreng Isra'il jareya mabadha paraya'an jareya menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Mosa. 
Numbers9:6 Tape e antarana reng-oreng Isra'il jareya badha se najjis lantaran nyedding mayyit, daddi ta' olle araya'agi Paska e are jareya. Daddi reng-oreng jareya ngadhep ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers9:7 laju mator, “Kaula paneka najjis polana nyedding mayyit. Namong aponapa kaula me' ebida'agi kantos ta' kengeng ngatorragi kurban ka PANGERAN akadi tan-taretan laenna?”" 
Numbers9:8 Dhabuna Mosa, “Nante' gallu sampe' sengko' narema petodu dhari PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers9:9 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers9:10 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il: Mon e antarana ba'na otaba na' potona badha se najjis polana nyedding mayyit, otabana teppa'na ajalanan jau, oreng jareya wajib keya araya'agi Paska." 
Numbers9:11 Tape paraya'an jareya kodu ebadha'agi saellana Paska jareya lebat sabulan, iya areya e malem tanggal pa' bellas bulan dhuwa'. Raya'agi are jareya kalaban ngakan dumba Paska ban roti se ta' eragi'i ban ngan-gangan se pae'." 
Numbers9:12 Kakanan jareya ja' pabadha karena sampe' kalagguwanna, ban tolangnga keban se eatorragi ka Sengko' ja' sampe' badha se potong. Raya'agi Paska jareya menorot sakabbinna atoran se la eteptebbagi." 
Numbers9:13 Sabaligga oreng se ta' najjis, ban ta' teppa'na badha e dhalem parjalanan, tape ta' ajalannagi kawajiban araya'agi Paska jareya, bi' Sengko' la ta' eanggep Tang ommat pole, sabab ta' ngatorragi kurban ka Sengko' e bakto se la etantowagi. Oreng jareya kodu nanggung okomanna dusana." 
Numbers9:14 Mon e antarana ba'na badha oreng manca se la neptep ako-bengko e jadhiya noro'a araya'agi Paska, oreng jareya kodu araya'agi menorot atoran se la eteptebbagi. Hokom jareya kodu etoro' bi' saneyap oreng, ta' parduli oreng jareya tamaso' oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca.”" 
Numbers9:15 E bakto Kemah Socce epaddek, badha ondhem se notobi Kemah jareya. E baja malem ondhem jareya katon akantha apoy." 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 Mon ondhem jareya ongga, oreng Isra'il abungkar kemahna se ekennengnge, pas mangkat dhari jadhiya. Mon ondhem jareya toron e settong kennengngan, oreng Isra'il pas ambu, laju maddek kemah e jadhiya." 
Numbers9:18 Oreng Isra'il abungkar ban maddek kemah menorot dhabuna PANGERAN. Saabidda ondhem gella' gi' badha e attasanna Kemah Socce, oreng Isra'il paggun neng e parkemahanna jareya." 
Numbers9:19 Mon ondhem jareya sampe' abit badha e attasanna Kemah, oreng Isra'il atoro' ka atoranna PANGERAN, ta' aginjeggan dhari kennengngan jareya." 
Numbers9:20 Tape dhang-kadhang ondhem jareya badha e attasanna Kemah jareya coma barampanan are. Pandha'na, oreng Isra'il paggun neng e parkemahanna otaba ngalle ka parkemahan laen baramma ca'na dhabuna PANGERAN." 
Numbers9:21 Dhang-kadhang ondhem jareya badha e attasanna Kemah pera' molae sar-asar sampe' kalagguwanna gu-laggu, ban e bakto ondhem jareya ongga, seyang otaba malem, oreng Isra'il pas mangkat pole." 
Numbers9:22 Saabidda ondhem jareya gi' badha e attasanna Kemah gella', apa dhu are, sabulan, sataon otaba lebbi, saabidda jareya keya oreng Isra'il ta' aguliyan dhari kennengnganna. Mon ondhemma ongga, buru mangkat pole." 
Numbers9:23 Oreng Isra'il akemah e settong kennengngan ban mangkat ka kennengngan laen menorot dhabuna PANGERAN se epanapa' kalaban parantara'anna Mosa. 
Numbers10:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers10:2 “Agabay tarompet dhadhuwa' dhari salaka tempa'an kaangguy ngolok makompola ra'yat, otabana mon nyorowa reng-oreng abungkara kemah mon mangkada." 
Numbers10:3 Mon tarompet se dhadhuwa' jareya epamonye jang-lanjang, artena ommat Isra'il kodu akompol kabbi e sakalenglengnga ba'na e adha'anna labangnga Tang Kemah." 
Numbers10:4 Tape mon se epamonye pera' settong, artena pera' para pamimpinna se kodu akompol e sakalenglengnga ba'na." 
Numbers10:5 Mon tarompedda epamonye epapandha' monyena, jareya artena ku-suku se akemah e bagiyan temor kodu mangkat." 
Numbers10:6 Mon epamonye dha'-pandha' kadhukaleyanna, ku-suku se e bagiyan lao' se kodu mangkat. Daddi monye se dha'-pandha' artena ommat kodu mangkat," 
Numbers10:7 dineng monye se lanjang artena ommat kodu akompol. 
Numbers10:8 Pet-tarompet jareya kodu epamonye bi' mam-imam, na'-ana'na Harun. Jareya atoran se kodu eestowagi bi' ba'na salanjangnga." 
Numbers10:9 Ban mon ba'na aperrang e nagarana ba'na dibi' nahana serranganna moso, tope tarompet se dhadhuwa' jareya. Mon pet-tarompet jareya la epamonye, Sengko', PANGERAN Allahna ba'na, nolonga ban masalamedda ba'na dhari so-mosona." 
Numbers10:10 Bariya keya bila'a bai mon ba'na teppa'na neng-sennengngan, iya areya e bakto araya'agi Bulan Anyar ban e bakto araya'agi parengeddanna re-are raja laenna, tarompet jareya kodu epamonye e bakto ba'na ngatorragi kurban obbaran ban kurban salameddan ka Sengko'. Mon jareya etoro' kabbi, Sengko' nolonga ba'na. Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na.”" 
Numbers10:11 E dhalem taon se kapeng dhuwa' saellana bangsa Isra'il nyengla dhari Messer, e tanggal dhu polo bulan dhuwa', ondhem e attassa Kemah Socce ongga ka attas." 
Numbers10:12 Oreng Isra'il laju padha mangkat dhari Sagara Beddhi Sinay, ban ondhem jareya ambu e bakto reng-oreng jareya napa' ka ra-ara Paran." 
Numbers10:13 Jareya se dha'-adha'na bangsa Isra'il mangkat menorot papakonna PANGERAN kalaban parantara'anna Mosa. 
Numbers10:14 Sabban mangkat toro' gilirra epapaggun terros, e dha'-adha' kadibi' laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla suku Yehuda, gan kan-sapasukan, epimpin Nahason, ana'na Aminadab." 
Numbers10:15 Netane'el ana'na Zuwar mimpin barisanna suku Isakhar," 
Numbers10:16 ban Eliyab ana'na Helon mimpin barisanna suku Zebulon. 
Numbers10:17 Saellana jareya Kemah Socce pas ebungkar, kaom Gerson ban Merari se mekol Kemah jareya pas mangkat e budhiyanna." 
Numbers10:18 Laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla suku Ruben mangkat e budhiyanna, gan kan-sapasukan, epimpin Elizur ana'na Syedeyur," 
Numbers10:19 Selumiyel ana'na Zurisyadai se mimpin barisanna suku Simeyon," 
Numbers10:20 ban Elyasaf ana'na Rehuwel se mimpin barisanna suku Gad. 
Numbers10:21 E budhiyanna jareya reng-oreng Kehat se mekol rang-barang se socce. Mon reng-oreng jareya napa' ka kennengnganna parkemahan samarena jareya, Kemah Socce la mare epasang pole." 
Numbers10:22 Saellana jareya nyosol laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla suku Efraim, gan kan-sapasukan, Elisama ana'na Amihud se mimpin barisanna suku Efraim," 
Numbers10:23 Gamaliyel ana'na Pedazur se mimpin barisanna suku Manasye," 
Numbers10:24 ban Abidan ana'na Gideyoni se mimpin barisanna suku Benyamin. 
Numbers10:25 E dhi-budhi kadibi' laskar se ngangguy bul-ombulla kasatuwanna suku Dan. Reng-oreng jareya se daddi pangawal budhina sakabbinna kasatuwan laenna. Reng-oreng jareya ajalan gan kan-sapasukan, Ahiyezer ana'na Amisyadai se mimpin barisanna suku Dan." 
Numbers10:26 Pagiyel ana'na Okhran se mimpin barisanna suku Asyer," 
Numbers10:27 ban Ahira ana'na Enan se mimpin barisanna suku Naftali. 
Numbers10:28 Jareya toro' gilirra barisanna oreng Isra'il, kan-sapasukan, sabban mangkat nerrossagiya parjalananna." 
Numbers10:29 Mosa adhabu ka eparra, iya areya Hobab ana'na Rehuwel oreng Midian, “Sengko' ban tang bangsa mangkada ka kennengngan se menorot dhabuna PANGERAN eparengngagiya ka tang bangsa. PANGERAN la ajanji madaddiya bangsa Isra'il bangsa se ma'mor. Daddi mara, ba'na noro', ba'na e dhissa' epamelowa bagiyan dhari kama'moranna tang bangsa jareya.”" 
Numbers10:30 Saodda Hobab, “Bunten, sakalangkong, kaula terro palemana ka kampong.”" 
Numbers10:31 “Ella, ba'na ja' abali ka kampongnga,” dhabuna Mosa, “ba'na tao noduwagi jalan ka tang bangsa, sabab ba'na tao e dhimma se ekenneng paddeggi kemah e ra-ara beddhi reya." 
Numbers10:32 Mon ba'na noro', bi' sengko' ba'na epamelowa pa-apa se becce' se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka tang bangsa.”" 
Numbers10:33 Saellana mangkat dhari Gunong Sinay, gunong kalenggiyanna PANGERAN, bangsa Isra'il pas ajalan tello are abidda. Petthe Parjanjiyan ros-terrosan esaba' e adha' kaangguy nyare kennengngan paambuwan se maddegga kemah." 
Numbers10:34 Mon reng-oreng jareya mangkat dhari kennengnganna parkemahanna, ondhemma PANGERAN ros-terrosan badha e attasanna reng-oreng jareya e bakto seyang." 
Numbers10:35 Sabban Petthe Parjanjiyan jareya egiba mangkat, Mosa adhabu, “Ngereng ngadek, GUSTE; pasalbuddagi mosoepon Junandalem sopaja oreng se baji' ka Junandalem padha'a buru.”" 
Numbers10:36 Mon Petthe Parjanjiyan jareya napa' ka paambuwan, Mosa adhabu, “Ngereng abali, GUSTE, ka ommat Isra'il se abun-ebun ka'dhinto.”" 
Numbers11:1 E settong are bangsa Isra'il aserrowan ka PANGERAN polana nemmo kasossa'an sabannya'na. Meyarsa aserrowan reng-oreng jareya, PANGERAN duka, laju madhateng apoy. Apoy jareya alatlat san-kassannagi sampe' sala settong dhari penggirra parkemahan jareya katonon." 
Numbers11:2 Reng-oreng Isra'il rat-tharadan menta tolong ka Mosa. Mosa pas nyo'on ka PANGERAN, daddi apoy jareya laju mate." 
Numbers11:3 Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Tabera, sabab e jadhiya apoyya PANGERAN rabbang makatonon kennengnganna reng-oreng Isra'il." 
Numbers11:4 Badha reng-oreng manca se abareng ban reng-oreng Isra'il e dhalem parjalanan jareya. Reng-oreng manca jareya ce' terrona ngakana daging, ban reng-oreng Isra'il molae noro' ango'ngo'an keya, oca'na, “Ja' sakenga badha se aberri' juko' daging ka sengko'!" 
Numbers11:5 E Messer sengko' ngakan juko' sampe' tobuk, ban ta' osa majar. Gi' ta' kabitong temon, somangka, prei, babang mera ban babang pote se ekakan sengko' e dhissa'!" 
Numbers11:6 Tape sateya aba' la ta' andhi' kakowadan, polana tadha' se ekakana kajabana manna malolo.”" 
Numbers11:7 Manna reya akantha katombar, ne'-kene', barnana pote abak koneng." 
Numbers11:8 E baja malem manna jareya gaggar ka kennengnganna parkemahan abareng ban ebbun. Kalagguwanna gu-laggu oreng Isra'il ajalan ka bara' ka temor, ka dhaja ka lao' makompol manna jareya. Ollena pas egilis otaba etoto ekagabay teppong, pas eola ekagabay jajan se bunter tor peppe'. Rassana padha ban roti se epanggang ban mennya' jaitun." 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Mosa meyarsa reng-oreng Isra'il se ango'ngo'an sambi manjeng akompol e adha'anna labangnga kemahna. PANGERAN duka, daddi Mosa sossa panggaliyanna." 
Numbers11:11 Atorra Mosa ka PANGERAN, “Aponapa abdidalem me' epakadi ka'dhinto? Aponapa Junandalem me' ta' neser ka abdidalem? Aponapa abdidalem me' epakon ngoros reng-oreng ka'dhinto?" 
Numbers11:12 Mangkana banne abdidalem se agandhu' sareng se alahirragi reng-oreng ka'dhinto! Aponapa abdidalem me' epakadi oreng se nganju sareng ngemban na'-kana' kene', ros-terrosan salanjangnga parjalanan ka nagara se sareng Junandalem ejanjiyagi ka bangatowaepon reng-oreng ka'dhinto?" 
Numbers11:13 Ngereng peyarsa'agi, reng-oreng ka'dhinto ango'ngo' ros-terrosan nyo'on daging. E ka'dhimma abdidalem se manggiya daging se eparengngagiya ka oreng sakaddu' ra'ra' ka'dhinto?" 
Numbers11:14 Abdidalem ta' sanggup ngoros reng-oreng ka'dhinto kadibi'an; taberra' dhimen! 
Numbers11:15 Manabi abdidalem epakadiya ka'dhinto ros-terrosan, langkong sae pate'e saos abdidalem, manabi Junandalem bellas ka abdidalem; sopaja abdidalem ta' pate abit nanggung kasangsara'an ka'dhinto.”" 
Numbers11:16 PANGERAN pas adhabu ka Mosa, “Kassa' ba'na makompol pettong polo oreng se wa-towa se eakone menangka pamimpinna bangsa. Giba kabbi ka adha'na Tang Kemah, soro manjeng e jadhiya e erenganna ba'na." 
Numbers11:17 Sengko' torona, acaca'a bi' ba'na e jadhiya, sabagiyan dhari kakobasa'an se etarema ba'na dhari Sengko', bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka reng-oreng jareya. Daddi reng-oreng jareya ngenneng abanto ba'na, noro' mekol tanggung jawab e dhalem ngoros bangsa jareya, daddi lalakon jareya ta' osa etanggung ekadibi'i ba'na." 
Numbers11:18 Ba'na ngoca' kantha reya ka ommat Isra'il, ‘Mara kabbi padha nyocce'e aba' kaangguy lagguna; ba'na bakal ngakana daging. PANGERAN la meyarsa serrona ba'na se terro ngakana daging, bariya keya ba'na se ngoca' ja' odhi'na ba'na anyamanan se gi' badha e Messer. Sateya bi' PANGERAN ba'na eparengngana daging se ekenneng kakan ba'na." 
Numbers11:19 Ba'na ngakana daging jareya banne pera' saare dhu are, otaba lema are otaba sapolo are, banne dhu polo are," 
Numbers11:20 tape sampe' sabulan abidda, sampe' ba'na mabu' ban aota'an. Jareya polana ba'na nolak PANGERAN se badha e nga'-tengnga'anna ba'na, sarta polana ba'na ango'ngo'an polana se nyengla dhari Messer.’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Atorra Mosa ka PANGERAN, “Ommat Isra'il ka'dhinto bannya'epon nem atos ebu oreng. Kadi ponapa Junandalem me' adhabu marengana daging kantos sabulan abittepon ka oreng se saka'dhinto bannya'na?" 
Numbers11:22 E ka'dhimma se manggiya sape sareng dumba se esambelliya se cokoba makennyang reng-oreng se saka'dhinto bannya'na? Ponapa juko' se badha e tase' kerana cokop makennyanga reng-oreng ka'dhinto sadaja?” 
Numbers11:23 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Apa Tang kakobasa'an badha batessa? Ba'na bakal duliya nangale'e apa se ekoca'agi Sengko' jareya bendher otaba enja'!”" 
Numbers11:24 Daddi Mosa pas kalowar, manapa' ka bangsana sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. Mosa makompol pamimpin se pettong polo oreng bannya'na, epakon manjeng e sakalenglengnga Kemah Socce." 
Numbers11:25 PANGERAN pas toron e dhalem ondhem, laju abu-dhabu ka Mosa. PANGERAN mondhut sabagiyan dhari kakobasa'an se la eparengngagi ka Mosa, laju eparengngagi ka pamimpin laenna se bannya'na pettong polo oreng rowa. E bakto kamaso'an kakobasa'an jareya, reng-oreng buru laju ra'-era'an akantha para nabbi, tape ta' sampe' abit." 
Numbers11:26 E antarana pamimpin se pettong polo oreng gella' badha oreng kadhuwa, nyamana Eldad ban Medad, paggun neng e parkemahan, ta' entar ka Kemah Socce ban en-laenna. E parkemahan jareya se kadhuwa buru kamaso'an kakobasa'anna Pangeran, pas ra'-era'an akantha para nabbi." 
Numbers11:27 Pas badha oreng ngodha berka' abala parkara jareya ka Mosa. 
Numbers11:28 Yusak, ana'na Nun, se abanto Mosa dhari gi' ngodhana, mator ka Mosa, “Pakon ambu se kadhuwa ka'issa'.”" 
Numbers11:29 Dhabuna Mosa, “Arapa ba'na me' mekkere sengko'? Sengko' la'-mala' ngarep sopaja PANGERAN kasokana marengngagi Errohna ka sakabbinna tang bangsa ban sakabbinna oreng padha ra'-era'an akantha nabbi!”" 
Numbers11:30 Mosa laju abali ka parkemahanna asareng ban reng-oreng pamimpinna ommat Isra'il, se bannya'na pettong polo oreng rowa." 
Numbers11:31 PANGERAN pas madhateng angen daksakala dhari tase'; angen jareya ngeba mano' gemmek se ngabber ce' mandhabba, ta' sampe' sameter tenggina dhari tana. No'-mano' jareya ngabber e attasanna parkemahan, jauna sampe' pan-barampan kilometer e sakalenglengnga parkemahan." 
Numbers11:32 E are jareya saare samalem, ban kalagguwanna saare benteng reng-oreng Isra'il padha mega' mano' gemmek jareya. Saneyap oreng padha mega' paleng sakone'na saebu kilo ebang. No'-mano' se epega' jareya epakerreng, ebirbir e sakalenglengnga parkemahan." 
Numbers11:33 Teppa'na dagingnga gi' bannya' se ekakana, PANGERAN duka ka bangsa jareya, sarta pas madhateng panyaket se alleyan ka bangsa jareya." 
Numbers11:34 Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Kibrot-Ta'awa se artena “Koburanna Kadhakka'an” sabab e jadhiya kennengnganna koburanna reng-oreng se mate polana dhakka. 
Numbers11:35 Dhari jadhiya bangsa Isra'il mangkat ka dhaera Hazerot, pas akemah e jadhiya." 
Numbers12:1 Mosa araji oreng Kus, bi' Miriyam ban Harun eca'-koca'e." 
Numbers12:2 Ca'na se kadhuwa jareya, “Apa PANGERAN abu-dhabu pera' ngangguy parantara'anna Mosa malolo? Gu ta' ngangguy parantara'anna sengko' ban ba'na keya, ta' iya?” PANGERAN meyarsa cacana se kadhuwa jareya." 
Numbers12:3 Mosa reya talebat andhap asor, alebbiyan dhari sapa'a bai e bume reya." 
Numbers12:4 O-tao PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa, Harun ban Miriyam, “Mara ba'na entar ka Tang Kemah.” Se katello jareya pas padha entar ka jadhiya," 
Numbers12:5 PANGERAN pas toron e dhalem cangga ondhem, pas ngadek e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce, laju nembali Harun ban Miriyam. Se kadhuwa jareya nyander." 
Numbers12:6 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Edhingngagi Tang oca' reya! Mon e antarana ba'na badha oreng se bi' Sengko' epele epadaddi nabbi, Sengko' tanto ngaton ka bi-nabbi jareya, ban acaca e dhalem mempena." 
Numbers12:7 Tape ka Mosa Sengko' ta' kantha jareya, sabab Mosa reya oreng se esto e antarana Tang ommat." 
Numbers12:8 Sengko' mon acaca ka Mosa dhep-adhebban, rang-terrangan, ta' akantha oreng bak-tebbagan. La'-mala' Mosa nangale'e Tang roba! Baramma ba'na me' bangal ca'-ngoca'e Mosa, Tang abdi jareya?”" 
Numbers12:9 PANGERAN ce' dukana ka Miriyam ban Harun, laju nyengga dhari jadhiya." 
Numbers12:10 E bakto ondhem jareya la tadha' e attassa Kemah Socce, o-tao kole'na Miriyam etombuwi panyaket kole' budhuk; kole'na pote akantha kapas. E bakto Harun atole, laju ngoladi ja' Miriyam ekenneng panyaket jareya," 
Numbers12:11 laju adhabu ka Mosa, “Adhu, ale', mara tolong sengko' ban embugga reya, ja' sampe' eseksa lantaran dusa se esababbagi kabudhuwan, se sampe' ca'-ngoca'e ba'na gella'." 
Numbers12:12 Tolong embugga rowa me' ta' daddi akantha babaji' se lahir se la mate dhari dhalem tabu', dagingnga satengnga bucco'.”" 
Numbers12:13 Daddi Mosa aserro ka PANGERAN, “Adhu, Guste Allah, abdidalem nyo'ona, kasokana Junandalem mabaras embuk ka'dhinto!”" 
Numbers12:14 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Ja' sakenga mowana ecopae bi' eppa'na, embugga ba'na jareya tanto nyandhang malo pettong are abidda. Paondur embugga ba'na jareya dhari parkemahan pettong are abidda, saellana jareya olle abali pole.”" 
Numbers12:15 Miriyam pas epaondur dhari parkemahan pettong are abidda, ban bangsa jareya ta' aginjeggan dhari jadhiya sampe' Miriyam eedine abali ka parkemahan." 
Numbers12:16 Saellana jareya bangsa Isra'il buru mangkat dhari Hazerot laju akemah e ra-ara beddhi Paran. 
Numbers13:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers13:2 “Pele pamimpinna ku-suku, dhari sabban suku kala' kasorang; reng-oreng jareya gabay ta-mata, soro nyendhemme nagara Kana'an se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya. Reng-oreng se epele epadaddi ta-mata jareya epamangkat dhari ra-ara Paran. Se epele jareya pin-pamimpin e antarana ku-suku Isra'il, iya areya:" 
Numbers13:4 Sukuna Pamimpinna Ruben Syamuwa ana'na Zakur Simeyon Safat ana'na Hori Yehuda Kaleb ana'na Yefune Isakhar Yigal ana'na Yusup Efraim Hoseya ana'na Nun Benyamin Palti ana'na Rafu Zebulon Gadiyel ana'na Sodi Manasye Gadi ana'na Susi Dan Amiyel ana'na Gemali Asyer Setur ana'na Mikha'el Naftali Nahbi ana'na Wofsi Gad Guwel ana'na Makhi 
Numbers13:5 Jareya ta-mata se eotos Mosa epanyendhemme nagara Kana'an. Hoseya ana'na Nun bi' Mosa egante'e nyama, epadaddi Yusak." 
Numbers13:6 Dhabuna Mosa e bakto makon reng-oreng jareya mangkat entar nyendhemme nagara Kana'an, “Kassa' ba'na mangkat, ajalan ka dhaja, ka bagiyan lao'na Kana'an, terros ka bagiyan se bannya' gunongnga." 
Numbers13:7 Sendhemme baramma kabadha'anna nagara jareya, orengnga bannya' apa sakone', kowat apa enja'." 
Numbers13:8 Pareksa apa nagara jareya bagus otaba juba', apa orengnga neng e sa-disa se abukka' otabana neng e tha-kottha se ekalenglenge binteng." 
Numbers13:9 Abassagi apa tanana landhu otaba kajal, otabana apa gi' bannya' alassa. Ja' loppa ngeba mole wa'-buwa'an se tombu e jadhiya.” E bakto jareya teppa'na mosem anggur." 
Numbers13:10 Reng-oreng jareya laju padha mangkat ka dhaja, nalektegi nagara jareya molae dhari ra-ara beddhi Zin e bagiyan lao'na sampe' ka kottha Rehob e seddi'anna lorong ka Hamat." 
Numbers13:11 Dha'-adha'na reng-oreng jareya entar ka bagiyan lao'na nagara jareya, laju napa' ka Hebron, kennengnganna reng-oreng Ahiman, Sesai ban Talmai, toronanna Enak. Hebron reya epaddek pettong taon sabellunna kottha Zowan e Messer." 
Numbers13:12 Saellana jareya, ta-mata jareya padha napa' ka Cora Eskol. E jadhiya reng-oreng buru ngetthok ranca'na anggur se badha buwana; buwana anggur jareya ce' berra'na sampe' kapaksa epekol oreng kadhuwa ngangguy kol-pekol kaju. Salaenna jareya reng-oreng buru ngeba keya pan-barampan buwana dalima ban buwana ara." 
Numbers13:13 Kennengngan jareya enyamae Cora Eskol polana ranca'na buwana anggur se eketthok oreng Isra'il e jadhiya. 
Numbers13:14 Saellana nalektegi nagara jareya pa' polo are abidda, ta-mata jareya abali ka nagarana," 
Numbers13:15 pas areppot ka Mosa, Harun ban sakabbinna oreng Isra'il se akompol e Kades, e ra-ara beddhi Paran. Reng-oreng jareya nyareta'agi pa-apa se etangale'e ban noduwagi wa'-buwa'an se ngeba dhari nagara jareya." 
Numbers13:16 Atorra reng-oreng jareya ka Mosa, “Abdina sakanca ampon nalektegi kabadha'anna nagara ka'issa'. Tanana landhu; ka'dhinto wa'-buwa'an sakone' dhari nagara gapaneka." 
Numbers13:17 Namong orengnga wat-kowat. Tha-kotthana ja-raja sareng badha bintengnga. Sarengngan pole, e ka'dhissa' kaula sadaja padha nengale reng-oreng toronanna buta." 
Numbers13:18 Oreng Amalek aenggun e bagiyan lao'na nagara gapaneka; oreng Het, Yebus sareng Amori e bagiyan se anong-gunong; dineng oreng Kana'an aenggun e salanjangnga paseser sareng e salanjangnga Songay Yordan.”" 
Numbers13:19 Tape Kaleb nyellang cacana reng-oreng se aserro ka Mosa jareya, laju mator, “Nagara ka'issa' kodu eserrang sareng erebbu' samangken jugan; bangsa Isra'il cokop kowat kaangguy makala'a bangsa ka'issa'.”" 
Numbers13:20 Tape reng-oreng se abali abareng Kaleb ngoca' kantha reya, “Bunten, sampeyan ta' kera sanggup nyerrang bangsa ka'issa'. Oreng e nagara ka'issa' akowadan dhari sampeyan.”" 
Numbers13:21 Reng-oreng jareya laju mabalattra careta se lecegan e kalanganna oreng Isra'il parkara nagara se eta-matae rowa. Oca'na, “Hasella nagara ka'issa' ta' cokop ekakan oreng ka'issa' dibi' balakka'. Orengnga talebat ja-raja," 
Numbers13:22 la'-mala' kaula nengale reng-oreng se akadi buta, toronanna oreng Enak. Mon ebandhing bi' reng-oreng ka'issa', kaula arassa pera' padha ban balang, ban reng-oreng ka'issa' tanto nganggep sapaneka jugan ka kaula sadaja.”" 
Numbers14:1 Samalem benteng reng-oreng Isra'il nanges reng-cerrengan ce' ngennessa. 
Numbers14:2 Kabbi padha ango'ngo'an ka Mosa ban Harun, sambi ngoca' kantha reya, “Mon cara paneka bango'an mateya e Messer, otabana e ra-ara paneka." 
Numbers14:3 Aponapa PANGERAN me' abakta kaula ka nagara ka'issa', epamateya e paperrangan, ana' bine kaula epatawana moso? Gu ta' bango'an abaliya ka Messer!”" 
Numbers14:4 Daddi reng-oreng Isra'il padha saleng ngoca' kantha reya, “Tore, mele pamimpin bai, pas abali ka Messer!”" 
Numbers14:5 Mosa ban Harun pas asojud e tana e adha'anna reng-oreng Isra'il. 
Numbers14:6 Tape Yusak ana'na Nun ban Kaleb ana'na Yefune, se tamaso' ta-mata se eotos kaangguy nalektegi Kana'an rowa, nyebbit kalambina menangka tandha ja' rentek atena," 
Numbers14:7 pas ngoca' kantha reya ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Sengko' padha noro' nalektegi nagara rowa, tanana landhu." 
Numbers14:8 Mon daddi karsana PANGERAN, sengko' ban ba'na tanto ebakta kabbi dha' essa', nagara se landhu ban ma'mor jareya tanto eparengngagi ka ba'na." 
Numbers14:9 Ja' ango'ngo'an ka PANGERAN, ban pole ta' osa tako' ka reng-oreng se badha e nagara rowa. Gampang mon gun makala'a bangsa se badha e nagara jareya, sabab ba'na etolonge PANGERAN. Dineng se nolonge ban se esemba bangsa jareya la epakala bi' PANGERAN, daddi ta' osa tako'.”" 
Numbers14:10 Ra'yat padha ngoca' agarujuga se kadhuwa jareya epasampe'a mate. Tape o-tao reng-oreng jareya padha nangale'e sonar se masolap mata e attasanna Kemah, se noduwagi ja' PANGERAN badha e jadhiya." 
Numbers14:11 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Ba' sampe' bila reng-oreng reya se terrosa pek-ngacepek ango'ngo'an ka Sengko'? Ba' sampe'a bila se ta' parcaja'a ka Sengko', maske Sengko' la pan-barampan kale mabadha kaajiban e adha'anna?" 
Numbers14:12 Sengko' madhatengnga panyaket sampar se alleyan, me' olle reng-oreng jareya mate kabbi, tape bi' Sengko' ba'na epadaddiya bangatowana settong bangsa se araja'an sarta akowadan dhari reng-oreng jareya!”" 
Numbers14:13 Monsa laju mator ka PANGERAN, “Adhu, GUSTE, kalaban kakobasa'anna Junandalem bangsa Isra'il ebakta ka lowar dhari Messer. Manabi bangsa Messer mereng ja' bangsa Isra'il sareng Junandalem epamate sadaja," 
Numbers14:14 tanto bangsa Messer padha acareta ka bangsa e Kana'an, mangkana bangsa Kana'an ampon mereng ja' bangsa abdidalem etolong sareng Junandalem; Ja' Junandalem ngaton ka bangsa abdidalem manabi Junandalem toron alomampa e adha'na bangsa ka'dhinto e dhalem cangga ondhem e baja seyang, sareng e dhalem cangga apoy e baja malem." 
Numbers14:15 Manabi samangken ommat ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem epamate sadaja, sa-bangsa se ampon mereng kasohorrannepon asmana Junandalem tanto padha ngoca'" 
Numbers14:16 ja' ommat Isra'il sareng Junandalem epamate sadaja e ra-ara ka'dhinto polana Junandalem ta' sanggup abakta ommat ka'dhinto ka nagara se sareng Junandalem ejanjiyagi ka bangsa Isra'il ka'dhinto. 
Numbers14:17 Daddi samangken abdidalem nyo'ona, GUSTE, ngereng patengale kakobasa'annepon Junandalem sareng lampa'agi sadaja se ampon edhabuwagi Junandalem. Junandalem adhabu," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Sengko', PANGERAN, ta' gampang peggel, Sengko' taresna ban esto parana. Sengko' aberri' sapora ka oreng se dusa otaba se ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta. Tape Sengko' masthe ngokom na'-ana'na ban poy-kompoyya oreng se andhi' dusa, sampe' toronanna se kapeng tello' otaba se kapeng empa'.’" 
Numbers14:19 Samangken, GUSTE, dhari rajana kataresna'an sareng kaestowanna Junandalem se ta' aoba, abdidalem nyo'ona, kasokana Junandalem nyapora dusana reng-oreng Isra'il ka'dhinto, akadi Junandalem se ros-terrosan nyapora dusana ommat Isra'il ngabidi mangkat dhari Messer.”" 
Numbers14:20 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Sengko' nyapora reng-oreng jareya menorot parnyo'onanna ba'na." 
Numbers14:21 Tape Sengko' ajanji, demi Sengko' dibi' se odhi' ban kobasa e bume reya," 
Numbers14:22 dhari sakabbinna oreng Isra'il se gi' odhi' sateya reya, tadha' settonga se bisa'a noro' maso' ka nagara Kana'an, sabab e bakto jareya reng-oreng reya la bakal padha'a mate kabbi. Reng-oreng Isra'il reya la nangale'e sonar kahadiranna Sengko' se masolap matana, sarta nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban se epabadha Sengko' e Messer ban e ra-ara, tape reng-oreng jareya li-baliyan mapeggel Sengko' ban ta' endha' atoro' ka Tang parenta." 
Numbers14:23 Reng-oreng jareya bakal tadha'a settonga se bisa'a noro' maso' ka nagara se bi' Sengko' ejanjiyagi ka bangatowana. Dhari reng-oreng se ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta tadha' se bisa'a maso' ka nagara jareya. 
Numbers14:24 Tape Tang abdi se anyama Kaleb ta' padha ban reng-oreng laenna, sarta teptep esto ka Sengko'. Daddi bi' Sengko' Kaleb jareya egiba'a maso' ka nagara se etalektegi aba'na rowa, ban na' potona bakal ngaandhi'a nagara jareya," 
Numbers14:25 nagara se sateya reya e bagiyan ra-corana gi' ekennengnge bangsa Amalek ban bangsa Kana'an. Lagguna ba'na kodu abali entar ka ra-ara nojju ka Tellok Akaba.” 
Numbers14:26 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers14:27 “Sampe' bila reng-oreng jahat reya se terrosa aseddhiyan ka Sengko'? Sengko' la ngedhing ngo'ngo'na reng-oreng jareya kabbi. 
Numbers14:28 Kassa' kabala ka reng-oreng jareya, koca' kantha reya: PANGERAN adhabu kantha reya, ‘Sengko' asompa demi Sengko' dibi' se odhi' ja' apa se ekoca'agi ba'na ka Sengko' bi' Sengko' ekabbulana. Sengko', PANGERAN, la ngoca'." 
Numbers14:29 Ba'na ngacepek aseddhiyan ka Sengko'. 
Numbers14:30 Daddi ba'na bakal mateya, mayyidda ba'na bakal car-kalacera e ra-ara beddhi reya. Kajabana Kaleb ban Yusak, e antarana ba'na se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas tadha' settonga se bisa'a maso' ka nagara se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka ba'na." 
Numbers14:31 Ba'na ngoca' ja' na'-ana'na ba'na bakal etawana moso. Tape na'-ana'na ba'na jareya se bi' Sengko' egiba'a ka nagara se ta' ekendha'i ba'na rowa, nagara jareya bakal ekaandhi'a na'-ana'na ba'na jareya." 
Numbers14:32 Ba'na dibi' bakal mateya e ra-ara reya. 
Numbers14:33 Na'-ana'na ba'na bakal ajalana e ra-ara reya pa' polo taon abidda, nanggunga kasangsara'an polana ba'na se ta' ngestowagi Tang oca', sampe' ba'na padha mate kabbi." 
Numbers14:34 Ba'na nyendhemme nagara rowa pa' polo are abidda; ban ba'na bakal nanggunga sangsara polana dusana dibi' pa' polo taon abidda, padha ban abidda ba'na se nyendhemme nagara rowa, coma sabban saare ebitong epadaddi sataon; daddi ba'na olle tao baramma rassana mon ba'na ekamoso bi' Sengko'!" 
Numbers14:35 Sengko' asompa ajalannagiya jareya kabbi polana ba'na jahat asakongkel ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta. E ra-ara reya ba'na bakal mateya kabbi. Sengko', PANGERAN, la ngoca'.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Reng-oreng se eotos Mosa nalektegi nagara jareya abali ngeba kabar se ta' bendher parkara kabadha'anna nagara jareya, sampe' reng-oreng Isra'il padha ango'ngo'an ka PANGERAN. Daddi PANGERAN ngokom reng-oreng se lecegan jareya, padha epakenneng panyaket sampe' padha mate." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Dhari ta-mata se dhubellas oreng gella' coma Yusak ban Kaleb se gi' odhi'. 
Numbers14:39 Saellana Mosa manapa' dhabuna PANGERAN jareya ka bangsa Isra'il, reng-oreng jareya laju padha nanges ce' ngennessa." 
Numbers14:40 Kalagguwanna teng-petteng, kabbi padha entara ongga ka gunong, sambi ngoca', “Sengko' pajat dusa ka PANGERAN. Tape sateya sengko' mangkada nyerrangnga nagara se edhabuwagi PANGERAN jareya.”" 
Numbers14:41 Tape Mosa adhabu, “Arapa sateya ba'na me' ta' atoro'a ka dhabuna PANGERAN? Ba'na ta' kera ahasel!" 
Numbers14:42 Ella, ja' nyerrang! Ba'na tanto kala, sabab ta' etolonge PANGERAN." 
Numbers14:43 E bakto ba'na ngadhebbi oreng Amalek ban oreng Kana'an, ba'na tanto mate e paperrangan. PANGERAN ta' kera nolonge ba'na sabab ba'na ta' atoro' dhabuna.”" 
Numbers14:44 Tape reng-oreng jareya maksa ongga ka gunong, sanajjan Mosa ban Petthe Parjanjiyan paggun ta' ngalle dhari parkemahanna." 
Numbers14:45 Reng-oreng Amalek ban reng-oreng Kana'an se badha e kennengngan jareya padha toron nyerrang reng-oreng Isra'il sampe' kala, sarta eserser terros sampe' ka Horma." 
Numbers15:1 PANGERAN marengngagi ka Mosa 
Numbers15:2 atoran-atoran reya se kodu etoro' bi' bangsa Isra'il e nagara se eparengngagiya PANGERAN se ekennengngana reng-oreng jareya: 
Numbers15:3 Mon ngatorragiya kurban obbaran otaba kurban ngessa'agiya neyat otaba kurban sokalella, otabana kurban kaangguy paraya'an-paraya'anna agama se biyasa, oreng olle ngatorragi ka PANGERAN kurban se aropa sape lake', dumba lake', dumba otaba embi'. Bauna ban-kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:4 Pa'-sapa'a ngatorragi dumba otabana embi' menangka kurban obbaran ka PANGERAN, sabban ebin settong kodu etoro'e keya teppong sakilo ecampor ban mennya' jaitun saliter kaangguy kurban sasajin, bariya keya aengnga anggur saliter." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Mon se ekurbannagi jareya dumba lake', kodu etoro'e keya teppong dhu kilo ecampor bi' mennya' jaitun saliter satengnga menangka kurban sasajin," 
Numbers15:7 sarta aengnga anggur saliter satengnga. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. 
Numbers15:8 Mon se ekurbannagi jareya sape lake' menangka kurban obbaran otaba kurban kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat otaba kaangguy kurban salameddan," 
Numbers15:9 kodu etoro'e keya teppong tello kilo ecampor bi' mennya' jaitun dhu liter menangka kurban sasajin," 
Numbers15:10 sarta aengnga anggur dhu liter. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. 
Numbers15:11 Jareya se kodu eatorragi epabareng ban saneyap sape ban dumba lake', dumba otabana embi'." 
Numbers15:12 Mon se ekurbannagi jareya ebinna lebbi dhari settong, tor-ator teppong, mennya' ban aengnga anggur jareya gi' kodu etamba'agi keya se bannya'na menorot parbandhingan se kasebbut gella'." 
Numbers15:13 Jareya kodu etoro' bi' saneyap oreng Isra'il e bakto ngatorragi kurban. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. 
Numbers15:14 Oreng manca se aenggun e antarana ba'na, kaangguy sabatara bakto otabana kaangguy saterrossa, kodu ngestowagi atoran jareya keya mon ngatorragi kurban kakanan, se bauna masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:15 Sakabbinna hokom ban atoran se kodu etoro' bi' ba'na ban oreng manca se aenggun e antarana ba'na, padha bai, sabab ba'na ban oreng manca jareya e dhalem pangoladanna PANGERAN tadha' bidana. Ban parkara jareya kodu eestowagi salanjangnga." 
Numbers15:16  
Numbers15:17 PANGERAN marengngagi ka Mosa 
Numbers15:18 atoran-atoran reya se kodu etoro' bi' bangsa Isra'il e nagara se eparengngagiya PANGERAN ka reng-oreng jareya. 
Numbers15:19 Mon oreng Isra'il la molae ngakan hasella nagara jareya, sabagiyan kodu epalaen kaangguy tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:20 Roti se eola dhari gandum se eanye dha'-adha' kadibi' kodu eatorragi menangka kurban se malolo ka PANGERAN. Carana ngatorragi padha ban carana ngatorragi gandum ollena anye se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers15:21 Kaangguy salanjangnga, saneyap roti dhari gandum se eanye dha'-adha' kadibi' kodu eatorragi menangka tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:22 Saompamana badha oreng se ta' etengnget ta' ngestowagi sala settong e antarana atoran se la eparengngagi PANGERAN ka Mosa jareya, molae dhari are e bakto PANGERAN marengngagi atoran jareya sampe' saterrossa ron-temoron, ban kasala'an jareya se daddi lantaranna polana ommat ta' tao ja' badha atoran se kantha jareya, sakabbinna ommat Isra'il jareya kodu ngatorragi sape lake' settong menangka kurban obbaran. Tor-ator jareya kodu etoro'e tor-ator kurban sasajin ban aengnga anggur akantha se la etantowagi. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. Laen dhari jareya kurban jareya kodu etoro'e dumba lake' settong menangka kurban pangamponanna dusa." 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24  
Numbers15:25 Imam pas kodu mabadha opacara palebbaranna dusa kaangguy ommadda. Reng-oreng jareya tanto esapora bi' PANGERAN lantaran se ta' etengnget agabay sala jareya, ban lantaran reng-oreng jareya la ngeba kurban pangamponanna dusa sarta kurban obbaran ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:26 Sakabbinna oreng Isra'il ban reng-oreng manca se aenggun e antarana reng-oreng Isra'il jareya bakal esapora'a, lantaran kabbi padha ta' etengnget agabay sala." 
Numbers15:27 Mon se ta' etengnget agabay dusa jareya pera' kasorang, oreng jareya kodu ngurbannagi embi' babine' se aomor sataon kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa." 
Numbers15:28 Imam kodu mabadha opacara pangamponanna dusa e ajunanna PANGERAN e adha'na mezba, sopaja oreng jareya esapora dusana." 
Numbers15:29 Sapa'a bai se ta' etengnget agabay dusa, oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca se aenggun neptep e antarana reng-oreng Isra'il, kodu padha atoro' ka atoran reya." 
Numbers15:30 Tape sapa'a bai se etengnget agabay dusa, apa jareya oreng Isra'il otabana oreng manca, oreng jareya ya-nyeya PANGERAN. Oreng jareya kodu eokom mate," 
Numbers15:31 sabab ta' atoro' ka PANGERAN, etengnget ta' atoro' ka se epakonnagi PANGERAN. Oreng jareya mate polana salana dibi'." 
Numbers15:32 E settong are, e bakto oreng Isra'il gi' badha e ra-ara beddhi, badha oreng lalake' etemmo teppa'na makompol kaju e are Sabat." 
Numbers15:33 Oreng jareya egiba ngadhep ka Mosa, Harun ban ka sakabbinna ommat," 
Numbers15:34 oreng jareya gi' etahan gallu sabab gi' ta' terrang epabaramma'a. 
Numbers15:35 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Oreng jareya kodu eokom mate; kodu egiba ka lowaranna parkemahan ban e jadhiya kodu egarujuk bi' sakabbinna ommat sampe' mate.”" 
Numbers15:36 Daddi sakabbinna ommat agiring oreng jareya ka lowaranna parkemahan, oreng jareya laju egarujuk sampe' mate, akantha se edhabuwagi PANGERAN." 
Numbers15:37 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers15:38 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il: Saneyap konco'na kalambina ba'na pobuwi bay-rambay, ban saneyap bay-rambay jareya tale'e ban tale bungo. Jareya kodu etoro' ban ba'na ron-temoron." 
Numbers15:39 Bay-rambay jareya menangka parengeddan: Sabban ba'na ngabas ka bay-rambay jareya, ba'na enga' ka sakabbinna Tang parenta ban ngestowagi Tang parenta jareya kabbi. Lantaran jareya ba'na ta' kera loppa ka Sengko' ban ta' kera norodi pangaterrona ban karebba atena dibi'." 
Numbers15:40 Bay-rambay jareya bakal maenga'a ba'na sopaja ngestowagi sakabbinna Tang parenta, sampe' ba'na daddi Tang andhi' ongguwan." 
Numbers15:41 Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na; bi' Sengko' ba'na epakalowar dhari Messer sopaja Sengko' daddiya Allahna ba'na. Sengko' reya PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers16:1 Korah ana'na Yizhar dhari kaom Kehat, suku Lewi, aberonta' ka Mosa. Korah jareya etolonge oreng katello dhari suku Ruben, iya areya Datan ban Abiram na'-ana'na Eliyab, ban On ana'na Pelet, sarta dhu ratos saeket pamimpin se kasohor se epele ra'yat." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Reng-oreng jareya areng-bareng padha ngadhep ka Mosa ban Harun laju mator, “Ampon cokop, Mosa! Sadajana ommat Isra'il paneka kaagunganna PANGERAN, ban PANGERAN badha e nga'-tengnga'anna ommat paneka. Tape aponapa sampeyan me' nganggep alebbiyan dhari ommadda PANGERAN se laen?”" 
Numbers16:4 Saellana meyarsa oca' jareya Mosa asojud e tana adu'a ka PANGERAN. 
Numbers16:5 Samarena laju adhabu ka Korah ban reng-orengnga, “Lagguna gu-laggu PANGERAN bakal noduwagiya ka ba'na kabbi sapa se sabendherra kaagunganna, oreng kaagunganna, iya areya reng-oreng se epele Salerana, bakal eedinana nyemma'e Salerana e mezba." 
Numbers16:6 Lagguna gu-laggu, Korah, ba'na ban reng-orengnga ngala' padupa'an, esse'e mardha ban dupa, pas giba ka mezba. Dhaggi' mara pas tenggu sapa e antarana sengko' ban ba'na kabbi reya se epele PANGERAN. Ba'na reng-oreng Lewi, se ngalebadi bates!”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Mosa terros adhabu ka Korah, “Mara edhingngagi reng-oreng Lewi!" 
Numbers16:9 Apa bi' ba'na eanggep parkara kene' ja' Allahna Isra'il malaen ba'na dhari ommat Isra'il laenna, sopaja ba'na ngennenga nyemma'e Salerana, ban ngalakone kawajiban e Kemah Socce, sarta alako kaangguy ommat Isra'il ban aladine ommat jareya?" 
Numbers16:10 Ba'na, Korah, ban reng-oreng Lewi laenna bi' PANGERAN la eparenge kahormadan jareya, ban sateya ba'na agugat terro daddiya imam keya!" 
Numbers16:11 Mon ba'na ban reng-orengnga ango'ngo'an ka Harun, jareya padha ban ba'na alaban ka PANGERAN!”" 
Numbers16:12 Mosa laju makon oreng ngolok Datan ban Abiram, tape se kadhuwa jareya ngoca', “Bunten, kaula ta' entara!" 
Numbers16:13 Ponapa gi' ta' cokop sampeyan ngeba kaula dhari Messer se landhu, epamateya e ra-ara beddhi paneka? Me' sampeyan gi' marenta'a kaula?" 
Numbers16:14 Sanyatana sampeyan ta' ngeba kaula ka tana se landhu, otaba marenge kaula teggal sareng kebbun anggur menangka sangkolan! Samangken sampeyan nepo kaula! Bunten, kaula ta' entara ka sampeyan!”" 
Numbers16:15 Mosa ce' dukana, laju mator ka PANGERAN, “GUSTE, ja' tarema tor-atorra reng-oreng paneka. Abdidalem ta' oneng marogi settonga dhari reng-oreng ka'dhinto; la'-mala' abdidalem ta' oneng ngala' hemarra reng-oreng ka'dhinto sanare settonga.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mosa laju adhabu ka Korah, “Lagguna ba'na entar ka Kemah Socce, abareng ban reng-orengnga ba'na se dhu ratos saeket oreng bannya'na rowa. Harun lagguna badha'a e dhissa' keya. Ba'na kodu padha ngeba padupa'anna bang-sebang, padupa'an jareya esse'e dupa, pas atorragi ka PANGERAN, saba' e mezba.”" 
Numbers16:17  
Numbers16:18 Daddi reng-oreng jareya padha ngala' padupa'anna bang-sebang, eesse'e mardha ban dupa, pas manjeng e labangnga Kemah Socce abareng Mosa ban Harun." 
Numbers16:19 Saellana jareya Korah makompol sakabbinna ommat, se laju padha manjeng dhep-adhebban bi' Mosa ban Harun e adha'anna labangnga Kemah Socce. Sakabbinna ommat jareya daksakala laju nangale'e sonarra PANGERAN se ngadirap." 
Numbers16:20 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers16:21 “Nyorot ba'na ja' apolong ban reng-oreng jareya; bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya epatompessa kabbi sateya keya.” 
Numbers16:22 Tape Mosa ban Harun asojud sampe' nyeyom tana, laju mator, “Adhu, Guste, Junandalem se apareng odhi' ka sadajana mahlok. Manabi se dusa namong oreng kasorang, ponapa Junandalem duka'a ka sadajana ommat?”" 
Numbers16:23 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers16:24 “Soro reng-oreng jareya ajauwi mah-kemahna Korah, Datan ban Abiram.”" 
Numbers16:25 Mosa pas meyos ka kennengnganna Datan ban Abiram, eerengngagi para pamimpinna Isra'il." 
Numbers16:26 Dhabuna Mosa ka reng-oreng Isra'il, “Mara padha majau dhari mah-kemahna reng-oreng se jahat reya, ja' nyedding ka apa'a bai dhari dhi'-andhi'na reng-oreng jareya. Mon ba'na ta' atoro', ba'na bakal epatompessa epabareng ban reng-oreng jareya lantaran sa-dusana reng-oreng jareya.”" 
Numbers16:27 Reng-oreng Isra'il jareya laju majau dhari mah-kemahna Korah, Datan ban Abiram. Datan ban Abiram la kalowar sarta manjeng e labangnga kemahna bang-sebang, abareng ban ana' binena." 
Numbers16:28 Mosa laju adhabu, “Kalaban cara se kantha reya ba'na bakal taowa ja' sengko' ngalakone reya kabbi polana eotos PANGERAN, banne polana tang karep dibi'." 
Numbers16:29 Mon reng-oreng reya mate akantha kapprana, ta' kalaban okoman pa-apa dhari Allah, jareya tandhana ja' sengko' ta' eotos PANGERAN." 
Numbers16:30 Tape mon PANGERAN alampa'agi barang se gi' ta' tao ekaedhing ba'na sampe' sateya, ban mon tana maroka adalgep reng-oreng reya ban sakabbinna dhi-andhi'na, sampe' reng-oreng jareya maso' dhi'-odhi' ka dhalem dunnyana oreng mate, ba'na bakal taowa ja' reng-oreng jareya ta' esto ka PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers16:31 Mosa buru mare se adhabu kantha jareya, tana e baba'anna Datan ban Abiram maroka," 
Numbers16:32 se kadhuwa jareya ban ana' binena ban reng-oreng se noro' Korah sarta dhi'-andhi'na kabbi edalgep tadha' karena. 
Numbers16:33 Reng-oreng jareya kabbi nyono' dhi'-odhi' ka dunnyana oreng mate ban sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na. Tana se maroka gella' laju adalgep pole, ban reng-oreng gella' mosna edalgep bume." 
Numbers16:34 Reng-oreng Isra'il se badha e jadhiya padha buru kabbi e bakto ngedhing pacerrengnga reng-oreng se edalgep bume jareya. Reng-oreng Isra'il laenna padha aera', “Duli buru! Dhaggi' ba'na edalgep bume!”" 
Numbers16:35 PANGERAN laju madhateng apoy se ngello' oreng se dhu ratos saeket se ngatorragi dupa jareya. 
Numbers16:36 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers16:37 “Soro Eleyazar ana'na Imam Harun ngangka' padupa'an-padupa'an dhari re-karena sabarang se katonon gella', abuna arengnga tabur ka kennengngan laen, sabab padupa'an jareya socce." 
Numbers16:38 Rang-barang jareya socce polana la eatorragi ka adha'anna Sengko', PANGERAN. Daddi kala' padupa'anna reng-oreng se padha eokom mate polana dusana jareya, tempa padaddi lambaran-lambaran se tepes, kagabay kole' lowarra mezba. Jareya menangka parengeddan ka bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Numbers16:39 Daddi Imam Eleyazar mondhut padupa'an-padupa'an jareya, pas esoro tempa ka reng-oreng, esoro kagabay lembaran se pes-tepes kaangguy kole' lowarra mezba." 
Numbers16:40 Jareya menangka parengeddan ka bangsa Isra'il ja' salaenna toronanna Harun, ta' olle badha oreng laen se nyander ka seddi'anna mezba ngobbara dupa e ajunanna PANGERAN. Oreng se ta' atoro' ka atoran jareya bakal epateyana akantha Korah ban reng-orengnga. Parkara jareya elakone kabbi akantha se epakonnagi PANGERAN ka Eleyazar kalaban parantara'anna Mosa." 
Numbers16:41 Kalagguwanna ommat Isra'il padha ca'-ngoca'e Mosa ban Harun. Oca'na, “Sampeyan mate'e ommadda PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers16:42 Teppa'na akompol ngadhebbi Mosa ban Harun, reng-oreng jareya atole ka Kemah Socce, laju nangale'e ondhem notowe Kemah jareya, sonar tandha kahadiranna PANGERAN pas etangale'e e jadhiya." 
Numbers16:43 Mosa ban Harun nyander ka adha'anna Kemah Socce jareya," 
Numbers16:44 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka Mosa," 
Numbers16:45 “Ba'na nyorot, ja' akompol ban reng-oreng jareya. Reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' epatompessa kabbi neng e kennengngan jareya keya!” Se kadhuwa jareya asojud," 
Numbers16:46 ban Mosa laju adhabu ka Harun, “Kala' padupa'anna ba'na, esse'e mardha dhari mezba, pas pobuwi dupa. Duli giba ka ommat, pas mabadha opacara nyo'onnagi saporana sa-dusana ommat jareya. Mara duliyan! PANGERAN la talebat dukana ban wabah la molae.”"
