Numbers16:47 Harun alampa'agi papakonna Mosa jareya, berka' ka nga'-tengnga'anna ommat se teppa'na akompol ban molae ekenneng panyaket se alleyan. Mardhana epobuwi dupa, saellana jareya laju mabadha opacara nyo'onnagi sapora dusana ommadda." 
Numbers16:48 Wabah jareya laju ambu, ban Harun paggun manjeng e antarana reng-oreng se gi' odhi' ban se la mate." 
Numbers16:49 Se mate e bakto jareya badha pa' bellas ebu pettong ratos oreng, ta' tamaso' se mate e dhalem pamberontaganna Korah." 
Numbers16:50 Saellana wabah jareya la tadha', Harun abali ka Mosa e labangnga Kemah Socce." 
Numbers17:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers17:2 “Soro reng-oreng Isra'il aberri' tongket dhubellas meggi' ka ba'na, dhari sabban suku settong ebang, se kodu epassra'agi bi' pamimpinna suku bang-sebang. Toles nyamana saneyap pamimpin jareya e tongkedda," 
Numbers17:3 ban nyamana Harun toles e tongkedda suku Lewi. Kaangguy saneyap pamimpinna suku kodu badha settong tongket. 
Numbers17:4 Ket-tongket jareya giba ka Tang Kemah, saba' e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan, kennengnganna Sengko' se biyasana mon atemmo ban ba'na." 
Numbers17:5 Tongket andhi'na oreng se epele Sengko' bakal nyelbi'a. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Sengko' maambuwa serrona oreng se ros-terrosan ngacepek ca'-ngoca'e ba'na.” 
Numbers17:6 Mosa manapa' dhadhabun jareya ka oreng Isra'il. Pamimpinna ku-suku laju padha ngatorragi tongket settong ebang. Bannya'na kabbi dhubellas meggi', tamaso' tongkedda Harun." 
Numbers17:7 Bi' Mosa ket-tongket jareya esaba' e dhalem Kemah Socce e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan. 
Numbers17:8 Kalagguwanna, e bakto Mosa meyos ka dhalem Kemah Socce, laju ngoladi ja' tekkenna Harun, iya areya tongkedda suku Lewi, la nyelbi'. Tongket jareya akembang, badha se mekko ban badha se mekkar sarta kalowar buwana katapang se la towa." 
Numbers17:9 Mosa mondhut sakabbinna tongket jareya, epatao ka reng-oreng Isra'il. Reng-oreng jareya nangale'e kadaddiyan jareya, saneyap pamimpin laju ngala' tongkedda bang-sebang." 
Numbers17:10 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka Mosa, “Tongkedda Harun jareya saba' pole e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan. Tongket jareya kodu esempen menangka parengeddan ka reng-oreng Isra'il se dujan aberonta' jareya ja' aba'na bakal mateya mon ta' endha' ambu se ngacepek ango'ngo'an terros.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya. 
Numbers17:12 Oreng Isra'il laju mator ka Mosa, “Manabi sapaneka, palang kaula! Kaula tanto pas padha tompes!" 
Numbers17:13 Manabi oreng se nyemma'e Kemah Socce kodu mate, kaula padha ta' gadhuwan pangarebban sadaja!”" 
Numbers18:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Harun, “Ba'na ban na'-ana'na sarta reng-oreng Lewi kodu nanggung okomanna kasala'an-kasala'an e dhalem lalakon aladine e Tang Kemah; tape pera' ba'na ban na'-ana'na malolo se kodu nanggung okomanna kasala'an-kasala'an e dhalem ngalakone kawajibanna mam-imam." 
Numbers18:2 Ajak la-balana ba'na, ban suku Lewi, soro nolonge e bakto ba'na ban na'-ana'na ngalakone kawajibanna." 
Numbers18:3 Suku Lewi jareya kodu ngalakone kawajibanna ka ba'na, ban ngalakone kawajibanna e Tang Kemah, tape ta' olle nyemma'e mezba otabana nyedding rang-barang se socce e Rowangan Se Socce. Mon atoran reya ta' etoro', reng-oreng jareya ban bariya keya ba'na dibi' bakal mateya." 
Numbers18:4 Reng-oreng jareya kodu alako abareng ban ba'na sarta ngalakone kon-lalakon se badha hubunganna ban sakabbinna pangladinan e dhalem Tang Kemah, tape reng-oreng se ta' andhi' ha' kaangguy lalakon jareya, ta' olle alalakon abareng ban ba'na." 
Numbers18:5 Pera' ba'na, Harun, ban na'-ana'na ba'na se kodu ngalakone lalakon e Rowangan Se Socce ban e mezba, sopaja Sengko' ta' sampe'a peggel pole ka bangsa Isra'il." 
Numbers18:6 Saongguna, Sengko' se mele la-balana ba'na, reng-oreng Lewi, dhari antarana bangsa Isra'il menangka baberri'na Sengko' ka ba'na. Reng-oreng jareya la epassra'agi ka Sengko', kaangguy aladine e Tang Kemah." 
Numbers18:7 Tape pera' ba'na ban na'-ana'na se olle ngalakone lalakonna imam, e dhalem sakabbinna lalakon se badha hubunganna ban mezba ban sabarang se badha e Rowangan Se Mahasocce. Jareya lalakonna ba'na, sabab bi' Sengko' ba'na la eberri'i kahormadan epadaddi imam. Oreng se ta' andhi' ha' eokoma mate mon nyemma'e rang-barang se socce jareya.”" 
Numbers18:8 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Harun, “Kaenga'e, ya! Sakabbinna tor-ator se malolo eatorragi ka Sengko', se ta' eobbar, daddi bagiyanna ba'na. Jareya bagiyanna ba'na se la etantowagi kaangguy salanjangnga. Jareya bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na ban na' potona." 
Numbers18:9 Dhari tor-ator se paleng socce se ta' eobbar e mezba, se kasebbut reya bagiyanna ba'na: Kurban sasajin, kurban palebbaranna dusa, ban kurban gantena tebbusanna kasala'an. Jareya kabbi tor-ator se socce se daddi bagiyanna ba'na ban na'-ana'na." 
Numbers18:10 Jareya kabbi socce monggu ka ba'na, daddi kodu ekakan e kennengngan se socce keya. Ban pera' oreng lalake' se olle ngakan jareya." 
Numbers18:11 Tor-ator laenna se eatorragi oreng Isra'il se malolo ka Sengko', andhi'na ba'na keya. Bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na ban ka ana' lalake'anna ban ana' babine'anna. Atoran reya angguy salanjangnga. Saneyap anggotana kalowargana ba'na se ta' najjis olle ngakan tor-ator jareya." 
Numbers18:12 Hasel se dha'-adha' se paleng bagus se eatorragi oreng Isra'il ka Sengko' sabban taonna, iya areya mennya' jaitun, aeng anggur ban gandum, bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na kabbi." 
Numbers18:13 Jareya kabbi andhi'na ba'na. Saneyap anggotana kalowargana ba'na se ta' najjis olle ngakan jareya. 
Numbers18:14 Pa-apa se badha e tana Isra'il se la emalolowagi ka Sengko', andhi'na ba'na." 
Numbers18:15 Ana' sareyangnga manossa otaba budhu' sareyangnga keban, se eatorragi oreng Isra'il ka Sengko', bagiyanna ba'na. Tape ba'na kodu nebbus saneyap ana' sareyang, bariya keya budhu' sareyangnga keban se haram." 
Numbers18:16 Na'-kana' kodu etebbus e bakto aomor sabulan. Arga se la etantowagi menangka tebbusanna ana' jareya lema pesse salaka, menorot arga e Tang Kemah." 
Numbers18:17 Tape sape, dumba ban embi' se sareyang ta' olle etebbus. Ebin jareya teptep Tang andhi' ban kodu ekurbannagi. Dharana serammagi ka mezba ban gajina obbar menangka kurban. Bauna masenneng Tang ate." 
Numbers18:18 Dagingnga bagiyanna ba'na, padha ban dhadha sarta pokang kanganna tor-ator se eatorragi malolo ka Sengko'." 
Numbers18:19 Sakabbinna tor-ator se eatorragi oreng Isra'il malolo ka Sengko', salanjangnga bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na ban na'-ana' lalake'anna sarta na'-ana' babine'anna. Atoran reya angguy salanjangnga ban daddi parjanjiyan se ta' ekenneng oba e antarana Sengko' ban ba'na sarta na' potona.”" 
Numbers18:20 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Harun, “Ba'na ta' olle sangkolan pa-apa. E nagara se ejanjiyagi Sengko' rowa tadha' tana maske salokke'a se daddiya andhi'na ba'na. Sengko', PANGERAN, jareya sangkolan bagiyanna ba'na.”" 
Numbers18:21 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Harun, “Sakabbinna tor-ator parsapolowanna oreng Isra'il bi' Sengko' ebagi ka reng-oreng Lewi. Jareya menangka bajaranna se alalakon e Tang Kemah." 
Numbers18:22 Reng-oreng Isra'il laenna ta' olle nyemma'e Tang Kemah, me' olle ta' madhateng dusa ban okoman mate ka aba'na dibi'." 
Numbers18:23 Molae sateya pera' oreng Lewi se olle ngoros Tang Kemah ban se nanggung orosanna lalakon jareya. Atoran reya kodu eangguy keya bi' na' potona ba'na salanjangnga. Oreng Lewi ta' andhi' sangkolan e Isra'il," 
Numbers18:24 menangka sangkolanna bi' Sengko' la eberri'i sakabbinna tor-ator parsapolowan se eatorragi oreng Isra'il ka Sengko' menangka tor-ator se malolo ka Sengko'. Jareya sababba Sengko' ngoca' ka reng-oreng Lewi jareya ja' aba'na ta' eberri'ana bagiyanna sangkolan e Isra'il.” 
Numbers18:25 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers18:26 “Kabala ka oreng Lewi: Mon ba'na narema dhari oreng Isra'il tor-ator parsapolowan se bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na menangka bagiyanna ba'na, ba'na kodu ngatorragi saparpolonna menangka tor-ator se malolo ka Sengko' dhari ba'na." 
Numbers18:27 Tor-ator jareya eanggep padha bi' tor-ator gandum se anyar ban aeng anggur se anyar dhari kaom tane. 
Numbers18:28 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na ngatorragi tor-ator se malolo ka Sengko' aropa sabagiyan dhari tor-ator parsapolowanna oreng Isra'il. Tor-ator jareya bi' ba'na kodu epassra'agi ka Imam Harun. 
Numbers18:29 Ngala'agi bagiyan se paleng bagus dhari se etarema ba'na. 
Numbers18:30 Samarena massra'agi bagiyan jareya, ba'na olle ngala' karena, akantha oreng tane se ngala' re-karena hasella saellana ngatorragi tor-atorra." 
Numbers18:31 Karena jareya bi' ba'na olle kakan e dhimma'a bai ban sabalana, menangka opana ba'na se alalakon e Kemah Socce." 
Numbers18:32 Ba'na ta' sala mon ngakan jareya, sokor bagiyanna se paleng becce' la eatorragi ka Sengko'. Ba'na ja' manajjis tor-ator se socce dhari oreng Isra'il polana ngakan sabagiyan dhari tor-ator jareya sabellunna bagiyanna se paleng bagus eatorragi malolo ka Sengko'. Mon ba'na ta' atoro' ka atoran reya, ba'na bakal mateya.”" 
Numbers19:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers19:2 “Kabala atoran-atoran reya ka bangsa Isra'il: Ngala' sape bine' se mera se tadha' calena ban se gi' ta' tao eangguy ko'-ngangko'. 
Numbers19:3 Sape jareya passra'agi ka Imam Eleyazar. Keban jareya kodu egiba ka lowarra parkemahan pas esambelli e adha'anna imam. 
Numbers19:4 Imam Eleyazar pas kodu ngala' dharana keban jareya sakone', dhara jareya ketessagi pettong kale sambi addhep ka Kemah Socce." 
Numbers19:5 Sakabbinna bagiyanna keban jareya, iya areya kole'na, dagingnga, dharana ban essena tabu'na, kodu eobbar e adha'anna imam." 
Numbers19:6 Saellana jareya imam kodu ngala' kaju aras sakone', hisop sagundhung ban tale mera, jareya kabbi ontallagi ka dhalem apoy se eangguy ngobbar sape jarowa." 
Numbers19:7 Saellana jareya imam jareya kodu nyassa kalambina, pas mandhi. Samareana, imam jareya olle maso' ka dhalem parkemahan, tape imam jareya gi' najjis sampe' compet are." 
Numbers19:8 Oreng se ngobbar sape jareya kodu nyassa kalambina keya pas mandhi; oreng jareya gi' najjis keya sampe' compet are. 
Numbers19:9 Saellana jareya oreng se ta' najjis kodu makompol abu bar-obbaranna sape gella', pas esaba' e kennengngan se ta' najjis e lowarra parkemahan. Abu jareya sempen e jadhiya sopaja ekenneng angguy ommat Isra'il kaangguy agabay aeng opacarana panyocceyan kaangguy palebbaranna dusa." 
Numbers19:10 Oreng se makompol abuna sape jareya kodu nyassa kalambina, tape gi' najjis sampe' compet are. Atoran jareya angguy salanjangnga, kaangguy oreng Isra'il ban bariya keya oreng manca se neptep e antarana oreng Isra'il.”" 
Numbers19:11 Pa'-sapa'a ngenneng nyedding mayyit daddi najjis pettong are abidda. 
Numbers19:12 Mon la olle tello are ban pettong are, oreng jareya kodu nyocce'e aba'na ngangguy aeng opacara, buru daddi berse. Tape mon saellana olle tello are ban pettong are oreng jareya ta' nyocce'e aba', oreng jareya paggun najjis." 
Numbers19:13 Oreng se ngenneng nyedding mayyit ban ta' nyocce'e aba' jareya najjis, sabab gi' ta' eserame aengnga opacara. Oreng jareya manajjis Kemah Socce, daddi ta' eanggep ommadda Allah pole." 
Numbers19:14 Mon badha oreng mate e dhalem settong kemah, pa'-sapa'a se badha e dhalem kemah jareya otabana se maso' ka jadhiya, daddi najjis pettong are abidda." 
Numbers19:15 Gendhi ban polo' se tadha' kodhungnga daddi najjis kabbi keya. 
Numbers19:16 Pa'-sapa'a se ngenneng nyedding ka mayyidda oreng se mate polana epate'e oreng, oreng se mate biyasa e teggal, daddi najjis pettong are abidda. Bariya keya oreng se nyedding makam otaba tolangnga oreng mate." 
Numbers19:17 Mon nyocceyana oreng se najjis jareya, kodu ngala' abu bar-obbaranna sape bine' se mera sakone' kaangguy malebbar dusana. Abu jareya kodu emaso'agi ka dhalem polo', pas epobuwi aeng se ekala' dhari aeng se agili." 
Numbers19:18 E dhalem parkara se nomer settong gella', iya areya mon badha oreng mate e dhalem kemah, oreng se ta' najjis kodu ngala' hisop sagundhung, cabbur ka dhalem aeng gella', aengnga laju ketessagi ka kemah jareya ban ka sabarang se badha e jadhiya, bariya keya ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya. E dhalem parkara se kapeng dhuwa', iya areya mon oreng ngenneng nyedding ka mayyit, makam otaba tolangnga oreng mate, oreng se ta' najjis kodu ngetesse oreng jareya bi' aeng gella' padha ban parkara se kapeng settong." 
Numbers19:19 Oreng se najjis jareya kodu eketesse e are se kapeng tello' ban e are se kapeng petto'. E are se kapeng petto' jareya opacara nyocce'e oreng se najjis gella' la mare. Oreng jareya pas kodu nyassa kalambina sarta terros mandhi. Molae compet are oreng jareya la daddi berse pole. 
Numbers19:20 Oreng se najjis tape ta' nyocce'e aba'na, pagguna najjis polana gi' ta' eserame aeng opacara. Oreng jareya manajjis Kemah Socce, ban ta' eanggep ommadda Allah pole." 
Numbers19:21 Atoran jareya kodu eangguy salanjangnga. Oreng se ngetessagi aeng opacara gella' kodu nyassa kalambina keya; oreng se ekenneng aeng jareya daddi najjis sampe' compet are. 
Numbers19:22 Barang se esedding oreng se najjis daddi najjis, ban oreng se nyedding oreng jareya daddi najjis sampe' compet are." 
Numbers20:1 E bulan settong bangsa Isra'il la napa' kabbi ka ra-ara Zin; bangsa jareya pas aenggun e Kades. Miriyam mate e jadhiya, laju ekoburragi e jadhiya keya." 
Numbers20:2 E settong bakto reng-oreng Isra'il ta' nemmo aeng pole, laju padha agaribbung e seddi'na Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers20:3 sarta pas padha pek-ngacepek, oca'na, “Lebbi becce' ja' sakenga kaula padha mate e ajunanna PANGERAN asareng ban tan-taretan se laen." 
Numbers20:4 Aponapa kaula bi' sampeyan me' egiba ka ra-ara paneka? Daddi kaula ban ebin kaula epamateya e ka'iya? 
Numbers20:5 Aponapa kaula bi' sampeyan me' egiba dhari Messer ka kennengngan se ta' ekenneng men-tamenne paneka? E ka'iya tadha' gandum, tadha' bungkana ara, anggur otabana dalima. La'-mala' tadha' aeng se eenoma balakka'!”" 
Numbers20:6 Mosa ban Harun laju nyengla dhari kennengnganna oreng se bannya' jareya, laju meyos ka adha'anna Kemah Socce. E jadhiya laju asojud ka tana, saellana jareya pas badha sonar se nandha'agi ja' PANGERAN rabu ka jadhiya." 
Numbers20:7 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers20:8 “Kala' tongkedda ba'na se e adha'anna Petthe Parjanjiyan rowa, ba'na ban Harun pas makompol ommat rowa. E adha'anna reng-oreng jareya ba'na nyoro ka gumo' e dhissa' rowa sopaja makalowara aeng. Aeng se kalowar dhari gumo' jareya ekenneng enom ommat Isra'il ban ebinna.”" 
Numbers20:9 Mosa mondhut tongket jareya menorot se epakonnagi PANGERAN. 
Numbers20:10 Mosa ban Harun makompol ommat Isra'il kabbi ka adha'anna gumo' gella'. Dhabuna Mosa, “E, reng-oreng se daraka, mara edhingngagi! Apa sengko' ban Harun kodu makalowar aeng dhari gumo' reya kaangguy kaparlowanna ba'na?”" 
Numbers20:11 Mosa laju ngangka' tekkenna, pas epokollagi ka gumo' bato gella' dhu kale. Dhari gumo' jareya pas nancel aeng se pas eenom bi' reng-oreng Isra'il ban ebinna." 
Numbers20:12 Tape PANGERAN nyala'agi Mosa ban Harun, dhabuna, “Sarrena ba'na ta' parcaja ka Sengko' kaangguy noduwagi Tang kakobasa'an e adha'anna bangsa Isra'il, ba'na bakal ta' noro'a mimpin ommat Isra'il maso' ka nagara se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka bangsa jareya.”" 
Numbers20:13 Jareya se enyamae somber Meriba, kennengnganna oreng Isra'il ango'ngo'an ka PANGERAN ban kennengnganna PANGERAN noduwagi kakobasa'anna ka bangsa Isra'il." 
Numbers20:14 Dhari Kades Mosa ngerem otosan ka rato Edom. Otosan jareya mator, “Abdidalem sakanca ka'dhinto otosan dhari bangsa Isra'il. Tantona junandalem ngagali kasossa'anna bangsa Isra'il." 
Numbers20:15 Bangatowana bangsa Isra'il ngalle ka Messer terros neptep e ka'dhissa' kantos ataonan abittepon. Bangsa Isra'il eseksa sareng bangsa Messer," 
Numbers20:16 daddi laju aserro ka PANGERAN. PANGERAN meyarsa serrona ommattepon, laju ngotos malaekadda. Malaekat gapaneka se mimpin bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer. Samangken bangsa Isra'il ampon napa' ka Kades, kottha se badha e batessa babaepon junandalem." 
Numbers20:17 Abdidalem epakon nyo'onnagi edi ka junandalem, bangsa Isra'il terro ngamponga lebat e nagaraepon junandalem. Reng-oreng Isra'il sareng ebinna ta' lebada e kennengngan se banne lorong, sareng ta' lebada e gal-teggal otaba e bun-kebbun anggur, jugan ta' ngenoma dhari mor-somor kaagunganna junandalem. Bangsa abdidalem namong ngamponga lebat e lorong raja, kantos kalowar dhari batessepon nagara ka'dhinto.”" 
Numbers20:18 Saodda oreng Edom, “Sampeyan ta' olle lebat e baba paneka. Mon maksa sampeyan ebasbasa bi' peddhang kabbi.”" 
Numbers20:19 Ca'na oreng Isra'il, “Bangsa kaula coma lebada e lorong rajana, mon oreng Isra'il otaba ebinna badha se ngenom aengnga sampeyan, ebajarana. Poko'na bangsa kaula nyo'ona edin ngamponga lebat.”" 
Numbers20:20 Oreng Edom ngoca' pole, “Ampon, ta' olle!” Oreng Edom pas kalowar ngeba tantara se kowat merrangana bangsa Isra'il." 
Numbers20:21 Daddi oreng Isra'il laju abali, nyare jalan laen, sabab bi' oreng Edom ta' ebagi lebat e nagarana." 
Numbers20:22 Sakabbinna ommat Isra'il mangkat dhari Kades pas dhapa' ka Gunong Hor," 
Numbers20:23 e batessa Edom. E jadhiya PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa ban Harun," 
Numbers20:24 “Harun ta' bisa noro' maso' ka nagara se bi' Sengko' ejanjiyagi ka bangsa Isra'il; polana ba'na ban Harun ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta e seddi'anna somber Meriba. Sateya Harun bakal mateya. 
Numbers20:25 Kassa' olok Harun ban ana'na se anyama Eleyazar, pas giba ongga ka Gunong Hor." 
Numbers20:26 Sanapa'na dha' essa', pangangguyya Harun pas bukka', pobu ka Eleyazar. Harun bakal mateya e jadhiya.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN buru. Se katello jareya pas ongga ka Gunong Hor esakseyagi bi' sakabbinna ommat Isra'il. 
Numbers20:28 Mosa mokka' pangangguyya Harun, pas epobu ka Eleyazar, pottrana. Harun seda e konco'na gunong jareya, dineng Mosa ban Eleyazar pas toron." 
Numbers20:29 Reng-oreng Isra'il saellana tao ja' Harun seda laju padha noduwagi kasossa'anna atena tello polo are abidda. 
Numbers21:1 E lao'na nagara Kana'an badha kottha se anyama Arad. E bakto ratona meyarsa ja' bangsa Isra'il lebat e jalan Atarim, bangsa Isra'il laju eserrang, reng-orengnga badha se etangkep." 
Numbers21:2 Oreng Isra'il laju asompa ka PANGERAN, “Manabi sareng Junandalem bangsa Isra'il epamennang ka bangsa ka'dhinto, bangsa ka'dhinto sareng tha-kotthana sareng abdidalem epatompessa.”" 
Numbers21:3 Parnyo'onanna bangsa Isra'il jareya ekabbuli bi' PANGERAN; bangsa Isra'il epamennang ka bangsa Kana'an. Bangsa Kana'an sarta tha-kotthana epatompes kabbi bi' bangsa Isra'il. Daddi kennengngan jareya enyamae Horma. 
Numbers21:4 Reng-oreng Isra'il mangkat dhari Gunong Hor lebat lorong se nojju ka Tellok Akaba moterre nagara Edom. Tape e tengnga jalan reng-oreng jareya ta' sabbar pole," 
Numbers21:5 pas ango'ngo'an ka Allah ban ka Mosa, oca'na, “Aponapa bi' sampeyan kaula me' egiba nyengla dhari Messer? Epamateya e ra-ara beddhi paneka? Sabab e ka'iya tadha' pa-ponapa se ekennenga teddha, tadha' aeng se ekennenga enom. Kaula ampon busen ngakan kakanan se tadha' rassana paneka!”" 
Numbers21:6 PANGERAN pas madhateng lar-olar se mandhi opassa, epangekke' reng-oreng Isra'il, sampe' bannya' reng-oreng Isra'il se padha mate." 
Numbers21:7 Reng-oreng Isra'il pas padha nyabis ka Mosa, atorra, “Kaula paneka dusa, ango'ngo'an ka PANGERAN sareng ka sampeyan. Tore nyo'onnagi ka PANGERAN sopaja lar-olar paneka epatadha'a.” Daddi Mosa laju adu'a nyo'onnagi bangsa jareya ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers21:8 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kassa' ba'na agabay lar-olaran dimbaga, pacangke' ka cangga. Reng-oreng se ekekke' olar gella' mon ngabas ka olar dimbaga jareya tanto pas baras.”" 
Numbers21:9 Daddi Mosa abadhi lar-olaran dimbaga; lar-olaran jareya epacangke' ka cangga. Reng-oreng se ekekke' olar gella', mon ngabas ka lar-olaran jareya, laju baras." 
Numbers21:10 Oreng Isra'il mangkat pole, laju akemah e kottha Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Samarena mangkat dhari kennengngan jareya, laju akemah e jur-gujuran Abarim e ra-ara beddhi e temoranna baba Mo'ab." 
Numbers21:12 Laju terros sampe' gan Cora Zered pas akemah e jadhiya. 
Numbers21:13 Dhari jadhiya pas mangkat pole laju akemah e penggirra Songay Arnon, e ra-ara beddhi se malanjang ka babana oreng Amori. Songay Arnon jareya daddi batessa babana oreng Mo'ab ban babana oreng Amori." 
Numbers21:14 Lantaran jareya e dhalem ‘Buku Paperranganna PANGERAN’ esebbuttagi, “… Disa Waheb, e baba Sufa ban ra-corana; Songay Arnon" 
Numbers21:15 ban bung-lambungnga ra-cora se malanjang sampe' ka disa Ar nojju ka batessa babana oreng Mo'ab.” 
Numbers21:16 Dhari jadhiya reng-oreng jareya mangkat, pas napa' ka kennengngan se anyama Be'er, artena mor-somor. E jadhiya PANGERAN tao adhabu ka Mosa, “Soro ommat akompol; bi' Sengko' eberri'ana aeng.”" 
Numbers21:17 E bakto jareya bangsa Isra'il anyanye lagu reya, “He, mor-somor, pakalowar aengnga ba'na, bi' sengko' eamba'a ban nyanyeyan." 
Numbers21:18 Somor se ekale bi' sa-pangobasa ban pin-pamimpinna bangsa ekale ban tongket kapamimpinanna sarta tongket tandha kobasana.” Dhari ra-ara beddhi reng-oreng jareya ngalle ka Matana," 
Numbers21:19 ban dhari jadhiya ka Nahaliyel, terros ka Bamot" 
Numbers21:20 saellana laju terros ka cora e babana oreng Mo'ab, e babana konco'na Gunong Pisga se ngadhep ka ra-ara beddhi." 
Numbers21:21 Bangsa Isra'il pas ngerem reng-oreng otosan ka Sihon, rato Amori, esoro manapa' pessen kantha reya," 
Numbers21:22 “Bangsa abdidalem nyo'ona edi lebada e nagarana junandalem. Bangsa abdidalem sareng bin-ebinna ta' nyalethong dhari lorong sareng ta' maso'a ka gal-teggal otabana ka bun-kebbunna anggur, sareng ta' ngenoma aeng dhari mor-somor e ka'dhinto. Bangsa abdidalem ta' nyalethong dhari lorong raja kantos kalowar dhari nagaraepon junandalem.”" 
Numbers21:23 Tape Rato Sihon ta' kasokan ngedine reng-oreng Isra'il lebat e nagarana. Rato jareya makompol pasukanna, pas meyos ka Yahas e ra-ara beddhi laju nyerrang oreng Isra'il e jadhiya." 
Numbers21:24 Tape e dhalem perrang jareya bannya' tantara Amori epate'e bangsa Isra'il. Bangsa Isra'il laju ngobasane sarta ngennengnge nagarana reng-oreng jareya molae dhari Songay Arnon sampe' ka Songay Yabok, iya areya batessa babana oreng Amon, sabab bates jareya ce' kowadda partahananna." 
Numbers21:25 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya oreng Isra'il arebbu' sakabbinna kotthana oreng Amori, tamaso' Hesybon ban sakabbinna kottha kene' e sakalenglengnga, sarta laju neptep e jadhiya." 
Numbers21:26 Hesybon reya ibu kottha se ekennengnge Sihon, Rato Amori. Rato jareya tao aperrang ban rato Mo'ab sarta arebbu' bagiyanna nagarana sampe' ka Songay Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Lantaran jareya bujangga asyi'ir kantha reya, “Mara entar ka Hesybon, ka kotthana Rato Sihon. Sengko' kabbi padha terro nangaleyana kottha jareya epaddek pole akantha molana." 
Numbers21:28 E settong bakto e kottha Hesybon reya pasukan Sihon maju akantha apoy. Se maancor kottha Ar e Mo'ab, ban ngobasane nong-gunong e salanjangnga Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 Adhu, bangsa Mo'ab, palang onggu ba'na! Ba'na se mojja Kamos, ba'na la epatompes kabbi! Bi' Allahna ba'na epanneng epadaddi oreng ngongse, babine'anna ba'na epadaddi tahananna rato Amori." 
Numbers21:30 Tape sateya toronanna bangsa jareya padha mate tadha' karena, e salanjangnga lorong se dhari Hesybon ka Dibon, dhari Nasyim ka Nofah e seddi'anna Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Daddi bangsa Isra'il laju ngennengnge babana oreng Amori. 
Numbers21:32 Saellana jareya Mosa laju makon reng-oreng nyare jalan se paleng bagus nyerrangnga kotthana Yaezer. Oreng Isra'il laju arebbu' kottha jareya ban tha-kottha e ma'-semma'na sarta ngojuk oreng Amori se ngennengnge tha-kottha jareya. 
Numbers21:33 Saellana jareya oreng Isra'il abiluk lebat e lorong se ka Basan. Rato Og dhari Basan maju ban pasukanna nyerrang oreng Isra'il e kottha Edrei. 
Numbers21:34 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Ella, ja' tako'. Ba'na epamennanga bi' Sengko'. Ba'na bakal makala'a rato jareya, ra'yadda ban nagarana. Rato Og jareya papadha ban Rato Sihon se marenta e Hesybon rowa.”" 
Numbers21:35 Daddi oreng Isra'il mennang ka rato Og. Rato jareya epate'e, bariya keya tra-pottra ban ra'yadda, kabbi epatadha' karena. Saellana jareya nagarana pas ekobasae sarta ekennengnge." 
Numbers22:1 Bangsa Isra'il mangkat pole, pas akemah e tana lapang Mo'ab, e temorra Songay Yordan, e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho." 
Numbers22:2 E bakto Rato Mo'ab se asmana Balak, pottrana Zipor, meyarsa kabadha'anna bangsa Amori se epakala bangsa Isra'il, sarta kabar ja' bangsa Isra'il jareya talebat bannya'na," 
Numbers22:3 rato jareya ban ra'yadda kabbi padha katako'en. 
Numbers22:4 Ca'na oreng Mo'ab ka para pamimpinna oreng Midian, “Tanto saos sadaja se badha e nagara paneka epatompes epatadha' karena sareng bangsa Isra'il, epakadi rebba se eamba sape e teggal.” Daddi Rato Balak" 
Numbers22:5 ngotos oreng nembali Bileyam, pottrana Beor, se alenggi e Petor e seddi'na Songay Efrat e dhaera Amau. Otosan jareya epakon mator kantha reya, “Areya' badha settong bangsa dhateng dhari Messer; mencar balattra man-dha'emman, olle daddi to-sabakto nyerrang tang nagara." 
Numbers22:6 Bangsa jareya akowadan dhari tang bangsa. Daddi mara ba'na dha' enna', bastowagi bangsa jareya. Pola tang bangsa me' mennang sarta ngenneng ngojuk bangsa jareya dhari tang nagara. Sabab sengko' yakin, oreng se eberkadi ba'na tanto narema berkat, dineng oreng se ebasto ba'na tanto ekenneng babaston.”" 
Numbers22:7 Daddi para pamimpinna oreng Mo'ab ban Midian mangkat ngeba opa se ebagiya ka Bileyam sopaja kasokana abasto bangsa Isra'il. Sanapa'na ka kennengnganna Bileyam, reng-oreng jareya manapa' dhabuna Rato Balak." 
Numbers22:8 Dhabuna Bileyam ka reng-oreng jareya, “Sampeyan asaren e ka'iya saos. Lagguna kaula aparengana kabar kadi ponapa dhabuna PANGERAN ka kaula.” Daddi para pamimpinna bangsa Mo'ab jareya laju ngenep e kalenggiyanna Bileyam." 
Numbers22:9 Allah rabu ka Bileyam, laju mareksane, “Sapa reng-oreng se badha e bengkona ba'na jareya, Bileyam?”" 
Numbers22:10 Atorra Bileyam, “Otosannepon Rato Balak dhari Mo'ab, ngatore oneng" 
Numbers22:11 ca'epon badha settong bangsa dhateng dhari Messer, ampon mencar balattra ka man-ka'dhimman. Sareng Rato Balak abdidalem epakon abastowagi bangsa gapaneka sopaja bangsa Mo'ab kengenga makala sareng ngojuk bangsa gapaneka.”" 
Numbers22:12 Dhabuna Allah ka Bileyam, “Ba'na ja' noro' reng-oreng otosan jareya, ban ta' olle abasto bangsa jareya, sabab bangsa jareya la eberkadi bi' Sengko'.”" 
Numbers22:13 Kalagguwanna Bileyam adhabu ka reng-oreng otosanna Balak, “Samangken sampeyan gubar, kaula ta' eparengngagi noro' sampeyan sareng PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers22:14 Daddi reng-oreng jareya abali, laju mator ka Balak, “Bileyam ta' kasokan rabu ka ka'dhinto.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balak pas makon reng-oreng laenna se abannya'an ban atenggiyan pangkadda dhari otosan se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers22:16 Reng-oreng jareya manapa' dhabuna Balak ka Bileyam, atorra, “Badha dhabuna Rato Balak sapaneka, ‘Sengko' menta'a onggu, mara ba'na dha' essa', ja' nolak, ya." 
Numbers22:17 Bi' sengko' ba'na eberri'ana opa se ce' rajana, ban apa'a bai se epenta ba'na bi' sengko' etorodana. Mara dha' essa', bastowagi bangsa rowa.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Saodda Bileyam, “Sanajjan salaka sareng emmas se badha e karatonna Balak eparengngagiya kabbi ka kaula, kaula ta' poron nyempang dhari dhabuna PANGERAN, Allah se esemba kaula. Sanare e dhalem parkara se kene' sakale kaula ta' bisa alaban." 
Numbers22:19 Namong, sae jugan sampeyan kelem e ka'iya, akadi otosan se jang adha'an. Kaula gi' terro onenga ponapa se edhabuwagiya PANGERAN pole ka kaula.”" 
Numbers22:20 E malem jareya Allah rabu ka kalenggiyanna Bileyam, laju adhabu, “Reng-oreng jareya dha' enna' ngajaga ba'na. Daddi la kassa' ba'na noro'. Tape ba'na kodu ajalannagi coma se eparenta'agi bi' Sengko'.”" 
Numbers22:21 Daddi kalagguwanna Bileyam masang pa-kapana hemarra, pas mangkat ban para pamimpinna bangsa Mo'ab jareya." 
Numbers22:22 Tape Allah duka polana Bileyam meyos abareng para otosanna Balak. Teppa'na Bileyam netene hemarra, eerengngagi sarengnga se kadhuwa, pas badha malaekadda PANGERAN ngadek e tengnga lorong, ngaddhang Bileyam." 
Numbers22:23 E bakto nangale'e badha malaekat ngadek e lorong sambi ngastane peddhang se eonos, hemar jareya abiluk dhari lorong ka teggal. Bi' Bileyam epokol, epabaliya ka lorong." 
Numbers22:24 Malaekat gella' laju ngadek e bagiyanna lorong se cope', se e kangan kacerra eapet kebbun anggur se ngangguy pagar bato." 
Numbers22:25 E bakto nangale'e malaekat jareya, hemar buru laju menggir, sampe' sokona Bileyam tagipe' ka geddhung pagarra kebbun anggur gella'. Bi' Bileyam hemar jareya epokol pole." 
Numbers22:26 Malaekadda PANGERAN gella' laju ngalle pole ajangadha'i Bileyam, pas ngadek e kennengngan se acope'an pole, se e kangan kacerra malaekat jareya ta' ekenneng lebadi." 
Numbers22:27 E bakto nangale'e malaekat jareya, hemar gella' laju arendhu. Bileyam laju peggel, hemarra epokol bi' tekkenna." 
Numbers22:28 Bi' PANGERAN hemar gella' laju epatao acaca. Ca'na hemar jareya ka Bileyam, “Kaula sala ponapa me' epokol kantos tello kale?”" 
Numbers22:29 Dhabuna Bileyam, “Sengko' egabay en-maenan bi' ba'na! Ja' sakenga sengko' ngeba peddhang, tanto ba'na la epate'e bi' sengko'!”" 
Numbers22:30 Saodda hemar jareya, “Kaula paneka gu ta' hemar se etetene sampeyan molae lamba', ta' enggi? Ponapa kaula oneng ta' atoro' ka papakonna sampeyan?” “Enja',” saodda Bileyam." 
Numbers22:31 Saellana jareya bi' PANGERAN Bileyam epangoladi ka malaekadda se ngadek e jadhiya sambi ngastane peddhang se eonos. Bileyam laju asojud ka tana. 
Numbers22:32 Dhabuna malaekat jareya, “Arapa hemarra ba'na me' epokol sampe' tello kale? Sengko' dha' enna' ngaddhanga ba'na, sabab masthena ba'na ta' noro' otosanna Rato Balak reya." 
Numbers22:33 E bakto hemarra ba'na nangale'e sengko', pas menggir sampe' tello kale. Ja' sakenga hemar jareya ta' menggir, tanto ba'na la epate'e bi' sengko', tape hemarra epasalamet.”" 
Numbers22:34 Saodda Bileyam, “Abdina dusa. Abdina ta' oneng panjennengngan ngadek e tengnga lorong ngaddhanga abdina. Samangken, manabi menorot panjennengngan abdina ka'dhinto sala, ngereng abdina abaliya.”" 
Numbers22:35 Tape malaekat jareya adhabu, “Dina kassa' la terros noro' reng-oreng jareya. Tape ba'na coma olle ngoca'agi pa-apa se esoro koca'agi bi' sengko'.” Daddi Bileyam nerrossagi parjalananna bi' reng-oreng otosanna Balak jareya." 
Numbers22:36 E bakto meyarsa ja' Bileyam rabuwa, Balak laju ngamba' ka kottha Mo'ab e penggirra Songay Arnon e batessa baba Mo'ab." 
Numbers22:37 Dhabuna Balak, “Arapa ba'na me' ta' endha' dhateng bakto ekone'e dha'-adha'na? Apa sengko' esanggu ta' kellar majar opa ka ba'na?”" 
Numbers22:38 Saodda Bileyam, “Ka'dhinto abdidalem ampon dhateng. Namong abdidalem ta' kobasa ngoca'agi pa-ponapa kajabana se epakon koca'agi ka abdidalem sareng Allah.”" 
Numbers22:39 Bileyam ban Balak pas meyos ka kottha Huzot. 
Numbers22:40 E jadhiya Balak ngatorragi kurban sape ban dumba. Dagingnga sabagiyan eparengngagi ka Bileyam ban ka para pamimpin se ekabareng ka jadhiya. 
Numbers22:41 Kalagguwanna Balak abakta Bileyam ongga ka gumo' Bamot Ba'al. Dhari jadhiya Bileyam bisa ngoladi sabagiyan dhari bangsa Isra'il. 
Numbers23:1 Dhabuna Bileyam ka Balak, “Ngereng abdidalem badhiyagi mezba pettong meggi', sareng sadhiya'agi sape lalake' papetto' sareng dumba lalake' papetto'.”" 
Numbers23:2 Apa panyo'onna Bileyam jareya bi' Balak etorodi. E mezba se papetto' jareya esaba'i sape lake' ban dumba lake' settong ebang menangka kurban. 
Numbers23:3 Atorra Bileyam ka Balak, “Ngereng junandalem ngadek e seddi'anna kurban kaagunganna. Abdidalem gi' nengalana ponapa PANGERAN manggiyana abdidalem ponapa bunten. Saamponna, junandalem eatorana oneng ponapa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka abdidalem.” Bileyam laju ongga ka konco'na gumo' kadibi'an," 
Numbers23:4 e jadhiya Allah ngaton ka salerana. Atorra Bileyam ka Allah, “Abdidalem ampon maddek mezba papetto', ngatorragi sape sareng dumba settong ebang e saneyap mezba gapaneka.”" 
Numbers23:5 PANGERAN apareng oneng ka Bileyam apa se kodu edhabuwagi; saellana jareya Bileyam laju epakon abali ka Balak. 
Numbers23:6 Sanapa'na ka baba, Balak epanggi gi' ngadek e seddi'anna kurban obbaranna, apolong ban para pamimpinna bangsa Mo'ab." 
Numbers23:7 Bileyam laju adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya: “Dhari Aram, pagunongan e temor rowa, sengko' ekone'e Balak, rato Mo'ab. Dhabuna, ‘Mara dha' enna', bastowagi bangsa Isra'il rowa!’" 
Numbers23:8 Baramma sengko' se abastowa, bangsa se ta' ebasto bi' Allah? Baramma sengko' se ngokoma, bangsa se ta' eokom PANGERAN?" 
Numbers23:9 Dhari konco'na nong-gunong sengko' nangale'e bangsa jareya; dhari nong-gunong sengko' ngabassagi tengka gulina. Bangsa jareya banneyan ban sa-bangsa laenna, ta' padha ban sa-bangsa e dunnya." 
Numbers23:10 Toronanna Isra'il padha ban abu bannya'na, ta' ekenneng bitong bi' manossa. Sengko' mandar mateya akantha oreng se jujur rowa, tang ajal mandar padha'a ban ajalla ommadda Allah jareya.”" 
Numbers23:11 Dhabuna Balak ka Bileyam, “Ba'na reya baramma? Bi' sengko' ba'na egiba dha' enna' esoro abasto tang moso, me' daddi bi' ba'na la'-mala' eberkadi.”" 
Numbers23:12 Atorra Bileyam, “Abdidalem namong kengeng ngoca'agi pa-ponapa se epakonnagi sareng PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers23:13 Dhabuna Balak ka Bileyam, “Mara sateya ba'na noro' sengko' ka kennengngan laen; dhari dhissa' ba'na pera' bisa nangale'e sabagiyan dhari bangsa Isra'il. Bastowagi bangsa jareya dhari jadhiya.”" 
Numbers23:14 Balak laju abakta Bileyam ka talon Zofim e konco'na Gunong Pisga. E jadhiya Balak maddek mezba pettong meggi'; e attassa mezba se papetto' jareya esaba'i sape lake' ban dumba lake' settong ebang. 
Numbers23:15 Atorra Bileyam ka Balak, “Ngereng junandalem ngadek e seddi'anna kurban obbaranna kaagunganna, abdidalem gi' badhi manggi'i PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers23:16 PANGERAN manggi'i Bileyam pas apareng oneng apa se kodu edhabuwagi, saellana jareya Bileyam laju epakon abali ka Balak." 
Numbers23:17 Sanapa'na ka baba, Balak epanggi gi' ngadek e seddi'anna kurban obbaranna, apolong ban para pamimpinna bangsa Mo'ab. Dhabuna Balak, “Baramma ca'na dhabuna PANGERAN?”" 
Numbers23:18 Bileyam laju adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya: “Balak, pottrana Zipor, ngereng kasokana peyarsa'agi." 
Numbers23:19 Allah ka'dhinto ta' padha sareng manossa se dujan lecek cacana. Manabi Allah ajanji, tanto eteptebbi! Manabi Allah adhabu, tanto dhabuna elampa'agi!" 
Numbers23:20 Abdidalem epakon aberkadi. Dineng manabi Allah aberkadi, berkadda ta' ekenneng cabut pole." 
Numbers23:21 Yakub tadha' kajahadanna Isra'il tadha' kasossa'anna sabab Isra'il terros etolonge PANGERAN. Allah se esemba bangsa gapaneka, Allah se eako menangka ratona!" 
Numbers23:22 Allah se makalowar bangsa gapaneka dhari Messer; se nolonge aperrang akadi bantheng. 
Numbers23:23 Tadha' wa'-duwa', tennong otaba seher se meddhas ka bangsa Isra'il. Ca'epon oreng parkara bangsa gapaneka, ‘Abas, ra, ajib onggu se elampa'agi Allah!’" 
Numbers23:24 Bangsa Isra'il padha sareng macan se ta' poron neng-enneng otaba dhung-tedhungan, manabi gi' ta' kengeng nyeppa' mosona, sareng gi' ta' ngero' dharana mosona se esargep bi' cakarra.”" 
Numbers23:25 Dhabuna Balak ka Bileyam, “Mon ba'na ta' endha' abasto bangsa Isra'il, iya ella, tape ja' sampe' ba'na la'-mala' aberkadi.”" 
Numbers23:26 Saodda Bileyam, “Abdidalem gu ta' ampon mator ja' abdidalem kodu ajalannagi sadajana dhabuna PANGERAN?”" 
Numbers23:27 Dhabuna Balak ka Bileyam, “Mara noro' sengko' ka kennengngan laen. Pola bi' Allah ba'na eedine abastowagi bangsa Isra'il dhari dhissa'.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balak laju abakta Bileyam ka konco'na Gunong Peyor se dhep-adhebban bi' sagara beddhi. 
Numbers23:29 Atorra Bileyam ka Balak, “Ngereng abdidalem maddeggagi mezba papetto', sareng sadhiya'agi sape lalake' papetto' sareng dumba lalake' papetto'.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balak norodi parnyo'onanna Bileyam jareya. E mezba se papetto' jareya esaba'i sape lake' ban dumba lake' settong ebang. 
Numbers24:1 Sateya Bileyam la ngagali ja' se daddi kasokanna Allah iya areya sopaja bangsa Isra'il eberkadi. Daddi Bileyam pas ta' nyare dha-tandha pole akantha se dha'-adha'na. Bileyam laju ngoladi ka sagara beddhi," 
Numbers24:2 pas ngoladi bangsa Isra'il se teppa'na akemah akalompo' menorot sukuna bang-sebang. Saellana jareya Bileyam laju ekobasae Erroh Allah," 
Numbers24:3 pas adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya, “Areya' pessenna Bileyam ana'na Peyor, totorra oreng se terrang pangabasanna," 
Numbers24:4 se ngedhing dadhabunna Allah, se nangale'e Allah Se Mahakobasa ngaton ka aba'na, sambi robbu tape mata abukka'." 
Numbers24:5 Yakub, mah-kemahna ba'na ce' bagussa, Isra'il, kennengnganna ba'na ce' leburra!" 
Numbers24:6 Akantha cora se ce' lebarra, padha ban bun-kebbunan e penggir songay, akantha bungkana garu tamennanna PANGERAN, otabana bungkana aras e penggir songay." 
Numbers24:7 Aeng ojan ta' kakorangan tana se etamenne ne-bine cokop aengnga. Ratona bakal jaja'a alebbiyan dhari Agag, ban karaja'anna bakal molja'a." 
Numbers24:8 Allah se makalowar bangsa jareya dhari Messer, se nolonge aperrang akantha bantheng. Mosona epa'-ceppa' tadha' karena, lang-tolangnga eparemmok, ban panana etel-potel kabbi." 
Numbers24:9 Bangsa jareya padha ban macan se tedhung; sapa se bangal ajagai? Moga oreng se aberkadi ba'na eberkadana keya, ban se abasto ba'na mandar ebastowa keya.”" 
Numbers24:10 Balak ce' dukana sampe' astana mergem akantha oreng se ngothemma, dhabuna ka Bileyam, “Ba'na bi' sengko' ekone'e polana esorowa abasto tang moso, me' ba'na la'-mala' aberkadi tang moso jareya sampe' tello kale." 
Numbers24:11 Sateya kassa' ba'na ondur, le-mole ka bengkona! Sengko' ajanji aberri'a opa sabannya'na ka ba'na, tape PANGERAN ta' ngedine ba'na narema opa jareya.”" 
Numbers24:12 Saodda Bileyam, “Abdidalem gu ta' ampon apareng oneng ka para otosannepon junandalem," 
Numbers24:13 ja' sanare sadajana emmas sareng salaka e karatonnepon junandalem eparengngagiya sadaja ka abdidalem, abdidalem ta' poron ngala' sakarebba dibi' sareng nyempang dhari kasokanna PANGERAN. Abdidalem namong ngoca'agi pa-ponapa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN.”" 
Numbers24:14 Atorra Bileyam ka Balak, “Samangken abdidalem palemana ka kennengnganna bangsa abdidalem. Namong, sabellunnepon, abdidalem ngatorana oneng ka junandalem pa-ponapa se badhi ejalannagi bangsa Isra'il ka bangsaepon junandalem e bingkeng are.”" 
Numbers24:15 Saellana jareya Bileyam pas adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya: “Areya' pessenna Bileyam, ana'na Beor; pessenna oreng se terrang pangabasanna," 
Numbers24:16 se ngedhing dadhabunna Allah, ban eparenge tao ka Se Mahatenggi; se nangale'e Allah Se Mahakobasa e bakto ngaton ka aba'na, sambi robbu, tape matana abukka'." 
Numbers24:17 Sengko' ngabas ka jaman se bakal dhatengnga; sengko' nangale'e bangsa Isra'il. Badha Rato dhari Isra'il asalla, bakal rabuwa akantha bintang se mancorong tera'na. Para pamimpinna Mo'ab bakal eparemmoga, bangsa Set bakal epatompessa." 
Numbers24:18 So-mosona e Edom bakal epakala'a, nagarana ekobasa'ana; dineng Isra'il bakal terros mennanga." 
Numbers24:19 Dhari Yakub bakal badha'a pangobasa, se matompessa so-mosona.”" 
Numbers24:20 Saellana jareya Bileyam e dhalem pangaton buru ngoladi reng-oreng Amalek, pas adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya: “Dhari sa-bangsa se badha e dunnya reya, Amalek se paleng kobasa, tape dhi-budhina bakal mosna'a salanjangnga.”" 
Numbers24:21 E dhalem pangaton jareya Bileyam ngoladi keya na' potona Kain, pas adhabuwagi nobuwat kantha reya: “Kennengnganna ba'na pajat koko, padha ban lebun e attassa gumo' bato." 
Numbers24:22 Tape ba'na, bangsa Keni, bakal mosna'a, ta' abit pole bangsa Asyur bakal dhatengnga, ngangko'a ba'na ekagabaya tawananna.”" 
Numbers24:23 Bileyam pas adhabuwagi nobuwat reya keya: “Palang! Sapa se odhi' mon Allah alampa'agi jareya? 
Numbers24:24 Tape dhari Siprus bakal dhatengnga armada, se bakal matelloga Asyur ban Heber, saellana jareya armada jareya bakal ancora keya.”" 
Numbers24:25 Bileyam pas aya-sadhiya gubara ka kalenggiyanna, dineng Balak pas gubar keya." 
Numbers25:1 Sabatara bangsa Isra'il ngennengnge Cora Sitim, lalake'anna molae azina ban babine'an Mo'ab se badha e jadhiya." 
Numbers25:2 Babine'an jareya ngajak lalake'an Isra'il jareya ka ta-pesta kurban kaangguy ngormat illahna bangsa Mo'ab. Oreng Isra'il noro' ngakan kurban jareya keya, sarta noro' nyemba illahna bangsa Mo'ab buru." 
Numbers25:3 Sarrena oreng Isra'il nyemba Ba'al e Peyor, PANGERAN duka sarta adhabu ka Mosa," 
Numbers25:4 “Pega' kabbi pamimpinna bangsa Isra'il, pas pate'e adha'anna oreng bannya' menangka tandha kata'adan ka Sengko' sopaja Sengko' ta' peggella pole ka bangsa jareya.”" 
Numbers25:5 Saellana jareya Mosa adhabu ka kim-hakim Isra'il, “Ba'na kodu padha mate'e reng-oreng e dhalem sukuna bang-sebang se nyemba ka Ba'al e Peyor.”" 
Numbers25:6 E bakto Mosa ban sakabbinna ommat teppa'na nanges agingging e labangnga Kemah Socce, laju padha nangale'e badha oreng Isra'il ngeba babine' Midian maso' ka dhalem kemahna." 
Numbers25:7 E bakto Pinehas, ana'na Eleyazar, bajana Imam Harun, nangale'e jareya, laju jaga adina'agi reng-oreng se akompol jareya. Pinehas ngala' tombak," 
Numbers25:8 laju nyerser lalake' ban babine' gella' ka dhalem kemahna. Se kadhuwa jareya laju ecoco bi' tombagga, kalaban cara se kantha jareya balai se ngenneng ka bangsa Isra'il se ekenneng tola jareya pas ambu." 
Numbers25:9 Tape sabatara jareya se mate la badha pa' lekor ebu oreng. 
Numbers25:10 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers25:11 “Pinehas ana'na Eleyazar, kompoyya Harun abillai Tang kahormadan e nga'-tengnga'anna bangsa Isra'il, ta' narema polana reng-oreng nyemba ka illah laen salaenna Sengko', daddi Sengko' sateya la ta' peggel pole ka bangsa Isra'il, ban burung se matompessa bangsa jareya." 
Numbers25:12 Daddi kabala ka Pinehas ja' Sengko' mabadha'a parjanjiyan ban aba'na," 
Numbers25:13 Pinehas ban na' potona bi' Sengko' epadaddiya imam salanjangnga, sabab Pinehas jareya abillai Sengko', Allahna, ban madhateng palebbaranna dusana oreng Isra'il.”" 
Numbers25:14 Oreng Isra'il se epate'e abareng ban babine' Midian rowa nyamana Zimri, ana'na Salu, kapalana settong kaom dhari suku Simeyon." 
Numbers25:15 Babine' gella' nyamana Kozbi, ana'na Zur, kapala kaom e Midian." 
Numbers25:16 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers25:17 “Laban oreng Midian rowa, patompes kabbi" 
Numbers25:18 sabab bangsa jareya jahat ka ba'na, nepo ba'na e Peyor, ban polana Kozbi, ana'na kapala kaom e Midian. Kozbi jareya babine' se mate epate'e e bakto dhateng balai lantaran kadaddiyan e Peyor rowa.”" 
Numbers26:1 Saellana balai jareya la tadha', PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa ban Eleyazar, pottrana Imam Harun," 
Numbers26:2 “Ba'na kodu mabadha caca jiwana ommat Isra'il menorot kalowargana bang-sebang. Oreng lalake'an se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas se sanggup daddi tantara, kodu cathet.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mosa ban Eleyazar alampa'agi papakon jareya. Lalake'an se aomor dhu polo taon ka attas epakompol e tana lapang Mo'ab, e bara'anna Songay Yordan e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho. Areya' reng-oreng Isra'il se kalowar dhari Messer:" 
Numbers26:4  
Numbers26:5 Dhari suku Ruben, pottra sareyangnga Yakub: kaom Henokh, Palu," 
Numbers26:6 Hezron, ban Karmi." 
Numbers26:7 Oreng lalake'an e dhalem om-kaom jareya bannya'na pa' polo tello' ebu pettong ratos tello polo oreng. 
Numbers26:8 Ana'na Palu iya areya Eliyab," 
Numbers26:9 ban na'-ana'na Eliyab iya areya Nemuwel, Datan ban Abiram. Datan ban Abiram jareya la epele bi' ommat, tape noro' reng-orengnga Korah alaban ka Mosa ban Harun sarta ta' atoro' ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers26:10 Tana laju maroka ban reng-oreng jareya padha nyono' ka dhalem sampe' padha mate abareng ban Korah sarta reng-orengnga e bakto apoy ngello' oreng lalake'an se dhu ratos saeket oreng bannya'na. Jareya daddi parengeddan ka bangsa Isra'il. 
Numbers26:11 Tape na'-ana'na Korah ta' noro' mate. 
Numbers26:12 Dhari suku Simeyon: Kaom Nemuwel, Yamin, Yakhin," 
Numbers26:13 Zerah ban Saul. 
Numbers26:14 Lalake'an e dhalem om-kaom jareya bannya'na dhu lekor ebu dhu ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:15 Dhari suku Gad: Kaom Zefon, Hagi, Syuni," 
Numbers26:16 Ozni, Eri," 
Numbers26:17 Arod ban Areli. 
Numbers26:18 Lalake'an e dhalem om-kaom jareya bannya'na pa' polo ebu lema ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:19 Dhari suku Yehuda: Kaom Syela, Peres, Zerah, Hezron ban Hamul. Ana'na Yehuda se kadhuwa, iya areya Er ban Onan, la mate e tana Kana'an." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 Lalake'an e dhalem om-kaom jareya bannya'na pettong polo ennem ebu lema ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:23 Dhari suku Isakhar: Kaom Tola, Pu'a," 
Numbers26:24 Yasub ban Simron. 
Numbers26:25 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na sabidak empa' ebu tello ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:26 Dhari suku Zebulon: Kaom Sered, Elon ban Yahle'el." 
Numbers26:27 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na sabidak ebu lema ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:28 Dhari toronanna Yusup, se kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa: suku Manasye ban Efraim." 
Numbers26:29 Dhari suku Manasye: Makhir, ana'na Manasye, iya areya eppa'na Gileyad; ban om-kaom se kasebbut e baba reya toronanna Gileyad:" 
Numbers26:30 Kaom Iyezer, Helek," 
Numbers26:31 Asriyel, Sekhem," 
Numbers26:32 Semida ban Hefer. 
Numbers26:33 Zelafehad, ana'na Hefer, ta' andhi' ana' lalake', pera' ana' babine'. Nyamana iya areya Mahla, No'a, Hogla, Milka ban Tirza." 
Numbers26:34 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na saeket dhuwa' ebu pettong atos oreng. 
Numbers26:35 Dhari suku Efraim: Kaom Sutelah, Bekher, ban Tahan." 
Numbers26:36 Kaom Eran reya toronanna Sutelah. 
Numbers26:37 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na tello polo dhuwa' ebu lema ratos oreng. Jareya om-kaom toronanna Yusup. 
Numbers26:38 Dhari suku Benyamin: Kaom Bela, Asybel, Ahiram," 
Numbers26:39 Sefufam ban Hufam. 
Numbers26:40 Kaom Ared ban Na'aman reya toronanna Bela. 
Numbers26:41 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na pa' polo lema' ebu nem atos oreng. 
Numbers26:42 Dhari suku Dan: Kaom Suham. 
Numbers26:43 Lalake'anna kaom jareya bannya'na sabidak empa' ebu pa' ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:44 Dhari suku Asyer: Kaom Yimna, Yiswi ban Beriya." 
Numbers26:45 Kaom Heber ban Malkiyel reya toronanna Beriya. 
Numbers26:46 Asyer andhi' ana' babine' se anyama Serah. 
Numbers26:47 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na saeket tello' ebu pa' ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:48 Dhari suku Naftali: Kaom Yahze'el, Guni," 
Numbers26:49 Yezer ban Syilem. 
Numbers26:50 Lalake'anna om-kaom jareya bannya'na pa' polo lema' ebu pa' ratos oreng. 
Numbers26:51 Lalake'an Isra'il jareya kabbi bannya'na nem atos settong ebu pettong ratos tello polo oreng. 
Numbers26:52 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers26:53 “Bagi tana jareya ka ku-suku bangsa Isra'il menorot rajana suku jareya bang-sebang. 
Numbers26:54 Mon magiya ngangguy ellot. Ka suku se raja kodu berri'i bagiyan se raja, ka suku se kene' bagiyanna kene'.”" 
Numbers26:55  
Numbers26:56  
Numbers26:57 Se tamaso' suku Lewi reya iya areya kaom Gerson, Kehat ban Merari." 
Numbers26:58 E dhalem toronanna reng-oreng jareya tamaso' kaom Libni, Hebron, Mahli, Mosi ban Korah. Kehat reya eppa'na Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Amram abine Yokhebed, pottrana Lewi. Yokhebed jareya lahir e Messer. Amram ban Yokhebed kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa: Harun ban Mosa, sarta pottra babine' kasorang, iya areya Miriyam." 
Numbers26:60 Harun kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa: Nadab, Abihu, Eleyazar ban Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Nadab ban Abihu seda e bakto ngatorragi apoy se ta' socce ka PANGERAN. 
Numbers26:62 Lalake'anna suku Lewi se aomor sabulan ka attas bannya'na tello lekor ebu oreng. Reng-oreng jareya ecathet epalaen dhari sabangsana, polana ta' olle tana sangkolan e Isra'il." 
Numbers26:63 Jareya dhaftarra om-kaom e dhalem bangsa Isra'il se ebadhi Mosa ban Imam Eleyazar e bakto mabadha caca jiwa e tana lapang Mo'ab e bara'anna Songay Yordan e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho. 
Numbers26:64 Dhari reng-oreng se ecathet Mosa ban Harun e dhalem caca jiwa se jang adha'an e ra-ara beddhi Sinay la tadha' settonga se gi' odhi'. 
Numbers26:65 PANGERAN la adhabu ja' reng-oreng jareya kabbi bakal mateya e ra-ara beddhi. Ban pajat ongguwan, reng-oreng jareya mate kabbi, kajabana Kaleb pottrana Yefune ban Yusak pottrana Nun." 
Numbers27:1 Zelafehad andhi' ana' babine' kalema, iya areya Mahla, No'a, Hogla, Milka ban Tirza. Eppa'na Zelafehad iya areya Hefer, eppa'na Hefer iya areya Gileyad. Eppa'na Gileyad iya areya Makhir, eppa'na Makhir iya areya Manasye, ban eppa'na Manasye iya areya Yusup." 
Numbers27:2 Ana'na Zelafehad se kalema jareya entar ngadhep ka Mosa, ban Imam Eleyazar sarta para pamimpin ban sakabbinna ommat se teppa'na akompol e seddi'na labangnga Kemah Socce. Oca'na se kalema jareya," 
Numbers27:3 “Eppa' kaula seda e ra-ara beddhi, sareng ta' kaagungan pottra lalake'. Eppa' ta' ngereng Korah sarengngan ta' alaban ka PANGERAN. Eppa' seda lantaran dusana dibi'." 
Numbers27:4 Tape aponapa me' asmana epaelang dhari bangsa Isra'il namong lantaran ta' kaagungan pottra lalake'? Kaula sataretan nyo'ona tana sangkolan akadi la-balana eppa'.” 
Numbers27:5 Mosa ngatorragi parkara jareya ka PANGERAN," 
Numbers27:6 ban PANGERAN laju adhabu ka Mosa," 
Numbers27:7 “Oca'na na'-ana'na Zelafehad jareya pajat bendher. Daddi la padha berri'i tana sangkolan akantha tan-taretanna eppa'na. Sangkolanna Zelafehad kodu etoronnagi ka ana' babine'anna. 
Numbers27:8 Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il ja' mon badha oreng lalake' mate tape ta' andhi' ana' lalake', sangkolanna kodu etoronnagi ka ana' babine'anna." 
Numbers27:9 Mon ta' andhi' ana' babine', sangkolan jareya kodu etoronnagi ka taretan lake'na." 
Numbers27:10 Mon ta' andhi' taretan lake', tanana jareya daddi sangkolanna taretan lake'na eppa'na." 
Numbers27:11 Mon ta' andhi' taretan lake', ban eppa'na ta' andhi' taretan lake' keya, tanana daddi andhi'na balana se paleng semma' dhari kaomma.” Katantowan jareya kodu etoro' bi' reng-oreng Isra'il menangka atoranna hokom se edhabuwagi PANGERAN kalaban parantara'anna Mosa." 
Numbers27:12 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Kassa' ba'na ongga ka Gunong Abarim, dhari jadhiya abassagi nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagi ka bangsa Isra'il rowa." 
Numbers27:13 Mon ba'na la mare ngabas nagara jareya, ba'na pas bakal mateya akantha Harun, kaka'na rowa," 
Numbers27:14 sabab ba'na ban Harun e baktona badha e ra-ara Zin rowa ta' atoro' Tang parenta. E bakto ommat Isra'il ango'ngo'an ka Sengko' e Meriba, ba'na ta' endha' noduwagi Tang kakobasa'an se socce ka bangsa jareya.” (Kadaddiyan jareya neng e somber Meriba e Kades, e ra-ara beddhi Zin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Atorra Mosa ka PANGERAN," 
Numbers27:16 “GUSTE Allah se apareng odhi' ka sadajana mahlok se odhi' e bume, abdidalem nyo'ona, kasokana Junandalem mele oreng se epamimpina bangsa ka'dhinto;" 
Numbers27:17 oreng se bisa apareng parenta e dhalem paperrangan, sopaja ommat Isra'il ka'dhinto ta' kantosa akadi dumba se tadha' tokang ngowanna.”" 
Numbers27:18 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Olok Yusak, ana'na Nun. Yusak jareya cakep orengnga. Tompangngagi tanangnga ba'na ka cethagga." 
Numbers27:19 Pas soro manjeng e adha'anna imam Eleyazar sarta e adha'anna ommat Isra'il. Omommagi ka reng-oreng jareya ja' Yusak jareya epadaddi gantena ba'na. 
Numbers27:20 Sabagiyan dhari kakobasa'anna ba'na bagi ka Yusak jareya, me' olle ommat Isra'il bisa ta'at ka Yusak kabbi." 
Numbers27:21 Yusak kodu menta petodu ka Imam Eleyazar ban Eleyazar kodu atanya apa se ekakarep Sengko' kalaban cara atanya ka Urim ban Tumim. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Eleyazar bisa mimpin Yusak ban ommat Isra'il kabbi e dhalem parkara apa'a bai.” 
Numbers27:22 Mosa alampa'agi papakonna PANGERAN jareya. Yusak epakon ngadek e adha'anna Imam Eleyazar ban sakabbinna ommat Isra'il. 
Numbers27:23 Saellana jareya Mosa laju nompangngagi astana ka serana Yusak, sarta pas ngomommagi ja' Yusak la eangkat epadaddi gantena, menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka salerana." 
Numbers28:1 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa 
Numbers28:2 manapa' ka bangsa Isra'il sopaja bangsa jareya agateyagiya gu-onggu mon teppa' ka to-bakto se la etantowagi, kodu ngatorragi ban-kurban aropa kakanan se masenneng panggaliyanna Allah." 
Numbers28:3 Areya' kurban se kodu eatorragi ka PANGERAN: Kaangguy kurban ren-aren, budhu'na dumba lalake' se gi' aomor sataon ban tadha' calena dhadhuwa'," 
Numbers28:4 se settong kaangguy tor-ator gi' laggu, se settonganna kaangguy tor-ator e bakto malem." 
Numbers28:5 Budhu'na dumba tor-ator jareya kodu toro'e teppong sakilo ecampor ban mennya' jaitun se paleng bagus saliter. 
Numbers28:6 Jareya kurban obbaran se teptep se eatorragi dha'-adha'na e Gunong Sinay. Bauna masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN. 
Numbers28:7 Budhu'na dumba tor-ator jareya kodu etoro'e keya aengnga anggur saliter se eserammagi ka attassa mezba. 
Numbers28:8 Budhu'na dumba kaangguy tor-ator malem kodu eatorragi kalaban cara se padha ban tor-ator gi' laggu, etoro'e aengnga anggur. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers28:9 E are Sabat kodu ekurbannagi budhu'na dumba lalake' se aomor sataon se gi' tadha' calena dhadhuwa', teppong dhu kilo ecampor ban mennya' jaitun menangka kurban sasajin ban kurban aeng anggur." 
Numbers28:10 Kurban obbaran jareya kodu eatorragi sabban are Sabat menangka tamba'anna kurban ren-aren se epabareng ban kurban aeng anggurra. 
Numbers28:11 Sabban tanggal settong kodu eatorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran aropa sape lake' ngodha dhadhuwa', dumba lake' ngodha settong, budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers28:12 Kaangguy kurban sasajin kodu eatorragi teppong se ecampore mennya' jaitun: sabban sape lake' settong kodu etoro'e teppong tello kilo; sabban dumba lalake' settong kodu etoro'e teppong dhu kilo," 
Numbers28:13 ban sabban budhu'na dumba lake' kodu etoro'e teppong sakilo. Jareya kurban obbaran jareya kurban kakanan, ban bauna masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers28:14 Kurban obbaran jareya kodu etoro'e keya kurban aeng anggur, sabban sape lake' settong kodu etoro'e dhu liter, sabban dumba lake' etoro'e saliter satengnga, ban sabban budhu'na dumba etoro'e saliter. Jareya atoranna kurban obbaran se kodu eatorragi sabban tanggal settong e dhalem sataon benteng." 
Numbers28:15 Ban menangka tamba'anna kurban obbaran ren-aren ban kurban aeng anggurra, ba'na kodu ngatorragi keya embi' lake' settong menangka kurban pangamponanna dusa." 
Numbers28:16 E tanggal pa' bellas bulan settong kodu eraya'agi Are Paska kaangguy ngormadi PANGERAN. 
Numbers28:17 Kalagguwanna, tanggal lema bellas, paraya'an Roti Se Ta' Eragi'i emolae abidda pettong are, saabidda pettong are jareya oreng ta' olle ngakan roti se eragi'i." 
Numbers28:18 E are se kapeng settong e dhalem paraya'an jareya oreng kodu akompol mabadha kabakteyan, ban ta' olle alako berra'." 
Numbers28:19 Atorragi kurban obbaran ka PANGERAN se aropa sape lake' se gi' ngodha dhadhuwa', dumba lake' settong, ban budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers28:20 Atorragi kurban sasajin se ewajibbagi, iya areya teppong ecampore mennya' jaitun: teppong tello kilo se kodu etoro'agi ka sabban sape lake' settong, teppong dhu kilo se kodu etoro'agi ka sabban dumba lake' settong," 
Numbers28:21 ban teppong sakilo se kodu etoro'agi ka sabban budhu'na dumba lake' settong. 
Numbers28:22 Atorragi keya embi' lake' settong kaangguy kurban palebbaranna dusa. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na mabadha opacara palebbaranna dusana ommat. 
Numbers28:23 Kurban jareya kabbi tamba'anna kurban obbaran se biyasa bagiyan gu-lagguna. 
Numbers28:24 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya keya, atorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran pettong are abidda. Kurban jareya menangka tamba'anna kurban obbaran ren-aren ban kurban aeng anggurra. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers28:25 E are se kapeng petto' oreng kodu padha akompol mabadha kabakteyan ban ta' olle alako berra'. 
Numbers28:26 E are se dha'-adha'na e bakto Pesta Anye, e bakto ba'na ngatorragi gandum se anyar ka PANGERAN, ba'na kodu padha akompol mabadha kabakteyan, ban ta' olle alako berra'." 
Numbers28:27 Atorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran se aropa sape lake' dhadhuwa', dumba lake' se gi' ngodha settong ban budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha se tadha' calena. Bauna kurban obbaran jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers28:28 Atorragi kurban sasajin se wajib, aropa teppong se ecampore mennya' jaitun: tello kilo kaangguy sabban sape lake' settong, dhu kilo kaangguy sabban dumba lake' settong," 
Numbers28:29 ban sakilo kaangguy sabban budhu'na dumba settong. 
Numbers28:30 Atorragi keya embi' lake' settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya oreng mabadha opacara palebbaranna dusana ommat. 
Numbers28:31 Ban-kurban jareya sarta kurban aeng anggurra daddi tamba'anna kurban obbaran ren-aren ban kurban sasajin. 
Numbers29:1 E tanggal settong bulan petto' ba'na kodu akompol mabadha kabakteyan, ban ta' olle alako berra'. E are jareya tarompet kodu epamonye." 
Numbers29:2 Atorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran se aropa sape lake' se gi' ngodha settong, dumba lake' settong, budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers29:3 Atorragi keya kurban sasajin se wajib, aropa teppong se ecampore mennya' jaitun: tello kilo kaangguy sape lake' settong, dhu kilo kaangguy dumba lake' settong," 
Numbers29:4 ban sakilo kaangguy sabban budhu'na dumba settong. 
Numbers29:5 Atorragi keya embi' lake' settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na mabadha opacara palebbaranna dusana ommat. 
Numbers29:6 Tor-ator jareya tamba'agi ka kurban obbaran se eatorragi epabareng ban kurban sasajinna, sabban tanggal settong sabban bulanna. Bariya keya menangka tamba'anna kurban obbaran se eatorragi epabareng ban kurban sasajin sarta kurban aeng anggurra. Bauna kurban obbaran jareya masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
Numbers29:7 E tanggal sapolo bulan petto' ba'na kodu akompol mabadha kabakteyan. E are jareya ba'na kodu apowasa ban ta' olle alako berra'. 
Numbers29:8 Atorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran se aropa sape lake' se gi' ngodha settong, dumba lake' settong, budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena. Bauna kurban jareya masenneng panggaliyanna Pangeran." 
Numbers29:9 Atorragi kurban sasajin se wajib aropa teppong se ecampore mennya' jaitun: tello kilo kaangguy sabban sape lake' settong, dhu kilo kaangguy sabban dumba lake' settong," 
Numbers29:10 ban sakilo kaangguy sabban budhu'na dumba settong. 
Numbers29:11 Atorragi keya embi' lake' settong kaangguy opacarana pangamponanna dusana ommat, salaenna kurban pangamponanna dusa ban kurban obbaran ren-aren se epabareng ban kurban sasajin sarta kurban aeng anggurra se eatorragi e are jareya." 
Numbers29:12 E tanggal lema bellas bulan petto' ba'na kodu akompol kaangguy mabadha kabakteyan ban ta' olle alako berra'. Paraya'an jareya kodu ebadha'agi pettong are abidda kaangguy ahormadi PANGERAN. 
Numbers29:13 E are se dha'-adha' atorragi kurban obbaran, se bauna masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN, iya areya: sape lake' ngodha tello bellas meggi', dumba lake' se gi' ngodha dhadhuwa', budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon pa' bellas meggi', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:14 Atorragi keya kurban sasajin se wajib, iya areya teppong se ecampore mennya' jaitun: tello kilo kaangguy sabban sape lake' settong, dhu kilo kaangguy sabban dumba lake' settong," 
Numbers29:15 ban sakilo kaangguy sabban budhu'na dumba settong. Kurban sasajin jareya kodu eatorragi epabareng ban kurban aeng anggur se wajib. 
Numbers29:16 Laen dhari jareya kodu eatorragi keya embi' lake' settong kaangguy kurban pangamponanna dusa. Kurban jareya menangka tamba'anna kurban obbaran ren-aren sarta kurban sasajin ban kurban aeng anggurra. 
Numbers29:17 E are se kapeng dhuwa' atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha dhubellas meggi', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', ban budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon pa' bellas meggi', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:18 Salaenna jareya atorragi keya ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha', kabbi padha atorragi pabareng." 
Numbers29:19  
Numbers29:20 E are se kapeng tello' atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha sabellas meggi', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', ban budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon pa' bellas meggi', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:21 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:22  
Numbers29:23 E are se kapeng empa' atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha sapolo meggi', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', ban budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon pa' bellas meggi', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:24 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:25  
Numbers29:26 E are se kapeng lema' atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha sangang meggi', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon pa' bellas meggi', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:27 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:28  
Numbers29:29 E are se kapeng ennem atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha baballu', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', budhu'na dumba lake' se aomor sataon pa' bellas, kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:30 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:31  
Numbers29:32 E are se kapeng petto' atorragi sape lake' se gi' ngodha papetto', dumba lake' dhadhuwa', budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' ngodha se aomor sataon pa' bellas, kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:33 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:34  
Numbers29:35 E are se kapeng ballu' ba'na akompol mabadha kabakteyan ban ta' olle alako berra'. 
Numbers29:36 Atorragi ka PANGERAN kurban obbaran se bauna masenneng panggaliyanna, iya areya: sape lake' se gi' ngodha settong, dumba lake' settong, budhu'na dumba lake' se gi' aomor sataon papetto', kabbi kodu padha tadha' calena." 
Numbers29:37 Jareya kabbi atorragi pabareng ban ban-kurban laenna akantha se ekaparlo e are se dha'-adha'. 
Numbers29:38  
Numbers29:39 Jareya atoran-atoranna kurban obbaran, kurban sasajin, kurban aeng anggur, ban kurban kasalameddan se kodu eatorragi ba'na ka PANGERAN mon badha paraya'an-paraya'an se wajib. Ban-kurban jareya menangka tamba'anna ban-kurban se la eatorragi ba'na kaangguy ngessa'agi neyat otabana kurban sokalella." 
Numbers29:40 Mosa manapa' ka bangsa Isra'il sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka salerana. 
Numbers30:1 Mosa manapa' atoran-atoran reya ka para pamimpinna ku-suku Isra'il. 
Numbers30:2 Mon oreng lalake' andhi' neyat otaba ajanji sambi etoro'e sompa ka PANGERAN, janji jareya kodu eteptebbi, ta' olle epaburung." 
Numbers30:3 Mon badha paraban se gi' apolong bengko ban eppa'na aneyat ka PANGERAN, ban eppa'na ta' alarang e bakto ngedhing parkara jareya, paraban buru kodu neptebbi neyadda ban janjina jareya." 
Numbers30:4  
Numbers30:5 Tape mon e bakto eppa'na ngedhing parkara jareya pas ta' magi ana'na aneyat kantha jareya, paraban jareya ta' wajib neptebbi neyadda ban janjina. Bi' PANGERAN babine' jareya bakal esapora'a sabab ta' ebagi bi' eppa'na." 
Numbers30:6 Mon badha babine' se gi' ta' alake andhi' neyat otaba andhi' janji, ban se aneyat otabana ajanji jareya la epekker gallu otabana ta' kalaban epekker gallu, neyat otabana janji jareya kodu elakone. Mon e budhi are babine' jareya alake, gi' wajib neptebbi neyat otaba janjina, sokor lakena ta' arassa berra' e bakto ngedhing parkara jareya." 
Numbers30:7  
Numbers30:8 Tape mon e bakto se lake' ngedhing parkara jareya pas ta' magi binena aneyat kantha jareya, babine' jareya ta' wajib neptebbi neyat otaba janjina jareya. Bi' PANGERAN babine' jareya tanto esapora." 
Numbers30:9 Mon badha randha otaba babine' se etellak bi' lakena andhi' neyat otabana andhi' janji ka PANGERAN, oreng jareya wajib neptebbi neyadda otaba janjina jareya." 
Numbers30:10 Mon badha babine' se la alake andhi' neyat otabana andhi' janji ka Pangeran," 
Numbers30:11 babine' jareya wajib ngessa'agi neyadda otabana janjina jareya, sokor lakena ta' alarang e baktona ngedhing parkara jareya." 
Numbers30:12 Tape mon e bakto lakena ngedhing parkara jareya pas ta' magi binena aneyat kantha jareya, babine' jareya ta' wajib ngessa'agi neyadda otabana neptebbi janjina. Bi' PANGERAN babine' jareya tanto esapora, sabab babine' jareya ta' ebagi se lake'." 
Numbers30:13 Lake andhi' ha' magi otaba alarang binena e dhalem parkara neyadda ban janjina ka PANGERAN. 
Numbers30:14 Tape mon e baktona ngedhing parkara jareya lakena ta' alarang, babine' jareya kodu ngessa'agi sakabbinna neyadda ban janjina. Lakena ngedine binena andhi' neyat otabana janji jareya sabab e bakto ngedhing parkara jareya ta' alarang." 
Numbers30:15 Mon e budhi are lakena maburung neyat otabana janjina binena jareya, lakena jareya se kodu nanggung okomanna Pangeran polana se maburung neyat ban janjina binena jareya." 
Numbers30:16 Jareya atoran-atoran se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka Mosa parkara neyat ban janjina paraban se gi' apolong ban eppa'na, otabana babine' se la alake." 
Numbers31:1 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers31:2 “Okom reng-oreng Midian polana se marogi ban masossa bangsa Isra'il. Saellana jareya ba'na bakal mateya.” 
Numbers31:3 Daddi Mosa laju adhabu ka bangsa Isra'il, “Mara sadhiya'agi sanjatana, pas mangkat merrange bangsa Midian, sopaja ba'na ngennenga neba'agi okomanna PANGERAN ka bangsa jareya." 
Numbers31:4 Saneyap suku Isra'il kodu nyadhiya'agi tantara saebu oreng se epamangkada aperrang.” 
Numbers31:5 Daddi dhari saneyap suku Isra'il epele oreng saebu, bannya'na kabbi dhubellas ebu se epamangkada aperrang." 
Numbers31:6 Mosa makon reng-oreng jareya mangkat aperrang, se epimpin Pinehas, pottrana Imam Eleyazar. Pinehas ngeba rang-barang se socce sarta pet-tarompet se eangguya aberri' dha-tandha." 
Numbers31:7 Menorot dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, oreng Isra'il nyerrang oreng Midian, lalake'an Midian epate'e kabbi," 
Numbers31:8 tamaso' rato Midian se kalema, iya areya Ewi, Rekem, Zur, Hur ban Reba. Bileyam, ana'na Beor, epate'e keya." 
Numbers31:9 Reng-oreng Isra'il nangkep babine'an ban na'-kana' Midian, sarta arampas keban ban ebinna, sarta sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na." 
Numbers31:10 Tha-kottha ban parkemahan-parkemahanna eobbar. 
Numbers31:11 Saellana jareya reng-oreng Isra'il ngala' sakabbinna hasella rampasan, tamaso' reng-oreng tahanan sarta ban-keban," 
Numbers31:12 jareya kabbi egiba ka Mosa ban ka Imam Eleyazar sarta ka sakabbinna ommat Isra'il, se e bakto jareya teppa'na akemah e tana lapang Mo'ab, e penggirra Songay Yordan, e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho." 
Numbers31:13 Mosa, Imam Eleyazar ban sakabbinna pamimpinna ommat Isra'il kalowar dhari parkemahan ngamba'a sardhadhu Isra'il." 
Numbers31:14 Mosa duka ka para parwira, para kapalana pasukan ban kapalana laskar se gi' buru abali dhari paperrangan jareya." 
Numbers31:15 Dhabuna ka reng-oreng jareya, “Arapa babine'an jareya me' ta' epate'e?" 
Numbers31:16 Gu ta' babine'an jareya se norodi petoduna Bileyam, ban nyacae ommat Isra'il e Peyor, eajak mongkore PANGERAN, ta' iya? Ban jareya se madhateng balai ka ommadda PANGERAN!" 
Numbers31:17 Daddi sateya pate'e kabbi na'-kana' lalake'an ban oreng babine'an se la ta' paraban. 
Numbers31:18 Tape babine'an se gi' paraban olle kala' ba'na. 
Numbers31:19 Ban ba'na kabbi se la mate'e oreng otabana se nyedding mayyit kodu neng e lowarra parkemahan sampe' pettong are abidda. E are se kapeng tello' ban se kapeng petto' ba'na ban sakabbinna babine'an se etawan bi' ba'na kodu padha mabadha opacara nyocce'e aba'. 
Numbers31:20 Sabarnana angguy, ban apa'a bai se ekagabay dhari kole', buluna embi' otaba kaju, kodu esocce'e keya.”" 
Numbers31:21 Saellana jareya Imam Eleyazar adhabu ka reng-oreng se gi' buru abali dhari paperrangan jareya, “Areya' atoran-atoran se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka Mosa." 
Numbers31:22 Sabarang se ta' tahan apoy, akantha emmas, salaka, dimbaga, besse, tema pote ban tema celleng, kodu esocce'e e dhalem apoy. Rang-barang laenna kodu esocce'e bi' aeng opacarana panyocceyan." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 E are se kapeng petto' ba'na kodu nyassa angguyya; samarena jareya buru ba'na ta' najjis pole, ban olle maso' ka dhalem parkemahan.”" 
Numbers31:25 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers31:26 “Ba'na ban Imam Eleyazar ban para pamimpinna ommat Isra'il se laen, kodu ngetong sakabbinna hasella rampasan, tamaso' tawanan sarta ban-keban." 
Numbers31:27 Hasella rampasan jareya kodu ebagi dhuwa', papadha; saparo bagi ka tantara se mole dhari aperrang, ban saparona bagi ka ommat Isra'il laenna." 
Numbers31:28 Dhari bagiyan se ebagi ka tantara gella', sabban lema ratos oreng tawanan, otabana sape, hemar, dumba ban embi', kodu kala' settong, gabay tor-ator se malolo ka Sengko', PANGERAN." 
Numbers31:29 Bagi jareya ka Imam Eleyazar menangka tor-ator se malolo ka Sengko', PANGERAN." 
Numbers31:30 Dhari bagiyan se ebagi ka ommat Isra'il laenna, sabban saeket oreng tawanan, sape, hemar, dumba ban embi', kodu ekala' settong, bagi ka oreng Lewi se ngoros Tang Kemah.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mosa ban Imam Eleyazar alampa'agi jareya menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. 
Numbers31:32 Salaenna se la ekala' dibi' bi' tantara, gi' badha hasella rampasan laen, iya areya: dumba ban embi' nem atos pettong polo lema' ebu, sape pettong polo dhuwa' ebu, hemar sabidak settong ebu, sarta babine'an se gi' paraban tello polo dhuwa' ebu." 
Numbers31:33  
Numbers31:34  
Numbers31:35  
Numbers31:36 Se saparo ebagi ka tantara se dhateng dhari aperrang, iya areya: dumba ban embi' tello ratos tello polo petto' ebu lema ratos, se nem atos pettong polo lema' egabay tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN; sape tello polo ennem ebu, se pettong polo dhuwa' egabay tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN; hemar tello polo ebu lema ratos, se sabidak settong egabay tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN; babine'an se gi' paraban nem bellas ebu, se tello polo dhuwa' egabay tor-ator se malolo ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers31:37  
Numbers31:38  
Numbers31:39  
Numbers31:40  
Numbers31:41 Mosa laju massra'agi tor-ator jareya ka Imam Eleyazar, kaangguy tor-ator ka PANGERAN, akantha se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN." 
Numbers31:42 Bagiyan se ebagi ka ra'yat padha bannya'na bi' bagiyan se ebagi ka tantara, iya areya: dumba ban embi' tello ratos tello polo petto' ebu lema ratos, sape tello polo ennem ebu, hemar tello polo ebu lema ratos, ban babine' se gi' paraban nem bellas ebu." 
Numbers31:43  
Numbers31:44  
Numbers31:45  
Numbers31:46  
Numbers31:47 Menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN, dhari sabban saeket oreng tawanan sarta keban, bi' Mosa epondhut settong, pas eparengngagi ka reng-oreng Lewi se atugas e Kemah Socce." 
Numbers31:48 Saellana jareya, para parwira se mimpin tantara Isra'il, ngadhep Mosa," 
Numbers31:49 laju mator kantha reya, “Tantara baba'an abdina sadaja ampon padha ebitong, genna' sadaja, tadha' korangnga sanare kasorang." 
Numbers31:50 Daddi abdina sakanca padha ngeba barang mas-emmasan, lang-gellang tanang, gellang soko, sello', anteng, sareng kalong ollena bagiyanna bang-sebang. Sadajana eatorragiya ka PANGERAN menangka tor-ator, sopaja PANGERAN teptebba ajaga sareng apareng kasalameddan ka abdina sadaja.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mosa ban Imam Eleyazar laju narema emmas jareya, se aropa gellang ban en-laenna." 
Numbers31:52 Tor-atorra para parwira jareya berra'na para' dhu ratos kilo. 
Numbers31:53 Tape tantara jareya la padha ngala' bagiyanna bang-sebang. 
Numbers31:54 Daddi bi' Mosa ban Eleyazar emmas jareya ebakta ka Kemah Socce sopaja PANGERAN ajaga'a ban aparenga salamet ka bangsa Isra'il. 
Numbers32:1 Ku-suku Ruben ban Gad bannya' ebinna. E bakto nangale'e ja' tana Yaezer ban tana Gileyad jareya ce' bagussa mon egabay kennengnganna meyara ebin," 
Numbers32:2 reng-oreng jareya laju entar ngadhep ka Mosa, Imam Eleyazar ban pin-pamimpin Isra'il se laen." 
Numbers32:3 Atorra reng-oreng jareya, “Tanaepon tha-kottha Atarot, Dibon, Yaezer, Nimra, Hesybon, Eleyale, Sebam, Nebo sareng Beon se ampon ekobasae Isra'il kalaban partolonganna PANGERAN, ce' saena manabi ebadhi kennengnganna meyara ebin. Sarengngan pole ebin abdina sadaja talebat bannya'na," 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 daddi manabi badha kabellasannepon panjennengngan, tana gapaneka eso'ona, daddi abdina sadaja ja' pakon ngalle ka bara'anna Songay Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Dhabuna Mosa, “Masa' ba'na ta' aguliyana dhari dhinna', mangkana reng-oreng sabangsana ba'na entara aperrang?" 
Numbers32:7 Arapa ba'na me' makene'a atena bangsa Isra'il se entasa Songay Yordan maso'a ka nagara paparengnga PANGERAN rowa? 
Numbers32:8 Eppa'na ba'na kabbi kantha jareya keya e bakto bi' sengko' eotos ka Kades-Barnea kaangguy gu-nenggu kabadha'anna nagara jareya. 
Numbers32:9 Kabbi la napa' ka Cora Eskol ban la nangale'e tana jareya. Tape e bakto abali, reng-oreng jareya makene' atena bangsa Isra'il sampe' padha tako' se maso'a ka nagara paparengnga PANGERAN rowa." 
Numbers32:10 E bakto jareya PANGERAN duka sampe' adhabu, ‘Reng-oreng reya ta' esto ka Sengko'. Lantaran jareya Sengko' asompa'a ja' reng-oreng jareya se la aomor dhu polo taon ka attas e bakto ondur dhari Messer, tadha' settonga se maso'a ka nagara se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub.’" 
Numbers32:11  
Numbers32:12 Kabbi oreng ekenneng okoman jareya kajabana Kaleb, ana'na Yefune, oreng Kenas rowa, ban Yusak ana'na Nun, sabab se kadhuwa jareya paggun esto ka PANGERAN." 
Numbers32:13 PANGERAN duka ka bangsa Isra'il sampe' bangsa jareya edina ajalan e ra-ara beddhi pa' polo taon abidda, sampe' reng-oreng se ta' esto ka Salerana padha mate kabbi." 
Numbers32:14 Ban sateya ba'na ro-nerowa eppa'na! Ba'na reya pajat oreng dusa se daddi sababba PANGERAN duka pole ka bangsa Isra'il! 
Numbers32:15 Mon ba'na abalik ta' atoro' ka Pangeran, bangsa reya bakal edina'a kabbi bi' Pangeran jang abidan pole se gi' kodu ajalan e ra-ara beddhi, ban ba'na se daddi sababba ancora bangsa jareya!”" 
Numbers32:16 Reng-oreng suku Ruben ban Gad jareya laju nyander ka seddi'anna Mosa, pas mator, “Abdina nyo'ona edi dhimen abadhiya dhang-kandhangnga ebin, dhari bato, jugan abadhiya tha-kottha se eparengngana binteng, badhi kennengnganna ana' bine abdina." 
Numbers32:17 Saamponna gapaneka abdina duliya mangkat aperranga asareng tan-taretan Isra'il. Abdina sadaja mimpina serrangan sareng abakta'a bangsa Isra'il maso' ka nagara se badhi ekaandhi'a bangsa gapaneka. Sabatara abdina eperrang, ana' bine abdina sadaja bisa terros neng e ka'dhinto, e tha-kottha se ngangguy binteng, aman dhari serranganna reng-oreng asli e tana ka'dhinto." 
Numbers32:18 Abdina sadaja ta' palemana ka compo' sabellunnepon sadajana oreng Isra'il padha gadhuwan tana se daddiya sangkolanna bang-sebang. 
Numbers32:19 Abdina sadaja padha ta' ngala'a tanana oreng Isra'il e bara'anna Songay Yordan ka'dhissa' maske sakone'a, sabab ampon narema bagiyan e ka'dhinto, e temoranna Songay Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:20 Dhabuna Mosa, “Mon oca'na ba'na jareya pajat bendher, mon ba'na pajat mangkada aperrang norodi kasokanna PANGERAN," 
Numbers32:21 ban oreng se bisa aperrang mangkat kabbi ka bara'anna Songay Yordan, epimpin PANGERAN nyerrangnga so-mosona sampe' so-mosona jareya epakala bi' PANGERAN," 
Numbers32:22 ban nagara jareya ekobasae, samarena jareya ba'na olle abali, ban ba'na bebas dhari kawajibanna ka PANGERAN ban ka tan-taretanna, ban tana e temoranna Songay Yordan reya bi' PANGERAN bakal eparengngagiya ka ba'na." 
Numbers32:23 Tape senga', mon ba'na ta' neptebbi janjina, ba'na dusa ka PANGERAN ban bakal eokoma lantaran dusana jareya." 
Numbers32:24 Kassa' la paddek tha-kotthana ban kagabay dhang-kandhangnga dumbana, ban ja' kaloppae neptebbi sabarang se ejanjiyagi ba'na jareya!”" 
Numbers32:25 Reng-oreng Gad ban reng-oreng Ruben laju mator, “Abdina padha ngalakonana sadaja papakonna panjennengngan." 
Numbers32:26 Ana' bine, sape sareng dumba abdina edinggala e ka'dhinto, e tha-kottha Gileyad." 
Numbers32:27 Namong abdina sadaja padha mangkada aperrang se epimpina sareng PANGERAN. Abdina entasa ka bara'anna Songay Yordan sareng aperranga akadi se ampon edhabuwagi salerana.” 
Numbers32:28 Daddi Mosa laju makon kantha reya ka Imam Eleyazar, Yusak ban pin-pamimpinna Isra'il," 
Numbers32:29 “Mon oreng Gad ban oreng Ruben ngestowagi papakonna PANGERAN ban entas ka bara'anna Songay Yordan aperranga, ban mon polana bantowanna reng-oreng jareya ba'na ahasel ngobasane nagara jareya, tana Gileyad rowa la bagi ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Numbers32:30 Tape mon reng-oreng jareya ta' entar ka bara'anna Songay Yordan parlo aperranga abareng ban ba'na, reng-oreng jareya kodu narema sangkolan tana e Kana'an, padha ban ba'na.”" 
Numbers32:31 Saodda reng-oreng Gad ban reng-oreng Ruben, “Tuwan, abdina padha ngestowagiya sadajana dhabuna PANGERAN." 
Numbers32:32 Kalaban pimpinannepon PANGERAN abdina padha entasa ka bara'anna Songay Yordan noro'a aperrang ka Kana'an, sopaja tana e temorranna Songay Yordan ka'dhinto pagguna daddi gadhuwan abdina sadaja.”" 
Numbers32:33 Mosa laju massra'agi tana jareya ka ku-suku Gad ban Ruben sarta ka saparona suku Manasye. Tana jareya iya areya baba kakobasa'anna Sihon, rato Amori, ban baba kakobasa'anna Og, rato Basan, tamaso' tha-kottha ban tana e sabingkerra." 
Numbers32:34 Kottha Dibon, Atarot, Aroër, Atarot-Sofan, Yaezer, Yogbeha, Bet-Nimra, ban Bet-Haran epaddek pole bi' suku Gad, epadaddi tha-kottha se ngangguy binteng ban menangka kennengnganna dhang-kandhangnga dumba." 
Numbers32:35  
Numbers32:36  
Numbers32:37 Dineng tha-kottha Hesybon, Eleyale, Kiryata'im, Nebo, Ba'al-Meon ban Sebam, epaddek pole bi' suku Ruben. Tha-kottha jareya padha egante'e nyamana." 
Numbers32:38  
Numbers32:39 Kaom Makhir, ana'na Manasye, nyerrang tana Gileyad, laju ekobasae, reng-oreng Amori se badha e jadhiya eojuk." 
Numbers32:40 Daddi tana Gileyad jareya bi' Mosa eparengngagi ka kaom Makhir se pas neptep e jadhiya. 
Numbers32:41 Ya'ir, dhari suku Manasye, nyerrang sarta laju ngobasane sa-disa, sa-disa jareya enyamae “Sa-disa Ya'ir”." 
Numbers32:42 Nobah nyerrang sarta ngobasane Kenat sarta pong-kampong e ma'-semma'na, tana jareya laju enyamae Nobah, menorot nyamana dibi'." 
Numbers33:1 Saellana bangsa Isra'il nyengla dhari Messer, se pamangkadda epatoro' gilir menorot sukuna bang-sebang, se epimpin Mosa ban Harun, e dhalem parjalanan bu-ambuwan e pan-barampan kennengngan." 
Numbers33:2 PANGERAN makon Mosa nyathet nyamana saneyap kennengngan se eambuwi reng-oreng jareya. 
Numbers33:3 Bangsa Isra'il mangkat dhari Messer tanggal lema bellas bulan settong, kalagguwanna are Paska se dha'-adha'. Kalaban partolonganna PANGERAN reng-oreng jareya mangkat dhari Rameses, eabassagi bi' reng-oreng Messer" 
Numbers33:4 se teppa'na ngoburragi na'-ana' sareyangnga se epate'e PANGERAN. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya kabbi, PANGERAN noduwagi ja' Salerana akowadan dhari lah-illahna Messer." 
Numbers33:5 Saellana bangsa Isra'il mangkat dhari Ra'amses, laju akemah e Sukot." 
Numbers33:6 Saellana jareya laju mangkat pole sarta akemah e Etam, e penggirra ra-ara beddhi." 
Numbers33:7 Dhari jadhiya abali pole ka Pi-Hahirot, e temoranna Ba'al-Zefon, pas akemah e seddi'anna Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Saellana jareya pas mangkat dhari Pi-Hahirot, entas tase', terros maso' ka ra-ara beddhi Syur; saellana olle tello are se ajalan, laju akemah e Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Dhari jadhiya nerrossagi parjalananna, laju akemah e Elim; e jadhiya badha somberra aeng dhubellas meggi' ban bungkana korma pettong polo meggi'." 
Numbers33:10 Saellana jareya bangsa Isra'il buru mangkat dhari Elim, laju akemah e seddi'anna Tellok Suez." 
Numbers33:11 Saellana jareya laju akemah e ra-ara beddhi Sin," 
Numbers33:12 terros akemah e Dofka," 
Numbers33:13 dhari Dofka pas ambu e Alus. 
Numbers33:14 Dhari Alus terros pole, pas akemah e Rafidim, tape e jadhiya tadha' aeng enomma." 
Numbers34:1 PANGERAN ngotos Mosa
