Numbers34:2 manapa' kon-pakon reya ka bangsa Isra'il, “Sakejja' aggi' ba'na bakal maso'a ka nagara Kana'an, nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagi ka ba'na menangka tana sangkolan. Areya' tes-batessa nagara jareya." 
Numbers34:3 E bagiyan lao', bates jareya molae dhari ra-ara beddhi Zin noro' salanjangnga batessa Edom. E temor bates jareya molae dhari konco' lao'na Tase' Mate," 
Numbers34:4 abiluk ka lao' nojju ka Lorong Akrabim ban terros ka Zin sampe' ka Kades-Barnea e bagiyan lao'. Dhari jadhiya abiluk ka bara' lao' sampe' ka Hazar-Adar, ban terros ka Azmon." 
Numbers34:5 E jadhiya abiluk ka cora e batessa Messer sampe' ka Tase' Tengnga. 
Numbers34:6 Tase' Tengnga daddi batessa nagarana ba'na se bagiyan bara'. 
Numbers34:7 E bagiyan dhaja, bates jareya molae dhari Tase' Tengnga terros ka Gunong Hor" 
Numbers34:8 dhari jadhiya ka Jalan Hamat, terros ka Zedad" 
Numbers34:9 ban ka Zifron sampe' gan Hazar-Enan. 
Numbers34:10 E bagiyan temor, batessa molae dhari Hazar-Enan ka Sefam." 
Numbers34:11 Dhari jadhiya toron ka Ribla e temorranna Ain, pas terros ka nong-gunong e paseser temorra Talaga Galilea," 
Numbers34:12 pas ka lao' salanjangnga Songay Yordan sampe' ka Tase' Mate. Jareya nagarana ba'na menorot tes-bates e sakalenglengnga.” 
Numbers34:13 Dhabuna Mosa ka bangsa Isra'il, “Jareya tana se etarema'a ba'na kalaban ngangguy ellot, tana se menorot dhabuna PANGERAN kodu ebagi ka ku-sukuna bangsa Isra'il se bannya'na sanga' satengnga." 
Numbers34:14 Ku-suku Ruben ban Gad sarta sabagiyan dhari suku Manasye la narema bagiyanna, tana jareya la egi-bagi ka sabala'anna ku-suku jareya dibi'." 
Numbers34:15 Tana sangkolanna ku-suku jareya e bagiyan temorra Songay Yordan, e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho.”" 
Numbers34:16 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa," 
Numbers34:17 “Se kodu magi tana jareya iya areya Imam Eleyazar ban Yusak ana'na Nun. 
Numbers34:18 Pele keya settong pamimpin dhari saneyap suku, soro nolonge Eleyazar ban Yusak magi tana jareya.”" 
Numbers34:19 Nyamana reng-oreng jareya iya areya: Suku Pamimpinna Yehuda Kaleb ana'na Yefune Simeyon Samuwel ana'na Amihud Benyamin Elidad ana'na Kislon Dan Buki ana'na Yogli Manasye Haniyel ana'na Efod Efraim Kemuwel ana'na Siftan Zebulon Elisafan ana'na Parnah Isakhar Paltiyel ana'na Azan Asyer Ahihud ana'na Selomi Naftali Pedayel ana'na Amihud 
Numbers34:20  
Numbers34:21  
Numbers34:22  
Numbers34:23  
Numbers34:24  
Numbers34:25  
Numbers34:26  
Numbers34:27  
Numbers34:28  
Numbers34:29 Jareya reng-oreng se epakon PANGERAN magi tana sangkolan ka bangsa Isra'il e nagara Kana'an. 
Numbers35:1 E tana lapang Mo'ab, e penggirra Songay Yordan, e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho, PANGERAN adhabu ka Mosa," 
Numbers35:2 “Kabala ka bangsa Isra'il, ja' dhari tana sangkolan se etarema'a reng-oreng jareya, badha tha-kottha ban talon e kangan kacerra se kodu ebagi ka oreng Lewi, sopaja oreng Lewi jareya ngennenga neptep e jadhiya." 
Numbers35:3 Tha-kottha jareya daddi andhi'na oreng Lewi me' olle ekagabay kennengnganna. Talon e kangan kacerra kaangguy kaparlowanna ebin sarta ban-keban peyara'anna. 
Numbers35:4 Talon jareya rajana, lanjangnga ban lebarra padha pa' ratos saeket meter, eokor molae dhari pagar alassa kottha." 
Numbers35:5 Daddi tana andhi'na oreng Lewi reya masagi empa', se okoranna saneyap penggirra sangang atos meter; kotthana badha e nga'-tengnga'anna." 
Numbers35:6 Oreng Lewi jareya kodu eberri'i kottha suaka bannya'na nem-ennem menangka kennengnganna sowakana oreng se ta' etengnget mate'e oreng laen. Laen dhari jareya oreng Lewi jareya kodu eberri'i keya kottha laenna pa' polo dhuwa' meggi' 
Numbers35:7 ban talonna. Daddi kabbi badha pa' polo ballu' kottha kaangguy oreng Lewi. 
Numbers35:8 Bannya'na tha-kottha Lewi e dhalem saneyap baba kakobasa'anna suku Isra'il kodu etantowagi menorot bannya'na kottha ban rajana baba jareya.” 
Numbers35:9 PANGERAN makon Mosa 
Numbers35:10 manapa' dhabuna ka bangsa Isra'il, “Mon ba'na la entas Songay Yordan ban la maso' ka nagara Kana'an," 
Numbers35:11 ba'na kodu mele tha-kottha se egabaya kottha suaka, se ekennenga kagabay sowakana oreng se ta' etengnget mate'e oreng laen." 
Numbers35:12 E tha-kottha jareya, oreng buru aman dhari la-balana oreng se ekenneng pate'e se malessa sake' atena. Sabab oreng se earane mate'e oreng laen, ta' olle epate'e mon parkarana gi' ta' epareksa e pangadilan omom." 
Numbers35:13 Pele kottha suaka nem-ennem," 
Numbers35:14 se tatello' e temorra Songay Yordan ban se tatello'na e tana Kana'an. 
Numbers35:15 Kottha se nem-ennem jareya daddi kottha suaka monggu ka ba'na, oreng Isra'il, ban oreng manca se dhateng ka nagara Isra'il otaba se neptep e nagarana ba'na. Sapa'a bai se ta' etengnget mate'e oreng, olle buru ka sala settonga kottha jareya." 
Numbers35:16 Tape mon oreng mate'e oreng ngangguy sanjata besse otaba bato otaba kaju, jareya nyamana etengnget mate'e oreng; oreng jareya sala, ban kodu eokom mate." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 La-bala semma'na oreng se epate'e olle ngokom mate oreng gella'. Mon oreng se mate'e jareya etemmo, la-bala semma'na oreng se epate'e olle mate'e oreng gella'." 
Numbers35:20 Mon oreng baji' ka oreng laen, pas abantengngagi otaba ngotep oreng jareya sampe' mate," 
Numbers35:21 otabana ngothem oreng jareya sampe' mate, oreng jareya nyamana mate'e oreng. Oreng jareya sala ban kodu eokom mate. La-bala semma'na oreng se epate'e olle ngokom mate oreng gella'. Mon oreng se mate'e jareya etemmo, la-bala semma'na oreng se epate'e olle mate'e oreng jareya." 
Numbers35:22 Tape olle daddi badha oreng se ta' etengnget mate'e oreng se ta' ekabaji'i, olle daddi polana abantengngagi otabana ngothem oreng jareya sampe' mate." 
Numbers35:23 Otabana olle daddi badha oreng se ta' ngabas magaggar bato, batona ngenneng ka oreng sampe' oreng jareya mate, mangkana oreng jareya banne mosona, ban oreng se magaggar bato jareya ta' amaksod macalaka'a oreng jareya." 
Numbers35:24 E dhalem parkara se kantha jareya kodu ebadha'agi rapadda ommat se kodu ngadili antarana oreng se daddi lantaranna matena oreng laen ban oreng se malessa patena oreng se mate. 
Numbers35:25 Rapadda ommat jareya kodu nolong oreng se ta' etengnget mate'e oreng jareya, se eara balana oreng se mate gella'. Oreng jareya kodu egiba abali ka kottha suaka kennengnganna sowakana, ban kodu neng e jadhiya sampe' oreng se e bakto jareya daddi Imam Agung la mate; buru saellana jareya olle mole ka kampongnga. Tape mon oreng jareya kalowar dhari kottha sowaka kennengnganna sowakana, pas etemmo sarta epate'e bi' la-balana oreng se mate gella', oreng se males pate jareya nyamana banne mate'e oreng." 
Numbers35:26  
Numbers35:27  
Numbers35:28  
Numbers35:29 Atoran-atoran reya kodu etoro' bi' ba'na sarta toronanna ba'na, e dhimma'a bai kennengnganna." 
Numbers35:30 E dhalem parkara mate'e oreng, oreng se earane mate'e, olle enyata'agi sala coma mon ekenneng bukteyagi bi' sakse kadhuwa otaba lebbi. Mon saksena pera' kasorang, ta' cokop ekagabay bukte ja' panyangka jareya bendher." 
Numbers35:31 Oreng se mate'e oreng kodu eokom mate. Okoman jareya ta' olle etebbus ban pesse. 
Numbers35:32 Mon oreng buru ka kottha sowaka, ja' sampe' oreng jareya eedine aberri' pesse sopaja olleya mole ka bengkona sabellunna Imam Agung mate." 
Numbers35:33 Mon sampe' kantha jareya, ba'na nyamana macemmer tana se ekennengnge. Mate'e oreng reya lalakon se macemmer nagara; daddi tadha' cara laen kaangguy maberseya nagara jareya kajabana nyabut nyabana oreng se mate'e oreng jareya." 
Numbers35:34 Ja' sampe' ba'na macemmer tana se ekennengnge, sabab Sengko' PANGERAN, ban Sengko' badha e antarana bangsa Isra'il.”" 
Numbers36:1 Para kapalana kalowarga e dhalem kaom Gileyad, ana'na Makhir, iya areya kompoyya Manasye, pottrana Yusup, ngadhep ka Mosa ban ka pin-pamimpin laenna." 
Numbers36:2 Atorra, “Sareng PANGERAN panjennengngan epakon magi tana ka oreng Isra'il kalaban cara ngangguy ellot. PANGERAN jugan makon panjennengngan marengngagi tana sangkolanna bala abdina se anyama Zelafehad ka tra-pottra babine'anna." 
Numbers36:3 Namong kodu ekaemodi manabi tra-pottrana Zelafehad ka'dhinto abine oreng suku laen, tanana gaggar ka suku gapaneka. Kalaban sapaneka tana se etantowagi menangka tanana bangsa abdina tanto sajan kene'." 
Numbers36:4 E dhalem Taon Baktona Li-mabali, e bakto sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na oreng se ampon ejuwal kodu epabali pole ka se andhi' se asal, tanana tra-pottra babine'anna Zelafehad bakal pagguna ekaandhi' lakeepon, kantos suku abdina kaelangan tana gapaneka.”" 
Numbers36:5 Mosa pas manapa' dhabuna PANGERAN reya ka bangsa Isra'il, “Oca'na reng-oreng toronanna Yusup jareya bendher," 
Numbers36:6 daddi PANGERAN adhabu ja' na'-ana'na Zelafehad olle abine ban sapa'a bai se ekakencengnge, sokor oreng se padha sukuna." 
Numbers36:7 Tana sangkolanna saneyap oreng Isra'il bakal pagguna daddi andhi'na sukuna. 
Numbers36:8 Saneyap babine' se narema tana sangkolan e dhalem sala settong dhari suku Isra'il, kodu abine oreng dhari suku jareya keya. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya saneyap oreng Isra'il bakal narema'a sangkolan tanana bangatowana," 
Numbers36:9 daddi tana sangkolan jareya ta' kera ngalle dhari suku se settong ka settongnga. Saneyap suku bangsa Isra'il bakal teptebba ngaandhi' tana sangkolan dibi'.” 
Numbers36:10 Daddi, menorot dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, pottra babine'anna Zelafehad se kalema jareya, iya areya Mahla, Tirza, Hogla, Milka, ban No'a, alake reng-oreng se gi' sabala'an bi' eppa'na." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Se ekalake ban reng-oreng dhari om-kaom e dhalem sukuna, bangsa Manasye, pottrana Yusup. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya tana sangkolanna paggun daddi andhi'na suku bangsana eppa'na." 
Numbers36:13 Jareya atoran-atoran ban katantowan-katantowan se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka bangsa Isra'il kalaban parantara'anna Mosa, e bakto bangsa Isra'il badha e tana lapang Mo'ab e penggirra Songay Yordan e seddi'anna kottha Yerikho." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ketab reya aesse sabarang se edhabuwagi Mosa ka bangsa Isra'il e bakto badha e ra-ara e Cora Yordan. Cora jareya badha e temorra Songay Yordan, e seddi'anna kottha Suf, penggirra se settong ebatesse kottha Paran, penggir settonganna ebatesse tha-kottha Tofel, Laban, Hazerot ban Di-Zahab. (" 
Deuteronomy1:2 Parjalanan dhari Gunong Sinay ka Kades-Barnea reya mon lebat pagunongan Edom abidda sabellas are.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 E tanggal settong bulan sabellas e taon se ka pa' polo saellana oreng Isra'il mangkat dhari Messer, Mosa manapa' ka bangsa jareya sabarang se edhabuwagi Pangeran kaangguy bangsa Isra'il." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Jareya kadaddiyan saellana Mosa makala Sihon, ratona oreng Amori se marenta e Hesybon, ban Og rato Basan se marenta e tha-kottha Asytarot ban Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 E bakto bangsa Isra'il badha e temorra Songay Yordan e baba kakobasa'anna Mo'ab jareya Mosa dha'-adha'na nerrangngagi kom-hokom ban kon-papakonna Pangeran. Dhabuna Mosa," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “E bakto sengko' ban ba'na badha e Gunong Sinay, GUSTE Allah, adhabu kantha reya, ‘La cokop abidda ba'na badha e gunong reya." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Sateya mara bungkar parkemahanna, pas mangkat ka dhaera pagunonganna oreng Amori ban sakabbinna dhaera e sabingkerra, iya areya ka Cora Yordan, dhaera se amo'-gumo' ban cora, dhaera e bagiyan lao' ban paseser Tase' Tengnga. Kobasae Tana Kana'an ban Pagunongan Libanon sampe' ka Songay Efrat se raja." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Jareya kabbi tana se ejanjiyagi Sengko', Pangeran, ka bangatowana ba'na Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub ban ka sakabbinna toronanna. Daddi kassa' kobasae tana jareya kabbi.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Dhabuna Mosa ka bangsa jareya, “E bakto sengko' ban ba'na badha e Gunong Sinay, sengko' ngoca' ka ba'na: Tanggung jawabba mimpin ba'na taberra' gallu monggu ka sengko'. Lalakon jareya ta' ekenneng kadibi'i sengko', sabab" 
Deuteronomy1:10 ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna epatamba bannya' epakantha bannya'na bintang e langnge'. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Moga-moga bi' PANGERAN, Allahna bangatowana ba'na, bannya'na ba'na epatamba'a sampe' saebu kalena, ban ba'na epadaddiya bangsa se ma'mor akantha se la edhabuwagi!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Tape baramma sengko' se ngennenga ngadibi'i mekol tanggung jawab se berra' maberes sakabbinna orosanna ba'na? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mara pele dhari saneyap suku oreng lalake'an se bicaksana, ngarteyan ban andhi' pangalaman, bi' sengko' epadaddiya pamimpinna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Usul jareya bi' ba'na etarema kalaban becce'. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Daddi e antarana pin-pamimpin se la epele bi' ba'na dhari ku-sukuna ba'na jareya, reng-oreng se bicaksana ban andhi' pangalaman, bi' sengko' eangkat epadaddi kapalana ba'na. Badha reng-oreng se epangapalae saebu oreng, badha se saratos oreng, saeket oreng ban sapolo oreng. Sengko' ngangkat keya pin-pamimpin laen se esoro ngoros ku-sukuna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy1:16 E bakto jareya sengko' ngoca' ka reng-oreng jareya kantha reya: Edhingngagi mon badha cekcok e antarana bangsana ba'na. Berri' potosan se adil, e dhalem parkarana reng-oreng se sabangsa bi' ba'na otabana parkarana oreng manca se badha e antarana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Potosanna ba'na ta' olle berra' salaja; saneyap oreng kodu eadili epapadha, ta' olle eda'-bida'agi. Ja' tako' ka sapa'a bai, sabab potosan se etantowagi bi' ba'na jareya dhari Allah. Mon badha parkara se malarat ka ba'na, giba ka sengko', me' olle sengko' ngenneng motose." 
Deuteronomy1:18 E bakto jareya keya sengko' aberri' du-petodu ka ba'na parkara sabarang laenna se kodu elakone ba'na.” 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Saellana jareya menorot dhabuna PANGERAN Allahna ba'na, sengko' ban ba'na kabbi mangkat dhari Gunong Sinay pas ajalan lebat e ra-ara beddhi se lebar ban nako'e, entara ka pagunonganna oreng Amori. E bakto jareya ba'na napa' ka Kades-Barnea," 
Deuteronomy1:20 sengko' ngoca': Sateya ba'na la napa' ka pagunonganna oreng Amori, tana se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na, Allahna bangatowana ba'na. Abassagi tana e adha'anna ba'na rowa. Entare, kobasae ban kennengnge akantha se epakonnagi PANGERAN. Ja' pamangmang ban ja' tako'." 
Deuteronomy1:21  
Deuteronomy1:22 Tape ba'na pas nyander ka sengko', laju ngoca', ‘Langkong sae ngereng ngotos reng-oreng, pakon mangkat kaadha', nalektegi nagara ka'dhissa', daddi reng-oreng gapaneka dhaggi' bisa noduwagi jalan se ka'dhimma se kodu elebadi, sareng bisa notorragi kadi ponapa kabadha'annepon tha-kottha ka'dhissa'.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Usul jareya bi' sengko' etarema, daddi sengko' laju mele oreng dhubellas, dhari saneyap suku ekala' settong." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Reng-oreng jareya maso' ka dhaera pagunongan jareya sampe' napa' ka Cora Eskol, pas nalektegi nagara jareya epabalattra." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya padha abali ngeba wa'-buwa'an ollena ngala' e tana jareya, eduduwagi ka sengko' ban ka ba'na kabbi, sarta abala ja' nagara paparengnga PANGERAN jareya talebat landhuna." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Tape ba'na ta' ngestowagi dhabuna PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, ban ta' endha' maso' ka nagara jareya." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ba'na ango'ngo'an kantha reya, ‘PANGERAN reya baji' ka sengko'. Daddi sengko' ebakta dhari Messer ebagiya ka bangsa Amori me' olle padha epate'e." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Daddi arapa'a me' entara dha' essa'? Reng-oreng se eotos dha' essa' abala ja' bangsa jareya araja'an ban akowadan dhari tang bangsa; ca'na, tha-kotthana bangsa jareya badha pagar alassa se tenggina sampe' gan langnge'. Para otosan jareya nangale'e buta e jadhiya. Daddi sengko' tako'!’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Tape sengko' ngoca': Ta' osa tako' ka reng-oreng jareya. 
Deuteronomy1:30 GUSTE Allahna ba'na se mimpina ba'na ban se nolongana ba'na aperrang akantha se la ekataowe ba'na dibi' e Messer 
Deuteronomy1:31 ban e ra-ara beddhi rowa. Ba'na nangale'e baramma PANGERAN se abakta ba'na, ba'na epasalamet salanjangnga parjalanan sampe' napa' dha' enna', tadha' bidana ban oreng towa se ngemban ana'na." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Tape, maske sengko' la ngoca' kantha jareya, ba'na paggun ta' parcaja ka PANGERAN," 
Deuteronomy1:33 la'-mala' maskeya Pangeran alomampa e adha'anna ba'na, noduwagi kennengngan se ekennengngana ba'na akemah. Pangeran noduwagi jalan ka ba'na e baja malem e dhalem cangga apoy, ban e baja seyang e dhalem cangga ondhem, se alomampa e adha'anna ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “PANGERAN meyarsa ngo'ngo'na ba'na, laju duka. Salerana asompa," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Tadha' settonga dhari angkadan se jahat reya se maso'a ka nagara se landhu se ejanjiyagi Sengko' ka bangatowana. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Pera' Kaleb ana'na Yefune se bakal maso'a ka jadhiya sabab Kaleb jareya esto ka Sengko'. Kaleb ban toronanna bi' Sengko' eberri'ana nagara se la ejanjiyagi Sengko' jareya.’ 
Deuteronomy1:37 Polana ba'na PANGERAN laju duka ka sengko' keya; dhabuna, ‘Mosa, ba'na keya ta' olle maso' ka nagara jareya." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Tape pakoko atena Yusak ana'na Nun se abanto ba'na rowa. Yusak jareya se mimpina bangsa Isra'il se arebbu'a tana jareya.’ 
Deuteronomy1:39 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka ba'na kabbi, ‘Na'-ana'na ba'na se gi' kene' se gi' ta' tao abida'agi becce' ban juba', na'-ana'na ba'na se ca'na ba'na bakal erampasa so-mosona ba'na, na'-kana' jareya se bi' Sengko' epanarema'a tana jareya, tana se bakal ekobasa'ana ban ekennengngana." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Tape ba'na, kassa' abali ka ra-ara beddhi lebat lorong se ka Tellok Akaba.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Ba'na nyaot, ‘Mosa, abdina dusa ka PANGERAN. Namong samangken abdina poron noro'a aperrang akadi se epakonnagi GUSTE Allah abdina.’ Ba'na kabbi laju padha mekol sanjata se entara aperrang, sabab ba'na apekker ja' nyerrang dhaera pagunongan reya parkara gampang." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Tape PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Ja' bagi aperrang reng-oreng jareya, sabab Sengko' ta' abarengngana, dhaggi' tanto epakala bi' mosona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Sengko' ngabala ka ba'na apa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN jareya, tape ba'na ta' marduli. Ba'na ta' ngedhingngagi dhabuna PANGERAN, maksa mangkat ka dhaera pagunongan jareya." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Reng-oreng Amori se ngennengnge pagunongan jareya kalowar ngadhebbi ba'na. Orengnga ce' bannya'na, sampe' padha ban nyarowan. Ba'na eserser sampe' ka Horma, sarta epakala e dhaera pagunongan Edom." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Daddi ba'na pas aserro pole ka PANGERAN nyo'on partolongan, tape PANGERAN ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi ba'na, ba'na ta' eparduli.”" 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Saellana jareya sengko' ban ba'na kabbi pas neng e Kades sampe' ce' abidda. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Dhi-budhina padha abali ka ra-ara beddhi lebat jalan se ka Tellok Akaba, akantha se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. Abit ba'na se ajalan e dhaera pagunongan Edom jareya." 
Deuteronomy2:2 PANGERAN laju adhabu ka sengko' 
Deuteronomy2:3 ja' la cokop sengko' ban ba'na alalana e dhaera jareya. Daddi sengko' ban ba'na kodu ajalan ka dhaja. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Saellana jareya sengko' bi' Pangeran epakon aberri' du-petodu reya ka ba'na, ‘Ta' abit pole bakal maso'a ka nagara Edom, dhaerana la-balana ba'na, iya areya toronanna Esau. Reng-oreng jareya bakal tako'a ka ba'na," 
Deuteronomy2:5 tape ba'na ta' olle nyerrang, sabab tanana reng-oreng jareya tadha' se ebagiya ka ba'na maske sakone'a, sabab dhaera Edom bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka toronanna Esau." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ba'na olle melle kakanan ban nom-enoman dhari reng-oreng jareya.’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 Kaenga'e, ra, baramma PANGERAN se la aberkadi ba'na e dhalem sabarang se elakone ba'na. Ba'na ejaga ban epasalamet saabidda ajalan e ra-ara beddhi se lebar reya. Saabidda pa' polo taon reya ba'na ejaga ban epasalamet sarta eparenge sabarang se ekabuto." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Saellana jareya ba'na ajalan terros, dhari jalan se lebat e tha-kottha Elat ban Ezion-Geber ka Tase' Mate, laju abiluk ka temor lao' ka ra-ara beddhi Mo'ab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Oreng Mo'ab, toronanna Lot rowa, ja' ca-anca. Bariya keya ja' serrang. Nagara Ar bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka bangsa jareya, ban dhari tanana reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' tadha' se ebagiya ka ba'na maske sakone'a.’ ” (" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Lamba' Ar reya ekennengnge oreng Emim. Badanna ja-raja, padha ban oreng Enak, padha bangsana buta." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Akantha oreng Enak, oreng Emim jareya enyamae keya oreng Refa'im, tape bi' oreng Mo'ab enyamae oreng Emim." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Lamba' oreng Hori neng e Edom, tape eojuk sarta epatompes bi' toronanna Esau, se saellana jareya ngennengnge tanana jareya; bariya keya bangsa Isra'il e budhi are ngojuk so-mosona dhari tana paparengnga PANGERAN jareya.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Saellana jareya ba'na entas Songay Zered menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka sengko' ban ba'na. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Se entas Songay Zered jareya teppa' tello polo ballu' taon saellana mangkat dhari Kades-Barnea. Tantara dhari angkadan jareya la padha mate kabbi akantha se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN. 
Deuteronomy2:15 Bi' PANGERAN reng-oreng dhari angkadan jareya terros ekamoso sampe' dhi-budhina kabbi padha epatompes. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Saellana reng-oreng jareya padha mate kabbi," 
Deuteronomy2:17 PANGERAN adhabu ka ba'na," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Are teya ba'na lebada e dhaera Mo'ab, lebat dhari nagara Ar." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Daddi ba'na bakal napa'a ka seddi'anna tanana oreng Amon, toronanna Lot. Reng-oreng jareya ja' ca-anca ban ja' perrange, sabab tana se bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka bangsa jareya tadha' se ebagiya ka ba'na maske sakone'a.’ ” (" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Bannya' oreng tao, dhaera jareya nagarana oreng Refa'im, Refa'im reya nyamana bangsa se lamba' neng e jadhiya; bi' oreng Amon reng-oreng jareya enyamae oreng Zamzumim." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bangsa jareya padha ban oreng Enak, badanna raja ban kowat; orengnga talebat bannya'na. Tape bi' PANGERAN epatompes kabbi, daddi oreng Amon laju arebbu' tanana sarta terros neng e jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Bariya keya se elampa'agi PANGERAN ka oreng Edom, toronanna Esau, se ngennengnge dhaera pagunongan Edom. Oreng Hori bi' PANGERAN epatompes, daddi oreng Edom arebbu' tanana sarta pas neng e jadhiya sampe' sateya." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Tana e salanjangnga paseser Tase' Tengnga ekobasae ban ekennengnge reng-oreng dhari polo Kareta. Reng-oreng jareya matompes oreng Awi, iya areya oreng se asli e tana jareya, pas ngobasane sarta ngennengnge dhaera jareya sampe' ka lao' ka kottha Gaza.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Saellana lebat dhari Mo'ab, PANGERAN adhabu ka ba'na, ‘Kassa' sateya ba'na entas Songay Arnon. Sihon, rato Amori se marenta e Hesybon, ban nagarana bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na. Kassa' serrang, nagarana kobasae." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Molae dhari sateya sa-bangsa e dhimma'a bai bi' Sengko' epatako'a ka ba'na. Sapa'a bai bakal ngetterra katako'an mon ngedhing nyamana ba'na.’ ” 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Saellana jareya sengko' ngotos reng-oreng dhari ra-ara beddhi Kedemot ka Sihon, rato Hesybon, esoro manapa' usul ngajak akanca; sengko' apessen kantha reya:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Abdidalem nyo'ona edi bangsa Isra'il ngamponga lebat e nagaraepon junandalem. Bangsa dalem ajalana terros, ta' nyempanga dhari lorong raja." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Teddha'an se eteddha sareng aeng se eenom bangsa abdidalem, ebajarana. Se ekaparlo bangsa abdidalem namong ngamponga lebat e nagara ka'dhinto," 
Deuteronomy2:29 kantos entas Songay Yordan maso'a ka nagara se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah, Pangeran, ka bangsa abdidalem. Toronanna Esau se badha e Edom sareng oreng Mo'ab se badha e Ar jugan ampon ngedine bangsa abdidalem lebat e nagarana.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Tape bi' Rato Sihon ba'na ta' ebagi lebat e nagarana jareya. Rato jareya bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na epacengkal sarta epanekat sopaja ba'na bisa'a makala rato jareya ban ngobasane baba kakobasa'anna, se sampe' sateya reya ekennengnge sengko' ban ba'na." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Saellana jareya PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Rato Sihon ban nagarana bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka ba'na; kala' ban kennengnge nagara jareya.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihon pas dhateng abareng ban sakabbinna pasukanna merrangana ba'na e seddi'na kottha Yahas. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Tape GUSTE Allahna ba'na marengngagi rato jareya ka ba'na, daddi rato jareya ban na'-ana'na sarta tantarana epakala kabbi bi' ba'na." 
Deuteronomy2:34 E bakto jareya keya ba'na arebbu' ban maancor saneyap kotthana ban mate'e saneyap oreng se badha e tha-kottha jareya, lalake'an, babine'an ban na'-kana'. Kabbi epate'e epatadha' karena." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Ebin bi' ba'na ekala', ban tha-kotthana erampas." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kalaban partolonganna GUSTE Allah, sengko' ban ba'na bisa arebbu' sakabbinna kottha jareya, molae dhari Aroër e konco'na Cora Arnon, ban kottha se badha e cora jareya, sampe' ka Gileyad. Tadha' kottha se ta' ekennenga kobasae bi' ba'na maske pagar alassa koko." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Tape ba'na ta' nyander ka seddi'anna baba kakobasa'anna oreng Amon otaba penggirra Songay Yabok otaba tha-kottha e bagiyan pagunongan otaba e kennengngan laenna se elarang bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na.” 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Saellana jareya ba'na mangkat ka dhaja ka baba Basan. Og, rato Basan kalowar ban sakabbinna tantarana, merrangana ba'na e seddi'na kottha Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Tape PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Ja' tako' ka rato jareya, Mosa. Rato jareya ban sakabbinna tantarana sarta sakabbinna baba kakobasa'anna bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na. Rato Og jareya pakantha Sihon, rato Amori se marenta e Hesybon rowa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Daddi bi' GUSTE Allahna sengko' ban ba'na Rato Og ban ra'yadda epassra'agi keya ka sengko' ban ba'na. Rato ban ra'yadda jareya kabbi epakala bi' sengko' ban ba'na. 
Deuteronomy3:4 E bakto jareya tha-kotthana erebbu' kabbi bi' ba'na, tadha' settonga se lopot. Kabbi badha sabidak kottha se erebbu' ba'na e dhaera Argob, se eparenta Rato Og dhari Basan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Tha-kottha jareya kabbi ngangguy gar-pagar alas se tenggi, bang-labang saketheng se ngangguy lang-palang pangancengnga. Laen dhari jareya gi' bannya' kottha laenna se ta' ngangguy pagar alas." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tha-kottha jareya bi' ba'na epaancor kabbi, reng-orengnga, lalake', babine' ban na'-ana'na bi' ba'na epate'e kabbi, epakantha tha-kotthana Rato Sihon dhari Hesybon." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ebinna bi' ba'na ekala' ban tha-kottha jareya bi' ba'na erampok. 
Deuteronomy3:8 E bakto jareya dhari rato Amori se kadhuwa gella' ba'na la arampas tana e temorra Songay Yordan ban Songay Arnon sampe' ka Gunong Hermon. ( 
Deuteronomy3:9 Gunong Hermon reya bi' oreng Sidon enyamae Siriyon, ban bi' oreng Amori enyamae Senir.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Sakabbinna baba kakobasa'anna Rato Og dhari Basan bi' ba'na erampas kabbi: tha-kotthana e tana tenggi, tana Gileyad ban Basan, terros ka temor sampe' ka kottha Salkha ban Edrei.” (" 
Deuteronomy3:11 Rato Og reya oreng Refa'im se dhi-budhi. Petthena mayyidda ekagabay dhari bato, lanjangnga pa' meter ban lebarra para' dhu meter, menorot okoran se la eteptebbagi. Sampe' sateya gi' badha e Raba, kotthana oreng Amon.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Saellana tana jareya ekaandhi' ba'na, bi' sengko' suku Ruben ban Gad eberri'i bagiyan e dhajana kottha Aroër e seddi'anna Songay Arnon, ban sabagiyan dhari tana pagunongan Gileyad, tamaso' tha-kotthana." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Saparona suku Manasye bi' sengko' eberri'i karena tana Gileyad, bariya keya tana bagiyan Basan bekkas jaja'anna Og, iya areya sakabbinna baba Argob.” (Bannya' oreng tao Basan reya nagarana oreng Refa'im." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Ya'ir dhari suku Manasye ngala' sakabbinna baba Argob, iya areya dhari Basan sampe' ka batessa Gesur ban Ma'akha. Sa-disa jareya enyamae menorot nyamana dibi', ban sampe' sateya gi' paggun anyama sa-disa Ya'ir.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Tana baba Gileyad bi' sengko' ebagi ka kaom Makhir dhari suku Manasye. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Ban ku-suku Ruben sarta Gad bi' sengko' eberri'i tana e antarana Gileyad ban Songay Arnon. Nga'-tengnga'anna songay jareya daddi batessa baba kakobasa'anna se kadhuwa jareya e bagiyan lao', dineng e bagiyan dhaja se daddi batessa Songay Yabok, se sabagiyanna daddi batessa nagarana oreng Amon." 
Deuteronomy3:17 E bagiyan bara'na baba kakobasa'anna ku-suku jareya malanjang sampe' ka Songay Yordan, dhari Talaga Galilea e bagiyan dhaja sampe' ka Tase' Mate e bagiyan lao', terros sampe' ka sokona Gunong Pisga e bagiyan Temor." 
Deuteronomy3:18 E bakto jareya sengko' aberri' parenta reya ka reng-oreng jareya: GUSTE Allahna ba'na, marengngagi tana e temorra Songay Yordan kaangguy kennengnganna ba'na. Tape tantarana ba'na kodu mekol sanjata alengka Songay Yordan ajangadha'i ku-suku Isra'il se laen." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Pera' ana' binena ba'na ban ebinna se bannya' olle paggun neng e tha-kottha se bi' sengko' la ebagi ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy3:20 Tolonge reng-oreng sabangsana ba'na sampe' ngenneng ngobasane ban ngennengnge tana se eparengngagiya PANGERAN ka bangsana ba'na jareya e bara'na Songay Yordan, ban sampe' PANGERAN ngedine reng-oreng jareya odhi' taremtem neng e jadhiya, akantha se la elampa'agi Salerana ka ba'na e dhinna'. Buru saellana jareya ba'na olle abali ka tana reya se bi' sengko' la ebagi ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Sengko' pas ngoca' ka Yusak: Ba'na la nangale'e sabarang se elampa'agi GUSTE Allahna ba'na ka Rato Sihon ban Rato Og rowa. To-rato laenna se tanana ekobasae ba'na bakal epakantha'a jareya keya. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ta' osa tako' ka to-rato jareya, sabab GUSTE Allah nolongana ba'na se aperrang.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “E bakto jareya sengko' nyo'on ka PANGERAN," 
Deuteronomy3:24 Adhu, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, abdidalem oneng ja' se eduduwagi Junandalem ka abdidalem ka'dhinto namong parmola'an dhari sadajana lalakon se raja sareng ajib se badhi elampa'agiya Junandalem. Tadha' la'-alla'an se badha e langnge' otabana e bume se oneng ngalakone lalakon raja akadi se ampon elampa'agi Junandalem." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nyo'ona edi abdidalem GUSTE, alengka'a Songay Yordan, nengalana nagara se landhu e bara' songay, tana pagunongan se bagus sareng Pagunongan Libanon." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Tape ba'na daddi lantaranna PANGERAN duka ka sengko' sampe' ta' kasokan ngabbuli tang parnyo'onan. Sabaligga PANGERAN adhabu, ‘Ella, cokop, Mosa, ta' osa ba'na but-nyebbut parkara jareya pole!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kassa' ba'na ongga ka konco'na Gunong Pisga, pas mandeng ka dhaja ban ka lao', ka temor ban ka bara'. Abassagi patete apa se etangale'e ba'na jareya, sabab ba'na ta' kera alengka'a Songay Yordan." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Yusak berri'i du-petodu. Pakowat atena, sabab Yusak jareya se mimpina bangsa jareya ka bara' songay kaangguy ngobasana'ana nagara se etangale'e ba'na rowa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Daddi sengko' ban ba'na paggun neng e cora se dhep-adhebban ban kottha Bet-Peyor.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Dhabuna Mosa ka ommat Isra'il, “Mara toro' sakabbinna hokom se la eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na, sopaja ba'na gi' odhi'a sampe' ngennengnge nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' PANGERAN, Allahna bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Apa se eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na jareya ja' sampe' etambai otaba ekorange. Toro' sakabbinna papakonna GUSTE Allahna ba'na, se bi' sengko' la ekabala ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Ba'na la nangale dibi' apa se elampa'agi PANGERAN e Gunong Peyor. Oreng se nyemba Ba'al e jadhiya padha epatompes kabbi," 
Deuteronomy4:4 tape ba'na se gi' esto ka GUSTE Allahna, sampe' sateya gi' paggun odhi'." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Sengko' la ngajarragi sakabbinna hokom jareya ka ba'na, akantha se edhabuwagi GUSTE Allah, tang PANGERAN, ka sengko'. Ta'adi kom-hokom jareya e nagara se emaso'ana ban ekobasa'ana ba'na jareya." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ta'adi saterrossa, ban dhari jareya sa-bangsa laen bakal taowa ja' ba'na reya bicaksana onggu. Mon sa-bangsa jareya ngedhing parkara kom-hokom jareya, tantona pas ngoca' bariya, ‘Bangsa se raja reya ce' bicaksanana ban ce' penterra!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Tadha' bangsa laen, sanajjan tamaso' bangsa se raja, se andhi' la'-alla'an se ce' semma'na mon teppa' ekabuto, akantha GUSTE Allah, Pangeranna ba'na se ce' semma'na ka sengko' ban ba'na. GUSTE Allah nyaot bila'a bai ba'na aera' menta tolong." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Tadha' bangsa laen, sanajjan tamaso' bangsa se raja, se andhi' kom-hokom se ce' adilla akantha kom-hokom se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na are teya." 
Deuteronomy4:9 Senga' te-ngate! Kaenga'e ban ja' sampe' loppa ka apa se etangale bi' matana ba'na dibi'. Careta'agi ka na' potona parkara are rowa," 
Deuteronomy4:10 e bakto ba'na kabbi manjeng e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, e Gunong Sinay, e baktona Pangeran adhabu kantha reya ka sengko', ‘Pakompol bangsa jareya. Soro ngedhingngagi pa-apa se ekoca'agiya Sengko', sopaja bangsa jareya ajar ta'at ka Sengko' saomorra, ban sopaja na'-ana'na eajarana ta'at ka Sengko'.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Careta'agi ka na'-ana'na ba'na baramma ba'na se manjeng e babana gunong se katotoban okos se petteng akantha ondhem se kandel ban apoy se rabbang sampe' ka langnge'. 
Deuteronomy4:12 PANGERAN pas abu-dhabu ka ba'na dhari dhalem apoy jareya, ba'na ngedhing sowarana tape ta' nangale'e ka Salerana." 
Deuteronomy4:13 E jadhiya ba'na edhabuwi apa se kodu ejalannagi bi' ba'na kaangguy neptebbi parjanjiyan se ebadha'agi Pangeran ban ba'na, iya areya ba'na kodu ngestowagi Papakon Se Sapolo se la eserrat bi' Pangeran e bato se dhadhuwa' rowa." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Sengko' bi' PANGERAN epakon ngajarragi ka ba'na sakabbinna hokom se kodu eestowagi bi' ba'na e nagara se la para' ekobasa'ana tor ekennengngana ba'na rowa.” 
Deuteronomy4:15 Mosa nerrossagi dhabuna, “Kaenga'e pateppa'! E baktona PANGERAN abu-dhabu ka ba'na dhari apoy e Gunong Sinay jarowa, ba'na ta' nangale'e pa-apa." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Jaga ja' sampe' ba'na agabay dusa polana ba'na agabay arca se esemba'a ba'na dibi', arca se eparopa'a apa'a bai – oreng lalake' otaba babine'," 
Deuteronomy4:17 burun alas otaba mano'," 
Deuteronomy4:18 keban se agalajar otaba juko'. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ja' sampe' ba'na agabay dusa nyemba ka apa'a bai se etangale'e ba'na e langnge' – are, bulan ban tang-bintang. Bi' GUSTE Allah, Pangeranna ba'na, sa-bangsa laen epanneng nyemba jareya." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Tape ba'na reya bangsa se epasalamet PANGERAN dhari nagara Messer, kennengnganna ba'na nanggung seksa'an se talebat berra'na. Ba'na ebakta kalowar dhari nagara jareya sopaja daddiya ommadda dibi', akantha kabadha'anna ba'na sateya reya." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Tape GUSTE Allahna ba'na duka ka sengko' polana ba'na, ban asompa ja' sengko' ta' eedinana alengka Songay Yordan ban ta' eedinana maso' ka nagara se landhu se eparengngagi Salerana ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ba'na la para' se alengka'a songay, ngobasa'ana tana se landhu rowa; tape sengko' ta' ngenneng noro', sabab sengko' bakal mateya e dhinna'." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Senga', ja' sampe' loppa ka parjanjiyan se la epabadha e antarana ba'na ban GUSTE Allahna. Ban estowagi papakonna; ja' sampe' ba'na agabay arca se aropa apa'a bai se esemba'a bi' ba'na," 
Deuteronomy4:24 sabab GUSTE Allah, Pangeranna ba'na padha ban apoy se rabbang; ta' kasokan epadha'agi bi' apa'a bai." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Bariya keya mon ba'na la abit badha e nagara jareya sampe' apoy-kompoy, ba'na ja' agabay dusa polana agabay arca se eparopa'a apa'a bai se esemba'a ba'na. Jareya bi' PANGERAN eanggep lalakon se jahat, se andaddiyagi dukana." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Langnge' ban bume bi' sengko' esorowa nyakse'e ja' mon ba'na ta' atoro' oca' ka sengko', ba'na bakal duliya mosna dhari tana se ekennengngana ba'na e bara'anna Songay Yordan jareya. Ba'na ta' kera abit odhi' e jadhiya sabab ba'na bakal epatompessa kabbi." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na bakal epacar-tapencara e antarana sa-bangsa laen, ban e antara ba'na reya pera' sakone' se gi' odhi'a." 
Deuteronomy4:28 E jadhiya ba'na bakal nyemba'a ka la'-alla'an gabayanna tanangnga manossa, la'-alla'an dhari kaju ban bato, se ta' nangale'e ban ta' ngedhing, se ta' bisa ngakan otaba ngedhing bau." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Saellana jareya ba'na bakal nyareya GUSTE Allah, Pangeranna ba'na, ban mon ba'na nyare kalaban gu-onggu, tanto tatemmo." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Mon ba'na nemmo kasossa'an ban nemmo sakabbinna balai se kasebbut gella', ba'na bakal abaliya ka PANGERAN ban ngestowagi papakonna." 
Deuteronomy4:31 PANGERAN reya Allah se bellas ase; ta' kera adina'agi otaba matompes ba'na, ta' kera kalep ka parjanjiyan se ebadhi Salerana dibi' bi' bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Kodda' sare dhari jaman lamba', jaman sabellunna ba'na lahir, molae dhari are e bakto Allah nyepta'agi manossa e bume reya. Sare sabume. Ba' taowa badha kadaddiyan raja kantha jareya sabellunna? Ba' badha'a oreng se tao ngedhing badha kadaddiyan se kantha reya?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ba' badha'a bangsa se gi' panggun odhi' saellana ngedhing badha la'-alla'an acaca ka bangsa jareya dhari apoy akantha se ealame ba'na rowa? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ba' badha'a la'-alla'an se bangal ngala' settong bangsa dhari bangsa laen, sarta bangsa jareya padha epadaddi ommadda dibi', akantha se elampa'agi GUSTE Allahna ba'na se nolong ba'na e Messer? Ba'na la nangale dibi' baramma Allah kalaban kakowadanna se raja madhateng balai ban perrang, mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban ban madhateng kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan se nako'e." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Jareya kabbi bi' PANGERAN epatangale ka ba'na menangka bukte ka ba'na ja' Allah reya pera' PANGERAN malolo, tadha' laenna pole." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Sowarana epakaedhing ka ba'na dhari langnge' sopaja ngennenga ngajar ba'na; e bume reya Pangeran noduwagi apoyya se socce ka ba'na, sarta pas abu-dhabu dhari apoy jareya." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Sarrena Pangeran reya taresna ka bangatowana ba'na, daddi ba'na pas epadaddi ommat peleyanna; kalaban kakobasa'anna se raja, Pangeran dibi' se abakta ba'na kalowar dhari Messer." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Sa-bangsa se araja'an ban akowadan dhari ba'na eojuk dhari seddi'anna ba'na, sopaja ba'na ngennenga maso' ka nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na, nagara se sateya ekaandhi' ba'na reya." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Daddi, are teya reya kaenga'e, ja' sampe' loppa: PANGERAN reya Allah se settong e langnge' ban e bume; tadha' laenna." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Toro' sakabbinna hokom se etotorragi sengko' ka ba'na are teya reya, mon ba'na atoro' ka kom-hokomma PANGERAN jareya, ba'na ban toronanna bakal taremtemma odhi'na sarta bakal odhi'a terros e nagara se bi' PANGERAN eparengngagi ka ba'na salanjangnga.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Mosa laju mele kottha tatello' e temorra Songay Yordan 
Deuteronomy4:42 epadaddi kottha sowaka, kennengnganna sowakana oreng mon ta' etengnget mate'e oreng se banne mosona. Oreng jareya olle buru ka sala settonga kottha jareya me' olle ta' epate'e keya." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Kottha Bezer e tana tenggi ra-ara beddhi esadhiya'agi ka suku Ruben; kottha Ramot e tana Gileyad ka suku Gad, ban kottha Golan e tana Basan ka suku Manasye." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Mosa laju marengngagi kom-hokom ban atoran-atoran dhari Allah ka bangsa Isra'il. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Parkara jareya elampa'agi saellana bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer ban la napa' ka cora e temorra Songay Yordan, e adha'anna kottha Bet-Peyor. Jareya bekkas baba kakobasa'anna Sihon, ratona oreng Amori, se lamba' marenta e kottha Hesybon. Mosa ban bangsa Isra'il makala bangsa jareya e bakto la kalowar dhari Messer." 
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Tanana Rato Sihon ekobasae, bariya keya tanana Rato Og dhari Basan, rato Amori se laen e temorra Songay Yordan." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Tana jareya malanjang dhari kottha Aroër e penggirra Songay Arnon terros ka dhaja sampe' ka Gunong Siriyon, iya areya Gunong Hermon," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ban sakabbinna tana e temorra Songay Yordan ka lao' sampe' ka Tase' Mate e sokona Gunong Pisga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mosa makompol sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il, laju adhabu, “Tan-taretan mara edhingngagi kom-hokom se bi' sengko' ekabala'a ka ba'na sateya reya. Ba'na kodu ajar kom-hokom jareya, pas estowagi pagu-onggu." 
Deuteronomy5:2 E Gunong Sinay GUSTE Allah Pangeranna ba'na, abadhi parjanjiyan," 
Deuteronomy5:3 banne pera' ban bangatowana ba'na, tape ban sengko' ban ba'na kabbi se padha badha e dhinna' sateya reya." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Dhari apoy e attas gunong jarowa PANGERAN adhabu dhep-adhebban ban ba'na. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Tape sarrena ba'na tako' ka apoy ban ta' endha' ongga ka gunong jareya, daddi sengko' e bakto jareya manjeng e antarana ba'na ban PANGERAN, manapa'a ka ba'na apa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. PANGERAN adhabu," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Sengko' reya GUSTE Allahna ba'na, se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na odhi' ekadunor oreng." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Ja' nyemba ka la'-alla'an laen. Nyemba ka Sengko' malolo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ja' agabay arca kaangguy ba'na dibi', arca se padha ban apa'a bai se badha e langnge', e bume otabana e dhalem aeng e babana bume." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ja' nyemba ka arca se kantha jareya sabab Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na ban Sengko' ta' endha' epapadha ban apa'a bai. Reng-oreng se baji' ka Sengko' bi' Sengko' eokoma sampe' ka toronanna se kapeng tello' ban se kapeng empa'." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Tape Sengko' noduwagi Tang kataresna'an ka abun-ebun toronanna reng-oreng se taresna ka Sengko' sarta ngestowagi Tang parenta. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ja' ban-saromban nyebbut Tang nyama, sabab Sengko', GUSTE Allahna ba'na, ngokom sapa'a bai se aguna'agi Tang nyama ta' sabendherra." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Raya'agi are Sabat ban hormadi menangka are se socce, sabab Sengko' GUSTE Allahna ba'na se marenta'agi jareya ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'i nem are se ekenneng angguy alako," 
Deuteronomy5:14 tape are se kapeng petto' reya are kaangguy istirahat malolo, kaangguy amolja'agi Sengko', GUSTE Allahna ba'na. E are jareya sapa'a bai ta' olle alalakon, maske ba'na, na'-ana'na ba'na, nor-dunorra, ebinna, otabana oreng manca se badha neng e nagarana ba'na. Nor-dunorra ba'na kodu aistirahat akantha ba'na dibi'." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Kaenga'e ja' lamba' ba'na ekadunor oreng e Messer, pas epabebas bi' GUSTE Allahna kalaban kakowadan se raja. Daddi ba'na bi' Sengko' eparenta'agi kaangguy araya'agi are Sabat." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Hormadi ban peyara rama ebuna; jareya Tang parenta, dhari GUSTE Allahna ba'na, sopaja ba'na taremtemma odhi'na ban lanjanga omor e nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na rowa." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Ja' mate'e oreng. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Ja' azina. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ja' co'-ngeco'an. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Ja' aberri' kasakseyan se lecek parkara oreng laen. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Ja' terro ka dhi'-andhi'na oreng laen: bengkona, tanana, binena, nor-dunorra, ebinna, hemarra otaba apa'a bai andhi'na oreng laen jareya.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Jareya papakon dhari PANGERAN ka ba'na e bakto ba'na akompol e gunong. E bakto Salerana abu-dhabu, sowarana se agarudhu', dhari dhalem apoy ban ondhem, PANGERAN jareya apareng papakon se buru jareya, banne laenna. Papakon jareya bi' Salerana laju eserrat e papan bato sarta laju eparengngagi ka ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy5:23 “E bakto gunong jareya rabbang kabbi ban ba'na ngedhing sowara dhari papetteng, la-kapala sukuna ba'na ban pin-pamimpinna padha entar ka sengko' kabbi." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, ‘GUSTE Allah ampon noduwagi kaagunganna sareng kamolja'anna e bakto abdina sadaja mereng Salerana abu-dhabu dhari apoy ka'dhissa'. Are mangken abdina sadaja padha nyaksene ja' manossa gi' bisa odhi' terros sanare Allah ampon abu-dhabu ka aba'na." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Namong aponapa abdina sadaja me' gi' kodu abandha'a nyaba pole? Dhaggi' tanto padha mate ekello' apoy se raja nako'e ka'issa'. Abdina yakin tanto mate manabi mereng Allah abu-dhabu pole. 
Deuteronomy5:26 E ka'dhimma badha manossa se gi' paggun odhi' saamponna mereng Allah se odhi' abu-dhabu dhari apoy? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Daddi panjennengngan saos meyos ka ka'issa', peyarsa'agi ponapa se edhabuwagi GUSTE Allah, pas panapa' ka abdina sadaja pa-ponapa se edhabuwagi GUSTE Allah ka panjennengngan. Abdina sadaja merengngagiya sareng ngestowagiya sadajana.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 E bakto meyarsa jareya, PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Sengko' la ngedhing apa se ekoca'agi bangsa jareya, ban oca'na jareya pajat bendher." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ja' sakenga reng-oreng jareya ros-terrosan apangrasa kantha jareya! Ja' sakenga reng-oreng jareya ros-terrosan ngargai Sengko' ban ngestowagi sakabbinna Tang parenta, sampe' reng-oreng jareya kabbi sana'potona odhi' nyaman salanjangnga." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Kassa' reng-oreng jareya soro abali ka kemahna bang-sebang. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Tape ba'na Mosa, abali dha' enna', neng ban Sengko', Sengko' magiya sakabbinna Tang hokom ban Tang parenta. Ajarragi ka bangsana ba'na, sopaja eestowagi e nagara se bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka reng-oreng jareya.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Tan-taretan, estowagi sabarang se la edhabuwagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na jareya. Ja' sampe' badha papakon jareya se bi' ba'na ta' etoro'." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Jalannagi sabarang se epakonnagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na me' olle ba'na nyaman odhi'na ban ngenneng neptep e nagara se bakal ekennengngana ba'na rowa.” 
Deuteronomy6:1 “GUSTE Allahna ba'na makon sengko' ngajarragiya kom-hokom reya ka ba'na. Estowagi kom-hokom jareya e nagara se bakal ekennengngana ba'na rowa. 
Deuteronomy6:2 Saomorra ba'na ban na' potona kodu hormat ka GUSTE Allahna, ban ngestowagi sakabbinna hokomma se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na reya, sopaja ba'na bisa'a lanjang omor e nagara jareya." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Daddi, tan-taretan, ommat Isra'il. Edhingngagi ban toro' kom-hokom jareya, sopaja ba'na sennengnga odhi'na ban daddiya bangsa se raja e nagara se sogi tor landhu jareya, akantha se la ejanjiyagi bi' GUSTE Allahna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Tan-taretan, ommat Isra'il, kaenga'e, ya! Pera' PANGERAN – pera' PANGERAN malolo – Allahna ba'na ban sengko'." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Taresnae GUSTE Allahna ba'na kalaban gu-onggu ate. Duduwagi jareya e dhalem odhi'na ba'na ban e dhalem tengka gulina. 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ja' sampe' ba'na loppa ka papakon se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na sateya reya. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Ajarragi jareya ka na'-ana'na ba'na. Kacaca jareya mon ba'na badha e dhalem bengko otaba e lowar bengko, mon ba'na teppa'na neng-enneng otaba alalakon." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Taleyagi ka lengngenna ban pasang e dhaina sopaja ba'na enga'a terros. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Toles e pangpangnga labangnga bengkona ban e labangnga pagarra taneyanna.” 
Deuteronomy6:10 “GUSTE Allahna ba'na ajanji ka bangatowana ba'na, iya areya Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub, ja' ba'na eparengngana nagara rowa. Tha-kotthana raja tor ma'mor, ban banne ba'na se maddek." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Ko-bengkona possa' bi' rang-barang se bagus, rang-barang se banne giba'anna ba'na. E jadhiya ba'na bakal nemmowa mor-somor se banne kaleyanna ba'na. Ba'na bakal nemmowa bun-kebbun jaitun se banne tamennanna ba'na. Mon ba'na la ebakta ka nagara jareya bi' PANGERAN, ban sakabbinna se terro ekakana ba'na la genna' kabbi," 
Deuteronomy6:12 senga' ja' kaloppae ka PANGERAN se la nolong mabebas ba'na dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na ekadunor oreng." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Hormadi GUSTE Allahna ba'na, ja' nyemba laenna kajabana ka GUSTE Allah, ban mon asompa, asompa demi asmana malolo." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ja' nyemba la'-alla'an se kemma'a bai se esemba sa-bangsa e sakalenglengnga ba'na. 
Deuteronomy6:15 Mon ba'na nyemba ka la'-alla'an, ba'na tanto narema babendun dhari GUSTE Allahna, ban tanto epatompes kabbi, sabab GUSTE Allah jareya ta' kasokan epadha'agi bi' apa'a bai." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ba'na ja' ba'-nyoba' GUSTE Allahna akantha se e Masa rowa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Estowagi kom-hokom se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Lakone apa se bi' PANGERAN enyata'agi becce' ban teppa', sabab kalaban cara se kantha jareya odhi'na ba'na bakal nyamana. Tana se landhu se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN ka bangatowana ba'na bakal ekaandhi'a ba'na," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ban ba'na bakal ngojuga so-mosona kabbi, menorot se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy6:20 E budhi are na'-ana'na ba'na tanto atanya ka ba'na kantha reya, ‘Aponapa GUSTE Allah me' makon sampeyan sareng kaula sopaja ngestowagi sadajana hokom paneka?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Ba'na kodu nyaot kantha reya, ‘Lamba' ommat Isra'il ekadunor rato Messer, bi' PANGERAN pas epabebas bi' kakowaddanna se raja." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Sengko' ban oreng Isra'il laenna nangale'e dibi' PANGERAN mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban ban kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan se nako'e ka bangsa Messer ban ka ratona sarta ka ja-pangrajana. 
Deuteronomy6:23 Bangsa Isra'il epabebas dhari Messer polana ba'na ban sengko' ebakta'a dha' enna', eparengana tana reya, akantha se la ejanjiyagi Salerana ka bangatowana ba'na ban sengko'." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Daddi GUSTE Allah makon sengko' ban ba'na sopaja padha'a ngestowagi kom-hokom jareya, sarta hormat ka Salerana. Mon dhabuna jareya eestowagi, bangsa Isra'il tanto epeyara bi' PANGERAN, eparenge odhi' se nyaman ban taremtem." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Mon sengko' ban ba'na terros ngestowagi papakonna, GUSTE Allah tanto lebur ka sengko' ban ba'na.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “GUSTE Allahna ba'na abakta'a ba'na ka nagara se ekennengngana ba'na, ban bannya' bangsa se eojuga dhari jadhiya. Ba'na bakal nangaleyana dibi' Pangeran ngojuga bangsa papetto' se araja'an ban akowadan dhari ba'na, iya areya reng-oreng Het, Girgasi, Amori, Kana'an, Feris, Hewi ban Yebus." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Mon GUSTE Allahna ba'na massra'agi sa-bangsa jareya ka dhalem kakobasa'anna ba'na, ban sa-bangsa jareya bi' ba'na epakala, pate'e kabbi. Ja' kaneserre, ban ja' mabadha parjanjiyan bi' reng-oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ba'na ja' alake otaba abine oreng dhari bangsa jareya, bariya keya na'-ana'na ba'na ja' bagi alake otaba abine oreng bangsa jareya," 
Deuteronomy7:4 sabab bi' reng-oreng jareya na'-ana'na ba'na tanto epajau dhari PANGERAN sarta esoro nyemba la'-alla'an. Mon ba'na ban na'-ana'na sampe' nyemba ka la'-alla'an, PANGERAN tanto duka, ban ba'na kabbi tanto pas duli epatompes." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Daddi, pagujur ba-mezbana bangsa jareya, paancor lar-pelar batona se eanggep karamat, parobbu bang-lambangnga dewina se anyama Asyera, obbar ca-arca brahalana se esemba." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Jalannagi jareya kabbi sabab ba'na kaagunganna GUSTE Allahna ba'na. Dhari sakabbinna bangsa se badha e bume reya, pera' ba'na se epele menangka ommadda se istimewa." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Ba'na ekataresnae ban epele PANGERAN, banne polana ba'na araja'an dhari sa-bangsa laenna; sanyatana ba'na reya bangsa se paleng kene' e bume reya." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Tape PANGERAN mele ba'na polana PANGERAN taresna ka ba'na ban terro neptebbana janjina ka bangatowana ba'na. Daddi jareya sababba PANGERAN masalamet ba'na kalaban kakobasa'anna se raja, ban mabebas ba'na dhari se ekadunor rato Messer." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Kaenga'e ja' GUSTE Allahna ba'na jareya Allah se settong tadha' tonggalla, ban Allah se esto. Pangeran reya neptebbi janjina ban noduwagi kataresna'anna se ta' aoba sampe' saebu toronan ka reng-oreng se taresna ka Salerana ban se atoro' ka papakonna." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Tape Pangeran jareya ta' kera mangmang ngokoma reng-oreng se baji' ka Salerana. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Daddi, estowagi kabbi kom-hokom se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na are teya.”" 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Mon ba'na agateyagi ban terros ngestowagi ka papakon jareya, GUSTE Allahna ba'na tanto terros esto ka parjanjiyanna se epabadha bi' ba'na, ban terros noduwagi kataresna'anna ka ba'na, akantha se ejanjiyagi ka bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Ba'na tanto ekataresnae sarta eberkadi sampe' ba'na bannya' ana'na ban ana'na jareya sajan atamba bannya'. Teggal ban sabana ba'na tanto eberkadi, sampe' ngasaellagi gandum, anggur ban mennya' jaitun; ba'na bakal eberkadana sampe' ba'na bannya' sape ban dumbana. Berkat jareya kabbi bakal etarema'a ba'na neng e nagara se eparengngagi Pangeran ka ba'na, menorot janjina ka bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Dhari sakabbinna bangsa neng e dunnya reya tadha' bangsa laen se narema berkat se ce' bannya'na akantha ba'na. E antarana ba'na, bariya keya e antara ebinna ba'na, ta' kera badha se jubeng." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Ba'na bi' PANGERAN bakal ejauwagiya dhari samacemma panyaket, ban dhari samacemma balai se etangale'e ba'na e Messer, balai jareya bi' Pangeran bakal eteba'agiya ka so-mosona ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Saneyap bangsa se epassra'agi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na kodu pamosna, ta' osa kaneserre. Ba'na ja' nyemba la'-alla'anna sa-bangsa jareya, sabab jareya tanto madhateng calaka' ka ba'na dibi'." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Olle daddi ba'na apekker ja' sa-bangsa jareya abannya'an dhari ba'na, daddi ta' kera ekenneng ojuk bi' ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Tape ta' osa tako'; kaenga'e bai apa se elampa'agi GUSTE Allahna ba'na ka rato Messer ban sakabbinna ra'yadda. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Kaenga'e sakabbinna balai se nako'e se etangale'e ba'na dibi', kaajiban-kaajiban ban kakowadan se raja se eguna'agi GUSTE Allahna ba'na kaangguy mabebasa ba'na. Bariya keya se bakal elampa'agi GUSTE Allah ka sakabbinna bangsa se ekatako'e ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:20 La'-mala' bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na sa-bangsa jareya bakal epabaridhuwa sampe' reng-oreng se ngenneng buru otaba ngetek bakal mateya keya. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Daddi ba'na ta' osa tako' ka sa-bangsa jareya. Ba'na ejaga bi' GUSTE Allahna. GUSTE Allah reya agung ban nako'e. 
Deuteronomy7:22 Sa-bangsa jareya bakal eojuga gan sakone' sopaja ba'na ngennenga materros parjalananna. Moso jareya ta' olle patadha' sakaleyan, sopaja burun alas ta' atamba'a bannya', babaja ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Daddi so-mosona ba'na jareya bi' PANGERAN bakal epassra'agiya ka ba'na, kabbi bakal epasalbuda sampe' dhi-budhina tompes kabbi." 
Deuteronomy7:24 To-ratona bakal epassra'agiya ka ba'na. Bi' ba'na bakal epateyana kabbi, nyamana ta' kera ekaenga'e oreng pole. Tadha' oreng settonga se kowadda alaban ngadhebbi ba'na; kabbi bakal epamosna'a bi' ba'na." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Obbar ca-arca brahala se esemba sa-bangsa jareya. Emmas ban salaka se cekka' ka ca-arca jareya ja' katerrowe, otabana ja' kala' ba'na dibi'. Mon parenta jareya ta' etoro', ba'na tanto mate, sabab GUSTE Allahna ba'na baji' ka oreng se nyemba arca brahala." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ba'na ja' nyaba' arca brahala e bengkona, sopaja babaston se ngenneng ka reng-oreng jareya ta' ngenneng ka ba'na keya. Ba'na kodu baji' ban ngapessagi ca-arca jareya, sabab ca-arca jareya ebasto Pangeran.”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Kom-hokom se eajarragi sengko' are teya kodu estowagi kabbi sopaja ba'na teptebba odhi', atamba bannya' ban bisa'a ngennengnge nagara se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN ka bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Kaenga'e, pa' polo taon abidda ba'na epimpin GUSTE Allahna e dhalem parjalanan se jau lebat e ra-ara. Parjalanan jareya bi' Pangeran emaksottagi nyoba'a ba'na, sopaja Pangeran ngagaliya ka essena atena ba'na, ban pole sopaja etemmo keya apa ba'na ngestowagi papakonna apa enja'." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ba'na epanneng sampe' kalaparan, saellana jareya pas eparenge manna menangka kakanna, ba'na ban para bangatowana sabellunna jareya ta' tao rassana ngakan kakanan jareya. Maksodda Pangeran ngajara ba'na ja' manossa reya odhi'na banne dhari kakanan malolo, tape dhari pa-apa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Pa' polo taon abidda kalambina ba'na ta' alpo' ban sokona ta' bara. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Kaenga'e, GUSTE Allahna ba'na ngajari ba'na akantha oreng towa se ngajari ana'na." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Daddi, lakone sabarang se eparenta'agi GUSTE Allahna ba'na, odhi' menorot kom-hokom jareya, ban hormadi Salerana." 
Deuteronomy8:7 GUSTE Allah abakta ba'na ka nagara se landhu, se bannya' songayya ban bannya' somberra, se e dhalem tanana agili aeng se nancel ka ra-cora ban ka mo'-gumo'." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Nagara jareya ngasellagi gandum acem-macem, anggur, buwana ara, dalima, bungkana jaitun ban maddu." 
Deuteronomy8:9 E jadhiya ba'na ta' kera kalaparan otaba kakorangan. Bato gunongnga badha bessena, ban mo'-gumo'na mon ekale badha dimbagana." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ba'na bakal bisa'a ngakan sanyang-kennyangnga, ban ba'na bakal asokkora ka GUSTE Allahna polana se apareng tana se landhu jareya ka ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Senga' ja' sampe' ba'na loppa ka GUSTE Allahna; ja' sampe' ba'na ngenthengngagi kom-hokomma se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na are teya, ja' enthengngagi maske settonga." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Mon ba'na la ngakan sampe' kennyang, ban la andhi' bengko se bagus se ekennengngana ba'na," 
Deuteronomy8:13 sarta sape ban dumbana la aba-tamba, bariya keya emmas ban salakana ban dhi'-andhi'na ba'na se laen," 
Deuteronomy8:14 jaga pateppa' ja' sampe' ba'na sombong sarta loppa ka GUSTE Allahna se mabebas ba'na dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na ekadunor oreng." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Pangeran mimpin ba'na lebat e ra-ara se lebar tor nako'e, se bannya' olarra ban kalajengkingnga. E tana se kerreng se tadha' aengnga rowa Pangeran magili aeng dhari dhalem bato sopaja ba'na bisa'a ngenom satobugga." 
Deuteronomy8:16 E ra-ara ba'na eparenge manna se daddi kakanna, bangatowana ba'na dibi' ta' tao rassana ngakan kakanan jareya. Ba'na epakantha jareya polana Pangeran ngojiya ba'na, sopaja dhi-budhina Pangeran bisa'a apareng kabecce'an ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Daddi ba'na ja' sampe' apekker ja' ba'na daddi sogi ollena ehteyarra ban kakowadanna dibi'. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kaenga'e ja' se masogi ba'na jareya GUSTE Allahna. Salerana apareng jareya polana sampe' sateya Salerana gi' esto ka parjanjiyanna ban bangatowana ba'na. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ja' sampe' ba'na loppa ka GUSTE Allahna, ban ja' sampe' ba'na nyemba ban ngabdi ka la'-alla'an. Sateya sengko' maenga'a ka ba'na, ja' mon ba'na sampe' atengka kantha jareya, ba'na tanto epatompes bi' Pangeran." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Mon ba'na ta' ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna, ba'na tanto epatompes epakantha sa-bangsa laen se epatompes e adha'na matana ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Tan-taretan ommat Isra'il, Mara edhingngagi! Are teya ba'na alengka'a Songay Yordan, ngobasa'ana nagarana sa-bangsa se araja'an ban akowadan dhari ba'na. Tha-kotthana ja-raja, ekalenglenge pagar geddhung se tenggina napa' ka langnge'." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Orengnga bangsana buta, badanna raja, tenggi ban kowat; ba'na la ngedhing kabar ja' tadha' oreng se kowat alaban ngadhebbi reng-oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Tape sateya ba'na bakal nangaleyana dibi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na alomampa e adha'anna ba'na aropa apoy se rabak. Ba'na bakal nangaleyana dibi' Salerana makala'a reng-oreng jareya, sampe' ba'na bisa ceppet ngojuk ban matompes reng-oreng jareya akantha se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Mon GUSTE Allahna ba'na la nolonge ba'na ngojuk sa-bangsa jareya, ba'na ja' nyangka ja' ba'na ebakta ka jadhiya epangobasa'ana tana jareya polana ba'na becce' ban ngestowagi dhabuna GUSTE Allahna, daddi pantes narema papareng jareya. Enja'! PANGERAN ngojuk sa-bangsa jareya, nolonge ba'na, polana sa-bangsa jareya jahat. PANGERAN ngedine ba'na ngaandhi' tanana sa-bangsa jareya polana PANGERAN neptebbana parjanjiyanna ka Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub." 
Deuteronomy9:5  
Deuteronomy9:6 Ba'na kodu yakin ja' GUSTE Allahna ba'na marengngagi tana se landhu jareya ka ba'na banne polana ba'na pantes narema papareng jareya. Enja'! Ba'na reya bangsa se cengkal! 
Deuteronomy9:7 Kaenga'e baramma ba'na se mapeggel GUSTE Allahna e ra-ara rowa. Molae kalowar dhari Messer sampe' napa' dha' enna', ba'na ros-terrosan ta' atoro' ka PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy9:8 La'-mala' e Gunong Sinay ba'na mapeggel PANGERAN ce' talebadda, sampe' ba'na para' epatompessa." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Sengko' ongga ka gunong jareya narema'a papan bato parjanjiyan se ebadhi PANGERAN ban ba'na. Pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda sengko' neng e attas gunong jareya, ta' ngakan ban ta' ngenom pa-apa." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Saellana jareya PANGERAN marengngagi ka sengko' papan bato se dhadhuwa', se aesse tolesan se eserrat PANGERAN dibi', aropa ca'-oca' se edhabuwagi Salerana dhari dhalem apoy ka ba'na e bakto ba'na akompol e babana gunong rowa." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Onggu, saellana lebat pa' polo are pa' polo malem, PANGERAN marengngagi papan bato parjanjiyan se dhadhuwa' jareya ka sengko'." 
Deuteronomy9:12 PANGERAN pas adhabu ka sengko', ‘Kassa' duli toron, sabab bangsa se epimpin ba'na kalowar dhari Messer rowa sateya alako daraka. Reng-oreng rowa nyempang dhari sabarang se eparenta'agi Sengko', sarta agabay arca se pas esemba.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka sengko', ‘Sengko' tao bangsa jareya cengkal parana." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ba'na ta' osa ngoddi lang-ngalange Sengko'. Bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya epatompessa kabbi sopaja reng-oreng jareya ta' ekaenga'ana oreng pole. Tape ba'na bi' Sengko' epadaddiya bangatowana settong bangsa se araja'an ban akowadan dhari sa-bangsa jareya.’ 
Deuteronomy9:15 Daddi sengko' laju toron dhari gunong se rabbang jareya sambi ngeba bato se dhadhuwa' rowa. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Sengko' nangale'e ja' ba'na ta' ngestowagi papakonna GUSTE Allahna. Ba'na daraka ka PANGERAN polana agabay arca pe-sapeyan logam se eangguya dibi'. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Daddi, e adha'na matana ba'na kabbi, papan bato parjanjiyan se dhadhuwa' rowa bi' sengko' ebantengngagi sampe' lejjar." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Saellana jareya sengko' laju asojud pole e ajunanna PANGERAN e konco'na gunong gella' pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda, ta' ngakan ban ta' ngenom pa-apa. Sengko' ngalakone kantha jareya polana ba'na la agabay dusa ka PANGERAN, ngalakone barang se bi' PANGERAN eanggep daraka, sampe' Salerana duka." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Sengko' tako' polana PANGERAN ce' dukana, sampe' ba'na epatompessa kabbi, tape e bakto jareya PANGERAN gi' meyarsa'agi tang parnyo'onan." 
Deuteronomy9:20 PANGERAN ce' dukana keya ka Harun, sampe' epateyana, daddi sengko' nyo'onnagi Harun keya." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Arca pe-sapeyan logam gabayanna ba'na rowa bi' sengko' epelpallagi ka dhalem apoy. Saellana jareya bi' sengko' pas epalejjar, etoto sampe' daddi abu, abuna bi' sengko' etabur ka songay se agili dhari gunong jareya." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Neng e Tabera, Masa, Kibrot-Ta'awa ba'na mapeggel PANGERAN keya." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Saellana jareya e bakto PANGERAN makon ba'na mangkat dhari Kades-Barnea, epakon arebbu' ban ngobasane tana se eparengngagi ka ba'na rowa, ba'na ta' atoro' ka dhabuna PANGERAN; ba'na ta' endha' parcaja ban ta' endha' atoro' ka PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Molae sengko' kennal ka ba'na, ba'na ros-terrosan ta' atoro' ka PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Daddi sengko' terros asojud e ajunanna PANGERAN pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda, sabab sengko' tao Pangeran la nekat mateyana ba'na kabbi." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Sengko' nyo'on kantha reya: Adhu, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, ja' pate'e ommattepon Junandalem ka'dhinto, bangsa se sareng Junandalem epabebas sareng ebakta kalowar dhari Messer kalaban kakowadanna sareng kakobasa'annepon Junandalem se raja." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Kaemodi abdiepon Junandalem Ibrahim, Ishak sareng Yakub, ja' kaemodi kacengkalanna, kajahadanna sareng dusana bangsa ka'dhinto." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Manabi sareng Junandalem bangsa ka'dhinto epamosna, oreng Messer tanto ngoca' ja' Junandalem ta' sanggup abakta ommadda ka nagara se ejanjiyagi Junandalem ka reng-oreng gapaneka. Oreng Messer tanto ngoca' ja' ommat Isra'il ebakta ka sagara beddhi sareng Junandalem badhi epateyana polana Junandalem baji' ka bangsa ka'dhinto." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Namong ngereng kaemodi, Guste, reng-oreng ka'dhinto bangsa peleyanna Junandalem se ebadhiya ommattepon Junandalem, se ebakta Junandalem dhari Messer kalaban kakobasa'an sareng kakowadannepon Junandalem se raja.”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Saellana jareya PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Mosa, kassa' ngetthok papan bato dhadhuwa' papadha ban se sabbanna rowa, pas gabayyagi baddha petthe dhari kaju. Mon la mare ba'na pas entar ka Sengko' e konco'na gunong." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Papan bato jareya bi' Sengko' etolesana ca'-oca' se padha ban se etoles e bato se epabella ba'na rowa, mon la mare, pan-papan bato jareya pas pamaso' ka petthe kajuna.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Sengko' pas agabay petthe dhari kaju akasia sarta ngetthok papan bato dhadhuwa' epapadha ban se jang adha'an, samarena bi' sengko' pas egiba ka attas gunong." 
Deuteronomy10:4 PANGERAN pas nyerrat Papakon Se Sapolo e papan bato se dhadhuwa' jareya, padha ban se dha'-adha', iya areya papakon se edhabuwagi ka ba'na e bakto Salerana abu-dhabu ka ba'na dhari dhalem apoy, teppa'na ba'na akompol e babana gunong rowa. Saellana jareya papan bato se la badha tolesanna rowa bi' PANGERAN eparengngagi ka sengko'," 
Deuteronomy10:5 sengko' pas abali toron gunong. Papan bato se dhadhuwa' jareya bi' sengko' pas epamaso' ka dhalem petthe gabayanna sengko' rowa, menorot apa se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN – molae dhari bakto jareya, sampe' sateya, papan bato jareya gi' paggun badha e dhalem petthe jareya.” (" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Saellana jareya oreng Isra'il mangkat dhari mor-somorra oreng Ya'akan, entar ka Mosera. E jadhiya Harun seda, ban ebendhem e jadhiya keya. Eleyazar, ana'na Harun, epadaddi gantena menangka imam." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Dhari jadhiya oreng Isra'il terros ka Gudgod, terros ka Yotbata, kennengngan se bannya' aengnga." 
Deuteronomy10:8 E gunong jareya PANGERAN mele reng-oreng suku Lewi epangoros Petthe Parjanjiyan ban epadaddi imam se kodu aladine PANGERAN, sarta epakon aberkadi oreng kalaban asmana PANGERAN. Sampe' sateya suku Lewi paggun epaneggu' lalakon jareya." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Lantaran jareya suku Lewi ta' narema tana sangkolan akantha ku-suku laenna; suku Lewi narema ha' istimewana mam-imamma PANGERAN, iya areya bagiyanna tor-atorra bangsa Isra'il ka PANGERAN, akantha se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN dibi'.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Pa' polo are pa' polo malem abidda sengko' neng e gunong jareya, akantha se jang adha'an. PANGERAN kasokan ngabbuli tang parnyo'onan pole, ba'na burung ta' epamosna'a." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Sengko' laju epakon toron, epakon mimpin ba'na sopaja ba'na bisa'a ngaandhi' tana se la ejanjiyagi ka bangatowana ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Sateya tan-taretan, kaenga'e apa se epakonnagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna: Abakte ka GUSTE Allahna, ban jalannagi kabbi sabarang papakonna. Taresnae Salerana, ban abakte ka Salerana banne pera' ban badanna malolo, tape ban atena keya." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Estowagi sabarang se daddi papakonna se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na are teya reya, kaangguy kaparlowanna ba'na dibi'." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Langnge' se paleng tenggi reya kaagunganna GUSTE Allahna ba'na; bariya keya bume ban essena. 
Deuteronomy10:15 Tape kataresna'anna PANGERAN ka bangatowana ba'na talebat rajana, sampe' ba'na epele e antara sa-bangsa laenna, ban sampe' sateya ba'na gi' paggun daddi ommat peleyanna." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Daddi, molae sateya ba'na kodu ta'at ka Pangeran, ban ja' macengkal pole." 
Deuteronomy10:17 GUSTE Allahna ba'na atenggiyan dhari sakabbinna la'-alla'an ban ngalebbi'i sakabbinna kakobasa'an. Salerana jareya Allah se agung ban kobasa se kodu eta'adi. Pangeran ta' kasokan nolonge se settong ban ngamoso settonganna, ban ta' kasokan ka go'-sogo'." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Salerana abillai ha'na na'-kana' jatim ban dha-randha sopaja na'-kana' jatim ban para randha jareya narema ha'na kalaban cara se adil; oreng manca se badha e nagarana ba'na ekataresnae, ban eparenge pakan ban angguy." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Daddi ba'na kodu noduwagi kataresna'anna keya ka reng-oreng manca jareya, sabab lamba' e Messer ba'na daddi oreng manca keya." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Ba'na kodu hormat ka GUSTE Allahna ban abakte ka Salerana malolo. Paesto ka Salerana ban asompa kalaban asmana malolo. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Molja'agi asmana sabab Pangeran jareya Allahna ba'na. Ba'na la nangale bi' matana dibi' kadaddiyan-kadaddiyan se makasambu' ate ban se nako'e se elampa'agi Salerana kaangguy kaparlowanna ba'na. 
Deuteronomy10:22 E bakto bangatowana ba'na entar ka Messer, bannya'na pera' pettong polo oreng. Tape bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na epatamba bannya' sampe' bannya'na padha ban bannya'na bintang e langnge'.”" 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Ba'na pataresna ka GUSTE Allahna, ban estowagi sakabbinna papakonna." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Kaenga'e sateya apa se la ekataowe ba'na parkara Pangeran dhari pangalamanna ba'na. Na'-ana'na ba'na ta' andhi' pangalaman jareya. Ba'na se la nangale'e kaagunganna GUSTE Allahna, kakowaddanna ban kakobasa'anna" 
Deuteronomy11:3 ban kaajiban-kaajiban se elampa'agi Salerana. Ba'na nangale'e dibi' apa se elampa'agi Salerana ka rato Messer ban nagarana. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Ba'na nangale'e baramma PANGERAN mamosna tantara Messer ban sakabbinna jaranna sarta kareta perrangnga, kabbi epatasellem e Tase' Galagas e bakto teppa'na nyerser ba'na." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Ba'na tao apa se elampa'agi Pangeran ka ba'na e ra-ara beddhi sabellunna ba'na napa' dha' enna'. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Ba'na enga' keya apa se elampa'agi Pangeran ka Datan ban Abiram, na'-ana'na Eliyab dhari suku Ruben. E adha'anna ba'na kabbi, bume melka, reng-oreng jareya kabbi ban la-balana, kemahna, nor-dunorra ban ebinna kabbi padha edalgep bume jareya." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Onggu, ba'na se nangale'e ban matana dibi' sakabbinna kaajiban se elampa'agi PANGERAN.”" 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Estowagi sakabbinna hokom se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na sateya reya, me' olle ba'na bisa alengka songay, pas maso' ka nagara se sakejja' aggi' ekennengngana ba'na rowa." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Ban ba'na bakal abida odhi' e nagara se sogi tor landhu se bi' PANGERAN ejanjiyagi ka bangatowana ba'na ban ka na' potona. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Nagara se ekennengngana ba'na rowa ta' akantha tana Messer se ekennengnge ba'na lamba' rowa. E dhissa' ba'na kodu alako berra' mon magiliya aeng ka gal-teggalla se etabura ne-bine. 
Deuteronomy11:11 Tape nagara se emaso'ana ba'na rowa tana pagunongan ban ra-cora, se eaenge ojan." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Nagara jareya ejaga bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na sataon benteng. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Daddi estowagi kon-papakon se bi' sengko' la eajarragi ka ba'na sateya reya; pataresna ka GUSTE Allahna ban abakte ka Salerana, banne pera' ban badanna malolo, tape ban atena keya." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Mon kantha jareya, Pangeran bakal matorona ojan ka tanana ba'na teppa' baktona, samarena ba'na anye otaba molong hasella tanana ban e bakto namen, sopaja ba'na andhi'a gandum, anggur, ban mennya' jaitun sacokobba," 
Deuteronomy11:15 ban ebinna ba'na nemmo rebba sacokobba. Kakanan se ekabuto ba'na bakal badha'a kabbi. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ba'na ja' endha' epajau dhari Pangeran polana nyemba'a ban ngabdiya ka la'-alla'an. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Mon papakon jareya bi' ba'na ta' etoro', PANGERAN tanto duka ka ba'na. Ba'na ta' kera eparenge ojan; tanana ba'na bakal kerrenga daddi tana regga sampe' ta' kera tombu mon emen-tamenne. E dhalem bakto sakejja' bai ba'na bakal mateya maske ba'na odhi' e tana se landhu paparengnga PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Kaenga'e ban estowagi kon-papakon jareya. Taleyagi ka lengngenna ban tambellagi e dhaina me' olle ba'na enga' terros. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ajarragi ka na'-ana'na. Kacaca e dhalem bengkona ban e lowar bengkona, e bakto aistirahat ban e bakto alalakon." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Toles e canggana labangnga bengkona ban e labangnga pagarra. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Mon kantha jareya ba'na ban na'-ana'na bakal lanjanga omor e nagara se ejanjiyagi GUSTE Allah ka bangatowana ba'na. Saabidda bandha langnge' e attassa bume, ba'na bakal teptebba ngennengnge tana jareya." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Estowagi sakabbinna hokom se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na reya: Ba'na pataresna ka GUSTE Allahna, lakone sabarang se epakonnagi ka ba'na, ban pateptep ba'na esto ka Salerana." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Mon ba'na kantha jareya PANGERAN bakal ngojuga sakabbinna bangsa jareya dhari adha'anna ba'na, ban ba'na bakal ngennengngana tana andhi'na sa-bangsa se araja'an ban akowadan dhari ba'na." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Saneyap kennengngan se edidda' ba'na bakal daddiya andhi'na ba'na. Tana se ekobasa'ana ba'na malanjang dhari ra-ara beddhi e bagiyan lao' sampe' ka Pagunongan Libanon e dhaja, ban dhari Songay Efrat e temor sampe' ka Tase' Tengnga e bara'." 
Deuteronomy11:25 E nagara jareya bi' GUSTE Allah reng-oreng bakal epatako'a ka ba'na menorot se la edhabuwagi, daddi tadha' oreng settonga se bisa'a lang-ngalange ba'na." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Are teya ba'na olle mele antarana berkat ban babaston. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Ba'na bakal eberkadana mon ngestowagi papakonna GUSTE Allahna, se are teya bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Tape ba'na bakal ebastowa mon ta' ngestowagi ka papakonna GUSTE Allahna, abalik nyemba ka la'-alla'an se ta' tao esemba ba'na." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Mon GUSTE Allah la abakta ba'na maso' ka nagara se ekennengngana ba'na dhaggi', ba'na kodu ngoca'agi berkat jareya dhari Gunong Gerizim, ban ngoca'agi babaston jareya dhari Gunong Ebal. (" 
Deuteronomy11:30 Kennengnganna gunong se dhadhuwa' jareya e bara'anna Songay Yordan e baba kakobasa'anna oreng Kana'an se ngennengnge Cora Yordan, addhep ka bara' ta' jau dhari ka'-bungka'an kennengnganna kabakteyan e More e seddi'anna kottha Gilgal.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Sakejja' aggi' ba'na bakal alengka'a Songay Yordan pas ngobasa'ana tana se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna. Saellana ba'na arebbu' tana jareya ban pas neng e jadhiya," 
Deuteronomy11:32 ba'na kodu ngestowagi sakabbinna hokom se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na sateya reya.” 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Areya' kom-hokom se kodu eta'adi ba'na saomorra e nagara paparengnga PANGERAN, Allahna bangatowana ba'na!" 
Deuteronomy12:2 Mon ba'na la napa' ka nagara jareya, paancor sakabbinna kennengngan se eangguy bangsa jareya nyemba ka la'-alla'anna e attas nong-gunong se tenggi, e mo'-gumo' ban e babana ju-kajuwan se rampa'." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Parosak ba-mezbana, pagujur lar-pelarra se eanggep karamat. Obbar bang-lambangnga dewi Asyera, paancor ca-arca brahalana, sopaja la'-alla'an jareya ta' sampe'a esemba pole e ngan-kennengngan jareya." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Mon ba'na nyemba ka GUSTE Allahna, ja' nero carana reng-oreng jareya mon nyemba la'-alla'anna." 
Deuteronomy12:5 E nagara Isra'il GUSTE Allahna ba'na bakal meleya settong kennengngan se eangguya bangsa Isra'il ngadhep ka ajunanna ban nyemba Salerana. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Ba'na kodu entar ka jadhiya mon ngeba'a ban-kurban obbaran ban ban-kurban laenna, tor-ator parsapolowan ban tor-ator laenna, kurban ngessa'agiya neyat, kurban sokalella ban budhu'na sape sarta embi' ban dumba se sareyang." 
Deuteronomy12:7 E kennengngan jareya keya, e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, ba'na ban saessena bengkona kodu ngakan sambi agumbiraan polana ba'na eberkadi GUSTE Allahna e dhalem usahana sampe' ahasel." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Mon bakto jareya la napa', ba'na ta' olle kantha sateya pole. Sampe' sateya reya ba'na abakte ka Pangeran sakarebba dibi'," 
Deuteronomy12:9 sabab ba'na gi' ta' maso' ka nagara paparengnga GUSTE Allahna se bakal daddiya kennengnganna ba'na se teptep, kennengnganna ba'na odhi'a taremtem salanjangnga." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Mon ba'na la alengka Songay Yordan, bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na bakal etolonga sopaja bisa'a ngobasane tana jareya. Ba'na bakal ejaga'a bi' Salerana dhari mosona ban ba'na bakal odhi'a aman ban taremtem." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Saellana jareya GUSTE Allahna ba'na bakal meleya settong kennengngan se kodu egabay kennengnganna oreng abakte ka Salerana. Ba'na kodu entar ka jadhiya mon ngeba'a sabarang se eparenta'agi bi' sengko', iya areya kurban obbaran ban ban-kurban laenna, tor-ator parsapolowan ban tor-ator se ejanjiyagi ba'na malolo ka PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ba'na agumbiraan e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, abareng ban na'-ana'na, nor-dunorra ban reng-oreng Lewi se badha e tha-kotthana ba'na, sabab oreng Lewi ta' olle bagiyan tana akantha ba'na." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Ba'na ta' olle ngatorragi kurban e man-dhimman sakarebba dibi'; 
Deuteronomy12:14 pera' olle e kennengngan se epele PANGERAN e dhaerana sala settonga sukuna ba'na dibi'. Pera' e jadhiya ba'na kodu ngatorragi kurban obbaran ban ngalakone sabarang laenna se la eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy12:15 Tape ba'na olle nyambelli ebin ban ngakan dagingnga e dhimma'a bai se ekennengnge ba'na. Ba'na olle ngakan bannya'na padha ban se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka ba'na. Sapa'a bai, se socce otaba se najjis, olle ngakan daging jareya, tadha' bidana ban oreng ngakan dagingnga keddang otaba manjangan." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Pera' dharana ja' kakan, kodu totta' ka tana akantha aeng." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Tape tor-ator parsapolowanna gandumma, anggurra otaba mennya' jaitunna, sape otaba embi' ban dumba sareyangnga, kurban pangessa'anna neyat, kurban sokalella otaba tor-ator laenna, ta' olle kakan e bengkona." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ba'na ban na'-ana'na, nor-dunorra ban reng-oreng Lewi se badha e kotthana ba'na, kodu ngakan tor-ator jareya e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, e kennengngan se la epele bi' GUSTE Allahna. E jadhiya ba'na kodu agumbiraan polana usahana ba'na se eberkadi Pangeran." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Jaga ja' sampe' kaom Lewi kalaparan saabidda ba'na badha e nagara jareya. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Mon GUSTE Allahna ba'na la malebar tes-batessa nagarana ba'na akantha se la ejanjiyagi Salerana, ba'na olle ngakan daging sakarebba." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Mon kennengnganna kabakteyan se epele GUSTE Allahna ba'na rowa ce' jauna dhari kennengnganna ba'na, ba'na olle nyambelli sape otaba dumba otaba embi' se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka ba'na, ban olle ngakan dagingnga e bengkona, akantha se la ekoca'agi bi' sengko' ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sapa'a bai, se socce otaba se najjis, olle ngakan daging jareya, tadha' bidana ban oreng ngakan dagingnga keddang otaba manjangan." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Tape daging se gi' badha dharana ta' olle kakan, sabab e dhalem dhara jareya badha nyabana, ban ba'na ta' olle ngakan daging se gi' badha nyabana." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Dharana ta' olle kakan; dhara jareya kodu ebuwang ka tana, akantha oreng se nyelen aeng." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Mon ba'na atoro' ka papakon jareya, PANGERAN tanto senneng panggaliyanna, odhi'na ba'na ban na' potona tanto nyaman." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kurban ban tor-ator se la ejanjiyagi ba'na ka PANGERAN, kodu egiba ka kennengngan se la etantowagi bi' PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Kurban obbaran ban kurban se ekakan dagingnga kodu eatorragi e attassa mezbana GUSTE Allahna ba'na ban dharana kodu etotta' ka attassa mezba jareya. 
Deuteronomy12:28 Estowagi kabbi se eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na reya, sopaja odhi'na ba'na ban na' potona nyaman ban salamet salanjangnga amarga ba'na ngalakone barang se becce' se ekasokane GUSTE Allahna.”" 
Deuteronomy12:29 “GUSTE Allahna ba'na matompessa sa-bangsa e nagara reya, sopaja ba'na bisa'a ngobasane ban ngennengnge nagara jareya." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Saellana sa-bangsa jareya epatompes, ba'na kodu te-ngate ja' sampe' ro-nero sa-bangsa jareya nyemba la'-alla'an, sabab lalakon jareya bakal madhatengnga balai." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ba'na ta' olle nyemba GUSTE Allahna nerowe carana sa-bangsa jareya mon nyemba la'-alla'anna, sabab reng-oreng jareya nyemba la'-alla'anna ngangguy cara se daraka se ta' ekasokane PANGERAN. La'-mala' sa-bangsa jareya ngobbar ana'na dibi' e mezbana, egabay kurban ka la'-alla'anna." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Lakone sabarang se eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na; ja' tambai ban ja' korange.” 
Deuteronomy13:1 Mon badha nabbi otaba tokang ngarte'e mempe ajanji mabadha'a mo'jizat otaba kaajiban 
Deuteronomy13:2 se maksodda terro sopaja ba'na nyemba'a ka la'-alla'anna, se sabellunna ta' tao esemba bi' ba'na, maske kaajiban jareya kadaddiyan onggu," 
Deuteronomy13:3 ja' parduli. GUSTE Allahna ba'na ngangguy oreng jareya parlo ngojiya ba'na, sopaja etemmowa apa ba'na taresna onggu ka PANGERAN apa enja'." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Oreng se kantha jareya kodu eokom mate, sabab manyempanga ba'na dhari jalan se eparenta'agi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna. Oreng jareya jahat polana nyoro ba'na ta' atoro' ka dhabuna GUSTE Allahna se mabebas ba'na dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na odhi' ekadunor oreng. Daddi oreng jareya kodu epate'e sopaja kajahadanna ta' terros alatlat. Tape ba'na kodu ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna ban hormat ka Salerana; pata'at ka Salerana ban lakone apa dhabuna. Paesto terros ban ngabdi ka Salerana salanjangnga." 
Deuteronomy13:5  
Deuteronomy13:6 Mon taretanna ba'na, ana'na ba'na se lalake' otaba se babine', otaba binena ba'na se kataresnan, otaba kanca rapedda ba'na, nyacae ba'na kalaban samar sopaja ba'na nyemba'a ka la'-alla'an se sabellunna ta' tao esemba bi' ba'na otaba bi' bangatowana ba'na, la'-alla'anna sa-bangsa se semma' ka ba'na otabana se badha e jauna," 
Deuteronomy13:7  
Deuteronomy13:8 ba'na ja' endha' ecacae oreng jareya, la'-mala' ja' edhingngagi cacana. Oreng jareya ja' kaneserre, ban ja' lindhunge." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Garujuk ban bato pasampe' mate. Ba'na se kodu ngotep dha'-adha', pas eterrossagi bi' ra'yat laenna kabbi. Oreng se sala jareya kodu epate'e, sabab majauwa ba'na dhari GUSTE Allahna se mabebas ba'na dhari odhi'na se ekadunor oreng e Messer." 
Deuteronomy13:10
