Deuteronomy13:11 Ommat Isra'il tanto pas ngedhing parkara oreng se epate'e jareya, ban tanto pas tako', daddi pas tadha' pole se alako jahat kantha jareya." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Mon ba'na la enneng e tha-kottha se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na, olle daddi ba'na pas ngedhing kabar" 
Deuteronomy13:13 ja' badha reng-oreng bangsana ba'na se jahat ngeba pandhudhu'na kotthana ka jalan se sala, eajak nyemba ka la'-alla'an se sabellunna ta' tao esemba ba'na." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Mon badha san-rasan se kantha jareya, talektegi pagu-onggu. Mon kajahadan jareya bendher badha onggu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 pate'e sakabbinna oreng kottha jareya ban bin-ebinna. Kottha jareya kodu epamosna. 
Deuteronomy13:16 Dhi'-andhi'na reng-oreng kottha jareya kodu pakompol kabbi, tompo' e lon-alon. Kottha jareya pas obbar ban sabarang se badha e jadhiya menangka kurban ka GUSTE Allahna. Saellana jareya kabbi pas dina padaddi kottha rosak, ban ta' olle epaddek pole." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Rang-barang se ekenneng babaston jareya ta' olle badha se esempen otaba ekala' ba'na dibi', kabbi kodu pamosna. Mon jareya ejalannagi, dukana PANGERAN tanto pas elang, ban Salerana tanto pas noduwagi bellas asena ka ba'na. Salerana bakal bellasa ka ba'na ban ba'na bakal epadaddiya bangsa se raja akantha se la edhabuwagi ka bangatowana ba'na," 
Deuteronomy13:18 sokor ba'na ngestowagi sakabbinna papakonna se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na are teya reya, ban ngalakone sabarang se daddi kasokanna." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Ba'na reya ommadda GUSTE Allahna. Daddi e bakto ba'na noduwagi kasossa'an polana kapateyan, ba'na ta' olle alokae badanna dibi' ban ta' olle nyokor bagiyan adha'na cethagga akantha sa-bangsa laenna." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ba'na reya kaagunganna GUSTE Allahna; dhari sakabbinna bangsa e attassa bume reya ba'na se epele Pangeran epadaddi ommadda.” 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Ja' ngakan keban se bi' PANGERAN enyata'agi haram. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ba'na olle ngakan ban-keban reya: sape, dumba, embi'," 
Deuteronomy14:5 manjangan, dumba alas, embi' alas, keddang" 
Deuteronomy14:6 ban sakabbinna keban se kokona melka ban akenyem. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ba'na ta' olle ngakan keban se kokona ta' melka ban ta' akenyem. Ja' ngakan onta, arnep otaba marmut. Jareya keban haram, sabab maske akenyem kokona ta' melka." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ja' ngakan babi. Keban jareya haram, sabab maske kokona melka tape ta' akenyem. Dagingnga ta' olle kakan, babathangnga ta' olle sedding." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ba'na olle ngakan samacemma juko' se agibis ban asesse'. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Keban se odhi' e dhalem aeng tape ta' agibis ban ta' asesse', haram, daddi ta' olle kakan." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Ba'na olle ngakan samacemma mano' se ta' haram. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Tape badha no'-mano' se ta' olle kakan, iya areya: mano' rajabali, mano' wek-kowek, samacemma ellang, nasar, dhangdhang, mano' onta, camar, dalko' ban samacemma dalko' laenna, mano' undan mano' kasa ban babburu." 
Deuteronomy14:13  
Deuteronomy14:14  
Deuteronomy14:15  
Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 Sakabbinna serangga se akalembang haram, daddi ta' olle kakan." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Keban se akalembang se ta' haram olle kakan. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Keban se mate la tanto bai ta' olle kakan, tape olle ekakan oreng manca se abengko e antarana ba'na, otabana ejuwal ka bangsa manca. Ba'na reya ommat se daddi kaagunganna GUSTE Allah malolo. Dagingnga budhu'na dumba otaba budhu'na embi' ta' olle eola bi' aeng sosona embu'na.”" 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Sabban taon ba'na kodu malaen saparpolon hasella tanana. 
Deuteronomy14:23 E ajunanna GUSTE Allahna ba'na, e kennengngan se epele Salerana kaangguy kennengnganna kabakteyan, ba'na kodu ngakan tor-ator parsapolowanna gandum, aeng anggur, mennya' jaitun ban budhu'na sape sarta embi' ban dumbana se lahir dha'-adha' kadibi'. Lakone jareya sopaja salanjangnga ba'na ajar ngormadi GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Mon kennengngan se epele GUSTE Allahna jareya ce' jauna dhari bengkona ba'na, sampe' saparpolonna hasella tanana se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na ta' ekenneng giba ka jadhiya," 
Deuteronomy14:25 juwal bagiyanna hasella tanana jareya, pessena pas giba ka kennengnganna kabakteyan se epele GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Pesse jareya kabelli apa'a bai sakencengnga ba'na – sape, dumba, aengnga anggur, otaba nom-enoman kerras – saellana jareya, e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, ba'na sabala kodu ngakan ban agumbiraan areng-bareng." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Oreng Lewi se badha e tha-kotthana ba'na ja' panneng sampe' kalaparan; kaenga'e ja' oreng Lewi jareya ta' andhi' tana dibi'. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Tello taon sakaleyan, pateppa' e aher taon, ba'na kodu ngeba saparpolon bagiyanna hasella tanana, pas pakompol e tha-kotthana." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Kakanan jareya bagi ka oreng Lewi sabab reng-oreng Lewi reya ta' andhi' tana dibi', ban bagi keya ka oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban dha-randha e tha-kotthana ba'na jareya. Reng-oreng jareya olle ngala' sabarang se ekaparlo e jadhiya. Mon ba'na ngalakone se kantha jareya, ba'na bakal eberkadana bi' GUSTE Allahna e dhalem sakabbinna usahana.”" 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Pettong taon sakaleyan, pateppa' ka aher taon, ba'na kodu matadha' otangnga reng-oreng se andhi' otang ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Carana kantha reya. Saneyap oreng Isra'il se maenjam pesse ka oreng sabangsana, kodu matadha' otang jareya, sabab menorot potosanna PANGERAN dibi' otang jareya kodu epatadha', daddi ta' olle etagi pole." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ba'na olle nagi pesse se epaenjam ka oreng manca, tape ta' olle nagi pole pesse se epaenjam ka oreng sabangsana dibi'." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ba'na bakal eberkadana bi' GUSTE Allahna e nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na jarowa. Ta' kera badha oreng sabangsana ba'na se mesken," 
Deuteronomy15:5 sokor ba'na ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna pagu-onggu ajalannagi sabarang se bi' sengko' eparenta'agi ka ba'na are teya reya. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ba'na bakal eberkadana bi' GUSTE Allahna menorot se la ejanjiyagi Salerana. Ba'na bakal maenjama pesse ka sa-bangsa se sabannya'na tape ba'na dibi' ta' kera ngenjam; bakal bannya'a sa-bangsa se ekobasa'ana ba'na tape ta' kera badha bangsa laen se ngobasa'ana ba'na. 
Deuteronomy15:7 Mon ba'na la ngennengnge nagara se eparengngagi GUSTE Allahna rowa, pas badha oreng sabangsana ba'na se kakorangan e sala settonga kotthana ba'na, ba'na ja' mekkere aba'na dibi' malolo ban kodu endha' aberri' partolongan ka oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Sabaligga, ba'na kodu palamba' atena, paenjame oreng jareya menorot bannya'na se ekaparlo." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ja' sampe' ba'na ta' endha' aberri' enjaman ka oreng jareya kalaban alasan ja' taon palebbaranna otang la para'. Ja' sampe' ba'na andhi' pekkeran se juba' kantha jareya. Mon ba'na ta' endha' aberri' enjaman, oreng jareya bakal aserrowa ka PANGERAN abadullagi ba'na, ban ba'na bakal enyata'agiya sala." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Berri'i oreng jareya bi' ate se senneng tor ehlas, sopaja GUSTE Allah aberkadana sakabbinna usahana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy15:11 E antarana oreng Isra'il masthe ros-terrosan badha oreng se mesken ban kakorangan, daddi sengko' marenta'agi ka ba'na sopaja lamba'a atena ka reng-oreng jareya.”" 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Mon badha oreng sabangsana ba'na, lalake' otaba babine', se ajuwal aba'na daddiya dunorra ba'na, oreng jareya kodu alako ka ba'na nem taon abidda. Mon la lebat se nem taon, oreng jareya kodu epabebas." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Dunor se epabebas jareya ta' olle epaondur ta' kalaban epagibai pa-apa. 
Deuteronomy15:14 Palamba' atena ba'na, berri'i dunor jareya sabagiyan dhari sabarang se etarema ba'na dhari GUSTE Allahna, iya areya embi' ban dumba, gandum ban aeng anggur." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Kaenga'e ja' ba'na lamba' daddi dunor e Messer, pas epabebas bi' GUSTE Allahna; jareya sababba sengko' aberri' parenta reya ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Tape mon dunor jareya ta' endha' ondur polana taresna ka ba'na ban ana' binena sarta senneng apolong ban ba'na," 
Deuteronomy15:17 giba dunor jareya ka labangnga bengkona ba'na, pas lobange kopengnga, oreng jareya pas daddi dunorra ba'na saomorra. Dunor bine'na ba'na kodu pakantha jareya keya." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Mon ba'na mabebas dunorra, ja' andhi' ate peggel, sabab la nem taon abidda oreng jareya alako ka ba'na kalaban opa saparona opana bareng. Lakone parenta reya, sopaja ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna eberkadi e dhalem sakabbinna usahana.”" 
Deuteronomy15:19 Budhu'na sape ban dumba lake' se lahir dha'-adha' kodu eatorragi ka GUSTE Allah. Sape jareya ta' olle angguy ananggala, ban dumba jareya ta' olle cokor." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Sabban taon ba'na ban ana' binena kodu ngakan dagingnga e ajunanna GUSTE Allah, e kennengngan se la epele PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Tape mon ebin jareya ena, ompamana dippang otaba buta otaba badha calena se raja laenna, jareya ta' olle eatorragi ka GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Saneyap oreng, se berse otaba se najjis, olle ngakan dagingnga keban jareya e bengkona, akantha se ngakan dagingnga manjangan otaba keddang." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Dharana ta' olle kakan, tape kodu etotta' ka tana epakantha aeng." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Raya'agi Paska e bulan Abib kaangguy ngormadi GUSTE Allahna ba'na, sabab e bulan jareya, e bakto malem, GUSTE Allah mabebas ba'na dhari Messer." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ba'na kodu entar ka kennengngan se la epele bi' PANGERAN, e jadhiya ba'na kodu nyambelli sala settong dhari dumbana otaba sapena menangka tor-ator Paska kaangguy ngormadi GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Tor-ator Paska jareya kodu ekakan bi' roti se ta' eragi'i. Pettong are abidda ba'na kodu ngakan roti se ta' eragi'i, akantha e bakto ba'na ondura dhari tana Messer ru-kaburu rowa. Kakan roti jareya, se enyamae roti kasangsara'an, sopaja saomorra ba'na terros enga' ka are e bakto ba'na ondur dhari Messer, kennengnganna ba'na nanggung sangsara." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Pettong are abidda e sanagarana ba'na ta' olle badha se nyempen ragi e bengkona. Dagingnga ebin se esambelli e malem se dha'-adha'na kodu ekakan epatadha' e malem jareya keya. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Ebin kaangguy paraya'an Paska jareya kodu esambelli e kennengngan se la etantowagi bi' GUSTE Allah, ta' olle e kennengngan laen e saanterona nagara se eparengngagi Salerana ka ba'na. Jareya kodu elakone bi' ba'na e bakto compet are, akantha e bakto ba'na ondura dhari tana Messer." 
Deuteronomy16:6  
Deuteronomy16:7 Daging jareya kolop, pas kakan e kennengngan se la epele bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na; saellana jareya ba'na pas mole ka bengkona kalagguwanna gu-laggu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Saellana jareya nem are aggi' ba'na kodu ngakan roti se ta' eragi'i. E are se kapeng petto' ba'na kodu akompol kaangguy abakte ka Pangeran, GUSTE Allahna. E are jareya ba'na ja' alalakon.”" 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Etong pettong menggu molae dhari are dha'-adha'na ba'na anye gandum," 
Deuteronomy16:10 laju raya'agi Pesta Anye menangka panghormadan ka GUSTE Allahna. E are jareya ba'na kodu ngeba tor-ator sokalella ka Salerana menorot bannya'na rajekke se eparengngagi ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy16:11 E ajunanna GUSTE Allahna, e kennengngan se la epele Salerana, ba'na kodu agumbiraan abareng ban na'-ana'na, nor-dunorra, ban oreng Lewi, oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban para randha se badha e tha-kotthana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Estowagi sakabbinna papakonna, ban ja' kaloppae ja' lamba' ba'na daddi dunor keya neng e Messer.”" 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Mon gandumma ba'na la mare egebba kabbi, ban buwana anggurra la mare eperres kabbi, ba'na kodu araya'agi paraya'an Ranggun Dhaun pettong are abidda." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Agumbiraan ban na'-ana'na, nor-dunorra, oreng Lewi, oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban para randha se badha neng e tha-kotthana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Pettong are abidda ba'na kodu araya'agi paraya'an jareya menangka panghormadan ka GUSTE Allah e kennengngan se epele Salerana. Agumbiraan, sabab GUSTE Allah la aberkadi hasella tanana ban lalakonna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Reng-oreng lalake'an kodu padha dhateng kabbi abakte ka GUSTE Allahna e kennengngan se la epele Salerana tello kale sataon, iya areya e Are Raja Paska, e bakto paraya'anna Pesta Anye, ban Ari Raja Ranggun Dhaun. Saneyap oreng kodu ngeba tor-ator" 
Deuteronomy16:17 menorot kakowadanna bang-sebang, menorot bannya'na rajekke se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka aba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy16:18 “E saneyap kottha se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na, ba'na kodu ngangkat kim-hakim ban gas-petugas laen se kodu ngadili ra'yat saadilla." 
Deuteronomy16:19 E dhalem motose parkara, reng-oreng jareya ta' olle ngala' sakarebba dibi' otabana berra' salaja, ta' olle narema go'-sogo', sabab go'-sogo' jareya mabuta oreng, la'-mala' oreng se bicaksana ban jujur, sampe' ta' adil motose parkara." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ba'na kodu adil terros, sopaja bisa'a ngennengnge tana se eparengngagi GUSTE Allahna ka ba'na ban odhi' nyaman e jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Mon ba'na agabay mezba kaangguy panghormadan ka GUSTE Allahna, e seddi'anna ja' saba'i arca kaju lambangnga Asyera" 
Deuteronomy16:22 ban ja' agabay cangga kaangguy nyemba brahala, sabab lalakon se kantha jareya ekabaji'i bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Ba'na ja' ngatorragi sape otabana dumba se ena ka GUSTE Allahna, sabab PANGERAN baji' ka kurban se kantha jareya." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Mon ba'na ngedhing ja' e sala settonga kotthana ba'na badha oreng se andhi' dusa ka GUSTE Allahna ba'na polana ta' ngestowagi parjanjiyan 
Deuteronomy17:3 ban papakonna, iya areya nyemba ban ngabdi ka la'-alla'an otabana ka are, bulan otabana tang-bintang," 
Deuteronomy17:4 ba'na kodu nalektegi pateppa' parkara jareya. Mon bendher pajat badha kajahadan se kantha jareya e Isra'il," 
Deuteronomy17:5 oreng se sala jareya kodu egiba ka lowar kottha, pas garujuk pasampe' mate." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Tape oreng jareya pera' olle eokom mate mon badha sakse kadhuwa otaba lebbi; oreng ta' olle eokom mate mon saksena coma kasorang. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Reng-oreng se daddi sakse kodu ngotebbagi bato dha'-adha' ka oreng jareya, saellana jareya buru eterrossagi bi' reng-oreng laenna. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Mon badha parkara se ta' ekenneng potose bi' kim-hakim e kennengnganna kadaddiyan jareya polana malarat se motosana, ompamana parkara oreng mate'e oreng laen se ta' etengnget otaba etengnget, oreng atokar polana dhi'-andhi'na otabana badha oreng se maloka oreng laen, ba'na kodu entar ka kennengngan se la epele GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Reppottagi parkara jareya ka mam-imam Lewi ban ka hakim se teppa'na atugas, pas dina me' olle reng-oreng jareya se motose." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Mam-imam ban kim-hakim jareya se kodu motose, ban ba'na kodu ajalannagi pa-apa se la ekoca'agi bi' reng-oreng jareya ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Tarema potosan jareya ban lakone apa se la eteptebbagi bi' reng-oreng jareya sampe' ka ke'-lekke'na. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Sapa'a bai se bangal alaban ka hakim otabana imam se teppa'na atugas, kodu eokom mate; kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya e Isra'il." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Reng-oreng tanto ngedhing kabbi parkara kajahadan jareya ban tanto pas padha tako', daddi pas ta' kera badha pole se bangal alako kantha jareya.”" 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Mon tana se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna rowa la ekaandhi' ba'na, ban ba'na la ako-bengko e jadhiya, olle daddi ba'na pas terro andhi'a rato akantha sa-bangsa laenna se badha e sabingkerra ba'na." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Senga' mon mele rato pateppa', pele oreng peleyanna GUSTE Allahna ba'na. Rato jareya kodu bangsana ba'na dibi'; oreng manca ta' olle epadaddi ratona ba'na." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Rato ta' olle kaagungan jaran bannya' kaangguy tantarana, ban ta' olle makon bangsa reya entar melle jaran ka Messer, sabab PANGERAN la adhabu ja' ommadda ta' olle abali ka nagara jareya." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Rato ta' olle bannya' rajina, sabab mon rato bannya' rajina pas ta' emot ka PANGERAN. Bariya keya rato reya ta' olle nompo' emmas ban salaka." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Mon oreng epadaddi rato kodu eatore buku se aesse kom-hokomma Allah se esalen dhari buku se asli se esempen bi' mam-imam Lewi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Buku jareya kodu esaba' e seddi'anna, ban rato jareya saomorra kodu maos buku jareya, sopaja rato jareya ajar apareng panghormadan ka GUSTE Allahna sarta ngestowagi sakabbinna papakon se etoles e dhalem buku jareya." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Mon rato jareya bajeng maos buku jareya, ta' kera nganggep salerana alebbiyan dhari reng-oreng sabangsana, ban ta' kera ta' atoro' papakonna PANGERAN kalaban cara apa'a bai. Mon kantha jareya rato jareya ban toronanna bakal marenta'a bangsana sampe' ron-temoron.”" 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Suku Lewi eberri'i tugas daddi imam kabbi, daddi ta' olle narema bagiyanna tana e Isra'il. Oreng Lewi jareya kodu odhi' dhari tor-ator ban ban-kurban laenna se eatorragi ka PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Suku Lewi ta' olle andhi' tana e antarana ku-suku laenna, sabab PANGERAN se daddi bagiyanna sangkola, akantha se la ejanjiyagi dibi' bi' PANGERAN ka suku jareya." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Mon badha oreng ngatorragi kurban sape otaba dumba, bagiyan pokang adha'na, rahangnga ban tabu'na kodu ebagi ka mam-imam jareya menangka bagiyanna." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Hasella gandum se dha'-adha', bariya keya aeng anggur, mennya' jaitun ban buluna dumba, daddi bagiyanna para imam jareya keya." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Dhari sakabbinna suku Isra'il, GUSTE Allah mele suku Lewi jareya epadaddi imam salanjangnga." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Mon badha oreng Lewi se asalla dhari kottha dhimma'a bai entar ka kennengngan se epele PANGERAN ban neptebba e jadhiya," 
Deuteronomy18:7 olle daddi imam ban aladine GUSTE Allahna ba'na akantha reng-oreng Lewi laenna se atugas e jadhiya. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Oreng Lewi jareya kodu narema kakan se padha bannya'na ban mam-imam laenna; ban pa-apa se ekeremmagi ana' binena, daddi andhi'na keya.”" 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Mon ba'na la maso' ka nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna, ja' nerowe kajahadanna sa-bangsa se badha e jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Ja' sampe' ba'na badha se ngurbannagi na'-ana'na menangka kurban obbaran. Ja' sampe' ba'na badha se daddi tokang tebbak, nyare dha-tandha, ngangguy wa'-duwa' otabana" 
Deuteronomy18:11 elmo seher, otabana mabadha hubungan ban roh-errohna oreng mate." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Oreng se ngalakone lalakon se jahat kantha jareya ekabaji'i bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na, ban jareya sababba arapa sa-bangsa jareya me' epanyengla dhari nagara jareya e bakto ba'na maso'a ka jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Daddi ba'na kodu ngabdi ka GUSTE Allah pagu-onggu ate.” 
Deuteronomy18:14 Mosa pas adhabu, “Sa-bangsa se badha e nagara se ekennengngana ba'na rowa parcaja ka tokang tebbak ban nyare dha-tandha. Tape GUSTE Allah ta' ngedine ba'na alako kantha jareya." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Sabaligga, Salerana ngotosa nabbi akantha sengko' reya, se epeleya dhari bangsana ba'na, ba'na kodu atoro' ka nabbi jareya." 
Deuteronomy18:16 E bakto ba'na akompol e Gunong Sinay, ba'na nyo'on sopaja ba'na ta' ngedhinga pole sowarana GUSTE Allahna abu-dhabu ban ta' nangaleyana pole kahadiranna Salerana e dhalem apoy se rabbang, polana ba'na tako' mate." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Daddi PANGERAN adhabu ka sengko', ‘Parnyo'onanna reng-oreng jareya bicaksana." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Sengko' ngotosa nabbi akantha ba'na, bi' Sengko' epeleya dhari antarana ommat jareya dibi'. Nabbi jareya bi' Sengko' ebala'ana apa se kodu ekoca'agi, sarta malae ommat Isra'il sabarang se eparenta'agi Sengko'." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Nabbi jareya bakal makkelana Sengko' acaca ka ommat Isra'il, ban pa'-sapa'a se ta' atoro' ka oca'na nabbi jareya bi' Sengko' eokoma." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Tape mon badha nabbi se manapa' sen-pessen ka ommat Isra'il, ngoca' esoro Sengko', mangkana Sengko' ta' nyoro, nabbi jareya kodu mate; bariya keya mon badha nabbi se la-malae ommat Isra'il, se ngoca' esoro la'-alla'anna, nabbi jareya kodu mate keya.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Olle daddi ba'na atanya e dhalem atena, ‘Baramma sengko' se taowa apa pessenna nabbi rowa dhari PANGERAN apa banne?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Mon nabbi la-malae ba'na sambi ngoca' epakon PANGERAN, tape se ekoca'agi jareya ta' kalakon otaba tadha' buktena, ramalanna jareya banne dhari PANGERAN. Babala'anna nabbi jareya dhari aba'na dibi', ban ba'na ta' osa tako' ka nabbi jareya.”" 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Saellana sa-bangsa jareya bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na epatompes kabbi ban nagarana la eparengngagi ka ba'na, ban ba'na la ngala' tha-kotthana ban ko-bengkona sarta la ako-bengko e jadhiya," 
Deuteronomy19:2 tana jareya kodu bagi padaddi tello bagiyan, sabban bagiyan kodu badha kottha sowakana se gampang eentare oreng, sopaja reng-oreng se mate'e oreng ngenneng buru ka jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Mon oreng mate'e oreng laen se banne mosona, tape ta' etengnget, oreng jareya olle buru ka sala settonga kottha sowaka jareya ban olle paggun odhi' salamet." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Ompamana badha oreng kadhuwa abareng maso' ka alas mogerra kajuwan. Teppa'na se settong moger kajuwan jareya, kapagga locot dhari gagangnga teppa' ka kancana sampe' mate. Oreng se mate'e oreng laen tape ta' etengnget jareya ta' sala ban olle buru ka sala settonga kottha sowaka se tatello' gella' sopaja salamedda. Mon kottha sowakana jareya pera' settong, olle daddi jau gallu kennengnganna, ban la-balana oreng se mate se kodu males pate jareya bisa nyerser oreng gella', ban e dhalem kabadha'an peggel pas mate'e oreng se ta' sala." 
Deuteronomy19:6  
Deuteronomy19:7 Daddi sengko' marenta'agi ka ba'na sopaja ba'na nyadhiya'agi kottha tatello'. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Mon baba kakobasa'anna ba'na jareya bi' GUSTE Allahna la epalebaran akantha se la edhabuwagi ka bangatowana ba'na, ban nagara jareya la eparengngagi kabbi ka ba'na," 
Deuteronomy19:9 ba'na kodu mele kottha sowaka tello'an aggi'. (Nagara jareya eparengngagiya ka ba'na mon ba'na la ngalakone sakabbinna se eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na are teya reya, ban mon ba'na taresna ka GUSTE Allahna ban odhi' menorot pangajaranna.)" 
Deuteronomy19:10 Lakone jareya sopaja ba'na ta' dusa polana manneng oreng se ta' sala epate'e e nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna, tape bi' ba'na epanneng.”" 
Deuteronomy19:11 Tape laen pole mon badha oreng se etengnget mate'e mosona se ekabaji'i, pas buru ka sala settonga kottha sowaka jareya nyare salamet." 
Deuteronomy19:12 E dhalem parkara jareya para pamimpinna kotthana oreng jareya kodu ngolok oreng jareya, pas passra'agi ka balana oreng se mate se wajib males pate jareya, sopaja oreng jareya epate'e." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Oreng jareya ta' osa kaneserre. Isra'il kodu epalopot dhari tokang mate'e oreng jareya, me' olle ba'na odhi' nyaman." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Mon ba'na la napa' ka nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna, ba'na ta' olle ngerset batessa tanana tatanggana se la etantowagi jaman lamba'.”" 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Sakse mon pera' kasorang, ta' cokop kaangguy nantowagi ja' oreng se earane sala pajat sala onggu; paleng sakone'na saksena kodu kadhuwa." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Mon badha oreng se macalaka'a oreng laen kalaban cara areppottagi e pangadilan ja' oreng jareya ngalakone kajahadan se sabendherra enja'," 
Deuteronomy19:17 se kadhuwa jareya kodu padha entar ka kennengnganna kabakteyan se la etantowagi bi' PANGERAN, sopaja eadili bi' para imam ban hakim se teppa'na atugas e jadhiya." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Para hakim jareya kodu tete mareksa parkara jareya, ban mon nyata ja' oreng jareya metenna oreng sabangsana se padha Isra'illa," 
Deuteronomy19:19 oreng jareya kodu ajalane okoman se emaksottagi ka mosona jareya. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Reng-oreng bakal padha'a ngedhing kabbi parkara jareya, ban tanto pas padha tako', daddi ta' kera badha pole se alako kantha jareya." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ta' osa andhi' ate neser e dhalem ngadhebbi ra-parkara se kantha jareya. Okomanna iya areya: Nyaba gante nyaba, mata gante mata, gigi gante gigi, tanang gante tanang ban soko gante soko.”" 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Mon ba'na entar aperrang ban so-mosona, ja' tako' mon nangale'e kareta perrangnga mosona ban ran-jaranna se bannya' sarta tantarana se abannya'an dhari ba'na. GUSTE Allahna ba'na se la mabebas ba'na dhari Messer, tanto nolonge ba'na keya." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Sabellunna molae aperrang, kodu badha settong imam se maju pas acaca kantha reya ka ba'na," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Tan-taretan, ngereng peyarsa'agi! Are mangken sampeyan aperranga. Ja' tako', sareng ja' kene' ate otaba bingong." 
Deuteronomy20:4 GUSTE Allah bakal nolongana sampeyan, aparenga kamennangan ka sampeyan.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Saellana jareya para parwira kodu ngoca' kantha reya ka ba'na, ‘E antarana sampeyan ba' badha'a se gi' buru abadhi compo', tape gi' ta' mabadha opacara paresmeyanna? Manabi badha, kengeng paleman. Manabi bunten, manabi oreng ganeka mate e paperrangan, compo'na bakal ekennengngana oreng laen." 
Deuteronomy20:6 E antarana sampeyan ba' badha'a se gi' buru namenne kebbun anggurra sareng gi' ta' sempat molong buwana? Manabi badha, kengeng paleman. Sabab manabi bunten, manabi oreng ganeka mate e paperrangan, tanto oreng laen se ngala' hasella." 
Deuteronomy20:7 E antarana sampeyan ba' badha'a se gi' abakalan sareng bakal aneka'a? Manabi badha, kengeng paleman. Manabi bunten, manabi oreng ganeka mate e paperrangan, bakalla tanto ekabine oreng laen.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Para parwira jareya kodu ngoca' kantha reya keya ka ba'na, ‘E antarana sampeyan ba' badha'a se gupo otaba tako'? Manabi badha, kengeng paleman, sopaja ta' marosak samangadda oreng laen.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Saellana para parwira la acaca ka tantarana, pas kodu pele pin-pamimpinna saneyap kasatuwan." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Mon ba'na nyerrangnga settong kottha, oreng kottha jareya berri'i gallu kasempadan kaangguy atellok." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Mon reng-oreng kottha jareya mokka' bang-labang sakethengnga sarta atellok, reng-oreng jareya kabbi kodu ekadunor ba'na ban ekenneng palako paksa bi' ba'na." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Tape mon reng-oreng kottha jareya ta' endha' atellok ban asoka'an aperrang, keppong kottha jareya." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Saellana jareya, mon GUSTE Allah la apareng jalan ka ba'na se arebbu'a kottha jareya, ba'na kodu mate'e sakabbinna oreng lalake'an e kottha jareya." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Tape ba'na olle ngala' babine'anna, na'-kana'na, ebinna ban apa'a bai se badha e kottha jareya. Dhi'-andhi'na mosona ba'na jareya olle angguy kabbi. Jareya kabbi la eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Tha-kottha se jau dhari nagara se ekennengnge ba'na jareya kodu pakantha jareya. 
Deuteronomy20:16 Tape mon kottha jareya badha e dhalem nagara se eparengngagi GUSTE Allah ka ba'na, pandhudhu'na kodu pate'e kabbi." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Menorot se edhabuwagi GUSTE Allahna, ba'na kodu mate'e reng-oreng Het, Amori, Kana'an, Feris, Hewi ban Yebus." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Pate'e kabbi reng-oreng jareya sopaja ta' sampe'a madusa ba'na ka GUSTE Allah lantaran ngajari ba'na ngalakone sabarang se majitjit, abakte ka la'-alla'anna." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Mon ba'na merrange settong kottha ban ngeppong kottha jareya sampe' abit, ja' moger bungkana wa'-buwa'an e jadhiya. Kakan buwana tape ja' parosak bungkana, sabab ka'-bungka'an jareya banne mosona ba'na." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Ka'-bungka'an jareya olle poger mon ekagabaya pagar pangeppongan sampe' kottha jareya atellok.” 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Mon e nagara se eparengngagiya ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna jareya badha oreng se etemmo mate epate'e oreng e teggal ban ta' etemmo sapa se mate'e," 
Deuteronomy21:2 pamimpin ban hakimma ba'na kodu ngokor jauna dhari kennengnganna mayyit se etemmo jareya ka tha-kottha e ma'-semma'na. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Para pamimpinna kottha se paleng semma' pas kodu mele sape settong se gi' ngodha se gi' ta' tao eangguy alalakon. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Sape jareya kodu egiba ka settong kennengngan e seddi'na songay se ta' tao kerreng ban se tanana ta' tao esalaga otaba emen-tamenne. E jadhiya para pamimpinna kottha gella' kodu mapotong le'erra sape jareya. 
Deuteronomy21:5 Para imam Lewi kodu ka jadhiya keya, sabab mam-imam jareya kodu motose saneyap parkara kakerrasan. Mam-imam jareya la epele GUSTE Allah epangabdi ka Salerana ban epangoca'a berkat kalaban asmana." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Para pamimpinna kottha se paleng semma' kodu maccowe tanangnga e attasanna sape jareya 
Deuteronomy21:7 sambi ngoca', ‘Banne abdidalem se mate'e oreng ka'dhissa', ban abdidalem ta' oneng pasera se mate'e." 
Deuteronomy21:8 GUSTE, kasokana Junandalem nyapora Isra'il, ommattepon Junandalem se sareng Junandalem ampon epabebas dhari Messer. Nyo'ona sapora abdidalem, GUSTE, sarengngan ja' okommagi bangsa abdidalem lantaran eanggep se kodu nanggung okoman lantaran badha oreng mate'e oreng se ta' gadhuwan sala ka'dhinto.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Mon ba'na ngalakone se epakonnagi PANGERAN jareya, ba'na ta' kera eanggep kodu nanggung okoman lantaran badha oreng se ta' sala epate'e oreng jareya.”" 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Mon ba'na aperrang ban eparenge kamennangan bi' GUSTE Allahna, ban ba'na pas ngeba tawanan perrang," 
Deuteronomy21:11 e antarana tawanan jareya olle daddi badha babine'na se raddin se ekaterrowe ba'na. 
Deuteronomy21:12 Giba babine' jareya ka bengkona ba'na. E jadhiya gunteng obu'na, ban ketthok kokona," 
Deuteronomy21:13 sarta salene kalambina. Babine' jareya kodu neng e bengkona ba'na, pas kodu noduwagi kasossa'anna sabulan abidda polana oreng towana se mate. Saellana jareya babine' buru olle kabine ba'na." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Mon e budhi are ba'na la ta' endha' pole ka babine' jareya, olle soro nyengga sakarebba. Babine' jareya ta' olle epakantha dunor otabana ejuwal, sabab la epaksa apolong tedhung ban ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Saompamana badha oreng andhi' bine kadhuwa, ban se kadhuwa jareya padha andhi' ana' lalake', tape ana' se lahir kaadha' banne ana'na binena se ekaleburi." 
Deuteronomy21:16 Mon oreng jareya nantowagiya baramma se magiya dhi'-andhi'na ka na'-ana'na, oreng jareya ta' olle pele kase ka ana'na binena se ekaleburi, iya areya magi ka kana' jareya sabarang se daddi ha'na ana' sareyangnga." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ana' lake' sareyangnga kodu eberri'i bagiyanna dhi'-andhi'na se bannya'na dhu kalena, maskeya kana' jareya banne ana'na binena se ekaleburi. Ha'na ana' sareyang jareya kodu eakowe bi' eppa'na, ban kana' jareya kodu eberri'i sangkolan se daddi ha'na menorot hokom.”" 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Ompamana badha ana' lalake' se cengkalan, dujan alaban sarta ta' endha' atoro' ka oreng towana maske bi' oreng towana la eberri' okoman." 
Deuteronomy21:19 Kana' jareya bi' oreng towana kodu egiba ka para pamimpinna kottha se ekennengnge, ban menta sopaja kana' jareya eadili." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Oreng towana jareya kodu ngoca' kantha reya ka para pamimpinna kottha jareya, ‘Ana' kaula paneka cengkal, dujan alaban sareng ta' poron toro' oca' ka kaula; dujan matadha'an pesse sareng dujan bu'-mabu'an.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Saellana jareya lalake'an e kottha jareya kodu agarujuk kana' jareya pasampe' mate. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan se kantha jareya. Oreng Isra'il bakal padha'a ngedhing parkara kadaddiyan jareya ban pas daddi tako'.” 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Mon oreng la eokom mate polana kajahadanna, ban mayyidda agantong e cangga," 
Deuteronomy21:23 mayyit jareya ta' olle dina agantong e jadhiya samalem benteng, tape kodu ekobur e are jareya keya. Mayyit se egantong e cangga madhateng babaston dhari Allah ka nagara e jadhiya. Daddi koburragi mayyit jareya sopaja ba'na ta' macemmer nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Mon sape otaba dumbana oreng sabangsana ba'na posang ban ba'na nangale'e keban jareya, ba'na ja' o-mata'tao, tape giba abali keban jareya ka orengnga se andhi'." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Mon se andhi' jareya jau bengkona, otabana ba'na ta' tao sapa se andhi', giba keban jareya ka bengkona ba'na. Mon se andhi' dhateng nyare'e, bagi ka orengnga." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Bariya keya mon ba'na nemmo hemar, angguyya oreng, otabana apa'a bai andhi'na oreng sabangsana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Mon hemar otabana sape andhi'na oreng sabangsana ba'na robbu e lorong, ba'na ja' o-mata'tao, tape tolonge oreng jareya majaga'agi ebinna." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Babine' ta' olle akalambi kantha lalake' ban lalake' ta' olle akalambi akantha babine', sabab oreng se kantha jareya ekabaji'i GUSTE Allah." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Mon ba'na nemmo lebunna mano' e settong kajuwan otabana e tana, dineng e lebunna mano' jareya badha korbina mano' se teppa'na ngerremme tellorra otabana apolong ban dhu'-budhu'na, korbina mano' jareya ja' kala'." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Ba'na olle ngala' dhu'-budhu'na, tape dina korbina me' olle ngabber, sopaja ba'na lanjanga omor ban odhi'na ma'mor." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Mon ba'na maddek bengko anyar, pasange pagar e sakalenglengnga penggirra ata'na. Daddi banne salana ba'na mon badha oreng labu dhari ata' jareya sampe' mate." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Kebbun anggurra ba'na ja' tamenne en-laenna kajabana bungkana anggur. Mon bi' ba'na gi' etamenne keya, ba'na ta' olle ngala' hasella kebbunna, iya areya hasella anggurra ban bariya keya hasella tamennan laenna." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ja' masang sape ban hemar ka settong nanggala. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Ja' ngangguy kalambi se ekagabay dhari wol ban linen e dhalem settong tennonan. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Poncana kalambina se pa'-empa' pobuwi bay-rambay.” 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Ompamana badha oreng lalake' se abine paraban, pas ta' lebur pole ka babine' jareya." 
Deuteronomy22:14 Oreng jareya abay-gabay ngarane ja' se bine' jareya banne paraban e bakto akabin. 
Deuteronomy22:15 E dhalem parkara jareya oreng towana se bine' kodu ngala' kaenna pangantan se badha lampadda dharana, menangka bukte ja' ana'na e bakto jareya gi' paraban. Kaen jareya kodu eduduwagi ka para pamimpinna kottha e pangadilan." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Eppa'na babine' jareya kodu ngoca' kantha reya ka para pamimpinna kottha jareya, ‘Kaula ampon massra'agi ana' kaula ka oreng paneka menangka binena, namong samangken oreng paneka ampon ta' poron pole." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Oreng paneka abay-gabay ngoca' ja' binena banne paraban e bakto se kadhuwa paneka akabin. Namong paneka' buktena ja' ana' kaula e bakto ganeka gi' paraban. Ngereng oladi lampadda dhara e kaen pangantanna paneka!’ 
Deuteronomy22:18 Para pamimpinna kottha jareya kodu ngolok lalake' gella', lalake' jareya pas kodu epokol." 
Deuteronomy22:19 Lalake' jareya salaenna epokol kodu edhindha saratos pesse salaka, pesse jareya kodu ebagi ka mattowana, sabab oreng jareya arosak kahormadanna babine' Isra'il. Ban pole babine' jareya kodu teptep daddi binena, ban ta' olle etellak saomorra." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Tape mon se earannagi jareya bendher ban tadha' buktena ja' binena jareya gi' paraban e bakto akabin," 
Deuteronomy22:21 babine' jareya kodu egiba ka labangnga bengkona oreng towana. E jadhiya lalake'an kottha jareya kodu agarujuk babine' jareya sampe' mate. Babine' jareya la ngalakone barang se mamalo bangsana sengko' ban ba'na sabab tedhung ban oreng lalake' e bakto gi' apolong ban eppa'na. Kalaban okoman se etanggungngagi ka babine' jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya. 
Deuteronomy22:22 Mon badha oreng lalake' tajuguk teppa'na tedhung apolong ban binena oreng laen, se kadhuwa jareya kodu eokom mate. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Ompamana e dhalem kottha badha oreng lalake' se tajuguk teppa'na tedhung apolong ban babine' se la abakalan oreng laen. 
Deuteronomy22:24 E dhalem parkara se kantha jareya se kadhuwa jareya kodu egiba ka lowar kottha pas garujuk pasampe' mate. Babine' jareya kodu epate'e polana ta' atharat menta tolong, mangkana kadaddiyan jareya e dhalem kottha, mon atharat tanto ekaedhing bi' oreng. Ban lalake' jareya kodu epate'e polana tedhung apolong ban babine' se la abakalan. Kalaban ngokom se kadhuwa jareya, ba'na matadha' kajahadan jareya." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Tape laen mon badha oreng lalake' e penggirra kottha arosak kalaban paksa babine' se la abakalan. E dhalem parkara se kantha jareya pera' lalake'na se kodu eokom mate. 
Deuteronomy22:26 Babine'na ta' olle epama-baramma sabab ta' ngalakone pa-apa se pantes eokom mate. Parkara jareya padha ban parkarana oreng se nyerrang oreng laen sarta pas epate'e. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Paraban se la abakalan jareya erosak kalaban paksa e penggiranna kottha, maske atharada menta tolong, ta' kera badha oreng se nolongana." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Ompamana badha oreng lalake' tajuguk teppa'na arosak kalaban paksa kahormadanna paraban se gi' ta' abakalan. 
Deuteronomy22:29 E dhalem parkara se kantha jareya lalake' buru kodu majar ka eppa'na paraban jareya mas kabin se argana saeket pesse salaka. Paraban jareya kodu ekabine, sabab epaksa ekapolong tedhung, ban saomorra ta' olle etellak." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Ta' olle badha oreng ya-nyeya eppa'na kalaban cara tedhung ban sala settonga binena eppa'na.” 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Oreng se ekobiri otabana se la eketthok palananganna ta' olle daddi anggotana ommadda PANGERAN. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Oreng se lahir e lowarra neka ban sakabbinna toronanna sampe' se kapeng sapolo, ta' olle daddi ommadda PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Oreng Amon ban Mo'ab sarta toronanna sampe' se kapeng sapolo ta' olle daddi ommadda PANGERAN," 
Deuteronomy23:4 sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' aberri' kakan ban aeng ka ba'na e bakto ba'na badha e dhalem parjalanan kalowar dhari Messer. La'-mala' reng-oreng jareya ngopae Bileyam, ana'na Beor dhari kottha Petor e Mesopotamia, esoro abasto ba'na." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Tape GUSTE Allahna ba'na ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi Bileyam jareya. Sabaligga, babaston jareya bi' PANGERAN eoba epadaddi berkat, sabab PANGERAN taresna ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Saabidda ba'na gi' odhi' ban salanjangnga, ja' nolonge sa-bangsa jareya otaba mama'mor sa-bangsa jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ja' nganggep kene' ka oreng Edom, sabab oreng Edom jareya balana ba'na. Bariya keya ja' nganggep kene' ka oreng Messer sabab ba'na tao neng e nagarana." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Molae dhari angkadan se kapeng tello' ban saterrossa, toronanna reng-oreng jareya olle daddi ommadda PANGERAN.”" 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Mon ba'na teppa'na aperrang, ba'na kodu ajauwi sabarang se bisa manajjis." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Mon oreng daddi najjis polana kalowar manne e bakto tedhung, oreng jareya kodu kalowar dhari parkemahanna ban neng e lowar." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Mon la para' compet are, oreng jareya kodu mandhi ban e bakto compet are olle abali ka parkemahanna." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Ba'na kodu nyadhiya'agi kennengngan e lowaranna parkemahan kaangguy kennengnganna akemme otaba akopadhang. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Mon ba'na entara ka jadhiya, salaenna ngeba pa-apa se ekaparlo, ba'na kodu ngeba keya kaju kaangguy ngale lobang kennengnganna akopadhang ban kaangguy notobi lobang jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:14 GUSTE Allah asarengnge ba'na e parkemahanna kaangguy ajaga kasalameddanna ba'na ban aparenga kamennangan ka ba'na e dhalem ngadhebbi so-mosona. Daddi jaga sopaja parkemahanna ba'na teptep berse. Ja' sampe' badha lalakon se ta' patot e antarana ba'na, sopaja PANGERAN ta' adinggallagi ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Mon badha dunor buru dhari lorana pas entar menta tolong ka ba'na sopaja salamedda, oreng jareya ja' soro mole." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Dunor jareya olle neng e sala settonga kotthana ba'na menorot peleyanna dibi', ban ba'na ta' olle mabengnges ka oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Oreng Isra'il, lalake' otaba babine', ta' olle daddi sondel e kowel pamojja'an se kemma'a bai." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Bariya keya pesse ollena nyondel ta' olle giba ka Padalemman Socce epamajara neyat, sabab GUSTE Allahna ba'na baji' ka sondel se badha e kowel pamojja'an se kemma'a bai, ban baji' ka opa ollena nyondel." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Mon ba'na maenjam pesse ka oreng manca, ba'na olle menta budhu'. Tape mon ba'na maenjam pesse otaba kakanan otaba barang laen ka oreng sabangsana, enjaman jareya ta' olle pentae budhu'. Toro' parenta reya, me' olle ba'na eberkadi bi' GUSTE Allahna e dhalem sabarang se elakone ba'na e nagara se ekennengngana ba'na jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:20  
Deuteronomy23:21 Mon badha se ejanjiyagi ba'na ka GUSTE Allahna, ja' rot-panyorot se neptebbana janji jareya, sabab GUSTE Allah teptep nagiya janjina ba'na, ban ba'na dusa mon ta' neptebbi janji jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ba'na ta' dusa mon ta' ajanji ka PANGERAN. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Tape mon ba'na kalaban sokalella ajanji ka GUSTE Allahna, ba'na wajib neptebbi janji jareya." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Mon ba'na teppa'na ajalan lebat e kebbun anggurra oreng, ba'na olle ngakan buwana anggurra sakencengnga ba'na bannya'na, tape ta' olle ngeba anggur jareya ebaddhai budhak otaba baddha laenna." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Mon ba'na teppa'na ajalan lebat e teggalla oreng se etamenne gandum, ba'na olle ngakan gandumma se epetthek bi' tanangnga, tape ta' olle ngetthok gandum jareya ngangguy are'.”" 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Ompamana badha lalake' akabin ban paraban, saellana jareya babine'na pas ta' ekendha'i pole polana babine' jareya etemmo atengka ta' teppa' se ta' ekasennengnge bi' lalake' jareya. Babine' jareya bi' lakena pas eberri'i sorat panellak, sarta pas etondhung dhari bengkona." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Saellana jareya babine' gella' alake pole. 
Deuteronomy24:3 Tape saellana olle abak abit, pas ta' ekendha'i pole bi' lakena se nomer dhuwa', babine' jareya pas eberri' sorat panellak sarta etondhung dhari bengkona. Otabana olle daddi lakena se nomer dhuwa' jareya mate." 
Deuteronomy24:4 E dhalem kabadha'an se dhu macem jareya, lakena se dha'-adha' ta' olle ngabin babine' jareya pole; lalake' jareya kodu nganggep bekkas binena jareya babine' se la cemmer. Mon lalake' jareya sampe' abine babine' jareya pole, jareya nyamana ya-nyeya GUSTE Allah. Ba'na ta' olle agabay dusa se sajareya rajana e nagara se eparengngagi PANGERAN ka ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Oreng lalake' se gi' buru abine ta' olle esoro maso' tantara sarta pas epamangkat aperrang otaba esoro ajalannagi tugas umum laenna. Oreng jareya kodu epabebas dhari tugas sataon abidda sopaja bisa'a ngoros roma tatanggana ban masennengnga binena. 
Deuteronomy24:6 Mon ba'na jam-maenjam ka oreng, ta' olle ngala' bato pagilinganna gandumma menangka tanggunganna. Sabab mon ba'na ngala' bato pagilinganna gandumma jareya, ba'na arampas pakakas se eangguy kalowargana nyare kasap." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Oreng Isra'il se nyuli' oreng sabangsana, dineng oreng se eculi' jareya pas ekagabay dunor otaba ejuwal epadaddi dunor, oreng jareya kodu eokom mate. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na matadha' kajahadan se kantha jareya." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Mon badha oreng se ekenneng panyaket kole' budhuk, jalannagi pateppa' apa se eparenta'agi bi' mam-imam Lewi; toro' du-petodu se bi' sengko' la ekoca'agi ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Kaenga'e epabaramma Miriyam bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na e bakto badha e dhalem parjalananna ba'na kalowar dhari Messer. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Mon ba'na jam-maenjam ka oreng, ba'na ja' maso' ka bengkona ngala'a kalambina se egabaya tanggunganna." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Nante' bai e lowar, dina me' olle oreng jareya magi dibi' ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Mon oreng jareya mesken, kalambina ja' teggu' ba'na sampe' samalem;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 pabali kalambi jareya sabban malem, me' olle ekenneng angguy tedhung. Oreng jareya tanto asakalangkong ka ba'na, ban ba'na tanto ekasokane bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Ba'na ja' merres oreng se ngala' derrep se odhi'na mesken ban kakorangan, apa oreng jareya sabangsa ban ba'na otabana oreng manca se abengko e sala settonga kotthana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Sabban are, sabellunna compet are ba'na kodu majar opana oreng jareya kaangguy lakona se saare; oreng jareya ngarep pesse jareya polana pesse jareya ekaparlo. Mon ba'na ta' majari opana, oreng jareya tanto aserro menta tolong ka PANGERAN ngadhebbana ba'na, ban ba'na pas enyata'agi dusa." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Ja' ngokom mate oreng towa polana kajahadanna ana'na, ban ja' ngokom mate ana' polana kajahadanna oreng towana. Oreng pera' olle eokom mate polana kajahadanna dibi'." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Ja' arampas ha'na oreng manca otabana kana' jatim, ban ja' ngala' kalambina randha menangka tanggungan." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Kaenga'e ja' e Messer ba'na tao daddi dunor ban ba'na epabebas bi' GUSTE Allahna; jareya sababba sengko' aberri' parenta reya ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy24:19 Mon ba'na makompol hasella tanana, ja' abali polana ngala'a gintelanna gandum se ceccer. Dina cer-ceccerra gandum jareya me' olle ekala' reng-oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban para randha, me' olle usahana ba'na eberkadi kabbi bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Bariya keya mon ba'na molong buwana jaitun ban buwana anggur, ja' abali parlo makompola buwa se gi' ceccer. Dina se gi' ceccer jareya me' olle ekala' oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban para randha." 
Deuteronomy24:21  
Deuteronomy24:22 Kaenga'e ja' e Messer ba'na tao daddi dunor; jareya sababba sengko' aberri' parenta reya ka ba'na. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Ompamana badha oreng Isra'il kadhuwa entar aparkara'a ka pangadilan, se settong enyata'agi sala, settonga enyata'agi ta' sala." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Mon oreng se sala jareya epotossagi kodu eokom peccot, hakim kodu nyoro oreng jareya napang. Barampa kale peccodanna, jareya targantong ka kajahadanna oreng jareya," 
Deuteronomy25:3 tape ta' olle lebbi dhari pa' polo kale. Mon epalebbi, artena oreng jareya eya-seya e adha'na oreng bannya'." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Ja' katoponge colo' ban elongnga sape se teppa'a eangguy agebba gandum.” 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Mon badha oreng lalake'an sataretan apolong bengko, se settong pas mate, ban oreng se mate jareya ta' andhi' ana' lalake', randhana ta' olle akabin ban oreng laen se banne balana lakena. Taretan lake'na oreng se mate jareya se kodu ngabine randhana." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Mon randha ban lakena se nomer dhuwa' jareya andhi' ana' lalake', ana'na jareya eanggep ana'na lakena se dha'-adha', sopaja lakena jareya andhi'a toronan e antarana bangsa Isra'il." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Tape mon lalake' jareya ta' endha' akabin ban randhana taretanna, randha jareya kodu ngadhep ka ja-pangraja e kottha sarta ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Taretanna lake kaula se ampon adinggal omor ta' poron ajalannagi kawajibanna kaangguy marenge toronan ka taretanna e antarana bangsa Isra'il.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ja-pangrajana kottha gella' kodu ngolok oreng jareya, oreng jareya pas kodu eajak acaca. Mon oreng jareya gi' paggun nolak," 
Deuteronomy25:9 randhana taretanna se la mate gella' kodu nyander ka seddi'anna e adha'anna ja-pangrajana kottha, pas mokka' sandhalla lalake' jareya salaja, sarta nyopae mowana sambi ngoca' bariya, ‘Oreng se ta' endha' aberri' toronan ka taretan lake'na kodu epakantha reya.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Kalowargana oreng jareya e Isra'il bakal esebbuda ‘kalowargana oreng se ebukka' sandhalla.’ ” 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Mon badha oreng lalake' kadhuwa teppa'na atokar, ban binena se settong aehteyar nolonge lakena kalaban cara merkes palananganna mosona lakena," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ketthok tanangnga babine' jareya; ta' osa kaneserre. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Ja' nepo oreng ngangguy tembangan otaba ker-taker se ta' cocok. 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Angguy tembangan ban ker-taker se teppa' sopaja ba'na lanjang omorra e nagara se bi' GUSTE Allah eparengngagi ka ba'na rowa. 
Deuteronomy25:16 GUSTE Allah baji' ka oreng se dujan nepo oreng.” 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Kaenga'e epabaramma ba'na bi' oreng Amalek e bakto ba'na teppa'na badha e dhalem parjalanan ka lowar dhari Messer rowa. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Reng-oreng jareya ta' tako' ka Allah ban nyerrang ba'na dhari budhi e bakto ba'na teppa'na lesso ban ta' andhi' kakowadan polana parjalanan jareya, sarta mate'e reng-oreng bangsana ba'na se ajalan gan satengka' ce' malaradda e bagiyan budhi." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Daddi mon GUSTE Allah la marengngagi nagara jareya ka ba'na ban ba'na aman dhari so-mosona e kangan kacerra nagara jareya, reng-oreng Amalek kodu pate'e kabbi sopaja reng-oreng jareya padha ta' ekaenga'e oreng pole. Senga' ja' kaloppae!”" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Mon ba'na la maso' ka nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna, sarta la ngennengnge nagara jareya," 
Deuteronomy26:2 hasel se dha'-adha' se epakompol ba'na dhari tanana kodu epamaso' ka cettheng, pas giba ka kennengngan se la epele GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Entar ka imam se atugas e bakto jareya, pas mator kantha reya, ‘Abdina ngatorana oneng ka GUSTE Allah ja' abdina ampon maso' ka nagara se ejanjiyagi Salerana ka bangatowa abdina kaangguy eparengngagi ka abdina sadaja.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Imam bakal narema'a cettheng jareya, sarta nyaba' cettheng jareya e adha'anna mezbana GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Saellana jareya e ajunanna GUSTE Allah ba'na kodu ngoca' kantha reya, ‘Adhu, Guste, bangatowa abdidalem oreng Aram se alalana, se ngongse ka Messer asareng ana' bineepon. E bakto pamangkadda, orengnga namong sakone', namong samangken ampon aoba daddi bangsa raja sareng kowat." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Sareng oreng Messer bangsa abdidalem eseksa epakejjem sareng epaksa ebadhi dunor. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Abdidalem sadaja laju padha nyo'on tolong ka Junandalem, PANGERAN, Allah se esemba bangatowa abdidalem. Junandalem meyarsa serrona bangsa abdidalem, ngoladi kasangsara'anna, kamalaradanna sareng kasossa'anna." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Kalaban kobasa sareng kakowadan se raja Junandalem mabebas bangsa abdidalem dhari Messer. Junandalem mabadha jat-mo'jijat ban kaajiban acem-macem se nako'e moso. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Saamponna gapaneka Junandalem abakta bangsa abdidalem ka ka'dhinto sareng marengngagi tana se sogi sareng landhu ka'dhinto ka bangsa abdidalem. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Daddi, GUSTE, samangken abdidalem ngatorragi ka Junandalem hasel dha'-adha'na se ekaolle abdidalem dhari tana paparengnga Junandalem ka abdidalem.’ Cettheng jareya pas saba' e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna ba'na, ban ba'na pas abakte ka Salerana." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ba'na asokkor polana ba'na ban ana' binena eparenge rajekke bi' GUSTE Allahna. Ajak oreng Lewi ban reng-oreng manca se badha e antarana ba'na, panoro' paraya'an jareya." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Tello taon sakaleyan ba'na kodu ngatorragi tor-ator saparpolowan, iya areya saparpolonna hasella tanana, bagi ka imam Lewi, ka oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban ka oreng randha, sopaja e saneyap kotthana ba'na reng-oreng jareya cokop se ekakan. Mon la mare," 
Deuteronomy26:13 ba'na pas mator kantha reya ka GUSTE Allahna, ‘Dhari saparpolonnepon hasella tana se kodu eatorragi ka Junandalem, GUSTE, sakone'a tadha' se ceccer e compo'; sadajana sareng abdidalem ampon eparengngagi ka oreng Lewi, oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim sareng oreng randha, menorot se edhabuwagi Junandalem ka abdidalem. Sadaja dhabuepon Junandalem parkara tor-ator saparpolowan tadha' se ta' etoro'a sareng abdidalem." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Tor-ator gapaneka tadha' se eteddha abdidalem e bakto abdidalem kasossa'an, tadha' se ebakta'a ka lowarra compo' e bakto abdidalem najjis; jugan tadha' se eparengngagi badhi sasajinna oreng mate. Abdidalem ampon ta'at ka Junandalem, GUSTE; sadaja se edhabuwagi Junandalem sareng abdidalem ampon elakone." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Dhari kalenggiyanna se socce e sowarga, kasokana Junandalem ngoladi sareng aberkadi ommat Isra'il; berkadi jugan nagara se sogi sareng landhu se sareng Junandalem eparengngagi ka abdidalem sadaja, akadi se ampon ejanjiyagi Junandalem ka bangatowa abdidalem sadaja.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Are teya ba'na epakon GUSTE Allahna sopaja ba'na padha'a ajalannagi papakonna jareya; estowagi kabbi, jalannagi bi' kakowadanna badanna ba'na ban e dhalem odhi'na ba'na." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Are teya PANGERAN bi' ba'na eako Allahna. Ba'na ajanji ta'ada ka Salerana ban ajalannagiya kom-hokomma sarta papakonna. 
Deuteronomy26:18 Are teya bi' PANGERAN ba'na etarema menangka ommadda dibi', menorot janjina se edhabuwagi ka ba'na; Pangeran makon ba'na sopaja ngestowagi papakonna." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Bi' Pangeran ba'na epadaddiya bangsa se araja'an dhari sa-bangsa laenna se ecepta'agi Salerana, ban ba'na bakal emolja'agiya ban ehormadana oreng. Ba'na daddi ommadda GUSTE Allahna akantha se la ejanjiyagi Salerana.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Saellana jareya Mosa asareng ban pin-pamimpinna Isra'il manapa' pessen reya ka bangsa Isra'il, “Toro' sakabbinna parenta se epanapa' ka ba'na sateya reya." 
Deuteronomy27:2 E are teppa'na ba'na alengka Songay Yordan maso'a ka nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna rowa, ba'na kodu mamanjeng to-bato se raja, pas labur." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Toles e to-bato jareya saneyap oca' dhari kom-hokom reya. Mon ba'na la maso' ka nagara se sogi ban landhu se ejanjiyagi ka ba'na bi' PANGERAN, Allahna bangatowana ba'na," 
Deuteronomy27:4 ban ba'na la badha e bara'anna Songay Yordan, ba'na kodu entar ka Gunong Ebal. E jadhiya ba'na kodu maddek ban alabur to-bato jareya akantha se eparenta'agi ka ba'na bi' sengko' are teya reya." 
Deuteronomy27:5 E kennengngan jareya ba'na kodu maddek keya mezba se eatorragiya ka GUSTE Allahna; kagabay dhari bato se gi' ta' tao elakone ban pakakas dhari besse," 
Deuteronomy27:6 sabab saneyap mezba se eatorragiya ka GUSTE Allah kodu ekagabay dhari bato se ta' abung-sambung. E mezba jareya ba'na kodu ngatorragi ban-kurban obbaran. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Atorragi keya kurban kasalameddan, kurban jareya kakan e jadhiya, sambi agumbiraan e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy27:8 E to-bato se la elabur jareya ba'na kodu noles paterrang saneyap oca' se badha e dhalem kom-hokomma Allah.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Saellana jareya, asareng ban para imam Lewi, Mosa adhabu, ka sakabbinna bangsa Isra'il, “Tan-taretan, mara padha edhingngagi pateppa'! Are teya ba'na la daddi ommadda GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Daddi ba'na pata'at ka GUSTE Allahna ban lakone sakabbinna papakonna se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na sateya reya.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Dhabuna Mosa ka bangsa Isra'il," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Mon ba'na la alengka Songay Yordan, suku Simeyon, Lewi, Yehuda, Isakhar, Yusup ban Benyamin kodu manjeng e attas Gunong Gerizim e bakto ebaca'agi berkat ka bangsa reya." 
Deuteronomy27:13 E bakto ebaca'agi babaston, suku Ruben, Gad, Asyer, Zebulon, Dan sarta Naftali kodu manjeng e attas Gunong Ebal." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Reng-oreng Lewi kodu ngoca'agi ca'-oca' se kasebbut e baba reya pakaja, ban reng-oreng Isra'il kodu nyaodi ‘Amin’." 
Deuteronomy27:15 Reng-oreng Lewi, ‘Ta' salamet oreng se agabay arca dhari bato, kaju otaba logam, sarta tek-ngetek nyemba arca jareya; PANGERAN baji' ka lalakon nyemba brahala.’ Reng-oreng Isra'il kodu nyaot kabbi, ‘Amin!’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se ta' hormat ka oreng towana ban ta' parduli maske odhi'na oreng towana nyangsara.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:17 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se ngerset batessa tanana tatanggana.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:18 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se ngeba oreng buta ka jalan se sala.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:19 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se arampas ha'na oreng manca, na'-kana' jatim ban para randha.’ ‘Amin!’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se ya-nyeya eppa'na kalaban cara ngapolong tedhung sala settonga binena eppa'na.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:21 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se apolong tedhung bi' keban.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:22 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se apolong tedhung ban taretan bine'na se tonggal eppa' tonggal embu', otabana taretan bine'na se tonggal eppa' otaba tonggal embu'.’ ‘Amin!’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se apolong tedhung ban mattowa bine'na.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:24 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se tek-ngetek mate'e oreng.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:25 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se narema sogo' polana esoro mate'e oreng se ta' sala.’ ‘Amin!’ 
Deuteronomy27:26 ‘Ta' salamet oreng se ta' ngestowagi hokomma ban pangajaranna Allah e dhalem odhi'na.’ ‘Amin!’ ” 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Mon ba'na atoro' ka dhabuna GUSTE Allahna ban esto ngalakone sakabbinna papakonna se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na are teya reya, bi' Salerana ba'na bakal epadaddiya bangsa se paleng kasohor e dunnya reya." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ta'adi GUSTE Allahna, sopaja ba'na narema'a sakabbinna berkat reya dhari Salerana:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 PANGERAN bakal aberkadana tha-kottha ban gal-teggalla ba'na. 
Deuteronomy28:4 PANGERAN bakal aberkadana ba'na sampe' ba'na bannya' ana'na, bannya' hasella tanana, ban bannya' sape ban dumbana." 
Deuteronomy28:5 PANGERAN bakal aberkadana hasella gandumma ba'na sarta kakanan se akagabay dhari gandum jareya. 
Deuteronomy28:6 PANGERAN bakal aberkadana sabarang usahana ba'na. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Mon ba'na eserrang, PANGERAN bakal makala'a mosona ba'na. So-mosona ba'na bakal nyerrangnga ba'na kalaban tartep, tape bakal buruwa asalebbudan san-kassannagi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 PANGERAN bakal aberkadana usahana ba'na ban ngesseyana bung-lombungnga ba'na bi' gandum. Salerana bakal aberkadana ba'na e nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na rowa. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Mon ba'na ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna, ban ngalakone sakabbinna papakonna, ba'na tanto epadaddi ommadda dibi' akantha se la ejanjiyagi Salerana." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Daddi sakabbinna bangsa e bume reya tanto pas tao ja' ba'na reya bangsa peleyanna PANGERAN, ban tanto padha tako' ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Ba'na bakal eparengngana bannya' ana'na. Ebinna ba'na bakal bannya'a ban hasella tanana ba'na bakal wa'-ngalowa'a e nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na menorot janjina ka bangatowana ba'na. 
Deuteronomy28:12 PANGERAN bakal matorona ojan e bakto mosemma dhari panyempennanna se ta' sakera-kera bannya'na neng e langnge'. Sakabbinna usahana ba'na bakal eberkadana, sampe' ba'na bisa aberri' enjaman ka bangsa sabannya'na, tape ba'na dibi' ta' osa jam-ngenjam dhari sapa'a bai." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Bi' GUSTE Allahna ba'na bakal epadaddiya pamimpin e antarana sa-bangsa, banne daddi oreng baba'an. Mon ba'na ngestowagi sakabbinna papakonna PANGERAN se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na are teya reya, ba'na bakal sajana ma'mor ban ta' kera tao kakorangan." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Tape ja' sampe' ba'na ngenthengngagi kon-papakonna jareya maske baramma'a, ban ja' sampe' ba'na nyemba ka la'-alla'an.”" 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Tape mon ba'na ta' atoro' ka GUSTE Allahna, ban ta' ngestowagi sakabbinna papakon ban hokomma se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na sateya reya, ba'na bakal ekennenga sakabbinna babaston reya:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 PANGERAN bakal abastowa tha-kottha ban gal-teggalla ba'na. 
Deuteronomy28:17 PANGERAN bakal abastowa hasella gandumma ba'na ban kakanan se ekagabay dhari gandum jareya. 
Deuteronomy28:18 PANGERAN bakal abastowa ba'na, sampe' ba'na pera' andhi' ana' sakone', bariya keya hasella tanana, sarta sape ban dumbana." 
Deuteronomy28:19 PANGERAN bakal abastowa sakabbinna usahana ba'na. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Mon ba'na atengka juba' ban nolak PANGERAN, ba'na bakal epadhatengngana balai, epasalbuda ban epamalarada e dhalem sabarang se elakone ba'na, sampe' e dhalem bakto se pera' sakejja' ba'na bakal epatompessa kabbi." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Ba'na bakal ekennenga panyaket se acem-macem, mare panyaket se settong agante panyaket laenna, sampe' dhi-budhina tadha' karena settonga e antarana ba'na se gi' badha'a e nagara se ekennengngana ba'na jareya." 
Deuteronomy28:22 PANGERAN bakal ngokoma ba'na bi' panyaket se alleyan, ra-bara ban panas. Ba'na bakal epadhatengngana jaman kerreng ban angen se mapotthon sampe' hasella tamennanna ba'na rosak kabbi. Balai se acem-macem jareya bakal ngennenga ka ba'na sampe' ba'na mate kabbi." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ojan ta' kera toron ban tanana ba'na bakal galiya akantha besse. 
Deuteronomy28:24 PANGERAN ta' kera matoron ojan aeng, tape bakal matorona ojan abu ban beddhi sampe' ba'na padha mate kabbi." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Mon ba'na ta' atoro' ka GUSTE Allahna, bi' Salerana ba'na bakal epakala'a ka so-mosona. Ba'na bakal nyerrangnga so-mosona kalaban tartep, tape ba'na bakal buruwa asalebbudan. Sa-bangsa e bume bakal arassa'a marenges kabbi nangale'e kapalanganna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Mon ba'na mate, mayyidda ba'na bakal daddiya pakanna no'-mano' ban burun alas, ban tadha' oreng se ngagga'a ban-keban jareya." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na bakal eokoma epatemmowa bu-tombu akantha se epakenneng ka bangsa Messer. Badanna ba'na bakal possa'a bi' poro ban koreng se gatel, tape tadha' tambana." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na bakal epagila'a, epabuta'a ban epabingonga." 
Deuteronomy28:29 E tera'na are ba'na bakal ga'-raga'ana akantha oreng buta, tape ta' kera nemmo jalan. Sakabbinna usahana ba'na bakal ta' olleya hasel. Ba'na bakal ros-terrosana ekaneyaja ban ebigal, ban ta' kera badha se nolong ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Mon ba'na ta' ta'at ka Guste Allah, ba'na bakal kateba'ana hal-hal e baba reya. Ba'na bakal abakalana, tape bakalla ba'na jareya bakal ekabina oreng laen. Ba'na bakal maddegga bengko, tape ta' kera noro' ngennengnge. Ba'na bakal namennana kebbun anggurra tape ta' kera noro' ngakan buwana." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Sapena ba'na bakal esambelliya e adha'anna matana ba'na, tape ba'na ta' kera noro' ngakan dagingnga. Mar-hemarra ba'na bakal egiringa oreng sabatara ba'na pera' bisa ngabas malolo, ban ta' kera epabali pole. Ba-dumbana ba'na bakal ebagiya ka so-mosona ban ta' kera badha oreng se nolong." 
Deuteronomy28:32 E adha'anna matana ba'na na'-ana'na ba'na bakal ebagiya ka oreng manca ekagabaya dunor. Sabban are matana ba'na bakal peddiya se nyare'e na'-ana'na, tape ehteyarra ba'na ta' kera badha ollena, sabab ta' kera epabali pole ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ba'na alako berra' namenne tanana, tape hasella bakal ekala'a bangsa laen kabbi, ban ba'na ta' kera olle pa-apa kajabana ekaneyaja ban ekejjemme ros-terrosan." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Ba'na bakal gila'a polana sakabbinna kasangsara'an se etanggung ba'na jareya. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Bi' PANGERAN sokona ba'na epabannya'a porona se nyo'nyo' ban ta' ekenneng pabaras; dhari soko sampe' ka konco'na obu'na ba'na bakal possa'a ban bu-tombu. 
Deuteronomy28:36 Ba'na ban ratona bi' PANGERAN bakal ebakta'a ka nagara manca se ta' ekataowe ba'na ban ta' ekataowe bangatowana ba'na. E jadhiya ba'na bakal ngabdiya ka la'-alla'an se ekagabay dhari kaju ban bato. 
Deuteronomy28:37 E ra-nagara kennengnganna ba'na se epasalebbudana bi' PANGERAN jareya, reng-oreng bakal arassa'a marenges nangale'e ba'na; ba'na bakal eya-seya'a ban ekala'-gella'a oreng." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Bannya' ne-bine se etabur ba'na, tape sakone' hasel se ekaolle, sabab men-tamennanna ba'na epaobus bi' balang." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ba'na bakal namennana kebbun anggurra ban meyara bun-kebbun jareya, tape ta' kera noro' molong buwana anggurra otabana ngenom aengnga, sabab ka-bungkana anggurra jareya bakal obusa ekakan ola'." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Sanagarana ba'na bakal tombuwa ka-bungkana jaitun, tape buwana bakal ngalotora, sampe' ba'na ta' olle mennya'na." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Ba'na bakal andhi'a ana' lalake' ban babine', tape ba'na bakal kaelangana na'-ana'na jareya sabab kabbi bakal epadaddiya tawanan perrang." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Bungkana anggurra ban men-tamennanna ba'na bakal obusa ekakan balang kabbi. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Oreng manca se badha e nagarana ba'na bakal atamba'a kobasa, dineng kakobasa'anna ba'na dibi' bakal akoranga." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Reng-oreng jareya bakal andhi'a pesse se eenjammagiya ka ba'na, tape ba'na bakal ta' andhi'a pa-apa se ekennenga paenjam ka reng-oreng jareya. Ban dhi-budhina ba'na bakal ekobasa'ana reng-oreng jareya." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Balai jareya kabbi bakal teba'a ka ba'na ban bakal agangguwa ba'na terros sampe' ba'na mate kabbi, sabab ba'na ta' atoro' ka GUSTE Allahna ban ta' ajalannagi kom-hokomma se eparengngagi ka ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Balai jareya menangka buktena okomanna Pangeran ka ba'na ban ka na' potona ba'na salanjangnga. 
Deuteronomy28:47 E dhalem apa'a bai ba'na la eberkadi bi' GUSTE Allahna, tape ba'na ta' endha' ngabdi ka Salerana kalaban ate se ehlas ban gumbira." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Daddi ba'na kodu ngabdi ka so-moso se bi' PANGERAN epadhatengnga ka ba'na. Ba'na bakal kalaparana, kapelka'en ban abangkang, ban kakorangan e dhalem parkara apa'a bai. PANGERAN bakal nyeksa'a ba'na epakejjem sampe' ba'na mate." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Badha settong bangsa dhari konco'na bume, ba'na ta' ngarte basana, bangsa jareya bakal epadhatengnga bi' PANGERAN epamosowana ban ba'na. Bangsa jareya akantha mano' rajabali bakal nyaoba ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Bangsa jareya kejjem, ta' andhi' ate neser ka oreng towa ban ka na'-kana'." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Ebin ban hasella tanana ba'na bakal epatadha'a, ban ba'na bakal ta' edina'ana gandum, aengnga anggur, mennya' jaitun otabana sape ban embi' ban dumba sampe' ba'na mate kalaparan." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Bangsa jareya bakal nyerrangnga saneyap kottha e nagara se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna sampe' gar-pagar batona se tenggi ban se epakoko ban binteng se eandellagi ba'na bakal gujura. 
Deuteronomy28:53 Sabatara so-mosona ba'na ngeppong tha-kotthana ba'na, ba'na bakal potosa asa polana kalaparan, sampe' ba'na ngakan na'-ana'na dibi', na'-ana' se eparengngagi ka ba'na bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy28:54 La'-mala' oreng bangsawan se paleng molja buddina bakal potosa asa saabidda ekeppong moso jareya, sampe' ngakan na'-ana'na dibi' sabab tadha' kakanan laenna. Taretanna otabana binena se kataresnan otabana na'-ana'na se gi' odhi' ta' epamelo maske sakone'a." 
Deuteronomy28:55  
Deuteronomy28:56 La'-mala' babine'an bangsawan se paleng molja buddina ban se talebat sogina sampe' ta' tao rassana ajalan soko, bakal kantha'a jareya keya. E bakto moso ngeppong kottha, babine' jareya bakal potosa asa polana kalaparan, sampe' tek-ngetek ngakan ana'na se gi' buru lahir ban ne-tamonena. Lakena se kataresnan otabana na'-ana'na tadha' se epamelowa maske sakone'a." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 Mon ba'na ta' ngestowagi sakabbinna hokomma GUSTE Allahna se etoles e dhalem buku reya ban ta' hormat ka GUSTE Allah se agung ban se makasambu' ate," 
Deuteronomy28:59 bi' GUSTE Allah ba'na sarta toronanna bakal epadhatengngana ket-panyaket se ta' ekenneng pabaras, ban bah-wabah se nako'e se ta' ekenneng paambu." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ket-panyaket se nako'e se etangale'e ba'na e Messer bakal ngennenga ka ba'na, ban ba'na ta' kera bisa epabaras." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Laen dhari jareya PANGERAN madhatengnga keya ket-panyaket ban wabah se ta' esebbut e dhalem buku reya, buku Hokomma PANGERAN. Ban ba'na bakal mateya." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Maske bannya'na ba'na la padha ban bannya'na bintang e langnge', e antarana ba'na pera' sakone' se gi' odhi', sabab ba'na ta' ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy28:63 PANGERAN kasokan apareng kama'moran ka ba'na ban nambai bannya'na ba'na, bariya keya Salerana bakal kasokana matompes ba'na. Ba'na bakal ecabuda dhari nagara se bakal ekobasa'ana ban ekennengngana ba'na jareya." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na bakal epasalebbudana e antarana sa-bangsa e bume. E jadhiya ba'na bakal nyemba'a la'-alla'an se ekagabay dhari kaju ban bato, la'-alla'an se padha ta' ekennal bi' ba'na ban bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy28:65 E antarana sa-bangsa jareya ba'na bakal ta' nemmowa kataremtemman e dhimma'a bai, ban bakal tadha'a kennengngan se ekennenga koca' andhi'na ba'na dibi'; bi' PANGERAN ba'na epaandhi'a ate kobater ban ta' andhi' pangarebban sakale." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Odhi'na ba'na bakal badha'a e dhalem babaja terros. Seyang malem ba'na bakal arassa'a marenges ban tako' mate. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Mon nangale'e apa bai atena ba'na dhek-gadheggan polana tako'. Mon gu-laggu ba'na terro malemma, ban mon malem ba'na terro lagguwa." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na bakal epabaliya ka Messer epanompa'a kapal, sanajjan Salerana la tao adhabu ja' ba'na ta' kera abali dha' essa' pole. E jadhiya ba'na bakal aehteyara ajuwal badanna terro epadaddiya dunorra mosona tape tadha' oreng settonga se melleya ba'na.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Areya' essena parjanjiyan se menorot dhabuna PANGERAN ebadhi Mosa ban bangsa Isra'il e bakto bangsa jareya badha e nagara Mo'ab. Parjanjiyan jareya menangka tamba'anna parjanjiyan se ebadhi PANGERAN bi' bangsa jareya e Gunong Sinay. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mosa makompol sakabbinna oreng Isra'il, laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ba'na la nangale'e dibi' apa se elampa'agi PANGERAN ka rato Messer, para pangraja ban saantero nagarana." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Bariya keya ba'na la nangale'e sakabbinna balai se nako'e ban jat-mo'jijat sarta kaajiban-kaajiban se elampa'agi PANGERAN. 
Deuteronomy29:4 Tape sampe' sateya bi' Salerana ba'na gi' ta' epangarte apa se ealame ba'na jareya. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Pa' polo taon abidda PANGERAN mimpin ba'na lebat e ra-ara beddhi, tape kalambi ban sandhalla ba'na ta' endha' laju ban alpo'." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ba'na ta' andhi' roti se ekakana, ta' andhi' aeng anggur otabana non-enoman kerras, tape bi' PANGERAN ba'na eparenge sabarang se ekabuto ba'na sopaja ba'na taowa ja' Salerana jareya GUSTE Allahna ba'na." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ban e bakto sengko' ban ba'na napa' ka kennengngan reya, Rato Sihon dhari Hesybon ban Rato Og dhari Basan merrange ba'na. Tape bi' ba'na reng-oreng jareya epakala." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Tanana bi' ba'na erebbu' pas egi-bagi ka suku Ruben, Gad ban sabagiyan dhari suku Manasye." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Daddi ba'na kodu ngestowagi sakabbinna parjanjiyan reya, sopaja ba'na ahasela e dhalem sakabbinna usahana." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Are teya ba'na kabbi padha manjeng e ajunanna GUSTE Allahna: sakabbinna kapala suku, para pamimpin, parwira, lalake'an," 
Deuteronomy29:11 babine'an, na'-kana' ban sakabbinna oreng manca se badha e antarana ba'na ban se nolonge ba'na ngetthok kaju ban mekol aeng." 
Deuteronomy29:12 GUSTE Allah mabadha parjanjiyan ban ba'na, ban ba'na kabbi padha akompol e dhinna' nyekkennana parjanjiyan reya sarta narema'a kawajiban-kawajibanna." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Kalaban parjanjiyan jareya e are teya PANGERAN makoko ba'na daddi bangsana, ban Salerana daddi Allahna ba'na akantha se la ejanjiyagi ka ba'na ban ka bangatowana ba'na Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Parjanjiyan jareya ban sakabbinna kawajibanna ebadhi bi' PANGERAN banne pera' ban ba'na malolo," 
Deuteronomy29:15 tape bi' saneyap oreng se are teya manjeng e dhinna', e ajunanna GUSTE Allah, ban bariya keya bi' toronanna sengko' ban ba'na se bakal dhatengnga.”" 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Ba'na gi' enga' baramma odhi'na ba'na e Messer ban baramma ba'na se ajalan lebat e nagarana sa-bangsa laen. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Ba'na la nangale'e ca-arca brahalana sa-bangsa jareya se majitjidan, se ekagabay dhari kaju, bato, salaka ban emmas." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Daddi jaga ja' sampe' badha e antarana ba'na, lalake' otaba babine', kalowarga otabana suku se manjeng e dhinna' sateya reya, se sampe' abalik dhari GUSTE Allah polana nyemba'a la'-alla'anna bangsa laen. Lalakon jareya padha ban ramo' se tombu daddi tamennan se pae' ban badha raconna." 
Deuteronomy29:19 E antarana ba'na se ngedhing parenta se kerras reya ja' sampe' badha se apekker ja' odhi'na nyamana terros maskeya nekat noro' karebba dibi'. Jareya bakal macalaka'a ba'na kabbi, reng-oreng se becce' ban se jahat padha bai." 
Deuteronomy29:20 PANGERAN ta' kera nyapora oreng se kantha jareya. Sabaligga, oreng se kantha jareya tanto ekenneng babendunna PANGERAN se talebat rajana, ban samacemma balai se etoles e buku reya tanto ngenneng ka aba'na, sampe' oreng jareya epatompes bi' PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Oreng jareya bi' PANGERAN bakal ekagabaya conto ka sakabbinna suku Isra'il, ban eokom ban babaston se esebbuttagi e dhalem parjanjiyan se etoles e buku reya, buku Hokomma PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy29:22 E budhi are, toronanna ba'na ban oreng manca se asalla dhari nagara se jau bakal nangaleyana balai ban kasangsara'an se acem-macem se epadhateng PANGERAN ka nagarana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Gal-teggalla ba'na bakal daddiya tana kajal se topo bi' balirang ban buja. Tanana ta' ekenneng tamenne ban rebba ta' endha' tombu e jadhiya. Nagarana ba'na bakal daddiya akantha tha-kottha Sodom ban Gomora, Adma ban Zebo'im se bi' PANGERAN epamosna e bakto ce' dukana." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Oreng sadunnya bakal atanya'a, ‘Arapa reng-oreng rowa me' epakantha jareya bi' PANGERAN? Arapa PANGERAN me' ce' sarana dukana?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Ban jawabba iya areya, ‘Polana reng-oreng jareya ta' neptebbi parjanjiyanna PANGERAN, Allahna bangatowana; parjanjiyan se ebadha'agi Salerana ban reng-oreng jareya e bakto Salerana abakta reng-oreng jareya kalowar dhari Messer." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Reng-oreng jareya ngabdi ka la'-alla'an se ta' ekennal bi' aba'na mangkana PANGERAN la alarang reng-oreng jareya nyemba ka la'-alla'an jareya. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Jareya sababba PANGERAN duka ka ommadda ban madhateng ka nagarana sakabbinna balai se etoles e dhalem buku reya. 
Deuteronomy29:28 PANGERAN ce' dukana, ban e dhalem dukana se ce' rajana jareya bangsa Isra'il ecabut dhari tanana ban epelpallagi ka nagara manca, daddi reng-oreng Isra'il jareya badha e jadhiya.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 Badha rang-barang se eroseya'agi bi' PANGERAN; tape Hokomma la enyata'agi ka ba'na kabbi, ban ba'na satoronanna kodu ngestowagi hokom jareya salanjangnga.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Sateya ba'na olle mele, berkat otabana babaston akantha se la eterrangngagi bi' sengko' rowa. Mon ba'na la ngalame sakabbinna kasangsara'an jareya ban odhi' epasalebbudan e antarana sa-bangsa bi' GUSTE Allahna, ba'na tanto pas enga' ja' bi' sengko' ba'na la eberri' pameleyan." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Mon ba'na ban na' potona atobat, abaliya ka GUSTE Allahna, sarta kalaban gu-onggu ate ngestowagi sakabbinna papakonna se bi' sengko' eajarragi ka ba'na are teya reya," 
Deuteronomy30:3 tanto GUSTE Allah bellas ka ba'na. Bi' PANGERAN ba'na tanto epakompol pole dhari kennengnganna se asalebbudan e antarana sa-bangsa, sarta pas epama'mor pole." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Sanajjan ba'na asalebbudan daddi sabume, ba'na tanto epakompol ban ebakta abali bi' GUSTE Allahna." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Tana se lamba' ekennengnge bangatowana ba'na, bakal ekaandhi'a ba'na pole. Ban ba'na bakal epadaddiya lebbi ma'mor, ban bannya'na ba'na bakal alebbidana dhari bangatowana." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ba'na sana' potona bakal eparengngana ate se ta'at, sopaja ba'na taresna kalaban gu-onggu ate ka GUSTE Allahna ban bisa terros ngennengnge nagara jarowa." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Sakabbinna babaston rowa bakal teba'a ka so-mosona ba'na, se baji' ka ba'na ban se nyeksa ba'na." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ba'na bakal ta'ada pole ka PANGERAN ban ajalannagi sakabbinna papakonna se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na are teya reya. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Bi' GUSTE Allah ba'na eparengngana olle hasel e dhalem sakabbinna usahana; ba'na bakal epabannya'a ana'na ban ebinna; gal-teggalla ba'na bakal bannya'a hasella. PANGERAN senneng panggaliyanna apareng kama'moran ka ba'na, akantha gi' lamba' Salerana senneng keya panggaliyanna apareng kama'moran ka bangatowana ba'na." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Tape ba'na kodu ta'at ka GUSTE Allahna ban ngestowagi sakabbinna hokomma se etoles e dhalem buku reya, iya areya buku Hokomma PANGERAN. Ba'na kodu abali ka Salerana kalaban gu-onggu ate." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Parenta se bi' sengko' epanapa' ka ba'na reya ta' pate malarat ban banne barang se ta' ekenneng lakone bi' ba'na. 
Deuteronomy30:12 Kennengnganna banne e langnge', daddi ba'na ta' olle atanya kantha reya, ‘Sapa se ongga'a dha' essa', se ngala'agiya papakon jareya me' olle sengko' bisa ngedhing ban ajalannagi?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Bariya keya kennengnganna banne e kennengngan se alengka tase', daddi ba'na ta' olle atanya kantha reya, ‘Sapa se entara alengka tase', se ngala'agiya papakon jareya me' olle sengko' bisa ngedhing ban ajalannagi?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ja' atanya kantha jareya, sabab papakon jareya badha e seddi'anna ba'na. Ba'na la tao ban la apal, daddi ba'na pera' kare ajalannagi." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Are teya ba'na olle mele se becce' otaba se juba', mele odhi' otaba mate." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Are teya sengko' marenta'agi ka ba'na sopaja ba'na taresna ka GUSTE Allahna, ta'at ka Salerana, ngestowagi kom-hokom ban papakonna, me' olle ba'na ma'mor ban daddi bangsa se raja. Ba'na bakal eberkadana bi' GUSTE Allahna e nagara se sakejja' aggi' bakal ekennengngana ba'na rowa." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Tape mon ba'na ta' ta'at ban ta' endha' ngedhingngagi, ban endha' eajak oreng lebat jalan se sala, nyemba ka la'-alla'an," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ba'na tanto epatompes. Kaenga'e, ya, jareya bi' sengko' la epaenga' ka ba'na sateya reya. Ba'na ta' kera abit odhi' e nagara e bara'na Songay Yordan se ekennengngana ba'na rowa." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Sateya ba'na olle mele, odhi' apa mate, berkadda Pangeran otaba babastonna. Langnge' ban bume bi' sengko' egabaya saksena potosanna ba'na. Mara mele odhi'." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Taresnae GUSTE Allahna, pata'at ban paesto ka Salerana. Tanto ba'na ban na' potona eparenge odhi' abit e nagara se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN ka bangatowana ba'na, Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mosa adhabu pole ka reng-oreng Isra'il," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Sateya tang omor la saratos dhu polo taon, sengko' la ta' sanggup pole mimpin ba'na. Laen dhari jareya PANGERAN la adhabu ja' sengko' ta' eedine noro' alengka Songay Yordan." 
Deuteronomy31:3 GUSTE Allah dibi' se alomampa'a e adha'anna ba'na, mateyana sa-bangsa se abengko e jadhiya, sopaja ba'na bisa'a ngobasane nagarana. Yusak se mimpina ba'na, akantha se la edhabuwagi PANGERAN." 
Deuteronomy31:4 PANGERAN matompessa sa-bangsa jareya, padha ban se makala Sihon ban Og, ratona oreng Amori, ban maancor nagarana." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Bi' PANGERAN ba'na epamennanga ka sa-bangsa jareya, saellana jareya ba'na kodu atoro' ka apa se epessennagi sengko' parkara sa-bangsa jareya kodu epabaramma." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Ba'na pakoko atena, ban pabangal. Ta' osa tako' ka sa-bangsa jareya, ba'na bakal etolonga bi' GUSTE Allahna dibi'. Ba'na ta' kera eco-koco ban ta' kera edinggallagi bi' Salerana.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Mosa pas adikane Yusak, sarta pas adhabu e adha'na reng-oreng Isra'il, “Ba'na pakoko atena ban pabangal, Yusak! Ba'na se mimpina bangsa Isra'il reya se entara arebbu' nagara se ejanjiyagi PANGERAN ka bangatowana." 
Deuteronomy31:8 PANGERAN dibi' se nontona ban nolongana ba'na. PANGERAN ta' kera co-ngoco ban ta' kera adinggallagi ba'na. Daddi ba'na ta' osa tako' otaba kene' ate.” 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mosa pas nyerrat hokomma GUSTE Allah, laju eparengngagi ka mam-imam Lewi se epangoros Petthe Parjanjiyan, sarta ka para pamimpinna oreng Isra'il." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mosa makon kantha reya ka reng-oreng jareya, “Sabban pettong taon sakaleyan, e aher taon, e dhalem taon palebbaranna otang e bakto paraya'an Ranggun Dhaun," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ba'na kodu maca'agi kom-hokom reya pakaja e adha'anna reng-oreng Isra'il se abakte ka GUSTE Allahna e kennengngan se etantowagi Salerana. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Reng-oreng lalake'an ban babine'an, na'-kana' ban oreng manca se abengko e tha-kotthana ba'na soro akompol, soro ngedhingngagi baca'an jareya, me' olle reng-oreng jareya ajar hormat ka GUSTE Allahna sarta ngestowagi kon-papakonna." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya, na'-ana'na ba'na se gi' ta' tao ngedhing parkara hokomma GUSTE Allahna jareya pas daddi ngedhing, sarta pas ajar hormat ka Pangeran saabidda odhi' e nagara se sakejja' aggi' reya bakal ekobasa'ana ba'na e bara'na Songay Yordan.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 PANGERAN pas adhabu ka Mosa, “Odhi'na ba'na e dunnya reya la ta' abit pole. Daddi kassa' olok Yusak, ajak ka Tang Kemah, bi' Sengko' eberri'ana du-petodu.” Daddi Mosa ban Yusak laju meyos ka Kemah Socce," 
Deuteronomy31:15 PANGERAN ngaton ka se kadhuwa jareya e dhalem pelar ondhem e seddi'na labangnga Kemah. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Mosa, “Ba'na la para' mateya, ban samatena ba'na, bangsa Isra'il ta' esto pole ka Sengko', ban ta' neptebbi parjanjiyan se epabadha Sengko' bi' reng-oreng jareya. Reng-oreng Isra'il bakal mongkorana Sengko' sarta pas nyemba'a ka la'-alla'an se esemba e nagara se sakejja' aggi' emaso'ana reng-oreng Isra'il jareya." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Mon sampe' kantha jareya, Sengko' bakal peggella parana ka reng-oreng jareya. Reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' edina'agiya ban epatompessa. Bi' Sengko' epadhatengngana balai se nako'e sabannya'na, saellana jareya reng-oreng Isra'il buru apangrasa ja' balai jareya dhateng polana aba'na eonduri bi' Sengko'." 
Deuteronomy31:18 E bakto jareya Sengko' la ta' endha' nolonge reng-oreng jareya pole, polana reng-oreng jareya nyemba ka la'-alla'an ban alako jahat."
