2Kings8:1 E settong bakto PANGERAN madhateng laep e nagara Isra'il pettong taon abidda. Sabellunna jareya Elisa la marenge oneng parkara jareya ka babine' dhari Sunem se ana'na epaodhi' pole rowa. Laen dhari jareya Elisa makon babine' jareya sabalana ngalle ka nagara laen. 
2Kings8:2 Babine' jareya ajalannagi apa se epakonnagi Elisa, sarta laju mangkat ka nagara Filistin ennengnga e jadhiya." 
2Kings8:3 Saellana bakto se pettong taon jareya la lebat, babine' buru laju abali ka Isra'il. E Isra'il laju nyabis ka rato abareng ban ana'na, nyo'on sopaja bengko ban teggalla epabali ka aba'na." 
2Kings8:4 E bakto jareya Gehazi barengnga Elisa, bi' rato epakon nyareta'agi kaajiban-kaajiban se la elampa'agi Elisa." 
2Kings8:5 Teppa'na Gehazi nyareta'agi baramma Elisa se maodhi' pole na'-kana' se la mate, babine' dhari Sunem jareya napa' ka karaton ngadhep ka rato, ngatorragiya parnyo'onanna. Atorra Gehazi, “Guste se molja, ka'dhinto babine' se ecareta'agi abdidalem buru ban ka'dhinto pottrana se epaodhi' pole sareng Elisa!”" 
2Kings8:6 Rato laju mareksane ka babine' jareya ban babine' jareya laju nyareta'agi parkara ana'na jareya. Saellana jareya rato adikane ponggabana makon sopaja dhi'-andhi'na babine' jareya epabali kabbi, tamaso' argana hasella gal-teggalla saabidda badha e nagara manca pettong taon." 
2Kings8:7 E settong bakto Elisa meyos ka Damsyik. Kabendherran Rato Benhadad teppa'na songkan abak sara. E bakto meyarsa ja' Elisa badha e Damsyik," 
2Kings8:8 rato laju adhabu ka Hazael, ponggabana, “Kassa' nabbi rowa ngeba'agi hadiya pas nyo'on tolong sopaja nabbi jareya nyo'on petodu ka PANGERAN apa sengko' reya barasa apa enja'.”" 
2Kings8:9 Hazael ngala' onta pa' polo meggi' ebuwa'i samacemma hasella kottha Damsyik, laju mangkat nyabis ka Elisa. Sanapa'na ka kalenggiyanna Elisa, Hazael mator, “Abdiepon panjennengngan, Rato Benhadad, ngotos abdina atanya ponapa salerana bakal saeya ponapa bunten.”" 
2Kings8:10 Dhabuna Elisa, “Dhabuna PANGERAN ka sengko' ratona ba'na bakal seda'a. Tape atorragi bai ja' salerana bakal saeya.”" 
2Kings8:11 Saellana jareya Elisa mandeng mancoreng ka Hazael sampe' Hazael ta' nyaman neng-enneng. O-tao Elisa laju molar. 
2Kings8:12 “Aponapa panjennengngan me' molar?” ca'na Hazael. “Sabab sengko' tao kajahadan apa se bakal elakowagiya ba'na ka ommat Isra'il,” dhabuna Elisa. “Ba'na ngobbara tha-kotthana se ebintenge, mate'e ngangodhadanna se paleng becce', ban nyekkel ji'-babaji' sarta morak tabu'na babine'an se ngandhung.”" 
2Kings8:13 “Abdina ka'dhinto oreng se tadha' artena,” saodda Hazael, “kadi ponapa se gadhuwana kobasa kantos sapaneka rajana?” “PANGERAN la noduwagi ka sengko' ja' ba'na daddiya rato Siria,” dhabuna Elisa." 
2Kings8:14 E bakto Hazael abali ka karaton, Benhadad mareksane, “Apa dhabuna Elisa?” “Ca'epon, junandalem badhi saeya,” atorra Hazael." 
2Kings8:15 Tape kalagguwanna Hazael ngala' sapo', ecabbur ka dhalem aeng sarta laju etekkeddagi ka raena rato sampe' rato jareya seda. Hazael laju daddi rato Siria agante Benhadad." 
2Kings8:16 Yehoram pottrana Yosafat jumenneng rato Yehuda e bakto Rato Yoram pottrana Ahab la olle lema taon se marenta Isra'il. 
2Kings8:17 E bakto jareya Yehoram la tello polo dhuwa' taon yuswana, ban marenta e Yerusalim ballung taon abidda." 
2Kings8:18 Yehoram jareya akabin pottrana Ahab, akantha sabalana Ahab, rato reya ngalakone dusa keya ka PANGERAN akantha sa-dusana to-rato Isra'il laenna." 
2Kings8:19 Tape PANGERAN ta' kasokan ngancor Yehuda polana la ajanji ka Daud abdina, ja' toronanna bakal pagguna daddi rato." 
2Kings8:20 E dhalem pamarenta'anna Yehoram, Edom aberonta' ka Yehuda ban maddek karaja'an dibi'." 
2Kings8:21 Lantaran kadaddiyan jareya, Yehoram kalowar ban sakabbinna kareta perrangnga mangkat ka Za'ir. E jadhiya salerana ekeppong pasukan Edom, tape e baja malem narabas kepponganna moso abareng ban para panglimana pasukanna, dineng rit-parjuridda padha buru mole ka bengkona bang-sebang." 
2Kings8:22 Molae dhari jareya Edom ta' daddi baba parentana Yehuda pole. E bakto jareya keya kottha Libna aberonta' keya. 
2Kings8:23 Careta laenna parkara Yehoram ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda. 
2Kings8:24 Yehoram seda ban esareyagi e tana pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud. Se agante jumenneng rato iya areya pottrana se anyama Ahaziya. 
2Kings8:25 Ahaziya pottrana Yehoram jumenneng rato Yehuda e bakto Rato Yoram pottrana Ahab la olle dhubellas taon se marenta Isra'il. 
2Kings8:26 E bakto jareya yuswana Ahaziya gi' buru dhu lekor taon, ban se marenta e Yerusalim sataon abidda. Ebuna asmana Atalya, pottrana Rato Ahab, bajana Omri rato Isra'il." 
2Kings8:27 Dhari rajina, Ahaziya daddi sabala'an ban balana Rato Ahab. Daddi Ahaziya laju alako dusa keya ka PANGERAN akantha se elakowagi sabalana Ahab." 
2Kings8:28 Rato Ahaziya noro' aperrang ban Hazael, Rato Siria, abareng ban Yoram rato Isra'il. Se aperrang jareya neng e Ramot, dhaera Gileyad. Yoram loka e dhalem paperrangan jareya," 
2Kings8:29 laju abali ka kottha Yizre'el erabada, Ahaziya meyos ka jadhiya nyapot Yoram." 
2Kings9:1 E bakto jareya Nabbi Elisa adikane sala settong e antarana bi-nabbi se gi' dha-ngodha, laju adhabu, “Mara ba'na asadhiya, bi' sengko' esorowa ka Ramot e Gileyad. Giba butol se aesse mennya' jaitun reya." 
2Kings9:2 Sanapa'na ka jadhiya sare oreng se anyama Yehu, pottrana Yosafat, bajana Nimsi. Pas ajak ka kamar kadibi'an," 
2Kings9:3 sanapa'na ka kamar jareya mennya' reya selennagi ka serana, sambi ngoca', ‘Dhabuna PANGERAN junandalem epajumenneng rato Isra'il sareng Salerana.’ Saellana jareya, ba'na duli ondur dhari jadhiya.”" 
2Kings9:4 Nabbi se gi' ngodha jareya mangkat ka Ramot," 
2Kings9:5 laju nemmone Yehu ban para panglima laenna teppa'na aparembagan e jadhiya. Nabbi jareya adhabu, “Guste, badha sen-pessen ka junandalem.” Saodda Yehu, “Ka sapa?” “Junandalem dibi',” saodda nabbi jareya." 
2Kings9:6 Saellana jareya se kadhuwa laju maso' ka dhalem bengko, ban nabbi se gi' ngodha jareya laju nyelen mennya' jaitun gella' ka serana Yehu sambi adhabu, “PANGERAN Allahna Isra'il adhabu kadi ka'dhinto, ‘Bi' Sengko' ba'na epadaddi ratona Tang ommat Isra'il." 
2Kings9:7 Ba'na bakal mateyana balana lorana ba'na, Ahab. Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Sengko' ngokom Izebel se la mate'e Tang bi-nabbi ban Tang di-abdi laenna." 
2Kings9:8 Ana' bine ban na' potona Ahab kodu mate kabbi. Saneyap lalake' balana Ahab, towa otaba ngodha bi' Sengko' epateyana kabbi." 
2Kings9:9 Ana' binena bi' Sengko' epakantha'a ana' binena Yerobeyam ban ana' binena Baesa, to-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings9:10 Izebel ta' ekoburragiya. Mayyidda bakal ekakana pate' e dhaera Yizre'el.’ ” Samarena adhabu kantha jareya, nabbi se gi' ngodha buru laju kalowar terros buru." 
2Kings9:11 Yehu abali ka ca-kancana, se laju padha atanya, “Badha kabar ponapa? Aponapa'a oreng gila ka'issa' ka sampeyan?” “Sampeyan ampon oneng sadaja,” saodda Yehu." 
2Kings9:12 “Bunten, kaula ta' oneng!” saodda reng-oreng jareya. “Tore, pona, parenge oneng!” “Oreng ka'issa' manapa' dhabuna PANGERAN ja' kaula sareng PANGERAN epadaddi rato Isra'il,” saodda Yehu." 
2Kings9:13 Ca-kancana Yehu duli mokka' jubana, pas eampar e dhak-ondhak bagiyan attas e ajunanna Yehu. Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya laju nope tarompet sarta aera', “Yehu rato!”" 
2Kings9:14 Daddi Yehu asakongkel ngamoso Rato Yoram se e bakto jareya badha e Yizre'el. Yoram meyos ka jadhiya polana arabada, mabarasa ka-lokana ollena se aperrang e Ramot ban Hazael rato Siria. Yehu adhabu ka ca-kancana se daddi para panglima, “Mon sampeyan saroju' kaula daddi rato, jaga ja' sampe' badha oreng settonga se kalowar dhari Ramot se abala'a ka reng-oreng e Yizre'el.”" 
2Kings9:15  
2Kings9:16 Saellana adhabu kantha jareya Yehu laju netene kareta perrangnga sarta terros meyos ka Yizre'el. E bakto jareya Yoram gi' ta' baras, ban Ahaziya rato Yehuda teppa'na badha e jadhiya nyapot Yoram." 
2Kings9:17 E bakto pangawalla manara kottha Yizre'el nangale'e Yehu rabu ban reng-orengnga, laju aera', “Badha reng-oreng sarombongan entara ka ka'dhinto!” Yoram nyaot, “Soro parjurit jaran kasorang entar nalektegi apa reng-oreng jareya kanca otaba moso.”" 
2Kings9:18 Parjurit jareya mangkat nompa' jaran laju entar ka Yehu pas ngoca', “Rato terro ngagaliya ponapa junandalem rabu ka ka'dhinto menangka kanca.” “Areya banne orosanna ba'na!” saodda Yehu. “Mara ba'na noro' sengko'.” Pangawalla manara gella' nangale'e parjurit se eotos buru napa' ka kennengnganna rombongan jarowa, tape tadha' abali, daddi laju ereppoddagi." 
2Kings9:19 Otosan laen epamangkat, manapa' partanya'an ka Yehu akantha otosan se dha'-adha'. Yehu nyaot akantha saodda ka otosan se dha'-adha' jarowa, “Areya banne orosanna ba'na! Mara ba'na noro' sengko'!”" 
2Kings9:20 Pangawalla manara gella' areppot pole ja' otosan jareya la napa' ka kennengnganna rombongan buru tape tadha' abali. Pangawal jareya ngoca' pole, “Kadiya pamimpin rombongan ka'issa' Yehu, sabab netene kareta perrangnga akadi oreng gila.”" 
2Kings9:21 “Sadhiya'agi tang kareta,” dhabuna Rato Yoram. Kareta jareya esadhiya'agi, dineng Yoram ban Rato Ahaziya laju mangkat ngamba'a Yehu, padha netene kareta perrangnga bang-sebang. Se kadhuwa jareya tapanggi ban Yehu e teggal bekkas andhi'na Nabot." 
2Kings9:22 “Ponapa sampeyan paneka rabu ka'dhinto menangka kanca?” dhabuna Yoram ka Yehu. Yehu nyaot, “Baramma se akanca'a ban ba'na, mon e dhinna' gi' bannya' dhukon, ban gi' badha oreng se nyemba brahala se emolae bi' ebuna ba'na, Izebel?”" 
2Kings9:23 “Paneka pangkiyanadan, Ahaziya!” ca'na pacerrengnga Yoram sambi mabiluk karetana, terros buru." 
2Kings9:24 Yehu naja' gandhibana salar-kellarra, laju manna Yoram teppa' ka balikadda, terbas sampe' ka kol-tongkolanna. Yoram robbu, seda e dhalem karetana." 
2Kings9:25 Dhabuna Yehu ka Bidkar, ajudanna, “Ba'na ba' gi' enga'a, e bakto ba'na ban sengko' nompa' jaran noro' Ahab, ramana Yoram? E bakto jareya PANGERAN adhabu ka Ahab, ‘Sengko' tao sapa se mate'e Nabot ban na'-ana'na ba'ari', ban sengko' ajanji ngokoma ba'na e kebbun reya keya.’ ” “Daddi, pelpallagi mayyidda Yoram reya ka kebbunna Nabot, sopaja okomanna Allah se la ejanjiyagi rowa kalakon.”" 
2Kings9:26  
2Kings9:27 Ahaziya ngoladi kadaddiyan jareya, daddi laju buru netene karetana nojju ka kottha Bet-Hagan. Bi' Yehu eserser; sambi nyerser Yehu aera' ka reng-orengnga, “Pate'e keya rato jareya!” Bi' reng-orengnga Yehu Ahaziya jareya epana e jalan ka Gur, e seddi'anna kottha Yibleyam. Tape Ahaziya gi' ngenneng buru sampe' ka Megido, laju seda e jadhiya." 
2Kings9:28 Bi' ba-ponggabana jinazana ekala' laju egiba epanompa' kareta ka Yerusalim. E jadhiya laju esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud. 
2Kings9:29 Ahaziya jumenneng rato Yehuda e bakto Rato Yoram pottrana Ahab la olle sabellas taon se marenta Isra'il. 
2Kings9:30 Yehu rabu e Yizre'el. E bakto Izebel meyarsa kabar jareya laju ngator rambudda sarta acella', pas nyongngo' ka baba dhari candhelana karaton." 
2Kings9:31 E bakto Yehu maso' lebat labang saketheng, Izebel aera', “He, Zimri! ba'na se mate'e gustena! Arapa'a ba'na me' dha' enna'?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu adhanga ka candhela jareya, pas adhabu, “Sapa se noro' sengko'?” Ngedhing jareya, badha ponggaba karaton kadhuwa otaba katello se nyongngo' ka baba." 
2Kings9:33 Dhabuna Yehu ka reng-oreng jareya, “Ontallagi ratona ba'na jareya ka baba!” Daddi bi' reng-oreng buru Izebel eontallagi ka baba, bi' Yehu laju elempet bi' karetana sampe' dharana nampes ka geddhung ban ka ran-jaranna kareta jareya." 
2Kings9:34 Yehu pas maso' ka dhalem karaton terros adha'ar. Saellana laju adhabu, “Babine' jareya oreng dalka'. Maske kantha jareya, mayyidda koburragi pateppa' sabab gi' anyama pottrena rato.”" 
2Kings9:35 Tape e bakto reng-oreng jareya ngala'a mayyidda se ekoburragiya, se etemmo pera' kare galunthonganna serana, lang-tolangnga lengngenna ban sokona." 
2Kings9:36 Saellana parkara jareya ereppoddagi ka Yehu, Yehu laju adhabu, “Areya la edhabuwagi sabellunna bi' PANGERAN, se adhabu kantha reya kalaban parantara'anna Eliya, abdina, ‘Mayyidda Izebel bakal ekakana pate' e dhaera Yizre'el," 
2Kings9:37 ban re-karena mayyidda jareya bakal ajalamperrana akantha calatthongnga keban sampe' tadha' oreng se taowa mayyidda sapa jareya.’ ” 
2Kings10:1 Rato Ahab kaagungan na' poto e kottha Samaria bannya'na pettong polo oreng. Daddi Yehu ngerem sorat ka Samaria, ka para ballina na' potona Ahab, ka sa-pangobasana kottha ban ka para pamimpinna masarakat. Monyena sorat jareya," 
2Kings10:2 “Ba'na se ngoros na' potona Ahab, ba'na andhi' kareta perrang, jaran, sanjata ban kottha se badha bintengnga. Daddi, saellana narema sorat reya," 
2Kings10:3 ba'na kodu duli mele settong se paleng becce' dhari na' potona Ahab, oreng jareya padaddi rato, ban ba'na kodu abilla rato jareya.”" 
2Kings10:4 Sa-pangobasana Samaria laju padha tako'. Oca'na, “Rato Yoram ban Rato Ahaziya sakale ta' bisa alaban ka Yehu, ponapa pole sampeyan sareng kaula!”" 
2Kings10:5 Daddi kapalana karaton ban walikota sarta para pamimpinna masarakat ban para ballina na' potona Ahab ngerem kabar kantha reya ka Yehu, “Abdidalem sadaja atellok ka junandalem sareng alampa'agiya ponapa saos se epakonnagi junandalem. Namong abdidalem sadaja ta' ngangkada pasera'a saos daddi rato. Ngereng ponapa kasokannepon junandalem.”" 
2Kings10:6 Yehu laju ngerem sorat pole ka reng-oreng jareya, monyena kantha reya, “Mon ba'na noro'a sengko', sarta endha' atoro' ka tang parenta, pate'e na' potona Ahab jareya, ban lagguna baja reya cethagga reng-oreng jareya giba ka sengko' e Yizre'el.” Na' potona Ahab se pettong polo oreng jareya apolong ban pamimpinna masarakat e kottha Samaria, epeyara ban eparaja bi' reng-oreng jareya." 
2Kings10:7 Saellana narema serradda Yehu, pamimpinna masarakat e kottha Samaria jareya mate'e na' potona Ahab se pettong polo oreng jareya; cethagga laju padha epamaso' ka budhak, pas ekeremmagi ka Yehu e Yizre'el." 
2Kings10:8 Saellana eatore oneng parkara jareya, Yehu laju makon sopaja thak-cethak jareya esoson epadaddi dhu tompo'an e labang sakethengnga kottha, sarta sopaja epanneng e jadhiya sampe' kalagguwanna." 
2Kings10:9 Kalagguwanna gu-laggu Yehu kalowar ka labang saketheng jareya, pas adhabu ka reng-oreng se akompol e jadhiya, “Sengko' se asakongkel ngamoso ban mate'e Rato Yoram; ba'na ta' sala pa-apa. Tape reng-oreng reya banne sengko' se mate'e." 
2Kings10:10 Areya buktena ja' sabarang se edhabuwagi PANGERAN parkara na' potona Ahab bakal kalakona. PANGERAN la alampa'agi pa-apa se edhabuwagi kalaban parantara'anna Eliya abdina.” 
2Kings10:11 Saellana jareya Yehu mate'e la-balana Ahab se laen se badha e Yizre'el, bariya keya sakabbinna ponggaba, ca-kanca kenthella, ban mam-imamma; tadha' karena settonga se gi' odhi'." 
2Kings10:12 Yehu pas meyos dhari Yizre'el ka Samaria. E tengnga lorong, e kennengngan se anyama Bet-Eked se artena “Kampongnga Oreng Ngowan”," 
2Kings10:13 apanggi ban la-balana Ahaziya rato Yehuda. Yehu mareksane, “Ba'na reya sapa?” “Abdidalem la-balana Ahaziya,” saodda reng-oreng jareya. “Badhi ka Yizre'el ka compo'na la-balana rato se gi' odhi' sareng na' potona Rato Izebel.”" 
2Kings10:14 “Pega' dhi-odhi' reng-oreng reya!” dhabuna Yehu. Daddi reng-oreng jareya epega', pas epate'e e seddi'na somor se la kerreng, bannya'na kabbi pa' polo dhuwa' oreng. Tadha' karena settonga se gi' odhi'." 
2Kings10:15 Yehu nerrossagi parjalananna. E tengnga jalan eamba' bi' Yonadab ana'na Rekhab. Yehu nyapa oreng jareya, dhabuna, “Atena ba'na ban sengko' gu ta' padha? Apa ba'na endha' nolonge sengko'?” “Dalem,” saodda Yonadab. “Mon bariya, mara asalaman,” dhabuna Yehu. Se kadhuwa jareya asalaman, Yehu nolonge Yonadab ongga ka karetana," 
2Kings10:16 sambi adhabu, “Mara noro', abassagi dibi' saapa bajengnga sengko' kaangguy PANGERAN.” Yehu pas mangkat netene kareta ka Samaria asareng ban Yonadab." 
2Kings10:17 Sanapa'na ka jadhiya Yehu mate'e sakabbinna la-balana Ahab, epatadha' karena settong balakka'. Kadaddiyan jareya cocok ban se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Yehu makompol reng-oreng Samaria laju adhabu, “Rato Ahab korang barenteng se ngabdi ka Ba'al; sengko' epabajengngana dhari Ahab." 
2Kings10:19 Daddi mara soro akompol dha' enna' kabbi bi-nabbina Ba'al ban reng-oreng se nyemba Ba'al sarta mam-imamma; ja' sampe' badha settonga se ta' dhateng. Sengko' ngatorragiya kurban se raja ka Ba'al. Sapa se ta' hadir bi' sengko' eokoma mate.” Tape jareya pera' akkalla Yehu se mateyana sakabbinna oreng se nyemba Ba'al. 
2Kings10:20 Yehu adhabu kantha reya, “Tantowagi settong are se malolo kaangguy nyemba Ba'al!” Daddi reng-oreng laju nantowagi are jareya;" 
2Kings10:21 bi' Yehu eomommagi ka saantero Isra'il. E are jareya reng-oreng se nyemba Ba'al dhateng kabbi, tadha' settong se nyeccer. Kabbi padha maso' ka kowella Ba'al mossa'e geddhong jareya dhari adha' sampe' ka budhi." 
2Kings10:22 Yehu makon reng-oreng se ngoros pangangguyya kabakteyan magi guy-pangangguy jareya ka reng-oreng se dhateng nyemba'a Ba'al. Saellana papakon jareya ejalannagi," 
2Kings10:23 Yehu maso' ka kowella Ba'al jareya asareng ban Yonadab ana'na Rekhab, pas adhabu ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya, “Mara pareksa patete apa reng-oreng se badha e dhinna' reya pera' reng-oreng se nyemba Ba'al malolo. Ja' sampe' badha oreng se nyemba PANGERAN e dhinna' reya.”" 
2Kings10:24 Yehu ban Yonadab laju ngatorragi kurban ka Ba'al. E lowarra geddhong jareya Yehu la nyaba' pangawal ban parwira ballung polo oreng bannya'na. Reng-oreng jareya eparenge dhabu kantha reya, “Ba'na kodu mate'e reng-oreng rowa kabbi. Mon sampe' badha se buru, se maburu bi' sengko' epateyana!”" 
2Kings10:25 Saellana ngatorragi kurban jareya Yehu duli kalowar, laju adhabu ka para pangawal ban ra-parwira jareya, “Mara maso', pate'e oreng jarowa kabbi. Ja' sampe' badha se buru!” Para pangawal ban parwira jareya maso' ngeba peddhang se eonos, laju mate'e reng-oreng jareya kabbi, mayyidda eeret kalowar kabbi. Saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya maso' ka dhalem kowel," 
2Kings10:26 arcana Ba'al epakalowar laju eobbar. 
2Kings10:27 Arca jareya epamosna ban geddhongnga ban kennengngan jareya laju ekagabay kennengnganna oreng akopadhang sampe' sateya. 
2Kings10:28 Kantha jareya carana Yehu mamosna panyemba'an ka Ba'al e Isra'il. 
2Kings10:29 Daddi PANGERAN adhabu ka Yehu, “Sabarang se eparenta'agi Sengko' ka ba'na sopaja ejalannagiya ka toronanna Ahab bi' ba'na la elakone kabbi. Daddi Sengko' ajanji ka ba'na ja' na' potona ba'na sampe' toronan se kapeng empa' bakal daddiya rato Isra'il.” Tape Yehu ta' gu-onggu atoro' ka hokomma PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il. Yehu nero tengkana Yerobeyam se daddi lantaranna oreng Isra'il dusa ka PANGERAN kalaban nyemba sape emmas se epaddek Yehu e Betel ban Dan." 
2Kings10:30  
2Kings10:31  
2Kings10:32 E bakto jareya PANGERAN molae makene' dhaera kakobasa'anna Isra'il. Hazael rato Siria arebbu' sakabbinna dhaera Isra'il 
2Kings10:33 e temorra Songay Yordan sampe' ka lao' gan kottha Aroër e seddi'na Songay Arnon, tamaso' dhaera Gileyad ban Basan, kennengnganna suku Gad, Ruben ban Manasye Temor." 
2Kings10:34 Careta laenna parkara Yehu, tamaso' kapahlawananna, ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings10:35 Yehu jumenneng rato marenta Isra'il ballu lekor taon abidda. Saellana seda laju esareyagi e Samaria, sarta pas egante pottrana, Yowahas." 
2Kings10:36  
2Kings11:1 E bakto Atalya ngagali ja' Ahaziya, pottrana, la seda, laju makon sopaja sabalana Ahaziya epate'e kabbi." 
2Kings11:2 Yowas, pottrana Ahaziya para' epateyana keya abareng ban tra-pottrana Ahaziya se laen, tape salamet, sabab etolong Yoseba, iya areya pottra bine'na Rato Yoram, taretanna Ahaziya. Yowas ban anjuna egiba pas eerrep e dhalem settong kamar katedhungan e Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings11:3 Nem taon abidda Yoseba meyara kana' jareya e dhalem Padalemman Socce saabidda Atalya jumenneng rato. 
2Kings11:4 E taon se kapeng petto', para parwira pangawal pribadhina rato ban para pangawalla karaton edikane Imam Yoyada ka Padalemman Socce. E jadhiya reng-oreng buru epakon asompa ajalannagiya rancanana. Imam jareya noduwagi Yowas, pottrana Rato Ahaziya ka reng-oreng jareya," 
2Kings11:5 laju apareng dhabu kantha reya, “Mon ba'na atugas e are Sabat, sapartellonna ba'na kodu ajaga e karaton," 
2Kings11:6 sapartellonna ajaga e Labang Saketheng Sur, ban karena ajaga e labang saketheng e budhiyanna wal-pangawal laenna." 
2Kings11:7 Regu se dhadhuwa' se la ta' atugas e are Sabat, sopaja ajaga e Padalemman Socce sambi neggu' peddhang se la eonos kaangguy ajaga Rato Yowas. Rato jareya meyosa dha'emma'a bai kodu jaga terros. Pa'-sapa'a se nyemma'e ba'na kodu pate'e.”" 
2Kings11:8  
2Kings11:9 Para parwira jareya' atoro'ka papakonna Yoyada buru, reng-oreng baba'anna se kodu atugas ban se la ta' atugas e are Sabat jareya epakompol laju egiba ka Yoyada." 
2Kings11:10 Para parwira jareya bi' Yoyada eparenge bak-tombak ban meng-tameng kaagunganna Rato Daud se esempen e Padalemman Socce. 
2Kings11:11 Saellana jareya para pangawal buru, sambi neggu' peddhang se la eonos manjeng e kennengnganna bang-sebang e sakalenglengnga Padalemman Socce alindhungana ratona." 
2Kings11:12 Saellana jareya bi' Yoyada Yowas ebakta ka lowar, e serana laju eparenge makotha, ketab Hokomma Allah epassra'agi ka kana' jareya. Yowas epajumenneng rato, ban parkara jareya laju eomommagi ka ra'yat. Reng-oreng padha akopa' ban asorak, “Hidup rato!”" 
2Kings11:13 Rato Atalya meyarsa soragga para pangawal ban ra'yat jareya, laju duli meyos ka Padalemman Socce, e jadhiya bannya' oreng abung-garibbung." 
2Kings11:14 Atalya ngoladi rato se anyar jareya ngadek e labangnga Padalemman Socce kennengnganna panobadanna rato menorot kabiyasa'anna, ekalenglenge ra-parwira ban reng-oreng tokang topena tarompet. Ra'yat padha asorak kaperagan kabbi, dineng tarompedda padha epamonye. Atalya nyebbit rasoganna, panggaliyanna ketter, sambi aera', “Kiyanat! Kiyanat!”" 
2Kings11:15 Bi' Yoyada Atalya ta' eparengngagi epate'e e sabingkerra Padalemman Socce, daddi salerana laju adhabu ka para parwirana, “Kassa' rato jareya giba kalowar lebat e barisanna pangawal; sapa'a bai se aehteyar nolonga rato jareya pate'e.”" 
2Kings11:16 Atalya epega' laju egiba ka karaton. E jadhiya rato jareya epate'e e adha'anna Labang Saketheng Jaran. 
2Kings11:17 Imam Yoyada makon Rato Yowas ban ra'yat agabay parjanjiyan ban PANGERAN se essena nyebbuttagi ja' rato jareya ban ra'yadda daddiya ommadda PANGERAN. Laen dhari jareya rato epakon abadhi parjanjiyan ban ra'yat keya. 
2Kings11:18 Saellana jareya ra'yat laju nyerbu magujur kowel Ba'al. Ba-mezba ban ca-arcana epaancor, dineng Matan, imamma Ba'al epate'e e adha'anna ba-mezbana. Yoyada makon wal-pangawal ajaga Padalemman Socce," 
2Kings11:19 saellana jareya asareng ban para parwira, para pangawal pribadhina rato ban para pangawalla karaton sarta sakabbinna ra'yat laju ngarak Rato Yowas dhari Padalemman Socce ka karaton. Yowas maso' lebat Labang Saketheng Pangawal, pas alenggi e korse karaja'an." 
2Kings11:20 Ra'yat padha perak kabbi, kottha taremtem, ban Atalya la epate'e." 
2Kings11:21 E bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda jareya yuswana Yowas buru pettong taon. 
2Kings12:1 E taon se kapeng petto' pamarenta'anna Yehu e Isra'il, Yowas jumenneng rato Yehuda. Salerana marenta e Yerusalim pa' polo taon abidda. Asmana ebuna Zibya dhari kottha Bersyeba." 
2Kings12:2 Berkat pangajaranna Imam Yoyada, saomorra Yowas alampa'agi sabarang se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
2Kings12:3 Pera' emanna, kennengnganna panyemba'anna ba-diba ta' epamosna, daddi ra'yat gi' ngatorragi kurban ban ngobbar mennyan e jadhiya." 
2Kings12:4 E settong are Yowas adikane para imam laju epakon nyempen pesse ollena tor-ator e Padalemman Socce, se aropa bajaranna se mabadha ban-kurban, otabana pesse tor-ator sokalella." 
2Kings12:5 Saneyap imam kodu atanggungjawab parkara pesse se eatorragi reng-oreng se eladine imam jareya bang-sebang. Pesse jareya eangguya mateppa' karosagan-karosaganna Padalemman Socce. 
2Kings12:6 Sampe' taon se kapeng tello lekor pamarenta'anna Yowas, para imam gi' ta' mateppa' karosagan e Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings12:7 Daddi Yowas laju nembali Imam Yoyada ban mam-imam laenna, pas adhabu, “Arapa ba'na me' gi' ta' mateppa' Padalemman Socce rowa? Molae sateya ba'na ta' olle nyempen pesse se etarema ba'na. Kabbi kodu epassra'agi kaangguy mateppa' Padalemman Socce.”" 
2Kings12:8 Mam-imam saroju' ta' makompola pesse dhari ra'yat, ban ta' ro'-noro'a nanggung orosan se mateppa'a Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings12:9 Daddi Yoyada laju mondhut settong kothak, kodhungnga elobange; kothak jareya esaba' e seddi'anna mezba e kanganna labang mon maso'a ka Padalemman Socce. Pesse se eatorragi reng-oreng e Padalemman Socce jareya emaso'agi ka kothak jareya bi' mam-imam se atugas e labang mon maso'a." 
2Kings12:10 Sabban pesse e kothak jareya la bannya', sekettarissa rato ban Imam Agung rabu ka jadhiya, ngetong pesse jareya ban pesse jareya laju ebundu'." 
2Kings12:11 Mon bannya'na la ecathet, pesse jareya laju epassra'agi ka reng-oreng se epassrae orosan mateppa' Padalemman Socce. Saellana jareya reng-oreng se epassrae lalakon jareya laju majari para tokang kaju, tokang bangonan," 
2Kings12:12 tokang bato ban tokang ngetthoga bato, sarta melle kaju ban bato, ban ngator sakabbinna pangalowaran se eangguy mateppa' padalemman jareya." 
2Kings12:13 Tape pesse jareya maske sakone'a ta' eangguy agabay ker-cangker salaka, bung-tobung, tarompet, but-parabudda damar otabana pakakas laenna se dhari emmas otaba salaka." 
2Kings12:14 Kabbi ekabajar kang-tokang ban ekabelli sabarang kaparlowanna geddhong jareya. 
2Kings12:15 Reng-oreng se daddi pangawassa lalakon jareya ce' jujurra, daddi ta' osa epentae laporan parkara pangalowaranna pessena." 
2Kings12:16 Pesse ollena kurban tebbusanna kasala'an ban dhari kurban pangamponanna dusa ta' epamaso' ka kothak jareya. Pesse jareya ebagi ka mam-imam. 
2Kings12:17 E jaman jareya Hazael rato Siria nyerrang ban ngobasane kottha Gat. Samarena laju aneyat aloroga Yerusalim keya. 
2Kings12:18 Daddi Yowas laju ngeremmagi pesse tebbusan ka salerana. Pesse jareya ollena dhari sakabbinna tor-ator se lamba' la eatorragi ka PANGERAN bi' Yowas dibi', bi' Yosafat, Yoram ban Ahaziya, iya areya to-rato se marenta sabellunna. Laen dhari jareya gi' etambai ban sakabbinna emmas se badha e ekkassa Padalemman Socce ban e karatonna rato. Daddi Hazael laju burung se aloroga Yerusalim." 
2Kings12:19 Saellana jareya ba-ponggaba karaja'an Yehuda asakongkel ngamoso Rato Yowas. E antarana reng-oreng jareya badha kadhuwa se anyama Yozakar ana'na Simeyat, ban Yozabad ana'na Somer, se mate'e Yowas e settong bengko se epaddek e attassa tana tembugan e bagiyan temorra Yerusalim, e lorong ka Sila. Yowas esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud. Sasedana laju egante pottrana se asmana Amaziya. Careta laenna parkara Rato Yowas ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings12:20  
2Kings12:21  
2Kings13:1 E taon se kapeng tello lekor pamarenta'anna Yowas pottrana Ahaziya e Yehuda, Yowahas pottrana Yehu jumenneng rato Isra'il, ban marenta e Samaria petto bellas taon abidda." 
2Kings13:2 Akantha Rato Yerobeyam se marenta sabellunna, Rato Yowahas abadhi dusa keya ka PANGERAN sarta andaddiyagi oreng Isra'il alako dusa keya. Rato jareya tadha' ambuna se alako jahat." 
2Kings13:3 Daddi PANGERAN duka ka Isra'il sampe' Isra'il epanneng li-baliyan epakala bi' Hazael rato Siria sarta Benhadad pottrana. 
2Kings13:4 Yowahas laju adu'a ka PANGERAN, ban PANGERAN meyarsa du'ana jareya, sabab PANGERAN ngoladi saapa kejjemma rato Siria se nganeyaja oreng Isra'il." 
2Kings13:5 Bi' PANGERAN oreng Isra'il eparenge pamimpin se mabebas Isra'il dhari kakobasa'anna Siria, daddi bangsa Isra'il laju odhi' taremtem pole akantha dha'-adha'na." 
2Kings13:6 Sanajjan kantha jareya oreng Isra'il tadha' ambuna se agabay dusa se emolae bi' Rato Yerobeyam. Reng-oreng jareya terros ngalakone sa-dusa jareya; sarta'anna arcana Dewi Asyera epanneng paggun badha e Samaria. 
2Kings13:7 Angkadan perrangnga Isra'il la epatompes bi' rato Siria, sampe' Rato Yowahas pera' kaagungan pasukan jaran saeket oreng, kareta perrang sapolo meggi' ban parjurit sapolo ebu oreng." 
2Kings13:8 Careta laenna parkara Rato Yowahas ban sakabbinna kapahlawananna ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il. 
2Kings13:9 Yowahas seda pas esareyagi e Samaria, laju egante bi' pottrana se asmana Yowas." 
2Kings13:10 E taon se kapeng tello polo petto' pamarenta'anna Rato Yowas e Yehuda, Yowas pottrana Yowahas jumenneng rato Isra'il, marenta e Samaria nem bellas taon abidda." 
2Kings13:11 Rato reya dusa keya ka PANGERAN sabab nero kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam se daddi lantaranna oreng Isra'il agabay dusa. 
2Kings13:12 Careta laenna parkara Yowas, tamaso' caretana kapahlawananna e dhalem paperrangan ban Amaziya rato Yehuda, ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings13:13 Yowas seda, esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Samaria, laju egante pottrana se asmana Yerobeyam II." 
2Kings13:14 E settong bakto Nabbi Elisa songkan sara, Rato Yowas meyos parlo nyapoda. E bakto ngoladi Elisa la para' seda'a, rato laju molar sambi adhabu, “Rama, rama kaula! Panjennengngan oreng raja se abillai Isra'il!”" 
2Kings13:15 “Ngereng mondhut gandhiba sareng panana!” dhabuna Elisa ka Yowas. Yowas mondhut gandhiba ban pana jareya," 
2Kings13:16 bi' Elisa laju epakon asadhiya epakon manna. Rato laju asadhiya, dineng Elisa laju nompangngagi astana e attassa astana rato." 
2Kings13:17 Saellana jareya menorot se edhabuwagi nabbi jareya, rato laju mokka' candhela se ngadhep ka Siria. “Ngereng ocol pana gapaneka!” dhabuna Elisa. Saellana pana jareya eocol bi' rato, nabbi jareya aera', “Junandalem panana PANGERAN. Kalaban pana gapaneka PANGERAN badhi makala'a Siria. Junandalem badhi aperranga sareng oreng Siria e Afek kantos junandalem makala bangsa gapaneka.”" 
2Kings13:18 Elisa makon Yowas mondhut na-panana se laen; na-pana jareya epakon pokollagi ka tana. Rato mokol tana jareya tello kale, laju ambu." 
2Kings13:19 Elisa duka, laju adhabu, “Masthena junandalem mokol lema kale otaba nem kale, daddi junandalem kengeng maancor bangsa Siria. Namong samangken junandalem namong makala'a bangsa gapaneka tello kale.”" 
2Kings13:20 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Elisa seda laju esareyagi. E bakto jareya garombolan-garombolan Mo'ab biyasana nyerrang nagara Isra'il sataon sakaleyan. 
2Kings13:21 E settong bakto, teppa'na badha reng-oreng ngoburragiya oreng mate, o-tao laju badha garombolan Mo'ab dhateng ka jadhiya. Reng-oreng jareya nangale'e, laju buru. Jinaza se ekoburragiya jareya eontallagi ka pasareyanna Elisa. E bakto jinaza jareya nyedding ka lang-tolangnga Elisa laju odhi' pole, terros manjeng." 
2Kings13:22 Saabidda pamarenta'anna Yowas, oreng Isra'il etendhes bi' Hazael rato Siria." 
2Kings13:23 Tape PANGERAN neser ka ommadda sarta eparenge sapora. Ommat jareya etolonge sopaja ta' sampe'a mosna, polana parjanjiyanna bi' Ibrahim, Ishak ban Yakub. Sampe' sateya ta' tao Pangeran reya adinggallagi ommadda." 
2Kings13:24 Saellana jareya Hazael rato Siria seda, laju egante pottrana Benhadad." 
2Kings13:25 Yowas rato Isra'il makala Benhadad sampe' tello kale, sarta arebbu' pole tha-kottha se erebbu' Benhadad e jaman pamarenta'anna Rato Yowahas ramana Yowas." 
2Kings14:1 E taon se kapeng dhuwa' pamarenta'anna Yowas pottrana Yowahas e Isra'il, Amaziya pottrana Yowas jumenneng rato Yehuda." 
2Kings14:2 E bakto jareya yuswana sagame' taon, ban marenta e Yerusalim sanga lekor taon abidda. Ebuna iya areya Yowadan dhari Yerusalim." 
2Kings14:3 Amaziya alampa'agi pa-apa se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN, tape Amaziya ta' padha ban Daud, bangatowana. Akantha ramana," 
2Kings14:4 Amaziya ta' magujur kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba se badha e man-dhimman, daddi ra'yadda terros bai ngeba kurban ban ngobbar dupa ka jadhiya." 
2Kings14:5 Saellana koko kakobasa'anna, ba-ponggabana se mate'e ramana bi' Amaziya eokom mate kabbi." 
2Kings14:6 Tape na'-ana'na ba-ponggabana ta' epate'e, sabab Amaziya atoro' ka papakonna PANGERAN e dhalem Ketab Mosa se amonye, “Ja' ngokom mate oreng towa lantaran kajahadan se elakone na'-ana'na, ban ja' ngokom mate na'-ana'na oreng lantaran kajahadan se elakone oreng towana. Saneyap oreng pera' olle eokom mate lantaran kajahadanna dibi'.”" 
2Kings14:7 E dhalem settong paperrangan, Amaziya mate'e parjurit Edom sapolo ebu oreng e Cora Accen, ban arebbu' kottha Sela. Kottha jareya bi' Amaziya enyamae Yokte'el. Sampe' sateya kottha jareya paggun anyama Yokte'el." 
2Kings14:8 Saellana jareya Amaziya ngerem otosan ka Yowas rato Isra'il, Rato Yowas etangtang eajak aperrang." 
2Kings14:9 Tape Rato Yowas ngerem jawaban kantha reya, “E settong bakto ombut se adhuri e Pagunongan Libanon ngerem kabar sapaneka ka bungkana comara, ‘E bungkana comara, mara ana' parabanna ba'na palake'e tang ana'.’ Tape saamponna ganeka laju badha burun alas lebat e ka'issa'; ombut se adhuri gapaneka enyek-enyek." 
2Kings14:10 Sampeyan, Amaziya, samangken angga' polana makala oreng Edom. Ponapa kamennangan ganeka gi' ta' cokop? Langkong sae sampeyan alenggi e compo'na saos! Aponapa'a me' re-nyare parkara se pera' macalaka'a sampeyan dibi' sareng ra'yadda?”" 
2Kings14:11 Tape Amaziya rato Yehuda ta' marduli dhabuna Yowas rato Isra'il jareya. Daddi Rato Yowas ban reng-oreng baba'anna laju mangkat ka Bet-Semes e Yehuda ban aperrang bi' Amaziya e jadhiya. 
2Kings14:12 Tantara Yehuda epakala ban parjuridda, pas padha buru kabbi mole ka bengkona bang-sebang." 
2Kings14:13 Yowas nangkep Amaziya, laju meyos ka Yerusalim terros magujur pagar alassa kottha jareya lebbi korang dhu ratos meter lanjangnga, molae dhari Labang Saketheng Efraim sampe' ka Labang Saketheng Paddu." 
2Kings14:14 Emmas ban salaka sarta pakakas se epanggi e Padalemman Socce, bariya keya essena karaton, ban pan-barampan oreng sandera ebakta kabbi ka Samaria bi' Yowas." 
2Kings14:15 Careta laenna parkara Rato Yowas, tamaso' kapahlawananna se aperrang ban Amaziya rato Yehuda ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings14:16 Yowas seda laju esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Samaria, laju egante pottrana, Yerobeyam II." 
2Kings14:17 Saellana Yowas rato Isra'il seda, Amaziya rato Yehuda, gi' odhi' lema bellas taon aggi'." 
2Kings14:18 Badha reng-oreng e Yerusalim se asakongkel mateyana Amaziya. Daddi Amaziya laju buru ka Lakhis, tape bi' so-mosona eserser laju epate'e. Jinazana eangko' ban jaran ka Yerusalim, pas esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud. Daddi bi' ra'yat Yerusalim Uziya, pottrana Amaziya laju epajumenneng ratona. E bakto jareya yuswana Uziya gi' buru nem bellas taon. Careta laenna parkara Rato Amaziya ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings14:19  
2Kings14:20  
2Kings14:21  
2Kings14:22 Sasedana ramana, kottha Elat bi' Uziya erebbu' pole sarta pas epaddek pole." 
2Kings14:23 E taon se kapeng lema bellas pamarenta'anna Amaziya pottrana Yowas e Yehuda, Yerobeyam II pottrana Yowas jumenneng rato Isra'il, ban marenta e Samaria pa' polo settong taon abidda." 
2Kings14:24 Rato jareya dusa ka PANGERAN polana nerowe kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam I se andaddiyagi oreng Isra'il alako dusa. 
2Kings14:25 Yerobeyam II reya se arebbu' pole sakabbinna dhaera kakobasa'anna Isra'il, dhari jalan ka Hamat e dhaja sampe' ka Tase' Mate e lao'. Jareya cocok ban janjina PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il, se epanapa' kalaban parantara'anna abdina, iya areya Nabbi Yunus pottrana Amitai oreng Gat-Hefer." 
2Kings14:26 PANGERAN ngoladi saapa sangsarana oreng Isra'il, ban tadha' oreng settonga se nolonge." 
2Kings14:27 PANGERAN ta' amaksod maancora Isra'il salanjangnga, daddi laju etolong kalaban parantara'anna Rato Yerobeyam II." 
2Kings14:28 Careta laenna parkara Rato Yerobeyam II, parkara kapahlawananna e dhalem paperrangan-paperrangan ban baramma se arebbu' pole Damsyik ban Hamat dhari Yehuda epabali ka Isra'il pole, la ecathet kabbi e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings14:29 Yerobeyam II seda pas esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato, laju egante Zakhariya, pottrana." 
2Kings15:1 E taon se kapeng petto lekor pamarenta'anna Rato Yerobeyam II e Isra'il, Uziya pottrana Amaziya jumenneng rato Yehuda." 
2Kings15:2 E bakto jareya yuswana gi' nem bellas taon ban marenta e Yerusalim saeket dhuwa' taon abidda. Ebuna Yekholya asmana, babine' dhari Yerusalim." 
2Kings15:3 Akantha ramana, Uziya alampa'agi se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
2Kings15:4 Tape emanna, kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba se badha e man-dhimman ta' epatadha', daddi ra'yat paggun ngeba kurban ban ngobbar dupa ka jadhiya." 
2Kings15:5 Bi' PANGERAN Uziya jareya epanyandhang panyaket kole' budhuk, ban panyaket jareya ta' endha' baras sampe' sedana. Gi' songkanna epajau dhari oreng esaba' e settong bengko ban epabebas dhari gas-tugassa. Pottrana se anyama Yotam makkele marenta ra'yadda" 
2Kings15:6 Careta laenna parkara Rato Uziya ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda. 
2Kings15:7 Uziya seda pas esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud, laju egante Yotam, pottrana." 
2Kings15:8 E taon se kapeng tello polo ballu' pamarenta'anna Rato Uziya e Yehuda, Zakhariya pottrana Yerobeyam II jumenneng rato Isra'il ban marenta e Samaria nem bulan abidda." 
2Kings15:9 Akantha to-rato se marenta sabellunna, Zakhariya dusa keya ka PANGERAN, nero kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam I se daddi lantaranna Isra'il alako dusa." 
2Kings15:10 Salum pottrana Yabes asakongkel ngamoso Rato Zakhariya, Salum mate'e Rato Zakhariya e Yibleyam, laju agante daddi rato." 
2Kings15:11 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya la kalakon apa se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Rato Yehu ja' na' potona sampe' toronan se kapeng empa' bakal daddiya rato Isra'il. Careta laenna parkara Rato Zakhariya ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il. 
2Kings15:12  
2Kings15:13 E taon se kapeng tello polo sanga' pamarenta'anna Rato Uziya e Yehuda, Salum pottrana Yabes jumenneng rato Isra'il, marenta e Samaria pera' sabulan abidda," 
2Kings15:14 sabab Menahem pottrana Gadi meyos dhari Tirza ka Samaria, laju mate'e Salum, pas agante jumenneng rato." 
2Kings15:15 E dhalem parjalananna dhari Tirza, Menahem ngancor kottha Tifsah ban ra-dhaera e sabingkerra sampe' tadha' karena, ban pandhudhu'na epate'e kabbi. Sarrena kottha jareya ta' endha' atellok ka salerana, babine'an se ngandhung e kottha jareya laju padha eporak tabu'na. Careta laenna parkara Rato Salum, tamaso' kasakongkellanna, ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il." 
2Kings15:16  
2Kings15:17 E taon se kapeng tello polo sanga' pamarenta'anna Rato Uziya e Yehuda, Menahem pottrana Gadi jumenneng rato Isra'il, ban marenta e Samaria sapolo taon abidda." 
2Kings15:18 Saomorra rato jareya alako dusa ka PANGERAN sabab nero kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam I, se daddi lantaranna oreng Isra'il alako dusa." 
2Kings15:19 E bakto Pul rato Asyur alorok Isra'il, Menahem ngatorragi salaka tello polo empa' ebu kilo ka rato Pul sopaja rato jareya abantowa makoko kakobasa'anna salerana e Isra'il." 
2Kings15:20 Carana Menahem olle pesse jareya kalaban maksa reng-oreng sogi ngatorragi pesse salaka saeket rang-sorangnga. Daddi Pul laju abali dhari nagara jareya gubar ka nagarana dibi'. 
2Kings15:21 Careta laenna parkara Rato Menahem ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il. 
2Kings15:22 Menahem seda pas esareyagi, sarta laju egante pottrana iya areya Pekahya." 
2Kings15:23 E taon se kapeng saeket pamarenta'anna Rato Uziya e Yehuda, Pekahya pottrana Menahem jumenneng rato Isra'il ban marenta e Samaria dhu taon abidda." 
2Kings15:24 Rato jareya alako dusa ka PANGERAN sabab nerowe kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam I, se daddi lantaranna oreng Isra'il alako dusa." 
2Kings15:25 Sala settong dhari para parwirana reya, iya areya Pekah pottrana Remaliya, asakongkel ban oreng dhari Gileyad se bannya'na saeket oreng. E dhalem settong binteng e karaton e Samaria reng-oreng jareya mate'e Pekahya ban oreng laenna kadhuwa se anyama Argob ban Arye. Saellana jareya Pekah laju jumenneng rato agante Pekahya." 
2Kings15:26 Careta laenna parkara Rato Pekahya ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il. 
2Kings15:27 E taon se kapeng saeket dhuwa' pamarenta'anna Rato Uziya e Yehuda, Pekah pottrana Remaliya jumenneng rato Isra'il, ban marenta e Samaria dhu polo taon abidda." 
2Kings15:28 Rato jareya dusa ka PANGERAN lantaran nero kajahadanna Rato Yerobeyam I se daddi lantaranna Isra'il alako dusa. 
2Kings15:29 E jaman pamarenta'anna Pekah, Tiglat-Pileser rato Asyur arebbu' kottha Iyon, Abel-Bet-Ma'akha, Yanowah, Kedes, Hazor, dhaera Gileyad, Galilea ban Naftali. Pandhudhu'na eangko' ka Asyur epadaddi tawanan." 
2Kings15:30 E taon se kapeng dhu polo pamarenta'anna Rato Yotam pottrana Uziya e Yehuda, Hoseya pottrana Ela asakongkel ngamoso Rato Pekah, Rato Pekah jareya epate'e ban Hoseya laju agante jumenneng rato." 
2Kings15:31 Careta laenna parkara Rato Pekah ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Isra'il. 
2Kings15:32 E taon se kapeng dhuwa' pamarenta'anna Rato Pekah pottrana Remaliya e Isra'il, Yotam pottrana Uziya jumenneng rato Yehuda." 
2Kings15:33 E bakto jareya yuswana sagame' taon ban marenta e Yerusalim nem bellas taon abidda. Ebuna iya areya Yerusa pottrana Zadok. 
2Kings15:34 Yotam alampa'agi se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN, padha ban Uziya, ramana." 
2Kings15:35 Tape emanna, ngan-kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba se badha e man-dhimman ta' epatadha', daddi ra'yadda gi' terros ngeba kurban ban ngobbar dupa ka jadhiya. Yotam jareya se maddek Labang Saketheng Dhaja e Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings15:36 E jaman pamarenta'anna Yotam, PANGERAN molae ngerem Rezin rato Siria ban Pekah rato Isra'il epalorok Yehuda. Careta laenna parkara Rato Yotam ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings15:37  
2Kings15:38 Yotam seda laju esareyagi e koburanna to-rato e Kottha Daud, sarta laju egante Ahas pottrana." 
2Kings16:1 E taon se kapeng petto bellas pamarenta'anna Rato Pekah pottrana Remaliya e Isra'il, Ahas pottrana Yotam jumenneng rato Yehuda." 
2Kings16:2 E bakto jareya yuswana dhu polo taon ban marenta e Yerusalim nem bellas taon abidda. Rato Ahas ta' nero conto se bagus se elampa'agi Daud, bangatowana, se elampa'agi barang se ta' masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN, Guste Allahna." 
2Kings16:3 Odhi'na padha ban to-rato Isra'il. La'-mala' pottra lake'na dibi' ekurbannagi ka diba egabay kurban obbaran, akantha kabiyasa'an se juba' se ejalannagi reng-oreng se la eojuk PANGERAN dhari nagara Kana'an e bakto oreng Isra'il maso' ka nagara jareya." 
2Kings16:4 Ahas ngatorragi kurban ban ngobbar dupa e kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba e nong-gunong ban e baba'anna ka'-bungka'an se rampa'. 
2Kings16:5 E bakto jareya rato Edom ngobasane pole kottha Elat ban ngojuk reng-oreng Yehuda se neng e jadhiya. Saellana jareya oreng Edom dhateng terros neptep e kottha jareya sampe' sateya. E jaman jareya keya Rezin rato Siria ban Pekah rato Isra'il alorok ban ngeppong Yerusalim, tape ta' ngenneng makala Ahas." 
2Kings16:6  
2Kings16:7 Ahas ngerem otosan ka Tiglat-Pileser rato Asyur se ngeba pessen kantha reya, “Abdidalem abdina junandalem se esto. Daddi abdidalem nyo'ona tolong, ngereng pasalameddagi abdidalem dhari rato Siria sareng rato Isra'il se parappa'na alorok abdidalem.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahas mondhut emmas ban salaka dhari Padalemman Socce, sarta rang-barang e karaton, pas epakerem ka rato Asyur menangka tor-ator." 
2Kings16:9 Rato Tiglat-Pileser ngabbuli parnyo'onanna Ahas, laju alorok sarta arebbu' Damsyik. Pandhudhu'na eangko' egabay tawanan, eangko' ka Kir, dineng ratona, iya areya Rato Rezin, epate'e." 
2Kings16:10 E bakto meyos ka Damsyik manggiyana Rato Tiglat-Pileser, Rato Ahas ngoladi mezba e kottha jareya. Conto bangonna mezba jareya ebirji' epagenna' ban okoranna epakerem ka Imam Uriya e Yerusalim." 
2Kings16:11 Imam Uriya laju abadhi mezba, bangonna ban okoranna epapadha ban contona jareya, sarta epamare sabellunna Ahas abali." 
2Kings16:12 E bakto abali dhari Damsyik, Ahas ngoladi ja' mezba jareya la mare." 
2Kings16:13 Ahas laju ngatorragi kurban keban ban kurban gandum, sarta nyelen kurban anggur ban dharana kurban salameddan e attassa mezba jareya." 
2Kings16:14 Ahas ngoladi ja' mezba paronggu se epaddek malolo kaator ka PANGERAN esaba' e antarana Padalemman Socce ban mezba se anyar. Daddi mezba paronggu jareya laju ealle dhari adha'na Padalemman Socce ka dhajana mezba se anyar jareya. 
2Kings16:15 Saellana jareya laju adhabu ka Uriya, “Angguy tang mezba se raja reya kaangguy ngobbar kurban gu-laggu ban kurban lem-malem se eatorragi rato ban ra'yat, bariya keya kurban anggur dhari ra'yat selen e jadhiya. Dharana keban se eatorragi ka Pangeran selen e jadhiya keya. Mezba paronggu se laju dina eangguya sengko' mon nyo'ona petodu ka roh-erroh.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uriya alampa'agi dhabuna rato jareya. 
2Kings16:17 Saellana jareya Ahas abungkar ta-kareta paronggu se eangguy e Padalemman Socce, nay-pennay e ta-kareta jareya ebukka' kabbi. Cemmong paronggu se raja se badha e balikadda sape paronggu se dhubellas meggi' rowa ebukka' keya pas esaba' e attassa langgan dhari bato." 
2Kings16:18 Kaangguy ngala' ate ka rato Asyur, Ahas abungkar pasebanna rato e Padalemman Socce, sarta mate'e labang se eangguy pera' mon rato maso'a ka Padalemman Socce malolo." 
2Kings16:19 Careta laenna parkara Ahas ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda. 
2Kings16:20 Ahas seda, esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato e Kottha Daud, laju egante pottrana Hizkiya." 
2Kings17:1 E taon se kapeng dhubellas pamarenta'anna Rato Ahas e Yehuda, Hoseya pottrana Ela jumenneng rato Isra'il, ban marenta e Samaria sangang taon abidda." 
2Kings17:2 Hoseya dusa ka PANGERAN, tape bannya'na dusana ta' sampe' akantha bannya'na dusana to-rato Isra'il se marenta sabellunna." 
2Kings17:3 Hoseya eperrange sarta epatellok bi' Salmaneser rato Asyur, daddi sabban taon ewajibbagi majar pesse opet ka rato Asyur jareya." 
2Kings17:4 Tape e settong bakto, Hoseya ngerem otosan ka So rato Messer nyo'on bantowanna, sarta laju ta' majar pesse opet taonanna ka Asyur. E bakto Salmaneser ngaonenge bab jareya, Hoseya laju etangkep sarta epenjara." 
2Kings17:5 Saellana jareya Salmaneser rato Asyur alorok Isra'il sarta ngeppong Samaria. E taon se kapeng tello' e dhalem pangeppongan jareya," 
2Kings17:6 iya areya e taon se kapeng sanga' pamarenta'anna Hoseya Samaria erebbu' bi' Salmaneser. Oreng Isra'il laju eangko' egabay tawanan ka Asyur. Sabagiyan dhari oreng Isra'il se etawan jareya esaba' e kottha Halah, sabagiyan e seddi'na Songay Habor e dhaera Gozan, ban sabagiyan pole e tha-kottha e nagara Madai." 
2Kings17:7 Samaria gaggar lantaran oreng Isra'il dusa ka PANGERAN, Guste Allahna, panyalamet bangsa jareya dhari rato Messer, sarta ngeba bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari nagara jareya. Oreng Isra'il nyemba la'-alla'an" 
2Kings17:8 ban nerowe kabiyasa'anna sa-bangsa se la eojuk PANGERAN e bakto bangsa Isra'il maju merrange sa-bangsa jareya. Bangsa Isra'il norodi adad se eteptebbagi bi' to-rato Isra'il," 
2Kings17:9 sarta ngalakone sabarang se elarang PANGERAN, Guste Allahna. Neng e tha-kottha se kene' otabana se raja bangsa Isra'il maddek kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba." 
2Kings17:10 E attassa saneyap gumo', ban e babana saneyap kajuwan se rampa', epaddeggi gu-tugu ban ca-arcana Dewi Asyera." 
2Kings17:11 Bangsa Isra'il ngobbar dupa kaangguy diba, se eobbar e sakabbinna mezbana, akantha kabiyasa'anna sa-bangsa se la eojuk PANGERAN dhari nagara Kana'an. Oreng Isra'il nyemba brahala, maske bi' PANGERAN la elarang. Sakabbinna lalakon se jahat se elakone bangsa jareya maduka panggaliyanna PANGERAN." 
2Kings17:12  
2Kings17:13 PANGERAN ngotos reng-oreng otosanna ban bi-nabbina ka ommat Isra'il ban Yehuda epakon manapa' parengeddan reya: “Mara ambuwi lalakonna se jahat ban toro' sabadhana parenta ban hokom se bi' Sengko' ebagi ka bangatowana ba'na ban ka ba'na dibi' kalaban parantara'anna para nabbi, Tang di-abdi rowa.”" 
2Kings17:14 Tape Isra'il ban Yehuda ta' endha' ngedhingngagi. Sa-bangsa jareya cengkal akantha bangatowana se ta' parcaja ka PANGERAN, Guste Allahna." 
2Kings17:15 Isra'il ban Yehuda ta' endha' atoro' ka kon-papakonna PANGERAN ban ta' esto ka parjanjiyan se ebadhi PANGERAN bi' para bangatowana. Bangsa Isra'il ban Yehuda ta' parduli maske li-baliyan eparengeddi, ban nyemba la-brahala se tadha' gunana, sampe' sa-bangsa jareya dibi' daddi ta' aguna keya. Bangsa Isra'il ban Yehuda jareya nero contona sa-bangsa e kangan kacerra, maske bi' PANGERAN la elarang." 
2Kings17:16 Ta' atoro' ka kom-hokomma PANGERAN, Guste Allahna, sarta agabay sape dhari logam dhadhuwa' se esemba'a. Bangsa se dhuwa'an jareya agabay arcana Dewi Asyera, nyemba tang-bintang ban abakte ka Diba Ba'al." 
2Kings17:17 Na'-ana'na egabay kurban obbaran ka diba. Reng-oreng jareya ngangguy elmo gaib ban menta petodu ka kon-dhukon se tao ahubungan ban roh-erroh, ce' bajengnga ngalakone pa-apa se ta' masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN" 
2Kings17:18 sampe' PANGERAN ce' dukana. Bangsa Isra'il ban Yehuda jareya bi' PANGERAN ta' eparduli pole, ebuwang dhari nagara se eparengngagi ka reng-oreng jareya; se gi' badha pera' kare karaja'an Yehuda." 
2Kings17:19 Reng-oreng Yehuda ta' ta'at keya ka kom-hokomma PANGERAN, Guste Allahna. Reng-oreng jareya atoro' ka kabiyasa'an-kabiyasa'anna oreng Isra'il." 
2Kings17:20 Daddi PANGERAN ta' kasokan pole ngakone ommat Isra'il, bangsa jareya eokom epassra'agi ka so-mosona se kejjem. Bangsa jareya ta' eparduli, la'-mala' ebuwang dhari tana se la eparengngagi ka bangsa jareya." 
2Kings17:21 Saellana bi' PANGERAN Isra'il epesa dhari Yehuda, oreng Isra'il mele Yerobeyam pottrana Nebat epadaddi ratona. Yerobeyam pas daddi lantaranna ra'yadda mongkore PANGERAN sarta ngalakone sa-dusa se raja." 
2Kings17:22 Reng-oreng jareya nerowe Yerobeyam sarta terros ngalakone sakabbinna dusa se elakone ratona," 
2Kings17:23 sampe' dhi-budhina bangsa jareya bi' PANGERAN ta' eparduli pole, la'-mala' ebuwang dhari tana se la eparengngagi ka bangsa jareya. Kadaddiyan jareya cocok ban parengeddanna Pangeran ka bangsa jareya se epanapa' kalaban parantara'anna di-abdina, para nabbi. Daddi oreng Isra'il egiba ka pambuwangan e Asyur, ban reng-oreng jareya terros neng e jadhiya sampe' sateya." 
2Kings17:24 Menangka gantena reng-oreng Isra'il se eangko' ka pambuwangan rowa, rato Asyur ngangko' oreng dhari Babil, Kuta, Awa, Hamat ban Sefarwaim esaba' e tha-kottha Samaria. Reng-oreng jareya ngobasane tha-kottha jareya sarta neptep e jadhiya." 
2Kings17:25 E bakto buru neng e jadhiya reng-oreng jareya ta' hormat ka PANGERAN; daddi PANGERAN laju madhateng can-macan epanyeppa' sabagiyan dhari reng-oreng jareya. 
2Kings17:26 Rato Asyur narema reppodan ja' reng-oreng se esaba' e tha-kottha e Samaria jareya ta' tao ka kom-hokomma dibana nagara jareya, daddi diba jareya madhateng can-macan epanyeppa' reng-oreng jareya." 
2Kings17:27 Daddi rato Asyur laju adika'agi sopaja nyare imam kasorang dhari antarana para tawanan se ebuwang ka Asyur; imam jareya epakon pabali ka Samaria. “Soro abali imam jareya ka bengkona ban soro neng e jadhiya, soro ngajarragi kom-hokomma dibana nagara jarowa ka reng-oreng dhissa',” dhabuna rato." 
2Kings17:28 Daddi badha settong imam Isra'il, se la eangko' dhari Samaria ka Asyur, imam jareya epamole sarta laju neng e Betel. E jadhiya imam jareya ngajarragi ka ra'yat baramma sabendherra carana nyemba PANGERAN." 
2Kings17:29 Tape reng-oreng se neng e Samaria jareya paggun agabay la-brahalana dibi' se esaba' e wel-kowel gabayanna reng-oreng Isra'il se lamba'na neng e jadhiya. Saneyap golongan agabay brahalana bang-sebang e kottha se ekennengnge: 
2Kings17:30 Oreng Babil agabay arcana Diba Sukot-Benot; oreng Kuta agabay arcana Nergal; oreng Hamat arcana Asima; 
2Kings17:31 oreng Awa arcana Nibhas ban Tartak; ban oreng Sefarwaim ngobbara na'-ana'na menangka kurban obbaran ka Diba Adramelekh ban Anamelekh. 
2Kings17:32 Salaenna nyemba ba-diba jareya, reng-oreng jareya gi' nyemba ka PANGERAN. Reng-oreng jareya mele reng-oreng se acem-macem e antarana aba'na dibi' epadaddiya imam ban epangatorragiya kurban e wel-kowella brahala." 
2Kings17:33 Daddi, reng-oreng jareya nyemba ka PANGERAN, tape gi' nyemba ka ba-dibana dibi', menorot adadda nagara asalla." 
2Kings17:34 Sampe' are teya reng-oreng jareya gi' paggun ajalannagi adadda se kantha jareya. Reng-oreng jareya ta' nyemba ka PANGERAN ban ta' atoro' ka kom-hokomma ban kon-papakonna se eparengngagi ka toronanna Yakub, se enyamae keya Isra'il." 
2Kings17:35 PANGERAN la abadhi parjanjiyan kantha reya ban ommat Isra'il, “Ba'na ja' abakte ka la'-alla'an; ja' asojud nyemba la'-alla'an jareya otaba aladine la'-alla'an jareya, otabana ngeba kurban ka la'-alla'an jareya." 
2Kings17:36 Ba'na kodu hormat ka Sengko', PANGERAN, se ngeba ba'na kalowar dhari Messer kalaban kobasa se raja; ba'na kodu nyemba ka Sengko' ban ngeba kurban ka Sengko'." 
2Kings17:37 Toro' Tang kom-hokom ban Tang parenta se bi' Sengko' la etoles kaangguy ba'na. Ba'na ja' abakte ka la'-alla'an laen," 
2Kings17:38 ban ja' paloppa ka parjanjiyan e antarana Sengko' ban ba'na. 
2Kings17:39 Pata'at ka Sengko', Guste Allahna ba'na, ban ba'na bi' Sengko' epasalamedda dhari so-mosona.”" 
2Kings17:40 Tape pandhudhu' Samaria ta' endha' ngedhingngagi, gi' paggun neggu'i dad-adadda." 
2Kings17:41 Daddi, reng-oreng jareya nyemba ka PANGERAN, tape gi' nyemba ka la-brahalana. Sampe' sateya toronanna gi' paggun ngalakone se kantha jareya." 
2Kings18:1 E taon se kapeng tello' pamarenta'anna Rato Hoseya pottrana Ela e Isra'il, Hizkiya pottrana Ahas jumenneng rato Yehuda." 
2Kings18:2 E bakto jareya yuswana sagame' taon, ban marenta e Yerusalim sanga lekor taon abidda. Asmana ebuna Abiya pottrana Zakhariya." 
2Kings18:3 Hizkiya ngalakone pa-apa se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN akantha Rato Daud bangatowana. 
2Kings18:4 Kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba se badha e man-dhimman erosak epaancor, gu-tuguna epagujur ban ca-arcana Dewi Asyera erosak. Bariya keya olar paronggu gabayanna Mosa se esebbut Nehustan apaancor. Sabab sampe' bakto jareya oreng Isra'il gi' ngobbar dupa menangka panghormadan ka olar paronggu jareya." 
2Kings18:5 E antarana sakabbinna rato Yehuda, se sabellunna ban bariya keya se samarena Hizkiya, tadha' se padha ban Hizkiya jareya. Salerana parcaja ka PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il," 
2Kings18:6 ban esto ka Salerana. Hizkiya ta' tao alaban ka dhabuna PANGERAN. Sakabbinna papakon se eparengngagi kalaban parantara'anna Mosa, bi' Hizkiya etoro' kalaban gu-onggu." 
2Kings18:7 Lantaran jareya bi' PANGERAN etolonge terros sampe' ahasel e dhalem sakabbinna usahana. Hizkiya aberonta' ka rato Asyur, ta' kasokan atellok." 
2Kings18:8 Oreng Filistin epakala, kennengnganna erampok, dhari disa se paleng kene' sampe' ka kottha se paleng raja, tamaso' Gaza ban dhaera e sabingkerra." 
2Kings18:9 E taon se kapeng empa' pamarenta'anna Hizkiya, iya areya taon se kapeng petto' pamarenta'anna Rato Hoseya e Isra'il, Salmaneser rato Asyur nyerrang Isra'il ban ngeppong Samaria." 
2Kings18:10 Saellana ekeppong tello taon abidda, Samaria gaggar. Jareya kadaddiyan e taon se kapeng ennem pamarenta'anna Hizkiya, ban e taon se kapeng sanga' pamarenta'anna Hoseya." 
2Kings18:11 Saellana jareya rato Asyur ngangko' reng-oreng Isra'il ka Asyur epadaddi tawanan; sabagiyan dhari reng-oreng Isra'il jareya esaba' e kottha Halah, sabagiyan laenna e seddi'na Songay Habor e dhaera Gozan, ban sabagiyan pole e tha-kottha e nagara Madai." 
2Kings18:12 Samaria kala polana oreng Isra'il ta' ta'at ka PANGERAN, Guste Allahna, ta' neptebbi janji se ebadhi PANGERAN ban bangsa jareya, ta' atoro' ka sakabbinna papakonna Mosa, abdina. Bangsa Isra'il jareya ta' endha' ngedhingngagi ban ta' endha' atoro'." 
2Kings18:13 E taon se kapeng pa' bellas pamarenta'anna Hizkiya rato Yehuda, tha-kottha Yehuda se ngangguy binteng eserrang ban epakala bi' Sanherib, rato Asyur." 
2Kings18:14 Daddi Hizkiya akerem kabar ka Sanherib se badha e Lakhis, kantha reya monyena, “Kaula sala. Daddi kaula nyo'ona kasokana panjennengngan maambu serranganna ka bangsa kaula. Ponapa se daddi kasokanna panjennengngan sareng kaula etorodana.” Sanherib apareng jawaban ja' Hizkiya kodu ngeremmagi salaka sapolo ebu kilo ban emmas saebu kilo." 
2Kings18:15 Daddi, salaka se badha e Padalemman Socce ban se badha e karatonna rato bi' Hizkiya ekerem ka Sanherib kabbi." 
2Kings18:16 Emmas se epasang ka bang-labangnga Padalemman Socce ban se epasang e ger-ogerra labangnga, epondhut pas epakerem ka Sanherib." 
2Kings18:17 Tape rato Asyur jareya ngerem pasukan se raja dhari Lakhis epanyerrang Yerusalim. Pasukan jareya epimpin parwira tenggi katello, iya areya panglima kasorang, juru nom-enoman kasorang ban kapalana pangawalla rato kasorang. Sanapa'na ka kottha jareya reng-oreng buru ngala' kennengngan e teggal, se anyama Teggalla Panatu e seddi'na sellogan se magili aeng dhari taman bagiyan attas." 
2Kings18:18 Reng-oreng jareya laju aera' ngolok Rato Hizkiya. Ponggabana Hizkiya kalowar katellowan nyander ka reng-oreng Asyur jareya. Ponggaba se katello jareya Elyakim ana'na Hilkiya kapalana roma tangga karaton, Sebna sekettarissa nagara, ban Yowah ana'na Asaf sekettarissa karaton." 
2Kings18:19 Sala settong dhari parwira Asyur atanya kantha reya ka oreng se katello buru, “Atorragi ka Hizkiya dhabuna rato Asyur sapaneka, ‘Arapa ba'na me' apangrasa kowat?" 
2Kings18:20 Apa bi' ba'na caca malolo esanggu bisa egabay gantena siyasat ban kakowadanna tantara? Sapa se eandellagi ba'na, me' daddi amosowa ban Asyur?" 
2Kings18:21 Ba'na pajat ngarep bantowanna Messer, tape jareya padha ban oreng atongket lalang; tongket jareya dhaggi' potong, tanangnga ba'na ekenneng jujju. Jareya gambaranna rato Messer monggu ka reng-oreng se ngarep bantowanna.’ ”" 
2Kings18:22 Parwira Asyur jareya pas ngoca' pole, “Otabana pole ba'na ngoca' ngarebba bantowanna PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na? E bakto Hizkiya apareng parenta sopaja oreng Yehuda ban Yerusalim abakte e adha'na mezba e Yerusalim malolo, se epamosna ratona ba'na jareya gu ta' mezba ban kennengnganna kabakteyan ka PANGERAN dibi' se badha neng e man-dhimman?" 
2Kings18:23 Sateya kalaban asmana rato Asyur sengko' bangal atarowana ja' mon ba'na eberri'i jaran dhu ebu meggi', bannya'na oreng e kotthana ba'na ta' kera cokop se epanompa'a jaran jareya!" 
2Kings18:24 Alabana parwirana tang bangsa se paleng mandhap bai ba'na banne tandhinganna. Tape ba'na me' gi' ngarep bantowan kareta perrang ban pasukan jaran dhari Messer! 
2Kings18:25 Tang bangsa se nyerrang ban makala nagarana ba'na reya apa bi' ba'na esanggu ta' olle bantowan dhari PANGERAN, ya? PANGERAN dibi' se makon tang bangsa nyerrang ban maancor ba'na kabbi!”" 
2Kings18:26 Elyakim, Sebna ban Yowah ngoca' ka parwira jareya, “Manabi abu-dhabu ka kaula sakanca paneka ngangguy oca' Aram saos, kaula ngarte. Ja' ngangguy oca' Ibrani, dhaggi' ekaedhing reng-oreng se badha e attassa pagar alas ka'issa', dhaggi' oreng pas padha oneng.”" 
2Kings18:27 Saodda parwira jareya, “Apa bi' ba'na sengko' reya esanggu pera' epakon manapa' pessen jareya ka ba'na ban sareng ka ratona? Enja'! Sengko' acaca keya ka ra'yat se toju' e attas pagar alas, ra'yat ban ba'na kabbi se padha ngakana taena ban ngenoma kemmena dibi'.”" 
2Kings18:28 Saellana jareya parwira buru pas manjeng sarta aera' ngangguy oca' Ibrani, “Mara edhingngagi apa dhabuna rato Asyur:" 
2Kings18:29 ‘Ba'na ja' endha' eco-koco Hizkiya; Hizkiya ta' kera bisa masalamet ba'na. 
2Kings18:30 Ja' edhingngagi mon Hizkiya nyacae ba'na esoro nyo'on tolong ka PANGERAN. PANGERAN ta' kera masalamet ba'na otabana lang-ngalange tantara Asyur arebbu' kotthana ba'na. 
2Kings18:31 Ja' edhingngagi Hizkiya. Mara ba'na padha kalowar dhari kotthana pas atellok ka sengko'. Dhaggi' ba'na olle ngakan buwana anggur dhari kebbunna dibi' sarta ngarassa'agi ne'madda buwana ara dhari bungkana andhi'na ba'na dibi', bariya keya bisa ngenom dhari somorra ba'na dibi'," 
2Kings18:32 sampe' bi' sengko' ba'na ealle ka settong nagara se merep ban nagarana ba'na dibi'. E jadhiya badha kebbun anggurra se ngasellagi anggur se ekenneng kakan ba'na, badha teggalla gandum se ngasellagi teppong kaangguy kakanna ba'na. E nagara jareya bannya' bungkana jaitun, bannya' mennya' jaitunna ban madduna. Mon ba'na atoro' ka tang oca' reya, ba'na bakal odhi'a, ta' kera mate. Ja' ngedhingngagi cacana Hizkiya! Ba'na eco-koco, ebalai ja' ba'na tanto epasalamet bi' PANGERAN." 
2Kings18:33 Ba' badha'a dibana bangsa laen masalamet nagarana dhari tang kakobasa'an? 
2Kings18:34 Kemma ba-dibana nagara Hamat ban Arpad? Kemma ba-dibana Sefarwaim, Hena ban Iwa? Ba' badha'a se dhateng nolonge Samaria?" 
2Kings18:35 Diba se kemma se tao malopot nagarana dhari tang kakobasa'an? Dhu dhimma PANGERAN se bisa'a masalamet Yerusalim?’ ” 
2Kings18:36 Ngedhing oca' jareya pandhudhu' Yerusalim ta' nyaot, sabab Rato Hizkiya la makon sopaja neng-enneng." 
2Kings18:37 Elyakim, Sebna ban Yowah pas nyebbit kalambina menangka tandha sossa, saellana jareya laju areppot ka ratona parkara pa-apa se ekoca'agi parwira Asyur gella'." 
2Kings19:1 E bakto meyarsa reppodanna oreng se katello gella', Rato Hizkiya laju nyebbit rasoganna pas ngagem kaen karong menangka tandha sossa, saellana jareya laju meyos ka Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings19:2 Saellana jareya rato laju ngotos Elyakim, kapalana karaton, Sabna sekettarissa nagara ban para imam se la towa, epakon nyabis ka Nabbi Yesaya pottrana Amos. Reng-oreng jareya akalambi karong keya." 
2Kings19:2 Saellana jareya rato laju ngotos Elyakim, kapalana karaton, Sabna sekettarissa nagara ban para imam se la towa, epakon nyabis ka Nabbi Yesaya pottrana Amos. Reng-oreng jareya akalambi karong keya." 
2Kings19:3 Areya' pessenna Hizkiya se epanapa' reng-oreng jareya ka Yesaya, “Are paneka are kasossa'an; kaula sareng sampeyan sadaja padha eokom sareng eya-seya. Kaula sareng sampeyan sadaja akadi oreng babine' se rembi'a tape ampon ta' gadhuwan kakowadan sakale." 
2Kings19:4 Rato Asyur ngotos parwira tenggina epakon ya-nyeya Allah se odhi'. Pasera oneng GUSTE Allahna sampeyan meyarsa se eya-seya kadi gapaneka, sareng badhi ngokoma reng-oreng se ngoca'agi sadajana gapaneka! Daddi kaula nyo'ona tolong, nyo'onnagi ka Allah kaangguy bangsana kaula sareng sampeyan se gi' odhi'.”" 
2Kings19:5 Saellana meyarsa pessenna Rato Hizkiya jareya," 
2Kings19:6 Yesaya makon para otosan jareya manapa' saodda kantha reya, “Dhabuna PANGERAN, junandalem ta' osa tako' meyarsa cacaepon reng-orengnga rato Asyur se ngoca' ja' PANGERAN ta' kera masalamet junandalem sareng sadajana ra'yadda." 
2Kings19:7 Sareng PANGERAN rato Asyur epameyarsa kabar angen kantos laju abali ka nagarana dibi' sarta pas epate'e oreng e ka'dhissa'.” 
2Kings19:8 Parwira Asyur jareya ngedhing kabar ja' ratona la mangkat dhari Lakhis ban parappa'na aperrang ban kottha Libna se ta' jau dhari jadhiya. Parwira jareya laju nyosol ka kottha jareya atemmowa ban ratona. 
2Kings19:9 Rato Asyur la narema kabar ja' pasukan Messer se ekapalae Tirhaka rato Sudan parappa'na e dhalem parjalanan ka jadhiya nyerranga bangsa Asyur. Daddi rato Asyur asoradan ka Hizkiya rato Yehuda. 
2Kings19:10 Monyena kantha reya, “Ba'na ja' ekenneng co-koco bi' janjina Allahna se eandellagi ba'na se nyebbuttagi ja' ba'na ta' kera gaggar ka tang tanang." 
2Kings19:11 Ba'na la ngedhing ja' saneyap nagara se eserrang to-rato Asyur epaancor kabbi. Ba'na ja' ngera bisa'a lopot dhari sengko'! 
2Kings19:12 E bakto tang bangatowa ngancor tha-kottha Gozan, Haran ban Rezef, sarta mate'e oreng Eden se enneng e Telasar, tadha' settonga dhari ba-dibana masalamet tha-kottha jareya." 
2Kings19:13 Kemma to-rato Hamat, Arpad, Sefarwaim, Hena ban Iwa?”" 
2Kings19:14 Hizkiya maos sorat jareya se etarema dhari para otosan. Saellana jareya laju meyos ka Padalemman Socce. Sorat jareya laju ebarbar e ajunanna PANGERAN," 
2Kings19:15 Hizkiya adu'a, dhabuna, “Guste PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il, Junandalem se alenggi e attassa kerub, namong Junandalem Allah se ngobasane sadajana karaja'an e bume ka'dhinto. Junandalem se nyepta'agi langnge' sareng bume." 
2Kings19:16 Kasokana Junandalem ngoladi ponapa se kadaddiyan ka bangsa abdidalem samangken ka'dhinto, GUSTE. Peyarsa'agi sadajana se ekoca'agi Sanherib se ya-nyeya Junandalem, Allah se odhi'!" 
2Kings19:17 Abdidalem sadaja padha oneng, GUSTE, manabi to-rato Asyur ampon matompes sa-bangsa sabannya'na sareng maancor nagarana sa-bangsa gapaneka." 
2Kings19:18 Ba-dibaepon sa-bangsa gapaneka jugan eobbar sareng epaancor, sabab ba-diba gapaneka ta' gadhuwan kakobasa'an pa-ponapa, namong ca-arca se ebadhi dhari kaju sareng bato badhiyannepon manossa." 
2Kings19:19 Adhu, Guste PANGERAN, Allah kaula, palopoddagi abdidalem sadajana dhari reng-oreng Asyur ka'dhissa', sopaja sa-bangsa e dunnya oneng sadaja ja' namong Junandalem Allah se settong.”" 
2Kings19:20 Saellana jareya Yesaya apessennan ka Rato Hizkiya ja' menangka jawabanna du'ana," 
2Kings19:21 PANGERAN adhabu kantha reya, “Ba'na ekala'-gella' ban eco-koco bi' Yerusalim, Sanherib." 
2Kings19:22 Ba' taowa ba'na sapa se eca'-koca'e ban eya-seya bi' ba'na reya? Sengko', Allahna Isra'il, Allah se socce! Ce' angga'na ba'na ka Sengko'." 
2Kings19:23 Ba'na ngerem otosan epangedirragiya ja' polana kareta perrangnga ba'na ce' bannya'na daddi ba'na la makala nong-gunong se paleng tenggi e Libanon. Ba'na ngedirragi ja' ba'na moger ka-bungkana comarana se paleng tenggi ban paleng bagus sarta narabas e las-alassa se paleng raja. 
2Kings19:24 Ba'na ngedirragi keya ja' ba'na ngale mor-somor ban ngenom aeng e ra-nagara manca, ban ja' rit-parjuridda ba'na enyek-enyek Songay Nil sampe' kerreng." 
2Kings19:25 Apa ba'na ta' tao ngedhing ja' jareya kabbi la erancana'agi bi' Sengko' molae lamba'? Sateya Sengko' ajalannagi rancana jareya. Sengko' se aberri' kobasa ka ba'na kaangguy maancor tha-kottha se ngangguy binteng sampe' daddi jur-gujuran. 
2Kings19:26 Reng-oreng se enneng e jadhiya ta' bisa apa-rapa; takerjat ban katako'en. Reng-oreng jareya akantha rebba e teggal otabana rebba se tombu e ata'na bengko, se daddi kerreng mon ecapo' angen temor se panas." 
2Kings19:27 Tape Sengko' la tao kabbi parkara ba'na. Sengko' tao apa se elakone ba'na ban entara dha' emma ba'na. 
2Kings19:28 Sengko' tao ja' ba'na ce' peggella ka Sengko', ban Sengko' la ngedhing kasombonganna ba'na jareya. Sateya bi' Sengko' ba'na ekae'a elongnga ban ekaddhaliyana colo'na, ba'na eereda epabaliya lebat e jalan se elebadi ba'na padhatengnga.”" 
2Kings19:29 Yesaya apessennan kantha reya keya ka Hizkiya, “Areya' se daddiya menangka tandha ka ba'na. Taon reya ban taon dhateng oreng bakal ngakana gandum se tombu dibi'. Tape saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya bakal bisa'a namen gandum ban anggur sarta bakal arassa'agiya nyamanna hasella." 
2Kings19:30 Oreng Yehuda se gi' odhi' bakal ma'mora akantha men-tamennan se ramo'na ce' dhalemma sarta ngasellagi buwa. 
2Kings19:31 E Yerusalim ban e attassa Gunong Siyon bakal badha'a reng-oreng se salamet, lantaran PANGERAN la nantowagi ja' bendher bakal badha'a kadaddiyan se kantha jareya." 
2Kings19:32 Ka'dhinto se edhabuwagi PANGERAN ka Rato Asyur, ‘Rato Asyur ta' kera bisa maso' ka kottha Yerusalim otabana ngocol panana ka kottha jareya. Rit-parjurit se padha ngangguy tameng ta' kera badha se bisa'a nyemma'e kottha jareya, ban ta' kera agabay tanggul pangeppongan e sakalenglengnga kottha jareya." 
2Kings19:33 Rato Asyur bakal moleya lebat e jalan se elebadi padhatengnga, ta' kalaban sempat maso' ka kottha jareya. Sengko', PANGERAN, la ngoca'." 
2Kings19:34 Bit kahormadanna Sengko' dibi' sarta Tang parjanjiyan ban Daud Tang abdi, Sengko' abilla'ana ban alindhungana Yerusalim.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 E malem jareya keya malaekadda PANGERAN meyos ka parkemahanna oreng Asyur, pas mate'e parjurit Asyur saratos ballung polo lema ebu oreng bannya'na. Kalagguwanna gu-laggu mayyidda reng-oreng jareya car-kalacer." 
2Kings19:36 Daddi Sanherib rato Asyur laju nyorot, abali ka Niniwe." 
2Kings19:37 E settong are, e bakto teppa'na abakte e dhalem kowella Diba Nisrokh, Sanherib epeddhang sampe' mate bi' Adramelekh ban Sarezer, tra-pottrana dibi'. Saellana jareya se kadhuwa buru pas buru ka nagara Ararat. Daddi se agante jumenneng rato pottrana se laen, iya areya Esarhadon." 
2Kings20:1 Ra-kera e bakto jareya Rato Hizkiya songkan bu-tombu ce' sarana sampe' para' seda'a. Nabbi Yesaya pottrana Amos nyabis laju mator, “Dhabuna PANGERAN junandalem epakon malerres sadajana orosan, sabab junandalem ta' kera sae pole. Ta' abit pole junandalem badhi seda'a.”" 
2Kings20:1 Ra-kera e bakto jareya Rato Hizkiya songkan bu-tombu ce' sarana sampe' para' seda'a. Nabbi Yesaya pottrana Amos nyabis laju mator, “Dhabuna PANGERAN junandalem epakon malerres sadajana orosan, sabab junandalem ta' kera sae pole. Ta' abit pole junandalem badhi seda'a.”" 
2Kings20:2 Hizkiya atole addhep ka geddhung laju adu'a," 
2Kings20:3 “Adhu, GUSTE, kaemodi ja' abdidalem ka'dhinto ampon ngabdi ka Junandalem kalaban esto sareng tolos ehlas. Abdidalem ros-terrosan aehteyar norodi kasokannepon Junandalem.” Hizkiya laju molar ce' ngennessa." 
2Kings20:4 Yesaya laju nyengla dhari jadhiya, tape sabellunna kalowar dhari pakarangan tengngana karaton bi' PANGERAN epakon" 
2Kings20:5 abali ka Hizkiya, ratona ommadda PANGERAN, kaangguy manapa' dhabuna se kantha reya, “Sengko' reya PANGERAN, Allah se esemba Daud bangatowana ba'na, Sengko' la ngedhing du'ana ba'na ban nangale'e aeng matana ba'na. Bi' Sengko' ba'na epabarasa; sadhumalem ba'na bakal entara ka Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings20:6 Bi' Sengko' ba'na epaodhi'a lema bellas taon aggi'. Ba'na ban kottha Yerusalim bi' Sengko' epalopoda'a dhari kakobasa'anna rato Asyur. Kottha reya bi' Sengko' elindhungana bit kahormadanna Sengko' dibi' sarta Tang parjanjiyan ban Daud Tang abdi.” 
2Kings20:7 Yesaya laju makon pangladinna rato jareya nyecce buwana ara pas epakon beddha'agi ka bu-tombuna rato sopaja barasa. 
2Kings20:8 Rato Hizkiya mareksane, “Ponapa tandhaepon ja' PANGERAN badhi mabaras kaula ban ja' sadhumalem kaula badhi kengenga entar ka Padalemman Socce pole?”" 
2Kings20:9 Saodda Yesaya, “PANGERAN badhi aparenga tandha ka junandalem ja' Salerana neptebbi janjiepon. Samangken, ka'imma se ekasokane junandalem: jang-bajangan se noduwagi ejjam are badhiyanna Rato Ahas ka'issa' maju sapolo garis otabana nyorot sapolo garis?”" 
2Kings20:10 Dhabuna Hizkiya, “Manabi mamajuwa jang-bajangan ganeka sapolo garis, gampang saos. Daddi samangken panyorot sapolo garis saos!”" 
2Kings20:11 Yesaya adu'a nyo'on ka PANGERAN, PANGERAN laju manyorot jang-bajangan e panoduna ejjam are jareya sapolo garis." 
2Kings20:12 Ra-kera e bakto jareya keya rato Babil, iya areya Merodakh-Baladan pottrana Baladan, meyarsa ja' Rato Hizkiya gi' buru sae dhari songkanna. Rato jareya laju ngotos oreng ngeba sorat ban le-olle ka Hizkiya." 
2Kings20:13 Hizkiya narema para otosan jareya se pas epataowe sakabbinna hartana se aropa emmas ban salaka, palappa ban mennya' ro'om, sarta sakabbinna parabudda tantarana. Tadha' settonga se badha e karaton ban e sabingkerra karaja'anna se ta' epatao ka para otosan jareya." 
2Kings20:14 Saellana jareya Nabbi Yesaya ngadhep Rato Hizkiya laju mareksane, “Dhari ka'dhimma reng-oreng ka'dhissa'? Ponapa ca'epon reng-oreng gapaneka?” Saodda Hizkiya, “Reng-oreng ka'dhissa' dhari Babil, nagara se jau dhari ka'dhinto.”" 
2Kings20:15 “Ponapa se etenggu reng-oreng ka'dhissa' e karaton?” dhabuna Yesaya pole. “Sadajana!” saodda Hizkiya. “Tadha' settonga essena karaton se bi' kaula ta' epatao ka reng-oreng ganeka.” 
2Kings20:16 Yesaya laju mator ka rato, “Dhabuna PANGERAN" 
2Kings20:17 e settong bakto sadajana harta se badha e karatonnepon junandalem sareng sadajana ollena se epakompol sareng bangatowaepon junandalem kantos are mangken, bakal eangko'a oreng ka Babil. Bakal tadha'a karena sakale." 
2Kings20:18 Dhari na' potoepon junandalem bakal badha'a se ebakta ka Babil epadaddiya ponggaba sareng epaladinana rato e ka'dhissa'.” 
2Kings20:19 Dhabuna Rato Hizkiya, “Sae jugan dhabuepon PANGERAN se epanapa' sampeyan ka kaula ganeka.” Kan adhabu kantha jareya lantaran ca'na panggaliyanna: “Sokor tang karaja'an paggun aman ban taremtem saabidda sengko' gi' odhi'.”" 
2Kings20:20 Careta laenna parkara Rato Hizkiya, parkara sa-jasana kapahlawananna, ban baramma carana se abadhi taman ban sellogan se eangguy magili aeng ka kottha, ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings20:21 Hizkiya seda, laju egante pottrana Manasye." 
2Kings21:1 Manasye yuswana gi' buru dhubellas taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda, sarta marenta e Yerusalim saeket lema' taon abidda. Asmana ebuna Hefzibah." 
2Kings21:2 Manasye dusa ka PANGERAN, sabab nerowe sabarang kabiyasa'an jahadda sa-bangsa se eojuk PANGERAN dhari Kana'an e bakto oreng Isra'il maso' ka nagara jareya." 
2Kings21:3 Kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba neng e man-dhimman se la epamosna bi' Hizkiya, ramana, epaddek pole. Manasye maddek ba-mezba kaangguy nyemba Ba'al, sarta abadhi arcana Dewi Asyera, akantha se elampa'agi Ahab rato Isra'il. Laen dhari jareya Manasye gi' nyemba ka tang-bintang." 
2Kings21:4 PANGERAN la adhabu ja' Yerusalim kennengnganna kahadiranna ban kodu ekagabay kennengnganna oreng abakte ka Salerana tape e Padalemman Socce jareya Manasye maddek ba-mezba se eangguy nyemba ba-diba. 
2Kings21:5 E taneyan se dhadhuwa' e Padalemman Socce jareya epaddek ba-mezba kaangguy nyemba tang-bintang. 
2Kings21:6 Pottrana ekagabay kurban obbaran. Laen dhari jareya Manasye gi' alampa'agi sabarang lalakonna dhukon, nojum, elmo seher, ban menta petodu ka roh-erroh. Salerana ce' dusana ka PANGERAN sampe' PANGERAN duka." 
2Kings21:7 Lambangnga Dewi Asyera esaba' e Padalemman Socce, mangkana parkara kennengngan jareya PANGERAN la adhabu ka Daud ban Sulaiman pottrana, “Tang padalemman ban kottha Yerusalim reya, se bi' Sengko' la epele dhari antarana dhaerana suku Isra'il se dhubellas, bi' Sengko' la etantowagi menangka kennengnganna oreng abakte ka Sengko'." 
2Kings21:8 Ban mon ommat Isra'il atoro' ka sakabbinna Tang parenta sarta atoro' ka kom-hokom se eajarragi bi' Mosa Tang abdi, bi' Sengko' etolonga sopaja ta' sampe'a eojuk dhari nagara se bi' Sengko' la ebagi ka bangatowana.”" 
2Kings21:9 Tape oreng Yehuda ta' atoro' ka dhabuna PANGERAN, ban Manasye la'-mala' daddi lantaranna reng-oreng Yehuda jareya agabay sa-dusa se lebbi jahat dhari sa-dusana sa-bangsa se bi' PANGERAN eojuk dhari Kana'an e bakto ommat Isra'il maso' ka nagara jareya." 
2Kings21:10 Lantaran jareya kalaban parantara'anna para nabbi, di-abdina PANGERAN, PANGERAN adhabu," 
2Kings21:11 “Rato Manasye ce' jahadda. Lalakonna ajahadan dhari lalakonna oreng Kana'an. La-brahala gabayanna daddi lantaranna oreng Yehuda alako dusa. 
2Kings21:12 Daddi Sengko', PANGERAN, Allah se esemba oreng Isra'il, madhatengnga balai se ce' rajana ka Yerusalim ban Yehuda, sampe' sapa'a bai se ngedhing parkara jareya bakal takerjada." 
2Kings21:13 Yerusalim bi' Sengko' eokoma akantha Sengko' se ngokom Samaria ban Ahab rato Isra'il sarta katoronanna. Yerusalim bi' Sengko' epaberseya tadha' karena akantha pereng se ekorae ban epakorong. 
2Kings21:14 Karena pandhudhu'na bi' Sengko' edina'a me' olle ekakan so-mosona se bakal arampasa sanjatana ban dhi'-andhi'na kabbi. 
2Kings21:15 Tang ommat jareya bi' Sengko' epakantha'a jareya lantaran dusana ka Sengko' ban mapeggel Sengko' molae dhari bangatowana kalowar dhari Messer sampe' sateya reya.” 
2Kings21:16 Manasye banne pera' daddi lantaranna oreng Yehuda agabay dusa ka PANGERAN kalaban nyemba brahala, tape gi' ngalakone kajahadan laenna iya areya mate'e oreng se ta' andhi' sala talebat bannya'na sampe' dhara agili e man-dhimman e Yerusalim." 
2Kings21:17 Careta laenna parkara Rato Manasye ban sa-dusana, ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manasye seda laju esareyagi e kebbunna karaton, iya areya kebbun Uza, sarta pas egante Amon, pottrana." 
2Kings21:19 Yuswana Amon dhu lekor taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda ban marenta e Yerusalim dhu taon abidda. Asmana ebuna Mesulemet pottrana Harus, oreng Yotba." 
2Kings21:20 Padha ban ramana, Amon dusa keya ka PANGERAN," 
2Kings21:21 nerowe pa-apa se elampa'agi ramana, sarta nyemba la-brahala se esemba ramana." 
2Kings21:22 Amon ta' atoro' ka kasokanna PANGERAN, la'-mala' mongkore PANGERAN, Allah se esemba bangatowana." 
2Kings21:23 Ba-ponggabana Rato Amon asakongkel, Amon ekamoso laju epate'e e karaton." 
2Kings21:24 Tape reng-oreng se mate'e Amon jareya epate'e bi' ra'yat Yehuda, se laju ngangkat Yosiya, pottrana Amon, epajumenneng rato." 
2Kings21:25 Careta laenna parkara Rato Amon ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda. 
2Kings21:26 Amon esareyagi e pasareyan e kebbun Uza, sarta laju egante Yosiya, pottrana." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yuswana ballung taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda ban marenta e Yerusalim tello polo settong taon abidda. Asmana ebuna Yedida pottrana Adaya, dhari Bozkat." 
2Kings22:2 Yosiya alampa'agi barang se masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN; nerowe contona Rato Daud bangatowana, sarta'anna atoro' ka sakabbinna hokomma Allah kalaban gu-onggu." 
2Kings22:3 Rato Yosiya kaagungan sekettarissa nagara se anyama Safan ana'na Azaliya, kompoyya Mesulam. E taon se kapeng ballu bellas pamarenta'anna Rato Yosiya, rato apareng parenta reya ka sekettarissa jareya, “Kassa' ba'na entar ka Imam Agung Hilkiya e Padalemman Socce, ba'na menta laporan barampa bannya'na pesse se epakompol bi' para imam se atugas e labang se egabay jalanna oreng mon maso'a ka Padalemman Socce." 
2Kings22:4  
2Kings22:5 Pesse jareya soro bagi ka pangawassa reng-oreng se mateppa' Padalemman Socce. Pesse jareya bi' para pangawas gella' kodu epamajar opana 
2Kings22:6 para tokang kaju, tokang geddhong ban tokang bato, sarta epamelle kaju ban bato se ekaparlo." 
2Kings22:7 Para pangawassa lalakon jareya ce' jujurra, daddi ta' osa epentae laporan pangalowaranna pesse.”" 
2Kings22:8 Safan manapa' dhabuna rato jareya ka Hilkiya, Hilkiya laju abala ka Safan ja' aba'na nemmo ketab kom-hokomma PANGERAN e Padalemman Socce. Bi' Hilkiya ketab jareya ebagi ka Safan, bi' Safan laju ebaca." 
2Kings22:9 Saellana jareya Safan abali ka ratona pas areppot ja' pesse se badha e Padalemman Socce la ekala' ebagi bi' para abdina rato ka para pangawassa reng-oreng se mateppa' Padalemman Socce. 
2Kings22:10 Saellana jareya Safan mator, “Hilkiya marengngagi ketab ka'dhinto ka abdidalem.” Safan pas maca'agi ketab jareya ka rato." 
2Kings22:11 E bakto meyarsa essena ketab jareya rato laju bit-nyebbit rasoganna menangka tandha sossa. 
2Kings22:12 Saellana jareya rato pas apareng parenta ka Imam Hilkiya, Ahikam ana'na Safan, Akhbor ana'na Mikha, Safan sekettarissa nagara, ban Asaya ajudanna rato:" 
2Kings22:13 “Kassa' sengko' ban ra'yat Yehuda nyo'onnagi petodu ka PANGERAN parkara essena ketab reya. PANGERAN duka polana bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na ta' ajalannagi ta-parenta se badha e dhalem ketab reya.” 
2Kings22:14 Daddi Hilkiya, Ahikam, Akhbor, Safan ban Asaya pas mangkat menta petodu ka oreng babine' se anyama Hulda. Hulda jareya nabbi se alenggi e kampong anyar e Yerusalim. Rakana anyama Salum pottrana Tikwa, bajana Harhas, se ngoros pangangguyya kabakteyan e Padalemman Socce. Saellana meyarsa katerranganna reng-oreng jareya," 
2Kings22:15 Hulda makon reng-oreng jareya abali ka ratona epakon manapa' 
2Kings22:16 dhabuna PANGERAN se kantha reya essena: “Sengko' ngokoma Yerusalim ban sakabbinna pandhudhu'na akantha se kasebbut e dhalem ketab se buru ebaca rato jareya. 
2Kings22:17 Reng-oreng jareya la loppa ka Sengko' ban ngeba kurban ka la'-alla'an. Sabarang se elakone reng-oreng jareya mapeggel Sengko'. Sengko' peggel ka Yerusalim, ban peggella Tang ate ta' bisa epaterep." 
2Kings22:18 Tape parkara Rato Yosiya, areya' pessen dhari Sengko', GUSTE Allahna Isra'il, ‘Saellana ngedhing essena ketab jareya" 
2Kings22:19 ba'na atobat sarta ngasorragi aba'na e adha'na Sengko'. Sengko' la ngoca' ja' Sengko' ngokoma Yerusalim ban pandhudhu'na. Kottha jareya bi' Sengko' ekagabaya settong paanaban se nako'e, dineng nyama Yerusalim bi' Sengko' ekagabaya nyama babaston.
