Tape e bakto ngedhing ja' Sengko' ngokoma Yerusalim ban pandhudhu'na jareya ba'na nanges ban nyebbit kalambina menangka tandha ja' ba'na sossa. Sengko' la ngedhing du'ana ba'na," 
2Kings22:20 daddi okoman ka Yerusalim jareya bi' Sengko' gi' ta' eteba'agiya mon ba'na gi' odhi'. Ba'na bakal mateya kalaban taremtem.’ ” Para otosan jareya laju abali ka ratona sarta manapa' dhadhabun jareya. 
2Kings23:1 Rato Yosiya adikane para pamimpin Yehuda ban Yerusalim. 
2Kings23:2 Saellana jareya laju meyos ka Padalemman Socce, eerengngagi para imam, para nabbi ban sakabbinna ra'yat se mesken ban se sogi. Rato ngadek e seddi'na pelar se esadhiya'agi kaangguy rato malolo e jadhiya, e adha'na reng-oreng gella', rato maos epakaja sakabbinna essena ketab parjanjiyan se etemmo e Padalemman Socce epakaedhing ka reng-oreng se badha e jadhiya. Saellana jareya rato mabadha parjanjiyan ban PANGERAN se anyata'agi salerana ta'ada ka PANGERAN, ban alampa'agiya sakabbinna papakon ban kom-hokomma, banne pera' e laherra, tape terros ka dhalem atena. Rato ajanji keya alampa'agiya saradda parjanjiyanna PANGERAN ban ommadda akantha se esebbuttagi e dhalem ketab jareya. Ra'yadda kabbi padha noro' ajanji ta'ada ka parjanjiyan jareya." 
2Kings23:3  
2Kings23:4 Saellana jareya rato makon Imam Agung Hilkiya, para imam se abanto ban para pangawal se atugas e labangnga Padalemman Socce, sopaja makalowar dhari Padalemman jareya sakabbinna pakakas se eangguy nyemba Ba'al, Dewi Asyera ban tang-bintang. Rang-barang jareya bi' Rato Yosiya eobbar kabbi e lowar kottha e seddi'na Cora Kidron, abuna pas egiba ka Betel." 
2Kings23:5 Para imam se eangkat to-rato Yehuda se epatugas e kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba e tha-kottha Yehuda ban e sabingkerra Yerusalim epaambu kabbi; bariya keya mam-imam se ngatorragi kurban ka Ba'al, are, bulan, planet ban tang-bintang." 
2Kings23:6 Arcana Dewi Asyera epakalowar dhari Padalemman Socce, egiba ka lowar kottha ka Cora Kidron. E jadhiya arca jareya eobbar, arengnga etoto epaalos, abuna etabur ka attassa koburan omom." 
2Kings23:7 Mar-kamar e Padalemman Socce se egabay kennengnganna del-sondella kowel se nyondel menangka kabakteyan ka diba, epaancor. (E mar-kamar jareya babine'an atennon kaen se eangguya e bakto nyemba'a ka Dewi Asyera.)" 
2Kings23:8 Mam-imam se badha e tha-kottha Yehuda bi' Yosiya epakon ka Yerusalim kabbi, saellana jareya e saantero nagara Yehuda ba-mezbana diba se badha e man-dhimman se eangguy mam-imam mon ngatorragi kurban epanajjis kabbi. Mam-imam jareya ta' eedine mabadha kabakteyan e Padalemman Socce, pera' eedine ngakan roti se ta' eragi'i se esadhiya'agi kaangguy ca-kancana. Ba-mezba se malolo eangguy kaparlowanna kabakteyan ka diba e seddi'na labang saketheng se epaddek Yusak, wali kotthana nagara jareya, epagujur. Labang saketheng jareya kennengnganna e kacerra Labang Saketheng Otama e jalan se elebadi oreng mon maso'a ka kottha." 
2Kings23:9  
2Kings23:10 Tofet, kennengnganna oreng nyemba ka diba e Cora Hinom, epanajjis. Daddi la tadha' pole oreng se ngobbar ana'na menangka kurban obbaran ka Diba Molokh." 
2Kings23:11 Ran-jaran se bi' to-rato Yehuda eangguy malolo kaangguy nyemba ka are ebuwang, ban ta-kareta se eangguy e dhalem kabakteyan jareya eobbar. (Ta-kareta jareya esaba' e palataranna Padalemman Socce, e seddi'na labang saketheng, ta' jau dhari mar-kamar se egabay kennengnganna Natan Melekh, settong oreng se apangkat tenggi.)" 
2Kings23:12 Ba-mezba se ekagabay to-rato Yehuda e ata'na mar-kamarra Rato Ahas, epaancor. Bariya keya ba-mezba se ekagabay bi' Rato Manasye e palataran se dhadhuwa' e Padalemman Socce, bi' Yosiya epalejjar, ban jar-lejjaranna ebuwang ka Cora Kidron." 
2Kings23:13 Bariya keya ba-mezba e bagiyan temorra Yerusalim, e lao'na Gumo' Kajahadan epanajjis. Ba-mezba jareya ekagabay bi' Rato Sulaiman kaangguy kaparlowan nyemba'a ba-diba se majitjit, iya areya Asytoret diba bine'na bangsa Sidon, Kamos dibana bangsa Mo'ab, ban Milkom dibana bangsa Amon." 
2Kings23:14 Gu-tuguna diba ban arcana Dewi Asyera epagujur, saellana jareya tana se ekennengnge pamaddegganna gu-tugu ban ca-arca jareya, bi' Yosiya etembuk bi' lang-tolangnga manossa." 
2Kings23:15 Kennengnganna kabakteyan e Betel se epaddek Rato Yerobeyam pottrana Nebat, iya areya rato se daddi lantaranna oreng Isra'il dusa ka PANGERAN bi' Yosiya eparosak keya. Saellana jareya mezba e kennengnganna kabakteyan bi' Yosiya eta'-tatta' pas eobbar epabareng ban arcana Dewi Asyera se badha e jadhiya." 
2Kings23:16 Saellana jareya Yosiya atole, pas ngoladi badha pan-barampan makam e attassa gunong. Kam-makam jareya laju epakon bungkar; lang-tolang se badha e dhalemmanna eobbar e attassa mezba se teppa'na rabbang jareya. Kantha jareya carana Yosiya manajjis mezba jareya. Daddi la kalakon apa se eramallagi lamba' bi' nabbina PANGERAN e bakto Rato Yerobeyam teppa'na ngadek e seddi'na mezba jareya baktona badha paraya'an. Saellana jareya Rato Yosiya ngoladi badha makam laenna pole." 
2Kings23:17 Rato jareya mareksane, “Makamma sapa rowa?” Saodda reng-oreng Betel, “Pasareyannepon nabbina Pangeran se oneng rabu ka ka'dhinto dhari Yehuda, se aramallagi sadaja se gi' buru elampa'agi junandalem, enggi ka'dhinto arosak ba-mezba ka'dhissa'.”" 
2Kings23:18 “Panneng makam jareya ja' li-guli,” dhabuna rato. “Dina lang-tolangnga e jadhiya, ja' le-alle!” Daddi lang-tolangnga nabbi dhari Yehuda jareya ta' eli-guli; bariya keya lang-tolangnga nabbi dhari Samaria se esareyagi e jadhiya." 
2Kings23:19 E saneyap kottha e Isra'il, Rato Yosiya magujur sakabbinna kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba se ekagabay bi' to-rato Isra'il, se andaddiyagi dukana PANGERAN. Apa se elampa'agi e Betel, bi' Rato Yosiya elampa'agi keya ka ba-mezba e saantero Isra'il." 
2Kings23:20 Sakabbinna imam se atugas e saneyap kennengnganna panyemba'anna diba epate'e e attassa ba-mezba kennengnganna reng-oreng jareya se atugas. E saneyap mezba jareya Yosiya ngobbar lang-tolangnga manossa. Saellana jareya rato jareya laju gubar ka Yerusalim. 
2Kings23:21 Saellana jareya Rato Yosiya makon ra'yat araya'agi Paska menorot se kasebbut e dhalem ketab parjanjiyan ban Pangeran, kalaban cara se kantha jareya ra'yat buru ngormadi PANGERAN, Allahna bangsa jareya." 
2Kings23:22 Sajjegga bangsa Isra'il eparenta wan-pahlawan ta' tao badha rato Isra'il otaba rato Yehuda se araya'agi Paska kantha jareya. 
2Kings23:23 Pera' e taon se kapeng ballu bellas pamarenta'anna Yosiya Paska jareya buru eraya'agi pole e Yerusalim kaangguy ahormadi PANGERAN. 
2Kings23:24 Kaangguy alampa'agi kom-hokom se kasebbut e dhalem ketab se etemmo Imam Agung Hilkiya e Padalemman Socce, reng-oreng tokang ngolok arwah ban tokang ramal bi' Rato Yosiya eojuk kabbi dhari Yerusalim ban dhari saantero Yehuda, dibana ko-bengko, brahala ban rang-barang se eangguy oreng e dhalem kabakteyan ka ba-diba." 
2Kings23:25 Sabellunna ta' tao badha rato se padha ban Rato Yosiya se abakte ka PANGERAN kalaban gu-onggu ate, ban noduwagi baktena jareya e dhalem odhi'na ban e dhalem tengka gulina, cocok ban kom-hokom se esebbuttagi e dhalem Ketab Mosa. Bariya keya samarena Rato Yosiya ta' tao badha rato se padha ban salerana." 
2Kings23:26 Tape lalakonna Rato Manasye maduka PANGERAN ka Yehuda; ban dukana jareya gi' ta' terep. 
2Kings23:27 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Apa se la ejalannagi Sengko' ka Isra'il, ejalannagiya keya ka Yehuda. Oreng Yehuda bi' Sengko' ebuwanga dhari nagara se eberri'i Sengko'. Sengko' nolaga Yerusalim, kottha Tang peleyan, bariya keya Tang padalemman se bi' Sengko' dibi' la ekoca'agi menangka kennengnganna oreng abakte ka Sengko'.”" 
2Kings23:28 Rato Yosiya seda e dhalem paperrangan e Megido e bakto meyos merrange Nekho, rato Messer, se teppa'na maju ban pasukanna nolongana rato Asyur e penggirra Songay Efrat. Jinazana Rato Yosiya jareya ekala' bi' ba-ponggabana pas egiba mole ka Yerusalim epanompa' kareta. E jadhiya esareyagi e pasareyanna to-rato. Ra'yat Yehuda laju mele Yowahas pottrana epajumenneng rato epagante salerana. Careta laenna parkara Rato Yosiya ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda." 
2Kings23:29  
2Kings23:30  
2Kings23:31 Yuswana Yowahas tello lekor taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda ban marenta e Yerusalim tello bulan abidda. Ebuna iya areya Hamutal pottrana Yeremiya dhari kottha Libna. 
2Kings23:32 Yowahas dusa ka PANGERAN akantha bangatowana. 
2Kings23:33 Yowahas ta' marenta pole e bakto etawan bi' Rato Nekho dhari Messer neng e Ribla e dhaera Hamat, ban Yehuda epaksa majar pesse opet ka Messer aropa salaka tello ebu pa' ratos kilo ban emmas tello polo empa' kilo." 
2Kings23:34 Saellana jareya Rato Nekho laju ngangkat pottrana Yosiya se anyama Elyakim epadaddi rato Yehuda, sarta ngoba nyama Elyakim epadaddi Yoyakim. Yowahas ebakta ka Messer, laju seda e dhissa'." 
2Kings23:35 Kaangguy majar pesse opet se epondhut rato Messer, Rato Yoyakim narek pajek dhari ra'yat menorot kakowadanna bang-sebang." 
2Kings23:36 Yuswana Yoyakim sagame' taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda ban marenta e Yerusalim sabellas taon abidda. Ebuna iya areya Zebuda pottrana Pedaya dhari kottha Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 Yoyakim alako dusa ka PANGERAN akantha bangatowana. 
2Kings24:1 E jaman pamarenta'anna Rato Yoyakim, Yehuda elorok sarta epatellok bi' Nebukadnezar rato Babil. Tello taon abidda Yoyakim atellok ka Nebukadnezar, tape dhi-budhina aberonta'." 
2Kings24:2 PANGERAN madhateng garombolan-garombolan se neggu' gagaman dhari bangsa Babil, Siria, Mo'ab ban Amon epamerrange Yoyakim sarta maancora Yehuda, menorot apa se la edhabuwagi Salerana kalaban parantara'anna para nabbi, di-abdina." 
2Kings24:3 Parkara jareya pajat kodu kalakon, sabab PANGERAN la adhabu ja' bangsa Yehuda bakal ebuwanga dhari nagara se eparengngagi Salerana ka bangsa jareya. Bangsa jareya ebuwang lantaran sa-dusana Rato Manasye," 
2Kings24:4 bi-lebbi lantaran Manasye se mate'e reng-oreng se tadha' salana. PANGERAN ta' kasokan nyapora Manasye lantaran sa-dusana jareya. 
2Kings24:5 Dhaera dhari Songay Efrat sampe' ka batessa Messer e bagiyan dhaja se tamaso' baba pamarenta'anna rato Messer, ekobasae rato Babil kabbi. Daddi rato Messer ta' tao kalowaran pole dhari nagarana kaangguy aperranga. Careta laenna parkara Rato Yoyakim ecathet e dhalem ketab Sajarana To-rato Yehuda. Saellana Yoyakim seda, pottrana se anyama Yoyakhin epajumenneng rato agante salerana." 
2Kings24:6  
2Kings24:7  
2Kings24:8 Yoyakhin yuswana ballu bellas taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda ban marenta e Yerusalim tello bulan abidda. Ebuna iya areya Nehusta pottrana Elnatan, dhari Yerusalim." 
2Kings24:9 Yoyakhin padha ban ramana dusa ka PANGERAN. 
2Kings24:10 E jamanna pamarenta'anna Yoyakhin jareya, pasukan Babil se epimpin ra-parwirana Nebukadnezar maju nyerrang Yerusalim, ngeppong kottha jareya." 
2Kings24:11 Sabatara kottha jareya ekeppong, Nebukadnezar dibi' maso' ka kottha Yerusalim," 
2Kings24:12 Rato Yoyakhin ban ebuna, tra-pottrana, ra-parwirana ban ba-ponggabana karatonna padha atellok ka Nebukadnezar. Yoyakhin pas etawan. Jareya kadaddiyan e taon se kapeng ballu' pamarenta'anna Nebukadnezar." 
2Kings24:13 Kas-pakakas dhari emmas gabayanna Rato Sulaiman se eangguy e Padalemman Socce eparosak kabbi bi' Nebukadnezar. Saellana jareya rang-barang se aji se badha e Padalemman Socce ban e dhalem karaton eangko' ka Babil. Jareya kabbi kalakon cocok ban dhabuna PANGERAN se la edhabuwagi sabellunna. 
2Kings24:14 Rato Yoyakhin, ebuna, para rajina, ba-ponggabana ban pin-pamimpin Yehuda, se bannya'na kabbi pettong ebu oreng raja, etawan sarta eangko' ka Babil. Bariya keya kang-tokang se ahli ban dhi-pandhi besse se bannya'na saebu oreng, kaetong reng-oreng se wat-kowat, ngal-bangal aperrang. Reng-oreng toronanna rato ban reng-oreng raja eangko' ka pambuwangan kabbi; bannya'na sapolo ebu oreng. Ekenneng koca' pandhudhu' Yerusalim eangko' kabbi; se ta' egiba coma ra'yat se paleng mesken." 
2Kings24:15  
2Kings24:16  
2Kings24:17 Saellana jareya Nebukadnezar ngangkat Matanya epajumenneng rato Yehuda. Matanya jareya majadhi'na Yoyakhin; bi' Nebukadnezar asmana laju eoba epadaddi Zedekiya. 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya yuswana salekor taon e bakto jumenneng rato Yehuda, ban marenta e Yerusalim sabellas taon abidda. Ebuna iya areya Hamutal, pottrana Yeremiya dhari kottha Libna." 
2Kings24:19 Akantha Rato Yoyakim, Rato Zedekiya dusa keya ka PANGERAN." 
2Kings24:20 PANGERAN ce' dukana ka pandhudhu' Yerusalim ban oreng Yehuda sampe' reng-oreng jareya ta' eparduli. 
2Kings25:1 Saellana jareya Zedekiya aberonta' ka Nebukadnezar rato Babil. Daddi Nebukadnezar pas mangkat ka jadhiya ban sakabbinna angkadan perrangnga nyerrang Yerusalim e tanggal sapolo bulan sapolo e taon se kapeng sanga' pamarenta'anna Zedekiya. Reng-oreng jareya maddek markas e lowarra kottha, pas agabay pagar pangeppongan dhari bato," 
2Kings25:2 kottha jareya ros-terrosan ekeppong sampe' taon se kasabellas pamarenta'anna Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 E tanggal sanga' bulan empa' e taon jareya keya e baktona laep jareya la ce' sarana sampe' ra'yat tadha' se ekakana," 
2Kings25:4 pagarra kottha epagujur bi' moso. E malem jareya keya, sanajjan kottha jareya gi' ekeppong bi' oreng Babil, tantara Yehuda padha buru ka Cora Yordan kabbi. Reng-oreng jareya lebat e kebbunna karaton, kalowar lebat e labang saketheng se daddi panyambungnga geddhung se dhadhuwa' e jadhiya." 
2Kings25:5 Tape Rato Zedekiya eserser bi' tantara Babil, pas ekenneng pega' e tana rata Yerikho. Tantara pangerengnga padha buru kabbi, ratona edina'agi." 
2Kings25:6 Rato Zedekiya pas egiba ka Rato Nebukadnezar e kottha Ribla, terros eokom." 
2Kings25:7 Tra-pottrana epate'e ajunanna. Saellana jareya Zedekiya econgke' socana, pas ekalenthong sarta terros egiba ka Babil." 
2Kings25:8 E tanggal petto' bulan lema' e taon se kapeng sanga bellas pamarenta'anna Nebukadnezar rato Babil, panasehadda Nebukadnezar ban panglimana tantarana se anyama Nebuzaradan rabu ka Yerusalim." 
2Kings25:9 Nebuzaradan ngobbar Padalemman Socce, karatonna rato ban bengkona para pamimpin e Yerusalim." 
2Kings25:10 Pagarra kottha jareya pas epagujur bi' sakabbinna tantarana ban pangerengnga. 
2Kings25:11 Karena ra'yat se gi' badha e dhalem kottha, iya areya kang-tokang se ahli, reng-oreng mesken se la noro' Babil, bi' Nebuzaradan eangko' kabbi ka Babil." 
2Kings25:12 Tape sabagiyan dhari ra'yat se paleng mesken ban ta' andhi' pa-apa edina e Yehuda esoro agarap kebbun anggur ban gal-teggal. 
2Kings25:13 Lar-pelar paronggu ban ta-kareta e Padalemman Socce ban mong-cemmong parongguna epaancor bi' oreng Babil, paronggu la'-bella'anna eangko' ka Babil kabbi." 
2Kings25:14 Rang-barang laenna eangko' keya, iya areya: kop-sekkop, baddhana abuna mezba, kas-pakakassa damar, sabadhana kobugan panadha'anna dharana keban se esambelli kaangguy kurban, sabadhana kobugan pangobbaranna dupa ban rang-barang laenna se eangguy e dhalem opacarana kabakteyan." 
2Kings25:15 Rang-barang emmas ban salaka, tamaso' sabadhana kobugan se kene' ban reng-pereng baddhana mardha ekala' Nebuzaradan dibi'." 
2Kings25:16 Rang-barang paronggu gabayanna Rato Sulaiman kaangguy Padalemman Socce, iya areya pelar se dhadhuwa', ta-kareta ban mong-cemmong raja, kabbi ta' katembang sabab talebat berra'na." 
2Kings25:17 Cangga paronggu se dhadhuwa' jareya padha; tenggina padha ballung meter se epobuwi pentholan dhari paronggu se tenggina settong koma tello' meter. E sakalenglengnga pentholanna pelar jareya epobuwi anggi'an se erengga ban buwana dalima dhari paronggu. 
2Kings25:18 Laen dhari jareya Nebuzaradan nangkep Imam Agung Seraya, Sefanya imam se abanto, panjagana Padalemman Socce katello, panasehadda rato se kalema se gi' badha e dhalem kottha, panglima, bakkella panglima se ngoros administrasina tantara, ban kaom oreng agung laenna se bannya'na sabidak oreng." 
2Kings25:19  
2Kings25:20 Reng-oreng jareya egiba kabbi ka Rato Nebukadnezar e kottha Ribla," 
2Kings25:21 e dhaera Hamat. E jadhiya kabbi padha eseksa pas epate'e. Daddi reng-oreng Yehuda eangko' dhari nagarana egiba ka pambuwangan. 
2Kings25:22 Saellana jareya Nebukadnezar ngangkat Gedalya pottrana Ahikam bajana Safan, epadaddi gubennor e Yehuda epamarenta karena oreng se gi' badha e jadhiya." 
2Kings25:23 E bakto para parwira ban parjurit Yehuda se ta' atellok ka Babil ngedhing ja' Gedalya epadaddi gubennor jareya, kabbi padha nyabis ka Gedalya e Mizpa. Ra-parwira jareya iya areya Isma'il ana'na Netanya, Yokanan ana'na Kareyah, Seraya ana'na Tanhumet dhari kottha Netofa, ban Yazanya dhari kottha Ma'akha." 
2Kings25:24 Dhabuna Gedalya ka reng-oreng jareya, “Sampeyan ta' osa tako' ka om-kaom oreng agung pamarenta Babil. Sampeyan alenggi e nagara paneka saos, ngabdi ka rato Babil. Kaula se nanggunga sampeyan tanto padha salamet.”" 
2Kings25:25 Tape e bulan petto' taon jareya Isma'il ana'na Netanya kompoyya Elisama se gi' toronanna rato, meyos ka Mizpa asareng ban oreng kasapolo. Reng-oreng jareya nyerrang ban mate'e Gedalya sarta reng-oreng Yehuda ban oreng Babil se akompol ban Gedalya e jadhiya." 
2Kings25:26 Daddi ra'yat Yehuda, sogi ban mesken, ban para parwirana padha buru ka Messer polana tako' ka oreng Babil." 
2Kings25:27 E tanggal petto lekor bulan dhubellas e taon se kapeng tello polo petto' saellana Yoyakhin eangko' ka pambuwangan, Ewil-Merodakh jumenneng rato Babil. E taon jareya keya rato jareya noduwagi kabellasanna ka Yoyakhin, Yoyakhin epakalowar dhari penjara," 
2Kings25:28 sarta ekabecce'e. Yoyakhin eparenge pangkat se atenggiyan dhari to-rato laenna se ebuwang ka Babil keya. 
2Kings25:29 Yoyakhin la ta' ngagem kalambi penjara pole ban biyasana adha'ar e karaton sarta eparenge pesse kaangguy kaparlowanna re-saarena. 
2Kings25:30  
1Chronicles1:1 Silsilana bangsa Isra'il dhari Adam sampe' ka Ennoh toro' gilirra kantha reya: Adam Set Enos Kenan Mahalale'el Yared Henokh Metusalah Lamekh Ennoh. Ennoh kaagungan pottra lalake' katello: Sem, Ham ban Yafet." 
1Chronicles1:2  
1Chronicles1:3  
1Chronicles1:4  
1Chronicles1:5 Tra-pottra lake'na Yafet iya areya: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yawan, Tubal, Mesekh ban Tiras. Jareya kabbi bangatowana sa-bangsa se enyamae menorot nyamana reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles1:6 Toronanna Gomer iya areya oreng Askenas, Rifat ban Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Toronanna Yawan iya areya oreng Elisa, Spanyol, Siprus ban Rodes." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ana' lalake'anna Ham iya areya Kus, Messer, Libiya ban Kana'an. Jareya bangatowana sa-bangsa se enyamae menorot nyamana reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles1:9 Toronanna Kus iya areya oreng Seba, Hawila, Sabta, Ra'ema ban Sabtekha. Toronanna Ra'ema iya areya oreng Syeba ban Dedan. (" 
1Chronicles1:10 Kus andhi' ana' lalake' anyama Nimrod, se daddi rato kowat se dha'-adha' kadibi' matellok ra-nagara laen e dunnya.)" 
1Chronicles1:11 Toronanna Messer iya areya oreng Lidiya, Anamim, Lehabim, Naftuhim," 
1Chronicles1:12 Patrusim, Kasluhim ban Kareta. Jareya bangatowana oreng Filistin." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ana' lalake'anna Kana'an iya areya Sidon, se sareyang, ban Het. Jareya bangatowana sa-bangsa se esebbut menorot nyamana reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles1:14 Kana'an jareya bangatowana oreng Yebusi, Amori, Girgasi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hewi, Arki, Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arwadi, Semari ban Hamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ana' lalake'anna Sem iya areya Elam, Asyur, Arpakhsad, Lud, Aram, Us, Hul, Geter ban Mas. Jareya bangatowana sa-bangsa se enyamae menorot nyamana reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakhsad ramana Selah, ban Selah ramana Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa; se sareyang nyamana Peleg sabab e jamanna jareya sa-bangsa e dunnya reya eca-pecca; se nomer dhuwa' nyamana Yoktan. 
1Chronicles1:20 Toronanna Yoktan iya areya oreng Almodad, Selef, Hazar-Mawet, Yerah," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Uzal, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal, Abima'el, Syeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir, Hawila ban Yobab." 
1Chronicles1:24 Silsilana bangatowana bangsa Isra'il dhari Sem sampe' ka Ibrahim toro' gilirra kantha reya: Sem Arpakhsad Selah Eber Peleg Rehu Serug Nahor Terah Abram (alias Ibrahim). 
1Chronicles1:25  
1Chronicles1:26  
1Chronicles1:27  
1Chronicles1:28 Ibrahim kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Ishak ban Isma'il." 
1Chronicles1:29 Tra-pottrana Isma'il iya areya: Se sareyang Nebayot, pas Kedar, Adbe'el, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misyma, Duma, Masa, Hadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetur, Nafis ban Kedma." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ibrahim kaagungan seller asmana Ketura. Dhari seller jareya kaagungan pottra lalake'an se nyamana: Zimran, Yoksan, Medan, Midian, Isybak ban Su'ah. Yoksan kaagungan pottra lalake' se anyama Syeba ban Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midian kaagungan pottra lalake' iya areya Efa, Efer, Henokh, Abida ban Elda'a." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ishak pottrana Ibrahim kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Esau ban Yakub (se ajuluk Isra'il). 
1Chronicles1:35 Pottrana Esau se lalake' iya areya Elifas, Rehuwel, Yeus, Yaelam ban Korah." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifas jareya bangatowana suku Téman, Omar, Zefi, Gaetam, Kenas, Timna ban Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 Rehuwel jareya bangatowana suku Nahat, Zerah, Syama ban Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Pandhudhu' aslina tana Edom reya toronanna na'-ana'na Seir, iya areya Lotan, Syobal, Zibeyon, Ana, Disyon, Ezer ban Disyan. Ana' lalake'anna Lotan iya areya Hori ban Homam. Lotan andhi' taretan bine' kasorang, iya areya Timna. Ana' lalake'anna Syobal iya areya Aliyan, Manahat, Ebal, Syefi ban Onam. Ana' lalake'anna Zibeyon iya areya Aya ban Ana. Ana'na Ana iya areya Disyon, ban na'-ana'na Disyon iya areya Hamran, Esyban, Yitran ban Keran. Ana' lalake'anna Ezer iya areya Bilhan, Za'awan ban Ya'akan. Ana' lalake'anna Disyan iya areya Us ban Aran." 
1Chronicles1:39  
1Chronicles1:40  
1Chronicles1:41  
1Chronicles1:42  
1Chronicles1:43 Sabellunna badha rato se marenta Isra'il, tana Edom eparenta to-rato se kasebbut e baba reya: Bela pottrana Beor dhari Dinhaba Yobab pottrana Zerah dhari Bozra Husyam dhari dhaerana oreng Téman Hadad pottrana Bedad dhari Awit (Hadad jareya se makala oreng Midian e dhalem paperrangan e dhaera Mo'ab), Samla dhari Masreka Saul dhari Rehobot e penggir songay Ba'al-Hanan pottrana Akhbor Hadad dhari Pahi (rajina iya areya Mehetabe'el, pottrana Matred ban bajana Mezahab)." 
1Chronicles1:44  
1Chronicles1:45  
1Chronicles1:46  
1Chronicles1:47  
1Chronicles1:48  
1Chronicles1:49  
1Chronicles1:50  
1Chronicles1:51 Se tamaso' bangsa Edom reya iya areya suku Timna, Aliya, Yetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenas, Téman, Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiyel ban Iram; nyamana padha ngala' dhari nyamana kapala sukuna bang-sebang. 
1Chronicles2:1 Pottra lalake'anna Yakub badha dhubellas oreng, iya areya: Ruben, Simeyon, Lewi, Yehuda, Isakhar, Zebulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Yusup, Benyamin, Naftali, Gad, Asyer." 
1Chronicles2:3 Pottra lalake'anna Yehuda badha kalema. Ollena ban Batsyua rajina se dhari Kana'an iya areya: Er, Onan ban Sela; ollena ban rajina se anyama Tamar, se sabendherra mantona dibi', iya areya Peres ban Zerah. Er pottra sareyangnga Yehuda jareya ce' jahadda, sampe' bi' PANGERAN epate'e." 
1Chronicles2:4  
1Chronicles2:5 Peres andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Hezron ban Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 Zerah andhi' ana' lalake' kalema, iya areya: Zimri, Etan, Heman, Kalkol ban Dara." 
1Chronicles2:7 Akhan ana'na Karmi toronanna Zerah, madhateng balai ka ommat Isra'il lantaran ngala' barang rampasanna perrang se kodu eatorragi ka Allah malolo." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ana' lake'na Etan iya areya Azarya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezron kaagungan pottra lalake' katello: Yerahme'el, Ram ban Kaleb." 
1Chronicles2:10 Garis silsilana dhari Ram sampe' ka Isay kantha reya: Ram Aminadab Nahason (pamimpinna suku Yehuda) 
1Chronicles2:11 Salmon Bowas 
1Chronicles2:12 Obed Isay. 
1Chronicles2:13 Pottra lalake'anna Isay badha kapetto. Areya' ma-nyamana, etoro' gilir menorot omorra: Eliyab, Abinadab, Simeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netane'el, Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozem, Daud." 
1Chronicles2:16 Isay gi' kaagungan pottra babine' kadhuwa, iya areya Zeruya ban Abigail. Zeruya kaagungan pottra katello: Abisai, Yowab ban Asa'el." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail araji Yeter toronanna Isma'il, pas kaagungan pottra lake' kasorang se anyama Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleb pottrana Hezron akabin ban Azuba, laju kaagungan pottra babine' nyamana Yeriyot. Yeriyot reya andhi' ana' lalake' katello: Yeser, Sobab, Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Saellana Azuba seda, Kaleb abine Efrat, laju kaagungan pottra lalake' nyamana Hur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ana' lake'na Hur anyama Uri ban kompoyya anyama Bezale'el. 
1Chronicles2:21 E bakto yuswana Hezron sabidak taon laju abine taretan bine'na Gileyad, pottrana Makhir. Se kadhuwa jareya laju kaagungan pottra lalake' nyamana Segub," 
1Chronicles2:22 dineng Segub andhi' ana' lalake' nyamana Ya'ir, se andhi' disa tello lekor meggi' e dhaera Gileyad." 
1Chronicles2:23 Tape karaja'an Gesur ban Aram makala sabidak disa e dhaera jareya, tamaso' sa-disana oreng Ya'ir, disana Kenat, ban sa-disa se kene' e sabingkerra. Sakabbinna oreng se neng e jadhiya padha toronanna Makhir ramana Gileyad." 
1Chronicles2:24 Saellana Hezron seda, Kaleb pottrana, abine Efrat, randhana ramana. Pottrana Kaleb ban Efrat se lalake' anyama Asyur; jareya se maddek kottha Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerahme'el ana' sareyangnga Hezron andhi' ana' lalake' kalema, iya areya: Ram se sareyang, pas Buna, Oren, Ozem ban Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ram andhi' ana' lake' katello: Ma'as, Yamin ban Eker. Yerahme'el andhi' bine laen, nyamana Atara, ban dhari Atara jareya Yerahme'el andhi' ana' lalake' anyama Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Ana' lake'na Onam kadhuwa, iya areya: Samai ban Yada. Samai andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Nadab ban Abisur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisur abine Abihail, laju andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, Ahban ban Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab kaka'na Abisur andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa keya, iya areya Seled ban Apa'im, tape Seled seda ta' kalaban andhi' ana' lake'." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apa'im ramana Yisei, dineng Yisei ramana Sesan, ban Sesan ramana Ahlai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada taretanna Samai andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Yeter ban Yonatan. Tape Yeter seda ta' kalaban andhi' ana' lake'." 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonatan andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Pelet ban Zaza. Jareya kabbi toronanna Yerahme'el." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesan ta' andhi' ana' lake', pera' ana' bine'. Sesan kaagungan bareng, oreng Messer, nyamana Yarha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Yarha jareya bi' Sesan epakabin ban sala settong dhari ana'na, se pas andhi' ana' lake' anyama Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Garis toronan dhari Atai sampe' ka Elisama toro' gilirra kantha reya: Atai Natan Zabad Eflal Obed Yehu Azarya Heles Elasa Sismai Salum Yekamya Elisama. 
1Chronicles2:37  
1Chronicles2:38  
1Chronicles2:39  
1Chronicles2:40  
1Chronicles2:41  
1Chronicles2:42 Kaleb reya taretanna Yerahme'el, kaagungan pottra lake' kasorang anyama Mesa. Mesa jareya pottra sareyang, daddi ramana Zif, dineng Zif ramana Maresa, Maresa ramana Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebron andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Korah, Tapuwah, Rekem ban Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema reya ramana Raham. Kompoyya Sema anyama Yorkeyam. Rekem kaka'na Sema, jareya ramana Samai;" 
1Chronicles2:45 dineng Samai ramana Ma'on, ban Ma'on ramana Bet-Zur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaleb kaagungan seller anyama Efa. Pottra lalake'anna ollena ban Efa badha katello, nyamana Haran, Moza ban Gazes. Haran gi' kaagungan pottra laen se anyama Gazes. (" 
1Chronicles2:47 Badha oreng anyama Yohdai, andhi' ana' lalake' kaennem: Regem, Yotam, Gesan, Pelet, Efa ban Sa'af.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaleb kaagungan seller laen se anyama Ma'akha. Bi' seller jareya Kaleb kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa se anyama Seber ban Tirhana; 
1Chronicles2:49 saellana jareya laju kaagungan pottra lalake' dhadhuwa' aggi' anyama Sa'af ban Sewa. Sa'af jareya se maddek kottha Madmana, dineng Sewa se maddek kottha Makhbena ban Gibeya. Kaleb kaagungan keya pottra bine' kasorang nyamana Akhsa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Se kasebbut e baba reya toronanna Kaleb keya: Hur pottra sareyangnga Kaleb ban rajina se anyama Efrat. Syobal pottrana Hur, jareya se maddek kottha Kiryat-Yearim." 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma pottrana se nomer dhuwa', se maddek kottha Betlehem; ban Haref pottrana se nomer tello' se maddek kottha Bet-Gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Syobal se maddek kottha Kiryat-Yearim jareya bangatowana oreng Haroë, bangatowana saparona oreng Menuhot," 
1Chronicles2:53 ban bangatowana om-kaom se neng e Kiryat-Yearim, iya areya kaom Yetri, Puti, Sumati ban Misrai. (Pandhudhu'na kottha Zora ban Esyta'ol reya reng-oreng se asalla dhari om-kaom jareya.)" 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma se maddek kottha Betlehem rowa bangatowana oreng Netofa, oreng Atarot-Bet-Yowab, ban oreng Zori, iya areya sala settong dhari kaom se dhadhuwa' se neng e Manahti." 
1Chronicles2:55 Dhari kaom Tirati, Simati ban Sukati se badha e kottha Yabes badha reng-oreng se ahli e dhalem parkara noles ban nyalen rat-sorat se penting. Jareya reng-oreng Keni se akabin campor ban oreng Rekhab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Tra-pottrana Daud se lahir e Hebron, etoro' gilir menorot omorra, iya areya: Amnon – ebuna anyama Ahino'am, oreng Yizre'el Daniyel – ebuna anyama Abigail, oreng Karmel Absalom – ebuna anyama Ma'akha, pottrena Talmai rato Gesur Adoniya – ebuna anyama Hagit Sefaca – ebuna anyama Abital Yitreyam – ebuna anyama Egla." 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Pottrana Daud se kaennem jareya lahir e Hebron kennengnganna salerana marenta pettong taon satengnga abidda. E Yerusalim Daud marenta tello polo tello' taon abidda," 
1Chronicles3:5 ban bannya' pottrana se lahir e jadhiya. Ban rajina se anyama Batsyeba, pottrana Amiyel, Daud kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, se lahir e Yerusalim, iya areya: Simeya, Sobab, Natan ban Sulaiman." 
1Chronicles3:6 Gi' badha pole pottra lake' laenna, bannya'na kasanga, iya areya: Yibhar, Elisua, Elifelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nogah, Nefeg, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Elyada ban Elifelet." 
1Chronicles3:9 Laen dhari jareya kabbi, gi' badha pole tra-pottra lake'na Daud ollena ban ler-sellerra. Ban gi' badha pole pottra bine'na kasorang iya areya Tamar." 
1Chronicles3:10 Silsilana to-rato Isra'il dhari Rato Sulaiman sampe' ka Yosiya kantha reya: Sulaiman, Rehabeyam, Abiyam, Asa, Yosafat, Yehoram, Ahaziya, Yowas, Amaziya, Uziya, Yotam, Ahas, Hizkiya, Manasye, Amon ban Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:11  
1Chronicles3:12  
1Chronicles3:13  
1Chronicles3:14  
1Chronicles3:15 Yosiya kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Yokanan, Yoyakim, Zedekiya, ban Yowahas." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yoyakim kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Yoyakhin ban Zedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Areya' toronanna Yoyakhin, rato se etawan oreng Babil. Pottra lalake'anna kapetto: Seyaltiyel," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkhiram, Pedaya, Syenazar, Yekamya, Hosama ban Nedabya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaya kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa: Zerubabil ban Simei. Zerubabil kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa anyama Mesulam ban Hananya, ban pottra bine' kasorang anyama Selomit." 
1Chronicles3:20 Badha pole pottra lalake'anna kalema, iya areya Hasuba, Ohel, Berekhya, Hasaja ban Yusab-Hesed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananya kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya: Pelaca, ban Yesaya. Yesaya reya ramana Refaya, Refaya ramana Arnan, Arnan ramana Obaja, ban Obaja ramana Sekanya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sekanya kaagungan pottra lalake' kasorang nyamana Semaya, ban Semaya kaagungan pottra lalake' kalema nyamana Hatus, Yigal, Bariah, Ne'arya ban Safat." 
1Chronicles3:23 Pottra lalake'anna Ne'arya badha katello nyamana Elyoënai, Hizkiya ban Azrikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elyoënai kaagungan pottra lalake' kapetto, iya areya Hodawya, Elyasib, Pelaya, Akub, Yokanan, Delaya ban Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Areya' sabagiyan dhari toronanna Yehuda: Peres, Hezron, Karmi, Hur ban Syobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Syobal reya ramana Reaya, Reaya ramana Yahat. Yahat andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa: Ahumai ban Lahad. Reng-oreng jareya bangatowana oreng kottha Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Pottra lake'na Kaleb se sareyang ollena ban rajina se anyama Efrat iya areya Hur. Toronanna Hur reya se maddek kottha Betlehem. Etam, Pnuwel ban Ezer reya tra-pottrana Hur. Etam kaagungan pottra lalake' katello nyamana Yizre'el, Isma ban Idbas, sarta pottra bine' kasorang, iya areya Hazelelponi. Pnuwel maddek kottha Gedor ban Ezer maddek kottha Husa." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Asyhur se maddek kottha Tekowa kaagungan raji dhadhuwa', iya areya Hela ban Na'ara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Pottra lalake'anna ollena ban Na'ara badha kaempa, iya areya: Ahuzam, Hefer, Temeni ban Ahastari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ban Hela Asyhur kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya Zeret, Yizhar ban Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Anub ban Hazobeba reya pottra lalake'anna Kos, bangatowana kaom toronanna Aharhel pottrana Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Badha oreng lalake' anyama Yabes; oreng jareya ehormadi oreng alebbiyan dhari tan-taretanna. Bi' ebuna enyamae Yabes lantaran ebuna nanggung sake' ce' sarana e bakto rembi' Yabes jareya. 
1Chronicles4:10 Tape Yabes adu'a ka Allah se esemba oreng Isra'il, atorra, “Adhu, Guste Allah, berkadi abdidalem, palebarragi dhaera kakobasa'an abdidalem. Jaga'agi abdidalem sareng pajauwagi dhari sadajana balai sopaja abdidalem ta' sangsara'a.” Ban Allah ngabbuli parnyo'onanna." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub taretanna Suha andhi' ana' lalake' anyama Mehir. Mehir andhi' ana' Eston," 
1Chronicles4:12 ban Eston andhi' ana' lalake' katello, iya areya Bet-Rafa, Paseyah ban Tehina, se maddek kottha Nahas. Toronanna reng-oreng jareya badha e kottha Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenas andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa nyamana Otniyel ban Seraya. Otniyel andhi' ana' lalake' laenna kadhuwa, iya areya Hatat ban Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Ana'na Meonotai iya areya Ofra. Pottrana Zeraya iya areya Yowab, se maddek Cora Pandhiyan. Pandhudhu' e cora jareya padha ahli e dhalem agabay karajinan tanang." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kaleb pottrana Yefune kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Iru, Ela ban Na'am. Pottrana Ela iya areya Kenas." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yehalele'el andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Zif, Zifa, Tireya ban Asare'el." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa: iya areya Yeter, Mered, Efer ban Yalon. Mered abine Bica pottrena rato Messer, laju kaagungan pottra babine' anyama Miriyam, ban pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Samai ban Yisba. Yisba jareya se maddek kottha Estemoa. Mered abine laen pole, iya areya babine' dhari suku Yehuda, pas kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya: areya Yered se maddek kottha Gedor, Heber se maddek kottha Sokho, ban Yekutiyel se maddek kottha Zanowah." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa: iya areya Yeter, Mered, Efer ban Yalon. Mered abine Bica pottrena rato Messer, laju kaagungan pottra babine' anyama Miriyam, ban pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Samai ban Yisba. Yisba jareya se maddek kottha Estemoa. Mered abine laen pole, iya areya babine' dhari suku Yehuda, pas kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya: areya Yered se maddek kottha Gedor, Heber se maddek kottha Sokho, ban Yekutiyel se maddek kottha Zanowah." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Hodiya abine taretanna Naham. Toronanna daddi bangatowana kaom Garmi ban kaom Ma'akha. Kaom Garmi neng e kottha Kehila, ban kaom Ma'akha neng e kottha Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Simon andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Amnon, Rina, Benhanan ban Tilon. Yisei kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Zohet ban Ben-Zohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Sala settong dhari pottrana Yehuda nyamana Sela. Toronanna iya areya: Er se maddek kottha Lekha Lada se maddek kottha Maresa Kaom tokang tennonna kaen linen e kottha Bet-Asybeya Yokim Pandhudhu' e kottha Kozeba Yowas Sarap se abine babine'an Mo'ab, ban saellana jareya laju abali ka Betlehem. Dhaftar jareya ollena nyonto dhari catheddan kona." 
1Chronicles4:22  
1Chronicles4:23 Reng-oreng jareya kabbi daddi tokang gabayya gendhi ban pennay se eagemma rato, sarta abengko e kottha Neta'im ban Gedera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeyon kaagungan pottra lalake' kalema iya areya: Nemuwel, Yamin, Yarib, Zerah ban Saul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Toronanna Saul iya areya: Salum Mibsam Misyma Hamuwel Zakur Simei. 
1Chronicles4:26  
1Chronicles4:27 Simei kaagungan pottra dhu lekor: nem bellas lalake' ban nem-ennem babine'. Tape la-balana Simei sakone' pottrana. Toronanna Simeyon bannya'na ta' akantha toronanna Yehuda. 
1Chronicles4:28 Sampe' ka jamanna Rato Daud, toronanna Simeyon abengko e tha-kottha reya: Bersyeba, Molada, Hazar-Suwal," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuwel, Horma, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-Markabot, Hazar-Susim, Bet-Biri ban Sa'ara'im." 
1Chronicles4:32 Reng-oreng jareya abengko keya neng e lema' kennengngan laenna, iya areya Etam, Ain, Rimon, Tokhen, Asan," 
1Chronicles4:33 ban e pong-kampong e ma'-semma'na kennengngan jareya, jauna sampe' gan kottha Ba'al e bagiyan bara' dhaja. Kantha jareya catheddan se badha e toronanna Simeyon parkara silsila ban tha-kottha se ekennengnge reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles4:34 Areya' nyamana la-kapala kaom e dhalem suku Simeyon: Mesobab Yamlekh Yosa ana'na Amaziya Yowël Yehu pottrana Yosibiya (Yosibiya reya pottrana Seraya, bajana Asiyel). Elyoënai Ya'akoba Yesohaya Asaya Adiyel Yesimiyel Benaya Ziza ana'na Sifei (garis silsila dhari Sifei ka attas iya areya: Alon, Yedaya, Simri, Semaya). Sarrena kalowargana reng-oreng jareya terros atamba," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 daddi reng-oreng jareya mencar ka bara' sampe' ka seddi'na kottha Gedor se badha e settong cora. E bagiyan temorra cora jareya reng-oreng buru nemmo talon pangowanan se landhu sarta lebar ban ta' ramme, daddi cocok kaangguy ebinna. Lamba' dhaera jareya ekennengnge reng-oreng Ham se odhi'na rokon." 
1Chronicles4:40  
1Chronicles4:41 E jamanna Hizkiya, rato Yehuda, toronanna Simeyon se kasebbut e attas jareya alorok Gedor. Mah-kemahna pandhudhu' kottha ban oreng Meunim epaancor kabbi, dineng reng-orengnga padha eojuk. Saellana jareya tanana laju ekennengnge sabab bannya' talonna se ekaparlo kaangguy pangowananna ebinna." 
1Chronicles4:42 Lema ratos oreng laenna dhari suku Simeyon ngalle ka Edom e temor, epimpin tra-pottrana Yisei, iya areya Pelaca, Ne'arya, Refaya ban Uziyel." 
1Chronicles4:43 Reng-oreng jareya mate'e re-karena oreng Amalek se gi' odhi', laju terros neptep e jadhiya salanjangnga." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ruben reya pottra sareyangnga Yakub. Tape sarrena Ruben tedhung apolong ban sala settong dhari sellerra ramana, ha'na menangka ana' sareyang ecabut laju eparengngagi ka Yusup. Maske kantha jareya, toronanna Yakub se paleng kowat banne suku Yusup, tape suku Yehuda. La'-mala' se dha'-adha' kadibi' daddi ratona sakabbinna ommat Isra'il jareya dhari suku Yehuda." 
1Chronicles5:2  
1Chronicles5:3 Ruben pottra sareyangnga Yakub, kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Henokh, Palu, Hezron ban Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Areya' toro' gilirra toronanna Yowël: Semaya, Gog, Simei, Mikha, Reaya, Ba'al ban Be'era. Be'era reya se mimpin suku Ruben e bakto etangkep bi' Tiglat-Pileser rato Asyur, laju egiba ka tana pambuwangan." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 E dhalem silsila ecathet keya la-kapala suku se kasebbut e baba reya e dhalem suku Ruben: Yeiyel, Zakhariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ban Bela pottrana Azas, bajana Sema dhari kaom Yowël. Suku Ruben neng e Aroër ban e dhaerana se molae dhari Aroër ka dhaja sampe' ka Nebo ban Ba'al-Meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ebinna ce' bannya'na e dhaera Gileyad. Daddi suku jareya ngennengnge dhaera bagiyan temor terros ka ra-ara beddhi se malanjang sampe' ka Songay Efrat. 
1Chronicles5:10 E jamanna Rato Saul, suku Ruben alorok ban makala oreng Hagri e temorra Gileyad, sarta laju ngobasane nagara jareya." 
1Chronicles5:11 E dhaja'anna dhaera kakobasa'anna suku Ruben, iya areya e tana Basan sampe' gan Salka e bagiyan temor, ekennengnge suku Gad." 
1Chronicles5:12 Dhari suku Gad jareya Yowël bangatowana kaom se kasohor, ban Safam bangatowana kaom se nomer dhuwa'. Yaenai ban Safat bangatowana om-kaom laenna e dhaera Basan." 
1Chronicles5:13 Reng-oreng laenna e dhalem suku Gad tamaso' e dhalem om-kaom se papetto' se kasebbut e baba reya: Mikha'el, Mesulam, Syeba, Yorai, Yakan, Ziya ban Eber." 
1Chronicles5:14 Jareya padha toronanna Abihail pottrana Huri. Toro' gilirra silsilana reng-oreng jareya dhari baba ka attas kantha reya: Abihail, Huri, Yarowah, Gileyad, Mikha'el, Yesisai, Yahdo, Bus." 
1Chronicles5:15 Kapalana om-kaom jareya iya areya Ahi pottrana Abdiyel, bajana Guni." 
1Chronicles5:16 Reng-oreng jareya ngennengnge dhaera Basan ban Gileyad ban tha-kottha e dhaera jareya sarta sakabbinna talon e Saron. 
1Chronicles5:17 Silsila reya ekagabay e jamanna Yotam rato Yehuda, ban Yerobeyam rato Isra'il." 
1Chronicles5:18 E dhalem suku Ruben, Gad ban suku Manasye se e temorranna Yordan badha pa' polo empa' ebu pettong atos sabidak oreng parjurit se la elate ban se la apangalaman e dhalem aguna'agi tameng, peddhang ban gandhiba." 
1Chronicles5:19 Rit-parjurit jareya aperrang ban suku Yetur, Nafis, ban Nodab, iya areya ku-suku e dhalem bangsa Hagri." 
1Chronicles5:20 Rit-parjurit jareya parcaja ka Allah, ban nyo'on tolong ka Salerana, daddi Allah ngabbullagi parnyo'onanna sarta apareng kamennangan ka reng-oreng jareya e dhalem paperrangan ban reng-oreng Hagri ban sakutuna." 
1Chronicles5:21 Lantaran paperrangan jareya kalakon dhari kasokanna Allah, daddi bannya' moso se epate'e. Moso se etawan badha saratos ebu oreng, rampasanna aropa onta saeket ebu, dumba dhu ratos saeket ebu ban hemar dhu ebu. Saellana jareya reng-oreng buru laju neptep e dhaera jareya sampe' ka baktona bangsa Isra'il etawan ban egiba ka pambuwangan." 
1Chronicles5:22  
1Chronicles5:23 Sabagiyan dhari suku Manasye enneng e dhaera Basan terros ka dhaja sampe' gan bagiyan Ba'al-Hermon, Senir ban Gunong Hermon. Reng-oreng jareya sajan abit sajan bannya'." 
1Chronicles5:24 La-kapalana kaomma iya areya: Hefer, Yisei, Eliyel, Azriyel, Yeremiya, Hodawya ban Yahdiyel. Jareya kabbi rit-parjurit se parjuga." 
1Chronicles5:25 Oreng Isra'il ta' esto ka Allah se esemba bangatowana, mongkore Allah ban nyemba ka ba-dibana sa-bangsa se la eojuk bi' Allah dhari nagara Kana'an." 
1Chronicles5:26 Daddi Allah laju maguli panggaliyanna Rato Pul dhari Asyur, sampe' rato jareya alorok nagara jareya. Rato Pul jareya kasohor ban nyama Tiglat-Pileser. Suku Ruben, Gad ban suku Manasye se badha e temorra Yordan laju eangko' menangka tawanan sarta ebuwang ka Halah, Habor, Hara ban ka settong kennengngan e seddi'anna Songay Gozan. E jadhiya reng-oreng jareya terros neptep sampe' are teya." 
1Chronicles6:1 Lewi kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Gerson, Kehat ban Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kehat kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa iya areya: Amram, Yizhar, Hebron ban Uziyel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya: Harun ban Mosa, ban pottra babine' kasorang, iya areya Miriyam. Harun kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Nadab, Abihu, Eleyazar ban Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Toro' gilirra silsilana Eleyazar kantha reya: Pinehas, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Buki, Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Zerahya, Merayot," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Zadok, Ahima'as," 
1Chronicles6:9 Azarya, Yokanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Azarya (se aladine e Padalemman Socce se epaddek Rato Sulaiman e Yerusalim)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Zadok, Salum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Hilkiya, Azarya," 
1Chronicles6:14 Seraya, Yozadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yozadak jareya noro' egiba epabareng ban reng-oreng Yehuda sarta reng-oreng Yerusalim laenna, e bakto PANGERAN mowang reng-oreng jareya ka nagara laen kalaban parantara'anna Nebukadnezar." 
1Chronicles6:16 Lewi kaagungan pottra lalake'an katello, iya areya: Gerson, Kehat ban Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Se katello jareya padha kaagungan pottra bang-sebang. Libni ban Simei tra-pottrana Gerson; 
1Chronicles6:18 Amram, Yizhar, Hebron ban Uziyel tra-pottrana Kehat." 
1Chronicles6:19 Mahli ban Mosi tra-pottrana Merari. 
1Chronicles6:20 Garis toronanna Gerson iya areya: Libni, Yahat, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yowah, Ido, Zerah, Ye'atrai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Garis toronanna Kehat iya areya: Aminadab, Korah, Asir," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkana, Ebyasaf, Asir," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat, Uriyel, Uziya, Saul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkana kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya: Amasai ban Ahimot." 
1Chronicles6:26 Garis toronanna Ahimot iya areya: Elkana, Zofai, Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliyab, Yeroham, Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuwel kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya: Yowël se sareyang ban Abiya se bungso." 
1Chronicles6:29 Garis toronanna Merari iya areya: Mahli, Libni, Simei, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Simeya, Hagiya, Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Sajjegga Petthe Parjanjiyan ealle ka kennengnganna kabakteyan e Yerusalim, Rato Daud mele reng-oreng se epangoros nyanyeyan se eangguy amolja'agi PANGERAN e Padalemman Socce." 
1Chronicles6:32 Reng-oreng jareya te-gante epaneggu' kawajiban e Kemah Socce e jaman sabellunna Rato Sulaiman maddek Padalemman Socce. 
1Chronicles6:33 Garis silsilana reng-oreng se epassrae kawajiban jareya kantha e baba reya: Dhari kaom Kehat: Heman pottrana Yowël, se mimpin kalompo'na tokang nyanye se kapeng settong. Garis silsilana dhari baba ka attas sampe' ka Yakub iya areya: Heman, Yowël, Samuwel," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elkana, Yeroham, Eliyel, Towah," 
1Chronicles6:35 Zuf, Elkana, Mahat, Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Yowël, Azarya, Zefanya," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahat, Asir, Ebyasaf, Korah," 
1Chronicles6:38 Yizhar, Kehat, Lewi, Yakub." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asaf reya pamimpinna kalompo'na tokang nyanye se kapeng dhuwa'. Garis silsilana dhari baba ka attas sampe' ka Lewi iya areya: Asaf, Berekhya, Simeya," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikha'el, Ba'aseya, Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etai, Zerah, Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Etan, Zima, Simei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Yahat, Gerson, Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etan reya pamimpinna kalompo'na tokang nyanye se kapeng tello'; tamaso' kaomma Merari. Garis silsilana dhari baba ka attas sampe' ka Lewi iya areya: Etan, Kisi, Abdi, Malukh," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hasabya, Amaziya, Hilkiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amzi, Bani, Semer," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mahli, Mosi, Merari, Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Lalakon en-laenna e kennengnganna kabakteyan epassra'agi ka ca-kancana se padha tamaso' oreng Lewi keya. 
1Chronicles6:49 Harun ban toronanna epassrae lalakon ngobbar dupa, ngatorragi kurban obbaran e attas mezba, alampa'agi sakabbinna opacara e kennengngan Se Mahasocce, ban ngatorragi kurban palebbaranna dusana ommat Isra'il. Jareya kabbi ejalannagi menorot du-petoduna Mosa abdina Allah." 
1Chronicles6:50 Areya' garis toronanna Harun: Eleyazar, Pinehas, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki, Uzi, Zerahya," 
1Chronicles6:52 Merayot, Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadok, Ahima'as." 
1Chronicles6:54 Areya' dhaera se ebagi ka kaom Kehat toronanna Harun menangka kennengnganna. Reng-oreng jareya narema bagiyan se dha'-adha' dhari tana se etantowagi menangka bagiyanna oreng Lewi. 
1Chronicles6:55 Se tamaso' tana se etarema reng-oreng jareya iya areya Hebron e dhaera Yehuda, ban lon-talon pangowanan e sabingkerra." 
1Chronicles6:56 Tape gal-teggal ban sa-disa se tamaso' ka kottha jareya ebagi ka Kaleb ban Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Toronanna Harun narema Hebron kottha sowaka, Yatir, ban sa-disa se kasebbut e baba reya sarta lon-talonna: disa Libna, Estemoa, Hilen, Debir, Asan, Bet-Semes." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 E dhaerana suku Benyamin toronanna Harun jareya narema sa-disa se kasebbut e baba reya ban lon-talonna: Geba, Alemet ban Anatot. Kabbi badha tello bellas disa se egabaya kennengnganna ga-kalowargana." 
1Chronicles6:61 Sapolo disana suku Manasye e bara'na Songay Yordan ebagi kalaban eellot ka ga-kalowarga e dhalem kaom Kehat se ta' olle bagiyan tana. 
1Chronicles6:62 Ga-kalowarga e dhalem kaom Gerson olle bagiyan tello bellas disa e dhaerana suku Isakhar, Asyer, Naftali, ban Manasye se e Basan e temorra Songay Yordan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Kalaban eellot keya, ga-kalowarga e dhalem kaom Merari olle bagiyan dhubellas disa e dhaerana suku Ruben, Gad ban Zebulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kantha jareya carana bangsa Isra'il magi ka suku Lewi sa-disa ban lon-talon pangowananna se ekagabaya kennengnganna. 
1Chronicles6:65 Sa-disa e dhaerana suku Yehuda, Simeyon ban Benyamin se kasebbut gella', egi-bagi ngangguy ellot keya." 
1Chronicles6:66 E dhaerana suku Efraim, sabagiyan dhari ga-kalowargana kaom Kehat narema sa-disa se kasebbut e baba reya ban lon-talon pangowanan e sabingkerra:" 
1Chronicles6:67 Sikhem, kottha sowaka e pagunongan e dhaera Efraim jareya, Gezer," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokmeyam, Bet-Horon," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayalon ban Gat-Rimon. 
1Chronicles6:70 E dhaerana suku Manasye se e bara'na Songay Yordan reng-oreng jareya narema disa Aner ban Bileyam ban lon-talon pangowanan e sabingkerra. 
1Chronicles6:71 Ga-kalowargana kaom Gerson olle bagiyan sa-disa se kasebbut e baba reya ban lon-talon pangowanan e sabingkerra: E dhaerana suku Manasye, e temorra Songay Yordan: Golan e Basan ban Asytarot." 
1Chronicles6:72 E dhaerana suku Isakhar: Kedes, Daberat," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot ban Anem. 
1Chronicles6:74 E dhaerana suku Asyer: Masal, Abdon," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok ban Rehob. 
1Chronicles6:76 E dhaerana suku Naftali: Kedes e Galilea, Hamon ban Kiryata'im." 
1Chronicles6:77 Toronanna Merari se gi' ta' olle bagiyan tana, olle bagiyan sa-disa se kasebbut e baba reya ban lon-talon pangowanan e sabingkerra: E dhaerana suku Zebulon: Rimono ban Tabor." 
1Chronicles6:78 E dhaerana suku Ruben, e temorra Songay Yordan e seddi'na Yerikho: Bezer e tana tenggi, Yahas," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot ban Mefa'at. 
1Chronicles6:80 E dhaerana suku Gad: Ramot e Gileyad, Mahana'im," 
1Chronicles6:81 Hesybon ban Yaezer. 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakhar kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Tola, Pu'a, Yasub ban Simron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola kaagungan pottra lalake' kaennem, iya areya: Uzi, Refaya, Yeriyel, Yahmai, Yibsam ban Samuwel. Jareya kabbi kapala kalowarga e dhalem kaom Tola, sarta kaetong rit-parjurit se parjuga. E jamanna Rato Daud, toronanna reng-oreng jareya bannya'na dhu lekor ebu nem atos oreng." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi kaagungan pottra lalake' kasorang nyamana Yizrahya. Yizrahya ban pottra lalake'anna se kaempa, iya areya Mikha'el, Obaja, Yowël ban Yisiya daddi la-kapalana kaom." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ji-rajina ban tra-pottrana talebat bannya'na, sampe' toronanna bisa nyadhiya'agi tello polo ennem ebu oreng lalake'an se epamaso' dines tantara." 
1Chronicles7:5 Menorot dhaftar se resme, dhari sakabbinna kalowarga e dhalem suku Isakhar badha ballung polo petto' ebu oreng lalake'an se nyokobi syarat kaangguy maso' dinessa tantara." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benyamin kaagungan pottra lalake', iya areya: Bela, Bekher, ban Yediyael." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela kaagungan pottra lalake' kalema, iya areya: Ezbon, Uzi, Uziyel, Yerimot ban Iri. Jareya kabbi la-kapalana kalowarga e dhalem kaomma ban kaetong rit-parjurit se parjuga. E dhalem dhaftarra katoronanna badha dhu lekor ebu tello polo empa' oreng lalake'an se nyokobi syarat kaangguy maso' dinessa tantara." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekher kaagungan pottra lalake' kasanga, iya areya: Zemira, Yowas, Eliyezer, Elyoënai, Omri, Yeremot, Abiya, Anatot ban Alemet." 
1Chronicles7:9 Jareya la-kapalana kalowarga e dhalem kaomma. Menorot dhaftar se resmi, dhari sakabbinna kalowarga e dhalem toronanna reng-oreng jareya, badha dhu polo ebu dhu ratos oreng lalake'an se nyokobi syarat kaangguy maso' dinessa tantara." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediyael kaagungan pottra lalake' kasorang, iya areya Bilhan. Bilhan kaagungan pottra lalake' kapetto, iya areya: Yeus, Benyamin, Ehud, Kena'ana, Zetan, Tarsis ban Ahisahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Jareya la-kapala kalowarga e dhalem kaomma, ban tamaso' rit-parjurit se parjuga. E dhalem dhaftarra toronanna badha petto bellas ebu dhu ratos oreng lalake'an se nyokobi syarat kaangguy maso' dinessa tantara." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supim ban Hupim toronanna Ir. Husim pottra lake'na Dan. 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftali kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Yahziyel, Guni, Yezer ban Salum. Jareya ja-bajana Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasye ban sellerra se dhari Aram, kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, iya areya Asriyel ban Makhir. Pottrana Makhir iya areya Gileyad." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makhir nyareyagi babine' se egabay rajina Hupim ban Supim. Rajina Makhir anyama Ma'akha. Pottra lake'na Makhir se nomer dhuwa' iya areya Zelafeyad. Zelafeyad ta' kaagungan pottra lalake', pera' pottra babine'." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ma'akha rajina Makhir babar lalake' kadhuwa, nyamana Peres ban Seres; Peres kaagungan pottra lalake' kadhuwa, nyamana Ulam ban Rekem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam kaagungan pottra lalake' kasorang, nyamana Bedan. Jareya toronanna Gileyad pottrana Makhir, bajana Manasye." 
1Chronicles7:18 Taretan bine'na Gileyad se anyama Molekhet kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Isyhod, Abiyezer ban Mahla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Semida kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Ahyan, Sekhem, Likhi ban Aniyam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efraim kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Sutelah, Ezer ban Elad. Garis toronanna Efraim dhari Sutelah iya areya Bered, Tahat, Elada, Tahat, Zabad, Sutelah. Ezer ban Elad epate'e oreng e bakto ngeco'a ebinna pandhudhu' aslina nagara Gad." 
1Chronicles7:21  
1Chronicles7:22 Ramana sossa sampe' pan-barampan are abidda, sampe' tan-taretanna dhateng alepor atena." 
1Chronicles7:23 Saellana jareya Efraim apolong asare pole ban rajina; rajina jareya laju bubut, pas babar lalake'. Kana' jareya bi' Efraim enyamae Beriya, lantaran mosiba se la ealame gella'." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efraim kaagungan pottra babine' se anyama Se'era. Se'era jareya se maddek tha-kottha Bet-Horon Baba ban Bet-Horon Attas, sarta kottha Uza ban Se'era." 
1Chronicles7:25 Badha pole pottra lake'na Efraim, nyamana Refah. Garis toronanna Refah kantha reya: Resef, Telah, Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladan, Amihud, Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun, Yusak." 
1Chronicles7:28 Bagiyanna tana se ebagi kaangguy kennengnganna reng-oreng jareya iya areya dhari Betel sampe' gan Na'aran e bagiyan temor, ban Gezer e bagiyan bara' sarta sa-disa e sabingkerra tha-kottha jareya. E dhaera jareya tamaso' kottha Sikhem ban Aya, sarta sa-disa e sakalenglengnga." 
1Chronicles7:29 Toronanna Manasye ngobasane tha-kottha Bet-Seyan, Ta'anakh, Megido, Dor ban sa-disa e sakalenglengnga. Jareya kabbi bagiyanna tana se ekennengnge toronanna Yusup pottrana Yakub." 
1Chronicles7:30 Se kasebbut e baba reya toronanna Asyer. Asyer kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Yimna, Yiswa, Yiswi ban Beriya, sarta pottra babine' kasorang nyamana Serah." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriya andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa iya areya Heber ban Malkiyel se maddek kottha Birzait. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heber andhi' ana' lalake' katello iya areya: Yaflet, Somer, Hotam ban pottra babine' kasorang iya areya Suwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yaflet andhi' ana' lalake' katello keya, iya areya: Pasakh, Bimhab ban Asywat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Somer taretanna Yaflet andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Ahi, Rohga, Yehuba ban Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Hotam, taretanna Yaflet settonganna andhi' ana' lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Zofah, Yimna, Seles ban Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Toronanna Sofah iya areya Su'ah, Harnefer, Syuwal, Beri, Yimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezer, Hod, Sama, Silsa, Yitram ban Be'era." 
1Chronicles7:38 Toronanna Yeter iya areya Yefune, Pispa ban Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Toronanna Ula iya areya Arah, Haniyel ban Rizya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Jareya toronanna Asyer; kabbi padha daddi kapala kalowarga, kalonta menangka pahlawan-pahlawan se parjuga sarta menangka pin-pamimpin raja. E dhalem dhaftarra toronanna Asyer badha nem lekor ebu oreng lalake'an se nyokobi syarat kaangguy maso' daddi tantara." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamin kaagungan pottra lalake' kalema. Menorot toro' gilirra omorra iya areya: Bela, Asybel, Ahrah," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha ban Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Toronanna Bela iya areya Adar, Gera, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua, Na'aman, Ahowah," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sefufan ban Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Toronanna Ehud iya areya Na'aman, Ahiya ban Gera. Jareya la-kapala kalowarga se lamba' enneng e Geba. Tape reng-oreng jareya eojuk dhari jadhiya, pas epimpin Gera ngalle ka Manahat sarta enneng e jadhiya. Gera andhi' ana' kadhuwa iya areya Uza ban Ahihud." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Sahara'im nellak binena se kadhuwa, iya areya Husim ban Ba'ara. Saellana jareya, e bakto enneng e dhaera Mo'ab, laju abine Hodes sarta andhi' ana' lalake' kapetto, iya areya: Yobab, Zibya, Mesa, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 Yeus, Sokhiya ban Mirma. Kabbi padha daddi kapala kalowarga." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ban binena se anyama Husim, Sahara'im jareya andhi' ana' lalake' kadhuwa keya, iya areya: Abitub ban Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:12 Ana' lalake'na Elpaal badha katello, iya areya: Eber, Misam, Semed. Semed jareya se maddek kottha Ono ban Lod sarta sa-disa e sabingkerra." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya ban Sema reya kapala kalowarga se badha neng e kottha Ayalon ban ngojuk pandhudhu'na kottha Gad. 
1Chronicles8:14 Toronanna Beriya iya areya Ahyo, Sasak, Yeremot, Zebaja, Arad, Eder, Mikha'el, Yispa ban Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:15  
1Chronicles8:16  
1Chronicles8:17 Toronanna Elpaal iya areya Zebaja, Mesulam, Hizki, Heber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yismerai, Yizliya dan Yobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 Toronanna Simei iya areya Yakim, Zikhri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elyoënai, Ziletai, Eliyel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya ban Simrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Toronanna Sasak iya areya: Yispan, Eber, Eliyel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zikhri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananya, Elam, Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifdeya ban Pnuwel. 
1Chronicles8:26 Toronanna Yeroham iya areya Samserai, Seharya, Atalya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Ya'aresya, Eliya ban Zikhri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Jareya la-kapala kalowarga ban pin-pamimpin se ecathet e dhalem silsilana reng-oreng jareya. Reng-oreng jareya badha e Yerusalim. 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeiyel maddek kottha Gibeyon, pas alenggi e jadhiya. Rajina iya areya Ma'akha;" 
1Chronicles8:30 Yeiyel ban Ma'akha kaagungan pottra lalake' sapolo oreng, iya areya: Abdon se sareyang, pas Zur, Kis, Ba'al, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahyo, Zakhariya," 
1Chronicles8:32 ban Miklot, ramana Simeya. Toronanna reng-oreng jareya neng e Yerusalim ban ga-kalowarga laenna se sakaom ban reng-oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ramana Rato Saul iya areya Kis, ban agungnga iya areya Ner. Saul kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Yonatan, Malkisuwa, Abinadab ban Esyba'al." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonatan kaagungan pottra lalake' anyama Meriba'al, ramana Mikha." 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikha kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Piton, Melekh, Tahreya ban Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 Pottrana Ahas iya areya: Yowada, se kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Alemet, Azmawet ban Zimri. Garis toronanna Zimri iya areya Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Bina, Rafa, Elasa, Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel kaagungan pottra lalake' kaennem, iya areya: Azrikam, Bokhru, Isma'il, Seyarya, Obaja ban Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esek, taretan lake'na Azel, kaagungan pottra lalake' katello, iya areya: Ulam se sareyang, pas Yeus ban Elifelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Tra-pottrana Ulam kabbi padha tamaso' rit-parjurit se parjuga, sarta tamaso' kang-tokang pana se ahli. Na' poto lalake'anna kabbi badha saratos saeket oreng. Jareya kabbi anggotana suku Benyamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Sakabbinna oreng Isra'il dhaftar menorot kalowargana bang-sebang. Dhaftar jareya badha e dhalem Ketab To-rato Isra'il. Menangka okomanna sa-dusana, ra'yat Yehuda eangko' ka pambuwangan." 
1Chronicles9:2 E antarana reng-oreng jareya se abali dha'-adha' kadibi' ka tanana dibi' e tha-kottha iya areya oreng awam, mam-imam, oreng Lewi ban reng-oreng se alako e Padalemman Socce." 
1Chronicles9:3 Sabagiyan dhari suku Yehuda, Benyamin, Efraim ban Manasye abali ka Yerusalim, pas neptep e jadhiya." 
1Chronicles9:4 Badha nem atos sangang polo kalowarga dhari suku Yehuda se enneng e Yerusalim, tamaso' toronanna tra-pottrana Yehuda se anyama Peres, Syela ban Zerah. Toronanna Peres epimpin Utai. Garis toronanna Utai dhari baba ka attas iya areya Utai, Amihud, Omri, Imri ban Bani. Toronanna Syela epimpin Asaya, se daddi kapala kalowarga. Toronanna Zerah epimpin Yeuwel." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Reng-oreng suku Benyamin se badha e Yerusalim bannya'na sangang atos saeket ennem kalowarga. La-kapala kalowargana reng-oreng jareya iya areya: Salu pottrana Mesulam, bajana Hodawya, peyo'na Hasenua Yibniya pottrana Yeroham Ela pottrana Uzi, bajana Mikhri Mesulam pottrana Sefaca, bajana Rehuwel, peyo'na Yibniya." 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9  
1Chronicles9:10 Mam-imam se kasebbut e baba reya alenggi e Yerusalim: Yedaya, Yoyarib ban Yakhin Azarya pottrana Hilkiya, bangatowana iya areya Mesulam, Zadok, Merayot ban Ahitub. (Azarya reya kapalana ponggaba e Padalemman Socce.) Adaya pottrana Yeroham; bangatowana iya areya Pasyhur ban Malkiya. Masai pottrana Adiyel; bangatowana iya areya Yahzera, Mesulam, Mesilemit, Imer." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12  
1Chronicles9:13 Para imam se daddi kapalana kalowarga kabbi badha saebu pettong atos sabidak oreng. Reng-oreng jareya ahli e dhalem sabarang lalakon e Padalemman Socce. 
1Chronicles9:14 Reng-oreng Lewi se kasebbut e baba reya enneng e Yerusalim: Semaya ana'na Hasub; bangatowana iya areya Azrikam ban Hasabya dhari kaom Merari Bakbakar, Heres ban Galal Matanya ana'na Mikha; bangatowana iya areya Zikhri ban Asaf Obaja ana'na Semaya; bangatowana iya areya Galal ban Yedutun Berekhya ana'na Asa, kompoyya Elkana se enneng e dhaera kottha Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:15  
1Chronicles9:16  
1Chronicles9:17 Para pangawalla Padalemman Socce se enneng e Yerusalim ban sabalana iya areya: Akub, Talmon, Ahiman ban Salum kapalana pangawal." 
1Chronicles9:18 Sampe' sateya reng-oreng dhari kaomma reng-oreng jareya epadaddi tokang jagana Labang Saketheng Rato e bagiyan temor. Lamba' reng-oreng dhari kaomma reng-oreng jareya epajaga bang-labang saketheng se elebadi oreng mon maso'a ka parkemahanna oreng Lewi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Se epajaga labang se elebadi oreng mon maso'a ka Padalemman Socce iya areya Salum ban reng-oreng sakaomma, iya areya kaom Korah. (Salum reya ana'na Kore kompoyya Ebyasaf.) Lamba' bangatowana epaneggu' lalakon jareya keya e bakto aladine e Kemah Socce." 
1Chronicles9:20 Pinehas pottrana Eleyazar – moga-moga salerana eparengngana salamet bi' PANGERAN! – tao daddi kapalana reng-oreng jareya. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakhariya pottrana Meselemya daddi pangawalla labang sakethengnga Kemah Socce keya. 
1Chronicles9:22 Reng-oreng se epele epadaddi panjagana labang saketheng bannya'na kabbi dhu ratos dhubellas oreng. Reng-oreng jareya edhaftar menorot sa-disa se ekennengnge. Bangatowana reng-oreng jareya eparenge lalakon jareya bi' Rato Daud sarta Nabbi Samuwel. 
1Chronicles9:23 Sajjegga jareya reng-oreng buru ron-temoron teptep daddi panjagana labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce. 
1Chronicles9:24 Labangnga badha pa'-empa': settong e dhaja, settong e lao', settong e bara' ban settong e temor. E saneyap labang jareya esaba'i oreng Lewi kasorang se daddi kapala panjagana." 
1Chronicles9:25 Reng-oreng jareya ebanto bi' la-balana se badha e disa, alir-gilir – sabban giliran abidda samenggu ebang." 
1Chronicles9:26 Tape kapalana panjaga se kaempa gella' teptep ajaga terros. Se kaempa jareya andhi' kawajiban ngoros wang-rowangan e Padalemman Socce sarta rang-barang se esempen e jadhiya. 
1Chronicles9:27 Bengkona e seddi'na Padalemman Socce, sabab kodu ajaga Padalemman jareya ban mokka' bang-labang sakethengnga sabban gi' laggu." 
1Chronicles9:28 Sabagiyan oreng Lewi laenna andhi' kawajiban ngoros pakakassa kabakteyan. Reng-oreng jareya se ngetong e bakto kas-pakakas jareya epakalowar ban e bakto epabali. 
1Chronicles9:29 Badha pole laenna se epangoros but-parabut laenna se eangguy e dhalem kabakteyan, epangoros teppong, anggur, mennya' jaitun, mennyan ban pa-palappa." 
1Chronicles9:30 Tape se kodu nyampor raceganna pa-palappa jareya pera' para imam. 
1Chronicles9:31 Se kodu agabay tor-ator se epanggang iya areya oreng Lewi se anyama Matica, ana' sareyangnga Salum dhari kaom Korah." 
1Chronicles9:32 Reng-oreng dhari kaom Kehat eberri' kawajiban nyadhiya'agi roti sasajin ka Pangeran sabban are Sabat. 
1Chronicles9:33 Badha pole oreng Lewi laenna se epadaddi tokang nyanye e Padalemman Socce. La-kapala kalowargana reng-oreng jareya ngennengnge pan-barampan bengko se badha e Padalemman Socce. Reng-oreng jareya ta' eberri'i lalakon laenna, sabab lalakonna seyang malem ros-terrosan." 
1Chronicles9:34 Reng-oreng se kasebbut e attas jareya la-kapalana kalowarga Lewi menorot garis katoronanna. Jareya pin-pamimpin se abengko e Yerusalim. 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeiyel maddek kottha Gibeyon, pas alenggi e jadhiya. Rajina Ma'akha nyamana" 
1Chronicles9:36 ban pottra lalake'na se sareyang anyama Abdon; se laenna anyama Zur, Kis, Ba'al, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahyo, Zakhariya, ban Miklot," 
1Chronicles9:38 ramana Simeya. Toronanna reng-oreng jareya ban la-balana se laen se sakaom padha abengko e Yerusalim. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ramana Rato Saul iya areya Kis ban agungnga iya areya Ner. Saul kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Yonatan, Malkisuwa, Abinadab ban Esyba'al." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonatan kaagungan pottra lalake' anyama Meriba'al, ramana Mikha." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mikha kaagungan pottra lalake' kaempa, iya areya: Piton, Melekh, Tahreya ban Ahas." 
1Chronicles9:42 Pottrana Ahas iya areya Yowada se kaagungan pottra lalake' katello: Alemet, Azmawet ban Zimri. Garis toronanna Zimri iya areya Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 Bina, Rafa, Elasa ban Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel kaagungan pottra lalake' kaennem, iya areya Azrikam, Bokhru, Isma'il, Seyarya, Obaja ban Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Oreng Filistin aperrang ban oreng Isra'il e pagunongan Gilboa. Bannya' oreng Isra'il se mate e jadhiya se gi' odhi', tamaso' Rato Saul ban tra-pottrana padha buru." 
1Chronicles10:2 Tape bi' oreng Filistin eserser; pottrana Saul katello ekenneng pate'e, iya areya Yonatan, Abinadab ban Malkisuwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Perrang e sakalenglengnga Saul ce' rammena, ban Saul dibi' ekenneng na-panana mosona sampe' loka ce' berra'na." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saul adhabu ka oreng ngodha se ngeba'agi sanjatana, “Mara onos peddhangnga ba'na, cocowagi ka sengko' me' olle sengko' ta' egabay en-maenan bi' oreng Filistin se ta' kennal ka Pangeran rowa.” Tape oreng ngodha jareya ta' endha' nyoco Saul polana ce' tako'na. Daddi Saul laju mondhut peddhangnga dibi', sarta laju marobbu ka attassa peddhang jareya." 
1Chronicles10:5 E bakto nangale'e ja' Saul la seda, oreng ngodha jareya marobbu keya ka attassa peddhangnga dibi', laju mate keya." 
1Chronicles10:6 Daddi Saul seda abareng ban pottrana se katello, ban toronanna laju obus." 
1Chronicles10:7 E bakto oreng Isra'il se neng e cora Yizre'el padha ngedhing ja' tantara Isra'il la padha buru, sarta ja' Saul ban tra-pottrana la tebas, laju padha buru dhari tha-kotthana. Tha-kottha jareya laju ekobasae oreng Filistin." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kalagguwanna e bakto arampasa angguy ban sanjatana yit-mayyit, reng-oreng Filistin nemmo jinazana Saul ban pottrana se katello se tebas e pagunongan Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Pangangguy perrangnga Saul ebukka', serana eketthok, laju egiba. Saellana jareya reng-oreng buru laju ngerem otosan ka saantero nagara Filistin esoro mabalattra kabar se bagus jareya ka bangsa ban ba-dibana." 
1Chronicles10:10 Pangangguy perrangnga Saul esempen e dhalem settong kowel, serana egantong e dhalem bengko se egabay kennengnganna Dagon, dibana." 
1Chronicles10:11 E bakto reng-oreng Yabes e Gileyad ngedhing sabarang tengkana oreng Filistin ka Saul ban tra-pottrana," 
1Chronicles10:12 reng-oreng se paleng bangal e antarana laju entar ngala' jinazana Saul ban tra-pottrana jareya, pas egiba ka Yabes. Jinaza jareya kabbi esareyagi e babana kajuwan raja, saellana jareya reng-oreng jareya laju apowasa pettong are abidda." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saul seda lantaran ta' esto ka PANGERAN, ban ta' atoro' ka papakonna. Saul nyo'on petodu ka errohna reng-oreng mate, banne ka PANGERAN. Daddi bi' PANGERAN eokom, ban karaja'anna epassra'agi ka Daud pottrana Isay." 
1Chronicles10:14  
1Chronicles11:1 Pin-pamimpinna bangsa Isra'il padha ngadhep ka Daud e Hebron, laju mator, “Abdidalem sadaja ka'dhinto gi' sabala'an sareng junandalem." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ngabidi gi' dhimen, la'-mala' e bakto Saul gi' marenta abdidalem sadaja, junandalem se mimpin tantara Isra'il sabban maju aperrang. Sarengngan pole Guste Allahepon junandalem ampon ajanji ja' junandalem se badhi mimpina ommadda sareng daddiya ratona.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Daddi Daud laju mabadha parjanjiyan ban pin-pamimpinna Isra'il jareya. Bi' reng-oreng jareya Daud laju elanti' epajumenneng rato Isra'il akantha se la edhabuwagi bi' PANGERAN kalaban parantara'anna Samuwel. 
1Chronicles11:4 E settong bakto Rato Daud ban sakabbinna tantara Isra'il alorok kottha Yerusalim. E bakto jareya kottha Yerusalim gi' anyama Yebus, ban gi' ekennengnge oreng Yebus, oreng asli kottha jareya." 
1Chronicles11:5 Reng-oreng Yebus ngoca' ka Daud ja' Daud ta' kera bisa maso' ka kotthana. Tape Daud ahasel arebbu' bintengnga se anyama Siyon. E bakto jareya Daud la ngomommagi ka reng-orengnga, ja' pa'-sapa'a se dha'-adha' kadibi' bisa mate'e oreng Yebus epadaddiya panglima. Sarrena Yowab se dha'-adha' kadibi' nyerbu oreng Yebus, daddi Yowab jareya laju epadaddi panglima. (Ebuna Yowab iya areya Zeruya.) Saellana arebbu' binteng Siyon, Daud laju alenggi e jadhiya. Lantaran jareya molae dhari bakto jareya binteng gella' enyamae “Kottha Daud”." 
1Chronicles11:6  
1Chronicles11:7  
1Chronicles11:8 Kottha jareya bi' Daud laju epateppa' pole molae dhari kennengngan se epatenggi etembuk ban tana e bagiyan temorra gumo'; saellana jareya se mateppa' kottha buru epaterros bi' Yowab sampe' mare. 
1Chronicles11:9 Daud sajan abit sajan kowat, lantaran etolong bi' PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa." 
1Chronicles11:10 Areya' ma-nyamana para parwirana Daud se kalonta. Ra-parwira jareya abareng ban reng-oreng Isra'il padha aperrang sopaja Daud bisa'a jumenneng rato menorot se edhabuwagi PANGERAN. Ban salanjangnga reng-oreng jareya paggun abanto pamarenta'anna Daud. 
1Chronicles11:11 Parwira se nomer settong iya areya Yasobam oreng Hakhmoni, se mimpin “Triwira”. Tao e dhalem settong paperrangan Yasobam jareya ngadhebbi oreng tello ratos; oreng jareya epate'e kabbi ban tombagga." 
1Chronicles11:12 Oreng se nomer dhuwa' e dhalem Triwira jareya iya areya Eleyazar pottrana Dodo dhari kaom Ahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 E dhalem paperrangan e Pas-Damim Eleyazar jareya aperrang nolonge Daud ngadhebbi oreng Filistin. E bakto tantara Isra'il molae buru, Eleyazar ban reng-orengnga paggun alaban e nga'-tengnga'anna settong teggal kennengnganna oreng namen gandum, sarta aperrang ngadhebbi reng-oreng Filistin jareya. Bi' PANGERAN Eleyazar jareya laju eparenge kamennangan se raja." 
1Chronicles11:14  
1Chronicles11:15 E settong are e antarana parwirana Daud se kalonta se bannya'na tello polo oreng rowa badha katello se entar nyabis ka Daud se teppa'na alenggi e settong kennengngan se ebintenge e settong gunong bato e seddi'anna Guwa Adulam. E bakto jareya oreng Filistin akemah e Cora Refa'im, ban sapasukan e antarana ngobasane sarta ngennengnge Betlehem." 
1Chronicles11:16  
1Chronicles11:17 Daud ce' kerrongnga ka kampongnga, laju adhabu, “Ja' sakenga badha oreng ngala'agi sengko' aeng enom dhari somor e seddi'na labang saketheng Betlehem!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ngedhing dhabuna Daud buru, parwira se katello gella' narabas parkemahanna oreng Filistin, pas nemba aeng dhari somor jareya, saellana laju eatorragi ka Daud. Tape Daud ta' kasokan adha'ar aeng enom jareya, la'-mala' aeng jareya laju etotta' menangka tor-ator ka PANGERAN." 
1Chronicles11:19 Dhabuna, “Bit asmana Allah, sengko' ta' ngenoma aeng reya! Mon sengko' ngenom aeng reya, rassana sengko' padha ban se ngenom dharana reng-oreng se abandha nyabana!” Daddi Daud ta' kasokan sakale adha'ar aeng enom jareya. Jareya lalakon se noduwagi kabangalanna parjurit katello se kalonta gella'." 
1Chronicles11:20 Parwira se kalonta se tello polo oreng gella' enyamae keya “Tridasawira” se epimpin bi' Abisai ale'na Yowab. Abisai jareya tao matebas oreng tello ratos ngangguy tombagga, ban lantaran jareya daddi kasohor. Tape ta' pate kasohor akantha Triwira." 
1Chronicles11:21  
1Chronicles11:22 Parwira laenna se kalonta iya areya Benaya pottrana Yoyada, oreng Kabze'el. Orengnga ce' bangalanna, la mate'e pahlawan raja dhari Mo'ab kadhuwa. E settong are, teppa'na ojan salju, Benaya maso' ka dhalem settong lobang sarta mate'e macan e jadhiya." 
1Chronicles11:23 Tao keya mate'e oreng Messer se raja badanna, se tenggina lebbi dhari dhu meter. Oreng jareya asanjata tombak se ce' rajana, tape bi' Benaya elaban ngangguy thong-penthong. Tombak se eteggu' oreng Messer jareya erebbu', pas eangguy mate'e oreng jareya." 
1Chronicles11:24 Jareya sa-jasana Benaya, sala settong dhari Tridasawira." 
1Chronicles11:25 E dhalem Tridasawira jareya Benaya se paleng kalonta, tape ta' saapa mon ebandhingngagi ban Triwira. Bi' Daud Benaya jareya laju epadaddi pangawal pribadhina." 
1Chronicles12:1 E bakto Rato Daud buru dhari Rato Saul, laju ngongse ka Ziklag. Bannya' parjurit se esto ban apangalaman dhateng agabung ban Daud." 
1Chronicles12:2 Jareya reng-oreng dhari suku Benyamin akantha Saul; penter manna ban ngomban bato – ngangguy tanang kangan otaba tanang kacer. 
1Chronicles12:3 Pamimpinna iya areya Ahiyezer ban Yowas na'-ana'na Sema'a dhari Gibeya. Rit-parjurit jareya iya areya: Yeziyel ban Pelet na'-ana'na Azmawet Berakha ban Yehu oreng Anatot Yismaya oreng Gibeyon, parjurit se kalonta se daddi sala settong dhari pamimpinna kalompo' “Tridasawira”. Yeremiya, Yahaziyel, Yokanan ban Yozabad oreng Gedera. Eluzai, Yerimot, Bealya, Semariya ban Sefaca oreng Harufi Elkana, Yisiya, Azare'el, Yowëzer ban Yasobam dhari kaom Korah Yowëla ban Zebaja na'-ana'na Yeroham oreng Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 E bakto Daud badha e kennengngan se badha bintengnga e sagara beddhi, bannya' parjurit se kalonta ban apangalaman dhari suku Gad padha noro' salerana. Jareya rit-parjurit se ce' ahlina ngangguy tameng ban tombak; katon ngal-bangal akantha macan ban gulina kesset akantha manjangan." 
1Chronicles12:9 Areya' ma-nyamana reng-oreng jareya se esoson menorot ondhagga pangkadda: Ezer, Obaja, Eliyab, Mismana, Yeremiya, Atai, Eliyel, Yokanan, Elzabad, Yeremiya, Makhbanai." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Sabagiyan dhari reng-oreng Gad jareya ra-parwira tenggi se ngapalae oreng saebu; sabagiyan pole ra-parwira se ngapalae oreng saratos. 
1Chronicles12:15 Tao e bulan settong, teppa'na Songay Yordan banjir, ra-parwira jareya alengka songay jareya laju ngojuk reng-oreng se ngennengnge ra-cora jareya se e bagiyan temorra songay buru, bariya keya se e bagiyan bara'na." 
1Chronicles12:16 E settong bakto badha reng-oreng suku Benyamin ban Yehuda entar ka binteng se ekalenggi'i Daud. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daud manggi'i laju adhabu, “Mon ba'na dha' enna' reya menangka kanca nolonga sengko', mara agabung ban reng-oreng se noro' sengko' reya. Sengko' perak narema ba'na. Tape mon ba'na akiyanadana sengko' ka moso, sanajjan sengko' ta' alako juba' ka ba'na, Allah se esemba bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na ngagali, ban bakal ngokoma ba'na kabbi.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Sala settong e antarana reng-oreng jareya, iya areya Amasai, se e budhi arena daddi pamimpinna ra-parwira se enyamae “Tridasawira”, ekobasae Erroh Allah, laju mator, “Daud, pottrana Isay! Abdidalem ngerenga junandalem! Moga-moga junandalem sareng reng-oreng se abanto junandalem eparengngana ahasel. Allah nolonge junandalem!” Daddi reng-oreng jareya bi' Daud etarema ban laju epadaddi ra-parwira e dhalem angkadan perrangnga." 
1Chronicles12:19 E bakto Daud abareng ban oreng Filistin merrange Rato Saul, sabagiyan dhari parjuridda suku Manasye ngalle noro' Daud. Sabendherra Daud ta' nolonge reng-oreng Filistin jareya. Para pamimpinna Filistin jareya nyoro Daud gubar ka Ziklag lantaran tako' me'-ame' Daud laju aoba nolonge Saul ban akiyanat ka reng-oreng Filistin." 
1Chronicles12:20 Areya' nyamana rit-parjurit dhari suku Manasye se aoba nolonge Daud e bakto Daud e dhalem parjalanan ka Ziklag: Adnah, Yozabad, Yediyael, Mikha'el, Yozabad, Elihu ban Ziletai. Kabbi padha ngapalae parjurit bang-sebang, se bannya'na saebu oreng ebang." 
1Chronicles12:21 Jareya kabbi padha parjurit se parjuga ban nolonge Daud ngadhebbi so-mosona. E budhi arena reng-oreng jareya daddi ra-parwira e dhalem angkadan perrangnga Isra'il. 
1Chronicles12:22 E kenneng koca' sabban are badha oreng anyar se noro' ka Daud, sampe' ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya pasukanna Daud laju daddi ce' rajana." 
1Chronicles12:23 E bakto Daud alenggi e Hebron bannya' parjurit se la elate aoba noro' salerana, nolongana salerana sopaja bisa'a jumenneng rato agante Saul, menorot se ejanjiyagi bi' PANGERAN. Bannya'na kantha e baba areya:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Dhari suku Yehuda: nem ebu ballung atos oreng, genna' ban tameng sarta tombagga. Dhari suku Simeyon: pettong ebu saratos oreng se la elate. Dhari suku Lewi: pa' ebu nem atos oreng. Reng-orengnga Yoyada pamimpinna toronanna Harun: tello ebu pettong atos oreng. La-balana Zadok, parjurit se gi' ngodha tor bangalan: dhu lekor oreng – kabbi padha kapala kalowarga. Dhari suku Benyamin (sukuna Rato Saul): tello ebu oreng; kabannya'an dhari suku Benyamin teptep esto ka Saul. Dhari suku Efraim: dhu polo ebu ballung atos oreng se kalonta e dhalem kaomma bang-sebang. Dhari suku Manasye se e bara'na Songay Yordan: ballu bellas ebu oreng se epele kaangguy alanti' Daud jumenneng rato. Dhari suku Isakhar: dhu ratos oreng pamimpin ban reng-orengnga; pin-pamimpin jareya penter nantowagi apa se kodu elakone ra'yat Isra'il ban bila baktona se teppa' kaangguy ngalakone jareya. Dhari suku Zebulon: saeket ebu oreng se penter ngangguy sanjata apa'a bai, ban la asadhiya se aperranga; reng-oreng jareya esto ban ekenneng parcaja. Dhari suku Naftali: saebu oreng pamimpin ban tello polo petto' ebu parjuridda se genna' ban tameng sarta tombagga. Dhari suku Dan: ballu lekor ebu nem atos oreng se la elate. Dhari suku Asyer: pa' polo ebu oreng se la asadhiya se aperranga. Dhari ku-suku e temorra Songay Yordan, iya areya Ruben, Gad ban sabagiyan dhari suku Manasye: saratos dhu polo ebu oreng se penter ngangguy sanjata apa'a bai." 
1Chronicles12:25 Rit-parjurit jareya entar ka Hebron kabbi, la asadhiya se aperranga ban la nekat madaddiya Daud ratona Isra'il. Ban reng-oreng Isra'il laenna padha saroju' kabbi se kantha'a jareya." 
1Chronicles12:26 Tello are abidda rit-parjurit jareya neng e jadhiya ban Daud sambi apesta ban ngarassa'agi kobassana kakanan ban nom-enoman se esadhiya'agi bi' reng-oreng Isra'il laenna. 
1Chronicles12:27 Dhari ku-suku bagiyan dhaja se jau, iya areya dhari suku Isakhar, Zebulon ban Naftali, bannya' keya oreng dhateng ngeba hemar, onta, jaran buwadan, ban sape se sarat bi' buwadan bahan kakanan: teppong, buwana ara, kismis, anggur ban mennya' jaitun. Laen dhari jareya reng-oreng jareya ngeba sape ban dumba se esambelliya ekakana. Jareya kabbi noduwagi saapa gumbirana ra'yat sa Isra'il." 
1Chronicles13:1 Rato Daud aparembagan ban sakabbinna parwirana se mimpin kasatuwan-kasatuwanna saebu oreng ban kasatuwan-kasatuwanna saratos oreng. 
1Chronicles13:2 Daud laju adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya kabbi, “Mon ba'na padha saroju', ban mon ekarsa'agi bi' PANGERAN, Guste Allah se esemba sengko' ban ba'na, mara ngerem otosan ka para imam ban reng-oreng Lewi e sa-disana, ban ka sakabbinna tang bangsa se laen, balai soro akompol dha' enna'."
