Nehemiah12:12 Areya' dhaftarra para imam kapala ban kaomma e bakto Yoyakim daddi Imam Agung: Imam Kaom Meraya Seraya Hananya Yeremiya Mesulam Ezra Yokanan Amarya Yonatan Melikhu Yusup Sebanya Adna Harim Helkai Merayot Zakhariya Ido Mesulam Gineton Zikhri Abiya … Minyamin Piltai Mowaja Samuwa Bilga Yonatan Semaya Matnai Yoyarib Uzi Yedaya Kalai Salai Heber Amok Hasabya Hilkiya Netane'el Yedaya 
Nehemiah12:13  
Nehemiah12:14  
Nehemiah12:15  
Nehemiah12:16  
Nehemiah12:17  
Nehemiah12:18  
Nehemiah12:19  
Nehemiah12:20  
Nehemiah12:21  
Nehemiah12:22 Dhaftarra la-kapala kalowargana oreng Lewi ban kalowargana para imam la ecathet e jamanna para Imam Agung se kasebbut e baba reya: Elyasib, Yoyada, Yokanan ban Yaduwa. Catheddan jareya la mare e bakto Darius jumenneng rato Persiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Tape parkara la-kapala kalowargana kaom Lewi pera' ecathet sampe' jamanna Yonatan kompoyya Elyasib. 
Nehemiah12:24 E bakto epimpin Hasabya, Serebiya, Yesuwa, Binui ban Kadmiyel, reng-oreng Lewi egi-bagi epadaddi pan-barampan galumpo'. Ne-samane badha galumpo' dhadhuwa' se kodu moji PANGERAN ban asokkor ka Salerana kalaban cara ot-saodan, menorot atoranna Rato Daud, abdina Allah rowa." 
Nehemiah12:25 Para panjagana labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce se epajaga mar-kamar pangandhuwan bahanna kakanan e seddi'na labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce iya areya: Matanya, Bakbukya, Obaja, Mesulam, Talmon ban Akub." 
Nehemiah12:26 Reng-oreng jareya odhi' e jamanna Yoyakim pottrana Yesuwa bajana Yozadak ban e jamanna Gubennor Nehemiya ban Imam Ezra, ahli Hokom rowa." 
Nehemiah12:26 Reng-oreng jareya odhi' e jamanna Yoyakim pottrana Yesuwa bajana Yozadak ban e jamanna Gubennor Nehemiya ban Imam Ezra, ahli Hokom rowa." 
Nehemiah12:27 E bakto geddhungnga kottha Yerusalim eresmeyagi, reng-oreng Lewi eolok dhari kennengnganna bang-sebang, sopaja ngennenga noro' maramme kadaddiyan jareya ban nyanyeyan sokkorra se acem-macem sarta ban mosik gambus sarta calempong." 
Nehemiah12:28 Kang-tokang nyanye dhari ga-kalowarga Lewi laju padha akompol dhari kennengnganna bang-sebang; badha se dhari sabingkerra Yerusalim, badha keya se dhari tha-kottha e sabingkerra Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 dhari Bet-Gilgal, Geba ban Azmawet." 
Nehemiah12:30 Para imam ban reng-oreng Lewi jareya ajalannagi opacara ababerse kaangguy aba'na dibi', saellana pas kaangguy ra'yat, bang-labang saketheng ban dhung-geddhungnga kottha." 
Nehemiah12:31 Sengko' ngatore para pamimpin Yehuda ongga ka attassa geddhung kaangguy ngator reng-oreng se epadaddi dhu galumpo' raja se epabarisa alenglenge kottha sambi anyanye pojiyan sokkor ka Allah. Galumpo' se settong abaris e attassa geddhung, ajalan ka kangan, ka Labang Saketheng Bu-rombu." 
Nehemiah12:32 Hosaya ajalan e budhiyanna para tokang nyanye, etoro' bunte' bi' para pamimpinna oreng Yehuda." 
Nehemiah12:33 Para imam e baba reya ajalan e budhiyanna reng-oreng buru sambi nope tarompet: Azarya, Ezra, Mesulam, Yehuda, Benyamin, Semaya ban Yeremiya. E budhiyanna etoro' bunte' bi' Zakhariya ana'na Yonatan, kompoyya Semaya. Bangatowana e antarana iya areya: Matanya, Mikha, Zakur dhari kaom Asaf." 
Nehemiah12:33 Para imam e baba reya ajalan e budhiyanna reng-oreng buru sambi nope tarompet: Azarya, Ezra, Mesulam, Yehuda, Benyamin, Semaya ban Yeremiya. E budhiyanna etoro' bunte' bi' Zakhariya ana'na Yonatan, kompoyya Semaya. Bangatowana e antarana iya areya: Matanya, Mikha, Zakur dhari kaom Asaf." 
Nehemiah12:34  
Nehemiah12:35  
Nehemiah12:36 Se ajalan e budhiyanna iya areya para anggotana kaomma, iya areya: Semaya, Azare'el, Milalai, Gilalai, Ma'ai, Netane'el, Yehuda ban Hanani. Kabbi padha ngeba pakakassa mosik, padha ban se eagem Rato Daud, abdina Allah rowa. Imam Ezra, ahli Hokomma Allah rowa alomampa e bagiyan paleng adha'." 
Nehemiah12:36 Se ajalan e budhiyanna iya areya para anggotana kaomma, iya areya: Semaya, Azare'el, Milalai, Gilalai, Ma'ai, Netane'el, Yehuda ban Hanani. Kabbi padha ngeba pakakassa mosik, padha ban se eagem Rato Daud, abdina Allah rowa. Imam Ezra, ahli Hokomma Allah rowa alomampa e bagiyan paleng adha'." 
Nehemiah12:37 Sanapa'na ka Labang Saketheng Aeng Nancel, reng-oreng jareya padha abiluk pas ongga ka dhak-ondhak se nojju ka Kottha Daud, lebat e karatonna Daud, pas terros sampe' ka geddhung e Labang Saketheng Aeng e bagiyan temorra kottha." 
Nehemiah12:38 Galumpo'na tokang nyanye settonganna abaris e attassa geddhung ajalan ka kacer; sengko' noro' bunte' abareng ban sabagiyan dhari ra'yat. Dhari jadhiya se abaris lebat Manara Kampowan sampe' ka Geddhung Lebar. 
Nehemiah12:39 Saellana jareya pas lebat e Labang Saketheng Efraim, Labang Saketheng Laju, Labang Saketheng Juko', Manara Hanane'el ban Manara Me'a sampe' ka Labang Saketheng Dumba. Barisan jareya ambu e seddi'na Labang Saketheng Panjaga'an e seddi'na Padalemman Socce." 
Nehemiah12:40 Galumpo'na tokang nyanye se dhadhuwa' jareya pas napa' ka seddi'anna Padalemman Socce. E dhalem tang kalompo', salaenna para pamimpin" 
Nehemiah12:41 badha keya mam-imam se nope tarompet, iya areya: Elyakim, Ma'aseya, Minyamin, Mikha, Elyoënai, Zakhariya ban Hananya;" 
Nehemiah12:42 se ajalan e budhiyanna iya areya Ma'aseya, Semaya, Eleyazar, Uzi, Yokanan, Malkiya, Elam ban Ezer. Para tokang nyanye jareya anyanye epimpin Yizrahya." 
Nehemiah12:43 E are jareya bannya' kurban se eatorragi ka PANGERAN. Ra'yat neng-sennengngan polana Allah apareng kasennengngan se raja. Babine'an ban na'-kana' noro' apesta keya. Sowarana reng-oreng jareya ce' peragga, ekaedhing sampe' ka jauna." 
Nehemiah12:44 E bakto jareya badha reng-oreng se epajaga mar-kamar pangandhuwanna bahan kakanan, kennengngan panyempennanna sombangan kaangguy Padalemman Socce, tamaso' tor-ator parsapolowan ban hasella bume se dha'-adha' sabban taon. Para pangawas jareya wajib makompol sombangan jareya dhari gal-teggal e sabingkerra tha-kottha. Sombangan jareya epassra'agi ka para imam ban oreng Lewi, menorot atoranna Hokom. Reng-oreng Yehuda ngargai para imam ban reng-oreng Lewi jareya," 
Nehemiah12:45 sabab para imam ban reng-oreng Lewi jareya se ajalannagi opacara ababerse ban ra-opacara laenna se edika'agi bi' Allah. Para tokang maenna mosik ban panjagana labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce ajalannagi kawajibanna keya, menorot atoranna Rato Daud ban Sulaiman, pottrana." 
Nehemiah12:46 Molae jamanna Rato Daud ban ahli mosik Asaf, para tokang nyanye anyanye gu-lagu pojiyan kaator ka Allah." 
Nehemiah12:47 E jamanna Zerubabil, bariya keya e jamanna Nehemiya, ra'yat Isra'il kabbi padha aberri' sombangan kaangguy nyokobi kabutowanna para tokang nyanye ban panjagana labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce re-saarena. Ra'yat ngeba tor-ator se malolo kaangguy reng-oreng Lewi; bi' reng-oreng Lewi sabagiyan dhari tor-ator jareya ebagi ka para imam toronanna Harun, se bannya'na la etantowagi." 
Nehemiah13:1 E bakto hokomma Mosa ebaca'agi e adha'anna ra'yat, e dhalemma hokom jareya badha katerrangan se amonye kantha reya: “Oreng Amon ban oreng Mo'ab maske baramma'a ta' olle apolong ban ommadda Allah;" 
Nehemiah13:2 sabab e bakto bangsa Isra'il badha e dhalem parjalanan kalowar dhari Messer, bangsa se dhadhuwa' jareya ta' aberri' ngakan ban ngenom ka bangsa Isra'il jareya. La'-mala' ngopa Bileyam, esoro abasto bangsa Isra'il, tape bi' Allah babaston jareya eoba epadaddi berkat.”" 
Nehemiah13:3 E bakto bangsa Isra'il ngedhing se kantha jareya buru, laju padha manyese reng-oreng manca jareya dhari masarakat Isra'il." 
Nehemiah13:4 Tape sabellunna jareya Imam Elyasib, se epangawase mar-kamar pangandhuwanna bahan kakanan e Padalemman Socce, andhi' hubungan ban Tobiya." 
Nehemiah13:5 Bi' Elyasib Tobiya jareya eberri'i settong kamar se raja se sabendherra kodu malolo egabay kennengnganna panyempennanna tor-ator gandum, mennyan, pakakassa Padalemman Socce, tor-ator kaangguy para imam, parsapolowanna gandum, anggur ban mennya' jaitun, se ebagiya ka reng-oreng Lewi, para tokang mosik ban panjagana labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce." 
Nehemiah13:6 E bakto badha kadaddiyan jareya, sengko' teppa'na tadha' e Yerusalim, sabab e taon se kapeng tello polo dhuwa' pamarenta'anna Artahsasta, rato Babil rowa, sengko' entar ka Babil areppoda ka rato. Sengko' buru olle edi saellana anante' abak abit" 
Nehemiah13:7 abali ka Yerusalim. Sanapa'na dha' enna', sengko' takerjat saellana tao ja' Elyasib aberri' kamar e Padalemman Socce ka Tobiya." 
Nehemiah13:8 Sengko' ce' peggella, ban rang-barangnga Tobid bi' sengko' epelpallagi ka lowar kabbi." 
Nehemiah13:9 Sengko' pas nyoro sopaja ebadha'agi opacara maberse mar-kamar jareya. Saellana jareya tor-ator gandum ban mennyan sarta kas-pakakas Padalemman Socce bi' sengko' epabali kabbi ka mar-kamar jareya. 
Nehemiah13:10 Laen dhari jareya sengko' nemmone keya ja' para tokang tabbuna mosik ban reng-oreng Lewi padha nyengla dhari Yerusalim abali alako e teggalla bang-sebang polana kabutowanna ta' ecokobi bi' ra'yat. 
Nehemiah13:11 Sengko' laju maenga' para pamimpin polana Padalemman Socce edina ta' eoros. Reng-oreng Lewi ban tokang tabbuna mosik jareya bi' sengko' esoro abali ban esoro ajalannagi pole lalakonna bang-sebang. 
Nehemiah13:12 Ra'yat pas padha molae pole aberri' tor-ator parsapolowan se aropa gandum, anggur ban mennya' jaitun, se pas esaba' e pangandhuwanna bahanna kakanan." 
Nehemiah13:13 Sengko' mele reng-oreng se kasebbut e baba reya esoro ngawase mar-kamar pangandhuwanna bahan kakanan: Imam Selemiya, Zadok ahli Hokom ban Pedaya oreng Lewi. Hanan ana'na Zakur kompoyya Matanya bi' sengko' esoro nolonge. Sengko' tao reng-oreng jareya ekenneng parcaja, tanto jujur ngoros pambagiyanna han-bahan kakanan jareya ka ca-kancana se padha alako e jadhiya." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ya, Allah, kaemodi sadaja se elakone abdidalem kaangguy Padalemmannepon Junandalem sareng sadajana pangladinanna." 
Nehemiah13:15 E jaman jareya sengko' nangale'e e Yehuda badha reng-oreng se merres anggur e are Sabat. Badha pole reng-oreng se mowa' gandum, aeng anggur, buwana anggur ban buwana ara sarta rang-barang laenna, ebuwa' hemarra egiba ka Yerusalim. Bi' sengko' reng-oreng jareya ta' ebagi awal-juwal e Yerusalim." 
Nehemiah13:16 Bariya keya badha reng-oreng dhari Tirus se enneng e Yerusalim, ngeba juko' ban acem-macem barang dagangan laenna ka Yerusalim e are Sabat, ejuwala ka reng-oreng Yehuda." 
Nehemiah13:17 Sengko' maenga' para pamimpin Yehuda, ngoca' kantha reya, “Ponapa sampeyan ta' apangrasa ja' sampeyan alako jahat lantaran ta' atoro' ka atoranna are Sabat?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Gu ta' lantaran dusa se kantha ganeka Allah ngokom bangatowana sampeyan sareng kaula sarta pas maancor kottha paneka? Ponapa samangken sampeyan namba'ana dadukanna Allah ka Isra'il kalaban macemmer are Sabat paneka?” 
Nehemiah13:19 Daddi sengko' marenta'agi sopaja mon teppa' parmola'anna are Sabat, iya areya Juma'at malem, bang-labang sakethengnga kottha sopaja etotop kabbi mon are la para' compedda, ban ta' olle ebukka' sampe' are Sabat la lebat iya areya e Satto lem-malem. E bang-labang saketheng jareya bi' sengko' esaba'i tang reng-oreng sopaja tadha'a barang dagangan se egiba maso' ka dhalem e bakto are Sabat." 
Nehemiah13:20 Tape dhang-kadhang badha reng-oreng se adagang ban ajuwal barang daganganna jareya se ngenep e lowarra geddhung Yerusalim e are Juma'at malem. 
Nehemiah13:21 Sengko' ngoca' ka reng-oreng jareya, “Parcoma ba'na anante' sampe' laggu e jadhiya. Senga', mon ba'na gi' ros-terrosan kantha jareya, bi' sengko' etangkebba!” Molae dhari jareya reng-oreng jareya ta' tao dhateng pole e are Sabat." 
Nehemiah13:22 Reng-oreng Lewi bi' sengko' pas esoro mabadha opacara ababerse, sarta esoro ajaga e bang-labang saketheng kaangguy ngawase sopaja reng-oreng ngormadi are Sabat. Sengko' adu'a, “Ya, Allah, kaemodi abdidalem lantaran parkara ka'dhinto jugan; nyo'ona kabellasi abdidalem menorot kataresna'an sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem se raja.”" 
Nehemiah13:23 E jaman jareya keya sengko' nangale'e ja' bannya' reng-oreng Yahudi se abine babine'an Asdod, babine'an Amon ban babine'an Mo'ab." 
Nehemiah13:24 Sabagiyan dhari ana'na reng-oreng jareya ta' ngarte basa Yahudi, tape ngarte basa Asdod otaba basa manca se laen." 
Nehemiah13:25 Bi' sengko' reng-oreng jareya epaenga' ban ebasto; e antarana badha se epokole, egumba' obu'na sarta esoro asompa bit asmana Allah ja' reng-oreng jareya ban na'-ana'na ta' akabina campor pole." 
Nehemiah13:26 Ca'na sengko', “Sulaiman, rato Isra'il rowa, gu ta' tao agabay dusa kantha jareya lamba'? Tadha' rato se alebbiyan dhari Sulaiman e dunnya reya. Sulaiman ekataresnae Allah, bi' Allah epajumenneng rato saantero Isra'il, tape maske bariya Sulaiman tanoro' keya ka dhalem dusa polana tagudha babine'an nagara manca jareya." 
Nehemiah13:27 Daraka onggu ba'na reya! Bangal ta' atoro' ka dhabuna Allah kalaban abine babine'an manca.” 
Nehemiah13:28 Yoyada reya ana'na Imam Agung Elyasib, tape badha ana'na Yoyada se ekamanto Sanbalat dhari kottha Bet-Horon. Daddi bi' sengko' Yoyada jareya etondhung dhari Yerusalim!" 
Nehemiah13:29 Sengko' adu'a, “Ya, Allah, kaemodi kadi ponapa reng-oreng ka'dhinto makocem nyamaepon imam sareng parjanjiyannepon Junandalem sareng para imam sareng reng-oreng Lewi!”" 
Nehemiah13:30 Daddi sengko' la maberse bangsa Isra'il dhari sabarang se kasambung ban bangsa manca. Sengko' neptebbagi atoran-atoran kaangguy para imam ban reng-oreng Lewi, sampe' reng-oreng jareya padha andhi' lalakon se wajib elakone bang-sebang." 
Nehemiah13:31 Sengko' ngator keya sopaja to-sabakto bisa esadhiya'agi kaju kaangguy tor-ator kurban ban ra'yat bisa ngeba tor-ator hasel bumena se dha'-adha'. Dhi-budhina sengko' adu'a, “Ya, Allah, kaemodi sadaja ka'dhinto, sareng berkadi abdidalem.”" 
Esther1:1 Rato Ahasyweros marenta e Susan, ibu kotthana Persiya. Karaja'anna molae dhari India sampe' ka Sudan, bannya'na saratos petto lekor propinsi." 
Esther1:2  
Esther1:3 E taon se kapeng tello' pamarenta'anna, Rato Ahasyweros mabadha pesta raja; se eonjang iya areya sakabbinna kaom oreng agung ban ponggabana. Para panglima Persiya ban Mediya, para gubennor ban om-kaom oreng agung tenggi e si-propinsi padha hadir." 
Esther1:4 Nem bulan abidda rato jareya ngedirragi kasogiyanna karatonna ban kaagunganna sarta kabagusanna karaja'anna. 
Esther1:5 Saellana jareya rato mabadha pesta pole pettong are abidda kaangguy sakabbinna ra'yadda se badha e binteng Susan, se sogi ban se mesken. Pesta jareya ebadha'agi e bun-kebbunanna karaton." 
Esther1:6 Palataranna karaton jareya erengga bi' bir-tabir dhari kaen linen se abarna bungo ban pote, etale'e bi' tale linen alos se abarna bungo terrong, epacangke' ka long-kolong salaka se epasang ka ga-cangga marmar. E baba'anna epobuwi pan-dipan emmas ban salaka e palesteran se erengga bi' marmar pote, bato akek mera, kole'na motteyara se ngarennyap ban bato pirus se bungo." 
Esther1:7 Rato nyadhiya'agi anggur se biyasana edha'ar rato, talebat bannya'na, eangka'agi ngangguy la-piala emmas se acem-macem." 
Esther1:8 Moy-tamoy jareya mon ngenoma anggur ta' ebatesse bannya'na, sabaligga keya ta' epaksa esoro ngenom. Rato makon ka para pangladinna karaton, sopaja moy-tamoy jareya eladine menorot pangaterrona bang-sebang." 
Esther1:9 Sabatara jareya Wasti, dinaju rato, mabadha pesta keya kaangguy babine'an e dhalem karaton." 
Esther1:10 E are se kapeng petto', rato terros adha'ar aeng anggur sampe' ce' peragga. Rato jareya pas nembali pangladin pribadhina se kapetto, iya areya: Mehuman, Bizta, Harbona, Bigta, Abagta, Zetar ban Karkas." 
Esther1:11 Reng-oreng jareya epakon ngone'e Dinaju Rato Wasti epakon ngagem jamang karaja'an, pas epakon bakta ka ajunanna. Dinaju rato jareya ce' raddinna, ban rato terro ngedirragiya karaddinanna ka om-kaom oreng agung sarta para tamoyya." 
Esther1:12 Tape e bakto para pangladin jareya manapa' dhabuna rato gella', Dinaju Rato Wasti ta' kasokan rabu, sampe' rato ce' dukana." 
Esther1:13 Daddi rato laju nembali para panasehadda se tao apa se kodu elakone e dhalem parkara se kantha jareya, sabab rato jareya kabiyasa'anna nyo'on panemmona para ahli e dhalem parkara hokom ban adad." 
Esther1:14 Para panasehadda se paleng seggut etembali rato kapetto, iya areya: Karsena, Setar, Admata, Tarsis, Meres, Marsena ban Memukan. Jareya kabbi om-kaom oreng agung Persiya ban Mediya se neggu' pangkat paleng tenggi e dhalem karaja'an." 
Esther1:15 Dhabuna rato ka se kapetto jareya, “Sengko' nyoro tang din-pangladin ka Dinaju Rato Wasti, esoro ngabala ja' dinaju rato bi' sengko' esoro ngadhep. Tape dinaju rato ta' endha'. Menorot hokom, kodu epabaramma dinaju rato jareya?”" 
Esther1:16 Memukan laju mator ka rato ban ka om-kaom oreng agung laenna, “Kalaban cara se kadi ka'dhinto, Dinaju Rato Wasti banne namong ya-nyeya rato, namong jugan sadajana kaom oreng agungngepon junandalem, la'-mala' saneyap oreng lalake' e karaja'an ka'dhinto!" 
Esther1:17 Sabab se elampa'agi dinaju rato gapaneka bakal ekaedhinga sareng sadajana babine'an, ban babine'an gapaneka tanto pas ta' kera ngargai lakena bang-sebang. Babine'an gapaneka tanto padha ngoca' ja' Rato makon Dinaju Rato Wasti sopaja ngadhebba, namong dinaju rato ta' kasokan." 
Esther1:18 Daddi, manabi rajina om-kaom oreng agung Persiya sareng Mediya padha mereng parkara se elampa'agi dinaju rato gapaneka, tanto pas padha notorragi parkara gapaneka ka lakeepon bang-sebang. Daddi babine'an tanto ros-terrosan ta' atoro' ka oca'na lakena, dineng oreng lalake' pas ros-terrosan peggel ka rajina." 
Esther1:19 Daddi abdidalem nyo'ona sopaja junandalem motose ja' Dinaju Rato Wasti ta' eedine pole ngadhep ka junandalem. Potosan gapaneka kodu ebadhi dhang-ondhang Persiya sareng Mediya, sopaja ta' kengenga ecabut pole. Saamponna, Dinaju Rato Wasti gapaneka pas gante'e babine' laen se asaeyan." 
Esther1:20 Manabi potosannepon junandalem ka'dhinto ekaonenge sareng sadajana oreng e karaja'an se lebar ka'dhinto, saneyap oreng bine' tanto ngargai lakena, sanare se mesken otabana se sogi.”" 
Esther1:21 Ator rembagga Memukan jareya eanggep bagus bi' rato sarta om-kaom oreng agung, daddi bi' rato duli elampa'agi." 
Esther1:22 Rato ngerem sorat ka saneyap propinsi e dhalem karaja'anna, se etoles ngangguy tolesan ban basa se eangguy e saneyap propinsi jareya bang-sebang. Monyena potosan jareya nyebbuttagi ja' e sabban bengko, se kodu daddi kapalana ban se kodu motose parkara apa'a bai, kodu se lake'." 
Esther2:1 Ta' abit saellana jareya, maske Rato Ahasyweros la ta' duka pole, tape gi' terros emot ka tengkana Dinaju Rato Wasti sarta potosan se la ekalowarragi salerana." 
Esther2:2 Daddi para panasehat se semma' ban rato ngatore rembak kantha reya, “Langkong sae junandalem enyareyagi ban-paraban se raddin." 
Esther2:3 Junandalem kodu ngangkat ponggaba e sadajana propinsina karaja'an ka'dhinto, pakon nyare ban-paraban se raddin, sadajana pakon bakta ka kapotren e binteng Susan ka'dhinto. Ban-paraban e kapotren gapaneka pakon oros ka Hegai, ponggaba se ngapalae orosan e kapotren, pakon rabat sopaja raddinna." 
Esther2:4 Saamponna ka'dhinto, junandalem mele paraban se menorot pamanggiepon junandalem paleng sae, pondhut badhi dinaju rato menangka ganteepon Dinaju Rato Wasti.” Rato narema rembak jareya, laju elampa'agi." 
Esther2:5 E bakto jareya e kottha Susan badha oreng Yahudi nyamana Mordekhai ana'na Ya'ir, toronanna Kis ban Simei dhari suku Benyamin." 
Esther2:6 Mordekhai etawan bakto Yerusalim epakala Rato Nebukadnezar, rato Babil, ebuwang ka Babil epabareng ban Yoyakin, rato Yehuda sarta tawanan laenna sabannya'na." 
Esther2:7 Mordekhai jareya andhi' sapopo, ana'na taretanna ramana; sapopona jareya babine', robana raddin, badanna bagus, nyamana Ester; Ester jareya nyama Ibranina Hadasa. Oreng towana Ester la padha seda, daddi pas ekala' ana' bi' Mordekhai, epeyara epakantha ana'na dibi'." 
Esther2:8 Saellana parentana rato rowa eomommagi, bannya' paraban epakompol e Susan; Ester tamaso' keya. Ban-paraban jareya egiba ka karaton, eparcaja'agi ka Hegai, kapalana orosan kapotren." 
Esther2:9 Hegai kasambu' nangale'e Ester, sarta pas lebur ka kana' jareya. Paraban jareya pas duli erabat sopaja sajana raddin sarta eberri' kakan se epabida dhari se laenna. Ester ealle ka bagiyan se paleng mewah e kapotren jareya, esoro ladine ka babine'an se paleng cakang dhari karaton, bannya'na kapetto." 
Esther2:10 Ester atoro' ka babala'anna Mordekhai, ta' ala-bala ja' aba'na oreng Yahudi." 
Esther2:11 Sabban are Mordekhai lan-jalanan e palataran e adha'na kapotren jareya terro taowa baramma kabadha'anna Ester ban ba' baramma'a daddina kana' jareya. 
Esther2:12 Menorot atoran, babine'an jareya erabat sopaja sajana raddin sampe' sataon abidda: nem bulan abidda erabat ban mennya' se ecampore mennyan, saellana jareya nem bulan aggi' ngangguy mennya' ecampor om-ro'oman se laen. Saellana jareya, saneyap paraban olle giliran ngadhep ka Rato Ahasyweros." 
Esther2:13 E bakto settong paraban epangadhebba ka rato, olle ngangguy apa'a bai menorot kasennengnganna." 
Esther2:14 Paraban jareya egiba ka karatonna rato e baja malem, kalagguwanna pas egiba ka karaton laen; e jadhiya eoros bi' oreng se anyama Sa'asgas, ponggaba se kusus epangoros para sellerra rato. Babine' jareya ta' ebagi ngadhep rato pole, kajabana mon rato dibi' kasokan ban adikane babine' jareya, se esebbuttagi nyamana." 
Esther2:15 Sateya napa' giliranna Ester se ngadhebba rato. Ester reya ana'na Abihail, ekala' ana' sapopona dibi' se anyama Mordekhai; Ester ekaleburi sapa'a bai se nangale robana. E bakto ngadheb ka rato, Ester ta' mamentane pa-apa; se eangguy coma menorot petoduna Hegai, kapalana kapotren." 
Esther2:16 Ester egiba ngadhep ka Rato Ahasyweros e karatonna e taon se kapeng petto' pamarenta'anna Rato Ahasyweros, teppa' e bulan sapolo, iya areya bulan Tebet." 
Esther2:17 Rato lebur ka Ester alebbi'i paraban en-laenna; panggaliyanna ce' sennengnga. Daddi Ester paleng ekataresnae bi' rato; Ester jareya laju epangangguy jamangnga karaja'an. Ester pas epadaddi dinaju rato, epagante Dinaju Rato Wasti." 
Esther2:18 Saellana jareya, rato pas mabadha pesta raja menangka panghormadan ka Ester; ba-ponggabana sarta om-kaom oreng agungnga eonjang kabbi. Rato ngomommagi are libur ka saantero karaja'anna sarta gi-magi hadiya se talebat bannya'na." 
Esther2:19 Sabatara jareya bi' rato Mordekhai la epadaddi ponggabana nagara. 
Esther2:20 Ester gi' ta' abala ja' aba'na oreng Yahudi, sabab bi' Mordekhai ta' ebagi. Ester atoro' ka oca'na Mordekhai akantha gi' kene'na e bakto epeyara sapopona jareya." 
Esther2:21 E settong are, e bakto Mordekhai teppa'na alako e karaton, badha ponggaba karaton kadhuwa, se lakona malolo ajaga labang se ka kamarra rato, nyamana Bigtan ban Teres; se kadhuwa jareya asakongkel mateyana rato, sabab ce' baji'na ka Rato Ahasyweros." 
Esther2:22 Rancana jareya ekataowe bi' Mordekhai; bi' Mordekhai ekabala ka Ester, dineng Ester laju mator ka rato sabarang se ekataowe Mordekhai jareya." 
Esther2:23 Parkara jareya eoros, ban reppodan jareya nyata pajat bendher onggu. Se kadhuwa jareya eokom gantong. Menorot parentana rato, kadaddiyan jareya ecathet e dhalem ketab sajarana karaja'an." 
Esther3:1 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya Rato Ahasyweros ngangkat oreng se anyama Haman epadaddi pardana mantre. Haman reya ana'na Hamedata dhari toronanna Agag. 
Esther3:2 Rato marenta'agi ka sakabbinna ponggabana sopaja padha ngormadi Haman ban asojud e adha'anna. Kabbi padha atoro' ka papakon jareya, kajabana Mordekhai." 
Esther3:3 Ba-ponggaba laenna e karaton jareya atanya ka Mordekhai, “Aponapa sampeyan me' ta' atoro' ka dhabuna rato?”" 
Esther3:4 Sabban are reng-oreng jareya maksa nyoro Mordekhai sopaja atoro'a ka papakon jareya, tape Mordekhai ta' marduli. Oca'na Mordekhai, “Kaula oreng Yahudi; kaula ta' bisa asojud ka manossa.” Reng-oreng jareya laju areppot ka Haman sabab terro taowa ba' epabaramma'a Mordekhai jareya bi' Haman." 
Esther3:5 Haman ce' dukana e bakto ngoladi ja' Mordekhai ta' endha' asojud e ajunanna. 
Esther3:6 Ban e bakto meyarsa ja' Mordekhai jareya oreng Yahudi, Haman motose ja' Mordekhai kodu eokom mate, tape banne Mordekhai malolo se epateyana; bangsa Yahudi se badha e karaja'an Persiya epateyana kabbi keya." 
Esther3:7 E taon se kapeng dhubellas pamarenta'anna Rato Ahasyweros, e bulan settong, iya areya bulan Nisan, Haman mabadha ellot se enyamae “purim” kaangguy ngataowe are ban bulan apa se cocok kaangguy ajalannagi neyadda se jahat jareya. Saellana eellot pas eteptebbagi arena, iya areya tanggal tello bellas bulan dhubellas, iya areya bulan Adar." 
Esther3:8 Haman pas mator ka rato, “Guste, badha settong bangsa se ane se badha e man-ka'dhimman e saneyap propinsi e karaja'annepon junandalem ka'dhinto. Adattepon ce' bidana sareng sa-bangsa laenna. Bangsa gapaneka ta' atoro' ka kom-hokomma karaja'an. Daddi langkong sae manabi sareng junandalem bangsa gapaneka ja' dinggal ngala' sakarebba dibi'." 
Esther3:9 Manabi junandalem ta' kaberradan, ngereng pakalowar sorat parenta se makon mate'e sadajana bangsa gapaneka. Manabi junandalem narema rembak abdidalem ka'dhinto, abdidalem tanto kengeng mamaso' salaka langkong dhari tello ratos pa' polo ebu kilo ka dhalem parbendhahara'annepon junandalem.”" 
Esther3:10 Saellana meyarsa jareya, rato laju mokka' sesserra se eagem, se biyasana epangeccap pangomoman resme, pas eparengngagi ka Haman, moso rajana bangsa Yahudi." 
Esther3:11 Dhabuna rato, “Bangsa jareya ban pessena bi' sengko' epassra'agiya ka ba'na. Epabaramma'a bai bi' ba'na, sokana.”" 
Esther3:12 Daddi e tanggal tello bellas bulan settong, Haman nembali para sekettarissa rato, pas epakon noles sorat menorot se edhabuwagi. Sorat jareya pas esalen ka dhalem basa ban tolesan se eangguy e saneyap propinsi e karaja'an jareya. Sorat jareya etoles kalaban asmana Rato Ahasyweros, eeccap ban sesserra, pas duli epakerem ka para pangobasa, gubennor ban para kaom oreng agung e saneyap propinsi. Essena sorat jareya nyebbuttagi ja' e tanggal tello bellas bulan Adar, sakabbinna bangsa Yahudi, towa ban ngodha, babine' ban na'-kana', kodu epate'e kabbi, ban dhi'-andhi'na kodu ekala'." 
Esther3:13  
Esther3:14 Parenta jareya kodu eomommagi e saneyap propinsi sopaja e are se la etantowagi jareya reng-oreng la padha asadhiya kabbi. 
Esther3:15 Para otosan jareya duli gancangan mangkat ngaterragi rat-sorat jareya ka sakabbinna propinsi e karaja'an jareya. Kalaban dhabuna rato, parenta jareya eomommagi keya e Susan, ibu kotthana Persiya. Saellana jareya rato ban Haman agi-lenggi sambi adha'ar aeng anggur, tape kottha Susan laju baridhu polana kabar jareya." 
Esther4:1 Saellana ngedhing parkara jareya, Mordekhai laju nyebbit kalambina, pas akalambi karong menangka tandha sossa. Cethagga eburburi abu, saellana jareya pas ajalan e kottha sambi nanges, panangessa kaja ban ngennes." 
Esther4:2 E adha'anna labang sakethengnga karaton Mordekhai ambu, sabab oreng akalambi karong ta' olle maso' ka karaton." 
Esther4:3 Bariya keya e saneyap propinsi, reng-oreng Yahudi nanges saellana parenta jareya eomommagi. Kabbi padha apowasa, nanges ban aserrowan; bannya' e antarana se ngangguy kalambi karong ban tedhung alama' abu." 
Esther4:4 E bakto babine'an ban reng-oreng kobiriyan se lakona malolo aladine Dinaju Rato Ester nyareta'agi parkara Mordekhai jareya, Ester talebat sossana. Ester makon oreng ngeba kalambi ka Mordekhai; Mordekhai esoro asalen, kalambi karongnga esoro bukka', tape Mordekhai ta' endha' narema." 
Esther4:5 Saellana jareya Ester adikane Hatah, sala settong e antarana reng-oreng kobiriyan se bi' rato epalako malolo aladine salerana. Hatah esoro atanya ka Mordekhai arapa Mordekhai me' kantha jareya." 
Esther4:6 Daddi Hatah laju entar ka Mordekhai e lon-alon kottha e adha'anna labang sakethengnga karaton. 
Esther4:7 Mordekhai nyareta'agi sabarang kadaddiyan jareya ban barampa pesse salaka se ejanjiyagi Haman se epamaso'a ka parbendhahara'anna rato, saellana reng-oreng Yahudi epate'e kabbi." 
Esther4:8 Mordekhai magi keya ka Hatah salenanna sorat parentana rato se epakalowar e Susan, se aesse parenta sopaja reng-oreng Yahudi epate'e kabbi. Bi' Mordekhai Hatah esoro magi sorat jareya ka Ester, ban nerrangngagi parkara kadaddiyan jareya, sarta esoro menta'agi tolong sopaja Ester ngadhep ka rato, nyo'onnagi sopaja rato bellasa ka bangsana." 
Esther4:9 Hatah pas nyabis ka Ester sarta manapa' pessenna Mordekhai jareya. 
Esther4:10 Tape bi' Ester Hatah jareya epakon abali pole ka Mordekhai, epessenne kantha reya," 
Esther4:11 “Saneyap oreng, lalake' otaba babine', mon ta' etembali pas ngadhep rato e palataran e dhalem karaton, kodu eokom mate. Jareya monyena dhang-ondhang ban sakabbinna oreng, molae dhari panasehadda rato sampe' ka ra'yat e si-propinsi, padha tao ka atoran jareya. Pera' badha settong jalan mon terro lopoda dhari dhang-ondhang jareya, iya areya mon rato nodingngagi tekken emmassa ka oreng jareya. Mon kantha jareya tanto salamet. Tape la sabulan sengko' ta' etembali rato.”" 
Esther4:12 Hatah pas manapa' dhabuna Ester jareya ka Mordekhai. 
Esther4:13 Daddi Mordekhai pas aberri' parengeddan kantha reya ka Ester, “Ba'na ja' apangrasa lebbi aman dhari oreng Yahudi laenna polana ba'na badha e karaton." 
Esther4:14 Maske baramma'a oreng Yahudi masthe olle partolongan sampe' salamet. Tape mon ba'na neng-enneng malolo e dhalem kabadha'an se kantha reya, ba'na dibi' tanto mate ban toronanna eppa'na ba'na bakal tadha'a se nerrossagi pole. Sapa tao, pola e dhalem kabadha'an kantha reya ba'na pas epele epadaddi dinaju rato!”" 
Esther4:15 Daddi Ester makon oreng nyaot kantha reya ka Mordekhai," 
Esther4:16 “Pakompollagi sadajana oreng Yahudi se badha e Susan; pakon nyo'onnagi kaula ka Allah. Reng-oreng ganeka pakon apowasa, pakon ja' neddha sareng ja' ngenom tello are tello malem abidda. Kaula dibi' sareng babine'an se aladine kaula apowasa'a jugan. Manabi ampon lastare, kaula pas ngadhebba rato, sanare ta' kengeng menorot dhang-ondhang. Manabi kaula kodu mate polana ganeka, dinggal ta' aponapa!”" 
Esther4:17 Mordekhai pas mangkat, ajalannagi sabarang se epessennagi Ester jareya." 
Esther5:1 Saellana se apowasa olle tello are, Ester ngagem agemmanna dinaju rato, pas meyos ka palataran dhalemma karaton, laju ngadek e adha'na labangnga karaton. Rato teppa'na alenggi e korse karaja'anna se addhep ka labangnga karaton jareya." 
Esther5:2 E bakto ngoladi Dinaju Rato Ester ngadek e lowar jareya, rato pas arassa neser, sarta laju nodingngagi tekken emmassa ka Ester jareya. Ester laju nyander, nyedding konco'na tongket jareya." 
Esther5:3 Rato laju mareksane, “Badha apa, Ester? Apa se ekaterro ba'na? Mara ngoca'! Maske menta'a saparona tang karaja'an, bi' sengko' ba'na eberri'ana.”" 
Esther5:4 Atorra Ester, “Manabi junandalem kasokan, ngereng junandalem sareng Haman eatore lenggi ka kapotren dhaggi' lem-malem; abdidalem mabadha'a dhadha'aran kaagem junandalem.”" 
Esther5:5 Rato makon sopaja Haman duli rabu, sopaja ngennenga norodi onjanganna Ester. Se kadhuwa jareya pas meyos ka dhadha'aran se ebadha'agi Ester e kapotrenna." 
Esther5:6 E bakto adha'ar aeng anggur, rato mareksa, “Sateya mara kabala apa pamentana ba'na. Apa'a bai se epenta ba'na bi' sengko' eberri'ana, maske saparona tang karaja'an sakale.”" 
Esther5:7 Atorra Ester, “Manabi junandalem kasokan ngabbuli parnyo'onan abdidalem, junandalem sareng Haman eatorana lenggi pole ka dhadha'aran se sareng abdidalem ebadha'agiya lagguna malem. E dhalem dhadha'aran gapaneka abdidalem matora ponapa se daddi parnyo'onan abdidalem.”" 
Esther5:8  
Esther5:9 Haman gubar dhari dhadha'aran e kapotrenna Ester; atena ce' peragga. Tape sanapa'na ka labang sakethengnga karaton ngoladi Mordekhai se ta' endha' jaga aberri' hormat ka salerana, salerana pas ce' dukana." 
Esther5:10 Tape atena gi' eampet, pas gubar ka compo'na. Sanapa'na ka compo'na jareya, ca-kancana laju epakompol ka compo'na; rajina, Zeres, epakon noro' alenggi e jadhiya." 
Esther5:11 Haman pas abu-dhabu, ngedirragi kasogiyanna, bannya'na pottra lalake'anna, pangkadda se penting se etarema dhari ratona, ban pangkadda se atenggiyan dhari ba-ponggaba laenna." 
Esther5:12 Dhabuna pole, “La'-mala' e bakto Dinaju Rato Ester mabadha dhadha'aran e kapotrenna, tadha' oreng laen se eonjang kajabana rato ban sengko', lagguna malem sengko' eonjang pole, epakon asarengnge rato." 
Esther5:13 Tape jareya monggu ka sengko' tadha' gunana kabbi, mon sengko' gi' nangaleyana Mordekhai, oreng Yahudi rowa, toju' e labang sakethengnga karaton.”" 
Esther5:14 Ngedhing parkara jareya, rajina se anyama Zeres gella', ban ca-kancana padha mator kantha reya, “Pakon saos oreng abadhi canggana gantongan se tenggina dhu lekor meter. Kalagguwanna, nyo'on edi ka rato sopaja Mordekhai gapaneka egantong e cangga gapaneka. Kalaban sapaneka panjennengngan kengeng meyos ka jang-onjangan gapaneka asareng rato kalaban panggaliyan se senneng.” Rembak jareya bi' Haman eanggep ce' bagussa, daddi laju makon oreng agabay cangga pagantongan jareya." 
Esther6:1 E malem jareya rato ta' bisa asaren. Daddi laju makon oreng ngala'agi ketab catheddanna sajarana karaja'an, pas makon oreng maca'agi buku jareya." 
Esther6:2 E dhalem catheddan jareya rato manggi'i ja' Mordekhai tao areppottagi parkara Bigtan ban Teres, oreng kobiriyan se ajaga kamarra rato, se agabay rancana mateyana Rato Ahasyweros." 
Esther6:3 Rato mareksane, “Panghormadan ban babales apa se etarema Mordekhai polana jareya?” Para pangladinna mator, “Ta' narema pa-ponapa.”" 
Esther6:4 Rato pas mareksa pole, “Sapa tang ponggaba se badha e karaton sateya reya?” Kabendherran e bakto jareya Haman gi' buru maso' ka palataranna karaton; maksodda nyo'ona edi ka rato agantonga Mordekhai e cangga se la epaddek rowa." 
Esther6:5 Para pangladinna rato mator, “Haman badha e palataran, nyo'ona ngadhep ka ajunanna.” “Soro maso',” dhabuna rato." 
Esther6:6 Saellana Haman maso', rato mareksane, “Badha oreng se bi' sengko' eberri'ana panghormadan se raja. Epabaramma'a oreng jareya bi' sengko'?” Pekkerra Haman, “Sapa pole se eparengngana panghormadan se raja bi' rato, mon banne sengko'!”" 
Esther6:7 Daddi Haman nyaot, “Oreng gapaneka saena mondhuddagi pangangguy kabessaran se biyasaepon eagem junandalem dibi', sareng jaran se biyasaepon etetene junandalem dibi'; jaran gapaneka parenge rarenggan lambangngepon karaja'an." 
Esther6:8  
Esther6:9 Sala settong e antaraepon kaom oreng agungnga nagara dhari kaom bangsawan pakon ngagemmagi pangangguy gapaneka ka oreng se badhi ehormadi junandalem gapaneka; oreng gapaneka panetene jaran teteyannepon junandalem gella', pas arak palebat e lon-alon kottha. Pangraja gella' pakon alomampa e adha'epon oreng gapaneka, sambi ra'-era'an, ‘Kantha reya mon rato apareng pangarga'an ka oreng se ehormadi salerana!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Rato pas adhabu ka Haman, “Kassa' duliyan kala'agi pangangguy ban jaran jareya, pas jalannagi panghormadan jareya kabbi ka Mordekhai, oreng Yahudi rowa. Lakone pakantha se ekoca'agi ba'na gella' ja' sampe' badha se ekorange. Mon esareya, sateya Mordekhai teppa'na ju'-toju' e adha'na labang sakethengnga karaton.”" 
Esther6:11 Haman laju mondhut pangangguyya rato ban jaran teteyanna; pangangguy jareya pas epasangngagi ka Mordekhai. Saellana Mordekhai nompa' jaran jareya, bi' Haman laju earak lebat e lon-alon kottha, sambi ra'-era'an, “Abas, kantha reya mon rato apareng pangarga'an ka oreng se ehormadi salerana!”" 
Esther6:12 Saellana jareya Mordekhai abali ka labang sakethengnga karaton. Tape Haman ru-kaburu gubar, serana eko'-buko'e tako' etangale'e oreng." 
Esther6:13 Haman laju notorragi ka rajina ban ka ca-kancana sabarang se ealame salerana. Saellana jareya rajina ban ca-kancana se bicaksana jareya mator kantha reya, “Sampeyan kala kowat ka Mordekhai. Sarrena Mordekhai gapaneka oreng Yahudi, sampeyan ta' kera bisa makala oreng gapaneka, la'-mala' sampeyan tanto epakala sareng oreng gapaneka.”" 
Esther6:14 Sabatara reng-oreng jareya gi' acaca ban Haman, reng-oreng kobiriyan se aladine e karaton dhateng ru-kaburu, ngaterragiya Haman ka dhadha'aran se ebadha'agi bi' Ester." 
Esther7:1 Daddi kaangguy kadhukaleyanna rato ban Haman adhadha'aran ban nom-ngenoman asareng ban Ester. 
Esther7:2 Sambi adha'ar aeng anggur, rato adhabu pole ka Ester, “Sateya, tang Parameswari, mara koca'agi apa se epenta'a ba'na! Bi' sengko' masthe eberri', maske se epenta'a ba'na saparona tang karaja'an.”" 
Esther7:3 Atorra Dinaju Rato Ester, “Manabi junandalem kasokan, abdidalem nyo'ona sopaja abdidalem sareng bangsa abdidalem sadaja eedine odhi'." 
Esther7:4 Sabab abdidalem sareng bangsa abdidalem sadaja ampon padha ejuwal kaangguy epate'e. Ja' sakenga namong ejuwal ekadunora, abdidalem tanto neng-enneng saos, ta' kera marepot ka junandalem. Namong samangken abdidalem sareng bangsa abdidalem sadaja padha epateyana, epamosna'a!”" 
Esther7:5 Rato Ahasyweros laju mareksa ka Dinaju Rato Ester, “Sapa jareya orengnga ban badha e dhimma oreng se andhi' neyat kantha jareya?”" 
Esther7:6 Atorra Ester, “Moso se nganeyaja'a bangsa abdidalem enggi ka'dhinto Haman, oreng se jahat ka'dhinto!” Haman katako'en ngoladi ka rato ban dinaju rato." 
Esther7:7 Rato talebat dukana, pas ngadek adinggallagi mejana, terros ka lowar, ka kebbunna karaton. Haman ngagali, ja' rato la motossagi ngokoma salerana, daddi paggun alenggi e kapotren jareya, nyo'ona partolongan ka Ester sopaja ta' epateyana." 
Esther7:8 Haman la ta' andhi' pangarebban, laju malabu ka dipan kennengnganna Ester ren-sarenan, maksodda nyo'ona sapora, tape e bakto jareya keya rato abali dhari kebbunna karaton. Ngoladi Haman se kantha jareya, rato adhabu epakaja, “Apa? Sela kantha reya gi' bangal arosaga dinaju rato e dhinna', e adha'anna sengko' ban e tang karaton dibi'?” Rato buru mare se adhabu kantha jareya, reng-oreng kobiriyan se ajaga e jadhiya maso' ngeba ko'-buko', ebuko'agi ka mowana Haman." 
Esther7:9 Harbona, sala settong e antarana reng-oreng kobiriyan jareya, mator kantha reya, “Guste, e seddi'annepon bengkona Haman badha cangga pagantongan se tenggina dhu lekor meter. Haman se abadhi cangga gapaneka, epagantonga Mordekhai, oreng se ampon masalamet nyabaepon junandalem.” Rato laju adhabu, “Gantong Haman e jadhiya!”" 
Esther7:10 Daddi Haman laju egantong e cangga se epaddek epagantonga Mordekhai jarowa. Saellana jareya buru dukana rato jareya elang. 
Esther8:1 E are jareya keya Rato Ahasyweros marengngagi ka Dinaju Rato Ester sabarang dhi'-andhi'na Haman, moso rajana bangsa Yahudi. Ester ngatore oneng ka rato ja' Mordekhai jareya sapopona, daddi molae dhari bakto jareya Mordekhai eparenge ha' ngadhep ka rato ta' kalaban edikane kaadha'." 
Esther8:2 Rato mokka' sesserra se la epondhut pole dhari Haman, pas eparengngagi ka Mordekhai. Bi' Ester Mordekhai jareya eangkat epadaddi pangobasana dhi'-andhi'na Haman." 
Esther8:3 Saellana jareya Ester ngadhep ka rato pole, asojud sambi molar, nyo'on sopaja rato nyabut rancana jahadda Haman ka oreng Yahudi." 
Esther8:4 Rato nodingngagi tekken emmassa ka Ester, daddi Ester laju ngadek e ajunanna rato, pas mator," 
Esther8:5 “Manabi junandalem kasokan, sareng bellas ka abdidalem, ngereng junandalem makalowar sorat parenta, pakon nyabut rat-soradda Haman se aesse parenta mateyana sadajana oreng Yahudi e karaja'an ka'dhinto." 
Esther8:6 Kadi ponapa abdidalem se tega'a nengale bangsa abdidalem sareng la-bala abdidalem ejagal sadaja?” 
Esther8:7 Daddi Rato Ahasyweros adhabu ka Dinaju Rato Ester, ban ka Mordekhai, “Pajat bendher Haman bi' sengko' la egantong polana mateyana reng-oreng Yahudi kabbi; dhi'-andhi'na bi' sengko' la ebagi ka Ester kabbi." 
Esther8:8 Tape sorat se etoles kalaban asmana rato ban la epobuwi eccabba sello'na rato ta' ekenneng cabut pole. Maske bariya, bi' sengko' ba'na eedinana noles sorat parkara bangsa Yahudi, apa bai se eanggep becce' bi' ba'na. Toles sorat jareya ngangguy tang nyama, bi' sengko' pas epasangana eccabba karaja'an.”" 
Esther8:9 E are jareya keya, iya areya e tanggal tello lekor bulan tello', bulan Siwan, Mordekhai makompol para sekettarissa rato, pas eparenta'agi noles sorat ka para gubennor, para bupati ban om-kaom oreng agung e si-propinsi se bannya'na saratos petto lekor, dhari India sampe' ka Sudan. Rat-sorat jareya etoles ngangguy basa ban tolesan se eangguy e propinsi jareya bang-sebang. Laen dhari jareya ekeremmagi keya sorat ka bangsa Yahudi ngangguy basa ban tolesan Yahudi." 
Esther8:10 Rat-sorat jareya eteken bi' Mordekhai, kalaban asmana Rato Ahasyweros, sarta epasange eccabba karaja'an. Mordekhai laju nyoro para otosan ngaterragi rat-sorat jareya ka si-propinsi e karaja'an jareya. Para otosan jareya nompa' ran-jaran se ceppet kaagunganna rato." 
Esther8:11 Rat-sorat jareya essena anyata'agi ja' rato ngedine oreng Yahudi e saneyap kottha akompol abillai nyabana. Mon eserrang bi' reng-oreng se asanjata dhari bangsa ban propinsi dhimma'a bai, oreng Yahudi olle alaban ban mate'e reng-oreng se nyerrang jareya, tamaso' binena ban na'-ana'na; oreng Yahudi olle ajagal mosona sampe' tadha' karena, ban arampas dhi'-andhi'na." 
Esther8:12 Parenta jareya kodu ejalannagi e saantero karaja'an Persiya teppa' e are se bi' Haman etantowagi kaangguy mate'e reng-oreng Yahudi, iya areya e tanggal tello bellas bulan dhubellas, bulan Adar." 
Esther8:13 Sorat parenta jareya kodu eomommagi menangka dhang-ondhang ka sakabbinna oreng e sakabbinna propinsi sopaja bangsa Yahudi mon la napa' ka are jareya padha'a asadhiya kaangguy alaban ka mosona. 
Esther8:14 Daddi para otosan jareya pas padha mangkat nompa' jaranna rato. Parenta jareya ebaca'agi keya e Susan. 
Esther8:15 Saellana jareya Mordekhai mangkat dhari karaton ngangguy pangangguy kabessaran se barnana bungo ban pote, juba bungo terrong dhari linen alos ban makotha emmas se ce' bagussa. Oreng sakottha Susan padha rak-soragan kaperagen." 
Esther8:16 Oreng Yahudi padha arassa legga ban senneng atena, sarta ce' gumbirana." 
Esther8:17 Bariya keya e saneyap kottha ban propinsi, e dhimma'a bai sorat parentana rato jareya ebaca'agi, reng-oreng Yahudi anga-bunga, neng-sennengngan ban apesta. La'-mala' bannya' e antarana ra'yat se laju maso' daddi bangsa Yahudi polana padha tako' ka bangsa jareya." 
Esther9:1 E bakto jareya la tanggal tello bellas bulan Adar, iya areya are se eteptebbagi kaangguy ajalannagi papakonna rato, kaangguy bangsa Yahudi. Are jareya ete'-nante' bi' so-mosona bangsa Yahudi kaangguy matompes bangsa jareya. Tape nyatana reng-oreng jareya dibi' se epakala bi' reng-oreng Yahudi." 
Esther9:2 E saneyap kottha, reng-oreng Yahudi akompol nyerranga reng-oreng se aneyat juba' ka aba'na. Sa-bangsa e man-dhimman padha katako'en, daddi tadha' se bangala ngadhebbi bangsa Yahudi jareya." 
Esther9:3 La'-mala' sakabbinna kaom oreng agungnga propinsi, para gubennor, bupati ban kaom oreng agungnga karaja'an padha nyokong oreng Yahudi polana kabbi padha tako' ka Mordekhai." 
Esther9:4 Reng-oreng sanagara padha tao ja' Mordekhai ce' rajana pangarona e karaton ban sajan raja kakobasa'anna. 
Esther9:5 Daddi oreng Yahudi nyerrang mosona sakarebba, mate'e mosona ngangguy peddhang." 
Esther9:6 E Susan, ibu kotthana nagara, oreng Yahudi mate'e oreng lema ratos." 
Esther9:7 E antarana se epate'e jareya tamaso' ana' lalake'anna Haman ana'na Hamedata, moso rajana oreng Yahudi, bannya'na kasapolo, iya areya: Parsandata, Dalfon, Aspata, Porata, Adaliya, Aridata, Parmasta, Arisai, Aridai ban Waizata. Tape oreng Yahudi ta' arampas dhi'-andhi'na reng-oreng jareya." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 E are jareya keya bannya'na oreng se epate'e e Susan ereppottagi ka rato. 
Esther9:12 Dhabuna rato ka Ester, “E Susan bai oreng se epate'e oreng Yahudi badha lema ratos oreng, tamaso' na'-ana'na Haman se sapolo. Apa pole e si-propinsi! Ba' baramma kabadha'anna e dhissa' sengko' ta' tao! Sateya, apa pole se epenta'a ba'na? Mara ngoca', tanto bi' sengko' etorodi kabbi!”" 
Esther9:13 Atorra Ester, “Manabi junandalem kasokan, reng-oreng Yahudi se badha e Susan ka'dhinto lagguepon parenge edi ngolange pole pa-ponapa se ampon ejalannagi e are mangken. Sarengngan pole, mayyidda na'-ana'na Haman pakon gantong e ga-cangga pagantongan.”" 
Esther9:14 Rato laju apareng parenta norodi parnyo'onanna Ester; sorat parenta epakalowar e Susan, ban mayyidda ana'na Haman se sapolo oreng gella' egantong." 
Esther9:15 Daddi, e tanggal pa' bellas bulan Adar, reng-oreng Yahudi e Susan akompol pole, laju mate'e pole oreng e kottha jareya bannya'na tello ratos oreng. Ban e bakto jareya reng-oreng Yahudi buru ta' arampas rang-barangnga oreng keya." 
Esther9:16 Reng-oreng Yahudi se badha e si-propinsi padha akompol keya ban abillai odhi'na. So-mosona se baji' ka oreng Yahudi epate'e, bannya'na se epate'e pettong polo lema' ebu. Tape reng-oreng jareya padha ta' arampas barang dhi'-andhi'na oreng." 
Esther9:17 Kadaddiyan jareya kalakon e tanggal tello bellas bulan Adar. Kalagguwanna, e tanggal pa' bellas, reng-oreng Yahudi jareya ta' mate'e oreng pole, tape neng-sennengngan araya'agi are jareya." 
Esther9:18 Tape oreng Yahudi se badha e Susan ngala' tanggal lema bellas se eraya'agi menangka are raja, sabab reng-oreng jareya mate'e so-mosona e tanggal tello bellas ban pa' bellas, pas ambu e tanggal lema bellas." 
Esther9:19 Daddi, reng-oreng Yahudi se badha e tha-kottha kene' araya'agi tanggal pa' bellas bulan Adar menangka are gumbira ban are pesta sambi saleng berri' kakanan." 
Esther9:20 Saellana jareya Mordekhai nyathet sakabbinna kadaddiyan jareya, pas ngerem sorat ka sakabbinna oreng Yahudi e saantero karaja'an Persiya, se jau ban bariya keya se semma'." 
Esther9:21 Essena sorat jareya marenta'agi sopaja oreng Yahudi araya'agi tanggal pa' bellas ban tanggal lema bellas bulan Adar sabban taon. 
Esther9:22 Sabab e are jareya oreng Yahudi makala so-mosona, sampe' kasossa'an ban karekonganna aoba daddi kagumbira'an ban kasennengngan. Daddi reng-oreng Yahudi kodu araya'agi re-are jareya sambi mabadha pesta ban dhadha'aran, sarta saleng aberri' kakanan ban magi sandhekka ka reng-oreng mesken." 
Esther9:23 Oreng Yahudi atoro' ka parentana Mordekhai jareya; daddi paraya'an jareya laju daddi adad kabiyasa'an sabban taon. 
Esther9:24 Haman ana'na Hamedata, toronanna Agag, moso rajana oreng Yahudi, ajumbu' ellot se enyamae keya “purim” kaangguy neptebbagi are se ajagala reng-oreng Yahudi; rancanana matompessa oreng Yahudi." 
Esther9:25 Tape Ester ngadhep ka rato, ban rato apareng parenta se etoles, se andaddiyagi rancana juba'na Haman jareya ngenneng ka badanna dibi', sampe' aba'na ban na'-ana'na egantong e cangga pagantongan." 
Esther9:26 Jareya sababba, arapa re-are raja jareya me' enyamae Purim, asalla dhari oca' pur. Soradda Mordekhai ban sabarang se ealame oreng Yahudi jareya," 
Esther9:27 daddi lantaranna oreng Yahudi agabay atoran kaangguy aba'na dibi' ban toronanna, ban sakabbinna oreng se daddiya warga bangsa Yahudi. Atoran jareya nyebbuttagi ja' sabban taon oreng Yahudi wajib araya'agi are se dhadhuwa' jareya, se la eteptebbagi bi' Mordekhai." 
Esther9:28 Eteptebbagi keya ja' salanjangnga re-are Purim jareya kodu ekaenga'e ban eraya'agi bi' saneyap kalowarga Yahudi dhari saneyap angkadan, e saneyap propinsi ban e saneyap kottha." 
Esther9:29 Laen dhari jareya, Dinaju Rato Ester, pottrana Abihail, abadhi sorat se nomer dhuwa'na, se ngowadi essena soradda Mordekhai, parkara Purim jareya." 
Esther9:30 Sorat jareya epakerem ka sakabbinna oreng Yahudi, ban toronanna epakerem ka saratos petto lekor propinsi e karaja'an Persiya. Sorat jareya etoro'e du'a parnyo'onan sopaja bangsa Yahudi terrosa taremtem ban aman." 
Esther9:31 Sorat jareya ngajak keya sopaja oreng Yahudi ban toronanna padha'a araya'agi ban marengeddi re-are Purim teppa' baktona, akantha mon marengeddi masa powasa ban masa sossa. Kantha jareya essena soradda Mordekhai ban Dinaju Rato Ester." 
Esther9:32 Parenta se epakalowar Ester se neptebbagi sakabbinna atoranna Purim, ecathet e dhalem ketab." 
Esther10:1 Rato Ahasyweros mabadha lako paksa, banne pera' ka ra'yat e ra-dhaera paseser e karaja'anna, tape ka reng-oreng se badha e ra-dhaera padhalemman keya." 
Esther10:2 Sabarang lalakon se raja ban makasambu' se elampa'agi rato jareya, bariya keya careta sagenna'na parkara baramma rato jareya se ngangkat Mordekhai epadaddi kaom oreng agung, ecathet e dhalem ketab sajarana to-rato Persiya ban Mediya." 
Esther10:3 Mordekhai, oreng Yahudi rowa teptep daddi kaom oreng agung se paleng tenggi e baba'anna Rato Ahasyweros dibi'. Mordekhai ehormadi ban ekaleburi reng-oreng sabangsana, sabab Mordekhai jareya aehteyar amba' pate kaangguy kasalameddanna ban kasennengnganna odhi'na bangsana sarta toronanna kabbi." 
Job1:1 E nagara Us badha oreng lalake' nyamana Ayyub. Oreng jareya abakte ka Allah sarta esto ka Salerana; becce' atena ban ta' tao alampa'agi barang se juba'. 
Job1:2 Pottrana lalake' kapetto ban babine' katello. 
Job1:3 Dunorra bannya', dumbana pettong ebu meggi', ontana tello ebu meggi', sapena saebu meggi' ban hemarra lema ratos meggi'. Pandha'na, Ayyub jareya oreng se paleng sogi e antarana pandhudhu' dhaera Temor." 
Job1:4 Pottra lalake'anna se kapetto jareya andhi' kabiyasa'an te-ganteyan mabadha pesta e bengkona bang-sebang. Mon teppa' apesta, tra-pottra babine'anna eonjang keya, kabbi pas padha adhadha'aran areng-bareng." 
Job1:5 Sabban badha pottrana se mare apesta, kalagguwanna Ayyub tanto abungo gu-laggu, ngatorragi kurban ka PANGERAN sopaja tra-pottrana esapora. Ca'na panggaliyanna olle daddi tra-pottrana agabay dusa ban ya-nyeya Allah maske ta' etengnget." 
Job1:6 E settong are lok-mahlok sowarga ngadhep ka PANGERAN. Se Panggudha noro' ngadhep keya. 
Job1:7 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Se Panggudha jareya, “Dhari dhimma ba'na?” Saodda Se Panggudha jareya, “Abdidalem buru dhateng alengleng saantero bume.”" 
Job1:8 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Ba'na apa ngabassagi Ayyub Tang abdi rowa? E saantero bume tadha' oreng se talebat estona ban becce' atena akantha Ayyub jareya. Salanjangnga abakte ka Sengko' ban ta' tao alako jahat sakale.”" 
Job1:9 Se Panggudha nyaot, “Tanto saos Ayyub abakte ka Junandalem sabab Ayyub narema opana." 
Job1:10 Aba'epon sareng ana' binena sareng sadajana dhi'-andhi'na ejaga terros sareng Junandalem. Ponapa se elakone eberkadi sareng Junandalem; sareng Junandalem jugan eparenge ebin, cokop mossa'e saantero nagara." 
Job1:11 Namong, saompamaepon dhi'-andhi'epon sareng Junandalem epondhut, tanto Ayyub gapaneka abasto ka Junandalem.”" 
Job1:12 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Se Panggudha, “Iya, mara, sateya soka'na ba'na, epabaramma'a bai dhi'-andhi'na Ayyub jareya, poko'na ja' sampe' sake'e orengnga!” Se Panggudha jareya laju nyengla dhari jadhiya." 
Job1:13 Ta' saapa abidda dhari jareya tra-pottrana Ayyub teppa'na apesta e bengkona pottrana se sareyang. 
Job1:14 O-tao badha otosan ka'-berka' ka compo'na Ayyub, atotoran kantha reya, “Towan, abdina sareng la-kabula se laen eserrang oreng Syeba e bakto pe-sape kalerressan nyalaga teggal, sareng mar-hemar kalerressan ngamba e seddi'annepon teggal gapaneka. Sadajana keban gapaneka erampas, sadajana kabulaepon panjennengngan se badha e ka'issa' epate'e. Namong abdina kasorang se salamet, daddi kengeng ngatore oneng ka panjennengngan.”" 
Job1:15  
Job1:16 Teppa'na oreng jareya gi' acaca, pas dhateng kabula laenna ka jadhiya, oca'na, “Ba-dumbaepon panjennengngan sareng sadajana oreng ngowanna padha mate etappor kelap. Namong abdina kasorang se salamet, daddi kengeng ngatore oneng ka panjennengngan.”" 
Job1:17 Oreng jareya gi' ta' mare acaca, pas badha kabulana se nomer tello' dhateng abala kantha reya, “Badha tello pasukan bigal Kasdim arampok ta-ontaepon panjennengngan; la-kabulaepon panjennengngan epate'e sadaja. Namong abdina kasorang se salamet, daddi kengeng ngatore oneng ka panjennengngan.”" 
Job1:18 Teppa'na kabula jareya gi' acaca, pas badha kabula laenna, ngoca' kantha reya, “Tra-pottraepon panjennengngan kalerressan apesta e compo'na pottrana se sareyang." 
Job1:19 Neng-oneng badha angen barat dhari tase' beddhi; compo'epon pottrana panjennengngan gujur, tra-pottrana panjennengngan adinggal dunnya sadaja. Namong abdina kasorang se salamet, daddi kengeng ngatore oneng ka panjennengngan.”" 
Job1:20 Ayyub ngadek, pas nyebbit rasoganna menangka tandha sossa. Rambudda ecokor, pas asojud sambi adhabu," 
Job1:21 “Sengko' lahir ta' ngeba pa-apa, sengko' mateya ta' ngeba'a pa-apa keya. PANGERAN se apareng, PANGERAN keya se mondhut. Molja'agi asmana!”" 
Job1:22 Daddi, maske ngadhebbi mosiba se acem-macem jareya, Ayyub ta' agabay dusa ban ta' nyala'agi Allah." 
Job2:1 E bakto lok-mahlok sowarga ngadhep PANGERAN pole, Se Panggudha rowa badha keya e antarana." 
Job2:2 Dhabuna PANGERAN ka Se Panggudha jareya, “Dhari dhimma ba'na?” Saodda Se Panggudha, “Abdidalem dhateng alengleng e saantero bume.”" 
Job2:3 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Apa ba'na la ngabassagi Ayyub Tang abdi rowa? E saantero bume tadha' oreng se esto ban becce' atena akantha Ayyub jareya. Salanjangnga abakte ka Sengko' ban ta' tao alako jahat sakale. Paggun esto ka Sengko' maske ba'na la nyacae Sengko' macalaka'a aba'na ta' kalaban badha sababba.”" 
Job2:4 Saodda Se Panggudha jareya, “Nyaba sareng kasehadan lebbi aji katembang arta. Manossa ta' eman kaelangan sadajana dhi'-andhi'epon sokor gi' bisa odhi' terros." 
Job2:5 Saompamaepon Junandalem nyake'e badanna, tanto Ayyub pas abasto Junandalem!”" 
Job2:6 Daddi PANGERAN adhabu ka Se Panggudha, “Iya, mara, soka'na ba'na, epabaramma'a bai Ayyub jareya bi' ba'na, tape ja' pate'e.”" 
Job2:7 Se Panggudha pas nyengla dhari ajunanna PANGERAN; badanna Ayyub epaporowan molae dhari pa'-dapa'na sokona sampe' ka konco'na obu'na. 
Job2:8 Ayyub pas alenggi e seddi'na tombuganna bu-rombu, pas mondhut la'-bella'anna belling epagaru badanna." 
Job2:9 Ca'na rajina, “Ba'na me' gi' esto ka Allah? Ca'-koca'e, ra, Allah jareya, mon mare ba'na pas te-mate!”" 
Job2:10 Saodda Ayyub, “Cacana ba'na akantha oreng gendheng! Masa' sengko' ban ba'na coma narema'a nyamanna bai dhari Pangeran, mon badha se ta' nyaman etolaga?” Daddi, maske ngadhebbi mosiba acem-macem kantha jareya, Ayyub paggun ta' adhabu pa-apa se ta' narema ka kasokanna Allah." 
Job2:11 Balai se ngenneng ka Ayyub jareya ekaedhing bi' kancana katello, iya areya Elifas dhari kottha Téman, Bildad oreng Su'ah ban Zofar oreng Na'amah. Se katello jareya aparembagan entara nyapot Ayyub, alepora atena." 
Job2:12 Tape e bakto nangale'e dhari jauna, se katello jareya para' ta' taowa ja' jareya Ayyub. Daddi se katello jareya pas nanges epakaja, laju nyebbit kalambina sarta nabur abu ka bang-abang ban ka cethagga bang-sebang." 
Job2:13 Pettong are pettong malem abidda se katello jareya toju' e tana, e seddi'na Ayyub, padha ta' ca'-ngoca' pa-apa sabab tao saapa berra'na kasangsara'anna Ayyub jareya." 
Job3:1 Saellana jareya Ayyub molae abu-dhabu sarta abasto are kalahiranna, dhabuna," 
Job3:2 “Ya Allah, ngereng bastowagi are e bakto abdidalem elahirragi, jugan malem e bakto abdidalem egandhu' sareng ebu!" 
Job3:3  
Job3:4 Ya Allah, papettengngagi are gapaneka, ja' kaemodi sareng Junandalem saterrossa; ja' parengngagi badha caja tera' se nyonare are gapaneka." 
Job3:5 Are gapaneka pacelleng ngalereng, petteng calemodan, rodhep sareng orem; totop sareng ondhem sopaja ta' esonare tera'na are." 
Job3:6 Malem gapaneka paelangngagi dhari etonganna taon, ban bulan; ja' kaemodi, ta' mabi ebitong." 
Job3:7 Dinggal malem gapaneka papetteng tadha' leburra, tadha' sennengnga." 
Job3:8 Kon-dhukon ban kang-tokang tennong se ngobasane Lewiyatan, mara pesowe sarta basto tang are kalahiran jareya." 
Job3:9 Ja' sampe' bintang karteka nyonar, ja' sampe' pajjar moncar! Dina malem jareya me' tadha' ollena te'-nante'an padhatengnga are ban pangarebban se anyar." 
Job3:10 Ta' salamet malem la'nat e bakto sengko' elahirragi ebu ka dunnya ban epanneng nanggung sangsara. 
Job3:11 Arapa sengko' reya me' ta' mate e bakto egandhu' ebu otabana e bakto elahirragi? 
Job3:12 Arapa sengko' reya bi' ebu me' egellu' sarta ereba, ban epanyoso ka sosona?" 
Job3:13 Ja' sakeng sengko' mate e bakto jareya, tanto sateya sengko' tedhung nyaman," 
Job3:14 akantha reng-oreng se kobasa ban to-rato jaman lamba' se majaga pole karaton jaman kona. 
Job3:15 Sengko' tatedhung akantha pottrana rato se ngesse'e karatonna bi' emmas sarta salaka. 
Job3:16 Arapa sengko' me' ta' lahir ta' anyaba sopaja sateya tedhung ngeddha? 
Job3:17 E koburan reng-oreng jahat ta' ngalakone kajahadan, li-koli se lesso neng-enneng ta' alalakon." 
Job3:18 Para tawanan atena legga, ta' ebentak reng-oreng se ajaga." 
Job3:19 Neng e koburan oreng tadha' bidana: se kasohor ban se tadha' ajina; nor-dunor padha bebas dhi-budhina. 
Job3:20 Arapa manossa me' terros epanyangsara? Arapa tera' me' eparengngagi ka manossa se sossa? 
Job3:21 Reng-oreng se nyangsara odhi'na jareya bango' meleya koburan etembang dunnya, anante' pate, tape ajal ta' endha' dhapa'." 
Job3:22 Reng-oreng jareya buru arassa senneng mon la mate ban la ebendhem. 
Job3:23 Odhi'na e budhi are bi' Allah ta' epatangale, etotobi dhari adha' budhi, kangan ban kacer." 
Job3:24 Sengko' ta' ngakan, la'-mala' aserro ros-terrosan, nanges malolo tadha' ambuna." 
Job3:25 Sabarang se ekakobater sengko', la teba ka tang aba', sabarang se ekatako'e sengko', nyecce'e tang aba'." 
Job3:26 Sengko' ta' tao taremtem, nyangsara seyang ban malem.”" 
Job4:1 Elifas laju acaca, oca'na: “Ayyub, ba'na ba' peggella mon sengko' ca'-ngoca'? Sengko' ta' betta mon terros ta' acaca." 
Job4:2  
Job4:3 La bannya' oreng se eberri' pangajaran bi' ba'na, se ta' kellar bi' ba'na epakowat." 
Job4:4 Ca'-oca'na ba'na se madhateng samangat, majaga oreng se tatandhung, lesso ban pendhet." 
Job4:5 Sateya ba'na dibi' se nemmo kasossa'an, ba'na takerjat, ta' andhi' pangarebban." 
Job4:6 Ba'na gu ta' esto ka Allah, odhi'na tadha' calena? Daddi masthena ba'na yakin atena, ban ngarep partolonganna Se Kobasa." 
Job4:7 Pekker, ra, ba' badha'a oreng se ta' sala nemmo balai ban calaka'?" 
Job4:8 Sengko' nangale'e oreng se nyalaga tana kajahadan, ban nabur bibidda balai epakantha bigina men-tamennan, ta' kera molong laen kajabana calaka' ban kasossa'an." 
Job4:9 Akantha kaleng busbus, kantha jareya dukana Allah, matompes oreng epatadha' karena." 
Job4:10 Oreng jahat agaung padha ban macan, tape bi' Allah epaegem colo'na sarta epotel gi-gigina." 
Job4:11 Reng-oreng jareya mate akantha macan kakorangan pakan, na'-ana'na car-kalacer ta' karowan." 
Job4:12 Sengko' tao ngedhing wahyu, sowarana alos akantha oreng ato'-koto'." 
Job4:13 Sengko' padha ban oreng amempe se nako'e e tengnga malem se petteng calemodan; Sengko' ngalengsang, tedhung ta' nyaman." 
Job4:14 Sengko' takerjat, ngetter gujuden; badan ngetter katako'en." 
Job4:15 Angen ser-kalesserran ngenneng ka tang mowa, sampe' buluna kole' manjeng kabbi." 
Job4:16 Badha oreng manjeng e adha'na sengko'; bi' sengko' epandeng, tape sengko' ta' kennal. E dhalem kabadha'an se seppe jareya sengko' ngedhing sowara kantha reya," 
Job4:17 ‘Ba' badha'a manossa se tadha' salana e ajunanna Allah? Ba' badha'a oreng se tadha' calena e ajunanna Panceptana? 
Job4:18 La'-mala' para abdina e sowarga, bi' Allah ta' eparcaja; la'-mala' para malaekadda bi' Allah epanggi badha sala ban calena." 
Job4:19 Apa pole mahlok se egabay dhari lempong, se ekenneng petes epapeppe' akantha ngetnget." 
Job4:20 Mahlok jareya odhi' e baja laggu, pas mate tadha' se ngoros e baja compet are, salanjangnga ta' ekaenga'e oreng pole." 
Job4:21 Elang sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na; sarta mate ta' kalaban olle akkal buddi.’ 
Job5:1 Ayyub, mara aera', ba' badha'a se nyaodi? Malaekat se kemma se bi' ba'na epentae bantowan?" 
Job5:2 Pera' oreng se budhu pekkerra se mate polana sake' atena. 
Job5:3 Sengko' tao nangale'e oreng budhu; odhi'na katon ce' kokona onggu. Tape daksakala sengko' abasto bengko kennengnganna. 
Job5:4 Na'-ana'na ta' tao nemmo pangaoban; tadha' se abillai e pangadilan. 
Job5:5 Hasel se ekaolle dhari teggalla, tadha' ekakan oreng se kosong tabu'na. La'-mala' gandum se badha e tengnga ombut tadha' epaabi' reng-oreng se lapar. Sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na eencer oreng se dhakka ka dunnya." 
Job5:6 Banne dhari bume kalowarra kajahadan, banne dhari tana dhatengnga kasossa'an." 
Job5:7 Enja', banne! Manossa dibi' se madhateng kasossa'an ka aba'na akantha tampessa kembang apoy asalla dhari apoyya dibi'." 
Job5:8 Ja' sakenga sengko' daddi ba'na, sengko' tanto aserro ka Allah. Ka Allah sengko' mamadula, nyareta'agiya tang parkara." 
Job5:9 Se elampa'agi Allah reya lowar biyasa, ta' kera epahame bi' manossa. Jat-mo'jijat badhiyanna, ta' kabilang bannya'na ban tadha' ambuna." 
Job5:10 Allah matoron ojan ka bume, teggal ban talon padha eserame." 
Job5:11 Jareya Allah se matenggi oreng se mandhap ban masenneng oreng se sossa. 
Job5:12 Epabuddhu rancanana oreng se salenter, ejebbak ban etangkep oreng se penter, sampe' ehteyarra ta' daddi kabbi, ekenneng tepo ban akkalla dibi'." 
Job5:13  
Job5:14 E baja seyang reng-oreng jareya ngadhebbi papetteng, ga'-raga'an akantha e baja malem." 
Job5:15 Tape Allah masalamet ban malopot oreng mesken dhari pate, oreng se ta' andhi' dhari seksa'anna oreng laen." 
Job5:16 Sateya badha pangarebban pole ka oreng se mesken. Oreng jahat ta' metto caca, edunggem colo'na bi' Allah." 
Job5:17 Pojur ba'na mon bi' Allah eparengeddi! Ja' kene' ate mon ecale. 
Job5:18 Sabab Allah se masake' ban Allah keya se nambai. Astana se mokole bariya keya se mabaras pole. 
Job5:19 Mon badha e dhalem babaja ba'na epasalamet terros. 
Job5:20 E mosem laep ba'na ta' kera kalaparan. E jaman perrang raja ba'na aman ta' kera mate. 
Job5:21 Ba'na epalopot dhari petenna ba'na ngadhebbi mosiba tadha' tako'na. 
Job5:22 Ngadhebbi kakejjemman ban kalaparan ba'na tanto kowat, la'-mala' agella'an. Ba'na ta' tako' ta' kobater ngadhebbi burun alas se galak." 
Job5:23 Teggal se esalaga ba'na ta' kera badha batona; burun alas ta' kera nyerrang ba'na. 
Job5:24 Ba'na tanto aman neng e kemahna; ban mon ba'na ngetong ba-dumbana, kabbi salamet, ta' korang settonga." 
Job5:25 Na' potona ba'na ta' kera kabilang, bannya'na akantha rebba e teggal." 
Job5:26 Akantha gandum se massa', eanye mon dhapa' baktona, bariya keya ba'na odhi' segger sampe' towana." 
Job5:27 Ayyub, bi' sengko' jareya la epareksa kabbi. Caca jareya bendher, tarema bai.”" 
Job6:1 Ayyub laju nyaot, “Ja' sakenga tang kasossa'an etembang berra'na," 
Job6:2  
Job6:3 tanto aberra'an dhari beddhi e tase' raja. Daddi ja' heran mon sengko' acaca ban-saromban sarta ru-kaburu. 
Job6:4 Pana dhari Se Mahakobasa nerbas tang badan raconna balattra sabadan nyerrep ka sokma. Kakowadanna Allah talebat nako'e monggu ka sengko', ban se nyerrang akantha pasukanna moso." 
Job6:5 Hemar tanto kaperagen mon eberri'i rebba se jenno, bariya keya sape mon eberri' pakanna." 
Job6:6 Tape sapa se endha' ngakan kakanan se ceya? E dhimma te-poteyanna tellor badha rassana? 
Job6:7 Sengko' ta' endha' nyedding kakanan jareya; mon ngakan jareya ngalennyer sengko' rassana. 
Job6:8 Arapa tang du'a bi' Allah me' ta' epeyarsa'agi? Tang parnyo'onan ta' eparduli? 
Job6:9 Mandar Allah kasokanna maremmok tang aba' reya! Mandar sengko' epamateya sateya keya! 
Job6:10 Monggu ka sengko' jareya tanto daddi panglepor ate; sengko' atariya e dhalem kasossa'an. Papakonna Allah Se Mahasocce bi' sengko' la etoro' terros, ta' ekaloppae." 
Job6:11 Apa tang kakowadan me' daddi sengko' gi' badha? Apa tang pangarebban me' gi' terro odhi' a jang abidan? 
Job6:12 Apa padha ban bato kakowadanna tang badan? Apa tang aba' reya dhari dimbaga? 
Job6:13 La tadha' tang kakowadan se nyare bantowan; sengko' la ta' kera nemmo partolongan. 
Job6:14 E dhalem kasossa'an se kantha reya, sengko' ngarep kanca se saongguna. Apa sengko' reya gi' esto nyamana, otabana la ta' enga' ka Se Mahakobasa?" 
Job6:15 Tape ba'na, ca-kanca, ta' ekenneng parcaja ta' ekenneng andellagi. Ba'na akantha songay se tadha' aengnga e bakto ojan ta' gellem dhatengnga." 
Job6:16 Ba'na akantha songay se ta' agili, polana katotoban salju ban aeng se gali." 
Job6:17 Mon mosem panas la molae, salju ban es elang tadha' lampadda. Dhasarra songay jareya laju kerreng tadha' aengnga sakale." 
Job6:18 Lah-kafilah e bakto nyare aeng posang kabbi; alengleng sampe' mate e sagara beddhi. 
Job6:19 Kafilah dhari Syeba ban dhari Tema nyare aeng ngarep olleya. 
Job6:20 Tape pangarebbanna tadha' ollena, e penggirra songay se tadha' aengnga." 
Job6:21 Akantha songay jareya ba'na, ca-kanca, ba'na nyorot ban tako' nangale'e sengko' nanggung sossa." 
Job6:22 Arapa? Pola sengko' ta-menta ka ba'na? Otabana nyoro ba'na nyogo' oreng kaangguy tang kaparlowan? 
Job6:23 Apa sengko' menta tolong sopaja epasalamedda ban etebbus dhari moso se ta' andhi' ate bellas? 
Job6:24 Daddi mara, ajari sengko' sateya, duduwagi tang kasala'an! Sengko' neng-ennengnga ngedhingngagiya cacana ba'na." 
Job6:25 Ca'-oca' se ehlas macellep ate, tape cacana ba'na kosong ta' agandhu' arte!" 
Job6:26 Sabarang tang oca' bi' ba'na eanggep angen malolo; daddi apa gunana ba'na nyaodi sengko' se arassa la ta' andhi' pangarebban reya? 
Job6:27 La'-mala' na'-kana' jatim bi' ba'na elottre odhi'na, ba'na co-ngoco kancana polana terro sogiya." 
Job6:28 Kodda' abas sengko' reya; masa' sengko' lecegan ka ba'na? 
Job6:29 Ba'na ja' sampe' ta' adil, ya, kaenga'e! Sengko' ta' sala onggu, ja' ros-terrosan cale." 
Job6:30 Apa bi' ba'na sengko' ekera acaca lecek, ta' tao abida'agi se juba' ban se becce'?" 
Job7:1 Manossa reya akantha se epaksa akeket, odhi'na berra' akantha koli ren-aren;" 
Job7:2 akantha dunor se ngarep pangaoban; akantha koli se anante' bajaran. 
Job7:3 Dhari bulan ka bulan tang odhi' ta' andhi' tojjuwan; sabban malem tang ate possa' ban kasossa'an. 
Job7:4 Mon sengko' tedhunga, malem ekarassa ce' lanjangnga; pekkeran posang anante' bila pajjar se moncara." 
Job7:5 Tang badan possa' cacengnga ban bannya' gerrangnga; tang kole' loka kalowar nana. 
Job7:6 Tang odhi' se tadha' pangarebbanna reya ceppet jalanna nojju ka aherra, aceppeddan dhari tokang tennon se majalan sakocina." 
Job7:7 Kaemodi, Guste, odhi' abdidalem namong anyaba; kasennengngan abdidalem ampon lobar, tadha' lampadda." 
Job7:8 Samangken Junandalem ngoladi abdidalem, namong ta' kera abit pole. Manabi Junandalem nyare'e, tanto abdidalem ampon tadha' e bume." 
Job7:9 Akadi ondhem se sajan tepes pas terros mosna, sapaneka jugan manossa mate ta' abali pole ka dunnya. Sadajana oreng se kennal ka aba'epon padha loppa tadha' se emot." 
Job7:10  
Job7:11 Daddi abdidalem ta' kengeng neng-enneng malolo! Ta' kengeng nyempen kasossa'an ka'dhinto. Abdidalem kodu acareta notorragi essena ate se loka. 
Job7:12 Aponapa abdidalem ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem me' ejaga terros? Ponapa abdidalem ka'dhinto naga tase' se ambabajane? 
Job7:13 Abdidalem dhung-tedhungan maelanga lesso; macellebba ate se sossa nyare panglepor. 
Job7:14 Namong Junandalem ko'-nako'e abdidalem sareng mempe; Junandalem madhateng mempe juba' sareng ngen-angen e dhalem ate. 
Job7:15 Kantos abdidalem arassa aperagan manabi ecekkel saos kantos napa' ka ajal etembang nyandhang sangsara e dhalem badan. 
Job7:16 Abdidalem lesso sareng busen odhi' e bume, diggal abdidalem me' olle mate! Sabab odhi' abdidalem ta' agandhu' arte." 
Job7:17 Sanyatana manossa ka'dhinto ponapa me' sareng Junandalem eanggep ce' ajina? Me' terros eoladi sadaja tengka polana? 
Job7:18 Sabban are sareng Junandalem etalektegi, saneyap sa'at terros eoji" 
Job7:19 Bila Junandalem se atoleya, ta' ajaga abdidalem saterrossa, sopaja abdidalem kengenga ngalodhu' copa?" 
Job7:20 Adhu, Guste, se ajaga abdidalem, ponapa rogina ka Junandalem, manabi abdidalem agabay dusa? Me' kantos abdidalem ebadhi sasaranna panana? Ponapa abdidalem talebat maberra' ka Junandalem?" 
Job7:21 Aponapa Junandalem me' ta' kasokan nyapora sadajana dusa se etanggung abdidalem paneka? Ponapa Junandalem ta' kasokan malebbar sadajana kasala'an abdina? Sabab sakejja' aggi' abdidalem bakal tedhunga e dhalem koburan, manabi sareng Junandalem esare'e tanto ta' epanggi.”" 
Job8:1 Bildad pas ngoca', “Sampe' bila ba'na acaca'a kantha jareya? Cacana akantha angen se agarudhu' monyena." 
Job8:2  
Job8:3 Allah ta' tao mabilu' kaadilan; ban ta' tao kalero alampa'agi barang se bendher. 
Job8:4 Olle daddi na'-ana'na ba'na dusa ka Salerana, daddi la sapantessa narema okomanna." 
Job8:5 Tape mon ba'na nyare pangaoban ka Allah, nyo'on kabellasan ban nyo'on sapora," 
Job8:6 mon atena ba'na jujur ban tadha' calena, ba'na tanto duli etolong bi' Allah; ban menangka babales ka ba'na, roma tatanggana ba'na epabali akantha asalla." 
Job8:7 Dhi'-andhi'na ba'na se elang rowa tadha' artena mon ebandhing bi' se bakal etarema'a. 
Job8:8 Kodda' pekker odhi'na oreng penter jaman lamba'na, pekker palanjang pangalamanna bangatowa." 
Job8:9 Sengko' ban ba'na reya ta' tao pa-apa sabab odhi'na abidda ta' sabarampa; coma akantha jang-bajangan se lebat e dunnya. 
Job8:10 Edhingngagi cacana reng-oreng penter jaman lamba'na se aberri' pangajaran ka ba'na kantha reya: 
Job8:11 ‘Galagas pera' tombu e tana se bannya' aengnga; pandhan ta' kera odhi' e tana se tadha' rabana. 
Job8:12 Mon aengnga kerreng galagas pas elop dhaunna, aceppeddan dhari bu-tombuwan laenna, mangkana gi' ngodha ban gi' banne baktona se eketthoga ekala'a gunana." 
Job8:13 Kantha jareya oreng se ta' abakte ka Pangeran, loppa ka Allah, tadha' pangarebban e dhalem odhi'na." 
Job8:14 Oreng jareya ngandellagi bennang alos salambar; jaringnga ba-laba se daddi kaparcaja'anna. 
Job8:15 Ba' kokowa jaringnga ba-laba, mon egabay panyandharan? Bennangnga ba' kowadda egabay paneggudan?’" 
Job8:16 Oreng jahat atamba bannya' akantha lalang se adhu'-budhu' ekenneng sonarra are mossa'e bun-kebbunan. 
Job8:17 Ramo'na abulet e to-bato se atompo' e tana, abulet ce' serredda, malarat se locoda." 
Job8:18 Tape mon lalang jareya edabu' ramo'na, katonna lalang jareya ta' tao badha e jadhiya." 
Job8:19 Oreng jahat coma kantha jareya kasennengnganna; oreng laen dhateng agante kennengnganna. 
Job8:20 Tape Allah ta' tao ajauwi oreng se esto ka Salerana, ban ta' tao nolong oreng se daraka." 
Job8:21 Colo'na ba'na gi' epagella'a, bibirra ba'na gi' epasoraga gumbira." 
Job8:22 Se baji' ka ba'na bakal malowa, ban bengkona oreng jahat bakal eparosaga epamosna'a.”" 
Job9:1 Tape Ayyub nyaot, dhabuna, “Sengko' tao, oca'na ba'na tadha' salana. Tape e dhimma se bisa'a manossa mennang aparkara ban Allah?”" 
Job9:2  
Job9:3 Dhari saebu partanya'an se eajuwagi Allah, maske settonga ta' ekenneng jawab bi' manossa." 
Job9:4 Allah reya talebat penter ban kobasa; sapa se bisa'a alaban ka Salerana? 
Job9:5 Allah ngalle nong-gunong ta' etemmo oreng settonga pas epajungkelang dhari dukana. 
Job9:6 Allah madhateng lendhu sampe' agundhek bume reya, canggana dunnya sampe' jan-onjanan." 
Job9:7 Allah bisa alarang are moncar e baja laggu ban ta' ngedine tang-bintang nyonar e baja malem. 
Job9:8 Ta' ebanto pa-sapa Allah ngampar langnge' padana nyek-ngenyek barugugga naga tase'. 
Job9:9 Tompo'anna bintang lao' esaba' e bang-abang, bariya keya bintang Biduk, bintang Belanti ban bintang Karteka." 
Job9:10 Ta' bisa manossa paham ka sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana, tadha' oreng se sanggup ngetong sakabbinna mo'jijadda." 
Job9:11 Salerana alomampa e adha'anna sengko' tape sengko' ta' nangale'e; Salerana lebat e erenganna sengko' tape sengko' ta' pasda. 
Job9:12 Mon Allah arampas, sapa se bangala lang-ngalange? Sapa se bangala maenga': ‘Ponapa se elampa'agi Junandalem?’" 
Job9:13 Allah ta' nahan dukana ban panassa panggaliyanna; para pangladinna Rahab atellok ka Salerana. 
Job9:14 Daddi, baramma sengko' se alabana? Oca' apa se bi' sengko' epanyaodana?" 
Job9:15 Maske sengko' ta' sala dhu baramma'a pole, kajabana nyo'on bellas ka Allah tang hakim?" 
Job9:16 Saompamana Salerana nyaot e bakto sengko' aserro, sengko' mangmang, ba' bendherra Guste Allah kasokan meyarsa'agi tang sowara?" 
Job9:17 Allah se maremmok tang aba' e dhalem kaleng busbus, se nambai sangsarana tang badan ta' kalaban badha sababba." 
Job9:18 Sengko' ta' eparenge kasempadan anyaba maske pera' sakejja'; la'-mala' tang odhi' reya epatalebat pae'na. 
Job9:19 Apa sengko' ngadduwa kakowadan ban Allah? Abas, ra, kakowadanna tadha' bandhinganna! Mon bi' sengko' egugada sapa se bangal ngologa Salerana ka pangadilan?" 
Job9:20 Maske sengko' esto ban ta' andhi' dusa, tang colo' dibi' katon ngoca' sengko' ta' teppa', sabban oca' se kalowar dhari tang bibir katon nyala'agi sengko' keya." 
Job9:21 Sengko' ta' sala, tape sengko' ta' parduli. Sengko' la busen odhi'. Ka sengko' kabbi la tadha' artena sakale; Kabbi padha bai papasthenna, se bendher ban se sala tadha' bidana: padha epamateya keya bi' Allah." 
Job9:22  
Job9:23 Mon oreng se ta' sala mate dadagan, Allah pera' kasokan malolo." 
Job9:24 Bume bi' Allah epassra'agi ka oreng daraka, kim-hakim la padha epabuta matana. Se makantha jareya tadha' laen kajabana Allah, mon enja', dhu sapa'a pole kerana?" 
Job9:25 Re-are e dhalem tang odhi' reya ngabber ceppet parana, elang ta' kalaban madhateng kasennengngan." 
Job9:26 Akantha parao se ceppet pajalanna, tang odhi' lebat ce' lekkassa, akantha kaceppeddanna mano' ellang se nyower nyargebba mangsana." 
Job9:27 Mon sengko' terro mesemma ban agella'a, terro loppa'a ka sakabbinna tang kasossa'an, tang kasossa'an dhateng pole nyerser sengko'; sabab sengko' tao bi' Guste Allah sengko' teptep eanggep sala." 
Job9:28  
Job9:29 Daddi mon kantha jareya, apa gunana bi' sengko' epekkere?" 
Job9:30 Tang dusa ta' kera elang, maske ebaccowa ban sabun!" 
Job9:31 Bi' Allah sengko' ecelleddagi ka cellot, sampe' tang kalambi dibi' arassa jitjit ka sengko'." 
Job9:32 Ja' sakenga Allah reya manossa akantha sengko', tanto sengko' ngenneng nyaot; ngajak Salerana ka pangadilan sopaja tokar reya epamare epareksa." 
Job9:33 Tape tadha' jaksa e antarana sengko' ban Salerana, se ngenneng ngadili Salerana ban sengko' reya." 
Job9:34 Moga-moga Allah ambuwa se ngokom sengko', ban ajauwagi sengko' dhari sabarang se nako'e!" 
Job9:35 Sengko' ta' tako' tor-matora ka Salerana, sabab sengko' ta' apangrasa andhi' sala." 
Job10:1 Sengko' la busen ban ontep odhi' e bume, daddi sengko' makalowara pae'na tang ate." 
Job10:2 Ya Allah, abdidalem ja' sala'agi; ngereng terrangngagi, aponapa abdidalem me' ekamoso sareng Junandalem?" 
Job10:3 Ponapa kaontonganna Junandalem nyeksa abdidalem sapaneka, mowang cepta'annepon Junandalem dibi', sareng nolonge reng-oreng se juba' ate?" 
Job10:4 Pamanggina Junandalem ta' padha sareng pamanggina manossa; 
Job10:5 yuswaepon Junandalem ta' pandha' akadi omorrepon manossa. 
Job10:6 Manabi sapaneka, aponapa Junandalem me' ngoros sadajana kasala'an sareng dusa abdidalem?" 
Job10:7 Sanyatana Junandalem ngagali, abdidalem ta' gadhuwan sala sakale. Junandalem ngagali tadha' oreng settonga se kengeng masalamet abdidalem dhari astaepon Junandalem." 
Job10:8 Junandalem se abadhi sareng apareng ropa ka abdidalem paneka, samangken sareng Junandalem me' daddi epaancora?" 
Job10:9 Kaemodi, Guste, Junandalem se abadhi abdidalem dhari lempong! Ma' samangken abdidalem ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem epadaddiya abu pole?" 
Job10:10 Kobasana Junandalem saos se abanto rama madaddi abdidalem ka'dhinto, sareng se maraja abdidalem e gandhu'anna ebu." 
Job10:11 Sareng Junandalem badan ka'dhinto ebadhi dhari tolang sareng ora', eparenge daging, sareng kole' menangka bungkossa." 
Job10:12 Abdidalem eparenge odhi' sareng kataresna'an, nyaba abdidalem ejaga sareng epeyara." 
Job10:13 Namong samangken abdidalem oneng ja' ngabidi gi' dhimen Junandalem ampon kaagungan rancana, abdidalem epacalaka'a." 
Job10:14 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem etalektegi salanjangnga pola me' abadhi kasala'an, sopaja Junandalem ta' kasokan apareng sapora." 
Job10:15 Manabi abdidalem alako dusa, tanto calaka'; namong manabi abdidalem tadha' salana, gi' paggun eanggep dusa. Abdidalem ta' bangal adhanga, sabab arassa sossa sareng eya-seya." 
Job10:16 Manabi abdidalem ahasel sanare ta' saponapa, sareng Junandalem eserser akadi se nyerser macan; noduwagi pole kakobasa'anna, sopaja abdidalem tako'a." 
Job10:17 Junandalem madhateng sakse ros-terrosan se nyala'agi abdidalem salanjangnga; Junandalem sajan atamba duka, sareng madhateng kan-pasukan anyar se epanyerrang sareng epamerrange abdidalem paneka." 
Job10:18 Aponapa abdidalem me' epalahir ka bume? Langkong sae abdidalem mate sabellunna etangale'e oreng. 
Job10:19 Sopaja abdidalem eanggep ta' oneng badha, sabab dhari gandhu'anna ebu terros egiba ka koburan." 
Job10:20 Abdidalem ta' abit pole se odhi'a e dunnya, daddi dinggal abdidalem kadibi'ana, ngarassa'agiya kobassana karena odhi' se namong sakejja'." 
Job10:21 Sakejja' aggi' abdidalem ondura ban ta' kera abali pole, nojju ka nagara se petteng calemodan," 
Job10:22 nagara se petteng, salbut ta' epanggi karowanna, kennengnganna tera' se padha sareng petteng calemodan.”" 
Job11:1 Saellana jareya Zofar ngoca', “Apa oreng se bannya' caca ta' parlo esaodi? Apa oreng se bannya' colo' ta' parlo esala'agi?" 
Job11:2  
Job11:3 Ayyub, apa bi' ba'na sengko' sakanca esangka ta' tao nyaot? Neng-enneng esanggu polana eca'-koca'e ba'na?" 
Job11:4 Menorot pekkeranna ba'na sabarang se ekoca'agi ba'na jareya ta' sala; menorot anggebbanna ba'na, ba'na reya berse e ajunanna Allah." 
Job11:5 Tape, moga Allah dibi' adhabuwa ka ba'na!" 
Job11:6 Moga ba'na eparengngana oneng bi' Salerana, ja' hekmat reya bannya' macemma ban tadha' manossa se ngarteya. Sopaja ba'na ngarteya ja' kasangsara'an se etanggung ba'na jareya sanyatana ta' sabarampa mon ebandhing ban kasala'anna ba'na, se sabagiyan e antarana ta' ebitong bi' Guste Allah." 
Job11:7 E dhimma ba'na se pahama parkara hakekadda Allah? E dhimma ba'na se ngarteya parkara kobasana? 
Job11:8 Kobasana atenggiyan dhari langnge', ta' kera ekenneng jangngo bi' ba'na. Kobasana adhalemman dhari dunnyana oreng mate, ba'na ta' kera ngarte maske sakone'a." 
Job11:9 Kobasana Allah araja'an dhari bume, alebaran dhari tase' raja." 
Job11:10 Mon Allah nangkep ba'na sarta abakta ba'na ka pangadilanna, sapa se bisa'a lang-ngalange Salerana?" 
Job11:11 Allah ngagali ka oreng se dujan lecegan saneyap kajahadanna ta' lopot dhari pangoladanna. 
Job11:12 Mon hemar alas abudhu' hemar se notot, buru oreng budhu daddi penter." 
Job11:13 Ayyub, mara ba'na paberse atena, atobat dhari sa-dusana! Adu'a nyo'on ka Allah!" 
Job11:14 Buwang dusa dhari atena, pajau kajahadan dhari bengkona." 
Job11:15 Daddi ba'na olle ngadhebbi odhi' reya kalaban ate sabbar ban bangal; koko ban ta' mangmang pekkerra. 
Job11:16 La'-mala' ba'na ta' kera enga' ka kasossa'anna, akantha banjir se asat ta' ekaenga'e oreng settonga." 
Job11:17 Odhi'na ba'na bakal lebbiya terrang dhari are seyang, ban odhi'na ba'na se calemodan bakal padha'a ban tera'na pajjar." 
Job11:18 Ba'na bakal kokowa ban andhi' pangarebban se kowat; ban ba'na arassa aman sabab elindhunge Allah. 
Job11:19 Ba'na ta' kera tako' ka moso; ban bannya' oreng entar ka ba'na menta'a tolong. 
Job11:20 Tape oreng se jahat bakal ngabasa kabingongan, sabab ta' nemmo jalan ban partolongan. Se daddi pangarebbanna coma anante' bila se mateya.”" 
Job12:1 Dhabuna Ayyub, “Pajat, ba'na reya abakkele ommat manossa. Mon ba'na mate, kabecce'an mate keya." 
Job12:2  
Job12:3 Sengko' manossa se andhi' akkal buddi keya; la ngarte apa se ekoca'agi ba'na. Ban pole, sapa se ta' tao ka parkara jareya? Sengko' ja' sangka kala ka ba'na." 
Job12:4 Sengko' ekala'-gella' bi' ca-kanca, mangkana sengko' tadha' salana tadha' calena. Lamba' Allah ngabbuli tang du'a, mon sengko' nyo'on partolonganna." 
Job12:5 Ba'na ya-nyeya oreng se palang, polana odhi'na ba'na aman; oreng se la para' robbuwa bi' ba'na gi' epokol epakaja." 
Job12:6 Tape odhi'na bigal aman salanjangnga, oreng se bangal nangtang Allah taremtem odhi'na. Mangkana diba se eandellagi, sanyatana pera' kakowadanna dibi'." 
Job12:7 Kodda' atanya ka mano' sarta keban laenna tanto ba'na eberri'i pangajaran. 
Job12:8 Menta katerrangan ka sakabbinna mahlok e bume ban e tase' raja, tanto ba'na ebalai." 
Job12:9 E antarana para mahlok jareya, se kemma se ta' tao ja' se nyepta'agi aba'na tadha' laen kajabana PANGERAN?" 
Job12:10 Allah se ngator odhi'na mahlok cepta'anna; se kobasa ka nyabana saneyap manossa.
