Job12:11 Akantha tang jila se dujan ka kakanan se nyaman, bariya keya tang kopeng lebur ngedhingngagi caca." 
Job12:12 Ca'na, se andhi' kabicaksana'an oreng se la towa omorra, tape pera' Allah se kaagungan hekmat ban kakowadan. Ca'na, se andhi' pangarteyan pera' oreng se la towa, tape pera' Allah se kaagungan pangarteyan ban kakobasa'an." 
Job12:13  
Job12:14 Sabarang se ebungkar Allah ta' ekenneng paddek pole; pa'-sapa'a se etawan ta' ekenneng tolong oreng. 
Job12:15 Mon Allah namba' aeng, kabbi tanto daddi kajal ban kerreng; mon aeng eocol ban epagili, tanto tana elompa' banjir." 
Job12:16 Allah reya kowat ban mennang ros-terrosan; tokang tepo ban reng-oreng se etepo padha badha e dhalem kakobasa'anna. 
Job12:17 Para pangobasa epondhut kabicaksana'anna, para pamimpin epadaddi kantha oreng lola." 
Job12:18 Para rato epondhut kakobasa'anna pas epamaso' ka dhalem penjara; 
Job12:19 para imam ban para pangadha'na bangsa epanespa tadha' bandhinganna. 
Job12:20 Reng-oreng se penter acaca epakerker jilana, reng-oreng towa epaelang kabicaksana'anna." 
Job12:21 Se neggu' kakobasa'an epakaelangan mowa, se marenta epondhut kakowadanna." 
Job12:22 Kennengngan se orem etera'e; se rodhep petteng esonare. 
Job12:23 Sa-bangsa epamaju ban epakowat, saellana jareya laju epatompes tadha' karena." 
Job12:24 Para pamimpin epabingong, sampe' ajalan ta' ron-karon." 
Job12:25 Reng-oreng jareya ga'-raga'an e pettengnga, dhing-tabarindhing akantha oreng mabu'." 
Job13:1 Sabarang se ekoca'agi ba'na sengko' la tao nangale ban ngedhing sabellunna, ban parkara jareya sengko' ce' pahamma." 
Job13:2 Sabarang se ekataowe ba'na sengko' tao keya; ja' nyangka sengko' kala ka ba'na. 
Job13:3 Tape sengko' tor-matora ka Se Mahakobasa; abilla'ana tang parkara e ajunanna Allah. 
Job13:4 Sabab ba'na notobi kabudhuwanna dibi' kalaban nepo, tadha' bidana ban kon-dhukon palsu." 
Job13:5 Ja' sakenga ba'na ta' acaca, olle daddi ba'na eanggep bicaksana." 
Job13:6 Daddi mara edhingngagi sengko' alabana; mara tetene tang caca reya. 
Job13:7 Apa ba'na olle lecek ka manossa, polana abilla'ana Allah? Apa ba'na olle co-ngoco kaangguy kaparlowanna Salerana?" 
Job13:8 Apa ba'na nolongana Allah, abilla'ana, daddi pangacarana?" 
Job13:9 Mon Allah mareksa ba'na, ba' becce'a hasella? Ba' bisa'a ba'na co-ngoco Salerana akantha se co-ngoco manossa?" 
Job13:10 Mon badha se etolonge ba'na maske ba'na ta' asa'-kasa', bi' Allah ba'na tanto eparenge okoman se kejjem." 
Job13:11 Apa atena ba'na ta' tekerjat ngataowe kaagunganna Guste Allah? Apa atena ba'na ta' tako' ngataowe kakowadanna? 
Job13:12 Babala'anna ba'na akantha abu se tadha' gunana; cacana ba'na padha ban lempong se gampang bella. 
Job13:13 Daddi la neng-enneng, dina sengko' se acaca'a, sengko' ta' parduli maske baramma'a daddina." 
Job13:14 Sengko' ehlas maske nyaba daddi tarowanna. 
Job13:15 Sengko' nekat, sabab la ta' andhi' pangarebban! Mon Allah mateyana sengko', sengko' passra, tape sengko' gi' abilla'ana tang aba' e ajunanna." 
Job13:16 Olle daddi sengko' salamet polana mabangal sabab oreng se jahat ta' kera bangal ngadhep ka Allah. 
Job13:17 Sateya edhingngagi pateppa' tang oca'; tetene tang katerrangan reya. 
Job13:18 Sengko' la asadhiya aparkara'a, sengko' yakin sengko' ta' ekenneng anggep sala." 
Job13:19 Guste, manabi Junandalem rabu ngarane abdidalem, abdidalem neng-ennengnga anante'a ajal." 
Job13:20 Namong kabbullagi parnyo'onan abdidalem se dhadhuwa' ka'dhinto, Guste, sopaja abdidalem bangal ngadhep Junandalem pole:" 
Job13:21 ngereng ambu, abdidalem ja' seksa ros-terrosan, ja' patako' ka Junandalem salanjangnga." 
Job13:22 Ngereng adhabu, abdidalem nyaoda. Otabana diggal abdidalem se tor-matora, kasokana Junandalem apareng jawaban." 
Job13:23 Saponapa kasala'an sareng dusa abdidalem? Ngereng sebbuddagi kajahadan abdidalem. 
Job13:24 Aponapa abdidalem sareng Junandalem me' ejauwi? Aponapa abdidalem me' ekamoso? 
Job13:25 Abdidalem namong dhaun se ngalotor egiba angen, aponapa sareng Junandalem me' eko'-tako'e? Abdidalem namong darameyan se kerreng, aponapa me' eserser samane?" 
Job13:26 Junandalem nantowagi papasthen se pae' kaangguy abdidalem, Guste, sareng ngokom kasala'an abdidalem gi' ngodhana." 
Job13:27 Soko abdidalem etale'e rantay besse; saneyap tengka' abdidalem etalektegi; kantos ka pa'-dapa'na soko eoladi. 
Job13:28 Kantos abdidalem alpo' akadi kaju se mopok, tadha' bidana sareng kaen se teppo ekakan ngetnget." 
Job14:1 Ngabidi lahir manossa ta' gadhuwan kakowadan, ta' bisa apa-ponapa; odhi' sakejja' e dunnya nanggung sangsara." 
Job14:2 Saamponna nyemme pas elop akadi kembang; mosna terros elang akadi jang-bajangan. 
Job14:3 Ya Allah, ba' kasokana Junandalem ngoladi abdidalem, otabana ponapa Junandalem ngadhebbagiya abdidalem ka pangadilanna Junandalem?" 
Job14:4 Ba' kengenga manossa se buddhak dusa madhateng barang se samporna? 
Job14:5 Omorra manossa sareng Junandalem ampon etantowagi; bannya'na bulanna ampon eteptebbagi. Jugan batessa ampon epamasthe, ta' kengeng elebadi pole." 
Job14:6 Diggal ja' rok-erok, me' olle bu-ambu lesso; ngarassa'agi kobassaepon odhi'na se nyangsara." 
Job14:7 Kajuwan se epoger gi' gadhuwan pangarebban; nyelbi' pole, pas aca'-ranca'." 
Job14:8 Sanare e dhalem tana ramo'na kero', sarengngan bungkella bucco'," 
Job14:9 namong manabi ekenneng aeng pas tombu pole; akadi tamennan se ngodha, selbi'na tombu pole." 
Job14:10 Namong manabi manossa mate, obus caretana; manabi adinggal dunnya, pas e ka'dhimma kennengnganna?" 
Job14:11 Akadi songay se asat aengnga, sareng talaga se kerreng dhasarra," 
Job14:12 sapaneka jugan manossa se ampon mate: ta' kengeng odhi' pole. Ta' kera jaga saabidda langnge' gi' badha, ta' kera mella' pole dhari tedhungnga." 
Job14:13 Erreppagi abdidalem e dunnyana oreng mate; jaga'agi kantos Junandalem ta' duka pole. Pas tantowagi baktoepon bila Junandalem se emoda ka abdidalem ka'dhinto. 
Job14:14 Sabab manabi manossa mate, ta' kera bisa odhi' pole. Abdidalem anante' sabban are kantos kasangsara'an ka'dhinto mare." 
Job14:15 Saamponna gapaneka Junandalem tanto ngolok, abdidalem badhi nyaot; Junandalem tanto pas neser pole ka abdidalem, mahlok cepta'anna." 
Job14:16 Junandalem tanto pas ajaga tendagga soko abdidalem, namong ta' kera nalektegi dusa abdidalem." 
Job14:17 Dusa abdidalem tanto epalebbar, kasala'an se ampon lebat tanto epatadha'." 
Job14:18 Pagi' nong-gunong badhi gujura, gunong bato se koko agingser kennengnganna." 
Job14:19 To-bato bakal egisgisa aeng se santer gilina; tana bakal eanyo'a ojan se derres gaggarra. Sapaneka jugan Junandalem mamosna pangarebbanna manossa. 
Job14:20 Junandalem makala manossa kaangguy salanjangnga; sareng Junandalem etondhung, eoba robana." 
Job14:21 Na'-ana'na daddi oreng se molja, tape oreng gapaneka ta' oneng pa-ponapa. Manabi na'-ana'na nespa odhi'na, tadha' oreng se malae aba'na." 
Job14:22 Se ekarassa namong nyo'nyo'na badanna; se etanggung namong ngennessa atena.” 
Job15:1 Elifas nyaot, “Dhu apa, Ayyub, me' acaca malolo! Tadha' oreng bicaksana se nyaot kantha ba'na jareya, oreng becce' ta' kera mabendherra aba'na ban caca se tadha' ma'nana." 
Job15:2  
Job15:3  
Job15:4 Mon cacana ba'na jareya etoro', ta' kera badha pole oreng se tako' otabana adu'a ka Allah." 
Job15:5 Cacana ba'na noduwagi ja' ba'na sala, tape ba'na ter-moter caca notobana kasala'anna." 
Job15:6 Ta' osa sengko' ngarane ban nyala'agi ba'na, sabab cacana ba'na la noduwagi salana." 
Job15:7 Apa ba'na manossa se elahirragi dha'-adha' kadibi'? Apa ba'na hadir e bakto nong-gunong ecepta'agi? 
Job15:8 Apa ba'na ngedhing rancanana Allah? Apa pera' ba'na se andhi' hekmadda manossa? 
Job15:9 Apa se ekataowe ba'na sengko' ban oreng laenna tao keya. Apa se epahame ba'na terrang keya ka oreng laenna. 
Job15:10 Sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna narema hekmat reya dhari reng-oreng se la pote obu'na; reng-oreng se la badha sabellunna eppa'na ba'na lahir e dunnya. 
Job15:11 Arapa ba'na ma' nolak pangleporra Allah? Sengko' sakanca acaca epasabbar ban epaalos bit asmana. 
Job15:12 Tape ba'na peggel, matana mera;" 
Job15:13 ba'na peggel ka Allah ban alaban ka Salerana. 
Job15:14 Ba' bisa'a manossa tadha' salana? Ba' bisa'a manossa jareya bendher e ajunanna Allah? 
Job15:15 La'-mala' ka malaekadda Allah ta' parcaja; kabbi eanggep ta' socce e dhalem pangoladanna. 
Job15:16 Apa pole manossa se juba' tengkana, se ngalakone kajahadan akantha oreng ngenom aeng biyasa." 
Job15:17 Edhingngagi, Ayyub, bi' sengko' ba'na ela'-bala'ana," 
Job15:18 parkara barang se eajarragi oreng penter ka sengko'. Pangajaran jareya etarema dhari bangatowana, ban epaterros ka na' potona." 
Job15:19 E bakto jareya tadha' oreng manca e nagarana; tadha' se manyalethong reng-oreng jareya dhari Allah. 
Job15:20 Oreng jahat se nendhes sasamana bakal arassa'a tako' salanjangnga e dhalem odhi'na. 
Job15:21 Nye-monye se nako'e makopok kopengnga, e jaman taremtem bigal dhateng nyerrang aba'na." 
Job15:22 Tadha' pangarebban e dhalem odhi'na se kalowara dhari pettengnga, sabab peddhangnga oreng se mateyana aba'na terros nyerser e saneyap kasempadan." 
Job15:23 No'-mano' se ngakanan babathang anante' matena, padha ngakana mayyidda. Oreng jareya pas apangrasa odhi'na se bakal dhateng orem tadha' tera'na." 
Job15:24 Balai akantha rato se parjuga, la asadhiya se nyargebba." 
Job15:25 Kantha jareya papasthenna oreng se nangtang Allah bangal alaban ka Se Mahakobasa. 
Job15:26 Oreng jareya noduwagi kasombonganna, nyerbu ban alaban ka Allah; ngangka' tamengnga ta' endha' kala." 
Job15:27  
Job15:28 Oreng jareya enneng e tha-kottha se ta' etemmo karowanna, ban e ko-bengko se tadha' orengnga, tape tha-kottha ban ko-bengko jareya la epastheyagi ancora polana perrang." 
Job15:29 Dhi'-andhi'na bakal elanga ta' alampat; dunnyana bakal tompessa tadha' karena. 
Job15:30 Oreng jareya ta' kera lopot dhari papetteng se calemodan; apoy bakal mapotthona bi'-selbi'na. Oreng jareya bakal mosna'a ekenneng serrop lesanna Allah. 
Job15:31 Mon oreng jareya parcaja ka barang se tadha' gunana, tanto aba'na kare angar, sabab ganjaran se etarema'a, barang se ta' aguna keya." 
Job15:32 Sabellunna baktona oreng jareya la mate, akantha ranca' se elop se ta' bisa biru pole." 
Job15:33 Oreng jareya akantha anggur se ngalotor buwana, akantha bungkana jaitun se ronto kembangnga." 
Job15:34 Oreng jahat ta' kera andhi' toronan; bakal katonona bengkona se epaddek dhari pesse ollena go'-sogo'. 
Job15:35 Kantha jareya oreng se amaksod jahat ban se alako juba'; se possa' ban tepowan e dhalem atena.” 
Job16:1 Tape Ayyub nyaot, “Sengko' la seggut ngedhing se kantha jareya; pangleporra ba'na pera' daddi seksa'an." 
Job16:2  
Job16:3 Bila ba'na se ambuwa acaca? Polana apa ba'na me' terros ban-labanan? 
Job16:4 Ja' sakenga ba'na daddi sengko' ban sengko' daddi ba'na, sengko' bisa acaca kantha jareya keya. Bi' sengko' ba'na eberri'ana babala'an ros-terrosan, sambi pek-kepeggan tadha' ambuna." 
Job16:5 Atena ba'na epakowada ban babala'an se bannya' macemma, sarta elepora ban tang caca." 
Job16:6 Mon sengko' acaca, tang kasossa'an ta' kera korang, mon sengko' neng-enneng, apa gunana?" 
Job16:7 Sengko' epace'lessona bi' Allah; tang ana' bine epamate tadha' karena. 
Job16:8 Sengko' etangkep ban ekamoso. Sateya tang badan sampe' koros, oreng sabannya'na nganggep jareya buktena ja' sengko' reya bannya' dusana." 
Job16:9 Allah ce' dukana, tang aba' ebit-sebbit tadha' karena; se ngoladi sengko' katon ce' baji'na." 
Job16:10 Oreng bi-nyebbi sengko' bi' colo'na se ebukka' epalebar; sengko' egaruyu', ban tang pepe etamper." 
Job16:11 Bi' Allah sengko' eparengngagi ka oreng daraka, eontallagi ka tanangnga oreng durjana." 
Job16:12 Dha'-adha'na sengko' odhi' taremtem ban aman, tape bi' Allah pas eserrang daksakala. Tang le'er ecangkarem dhari budhi, samarena pas ebantengngagi; egabay sasaranna lateyan." 
Job16:13 Sengko' epana tadha' ambuna, tadha' sakale bellas asena, sampe' essena tang tabu' ngalowa." 
Job16:14 Allah nyerrang sengko' reya akantha tantara se ngamok dhari baji'na; sengko' elokae ta' etemmo barampa kalena. 
Job16:15 Sengko' akalambi karong tandha sossa, toju' e abu tandha kala." 
Job16:16 Dhari bannya'na nanges tang mata sampe' mera, bara ban beddeng balukodanna." 
Job16:17 Tape sengko' ta' andhi' sala ajalannagi kakerrasan; tang du'a ka Allah kalowar dhari ate se ehlas. 
Job16:18 E bume, kajahadan se eteba'agi ka sengko' ja' alenge; tang serro se menta kaadilan ja' anggep tadha'!" 
Job16:19 Sengko' tao ja' se abillai sengko' badha e sowarga, se nyakse'e ja' sengko' ta' andhi' sala." 
Job16:20 Sengko' eca'-koca'e ban ekala'-gella' ca-kanca; sengko' nanges ngadhep ka Allah nyo'on bantowan. 
Job16:21 Mandar Allah dibi' nolonga sengko' e ajunanna, akantha oreng se nolong kancana." 
Job16:22 Tang omor la ta' bannya' karena, sakejja' aggi' sengko' la tadha' ban ta' abali saterrossa." 
Job17:1 Tang ajal la para' napa'a, tang nyaba la para' pegga'a; kabbi la padha tadha', pera' kare koburan." 
Job17:2 Sengko' egabay co-kocowan, sengko' nangale saapa oreng amon-semmonan." 
Job17:3 Abdidalem ka'dhinto jujur, Guste Allah. Moga Junandalem parcaja'a. Pasera pole se bisa nyokong oca' abdidalem?" 
Job17:4 Junandalem notobi atena reng-oreng gapaneka kantos tadha' se ngarteya; ja' kantos samangken abdidalem epakala reng-oreng gapaneka. 
Job17:5 Menorot parebasan, se eparkara'agi kancana sopaja olleya kaontongan, babales bakal teba'a ka na'-ana'na." 
Job17:6 Sateya sengko' etondhung ban parebasan jareya; tang ca-kanca nyander pera' nyopa'ana tang mowa. 
Job17:7 Tang mata rabeng polana ce' sossana; tang badan talebat korossa. 
Job17:8 Oreng se tako' ka Allah, takerjat ban heran, oreng se ta' andhi' sala nganggep sengko' ta' andhi' Pangeran." 
Job17:9 Oreng se becce' ban ta' andhi' sala, sajan yakin odhi'na ekasokane bi' Allah." 
Job17:10 Tape saompamana ba'na kabbi entar dha' enna', ta' kera sengko' nemmo oreng se bicaksana maske settonga e antarana." 
Job17:11 Tang omor la lebat, tang rancana kabbi la buddhu; elang keya sakabbinna tang pangaterro." 
Job17:12 Tape bi' tang ca-kanca malem ekoca' seyang, ca'na la para' tera'a. Tape sengko' tao tang kabadha'an paggun petteng tadha' obana." 
Job17:13 Pera' dunnyana oreng mate se bi' sengko' enante'a, e dhissa' sengko' tedhunga e pettengnga." 
Job17:14 Tang makam bi' sengko' ekoca'a “Tang eppa'” ban ceng-caceng se ngakan tang badan reya ekoca'a “Ebu” ban “Embuk”. 
Job17:15 E dhimma pangarebban monggu ka sengko' reya? Sapa se nangale sengko' badha sennengnga? 
Job17:16 Mon sengko' la toron ka dunnyana oreng mate, sengko' ta' andhi' pangarebban pole.”" 
Job18:1 Bildad nyaot, “Bila ba'na se mareya acaca? Mara neng-enneng, edhingngagi sateya sengko' sakanca acaca'a." 
Job18:2  
Job18:3 Arapa sengko' sakanca bi' ba'na me' eanggep gendheng, me' eanggep padha ban sape?" 
Job18:4 Kapeggellanna ba'na pera' nyake'e aba'na dibi'. Apa polana kaparlowanna ba'na bume kodu epaseppe, nong-gunong bato kodu ealle?" 
Job18:5 Damarra oreng jahat tanto epate'e; apoyya ta' kera tao eodhi'i pole. 
Job18:6 Sonar e dhalem kemahna la orem; damarra la ta' nyonar. 
Job18:7 Tengka'na se mantep dhing-tabarindhing; babala'anna dibi' andaddiyagi aba'na tatandhung. 
Job18:8 Sokona atengka' ka dhalem jaring, sampe' sokona takae'." 
Job18:9 Tombedda takae' ka jebbak, aba'na cekka' tajira'." 
Job18:10 Talena jira' epasang e dhalem tana; jebbak anganga e jalan se elebadana. 
Job18:11 Oreng jahat takerjat polana barang se nako'e dhari man-dhimman; sabban tengka'na etoro' bunte' rassa katako'en. 
Job18:12 Lamba' aba'na kowat, sateya nyangsara; balai dhateng neng e man-dhimman." 
Job18:13 Kole'na topo ban panyaket se sara, tanang ban sokona bucco' kalowar nana." 
Job18:14 Oreng jareya eeret dhari kemahna se daddi kennengnganna se aman, epangadhebba ka Ratona Pate." 
Job18:15 Sateya sapa'a bai olle enneng e kemahna, kemahna etaburi balirang maelanga panyakedda." 
Job18:16 Mo'-ramo'na padha kerreng ban kero', ca'-ranca'na padha elop." 
Job18:17 Tadha' oreng se kennal pole ka aba'na e dhalem kotthana otaba e lowar nagarana; tadha' oreng settonga se enga' ka nyamana. 
Job18:18 Dhari kennengngan se tera' etondhung ka pettengnga, dhari dunnyana oreng odhi' epanyengla." 
Job18:19 Ta' andhi' ana' ban katoronan, tadha' karena settonga e kampongnga." 
Job18:20 Ngedhing papasthenna se kantha jareya pandhudhu' e bara' padha tacengnga', pandhudhu' e temor padha katako'en." 
Job18:21 Kantha jareya papasthenna oreng daraka, oreng se ta' marduli ka Allah.”" 
Job19:1 Tape Ayyub nyaot, “Arapa sengko' me' terros eca'-koca'e, eseksa tadha' ambuna sakale?" 
Job19:2  
Job19:3 Li-baliyan ba'na ya-nyeya sengko', nganeyaja sengko' ta' tao malo." 
Job19:4 Mon sengko' pajat kalero, apa rogina ka ba'na?" 
Job19:5 Ba'na apangrasa ateppa'an dhari sengko'; tang kasossa'an eanggep bukte ja' sengko' kalero. 
Job19:6 Pangarte, ja' sengko' reya eseksa Allah, epega' e dhalem jebbagga." 
Job19:7 Sengko' ajeng-gujeng polana kakejjemman jareya, tape tadha' oreng se marduli. Sengko' acerreng menta kaadilan, tape tadha' oreng se ngedhing." 
Job19:8 Allah notop tang jalan, sampe' sengko' ta' ngenneng lebat, ban sakabbinna tang lorong epapetteng calemodan." 
Job19:9 Tang dhi'-andhi' erampas epatadha' karena, tang nyama se bagus eparosak." 
Job19:10 Salerana ngantem sengko' dhari man-dhimman, akantha oreng se adabu' ramo' dhari tamennan, se pas epanneng koros sarta elop, sabariya jareya Salerana nyendhal sakabbinna tang pangarebban." 
Job19:11 Dukana ka sengko' tadha' bandhinganna; sengko' eanggep menangka mosona. 
Job19:12 Pasukanna nyerrang ta' ekenneng addhang; tang kemah ekeppong, tang jalan etebbeng." 
Job19:13 Tang tan-taretan epajau dhari sengko'; tang kennalan kabbi ta' tao pole ka sengko'. 
Job19:14 Tang la-bala majau, tang ca-kanca maelang." 
Job19:15 Tang reng-bareng se babine'an ta' enga' ja' sengko' lorana; sengko' eanggep oreng se gi' ta' ekennal. 
Job19:16 Mon tang bareng eolok, ta' endha' nyaot, maske sengko' se-ngase ngangguy caca se lemma' manes." 
Job19:17 Tang bine ngota'a ngedhing bauna tang nyaba, tang tan-taretan ta' endha' nyemma', jitjit ngedhing bauna tang aba'." 
Job19:18 Bi' na'-kana' e rong-lorong sengko' eya-seya, mon sengko' manjeng ekala'-gella' tadha' ambuna." 
Job19:19 Mon nangale'e sengko', tang ca-kanca padha tako', reng-oreng se ekataresnae sengko' padha ondur." 
Job19:20 Tang badan kare kole' ban tolang; sengko' para' mateya, tang ajal para' napa'a." 
Job19:21 Kaneserre sengko', ca-kanca, sabab sengko' epokol Allah bi' astana." 
Job19:22 Allah terros nyecce' sengko'; arapa ba'na me' ro-nero? Apa ba'na ta' tobuk se nyeksa sengko'? 
Job19:23 Ja' sakenga tang ca'-oca' etoles, sopaja teptebba ekaenga'e," 
Job19:24 ja' sakenga eoker bi' besse ka gunong bato, sopaja ta' elanga terros." 
Job19:25 Tape sengko' tao e sowarga badha se abilla sengko', se dhi-budhina bakal dhatengnga abanto sengko'." 
Job19:26 Maske tang kole' bucco' ban rosak, mon daging gi' badha badanna, sengko' gi' ngabasa Allah." 
Job19:27 Tang mata dibi' ngabasa Allah, ban Salerana bakal daddiya tang kanca. Tang ate ancor sabab ba'na ngoca'," 
Job19:28 ‘Baramma carana se agugada oreng jareya?’ Ba'na nyare lantaran agabaya parkara. 
Job19:29 Tape sateya patako' ka peddhang, sabab Allah duka ban ngokom oreng se dusa, daddi ba'na pas bakal taowa ja' badha Allah se ngadili manossa.”" 
Job20:1 Zofar nyaot, “Sengko' peggel ngedhing cacana ba'na daddi bi' sengko' ba'na esaodana." 
Job20:2  
Job20:3 Cacana ba'na jareya ya-nyeya tang aba', tape sengko' tao baramma se ajawaba." 
Job20:4 Apa ba'na ta' tao dhari lamba'na, molae manossa buru esaba' e dunnya," 
Job20:5 ja' kagumbira'anna oreng jahat pera' sakejja', kasennengnganna oreng daraka ta' saapa abidda?" 
Job20:6 Maske daddi oreng raja tenggina sampe' gan langnge', cethagga sampe' nyedding ka ondhem," 
Job20:7 tape oreng jareya bakal mosna'a salanjangnga, elang dhari dunnya kalaban cara se nespa. Reng-oreng se kennal ka aba'na, bakal atanya'a, ‘Dha' emma oreng rowa?’" 
Job20:8 Oreng jareya bakal elanga akantha jang-bajanganna mempe, akantha barang se katon e baja malem elang ta' etangale'e pole." 
Job20:9 Oreng jareya ta' etangale'e pole bi' mata; sarta tadha' neng e bengkona. 
Job20:10 Sabarang se ekeco' dhari oreng se malarat, kodu epabali bi' na'-ana'na." 
Job20:11 Maske oreng jareya gi' ngodha ban parjuga, sakejja' aggi' la daddi abu ta' aroba." 
Job20:12 Kajahadan ekarassa ce' manessa e colo'na, se ekalodhu'a eman rassana; daddi esempen e baba'anna jilana sopaja abit ngarassa'agi nyamanna." 
Job20:13  
Job20:14 Tape sanapa'na ka dhalem tabu'na, aoba kakanan jareya daddi racon se ce' mandina." 
Job20:15 Barang keco'an se la ekalodhu' maso' ka dhalem tabu', kapaksa eota'agi kalowar; Allah se makalowar dhari dhalem tabu'na." 
Job20:16 Oreng jahat bakal ngenoma racon se madhateng balai, oreng jareya bakal mateya akantha se ekekke' olar se mandi raconna." 
Job20:17 Oreng jareya ta' kera tao rassana mennya' jaitun se ce' bannya'na, otabana susu ban maddu se wa-ngalowa." 
Job20:18 Kaontonganna kodu epabali kabbi; daddi ta' tao rassana kobassana hasella usahana. 
Job20:19 Sabab oreng jahat jareya nendhes ban ta' marduli oreng mesken ban malarat, arampas ko-bengko se banne andhi'na." 
Job20:20 Lantaran katama'anna tadha' batessa, oreng jareya ros-terrosan arassa korang." 
Job20:21 Mon ngakan kabbi epaabi' epatadha' karena, daddi kama'moranna ta' abit omorra." 
Job20:22 E bakto odhi'na la ce' ma'morra, kasangsara'an ban kasossa'an teba ka aba'na." 
Job20:23 E bakto ngakan ngesse'e tabu'na, Allah ce' dukana pas ngokom oreng jareya." 
Job20:24 Mon oreng jareya bisa buru lopot dhari peddhang baja bakal loka'a ekenneng pana dimbaga. 
Job20:25 Pana naccek sampe' aba'na loka; konco'na agalirap terbas ka badanna, daddi atena katako'en ce' talebadda." 
Job20:26 Tompes dhi'-andhi'na ban sempennanna; oreng jareya ban saessena bengkona ekakan apoy se banne gabayanna manossa. 
Job20:27 Langnge' mokka' kajahadanna, bume jaga nangtang aba'na." 
Job20:28 Dhi'-andhi'na kabbi bakal tompessa, sabab Allah talebat dukana." 
Job20:29 Jareya odhi'na oreng durjana, se la etantowagi Allah kaangguy aba'na.”" 
Job21:1 Saodda Ayyub, “Edhingngagi pateppa' tang oca' reya; pera' jareya panglepor se epenta sengko' sateya." 
Job21:2  
Job21:3 Edine gallu sengko' acaca'a, samarena olle ba'na ya-nyeya pole tang aba' reya." 
Job21:4 Banne ban manossa sengko' atokar; sengko' ta' sabbar badha lantaranna. 
Job21:5 Abas sengko', tanto ba'na tacengnga', ba'na tababeggen ta' metto oca'." 
Job21:6 Mon sengko' mekkere tang kabadha'an reya sengko' ngetter, marenges rassana." 
Job21:7 Arapa oreng jahat me' epalanjang omorra bi' Allah dhi'-andhi'na epatamba ros-terrosan? 
Job21:8 Odhi'na cokop abidda, sempat nangale'e na' potona daddi dibasa." 
Job21:9 Roma tatanggana taremtem ban aman; Bi' Allah ta' eparenge balai pa-apa. 
Job21:10 Ebinna ana'-rana', abudhu' ta' kalaban malarat." 
Job21:11 Na'-ana'na oreng jahat gumbira ca'-lonca'an, akantha dumba se gi' ngodha se neng-sennengngan." 
Job21:12 Kabbi ramme atari ban anyanye, etoro'e terbang, calempong ban soleng." 
Job21:13 Re-saare senneng odhi'na, matena taremtem ta' nyangsara." 
Job21:14 Mangkana reng-oreng jareya mator ka Allah, ‘Jauwi abdidalem, ngereng Junandalem nyengla! Abdidalem ta' parduli ban ta' terro ngarteya maksod sareng kasokanna Junandalem ka abdidalem sadajana.’" 
Job21:15 Ca'na pekkerra reng-oreng jareya, ‘Aladine Allah tadha' gunana, adu'a ka Salerana tadha' parlona." 
Job21:16 Sengko' ahasel ngaolle tang maksod ban pangaterro, gu ta' dhari kakowadan dibi' malolo?’ Tape sengko' ta' saroju' sakale ka jalanna pekkeran ban panemmo se kantha jareya." 
Job21:17 Bila badha damarra oreng jahat epamate? Bila badha oreng jahat nemmo balai ban palang? Bila Allah tao duka ka reng-oreng jareya, sampe' apareng okoman?" 
Job21:18 Bila reng-oreng jareya tao daddi akantha darameyan ban abu se ekebbat kaleng busbus ban angen se lebat? 
Job21:19 Ca'na ba'na, ‘Ana' eokom Allah polana dusana eppa'na.’ Tape ca'na sengko': Oreng se dusa jareya se kodu eokom Allah polana dusana, sopaja oreng jareya apangrasa ja' polana dusana aba'na eokom bi' Allah." 
Job21:20 Dina oreng dusa me' nanggung dusana dibi', dina me' erassae dukana Allah Se Mahatenggi." 
Job21:21 Mon oreng la mate ta' kera mekkere pole senneng enja'na ana' bine. 
Job21:22 Apa bisa manossa ngajari Allah, Allah se ahakime mahlok e sowarga?" 
Job21:23 Badha reng-oreng se baras saomorra; badanna sehat sampe' matena. Pamatena senneng ban gampang, badanna gi' kowat." 
Job21:24  
Job21:25 Badha pole se ta' tao senneng salanjangnga, odhi' sampe' mate talebat nyangsara." 
Job21:26 Tape e koburan kabbi tadha' bidana; padha ekaromo' caceng ban ola'. 
Job21:27 Sengko' tao pekkeranna ba'na, ban pekkeran juba' se erancang e dhalem atena." 
Job21:28 Ba'na atanya, ‘E dhimma bengkona oreng se kobasa rowa, oreng se daraka lakona?’" 
Job21:29 Apa ba'na gi' ta' atanya ka reng-oreng se seggut ajalanan? Apa ba'na ta' parcaja ka berta se egiba reng-oreng jareya? 
Job21:30 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, ‘E are baktona Allah apareng okoman, reng-oreng jahat bakal epasalamedda.’" 
Job21:31 Tadha' se agugat tengkana, tadha' se males kajahadanna." 
Job21:32 Oreng jareya egiba ka koburan, epamaso' ka dhalem lobang, makamma ejaga ban erabat." 
Job21:33 Oreng aebuwan se ngerengngagi jinazana, tana re-lere notobi badanna." 
Job21:34 Daddi pangleporra ba'na jareya kosong! Jawabanna ba'na jareya co-ngoco!” 
Job22:1 Elifas ngoca', “E antarana manossa reya, tadha' settonga se aguna ka Allah. Oreng se andhi' akkal buddi pera' aguna ka aba'na dibi'." 
Job22:2  
Job22:3 Apa gunana ka Allah mon ba'na ajalannagi kasokanna? Apa ontongnga ka Salerana mon odhi'na ba'na samporna? 
Job22:4 Banne polana ba'na tako' ka Allah, ba'na earane ban eanggep sala," 
Job22:5 tape polana dusana ba'na ce' bannya'na, tengka polana ce' juba'na." 
Job22:6 Mon taretanna ba'na ta' bisa majar otangnga, bi' ba'na erampas kabbi kalambina." 
Job22:7 Ba'na ta' aberri' ngenom ka oreng se pelka', ta' matabari ngakan ka oreng se lapar." 
Job22:8 Ba'na ngangguy pangkat ban kakobasa'anna kaangguy arampas sakabbinna tana. 
Job22:9 Ba'na banne pera' ta' endha' atolong para randha, tape na'-kana' se ta' andhi' eppa' embu' etendhes keya." 
Job22:10 Daddi sateya bannya' jebbak e sakalenglengnga ba'na, ban atena ba'na katako'en daksakala." 
Job22:11 Are sajan petteng, ba'na ta' nangale pa-apa, ba'na tasellem elanyo' banjir se ce' rajana." 
Job22:12 Allah reya gu ta' alenggi e langnge' se paleng tenggi, nondhu' ngoladi ka tang-bintang e baba'anna, maske tang-bintang jareya ce' tenggina?" 
Job22:13 Tape ca'na ba'na, ‘Dhu ngagaliya apa Allah rowa, se badha e attassa ondhem ban ta' bisa ngadili sengko' ban ba'na?’" 
Job22:14 Ba'na nyangka Allah ta' bisa ngoladi nerbas ondhem se kandel, ban pera' bisa alomampa e bates e antarana langnge' ban bume?" 
Job22:15 Apa ba'na paggun lebada e jalan se epele reng-oreng jahat? 
Job22:16 Reng-oreng jareya esendhal sabellunna baktona ajal, elanyo' banjir se ce' rajana." 
Job22:17 Jareya reng-oreng se bangal nolak Se Mahakobasa, se nyangka Allah ta' bisa apa-rapa ka aba'na." 
Job22:18 Mangkana Allah se masogi reng-oreng jareya! Sengko' ta' ngarte onggu ka pekkerra reng-oreng durjana! 
Job22:19 Reng-oreng becce' agella' kaperagen, mon nangale oreng jahat narema okoman." 
Job22:20 Dhi'-andhi'na oreng jahat epaancor, re-karena se gi' badha tompes ekello' apoy." 
Job22:21 Daddi, Ayyub, mara atobat ka Pangeran me' olle ba'na olle kataremtemman. Mon ba'na ajalannagi jareya, tanto ba'na olle kaontongan." 
Job22:22 Tarema apa se eajarragi Pangeran ka ba'na; sempen kabbi e dhalem atena. 
Job22:23 Mara abali ka Pangeran kalaban ate andhap asor, kajahadan e bengkona ja' paterros." 
Job22:24 Buwang emmassa ba'na se paleng morne; ontallagi ka dhasarra songay se la ta' metto aeng. 
Job22:25 Dina Allah Se Mahakobasa me' daddi emmassa ba'na, ban salakana ba'na se paleng bagus." 
Job22:26 Daddi ba'na tanto ros-terrosan parcaja ka Allah, ban tao ja' Allah jareya somberra kasennengnganna ba'na." 
Job22:27 Mon ba'na adu'a bi' Allah tanto ekabbullagi, ban ba'na tanto bisa neptebbi janji." 
Job22:28 Sabarang se elakone ba'na tanto ahasel ros-terrosan, odhi'na ba'na tanto etera'e sonar se terrang." 
Job22:29 Oreng se sombong ekababa'agi bi' Pangeran, tape se andhap asor epasalamet." 
Job22:30 Allah tanto nolong ba'na mon ba'na ta' sala sarta mon ajalannagi se daddi kasokanna.” 
Job23:1 Tape Ayyub nyaot, “Sengko' ateng-banteng aserro ka Allah; sengko' ta' bisa ngampet se aserrowa." 
Job23:2  
Job23:3 Ja' sakenga sengko' tao kalenggiyanna, sengko' ce' terrona nyabisa ka Salerana." 
Job23:4 Sengko' matorragiya tang parkara ka Salerana, tang colo' dibi' se manapa'a." 
Job23:5 Sengko' terro taowa baramma dhabuna, ban baramma jawabanna." 
Job23:6 Apa kerana Allah nekkedda sengko' ban kakobasa'anna? Ta' kera! Allah tanto meyarsa'agi tang caca. 
Job23:7 Sengko' ta' sala, bisa abilla tang aba' e ajunanna, tanto bi' Allah sengko' pas epabebas." 
Job23:8 Sengko' nyare Allah e temor ban e bara', e lao' ban e dhaja, tape Allah ta' etemmo; tadha' e jadhiya." 
Job23:9  
Job23:10 Tape Allah ngagali saneyap tang tengka'. Ja' sakenga sengko' eoji epakantha emmas, tanto etemmo ja' tang ate reya morne." 
Job23:11 Sengko' ta'at ban esto ka Salerana, salanjangnga ta' tao nyaleyot dhari jalanna." 
Job23:12 Papakonna bi' sengko' etoro' terros, se daddi kasokanna elakone, banne noro' karebba tang ate." 
Job23:13 Allah reya ta' tao aoba; tadha' se bisa mennang ka Salerana. Allah alampa'agi sabarang se daddi kasokanna. 
Job23:14 Rancanana se etantowagi ka sengko' masthe elampa'agi, bariya keya rancana laenna se sabannya'na." 
Job23:15 Sengko' ngetter lantaran tako' ka Salerana; sajan epekker sajan tako' rassana. 
Job23:16 Bi' Se Mahakobasa sengko' epakene' ate, kabangalanna tang ate epatadha' sakale. Sengko' tako' ka Allah, banne polana petteng calemodan, maske sengko' ebuko'e papetteng jareya sampe' tang mata buta." 
Job23:17  
Job24:1 Arapa Allah me' ta' neptebbagi are panghakiman, sopaja reng-oreng se kennal ka Salerana narema kaadilan?" 
Job24:2 Badha oreng se ngerset batessa tana, sopaja tanana atamba lebar. Reng-oreng jareya ngeco' dumba saambalan, esaba' e kandhangnga ebinna dibi'." 
Job24:3 Hemarra kana' jatim egiba buru, sapena randha ekala' egabay tanggungan." 
Job24:4 Oreng mesken elang-alange kaangguy ngaolle ha'na, daddi tapaksa ngetek oreng se nespa." 
Job24:5 Daddi se mesken jareya akantha hemar alasan se nyare kakan e but-ombut e ra-ara; pera' e jadhiya badha kakanan se epakannagiya ka na'-ana'na. 
Job24:6 Daddi tapaksa agarap tanana oreng laen; tapaksa makompol buwana anggurra oreng se jahat. 
Job24:7 Oreng jareya ta' andhi' sapo' ban kalambi se ekennenga maanga' badanna e baja malem. 
Job24:8 Badanna kopo kaojanan e gunong, laju ngaop nalpe' ka gunong bato." 
Job24:9 Na'-kana' se ta' andhi' eppa' embu' ekadunor bi' oreng jahat, babaji'na oreng mesken ekala' egabay tanggunganna otang." 
Job24:10 Oreng mesken ajalan ta' akalambiyan; lapar teppa'na anye gandum e saba. 
Job24:11 Oreng mesken jareya merres jaitun ekagabay mennya', merres anggur ekagabay nom-enoman, tape aba'na dibi' pelka' parana." 
Job24:12 E tha-kottha badha serrona reng-oreng se sakarat, reng-oreng se loka menta erabat, tape Allah ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi ban ta' parduli." 
Job24:13 Badha reng-oreng se nolak terrang ban ngamoso terrang jareya, reng-oreng jareya ta' tao ban ta' noro' jalanna." 
Job24:14 E baja sobbu reng-oreng se dujan mate'e oreng jaga dhari tedhungnga, pas kalowar mate'e oreng se nespa. Sabellunna moncar are, ajalan tek-ngetek akantha maleng." 
Job24:15 Se dujan azina anante' compedda are; mowana eko'-buko'e terro ta' etemmowa oreng. 
Job24:16 Maleng agubang bengko e baja malem, e baja seyang ajauwi tera'na laju ngetek." 
Job24:17 Monggu ka reng-oreng jareya baja laggu nako'e atena, petteng calemodan daddi sennengnga.”" 
Job24:18 Ca'na Zofar, “Oreng jahat eanyo' banjir, tana andhi'na ebasto bi' Allah; kebbun anggurra sateya seppe; tadha' oreng alako e jadhiya pole." 
Job24:19 Padha ban salju se mosna ekenneng nemor ban panassa are, kantha jareya oreng se dusa eontal ka dhalem dunnyana oreng mate." 
Job24:20 Ebuna dibi' ta' enga' ka oreng jareya, ceng-caceng tana ngarobut badanna. Tadha' oreng se enga' ka nyamana; oreng jareya epamosna akantha kajuwan se robbu ka tana." 
Job24:21 Se daddi lantaranna kadaddiyan jareya kabbi polana oreng jareya nendhes para randha, kejjem ka babine'an se ta' bisa andhi' ana'." 
Job24:22 Tape Allah, kalaban kobasana, ngojuk reng-oreng se parjuga, ngokom reng-oreng daraka epamate tadha' karena." 
Job24:23 Bi' Allah oreng jareya epasenneng odhi'na, tape eoladi terros tadha' ambuna." 
Job24:24 Pera' sakejja' oreng jareya senneng odhi'na, saellana pas ondur salanjangnga; elop akantha rebba se tadha' gunana, akantha bulirra padhi se eketthok dhari bungkana." 
Job24:25 Sapa se bisa ta' ngakone kanyata'an reya? Sapa se bisa nyala'agi tang caca?” 
Job25:1 Bildad nyaot, “Allah reya ce' kobasana; oreng kodu tako' e ajunanna; Salerana se ajaga kataremtemman e dhalem karaja'anna e sowarga." 
Job25:2  
Job25:3 Ba' bisa'a ebitong malaekat se aladine Salerana? Ba' badha'a kennengngan se ta' etera'e sonarra? 
Job25:4 Ba' socceya manossa reya e dhalem pangoladanna Allah? Ba' morneya e dhalem pangoladanna? 
Job25:5 Monggu ka Allah la'-mala' bulan reya ta' tera', ban tang-bintang reya orem sonarra." 
Job25:6 Apa pole manossa, se mara caceng ban serangga; e dhalem pangoladanna Allah tadha' argana!”" 
Job26:1 Ayyub nyaot, “Bagus onggu partolonganna ba'na ka sengko' se la ce' lessona ban la ta' andhi' kakowadan reya!" 
Job26:2  
Job26:3 Ce' bagussa babala'an ban ajaranna ba'na, se ebagi ka sengko' oreng se gendheng." 
Job26:4 Etojjuwagi ka sapa cacana ba'na jareya? Sapa se aberri' ilham me' ba'na acaca kantha jareya?” 
Job26:5 Saodda Bildad, “Reng-oreng e alam maot padha ngetter, aeng ban saessena agaledder." 
Job26:6 E ajunanna Allah dunnyana oreng mate abukka', ta' tatotop, essena kabbi katengal." 
Job26:7 Allah ngampar langnge' e attassa tase' raja, e bang-abang se kosong agantong bume." 
Job26:8 Ondhem eesse'e aeng ta' sakera-kera, tape ondhem ta' sebbit maske ce' berra'na essena." 
Job26:9 Ondhem epanotobi bulan pornama, sampe' ta' etangale sonarra." 
Job26:10 Petteng ban tera' epalaen, ngangguy garis bunterran e attassa tase' raja." 
Job26:11 Ga-canggana langnge' padha ngetter mon esentak Allah ban sowarana se agaledder. 
Job26:12 Tase' raja epakala ban kobasana, Rahab eparemmok bi' kapenterranna." 
Job26:13 Nyabana nyapowe langnge' sampe' tera' sarta paddhang, astana mate'e naga se para' buruwa." 
Job26:14 Tape jareya coma dha-tandhana kobasana, coma sowara alos se napa' ka kopengnga sengko' ban ba'na. Ce' sakone'na pangarteyanna sengko' ban ba'na parkara kobasana Allah se talebat rajana!”" 
Job27:1 Ayyub nerrossagi dhabuna, “Bit asmana Allah se odhi', se ta' adil ka sengko'," 
Job27:2  
Job27:3 sengko' asompa'a: Mon bi' Allah sengko' gi' eparenge nyaba, mon tang nyaba gi' badha e dhalem tang badan," 
Job27:4 tang bibir ta' acaca'a lecek, tang jila ta' co-ngocowa oreng." 
Job27:5 Daddi, sengko' ta' endha' ngakone ja' ba'na bendher; sampe' mate sengko' ngoca'a ja' sengko' ta' sala." 
Job27:6 Sengko' teptebba ngoca' ja' sengko' reya teppa', tang pekkeran berse salanjangnga." 
Job27:7 Mandar tang moso eokoma menangka oreng daraka, eajar menangka oreng durjana." 
Job27:8 Apa pangarebban monggu ka oreng daraka e bakto Allah mondhuda nyabana? 
Job27:9 Apa Allah meyarsa'agiya tangessa mon oreng jareya nemmo kasossa'an? 
Job27:10 Masthena oreng jareya ngarep kasennengngan dhari Allah, ban adu'a tadha' ambuna." 
Job27:11 Bi' sengko' ba'na eajarana parkara kobasana Allah, ebala'ana rancanana Se Mahakobasa." 
Job27:12 Tape, ba'na la padha nangale'e dibi'. Daddi arapa ba'na me' aberri' babala'an se tadha' gunana?”" 
Job27:13 Zofar ngoca', “Kantha reya carana Allah Se Mahakobasa ngokom oreng se jahat ban daraka." 
Job27:14 Mon ana'na bannya', ana'na bakal mateya e paperrangan, ban na' potona bakal odhi'a kakorangan." 
Job27:15 Karena balana bakal mateya polana wabah panyaket, dha-randhana padha tadha' se nangese." 
Job27:16 Maske salakana abuk-tombuk ban kalambina ason-soson," 
Job27:17 tape salaka ban kalambi jareya bakal ekaandhi'a reng-oreng se berse atena. 
Job27:18 Bengkona oreng jahat teppo akantha bang-sabang, pera' bengko sabatara akantha kennengnganna panjaga." 
Job27:19 Oreng jareya marobbu menangka oreng sogi, tape jareya ta' ekenneng edhukale'e, sabab e bakto jaga dhari tedhungnga, dhi'-andhi'na la tadha' kabbi." 
Job27:20 Oreng jareya bakal ngadhebbana kabadha'an se talebat nako'e, akantha se kadhatengngan ba'a maleng. Akantha angen e baja malem sampe' aba'na elang tanoro' eabber." 
Job27:21 Angen temor dhateng, oreng jareya eangka', eabber dhari bengkona." 
Job27:22 Oreng jareya eabber ta' ekaneserre, tapaksa buru nyare pangaoban." 
Job27:23 E bakto gaggar ka tana ekopa'e oreng sabannya'na, neng e man-dhimman eya-seya.”" 
Job28:1 Badha kennengnganna pangaleyanna salaka; badha pole kennengnganna oreng mamorne emmas. 
Job28:2 Besse ekale dhari dhalem tana, dhari bato epangalelle dimbaga." 
Job28:3 Se petteng calemodan esono'e, kennengngan se paleng dhalem etalektegi. Nyare to-bato e kennengngan se petteng e dhalem bume." 
Job28:4 E bagiyan se jau se ta' ekennengnge oreng, se ta' tao edidda' otaba elebadi manossa, oreng alako agalattong ka le-tale e dhalem tana se talebat seppena." 
Job28:5 Tana ngasellagi kakanna manossa, tape e babana tana jareya keya ekar-bungkar epasalbut ta' etemmo karowanna." 
Job28:6 Bato e dhalem tana badha mamatanna, abuna aesse emmas sokkla." 
Job28:7 Mano' ellang ta' tao jalan ka jadhiya, mano' se ngakanan babathang ta' tao ngabber e attasanna." 
Job28:8 Macan otaba burun alas laenna ta' tao lebat e lorong se ka jadhiya se talebat seppena. 
Job28:9 Oreng ngale bato maske ce' galina, gunong ebungkar sampe' ka ramo'na." 
Job28:10 E bakto agabay lorong e dhalem gunong bato, laju nemmo mamatan se ce' bagussa." 
Job28:11 Se ngale sampe' ka ber-somberra songay, sabarang se ta' etangale laju tabukka'." 
Job28:12 Tape e dhimma hekmat ekenneng sare? E dhimma kodu ajar sopaja bisa'a ngarte? 
Job28:13 Hekmat tadha' e nga'-tengnga'anna manossa; tadha' se tao ajina se saongguna. 
Job28:14 Ca'na sar-dhasarra tase' ban tase' raja, hekmat tadha' e jadhiya." 
Job28:15 Hekmat ta' ekenneng porop maske ban emmas sokkla, ta' ekenneng belli bi' pesse salaka." 
Job28:16 Emmas ban mamatan se paleng larang tadha' argana mon ebandhing ban hekmat. 
Job28:17 Hekmat ta' ekenneng bandhingngagi ban emmas otaba kaca se ce' alossa, argana alarangan dhari cemmong emmas." 
Job28:18 Hekmat alarangan argana dhari merjan, kristal otaba motteyara." 
Job28:19 Bato topas se asli ban emmas se morne, ta' saapa argana mon ebandhing ban akkal buddi." 
Job28:20 E dhimma somberra kabicaksana'an? E dhimma oreng se nemmowa pangarteyan? 
Job28:21 Tadha' mahlok odhi' se tao nangale'e, bariya keya no'-mano' se ngabber e bang-abang." 
Job28:22 Maot ban pate ngoca' keya, se ekaedhing pera' rarasan tadha' laenna." 
Job28:23 Pera' Allah se ngagali kennengnganna hekmat, ban se ngagali jalan dha' essa'," 
Job28:24 sabab Allah ngoladi co'-konco'na bume, sabarang se badha e babana langnge' etalektegi." 
Job28:25 E bakto apareng kakowadan ka angen, ban neptebbagi tes-batessa tase' raja," 
Job28:26 e bakto neptebbagi kennengnganna pagaggarra ojan, sarta jalan se elebadi galudhuk ban kelap;" 
Job28:27 e bakto jareya Allah ngoladi hekmat, se pas eoji argana, sarta pas eparenge berkat." 
Job28:28 Dhabuna Allah ka manossa, “Mon terro olleya hekmat, hormadi Allah. Mon terro andhi'a pangarteyan, jauwi kajahadan.”" 
Job29:1 Ayyub nerrossagi dhabuna," 
Job29:2 “Ja' sakenga sengko' odhi' akantha ba'-lamba'na, e bakto sengko' gi' epeyara bi' Allah." 
Job29:3 Sengko' ros-terrosan eparenge partolongan, etera'e e bakto ajalan e pettengnga." 
Job29:4 Jareya e bakto sengko' gi' jaja, e bakto sengko' semma' ban Allah se anaonge tang kalowarga." 
Job29:5 E bakto jareya Se Mahakobasa gi' asarengnge sengko', ban tang na'-ana' badha e seddi'an sengko'." 
Job29:6 Tang ebin bannya' ngasellagi susu, bannya' mennya' se ehasellagi tang bungkana jaitun, maske etamen e tana se ato-bato." 
Job29:7 Mon oreng wa-towana kottha ju'-toju' akompol, dineng sengko' pas noro' apolong," 
Job29:8 ngangodhadan laju menggir saellana nangale'e sengko'. Bariya keya reng-oreng towa jaga kalaban hedmat kaangguy aberri' hormat. 
Job29:9 Ja-pangraja padha ambu acaca," 
Job29:10 oreng penting padha neng-enneng ta' kalowar sowara. 
Job29:11 Se ngedhing parkara sengko' padha kasambu', se nangale sengko' padha getton, padha ngalem tang lalakon." 
Job29:12 Sabab sengko' nolong oreng mesken se menta bantowan; nolong kana' jatim se ta' nemmo panyandharan. 
Job29:13 Sengko' ealem oreng se ce' sossana, sengko' nolong para randha sampe' taremtem odhi'na." 
Job29:14 Sengko' jujur tadha' calena, sengko' adil salanjangnga." 
Job29:15 Ka oreng buta sengko' daddi matana, ka se empon daddi sokona." 
Job29:16 Ka oreng mesken sengko' daddi eppa'na, oreng manca etolong e dhalem kasossa'anna." 
Job29:17 Tape sengko' maremmok oreng se kejjem, kurbanna padha epasalamet." 
Job29:18 Tang pangaterro mandar lanjanga omor, mandar mate taremtem e dhalem tang bengko." 
Job29:19 Sengko' akantha kajuwan se landhu, ramo'na cokop aengnga, ranca'na bacca ban ebbun." 
Job29:20 Oreng kabbi ngalem sengko' ros-terrosan, tang kakowadan paggun ta' korang." 
Job29:21 Reng-oreng neng-enneng mon sengko' aberri' babala'an; tang oca' eedhingngagi epagu-onggu. 
Job29:22 Mon sengko' mare acaca ta' parlo etambai pole, tang oca' nyarepsep akantha aeng gaggar ka tana." 
Job29:23 Reng-oreng padha perak narema tang oca', akantha oreng tane narema ojan e mosem bang-kembangan." 
Job29:24 Sengko' mesem ka oreng se teppa'na kaelangan pangarebban, tang mowa se katon gumbira nambai samangadda." 
Job29:25 Sengko' se neggu' pimpinan ban se neptebbagi kapotosan. Sengko' mimpin reng-oreng akantha rato se mimpin pasukanna, alepor reng-oreng jareya e dhalem kasossa'anna." 
Job30:1 Tape sateya sengko' eco-koco reng-oreng se angodha'an. Lamba' eppa'na reng-oreng jareya bi' sengko' eanggep talebat nespana, ta' pantes ajaga tang dumba apolong ban pate' panjaga." 
Job30:2 Ka sengko' reng-oreng jareya tadha' gunana lantaran la tadha' kakowadanna. 
Job30:3 Reng-oreng jareya lapar ban ce' nyangsarana, sampe' ngakan mo'-ramo' kerreng e ra-ara se ce' seppena." 
Job30:4 Reng-oreng jareya adabu' but-ombut e ra-ara, laju ekakan dhaun sarta ramo'na." 
Job30:5 Kabbi padha ngojuk oreng jareya sambi areng-cerreng, ta' kala ka oreng se ngojuk maleng." 
Job30:6 Wa-guwa daddi kennengnganna, bang-lobang e ke'-lekke'na gunong daddi bengkona." 
Job30:7 E dhalem alas reng-oreng jareya wat-thowadan akantha keban se agaung, akompol e babana but-ombut." 
Job30:8 Reng-oreng jareya ta' andhi' nyama ban tadha' argana, etondhung eojuk dhari nagarana." 
Job30:9 Sateya reng-oreng jareya dhateng, sengko' ekala'-gella', eanggep akantha con-locon se ta' arga." 
Job30:10 Reng-oreng jareya nganggep sengko' tadha' argana, sarta padha nyopae tang mowa." 
Job30:11 Sabab bi' Allah sengko' epata'andhi' kakowadan sakone'a, daddi oreng padha ya-nyeya sengko' sakarebba atena." 
Job30:12 Garombolan jareya nyerrang sengko' dhari adha', sengko' buru, eserser epalabuwa." 
Job30:13 Tang jalan eaddhang, sengko' epateyana; bakto reng-oreng jareya nyerbu, tadha' oreng settonga se ngalang." 
Job30:14 Akantha banjir reng-oreng jareya abeddhul tang partahanan, anyo-ronyo nyecce'e tang badan." 
Job30:15 Sengko' arassa ce' tako'na; akantha se ekebbat angen, mosna ajina tang aba'; sennengnga tang ate elang akantha ondhem se lebat." 
Job30:16 Sateya sengko' para' mateya; tang kasossa'an tadha' korangnga. 
Job30:17 E baja malem tang tolang ngaronyo; tadha' ambuna se nyo'nyo'. 
Job30:18 Allah nyangkarem guluna tang kalambi sampe' tang kalambi agalambir. 
Job30:19 Sengko' epelpallagi ka dhalem cellot, tadha' bidana ban bu-rombu se bucco'." 
Job30:20 Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, Guste, namong Junandalem ta' meyarsa'agi; manabi abdidalem adu'a, Junandalem ta' marduli." 
Job30:21 Junandalem kejjem ka abdidalem, abdidalem ececce' salar-kellarra sareng Junandalem." 
Job30:22 Abdidalem eabber angen, sareng Junandalem epanneng; sareng Junandalem abdidalem epabang-ngala'bang e dhalem angen barat." 
Job30:23 Abdidalem oneng Junandalem abakta abdidalem ka alam maot, kennengngannepon sadajana oreng se odhi' epakompol." 
Job30:24 Aponapa Junandalem me' nyerrang oreng se calaka', se ta' bisa apa-ponapa kajabana aserro nyo'on partolongan?" 
Job30:25 Abdidalem noro' nanges sareng oreng se kasossa'an, bellas ka oreng se kakorangan." 
Job30:26 Abdidalem ngarep terrang sareng senneng, namong kasossa'an sareng papetteng se dhateng." 
Job30:27 Abdidalem akadi se eporak lantaran sossa sareng nespa; sajan abit atamba bannya' nanggung sangsara. 
Job30:28 Abdidalem leng-ngaleleng e pettengnga se tadha' sonarra; manjeng e adha'na oreng bannya' nyo'on partolongan. 
Job30:29 Sowara abdidalem ngennes sareng mellas, akadi tangessa mano' onta sareng pate' alas." 
Job30:30 Kole' abdidalem taker celleng, badan potthon ekenneng panas." 
Job30:31 Gi' dhimen abdidalem mereng monyena mosik se gumbira, samangken namong mereng tanges malolo." 
Job31:1 Sengko' la ajanji ban asompa, ta' ngabasa ka babine' bi' ate barai ka aba'na." 
Job31:2 Apa se elampa'agi Allah ka sengko' ban ba'na? Apa se ebalessagi ka lalakonna manossa? 
Job31:3 Oreng se ngalakone kajahadan tanto epadhatengnge kasossa'an. 
Job31:4 Allah tanto ngagali ka sakabbinna tang lalakon; tanto ngoladi ka tengka'na tang soko. 
Job31:5 Sengko' asompa ta' tao alako roce, ta' tao keya nepo oreng." 
Job31:6 Dina Allah me' nembang sengko' ngangguy tembangan se teppa', sopaja ngagali ja' sengko' ta' andhi' sala." 
Job31:7 Mon sengko' nyaleyot dhari jalan se sabendherra, otaba arassa lebur ka barang se juba', mon tang tanang reya gedda' ban dusa," 
Job31:8 sabarang se etamen sengko' mandar oreng laen se ngakana, tang hasel bume mandar rosaga tadha' karena." 
Job31:9 Mon sengko' tao terro ka binena tatangga, sarta nyorne' babine' jareya dhari budhina labang," 
Job31:10 mandar tang bine atana'agiya oreng laen, ban tedhung e ranjangnga lalake' laen." 
Job31:11 Mon sengko' pajat agabay dusa se juba' jareya, sengko' pantes narema okoman." 
Job31:12 Dusa reya mamateyan akantha apoy naraka, tang dhi'-andhi' ekello' kabbi kare abuna." 
Job31:13 E bakto tang bareng aserro polana sengko' nyalae ha'na, bi' sengko' eedhingngagi, eadhebbi kalaban ate se ehlas." 
Job31:14 Mon enja', baramma sengko' se ngadhebbana Allah? Baramma sengko' se nyaoda mon Allah rabu ahakimana?" 
Job31:15 Allah se nyepta'agi sengko' reya, gu ta' se nyepta'agi tang reng-bareng keya?" 
Job31:16 Sengko' ta' tao ta' endha' nolong oreng se nespa, otaba neng-enneng ta' nolong para randha se la ta' andhi' pangarebban." 
Job31:17 Na'-kana' jatim bi' sengko' ta' tao edina kalaparan, teppa'na sengko' dibi' cokop kakanan." 
Job31:18 Molae gi' kene' bi' sengko' epeyara; saomorra sengko' na'-kana' jareya etonton tadha' ambuna. 
Job31:19 Mon sengko' nangale'e oreng se kakorangan, se ta' kellar melle kalambi dhari meskenna," 
Job31:20 bi' sengko' epaanga' badanna ngangguy kaen wol dhari buluna tang dumba, oreng jareya pas ngalem sengko' ce' tarongguna." 
Job31:21 Ja' sakenga sengko' tao nyecce' na'-kana' jatim, polana tao sengko' masthe mennang mon aparkara," 
Job31:22 tang lengngen dhu kalaja mandar kotthonga, mandhar locoda dhari tang bau reya." 
Job31:23 Sengko' ta' kera atengka kantha jareya, sabab sengko' ce' tako'na ka okomanna Pangeran." 
Job31:24 Sengko' ta' tao ngandellagi tang dhi'-andhi'," 
Job31:25 otabana ngedirragi tang kasogiyan dibi'. 
Job31:26 Sengko' ta' tao nyemba ka are se tera' sonarra otabana bulan se tera' ban lebur abasanna. 
Job31:27 Tang ate ta' kapencot otaba tagudha, ngeccot tang tanang menangka panghormadan ka are ban bulan." 
Job31:28 Oreng se dusa kantha jareya kodu eokom mate; sabab Allah Se Mahakobasa epongkore. 
Job31:29 Sengko' ta' tao perak polana tang moso nyangsara, otabana gumbira polana tang moso nemmo calaka'." 
Job31:30 Sengko' ta' tao adu'a nyo'on matena tang moso, agabay dusa kantha jareya sengko' ta' tao." 
Job31:31 Reng-oreng se alako ka sengko' padha tao, sengko' narema sapa'a bai se entar ka tang bengko." 
Job31:32 Tang bengko abukka' kaangguy oreng se ajalanan, sengko' ta' tao nyoro reng-oreng jareya tedhung e lowar." 
Job31:33 Oreng laen top-notobi dusana, tape sengko' ta' tao kantha jareya." 
Job31:34 Sengko' ta' tako' ka cacana oreng, ta' parduli maske eya-seya oreng. Sengko' ta' tao ngetek e bengko otaba neng-enneng malolo polana tako' me' eya-seya oreng." 
Job31:35 Ba' tadha'a oreng se endha' ngedhingngagi tang caca? Sengko' asompa, tang caca reya kabbi pajat saongguna. Mandar Se Mahakobasa kasokana apareng jawaban. Ja' sakenga sabarang se earannagi moso etoles kabbi sampe' etangale'e bi' sengko'," 
Job31:36 bi' sengko' tanto ekasandhang e bau kalaban ate gumbira, epasang e tang cethak menangka jamang." 
Job31:37 Bi' sengko' eatorragiya ka Allah sabarang se la elakone sengko', e ajunanna sengko' adhanga'a kalaban ate gumbira." 
Job31:38 Ja' sakenga tana se egarap sengko' reya ollena ngeco', ollena arampas dhari oreng," 
Job31:39 ja' sakenga hasella bi' sengko' ekakan epatadha', dineng oreng tane se namenne tana jareya bi' sengko' edina kalaparan," 
Job31:40 mandar tana jareya ta' tombuwa gandum otaba padhi, mandar tombuwa lalang ban ombut se adhuri.” Gan jadhiya bu-dhabuna Ayyub." 
Job32:1 Sarrena Ayyub ce' yakinna ja' salerana bendher, daddi kancana se katello ta' endha' nyaot pole." 
Job32:2 Tape e jadhiya badha oreng anyama Elihu, ana'na Barakhe'el, toronanna Bus dhari kaom Ram. Elihu ta' bisa ngampet peggella polana Ayyub mabendher salerana dibi' ban nyala'agi Allah." 
Job32:3 Kancana Ayyub se katello gella' ekapeggelli keya polana ta' bisa alaban dhabuna Ayyub, maske padha ngoca' ja' Ayyub sala." 
Job32:4 Elihu jareya se paleng ngodha e antarana reng-oreng jareya, daddi neng-enneng malolo, anante' sampe' kabbi padha mare se acaca." 
Job32:5 Saellana nangale'e ja' oreng se katello gella' la ta' bisa nyaot pole, atena laju peggel," 
Job32:6 pas ngoca' kantha reya, “Sengko' gi' ngodha, ba'na la towa, daddi sengko' tako' ban mangmang kaangguy anyata'agi tang panemmo." 
Job32:7 Ca'na tang pekker, ba'na se kodu acaca, se atowa'an se kodu magi hekmadda." 
Job32:8 Tape se apareng hekmat ka manossa pera' Erroh Allah Se Mahakobasa. 
Job32:9 Oreng daddi bicaksana banne polana towa omorra, oreng ngarte barang se bendher banne polana abit odhi'na." 
Job32:10 Daddi mara, edhingngagi sengko'; edine sengko' makalowar tang panemmo." 
Job32:11 Sengko' sabbar ngedhingngagi ba'na e bakto acaca, sengko' anante' e bakto ba'na mele ca'-oca' se teppa' ban becce'." 
Job32:12 Sengko' ngedhingngagi epagu-onggu; sengko' ngedhing cacana ba'na tadha' ollena; ba'na ta' bisa abukteyagi salana cacana Ayyub. 
Job32:13 Baramma ba'na se ngoca'a ja' ba'na la nemmo hekmat? sabab ba'na tapaksa kala. Se bisa nyaodi Ayyub pera' Allah. 
Job32:14 Ayyub acaca ka ba'na, banne ka sengko' reya, tape sengko' ta' nyaoda akantha ba'na." 
Job32:15 Ayyub, reng-oreng reya ta' bisa nyaot; ta' nemmo oca' polana bingong." 
Job32:16 Kabbi padha manjeng malolo, ta' nemmo oca' pole. Apa sengko' kodu terros anante' e bakto reng-oreng jareya ta' nyaot sakale?" 
Job32:17 Enja', sateya sengko' masthe nyaot, sengko' kodu manapa' tang panemmo." 
Job32:18 Sengko' la ta' sabbar se anante'a, la ta' kowat ngampet tang oca'." 
Job32:19 Mon sengko' neng-enneng malolo, tanto sengko' leddu', akantha kanthong se aesse anggur se anyar." 
Job32:20 Sengko' kodu ngoca' me' olle tang ate nyaman; sengko' kodu nyaot, mokka' tang colo'." 
Job32:21 Sengko' ta' nolonga pa-sapa e dhalem parkara reya, bariya keya tadha' se bi' sengko' ealemma." 
Job32:22 Sengko' ta' tao lem-ngalem ngala' atena oreng, ban saompamana sengko' alako kantha jareya tanto eokom bi' Guste Allah." 
Job33:1 Sateya, he Ayyub, mara edhingngagi pateppa' apa se ekoca'agiya sengko' reya." 
Job33:2 Sengko' sateya la sadhiya acaca'a ka ba'na. 
Job33:3 Sengko' acaca sajujurra, sengko' mala'ana sabendherra." 
Job33:4 Erroh Allah nyepta'agi sengko' reya ban apareng odhi' ka sengko' e dunnya. 
Job33:5 Daddi mon bisa, mara ba'na nyaot. Sadhiya'agi se abilla'a ba'na." 
Job33:6 Monggu ka Allah, sengko' ban ba'na tadha' bidana padha ekagabay dhari lempong ban tana." 
Job33:7 Daddi ba'na ta' osa tako' ka sengko'; sengko' ta' amaksod makala'a ba'na. 
Job33:8 Sengko' la ngedhing oca'na ba'na, sarta la ngarte se ekamaksod atena." 
Job33:9 Ba'na ngoca', ‘Sengko' berse, ta' nerrak larangan. Sengko' socce, ta' andhi' kasala'an." 
Job33:10 Tape Allah re-nyare marga nyala'agi sengko', sengko' eanggep moso." 
Job33:11 Tang soko epasange rantay; tang guli terros etalektegi.’ 
Job33:12 He Ayyub, pekkeranna ba'na ce' salana. Sabab Allah araja'an dhari manossa." 
Job33:13 Arapa ba'na me' ngarane Allah ekoca' ta' marduli ka serrona manossa? 
Job33:14 Allah abu-dhabu acem-macem carana, tape tadha' oreng se agateyagi dhabuna." 
Job33:15 E bakto oreng tedhung ngeddha e baja malem, e dhalem mempe ban pangatonan Allah adhabu ka manossa." 
Job33:16 Allah makon manossa ngedhingngagi dhabuna, manossa epatakerjat ban parengeddan-parengeddanna." 
Job33:17 Maksodda sopaja manossa ambu se alako dusa, ban ta' terros sombong." 
Job33:18 Manossa jareya epalopot dhari pate; epeyara sopaja ta' sampe' ancor. 
Job33:19 Allah maemot oreng kalaban madhateng panyaket, sampe' badanna arassa sake'." 
Job33:20 Se sake' ta' endha' ngakan, ngota'a nangale kakanan se paleng nyaman." 
Job33:21 Badanna koros kare kole'na, sampe' etangale'e lang-tolangnga." 
Job33:22 Oreng jareya para' mateya, dunnyana oreng mate la semma' ka aba'na." 
Job33:23 Olle daddi settong dhari saebu malaekadda Allah se maenga' manossa parkara kawajibanna, bakal dhatengnga nolonga aba'na." 
Job33:24 Malaekat jareya bakal adhabuwa kalaban bellas ase, ‘Ocol oreng jareya, ja' patoron ka dunnyana oreng mate. Areya' pesse tebbusanna, se mabebasa oreng jareya pole.’" 
Job33:25 Badanna bakal kowadda parjuga segger akantha oreng ngodha. 
Job33:26 Mon oreng jareya adu'a, tanto ekaneserre bi' Allah, oreng jareya tanto moji Allah, atena gumbira, ban Allah tanto mabali kabadha'anna akantha asalla." 
Job33:27 E adha'na oreng bannya' oreng jareya tanto pas ngoca', ‘Se jahat bi' sengko' eanggep becce', sengko' ce' dusana, tape sengko' ta' eokom bi' Allah.’" 
Job33:28 Allah nolong sampe' sengko' ta' maso' ka dunnyana oreng mate, sarta gi' odhi' sampe' sateya." 
Job33:29 La li-baliyan, Allah alampa'agi se kantha jareya," 
Job33:30 sopaja bisa'a nolong masalamet manossa ban apareng kasennengngan e dhalem odhi'na. 
Job33:31 Daddi mara edhingngagi Ayyub, bukka' kopengnga, neng-enneng, sateya sengko' se acaca." 
Job33:32 Tape mon badha se ekoca'agiya ba'na, mara ngoca'; mon ba'na pajat bendher, sengko' endha' ngakowa." 
Job33:33 Tape mon enja', mara neng-enneng, edhingngagi tang caca, sengko' ngajarragiya hekmat ka ba'na." 
Job34:1 Ba'na reya gu ta' penter ban andhi' akkal buddi? Daddi, mara tang caca reya edhingngagi." 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 Oreng tao ja' kakanan reya nyaman mon la arassae; oreng tao ja' ca'-oca' bicaksana mon la tao ngedhing. 
Job34:4 Mara areng-bareng mareksa parkara reya me' olle etemmo baramma se teppa'. 
Job34:5 Dhabuna Ayyub, ‘Sengko' ta' andhi' sala, tape Allah ta' adil ka sengko'." 
Job34:6 Sengko' eanggep lecek polana ngoca' ta' andhi' dusa. Sateya sengko' bakbak, maske ta' andhi' sala.’" 
Job34:7 Ba'na ba' taowa nangale oreng akantha Ayyub reya? Salerana li-baliyan bi-nyebbi Allah. 
Job34:8 Ayyub jareya dujan akanca ban oreng daraka, apolongan ban oreng durjana." 
Job34:9 Ca'na, tadha' gunana mon aehteyar ajalannagi kasokanna Allah." 
Job34:10 He reng-oreng se penter, mara edhingngagi! Masa' Allah Se Mahakobasa reya badha salana?" 
Job34:11 Allah reya aganjar manossa menorot lalakonna, apareng ganjaran otaba okoman sapantessa." 
Job34:12 Allah Se Mahakobasa ta' tao alampa'agi kajahadan; kabbi manossa eparenge kaadilan. 
Job34:13 Dhari sapa Allah narema kobasana? Sapa se massra'agi bume reya ka Salerana? 
Job34:14 Saandhinna Allah nyabut nyabana manossa, ban mondhut balina nyabana odhi'na," 
Job34:15 mate kabbi mahlok se anyaba, manossa daddi abu akantha asalla." 
Job34:16 Daddi, mon ba'na penter, mara gateyagi, bukka' kopengnga, pas edhingngagi." 
Job34:17 Apa ba'na nyala'agi Allah se adil ban parjuga? Apa ba'na nyangka Allah reya baji' ka kaadilan? 
Job34:18 Allah ngokom rato ban pangobasa se alako jahat ban daraka. 
Job34:19 Allah ta' nolonge rato otaba mamennang oreng sogi ka oreng se nespa, sabab kabbi padha cepta'anna." 
Job34:20 E tengnga malem rato bisa o-tao atemmo seda. Allah ngokom pangobasa se pas laju napa' ka ajal; tadha' malaradda mon mateyana oreng se parjuga. 
Job34:21 Sabab Allah nalektegi odhi'na manossa, ngoladi saneyap tengka'na." 
Job34:22 Tadha' petteng maske sampe' calemodan, se ekenneng gabay pangeteggan kaangguy dusa ban kajahadan." 
Job34:23 Allah ta' parlo nantowagi baktona bila manossa se mangkada eadilana. 
Job34:24 Ta' kalaban nalektegi otaba mareksa, Allah maambu pangobasa, oreng laen epadaddi gantena." 
Job34:25 Sabab Allah ngagali apa se la elakone reng-oreng jareya; daddi laju epagulu' ban epaancor e baja malem. 
Job34:26 Reng-oreng jareya etamper polana dusana, e adha'na oreng se bannya' epanarema okomanna." 
Job34:27 Sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' atoro' ka kasokanna, ban ta' ta'at ka papakonna." 
Job34:28 Reng-oreng jareya daddi sababba oreng mesken aserrowan, tangessa kapeyarsa ka Allah." 
Job34:29 Mon Allah motossagi mendella malolo, tadha' oreng se bangal nyale. Mon Salerana ta' kasokan ngaton, ta' kera badha oreng se bisa nyare." 
Job34:30 Sa-bangsa ta' bisa apa-rapa ngadhebbi kakejjemmanna reng-oreng se ta' andhi' Allah. 
Job34:31 Ayyub, apa sa-dusana ba'na ka Allah la eakone? Apa ba'na la ajanji ta' agabaya dusa pole?" 
Job34:32 Apa ba'na nyo'on sopaja eduduwagi kasala'anna? Apa ba'na la asompa ambuwa ta' ngalakonana kantha jareya? 
Job34:33 Allah ta' kera ngabbuli pangaterrona ba'na, saellana ba'na nyala'agi se elampa'agi Allah. Sateya ba'na se kodu motossagi, banne sengko', mara koca'agi mon ba'na andhi' panemmo." 
Job34:34 Reng-oreng se penter tanto padha ban sengko' pekkeranna; oreng bicaksana se ngedhing tang caca tanto ngoca' 
Job34:35 ja' Ayyub acaca tape ta' ngarte ka cacana dibi', cacana tadha' ma'nana." 
Job34:36 Mon cacana Ayyub epekker epatete, nyata cacana akantha oreng jahat se juba' ate." 
Job34:37 Kasala'anna etambai pole ban settong dusa; iya areya alaban ka Allah ban ya-nyeya Allah e adha'na sengko' ban ba'na. 
Job35:1 Ayyub, ba'na kalero mon ba'na nyangka ja' e dhalem pangoladanna Allah ba'na ta' andhi' sala." 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 Ba'na kalero mon atanya apa rogina ka Allah mon ba'na andhi' dusa, apa ollena ba'na mon ba'na ta' agabay dusa." 
Job35:4 Sengko' se nyaodana ba'na, ban nyaodana tang ca-kanca." 
Job35:5 Kodda' abassagi patete saapa tenggina ondhem e langnge'. 
Job35:6 Allah ta' rogi, mon ba'na andhi' dusa. Allah ta' apa-rapa mon ba'na bannya' salana." 
Job35:7 Mon ba'na alako becce', Allah ta' olle pa-apa. Allah ta' parlo pa-apa dhari ba'na." 
Job35:8 Pera' sasamana ba'na se rogi polana sa-dusana ba'na, ban se olle kaontongan polana kabecce'anna ba'na." 
Job35:9 Reng-oreng se ececce' tanto aserrowan; atharat menta partolongan. 
Job35:10 Tape banne ka Allah, Panceptana, se apareng pangarebban e dhalem kasossa'an," 
Job35:11 se marenge manossa akkal ban pekkeran, ngalebbi'i mano' ban keban e bume." 
Job35:12 Reng-oreng se ececce' acerreng, tape Allah mendel malolo, lantaran reng-oreng jareya jahat ban sombong." 
Job35:13 Tadha' gunana atharat salar-kellarra; sabab Se Mahakobasa ta' ngoladi ban ta' meyarsa serrona. 
Job35:14 Ayyub, bi-lebbi pole mon ba'na ngoca' ja' ba'na ta' nangale'e Salerana, ja' parkarana ba'na la badha e ajunanna, ban ba'na te'-nante'an Salerana." 
Job35:15 Ba'na ngera Allah ta' apareng okoman, ban ta' parduli manossa agabay kasala'an." 
Job35:16 Tadha' gunana ba'na terros acaca; terrang, ba'na ta' ngarte apa se ekacaca." 
Job36:1 Mara pasabbar, edhingngagi sakejja' aggi', gi' badha se ekoca'agiya sengko' bit asmana Se Mahatenggi." 
Job36:2  
Job36:3 Tang pangataowan lebar; bi' sengko' eangguya abukteyagi ja' tang Pancepta reya adil. 
Job36:4 Tang caca tadha' se palsu; se badha e adha'na ba'na reya oreng se bicaksana onggu. 
Job36:5 Allah reya ce' kowadda, ta' ya-nyeya oreng; tadha' barang se ta' epahame." 
Job36:6 Oreng se dusa ta' epaabit odhi'na, kaadilan eparengngagi ka oreng se nyangsara." 
Job36:7 Oreng jujur ejaga ban epeyara, epakobasa akantha to-rato, ehormat oreng salanjangnga." 
Job36:8 Tape mon oreng ekalenthong ban rantay besse, nanggung sangsara polana kasala'anna dibi'," 
Job36:9 tanto dusa ban kasombonganna ebukka' tor esengkap bi' Allah. 
Job36:10 Allah makon reng-oreng jareya ngedhingngagi parengeddanna, ban ambu dhari kajahadanna." 
Job36:11 Mon reng-oreng jareya atoro' ban abakte ka Allah, tanto odhi'na taremtem ban ma'mor sampe' matena." 
Job36:12 Tape mon ta' ngedhingngagi dhabuna, reng-oreng jareya bakal mateya e dhalem kabudhuwanna." 
Job36:13 Oreng se ta' andhi' Pangeran peggel ros-terrosan, maske eokom Pangeran ta' endha' menta bantowan." 
Job36:14 Reng-oreng jareya mate kalessowen e bakto ngodhana, polana odhi'na se juba' tengkana." 
Job36:15 Allah ngajar manossa kalaban kasangsara'an, kasossa'an epadhateng sopaja manossa enga'a." 
Job36:16 Dhari kamalaradan ba'na epabebas bi' Allah, sampe' ba'na arassa'agi kobassana kataremtemman, meja makanna possa' ban kakanan." 
Job36:17 Tape sateya ba'na narema okomanna Allah, satembang ban kajahadanna." 
Job36:18 Te-ngate, ja' sampe' tagiyur polana pesse go'-sogo'; ja' sampe' sala jalan polana dunnya." 
Job36:19 Parcoma ba'na atharat menta bantowan, tadha' gunana ngettokkagi kakowadanna." 
Job36:20 Ja' rep-ngarep malem se petteng, sa'adda sa-bangsa elang mosna." 
Job36:21 Senga' te-ngate, ja' sampe' abiluk ka kajahadan; ba'na eparenge kasangsara'an sopaja ambuwa alako jahat." 
Job36:22 Kaenga'e, Allah reya ce' rajana kobasana; Allah reya guru raja se tadha' bandhinganna." 
Job36:23 Sapa se bisa nantowagi jalanna otabana se bangal ngoca' Salerana sala? 
Job36:24 Allah reya ealem polana se elampa'agi Salerana, bariya keya ba'na kodu amolja'agi Salerana keya." 
Job36:25 Oreng nangale kabbi ka se elampa'agi Salerana; tape tadha' settonga se ngarteya. 
Job36:26 Ba'na ban sengko' ta' kera ngarte onggu parkara kamolja'anna, otabana ngetong saapa bannya'na taonna." 
Job36:27 Allah naja' aeng dhari bume epadaddi ondhem e langnge' pas eoba epadaddi aeng ojan se benneng. 
Job36:28 Aeng ojan epatoron dhari ondhem e tenggina, eserammagi ka ommat manossa." 
Job36:29 Tadha' oreng se ngarteya gulina ondhem e tenggina, ban monyena galudhuk e langnge' kalenggiyanna." 
Job36:30 Langnge' sabalattrana etera'e ban dhap-keddhap, tape dhasarra tase' paggun petteng calemodan." 
Job36:31 Kantha jareya carana Allah apareng odhi' ka sa-bangsa, ban apareng kakanan se ta' sakera-kera." 
Job36:32 Kelap epega' ban astana, epakon nappor sasaranna." 
Job36:33 Monyena galudhuk nandha'agi kaleng busbus bakal dhatengnga, ebin tao keya angen barat la para'." 
Job37:1 Lantaran ojan derres campor angen sengko' katako'en, tang ate dhek-gadheggan." 
Job37:2 Mara kabbi, edhingngagi sowarana Allah, galudhuk se kalowar dhari lathena." 
Job37:3 Dhap-keddhap eocol ka sabalattrana langnge', kelap ekerem ka co'-konco'na bume." 
Job37:4 Saellana jareya sowarana agarudhu', monyena kelap ban galudhuk; ban e antarana sowara se saleng pajendhar, kelap patang kareddhap." 
Job37:5 Kalaban dhabuna Allah pas badha mo'jijat, kaajiban se ta' epahame pekkeranna manossa." 
Job37:6 Salju gaggar ka bume lantaran papakonna, ojan derres toron polana dhabuna." 
Job37:7 Lalakonna manossa epaambu sopaja manossa tao ja' Salerana alalakon. 
Job37:8 Burun alas padha maso' ka rongkangnga, ngetek e guwa ban e lobangnga." 
Job37:9 Dhari lao' dhateng kaleng busbus, dhari dhaja dhateng hawa se ce' cellebba." 
Job37:10 Nyabana Allah magali aeng salebarra, sampe' aoba daddi es se gali talebat." 
Job37:11 Ondhem eesse'e aeng, dhap-keddhap matera' langnge'." 
Job37:12 Ondhem ajalan noro' dhabuna Allah, sampe' san-kassannagi sabalattrana." 
Job37:13 Allah apareng ojan mabacca tana, otabana kaangguy ngokom manossa; olle daddi kaangguy noduwagi saapa bellas asena." 
Job37:14 Mara Ayyub, neng-enneng sakejja' bai, edhingngagi; abassagi kaajiban se epadhateng Allah." 
Job37:15 Ba' taowa ba'na, baramma Allah se apareng parenta, sampe' dhap-keddhap agalirap dhari ondhem e attas rowa?" 
Job37:16 Ba' taowa ba'na baramma ondhem se ajalan, hasel kaahliyanna Pangeran se makasambu' pekkeran?" 
Job37:17 Enja', ba'na pera' tao aserro mon kapanasan polana bume ekenneng panassa angen lao'." 
Job37:18 Ba' bisa'a ba'na akantha Allah ngampar langnge', ban magali langnge' jareya epakantha besse?" 
Job37:19 Mara sengko' sakanca padha balai apa se ekoca'agiya e ajunanna Allah; tang pekkeran kosong tadha' essena ta' bisa nerrangngagi pa-apa. 
Job37:20 Sengko' ta' nyo'ona edi tor-matora ka Allah, tako' daddi lantaran sengko' epacalaka'." 
Job37:21 Sateya langnge' ce' tera'na sampe' solap; angen dhateng maberse cowaca. 
Job37:22 Sonar akantha emmas moncar dhari dhaja, kamolja'anna Allah makasambu' ongguwan." 
Job37:23 Raja onggu kobasana Allahna sengko' ban ba'na; ta' sanggup sengko' ban ba'na nyander ka seddi'anna. Salerana jujur ban adil salanjangnga, ta' tao nendhes ban nyecce' manossa." 
Job37:24 Lantaran jareya sapa'a bai kodu hormat ka Allah, ban oreng se ngako penter ta' eparduli bi' Salerana.”" 
Job38:1 Saellana jareya dhari dhalem kaleng busbus PANGERAN adhabu kantha reya ka Ayyub," 
Job38:2 “Sapa ba'na, me' bangal mangmang ka Tang kabicaksana'an, makalowar ca'-oca' se budhu ban kosong kantha jareya?" 
Job38:3 Sateya adhebbi Sengko', duduwagi ja' ba'na lalake', saodi kabbi se etanya'agi Sengko' reya." 
Job38:4 Apa ba'na la badha e bakto Sengko' agabay bume ban saesena? Mon ba'na bannya' pangataowanna, balai Sengko' sateya! Apa ba'na tao jawabanna?" 
Job38:5 Sapa se nantowagi lebarra dunnya? Sapa se masang tale okoranna? Apa ba'na tao jawabanna? 
Job38:6 Baramma lar-pelar tongkana bume me' manjeng koko? Sapa se masang bato padduna? 
Job38:7 E bakto pajjar tang-bintang anyanye abareng, ban lok-mahlok sowarga padha asorak kaperagen." 
Job38:8 Sapa se notop labang nahan aeng tase' raja, e bakto aeng kalowar dhari tabu'na bume?" 
Job38:9 Sengko' se madhateng ondhem epangodhunge tase', se abungkos tase' epapetteng sampe' ta' etangale'e." 
Job38:10 Sengko' se nantowagi batessa tase' raja, se masang labang se epalang sopaja aengnga ta' ngalowa." 
Job38:11 Ca'na Sengko', ‘Areya' batessa ba'na, ja' lebadi! Omba'na ba'na ambu gan dhinna' bai.’" 
Job38:12 Ayyub, ba'na ba' taowa, maske pera' sakaleyan e dhalem odhi'na, marenta'agi sopaja para' seyang dhatengnga?" 
Job38:13 Ba' taowa ba'na nyoro pajjar neggu'i bume, magundhek pangetegganna oreng jahat sampe' kabbi padha kalowar?" 
Job38:14 Gunong ban cora etangale ce' terrangnga polana tera'na seyang, akantha leppedanna juba ban eccap e lempong se leca'." 
Job38:15 Tera'na seyang terrang gallu ka oreng se ta' andhi' Pangeran, daddi ta' bisa ngalakone kakerrasan." 
Job38:16 Ba' taowa ba'na ka somber e dhasarra tase'? otabana lan-jalanan e dhasarra tase' raja? 
Job38:17 Ba' taowa badha oreng noduwagi ka ba'na labang saketheng se raja e batessa alam maot se petteng calemodan? 
Job38:18 Ba' bisa'a ba'na ra-ngera lebarra dunnya reya? Mon pajat tao, mara jawab sateya keya." 
Job38:19 Ba' taowa ba'na dhari dhimma asalla terrang, ban e dhimma somber se madhateng petteng?" 
Job38:20 Ba' bisa'a ba'na nantowagi batessa terrang ban petteng, otaba nyoro terrang ban petteng ondur saellana dhateng?" 
Job38:21 Tanto bai ba'na bisa sabab ba'na la towa, ban e bakto bume reya ekagabay ba'na la badha e dhissa'!" 
Job38:22 Ba' taowa ba'na maso' ka Tang dhang-gudhang, panyaba'anna salju ban ojan bato" 
Job38:23 se bi' Sengko' esempen kaangguy jaman malarat, kaangguy re-are e jaman paperrangan?" 
Job38:24 Ba' taowa ba'na are reya e dhimma bungkana, ban angen temor dhari dhimma asalla?" 
Job38:25 Sapa se ngale li-giliyanna ojan raja, ban se aberri' jalan ka galudhuk ban dhap-keddhap?" 
Job38:26 Sapa se magili ojan ka ra-ara se tadha' men-tamennanna ban ka tana se ta' ekennengnge manossa? 
Job38:27 Sapa se nyerame tana se kerreng ban gali, sampe' rebba nyenna kabbi?" 
Job38:28 Apa ojan andhi' eppa'? Ebbun reya sapa ramana? 
Job38:29 Apa es reya andhi' ebu? Sapa se alahirragi ebbun se gali? 
Job38:30 Sapa se madaddi bato dhari aeng? Sapa se magali bagiyan attassa tase'? 
Job38:31 Ba' bisa'a ba'na agintel bintang Karteka, otabana malocot sambunganna bintang Belanti'?" 
Job38:32 Ba' bisa'a bi' ba'na tang-bintang etonton sabban mosemma, bintang Biduk raja ban kene' etantowagi jalanna?" 
Job38:33 Apa ba'na tao ka kom-hokom se ngator langnge'? Ba' bisa'a ba'na ngangguy kom-hokom jareya e bume? 
Job38:34 Ba' bisa'a ba'na aera' marenta ondhem, nyoro madhateng ojan sampe' banjir notobi kennengnganna ba'na?" 
Job38:35 Mon ba'na nyoro kelap patang galirap, apa kerana lap-kelap jareya dhateng sarta nyaoda, ‘Mator sandika, Guste’?" 
Job38:36 Mano' ibis tao dhari sapa bila Songay Nil ngalowa'a aengnga? Ajam lake' tao dhari dhimma ja' ojan bakal dhatengnga? 
Job38:37 Sapa se ce' penterra sampe' bisa ngetong ondhem e langnge', ban abalik ondhem jareya sampe' toron ojan aeng," 
Job38:38 ojan se magali abu ban tana sampe' apel-kempel? 
Job38:39 Ba' taowa ba'na aburu mamangsan kaangguy pakanna macan, otabana makennyang tabu'na dhu'-budhu'na," 
Job38:40 mon macan jareya teppa'na ngetek e dhalem guwana, otabana dhep-ngendhep e dhalem rongkangnga?" 
Job38:41 Sapa se makane dhangdhang se kalaparan, se ngabber san-kassannagi nyare kakan? Sapa se nolong dhu'-budhu'na, mon ok-kaogan ka Sengko' menta pakan?" 
Job39:1 Ba' taowa ba'na bila embi' gunong elahirragi korbina? Ba' taowa ba'na ngabassagi manjangan alas se teppa' rembi'a? 
Job39:2 Ba' taowa ba'na barampa abidda burun alas jareya se ngandhung, ban ngetong bila baktona se rembi'a?" 
Job39:3 Ba' taowa ba'na bila korbina molae arendhu, pas rembi' kalowar budhu'na?" 
Job39:4 Dhu'-budhu'na atamba raja ban kowat e ra-ara; pas nyengla ta' abali pole ka korbina. 
Job39:5 Sapa se ngocol mar-hemar e alas, se mokka' talena, aberri' kabebasan berka' man-dha'emman?" 
Job39:6 Mar-hemar jareya bi' Sengko' eberri' sagara beddhi menangka bengkona, ban gal-teggal buja menangka kennengnganna." 
Job39:7 Keban jareya ajauwi tha-kottha se ramme, tadha' oreng se bisa manotot otaba malalakon." 
Job39:8 Lon-talon ban nong-gunong kennengnganna nyare pakan, bu-tombuwan se gi' biru daddi kakanna." 
Job39:9 Apa sape alas endha' alako ka ba'na, endha' tedhung e kandhang andhi'na ba'na?" 
Job39:10 Ba' bisa'a ba'na nale'e sape jareya, epaksa nyalaga ban agarap tanana ba'na?" 
Job39:11 Ba' bisa'a ba'na ngandellagi kakowadanna, massra'agi lakona ba'na se berra' ka sape jareya?" 
Job39:12 Ba' bisa'a ba'na parcaja passra ka sape jareya esoro makompol hasella gandumma, esoro ngeba ka kennengnganna pagebba'anna?" 
Job39:13 Ceppet onggu pakebba'na kalembangnga mano' onta! Tape pangabberra ta' nandhinge pangabberra dalko'. 
Job39:14 Mano' onta atellor e tana, saellana pas edina; daddi beddhi se manase tellor jareya." 
Job39:15 Mano' jareya loppa ja' tellorra bisa edidda' manossa otaba enyek-enyek burun alas. 
Job39:16 Katonna budhu'na eanggep banne andhi'na, ta' parduli ja' ehteyarra tadha' ollena." 
Job39:17 Sengko' se mabudhu mano' jareya, ta' eberri'i hekmat ban akkal." 
Job39:18 Tape mon mano' jareya la kare berka', jaran ban oreng se nompa' ta' kera mennang." 
Job39:19 He Ayyub, apa ba'na, ya, se aberri' kakowadan ka jaran ban bulu se bagus se bay-kerbayan e le'er budhina?" 
Job39:20 Ba'na se mabisa jaran bisa alonca' akantha balang, monyena adherreng nako'e manossa?" 
Job39:21 Kaperagen ngarkar cora ngangguy kokodda, ce' samangadda sasat ngabber ka medan perrang." 
Job39:22 Jaran jareya ta' tao artena marenges otaba tako', maske ngadhebbi konco'na peddhang ta' kera nyorot." 
Job39:23 Sanjata se epekol oreng se nompa', saleng pakermang ban agalirap ekenneng sonarra are." 
Job39:24 Samangadda rabbang, jaran jareya berka'; mon tarompet amonye, sokona ta' bisa ambu." 
Job39:25 Jaran jareya adherreng mon monyena tarompet ekaedhing e kopengnga, bauna perrang la ekaedhing dhari jauna; bariya keya sowarana para parwira, se ra'-era'an aberri' parenta." 
Job39:26 Apa ba'na se ngajari ngabber mano' ellang, bila entar dha' lao', kalembangnga epamekkar?" 
Job39:27 Apa mano' rajabali noro' parentana ba'na, sabellunna agabay lebun e gunong se ce' tenggina?" 
Job39:28 Lebunna ekagabay e co'-konco'na gunong bato, abinteng konco'na to-bato se tajem co'-nyoco', daddi bengkona ta' gampang emaso'e moso." 
Job39:29 Dhari jadhiya matana ngabas ka man-dhimman, nyendhemme mangsa se ekakana." 
Job39:30 Mon badha se mate, bi' mano' jareya esanderri, dharana eenom budhu'na ekambuli'i." 
Job40:1 He Ayyub, ba'na nangtang Sengko', Allah Se Mahakobasa; apa sateya ba'na ngakowa kala, otaba gi' alabana?”" 
Job40:2  
Job40:3 Atorra Ayyub ka PANGERAN, “Abdidalem acaca akadi oreng budhu, GUSTE. Daddi abdidalem dhu nyaoda ponapa pole? Ampon tadha' se eatorragiya abdidalem samangken." 
Job40:4  
Job40:5 Se ekoca'agi abdidalem ampon lebbi dhari se samasthena.” 
Job40:6 Saellana jareya, dhari dhalem ojan derres acampor kaleng busbus, PANGERAN adhabu pole ka Ayyub, dhabuna," 
Job40:7 “Mara adhebbi Sengko' sateya, duduwagi ja' ba'na lalake', saodi kabbi se etanya'agi Sengko' reya." 
Job40:8 Apa ba'na gi' ta' endha' ngakone ja' Sengko' reya adil, gi' nyala'agi Sengko', mabendher aba'na dibi'?" 
Job40:9 Apa ba'na kowat akantha Sengko' reya? Apa sowarana ba'na bisa agarudhu' akantha Tang sowara? 
Job40:10 Mon bendher kantha jareya, mara ba'na jaga, angguy rarenggan kamolja'anna, duduwagi kaangga'anna." 
Job40:11 Abas reng-oreng se angga' rowa; ca'-koca'e pamare, pangalowa peggella atena ba'na." 
Job40:12 Ongguwan, abas reng-oreng se sombong, soro asojud e adha'anna ba'na; paremmok reng-oreng jahat e kennengnganna." 
Job40:13 Kobur kabbi e dhalem bume; korong e dhalem dunnyana oreng mate. 
Job40:14 Bi' Sengko' ba'na pas ealemma polana ba'na mennang ban kakowadanna dibi'. 
Job40:15 Abassagi Behemot, keban se talebat rajana rowa; padha ban ba'na, gabayanna Sengko' keya. Rebba se daddi kakanna, akantha sape ban sabangsana." 
Job40:16 Tape abassagi kakowadanna ban badanna, sarta kakowadanna ra'-ora'na!" 
Job40:17 Bunto'na epanoccer ka attas akantha bungkana aras, ra'-ora'na pokangnga koko ban merras." 
Job40:18 Lang-tolangnga kowat akantha dimbaga, bettessa koko akantha baja." 
Job40:19 E antarana sakabbinna Tang mahlok, jareya se paleng makasambu'; tadha' se bisa makala, kajabana Sengko', Panceptana!" 
Job40:20 E mo'-gumo' kennengnganna burun alas amaen neng-sennengngan, rebba tombu daddi kakanna." 
Job40:21 Keban jareya dhung-tedhungan e babana ombut se adhuri, ngetek e antarana galagas e ba-raba." 
Job40:22 Ombut se adhuri anaonge keban jareya ban jang-bajanganna. Bungkana gandarusa e penggir songay ngaobi badanna. 
Job40:23 Keban jareya ta' tako' maske Songay Yordan santer gilina, paggun kalem maske aengnga alompa' mowana." 
Job40:24 Sapa se bangal mabuta matana, mega' keban jareya kalaban nyandhak congorra?" 
Job41:1 Ba' bisa'a ba'na mega' baja Lewiyatan ngangguy panceng, otabana naja' jilana ngangguy tale?" 
Job41:2 Ba' bisa'a ba'na masang tongar ka elongnga, otabana e'-kae' besse ka tolangnga cangkemma?" 
Job41:3 Apa kerana Lewiyatan jareya menta ocol ka ba'na, otabana se-ngase menta kabellasan?" 
Job41:4 Apa kerana keban jareya mabadha parembagan ban ba'na, ngabdiya ka ba'na salanjangnga?" 
Job41:5 Apa kerana bi' ba'na etaleyana akantha mano' peyara'an, se masenneng atena la-kabula babine'an?" 
Job41:6 Apa kerana keban jareya ekadaganga bi' reng-oreng majang, egi-bagi e antarana oreng dagang?" 
Job41:7 Ba' bisa'a ba'na nyoddu'agi tombak amata tello' ka kole'na, otabana ngontallagi lembing sampe' terbas cethagga?" 
Job41:8 Kodda' sedding sakaleyan bai, tanto ba'na ta' kera adhukale'e; saomorra ba'na ta' kera loppa se akeket ban keban jareya." 
Job41:9 Pa'-sapa'a se nangale Lewiyatan, tanto lempo, pas kalengnger robbu ka tana." 
Job41:10 Galagga ta' jama' mon epajaga dhari tedhunga; tadha' oreng bangal manjeng e adha'anna. 
Job41:11 Sapa bisa nyerrang Lewiyatan ban abali salamet ka bengkona? Tadha' oreng settonga se sanggup e dunnya reya. 
Job41:12 Mara bi' Sengko' ba'na ebala'ana bagiyanna badanna Lewiyatan, saapa rajana ban kakowadanna badanna." 
Job41:13 Tadha' oreng se bisa nyebbit kalambi lowarra, otabana maloka kalambi perrang se eangguy aba'na." 
Job41:14 Sapa se bisa mokka' colo'na se kowat, se aesse gigi se nako'e manossa?" 
Job41:15 Balikadda akantha tameng se ason-soson, cekka' rapet, gali akantha bato." 
Job41:16 Se settong nompang cekka' ka settonganna, sampe' ta' ekenneng lebadi angen balakka'." 
Job41:17 Tameng jareya asambung cekka' ce' kokona, sapa'a bai ta' kera bisa mokka'." 
Job41:18 Mon Lewiyatan aassim kalowar sonar akantha mardha, matana mancorong akantha are se moncar." 
Job41:19 Apoy rabbang kalowar dhari colo'na, bur-nyembur ka lowaranna." 
Job41:20 Dhari lobangnga elongnga kalowar okos, akantha okossa kaju se rabbang e baba'anna polo'." 
Job41:21 Mardha rabbang mon ekenneng nyabana; apoy rabbang kalowar dhari colo'na. 
Job41:22 Le'er budhina talebat kowadda, sapa se tatemmo tako' sampe' gujuden." 
Job41:23 Tadha' bagiyan se lembu' e kole'na; kabbi padha ban baja galina. 
Job41:24 Atena se akantha bato ta' tao mangmang, koko gali akantha bato gilingan." 
Job41:25 Mon Lewiyatan jaga, oreng se paleng kowat sakale laju ngetter, ta' bisa apa-rapa lantaran katako'en." 
Job41:26 Tadha' peddhang se bisa maloka kole'na; badanna ta' meddhas lembing, tombak otaba pana." 
Job41:27 Besse eanggep padha ban darameyan, dimbaga eanggep lembu' akantha kaju se bucco' etombuwi kolat." 
Job41:28 Ta' ekenneng oddak ban pana; mon ekotep ban bato eanggep darameyan. 
Job41:29 Gada eanggep rebba kerreng salambar, mon oreng ngontallagi tombak ekala'-gella'." 
Job41:30 Sesse' e tabu'na akantha belling se tajem konco'na, nyongkar tana lempong akantha nanggala." 
Job41:31 Tase' egaluy sampe' padha ban aeng se ngalkal, akantha mennya' se ngelbuk e dhalem kattha." 
Job41:32 Lampadda sokona asonar tera', aeng tase' eoba daddi kapo' se pote barnana." 
Job41:33 E attas bume tadha' tandhinganna; mahlok jareya tadha' tako'na. 
Job41:34 Keban se paleng raja ban kowat eanggep tadha' argana; e antarana sakabbinna burun alas, jareya ratona.”" 
Job42:1 Atorra Ayyub ka PANGERAN, “Abdidalem oneng, GUSTE, Junandalem Mahakobasa; sanggup alampa'agi sadaja se daddi kasokanna." 
Job42:2  
Job42:3 Junandalem mareksane aponapa abdidalem me' bangal mangmang sareng ta' parcaja ja' Junandalem bicaksana, mangkana abdidalem dibi' ta' oneng pa-ponapa. Abdidalem acaca parkara sabarang se abdidalem dibi' ta' ngarte, sadajana se monggu ka abdidalem dibi' talebat ajib." 
Job42:4 E bakto Junandalem abu-dhabu, abdidalem epakon merengngagi, epakon nyaot manabi Junandalem mareksane." 
Job42:5 Gi' dhimen se ekaonenge abdidalem parkara Junandalem namong ollena mereng dhari oreng laen, namong samangken abdidalem oneng ka Junandalem saamponna dhep-adhebban dibi'." 
Job42:6 Daddi abdidalem todhus emot ka sadajana oca' abdidalem; abdidalem toju' e dhalem abu sareng tana, atobat nyo'on sapora.”" 
Job42:7 Samarena abu-dhabu ka Ayyub, PANGERAN pas adhabu ka Elifas, “Sengko' peggel ka ba'na ban ka kancana se kadhuwa jareya, sabab ba'na ta' ngoca' se sabendherra parkara Sengko'. Tape Ayyub Tang abdi reya ta' kantha jareya."
