Job42:8 Sateya kassa' ngala' sape lake' papetto' ban dumba lake' papetto', giba ka Ayyub. Atorragi jareya kabbi menangka kurban obbaran kaangguy ba'na dibi'. Ayyub adu'a'agiya ba'na, ban du'ana bi' Sengko' etarema'a. Bi' Sengko' ba'na ta' epatodhusa, maske ba'na patot narema okoman. Ayyub ngoca' se sabendherra parkara Sengko', tape ba'na enja'.”" 
Job42:9 Elifas, Bildad ban Zofar ajalannagi se epakonnagi PANGERAN, ban PANGERAN narema du'ana Ayyub." 
Job42:10 Saellana Ayyub adu'a'agi kancana se katello gella', bi' PANGERAN Ayyub epasogi pole; kasogiyanna epadaddi tekel dhuwa'na se asal." 
Job42:11 Tan-taretanna se lalake' ban babine', sarta ca-kancana se kona, padha entar nyapot Ayyub, pas padha apesta e compo'na. Kabbi padha ngoca' noro' sossa polana kasossa'an se eteba'agi PANGERAN ka Ayyub, kabbi padha alepor salerana. Reng-oreng jareya padha ngatore pesse ban sello' emmas ka Ayyub." 
Job42:12 Molae dhari bakto jareya sampe' sedana Ayyub eberkadi PANGERAN alebbiyan dhari sabellunna katebanan mosiba rowa. Ayyub kaagungan embi' dumba pa' bellas ebu meggi', onta nem ebu meggi', sape dhu ebu meggi', ban hemar saebu meggi'." 
Job42:13 Ayyub kaagungan pottra pole, lalake' papetto' ban babine' katello." 
Job42:14 Pottra babine'na se nomer settong anyama Yemima, se nomer dhuwa' Keziya, ban se bungso Kerenhapukh." 
Job42:15 E saantero nagara tadha' paraban se raddinna padha ban pottrana Ayyub. Tra-pottra babine'anna jareya eparenge sangkolan dhari ramana, epapadha ban tra-pottra lalake'anna." 
Job42:16 Saellana jareya Ayyub gi' odhi' saratos pa' polo taon abidda, sampe' gi' sempat ngoladi ja-bajana sarta yo'-peyo'na." 
Job42:17 Saellana ce' seppona, Ayyub pas seda." 
Psalms1:1 Bajjra oreng se ta' atoro' ka babala'anna oreng jahat, se ta' nerowe tengkana oreng se bannya' dusana, sarta ta' akompol ban reng-oreng se ya-nyeya Allah," 
Psalms1:2 se lebur ajalannagi papakonna PANGERAN, sarta mekker parkara papakon jareya malem ban seyang." 
Psalms1:3 Oreng jareya olle hasel e dhalem saneyap ehteyarra, akantha kajuwan e penggir songay, se abuwa mon teppa' mosemma ban ta' tao elop dhaunna." 
Psalms1:4 Sabaligga, oreng jahat, padha ban sekkem se eabber angen." 
Psalms1:5 Oreng jahat bakal eokoma bi' Allah, hakimma ban epesa dhari ommat laenna." 
Psalms1:6 Sabab oreng se ta'at etonton ban eaobi PANGERAN, tape oreng jahat bakal ancora odhi'na." 
Psalms2:1 Arapa sa-bangsa me' agigiran ros-terrosan, arapa oreng me' asakongkel se tadha' gunana?" 
Psalms2:2 To-ratona padha aberonta', para pangobasana alaban ka PANGERAN ban ka rato peleyanna Salerana." 
Psalms2:3 Para pangobasa jareya padha ngoca', “Tore pakala to-rato ka'issa', me' olle sampeyan sareng kaula padha mardika!”" 
Psalms2:4 E sowarga Pangeran kasokan dhari kalenggiyanna, ngece sajjana reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms2:5 Reng-oreng jareya bi' Pangeran laju edukane ban esentak, padha katako'en nangale'e padukana." 
Psalms2:6 Ca'na dhabuna, “E Siyon Tang gumo' se socce, Sengko' la aresmeyagi rato Tang peleyan dibi'.”" 
Psalms2:7 Dhabuna rato, “Sengko' mala'ana ka oreng se bannya', ca'na dhabuna ka sengko', ‘Ba'na Tang ana', are teya Sengko' daddi Ramana ba'na." 
Psalms2:8 Mara menta, sakabbinna bangsa bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na, saantero bume epadaddiya andhi'na ba'na." 
Psalms2:9 Sa-bangsa jareya bakal epaancora ba'na bi' tongkat besse, epalejjara akantha polo' tana.’ ”" 
Psalms2:10 Daddi para rato, para edhingngagi Tang parengeddan reya, para pangobasana dunnya, mara kaenga'e pangajaran reya!" 
Psalms2:11 Patako' abakte ka PANGERAN," 
Psalms2:12 pangetter asojud e ajunanna, ja' sampe' Pangeran duka, sampe' ba'na epatompes daksakala, sabab dukana rabbang sanatkala. Bajjra oreng se nyare pangaoban ka Pangeran!" 
Psalms3:1 Jaburra Daud, e bakto buru dhari Absalom, pottrana." 
Psalms3:2 Adhu GUSTE, moso abdidalem talebat bannya'na, se nyerrang abdidalem ta' sakera-kera!" 
Psalms3:3 Bannya' oreng se padha ngoca' abdidalem ta' kera etolong sareng Allah. 
Psalms3:4 Namong Junandalem, GUSTE, akadi tameng se malopot abdidalem dhari babaja. Abdidalem eparenge kamennangan, sareng eparaja ate." 
Psalms3:5 Sengko' aserro ka PANGERAN, dhari gumo'na se socce Salerana nyaodi sengko'." 
Psalms3:6 Sengko' marobbu, pas tedhung ngeddha, laju jaga pole, sabab PANGERAN ajaga tang aba'." 
Psalms3:7 Sengko' ta' tako' ka moso se aebuwan, se ngeppong sengko' dhari man-dhimman." 
Psalms3:8 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, okommagi sareng palempowagi moso abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms3:9 Dhari Junandalem dhatengnga partolongan kasokana aberkadi ommattepon Junandalem sadajana. 
Psalms4:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms4:2 Ya Allah, Junandalem se abilla abdidalem, kasokana nyaodi manabi abdidalem aserro. Manabi abdidalem sossa, Junandalem se nolong; samangken kabellasi abdidalem ka'dhinto, peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem." 
Psalms4:3 Sampe' bila manossa reya se ambuwa ya-nyeya tang Allah? Sampe' bila terros leburra ka sabarang se tadha' gunana ban nyerser barang se ta' teppa'? 
Psalms4:4 Kaenga'e, kaangguy Salerana dibi' PANGERAN mele oreng se ekaase'e Salerana. PANGERAN meyarsa'agi mon sengko' aserro nyo'on partolongan." 
Psalms4:5 Pangetter patako', ban ja' agabay dusa pole. Ja' acaca, tape pekker e dhalem ate, e bakto dhung-tedhungan e dhalem pangkeng." 
Psalms4:6 Atorragi kurban se teppa' ban paparcaja ka PANGERAN. 
Psalms4:7 Bannya' oreng atanya, “Sapa se aberkadana sengko' ban ba'na?” GUSTE, moga Junandalem kasokana ka abdidalem sadajana." 
Psalms4:8 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem epalebbi perak dhari oreng se talebat bannya' hasella tamennanna. 
Psalms4:9 Daddi abdidalem tedhung ngeddha sareng taremtem, sabab namong Junandalem, GUSTE, se mataremtem odhi' abdidalem." 
Psalms5:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge bi' soleng. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms5:2 Adhu GUSTE, peyarsa'agi ca'-oca' abdidalem, gateyagi serrona abdidalem." 
Psalms5:3 Peyarsa'agi abdidalem, nyo'ona tolong, Guste, sabab namong Junandalem Rato sareng Allah abdidalem." 
Psalms5:4 Sabab abdidalem adu'a ka Junandalem, GUSTE, peyarsa'agi serrona abdidalem e baja laggu. Abdidalem abakta tor-ator gu-laggu sareng anante' dhabuepon Junandalem, Guste." 
Psalms5:5 Junandalem Allah se ta' kasokan ka kajahadan; oreng jahat ta' kengeng nyabis ka Junandalem. 
Psalms5:6 Junandalem ta' betta ngoladi oreng sombong, Junandalem baji' ka oreng se alako jahat." 
Psalms5:7 Reng-oreng se lecegan sareng Junandalem epate'e, Junandalem baji' ka oreng se dujan co-ngoco sareng se dujan mate'e oreng." 
Psalms5:8 Namong lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem se talebat rajana, abdidalem kengeng maso' ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem. Abdidalem asojud ngadhep ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem se socce, sareng nyemba ka Junandalem kalaban hormat." 
Psalms5:9 Adhu GUSTE, moso abdidalem ce' bannya'na! Tontonnagi abdidalem sopaja alampa'agi karsaepon Junandalem sadajana, sareng duduwagi e ka'dhimma abdidalem kodu lebat." 
Psalms5:10 Sabab cacana moso abdidalem ta' ekenneng parcaja; atena possa' sareng sajja se juba'. Cacana manes ngapencot ate, namong, bucco' e dhalem baten." 
Psalms5:11 Guste Allah, okommagi reng-oreng gapaneka, me' olle padha calaka' lantaran sajjaepon dibi'. Tondhungngagi reng-oreng gapaneka, lantaran bannya' dusana, sabab padha aberonta' ka Junandalem." 
Psalms5:12 Sadajana oreng se ngaop ka Junandalem mandar padha'a sennengnga, sareng rak-soragan salanjangnga. Jaga'agi reng-oreng se taresna ka Junandalem, sopaja padha'a anga-bunga lantaran Junandalem." 
Psalms5:13 Sabab Junandalem aberkadi reng-oreng se esto ka Junandalem, GUSTE; Junandalem ajaga sadajana kalaban bellas ase." 
Psalms6:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Menorot lagu se nomer ballu'. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms6:2 Adhu GUSTE, abdidalem ja' ajar sanare Junandalem duka, abdidalem ja' okom sanare Junandalem ce' benduna." 
Psalms6:3 Kabellasi abdidalem, PANGERAN, sabab abdidalem ampon ce' lempona; parenge abdidalem kakowadan, sabab abdidalem ampon ce' lessona." 
Psalms6:4 Abdidalem ce' bingongnga; kantos bilaepon abdidalem edinggallagiya sapaneka? 
Psalms6:5 Ngereng abali, GUSTE, palopottagi abdidalem, pasalamettagi abdidalem lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms6:6 Sabab e alam maot Junandalem ta' ekaemodi oreng; tadha' se moji Junandalem e dunnyaepon oreng mate. 
Psalms6:7 Sengko' ce' lessona se aserrowan; seyang malem aeng mata agili tadha' ambuna sampe' tang ranjang bacca. 
Psalms6:8 Tang mata rabeng lantaran sossa terros, bureng polana tang so-moso." 
Psalms6:9 Reng-oreng se jahat, mara padha nyese, sabab Guste ALLAH la meyarsa tang tanges." 
Psalms6:10 PANGERAN meyarsa tang parnyo'onan, ban narema tang du'a." 
Psalms6:11 Tanto takerjat ban todhus kabbi tang moso, sarta pas nyorot lantaran malo." 
Psalms7:1 Tangessa Daud, se enyanyeyagi kaangguy amolja'agi PANGERAN lantaran Kus, oreng Benyamin." 
Psalms7:2 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, abdidalem ngaoba ka Junandalem; nyo'ona salamet, sareng palopottagi abdidalem, GUSTE, dhari para moso se nyerser abdidalem." 
Psalms7:3 Ja' kantos moso abdidalem daddi padha sareng macan, abdidalem eeret sareng ecarakem, ta' kalaban manggi partolongan." 
Psalms7:4 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, ompamaepon abdidalem gadhuwan sala, malako jahat ka ca-kanca, otaba marogi moso ta' kalaban badha sababba, manabi lerres sapaneka," 
Psalms7:5  
Psalms7:6 mandar abdidalem ekennenga pega' moso, epate'e pas edinggal neng e tana." 
Psalms7:7 Ngereng Junandalem ngadek e dhalem dukaepon, GUSTE, labannagi so-moso abdidalem. Ngereng ngadek, abdidalem tolonge, sabab Junandalem ngarep kaadilan." 
Psalms7:8 Pakompol sadajana bangsa e sabingkerrepon Junandalem, kobasae dhari kalenggiyannepon Junandalem e sowarga." 
Psalms7:9 Junandalem ahakime ommat manossa; parenge abdidalem kaadilan, Guste PANGERAN, sabab abdidalem ta' sala." 
Psalms7:10 Paambuwagi kajahadannepon oreng se daraka, sareng pakokowagi ateepon oreng se sae, sabab Junandalem Allah se adil, se ngagali ka essena ateepon manossa." 
Psalms7:11 Tang tameng reya Allah se masalamet oreng se morne atena. 
Psalms7:12 Allah reya hakim se adil ongguwan, se ros-terrosan ngokom oreng se jahat." 
Psalms7:13 Mon tengkana padha ta' eoba, Allah kare ngocol sanjatana se madhateng maot. Allah bakal agangseya peddhang ban menthang gandhiba, ngaceddagi na-pana se kalowar apoy." 
Psalms7:14  
Psalms7:15 Abassagi oreng jahat se andhi' sajja juba'; amaksod jahat, nepo ban lecegan." 
Psalms7:16 Oreng jahat masang barajak kaangguy oreng laenna, aba'na dibi' se tajebbak sokona." 
Psalms7:17 Daddi aba'na eokom bi' kajahadanna dibi', eseksa bi' kakerrasanna dibi'." 
Psalms7:18 Sengko' asokkor ka PANGERAN, polana Pangeran reya adil, sengko' anyanye moji PANGERAN Se Mahatenggi." 
Psalms8:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot lagu Gitit. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms8:2 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, kakobasa'annepon Junandalem kasohor saantero bume! Kaagungannepon Junandalem atenggiyan sareng langnge'," 
Psalms8:3 enyanyeyagi na'-kana' sareng babaji'. Pamarenta'annepon Junandalem koko ta' ekenneng gundhek moso. Sadajana moso sareng Junandalem epata'bisa aguli. 
Psalms8:4 Manabi abdidalem adhanga nengale langnge' cepta'annepon Junandalem, bulan sareng bintang se epasang sareng Junandalem," 
Psalms8:5 abdidalem apekker tadha' ambuna, pasera sanyataepon manossa ka'dhinto, me' sareng Junandalem etolong terros, sareng Junandalem epeyara?" 
Psalms8:6 Namong sareng Junandalem sadajana manossa eangkat kantos para' padha'a sareng Allah, eparenge jamang kaagungan sareng kahormadan." 
Psalms8:7 Sareng Junandalem eparenge kobasa ngator alam saessena, sadaja cepta'annepon Junandalem epakobasae ka manossa:" 
Psalms8:8 dumba, sape sareng ebin sadajana, jugan ban-keban se badha e ra-ara;" 
Psalms8:9 mano' sareng juko', se raja sareng se kene', sadajana mahlok e dhalem tase' raja." 
Psalms8:10 GUSTE, Pangeran kaula, kaagungannepon Junandalem kasohor saantero bume!" 
Psalms9:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot lagu Mut-Laben. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms9:2 Kalaban gu-onggu ate abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem, GUSTE, sareng aberta'agi lalampa'annepon Junandalem se makasambu' ate." 
Psalms9:3 Abdidalem anga'-bunga'a lantaran Junandalem, sareng mojiya Junandalem, Allah Se Mahakobasa." 
Psalms9:4 E ajunannepon Junandalem, moso abdidalem abali, buru sadaja; labu tatandhung napa' ka ajal." 
Psalms9:5 Sabab Junandalem marenta menangka hakim se adil, parkara abdidalem sareng Junandalem ebillai." 
Psalms9:6 Junandalem ngokom sa-bangsa sareng mamate reng-oreng jahat; sadajana ta' ekaemodi pole salanjangnga. 
Psalms9:7 Moso abdidalem epaobus tadha' karena, tha-kotthana epaancor sadajana, salanjangnga tadha' se enga' ka nyamana." 
Psalms9:8 PANGERAN marenta kaangguy salanjangnga; abadhi kalenggiyanna kaangguy ahakime dunnya. 
Psalms9:9 Pangeran adil marenta sa-bangsa, jujur ahakime dunnya." 
Psalms9:10 PANGERAN reya pangaobanna oreng se tatendhes odhi'na, pangaobanna oreng e bakto sossa." 
Psalms9:11 Oreng se oneng ka Junandalem padha ngarep partolongannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, oreng se nyemba ka Junandalem sareng Junandalem ta' edinggallagi." 
Psalms9:12 Moja'agi PANGERAN se marenta e Siyon! Careta'agi lalampa'anna ka sa-bangsa! 
Psalms9:13 Sabab Pangeran emot ka oreng se sangsara odhi'na ban ta' kalep ka serrona reng-oreng jareya; reng-oreng se ngalakone kakerrasan eparenge okomanna. 
Psalms9:14 Oladi, Guste, abdidalem epanyangsara moso, kabellasi abdidalem, GUSTE, lopoddagi abdidalem dhari maot sareng pate," 
Psalms9:15 sopaja abdidalem amolja'agiya Junandalem e adha'epon pandhudhu' Yerusalim; abdidalem asoraga epaperaga, sabab abdidalem eparenge kasalameddan." 
Psalms9:16 Sa-bangsa se ta' oneng ka Junandalem, padha labu ka dhalem lobang se ekale dibi'; tajira' e dhalem jaring gabayanna dibi'." 
Psalms9:17 PANGERAN la anyata'agi Salerana lantaran kapotosanna se adil; oreng jahat tabalusok lantaran tengkana dibi'. 
Psalms9:18 Maot reya daddi aherra oreng se jahat, ban sa-bangsa se ta' marduli ka Allah." 
Psalms9:19 Ta' salanjangnga oreng mesken ekaloppae oreng; ta' saterrossa oreng se nyangsara ta' andhi' pangarebban e dhalem atena. 
Psalms9:20 Ngereng ngadek, GUSTE, hakime sa-bangsa ja' diggal manossa ngandellagi aba'." 
Psalms9:21 Diggal manossa me' padha tako' sareng apangrasa, ja' aba'epon namong manossa." 
Psalms10:1 Aponapa Junandalem me' jau, GUSTE, sareng ngetek ta' etangale, e bakto abdidalem e dhalem karekongan?" 
Psalms10:2 Oreng jahat ce' angkona nendhes oreng se mesken; mandar tajira'a sareng jaringngepon dibi'. 
Psalms10:3 Reng-oreng jahat asebbal parkara pangaterrona se juba', oreng se dhakka abasto sareng nolak PANGERAN." 
Psalms10:4 Oreng se dusa ta' parduli ka PANGERAN, Allah eanggep tadha' dhari angkona." 
Psalms10:5 Oreng jahat ahasel e dhalem sadajana ehteyarra, ta' oneng sareng ta' ngarte ka hokomma Pangeran sareng nganggep entheng sadajana mosona." 
Psalms10:6 Ca'na pekkerra, “Sengko' masthe ahasel salanjangnga, ron-temoron ta' kera nemmo calaka'.”" 
Psalms10:7 Bibirra ros-terrosan abasto, ngara sareng nepo, cacana possa' sareng kabaji'an sareng kajahadan." 
Psalms10:8 Oreng gapaneka ngetek e sa-disa mateyana oreng se ta' sala. Ngetek e budhina ombut akadi macan se nyendhemme oreng se ta' kengeng apa-ponapa. Oreng mesken eaddhang e kennengngan se seppe, laju esargep, terros ebakta sambi eeret." 
Psalms10:9  
Psalms10:10 Oreng gapaneka ngendha' nyargebba; oreng eparobbu kalaban kakerrasan. 
Psalms10:11 Ca'epon pekkerra, “Allah la loppa, ta' parduli ka sengko' reya, ta' ngoladi ka sengko' saterrossa!”" 
Psalms10:12 Ngereng ngadek, GUSTE, okommagi oreng se jahat! Kaemodi oreng se tatendhes odhi'na." 
Psalms10:13 Aponapa oreng jahat me' ya-nyeya Allah saterrossa, sareng apekker ja' Allah ta' kera ngokom aba'na?" 
Psalms10:14 Namong Junandalem ngoladi sadajana; Junandalem mekkere kasossa'an sareng kasangsara'an, ros-terrosan asadhiya se aparenga partolongan. Oreng se ta' kengeng apa-ponapa massra'agi aba'epon ka Junandalem, oreng mesken sareng Junandalem ebanto ros-terrosan." 
Psalms10:15 Potellagi kakobasa'annepon reng-oreng jahat ban se daraka; okommagi lantaran tengka polana, kantos jerra ka budhina." 
Psalms10:16 PANGERAN marenta kaangguy salanjangnga; sa-bangsa se ta' kennal ka Salerana, bakal elanga dhari tanana." 
Psalms10:17 Guste PANGERAN, Junandalem meyarsa'agi du'ana oreng se eya-seya sareng makowat atena." 
Psalms10:18 Kana' jatim sareng se tatendhes odhi'na sareng Junandalem ebillai parkarana, sopaja tadha' oreng se ko'-nako'e atena." 
Psalms11:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. Sengko' ngaop ka PANGERAN; tadha' gunana ngoca' ka sengko', “Ba'na nyare salamet akantha mano' se ngabber ka gunong." 
Psalms11:2 Sabab oreng jahat menthang gandhibana ban masang panana, eacettagiya ka oreng se jujur atena, dhari pangeteggan e pettengnga." 
Psalms11:3 Mon tata tartebba masarakat ta' etemmo karowanna, oreng becce' ta' bisa apa-rapa.”" 
Psalms11:4 PANGERAN badha e Padalemmanna se socce, korse karaja'anna badha e sowarga. PANGERAN ngoladi manossa ban ngagali sabarang tengkana." 
Psalms11:5 PANGERAN ngoji oreng se becce' ban oreng se jahat, sarta baji' ka oreng se dujan ngalakone kakerrasan." 
Psalms11:6 Oreng jahat eokom eparenge balai, epadhatengnge apoy, balirang ban angen se ngello' sabarang se badha." 
Psalms11:7 Sabab PANGERAN reya adil ban sae, taresna ka oreng se alako becce'; oreng jujur bakal nangaleyana ban kennala ka PANGERAN." 
Psalms12:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan se kapeng ballu'. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms12:2 Nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, GUSTE, sabab ampon tadha' pole oreng se sae, se esto ka Junandalem ampon tadha' sakale." 
Psalms12:3 Sadaja padha saleng acaca lecek, saleng nepo sareng ca'-oca' se manes." 
Psalms12:4 Paambuwagi oreng se ca-nyacae, Guste PANGERAN, dunggemmagi oreng se raja cacana," 
Psalms12:5 se ngoca', “Tang jila reya kobasa! Ngoca'a apa bai bisa, tadha' oreng se bisa'a ngalang!”" 
Psalms12:6 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Oreng mesken etendhes odhi'na, oreng se nyangsara aserrowan. Daddi sateya keya Sengko' dhatengnga, aberri'a kataremtemman se ete'-nante' ba'na.”" 
Psalms12:7 Janjina PANGERAN reya koko, ekenneng andellagi, akantha salaka se morne se eoji e dhalem apoy." 
Psalms12:8 Oreng jahat jar-ganjir e man-dhimman, saneyap oreng ngalem kajahadanna. Namong Junandalem, GUSTE, apareng pangaoban ka abdidalem sadajana, jaga'agi abdidalem sadaja sopaja ta' kantos gaggar ka tanangnga oreng jahat." 
Psalms12:9  
Psalms13:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms13:2 Kantos bilaepon Junandalem ta' emoda ka abdidalem, GUSTE? Kantos bilaepon Junandalem ta' kasokana ngaton ka abdidalem?" 
Psalms13:3 Kantos bilaepon abdidalem kodu nanggung sossa, ate sompek seyang sareng malem? Kantos bilaepon abdidalem ekobasa'ana moso terros?" 
Psalms13:4 Oladi abdidalem, GUSTE Allah, Pangeran kaula, kasokana ajawab du'a abdidalem. Kakowadan abdidalem kasokana pabali one, sopaja abdidalem ta' kantosa mate." 
Psalms13:5 Ja' kantos moso abdidalem ngoca' abdidalem ampon epakala. Ja' kantos abdidalem erak-sorak sareng reng-oreng gapaneka. 
Psalms13:6 Sabab abdidalem ngandellagi kataresna'annepon Junandalem, daddi abdidalem talebat peragga lantaran Junandalem marenge abdidalem kasalameddan. Sengko' anyanyeya amolja'agiya PANGERAN, sabab Pangeran marenge sengko' kabecce'an." 
Psalms14:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. Oreng budhu ngoca' e dhalem atena, “Allah reya tadha'.” Reng-oreng jareya juba' tengkana, tadha' se alako becce', padha jahadda." 
Psalms14:2 Dhari sowarga PANGERAN ngoladi manossa, nyare'e oreng bicaksana se abakte ka Salerana." 
Psalms14:3 Tape oreng la padha rosak ban bejjat, tadha' settonga se becce' lalakonna." 
Psalms14:4 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Ba' ta' apangrasa'a reng-oreng jahat jareya? Lakona arampas dhi'-andhi'na Tang ommat, ban ta' endha' abakte ka Sengko', Pangeranna.”" 
Psalms14:5 Oreng jahat bakal tako'a parana, sabab Allah ngaobi oreng se ta'at ka Salerana." 
Psalms14:6 Oreng jahat lang-ngalangana oreng mesken, tape PANGERAN se daddi pangaobanna." 
Psalms14:7 Moga-moga dhari Siyon dhatengnga kasalameddan kaangguy Isra'il! Sopaja toronanna Yakub senneng atena, mon PANGERAN mabali kabadha'anna ommadda epakantha asalla." 
Psalms15:1 Jaburra Daud. Adhu, GUSTE, pasera se kengeng ngampong e Kemahepon Junandalem sareng se kengeng ngennengnge gumo'epon Junandalem se socce?" 
Psalms15:2 Oreng se ros-terrosan ajalannagi dhabuna Allah, socce ban tadha' calena, sarta jujur cacana;" 
Psalms15:3 se ta' metenna sasamana, ta' alako jahat ka kancana, ban ta' aba'-juba'agi tatanggana;" 
Psalms15:4 se nganggep maba oreng se etolak Allah, tape hormat ka oreng se ta'at ka PANGERAN, se neptebbi janji maske kodu nyandhang rogi," 
Psalms15:5 ta' menta budhu' mon maenjam pesse, se ta' endha' narema go'-sogo' kaangguy marogi oreng se ta' sala. Oreng se kantha jareya salanjangnga bakal taremtemma odhi'na." 
Psalms16:1 Jaburra Daud. Jaga'agi abdidalem, Guste Allah, sabab Junandalem pangaoban abdidalem." 
Psalms16:2 Abdidalem mator, “Junandalem PANGERAN abdidalem, se masenneng odhi' abdidalem, tadha' se ngalangkonge Junandalem!”" 
Psalms16:3 Abdidalem ngargai reng-oreng socce e nagara ka'dhinto; abdidalem lebur akompol sareng reng-oreng gapaneka. 
Psalms16:4 Oreng se nyemba ba-diba kasossa'anna sajan aba-tamba. Abdidalem ta' poron abakta kurban ka ba-diba gapaneka, la'-mala' ta' poron nyebbut nyamana balakka'." 
Psalms16:5 GUSTE, abdidalem ta' gadhuwan pa-ponapa kajabana Junandalem malolo, tadha' laenna; Junandalem marenge sadaja se ekabuto abdidalem, odhi' abdidalem targantong ka Junandalem." 
Psalms16:6 Paparengngepon Junandalem ka abdidalem talebat saena, abdidalem se narema ce' sennengnga!" 
Psalms16:7 Sengko' moji PANGERAN se apareng petodu ka sengko', e baja malem sowarana tang ate maenga' sengko'." 
Psalms16:8 Sengko' ros-terrosan enga' ka PANGERAN; Salerana badha e tang seddi'an, daddi sengko' ta' agundheggan." 
Psalms16:9 Daddi ate abdidalem perak, sokma abdidalem asorak, badan abdidalem aistirahat ce' taremtemma." 
Psalms16:10 Sabab sareng Junandalem abdidalem epalopot dhari kakobasa'annepon maot; Oreng se sareng Junandalem ekataresnae epalopot dhari pate. 
Psalms16:11 Junandalem noduwagi ka abdidalem jalan se nojju ka kaodhi'an; e ajunannepon Junandalem ate abdidalem ce' sennengnga sareng arassa perak salanjangnga. 
Psalms17:1 Du'ana Daud. Peyarsa'agi abdidalem se aserro nyo'on kaadilan, GUSTE; gateyagi du'a ka'dhinto se kalowar dhari ate se berse." 
Psalms17:2 Tolong abdidalem e dhalem parkara ka'dhinto sabab Junandalem ngagali ponapa se lerres. 
Psalms17:3 Manabi Junandalem ngoji ate abdidalem sareng nalektegi abdidalem e baja malem, tanto Junandalem ngagali abdidalem ta' gadhuwan pekkeran juba'; se ekoca'agi abdidalem padha sareng essena ate." 
Psalms17:4 Abdidalem ta' ajalannagi kakerrasan, sadaja papakonna Junandalem elakone jalan kakerrasan sareng abdidalem ejauwi." 
Psalms17:5 Abdidalem odhi' ros-terrosan menorot petoduepon Junandalem, ta' nyempang sanare sakone'." 
Psalms17:6 Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, Guste Allah, sabab Junandalem ajawab du'a abdidalem; daddi ngereng oladi sareng peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem." 
Psalms17:7 Duduwagi kataresna'annepon Junandalem se makasambu' ate, sabab Junandalem masalamet oreng se nyare pangaoban ka Junandalem, sadajana padha aman dhari serrangannepon moso manabi badha e seddi'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms17:8 Peyara'agi abdidalem pakadi socana Junandalem, GUSTE, kepkebbagi abdidalem e baba'anna kalembangngepon Junandalem," 
Psalms17:9 sopaja lopoda dhari serrangannepon reng-oreng se jahat. Abdidalem ekeppong moso se mateyana abdidalem ka'dhinto; 
Psalms17:10 reng-oreng gapaneka ta' gadhuwan kabellasan, pacacana talebat angga'." 
Psalms17:11 Sadajana nyander agaribbung nyerranga abdidalem, nyare kasempadan abantengngagiya abdidalem." 
Psalms17:12 Moso abdidalem gapaneka akadi macan se nyangkaremma mangsana, akadi macan se gi' ngodha se ngaddhang e pangetegganna." 
Psalms17:13 Ngereng ngadek, GUSTE, labannagi sareng pakala'agi so-moso abdidalem gapaneka. Pasalamettagi abdidalem sareng peddhangngepon Junandalem, dhari serrangannepon oreng jahat." 
Psalms17:14 Pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari kakobasa'annepon reng-oreng se nompo' arta e dunnya. Okom reng-oreng gapaneka sareng balai se ampon esadhiya'agi Junandalem kaagem reng-oreng gapaneka. Parenge jugan okoman ka na' potona. 
Psalms17:15 Namong abdidalem mandengnga Junandalem sabab abdidalem ta' gadhuwan sala. Manabi abdidalem jaga tedhung, kahadirannepon Junandalem masenneng ate abdidalem." 
Psalms18:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud, abdina PANGERAN. Enyanyeyagi ka PANGERAN e bakto Daud epalopot dhari Saul ban dhari so-mosona." 
Psalms18:2 Abdidalem taresna ka Junandalem, GUSTE, Junandalem kakowadanna abdidalem." 
Psalms18:3 PANGERAN padha ban binteng se koko kennengnganna sengko' ngaop. Tang Allah akantha gunong bato kennengnganna sengko' anaong. akantha tameng se notobi tang aba', se ajaga sengko' sopaja aman salanjangnga." 
Psalms18:4 Ka PANGERAN sengko' aserro, sengko' epasalamet dhari tang moso. Sokkor ka PANGERAN." 
Psalms18:5 Sengko' ekalenglenge babaja maot, ancor tasellem e dhalem banjir." 
Psalms18:6 Sengko' ekalenglenge babaja maot, jebbak maot ngaddhang e adha'na soko." 
Psalms18:7 E dhalem karekongan sengko' aserro ka PANGERAN, sengko' aera' ka Allah nyo'on partolongan. Dhari kalenggiyanna Allah meyarsa tang sowara, Allah agateyagi tang parnyo'onan." 
Psalms18:8 Bume laju agundhek ban agaledder, sar-dhasarra gunong aguli ban ngetter, polana Allah duka." 
Psalms18:9 Kokos ngebbul dhari lobangnga pangambungnga, apoy ban mardha kalowar dhari lesanna." 
Psalms18:10 Langnge' eseba', samarena Salerana pas toron ka baba, toron ban ondhem se celleng e baba'anna padana." 
Psalms18:11 Pangeran ngabber, kerub menangka teteyanna; ngabang e attassa kalembangnga angen." 
Psalms18:12 Salerana abuko' papetteng; ekalenglenge ondhem se tebbel. 
Psalms18:13 Dhari kelap e ajunanna, kalowar ondhem, ojan es ban apoy." 
Psalms18:14 PANGERAN laju jendharan akantha galudhuk e bang-abang; Se Mahatenggi asowara talebat kaja. 
Psalms18:15 Na-panana eocol saleng pajeddhat, so-moso padha epabalessudan; kelap patang kareddhap, ta' endha' ambu kabbi moso padha buru." 
Psalms18:16 Dhasarra tase' tasengkap, langganna bume maroka e bakto PANGERAN abentak mosona sambi duka." 
Psalms18:17 Dhari attas PANGERAN ajuluwagi astana; sengko' ecandhak laju eangka' dhari banjir se dhalem, epakalowar." 
Psalms18:18 Sengko' epasalamet dhari moso se parjuga, ban dhari reng-oreng se baji' ka sengko' reya, sabab reng-oreng jareya monggu ka sengko' talebat kowat." 
Psalms18:19 Sengko' eserrang e dhalem balai tape PANGERAN apareng partolongan. 
Psalms18:20 Sengko' epalopot dhari babaja, epasalamet polana sengko' ekasokane Salerana." 
Psalms18:21 PANGERAN malesse tang lalakon se teppa'; sengko' eberkadi sabab sengko' ta' sala. 
Psalms18:22 Sengko' ngestowagi papakonna PANGERAN, ban ta' mongkore tang Allah." 
Psalms18:23 Sakabbinna hokomna bi' sengko' egateyagi, kon-papakonna ejalannagi." 
Psalms18:24 Salerana ngagali sengko' tadha' calena, ban ajauwi sabarang se sala." 
Psalms18:25 Daddi PANGERAN aganjar tang lalakon se teppa' sabab Salerana ngagali sengko' ta' andhi' sala. 
Psalms18:26 GUSTE, Junandalem esto ka oreng se esto sareng sae ka oreng se sae." 
Psalms18:27 Junandalem socce ka oreng se socce, namong amoso ka oreng se jahat." 
Psalms18:28 Oreng se andhap asor sareng Junandalem epasalamat, oreng se angga' epanyonglet." 
Psalms18:29 Damar abdidalem sareng Junandalem eodhi'i; Guste ALLAH, Junandalem se matera' papetteng se notobi abdidalem." 
Psalms18:30 Junandalem se makowat abdidalem, sareng se abanto, sopaja bisa'a makala moso, sareng magujura partahananna." 
Psalms18:31 Se elampa'agi Allah reya samporna, janjina ekenneng parcaja salanjangnga. PANGERAN reya marabut tameng monggu ka oreng se nyare pangaoban ka Salerana." 
Psalms18:32 Sabab tadha' Allah salaenna PANGERAN; tadha' se nolong sengko' ban ba'na kajabana Allah. 
Psalms18:33 Allah jareya se makowat sengko' ban se maaman tang jalan. 
Psalms18:34 Salerana makowat tang soko epakantha sokona manjangan, ban ajaga tang kasalameddan e pagunongan." 
Psalms18:35 Sengko' eajari aperrang, sampe' tao menthang gandhiba se paleng kowat." 
Psalms18:36 GUSTE, Junandalem ajaga sareng masalamet abdidalem; abdidalem etongka sareng kobasaepon Junandalem, abdidalem daddi oreng raja lantaran se elampa'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms18:37 Junandalem ajaga sopaja abdidalem ta' kantosa ekenneng tawan, kantos abdidalem ta' oneng labu." 
Psalms18:38 Abdidalem nyerser moso sampe' epakala, ta' poron nyorot kantos moso mate sadajana." 
Psalms18:39 Sareng abdidalem moso ebanteng kantos ta' bisa jaga pole, sadaja robbu ta' aguli e adha'na soko abdidalem." 
Psalms18:40 Junandalem marenge abdidalem kakowadan kaangguy aperrang, sareng kamennangan ka so-moso sadajana." 
Psalms18:41 Sareng Junandalem so-moso abdidalem epaburu; se baji' ka abdidalem padha epaobus. 
Psalms18:42 Reng-oreng gapaneka reng-cerrengan, namong tadha' se apareng partolongan, sadajana aserro ka PANGERAN, tape Salerana ta' apareng jawaban." 
Psalms18:43 Sareng abdidalem moso eparemmok, kantos akadi abu se atabuyan, epagemmet akadi oreng nyapowe cellot e lorong." 
Psalms18:44 Junandalem malopot abdidalem dhari oreng daraka, abdidalem epangobasane sa-bangsa; sa-bangsa se ta' ekennal abdidalem epadaddi dunor abdidalem." 
Psalms18:45 Reng-oreng manca atellok ka abdidalem atoro' manabi mereng parenta abdidalem. 
Psalms18:46 Kabangalannepon ampon elang, sadaja padha ngetter kalowar dhari bintengnga." 
Psalms18:47 PANGERAN odhi'! Molja'agi se abilla sengko'! Molja'agi kaagunganna Allah se masalamet sengko'! 
Psalms18:48 Sengko' epamennang ka tang moso; tang moso epasojud e tang soko," 
Psalms18:49 Sengko' epasalamet dhari tang moso. GUSTE, Junandalem marenge abdidalem kamennangan ka moso, abdidalem epasalamet dhari reng-oreng se kejjem." 
Psalms18:50 Daddi abdidalem ngagungngagi Junandalem e antaraepon sa-bangsa, abdidalem amolja'agiya Junandalem sareng nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan pojiyan." 
Psalms18:51 Allah marenge kamennangan se raja ka rato peleyanna, teptep taresna ka oreng kakasena, iya areya Daud ban toronanna, terros salanjangnga." 
Psalms19:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms19:2 Langnge' anyata'agi kaagunganna Allah, ban aberta'agi sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms19:3 Are se settong manapa' ka are kalagguwanna; malem se settong nyareta'agi ka malem laenna. 
Psalms19:4 Tadha' se acaca otaba ca'-ngoca', tadha' monye tadha' sowara." 
Psalms19:5 Tape ro-sarowanna ekaedhing daddi sadunnya, pessenna napa' ka co'-konco'na bume sabalattrana. Pangeran abadhi bengko e langnge' menangka kennengnganna are," 
Psalms19:6 se moncar e baja laggu akantha pangantan lake' se kalowar dhari kamarra, akantha pahlawan se perak amolae parjalananna." 
Psalms19:7 Are jareya ajalan e langnge' dhari konco' se settong ka konco' settongnga; tadha' se lopot dhari panassa. 
Psalms19:8 Hokomma PANGERAN reya samporna, masegger ate ban sokma. Papakonna PANGERAN reya ekenneng parcaja, madhateng hekmat ka oreng se majja." 
Psalms19:9 Atoranna PANGERAN reya teppa', masenneng atena oreng se ta'at. Kateptebbanna PANGERAN reya morne, andaddiyagi oreng padha ngarte." 
Psalms19:10 Abakte ka PANGERAN reya bagus, ajalan terros salanjangnga. Hokomma PANGERAN reya teppa', ban adil sakabbinna." 
Psalms19:11 Hokomma PANGERAN lebbi aji dhari emmas morne, lebbi manes dhari maddu asli." 
Psalms19:12 Abdidalem epaemot sareng kom-hokom ka'dhinto; ganjaran raja esadhiya'agi ka oreng se atoro'. 
Psalms19:13 Tadha' se apangrasa ka kasala'anna; GUSTE, palopottagi abdidalem dhari kasala'an se ta' katengal." 
Psalms19:14 Pajauwagi abdidalem dhari dusa se etengnget, ja' kantos dusa gapaneka ngobasane abdidalem. Daddi abdidalem pas tadha' calena, lopot dhari kasala'an se berra'." 
Psalms19:15 Moga ca'-oca' sareng pekkeran abdidalem katarema'a ka Junandalem, GUSTE, Junandalem se ajaga sareng nebbus abdidalem." 
Psalms20:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms20:2 Moga PANGERAN nyaodana ba'na e dhalem karekongan, moga kobasana Allahna Yakub marengana pangaoban ka ba'na!" 
Psalms20:3 Moga ba'na eparengngana partolongan dhari kalenggiyanna ban eparengngana bantowan dhari Gumo' Siyon. 
Psalms20:4 Moga Salerana emoda ka sakabbinna tor-atorra ba'na, sarta kasokana narema kurban obbaranna ba'na." 
Psalms20:5 Moga ekabbulana apa pangaterrona ba'na, ban eparengngana ahasel se daddi sajjana." 
Psalms20:6 Daddi sengko' kabbi padha asorak, polana kamennanganna ba'na, ban ngonjuk bul-ombul mojiya Allah. Moga PANGERAN ngabbulana sakabbinna parnyo'onanna ba'na." 
Psalms20:7 Sateya sengko' tao ja' PANGERAN apareng kamennangan ka rato peleyanna. PANGERAN nyaodi rato jareya dhari sowargana se socce; dhari kobasana PANGERAN rato jareya olle kamennangan se raja. 
Psalms20:8 Badha oreng se ngandellagi kareta perrangnga, badha pole se ngandellagi jaranna. Tape sengko' ban ba'na ngandellagi kobasana PANGERAN, Allah se esemba sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms20:9 Reng-oreng se kantha jareya bakal tatandhunga terros labu, tape sengko' ban ba'na bakal jaga'a sarta manjeng koko." 
Psalms20:10 GUSTE, parenge kamennangan ka rato, parenge jawaban manabi abdidalem sadaja aserro." 
Psalms21:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms21:2 Guste PANGERAN, rato perak lantaran sareng Junandalem epakowat; panggaliyannepon gumbira lantaran sareng Junandalem eparenge kamennangan!" 
Psalms21:3 Junandalem ngabbuli pangaterrona, marenge se daddi parnyo'onanna." 
Psalms21:4 Junandalem rabu manggi'i salerana abakta berkat ta' sakera-kera, sareng masang jamang emmas e serana." 
Psalms21:5 Salerana nyo'on odhi', sareng Junandalem eparenge, eparenge lanjang omor salanjangnga." 
Psalms21:6 Lantaran partolongannepon Junandalem salerana ehormat oreng; sareng Junandalem epakasohor, epamolja." 
Psalms21:7 Sareng Junandalem eberkadi saterrossa; kahadirannepon Junandalem magumbira panggaliyanna. 
Psalms21:8 Rato ngarep partolonganna PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, salerana ros-terrosan aman lantaran ekataresnae PANGERAN." 
Psalms21:9 Pangeran bakal nawana so-mosona, ban nangkep reng-oreng se baji' ka salerana." 
Psalms21:10 Pangeran rabu akantha apoy se rabbang mateyana so-moso jareya. Reng-oreng jareya bakal epamosna'a bi' dadukanna PANGERAN, sarta bi' apoy se makatononan." 
Psalms21:11 Dhari toronanna bakal tadha'a karena, bi' rato bakal epatompessa sakabbinna." 
Psalms21:12 Mon reng-oreng jareya andhi' sajja nangtanga ratona, tepona ta' kera badha hasella." 
Psalms21:13 Pangeran bakal ngaceddagiya panana sampe' reng-oreng jareya abali terros buru. 
Psalms21:14 Abdidalem sadaja moji Junandalem, GUSTE, sabab kobasana Junandalem ce' rajana, abdidalem sadaja padha anyanye, amolja'agi kakobasa'an sareng kakowadanna Junandalem." 
Psalms22:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Manjangan se eserser pajjar. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms22:2 Guste Allah, Guste Allah, aponapa abdidalem me' edinggallagi? Abdidalem aserro, namong Junandalem paggun jau, Junandalem ta' kasokan nolong." 
Psalms22:3 Abdidalem aserro e bakto seyang, namong Junandalem ta' kasokan adhabu pa-ponapa. Abdidalem adu'a e baja malem, namong ate paggun ngalengsang." 
Psalms22:4 Namong Junandalem Rato Se Mahasocce, se eji-poji oreng Isra'il." 
Psalms22:5 Bangatowa abdidalem ngarep partolongannepon Junandalem, sareng Junandalem laju epasalamet." 
Psalms22:6 Bangatowa abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, sareng Junandalem epalopot; parcaja ka Junandalem, sareng Junandalem ta' epakoceba." 
Psalms22:7 Namong abdidalem ka'dhinto caceng, banne manossa, eca'-koca'e, eya-seya oreng sabannya'na." 
Psalms22:8 Sadaja se nengale abdidalem padha bi-nyebbi, pek-kepeggan sambi nyambibi'." 
Psalms22:9 Reng-oreng gapaneka ngoca', “Dina me' olle ngandellagi PANGERAN, me' olle epasalamet bi' PANGERAN, mon PANGERAN kasokan ka aba'na!”" 
Psalms22:10 Junandalem se makalowar abdidalem dhari tabu'epon ebu, se maaman abdidalem e reba'annepon ebu." 
Psalms22:11 Ngabidi lahir ka dunnya abdidalem targantong ka Junandalem, ngabidi egandhu' sareng ebu, Junandalem Allah abdidalem." 
Psalms22:12 Ja' majau dhari abdidalem, Guste, sabab babaja ampon semma', sareng tadha' oreng se nolong." 
Psalms22:13 Abdidalem ekeppong moso, se akadi banteng saambalan, akadi banteng alas dhari Basan." 
Psalms22:14 Colo'epon padha anganga, akadi macan se agaung sareng nyeppa'a." 
Psalms22:15 Kakowadan abdidalem ampon tadha' akadi aeng se nompa ka tana; lang-tolang locot dhari cacopona, ate lejjar akadi lilin se ngalelle." 
Psalms22:16 Gerrungan abdidalem kerreng akadi belling, jila nalket ka lak-ellagan. Sareng Junandalem abdidalem edinggallagi e attassa abu, akadi oreng se ampon mate." 
Psalms22:17 Abdidalem ekeppong reng-oreng jahat; se ngaromo' akadi pate' sabannya'na, nyangkarem nyebbit soko sareng tanang." 
Psalms22:18 Tolang abdidalem ekenneng bitong, eabas eanggep gun-tenggun sareng moso." 
Psalms22:19 Kalambi abdidalem egi-bagi, juba abdidalem elottre." 
Psalms22:20 Namong Junandalem, GUSTE, ngereng ja' majau, ngereng duliyan tolong abdidalem, sabab Junandalem kakowadan abdidalem." 
Psalms22:21 Palopottagi nyaba abdidalem dhari peddhang, pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari cakarrepon pate'." 
Psalms22:22 Abdidalem ta' kengeng apa-ponapa, pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari tandhu'epon banteng sareng dhari colo'epon macan." 
Psalms22:23 Sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem, sareng abdidalem ecareta'agiya ka tan-taretan abdidalem; e dhalem papanggiyan sareng ommattepon Junandalem, abdidalem ji-mojiya asmaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms22:24 Tan-taretan se padha abakte ka ALLAH, mara poji Pangeran! Para toronanna Yakub, mara agungngagi Salerana! Para toronanna Isra'il, mara asojud ka Salerana!" 
Psalms22:25 Sabab Pangeran ta' ya-nyeya oreng se tatendhes odhi'na, ban ta' ngenthengngagi kasangsara'anna. Salerana ta' mongkore oreng jareya, tape meyarsa'agi serrona mon oreng jareya nyo'on tolong ka Salerana." 
Psalms22:26 E adha'epon kompolanna ommat abdidalem moji Junandalem, lantaran sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem. E adha'epon ommat se abakte ka Junandalem, abdidalem ngatorragi kurban se ampon ejanjiyagi sareng abdidalem." 
Psalms22:27 Oreng mesken bakal ngakana sampe' kennyang; se ngadhep ka PANGERAN bakal mojiya Salerana. Moga ba'na padha'a nyaman odhi'na salanjangnga! 
Psalms22:28 Sa-bangsa bakal padha'a enga' ka PANGERAN ban abali ka Salerana, ku-suku bangsa bakal asojuda kabbi nyemba ka Salerana." 
Psalms22:29 Sabab PANGERAN reya se kobasa, se marenta sa-bangsa." 
Psalms22:30 Oreng raja bakal asojuda kabbi e ajunanna, manossa se ta' langgeng bakal asojuda kabbi nyemba ka Salerana." 
Psalms22:31 Angkadan-angkadan se bakal dhateng bakal abakteya ka PANGERAN, Salerana bakal eberta'agiya ron-temoron." 
Psalms22:32 Ka bangsa se lahir jang budhiyan bakal ekabarragiya ja' PANGERAN la masalamet ommadda. 
Psalms23:1 Jaburra Daud. PANGERAN reya se ngowan sengko', sengko' ta' kera kakorangan." 
Psalms23:2 Bi' Pangeran sengko' epatedhung e talon se rebbana biru. Sengko' etonton bi' Pangeran ka aeng se ceddu. 
Psalms23:3 Sengko' eparenge kakowadan se anyar, ban etonton ka jalan se teppa', menorot janjina." 
Psalms23:4 Sanare abdidalem lebat e cora se petteng, GUSTE, abdidalem ta' tako' sakale ngadhebbi babaja, sabab Junandalem asarengnge abdidalem. Sabab Junandalem ajaga abdidalem akadi oreng ngowan se ajaga dumbana sareng tongket ban gadana." 
Psalms23:5 Junandalem nyadhiya'agi pesta kaangguy abdidalem e adha'annepon moso abdidalem. Sareng Junandalem abdidalem etarema epakadi tamoy raja se molja. Sareng Junandalem abdidalem eparenge nom-enoman se sae talebat bannya'na. 
Psalms23:6 Abdidalem oneng Junandalem sae ka abdidalem, sareng taresna ka abdidalem salanjangnga; abdidalem eedine saomorra ngennengnge kalenggiyannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms24:1 Jaburra Daud. Kaagunganna PANGERAN bume ban saessena, dunnya ban mahlok se enneng e dhalemmanna." 
Psalms24:2 Pangeran se masang dhasarra e attassa tase' raja, epamanjeng e attassa aeng se dhalem." 
Psalms24:3 Sapa se olle ongga ka Gumo'na PANGERAN, se olle maso' ka Dalemma?" 
Psalms24:4 Oreng se tadha' calena pekkeran ban tengka gulina, se ta' asompa palsu ban ta' nyemba brahala." 
Psalms24:5 Oreng jareya se bakal eberkadana ban epasalamedda bi' PANGERAN, ban enyata'agiya ta' sala bi' Allah." 
Psalms24:6 Kantha jareya oreng ngadhep ka Allah, se entar nyemba ka Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms24:7 Bukka' palebar labang saketheng kona, Rato se molja bakal maso'a." 
Psalms24:8 Sapa Rato se molja jareya? Salerana PANGERAN se parjuga, PANGERAN se possa' ban kobasa, se mennang e dhalem paperrangan." 
Psalms24:9 Bukka' palebar labang saketheng kona, Rato se molja bakal maso'a." 
Psalms24:10 Sapa Rato se molja jareya? PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, jareya Rato se molja!" 
Psalms25:1 Jaburra Daud. Ka Junandalem, GUSTE, abdidalem ngatorragi du'a," 
Psalms25:2 Ya Allah, abdidalem parcaja ka Junandalem! Ja' kantos abdidalem epamalo, sareng esorak moso." 
Psalms25:3 Oreng se akiyanat ka Junandalem tanto epabirang, namong se parcaja ka Junandalem ta' kera epakoceba." 
Psalms25:4 Duduwagi ka abdidalem, GUSTE, ponapa se daddi kasokannepon Junandalem, parenge oneng ponapa se kodu elakone abdidalem." 
Psalms25:5 Ngereng ajari sareng tonton abdidalem, sopaja odhi' menorot kasokannepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem Allah se masalamet abdidalem, abdidalem salanjangnga ngarep ka Junandalem." 
Psalms25:6 Kaemodi kabecce'an sareng kataresna'annepon Junandalem, GUSTE, se eduduwagi Junandalem ngabidi gi' dhimen." 
Psalms25:7 Parenge sapora dusa sareng kasala'an abdidalem gi' ngodhana, kaemodi abdidalem menorot kataresna'an sareng kasaeyannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms25:8 Sabab PANGERAN reya sae ban adil, noduwagi jalan ka oreng se posang." 
Psalms25:9 PANGERAN nonton oreng se andhap asor, ngajarragi apa se daddi kasokanna ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms25:10 Oreng se ta'at ka parjanjiyan ban hokomma ekataresnae ban ekaestowe. 
Psalms25:11 GUSTE, parenge sapora abdidalem, menorot janjiepon Junandalem, sabab ce' rajana kasala'an abdidalem." 
Psalms25:12 PANGERAN ngajarragi ka oreng se ta'at jalan se kodu elebadi. 
Psalms25:13 Reng-oreng jareya bakal teptebba ma'mor odhi'na, na' potona bakal abarisana tana sangkolan." 
Psalms25:14 PANGERAN reya sahabadda oreng se ta'at, Salerana anyata'agi kasokanna ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms25:15 Tang mata teptep mandeng ka PANGERAN, sabab Salerana se masalamet sengko' dhari babaja." 
Psalms25:16 Oladi abdidalem, kabellasi abdidalem, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem kadibi'an sareng ta' gadhuwan kakowadan." 
Psalms25:17 Kasossa'an abdidalem sajan atamba, bebassagi abdidalem dhari karekongan." 
Psalms25:18 Oladi kasangsara'an sareng kamalaradan abdidalem, parenge sapora sadajana dusa abdidalem." 
Psalms25:19 Oladi saponapa bannya'epon moso abdidalem; sadaja padha baji' ka abdidalem. 
Psalms25:20 Jaga'agi sareng pasalamettagi abdidalem, sopaja abdidalem ta' nanggung malo, sabab abdidalem ngaop ka Junandalem." 
Psalms25:21 Moga kabecce'an sareng kajujuran ngerenge abdidalem, sabab Junandalem se earep abdidalem." 
Psalms25:22 Ya Allah, bebassagi ommattepon Junandalem dhari sadajana karekongannepon." 
Psalms26:1 Jaburra Daud. Parenge abdidalem kaadilan, GUSTE, sabab ate abdidalem berse. Junandalem se earep abdidalem, ate abdidalem ta' mangmang sakale." 
Psalms26:2 Ngereng talektegi sareng oji abdidalem, GUSTE, pareksa pangaterro sareng pekkeran abdidalem." 
Psalms26:3 Abdidalem emot terros ka kataresna'annepon Junandalem, sareng teptep esto ka Junandalem." 
Psalms26:4 Abdidalem ta' poron akompol sareng tokang tepo, otabana akanca sareng oreng se monafik." 
Psalms26:5 Abdidalem baji' ka kompolannepon oreng se jahat, abdidalem ajauwi oreng se tengkana juba'." 
Psalms26:6 Abdidalem maccowe tanang partandha ta' sala, pas ajalan ngalenglenge mezbaepon Junandalem, GUSTE," 
Psalms26:7 sambi anyanye lagu sokkor, sareng aberta'agi sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem se makasambu' ate." 
Psalms26:8 Abdidalem taresna ka dalemmepon Junandalem, GUSTE, se ekalenggi'i Junandalem kalaban agung." 
Psalms26:9 Abdidalem ja' pate'e asareng oreng se dusa, nyaba abdidalem ja' cabut epasareng tokang jagalla manossa." 
Psalms26:10 Reng-oreng gapaneka alako jahat ros-terrosan, ros-terrosan asadhiya narema pesse go'-sogo'." 
Psalms26:11 Namong abdidalem jujur sareng berse e dhalem ate, kaneserre abdidalem, sareng bebassagi, Guste." 
Psalms26:12 Daddi sengko' aman dhari babaja, sengko' mojiya PANGERAN e dhalem kompolanna ommadda." 
Psalms27:1 Jaburra Daud. PANGERAN reya tang sonar ban tang kasalameddan, apa se ekatako'e sengko'! PANGERAN reya binteng se ngaobi sengko', sengko' ta' kera tako' pa-apa." 
Psalms27:2 Mon badha oreng jahat se mateyana sengko', oreng jareya dibi' se tatandhung, laju labu." 
Psalms27:3 Maske sengko' ekeppong pasukanna moso sabannya'na, sengko' ta' kera tako'. Maske badha perrang, sengko' se eserrang, tang pangarep ta' kera elang." 
Psalms27:4 Pera' settong tang parnyo'onan ka PANGERAN, pera' reya tang pangaterro, tadha' laenna: terro ennengnga e Padalemman Socce saomorra, sopaja bisa'a arassa'agi kasaeyanna PANGERAN, sarta nyo'on petoduna." 
Psalms27:5 PANGERAN ngaobi sengko' e dhalem karekongan; sengko' eerrep e Padalemmanna, ban eangka' ka gunong bato se tenggi." 
Psalms27:6 Sateya sengko' mennang ka moso e sabingkerra tang aba', daddi sengko' ngatorragi kurban sokkor e Padalemmanna; sambi asorak gumbira sengko' anyanye mojiya PANGERAN." 
Psalms27:7 Manabi abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, peyarsa'agi, GUSTE, kabellasi abdidalem, saodi abdidalem!" 
Psalms27:8 Junandalem adhabu, “Mara dha' enna' nyemba ka Sengko'.” Abdidalem nyaot, “Abdidalem nyabisa, GUSTE;" 
Psalms27:9 Junandalem ja' ngetek dhari abdidalem, GUSTE.” Junandalem ja' duka, abdidalem ja' tolak, sabab Junandalem se ampon nolong abdidalem. Ya Allah, Junandalem panyalamet abdidalem; abdidalem ja' dinggallagi, abdidalem ja' buwangngagi." 
Psalms27:10 Maske rama ebu adinggallagi sengko', ALLAH paggun meyara sengko' terros." 
Psalms27:11 Dhabuwagi ponapa kasokannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, tontonnagi abdidalem e jalan se loros, sabab moso abdidalem ta' sakone'." 
Psalms27:12 Abdidalem ja' passra'agi ka napsoepon moso, se nyerrang abdidalem ngangguy caca se lecek sambi ngara sareng ko'-nako'e." 
Psalms27:13 Sengko' yakin bakal ngalamana kabecce'anna PANGERAN e dhalem tang odhi' e dunnya reya. 
Psalms27:14 Mara arep partolonganna PANGERAN, pakowat ban pakoko atena. Onggu, mara arep partolonganna PANGERAN." 
Psalms28:1 Jaburra Daud. Adhu GUSTE, abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, Junandalem se abilla abdidalem, peyarsa'agi serrona abdidalem. Manabi Junandalem mendel, abdidalem akadi oreng se toron ka lobangnga koburan." 
Psalms28:2 Peyarsa'agi parnyo'onan abdidalem manabi abdidalem aera' nyo'on partolongan, sareng ngangka' tanang abdidalem epangadhep ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem se socce." 
Psalms28:3 Abdidalem ja' patompes pasareng oreng se daraka, ja' okom pasareng oreng se jahat odhi'na. Reng-oreng gapaneka manes cacana, namong atena bucco'." 
Psalms28:4 Okom reng-oreng gapaneka lantaran tengkana, menorot kajahadanna. Parenge okoman menorot sadaja se elakone; satembang sareng kajahadan se ejalane." 
Psalms28:5 Reng-oreng jareya ta' marduli sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN, otaba sabarang se ebadhi Salerana. Daddi bi' PANGERAN tanto eparenge okoman, ban reng-oreng jareya epatompes salanjangnga." 
Psalms28:6 Molja PANGERAN, sabab Salerana la meyarsa tang parnyo'onan." 
Psalms28:7 PANGERAN tang pangaoban ban panyalamet sengko', sengko' parcaja ka Salerana. Sengko' epaperak ban etolong, sengko' ngagungngagi Salerana, anyanye lagu asokkor." 
Psalms28:8 PANGERAN apareng kakowadan ka ommadda, abilla ban masalamet rato peleyanna." 
Psalms28:9 Parenge salamet ommattepon Junandalem, GUSTE, berkadi reng-oreng kaagungannepon Junandalem. Kasokana Junandalem daddi se ngowan monggu ka reng-oreng gapaneka, kasokana ajaga sadajana kaangguy salanjangnga." 
Psalms29:1 Jaburra Daud. He lok-mahlok sowarga, molja'agi PANGERAN, molja'agi kaagungan ban kobasana." 
Psalms29:2 Molja'agi asmana PANGERAN se molja, semba Salerana sambi ngangguy kalambi kabakteyan." 
Psalms29:3 Allah se agung asowara akantha galudhuk e attas tase', sowarana metto ro-sarowan e attassa tase' raja." 
Psalms29:4 Sowarana PANGERAN ekaedhing agandhu' kakowadan ban kobasa. 
Psalms29:5 Sowarana PANGERAN magujur ka'-bungka'an, masempal bungkana comara Libanon." 
Psalms29:6 Ngedhing sowara jareya Gunong Libanon sampe' alonca' akantha budhu'na sape, Gunong Siriyon abintal akantha budhu'na banteng." 
Psalms29:7 Sowarana PANGERAN andaddiyagi kelap ngareddhap. 
Psalms29:8 Sowarana PANGERAN magundhek ra-ara beddhi, PANGERAN magundhek ra-ara beddhi Kades." 
Psalms29:9 Sowarana PANGERAN maguli ka-bungkana berrangan, maronto un-dhaunan e dhalem alas, sabatara e Padalemman Socce ommat ra'-era'an, “Molja'agi Pangeran!”" 
Psalms29:10 PANGERAN kobasa ka ba'a, kobasa menangka Rato salanjangnga." 
Psalms29:11 Moga PANGERAN marengana kakowadan ka ommadda, ban mataremtem sarta manyaman odhi'na." 
Psalms30:1 Jaburra Daud. Nyanyeyan kaangguy aresmeyagi Padalemman Socce. 
Psalms30:2 Abdidalem ngagungngagi Junandalem, GUSTE, sabab Junandalem ampon masalamet abdidalem; Junandalem ta' ngedine abdidalem erak-sorak moso." 
Psalms30:3 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, abdidalem aserro nyo'on tolong ka Junandalem, Junandalem laju mabaras abdidalem." 
Psalms30:4 Junandalem malopot abdidalem dhari alam maot, maodhi' abdidalem dhari antarana reng-oreng mate." 
Psalms30:5 Mara anyanye ji-moji PANGERAN, he ommadda se esto! Mara asokkor ka Se Mahasocce." 
Psalms30:6 Sabab pera' sakejja' dukana PANGERAN, kabecce'anna ros-terrosan saomorra. E baja malem sengko' nanges, tape pajjar dhateng maperak ate." 
Psalms30:7 E bakto arassa aman abdidalem ngoca', “Sengko' ta' ekenneng pakala!”" 
Psalms30:8 Sabab Junandalem sae ka abdidalem, GUSTE, abdidalem sareng Junandalem epakowat akadi gunong se koko. Namong saamponna Junandalem laju ta' ngaton, abdidalem laju daddi tako'." 
Psalms30:9 Ka Junandalem, GUSTE, abdidalem aserro, ka Junandalem abdidalem nyo'on," 
Psalms30:10 “Ponapa gunana ka Junandalem manabi abdidalem mate sareng toron ka lobangngepon koburan? Sabab oreng mate ta' kera ngagungngagi Junandalem sareng ta' kera aberta'agi kaestowannepon Junandalem. 
Psalms30:11 Peyarsa'agi, GUSTE, sareng kabellasi abdidalem ka'dhinto, abdidalem nyo'ona tolong!”" 
Psalms30:12 Tanges abdidalem sareng Junandalem eoba epadaddi tari se gumbira, kasossa'an abdidalem epatadha' egante'e kasennengngan se talebat rajana." 
Psalms30:13 Daddi abdidalem ta' poron neng-enneng; abdidalem anyanye ngagungngagi Junandalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, sareng asokkor ka Junandalem salanjangnga!" 
Psalms31:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms31:2 Abdidalem nyare pangaoban ka Junandalem, GUSTE, ja' pakoceba'agi abdidalem. Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, GUSTE, bit kaadilannepon Junandalem," 
Psalms31:3 peyarsa'agi abdidalem, bebassagi abdidalem duliyan. Ngereng Junandalem daddi gunong bato kennengnganna abdidalem nyare pangaoban, ngereng Junandalem daddi binteng se koko kennengnganna abdidalem nyare kasalameddan." 
Psalms31:4 Lerres, monggu ka abdidalem Junandalem padha sareng gunong bato, akadi binteng se koko! Tontonnagi abdidalem, menorot janji se edhabuwagi Junandalem." 
Psalms31:5 Palopottagi abdidalem dhari jebbak se epasang oreng, sabab namong Junandalem kennengnganna abdidalem nyare pangaoban." 
Psalms31:6 Ka dhalem astana Junandalem abdidalem massra'agi aba' ka'dhinto; Junandalem masalamet abdidalem, Guste PANGERAN, Allah se esto." 
Psalms31:7 Junandalem baji' ka oreng se nyemba brahala, namong abdidalem parcaja ka Junandalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms31:8 Abdidalem perak sareng gumbira, sabab Junandalem paggun taresna ka abdidalem. Junandalem ngoladi kasangsara'an abdidalem, sareng ngagali ka kasossa'an abdidalem." 
Psalms31:9 Junandalem ta' ngedine abdidalem etawan moso, Junandalem marenge jalan kantos abdidalem kengeng ajalan sanyamanna." 
Psalms31:10 Kaneserre abdidalem, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem sossa e dhalem ate; mata abdidalem peddi kabannya'an nanges, sokma sareng badan nyandhang sangsara." 
Psalms31:11 Abdidalem ta' gadhuwan kakowadan lantaran kasossa'an, omor abdidalem pandha' lantaran nanges ros-terrosan. Abdidalem lempo lantaran kajahadan, kantos lang-tolang daddi alpo' sadajana." 
Psalms31:12 Abdidalem ekala'-gella' sareng moso la'-mala' jugan sareng tatangga tepparo. Sadajana kennalan takerjat manabi nengale abdidalem, padha buru manabi tatemmo sareng nengale abdidalem e lorong." 
Psalms31:13 Abdidalem ta' ekaenga'e oreng akadi oreng se ampon mate, sareng daddi barang buwangan." 
Psalms31:14 E man-ka'dhimman badha barang se nako'e; abdidalem mereng san-rasanna moso. So-moso abdidalem asakongkel asajja padha mateyana abdidalem. 
Psalms31:15 Namong abdidalem ngarep partolongan dhari Junandalem, Guste PANGERAN, sabab Junandalem Allah abdidalem." 
Psalms31:16 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem epeyara terros; nyo'ona salamet abdidalem dhari sadajana moso, sareng dhari reng-oreng se nyerser abdidalem." 
Psalms31:17 Moga Junandalem kasokana ka abdidalem; nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, GUSTE, lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms31:18 Ja' kantos abdidalem malo, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem. Diggal oreng jahat me' olle nanggung malo, sareng tadha' kasa'na maso' ka alam maot." 
Psalms31:19 Dunggemmagi colo'epon reng-oreng se dujan co-ngoco, se nye-ngenye oreng jujur lantaran sombong." 
Psalms31:20 Saponapa bannya'na kasaeyannepon Junandalem se esadhiya'agi ka oreng se abakte ka Junandalem! Saneyap oreng nengale kabecce'an se elampa'agi Junandalem ka reng-oreng se ngaop ka Junandalem sareng se parcaja ka Junandalem. 
Psalms31:21 Junandalem ngerrep reng-oreng gapaneka, epaaman e dhalem pangaobannepon Junandalem, sopaja lopoda dhari kobasaepon reng-oreng se asakongkel asajja juba'; sareng Junandalem ejaga sopaja salamedda dhari da'wa'annepon mosona." 
Psalms31:22 Molja PANGERAN! Kataresna'anna ka sengko' tadha' bandhinganna, e bakto sengko' ekeppong ban eserrang." 
Psalms31:23 E bakto sengko' kabingongan sengko' nyangka tang aba' la ebuwang bi' PANGERAN dhari ajunanna. Tape Salerana meyarsa tang parnyo'onan, e bakto sengko' aserro nyo'on partolongan." 
Psalms31:24 Taresnae PANGERAN, he sakabbinna ommadda, PANGERAN nolong ban ngaobi oreng se esto. Tape ta' gung-tanggung ngokom oreng se angga'." 
Psalms31:25 Ba'na kabbi se ngarep ka PANGERAN, mara padha pakowat ban pakoko atena!" 
Psalms32:1 Jaburra Daud. Nyanyeyan pangajaran. Bajjra onggu oreng se esapora dusana ban epaelang kasala'anna. 
Psalms32:2 Bajjra onggu oreng se kajahadanna ta' eetong bi' PANGERAN, ban se ta' dujan nepowan." 
Psalms32:3 Saabittepon abdidalem ta' ngakone dusa, ate abdidalem taseksa rassana, polana abdidalem nanges saare benteng." 
Psalms32:4 Seyang malem abdidalem ececce' sareng Junandalem, GUSTE, abdidalem ta' gadhuwan kakowadan pole akadi se eesep are." 
Psalms32:5 Abdidalem laju ngako dusa ka Junandalem, sadajana kasala'an tadha' se ealenge. Abdidalem motossagi ngakowana sadajana ka Junandalem, ban Junandalem nyapora sadajana dusa abdidalem." 
Psalms32:6 Daddi sadajaepon oreng alem padha adu'a e bakto ngadhebbi karekongan, sopaja manabi dhateng banjir kasossa'an ta' kantosa noro' talanyo'." 
Psalms32:7 Junandalem pangeteggan abdidalem, Junandalem mabebas abdidalem dhari kamalaradan. Daddi abdidalem asorak kaperagen, sabab Junandalem ampon masalamet abdidalem." 
Psalms32:8 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Bi' Sengko' ba'na eduduwana jalan se kodu elebadi; bi' Sengko' ba'na etontona ban ela'-bala'ana." 
Psalms32:9 Ba'na ja' akantha jaran se ta' andhi' akkal, se kodu ekaddhali'i ban etale'e sopaja atoro'a parenta.”" 
Psalms32:10 Oreng se dusa bannya' nanggung sangsara, tape se ngarep ka PANGERAN terros ejaga ban etolong bi' kataresna'anna." 
Psalms32:11 He reng-oreng alem, mara padha anga-bunga lantaran sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN. Mara asorak pasenneng, reng-oreng se berse atena!" 
Psalms33:1 He reng-oreng alem, mara asorak pagumbira lantaran sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN; reng-oreng se padha berse atena, mara molja'agi Salerana." 
Psalms33:2 Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN ngangguy calempong, mara anyanye amolja'agi Salerana sambi erenge monyena mosik." 
Psalms33:3 Nyanyeyagi nyanyeyan se anyar ka PANGERAN, tabbu pabagus calempongnga ban asorak pasenneng atena!" 
Psalms33:4 Dhabuna PANGERAN ekenneng parcaja kabbi, Salerana esto e dhalem sabarang se elampa'agi." 
Psalms33:5 PANGERAN lebur ka kaadilan ban kajujuran; bume possa' ban kataresna'anna. 
Psalms33:6 PANGERAN apareng parenta, langnge' laju etemmo badha; are, bulan ban bintang epadaddi coma dhari dhabuna." 
Psalms33:7 Aeng tase' epakompol kabbi e settong kennengngan, tase' raja etebbeng e dhalem eddham." 
Psalms33:8 Mara reng-oreng bume, patako' ba'na ka PANGERAN, reng-oreng e dunnya, mara hormadi Salerana." 
Psalms33:9 Sabab Pangeran adhabu, kabbi laju etemmo daddi; Pangeran apareng parenta, kabbi laju etemmo badha." 
Psalms33:10 PANGERAN mabuddhu sajjana sa-bangsa, neyadda epata'daddi kabbi." 
Psalms33:11 Tape rancanana PANGERAN tadha' obana, rancanganna koko salanjangnga jaman." 
Psalms33:12 Bajjra onggu bangsa se ngako Allah ka PANGERAN, bajjra onggu ommat se epele epadaddi kaagunganna!" 
Psalms33:13 Dhari sowarga PANGERAN ngoladi ka baba, pas ngoladi sakabbinna manossa, ommadda." 
Psalms33:14 Dhari korse karaja'anna PANGERAN ngoladi ka manossa se ngennengnge bume. 
Psalms33:15 Pangeran se mabangon atena reng-oreng jareya, ban ngagali sakabbinna tengka polana." 
Psalms33:16 Rato mennang banne polana bannya'na tantarana, tantara salamet banne dhari kakowadanna." 
Psalms33:17 Jaran ta' ekenneng andellagi sopaja mennang, kakowadanna se raja ta' bisa madhateng kasalameddan." 
Psalms33:18 PANGERAN ajaga reng-oreng se ta'at ka dhabuna, reng-oreng se ngarep kataresna'anna." 
Psalms33:19 Pangeran masalamet reng-oreng jareya dhari pate, epaodhi' e bakto jaman kalaparan." 
Psalms33:20 Daddi sengko' ban ba'na padha ngarep ka PANGERAN, se nolong ban se abilla sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms33:21 Sengko' ban ba'na perak polana Salerana ban parcaja ka asmana se socce. 
Psalms33:22 Moga abdidalem pagguna etaresnae Junandalem, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem sadaja padha ngarep ka Junandalem." 
Psalms34:1 Jaburra Daud e bakto salerana tha-kantha ras-mata'baras e ajunanna Abimelekh, sampe' salerana eojuk, pas nyengla dhari jadhiya." 
Psalms34:2 Sengko' asokkora ros-terrosan ka PANGERAN, ta' ambuwa ngagungngagi Salerana." 
Psalms34:3 Sengko' amolja'agiya PANGERAN polana sabarang se la elampa'agi Salerana; moga oreng se etendhes ngedhinga ban gumbira atena. 
Psalms34:4 Mara abareng ban sengko' ngagungngagi PANGERAN, mara areng-bareng amolja'agi asmana." 
Psalms34:5 Sengko' adu'a ka PANGERAN, Salerana nyaodi, katako'anna tang ate epaelang kabbi." 
Psalms34:6 Oreng se etendhes ngarep ka Salerana ban perak atena, tadha' barang se parlo ekatodhus." 
Psalms34:7 Oreng se palang aserro, PANGERAN nyaodi, karekonganna epatadha' kabbi." 
Psalms34:8 Malaekadda PANGERAN ajaga oreng alem, malopot reng-oreng jareya dhari babaja." 
Psalms34:9 Rassa'agi dibi' saapa saena PANGERAN; bajjra onggu oreng se ngaop ka Salerana. 
Psalms34:10 Para ommadda PANGERAN, hormadi Salerana, sabab oreng alem ta' kera kakorangan pa-apa." 
Psalms34:11 Can-macan lapar keya polana kakorangan kakan, tape oreng se nyemba ka PANGERAN ta' kakorangan pa-apa." 
Psalms34:12 Na'-kana' kabbi, mara edhingngagi, bi' sengko' ba'na eajarana ngormadi PANGERAN." 
Psalms34:13 Apa ba'na terro lanjanga omorra ban nyamana odhi'na? 
Psalms34:14 Ja' acaca'an barang se juba', ban ja' dujan nepo otaba lecegan." 
Psalms34:15 Jauwi kajahadan, lakone kabecce'an, ehteyarragi salar-kellarra madhateng kataremtemman." 
Psalms34:16 PANGERAN ajaga oreng se alem, meyarsa'agi mon reng-oreng jareya aserro nyo'on tolong." 
Psalms34:17 Tape reng-oreng jahat ekamoso; mon reng-oreng jareya mate, sakejja' bai la ta' ekaemodi pole." 
Psalms34:18 Mon oreng alem aserro, PANGERAN meyarsa'agi, reng-oreng jareya padha epalopot dhari karekongan." 
Psalms34:19 PANGERAN semma' ka oreng se kene' ate; oreng se kaelangan samangat epasalamet. 
Psalms34:20 Oreng becce' bannya' kasossa'anna, tape bi' PANGERAN epabebas dhari sakabbinna." 
Psalms34:21 Badanna teptep ejaga bi' PANGERAN, tolangnga ta' epapotong settonga." 
Psalms34:22 Oreng jahat bakal mateya polana kajahadanna, se baji' ka oreng alem bakal eokoma." 
Psalms34:23 PANGERAN masalamet para abdina; se ngaop ka Salerana ta' kera eparenge okoman. 
Psalms35:1 Jaburra Daud. Guste PANGERAN, labannagi oreng se ngamoso abdidalem, perrangngagi oreng se merrange abdidalem." 
Psalms35:2 Pondhut tameng sareng pangangguy perrangngepon Junandalem, ngereng ngadek, tolong abdidalem." 
Psalms35:3 Angka' lembing sareng tombakkepon kaangguy ngadhebbi oreng se nyerser abdidalem. Ngereng adhabu ka abdidalem ja' Junandalem panyalamet abdidalem. 
Psalms35:4 Oreng se mateyana abdidalem moga eparengngana epakala sareng epamalo. Se asakongkel ngamoso abdidalem moga eparengngana nyorot kabingongan. 
Psalms35:5 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka eserserra malaekadda PANGERAN, atabuyan akadi sekkem eabber angen." 
Psalms35:6 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka epokola malaekadda PANGERAN e lorong se petteng sareng lecen. 
Psalms35:7 Parcoma reng-oreng gapaneka masang jebbak ajira'a abdidalem otabana ngale lobang mega'a abdidalem. 
Psalms35:8 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka padha mateya ta' kalaban eka-sangka. Moga sadaja padha'a tajebbak e dhalem barajagga dibi', laju labu terros mate." 
Psalms35:9 Daddi sengko' rak-soragan polana PANGERAN, tang ate perak polana Salerana masalamet sengko'." 
Psalms35:10 Sengko' ngoca' kalaban gu-onggu ate, “Junandalem tadha' bandhingannepon, GUSTE! Junandalem masalamet se ta' gadhuwan kakowadan dhari oreng se kowat, masalamet oreng se mesken sareng nyangsara dhari reng-oreng se nendhes aba'epon.”" 
Psalms35:11 Se-sakse jahat padha jaga nyala'agi abdidalem, ngarane abdidalem ngalakone sabarang se abdidalem dibi' ta' oneng." 
Psalms35:12 Kabecce'annepon abdidalem ebales reng-oreng gapaneka sareng kajahadan; abdidalem tacekkel ta' gadhuwan pangarebban. 
Psalms35:13 E bakto reng-oreng gapaneka nganglo, abdidalem sossa, neddha ta' poron; abdidalem adu'a sambi nondhu'," 
Psalms35:14 akadi se adu'a nyo'onnagi taretan otaba sahabat. Abdidalem nondhu', nangese reng-oreng gapaneka, akadi se sossa lantaran ebu abdidalem dibi'." 
Psalms35:15 Namong e bakto abdidalem sossa, reng-oreng gapaneka senneng, agaribbung ca'-ngoca'e abdidalem. Reng-oreng ya-nyeya abdidalem, sanare abdidalem ta' oneng ka reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms35:16 Akadi oreng se ya-nyeya oreng se dippang, reng-oreng gapaneka ngabas ka abdidalem, katon ce' baji'na." 
Psalms35:17 Kantos bilaepon, GUSTE, kantos bilaepon, Junandalem namong ngoladi bisaos? Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem dhari serrangannepon reng-oreng gapaneka, palopottagi nyaba abdidalem dhari can-macan gapaneka." 
Psalms35:18 Abdidalem pas asokkora ka Junandalem e nga'-tengnga'annepon ommadda Junandalem, sareng amolja'agiya asmaepon Junandalem e dhalem kompolannepon reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms35:19 Ja' dinggal abdidalem ebadhi en-maenan sareng oreng se ngamoso abdidalem ta' kalaban badha margana. Ja' dinggal abdidalem erak-sorak oreng se baji' ka abdidalem ta' kalaban badha lantaranna. 
Psalms35:20 Pacacana reng-oreng gapaneka ta' laba; reng-oreng gapaneka gadhuwan sajja badhi nepo reng-oreng laen se odhi'na rokon. 
Psalms35:21 Reng-oreng gapaneka ra'-era'an ka abdidalem sambi ngoca' ja' sadaja ampon padha nengale lalakon abdidalem. 
Psalms35:22 Namong Junandalem, GUSTE, ampon ngoladi; daddi ngereng, ja' mendel saos, GUSTE, ja' majau dhari abdidalem." 
Psalms35:23 Ngereng ngadek abillai abdidalem, Ya Allah, Pangeran kaula, nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms35:24 Guste ALLAH, ngereng billai abdidalem, sabab Junandalem adil; ja' panneng abdidalem erak-sorak moso." 
Psalms35:25 Ja' kantos moso abdidalem ngoca' e dhalem atena, “Dulat, la tompes oreng jareya, la katekkan pangaterrona sengko' ban ba'na!”" 
Psalms35:26 Oreng se perak nengale kasangsara'an abdidalem, moga eparengngana todhus sareng bingong; se ga'-maangga' ka abdidalem, moga eya'-seya'a oreng sareng eparenge malo." 
Psalms35:27 Oreng se terro nengalana abdidalem eanggep teppa', moga eparengngana asorak sareng senneng atena. Moga padha'a li-baliyan ngoca', “Agung onggu PANGERAN reya! Se ekaterro kasalameddanna para abdina!”" 
Psalms35:28 Daddi abdidalem aberta'agiya kaadilannepon Junandalem, sareng amolja'agiya Junandalem saare benteng." 
Psalms36:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Dhari Daud, abdina PANGERAN." 
Psalms36:2 Dusa asowara e dhalem atena oreng jahat oreng jareya ta' tako' sakale ka Allah. 
Psalms36:3 Oreng jareya nganggep aba'na ce' tenggina sampe' ta' apangrasa ka kasala'anna, ban ta' baji' ka dusana jareya." 
Psalms36:4 Cacana juba' ban lecek oreng jareya ta' ajalannagi pole se bicaksana ban se becce'. 
Psalms36:5 E katedhunganna andhi' sajja jahat; tengkana tadha' se bagusa se jahat tadha' se etolaga. 
Psalms36:6 GUSTE, kataresna'annepon Junandalem salangnge' tenggina, kaestowannepon Junandalem kantos gan ondhem." 
Psalms36:7 Kasaeyannepon Junandalem sagunong tenggina, kaadilannepon Junandalem akadi tase' raja dhalemma; keban sareng manossa sareng Junandalem epeyara." 
Psalms36:8 Ya Allah, kataresna'annepon Junandalem raja argana, manossa ngaop e baba'anna kalembangngepon Junandalem." 
Psalms36:9 Manossa padha tobuk neddha teddha'an se ta' sakera-kera e dalemmepon Junandalem, tobuk ngenom dhari songayyepon Junandalem se segger." 
Psalms36:10 Junandalem somberrepon odhi'na mahlok sadajana, e dhalem terrangngepon Junandalem abdidalem sadaja nengale terrang." 
Psalms36:11 Moga Junandalem teptebba taresna ka oreng se oneng ka Junandalem, sareng teptebba sae ka oreng se sae atena." 
Psalms36:12 Ja' diggal abdidalem eserrang oreng se angga' otabana etondhung oreng se jahat. 
Psalms36:13 Oladi, oreng ngalakone kajahadanna padha labu, ngalto' ta' kengeng jaga pole." 
Psalms37:1 Dhari Daud. Ja' posang pekkerra polana oreng jahat, ja' ere atena ka oreng se alako sala." 
Psalms37:2 Sabab reng-oreng jareya bakal duliya elang akantha rebba, bakal mateya akantha men-tamennan se elop dhaunna." 
Psalms37:3 Paparcaja ka PANGERAN, ban lakone se bagus, enneng e nagara jareya ban paesto ka PANGERAN, tanto ba'na salamet." 
Psalms37:4 Sare kasennengngan e PANGERAN, tanto Salerana marenge apa pangaterrona ba'na." 
Psalms37:5 Passra'agi odhi'na ba'na ka PANGERAN, ngarep ka Salerana, tanto ba'na eparenge partolongan." 
Psalms37:6 Kaestowanna ba'na tanto epanyonar, kabagusanna atena epatera' akantha seyang." 
Psalms37:7 Pasabbar atena anante' PANGERAN alampa'agi karsana. Ja' ngalengsang polana oreng laen pojur odhi'na, otaba polana oreng laen ahasel ngalakone kajahadanna." 
Psalms37:8 Ja' peggel otaba panas atena, jareya pera' madhateng calaka'." 
Psalms37:9 Sabab oreng se alako jahat bakal epatompessa, tape se ngarep ka PANGERAN bakal narema'a sangkol tana rowa." 
Psalms37:10 Oreng jahat bakal duliya mosna, mon esare ta' kera etemmo." 
Psalms37:11 Oreng se andhap asor atena bakal abarisana tana rowa, ban arassa'agi kobassana kama'moran se ta' sakera-kera." 
Psalms37:12 Oreng jahat andhi' sajja juba' ka oreng becce', ngabas ka oreng jareya kalaban ate baji'." 
Psalms37:13 Tape oreng jahat ekala'-gella' bi' PANGERAN, sabab PANGERAN ngagali oreng jareya para' mateya." 
Psalms37:14 Oreng jahat ngonos peddhangnga, ngaceddagi panana, mateyana oreng mesken ban nyangsara, ajagala reng-oreng se becce' odhi'na." 
Psalms37:15 Tape oreng jahat bakal mateya bi' peddhangnga dibi', gandhibana bakal epapotonga." 
Psalms37:16 Barang sakone' andhi'na oreng becce' atena, lebbi arga katembang dhi'-andhi'na oreng jahat se talebat bannya'na." 
Psalms37:17 Sabab kobasana oreng jahat bakal epotella bi' PANGERAN, tape oreng becce' bakal eparengngana pangaobanna." 
Psalms37:18 PANGERAN ajaga odhi'na oreng se alem, sangkol barisanna ekaandhi' salanjangnga." 
Psalms37:19 E dhalem karekonganna reng-oreng jareya ta' kera nyandhang sossa, e jaman laep ta' kera kakorangan kakan." 
Psalms37:20 Tape oreng jahat bakal mateya, mosona PANGERAN bakal elanga akantha kembang e teggal, mosna akantha okos." 
Psalms37:21 Oreng jahat jam-ngenjam ta' endha' mabali, tape oreng becce' ari'-berri' kalaban ate lamba'." 
Psalms37:22 Oreng se eberkadi PANGERAN bakal abarisana tana rowa, tape oreng se ebasto Salerana bakal etondhunga." 
Psalms37:23 Pangeran nonton oreng e jalan se samasthena, ngaobi oreng se odhi'na katarema ka Salerana." 
Psalms37:24 Mon labu, oreng jareya ta' kera berra' lokana, sabab PANGERAN tanto nyandhak tanangnga." 
Psalms37:25 Molae sengko' gi' ngodha sampe' towa, ta' tao nangale'e oreng becce' edinggallagi PANGERAN, otabana se na' potona ngemmes kakanan." 
Psalms37:26 Oreng jareya maenjam ban aberri' ros-terrosan, na'-ana'na daddi berkat ka aba'na." 
Psalms37:27 Onduri se juba', lakone se becce', tanto toronanna ba'na bakal terrosa ngennengnge tana jareya." 
Psalms37:28 Sabab PANGERAN kasokan ka barang se adil ban teppa', oreng se esto ka Salerana ta' kera epanyangsara odhi'na. Reng-oreng jareya eaobi salanjangnga, tape toronanna oreng jahat bakal epatompessa." 
Psalms37:29 Oreng se alem bakal abarisana tana rowa, enneng e jadhiya salanjangnga." 
Psalms37:30 Oreng becce' mon acaca bicaksana, jujur totor ban oca'na." 
Psalms37:31 Hokomma Allahna esempen e dhalem atena, ta' tao nyaleyot dhari kom-hokom jareya." 
Psalms37:32 Oreng becce' eencer oreng jahat, se nyare kasempadan mateyana." 
Psalms37:33 Tape bi' PANGERAN oreng jareya ta' edina gaggar ka tanangnga mosona, otaba narema okoman e bakto eadili." 
Psalms37:34 Nyo'on ka PANGERAN ban ta'adi dhabuna, ba'na tanto eangka' epanarema barisan tana rowa; ban epanangale oreng jahat epamosna." 
Psalms37:35 Sengko' tao nangale oreng jahat se raja cacana; akantha comara Libanon se ngongkole sakabbinna oreng tenggina. 
Psalms37:36 E bakto sengko' lebat, oreng jareya la tadha'; bi' sengko' esare, la ta' etemmo pole." 
Psalms37:37 Abassagi oreng becce' ban se berse atena; oreng se ta' endha' atokaran tanto senneng e budhi arena. 
Psalms37:38 Tape oreng dusa bakal epamateya, toronanna bakal epamosna'a." 
Psalms37:39 Oreng alem epasalamet bi' PANGERAN, sarta ejaga ban etolong e bakto karekongan." 
Psalms37:40 Reng-oreng jareya epasalamet ban eparenge partolongan, epalopot dhari oreng jahat, sabab reng-oreng jareya nyo'on tolong ka Salerana." 
Psalms38:1 Jaburra Daud e bakto ngatorragi kurban parengeddan. 
Psalms38:2 GUSTE, abdidalem ja' okom sanare Junandalem duka; abdidalem ja' seksa sanare Junandalem ce' benduna." 
Psalms38:3 Panaepon Junandalem nerbas badan abdidalem kantos loka, astana Junandalem nekket abdidalem, ekarassa ce' berra'na." 
Psalms38:4 Badan abdidalem ce' sake'na lantaran Junandalem duka; sabadan abdidalem sake' sadaja lantaran abdidalem dusa. 
Psalms38:5 Abdidalem tasellem e dhalem banjir dusa, berra'na dusa gapaneka ta' tapekol rassana." 
Psalms38:6 Ka-lokana badan abdidalem kalowar nana baceng bauna, sabab abdidalem atengka ce' budhuna." 
Psalms38:7 Abdidalem nondhu' sareng bungko', saare benteng sossa kantos mowa katon elop." 
Psalms38:8 Badan panas akadi se katonon, sabadan sake' sadaja." 
Psalms38:9 Abdidalem ce' lessona, ta' gadhuwan kakowadan pole, ro-serrowan lantaran posang rassana ate." 
Psalms38:10 Junandalem ngagali sadaja se ekaterro abdidalem, GUSTE, Junandalem meyarsa sadaja se ekaserro abdidalem." 
Psalms38:11 Dhadha abdidalem dhek-gadheggan, kakowadan elang tadha' sakale, mata rabeng ta' nengale." 
Psalms38:12 Lantaran panyaket abdidalem, ca-kanca padha nyese, la'-mala' la-bala abdidalem padha majau sakale." 
Psalms38:13 Reng-oreng se terro mateyana abdidalem padha masang jira', se terro macalaka'a abdidalem padha ngara matompessa abdidalem." 
Psalms38:14 Namong abdidalem akadi oreng kopok se ta' mereng pa-ponapa, akadi oreng buwi se ta' kengeng acaca." 
Psalms38:15 Lerres, abdidalem akadi oreng kopok, daddi buru ta' metto oca'." 
Psalms38:16 Namong abdidalem nyo'on ka Junandalem, GUSTE, ban Junandalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, laju apareng jawaban." 
Psalms38:17 Ja' kantos moso senneng nengale kasossa'an abdidalem, ja' kantos reng-oreng gapaneka asebbal terros manabi abdidalem ta' jekjek manjeng." 
Psalms38:18 Abdidalem para' labuwa, nyandhang sake' salanjangnga." 
Psalms38:19 Abdidalem ngakone dusa; ate ketter mekkere kasala'an. 
Psalms38:20 Reng-oreng se ngamoso abdidalem bannya' sareng kowat, sadaja padha baji' ka cara odhi'na abdidalem." 
Psalms38:21 Abdidalem ekamoso reng-oreng se males kabecce'an sareng kajahadan, lantaran abdidalem ngalakone se sae." 
Psalms38:22 Adhu GUSTE, ja' dinggallagi abdidalem, ja' majau dhari abdidalem, Guste Allah." 
Psalms38:23 Ngereng duli rabu, tolong abdidalem, GUSTE panyalamet abdidalem." 
Psalms39:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. Kaangguy Yedutun. 
Psalms39:2 Ca'na tang pekker, “Sengko' ajaga'a tang aba' sopaja sengko' ta' sampe'a agabay dusa bi' tang jila. Sengko' ta' acaca'a mon gi' badha oreng jahat e semma'na.”" 
Psalms39:3 Sengko' neng-enneng, ta' acaca maske sakeccaba ta' but-nyebbut pa-apa maske parkara se becce'. Tape tang kasossa'an ekarassa atamba berra';" 
Psalms39:4 sengko' ce' ketterra rassana. Sajan epekker sajan sossa tang ate; dhi-budhina sengko' ngoca'," 
Psalms39:5 “Adhu GUSTE, ngereng abdidalem parenge oneng bila abdidalem se mateya, sopaja abdidalem onenga ja' odhi' abdidalem talebat pandha'na.”" 
Psalms39:6 Junandalem apareng omor ka abdidalem ce' pandha'na! Monggu ka Junandalem omor abdidalem tadha' artena. Pajat lerres manossa tadha' bidana sareng nyaba sasergu'an," 
Psalms39:7 odhi'epon elang akadi jang-bajangan. Sadaja karepodanna tadha' gunana; makompol arta, namong ta' oneng pasera se ngangguya." 
Psalms39:8 Samangken ponapa se enante'a abdidalem, Guste? Namong Junandalem pangarebban abdidalem." 
Psalms39:9 Pabebassagi abdidalem dhari sadajana dusa abdidalem, ja' kantos abdidalem eya-seya oreng se budhu." 
Psalms39:10 Abdidalem neng-enneng, ta' acaca, sabab Junandalem se masangsara abdidalem sapaneka." 
Psalms39:11 Cabuddagi okomanna Junandalem ka'dhinto, Guste, Abdidalem ampon ta' kellar akadi se mateya." 
Psalms39:12 Manossa lantaran kasala'anna sareng Junandalem eparenge okoman; sadaja se raja argana ka oreng gapaneka sareng Junandalem epalejjar epakadi ngetnget Lerres, manossa ta' lebbi dhari nyaba sasergu'an." 
Psalms39:13 Peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, GUSTE, peyarsa'agi parnyo'onan ka'dhinto; ja' mendel saos manabi abdidalem nanges. Akadi bangatowa abdidalem sadajana, namong sakejja' saos abdidalem ngampong kennengngan ka Junandalem." 
Psalms39:14 Ja' ganggu abdidalem, me' olle arassa senneng sanare namong sakone' sabellunnepon abdidalem mangkat ta' abali pole." 
Psalms40:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms40:2 Sengko' epasabbar anante' partolonganna PANGERAN; Salerana pas meyarsa'agi sengko' se aserrowan. 
Psalms40:3 Bi' Salerana sengko' eangkes dhari lobang se babaja, epakalowar dhari cellot e raba. PANGERAN nyaba' sengko' e attassa gumo' bato, sampe' teggep tengka'na tang soko." 
Psalms40:4 PANGERAN ngajari sengko' nyanye lagu anyar, lagu pojiyan kaangguy Allahna sengko' ban ba'na. Bannya' oreng se nangale pas padha tako' atena, sarta parcaja ka PANGERAN." 
Psalms40:5 Bajjra oreng se parcaja ka Pangeran, se ta' nyemba ka ba-diba, otaba menta tolong ka oreng se sombong." 
Psalms40:6 GUSTE, saponapa bannya'epon se elampa'agi Junandalem kaangguy abdidalem sadaja, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, Junandalem tadha' bandhinganna! Junandalem kaagungan sajja se makasambu' ate kaangguy abdidalem sadaja, se bannya'epon ta' kabilang." 
Psalms40:7 Junandalem ta' kasokan tor-ator sareng kurban sasajin, jugan ta' mondhut kurban obbaran otabana kurban palebbarannepon dusa. Namong Junandalem marenge kopeng ka abdidalem sopaja merengnga sowaraepon Junandalem." 
Psalms40:8 Abdidalem laju mator, “Ka'dhinto abdidalem, Guste, dhabuepon Junandalem badha e dhalem gulunganna buku sadaja." 
Psalms40:9 Abdidalem senneng ajalannagi kasokannepon Junandalem, Guste, hokommepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem esempen e dhalem ate.”" 
Psalms40:10 E dhalem kompolannepon ommadda Junandalem abdidalem aberta'agi kabar gumbira, kabar manabi Junandalem ampon masalamet abdidalem sadajana. Junandalem ngagali, GUSTE, abdidalem ta' ambuwa ngabarragi parkara ka'dhinto sadaja." 
Psalms40:11 Kabar kasalameddan ka'dhinto sareng abdidalem ta' esempen e dhalem ate malolo, partolongan sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem ros-terrosan ekaberta sareng abdidalem. E adha'epon kompolanna ommattepon Junandalem abdidalem ta' oneng neng-enneng; abdidalem terros ngabarragi kataresna'an sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms40:12 Adhu GUSTE, ja' pegga' kataresna'annepon Junandalem ka abdidalem; jaga'agi abdidalem saterrossa kalaban kataresna'an sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms40:13 Abdidalem ekeppong balai se bannya', se ta' kabilang bannya'na. Abdidalem eserser sa-dusa abdidalem kantos ta' bisa nengale. Bannya'na alebbiyan dhari obu' se badha e cethak abdidalem, kantos abdidalem potos pangarep." 
Psalms40:14 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, GUSTE, ngereng duli tolong abdidalem, GUSTE!" 
Psalms40:15 Diggal reng-oreng se terro mateyana abdidalem me' olle padha buru kabingongen. Diggal oreng se asorak nengale abdidalem palang me' olle nyorot polana tako' sareng eya-seya. 
Psalms40:16 Diggal oreng se ngala'-gella' abdidalem me' olle takerjat sareng malo. 
Psalms40:17 Sadajana oreng se nyemba ka Junandalem mandar eparengngana senneng sareng perak; sadajana oreng se asokkor polana epasalamet sareng Junandalem eparengngana terros ngoca', “Agung onggu PANGERAN reya!”" 
Psalms40:18 Abdidalem ka'dhinto mesken sareng ta' kowat, namong Junandalem emot terros ka abdidalem, Guste. Junandalem se nolong sareng panyalamet abdidalem, ngereng duli tolong abdidalem, Guste." 
Psalms41:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms41:2 Bajjra onggu oreng mekkere oreng se ta' kowat; PANGERAN tanto nolong oreng jareya e bakto sossa. 
Psalms41:3 PANGERAN tanto ajaga ban meyara oreng jareya, tanto marenge kasennengngan e dhalem odhi'na e dunnya, ban ta' massra'agi aba'na ka mosona." 
Psalms41:4 PANGERAN tanto nolong oreng jareya e bakto sake', badanna laju epabaras pole." 
Psalms41:5 Ca'na sengko', “Abdidalem dusa ka Junandalem, GUSTE, kaneserre sareng pabarassagi abdidalem.”" 
Psalms41:6 Sengko' ekacaca juba' bi' tang moso, se ngarep sopaja sengko' mate ban ta' ekaenga'e oreng pole." 
Psalms41:7 Reng-oreng se nyapot sengko' ta' saongguna atena. Kabbi padha nyare kabar juba' parkara tang aba', pas ekacaca san-kassannagi." 
Psalms41:8 Se baji' ka sengko' padha ato'-koto', acaca barang se paleng juba' parkara sengko'." 
Psalms41:9 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Panyakedda ce' sarana, ta' kera ngenneng jaga pole salanjangnga.”" 
Psalms41:10 La'-mala' tang kanca se rapet se paleng eparcaja bi' sengko', oreng se ngakan abareng ban sengko' padha ya-nyeya sengko'." 
Psalms41:11 Kaneserre abdidalem GUSTE, pabarassagi abdidalem, sopaja abdidalem kengenga males kajahadanna so-moso abdidalem." 
Psalms41:12 Manabi abdidalem ta' epakala moso, abdidalem pas oneng ja' abdidalem katarema ka Junandalem." 
Psalms41:13 Junandalem nolong abdidalem lantaran ate abdidalem berse; abdidalem epaodhi' asareng Junandalem salanjangnga. 
Psalms41:14 Molja'agi PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il! Molja'agi Salerana sateya ban salanjangnga! Amin!" 
Psalms42:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna kaom Korah. 
Psalms42:2 Akadi manjangan se kerrong ka aeng songay, saka'dhinto kerrongnga sokma abdidalem ka Junandalem, Guste Allah." 
Psalms42:3 Sengko' ce' terrona tatemmowa ban Allah se odhi', ba' bila sengko' se bisa'a abakte e dalemma?" 
Psalms42:4 Seyang malem sengko' nanges ros-terrosan, pera' aeng mata se daddi tang kakanan. Saare benteng tang moso atanya, “kemma Allahna ba'na?”"
