Psalms42:5 Tang ate ngennes mon enga' ka jaman lamba', e bakto sengko' ajalan ka Padalemman Socce, abareng ban oreng se bannya' se mabadha paraya'an. Sengko' ajalan e adha'na rak-aragan, se rak-soragan sambi anyanye amolja'agi PANGERAN." 
Psalms42:6 Arapa tang ate me' sossa ban posang? Sengko' ngarep ka Allah. Daddi sengko' asokkora pole ka Salerana, ka tang Alah panyalamet sengko' reya." 
Psalms42:7 E tana pambuwangan reya tang ate ancor rassana, daddi sengko' enga' ka PANGERAN. Tang sokma eanyo' omba' kasossa'an, pekkeran salbut ta' etemmo karowanna; kantha garudhu'na garujugan Songay Yordan dhari Gunong Hermon ban Gunong Mizar." 
Psalms42:8  
Psalms42:9 Moga-moga PANGERAN noduwagiya kataresna'anna e baja seyang, sopaja e bakto malem sengko' bisa'a anyanye, sarta adu'a ka Allah somberra tang odhi'." 
Psalms42:10 Sengko' mator ka Allah se abilla sengko', “Aponapa Junandalem me' ta' emot ka abdidalem? Aponapa abdidalem me' kodu terros nyandhang sossa, lantaran etendhes moso abdidalem sadajana?”" 
Psalms42:11 Tang ate ancor polana eya-seya tang moso jareya, se padha atanya, “Kemma Allahna ba'na?”" 
Psalms42:12 Arapa tang ate me' sossa ban posang? Sengko' ngarep ka Allah. Daddi sengko' asokkora pole ka Salerana, ka tang Allah panyalamet sengko' reya." 
Psalms43:1 Ya Allah, parenge abdidalem kaadilan, billa'agi abdidalem ngadhebbi bangsa se daraka; palopottagi abdidalem dhari oreng jahat sareng tokang tepo." 
Psalms43:2 Junandalem Allah, se ngaobi abdidalem; aponapa abdidalem me' edinggallagi, GUSTE? Aponapa abdidalem me' kodu terros nyandhang sossa lantaran etendhes moso abdidalem sadajana?" 
Psalms43:3 Nyata'agi kaestowannepon Junandalem kaangguy nyonare sareng nonton abdidalem, sopaja abdidalem abali ka Siyon, gumo'epon Junandalem se socce, sareng abali ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms43:4 Daddi abdidalem mangkada ka mezbaepon Junandalem, GUSTE, ngadhebba ka Junandalem, Allah somberra kasennengngan abdidalem. Abdidalem anyanye sambi nabbuwa calempong, amolja'agiya Junandalem, Guste Allah, Allah kaula." 
Psalms43:5 Arapa tang ate me' sossa ban posang? Sengko' ngarep ka Allah, daddi sengko' asokkora pole ka Salerana, ka tang Allah panyalamet sengko' reya." 
Psalms44:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. Nyanyeyan pangajaran. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. 
Psalms44:2 Ya Allah, abdidalem ampon mereng dibi' careta dhari para bangatowa, parkara sadaja lalakon raja se elampa'agi Junandalem gi' jaman dhimen." 
Psalms44:3 Junandalem dibi' ngojuk sa-bangsa, sopaja ommadda Junandalem neptebba e nagarana. Sa-bangsa laen sareng Junandalem epacalaka', namong ommattepon Junandalem epasajan ma'mor odhi'na." 
Psalms44:4 Banne sareng peddhang reng-oreng gapaneka arebbu' tana ka'dhissa'; banne lantaran kakowadanna dibi' reng-oreng gapaneka mennang, namong lantaran kobasa sareng cajana kahadirannepon Junandalem, sabab ommat ka'dhinto katarema ka Junandalem." 
Psalms44:5 Junandalem Rato sareng Allah abdidalem, se apareng kamennangan ka ommadda." 
Psalms44:6 Kalaban kobasaepon Junandalem abdidalem sadaja makala moso, ban matellok reng-oreng se nyerrang abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms44:7 Sabab abdidalem ta' ngandellagi pana otabana peddhang kaangguy masalamet aba' ka'dhinto. 
Psalms44:8 Namong Junandalem panyalamet abdidalem dhari moso, makala reng-oreng se baji' ka abdidalem." 
Psalms44:9 Daddi abdidalem amolja'agiya Junandalem salanjangnga, sareng asokkor ka Junandalem saterrossa." 
Psalms44:10 Namong samangken Junandalem adinggallagi abdidalem sadajana; Junandalem mendel sanare abdidalem epakala. Junandalem ta' kasokan maju nyarengnge abdidalem sadajana. 
Psalms44:11 Junandalem mendel saos abdidalem padha buru dhari moso, dhi'-andhi' abdidalem sadaja erampas tadha' karena." 
Psalms44:12 Junandalem mendel abdidalem sadaja ejagal epakadi dumba, sareng Junandalem epabalessudan e antaraepon sa-bangsa." 
Psalms44:13 Junandalem ajuwal ommadda epace'modhana, Junandalem ta' narema kaontongan pa-ponapa." 
Psalms44:14 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem sadaja ebadhi co-kocowanna tatangga, ekala'-gella' ebadhi en-maenan." 
Psalms44:15 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem sadaja eya-seya ka sa-bangsa; se pek-kepeggan ya-nyeya tadha' ambuna. 
Psalms44:16 Saare benteng abdidalem ecale, nanggung malo e adha'na oreng." 
Psalms44:17 polana mereng aba' eco-koco sareng eya-seya sareng moso, sareng oreng se baji' ka abdidalem sadajana." 
Psalms44:18 Abdidalem sadaja padha katebanan ka'dhinto, sanare abdidalem ta' oneng loppa ka Junandalem otabana ta' esto ban ta' neptebbi ka parjanjiyan se ebadhi Junandalem sareng abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms44:19 Abdidalem sadaja ta' oneng mongkere Junandalem; papakonnepon Junandalem etoro' terros. 
Psalms44:20 Namong abdidalem sadaja sareng Junandalem edinggallagi e pettengnga; ta' kengeng apa-ponapa e antaraepon burun alas. 
Psalms44:21 Saompamaepon abdidalem nyemba ka diba laen, ta' poron pole nyemba ka Allah," 
Psalms44:22 tanto Junandalem ngagali sabab Junandalem ngoladi ka essena ate se ta' etengale oreng. 
Psalms44:23 Namong bit asmaepon Junandalem, abdidalem ngadhebbi babaja pate salanjangnga, epakadi dumba se esambelliya." 
Psalms44:24 Ngereng ngadek, GUSTE! Aponapa Junandalem me' asare? Ngereng ngadek! Ja' nolak abdidalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms44:25 Aponapa Junandalem me' ngetek ta' ngemodi sangsarana sareng kasossa'anna abdidalem sadaja? 
Psalms44:26 Abdidalem sadaja robbu ancor e tana ta' kengeng jaga e dhalem abu polana kala. 
Psalms44:27 Ngereng ngadek, nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms45:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. Nyanyeyan kataresna'an. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot lagu: Kembang kacobung. 
Psalms45:2 Ca'-oca' se bagus ngalowa dhari tang ate, sengko' ngatorragi tang nyanyeyan ka rato. Akantha eppenna bujangga se penter, tang jila to-sabakto bisa makalowar syi'ir." 
Psalms45:3 Junandalem se paleng gantheng e antarana manossa, dhabuepon junandalem bagus, tadha' calena, daddi junandalem eberkadi Allah salanjangnga." 
Psalms45:4 Taleyagi peddhangngepon junandalem e tengngana, rato se gaga' parjuga, junandalem sanget agung sareng molja." 
Psalms45:5 Ngereng maju pagaga' nyerser kamennangan aperrang arebbu' sadajana se lerres sareng adil, kalaban kakowadannepon junandalem ngereng rebbu' kamennangan se raja!" 
Psalms45:6 Panaepon junandalem se tajem naccek ka kol-tongkolannepon moso, terbas sampe' ka atena, sa-bangsa robbu e ajunanna padaepon junandalem." 
Psalms45:7 Allah marenge junandalem kobasa kaangguy marenta, kobasaepon junandalem paggun salanjangnga; junandalem adil marenta ra'yadda." 
Psalms45:8 Junandalem lebur ka se sae, baji' ka se jahat; daddi junandalem epele sareng Allah, Allahepon junandalem; junandalem epasenneng ngalangkonge to-rato laenna." 
Psalms45:9 Rasoganna junandalem ro'om mennyan, dupa sareng candhana; junandalem gumbira meyarsa'agi tokang mosik e karaton gaddhing." 
Psalms45:10 E antaraepon bu' embanna karaton, badha tre-pottrena rato. E kanganna korse karaja'an ngadek dinaju rato ngagem pangangguy dhari emmas morne." 
Psalms45:11 Adhu, dinaju potre, ngereng peyarsa'agi ator abdidalem ka'dhinto, ja' kaemodi pole bangsa sareng la-balaepon junandalem." 
Psalms45:12 Junandalem raddin ngapencot atena rato; rato ka'issa' loraepon junandalem, toro' sadajana dhabuepon." 
Psalms45:13 Pandhudhu' Tirus abakta tor-ator ka junandalem; oreng sogi aehteyar ngala'a ate ka junandalem. 
Psalms45:14 Dinaju pottre maso', katon ce' agungnga, rasoganna asolam bennang emmas." 
Psalms45:15 Salerana earak ka rato, ngagem rasogan se acem-macem barnana, eerengngagi ban-paraban ca-kancana, se eatorragi ka rato keya." 
Psalms45:16 Reng-oreng jareya padha asorak gumbira e bakto eater maso' ka karaton. 
Psalms45:17 Junandalem, Guste Rato, badhi kaagunganna pottra bannya', se ngobasa'ana karaja'annepon bangatowana. Sadajana sareng junandalem epangobasa'ana saantero bume." 
Psalms45:18 Kalaban nyanyeyan ka'dhinto abdidalem makasohor junandalem ron-temoron, sa-bangsa badhi amolja'agiya junandalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms46:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Ngangguy nyanyeyan Alamot. 
Psalms46:2 Allah reya pangaoban ban kakowadanna sengko' ban ba'na; se to-sabakto bisa nolong e dhalem karekongan. 
Psalms46:3 Daddi sengko' ban ba'na ta' tako', maske bume agundhegga sakale, ban nong-gunong nyellem ka dhasarra tase' raja;" 
Psalms46:4 maske tase' ngamok, omba'na akantha gunong, ban mo'-gumo' agaledder ekenneng tambu omba'na." 
Psalms46:5 Badha gilina songay se maperak Kotthana Allah, kalenggiyanna Allah Se Mahatenggi." 
Psalms46:6 Allah alenggi e jadhiya, daddi kottha jareya ta' kera mosna; Salerana tanto apareng partolongan e bakto pajjar ngombar." 
Psalms46:7 Allah agarudhu' akantha galudhuk, bume lejjar; sa-bangsa baridhu, karaja'anna padha gujur." 
Psalms46:8 Sengko' ban ba'na esarengnge PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, Allahna Yakub ngaobi sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms46:9 Mara, abas apa se elampa'agi PANGERAN; makasambu' onggu se elampa'agi e bume!" 
Psalms46:10 Paperrangan saantero dunnya epaambu, gandhiba ban lembing epaancor, meng-tameng padha eobbar." 
Psalms46:11 Dhabuna, “Ambu se aperrang; ba'na kodu tao, Sengko' reya Allah, Sengko' agung e antarana sa-bangsa, agung e saantero bume reya.”" 
Psalms46:12 Sengko' ban ba'na esarengnge PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, Allahna Yakub ngaobi sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms47:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. 
Psalms47:2 Mara akopa' paperak, sa-bangsa kabbi! Anyanye pakaja amolja'agi Allah!" 
Psalms47:3 Sabab PANGERAN Se Mahatenggi reya nako'e, Rato Agung se ngobasane saantero bume." 
Psalms47:4 Sengko' ban ba'na padha epamennang ka sa-bangsa, epadaddi pangobasana ku-suku bangsa." 
Psalms47:5 Sengko' ban ba'na padha emeleyagi tana sangkolan, kagumbira'anna bangsa se ekataresnae Salerana." 
Psalms47:6 Allah la alenggi e korse karaja'anna, eerenge sorak ban monyena tarompet." 
Psalms47:7 Nyanyeyagi pojiyan amolja'agi Allah, nyanyeyagi pojiyan ngagungngagi Ratona sengko' ban ba'na!" 
Psalms47:8 Allah reya Rato e saantero bume, molja'agi Salerana ban nyanyeyan se bagus!" 
Psalms47:9 Allah alenggi e korse karaja'anna se socce; Salerana marenta sa-bangsa. 
Psalms47:10 Para pamimpinna sa-bangsa padha akompol menangka ommadda Allah se epojja Ibrahim. Sabab Allah reya Ratona rato, se talebat agung ban molja." 
Psalms48:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. 
Psalms48:2 PANGERAN reya agung onggu ban talebat emolja'agi e kotthana Allahna sengko' ban ba'na, e gumo'na se socce." 
Psalms48:3 Siyon, Gumo'na Allah, tenggi ban bagus, kotthana Rato Agung maperak saessena bume." 
Psalms48:4 Allah noduwagi ja' e kottha bintengnga, aman apolong ban Salerana." 
Psalms48:5 Mara abas, to-rato padha akompol, padha entara alorok." 
Psalms48:6 Tape nangale'e gumo' jareya, reng-oreng jareya heran; bingong, padha buru katako'en." 
Psalms48:7 E jadhiya reng-oreng jareya, ngetter sabadan, polana tako' ban sake', akantha babine' se rembi'a," 
Psalms48:8 akantha kapal se ancor e dhalem kaleng busbus. 
Psalms48:9 Sengko' ban ba'na padha ngedhing apa se elampa'agi Allah, sateya sengko' ban ba'na nangale'e jareya e kotthana Allah, PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa; Allah bakal ajaga'a ban abilla kottha jareya salanjangnga." 
Psalms48:10 E dhalem dalemmepon Junandalem abdidalem ker-mekker kataresna'annepon Junandalem, Guste Allah." 
Psalms48:11 Asmaepon Junandalem kalonta sareng eagungngagi e saantero bume, Junandalem marenta kalaban adil." 
Psalms48:12 Diggal ra'yat Siyon sareng Yehuda me' olle asorak anga-bunga lantaran Junandalem ngokom so-mosona. 
Psalms48:13 Mara alengleng e Siyon, moter e jadhiya, ban etong manarana." 
Psalms48:14 Abassagi geddhungnga, pareksa bintengnga, sopaja ba'na bisa'a acareta ka toronanna:" 
Psalms48:15 “Jareya Allah, Allahna sengko' ban ba'na salanjangnga, se mimpina sengko' ban ba'na salanjangnga.”" 
Psalms49:1 Jaburra kaom Korah. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. 
Psalms49:2 Mara edhingngagi, sa-bangsa, pasang kopengnga ba'na, pandhudhu' dunnya," 
Psalms49:3 oreng kene' ban oreng agung, se mesken ban se sogi." 
Psalms49:4 Sengko' ngoca'agiya ca'-oca' se bicaksana, essena tang pekkeran ce' dhalemma artena." 
Psalms49:5 Sengko' mekkera parkara parebasan, ban nerrangngagiya artena sambi nabbu calempong." 
Psalms49:6 Sengko' ta' tako' ngadhebbi babaja, e bakto ekeppong moso se jahat." 
Psalms49:7 Reng-oreng jareya ngandellagi kasogiyanna, ban ngedirragi dhi'-andhi'na." 
Psalms49:8 Sanyatana tadha' oreng settonga se bisa masalamet aba'na, otabana majar tebbusanna ka Allah." 
Psalms49:9 Tebbusanna nyabana manossa talebat larangnga, apa'a bai se ebajarragi ta' nyokobi bannya'na," 
Psalms49:10 kaangguy malopot dhari pate ban sopaja bisa'a odhi' salanjangnga. 
Psalms49:11 Kabbi oreng tao ja' maske oreng bicaksana sakale tanto mate keya. Bariya keya oreng gendheng ban oreng budhu, dhi'-andhi'na edina ka oreng laenna." 
Psalms49:12 Oreng se la mate bakal ennengnga e koburan salanjangnga; jareya se daddi bengkona saterrossa, maske sabellunna jareya andhi' tana sabannya'na." 
Psalms49:13 Oreng ta' kera lopot dhari pate polana kasogiyanna; padha ban keban, oreng jareya tanto mate keya." 
Psalms49:14 Kantha jareya oreng se ngandellagi aba'na, ban are pagi'na oreng se la senneng polana cacana." 
Psalms49:15 Reng-oreng jareya padha ban dumba, la etantowagi kodu mate; maot se daddi oreng ngowanna. Reng-oreng jareya epakala bi' reng-oreng se jujur atena, badanna bucco' ce' ceppedda e dunnyana oreng mate jau dhari bengkona se nyaman." 
Psalms49:16 Tape Allah tanto malopot sengko' dhari kobasana maot. 
Psalms49:17 Ja' tako' mon badha oreng se daddi sogi, ban dhi'-andhi'na sajan bannya'." 
Psalms49:18 Sabab oreng mon mate ta' kera ngeba pa-apa, dhi'-andhi'na ta' kera noro' ka koburanna." 
Psalms49:19 La'-mala' mon badha oreng se ontong odhi'na, ban ealem oreng bannya' polana ahasel ehteyarra," 
Psalms49:20 oreng jareya tanto nyosol bangatowana keya ka kennengngan se petteng kaangguy salanjangnga. 
Psalms49:21 Oreng ta' kera lopot dhari pate polana kasogiyanna; padha ban keban, oreng jareya tanto mate keya." 
Psalms50:1 Jaburra Asaf. PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, abu-dhabu, aera' ka saantero bume, dhari temor sampe' ka bara'." 
Psalms50:2 Dhari Siyon, kottha se paleng bagus, Allah ngaton mancorong sonarra." 
Psalms50:3 Tang Allah rabu ban ta' mendel, parabuna ejangadha'i apoy se lap-ngolap, ekalenglenge kaleng busbus se nako'e." 
Psalms50:4 Salerana nembali langnge' ban bume epakon nyaksene Salerana ngadili ommadda. 
Psalms50:5 Dhabuna, “Pakompol kabbi Tang ommat se la mabadha parjanjiyan ban Sengko', ban makoko parjanjiyan jareya bi' kurban sambelliyan.”" 
Psalms50:6 Langnge' aberta'agi ja' Allah ngadili ommadda, ja' Allah dibi' jareya hakimma." 
Psalms50:7 “He Tang ommat kabbi mara padha edhingngagi Sengko' acaca'a, Isra'il, Sengko' nyakseyana kasala'anna ba'na; Sengko' reya Allah, Allahna ba'na." 
Psalms50:8 Sengko' ngarane ba'na banne polana kurbanna ba'na; kurban obbaranna se terros badha e adha'an Sengko'. 
Psalms50:9 Sengko' ta' parlo ka sape dhari kandhangnga ba'na, otabana embi' dhari ebinna ba'na;" 
Psalms50:10 sabab sakabbinna keban se badha e alas Tang andhi' kabbi, bariya keya ebin e pan-barampan ebu pagunongan." 
Psalms50:11 Mano' e pagunongan Tang andhi' kabbi reya, bariya keya lok-mahlok se odhi' e ra-ara." 
Psalms50:12 Mon Sengko' lapar ta' parlo abala ka ba'na, sabab bume saesena Tang andhi' kabbi." 
Psalms50:13 Sengko' ta' ngakan dagingnga sape lake', bariya keya ta' ngenom dharana embi' lake'." 
Psalms50:14 Atorragi kurban sokkor ka Allah, teptebbi janjina ba'na ka Se Mahakobasa." 
Psalms50:15 Aserro ka Sengko' e bakto karekongan, bi' Sengko' ba'na epabebasa, ban ba'na ngagungngagiya Sengko'.”" 
Psalms50:16 Tape ka oreng jahat Pangeran adhabu, “Ba'na ta' olle nyebbuttagi Tang hokom, ta' olle acaca parkara Tang parjanjiyan." 
Psalms50:17 Sabab ba'na ta' endha' narema mon bi' Sengko' epaenga', ban nolak sakabbinna Tang parenta." 
Psalms50:18 Mon ba'na nangale'e maleng bi' ba'na etoro', ban ba'na apolong bi' reng-oreng se azina." 
Psalms50:19 Ba'na ros-terrosan acaca barang se jahat, ros-terrosan asadhiya se nepowa." 
Psalms50:20 Ba'na ros-terrosan metenna taretanna ban ca'-ngoca'e tadha' karena. 
Psalms50:21 Jareya lalakonna ba'na, tape Sengko' neng-enneng bai, daddi bi' ba'na Sengko' reya ekera tadha' bidana ban ba'na. Tape sateya Sengko' nyale ba'na kabbi ebukka' epace'terrangnga." 
Psalms50:22 Edhingangagi, ba'na kabbi se loppa ka Allah; jaga ja' sampe' ba'na epatompes bi' Sengko', ban tadha' se masalamet ba'na." 
Psalms50:23 Oreng se ngatorragi sokkor menangka kurbanna, jareya se ahormadi Sengko'; ban ka oreng se atoro' ka Tang parenta bi' Sengko' epasalamedda.”" 
Psalms51:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jabur karanganna Daud 
Psalms51:2 saellana epaemot Nabbi Natan polana azina ban Batsyeba. 
Psalms51:3 Kabellasi adidalem, Guste Allah, sabab Junandalem bellas ase salanjangnga. Patadha'agi dusa abdidalem lantaran bellas asena Junandalem se talebat rajana." 
Psalms51:4 Baccowagi kajahadan abdidalem sadajana; paberseyagi abdidalem dhari sadajana dusa. 
Psalms51:5 Sabab abdidalem ngakone sadajaepon kasala'an abdidalem, abdidalem enga' terros ka sadajaepon dusa abdidalem." 
Psalms51:6 Namong ka Junandalem, namong ka Junandalem abdidalem se dusa, ban abdidalem ngalakone sadajana se sareng Junandalem eanggep jahat. Daddi ampon sapantessa abdidalem eparenge okoman, kapotosannepon Junandalem adil sadajana." 
Psalms51:7 Salerressepon abdidalem jahat molae bakto lahir, ampon ekenneng dusa molae dhari gandhu'anna ebu." 
Psalms51:8 Se epondhut Junandalem namong ate se berse; esseyagi baten abdidalem sareng hekmattepon Junandalem. 
Psalms51:9 Pasocceyagi abdidalem, tanto abdidalem pas berse; baccowagi abdidalem, tanto abdidalem apoteyan dhari kapas." 
Psalms51:10 Edine abdidalem mereng kabar gumbira, sopaja ate abdidalem se sareng Junandalem eparemmok ka'dhinto kengenga asorak pole." 
Psalms51:11 Ja' ngoladi ka sa-dusa abdidalem, sareng paelangngagi sadajana kasala'an abdidalem." 
Psalms51:12 Ya Allah, parenge abdidalem ate se morne, anyare baten abdidalem sareng samangat se kowat." 
Psalms51:13 Ja' buwang abdidalem dhari ajunannepon Junandalem, ja' pondhut errohepon Junandalem se socce dhari abdidalem." 
Psalms51:14 Pagumbira pole ate abdidalem lantaran kasalameddan se dhateng dhari Junandalem, parenge abdidalem ate se ehlas ta'at ka Junandalem." 
Psalms51:15 Abdidalem laju ngajarragiya ka reng-oreng dusa sadaja papakonnepon Junandalem, sopaja reng-oreng gapaneka padha abali ka Junandalem." 
Psalms51:16 Ya Allah se masalamet abdidalem, palopottagi abdidalem dhari maot, sopaja kalaban ate senneng abdidalem aberta'agiya kaadilannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms51:17 Tolonge abdidalem acaca, GUSTE, sopaja abdidalem kengenga amolja'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms51:18 Kurban sambelliyan ta' katarema ka Junandalem; saompamaepon abdidalem ngatorragi kurban obbaran, sareng Junandalem ta' kera katarema jugan." 
Psalms51:19 Kurban abdidalem kaator ka Junandalem ate se andhap asor, Guste; Junandalem ta' nolak ate se andhap asor sareng se atobat." 
Psalms51:20 Ya Allah, duduwagi kasaeyannepon Junandalem ka Siyon, pamanjengngagi pole dhung-geddhungngepon Yerusalim." 
Psalms51:21 Tanto Junandalem pas kasokan narema kurban se pantes, sareng kurban obbaran; sape lake' badhi ekurbannagiya e mezbaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms52:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Daud," 
Psalms52:2 e bakto Doëg, oreng Edom, dhateng ngatore oneng ka Saul ja' Daud la napa' ka compo'na Abimelekh." 
Psalms52:3 He oreng se kowat, arapa ba'na me' ngandellagi kajahadanna ka oreng se ekataresnae Allah?" 
Psalms52:4 Saare benteng ba'na nepo ban andhi' sajja jahat; jilana ba'na akantha ladding panyokor se tajem. 
Psalms52:5 Ba'na aleburan ka kajahadan etembang kabecce'an, aleburan acaca lecek etembang acaca sabendherra." 
Psalms52:6 Kalaban cacana ba'na co-ngoco ban nyake'e atena oreng! 
Psalms52:7 Tape ba'na bi' Allah bakal epatompessa salanjangnga, ba'na bakal etangkebba, eereda dhari bengkona, epamosna'a dhari dunnyana oreng odhi'." 
Psalms52:8 Nangale'e jareya reng-oreng alem bakal tako'a, ngala'-gella' ba'na sambi ngoca'," 
Psalms52:9 “Arowa' oreng se ta' nyare pangaoban ka Allah, tape parcaja ka kakowadanna kasogiyanna, ban nyare kaamanan e dhalem barang rampasanna.”" 
Psalms52:10 Tape sengko' padha ban bungkana jaitun se biru e Padalemman Socce. Sengko' parcaja ja' Allah teptep taresna salanjangnga. 
Psalms52:11 Abdidalem ros-terrosan asokkora ka Junandalem, abdidalem aberta'agiya kabecce'annepon Junandalem e adha'epon sadajana ommadda." 
Psalms53:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Mahalat. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Daud. 
Psalms53:2 Oreng gendheng ngoca' e dhalem atena, “Allah reya tadha'.” Reng-oreng jareya tadha' se alakowa becce'; tengkana talebat juba'." 
Psalms53:3 Dhari sowarga Pangeran ngoladi ommat manossa, nyare oreng bicaksana se abakte ka Salerana." 
Psalms53:4 Tape reng-oreng la padha nyaleyot ban bejjat kabbi, tadha' settonga se bagus tengkana." 
Psalms53:5 Dhabuna Pangeran, “Ba' ta' apangrasa'a reng-oreng jahat jareya? Odhi'na dhari arampase dhi'-andhi'na Tang ommat, ban ta' tao adu'a ka Sengko'.”" 
Psalms53:6 Oreng jahat bakal padha'a katako'en, maske tadha' barang se kodu ekatako'e, polana Allah nabur tolangnga reng-oreng se ngeppong ba'na; Allah nolak reng-oreng jareya, daddi ba'na bakal makala'a reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms53:7 Moga dhari Gumo' Siyon dhatengnga kasalameddan monggu ka ommat Isra'il. Saapa'a gumbirana oreng toronanna Yakub mon kabadha'anna bi' Allah epabali akantha asalla pole. 
Psalms54:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Daud," 
Psalms54:2 e bakto oreng Zifi dhateng mator ka Saul ja' Daud ngetek e bengkona reng-oreng jareya. 
Psalms54:3 Ya Allah, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem lantaran kobasaepon Junandalem, parenge abdidalem kaadilan lantaran kakowadannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms54:4 Peyarsa'agi parnyo'onan abdidalem, Guste Allah, peyarsa'agi ator abdidalem." 
Psalms54:5 Sabab abdidalem eserrang reng-oreng manca, epateyana reng-oreng se angko, reng-oreng se ta' marduli ka Allah." 
Psalms54:6 Tape Allah reya se nolonge sengko'; PANGERAN reya se abillai sengko'. 
Psalms54:7 Salerana ngokom tang moso ngangguy kajahadanna dibi', mate'e tang moso, sabab Allah esto ka sengko'." 
Psalms54:8 Kalaban ate ehlas abdidalem ngatorragi kurban ka Junandalem, GUSTE, sareng asokkor ka Junandalem lantaran Junandalem sae." 
Psalms54:9 Junandalem malopot abdidalem dhari sadajana kasossa'an, ban abdidalem nengale moso abdidalem epakala." 
Psalms55:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Daud. 
Psalms55:2 Peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, Guste, ja' pongkore parnyo'onan abdidalem." 
Psalms55:3 Peyarsa'agi abdidalem, parenge abdidalem jawaban, abdidalem ancor lantaran kasossa'an." 
Psalms55:4 Abdidalem ngalengsang lantaran eara moso sareng etendhes oreng jahat. Odhi' abdidalem epasossa reng-oreng gapaneka, abdidalem ekapeggelli sareng ekabaji'i." 
Psalms55:5 Abdidalem ngalengsang e dhalem ate, katako'en ngadhebbi babaja pate." 
Psalms55:6 Abdidalem katako'en sareng gujuden, arassa marenges sareng serrem." 
Psalms55:7 Ja' sakenga abdidalem gadhuwan kalembang akadi dara, tanto abdidalem ngabber nyare kennengngan se aman taremtem." 
Psalms55:8 Abdidalem ngabberra ka jauna, badhi ennengnga e ra-ara." 
Psalms55:9 Abdidalem duliya nyare pangaoban, sopaja lopoda dhari ojan derres sareng kaleng busbus." 
Psalms55:10 Pabingongngagi so-moso abdidalem, Guste, pasalbuddagi cacana, sabab abdidalem nengale kakerrasan sareng tokar e dhalem kottha." 
Psalms55:11 Seyang sareng malem reng-oreng gapaneka alengleng e kottha, ngalakone kajahadan, madhateng kasossa'an." 
Psalms55:12 E man-ka'dhimman badha se eancor; bannya' oreng ekaneyaja sareng etepo e lon-alon sareng e rong-lorong. 
Psalms55:13 Ja' sakenga moso se nyale sengko', sengko' gi' betta; ja' sakenga moso se ya-nyeya sengko', sengko' gi' bisa ngetek." 
Psalms55:14 Tape me' ba'na, tang kanca, tang sahabat, ba'na oreng se semma' ka sengko' se akiyanat ka sengko'." 
Psalms55:15 Lamba' sengko' ban ba'na along-polong acaca ce' nyamanna, biyasana areng-bareng noro' kabakteyan e Padalemman Socce." 
Psalms55:16 Mandar tang moso mateya dadagan, maso' dhi'-odhi' ka dunnyana oreng mate, sabab kajahadan mossa'e bengko ban atena." 
Psalms55:17 Tape sengko' aserro ka Allah, sengko' tanto epasalamet bi' PANGERAN." 
Psalms55:18 Sengko' aserro ban nanges malem ban seyang ban Pangeran meyarsa tang sowara. 
Psalms55:19 Sengko' epasalamet dhari serranganna moso, se padha dhateng anyo-ronyo." 
Psalms55:20 Allah se marenta salanggengnga, tanto meyarsa'agi sengko' ban makala reng-oreng jareya. Sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' atobat dhari salana, sarta ta' tako' ka Allah." 
Psalms55:21 Bekkas tang kanca nyerrang ca-kancana, ta' neptebbi janjina." 
Psalms55:22 Ca'-oca'na alos lemma' manes, tape e dhalem atena baji' ka oreng. Cacana alos tadha' bandhinganna, tape naccek akantha peddhang se ce' tajemma." 
Psalms55:23 Passra'agi kakobateranna ba'na ka PANGERAN, tanto ba'na etolong bi' Salerana; sabab oreng se jujur atena bi' PANGERAN ta' kera epakala ka mosona." 
Psalms55:24 Namong Junandalem, Guste Allah, bakal ajurukkagiya reng-oreng gapaneka ka dhalem jurang se paleng dhalem. Tokang tepo sareng tokang mate'e oreng ta' kera odhi' kantos saparona omorra. Namong abdidalem parcaja ka Junandalem." 
Psalms56:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Dara se ta' endha' amonye, dhari dhaera se jau. Jaburra Daud e bakto epega' oreng Filistin e Gat." 
Psalms56:2 Ya Allah, kaneserre abdidalem, Guste, sabab abdidalem eserrang, ekaneyaja moso ros-terrosan." 
Psalms56:3 Saare benteng abdidalem enyek-enyek moso; bannya' se ngamoso abdidalem, Guste." 
Psalms56:4 E bakto abdidalem tako', Junandalem se earep abdidalem, Guste PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa." 
Psalms56:5 Sengko' ngagungngagi Allah polana se ejanjiyagi Salerana; sengko' parcaja ka Salerana, daddi sengko' ta' tako', manossa ta' kera bangal apa-rapa ka sengko'." 
Psalms56:6 Saare benteng moso marepot sareng masossa abdidalem, padha aehteyar terros macalaka'a abdidalem" 
Psalms56:7 Moso abdidalem padha akompol ngetek areng-sareng, nyendhemme sadaja se elakone abdidalem, nyare kasempadan mateyana abdidalem." 
Psalms56:8 Ba' salamedda reng-oreng gapaneka dhari kajahadanna? Ya Allah, patompessagi reng-oreng gapaneka e bakto Junandalem duka!" 
Psalms56:9 Junandalem se ngetong kasangsara'an abdidalem, Junandalem ngagali bannya'epon aeng mata abdidalem. Ponapa sadajana ta' ebadhi paretongan sareng Junandalem?" 
Psalms56:10 E are bakto sengko' aserro ka Allah, moso bakal epokola sampe' padha nyorot, sabab sengko' tao Allah nolonge sengko'." 
Psalms56:11 Sengko' ngagungngagi Guste ALLAH polana apa se ejanjiyagi Salerana. 
Psalms56:12 Sengko' parcaja ka Salerana, daddi sengko' ta' tako' pa-apa, manossa biyasa ta' ngenneng apa-rapa ka sengko' reya." 
Psalms56:13 Ya Allah, abdidalem neptebbana janji ka Junandalem, sareng ngatorragiya kurban sokkor ka Junandalem." 
Psalms56:14 Sabab Junandalem malopot abdidalem dhari maot, Junandalem ajaga abdidalem sopaja ta' labu. Daddi abdidalem kengeng odhi' e dhalem pangaobanna Allah, e dhalem sonar se nerrange sadajana se odhi'." 
Psalms57:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Ja' mamosna. Jaburra Daud, e bakto buru ka dhalem guwa nyenglae Saul." 
Psalms57:2 Kaneserre abdidalem, Guste, kaneserre abdidalem, sabab ka Junandalem abdidalem nyare pangaoban. Abdidalem nyare pangeteggan e baba'anna kalembangngepon Junandalem, anante' kantos kaleng busbus ambu." 
Psalms57:3 Sengko' aserro ka Allah Se Mahatenggi, ka Allah se nolonge sengko'." 
Psalms57:4 Dhari sowarga Allah nyaot ban masalamet sengko'; makala reng-oreng se nendhes sengko'. Allah noduwagiya ja' Salerana esto ka sengko', ban taresna terros ka sengko'." 
Psalms57:5 Sengko' ekeppong moso, se akantha macan se ngakanan manossa. Gigina akantha tombak ban pana, jilana akantha peddhang se ce' tajemma." 
Psalms57:6 Ya Allah, ngereng duduwagi kaagungannepon Junandalem e langnge', sareng kamolja'annepon Junandalem e bume." 
Psalms57:7 Moso abdidalem masang jebbak ajira'a abdidalem, abdidalem ce' sossana. E lorong se elebadi abdidalem epasange lobang, namong oreng gapaneka dibi' se gaggar labu ka dhalem lobang gapaneka." 
Psalms57:8 Abdidalem parcaja onggu, Guste Allah, parcaja onggu, abdidalem anyanye ngagungngagiya Junandalem." 
Psalms57:9 Mara jaga, tang sokma! Mara jaga gambus ban calempong! Sengko' ajaga'ana pajjar." 
Psalms57:10 Guste Pangeran, abdidalem asokkora ka Junandalem, e antaraepon sa-bangsa. Abdidalem terro anyanyeya nyanyeyan pojiyan kaagem Junandalem e antaraepon ommat manossa." 
Psalms57:11 Sabab kataresna'annepon Junandalem raja kantos ka langnge' ban kaestowannepon Junandalem kantos ka ondhem. 
Psalms57:12 Ya Allah, ngereng duduwagi kaagungannepon Junandalem e langnge', sareng kamolja'annepon Junandalem e bume." 
Psalms58:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Ja' mamosna. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms58:2 Para pangobasa, apa ba'na adil e dhalem aberri' potosan? Apa ba'na jujur e dhalem ngadili manossa?" 
Psalms58:3 Enja', ba'na andhi' sajja jahat, ban pole ba'na ngalakone kakerrasan e nagara reya." 
Psalms58:4 Oreng jahat la kalero jalan molae gi' egandhu' ebuna, la co-ngoco manossa laenna molae bakto lahir e dunnya." 
Psalms58:5 Reng-oreng jareya agandhu' racon akantha olar se badha opassa, kopengnga esompet akantha kobbra se kopok" 
Psalms58:6 se ta' ngedhing sowarana pawang se penter otabana sowarana tokang seher se cakep. 
Psalms58:7 Ya Allah, papotongngagi gigina reng-oreng gapaneka, dabu'agi seyongnga can-macan se gi' ngodha ka'dhissa', GUSTE." 
Psalms58:8 Dinggal sadajana me' olle mosna akadi aeng se ngebbat, akadi pana se tompol." 
Psalms58:9 Dinggal sadajana me' olle akadi congcong se ngalelle daddi aeng that-lenthat, akadi babaji' se mate sabellunna nengale tera'." 
Psalms58:10 Sabellunna apangrasa, reng-oreng gapaneka ampon mate akadi ombut se gi' ta' raja, padha obus ekebbat angen tadha' bidana sareng tamennan se kerreng." 
Psalms58:11 Nangale'e oreng jahat eokom, oreng se jujur padha perak, sokona padha ebaccowe ban dharana oreng daraka." 
Psalms58:12 Oreng bakal padha'a ngoca' kantha reya, “Oreng becce' pajat olle ganjaran, pajat bendher, badha Allah se ahakime bume.”" 
Psalms59:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Ja' mamosna. Jaburra Daud, e bakto Saul makon oreng ngawase kalenggiyanna Daud se epateyana." 
Psalms59:2 Ya Allah, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem dhari sadajana moso, Guste, aobi abdidalem dhari reng-oreng se nyerrang abdidalem." 
Psalms59:3 Pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari oreng se jahat, palopottagi abdidalem dhari oreng se dujan mate'e oreng." 
Psalms59:4 Oladi, reng-oreng ka'dhissa' padha ngaddhang mateyana abdidalem, reng-oreng se kejjem asakongkel ngamoso abdidalem. Mangkana banne lantaran abdidalem alako dusa otabana ta' atoro' ka papakon, GUSTE." 
Psalms59:5 Jugan banne lantaran kasala'an abdidalem, reng-oreng gapaneka ru-kaburu padha aya-sadhiya." 
Psalms59:6 Ngereng ngadek, PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, tolong abdidalem Ya Allah Isra'il, ngereng oladi dibi'. Ngereng ngadek sareng okommagi sa-bangsa sadajana, ja' kaneserre reng-oreng jahat se akiyanat." 
Psalms59:7 E bakto para' compet are reng-oreng gapaneka abali, adherreng akadi pate' sambi alengleng e kottha." 
Psalms59:8 Reng-oreng gapaneka terros mon-semmonan sareng nye-ngenye; cacana tajem akadi peddhang, nyangka tadha' oreng se mereng." 
Psalms59:9 Tape sareng Junandalem reng-oreng gapaneka ekala'-gella', GUSTE, sadajana bangsa gapaneka sareng Junandalem eya-seya." 
Psalms59:10 Junandalem kakowadan abdidalem, Junandalem se earep abdidalem, Junandalem pangongseyan abdidalem, Guste Allah." 
Psalms59:11 Lantaran kabecce'anna tang Allah rabu manggi'i sengko' reya; sengko' epanangale tang moso epakala. 
Psalms59:12 Ja' pate'e reng-oreng gapaneka, Guste, sopaja bangsa abdidalem ta' loppa'a. Pasalebbudan sareng pakala reng-oreng gapaneka sareng kobasaepon Junandalem, Guste pangaoban abdidalem sadajana," 
Psalms59:13 Sabab reng-oreng gapaneka dusa lantaran cacana; dinggal sadajana me' padha tajira' e dhalem kasombonganna, sabab reng-oreng gapaneka dujan abasto sareng lecek oca'na." 
Psalms59:14 Guste Allah, pamateyagi reng-oreng gapaneka e bakto Junandalem duka, pamateyagi kantos tadha' karena. Daddi sadajana oreng tanto oneng ja' Allah marenta Isra'il, ban pamarenta'annepon malebar saantero bume." 
Psalms59:15 E bakto para' compet are, reng-oreng gapaneka abali, adherreng akadi pate' sambi alengleng e kottha." 
Psalms59:16 Reng-oreng gapaneka alengleng nyare teddha'an, manabi ta' kennyang padha rak-dharagan." 
Psalms59:17 Namong abdidalem anyanye parkara kakowadannepon Junandalem; sabban gi' laggu abdidalem anyanye epakaja parkara kataresna'an sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem. Sabab Junandalem pangongseyan abdidalem, kennengnganna abdidalem nyare pangaoban e bakto sossa." 
Psalms59:18 Ya Allah, kakowadan abdidalem, abdidalem anyanye nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan pojiyan kaagem Junandalem, sabab Junandalem pangaoban abdidalem, Guste Allah, se kataresnan." 
Psalms60:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot lagu: Kembang kacobung kasakseyan. Jabur pangajaran dhari Daud," 
Psalms60:2 e bakto merrange oreng Aram-Mesopotamia ban oreng Aram-Zoba, ban e bakto Yowab gubar makala oreng Edom dhubellas ebu e Cora Accen." 
Psalms60:3 Ya Allah, Junandalem nolak abdidalem sadajana, abdidalem sadaja edinggal epakala. Junandalem duka ka abdidalem sadajana, samangken ngereng pabaliyagi akadi gi' dhimenna." 
Psalms60:4 Junandalem magundhek bume kantos tennar, palerressagi se la-bella, sabab bume gundhek." 
Psalms60:5 Sareng Junandalem ommadda edinggal nanggung kasossa'an raja sareng berra'; kantos padha dhing-tabarindhing akadi oreng mabu'. 
Psalms60:6 Junandalem apareng parengeddan ka oreng se alem, sopaja padha'a lopot dhari okoman." 
Psalms60:7 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem sadaja, polana kobasana Junandalem se raja; peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem sadaja sopaja reng-oreng se ekataresnae Junandalem salamedda." 
Psalms60:8 Dhari kalenggiyanna se socce Allah adhabu, “Sengko' asoraga, tana Sikhem bi' Sengko' egi-bagiya, Cora Sukot eelloda." 
Psalms60:9 Gileyad ban Manasye Tang andhi', Efraim Tang topi baja ban Yehuda Tang tongket karaja'an." 
Psalms60:10 Tape Mo'ab kennengnganna pamaccowanna Tang soko; Sengko' asorak polana mennang ka Filistea. Edom bi' Sengko' eontale Tang kasot, menangka tandha ja' tana jareya andhi'na Sengko'.”" 
Psalms60:11 Sapa se ngeba'a sengko' ka Edom? Sapa se ngeba'a sengko' ka kottha se abinteng jareya? 
Psalms60:12 Ya Allah, ponapa Junandalem ta' asarengngana abdidalem sadajana? Ponapa Junandalem ta' majuwa asarengnge tantara abdidalem sadajana?" 
Psalms60:13 Nyo'ona tolong abdidalem ngadhebbi moso, sabab bantowannepon manossa tadha' gunana." 
Psalms60:14 Abareng ban Allah sengko' ban ba'na gaga' parjuga, Allah jareya se makala mosona sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms61:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Dhari Daud. 
Psalms61:2 Ya Allah, peyarsa'agi serrona abdidalem, gateyagi du'a abdidalem." 
Psalms61:3 Jau dhari compo' abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, sabab abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan pangarebban pole. Aterragi abdidalem ka pangongseyan se aman, se monggu ka abdidalem talebat tenggina." 
Psalms61:4 Sabab Junandalem pangaoban abdidalem, partahanan se kowat e dhalem ngadhebbi moso." 
Psalms61:5 Nyo'ona edi abdidalem ngamponga kennengngan e kemahepon Junandalem saomorra, sopaja abdidalem aman ngaop e babana kalembangngepon Junandalem." 
Psalms61:6 Sabab Junandalem ampon meyarsa janji abdidalem, Guste Allah, sareng marenge abdidalem sangkolan gadhuwanna oreng alem." 
Psalms61:7 Moga rato lanjanga omor sopaja odhi' ron-temoron. 
Psalms61:8 Moga salerana marenta'a salanjangnga menangka rato peleyanna Junandalem, Guste Allah, jaga'agi salerana e dhalem kataresna'an sareng kaestowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms61:9 Daddi abdidalem anyanye, mojiya Junandalem saterrossa, sambi neptebbana janji abdidalem e dhalem re-saarena." 
Psalms62:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot: Yedutun. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms62:2 Tang sokma sabbar anante' Allah, pera' Salerana se bisa masalamet sengko' reya." 
Psalms62:3 Pera' Salerana se ajaga ban masalamet sengko', Salerana se abillai sengko', sengko' ta' kera gundhek." 
Psalms62:4 Sampe' bila ba'na kabbi nyerranga oreng se la padha ban geddhung se mereng, akantha geddhung se la para' gujura?" 
Psalms62:5 Ba'na pera' aneyat magaggara oreng jareya dhari kadhudhuganna se tenggi. Ba'na dujan lecek cacana; bibirra ba'na aberkadi, tape abasto e atena." 
Psalms62:6 Tang sokma sabbar anante' Allah, pera' Salerana se bisa masalamet sengko' reya." 
Psalms62:7 Pera' Salerana se ajaga ban masalamet sengko'; Salerana se abillai sengko', sengko' ta' kera gundhek." 
Psalms62:8 Allah jareya se marenge sengko' kasalameddan ban kahormadan, Allah jareya se kowat, se ajaga ban se abillai tang aba'." 
Psalms62:9 He tang bangsa, mara terros nyo'on ka Allah; totorragi essena atena ba'na ka Salerana, sabab Salerana jareya pangaobanna ba'na." 
Psalms62:10 Manossa tadha' bidana ban nyaba sasergu'an, raja kene' padha tadha' argana. Mon etembang manossa reya etemmo ja' sanyatana dhammang, adhammangan dhari nyaba sasergu'an." 
Psalms62:11 Ja' ngarep hasella pamerressan, ban ja' ngandellagi barang rampasan. La'-mala' mon kasogiyanna ba'na atamba, atena ba'na ja' pacekka' e jadhiya." 
Psalms62:12 Pan-barampan kale sengko' ngedhing Allah adhabu ja' kakobasa'an reya asalla dhari Salerana," 
Psalms62:13 ban pole ja' Allah reya teptep taresna. Junandalem, Guste, se apareng babales ka saneyap oreng, menorot lalakonna bang-sebang." 
Psalms63:1 Jaburra Daud, e bakto badha e ra-ara Yehuda." 
Psalms63:2 Ya Allah, Junandalem Allah abdidalem, abdidalem nyare'e sareng kerrong ka Junandalem. Akadi tana kajal se terro ka aeng, saka'dhinto jugan abdidalem ce' terrona tapanggiya sareng Junandalem." 
Psalms63:3 Edine abdidalem mandeng Junandalem e kalenggiyanna, sopaja nengale kakowadan sareng kaagungannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms63:4 Kataresna'annepon Junandalem aarga'an dhari odhi', daddi abdidalem ngagungngagi Junandalem." 
Psalms63:5 Abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem saomorra, ngangka' tanang ka Junandalem sambi adu'a." 
Psalms63:6 Abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem sambi asorak, sabab sokma abdidalem sareng Junandalem epakennyang, akadi se eparenge teddha'an se nyaman." 
Psalms63:7 E bakto dhung-tedhungan abdidalem emot ka Junandalem; samalem benteng abdidalem mekkere Junandalem," 
Psalms63:8 sabab Junandalem se nolong abdidalem; e babana kalembangngepon Junandalem abdidalem ngaop sambi anyanye kalaban ate gumbira. 
Psalms63:9 Abdidalem nagenne ka Junandalem epasekken, astaepon Junandalem se nyekkenne sareng masalamet abdidalem." 
Psalms63:10 Namong reng-oreng se mateyana abdidalem bakal torona ka dunnyaepon oreng mate. 
Psalms63:11 Reng-oreng gapaneka badhi tebasa e dhalem paperrangan, daddi teddha'anna burun alas." 
Psalms63:12 Rato badhi anga-bunga lantaran partolongannepon Allah; oreng se asompa bit asmaepon Allah bakal amolja'agiya asmana, namong colo'epon oreng se lecegan bakal esompedda." 
Psalms64:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms64:2 Ya Allah, peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem e bakto sossa, parenge salamet nyaba abdidalem dhari moso se nako'e." 
Psalms64:3 Pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari reng-oreng daraka se asakongkel, dhari sajjana reng-oreng jahat se salenter." 
Psalms64:4 Reng-oreng gapaneka jilana epatajem akadi peddhang, makalowar caca se kejjem akadi pana." 
Psalms64:5 Dhari pangetegganna reng-oreng gapaneka mabalattra careta lecek, tadha' tako'na metenna oreng se ta' sala." 
Psalms64:6 Reng-oreng gapaneka koko neggu'i neyadda se jahat, aparembagan masanga jebbak; ca'epon pangrasana tadha' oreng se nengale." 
Psalms64:7 Reng-oreng gapaneka gadhuwan sajja jahat, laju ngoca', “Sengko' ban ba'na andhi' sajja jahat se samporna.” Ate ban buddina manossa ce' dhalemma, tadha' oreng se oneng ka essena." 
Psalms64:8 Tape Allah ngaceddagi panana ka reng-oreng jareya, reng-oreng jareya pas loka daksakala." 
Psalms64:9 Reng-oreng jareya mate polana cacana dibi'; se nangale padha pek-kepeggan kabbi. 
Psalms64:10 Reng-oreng laju padha katako'en kabbi; padha mekkere sabarang se la elampa'agi Allah ban aberta'agi sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana. 
Psalms64:11 Daddi oreng becce' bakal padha'a perak, polana sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN. Kabbi bakal ngaoba ka Salerana; reng-oreng se jujur se amolja'agi asmana." 
Psalms65:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. Nyanyeyan. 
Psalms65:2 Ya Allah, ampon sapantessa abdidalem sadaja amolja'agi Junandalem e Siyon, sareng neptebbi janji abdidalem sadaja ka Junandalem." 
Psalms65:3 Sabab Junandalem se ngabbuli du'a; sadajana oreng ngadhep ka Junandalem lantaran dusa. 
Psalms65:4 Sa-dusa abdidalem talebat berra' rassana, namong sareng Junandalem esapora." 
Psalms65:5 Pojur onggu oreng se epele Junandalem, se edikane epaenneng e kalenggiyannepon Junandalem. Abdidalem sadaja badhi epatobuga sareng sadajana se sae, e dalemmepon Junandalem, kalenggiyannepon Junandalem se socce." 
Psalms65:6 Junandalem nyaodi abdidalem sadaja kalaban marenge kamennangan, Junandalem mabadha sabarang se ajib kaangguy masalamet abdidalem sadaja. Junandalem se earep sadajana bangsa, kantos ka kennengngan se alengka tase' raja e jauna." 
Psalms65:7 Junandalem majaga nong-gunong kalaban kakowadannepon Junandalem dibi', kaangguy noduwagi kobasana Junandalem se parjuga." 
Psalms65:8 Junandalem maceddu garudhu'na tase' raja sareng omba' se raja, sareng masabbar sa-bangsa se padha baridhu." 
Psalms65:9 Sadaja pandhudhu' bume tako' sareng hormat nengale lalampa'annepon Junandalem se tadha' bandhinganna. Saantero bume dhari konco' se settong ka settongnga sareng Junandalem epasorak talebat gumbirana. 
Psalms65:10 Tana gapaneka sareng Junandalem epeyara sareng eparenge ojan, epalandhu kantos ce' bannya'na hasella. Ngay-songay sareng Junandalem eesse'e kantos possa' aengnga, reng-oreng esadhiyai gandum sadajana; kadi ka'dhinto caraepon Junandalem apareng hasel bume." 
Psalms65:11 Tana se elebadi salaga sareng Junandalem eaenge, tanana se apel-kempel ebaccae. Tanana epaardhung sareng ojan, bi'-selbi'na epajurno." 
Psalms65:12 Lantaran kasaeyannepon Junandalem, sabban taon Junandalem nyadhiya'agi hasel tamennan; kennengngan se erabuwi Junandalem hasella ce' bannya'na." 
Psalms65:13 Ra-ara possa' embi' sareng dumbana, sadaja gumo'na anga-bunga." 
Psalms65:14 Lon-talon katotoban dumba, ra-cora possa' sareng gandum. Sadaja padha asorak sareng anyanye ce' peragga." 
Psalms66:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Nyanyeyan. Mara asorak amolja'agi Allah, ommat manossa sadunnya!" 
Psalms66:2 Mara anyanye ngagungngagi asmana, molja'agi Salerana ngangguy ji-pojiyan." 
Psalms66:3 Mara mator ka Allah, “Se elampa'agi Junandalem makasambu' ate onggu! Moso asojud katako'en ka Junandalem, amarga kobasaepon Junandalem talebat rajana." 
Psalms66:4 Saantero bume asojud nyemba ka Junandalem, padha anyanye amolja'agi asmaepon Junandalem.”" 
Psalms66:5 Mara nyander, abassagi apa se elampa'agi Allah, makasambu' ate onggu se elampa'agi Salerana e antarana manossa!" 
Psalms66:6 Tase' eoba epadaddi tana kerreng, elebadi bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na kalaban ajalan soko sampe' entas ka tenggangan. Daddi sengko' ban ba'na padha perak polana sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms66:7 Allah salanjangnga marenta kalaban parjuga. Sa-bangsa eoladi ban ejaga, sopaja se aberonta' ta' ngenneng ga'-maangga' ka Salerana." 
Psalms66:8 Mara molja'agi tang Allah, sa-bangsa, poji Salerana, pakaja sowarana!" 
Psalms66:9 Salerana ajaga sengko' ban ba'na sopaja pagguna odhi', ejaga sopaja ta' sampe'a labu." 
Psalms66:10 Ya Allah, Junandalem ampon ngoji abdidalem sadaja akadi oreng se mamorne salaka e dhalem apoy se raja." 
Psalms66:11 Sareng Junandalem, abdidalem sadaja edinggal tabalusok ka dhalem jebbak, sareng eparenge tanggungan se talebat berra'." 
Psalms66:12 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem sadaja edinggal enyek-enyek moso; abdidalem sadaja lebat e banjir sareng apoy. Namong samangken abdidalem sadaja sareng Junandalem ampon ebakta ka kennengngan se ma'mor. 
Psalms66:13 Abdidalem abakta'a kurban obbaran ka dalemmepon Junandalem, sareng neptebbana janji abdidalem ka Junandalem," 
Psalms66:14 janji se ekoca'agi abdidalem e bakto abdidalem kasossa'an. 
Psalms66:15 Abdidalem ngatorragi ka Junandalem kurban obbaran keban peleyan, embi' dumba sareng sape lake', okossa ngebbul ka langnge'." 
Psalms66:16 Mara padha dha' enna', reng-oreng alem, bi' sengko' ecareta'ana apa se elampa'agi Allah ka sengko'." 
Psalms66:17 Sengko' la aserro nyo'on tolong ka Salerana; sateya sengko' anyanye pojiyan amolja'agi asmana. 
Psalms66:18 Ja' sakenga sengko' lebur mekkere kajahadan, Pangeran tanto ta' kasokan meyarsa'agi maske sakejja'." 
Psalms66:19 Tape Allah meyarsa'agi tang du'a, sarta agateyagi tang parnyo'onan." 
Psalms66:20 Sengko' amolja'agi Allah sabab Allah ta' nolak tang du'a, ban taresna ka sengko' tadha' ambuna." 
Psalms67:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms67:2 Moga Allah bellas ban aberkadi sengko' ban ba'na, moga Salerana ngoladana ka sengko' ban ba'na kalaban mora ate." 
Psalms67:3 Ya Allah, moga karsaepon Junandalem ekaonengana oreng saantero bume, moga kasalameddannepon Junandalem ekaonengana sareng sa-bangsa." 
Psalms67:4 Ya Allah, moga sa-bangsa amolja'agiya Junandalem, moga sa-bangsa padha'a asokkor ka Junandalem." 
Psalms67:5 Moga sa-bangsa padha'a asorak kaperagen, sambi asorak kalaban gumbira. Sabab Junandalem adil e dhalem marenta sareng nonton saneyap bangsa e dunnya." 
Psalms67:6 Ya Allah, moga sa-bangsa amolja'agiya Junandalem, moga sa-bangsa padha'a asokkor ka Junandalem." 
Psalms67:7 Tana la makalowar hasella, Allah, Allahna sengko' ban ba'na se apareng berkat." 
Psalms67:8 Allah aberkadi sengko' ban ba'na; moga Salerana ehormadi saantero dunnya. 
Psalms68:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms68:2 Allah ngadek, mosona epabalessudan, oreng se baji' ka Salerana padha buru asalebbudan." 
Psalms68:3 Allah ngojuk reng-oreng jareya, epakantha okos se ekebbat angen sampe' elang. Akantha lilin se ngalelle e dhalem apoy kantha jareya oreng jahat mosna e ajunanna Allah." 
Psalms68:4 Tape oreng alem perak ban anga-bunga, asorak kaperagen e ajunanna Allah." 
Psalms68:5 Mara nyanye amolja'agi Allah, molja'agi asmana, sadhiya'agi jalan raja se elebadana Salerana se netene ondhem. Asmana iya areya PANGERAN – mara anga-bunga e ajunanna!" 
Psalms68:6 Allah se alenggi e Padalemmanna se Socce jareya ramana kana' jatim ban se abillai para randha se ta' andhi' lake. 
Psalms68:7 Allah apareng kennengngan ka oreng se kadibi'an, mabebas para tahanan sampe' padha senneng odhi'na. Tape reng-oreng se ta' atoro' ka Pangeran kodu enneng e tana se kajal." 
Psalms68:8 Ya Allah, e bakto Junandalem nonton ommadda se ajalan lebat e ra-ara se kerreng," 
Psalms68:9 bume agaledder, ojan ngalowa e ajunannepon Junandalem lantaran rabuna Allah Sinay, Allah Isra'il." 
Psalms68:10 Junandalem matoron ojan sabannya'na ka bume, mabali one tana kajal se kerreng." 
Psalms68:11 Ommattepon Junandalem pas enneng e ka'dhissa'; e dhalem kabecce'annepon Junandalem, Guste, Junandalem meyara oreng mesken." 
Psalms68:12 Pangeran apareng potosan, babine'an laju padha ngeba berta:" 
Psalms68:13 “To-rato ban pasukanna la padha buru!” Paburuna akantha dara ngabber ka tenggina. Babine'an e bengkona padha gi-magi salaka ban emmas se edina'agi. Maske bannya' se ta' noro' aperrang, ommadda Allah la olle kamennangan." 
Psalms68:14  
Psalms68:15 E bakto Allah Se Mahakobasa masalebbudan to-rato e jadhiya, salju toron dhari Gunong Salmon." 
Psalms68:16 Gunong Basyan reya ce' rajana, gunong se bannya' konco'na." 
Psalms68:17 Dhari co'-konco'na se bannya' jareya arapa ba'na me' tamburuwan ngabas ka Gumo' Siyon se epele Pangeran menangka kalenggiyanna? PANGERAN alenggiya e jadhiya salanjangnga. 
Psalms68:18 Allah abakta kareta se koko aebuwan bannya'na rabu katon ce' agungnga, dhari Sinay ka kennengngan se socce rowa." 
Psalms68:19 PANGERAN ongga ka kennengngan se tenggi, abakta tawanan sabannya'na. Salerana narema tor-ator dhari manossa, la'-mala' dhari kaom pamberonta', sopaja padha'a bisa enneng e jadhiya apolong ban GUSTE Allah." 
Psalms68:20 Molja'agi Pangeran, sabab Pangeran jareya Allah se masalamet sengko' ban ba'na, Se re-saarena mekol tanggunganna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms68:21 Allahna sengko' ban ba'na reya PANGERAN se apareng kasalameddan. se mabebas sengko' ban ba'na dhari pate. 
Psalms68:22 Allah tanto maremmok cethagga so-mosona, reng-oreng se terros odhi' e dhalem dusa." 
Psalms68:23 Dhabuna Pangeran, “He Tang ommat, Sengko' ngeba mosona ba'na dhari Basyan, bi' Sengko' egiba abali dhari dhasarra tase' raja," 
Psalms68:24 sopaja ba'na maccowa sokona ban dharana reng-oreng jareya, ban te'-pate'na ba'na bisa'a ajilat dhara jareya sampe' tobuk sakennyangnga.”" 
Psalms68:25 Ya Allah, sadajana padha nengale paway kamennanganna Junandalem, Guste, rak-aragannepon Junandalem, GUSTE Allah, tang Allah, tang Rato, earak e kalenggiyanna." 
Psalms68:26 E adha' ajalan para tokang nyanye, e budhi tokang tabbuna calempong; e tengnga ban-paraban tokang tabbuna terbang; kantha reya nyanyeyanna reng-oreng jareya:" 
Psalms68:27 “Molja'agi Allah e dhalem kompolanna ommadda, molja'agi PANGERAN, he toronanna Yakub kabbi!”" 
Psalms68:28 Benyamin, suku se paleng kene' ajalan e adha', e budhiyanna anyo-ronyo para pamimpinna suku Yehuda, e budhiyanna pole para pamimpinna suku Zebulon ban Naftali." 
Psalms68:29 Ngereng duduwagi kakowadannepon Junandalem, Guste, kakowadan se sareng Junandalem eagem nolong abdidalem." 
Psalms68:30 To-rato abakta tor-ator ka Junandalem e Padalemmannepon Junandalem e Yerusalim. 
Psalms68:31 Bentakkagi Messer, burun alas e tengnga galagas ka'dhissa'. Dukane sabangsa, se akadi banteng saambalan se asareng dhu'-budhu'na, se saleng enyek polana arebbu'a salaka; masalebbudan sa-bangsa se dujan aperrang!" 
Psalms68:32 Ja-pangraja Messer rabu abakta dimbaga; oreng Sudan ru-kaburu ngeba pesse opet ka Allah. 
Psalms68:33 Mara nyanye ka Allah, sakabbinna karaja'an e dunnya, nyanyeyagi ji-pojiyan ka Pangeran," 
Psalms68:34 kaagem Salerana se lebat e langnge' jaman lamba'. Edhingngagi, Pangeran abu-dhabu, sowarana agarudhu' nako'e onggu." 
Psalms68:35 Akone kobasana Allah se ngobasane Isra'il, kobasana sampe' gan langnge'." 
Psalms68:36 Makasambu' ate onggu Allahna sengko' ban ba'na e bakto kalowar dhari kalenggiyanna. Allah Isra'il marenge kobasa ban kakowadan ka ommadda. Molja'agi Allah! 
Psalms69:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Kembang Kacobung. Dhari Daud. 
Psalms69:2 Ya Allah, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, Guste, sabab aeng ampon ongga gan le'er." 
Psalms69:3 Abdidalem tacellet ka cellot se dhalem, ta' manggi tana panedda'anna soko. Abdidalem tasellem e aeng se dhalem, eanyo' omba' raja se santer." 
Psalms69:4 Abdidalem ampon lesso se ra'-era'an, le'er kantos kerreng rassana. Mata kantos peddi anante' bantowan dhari Junandalem, Guste Allah." 
Psalms69:5 Oreng se baji' ka abdidalem ta' kalaban badha sababba, abannya'an dhari obu' se tombu e cethak. Abdidalem epateyana reng-oreng kowat; se nyerrang abdidalem ngangguy petenna. Abdidalem epaksa mabali rang-barang se banne hasella rampasan." 
Psalms69:6 Ya Allah, Junandalem ngagali sadajana kasala'an abdidalem, dusa abdidalem ta' ekenneng errep dhari Junandalem." 
Psalms69:7 Ja' kantos abdidalem matodhusan reng-oreng se ngarep ka Junandalem, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, Se Mahakobasa. Ya Allah Isra'il, ja' kantos abdidalem madhateng nespa ka reng-oreng se nyemba Junandalem!" 
Psalms69:8 Sabab lantaran Junandalem abdidalem eya-seya, lantaran Junandalem abdidalem ecale oreng sabannya'na." 
Psalms69:9 Abdidalem akadi oreng manca e seddi'na la-bala sadajana, ale' kaka' tadha' se kennala." 
Psalms69:10 Samangat abdidalem rabbang lantaran taresna ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem; abdidalem eya-seya reng-oreng se ya-nyeya Junandalem. 
Psalms69:11 Abdidalem apowasa marendha aba', namong eya-seya sareng reng-oreng." 
Psalms69:12 Abdidalem ngangguy kaen karong partandha sossa, namong ekala'-gella' oreng sabannya'na." 
Psalms69:13 Abdidalem daddi rarasanna oreng, reng-oreng mabu' padha anyanye parkara abdidalem." 
Psalms69:14 Namong abdidalem adu'a ka Junandalem, GUSTE, Ya Allah, kasokana Junandalem nyaodi e bakto se sae. Nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, lantaran taresnana Junandalem se raja, sareng lantaran kaestowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms69:15 Ja' kantos abdidalem tasellem e dhalem cellot, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem dhari reng-oreng se baji' ka abdidalem, sareng dhari aeng se dhalem." 
Psalms69:16 Ja' kantos abdidalem eanyo' omba' raja, sareng tasellem e dhasarra tase' otaba ekobur e dhalem lobang." 
Psalms69:17 Ngereng abdidalem saodi, GUSTE, sabab Junandalem sae sareng taresna salanjangnga. Kasokana Junandalem atole ka abdidalem samangken, sabab bellas asena Junandalem talebat rajana." 
Psalms69:18 Ja' ngetek dhari abdidalem ka'dhinto, sabab abdidalem kasossa'an, ngereng duliyan, abdidalem nyo'ona tolong." 
Psalms69:19 Ngereng ka ka'dhinto, pasalamet abdidalem, palopottagi dhari moso." 
Psalms69:20 Junandalem ngagali saponapa abdidalem eya-seya, ecale sareng epanespa, Junandalem ngagali ka moso abdidalem sadajana." 
Psalms69:21 Ate abdidalem ancor lantaran eya-seya, abdidalem kantos potos pangarep. Abdidalem nyare kabellasan, namong tadha' ollena; abdidalem nyare panglepor, namong ta' manggi pa-ponapa." 
Psalms69:22 La'-mala' abdidalem epakon neddha racon e bakto lapar; e bakto pelka' epakon ngenom cokka. 
Psalms69:23 Mandar pestana reng-oreng gapaneka madhatengnga calaka' ka aba'na, sareng daddi jebbak ka para tamoyya." 
Psalms69:24 Mandar tengalla eparengngana buta, balikadda eparengngana ta' kowat." 
Psalms69:25 Teba'agi dukaepon Junandalem ka reng-oreng gapaneka, me' olle reng-oreng gapaneka katebanan babendunnepon Junandalem se rabbang lap-ngolap." 
Psalms69:26 Diggal parkemahannepon me' olle seppe, sadajaepon kemahna me' olle tadha' orengnga." 
Psalms69:27 Sabab reng-oreng gapaneka nganeyaja reng-oreng se eokom Junandalem, sareng ngacaca reng-oreng se eseksa Junandalem." 
Psalms69:28 Diggal kasala'anna me' olle sajan bannya'; ja' pabendherragi reng-oreng gapaneka. 
Psalms69:29 Diggal nyamana me' olle ekosot dhari ketabba oreng odhi'; ban ta' ecathet e dhalem dhaftarra reng-oreng se jujur. 
Psalms69:30 Namong abdidalem etendhes kantos sake' sadaja, angkessagi abdidalem, Guste, pasalamettagi." 
Psalms69:31 Daddi sengko' anyanye ngagungngagiya Allah, amolja'agiya Salerana sambi anyanye asokkor." 
Psalms69:32 Jareya lebbi ekasokane PANGERAN ebandhing kurban sape lake', kurban sape lake' se raja." 
Psalms69:33 Nangale'e jareya, oreng se tatendhes perak, oreng se nyemba Allah padha raja atena." 
Psalms69:34 Sabab PANGERAN meyarsa'agi oreng se mesken, ta' loppa ka oreng se epenjara." 
Psalms69:35 Molja'agi Allah, langnge' ban bume, tase' raja ban saessena." 
Psalms69:36 Allah masalamedda Yerusalim ban majaga'a pole tha-kottha Yehuda. Ommadda Pangeran ennengnga e jadhiya, tana jareya daddiya andhi'na." 
Psalms69:37 Na' potona bakal narema'a sangkol tana jareya, reng-oreng se taresna ka Pangeran bakal ennengnga e jadhiya." 
Psalms70:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Dhari Daud, e bakto ngatorragi kurban parengeddan." 
Psalms70:2 Ya Allah, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, ngereng duli tolong abdidalem, GUSTE!" 
Psalms70:3 Diggal oreng se terro mateyana abdidalem me' olle epakala sareng buru kabingongan. Diggal oreng se asorak polana abdidalem manggi kasossa'an me' olle tako', laju nyorot sareng eya-seya." 
Psalms70:4 Diggal oreng se ngala'-gella' abdidalem me' olle takerjat sareng malo. 
Psalms70:5 Sadajana oreng se nyemba ka Junandalem moga eparengngana perak sareng gumbira. Sadajana oreng se asokkor lantaran epasalamet Junandalem moga ros-terrosana ngoca', “Agung onggu Pangeran reya!”" 
Psalms70:6 Abdidalem ka'dhinto mesken sareng ta' gadhuwan kakowadan; ngereng duli rabu, Guste Allah. Junandalem se nolong sareng masalamet abdidalem, ngereng ja' patellat se nolonga abdidalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms71:1 Abdidalem nyare pangaoban ka Junandalem, GUSTE, ja' kantos abdidalem epamalo." 
Psalms71:2 Bebassagi abdidalem, sabab Junandalem adil, peyarsa'agi abdidalem sareng pasalamettagi." 
Psalms71:3 Ngereng Junandalem daddi gunong bato kennengnganna abdidalem ngaop; sareng daddi binteng se koko kennengnganna abdidalem nyare salamet. Sabab Junandalem sowaka sareng kennengnganna kasalameddan monggu ka abdidalem ka'dhinto. 
Psalms71:4 Ya Allah, palopottagi abdidalem dhari oreng jahat, dhari kobasana oreng se kejjem sareng daraka." 
Psalms71:5 Sabab Junandalem pangarebban abdidalem, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi; abdidalem parcaja ka Junandalem ngabidi gi' kene'." 
Psalms71:6 Saomorra abdidalem terros nyandhar ka Junandalem; Junandalem se ajaga abdidalem ngabidi abdidalem lahir, daddi abdidalem ngagungngagi Junandalem terros." 
Psalms71:7 Odhi' abdidalem daddi conto ka oreng bannya', sabab Junandalem pangaoban abdidalem se kowat." 
Psalms71:8 Abdidalem ros-terrosan moji Junandalem, saare benteng abdidalem aberta'agi kaagunganna Junandalem." 
Psalms71:9 Ja' buwang abdidalem manabi ampon towa, ja' dinggallagi abdidalem manabi ampon ta' gadhuwan kakowadan," 
Psalms71:10 sabab so-moso padha ngacaca abdidalem se terro mateyana abdidalem padha asakongkel. 
Psalms71:11 Ca'epon reng-oreng gapaneka, “Oreng rowa la edina bi' Allah; mara serser, mara pega' sabab la tadha' se masalamedda oreng rowa.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ja' majau dhari abdidalem, Guste Allah, Ya Allah, ngereng duli tolong abdidalem." 
Psalms71:13 Diggal oreng se nyerrang abdidalem me' olle epamalo sareng epatompes, oreng se macalaka'a abdidalem me' olle eya-seya sareng katodhusen." 
Psalms71:14 Namong abdidalem terrosa ngarep ka Junandalem, sareng sajana bajeng se moji Junandalem." 
Psalms71:15 Saare benteng abdidalem nyareta'agiya sadajana kaadilan sareng kasalameddan se ta' kabitong saponapa bannya'na, se sadajana dhari Junandalem asalla." 
Psalms71:16 Abdidalem mojiya kobasana Junandalem, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi, abdidalem makalonta'a kaadilanna Junandalem, namong kaadilanna Junandalem saos." 
Psalms71:17 Ya Allah, Junandalem apareng kasalameddan ka abdidalem dhari gi' kene', kantos mangken abdidalem nyareta'agi sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem se makasambu' ate." 
Psalms71:18 Ya Allah, ja' dinggallagi abdidalem, kantos abdidalem towa sareng oban, sopaja abdidalem aberta'agi kobasana sareng kaparjuga'anna Junandalem, ka sadajana katoronan se bakal dhateng." 
Psalms71:19 Ya Allah, kaadilannepon Junandalem salangnge' tenggina; se elampa'agi Junandalem talebat rajana; pasera se nandhinge Junandalem?" 
Psalms71:20 Junandalem marenge abdidalem kasossa'an se berra' sabannya'na, namong Junandalem mabaliya kakowadan abdidalem akadi asalla, sareng majaga abdidalem dhari makam." 
Psalms71:21 Junandalem bakal madaddiya abdidalem amolja'an dhari gi' dhimen, sareng apareng panglepor ka abdidalem pole." 
Psalms71:22 Abdidalem mojiya Junandalem sareng gambus, sabab Junandalem esto, Guste Allah. Abdidalem anyanye amolja'agiya Junandalem sareng calempong, mojiya Junandalem, Guste, Allahna Isra'il se socce." 
Psalms71:23 Abdidalem asoraga ce' gumbirana sambi anyanye amolja'agi Junandalem. Badan sareng sokma abdidalem anyanye kaperagen, polana Junandalem masalamet abdidalem." 
Psalms71:24 Saare benteng abdidalem aberta'agiya kaadilannepon Junandalem, sabab reng-oreng se macalaka'a abdidalem ampon epakala ban epamalo sareng Junandalem." 
Psalms72:1 Dhari Sulaiman. Ya Allah, ajarragi okomannepon Junandalem ka rato, parengngagi kaadilannepon Junandalem ka pottrana rato." 
Psalms72:2 Moga rato ahakime ommattepon Junandalem menorot hokom, sareng adil ka reng-oreng se tatendhes." 
Psalms72:3 Moga nagara abdidalem eparengngana ma'mor, ra'yattepon ngarassa'agi kaadilan." 
Psalms72:4 Moga rato abilla'ana ha'epon ra'yat kene', nolong reng-oreng mesken sareng matadha' reng-oreng se nganeyaja ra'yat." 
Psalms72:5 Moga salerana teptebba kobasa kantos ron-temoron saabidda gi' badha are sareng bulan. 
Psalms72:6 Moga rato padha'a sareng ojan se gaggar e gal-teggal, akadi ojan derres se mabacca tana." 
Psalms72:7 Moga kaadilan atamba'a sae e jaman pamarenta'anna, nagara ma'mor saabidda bulan gi' nyonar." 
Psalms72:8 Moga karaja'annepon atamba'a lebar dhari tase' se settong ka tase' settongnga, malebar dhari temor kantos ka bara'." 
Psalms72:9 Pandhudhu'epon sagara beddhi badhi asojuda ka salerana, moso asojud e adha'na padana." 
Psalms72:10 To-rato Tarsis sareng lo-polo badhi abakta'a tor-ator ka salerana. To-rato Arab sareng Etiopia rabu abakta pesse opet. 
Psalms72:11 To-rato badhi asojuda sadaja e ajunanna, sa-bangsa sadajana badhi daddiya dunorra." 
Psalms72:12 Sabab salerana nolong oreng se tatendhes odhi'na se ta' gadhuwan kakowadan ta' bisa apa-ponapa, ban oreng mesken aserro nyo'on tolong ka salerana." 
Psalms72:13 Rato gapaneka bellas ka oreng mesken sareng ra'yat biyasa, sareng masalamet reng-oreng se malarat odhi'na." 
Psalms72:14 Salerana mabebas reng-oreng gapaneka dhari panendhessan sareng kakerrasan, sabab odhi'na reng-oreng gapaneka eanggep talebat raja argana." 
Psalms72:15 Lanjang omor, rato! Moga salerana eatorana emmas dhari nagara Arab. Moga salerana enyo'onnagi ka Pangeran ros-terrosan, sareng eberkadi Pangeran salanjangnga." 
Psalms72:16 Moga bannya' a hasella gandum saantero nagara, mo'-gumo'epon possa' sareng hasel bume. Moga tanaepon landhu akadi Pagunongan Libanon, pandhudhu'epon kotthana atamba akadi rebba e talon." 
Psalms72:17 Moga asmaepon rato ekaemodi salanjangnga, moga asmaepon atamba'a kasohor saabittepon gi' badha are se nyonar. Moga sa-bangsa nyo'ona berkattepon Junandalem akadi se etarema salerana, sareng nyo'on sopaja rato eparengngana senneng salanjangnga." 
Psalms72:18 Molja'agi PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il! Pera' Salerana se alampa'agi sabarang se makasambu' ate." 
Psalms72:19 Molja'agi asmana se agung salanjangnga; moga kamolja'anna mossa'e bume ban saessena! Amin! Amin! 
Psalms72:20 Gan jadhiya du'ana Daud, pottrana Isay." 
Psalms73:1 Jaburra Asaf. Allah reya sae onggu ka ommadda, ka oreng se morne atena." 
Psalms73:2 Tape sengko' la mangmang, tang kaparcaja'an para' elanga," 
Psalms73:3 sabab sengko' arassa tamburuwan ka oreng se angga', e bakto sengko' nangale oreng jahat se nyaman odhi'na." 
Psalms73:4 Sabab reng-oreng jareya ta' nanggung sake' pa-apa, badanna baras ban kowat." 
Psalms73:5 Reng-oreng jareya ta' nanggung sossa, ta' palang akantha oreng laenna." 
Psalms73:6 Polana reng-oreng jareya sombong pannengnga, ban ajalannagi kakerrasan salanjangnga." 
Psalms73:7 Dhari atena ngalowa kajahadan; kabbi padha repot ban maksod se jahat. 
Psalms73:8 Oreng laen ekala'-gella' ban eca'-koca'e, eara ekaneyaja'a, gathagga ta' jama'." 
Psalms73:9 Allah se jumenneng e sowarga eca'-koca'e, ban asebbal ka reng-oreng e bume," 
Psalms73:10 sampe' ommadda Allah abalik noro' reng-oreng jareya, ban parcaja ka cacana." 
Psalms73:11 Ca'na reng-oreng jareya, “Allah ta' kera ngagali, Se Mahatenggi ta' kera ngarte.”" 
Psalms73:12 Kantha jareya kabadha'anna oreng jahat; odhi'na nyaman, dhi'-andhi'na sajan atamba." 
Psalms73:13 Parcoma sengko' ajaga sopaja tang ate berse; tadha' gunana sengko' ajauwi dusa. 
Psalms73:14 Sabab saare benteng sengko' terros palang; sabban laggu sengko' eseksa. 
Psalms73:15 Ja' sakenga abdidalem ngoca' kadi gapaneka, abdidalem akiyanadi angkadanna tra-pottraepon Junandalem." 
Psalms73:16 Namong e bakto abdidalem ngoddi terro ngarteya, parkara gapaneka ka abdidalem ce' malaradda rassana." 
Psalms73:17 Dhi-budhina abdidalem maso' ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem, abdidalem laju ngarte aherrepon odhi'na oreng jahat." 
Psalms73:18 Sareng Junandalem reng-oreng gapaneka esaba' e lorong se lecen, ediggal kantos padha labu laju mate." 
Psalms73:19 E dhalem saparngedep padha ancor sadajana, aherrepon odhi'na nako'e parana." 
Psalms73:20 Reng-oreng gapaneka akadi mempe se elang e baja laggu; e bakto Junandalem ngadek, GUSTE, reng-oreng gapaneka ampon tadha'." 
Psalms73:21 E bakto abdidalem arassa caremmet sareng ate arassa peggel," 
Psalms73:22 abdidalem budhu sareng ta' ngarte, akadi keban e ajunannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms73:23 Sanajjan saka'dhinto, abdidalem teptep badha e seddi'annepon Junandalem, Junandalem ngastane tanang abdidalem." 
Psalms73:24 Junandalem nonton abdidalem sareng babala'an, ban pagi' narema'a abdidalem kalaban kahormadan." 
Psalms73:25 Pasera se ekaandhi' abdidalem e sowarga kajabana Junandalem? Salaenna Junandalem tadha' pole se ekaterrowe abdidalem e bume. 
Psalms73:26 Sanajjan sokma sareng badan abdidalem ta' kowat, Junandalem kakowadan abdidalem, Guste Allah; namong Junandalem se ekaandhi' abdidalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms73:27 Oreng se adinggallagi Junandalem tanto calaka', se ta' esto ka Junandalem tanto sareng Junandalem epamosna." 
Psalms73:28 Tape monggu ka sengko' bagus mon semma' ban Allah, Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi bi' sengko' egabay tang pangaoban, sopaja sengko' bisa'a aberta'agi sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms74:1 Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Asaf. Ya Allah, ponapa abdidalem ka'dhinto sareng Junandalem edinggallagiya salanjangnga? Aponapa Junandalem me' duka terros ka ommattepon dibi'?" 
Psalms74:2 Kaemodi ommattepon Junandalem se epele Junandalem dhari gi' dhimen, bangsa se sareng Junandalem epabebas sopaja daddi kaagungannepon Junandalem. Kaemodi Gumo' Siyon, se ebadhi kalenggiyannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms74:3 Ngereng alomampa e kennengngan se ampon daddi jur-gujuran; sadaja se badha e Padalemmannepon Junandalem ampon epaancor sareng moso. 
Psalms74:4 Mosoepon Junandalem padha ra'-era'an e Padalemmannepon Junandalem, sareng masang bul-ombul kamennangan e ka'dhissa'." 
Psalms74:5 Reng-oreng gapaneka akadi tokang moger kaju se nyebengngagi kapagga, mogerra ka'-bungka'an e alas." 
Psalms74:6 Sareng reng-oreng gapaneka sadajana okeran kaju epaancor ngangguy kapak sareng tokol. 
Psalms74:7 Reng-oreng gapaneka ngobbar Padalemmannepon Junandalem kantos tadha' karena; sareng manajjis kennengngannepon oreng abakte ka Junandalem. 
Psalms74:8 Reng-oreng gapaneka amaksot makala'a abdidalem sadaja, kennengngannepon kabakteyan e nagara ka'dhinto eobbara, epatadha'a." 
Psalms74:9 Bi-nabbi sareng dha-tandha se ajib ampon ta' ngaton pole, tadha' oreng settonga se oneng kantos bilaepon kabadha'an teptebba saka'dhinto." 
Psalms74:10 Kantos bilaepon, Guste, Junandalem se eya'-seya'a moso? Ponapa salanjangnga asmaepon Junandalem eya-seya reng-oreng gapaneka?" 
Psalms74:11 Aponapa Junandalem me' ta' kasokan nolong abdidalem pole? Aponapa abdidalem sadaja me' ta' eparduli pole? 
Psalms74:12 Ya Allah, ngabidi parmola'anna Junandalem rato abdidalem, Junandalem panyalamet abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms74:13 Kalaban kakowadan se talebat rajana Junandalem nyeba' tase', mabella cethakkepon ga-naga tase'." 
Psalms74:14 Junandalem malejjar thak-cethakkepon Lewiyatan, ban Lewiyatan gapaneka ebadhi kakanna essena ra-ara." 
Psalms74:15 Junandalem magili somber sareng songay; songay se raja epakerreng tadha' aengnga. 
Psalms74:16 Junandalem se nyepta'agi seyang sareng malem, se nantowagi kennengngannepon are sareng bulan." 
Psalms74:17 Junandalem neptebbagi tes-batessepon bume, abadhi mosem nemor sareng nembara'." 
Psalms74:18 Namong kaemodi, GUSTE, kadi ponapa moso ya-nyeya Junandalem, bangsa se ta' oneng ka Junandalem ca'-ngoca'e Junandalem." 
Psalms74:19 Ja' passra'agi ka moso se kejjem, ommattepon Junandalem se ta' bisa apa-ponapa ka'dhinto. Ja' kantos Junandalem ta' ngemodi kabadha'annepon ommadda se palang." 
Psalms74:20 Kaemodi parjanjiyan se ebadhi Junandalem sareng abdidalem sadaja, sabab oreng ajalannagi kakerrasan e man-ka'dhimman e nagara ka'dhinto." 
Psalms74:21 Ja' kantos oreng se tatendhes epamalo, moga oreng mesken sareng nyangsara amolja'agi Junandalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms74:22 Ngereng ngadek, Guste, billai parkaraepon Junandalem! Sabab saare benteng Junandalem eya-seya sareng reng-oreng se ta' parcaja ka Junandalem." 
Psalms74:23 Kaemodi paera'na so-mosoepon Junandalem, se reng-cerrengan ce' rammena sajan abit sajan ce' kajana." 
Psalms75:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Ja' mamosna. Jaburra Asaf. Nyanyeyan. 
Psalms75:2 Abdidalem sadaja nyemba ka Junandalem, Guste, abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem, sareng aberta'agi sadaja se makasambu' ate se elampa'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms75:3 Allah adhabu, “Mon la napa' ka bakto se la etantowagi bi' Sengko', Sengko' ahakimana epaadila." 
Psalms75:4 Mon bume agundhek ban mahlok saessena padha ngetter, Sengko' se makoko ga-canggana.”" 
Psalms75:5 Sengko' ngoca' ka oreng se dujan asebbal sopaja ja' asebbal ros-terrosan. 
Psalms75:6 Ka oreng jahat Sengko' ngoca' sopaja ja' thak-magathak tengkana. Ja' ja-maraja cethak, otaba ja-maraja caca." 
Psalms75:7 Sabab panghakiman ta' dhateng dhari bara' otaba dhari temor, banne dhari dhaja otaba dhari lao'." 
Psalms75:8 Se ahakime reya Allah dibi', se settong epamandhap, settonganna epatenggi." 
Psalms75:9 Dukana PANGERAN akantha tobung se eastane, tobung se aesse anggur se towa. Bi' Allah essena eselen, pas kodu eenom bi' reng-oreng jahat e bume epa sampe' berse." 
Psalms75:10 Tape sengko' paggun aberta'agi Allahna Yakub, anyanye ji-pojiyan amolja'agiya Salerana." 
Psalms75:11 Allah bakal mapotonga kakowadanna oreng jahat, dineng oreng se becce' epasajana kowat." 
Psalms76:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Eerenge calempong. Jaburra Asaf. Nyanyeyan. 
Psalms76:2 Allah kalonta e Yehuda; asmana kasohor e Isra'il. 
Psalms76:3 Yerusalim padalemmanna; Gumo' Siyon kalenggiyanna. 
Psalms76:4 E jadhiya pakakas perrangnga moso, pana, tameng ban peddhang padha epaancor." 
Psalms76:5 Molja onggu, Junandalem, Guste, lebbi agung dhari nong-gunong jaman lamba'." 
Psalms76:6 Reng-oreng se bangalan ampon erampase, padha tatedhung ta' jaga pole. Rit-parjurit se gaga' parjuga ampon elang kakowadanna sadaja." 
Psalms76:7 Ran-jaran sareng se nompa' padha labu terros mate e bakto ebentak Junandalem, Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms76:8 Nako'e onggu Junandalem, GUSTE! Manabi Junandalem duka, pasera se kowat nahan?" 
Psalms76:9 Dhari langnge' Junandalem anyata'agi potosan; bume neng-enneng katako'en," 
Psalms76:10 e bakto Junandalem ngadek badhi ngadili, masalamedda reng-oreng se etendhes e bume." 
Psalms76:11 Reng-oreng se paleng galak amolja'agi Junandalem jugan, se gi' peggel padha ngangguy kaen karong menangka tandha sossa atena." 
Psalms76:12 Teptebbi janjina ba'na ka GUSTE Allahna. Sa-bangsa se badha e ma'-semma'na, mara padha ngeba tor-ator ka Allah se ekatako'e oreng sadunnya." 
Psalms76:13 Allah mapotong samangadda para pangobasa, to-rato padha katako'en ka Salerana." 
Psalms77:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot: Yedutun. Jaburra Asaf. 
Psalms77:2 Sengko' aera' epakaja ka Allah; sengko' aera' epakaja, ban Allah meyarsa tang sowara." 
Psalms77:3 E dhalem karekongan sengko' adu'a ka Pangeran; sengko' ngangka' tang tanang samalem benteng nyo'on ka Salerana tadha' busenna, tape sengko' ta' nemmo panglepor ate," 
Psalms77:4 Bila sengko' enga' ka Guste Allah sengko' aserro, bila sengko' ker-mekker, tang ate sajan lesso." 
Psalms77:5 E baja malem sengko' epata'ngeddha tedhung bi' Pangeran, sengko' ngalengsang sampe' ta' ngenneng acaca." 
Psalms77:6 Sengko' mekkere re-are se la lebat, nga'-ngenga'e on-taon jaman lamba'." 
Psalms77:7 E baja malem sengko' ker-mekker, ban atanya e dhalem ate," 
Psalms77:8 “Pangeran reya apa salanjangnga nolak sengko' ban ta' kasokan pole ka sengko' reya? 
Psalms77:9 Apa Allah la ta' taresna ka sengko'? apa Allah ta' neptebbi dhabuna? 
Psalms77:10 Apa Allah la ta' emot aparenga kabellasan? Apa Allah duka sampe' ta' kaagungan panganeser?” 
Psalms77:11 Sengko' laju ngoca', “Se paleng nyake'e tang ate iya areya Se Mahatenggi ta' kobasa pole.”" 
Psalms77:12 Abdidalem ngemodana sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem, GUSTE, ngemodana sadaja se ajib sareng se ane se elampa'agi Junandalem gi' jaman dhimen." 
Psalms77:13 Abdidalem mekkerana sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem, se talebat sae, se makasambu' ate." 
Psalms77:14 Ya Allah, sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem socce, tadha' Allah se agung kajabana Junandalem, Guste." 
Psalms77:15 Junandalem Allah se mabadha kaajiban, kobasana Junandalem ampon enyata'agi e antarana sa-bangsa." 
Psalms77:16 Kalaban kakowadannepon Junandalem, Junandalem mabebas ommadda, toronannepon Yakub sareng Yusup." 
Psalms77:17 Nengale Junandalem aeng daddi tako', Guste, padha ngetter sar-dhasarra tase'." 
Psalms77:18 Ondhem magaggar ojan, galudhuk saleng pajaggur; kelap saleng kareddhap dhari man-ka'dhimman." 
Psalms77:19 Galudhuk saleng pajaggur, kelap patang kareddhap, bume gundhek agaledder." 
Psalms77:20 Junandalem alomampa lebat e omba', ngalebadi sagara se dhalem, namong lampadda padaepon ta' katengal." 
Psalms77:21 Akadi oreng ngowan Junandalem nonton ommadda, kalaban parantara'anna Mosa sareng Harun." 
Psalms78:1 Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Asaf. Tan-taretan sabangsa, edhingngagi tang babala'an reya, edhingngagi pateppa' tang oca'." 
Psalms78:2 Sengko' nerrangngagiya bangsalan ban parebasan, nerrangngagiya bak-tebbagan jaman lamba'," 
Psalms78:3 sabarang se ekaedhing ban se ekataowe sengko', se ecareta'agi bi' tang bangatowa." 
Psalms78:4 Jareya bi' sengko' ta' eroseya'agiya ka na' poto; kabbi eberta'agiya ka angkadan se bakal dhatengnga parkara kobasana PANGERAN, sabarang se ajib ban se raja se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms78:5 Bangsa Isra'il eparenge hokomma, toronanna Yakub eparenge papakonna. Bangatowana sengko' ban ba'na epakon ngajarragi kom-hokom jareya ka na'-ana'na," 
Psalms78:6 sopaja angkadan se bakal dhateng padha taowa, sarta nerrossagi pole ka na'-ana'na." 
Psalms78:7 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya na' potona sengko' ban ba'na bakal ngarebba ka Allah, ta' loppa ka sabarang se elampa'agi ban terros ta'at ka papakonna," 
Psalms78:8 sopaja na' potona sengko' ban ba'na jareya, ta' padha'a ban bangatowana, se dujan aberonta' ban alako daraka; angkadan se ta' koko imanna ban ta' esto ka Allah." 
Psalms78:9 Suku Efraim se asanjata gandhiba ban pana, padha buru e bakto aperrang." 
Psalms78:10 Suku jareya ta' neptebbi parjanjiyanna ban Allah, sarta ta' atoro' ka kom-hokomma." 
Psalms78:11 Reng-oreng jareya padha loppa ka sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana, ban sabarang se ajib se epatangale ban aba'na." 
Psalms78:12 E adha'na para bangatowana Allah mabadha kaajiban e nagara Messer ban e tana lapang Zowan. 
Psalms78:13 Tase' epaseba', reng-oreng jareya pas epalebat e jadhiya; aeng epamanjeng epakantha geddhung." 
Psalms78:14 Reng-oreng jareya etonton ban ondhem e baja seyang sarta ban tera'na apoy e baja malem. 
Psalms78:15 Bato e ra-ara beddhi epamaroka, reng-oreng jareya eparenge aeng enom sampe' wa-ngalowa." 
Psalms78:16 Gumo' bato epakon makalowara aeng, aeng pas agili akantha songay." 
Psalms78:17 Tape reng-oreng jareya terros dusa ka Allah, e ra-ara beddhi padha aberonta' ka Allah Se Mahatenggi." 
Psalms78:18 Reng-oreng jareya etengnget ba'-nyoba' Allah, maksa nyo'on kakanan se daddi pangaterrona." 
Psalms78:19 Reng-oreng jareya alaban ka Allah, laju ngoca', “Ba' bisa'a Allah apareng kakanan ka sengko' ban ba'na e ra-ara reya?" 
Psalms78:20 Pajat bendher Salerana mokol gunong bato se gali, sampe' aeng santer agili. Tape ba' bisa'a keya Salerana nyadhiya'agi roti ban marenge ommadda daging?”" 
Psalms78:21 Meyarsa jareya, Guste ALLAH duka pas madhateng apoy epanyerrang ommat jareya; dukana aba-tamba ka reng-oreng jareya," 
Psalms78:22 polana reng-oreng jareya ta' parcaja ka Allah, ta' parcaja ka kobasana se bisa masalamet aba'na." 
Psalms78:23 Sanajjan kantha jareya langnge' eparenge parenta, sopaja mokka' bang-labangnga." 
Psalms78:24 Dhari sowarga epatoron gandum sabannya'na, manna se daddiya kakanna reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms78:25 Reng-oreng jareya eparenge kakanan ta' sakera-kera, epangakan rotina para malaekat." 
Psalms78:26 Angen temor epadhateng keya, angen lao' epadhateng kalaban kobasana." 
Psalms78:27 No'-mano' epatoron kaangguy ommadda, bannya'na padha ban beddhi e penggir serreng." 
Psalms78:28 No'-mano' epagaggar e parkemahan, e sabingkerra tana se daddi kennengnganna." 
Psalms78:29 Reng-oreng jareya pas ngakan sampe' kennyang, sabab bi' Allah la eparenge se daddi pangaterrona." 
Psalms78:30 Tape napsona reng-oreng jareya tadha' marena, daddi teppa'na gi' padha terros ngakan," 
Psalms78:31 Allah pas duka ka reng-oreng jareya, reng-oreng Isra'il se gi' ngodha ban se gaga' parjuga padha epamate tadha' karena." 
Psalms78:32 Maske kantha jareya ommadda gi' paggun agabay dusa maske nangale'e kaajiban-kaajiban padha paggun ta' parcaja. 
Psalms78:33 Daddi akantha ceppedda nyaba reng-oreng jareya epapegga' odhi'na epamate katako'en daksakala. 
Psalms78:34 Sabban badha e antarana se epamate bi' Allah, se laen atobat pas abali ka Salerana." 
Psalms78:35 Pas enga' ja' Allah se ngaobi aba'na ja' Allah Se Mahakobasa panyalamedda aba'na. 
Psalms78:36 Tape reng-oreng jareya lecek ka Salerana, cacana ta' teppa' salanjangnga." 
Psalms78:37 Reng-oreng jareya ta' esto ka Allah, ban ta' neptebbi parjanjiyanna." 
Psalms78:38 Tape Allah neser ban nyapora ommadda sarta ta' mate'e reng-oreng jareya. Li-baliyan Allah ngampet dukana ban ta' norodi benduna panggaliyanna. 
Psalms78:39 Allah emot ja' manossa jareya mahlok se fana, akantha angen se lebat ban tadha' balina." 
Psalms78:40 Ce' seggudda reng-oreng jareya aberonta' ka Salerana, nyake'e panggaliyanna e bakto badha e ra-ara." 
Psalms78:41 Li-baliyan reng-oreng jareya ba'-nyoba' Allah, masossa Se Socce, Allahna Isra'il." 
Psalms78:42 Kabbi padha ta' enga' ka kakobasa'anna, ta' enga' e bakto epasalamet dhari mosona," 
Psalms78:43 e bakto Allah mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban e Messer sarta jat-mo'jijat e tana lapang Zowan. 
Psalms78:44 Ngay-songayya reng-oreng jareya eoba epadaddi dhara sampe' ta' ekenneng enom aengnga. 
Psalms78:45 Reng-oreng jareya eseksa bi' lala' sabannya'na, tanana eparosak kata'." 
Psalms78:46 Allah madhateng ola' ban balang se maobus hasella tana ban teggal. 
Psalms78:47 Bungkana anggurra eparosak ban ojan bato, ka-bungkana arana eparosak ban ebbun se gali." 
Psalms78:48 Ojan es epatoron ngenneng ka bin-ebinna, ban-kebanna epatappor kelap." 
Psalms78:49 Panggaliyanna se duka ta' eampet sakale, pasukan malaekat maot eotos ka bume, se andaddiyagi reng-oreng jareya ta' andhi' pangarep pole." 
Psalms78:50 Allah ta' ngampet dukana, ban ta' neser ka reng-oreng jareya, kabbi padha epamate ban panyaket sampar." 
Psalms78:51 Ana' lalake' sareyang e nagara Messer padha epamate. 
Psalms78:52 Saellana jareya Allah mimpin ommadda akantha oreng se ngowan dumba saambal, eater lebat e ra-ara se raja." 
Psalms78:53 Lantaran esarengnge Allah ommadda arassa aman ban ta' arassa tako' atena, tape mosona padha tasellem e tase'." 
Psalms78:54 Ommadda pas ebakta ka tana se socce, pagunongan se erebbu' bi' astana dibi'." 
Psalms78:55 E adha'na ommadda Allah ngojuk sa-bangsa e jadhiya, tana sangkolan egi-bagi ka ku-suku Isra'il, ommadda, se pas padha ngennengnge mah-kemahna mosona." 
Psalms78:56 Tape ommat jareya aberonta' ba'-nyoba' Allah Se Mahakobasa, papakonna ta' eparduli." 
Psalms78:57 Ommat jareya akiyanat akantha bangatowana, ta' ekenneng parcaja akantha gandhiba se bilu'." 
Psalms78:58 Ommat jareya nangtang Allah mabadha kennengnganna panyemba'anna brahala, maduka panggaliyanna polana ca-arcana." 
Psalms78:59 Ngoladi jareya Allah ce' dukana, ommat Isra'il etolak ta' eparduli sakale." 
Psalms78:60 Allah adinggallagi Kemahna e Silo, kalenggiyanna e nga'-tengnga'anna manossa." 
Psalms78:61 Petthe Parjanjiyan lambang kobasa ban kamolja'anna bi' Allah epanneng maske egiba buru moso. 
Psalms78:62 Allah duka ka ommat kaagunganna, daddi epanneng maske epate'e moso ban peddhang." 
Psalms78:63 Ngangodhadanna mate ekello' apoy, ban-parabanna tadha' se ngabine." 
Psalms78:64 Mam-imamma mate bi' peddhang, dha-randhana ta' ngenneng nanges."
