Psalms78:65 Pangeran ngadek akantha oreng se jaga tedhung, akantha oreng se kowat samarena mabu' ngenom anggur." 
Psalms78:66 Mosona padha nyorot tadha' karena, padha epakala salanjangnga." 
Psalms78:67 Toronanna Yusup etolak, suku Efraim tadha' se epeleya." 
Psalms78:68 Se epele iya areya suku Yehuda, ban Gumo' Siyon se ekataresnae parana." 
Psalms78:69 E jadhiya Allah maddek Padalemmanna akantha kalenggiyanna e sowarga, epakoko akantha bume salanjangnga." 
Psalms78:70 Daud abdina epele, epondhut dhari dhang-kandhangnga dumba ban embi'," 
Psalms78:71 dhari kennengnganna pameyara'anna korbina dumbana, epangowana ommat Isra'il." 
Psalms78:72 Daud meyara Isra'il bi' ate se ehlas, mimpin ommadda talebat penterra." 
Psalms79:1 Jaburra Asaf. Ya Allah, bangsa se ta' oneng ka Junandalem ngobasane tana sangkolannepon Junandalem. Padalemman Socce epanajjis, Yerusalim epadaddi jur-gujuran." 
Psalms79:2 Mayyidda para abdiepon Junandalem edinggallagi daddi kakanna mano' e bang-abang. Jinazana para kakaseepon Junandalem daddi kakanna burun alas. 
Psalms79:3 Dharana reng-oreng gapaneka ngalowa akadi aeng, daddi sakottha Yerusalim; mayyidda tadha' se ngoburragi." 
Psalms79:4 Abdidalem sadaja ekala'-gella' sareng sa-bangsa tatangga, eya-seya tadha' ambuna." 
Psalms79:5 Ponapa salanjangngepon Junandalem se duka'a, GUSTE, se tamburuwan parana tadha' ambuna akantha apoy?" 
Psalms79:6 Teba'agi dadukannepon Junandalem ka sa-bangsa se ta' oneng ka Junandalem, sareng ka sadajana karaja'an se ta' oneng abakte ka Junandalem." 
Psalms79:7 Sabab sa-bangsa gapaneka mate'e ommattepon Junandalem, sareng maancor po'-compo'na." 
Psalms79:8 Ja' ngokom abdidalem lantaran dusaepon para bangatowa. Duli kabellasi abdidalem, Guste, sabab abdidalem sadaja ampon potos pangarep." 
Psalms79:9 Nyo'ona tolong, abdidalem sadaja, Guste, Junandalem se masalamet abdidalem sadaja; parenge sapora sadajana dusa abdidalem sadaja, sareng pasalamettagi abdidalem sadaja bit kahormadannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms79:10 Ja' kantos sa-bangsa laen padha atanya, “Kemma Allahna reng-oreng rowa?” Parenge abdidalem sadaja kasempadan, panengale babalessepon Junandalem ka sa-bangsa se mate'e di-abdiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms79:11 Peyarsa'agi serrona para tahanan; moga reng-oreng se ampon epotossagi sopaja mateya eparengngana paggun odhi' bit kobasaepon Junandalem. 
Psalms79:12 Adhu Guste, parenge babales sa-bangsa gapaneka kantos pettong kaleepon, lantaran ya-nyeya Junandalem." 
Psalms79:13 Daddi abdidalem sadaja, para ommat, ba-dumba se eowan Junandalem, asokkora salanjangnga ka Junandalem, sareng mojiya Junandalem ron-temoron saterrossa." 
Psalms80:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Kembang kacobung. Jabur kasakseyanna Asaf. 
Psalms80:2 PANGERAN se ngowan Isra'il, ngereng peyarsa'agi, Junandalem se mimpin ommat toronannepon Yusup epakadi dumba saambal. Junandalem se alenggi e attas kerub, kasokana Junandalem ngaton" 
Psalms80:3 ka Efraim, Benyamin sareng Manasye. Duduwagi kakobasa'annepon Junandalem ka abdidalem sadaja, ngereng ka ka'dhinto, pasalamettagi abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms80:4 Ya Allah, pabaliyagi abdidalem sadaja akadi asalla, oladi sareng kabellasi abdidalem sadaja sopaja padha salamet." 
Psalms80:5 PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, kantos bilaepon Junandalem se duka'a, sanare ommattepon Junandalem adu'a?" 
Psalms80:6 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem sadaja eteddhai tangesan, sareng eenome aeng mata se talebat bannya'na." 
Psalms80:7 Sa-bangsa tatangga sareng Junandalem edinggal atokar lantaran tana abdidalem sadaja, moso padha agella'an kasennengngen." 
Psalms80:8 Ya Allah Se Mahakobasa, pabaliyagi kabadha'an abdidalem sadaja ka asalla, oladi sareng kabellasi abdidalem sadaja sopaja padha salamet." 
Psalms80:9 Ommattepon Junandalem akadi bungkana anggur se ealle Junandalem dhari Messer. Sa-bangsa laen sareng Junandalem eojuk, bungkana anggur sareng Junandalem pas etamen e nagarana." 
Psalms80:10 Bungka gapaneka sareng Junandalem esadhiyai tana; bungka gapaneka pas kalowar ramo' kantos dhalem, aka-cangka kantos daddi saantero nagara." 
Psalms80:11 Mo'-gumo' enaonge, ka-bungkana comara Libanon se ja-raja eaobi ca'-ranca'na." 
Psalms80:12 Ranca'na malanjang kantos ka Tase' Tengnga, co'-konco'na kantos ka Songay Efrat." 
Psalms80:13 Ya Allah, aponapa sareng Junandalem me' eparobbu pagarra, kantos buwana epetthek sareng saneyap oreng se lebat?" 
Psalms80:14 Leng-celeng dhateng nyek-enyek bungkana, keban ngakan dhaun sareng buwana." 
Psalms80:15 Ya Allah Se Mahakobasa, ngereng Junandalem ka ka'dhinto pole, oladi dhari sowarga, ommattepon Junandalem tolonge." 
Psalms80:16 Parenge salamet ommat se akadi bungkana anggur ka'dhinto se etamen Junandalem dibi', jugan bi'-selbi'na se sareng Junandalem epatombu epakoko." 
Psalms80:17 Sareng moso bungkana epoger laju eobbar; pamateyagi reng-oreng gapaneka e dhalem dadukannepon Junandalem. 
Psalms80:18 Jaga'agi oreng se ampon epele Junandalem, ana'na manossa se sareng Junandalem epakowat kaangguy Junandalem." 
Psalms80:19 Abdidalem sadaja ta' nyalethong dhari Junandalem; jaga'agi odhi' abdidalem, abdidalem pas amolja'agiya Junandalem." 
Psalms80:20 PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, pabaliyagi abdidalem sadaja akadi asalla, oladi sareng kabellasi abdidalem sadaja, sopaja padha salamet." 
Psalms81:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Gitit. Dhari Asaf. 
Psalms81:2 Mara anyanye ji-pojiyan amolja'agi Allah kakowadanna sengko' ban ba'na, mara padha asorak pagumbira ngagungngagi Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms81:3 Tabbu terbangnga, pamonye sowarana, toro'e gambus ban calempong, panyaman monyena." 
Psalms81:4 Tope tarompedda e are raja, e bakto pesta bulan anyar ban bulan pornama." 
Psalms81:5 Sabab jareya atoran neng e Isra'il, papakon dhari Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms81:6 Atoran jareya eteptebbagi kaangguy bangsa Isra'il, e bakto Salerana maju ngadhebbi Messer. Sengko' ngedhing sowara se sengko' ta' kennal," 
Psalms81:7 “Ban-giban e bauna ba'na bi' sengko' la ekala'. Budhak kol-pekol la epatoron dhari tanangnga. 
Psalms81:8 E dhalem kasossa'an ba'na aserro, ba'na laju epasalamet bi' Sengko'. Sengko' nyaodi ba'na dhari galudhuk Tang pangeteggan, bi' Sengko' ba'na eoji e somber Meriba." 
Psalms81:9 Edhingngagi Tang parengeddan, Tang ommat kabbi; Isra'il, ja' sakenga ba'na endha' ngedhingngagi!" 
Psalms81:10 Ja' sampe' badha illah e antarana ba'na, ja' sampe' ba'na nyemba dibana oreng manca." 
Psalms81:11 Sengko' PANGERAN, Allahna ba'na, se nonton ba'na kalowar dhari Messer. E bakto ba'na lapar bi' Sengko' eberri' ngakan." 
Psalms81:12 Tape Tang ommat ta' endha' ngedhingngagi Sengko', Isra'il ta' endha' atoro' ka Sengko'." 
Psalms81:13 Daddi bi' Sengko' reng-oreng jareya epanneng paggun cengkal; dina me' olle noro' karebba atena dibi'. 
Psalms81:14 Ja' sakenga Tang ommat endha' ngedhingngagi Tang oca', ja' sakenga Tang ommat atoro' ka Tang parenta," 
Psalms81:15 Sengko' duliya matelloga so-mosona, mosona kabbi epakala'a." 
Psalms81:16 Oreng se baji' ka Sengko' bi' Sengko' epatelloga, kabbi padha eokoma salanjangnga." 
Psalms81:17 Tape Tang ommat eberri'ana gandum peleyan, epakennyanga ban maddu alas.”" 
Psalms82:1 Jaburra Asaf. Allah mimpin partemmowan illahi e sowarga, pas apareng potosanna:" 
Psalms82:2 “Ba'na ja' paroce pole mon ngadili, sarta ja' nolonge oreng jahat pole." 
Psalms82:3 Billai na'-kana' jatim ban oreng se ta' andhi' kakowadan, paadil ka oreng mesken ban nyangsara." 
Psalms82:4 Pabebas reng-oreng se ta' kowat ban ta' bisa apa-rapa, palopot kabbi dhari tanangnga oreng daraka." 
Psalms82:5 Ba'na ta' tao pa-apa, budhu ban posang, polana ba'na, atoranna masarakat ta' etemmo karowanna." 
Psalms82:6 Sengko' la ngoca' ja' ba'na reya illahi, ba'na kabbi tra-pottrana Allah Se Mahatenggi." 
Psalms82:7 Tape ba'na bakal mateya akantha manossa, akantha saneyap pangraja, ba'na bakal mateya keya.”" 
Psalms82:8 Ngereng, ka ka'dhinto, Guste, hakime dunnya ka'dhinto, sabab sadajana bangsa kaagunganna Junandalem." 
Psalms83:1 Jaburra Asaf: settong nyanyeyan. 
Psalms83:2 Ya Allah, ngereng ja' mendel saos, ta' abu-dhabu sakale, ja' mendel saos, ta' nolonge sakale." 
Psalms83:3 Ngereng oladi, so-mosona Junandalem baridhu, reng-oreng se baji' ka Junandalem padha aberonta'." 
Psalms83:4 Reng-oreng gapaneka gadhuwan sajja se salenter macalaka'a ommattepon Junandalem; padha aparembagan macalaka'a reng-oreng se eaobi Junandalem. 
Psalms83:5 Ca'epon reng-oreng gapaneka, “Mara paancor reng-oreng Isra'il, me' olle nyamana ta' ekaenga'e oreng pole.”" 
Psalms83:6 Sa-bangsa padha asakongkel, amopakat alabana ka Junandalem:" 
Psalms83:7 bangsa Edom sareng Isma'il, oreng Mo'ab sareng Hagar;" 
Psalms83:8 bangsa Gebal, Amon sareng Amalek, bangsa Filistea sareng pandhudhu' Tirus." 
Psalms83:9 Jugan Asyur agabung sareng reng-oreng gapaneka, daddi soko tanangnga toronanna Lud." 
Psalms83:10 Reng-oreng gapaneka pakadi reng-oreng Midian, Guste, jugan pakadi Sisera sareng Yabin e Songay Kisyon," 
Psalms83:11 se padha epaancor e Endor, sareng padha daddi buthogga tana." 
Psalms83:12 Pin-pamimpinna pakadi Oreb sareng Ze'eb, para pangobasana pakala akadi Zebah sareng Salmuna," 
Psalms83:13 sabab reng-oreng gapaneka ngoca' sapaneka, “Mara kobasae tana kalenggiyanna Allah.”" 
Psalms83:14 Ya Allah, panabuyyagi reng-oreng gapaneka pakadi abu, pakadi darameyan se eketbat angen." 
Psalms83:15 Akadi apoy se ngello' alas, akadi apoy se rabbang makatonon nong-gunong." 
Psalms83:16 Serser reng-oreng gapaneka sareng ojan angen sale'bung, pangejjit sareng kaleng busbus." 
Psalms83:17 Ya Allah, PANGERAN, diggal reng-oreng gapaneka me' olle eya-seya, Guste, sopaja padha ngakone kakobasa'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms83:18 Diggal reng-oreng gapaneka me' olle epamalo sareng katako'en salanjangnga, me' olle padha mate nespa." 
Psalms83:19 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka eparengngana oneng ja' namong Junandalem Se Mahatenggi, PANGERAN, se ngobasane bume." 
Psalms84:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Gitit. Jaburra kaom Korah. 
Psalms84:2 Padalemmannepon Junandalem sanget masenneng ate, Guste ALLAH Se Mahakobasa!" 
Psalms84:3 Abdidalem ce' kerrongnga ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem, sokma sareng badan abdidalem asorak amolja'agi Allah se odhi'." 
Psalms84:4 La'-mala' mano' keddi' eparenge bengko, mano' daddali eparenge lebun, kennengngannepon panyaba'anna budhu'na e seddi'anna mezbaepon Junandalem, PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, Rato sareng Allah abdidalem." 
Psalms84:5 Pojur onggu oreng se enneng e dalemmepon Junandalem, anyanye ji-pojiyan amolja'agi Junandalem ros-terrosan." 
Psalms84:6 Pojur onggu oreng se narema kakowadan dhari Junandalem, ban se gadhuwan pangaterro entara aziyara ka Gunong Siyon." 
Psalms84:7 Sabatara reng-oreng gapaneka ajalan lebat e Cora Baka, kennengngan gapaneka aoba daddi somberra aeng, ojan dha'-adha'na ngeba berkat sabannya'na." 
Psalms84:8 E bakto reng-oreng gapaneka ajalan ka Siyon, ka kennengngannepon Allahna sadajana diba ngaton." 
Psalms84:9 Peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, peyarsa'agi, Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms84:10 Berkadi rato abdidalem, Guste Allah, jaga'agi sareng parenge salamet oreng peleyannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms84:11 Saare neng e Padalemmannepon Junandalem asaeyan katembang saebu are e kennengngan laen. Sengko' bango'an daddiya panjagana labang e Padalemmanna tang Allah, etembang enneng e bengkona oreng jahat." 
Psalms84:12 Sabab Guste ALLAH reya se ajaga sengko' ban ba'na ban rato se agung, se marenge sengko' ban ba'na kahormadan ban kataresna'an. Salerana ta' tao nolak apa'a bai se bagus ka oreng se tadha' calena." 
Psalms84:13 Guste PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, pojur onggu oreng se parcaja ka Junandalem." 
Psalms85:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra kaom Korah. 
Psalms85:2 Junandalem kasokan ka tanaepon Junandalem, GUSTE, kabadha'annepon Isra'il sareng Junandalem ampon epabali akadi asalla." 
Psalms85:3 Junandalem ampon nyapora sa-dusana ommadda, nyapora sadajana kasala'anna." 
Psalms85:4 Reng-oreng gapaneka sareng Junandalem ta' edukane pole, benduepon Junandalem ampon lastare." 
Psalms85:5 Pabaliyagi abdidalem akadi asalla, Allah panyalamet abdidalem, ja' duka pole ka abdidalem sadaja!" 
Psalms85:6 Ponapa Junandalem terrosa duka ka abdidalem sadaja, pagguna bendu kantos ron-temoron?" 
Psalms85:7 Pakowattagi pole abdidalem sadaja, sopaja abdidalem sadaja, para ommattepon Junandalem gumbira lantaran partolongannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms85:8 Ngereng duduwagi ka abdidalem sadaja, GUSTE, ja' Junandalem teptep taresna salanjangnga, parenge abdidalem sadaja kasalameddan dhari Junandalem." 
Psalms85:9 Sengko' ngedhingngagiya dhabuna GUSTE Allah; Allah ajanji aparenga kaamanan ban kasalameddan ka sengko' ban ba'na, para ommadda, sokor sengko' ban ba'na ambu se alako dusa." 
Psalms85:10 Pajat ongguwan, Allah asadhiya masalamedda oreng se alem, Allah se agung alenggiya e nagarana sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms85:11 Kataresna'an ban kaestowan bakal atemmowa, kaadilan ban kataremtemman bakal alu'-gellu'a." 
Psalms85:12 Kaestowanna manossa bakal tombuwa dhari bume, ban kaadilanna Allah bakal nyongngo'a dhari langnge'." 
Psalms85:13 PANGERAN apareng sabarang se becce' daddi tanana sengko' ban ba'na bakal madhatengnga hasel. 
Psalms85:14 Kaadilan bakal ajangadha'ana PANGERAN ban nyadhiya'agi jalan kaangguy Salerana. 
Psalms86:1 Du'ana Daud. Peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, GUSTE, sareng peyarsa'agi abdidalem, sabab abdidalem mesken sareng ta' kowat." 
Psalms86:2 Jaga'agi odhi' abdidalem, sabab Junandalem taresna ka abdidalem, parenge salamet abdi se parcaja ka Junandalem." 
Psalms86:3 Junandalem Allah abdidalem, kaneserre abdidalem, sabab saare benteng abdidalem terros nyo'on ka Junandalem." 
Psalms86:4 Pagumbira'agi atena abdiepon Junandalem, Guste sabab ate abdidalem ngadhep ka Junandalem." 
Psalms86:5 Sabab Junandalem sae, Guste, sareng kasokan apareng sapora, oreng se adu'a ka Junandalem teptep ekaase'e sareng kataresna'an tadha' batessa." 
Psalms86:6 Gateyagi du'a abdidalem, GUSTE, peyarsa'agi serro abdidalem se nyo'on partolongan." 
Psalms86:7 E dhalem karekongan abdidalem adu'a ka Junandalem, sabab Junandalem nyaodi abdidalem." 
Psalms86:8 Adhu Guste, tadha' Pangeran akadi Junandalem, tadha' se alampa'agi pa-ponapa akadi se elampa'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms86:9 Sadajana bangsa se ebadhi Junandalem bakal dhatengnga, Guste, nyemba'a ka Junandalem sareng mojiya kaagungannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms86:10 Sabab Junandalem parjuga sareng alampa'agi kaajiban-kaajiban, namong Junandalem Allah." 
Psalms86:11 Duduwagi ka abdidalem se daddi kasokannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, sareng abdidalem etoro'a kalaban esto; ajari abdidalem daddi oreng alem se ta' nga-satengnga." 
Psalms86:12 Abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem kantos ka dhasarra ate, Guste Allah Pangeran kaula; abdidalem badhi mojiya kamolja'annepon Junandalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms86:13 Sabab kataresna'annepon Junandalem ka abdidalem talebat rajana; Junandalem malopot nyaba abdidalem dhari lobangnga koburan. 
Psalms86:14 Ya Allah, oreng sombong jaga nyerrang abdidalem, oreng se kejjem saambalan mateyana abdidalem; reng-oreng gapaneka ta' parduli ka Junandalem." 
Psalms86:15 Namong Junandalem, Guste, Allah se bellas sareng se ase, sabbar, talebat taresna sareng esto." 
Psalms86:16 Oladi sareng kabellasi abdidalem, pakowattagi sareng pasalamettagi abdidalem, sabab padha sareng ebu, abdidalem jugan abakte ka Junandalem." 
Psalms86:17 Parenge abdidalem tandhana kabecce'annepon Junandalem, GUSTE, sopaja oreng se baji' ka abdidalem padha malo, manabi nengale ja' sareng Junandalem abdidalem etolong sareng elepor." 
Psalms87:1 Jaburra kaom Korah, settong nyanyeyan. PANGERAN maddek kotthana e gumo'na se socce." 
Psalms87:2 Dhari tha-kottha kabbi e Isra'il, se paleng ekataresnae pera' Yerusalim." 
Psalms87:3 Mara edhingngagi, Kotthana Allah, sabarang se makasambu' parkara ba'na edhabuwagi bi' Pangeran:" 
Psalms87:4 “Messer ban Babil bi' Sengko' epamaso'a ka dhalem dhaftarra sa-bangsa se ta'at ka Sengko' reya. La'-mala' Filistea, Tirus ban Sudan eetonga menangka pandhudhu' Yerusalim keya.”" 
Psalms87:5 Ka Siyon oreng bakal ngoca'a, ja' sakabbinna bangsa tamaso' wargana, ban ja' Se Mahakobasa bakal makokowa aba'na." 
Psalms87:6 PANGERAN bakal mamaso'a sa-bangsa ka dhalem dhaftarra pandhudhu' Yerusalim. 
Psalms87:7 Reng-oreng jareya bakal atariya ban anyanye, “Siyon kennengnganna tang asal.”" 
Psalms88:1 Nyanyeyan. Jaburra kaom Korah. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Mahalat Leyanot. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Heman, oreng Ezrahi." 
Psalms88:1 Nyanyeyan. Jaburra kaom Korah. Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Menorot nyanyeyan: Mahalat Leyanot. Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Heman, oreng Ezrahi." 
Psalms88:2 Adhu GUSTE, Allah se masalamet abdidalem, e baja seyang abdidalem lok-ologan Junandalem, e baja malem abdidalem ngadhep ka Junandalem." 
Psalms88:3 Moga du'a abdidalem napa'a ka Junandalem, ngereng peyarsa'agi sowara abdidalem." 
Psalms88:4 Abdidalem manggi kasossa'an sabannya'na, maot ampon badha e adha'na labang." 
Psalms88:5 Abdidalem akadi oreng se torona ka lobangnga koburan, oreng se ta' gadhuwan kakowadan." 
Psalms88:6 Abdidalem edinggal apolong sareng oreng mate, akadi oreng se epate'e oreng, agentang e dhalem makam. akadi oreng se ta' ekaemodi pole sareng Junandalem, oreng se ta' eparenge partolongan pole." 
Psalms88:7 Junandalem melpallagi abdidalem ka jurang se dhalem, ka lobangnga kobur se dhalem sareng petteng." 
Psalms88:8 Dadukanna Junandalem ce' berra'na nyecce'e abdidalem, abdidalem ancor tacecce' babendunnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms88:9 Junandalem majau abdidalem dhari sadajana kennalan, abdidalem epakadi ka'dhinto, kantos majitjit ka reng-oreng gapaneka. Abdidalem tabebbeng ta' kengeng kalowar;" 
Psalms88:10 mata abdidalem rabeng lantaran nyangsara. Sabban are abdidalem lok-ologan ka Junandalem, GUSTE, ngangka' tanang adu'a ka Junandalem." 
Psalms88:11 Ponapa Junandalem mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban kaangguy oreng mate? Ponapa reng-oreng mate gapaneka jaga ngagungngagi Junandalem? 
Psalms88:12 Ponapa kataresna'annepon Junandalem eberta'agi e dhalem koburan, ban kaestowanna Junandalem e kennengnganna maot?" 
Psalms88:13 Ponapa badha oreng se oneng ka kaajibannepon Junandalem e kennengngan se petteng, otabana kabecce'annepon Junandalem e kennengnganna oreng se ta' ekaenga'e oreng?" 
Psalms88:14 Namong abdidalem nyo'on partolongannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, sabban gi' laggu abdidalem adu'a ka Junandalem." 
Psalms88:15 Adhu GUSTE, aponapa Junandalem me' nolak abdidalem? Aponapa Junandalem me' malengos ka abdidalem?" 
Psalms88:16 Ngabidi gi' kene' abdidalem nyangsara sareng eencer maot, abdidalem ce' payana se nanggung okomannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms88:17 Babendunnepon Junandalem se nako'e maancor abdidalem; serrangannepon Junandalem se ce' berra'na mamate abdidalem. 
Psalms88:18 Dadukannepon Junandalem saare benteng ngeppong abdidalem akadi banjir, dhari kangan sareng kacer, dhari adha' sareng budhi." 
Psalms88:19 Ca-kanca abdidalem se rapet sareng Junandalem epajau dhari abdidalem, namong kare papetteng se asarengnge abdidalem." 
Psalms89:1 Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Etan, oreng Ezrahi." 
Psalms89:1 Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Etan, oreng Ezrahi." 
Psalms89:2 Kataresna'annepon Junandalem, GUSTE, sareng abdidalem enyanyeyagiya ros-terrosan, kaestowannepon Junandalem eberta'agiya ron-temoron salanjangnga." 
Psalms89:3 Sabab abdidalem oneng kataresna'annepon Junandalem langgeng tadha' ambuna, kaestowannepon Junandalem akadi langnge' kokona." 
Psalms89:4 Junandalem adhabu, “Sengko' la agabay parjanjiyan ban oreng Tang peleyan; Sengko' la asompa ka Daud, Tang abdi:" 
Psalms89:5 ‘Korse karaja'anna ba'na bi' Sengko' ejaga'a salanjangnga, ron-temoron na' potona ba'na bakal toju'a e korse jareya.’ ”" 
Psalms89:6 Kompolan e sowarga ngalem sabarang se ajib se elampa'agi Junandalem, sareng anyanyeyagi kaestowannepon Junandalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms89:7 E langnge' tadha' se akadi Junandalem, GUSTE, tadha' mahlok sowarga se madhane Junandalem." 
Psalms89:8 Junandalem ehormadi e kalangannepon oreng se socce, ekatako'e ngalebbi'i sadaja se ngalenglenge Junandalem." 
Psalms89:9 PANGERAN, Allah Se Mahakobasa, pasera se padha sareng Junandalem kakowadanna? Junandalem esto e dhalem sadajana parkara." 
Psalms89:10 Junandalem ngobasane tase' se raja omba'na, sareng maambu omba'na se nako'e." 
Psalms89:11 Rahab, naga tase' sareng Junandalem eparemmok epate'e, astaepon Junandalem se kowat makala sadajana moso." 
Psalms89:12 Langnge' sareng bume kaagungannepon Junandalem, dunnya saessena cepta'anna Junandalem." 
Psalms89:13 Junandalem se abadhi lao' sareng dhaja, Gunong Tabor sareng Gunong Hermon rak-soragan amolja'agi Junandalem ce' peragga." 
Psalms89:14 Raja onggu kakobasa'annepon Junandalem, raja onggu kakowadannepon Junandalem!" 
Psalms89:15 Kaadilan sareng hokom dhasarra karaja'annepon Junandalem, kataresna'an sareng kaestowan nyata e dhalem sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms89:16 Pojur onggu bangsa se abakte ka Junandalem kalaban ate gumbira, se odhi' e dhalem cajana kahadirannepon Junandalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms89:17 Saare benteng reng-oreng gapaneka padha perak sareng teptep koko lantaran kabecce'annepon Junandalem. 
Psalms89:18 Junandalem marenge abdidalem sadajana kamennangan se talebat rajana, lantaran kabecce'annepon Junandalem abdidalem sadaja mennang." 
Psalms89:19 Sabab se ngaobi abdidalem sadaja oreng peleyannepon Junandalem, GUSTE; rato abdidalem kaagungannepon Allah Isra'il se socce." 
Psalms89:20 Gi' jaman lamba' e bakto Junandalem ngaton, Junandalem adhabu ka abdiepon se esto, “Sengko' la nolong pahlawan se kasohor, oreng se epele bi' Sengko' dhari antarana ra'yat epadaddiya rato." 
Psalms89:21 Sengko' la nemmo Daud, Tang abdi, bi' Sengko' la eangkat ngangguy mennya' opacara." 
Psalms89:22 Tang kakowadan bakal ngaobana aba'na ros-terrosan, Tang kobasa bakal makowada aba'na." 
Psalms89:23 Aba'na ta' kera epakala mosona, oreng jahat ta' kera bisa apa-rapa ka aba'na." 
Psalms89:24 Mosona kabbi bi' Sengko' epaancora, sapa se baji' ka aba'na epamateya." 
Psalms89:25 Sengko' pagguna taresna ban esto ka aba'na, sajan abit epasajana kobasa." 
Psalms89:26 Sengko' malebara karaja'anna, dhari Tase' Tengnga epasampe'a ka Songay Efrat." 
Psalms89:27 Daud bakal ngoca'a ka Sengko', ‘Junandalem Rama abdidalem, Allah abdidalem, se ngaobi sareng masalamet abdidalem.’" 
Psalms89:28 Bi' Sengko' aba'na epadaddiya Tang ana' se sareyang, se paleng agung e antarana to-rato sadunnya." 
Psalms89:29 Bi' Sengko' oreng jareya ekataresna'ana saterrossa, Tang parjanjiyan ban aba'na bakal teptep kokowa." 
Psalms89:30 Korse karaja'anna bi' Sengko' ejaga'a saabidda badha langnge' e attassa bume, ron-temoron na' potona bakal marenta'a e korse jareya." 
Psalms89:31 Tape mon Tang hokom ta' etoro' bi' na' potona, mon odhi'na ta' atoro' ka Tang parenta," 
Psalms89:32 mon na' potona ta' marduli ka Tang oca', ban ngenthengngagi Tang atoran," 
Psalms89:33 bi' Sengko' eokoma ngangguy peccot polana kasala'anna jareya, ban epadhatengngana balai lantaran sa-dusana." 
Psalms89:34 Tape Sengko' paggun taresna'a ka Daud, ban ta' loppa'a ka Tang janji ka aba'na." 
Psalms89:35 Tang parjanjiyan ban Daud jareya ta' epabattala, dhari Tang janji tadha' se epaburunga." 
Psalms89:36 Sengko' asompa bit Tang nyama se socce sakaleyan kaangguy salanjangnga; ka Daud Sengko' ta' acaca'a lecek. 
Psalms89:37 Korse karaja'anna bakal kokowa saabidda are gi' badha, ron-temoron na' potona bakal marenta'a e jadhiya." 
Psalms89:38 Karaja'anna bakal teptebba badha akantha bulan, sakse se esto e attas ondhem.”" 
Psalms89:39 Namong samangken Junandalem duka ka rato, Junandalem mowang sareng nolak oreng peleyannepon dibi'." 
Psalms89:40 Junandalem maburung janjina ka abdiepon, makothana sareng Junandalem ebuwang ka cellot." 
Psalms89:41 Junandalem magujur dhung-geddhungnga kotthana, teng-bintengngepon epatadha' karena." 
Psalms89:42 Sadajana oreng se lebat arampas dhi'-andhi'na, saleraepon ekala'-gella' ga-tatanggana." 
Psalms89:43 Junandalem apareng kamennangan ka so-mosona, tro-sattrona padha epaperak." 
Psalms89:44 Sanjatana sareng Junandalem epatadha' gunana, e dhalem paperrangan ta' eparenge partolongan." 
Psalms89:45 Kakobasa'annepon sareng Junandalem eahere, korse karaja'anna eonjebbagi ka tana." 
Psalms89:46 Junandalem mapandha' bakto ngodhana, epamalo e adha'na oreng sabannya'na." 
Psalms89:47 Kantos bilaepon Junandalem se ngetegga, GUSTE? Kantos bilaepon Junandalem terrosa duka akadi apoy se bal-kobalan?" 
Psalms89:48 Abdidalem laju enga' ce' sakejja'na odhi' abdidalem e dunnya, Junandalem nyepta'agi manossa menangka mahlok se fana." 
Psalms89:49 Pasera se bisa odhi' terros sareng ta' mateya? Pasera se bisa lopot dhari koburan? 
Psalms89:50 Adhu Guste, ka'dhimma bukte kataresna'annepon Junandalem se asal, se ejanjiyagi Junandalem ka Daud bit kaestowannepon Junandalem?" 
Psalms89:51 Kaemodi Guste, kadi ponapa abdidalem ka'dhinto ecale, abdidalem sangsara eya-seya sa-bangsa sabannya'na." 
Psalms89:52 So-mosoepon Junandalem ya-nyeya rato peleyannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, ka ka'dhimma'a saos rato meyos, ekala'-gella' ekala'-gella' sareng reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms89:53 Molja'agi PANGERAN salanjangnga. Amin! Amin! 
Psalms90:1 Du'ana Mosa, abdina Allah. Guste PANGERAN, Junandalem ka'dhinto pangaoban abdidalem ron-temoron." 
Psalms90:2 Sabellunnepon nong-gunong ecepta'agi, sabellunnepon bume sareng dunnya ebadhi, Junandalem Allah se langgeng, tadha' dha'-adha'na tadha' dhi-budhina." 
Psalms90:3 Junandalem makon manossa abali ka asalla, abali daddi abu akadi dha'-adha'na." 
Psalms90:4 Monggu ka Junandalem saebu taon akadi saare, akadi ba'ari', ampon lebat; akadi bakto saejjam e baja malem." 
Psalms90:5 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem eanyo'; odhi' abdidalem namong akadi mempe, akadi rebba se nyelbi';" 
Psalms90:6 e baja laggu tombu sareng mekkar, namong laju elop e baja asar." 
Psalms90:7 Abdidalem sadaja takerjat lantaran Junandalem duka, laju padha mate lantaran Junandalem bendu parana." 
Psalms90:8 Junandalem nyaba' kasala'an abdidalem sadaja e ajunannepon Junandalem, dusa abdidalem se ta' etengale oreng eoladi sareng Junandalem." 
Psalms90:9 Odhi' abdidalem sadaja pandha' lantaran Junandalem duka, on-taon abdidalem sadaja ampon napa' ka aherra akadi nyaba sasergu'an." 
Psalms90:10 Omor abdidalem sadaja namong pettong polo taon, manabi kowat, kantos ballung polo taon. Namong se ekaolle abdidalem sadaja namong kasossa'an sareng kasangsara'an; saamponnepon odhi' se sakejja' abdidalem sadaja padha mosna." 
Psalms90:11 Pasera se oneng ka dadukannepon Junandalem se nako'e, otabana kadi ponapa daddina manabi Junandalem duka?" 
Psalms90:12 Paemottagi abdidalem sadaja ja' odhi' e dunnya ka'dhinto talebat pandha', sopaja abdidalem sadaja daddi oreng se sae buddina." 
Psalms90:13 Kantos bilaepon Junandalem se duka'a terros, GUSTE? Ngereng abali, kaneserre para abdiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms90:14 Parenge abdidalem sadaja kataresna'annepon Junandalem e baja laggu sabban arena, sopaja abdidalem sadaja padha perak sareng anyanye saomorra." 
Psalms90:15 Parenge abdidalem sadaja kasennengngan se sabandhing sareng kasossa'an se etanggung abdidalem ataonan e bakto nyangsara. 
Psalms90:16 Duduwagi ka abdidalem sadaja, para abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem; duduwagi kobasaepon Junandalem se agung ka na' poto abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms90:17 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, berkadi abdidalem sadaja, sopaja ahasel e dhalem sadaja lalakon." 
Psalms91:1 Oreng se ngaop ka Se Mahatenggi, ban anaong ka Se Mahakobasa," 
Psalms91:2 olle mator kantha reya ka PANGERAN, “Junandalem se abilla sareng ngaobi abdidalem, Guste Allah, abdidalem parcaja ka Junandalem.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ba'na bakal epalopoda dhari babaja se ta' etangale'e oreng, ban dhari panyaket se madhateng pate." 
Psalms91:4 Ba'na bakal ekepkebbana e baba'anna kalembangnga, sopaja ba'na aman e dhalem naonganna; kaestowanna akantha tameng se ngaobi ba'na." 
Psalms91:5 Ba'na ta' osa tako' ka babaja e bakto malem, otabana serrangan dadagan e baja seyang;" 
Psalms91:6 ja' tako' ka balai se dhateng e bakto petteng, otabana pate se dhateng e tera'na are." 
Psalms91:7 Maske badha saebu se mate e erenganna ba'na, sapolo ebu mate e sabingkerra ba'na, tape ba'na ta' kera apa-rapa." 
Psalms91:8 Mon ba'na ngabas ka sakalenglengnga, ba'na tanto nangale oreng jahat narema okomanna." 
Psalms91:9 Sabab ba'na la mele PANGERAN se epentae tolong kaangguy abilla ba'na, Se Mahatenggi bi' ba'na egabay pangaoban." 
Psalms91:10 Daddi ba'na ta' kera ekenneng calaka', bengkona ba'na ta' kera ekenneng pa-apa." 
Psalms91:11 Allah tanto makon malaekadda ajaga ba'na, kaangguy ngaobi ba'na mon ba'na entar dha' emma'a bai." 
Psalms91:12 Bi' para malaekat jareya ba'na tanto ejungjung e pa'-dapa'na astana, sopaja sokona ba'na ta' tatandhung ka bato." 
Psalms91:13 Olar ban macan bi' ba'na bakal elengka'ana, macan galak ban olar se mandi opassa bakal edidda'a ban sokona." 
Psalms91:14 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Oreng se taresna ka Sengko' bi' Sengko' epasalamedda, se ngakone Sengko' eberri'ana pangaoban." 
Psalms91:15 Mon oreng jareya aserro ka Sengko', bi' Sengko' esaodana; e dhalem karekongan bi' Sengko' ebarengngana, e dhalem babaja epalopoda, ban eberri'ana kahormadan." 
Psalms91:16 Bi' Sengko' eberri'ana omor lanjang ban epasalamedda.” 
Psalms92:1 Nyanyeyan kaangguy are Sabat. 
Psalms92:2 Ce' saena asokkor ka Junandalem, GUSTE, sareng moji Junandalem, Allah Se Mahatenggi;" 
Psalms92:3 aberta'agi kataresna'annepon Junandalem e baja laggu, ngabarragi kaestowannepon Junandalem e baja malem," 
Psalms92:4 sambi nabbu gitar se talena sapolo, etoro'e gambus sareng calempong." 
Psalms92:5 Sabab sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem maperak ate abdidalem, abdidalem anyanye gumbira lantaran karyaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms92:6 Raja onggu sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem, GUSTE, dhalem onggu panggaliyannepon Junandalem!" 
Psalms92:7 Oreng budhu ta' bisa ngarte, oreng gendheng ta' bisa paham parkara gapaneka." 
Psalms92:8 Olle daddi oreng se daraka tombu landhu akadi rebba, oreng jahat atamba sogi sareng ma'mor; namong reng-oreng gapaneka bakal epatompessa sadaja," 
Psalms92:9 sabab Junandalem, GUSTE, kobasa salanjangnga." 
Psalms92:10 Abdidalem sadaja padha oneng, mosoepon Junandalem badhi epamosna'a, Guste, sadajana oreng jahat badhi epabalessudana." 
Psalms92:11 Sareng Junandalem abdidalem epakowat akadi bantheng alas, eberkadi eparenge kasennengngan." 
Psalms92:12 Abdidalem nengale kakala'anna so-moso abdidalem, reng-oreng se nyerrang abdidalem, abdidalem ampon mereng sadajana sajjaepon se jahat." 
Psalms92:13 Oreng jujur nyemme akantha bungkana korma, tombu landhu akantha bungkana comara e Libanon." 
Psalms92:14 Reng-oreng jareya akantha kajuwan se etamen e Padalemman Socce, ban atamba raja e Padalemmanna, Allahna sengko' ban ba'na" 
Psalms92:15 kajuwan se gi' abuwa maske la towa, paggun biru ban cengngar." 
Psalms92:16 Jareya buktena ja' PANGERAN adil; Pangeran jareya se abillai sengko', Pangeran jareya ta' roce sakale." 
Psalms93:1 PANGERAN reya Rato; Salerana ngagem pangangguy kaagungan ban kakowadan. Bume manjeng koko ta' bisa agundhek. 
Psalms93:2 Korse karaja'annepon Junandalem koko dhari asalla, Junandalem ampon badha sabellunnepon badha bakto." 
Psalms93:3 Dhasarrepon tase' raja makaja sowaraepon, GUSTE, tase' raja makaja garudhu'epon omba'na." 
Psalms93:4 Namong Junandalem se kobasa e sowarga, lebbi nako'e dhari omba'na tase' raja, lebbi kowat katembang pangamogga omba'." 
Psalms93:5 GUSTE, okomannepon Junandalem langgeng, Padalemmannepon Junandalem socce salanjangnga." 
Psalms94:1 Ya ALLAH, Junandalem Allah se apareng babales, ngereng duduwagi babalessepon Junandalem, Guste." 
Psalms94:2 Ngereng ngadek, hakimma manossa sabume, okommagi oreng se angga' satembang sareng tengkana." 
Psalms94:3 Adhu PANGERAN, kantos bilaepon oreng jahat anga'-bunga'a? Kantos bilaepon, GUSTE?" 
Psalms94:4 Reng-oreng jahat gapaneka makalowar ca'-oca' se kasar, sareng ngedirragi kajahadanna." 
Psalms94:5 Ommattepon Junandalem etendhes sareng reng-oreng gapaneka, GUSTE, reng-oreng peleyanna Junandalem eparemmok." 
Psalms94:6 Dha-randha sareng na'-kana' jatim epate'e, sapaneka jugan reng-oreng manca se badha e nagara paneka." 
Psalms94:7 Oca'na reng-oreng gapaneka, “PANGERAN ta' ngoladi, Allahna Yakub ta' parduli.”" 
Psalms94:8 He tang bangsa, ja' budhu kantha jareya, mara ajar ngangguy akkalla!" 
Psalms94:9 Allah reya se abadhi kopeng, masa' ta' meyarsa'a? Allah se abadhi mata, masa' ta' ngoladana?" 
Psalms94:10 Allah jareya se ngajar sa-bangsa, masa' ta' ngokoma? Allah jareya guruna oreng sadunnya, masa' ta' kaagunganna pangataowan?" 
Psalms94:11 PANGERAN ngagali ka pekkeranna manossa, ngagali ja' jareya kabbi tadha' gunana." 
Psalms94:12 Pojur onggu oreng se eajar Junandalem, GUSTE, oreng se eajari kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms94:13 E re-are se ngeba balai oreng gapaneka sareng Junandalem eparenge taremtem, kantos ekale lobang kaangguy nangkep oreng jahat." 
Psalms94:14 Sabab PANGERAN ta' kera adinggallagi ommadda; ta' kera ngenthengngagi se daddi kaagunganna. 
Psalms94:15 Daddi hokom epasodegga pole e pangadilan, reng-oreng se jujur kabbi bakal nolongana." 
Psalms94:16 Sapa se abillai sengko' ngadhebbi reng-oreng daraka? Sapa se nolong sengko' ngadhebbi reng-oreng se alako jahat? 
Psalms94:17 Ja' sakenga PANGERAN ta' nolong sengko', sengko' para' ngalleya ka dunnyana oreng mate." 
Psalms94:18 E bakto abdidalem apekker ja' abdidalem labuwa, kataresna'annepon Junandalem, GUSTE andaddiyagi abdidalem terros manjeng koko." 
Psalms94:19 Manabi ate abdidalem ketter sareng ngalengsang, Junandalem alepor sareng maperak abdidalem." 
Psalms94:20 Junandalem ta' asakongkel sareng kim-hakim se jahat, se gadhuwan sajja jahat adhasar hokom." 
Psalms94:21 Reng-oreng gapaneka asakongkel amoso sareng reng-oreng jujur, sareng ngokom mate oreng se tadha' salana." 
Psalms94:22 Tape PANGERAN reya se abillai sengko', tang Allah jareya se ngaobi sengko'." 
Psalms94:23 PANGERAN ngokom oreng jahat satembang ban kajahadanna, matompessa reng-oreng jareya polana sa-dusana, PANGERAN, Allahna sengko' ban ba'na bakal matompessa reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms95:1 Mara anyanye kaator PANGERAN, asorak kaator ka panyalamedda sengko' ban ba'na!" 
Psalms95:2 Mara ngadhep ka ajunanna bi' nyanyeyan sokkor sambi asorak, anyanye amolja'agi asmana." 
Psalms95:3 Sabab PANGERAN reya Allah se agung, Rato parjuga se ngalebbi'i sakabbinna diba." 
Psalms95:4 Pangeran reya ngobasane bagiyan-bagiyan se paleng dhalem e bume, co'-konco'na gunong kaagunganna keya." 
Psalms95:5 Salerana ngobasane tase', sabab tase' jareya badhiyanna, dineng tenggangan cepta'anna astana keya." 
Psalms95:6 Mara asojud nyemba ka Salerana, asojud e ajunanna PANGERAN se nyepta'agi sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms95:7 Sabab PANGERAN jareya Allahna sengko' ban ba'na, ba'na ban sengko' ommat se epeyara Salerana, padha ban dumba se eowan Salerana. E are teya mara edhingngagi sowarana:" 
Psalms95:8 “Ba'na ja' pacengkal akantha bangatowana e Meriba, e bakto badha e Masa, e tengnga ra-ara." 
Psalms95:9 E jadhiya bangatowana ba'na ba'-nyoba' Sengko', maske la padha nangale'e Tang lalakon." 
Psalms95:10 Pa' polo taon abidda Sengko' ngalennyer ka bangatowana ba'na, ca'na Sengko', ‘Ta' esto onggu bangsa reya! Padha ta' parduli ka Tang parenta.’" 
Psalms95:11 Daddi sambi peggel Sengko' asompa, reng-oreng jareya bi' Sengko' ta' epamaso'a ka nagara jareya, se samasthena daddiya kennengnganna aistirahat apolong ban Sengko' Pangeranna.”" 
Psalms96:1 Nyanyeyagi nyanyeyan se anyar kaator ka PANGERAN! Mara nyanye ka PANGERAN, saantero bume!" 
Psalms96:2 Mara nyanye kaator ka PANGERAN, ban molja'agi Salerana; sabban are berta'agi kabar gumbira ja' Salerana la masalamet sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms96:3 Careta'agi kaagunganna ka sa-bangsa, ban lalakon raja se elampa'agi Salerana kaangguy ommat manossa." 
Psalms96:4 Sabab PANGERAN reya agung ban talebat molja, kodu ekatako'e alebbiyan dhari ba-diba." 
Psalms96:5 Ba-dibana bangsa laen pera' arca brahala, tape PANGERAN reya se nyepta'agi langnge'." 
Psalms96:6 Salerana katotoban kamolja'an ban kaagungan, Padalemmanna possa' ban kobasa sarta kaasreyan." 
Psalms96:7 Molja'agi PANGERAN, he ommat manossa, molja'agi kaagungan ban kakowadanna!" 
Psalms96:8 Molja'agi asmana se agung, mara ngeba kurban ka dhalem Padalemmanna." 
Psalms96:9 Semba Pangeran ngangguy pangangguy kabakteyan! Pangetter e ajunanna, saantero dunnya!" 
Psalms96:10 Berta'agi ka sa-bangsa, “PANGERAN reya Rato! Bume koko ta' ekenneng gundhek; Salerana bakal ahakimana sa-bangsa kalaban adil.”" 
Psalms96:11 Mara paperak, langnge' ban bume! Mara agarudhu', tase' ban saessena!" 
Psalms96:12 Mara paperak, gal-teggal ban men-tamennanna! Ka'-bungka'an e alas bakal rak-soragana." 
Psalms96:13 Sabab PANGERAN rabu marenta e bume, ahakimana sa-bangsa kalaban jujur ban adil." 
Psalms97:1 PANGERAN reya Rato! Mara bume anga-bunga, ban lo-polo padha paperak!" 
Psalms97:2 Pangeran ekalenglenge ondhem ban papetteng; kaadilan ban hokom menangka dhasarra pamarenta'anna. 
Psalms97:3 Apoy alatlat e ajunanna, mapotthon moso e sakalenglengnga." 
Psalms97:4 Dhap-keddhabba nera'e dunnya, bume ngetter nangale'e jareya." 
Psalms97:5 Nong-gunong ngalelle akantha lilin e ajunanna PANGERAN, e ajunanna Pangeran, se ngobasane saantero bume." 
Psalms97:6 Langnge' aberta'agi kaadilanna, sa-bangsa kabbi nangale'e kamolja'anna." 
Psalms97:7 Reng-oreng se nyemba brahala padha epamalowa, sakabbinna diba bakal asojuda e ajunanna PANGERAN." 
Psalms97:8 Pandhudhu' Siyon ban tha-kottha Yehuda senneng e bakto ngedhing potosanna PANGERAN.

Psalms97:11 Tera' la moncar kaangguy oreng se berse atena, ban kagumbira'an kaangguy oreng se jujur odhi'na."

Psalms98:1 Jabur. Mara anyanye nyanyeyan se anyar kaator ka PANGERAN, polana lalampa'anna se makasambu' ate! Kalaban kobasa ban kakowadanna dibi' Pangeran ngaolle kamennangan." 
Psalms98:2 PANGERAN aberta'agi kamennanganna; ban anyata'agi kaadilanna ka sa-bangsa. 
Psalms98:3 Salerana emot ka kataresna'an ban kaestowanna ka Isra'il, ommadda. Sakabbinna bangsa e bume la nangale kamennanganna Allahna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms98:4 Mara asorak kaator ka PANGERAN, saantero bume! Poji Pangeran ban nyanyeyan sarta sorak se gumbira." 
Psalms98:5 Mara anyanye nyanyeyan pojiyan kaator ka PANGERAN, sambi nabbu calempongnga." 
Psalms98:6 Tope tarompet ban sangkakala, asorak kaator PANGERAN, Ratona sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms98:7 Mara agarudhu', tase' ban essena, bume ban kabbi se badha e dhalemmanna." 
Psalms98:8 Dina ngay-songay me' olle padha akopa', ban mo'-gumo' padha rak-soragan e ajunanna PANGERAN." 
Psalms98:9 Sabab Pangeran rabu ahakimana bume; sa-bangsa ehakimana kalaban bendher ban adil. 
Psalms99:1 PANGERAN reya Rato, daddi sa-bangsa ngetter polana tako'. Salerana alenggi e attas kerub, daddi bume agundhek." 
Psalms99:2 Neng e Siyon PANGERAN ce' kobasana; Salerana agung ngalebbi'i sakabbinna bangsa. 
Psalms99:3 Dina kabbi me' olle amolja'agi asmana se agung ban molja. Socce Salerana! 
Psalms99:4 Rato se kowat kobasa, Junandalem lebur ka hokom; Junandalem malerres sadajana; Junandalem alampa'agi hokom sareng kaadilan e Isra'il." 
Psalms99:5 Mara agungngagi PANGERAN Allahna sengko' ban ba'na; mara asojud e ajunanna korse karaja'anna! Socce salerana! 
Psalms99:6 Mosa ban Harun tamaso' mam-imamma, Samuwel sala settong se adu'a ka Salerana. Reng-oreng jareya aera' ka PANGERAN, ban Salerana apareng jawaban." 
Psalms99:7 Dhari cangga ondhem Pangeran adhabu ka reng-oreng jareya, reng-oreng jareya atoro' ka kom-hokom ban papakonna." 
Psalms99:8 Ya ALLAH Pangeran kaula, Junandalem apareng jawaban ka ommadda; monggu ka reng-oreng gapaneka Junandalem Allah se dujan nyapora, sanare reng-oreng gapaneka sareng Junandalem eokom lantaran kasala'anna." 
Psalms99:9 Mara agungngagi GUSTE Allahna sengko' ban ba'na, semba Salerana e Gumo'na se socce, sabab GUSTE Allahna sengko' ban ba'na reya socce." 
Psalms100:1 Jabur kaangguy kurban sokkoran. Mara asorak kaator ka PANGERAN, saantero bume!" 
Psalms100:2 Mara abakte ka PANGERAN kalaban ate gumbira, ngadhep ka ajunanna sambi anyanyeyagi nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan se gumbira!" 
Psalms100:3 Kaenga'e ja' PANGERAN reya Allah. Salerana se nyepta'agi sengko' ban ba'na, daddi sengko' ban ba'na reya kaagunganna, ommadda, bangsa se epeyara bi' Salerana." 
Psalms100:4 Mara maso' lebat labang sakethengnga sambi nyanyeyagi nyanyeyan sokkor, mara maso' ka taneyanna bi' ji-pojiyan. Asokkor ka Salerana, molja'agi Salerana!" 
Psalms100:5 Sabab PANGERAN reya sae; kataresna'anna kaangguy salanjangnga ban kaestowanna ron-temoron saterrossa. 
Psalms101:1 Jaburra Daud. Abdidalem anyanye parkara kaestowan sareng kaadilan, kaagem Junandalem, GUSTE, nyanyeyan pojiyan abdidalem!" 
Psalms101:2 Abdidalem ajaga'a sopaja odhi'a tadha' calena. Bilaepon Junandalem se rabuwa manggiyana abdidalem? Abdidalem odhi'a socce e compo'," 
Psalms101:3 manabi badha kajahadan sareng abdidalem ta' epannengnga. Abdidalem baji' ka tengkaepon oreng mortad, ta' poron aorosan sareng reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms101:4 Abdidalem ta' roceya, ta' ro'-noro'a e dhalem kajahadan." 
Psalms101:5 Oreng se tek-ngetek apetenna sareng abdidalem epateyana. Oreng se sombong sareng tenggi atena sareng abdidalem ta' epannengnga. 
Psalms101:6 Abdidalem lebur ka oreng se esto ka Allah; reng-oreng gapaneka kengeng enneng e compo' abdidalem. Oreng se odhi'na tadha' calena kengeng aladine abdidalem. 
Psalms101:7 Tokang tepo ta' kengeng enneng e compo' abdidalem; oreng lecegan ta' kera kowat dhep-adhebban sareng abdidalem. 
Psalms101:8 Sabban are abdidalem mamosna'a reng-oreng jahat e nagara ka'dhinto. Reng-oreng se alako jahat sareng abdidalem epamosna'a dhari kotthana PANGERAN. 
Psalms102:1 Du'ana oreng se nyangsara e dhalem kabadha'an lesso aserro ka PANGERAN. 
Psalms102:2 Adhu GUSTE, peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, moga serrona abdidalem napa'a ka Junandalem." 
Psalms102:3 Ja' malengos dhari abdidalem, manabi abdidalem e dhalem kasossa'an. Peyarsa'agi manabi abdidalem aserro, kasokana Junandalem duli nyaot." 
Psalms102:4 Odhi' abdidalem elang akadi okos; lang-tolang abdidalem akadi mardhana apoy. 
Psalms102:5 Abdidalem lesso akadi rebba se kerreng, sareng ta' gadhuwan napso se neddha'a." 
Psalms102:6 Abdidalem ngadhudhu epakaja; badan kare kole' se abungkos tolang. 
Psalms102:7 Abdidalem akadi mano' alas e ra-ara, akadi wek-kowek e jur-gujuran se seppe." 
Psalms102:8 Abdidalem ta' ngeddha tedhung, akadi mano' se kaseppeyan e ata'na compo'." 
Psalms102:9 Saare benteng abdidalem eya-seya moso; nyama abdidalem ebadhi babaston sareng oreng se peggel ka abdidalem. 
Psalms102:10 Abdidalem neddha abu akadi roti, se eenom abdidalem acampor aeng tengal," 
Psalms102:11 sabab sareng Junandalem abdidalem eangka' laju ebantengngagi, lantaran dukaepon Junandalem ekabbiyagi." 
Psalms102:12 Odhi' abdidalem lebat akadi jang-bajangan e baja asar; abdidalem elop akadi rebba. 
Psalms102:13 Namong Junandalem, GUSTE, salanjangnga teptep Rato, se terros ekaemodi ron-temoron." 
Psalms102:14 Junandalem bakal ngadegga noduwagiya kabellasan ka Siyon, sabab ampon napa' sa'adda Siyon ekabellasi." 
Psalms102:15 Sabab di-abdiepon Junandalem taresna ka kottha gapaneka, sanare ampon aropa jur-gujuran se tadha' argana. Sadaja padha arassa neser, sanare ampon aropa abu sareng tana." 
Psalms102:16 Kobasana PANGERAN bakal ekatako'ana sa-bangsa; kamolja'anna ekasengkae to-rato saalam dunnya," 
Psalms102:17 e bakto PANGERAN mateppa' Siyon pole sarta kalowar e dhalem kaagunganna. 
Psalms102:18 Pangeran bakal meyarsa'agiya du'ana ommadda se malarat ban ta' nolak parnyo'onanna. 
Psalms102:19 Mara toles sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN me' olle ekataowe angkadan se bakal dhateng, sopaja bangsa se gi' ta' elahirragi e dunnya, bisa amolja'agi Salerana." 
Psalms102:20 PANGERAN ngoladi dhari kalenggiyanna se tenggi, dhari sowarga nyongngo' ka bume," 
Psalms102:21 meyarsa'agiya serrona oreng tahanan, mabebasa reng-oreng se eokom mate." 
Psalms102:22 Daddi asmana bakal eberta'agiya e Siyon, Salerana bakal emolja'agiya e Yerusalim," 
Psalms102:23 e bakto sa-bangsa ban karaja'an-karaja'an padha akompol abakteya ka PANGERAN. 
Psalms102:24 PANGERAN motel tang kakowadan e bakto sengko' gi' ngodha, tang omor epapandha'." 
Psalms102:25 Sengko' pas mator, “Ya Allah ja' cabuddagi nyaba abdidalem, sabab abdidalem gi' ta' towa.” GUSTE, Junandalem odhi' salanjangnga," 
Psalms102:26 gi' dhimen Junandalem abadhi bume, sapaneka jugan Junandalem se abadhi langnge'." 
Psalms102:27 Sadaja gapaneka bakal mosna'a, namong Junandalem paggun badha saterrossa; sadaja gapaneka bakal lajuwa akadi kalambi. Sareng Junandalem bakal ebuwanga akadi kalambi se laju, saamponna sadajana laju bakal mosna'a." 
Psalms102:28 Namong Junandalem paggun padha, odhi'epon Junandalem tadha' aherra." 
Psalms102:29 Na' poto abdidalem sadaja bakal taremtemma odhi'na, sareng aman saterrossa e dhalem pangaobannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms103:1 Dhari Daud. Mara molja'agi PANGERAN, tang sokma, tang ate, mara molja'agi asmana se socce." 
Psalms103:2 Mara molja'agi PANGERAN, tang sokma, ja' kaloppae kasaeyanna Salerana!" 
Psalms103:3 Salerana se nyapora sakabbinna dusana ba'na, se mabaras sakabbinna panyakedda ba'na," 
Psalms103:4 Salerana se malopot nyabana ba'na dhari koburan, se marenge ba'na kataresna'an ban kabellasan se talebat bannya'na." 
Psalms103:5 Salerana se marenge odhi'na ba'na sabarang se becce' se ta' korang bannya'na sampe' ba'na teptep ngodha akantha mano' ellang raja. 
Psalms103:6 PANGERAN alampa'agi hokom ban kaadilanna, kaangguy sakabbinna oreng se tatendhes odhi'na." 
Psalms103:7 Salerana anyata'agi ka Mosa sabarang se elampa'agiya Salerana, bangsa Isra'il epanangale sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms103:8 Sabab PANGERAN reya bellas ase, lanjang sabbarra ban kataresna'anna talebat rajana." 
Psalms103:9 Salerana ta' abentak ros-terrosan, ta' duka salanjangnga." 
Psalms103:10 Pangeran ta' ngokom sengko' ban ba'na satembang ban dusana, otabana apareng babales ka sengko' ban ba'na satembang ban kasala'anna." 
Psalms103:11 Tape padha ban tenggina langnge' e attassa bume, sajareya rajana kataresna'anna ka oreng se alem." 
Psalms103:12 Akantha jauna temor dhari bara', sajareya keya jauna Salerana mowang sa-dusana sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms103:13 Akantha oreng lake' se neser ka na'-ana'na, kantha jareya taresnana PANGERAN ka oreng se alem." 
Psalms103:14 Sabab PANGERAN ngagali ekagabay dhari apa sengko' ban ba'na reya, Pangeran emot sengko' ban ba'na pera' dhari abu tana." 
Psalms103:15 Odhi'na manossa sakejja' akantha rebba, mekkar akantha kembang e teggal;" 
Psalms103:16 mon eketbat angen laju elang mosna, la'-mala' ta' etemmo lampadda kennengnganna." 
Psalms103:17 Tape PANGERAN teptep taresna ka oreng alem, kabecce'anna ta' ambu ron-temoron" 
Psalms103:18 ka oreng se neggu'i parjanjiyanna, ban esto ajalannagi papakonna." 
Psalms103:19 PANGERAN marenta e sowarga; Salerana jareya rato se ngobasane sakabbinna. 
Psalms103:20 Molja'agi PANGERAN, kat-malaekat se parjuga, se meyarsa'agi ban alampa'agi dhabuna." 
Psalms103:21 Molja'agi PANGERAN, lok-mahlok e sowarga, sakabbinna abdina se ajalannagi kasokanna." 
Psalms103:22 Molja'agi PANGERAN, sakabbinna cepta'an se badha e baba kakobasa'anna. Molja'agi PANGERAN, tang sokma!" 
Psalms104:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN, tang sokma! Agung onggu Junandalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula! Junandalem ngagem rasogan kabessaran sareng kamolja'an," 
Psalms104:2 sareng abuko' caja. Junandalem ngampar langnge' epakadi kemah," 
Psalms104:3 sareng maddek dalemmepon e attas aeng e langnge'. Dhem-ondhem sareng Junandalem ebadhi teteyan, Junandalem netene kalembang angen." 
Psalms104:4 Sareng Junandalem angen ebadhi otosan, dhap-keddhap ebadhi pangladin." 
Psalms104:5 Junandalem masang bume epakoko e langganna, kantos ta' kera gundhek salanjangnga." 
Psalms104:6 Junandalem notobi bume sareng tase' raja, aengnga ngambang kantos ka konco'na nong-gunong." 
Psalms104:7 E bakto sareng Junandalem ebentak, aeng gapaneka agili, pagilina banter lantaran garudhu'na sowarana Junandalem." 
Psalms104:8 Aeng agili lebat e nong-gunong ka dhalem cora, ka kennengngan se ampon esadhiya'agi sareng Junandalem." 
Psalms104:9 Junandalem nantowagi tes-bates se ta' kengeng elebadi aeng gapaneka, sopaja ta' kantos abali ngambang neng e bume." 
Psalms104:10 Junandalem magili somber e ra-cora, ka-cangkana songay epagili e ke'-lekke'na mo'-gumo'," 
Psalms104:11 badhi ngenome keban, maelanga pelka'na mar-hemar alas." 
Psalms104:12 E ma'-semma'na no'-mano' abadhi lebunna, ngoce e dhalemmanna un-dhaunan." 
Psalms104:13 Junandalem matoron ojan dhari langnge' epagaggar ka pagunongan, bume possa' sareng hasel karyaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms104:14 Junandalem matombu rebba menangka teddhana ban-keban, matombu samacemmepon men-tamennan kaagem manossa. Daddi manossa kengeng men-tamennan," 
Psalms104:15 sareng ngasellagi aengnga anggur se nyaman. Jugan mennya' jaitun se matera' mowana, sareng teddha'an se madhateng kakowadan ka badanna." 
Psalms104:16 Ka'-bungka'anna se etamen PANGERAN dibi', comara Libanon se gi-tenggi eparenge ojan sacokobba." 
Psalms104:17 E ka'dhissa' no'-mano' abadhi lebunna, ko'-dalko' alebun e co'-konco'na." 
Psalms104:18 Nong-gunong se tenggi daddi kennengnganna embi' alas; kancel ngetek neng e to-bato karang. 
Psalms104:19 Junandalem abadhi bulan menangka tandhaepon bakto, are oneng bilaepon baktona compet." 
Psalms104:20 Manabi Junandalem madhateng petteng, are laju malem, sadajana burun alas padha kalowar." 
Psalms104:21 Can-macan se gi' ngodha agaung nyare mangsana, nyare teddha'an se esadhiya'agi Allah." 
Psalms104:22 Manabi are moncar, burun alas gapaneka padha nyengla, arendhu e pangetegganna." 
Psalms104:23 Manossa laju kalowar alalakona, terros alako kantos are para' compedda." 
Psalms104:24 Bannya' onggu karyaepon Junandalem, GUSTE, sadajana elampa'agi Junandalem kalaban bicaksana; bume possa' sareng cepta'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms104:25 Oladi tase' se lebar ngampar ka'dhissa', sareng mahlok raja kene' se ta' kabilang bannya'na." 
Psalms104:26 E tase' gapaneka pal-kapal alajar, Lewiyatan, naga tase' cepta'annepon Junandalem, en-maenan." 
Psalms104:27 Sadajana padha ngarep Junandalem, anante' papareng teddha'an manabi ampon baktona." 
Psalms104:28 Junandalem marenge, sadajana padha neddha, Junandalem nyadhiya'agi teddha'an, sadajana padha kennyang." 
Psalms104:29 Manabi Junandalem malengos, sadaja padha tako'; manabi Junandalem mondhut nyabana, sadaja padha mate, abali daddi abu akadi asalla." 
Psalms104:30 Namong manabi sareng Junandalem eparenge nyaba, sadajana ecepta'agi; Junandalem apareng odhi' se anyar ka bume." 
Psalms104:31 Moga kaagunganna PANGERAN teptebba salanjangnga! Moga Salerana sennengnga panggaliyanna ngoladi sadaja cepta'anna! 
Psalms104:32 Pangeran ngoladi ka bume sampe' bume ngetter, nong-gunong esedding sampe' okossa kalowar." 
Psalms104:33 Sengko' anyanye kaagem ka PANGERAN saomorra, anyanye pojiyan kaator ka Allah saabidda sengko' gi' odhi' e dunnya." 
Psalms104:34 Moga tang nyanyeyan katarema'a, sabab Salerana se maperak tang ate reya." 
Psalms104:35 Mandar oreng daraka epamosna'a dhari bume, oreng jahat mandar padha'a mate. Molja'agi PANGERAN, tang sokma! Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms105:1 Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN, berta'agi kaagunganna, careta'agi lalampa'anna ka sa-bangsa." 
Psalms105:2 Mara nyanye pojiyan kaagem ka PANGERAN, berta'agi sakabbinna karyana se makasambu' pekkeran." 
Psalms105:3 Salerana jareya Pangeran Se Settong; mara paperak sabab sengko' ban ba'na reya kaagunganna, kabbi se abakte ka Salerana mara pagumbira." 
Psalms105:4 Nyo'on kakowadan dhari Salerana, semba Salerana salanjangnga." 
Psalms105:5 He toronanna Ibrahim, abdina Allah, para toronanna Yakub, peleyanna Pangeran, kaenga'e sakabbinna kaajiban se elampa'agi Salerana, ja' kaloppae kapotosan-kapotosanna." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 PANGERAN reya Allahna sengko' ban ba'na, kapotosanna kaangguy saantero dunnya." 
Psalms105:8 Salerana terros emot ka parjanjiyanna, dhabuna kaangguy salanjangnga." 
Psalms105:9 Parjanjiyan jareya ebadhi Pangeran ban Ibrahim, saellana pas epaterros ban Ishak." 
Psalms105:10 Saellana jareya pas epakoko bi' Yakub, epadaddi parjanjiyan se langgeng ban ommat Isra'il." 
Psalms105:11 Ca'na dhabuna, “Tana Kana'an bi' Sengko' ebagiya ka ba'na, epadaddiya sangkolan andhi'na ba'na.”" 
Psalms105:12 Lamba' ommadda Allah daddi oreng manca e dhissa', bannya'na orengnga ta' saapa." 
Psalms105:13 Reng-oreng jareya alalana dhari bangsa se settong ka settonga, ngalle dhari nagara se settong ka settonga." 
Psalms105:14 Tape Pangeran ta' ngedine sapa'a bai nendhes ommadda jareya, kaangguy masalamedda ommadda, to-rato padha epaenga'," 
Psalms105:15 “Ja' la-nyala ka ommat Tang peleyan, Tang bi-nabbi ja' ca-anca!”" 
Psalms105:16 PANGERAN madhateng laep ka nagara jareya, parsadhiya'anna kakanan epondhut epatadha' karena." 
Psalms105:17 Tape Pangeran ngotos oreng ajangadha'i ommadda jareya, Yusup, se ejuwal egabay dunor odhi'na." 
Psalms105:18 Sokona ekalenthong, le'erra etale'e rantay besse." 
Psalms105:19 Dhi-budhina kadaddiyan keya se eramallagi salerana, Yusup eanggep ta' sala polana dhabuna PANGERAN." 
Psalms105:20 Rato Messer se ngobasane sa-bangsa makalowar salerana dhari penjara. 
Psalms105:21 Yusup laju epangoros karaja'anna, eparenge kakobasa'an marenta nagarana;" 
Psalms105:22 bariya keya kakobasa'an ngator para ponggabana rato, ban mimpin kaom towa." 
Psalms105:23 Yakub pas meyos ka Messer, neptep e jadhiya daddi oreng manca." 
Psalms105:24 Bi' PANGERAN ommadda epatamba bannya', sampe' daddi akowadan dhari mosona." 
Psalms105:25 Atena oreng Messer epabaji' ka ommadda, para abdina padha eco-koco." 
Psalms105:26 Pangeran laju ngotos Mosa abdina sarta Harun oreng peleyanna. 
Psalms105:27 E nagara Messer se kadhuwa jareya mabadha kaajiban sabannya'na, lalakon ja-raja se elampa'agi Pangeran," 
Psalms105:28 Mosa ban Harun ta'at ka papakonna. Nagara jareya laju epapetteng calemodan bi' Pangeran. 
Psalms105:29 Songayya eoba epadaddi dhara, sampe' mate kabbi ko'-juko'na." 
Psalms105:30 Kata' mossa'e nagara jareya, la'-mala' sampe' maso' ka karatonna." 
Psalms105:31 Kalaban dhabuna Allah laju dhateng lala' sabannya'na, rengnge' ngaromo' saantero nagara." 
Psalms105:32 Pangeran matoron es menangka gantena ojan, kelap epadhateng patang galirap." 
Psalms105:33 Pangeran marobbu bungkana anggur ban bungkana ara, bariya keya ju-kajuwan laenna." 
Psalms105:34 Kalaban dhabuna pas dhateng balang, bannya'na ta' ekenneng bitong, ta' ekenneng bilang." 
Psalms105:35 Balang jareya ngakan sakabbinna men-tamennan e teggal, hasella bume ekakan epatadha'." 
Psalms105:36 Saellana jareya Pangeran mate'e sakabbinna ana' sareyang e Messer. 
Psalms105:37 Saellana jareya bangsa Isra'il pas eater ka lowar, reng-oreng jareya ngeba emmas ban salaka, kabbi padha baras ban kowat." 
Psalms105:38 Oreng Messer tako' ka bangsa Isra'il jareya, daddi padha perak atena e bakto oreng Isra'il ondur dhari nagarana." 
Psalms105:39 Bi' Pangeran ommadda epajunge ondhem, eparenge apoy se matera' e baja malem." 
Psalms105:40 Reng-oreng jareya nyo'on, Pangeran madhateng mano' gemmek, ommadda eparenge roti dhari sowarga sampe' padha kennyang." 
Psalms105:41 Gunong bato eseba' pas kalowar aeng se agili akantha songay e ra-ara beddhi. 
Psalms105:42 Sabab Pangeran emot ka janjina se edhabuwagi ka Ibrahim, abdina." 
Psalms105:43 Daddi Pangeran ngater ommat peleyanna, se nyanye sambi asorak, kaperagen atena." 
Psalms105:44 Tanana sa-bangsa laen eparengngagi ka ommat jareya, gal-teggalla epadaddi andhi'na," 
Psalms105:45 sopaja ommadda ta'ada ka kom-hokomma ban atoro' ka papakonna. Molja'agi PANGERAN! 
Psalms106:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN, sabab Pangeran reya sae; kataresna'anna langgeng saterrossa." 
Psalms106:2 Sapa se bisa aberta'agi kakowadanna PANGERAN, ban amolja'agi Salerana sapantessa?" 
Psalms106:3 Pojur oreng se atoro' ka kon-papakonna, sarta se ros-terrosan teppa' tengka gulina." 
Psalms106:4 Kaemodi abdidalem, GUSTE, lantaran kabecce'annepon Junandalem ka ommadda, abdidalem jugan nyo'ona tolong manabi Junandalem masalamet reng-oreng ka'dhissa'." 
Psalms106:5 Moga abdidalem nengalana kama'moranna reng-oreng peleyannepon Junandalem tor anga-bunga asareng ommattepon Junandalem. Moga abdidalem noro'a perak tor gumbira asareng reng-oreng kaagungannepon Junandalem. 
Psalms106:6 Abdidalem sadaja padha dusa akadi para bangatowa; abdidalem sadaja ampon padha alako jahat sareng daraka. 
Psalms106:7 E bakto badha e Messer bangatowa abdidalem sadaja padha ta' ngarte; padha tadha' se pahama ka karyaepon Junandalem se makasambu' ate. Reng-oreng gapaneka loppa ka kataresna'annepon Junandalem se tadha' batessa, ban e seddi'anna Tase' Galagas reng-oreng gapaneka aberonta' ka Se Mahatenggi." 
Psalms106:8 Tape PANGERAN masalamet reng-oreng jareya bit Salerana dibi', sopaja kaparjuga'anna daddiya nyata." 
Psalms106:9 Kalaban dhabuna Tase' Galagas daddi kerreng, Pangeran abakta ommadda epajalan lebat e tase' se dhasarra kerreng akantha sagara beddhi." 
Psalms106:10 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya Allah masalamet reng-oreng jareya dhari mosona, epalopot dhari kobasana reng-oreng se baji' ka aba'na." 
Psalms106:11 Tape e dhalem aeng para mosona epatasellem, settonga tadha' karena." 
Psalms106:12 Ommadda laju parcaja ka janjina, pas anyanye amolja'agi asmana." 
Psalms106:13 Tape ta' abit dhari jareya reng-oreng jareya la loppa ka se elampa'agi PANGERAN, pas ngala' karebba dibi'na ta' kalaban nyo'on babala'anna." 
Psalms106:14 E sagara beddhi reng-oreng jareya ta' kellar ngampet napsona laju ba'-nyoba' Allah. 
Psalms106:15 Allah marenge reng-oreng jareya sabarang se epenta etambai wabah panyaket se ce' berra'na. 
Psalms106:16 E sagara beddhi reng-oreng jareya ere ka Mosa ban ka Harun abdina se socce atena. 
Psalms106:17 Bume pas maroka ngoldek Datan, notobi Abiram ban la-balana." 
Psalms106:18 Apoy toron ngolap e kennengnganna reng-oreng jareya, potthon katonon reng-oreng se padha daraka." 
Psalms106:19 E Gunong Sinay reng-oreng jareya agabay budhu'na pe-sapeyan dhari emmas, pas nyemba arca gabayanna tanangnga." 
Psalms106:20 Reng-oreng jareya morobi Allahna se agung molja egante'e arcana sape se ngakanan rebba. 
Psalms106:21 Reng-oreng jareya loppa ka Allah panyalamedda aba'na se alampa'agi sabarang lalakon raja e Messer rowa. 
Psalms106:22 Nako'e onggu se elampa'agi Allah e jadhiya, makasambu' ate kadaddiyan e Tase' Galagas." 
Psalms106:23 Daddi Allah aneyat mateyana ommadda, tape elanglang bi' Mosa, oreng peleyanna. Mosa daddi panengnga e antarana Allah ban ommadda, daddi Allah pas terep dukana." 
Psalms106:24 Saellana jareya reng-oreng buru nolak nagara se bagus rowa polana ta' parcaja ka janjina Allah. 
Psalms106:25 Reng-oreng jareya aseddhiyan e dhalem kemahna, ta' endha' ngedhingngagi dhabuna PANGERAN." 
Psalms106:26 Allah laju asompa ban ajanji mateyana reng-oreng jareya e sagara beddhi. 
Psalms106:27 Toronanna reng-oreng jareya ebuwanga e antarana sa-bangsa, epabalessudana e ra-nagara manca." 
Psalms106:28 Saellana jareya e Peyor reng-oreng jareya nyemba Ba'al, ban ngakan tor-ator se ebagi ka ba-dibana." 
Psalms106:29 Tengkana reng-oreng jareya andaddiyagi dukana PANGERAN, daddi laju epadhatengnge panyaket se nako'e parana." 
Psalms106:30 Tape Pinehas kalowar ngokom reng-oreng se sala, daddi panyaket jareya laju ambu." 
Psalms106:31 Jareya eanggep jasana, se ekaenga'e salanjangnga." 
Psalms106:32 E mor-somor Meriba reng-oreng jareya mapeggel PANGERAN, masossa Mosa polana tengka polana." 
Psalms106:33 Reng-oreng jareya mapeggel panggaliyanna Mosa, kantos adhabu ta' kalaban epekker sabellunna." 
Psalms106:34 Sa-bangsa laen bi' reng-oreng jareya ta' epamosna akantha se epakonnagi PANGERAN. 
Psalms106:35 Reng-oreng jareya la'-mala' acampor ban sa-bangsa jareya, nerowe ra-carana oreng se ta' kennal ka Allah." 
Psalms106:36 Reng-oreng jareya laju nyemba la-brahala, jareya se daddi lantaranna gaggarra aba'na." 
Psalms106:37 Na'-ana'na dibi' ekagabay kurban ka la-brahala Kana'an. 
Psalms106:38 Reng-oreng jareya magili dharana oreng se ta' sala, dharana na'-ana'na dibi', se ekurbannagiya ka la-brahala, sampe' reng-oreng jareya makocem nagarana." 
Psalms106:39 Lantaran tengka polana jareya reng-oreng jareya daddi najjis, ban ta' esto ka Allah." 
Psalms106:40 PANGERAN laju ce' dukana ka ommat jareya, ce' baji'na ka ommat kaagunganna dibi'." 
Psalms106:41 Daddi reng-oreng jareya eparengngagi ka sa-bangsa, epanneng ekobasae so-mosona." 
Psalms106:42 Ommat jareya pas etendhes bi' so-mosona, epatellok e dhalem kakobasa'anna." 
Psalms106:43 Li-baliyan PANGERAN masalamet reng-oreng jareya, tape reng-oreng jareya asoka'an aberonta' sampe' kabbi padha mate e dhalem sa-dusana." 
Psalms106:44 Tape PANGERAN meyarsa cerrengnga reng-oreng jareya, Salerana ngoladi ka kasossa'anna." 
Psalms106:45 Kaangguy kaparlowanna reng-oreng jareya Pangeran emot ka parjanjiyanna, arassa neser lantaran kataresna'anna se ce' rajana." 
Psalms106:46 Sakabbinna oreng se nawan reng-oreng jareya epaneser kabbi ka ommat jareya. 
Psalms106:47 Adhu Guste ALLAH, parenge salamet abdidalem sadajana, pakompollagi abdidalem sadajana dhari antarana sa-bangsa sopaja abdidalem sadaja kengenga asokkor sareng amolja'agi asmana Junandalem se socce." 
Psalms106:48 Molja'agi PANGERAN, Allahna Isra'il, sateya ban salanjangnga. Dina reng-oreng me' padha ngoca', “Amin!” Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms107:1 “Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN sabab Salerana sae, kataresna'anna langgeng.”" 
Psalms107:2 Koca'agi li-bali jareya, he reng-oreng se la epasalamet dhari kasossa'an!" 
Psalms107:3 Ba'na la epakompol dhari ra-nagara manca, dhari bara' ban dhari temor, dhari dhaja ban dhari lao'." 
Psalms107:4 Badha se alalana e ra-ara, ta' tao jalan ka kennengnganna e kottha." 
Psalms107:5 Reng-oreng jareya lapar ban pelka', sarta ta' andhi' pangarebban." 
Psalms107:6 E dhalem kasossa'an reng-oreng jareya aserro ka PANGERAN, bi' Pangeran eangkes dhari karekongan." 
Psalms107:7 Pangeran nonton reng-oreng jareya lebat jalan se loros ka kennengnganna e kottha. 
Psalms107:8 Sapantessa reng-oreng jareya asokkor ka PANGERAN lantaran kataresna'anna, lantaran sakabbinna karyana se makasambu' manossa." 
Psalms107:9 Sabab se pelka' epakobassa, se lapar epakennyang ban sabarang se bagus." 
Psalms107:10 Badha se ajarukkong e pettengnga, oreng okoman se sangsara ekalenthong e penjara," 
Psalms107:11 sabab reng-oreng jareya aberonta' ka Allah ban ta' marduli papakonna Allah Se Mahakobasa. 
Psalms107:12 Badanna eparemmok polana alako berra'; reng-oreng jareya labu tape tadha' se nolong. 
Psalms107:13 E dhalem kasossa'an reng-oreng jareya aserro ka PANGERAN, bi' Pangeran eangkes dhari karekongan." 
Psalms107:14 Pangeran abakta reng-oreng jareya kalowar dhari pettengnga sarta mapegga' kalenthongnga. 
Psalms107:15 Sapantessa reng-oreng jareya asokkor ka PANGERAN lantaran kataresna'anna, lantaran sakabbinna karyana se makasambu' manossa." 
Psalms107:16 Sabab Salerana magujur bang-labang dimbaga, lang-palang besse padha epalejjar." 
Psalms107:17 Badha se gendheng ban nanggung sangsara polana sa-dusana, sarta eseksa polana kasala'anna." 
Psalms107:18 Reng-oreng jareya ngalennyer nangale'e kakanan, ajalla la para'." 
Psalms107:19 E dhalem kasossa'an reng-oreng jareya aserro ka PANGERAN, bi' Pangeran eangkes dhari karekongan." 
Psalms107:20 Kalaban dhabuna bi' Pangeran reng-oreng jareya epabaras, ban epalopot dhari lobangnga koburan." 
Psalms107:21 Sapantessa reng-oreng jareya asokkor ka PANGERAN lantaran kataresna'anna, lantaran sakabbinna karyana se makasambu' manossa." 
Psalms107:22 Dina reng-oreng jareya me' olle asokkor sambi ngeba tor-ator, ban aberta'agi lalampa'anna ngangguy nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan se gumbira." 
Psalms107:23 Badha pole se alajar e tase', nyareya kasap e tase' se lebar." 
Psalms107:24 Reng-oreng jareya nangale'e sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN, karyana se makasambu' ate neng e tase' raja." 
Psalms107:25 Kalaban dhabuna pas dhateng kaleng busbus se maraja omba' e sagara. 
Psalms107:26 Pal-kapal eanjullagi sampe' tenggi ka bang-abang, pas eonjebbagi ka dhasarra tase' raja. Oreng padha katako'en ngadhebbi babaja se kantha jareya rajana." 
Psalms107:27 Kabbi padha pettengngen ban dhing-tabarindhing akantha oreng mabu' elang akkalla. 
Psalms107:28 E dhalem kasossa'an reng-oreng jareya aserro ka PANGERAN, bi' Pangeran eangkes dhari karekongan." 
Psalms107:29 Kaleng busbus berra' berreng epakon ambu, omba' laju epaceddu." 
Psalms107:30 Reng-oreng jareya perak polana kaleng busbus la ambu, bi' Pangeran ebakta ka palabbuwan se etojju." 
Psalms107:31 Sapantessa reng-oreng jareya asokkor ka PANGERAN lantaran kataresna'anna, lantaran sakabbinna karyana se makasambu' manossa." 
Psalms107:32 Reng-oreng jareya makalonta kaagunganna PANGERAN e nga'-tengnga'anna ommadda, ban amolja'agi Salerana e dhalem kompolanna oreng wa-towa." 
Psalms107:33 Ngay-songay eoba epadaddi sagara beddhi, somber epadaddi tana kajal ta' metto aeng." 
Psalms107:34 Tana landhu epadaddi teggal accen, lantaran kajahadanna reng-oreng se ngennengnge." 
Psalms107:35 Sagara beddhi eoba epadaddi taman, tana kerreng epadaddi somberra aeng." 
Psalms107:36 Reng-oreng se lapar epaenneng e jadhiya, padha maddek kottha kaangguy kennengnganna." 
Psalms107:37 Reng-oreng jareya nabur ne-bine e gal-teggal sarta namen bungkana anggur, pas makompol hasella se talebat bannya'na." 
Psalms107:38 Bi' Pangeran reng-oreng jareya epabannya' ana'na, keban bu-obuwanna adhu'-budhu' sajan bannya'." 
Psalms107:39 Tape ommat jareya epakala sampe' kare sakone' lantaran sangsara ban etendhes ce' kejjemma. 
Psalms107:40 Pangeran ya-nyeya reng-oreng se nendhes ommat jareya, epakon ajalan ta' etemmo tojjuwanna e ra-ara se tadha' jalanna." 
Psalms107:41 Tape oreng mesken bi' Pangeran eangkes dhari kasossa'anna, la-balana sajan bannya' akantha dumba." 
Psalms107:42 Oreng jujur nangale'e jareya, perak atena, tape oreng jahat ta' metto caca." 
Psalms107:43 Moga oreng se bicaksana mekker parkara jareya kabbi ban ngakone kataresna'anna PANGERAN tadha' obana. 
Psalms108:1 Nyanyeyan. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms108:2 Ya Allah, abdidalem koko parcaja ka Junandalem, abdidalem anyanye amolja'agiya Junandalem. Mara jaga, tang sokma!" 
Psalms108:3 Mara jaga, gambus ban calempong! Sengko' ajaga'ana pajjar." 
Psalms108:4 Abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem, GUSTE, e antaraepon sa-bangsa. Abdidalem terro anyanyeya pojiyan kaator Junandalem, e antaraepon manossa." 
Psalms108:5 Sabab kataresna'annepon Junandalem raja kantos gan langnge'; kaestowannepon Junandalem kantos ka ondhem. 
Psalms108:6 Ya Allah, duduwagi kaagungannepon Junandalem e langnge', sareng kamolja'annepon Junandalem e saantero bume." 
Psalms108:7 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem bit kobasaepon Junandalem, jawabbagi du'a abdidalem, sopaja reng-oreng se ekataresnae Junandalem padha salamet." 
Psalms108:8 Dhari kalenggiyanna se socce Allah adhabu, “Sengko' asoraga ban gi-magiya tana Sikhem, Cora Sukot bi' Sengko' eelloda." 
Psalms108:9 Gileyad ban Manasye reya Tang andhi', Efraim Tang songko' baja, Yehuda Tang tongket karaja'an." 
Psalms108:10 Tape Mo'ab kennengnganna pamaccowanna Tang soko; Sengko' asorak mennang ka Filistea. Sengko' ngontallagi Tang kasot ka Edom, menangka tandha Edom jareya andhi'na Sengko'.”" 
Psalms108:11 Sapa se ngeba'a sengko' ka Edom? Sapa se nontona sengko' ka kottha binteng jareya? 
Psalms108:12 Ya Allah, ponapa Junandalem ta' kasokan onggu asarengnge abdidalem sadaja? Ponapa Junandalem ta' kasokan maju asarengnge tantarana abdidalem sadaja?" 
Psalms108:13 Tolong abdidalem sadaja ngadhebbi moso, sabab bantowannepon manossa tadha' gunana." 
Psalms108:14 Abareng Allah, sengko' ban ba'na parjuga; Allah jareya se makala mosona sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms109:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. Ya Allah se ros-terrosan emolja'agi sareng abdidalem, ngereng ja' ros-terrosan mendel." 
Psalms109:2 Sabab abdidalem eserrang oreng jahat sareng tokang tepo se mabalattra kabar lecek parkara abdidalem. 
Psalms109:3 Reng-oreng gapaneka nyerrang abdidalem sareng ca'-oca' se noduwagi kabaji'an, merrange abdidalem ta' kalaban badha sababba." 
Psalms109:4 Reng-oreng gapaneka ngarane abdidalem, sanare abdidalem taresna ka reng-oreng gapaneka, sareng mojiyagi reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms109:5 Kabecce'an abdidalem ebales sareng kajahadan, kataresna'an abdidalem ebales sareng kabaji'an." 
Psalms109:6 Angkaddagi oreng jahat kasorang pakon ngadili oreng gapaneka, diggal oreng gapaneka me' olle egugat sareng mosona." 
Psalms109:7 Moga oreng gapaneka eadilana sareng enyata'agiya sala, sarengngan moga du'ana eanggebba dusa." 
Psalms109:8 Mandar oreng gapaneka duliya mate, ban pangkadda ekala' oreng laen." 
Psalms109:9 Moga ana'epon padha eparengngana daddi jatim, ban rajina daddi randha." 
Psalms109:10 Moga ana'epon padha daddiya oreng ngemmes se ajalan san-kassannagi ta' epanggi tojjuwanna, sareng eojuk dhari jur-gujuranna compo'na." 
Psalms109:11 Moga sadaja dhi'-andhi'na erampasa tokang tagina otang, hasella pello konengnga ekala' oreng." 
Psalms109:12 Ja' kantos badha oreng se becce' ate ka reng-oreng gapaneka, otabana bellas ase ka na'-ana'na se edinggalagi." 
Psalms109:13 Moga sadaja toronanna mateya, nyamana ekaloppae sareng angkadan se bakal dhateng." 
Psalms109:14 Moga kajahadanna bangatowana pagguna ekaemodi PANGERAN, ban dusana ebuna ta' epaelang." 
Psalms109:15 Moga kasala'anna reng-oreng gapaneka teptebba ekaemodi PANGERAN, ban tadha' oreng e bume se ngenga'e nyamana." 
Psalms109:16 Sabab oreng gapaneka ta' oneng enga' noduwagiya bellas ase sakone'a. Aba'epon nganeyaja oreng mesken sareng se nyangsara sarta mate'e oreng se ta' bisa apa-ponapa. 
Psalms109:17 Oreng gapaneka dujan abasto; moga ekennenga basto dibi'! Ta' poron apareng berkat, moga ta' onenga narema berkat dibi'!" 
Psalms109:18 Monggu ka oreng gapaneka abasto barang biyasa, eanggep padha sareng masang kalambina. Diggal babaston gapaneka me' olle nyarepsep akadi aeng ka badanna, sareng akadi mennya' ka dhalem lang-tolangnga." 
Psalms109:19 Moga oreng gapaneka katotobana babastonna akadi se katotoban kalambina, sareng ele'le' babaston gapaneka akadi sabbu' e tengngana." 
Psalms109:20 GUSTE, teba'agi okoman gapaneka ka oreng se ngarane abdidalem, ka oreng se acaca jahat parkara abdidalem." 
Psalms109:21 Namong tolong abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, parenge salamet abdidalem lantaran kabecce'an sareng kataresna'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms109:22 Sabab abdidalem mesken sareng nyangsara, ate abdidalem loka ce' dhalemma." 
Psalms109:23 Abdidalem para' elanga akadi jang-bajangan e baja asar, abdidalem ekepattagi epakadi balang." 
Psalms109:24 To'ot abdidalem ngetter polana apowasa, badan koros kerreng tadha' dagingnga." 
Psalms109:25 Reng-oreng se nengale abdidalem padha ya-nyeya sareng pek-kepeggan tadha' ambuna. 
Psalms109:26 Tolong abdidalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, parenge salamet abdidalem menorot kataresna'anna Junandalem." 
Psalms109:27 Daddi moso abdidalem tanto pas oneng ja' Junandalem se alampa'agi gapaneka, Guste." 
Psalms109:28 Sanare abdidalem ebasto sareng reng-oreng gapaneka, moga sareng Junandalem abdidalem eparengngana berkat. Sanare reng-oreng gapaneka padha jaga, reng-oreng gapaneka bakal epamalowa; namong moga abdidalem, abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto eparengngana gumbira terros." 
Psalms109:29 Moga reng-oreng se ngarane abdidalem eya'-seya'a odhi'na, ban rassa malo nyalokobi aba'na akadi juba." 
Psalms109:30 Sengko' amolja'agiya PANGERAN epakaja'a, makalonta'a asmana e nga'-tengnga'anna kompolanna ommat." 
Psalms109:31 Sabab Salerana abilla ban masalamet oreng mesken, dhari oreng se neba'agi okoman mate ka reng-oreng jareya." 
Psalms110:1 Jaburra Daud. PANGERAN adhabu ka tang guste, “Mara toju' e kanganna Sengko', sampe' so-mosona ba'na bi' Sengko' epatellok ka ba'na.”" 
Psalms110:2 Dhari Siyon PANGERAN malebara karaja'annepon junandalem; moga junandalem ngobasa'ana so-mosona! 
Psalms110:3 E are bakto junandalem rabu kalaban kobasana, e gumo' se socce, ra'yattepon junandalem maju kalaban sokalella. Akadi ebbun e baja laggu para ngangodhadan nyander ka junandalem." 
Psalms110:4 PANGERAN ajanji ban asompa, janji se ta' ecabuda saterrossa, “Ba'na imam kaangguy salanjangnga, akantha Melkisedek.”" 
Psalms110:5 PANGERAN badha e kangannepon junandalem, manabi duka, to-rato padha epakala." 
Psalms110:6 Salerana badhi ngokoma sa-bangsa, kantos mayyit ajalamperran ta' karowan. Salerana badhi mateyana para pangobasa se badha neng e dunnya." 
Psalms110:7 Rato badhi adha'ara aeng dhari songay e penggir lorong, saamponnepon epakowat bakal mennanga." 
Psalms111:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Sengko' asokkor ka PANGERAN sampe' ka dhasarra ate, e nga'-tengnga'anna kompolanna ommadda." 
Psalms111:2 Ajib onggu sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN, patot etalektegi reng-oreng se lebur ka Salerana." 
Psalms111:3 Sabarang se elampa'agi PANGERAN reya agung ban makasambu' atena manossa, kaadilanna langgeng saterrossa." 
Psalms111:4 PANGERAN reya bellas ase, alampa'agi sabarang se makasambu' ate, sengko' ban ba'na sopaja teptebba enga' ka Salerana." 
Psalms111:5 Pangeran marenge rajekke ka oreng se abakte ka Salerana, sarta emot terros ka parjanjiyanna." 
Psalms111:6 Salerana noduwagi kobasana ka ommadda, kalaban marenge ommat jareya tana sangkolanna sa-bangsa." 
Psalms111:7 PANGERAN reya adil ban esto e dhalem sabarang se elampa'agi, sakabbinna papakonna ekenneng andellagi." 
Psalms111:8 Hokomma terros koko salanjangnga, eparengngagi sabendherra ban sajujurra." 
Psalms111:9 Allah mabebas ommadda, mabadha parjanjiyan se langgeng ban reng-oreng jareya. Jareya PANGERAN se socce ban parjuga!" 
Psalms111:10 Sapa se terro bicaksana'a kodu hormat ka PANGERAN, Salerana apareng pangarteyan ka sakabbinna oreng se ta'at. Molja'agi PANGERAN salanjangnga!" 
Psalms112:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Pojur oreng alem, se atoro' ka papakonna PANGERAN." 
Psalms112:2 Na'-ana'na bakal kobasa'a e nagara reya, toronanna oreng becce' bakal eberkadana." 
Psalms112:3 Sabalana bakal sogiya ban ma'mora, odhi'na bakal nyamana salanjangnga." 
Psalms112:4 Tera' nyonar e pettengnga kaangguy oreng se jujur atena kaangguy oreng se adil, se bellas ase." 
Psalms112:5 Pojur oreng se lamba' atena ban lebur jam-maenjam, sarta jujur e dhalem orosan." 
Psalms112:6 Oreng becce' masthe ahasel saterrossa, aba'na bakal ekaenga'ana salanjangnga." 
Psalms112:7 Oreng jareya ta' tako' narema kabar juba', atena koko lantaran parcaja ka PANGERAN." 
Psalms112:8 Oreng jareya ta' kobater otaba tako' atena, sabab yakin mosona tanto epakala." 
Psalms112:9 Dhi'-andhi'na egi-bagi, ban asandhekka ka oreng se ta' andhi'; se elakone pera' barang se becce', daddi aba'na kobasa ban ehormat oreng." 
Psalms112:10 Oreng jahat nangale'e, laju peggel atena; gigina ngaret dhari baji'na. Reng-oreng jareya pas padha mate; pangarebbanna elang mosna salanjangnga." 
Psalms113:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Para abdina PANGERAN, mara molja'agi asmana PANGERAN!" 
Psalms113:2 Asmana bakal epakalonta'a sateya ban saterrossa. 
Psalms113:3 Dhari temor sampe' ka bara' asmana PANGERAN kodu emolja'agi. 
Psalms113:4 PANGERAN kobasa ka sakabbinna bangsa, kaagunganna ngongkole langnge'." 
Psalms113:5 Sapa se nandhinge PANGERAN Allahna sengko' ban ba'na? Se alenggi e kennengngan se tenggi? 
Psalms113:6 Tape Salerana ngendha', ngoladana langnge' ban bume." 
Psalms113:7 Oreng mesken epajaga dhari dhalem abu, oreng malarat eangkes dhari dhalem cellot." 
Psalms113:8 Reng-oreng jareya epatoju' epapolong ban reng-oreng se neggu' kakobasa'an, epakompol ban oreng agung e dhalem bangsana." 
Psalms113:9 Babine'an se jubeng eparenge ana', epadaddi ebu se gumbira atena ban ehormat e bengkona. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms114:1 E bakto bangsa Isra'il kalowar dhari Messer, e bakto toronanna Yakub ngalle dhari nagara manca," 
Psalms114:2 bi' Pangeran Yehuda ebadhi kalenggiyanna se socce, Isra'il ebadhi baba kakobasa'anna." 
Psalms114:3 Tase' Galagas nangale'e Salerana laju buru, Songay Yordan se agili pas ambu." 
Psalms114:4 Nong-gunong ca'-lonca'an akantha embi', mo'-gumo' cal-pancalan akantha budhu'na dumba." 
Psalms114:5 Badha apa, tase', ba'na me' buru? Badha apa Songay Yordan, se agili me' ambu?" 
Psalms114:6 Apa sababba ba'na me' ca'-lonca'an, nong-gunong, ban arapa ba'na me' cal-encalan, mo'-gumo'?" 
Psalms114:7 He bume, mara ba'na pangetter e ajunanna Pangeran, e ajunanna Allahna Yakub," 
Psalms114:8 se ngoba bato karang epadaddi taman, ban ngoba gunong epadaddi somberra aeng." 
Psalms115:1 Banne abdidalem, GUSTE, banne abdidalem, namong Junandalem se kodu emolja'agi, sabab Junandalem esto sareng taresna salanjangnga." 
Psalms115:2 Arapa sa-bangsa me' kodu ngoca', “E dhimma Allahna reng-oreng jareya?”" 
Psalms115:3 Allahna sengko' ban ba'na badha e sowarga, Salerana alampa'agi sabarang se daddi kasokanna." 
Psalms115:4 Brahalana reng-oreng jareya dhari emmas ban salaka, gabayanna tanangnga manossa." 
Psalms115:5 La-brahala jareya badha colo'na, tape ta' bisa acaca, badha matana, tape ta' nangale pa-apa." 
Psalms115:6 Brahala jareya badha kopengnga, tape ta' ngedhing pa-apa, badha elongnga, tape ta' bisa nyeyom." 
Psalms115:7 Brahala jareya badha tanangnga, tape ta' bisa araga, badha sokona, tape ta' bisa ajalan, ban ta' kalowar sowara dhari gerrunganna." 
Psalms115:8 Mandar kantha'a jareya keya daddina reng-oreng se agabay ban se parcaja ka la-brahala jareya. 
Psalms115:9 He ommat Isra'il, mara ngarep ka PANGERAN, Salerana se nolong ban ngaobi ba'na." 
Psalms115:10 He para imam, mara ngarep ka PANGERAN, Salerana se nolong ban ngaobi ba'na." 
Psalms115:11 He reng-oreng alem, mara ngarep ka PANGERAN, Salerana se nolong ban ngaobi ba'na." 
Psalms115:12 PANGERAN emot ban apareng berkat ka sengko' ban ba'na, Salerana bakal aberkadana ommat Isra'il ban sakabbinna imam toronanna Harun." 
Psalms115:13 Pangeran bakal aberkadana reng-oreng alem, se raja, bariya keya se kene'." 
Psalms115:14 Moga PANGERAN marengana bannya' ana', ka ba'na ban toronanna." 
Psalms115:15 Moga ba'na eberkadana bi' PANGERAN, se nyepta'agi langnge' ban bume!" 
Psalms115:16 Langnge' reya kaagunganna PANGERAN malolo, tape bume eparengngagi ka manossa terros." 
Psalms115:17 PANGERAN ta' eagungngagi bi' oreng mate, bi' oreng se la toron ka tana se seppe." 
Psalms115:18 Tape sengko' ban ba'na se odhi' reya asokkor ka Salerana, sateya ban salanjangnga. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms116:1 Sengko' taresna ka PANGERAN, sabab Pangeran meyarsa'agi tang parnyo'onan." 
Psalms116:2 Pangeran meyarsa'agi tang sowara, sabban sengko' aserro ka Salerana." 
Psalms116:3 Sengko' ekalenglenge babaja maot; ce' marengessa rassana ngadhebbi pate, sampe' sengko' ngalengsang ban tako'." 
Psalms116:4 Daddi sengko' aera' ka PANGERAN, “Adhu GUSTE, nyo'ona tolong, parenge salamet abdidalem!”" 
Psalms116:5 PANGERAN reya bellas ase ban adil; Allahna sengko' ban ba'na neserran parana. 
Psalms116:6 PANGERAN reya meyara reng-oreng se majja; sengko' epasalamet e bakto ta' bisa apa-rapa. 
Psalms116:7 Sengko' maayem tang ate, sabab PANGERAN sae ka sengko'." 
Psalms116:8 PANGERAN la malopot sengko' dhari pate; sengko' elepor ban ejaga sampe' sengko' ta' labu. 
Psalms116:9 Daddi sengko' bisa ngarassa'agi kobassana odhi' e dunnya reya, e dhalem pangaobanna PANGERAN." 
Psalms116:10 Sengko' paggun parcaja maske sengko' ngoca' kantha reya, “Sengko' taseksa parana.”" 
Psalms116:11 E dhalem kabingongan sengko' ngoca' bariya, “Tadha' oreng se ekennenga parcaja.”" 
Psalms116:12 Apa se eatorragiya sengko' ka PANGERAN, menangka babalessa kasaeyanna ka sengko' reya?" 
Psalms116:13 Sengko' ngeba'a tor-ator anggur ka PANGERAN, menangka tandha sokkor eparenge partolongan." 
Psalms116:14 Sengko' neptebbana tang janji ka Salerana e adha'anna sakabbinna ommadda. 
Psalms116:15 PANGERAN arassa ce' emanna mon badha oreng se ekataresnae Salerana mate. 
Psalms116:16 Abdidalem ka'dhinto abdiepon Junandalem, GUSTE, akadi ebu, abdidalem jugan abakte ka Junandalem. Junandalem ampon mabebas abdidalem dhari tahanan."
