Psalms116:17 Abdidalem ngatorragiya kurban sokkor ka Junandalem, sambi ngatorragiya du'a abdidalem." 
Psalms116:18 Sengko' neptebbana tang janji ka Pangeran, e adha'na sakabbinna ommadda" 
Psalms116:19 se akompol e taneyanna Padalemman Socce, e tengngana kottha Yerusalim. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms117:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN, para bangsa, agungngagi Salerana, sakabbinna suku bangsa!" 
Psalms117:2 Sabab raja kataresna'anna PANGERAN ka sengko' ban ba'na, kaestowanna teptep ta' aoba salanjangnga. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms118:1 Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN sabab Salerana sae, kataresna'anna langgeng saterrossa." 
Psalms118:2 Soro reng-oreng Isra'il ngoca', “Kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana.”" 
Psalms118:3 Soro para imam adhabu, “Kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana.”" 
Psalms118:4 Soro sakabbinna oreng alem ngoca', “Kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana.”" 
Psalms118:5 E dhalem karekongan sengko' aserro ka PANGERAN, Salerana nyaodi sarta mabebas sengko' reya." 
Psalms118:6 Sengko' ta' tako' sabab sengko' esarengnge PANGERAN, ngadhebbi sengko' manossa ta' bisa apa-rapa." 
Psalms118:7 PANGERAN asarengnge sengko' kaangguy nolong sengko', sengko' ngabasa mon tang moso epakala." 
Psalms118:8 Lebbi becce' atameng PANGERAN, katembang ngandellagi manossa." 
Psalms118:9 Lebbi becce' atameng PANGERAN, katembang ngarep bantowanna oreng se apangkat." 
Psalms118:10 Sengko' ekaromo' moso sabannya'na, kalaban kobasana PANGERAN bi' sengko' epakala." 
Psalms118:11 Sengko' ekeppong dhari kangan ban kacer, dhari adha' ban dhari budhi; kalaban kobasana PANGERAN bi' sengko' epakala." 
Psalms118:12 Tang moso ngaromo' akantha nyarowan, kalaban kobasana PANGERAN bi' sengko' epakala. E dhalem saparngedep tang moso mate akantha apoy se rabbang e dhalem ombut." 
Psalms118:13 Sengko' eserrang ce' sarana sampe' para' kala'a, tape sengko' etolong bi' PANGERAN." 
Psalms118:14 PANGERAN reya tang kakowadan ban tang pojja'an, Salerana panyalamedda tang aba'." 
Psalms118:15 Edhingngagi sorak kamennangan e mah-kemahna ommadda Pangeran, “PANGERAN alampa'agi lalakon se parjuga!" 
Psalms118:16 Kobasana PANGERAN marenge kamennangan ka sengko' ban ba'na, PANGERAN alampa'agi lalakon se parjuga!”" 
Psalms118:17 Sengko' ta' kera mate, tape tanto odhi' terros kaangguy aberta'agi karyana PANGERAN." 
Psalms118:18 PANGERAN nyeksa sengko' ce' kerrassa, tape ta' massra'agi sengko' ka maot sampe' sateya." 
Psalms118:19 Mara sengko' bukka'e labang sakethengnga Padalemman Socce, sengko' maso'a, asokkora ka Salerana." 
Psalms118:20 Areya' labang sakethengnga PANGERAN, pera' oreng jujur se olle lebat e dhinna'." 
Psalms118:21 Abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem, sabab Junandalem ngabbuli parnyo'onan abdidalem; Junandalem marenge abdidalem kamennangan." 
Psalms118:22 Bato wang-buwanganna tokang bangonan, se eanggep ta' ekenneng angguy, sateya daddi bato pelar e paddu." 
Psalms118:23 Jareya se elampa'agi PANGERAN, makasambu' onggu ka sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms118:24 Areya' are se etantowagi PANGERAN; mara raya'agi bi' ate se gumbira. 
Psalms118:25 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem sadaja, GUSTE, pamennangngagi, abdidalem sadaja, GUSTE." 
Psalms118:26 Moga eberkadana se rabu bit asmana PANGERAN, sengko' kabbi padha aberkadana ba'na dhari Padalemman Socce." 
Psalms118:27 PANGERAN reya Allah, Salerana lamba' ka sengko' ban ba'na. Mara ajalan rak-aragan, sambi ngeba ca'-ranca'na kajuwan, alengleng e mezbana PANGERAN." 
Psalms118:28 Junandalem Allah abdidalem, abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem, Guste Allah, abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem." 
Psalms118:29 Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN sabab Salerana sae, kataresna'anna langgeng saterrossa." 
Psalms119:1 Pojur oreng se odhi'na tadha' calena ban ta'at ka kom-hokomma PANGERAN. 
Psalms119:2 Pojur oreng se atoro' ka papakonna, sarta kalaban gu-onggu ate aehteyar terro kennala ka Pangeran." 
Psalms119:3 Pojur oreng se odhi' menorot karsana PANGERAN, ban ta' ngalakone kajahadan." 
Psalms119:4 Junandalem marenge papakon ka abdidalem sadaja, sopaja eestowagi kalaban gu-onggu ate." 
Psalms119:5 Moga ate abdidalem eparengngana koko atoro' sadajana atoranna Junandalem. 
Psalms119:6 Manabi abdidalem agateyagi sadajana papakonna Junandalem, tanto abdidalem ta' kera epamalo." 
Psalms119:7 Manabi abdidalem ajar parkara potosannepon Junandalem se adil, abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem kalaban ate se tolos ehlas." 
Psalms119:8 Abdidalem atoro'a ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem, ja' dinggallagi abdidalem." 
Psalms119:9 Oreng ngodha bisa ajaga sopaja odhi'na teptep tadha' calena manabi atoro' papakonnepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:10 Abdidalem aehteyar epagu-onggu sopaja kennala ka Junandalem, nyo'ona tolong ja' kantos abdidalem nyaleyot dhari papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:11 Pangajarannepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem esempen e dhalem ate, sopaja abdidalem ta' kantosa dusa ka Junandalem." 
Psalms119:12 Abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem, GUSTE, ajarragi abdidalem sadajana atorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:13 Abdidalem epakaja aberta'agi sadajana hokom se eparengngagi Junandalem. 
Psalms119:14 Abdidalem gumbira atoro' papakonnepon Junandalem, akadi se gadhuwan arta samacemma." 
Psalms119:15 Abdidalem ajara sadajana pangajarannepon Junandalem, sareng agateyagiya sadajana petoduepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:16 Hokommepon Junandalem masenneng ate abdidalem; pangajarannepon Junandalem ta' ekaloppa'ana sareng abdidalem. 
Psalms119:17 Pasae ka abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto, sopaja abdidalem teptebba odhi' atoro' ka papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:18 Bukka'agi mata abdidalem sopaja nengale pangajaran se makasambu' ate e dhalem hokommepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:19 Namong sabatara abdidalem neng e dunnya, ja' erreppagi papakonna Junandalem dhari abdidalem." 
Psalms119:20 Ate abdidalem sake' nanggung kerrong, terro onenga terros kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:21 Junandalem maemot oreng se sombong, abasto oreng se nyaleyot dhari papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:22 Palopottagi abdidalem ja' sampe' eya-seya otaba ecale reng-oreng gapaneka, sabab abdidalem ngalakone kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:23 Sanare sadajana pangobasa asakongkel ngamoso abdidalem, abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto mekkera atorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:24 Sadaja atorannepon Junandalem daddi panasehat abdidalem se masenneng ate abdidalem. 
Psalms119:25 Abdidalem tedhung e dhalem abu; pabaliyagi odhi' abdidalem akadi asalla menorot janji se edhabuwagi Junandalem. 
Psalms119:26 Abdidalem ngakone tengka abdidalem, Junandalem laju nyaodi; ajari abdidalem atorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:27 Tolong abdidalem sopaja ngarte ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem, pangajarannepon Junandalem se makasambu' ate sareng abdidalem badhi epekker." 
Psalms119:28 Ate abdidalem ancor lantaran sossa, pakowattagi abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:29 Jauwagi abdidalem dhari jalan se sala, lantaran kabecce'annepon Junandalem, ajari abdidalem hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:30 Abdidalem ampon mele ta'ada ka Junandalem, papakonnepon Junandalem ekaemodana terros." 
Psalms119:31 Sadaja atorannepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem ampon etoro', adhu GUSTE, ja' kantos abdidalem epamalo." 
Psalms119:32 Kalaban ate senneng abdidalem atoro'a ka dhabuepon Junandalem, sabab sareng Junandalem abdidalem epalebbi ngarte." 
Psalms119:33 Ngereng ajari abdidalem, GUSTE, artena sadaja atorannepon Junandalem, sopaja abdidalem kengeng atoro' kantos aher." 
Psalms119:34 Pangarteyagi abdidalem ka hokommepon Junandalem sopaja etoro' sareng abdidalem, ejalannagi kalaban gu-onggu ate." 
Psalms119:35 Moga abdidalem kokowa neggu'i papakonnepon Junandalem, sabab gapaneka se ekasennengnge abdidalem." 
Psalms119:36 Parenge abdidalem pangaterro kaangguy ta'at ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem, ngalangkonge pangaterro se sogiya." 
Psalms119:37 Jaga'agi ja' kantos abdidalem nyerser barang se ta' aguna, parenge abdidalem odhi' menorot kasokannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:38 Pakokowagi ka abdidalem janjiepon Junandalem, se eparengngagi Junandalem ka oreng se ta'at ka Junandalem." 
Psalms119:39 Jauwagi abdidalem dhari se nako'e ate, eya-seya oreng, sabab hokommepon Junandalem talebat sae." 
Psalms119:40 Parenge abdidalem odhi' se anyar, sabab Junandalem adil, abdidalem terro atoro'a ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:41 Adhu GUSTE, ngereng duduwagi saponapa kataresna'annepon Junandalem ka abdidalem, parenge salamet abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:42 Sopaja abdidalem kengenga nyaodi oreng se ya-nyeya abdidalem, sabab abdidalem ngandellagi dhabuepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:43 Nyo'ona tolong abdidalem sopaja ros-terrosan acaca salerressa, sabab abdidalem ngarep potosannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:44 Abdidalem neggu'ana kom-hokommepon Junandalem salanjangnga. 
Psalms119:45 Abdidalem badhi odhi'a bebas polana aehteyar atoro' ka pangajarannepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:46 Paratorannepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem eberta'agiya ka to-rato, ban abdidalem ta' kera epamalo." 
Psalms119:47 Kasennengngan abdidalem ngalakone papakonnepon Junandalem, sabab abdidalem esto ka papakon gapaneka." 
Psalms119:48 Abdidalem ngargai sareng esto ka papakonnepon Junandalem, hokommepon Junandalem epekkera epadhalem sareng abdidalem." 
Psalms119:49 Kaemodi janjiepon Junandalem ka abdidalem ka'dhinto, janji se madhateng pangarebban ka abdidalem." 
Psalms119:50 Se alepor abdidalem e dhalem kasangsara'an, enggi ka'dhinto janjiepon Junandalem maodhi' abdidalem." 
Psalms119:51 Oreng sombong ya-nyeya abdidalem ce' sarana, tape abdidalem ta' nyalethong dhari kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:52 Abdidalem emot ka hokommepon Junandalem se ampon badha dhari jaman dhimen, daddi ate abdidalem laju talepor, GUSTE." 
Psalms119:53 Abdidalem ce' peggella ka oreng jahat, sabab reng-oreng gapaneka adinggallagi kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:54 E dhalem odhi' abdidalem se pandha' e bume, hokommepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem ebadhi nyanyeyan pojiyan." 
Psalms119:55 E baja malem abdidalem emot ka Junandalem, GUSTE, hokommepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem teptep eteggu'i." 
Psalms119:56 Abdidalem manggi kasennengngan e dhalem atoro' papakonnepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:57 Namong Junandalem se ekaterro abdidalem, GUSTE, abdidalem ajanji ajalannagiya pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:58 Abdidalem nyo'on kabellasannepon Junandalem kalaban gu-onggu ate, kaneserre abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:59 Abdidalem ampon mekkere tengka pola abdidalem, sareng ajanji atoro'a ka paratorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:60 Abdidalem ru-kaburu sareng ta' anante', duliya ajalannagi papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:61 Oreng jahat masang jaring macalaka'a abdidalem, namong abdidalem ta' loppa ka hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:62 Tengnga malem abdidalem jaga asokkora ka Junandalem lantaran sadaja kapotosannepon Junandalem se adil. 
Psalms119:63 Abdidalem akanca sareng sadajana oreng alem, sadajana oreng se ajalannagi papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:64 Bume possa' sareng kataresna'anna Junandalem, GUSTE, ajari abdidalem sadajana atorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:65 Junandalem neptebbi janji, GUSTE, sareng apareng kabecce'an ka abdiepon." 
Psalms119:66 Parenge abdidalem hekmat sareng pangataowan, sabab abdidalem parcaja ka papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:67 Sabellunnepon eokom, abdidalem nyalethong, samangken abdidalem neggu'i papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:68 Sabab Junandalem sae, sareng alampa'agi se sae, ajari abdidalem kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:69 Abdidalem epetenna oreng se sombong, namong abdidalem kalaban gu-onggu ate atoro' ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:70 Reng-oreng gapaneka ta' ngarte, namong monggu ka abdidalem kom-hokommepon Junandalem masenneng ate." 
Psalms119:71 Pajat sae abdidalem eokom sareng Junandalem, sopaja abdidalem onenga ka sadajana katantowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:72 Monggu ka abdidalem hokommepon Junandalem lebbi arga katembang sadajana emmas sareng salaka e dunnya. 
Psalms119:73 Junandalem se nyepta'agi sareng abadhi abdidalem, parenge abdidalem pangarteyan kaangguy ajar papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:74 Oreng alem tanto senneng manabi nengale abdidalem, sabab abdidalem ngarep ka janjinepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:75 Abdidalem oneng potosannepon Junandalem adil, GUSTE, abdidalem sareng Junandalem eokom lantaran Junandalem esto." 
Psalms119:76 Kataresna'annepon Junandalem moga daddiya panglepor ka abdidalem, menorot janjiepon Junandalem ka abdiepon." 
Psalms119:77 Kaneserre abdidalem, sopaja abdidalem odhi' terros, sabab hokommepon Junandalem masenneng ate abdidalem." 
Psalms119:78 Moga oreng se sombong olleya malo lantaran metenna abdidalem ka'dhinto, namong abdidalem epadhalemma mekkera papakonnepon Junandalem sadajana." 
Psalms119:79 Moga oreng alem nyanderra ka abdidalem, sadajana oreng se oneng ka kom-hokomma Junandalem." 
Psalms119:80 Moga ate abdidalem ta' nyalethonga dhari kom-hokommepon Junandalem, sopaja abdidalem ta' kantosa malo." 
Psalms119:81 Abdidalem sanget ngarep kasalameddan dhari Junandalem; abdidalem ngarep janjiepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:82 Mata abdidalem pendhet anante' Junandalem se neptebbana janji, abdidalem atanya, “Bilaepon Junandalem alepora abdidalem?”" 
Psalms119:83 Kole' abdidalem kero' akadi kanthongnga anggur se alpo', namong katantowannepon Junandalem teptep abdidalem emot." 
Psalms119:84 Kantos bilaepon abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto kodu sabbar terros? Bilaepon Junandalem badhi ngokom reng-oreng se nyerser abdidalem? 
Psalms119:85 Oreng se ta' ta'at ka hokommepon Junandalem, ngale lobang ajebbaga abdidalem." 
Psalms119:86 Sadajana hokommepon Junandalem kengeng eandellagi, nyo'ona tolong abdidalem, sabab abdidalem eserser ta' kalaban badha margana." 
Psalms119:87 Reng-oreng gapaneka para' ahasela mate'e abdidalem, namong abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagi papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:88 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, sabab Junandalem teptep taresna, sopaja abdidalem kengenga atoro' ka hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:89 GUSTE, dhabuepon Junandalem koko salanjangnga, langgeng e dhalem sowarga." 
Psalms119:90 Kaestowannepon Junandalem ta' aoba dhari jaman ka jaman, Junandalem maddek bume kantos badha saterrossa." 
Psalms119:91 Sadaja se badha samangken ka'dhinto badha lantaran dhabuepon Junandalem, sabab sadajana padha abdiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:92 Ja' sakenga kom-hokommepon Junandalem ta' daddi somberrepon kasennengnganna ate abdidalem, tanto abdidalem ampon mate e bakto nyandhang sangsara." 
Psalms119:93 Salanjangnga abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagiya papakonnepon Junandalem, sabab kalaban papakon ka'dhinto Junandalem maodhi' abdidalem." 
Psalms119:94 Nyo'ona salamet abdidalem, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem ka'dhinto kaagungannepon Junandalem, abdidalem ampon aehteyar atoro' ka kapotosannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:95 Oreng jahat anante' mateyana abdidalem, namong abdidalem teptep agateyagiya hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:96 Abdidalem nengale se samporna jugan badha batessa, namong papakonnepon Junandalem se lerres samporna." 
Psalms119:97 Saponapa estona abdidalem ka hokommepon Junandalem, Guste, sareng abdidalem epekker saare benteng." 
Psalms119:98 Abdidalem terros emot ka papakonnepon Junandalem, se andaddiyagi abdidalem lebbi bicaksana katembang sareng so-moso abdidalem." 
Psalms119:99 Pangarteyan abdidalem ngalangkonge pangarteyannepon ru-guru abdidalem, sabab abdidalem terros mekkere sadajana papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:100 Abdidalem lebbi paham dhari reng-oreng se towa, sabab abdidalem neggu'i sadajana katantowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:101 Abdidalem ajauwi sadajana kajahadan, polana terro ta'ada ka pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:102 Abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagi hokommepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem dibi' se ngajari abdidalem." 
Psalms119:103 Dhabuwepon Junandalem talebat manessa, amanesan dhari maddu rassana!" 
Psalms119:104 Kom-hokommepon Junandalem madhateng pangarteyan ka abdidalem, kantos abdidalem ta' poron ka lalakon se juba'." 
Psalms119:105 Dhabuwepon Junandalem daddi damar se nera'e tengka' abdidalem, cajana nera'e jalan abdidalem." 
Psalms119:106 Abdidalem neptebbana janji sareng sompa, badhi neggu'ana katantowannepon Junandalem se adil." 
Psalms119:107 Abdidalem talebat nyangsara, GUSTE, jaga'agi odhi' abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:108 Kasokana Junandalem narema du'a sokkor abdidalem, GUSTE, sareng ajari abdidalem kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:109 Abdidalem ros-terrosan abandha nyaba, namong abdidalem ta' loppa ka sadajana hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:110 Oreng jahat masang barajak kaangguy abdidalem, namong abdidalem ta' adinggallagi hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:111 Papakonnepon Junandalem sangkolan abdidalem salanjangnga, se maperak ate abdidalem ros-terrosan." 
Psalms119:112 Abdidalem terro ta'ada ka katantowannepon Junandalem kantos abdidalem napa' ka ajal. 
Psalms119:113 Abdidalem esto ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem, abdidalem baji' ka oreng se kaestowannepon ka Junandalem nga-satengnga." 
Psalms119:114 Junandalem se abillai sareng ngaobi abdidalem, abdidalem ngarep ka janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:115 He oreng jahat, jauwi sengko'! Sengko' ngestowagi papakonna tang Allah." 
Psalms119:116 Parenge abdidalem kakowadan menorot janjiepon Junandalem sopaja abdidalem bisa'a odhi'; ja' kantos abdidalem epakoceba e dhalem pangarebban. 
Psalms119:117 Teggu'agi abdidalem sopaja salamet, sareng ros-terrosan agateyagi papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:118 Junandalem nolak reng-oreng se nyalethong dhari katantowannepon Junandalem, parcoma saos tepowannepon reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms119:119 Sadajana oreng jahat sareng Junandalem eanggep kas-rakas, daddi abdidalem ngestowagi kom-hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:120 Abdidalem ngetter tako' ka Junandalem, ate tako' ka kapotosannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:121 Abdidalem ampon ngalakone sadajana se adil sareng lerres, ja' passra'agi abdidalem ka tanangnga moso." 
Psalms119:122 Ngereng ajanji Junandalem nolonga abdidalem, ja' kantos abdidalem etendhes reng-oreng se angko." 
Psalms119:123 Mata abdidalem peddi anante' bantowannepon Junandalem se madhateng kasalameddan, abdidalem anante' pambebasan se ejanjiyagi Junandalem." 
Psalms119:124 Kabellasi abdidalem menorot kataresna'annepon Junandalem, sareng ajari abdidalem katantowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:125 Abdidalem ka'dhinto abdiepon Junandalem, ngereng abdidalem pangarteyagi, sopaja abdidalem paham ka papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:126 Samangken ampon napa' baktona, GUSTE, Junandalem ngokom reng-oreng se nerrak hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:127 Abdidalem ngargai papakonnepon Junandalem ngalangkonge emmas, ngalangkonge emmas sokkla." 
Psalms119:128 Daddi abdidalem odhi' menorot sadaja petoduwepon Junandalem; abdidalem baji' ka tengka se nyalethong. 
Psalms119:129 Sadajana paratorannepon Junandalem makasambu' ate, daddi sareng abdidalem etoro' kalaban gu-onggu ate." 
Psalms119:130 Manabi eterrangngagi, pangajarannepon Junandalem madhateng terrang, marenge pangarteyan ka oreng se majja atena." 
Psalms119:131 Nyaba abdidalem nga'-engnga'an rep-ngarep papakonnepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:132 Ngereng atole ka abdidalem, kaneserre abdidalem, akadi panganeserrepon Junandalem ka reng-oreng se taresna ka Junandalem." 
Psalms119:133 Pakokowagi tengka' abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem, ja' panneng abdidalem ekobasae oreng jahat." 
Psalms119:134 Pabebassagi abdidalem dhari reng-oreng se nendhes abdidalem, sopaja abdidalem kengenga ta'at ka paratorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:135 Berkadi abdidalem sareng kahadirannepon Junandalem, sareng ajari abdidalem katantowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:136 Aeng mata abdidalem agili akadi songay, lantaran hokommepon Junandalem ta' eta'adi manossa." 
Psalms119:137 Junandalem adil, GUSTE, hokommepon Junandalem lerres sadaja." 
Psalms119:138 Kon-papakon se eparengngagi Junandalem adil sareng ekenneng andellagi. 
Psalms119:139 Ate abdidalem panas, rabbang rassana, sabab moso abdidalem loppa ka pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:140 Janjiepon Junandalem koko sareng kengeng eparcaja, abdidalem ce' estona ka janji gapaneka." 
Psalms119:141 Abdidalem ka'dhinto kene' sareng nespa, namong ta' ngenthengngagi pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:142 Kaadilannepon Junandalem ta' aoba salanjangnga, hokommepon Junandalem lerres saterrossa." 
Psalms119:143 Abdidalem rekong sareng sossa, namong katantowannepon Junandalem maperak ate abdidalem." 
Psalms119:144 Atorannepon junandalem adil salanjangnga; parenge abdidalem pangarteyan sopaja odhi'a saterrossa. 
Psalms119:145 Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem kalaban gu-onggu ate; saodi abdidalem, GUSTE, abdidalem atoro'a ka papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:146 Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem parenge salamet abdidalem, abdidalem neggu'ana atorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:147 Gu-laggu abdidalem jaga, aserro nyo'on tolong; abdidalem ngarep janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:148 Samalem benteng abdidalem ta' tedhung, mekkere pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:149 Peyarsa'agi abdidalem lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem, GUSTE, jaga'agi odhi' abdidalem lantaran kaadilannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:150 Oreng se nyerser abdidalem ampon semma', reng-oreng gapaneka gadhuwan maksod jahat sareng ta' marduli hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:151 Namong Junandalem semma', GUSTE, sadaja papakonnepon Junandalem tadha' salana." 
Psalms119:152 Dhari gi' dhimen abdidalem oneng dhari sadajana pangajarannepon Junandalem, ja' sadajana papakon gapaneka eteptebbagi kaangguy salanjangnga." 
Psalms119:153 Oladi kasangsara'an abdidalem, pasalamettagi abdidalem sabab abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagi hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:154 Billa'agi abdidalem e dhalem parkara sareng pabebassagi abdidalem; pasalamettagi abdidalem menorot dhabuwepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:155 Oreng jahat ta' kera epasalamet sabab ta' atoro' ka kom-hokommepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:156 Raja onggu kabellasannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, parenge salamet abdidalem menorot kaadilannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:157 Bannya' oreng se ngamoso sareng se nyerser abdidalem, namong abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagi paratorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:158 Abdidalem baji' nengale para pangkiyanat ka'dhissa', sabab reng-oreng gapaneka ta' atoro' ka pangajarannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:159 Oladi, GUSTE, saponapa kaestowan abdidalem ka papakonnepon Junandalem, pasalamettagi abdidalem lantaran kataresna'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:160 Dhabuepon Junandalem lerres sadaja, sadaja hokommepon Junandalem se adil teptep salanjangnga." 
Psalms119:161 Reng-oreng se kobasa nyerser abdidalem ta' kalaban badha margana, namong coma hokommepon Junandalem se ekatako'e abdidalem." 
Psalms119:162 Janjiepon Junandalem maperak abdidalem akadi oreng se manggi arta. 
Psalms119:163 Abdidalem baji' ka sadajana kalecegan, namong abdidalem esto ka hokommepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:164 Abdidalem asokkor ka Junandalem ros-terrosan, lantaran hokommepon Junandalem se adil." 
Psalms119:165 Oreng se esto ka hokommepon Junandalem aman sareng taremtem, ta' kera badha oreng se bisa lang-ngalange." 
Psalms119:166 Abdidalem anante' kasalameddan dhari Junandalem, GUSTE, sadaja papakonnepon Junandalem sareng abdidalem elakone." 
Psalms119:167 Abdidalem ta'at ka sadajana hokommepon Junandalem, sareng ngestowagi papakon gapaneka kalaban gu-onggu ate." 
Psalms119:168 Abdidalem ta'at ka papakon sareng petoduepon junandalem, sabab Junandalem ngoladi sadaja se elakone abdidalem." 
Psalms119:169 Moga serroepon abdidalem napa'a ka Junandalem, GUSTE, parenge abdidalem pangarteyan, menorot janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:170 Moga parnyo'onan abdidalem napa'a ka Junandalem parenge salamet abdidalem menorot janjiepon Junandalem. 
Psalms119:171 Abdidalem amolja'agiya Junandalem ros-terrosan, sabab Junandalem ngajari abdidalem katantowannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:172 Abdidalem terro anyanyeyagiya janjiepon Junandalem, sabab papakonnepon Junandalem adil sadaja." 
Psalms119:173 Moga Junandalem ehlasa ros-terrosan nolong abdidalem, sabab abdidalem asoka'an atoro' ka paratorannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms119:174 Ate abdidalem talebat ngarep kasalameddan dhari Junandalem, hokommepon Junandalem magumbira ate abdidalem." 
Psalms119:175 Edine abdidalem odhi', sopaja abdidalem amolja'agi Junandalem, moga sadaja katantowannepon Junandalem nolong abdidalem." 
Psalms119:176 Abdidalem sala jalan akadi dumba se elang, daddi ngereng meyos ka ka'dhinto, sareyagi abdiepon Junandalem ka'dhinto sabab abdidalem ta' ngenthengngagi papakonnepon Junandalem." 
Psalms120:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. E dhalem kasossa'an sengko' aserro ka PANGERAN, ban Pangeran nyaodi sengko'." 
Psalms120:2 Adhu GUSTE, nyo'ona salamet abdidalem ka'dhinto dhari oreng se lecegan sareng se dujan nepo." 
Psalms120:3 He tokang tepo, ba' epabaramma'a ba'na bi' Guste Allah? Okoman apa ba'nengan se eparengngagiya ka ba'na?" 
Psalms120:4 Bi' pana se tajem andhi'na parjurit, bi' mardha se rabbang!" 
Psalms120:5 Palang sengko' sabab kodu odhi' apolong ban ba'na; tadha' bidana ban se enneng e Mesekh, otabana apolong ban oreng Kedar." 
Psalms120:6 La cokop abit sengko' apolong ban reng-oreng se ta' lebur odhi' rokon. 
Psalms120:7 Mon sengko' acaca parkara karokonan, reng-oreng jareya terro ka perrang." 
Psalms121:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Sengko' ngabas ka nong-gunong, dhari dhimma dhatengnga partolongan kaangguy sengko'?" 
Psalms121:2 Partolongan se etarema sengko' asalla dhari PANGERAN se abadhi alam dunnya. 
Psalms121:3 Salerana tanto ajaga ba'na sopaja ta' labuwa, se ngaobi ba'na tanto ros-terrosan aga-jaga." 
Psalms121:4 Ongguwan, se ngaobi Isra'il rowa ta' tao ngantok otaba asaren." 
Psalms121:5 PANGERAN tanto ajaga ba'na, badha e seddi'anna ba'na kaangguy ngaobi ba'na." 
Psalms121:6 Ba'na ta' kera sake' polana are e baja seyang, otabana polana bulan e baja malem." 
Psalms121:7 PANGERAN bakal ngaobana ba'na dhari babaja, Salerana ajaga ba'na sopaja ba'na salamedda." 
Psalms121:8 Salerana ngaobi ba'na e bakto ba'na ondur ban dhateng, sateya ban salanjangnga." 
Psalms122:1 Nyanyeyan ziyarana Daud. Sengko' perak e bakto oreng ngoca' ka sengko', “Mara ja' entara ka Padalemman Socce!”" 
Psalms122:2 Sateya sengko' ban en-laenna la napa' e labang sakethengnga kottha Yerusalim. 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalim se epaddek daddi kottha bagus sosonanna ban lebur abasanna. 
Psalms122:4 Ka kottha jareya dhateng ku-suku bangsa, ku-suku bangsa peleyanna PANGERAN, kaangguy asokkor ka Salerana menorot se epakonnagi Salerana." 
Psalms122:5 E dhinna' to-rato toronanna Daud ahakime ra'yadda. 
Psalms122:6 Mara adu'a nyo'on kataremtemmanna ban kama'moranna Yerusalim: “Moga reng-oreng se taresna ka Yerusalim eparengngana odhi' ma'mor ban taremtem. 
Psalms122:7 Moga e dhalem dhaerana ba'na eparengngana rokon ban aman, e dhalem teng-bintengnga ba'na mandar taremtemma.”" 
Psalms122:8 Bit odhi'na tang la-bala ban tang ca-kanca, sengko' ngoca', “Moga ba'na taremtemma!”" 
Psalms122:9 Bit Padalemmanna PANGERAN, Allahna sengko' ban ba'na, sengko' adu'a mandar ba'na sennengnga odhi'na." 
Psalms123:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Abdidalem adhanga ka Junandalem, PANGERAN se marenta e sowarga." 
Psalms123:2 Akadi abdi se targantong ka lora lake'na, sareng kabula bine' se targantong ka lora bine'na, saka'dhinto jugan abdidalem sadaja anante' Junandalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, kantos Junandalem bellas ka abdidalem sadaja." 
Psalms123:3 Kaneserre abdidalem, GUSTE, kaneserre abdidalem sadaja, sabab abdidalem sadaja ampon eya-seya parana." 
Psalms123:4 Ampon cokop abdidalem ebi-cebbi oreng sogi, sareng eya-seya oreng sombong." 
Psalms124:1 Nyanyeyan ziyarana Daud. Baramma saompamana PANGERAN ta' nolonge sengko' ban ba'na? He Isra'il, mara nyaot kantha reya:" 
Psalms124:2 “Saompamana PANGERAN ta' nolonge sengko' ban ba'na e bakto sengko' ban ba'na eserrang moso," 
Psalms124:3 tanto sengko' ban ba'na la padha eontal dhi'-odhi', lantaran atena moso se panas ta' ekenneng ampet;" 
Psalms124:4 tanto sengko' ban ba'na la eanyo' banjir, lem-kellemman e dhalem aeng;" 
Psalms124:5 tanto sengko' ban ba'na la tasellem e dhalem aeng se gilina talebat santer.” 
Psalms124:6 Mara padha asokkor ka PANGERAN, se ta' ngedine moso mamosna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms124:7 Sengko' ban ba'na reya padha ban mano' se ngenneng buru dhari pekadda panganjur, pekadda pegga', sengko' ban ba'na bebas!" 
Psalms124:8 Partolongan se etarema sengko' ban ba'na asalla dhari PANGERAN se abadhi alam dunnya. 
Psalms125:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Oreng se parcaja ka PANGERAN akantha Gumo' Siyon se ta' ekenneng gundhek ban terros koko, ban sekken salanjangnga." 
Psalms125:2 Akantha nong-gunong se ngaobi Yerusalim, kantha jareya PANGERAN ngaobi ommadda sateya ban salanjangnga." 
Psalms125:3 Oreng jahat ta' kera terros kobasa e tana sangkolla oreng se jujur atena, sopaja se becce' ta' noro' daddi jahat keya." 
Psalms125:4 Guste PANGERAN, moga Junandalem saeya ka oreng se sae, ka oreng se atena berse." 
Psalms125:5 Namong parenge okoman, Guste, reng-oreng jahat se juba' ate, sareng se nyempang dhari jalannepon Junandalem. Moga ommattepon Junandalem senneng sareng taremtem!" 
Psalms126:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. E bakto PANGERAN mabali Yerusalim akantha asalla, sengko' ban ba'na akantha se amempe!" 
Psalms126:2 Sengko' ban ba'na terros agella'an, anyanye kaperagen, sampe' sa-bangsa laen padha ngoca', “PANGERAN la alampa'agi sabarang parkara se raja ka reng-oreng rowa!”" 
Psalms126:3 Pajat Pangeran la alampa'agi sabarang parkara se raja ka sengko' ban ba'na! Jareya sababba sengko' ban ba'na padha gumbira! 
Psalms126:4 Guste PANGERAN, pabaliyagi kabadha'an abdidalem sadaja akadi asalla, akadi songay kerreng se kalowar aeng e mosem nembara'." 
Psalms126:5 Moga oreng se nabur sambi nanges, eparengngana anye sambi rak-soragan." 
Psalms126:6 Oreng entar nabur ne-bine e teggalla, sambi ngalecer aeng matana. Oreng jareya mole sambi anyanye kaperagen, ngeba hasella tamennanna." 
Psalms127:1 Nyanyeyanna Sulaiman. Mon banne PANGERAN se maddek bengko, tadha' gunana kang-tokang laenna alako. Mon banne PANGERAN se ngaobi sengko' ban ba'na, pangawal se ajaga tadha' gunana." 
Psalms127:2 Parcoma oreng alako berra' nyare pangoreban, jaga gu-laggu ban tedhung tengnga malem; sabab PANGERAN nyadhiya'agi pangoreban kaangguy reng-oreng se ekataresnae Salerana, sabatara reng-oreng jareya badha e katedhunganna." 
Psalms127:3 Ana' reya paparengnga ALLAH, papareng se ce' rajana." 
Psalms127:4 Ana' lalake' ollena oreng towa se gi' ngodha padha ban pana e tanangnga satreya. 
Psalms127:5 Pojur oreng se andhi' parsadhiya'an na-pana se kantha jareya! Oreng jareya ta' kera epakala, e bakto ngadhebbi moso e pangadilan." 
Psalms128:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Pojur oreng se alem ban odhi' menorot papakonna ALLAH. 
Psalms128:2 Ba'na bakal ngakana dhari hasella lakona, odhi' ma'mor ban taremtem salanjangnga." 
Psalms128:3 Binena ba'na padha ban bungkana anggur se dhuluk e dhalem bengkona ba'na. Na'-ana'na ba'na akantha selbi'na bungkana jaitun e sakalenglengnga mejana. 
Psalms128:4 Kantha jareya berkadda PANGERAN ka oreng se abakte ka Salerana. 
Psalms128:5 Moga dhari Siyon PANGERAN aberkadana ba'na, moga ba'na nangaleyana kama'moranna Yerusalim salanjangnga odhi'na!" 
Psalms128:6 Moga ba'na lanjanga omor, ban nangaleyana na' potona! Moga ommattepon Junandalem eparengnganna salamet ta' kakorangan pa-ponapa!" 
Psalms129:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Isra'il, mara careta'agi baramma carana ba'na ekaneyaja mosona dhari gi' ngodhana." 
Psalms129:2 “Sengko' ekaneyaja moso dhari gi' ngodhana, tape sengko' ta' ekenneng pakala reng-oreng jareya;" 
Psalms129:3 tang moso maloka tang balikat, loka dhalem sabannya'na, akantha salaga se malobang teggal, lobang se dhalem ban lanjang." 
Psalms129:4 Tape PANGERAN se adil malopot sengko', ta' sampe' ekadunor oreng.”" 
Psalms129:5 Moga saneyap oreng se baji' ka Siyon epakala'a sampe' kabbi padha nyorot. 
Psalms129:6 Moga kabbi padha'a ban rebba e attas ata', se kerreng sabellunna tombu ban nyenna;" 
Psalms129:7 tadha' oreng se ngare', tadha' se agintel." 
Psalms129:8 Reng-oreng se lebat ta' kera ngoca', “Moga ba'na eberkadana PANGERAN, sengko' kabbi padha aberkadi ba'na bit asmana PANGERAN.”" 
Psalms130:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Dhari jurang kasossa'an, abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, Guste PANGERAN." 
Psalms130:2 Peyarsa'agi serrona abdidalem, Guste, peyarsa'agi parnyo'onan abdidalem." 
Psalms130:3 Manabi Junandalem terros ngaemodi dusa abdidalem, pasera se kowat, Guste?" 
Psalms130:4 Namong Junandalem gampang nyapora, sopaja oreng tako' sareng abakte ka Junandalem." 
Psalms130:5 Sengko' ngarep partolonganna PANGERAN, rep-ngarep janjina." 
Psalms130:6 Sengko' ce' terrona tatemmowa ban Pangeran, alebbiyan dhari pangaterrona tokang patrol se anante' pajjar." 
Psalms130:7 Mara ngarep ka PANGERAN, para ommadda, sabab Salerana paggun taresna, ban to-sabakto kasokan masalamet manossa." 
Psalms130:8 Salerana bakal mabebasa sengko' ban ba'na dhari sakabbinna kasala'an ban dusa. 
Psalms131:1 Nyanyeyan ziyarana Daud. Guste PANGERAN, abdidalem ta' angko, abdidalem ta' sombong. Abdidalem ta' nyerser sabarang se talebat raja otabana se talebat malarat monggu ka abdidalem." 
Psalms131:2 Lerres ate abdidalem ayem sareng taremtem, akadi babaji' se buru nyepsep, tedhung taremtem e reba'annepon ebuna, saka'dhinto taremtemmepon ate abdidalem." 
Psalms131:3 Mara ngarep ka PANGERAN, para ommadda, sateya ban salanjangnga." 
Psalms132:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Kaemodi Daud, GUSTE, sareng sadajana kasossa'anna." 
Psalms132:2 Kaemodi bakteepon ka Junandalem, GUSTE, ka neyattepon se ejanjiyagi ka Junandalem, Se Mahakowat, Allahna Yakub." 
Psalms132:3 Dhabuna, “Sengko' ta' aistirahada e tang bengko ban ta' tedhunga e tang ranjang," 
Psalms132:4  
Psalms132:5 sabellunna nyadhiya'agi padalemman kaagem Allahna Yakub, kaagem kalenggiyanna PANGERAN Se Mahakowat.”" 
Psalms132:6 E Betlehem sengko' ban ba'na ngedhing parkara Petthe Parjanjiyan, pas nemmo Petthe jareya e teggal Ya'ar." 
Psalms132:7 Mara ja' entara ka kalenggiyanna PANGERAN, pas nyemba ka Salerana e adha'anna korse karaja'anna." 
Psalms132:8 Ngereng rabu pas alenggi e Padalemmannepon Junandalem, GUSTE, akompol sareng Petthe Parjanjiyan, lambang kakobasa'annepon Junandalem." 
Psalms132:9 Moga ommattepon Junandalem asorak gumbira, para imammepon Junandalem terros odhi' menorot kasokannepon Junandalem." 
Psalms132:10 Bit asmaepon Daud, abdiepon Junandalem, ja' tolak rato peleyannepon Junandalem, GUSTE." 
Psalms132:11 Pangeran la asompa ka Daud; Salerana ta' kera mongkere janjina. Dhabuna, “Sala settong dhari toronanna ba'na bi' Sengko' epadaddiya rato epamarenta'a epaganteya ba'na." 
Psalms132:12 Mon na'-ana'na ba'na ngestowagi Tang parjanjiyan, ban na'adi Tang parenta, toronanna na'-ana'na ba'na jareya saterrossa bakal aganteya ba'na daddi rato.”" 
Psalms132:13 Sabab PANGERAN la mele Siyon; epadaddiya kalenggiyanna. 
Psalms132:14 Dhabuna, “E dhinna' reya Tang kennengngan salanjangnga, Sengko' terro marenta'a e dhinna'." 
Psalms132:15 Sakabbinna kaparlowanna bi' Sengko' eberri'ana sabannya'na, reng-oreng se mesken eberri'ana ngakan sakennyangnga." 
Psalms132:16 Mam-imamma bi' Sengko' eberkadana e dhalem sakabbinna lakona, ommadda bakal anyanye ban asorak gumbira." 
Psalms132:17 E dhinna' sala settonga toronanna Daud bi' Sengko' epadaddiya rato; pamarenta'anna epakokowa bi' Sengko'. 
Psalms132:18 Karaja'anna bakal rajja'a, tape so-mosona bakal epamalowa.”" 
Psalms133:1 Nyanyeyan ziyarana Daud. Saapa becce'na ban sennengnga mon ommadda Allah rokon oddhi'na! 
Psalms133:2 Jareya padha ban mennya' ro'om se aji se eselen ka serana Harun, terros agili ka guluna rasoganna." 
Psalms133:3 Otaba akantha ebbun e Gunong Hermon, se toron ka mo'-gumo' Siyon. E jadhiya PANGERAN matoron berkadda, odhi' se tadha' aherra." 
Psalms134:1 Nyanyeyan ziyara. Mara molja'agi PANGERAN, para abdina, sakabbinna oreng se abakte e Padalemmanna e bakto malem." 
Psalms134:2 Angka' tanangnga ka kennengngan se socce, molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms134:3 Moga dhari Siyon ba'na eberkadi bi' PANGERAN, se nyepta'agi langnge' ban bume!" 
Psalms135:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Molja'agi asmana PANGERAN, mara molja'agi, para abdina" 
Psalms135:2 se abakte e Padalemman Socce e kalenggiyanna Allahna sengko' ban ba'na. 
Psalms135:3 Molja'agi PANGERAN, sabab Pangeran reya sae, molja'agi asmana, sabab Salerana lamba' ate." 
Psalms135:4 Yakub epele epadaddi kaagunganna, ommat Isra'il epondhut Salerana." 
Psalms135:5 Sabab sengko' tao PANGERAN reya agung onggu, agung ngalebbi'i diba se kemma'a bai." 
Psalms135:6 Pangeran alampa'agi sabarang se daddi kasokanna, e langnge' ban e bume, e tase' ban e sagara se dhalem." 
Psalms135:7 Dhari konco'na bume Pangeran madhateng ondhem, abadhi dhap-keddhap se noro'e ojan. Samarena pas marenta angen epakon kalowar dhari kennengnganna panyempennanna." 
Psalms135:8 E Messer Salerana mate'e sakabbinna ana' sareyang ana'na manossa ban keban tadha' bidana. 
Psalms135:9 E jadhiya Pangeran mabadha bannya' kaajiban ban tandha kaangguy ngokom rato ban para ponggaba. 
Psalms135:10 Pangeran mate'e bangsa sabannya'na, bariya keya to-rato se parjuga." 
Psalms135:11 Sihon rato Amori ban Og rato Basyan, ban sakabbinna to-rato Kana'an." 
Psalms135:12 Nagarana to-rato jareya epassra'agi epadaddi andhi'na ommadda, Isra'il." 
Psalms135:13 Junandalem badhi teptep eberta'agiya, GUSTE, asmana Junandalem badhi ekaemodana sadajana toronan." 
Psalms135:14 Sabab Junandalem apareng kaadilan ka sadajana ommadda sareng bellas ase ka para abdina. 
Psalms135:15 Brahalana reng-oreng gapaneka dhari emmas sareng salaka, badhiyanna tanangnga manossa." 
Psalms135:16 Badha colo'na namong ta' bisa acaca, badha matana, namong ta' nengale pa-ponapa." 
Psalms135:17 Badha kopengnga, namong ta' bisa ngedhing, dhari colo'na ta' kalowar nyaba." 
Psalms135:18 Moga sapaneka'a jugan papasthenna reng-oreng se agabay, sareng parcaja ka ca-arca gapaneka." 
Psalms135:19 Mara ommat Isra'il, molja'agi PANGERAN, molja'agi Salerana, mam-imamma Allah!" 
Psalms135:20 Molja'agi PANGERAN, he reng-oreng Lewi, molja'agi Salerana, ba'na kabbi se tako' ka Pangeran!" 
Psalms135:21 Molja'agi PANGERAN e Siyon, e Yerusalim ban e kalenggiyanna. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms136:1 Mara asokkor ka PANGERAN, sabab PANGERAN reya sae; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana." 
Psalms136:2 Mara asokkor ka Allah Se Settong; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:3 Mara asokkor ka Pangeran Se Mahatenggi; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:4 Coma Salerana se mabadha kaajiban-kaajiban se raja; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:5 Kalaban kabicaksana'anna Salerana abadhi langnge'; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:6 Salerana se ngampar bume e attassa aeng; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:7 Salerana se abadhi sabarang se tera' e langnge'; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:8 se abadhi are se epangobasane seyang; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:9 bulan ban tang-bintang se epangobasane malem; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:10 Salerana se mate'e na'-ana' sareyang e Messer; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:11 Isra'il ebakta kalowar dhari Messer; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha obana; 
Psalms136:12 kalaban astana se kowat ban parjuga; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:13 Tase' Galagas eseba' madhuwa; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:14 Isra'il ommadda ebakta alengka tase' jareya; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:15 Tape rato Messer ban tantarana epatasellem tadha' karena; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:16 Salerana se mimpin ommadda lebat e ra-ara; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:17 Salerana se makala to-rato se parjuga; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:18 Salerana se mate'e to-rato se kasohor; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana; 
Psalms136:19 Sihon, rato Amori; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana;" 
Psalms136:20 ban Og, rato Basyan; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana." 
Psalms136:21 Nagarana erampas, eparengngagi ka ommadda; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana;" 
Psalms136:22 epadaddi andhi'na Isra'il abdina; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:23 Salerana ta' kalep ka sengko' ban ba'na e bakto epakala; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:24 Sengko' ban ba'na epalopot dhari tanangnga moso; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:25 Saneyap mahlok eparenge pakan; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms136:26 Mara asokkor ka Allah se ngobasane langnge'; kataresna'anna langgeng tadha' obana. 
Psalms137:1 E penggirra ngay-songay Babil sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna toju' sambi nanges mon enga' ka Siyon. 
Psalms137:2 E ka-bungkana gandarusa e nagara jareya sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna macangke' calempong andhi'na bang-sebang. 
Psalms137:3 Reng-oreng se nawan sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna nyoro sengko' kabbi anyanye kaangguy reng-oreng jareya. Reng-oreng se nendhes sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna nyoro sengko' kabbi anyanye nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan se gumbira, “Mara sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna anyanyeyagi nyanyeyan-nyanyeyan dhari Siyon!”" 
Psalms137:4 Baramma sengko' ban reng-oreng laenna se bisa'a anyanye e nagara manca? 
Psalms137:5 Mandar sengko' ta' bisa'a anyanye pole, mon sengko' sampe' loppa ka ba'na, Yerusalim!" 
Psalms137:6 Mandar sengko' ta' bisa'a anyanye pole, mon sengko' loppa ka ba'na ban ta' nganggep ba'na se masenneng tang ate!" 
Psalms137:7 Kaemodi, GUSTE, ponapa se elakone oreng Edom e bakto Yerusalim epamosna. Reng-oreng gapaneka ngoca', “Pagujur, pagujur sampe' ka sar-dhasarra!”" 
Psalms137:8 He Babil, ba'na bakal epaancora! Pojur oreng se males ka kajahadanna ba'na, kajahadan se eteba'agi ka sengko' sarta reng-oreng laenna." 
Psalms137:9 Pojur oreng se ngala' ji'-babaji'na ba'na pas ngontallagi ji'-babaji' jareya ka gumo' bato! 
Psalms138:1 Dhari Daud. Abdidalem asokkora ka Junandalem, GUSTE, kantos ka dhasarra ate. E ajunannepon sadajana diba abdidalem anyanyeyagi pojiyan kaagem Junandalem." 
Psalms138:2 Abdidalem asojud ngadhep ka Padalemmannepon Junandalem se socce sambi ngagungngagi asmaepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem esto sareng ta' pegga' taresnana. Junandalem lebbi ngotama'agi janjiepon, katembang pamanggina oreng parkara Junandalem." 
Psalms138:3 E bakto abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, Junandalem nyaodi, Junandalem makowat ate abdidalem kantos abdidalem daddi bangal." 
Psalms138:4 Sadajana rato e bume amolja'agiya Junandalem, GUSTE, sabab to-rato gapaneka ampon mereng parkara janjiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms138:5 To-rato gapaneka anyanye parkara se elampa'agi Junandalem sareng parkara kaagungannepon Junandalem se talebat rajana. 
Psalms138:6 Junandalem talebat molja, namong se nespa sareng Junandalem egateyagi jugan, oreng sombong ta' kengeng ngetek dhari Junandalem." 
Psalms138:7 E bakto abdidalem manggi kasossa'an, Junandalem nolonge kantos abdidalem teptep odhi' salamet. Junandalem alabannagi ka moso abdidalem se ngamok, masalamet abdidalem sareng kobasaepon." 
Psalms138:8 Junandalem bakal neptebbi janjiepon ka abdidalem; kataresna'anna Junandalem langgeng tadha' obana. Palastareyagi lalakon se ampon emolae sareng Junandalem. 
Psalms139:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. GUSTE, Junandalem nalektegi abdidalem sareng ngagali kabadha'annepon abdidalem." 
Psalms139:2 Junandalem ngagali sadaja se elakone abdidalem; dhari jauna Junandalem ampon ngagali ponapa se epekker abdidalem. 
Psalms139:3 Junandalem ngoladi abdidalem, e bakto abdidalem alalakon otaba bu-ambu lesso, Junandalem ngagali sadaja se elakone abdidalem." 
Psalms139:4 La'-mala' sabellunnepon abdidalem acaca, Junandalem ampon ngagali ponapa se ekoca'agiya abdidalem." 
Psalms139:5 Abdidalem ekalenglenge Junandalem dhari sadajana paddu, eaobi kalaban kobasaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms139:6 Pangataowannepon Junandalem ka'dhinto monggu ka abdidalem talebat dhalemma, pekkeran abdidalem ta' bisa ngarte." 
Psalms139:7 Ka ka'dhimma abdidalem nyengga'a sopaja lopoda dhari kobasaepon Junandalem? Ka ka'dhimma abdidalem se buruwa ajauwi Junandalem? 
Psalms139:8 Manabi abdidalem ongga ka langnge', Junandalem badha e ka'issa'; manabi abdidalem tedhung e dunnyana oreng mate, Junandalem badha jugan e kennengngan gapaneka." 
Psalms139:9 Manabi abdidalem ngabber lebat e konco' temorra langnge' otabana enneng e konco' bara'na," 
Psalms139:10 e ka'dhissa' Junandalem tanto badha jugan se nolonga abdidalem; e ka'dhissa' Junandalem tanto badha jugan se nontona abdidalem. 
Psalms139:11 Manabi abdidalem makon petteng notobi abdidalem, otabana tera' e sakalenglengnga abdidalem aoba daddi malem," 
Psalms139:12 se petteng gapaneka ta' petteng monggu ka Junandalem; malem gapaneka tera' akadi seyang, se petteng akadi terrang." 
Psalms139:13 Junandalem nyepta'agi saneyap bagiyan badan abdidalem, abadhi abdidalem e dhalem gandhu'annepon ebu." 
Psalms139:14 Abdidalem ngagungngagi Junandalem sabab Junandalem talebat lowar biyasa! Sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem ajib sareng makasambu' ate, abdidalem apangrasa onggu parkara gapaneka." 
Psalms139:15 E bakto lang-tolang abdidalem epadaddi, ebung-sambung epatete e gandhu'annepon ebu, e bakto abdidalem e gandhu'annepon ebu atamba raja ta' kalaban ekaonenge oreng, abdidalem paddhang ka Junandalem." 
Psalms139:16 Junandalem ngoladi abdidalem e bakto abdidalem gi' badha e dhalem gandhu'annepon ebu; sadajana ampon ecathet e ketappepon Junandalem; re-arena ampon etantowagi sabellunnepon badha se emolae. 
Psalms139:17 Ya Allah, panggaliyannepon Junandalem ce' malaradda monggu ka abdidalem, sareng talebat bannya'na!" 
Psalms139:18 Manabi sareng abdidalem ebitong, abannya'an dhari beddhi; manabi abdidalem jaga tedhung, abdidalem gi' mekkere Junandalem." 
Psalms139:19 Ya Allah, patompessagi reng-oreng jahat, pajauwagi dhari abdidalem reng-oreng se dujan mate'e oreng!" 
Psalms139:20 Reng-oreng gapaneka acaca juba' parkara Junandalem, sareng asompa palsu bit tha-kotthaepon Junandalem." 
Psalms139:21 GUSTE, abdidalem baji' ka reng-oreng se baji' ka Junandalem, abdidalem caremmet ka reng-oreng se ta' atoro' ka Junandalem." 
Psalms139:22 Abdidalem ce' baji'na ka reng-oreng gapaneka, sareng abdidalem eanggep moso sadajana." 
Psalms139:23 Talektegi abdidalem, Guste Allah, oladi essena ate ka'dhinto, ojiyagi abdidalem, sopaja Junandalem ngagali ka pekkeran abdidalem." 
Psalms139:24 Oladi manabi badha kajahadan e aba' abdidalem, sareng tontonnagi abdidalem e jalan se langgeng." 
Psalms140:1 Kaangguy pamimpinna koor. Jaburra Daud. 
Psalms140:2 Pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari oreng daraka, GUSTE, jaga'agi abdidalem ngadhebbi oreng se ngalakone kakerrasan." 
Psalms140:3 Reng-oreng gapaneka asajja jahat e dhalem ate, matokaran oreng sabban are." 
Psalms140:4 Jilana akadi olar se badha opassa, cacana akadi opassa olar sendhu'." 
Psalms140:5 Adhu GUSTE, palopottagi abdidalem dhari kobasana oreng jahat, jaga'agi abdidalem ngadhebbi oreng se ngalakone kakerrasan se amaksod maancora abdidalem." 
Psalms140:6 Oreng angga' ta' asa'-kasa' masang jira' nangkebba abdidalem, sareng masang jaring mega'a abdidalem. E salanjangnga lorong reng-oreng gapaneka masang jebbak ajira'a abdidalem." 
Psalms140:7 Adhu GUSTE, abdidalem mator: Junandalem Allah abdidalem, peyarsa'agi du'a parnyo'onan abdidalem." 
Psalms140:8 Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, Allah se kowat, panyalamedda abdidalem, Junandalem masalamet abdidalem e dhalem paperrangan." 
Psalms140:9 Ja' kabbuli pangaterroepon oreng jahat, GUSTE, ja' kantos sajjaepon reng-oreng gapaneka ahasel." 
Psalms140:10 Ja' kantos moso abdidalem mennang; moga caca se jahat se ekoca'agi reng-oreng gapaneka eparengngana ngenneng ka badanna oreng se metenna abdidalem ka'dhinto. 
Psalms140:11 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka kaojanana mardha, sareng ebuwang ka dhalem lobangnga maot, kantos ta' bisa kalowar pole." 
Psalms140:12 Moga oreng se ngalakone kakerrasan manggiya balai, ja' edine tokang petenna ngennengnge bume." 
Psalms140:13 Abdidalem oneng Junandalem apareng kaadilan ka oreng se tatendhes, sareng nolonge parkarana oreng se mesken." 
Psalms140:14 Oreng jujur badhi ngagungngagiya Junandalem; sadajana padha apolonga sareng Junandalem. 
Psalms141:1 Jaburra Daud. Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, GUSTE, nyo'ona tolong duliyan abdidalem samangken! Peyarsa'agi abdidalem manabi aserro ka Junandalem." 
Psalms141:2 Tarema'agi du'a abdidalem menangka tor-ator dupa, sareng lengngen abdidalem se epenthang menangka kurban e baja malem." 
Psalms141:3 Adhu GUSTE, jaga'agi colo' abdidalem, bibir ka'dhinto olattagi." 
Psalms141:4 Jauwagi abdidalem dhari pekkeran juba', ja' kantos abdidalem noro' reng-oreng se daraka ja' kantos abdidalem noro' neddha manabi reng-oreng jahat gapaneka apesta." 
Psalms141:5 Manabi oreng se sae maemot abdidalem, kalaban ate se ehlas ca'-ngoca'e abdidalem, ka'dhinto marabut mennya' se paleng sae ka abdidalem. namong abdidalem ta' narema'a panghormadanna oreng jahat, sabab abdidalem terros adu'a nolak kajahadanna reng-oreng gapaneka." 
Psalms141:6 Manabi para pangobasana reng-oreng gapaneka ebantengngagi dhari gir-penggirra jurang bato se durjet, tanto reng-oreng gapaneka ngakone ja' oca' abdidalem pajat lerres." 
Psalms141:7 Lang-tolangnga reng-oreng gapaneka bakal etabura e penggirra koburan akadi bato se epalejjar e tana. 
Psalms141:8 Namong Junandalem teptep daddi pangarep abdidalem, Guste ALLAH, Pangeran kaula, ja' kantos abdidalem mate sabab abdidalem ngaop ka Junandalem." 
Psalms141:9 Palopottagi abdidalem dhari jira' sareng jebbak se epasang reng-oreng jahat. 
Psalms141:10 Moga reng-oreng gapaneka eparengngana tabalusok ka jira'na dibi', namong abdidalem moga salamedda." 
Psalms142:1 Nyanyeyan pangajaranna Daud e bakto badha e dhalem guwa. 
Psalms142:2 Sengko' aserro epakaja ka PANGERAN; tang sowara eparanyeng nyo'on bantowanna. 
Psalms142:3 E ajunanna sengko' aserrowan; notorragi sakabbinna tang kasossa'an. 
Psalms142:4 E bakto abdidalem para' kaelangana pangarep, Junandalem ngagali ponapa se kodu elakone abdidalem. E jalan se kodu elebadi abdidalem, moso ta' asa'-kasa' masang jira' ajebbaga abdidalem." 
Psalms142:5 E bakto abdidalem atole ka ereng, abdidalem ta' nengale oreng se nolongana abdidalem. Tadha' se ngaobi abdidalem, otaba se marduli abdidalem." 
Psalms142:6 Abdidalem aserro ka Junandalem, GUSTE, Junandalem pangaoban abdidalem, namong Junandalem se ekaparlo abdidalem e dhalem odhi' ka'dhinto." 
Psalms142:7 Peyarsa'agi serro abdidalem paneka, sabab abdidalem talebat nyangsara. Pasalamet abdidalem dhari moso abdidalem sadajana, sabab monggu ka abdidalem moso talebat kowat." 
Psalms142:8 Pakalowarragi abdidalem dhari penjara, sopaja e dhalem kompolanna ommattepon Junandalem abdidalem kengenga amolja'agi asmaepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem sae ka abdidalem." 
Psalms143:1 Jaburra Daud. Peyarsa'agi du'a abdidalem, GUSTE, gateyagi parnyo'onan abdidalem. Saodi abdidalem, sabab Junandalem esto, kabbullagi du'a abdidalem, sabab Junandalem adil." 
Psalms143:2 Abdidalem ka'dhinto abdiepon Junandalem, ja' adili abdidalem, Guste, sabab e ajunannepon Junandalem tadha' oreng se ta' gadhuwan sala." 
Psalms143:3 Abdidalem eserser sareng epakala moso, sarta epamaso' ka penjara se petteng calemot, abdidalem akadi oreng se ampon abit mate." 
Psalms143:4 Abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan samangat, ate bingong ta' karowan." 
Psalms143:5 Abdidalem ngenga'e re-are gi' jaman dhimen; mekkere sadajana se elampa'agi Junandalem, sadaja karyaepon Junandalem epekker e dhalem ate." 
Psalms143:6 Abdidalem adu'a ka Junandalem lengngen epenthang, tanang eangka'; akadi tana se kerreng, abdidalem rep-ngarep Junandalem." 
Psalms143:7 Ngereng enggal saodi abdidalem, GUSTE, sabab abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan pangarep. Ja' ngetek dhari abdidalem, Guste, sopaja abdidalem ta' akadi oreng se ampon toron ka alamma oreng mate." 
Psalms143:8 Sabban gi' laggu paemottagi ka abdidalem kataresna'annepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem pangarebban abdidalem. Duduwagi jalan se kodu elebadi abdidalem, sabab namong ka Junandalem abdidalem adu'a." 
Psalms143:9 Abdidalem entar nyareya pangaoban ka Junandalem, palopottagi abdidalem, GUSTE, dhari sadajana moso." 
Psalms143:10 Ajari abdidalem ngalakone kasokannepon Junandalem, sabab Junandalem Allah abdidalem. Junandalem sae, sareng badhi nonton abdidalem e jalan se rata." 
Psalms143:11 Pasalamettagi abdidalem, GUSTE menorot se ejanjiyagi Junandalem, bebassagi abdidalem dhari kasompeggan, sabab Junandalem ka'dhinto pajat sae." 
Psalms143:12 Patompessagi so-moso abdidalem, bit kataresna'annepon Junandalem, pamateyagi reng-oreng se nendhes abdidalem, sabab abdidalem ka'dhinto abdiepon Junandalem." 
Psalms144:1 Dhari Daud. Molja'agi PANGERAN tang pangaoban! Salerana se ngalate sengko' abuwang, se ngajari sengko' aperrang." 
Psalms144:2 Salerana se nolong ban se abilla sengko', panyalamedda sengko', kennengnganna sengko' ngaop. Salerana tang pangaoban, kennengnganna tang pangongseyan, se matellok sa-bangsa ka sengko'." 
Psalms144:3 Ponapa manossa ka'dhinto, GUSTE, sareng Junandalem me' egateyagi? Pasera manossa ka'dhinto, sareng Junandalem me' ekagali?" 
Psalms144:4 Manossa ka'dhinto akadi angen sasergu'an, odhi'na akadi jang-bajangan se lebat." 
Psalms144:5 Ngereng bukka' langnge'epon Junandalem, GUSTE, pas toron ka baba, seddingngagi nong-gunong me' olle metto kalembang." 
Psalms144:6 Ontallagi kelappepon Junandalem sopaja moso asalebbudan, ocol panaepon Junandalem sopaja reng-oreng gapaneka baridhu." 
Psalms144:7 Pangacengngagi astaepon Junandalem dhari sowarga, palopottagi abdidalem dhari banjir sareng ba'a. Pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari kobasana oreng manca" 
Psalms144:8 se dujan acaca lecek sareng nepo, sarta asompa palsu." 
Psalms144:9 Abdidalem anyanyeyagiya lagu se anyar kaagem Junandalem, ya Allah, sareng nabbuwa calempong sambi anyanye." 
Psalms144:10 Junandalem marenge kamennangan ka to-rato sareng mabebas Daud, abdiepon." 
Psalms144:11 Palopottagi abdidalem dhari peddhangngepon oreng jahil; pasalamettagi abdidalem dhari kobasaepon oreng manca se dujan acaca lecek sareng nepo sarta asompa palsu. 
Psalms144:12 Moga ana' lalake'anna sengko' ban ba'na e bakto ngodhana padha'a ban men-tamennan se atamba raja. Moga ana' babine'anna sengko' ban ba'na padha'a ban pangpang se lebur abasanna se daddi rarengganna du-padduna karaton. 
Psalms144:13 Moga dhang-gudhangnga sengko' ban ba'na possa'a aesse hasel bume samacemma. Moga ba-dumba e gal-teggalla sengko' ban ba'na adhu'-budhu'a sampe' apolowan ebu bannya'na. 
Psalms144:14 Moga pe-sapena sengko' ban ba'na adhu'-budhu'a, tadha' se elang otaba kalabuwan. Moga tadha'a oreng se acerreng polana kasangsara'an e rong-lorongnga kotthana sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms144:15 Pojur bangsa se kantha jareya, pojur ommat se Allahna PANGERAN!" 
Psalms145:1 Pojiyan dhari Daud. Abdidalem ngagungngagiya Junandalem, Guste, Junandalem Allah sareng Rato abdidalem; abdidalem amolja'agiya Junandalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms145:2 Sabban are abdidalem asokkora ka Junandalem, sareng amolja'agiya Junandalem salanjangnga." 
Psalms145:3 Sabab PANGERAN agung ban sapantessa emolja'agi, pekkeranna manossa ta' dhugga kaangguy ngarte parkara kaagunganna." 
Psalms145:4 Ron-temoron oreng badhi amolja'agiya sadaja se elampa'agi Junandalem sareng aberta'agi kaparjuga'annepon Junandalem. 
Psalms145:5 Reng-oreng gapaneka badhi aberta'agiya kaagungan sareng kamolja'annepon Junandalem, karyaepon Junandalem se makasambu' ate sareng abdidalem epekkera epadhalem." 
Psalms145:6 Reng-oreng gapaneka aberta'agi lalampa'annepon Junandalem se nako'e, abdidalem badhi ngabarragi kaagungannepon Junandalem, Guste," 
Psalms145:7 Oreng badhi nyareta'agi kasaeyannepon Junandalem sareng anyanye parkara kaadilannepon Junandalem. 
Psalms145:8 Pangeran reya taresna ban neserran, ta' gampang duka ban taresna salanjangnga." 
Psalms145:9 Salerana sae ka sakabbinna oreng, ban bellas ka sakabbinna cepta'anna." 
Psalms145:10 Sadaja cepta'annepon Junandalem badhi amolja'agiya Junandalem, GUSTE, sadaja ommattepon Junandalem badhi asokkor ka Junandalem." 
Psalms145:11 Sadajana padha ngagungngagiya kobasaepon Junandalem menangka Rato, sareng nyareta'agi kaparjuga'annepon Junandalem," 
Psalms145:12 sopaja sadajana oreng padha onenga lalakon raja se elampa'agi Junandalem, sarta karaja'annepon Junandalem se molja sareng ce' bagussa." 
Psalms145:13 Pamarenta'annepon Junandalem teptep salanjangnga, kakobasa'annepon Junandalem paggun ron-temoron. PANGERAN esto ka dhabuna, taresna e dhalem sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Psalms145:14 Pangeran nolong oreng se nemmo kasossa'an, majaga oreng se labu." 
Psalms145:15 Junandalem pangarebbanna sadajana mahlok, Junandalem apareng teddha'an teppa' baktona." 
Psalms145:16 Junandalem nyokobi sadajana kaparlowanna, kantos tadha' se kakorangan." 
Psalms145:17 PANGERAN adil e dhalem sabarang se elampa'agi, ban taresna e dhalem sabarang se ejalannagi." 
Psalms145:18 Pangeran semma' ka oreng se aserro ka Salerana, sarta nyo'on ka Salerana kalaban berse atena." 
Psalms145:19 Oreng alem epasenneng atena, serrona epeyarsa'agi ban epasalamet kabbi." 
Psalms145:20 Pangeran ngaobi oreng se taresna ka Salerana, tape oreng se jahat epamate tadha' karena." 
Psalms145:21 Sengko' ros-terrosan ngagungngagiya PANGERAN, moga sakabbinna mahlogga amolja'agi asmana salanjangnga." 
Psalms146:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! He tang sokma, molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms146:2 Sengko' ngagungngagiya Pangeran saomorra, anyanye kaator ka Allah saabidda sengko' gi' badha e dunnya." 
Psalms146:3 Ja' ngarep ka pangobasa, ka manossa se ta' bisa madhateng kasalameddan." 
Psalms146:4 Mon la mate, reng-oreng jareya abali ka tana; e are jareya keya sakabbinna sajjana mosna." 
Psalms146:5 Pojur oreng se ngandellagi GUSTE Allahna, se andhi' Allahna Yakub se nolong aba'na." 
Psalms146:6 Allah jareya se abadhi langnge' ban bume, tase' ban saessena; Salerana esto salanjangnga." 
Psalms146:7 Salerana abilla reng-oreng se tatendhes, apareng kakan ka oreng se lapar. PANGERAN mabebas para tahanan," 
Psalms146:8 mamella' matana oreng se buta. Majaga oreng se labu, taresna ka oreng se jujur." 
Psalms146:9 Salerana ngaobi reng-oreng manca; nolong kana' jatim ban para randha, tape mabuddhu sajjana oreng se jahat." 
Psalms146:10 PANGERAN reya Rato salanjangnga. He Siyon, Allahna ba'na kobasa dhari lamba' ban saterrossa. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms147:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Sabab becce' ngagungngagi Salerana, ban anyanye ngagungngagi Salerana masenneng ate ban pekkeran." 
Psalms147:2 PANGERAN mabali Yerusalim akantha asalla; abakta mole reng-oreng buwangan. 
Psalms147:3 Salerana mabaras oreng se kaelangan pangarebban, sarta abetbet ka-lokana." 
Psalms147:4 Pangeran se nantowagi bannya'na bintang e langnge', se apareng nyama ka tong-settongnga." 
Psalms147:5 Agung ban kobasa onggu Pangeran sengko' ban ba'na, kabicaksana'anna tadha' engganna." 
Psalms147:6 Oreng se tatendhes epajaga, tape oreng se jahat ebantengngagi ka tana." 
Psalms147:7 Mara anyanye ji-pojiyan kaator ka PANGERAN, tabbu calempongnga kaator ka Allahna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Psalms147:8 Salerana se ngampar ondhem e langnge'; se nyadhiya'agi ojan kaangguy bume, ban matombu rebba e mo'-gumo'." 
Psalms147:9 Pangeran jareya se apareng kakan ka ban-keban, ban ka budhu'na dhangdhang se lok-ologan." 
Psalms147:10 Se ekasokane Pangeran banne jaran se kowat; ban banne parjurit se bangalan. 
Psalms147:11 Se ekasokane Pangeran oreng se ta'at ka Salerana, ka oreng se teptep ngarep kataresna'anna." 
Psalms147:12 Mara molja'agi PANGERAN, Yerusalim! Molja'agi Allahna ba'na, Siyon!" 
Psalms147:13 Sabab Salerana makoko bang-labang sakethengnga ba'na, ban aberkadi pandhudhu'na." 
Psalms147:14 Salerana ajaga dhaerana ba'na sopaja teptebba aman, makennyang ba'na ban gandum se paleng bagus." 
Psalms147:15 Salerana apareng papakon ka bume, dhadhabun jareya laju duli elakone." 
Psalms147:16 Salju epatoron akantha kapas, ebbun etabur akantha abu ban tana." 
Psalms147:17 Salerana matoron ojan es akantha baliker; tadha' se kellar nahan cellebba. 
Psalms147:18 Kalaban dhabuna es jareya laju ancar; aeng nyerroppagi, aeng laju agili." 
Psalms147:19 Salerana apareng pessen ka ommadda, kateptebban ban hokomma ka ommat peleyanna." 
Psalms147:20 Ka sa-bangsa laen Pangeran ta' kantha jareya, sabab sa-bangsa jareya ta' kennal ka kom-hokomma. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms148:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Molja'agi PANGERAN, sakabbinna essena sowarga! Kabbi se badha e kennengngan se tenggi, molja'agi Salerana!" 
Psalms148:2 Para malaekadda Pangeran, molja'agi Salerana, sakabbinna tantara sowarga, molja'agi Salerana!" 
Psalms148:3 Molja'agi Salerana, are ban bulan, molja'agi Salerana, tang-bintang se rap-galiraban!" 
Psalms148:4 Molja'agi Salerana, langnge' se paleng tenggi, molja'agi Salerana, aeng e attas langnge'!" 
Psalms148:5 Mara kabbi padha ngagungngagi asmana PANGERAN, sabab kabbi reya epabadha lantaran dhabuna." 
Psalms148:6 Pangeran se nantowagi kennengnganna bang-sebang, kateptebban jareya etantowagi kaangguy salanjangnga." 
Psalms148:7 Molja'agi PANGERAN, saessena bume, ga-naga tase' ban sakabbinna sagara se lebar;" 
Psalms148:8 kelap ban ojan es, salju ban ondhem, kaleng busbus se atoro' ka papakonna PANGERAN!" 
Psalms148:9 Molja'agi Salerana, mo'-gumo' ban nong-gunong, bungkana wa'-buwa'an ban las-alas;" 
Psalms148:10 sakabbinna ebin ban keban alasan, sakabbinna keban se agalajar ban no'-mano'!" 
Psalms148:11 Molja'agi Salerana, to-rato ban sa-bangsa, sakabbinna oreng agung ban para pangobasa;" 
Psalms148:12 ngangodhadan lake' ban bine', oreng towa ban oreng ngodha." 
Psalms148:13 Mara kabbi ngagungngagi asmana PANGERAN, sabab asmana lebbi agung dhari sakabbinna nyama; kaagunganna ngongkole langnge' ban bume." 
Psalms148:14 Salerana la makowat bangsana, sampe' Salerana egung-agungngagi ommadda, Isra'il, ommadda se kataresnan. Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Psalms149:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Mara anyanye lagu se anyar kaator ka PANGERAN, molja'agi Salerana e dhalem kompolanna ommadda." 
Psalms149:2 Mara paperak, Isra'il, lantaran Se Nyepta'agi ba'na; mara pasenneng pandhudhu' Siyon, lantaran Ratona ba'na!" 
Psalms149:3 Molja'agi asmana ngangguy ri-tariyan, molja'agi Salerana ngangguy calempong ban terbang." 
Psalms149:4 PANGERAN kasokan ka ommadda; oreng se andhap asor eparenge kamennangan. 
Psalms149:5 Dina ommadda Allah me' olle anga-bunga lantaran kajaja'anna, ban anyanye kalaban senneng ate samalem benteng." 
Psalms149:6 Dina reng-oreng jareya me' olle ngagungngagi Allah kalaban sowara se ranyeng, sambi neggu' peddhang se la egangse" 
Psalms149:7 kaangguy males ka sa-bangsa ban ngokom ku-suku bangsa; 
Psalms149:8 kaangguy ngalenthong to-rato ban arantay para pangobasana; 
Psalms149:9 kaangguy ngokom sa-bangsa kalaban dhabuna Allah. Jareya kamennanganna ommat se ekataresnae Salerana. Molja'agi PANGERAN! 
Psalms150:1 Molja'agi PANGERAN! Molja'agi Pangeran e dhalem Padalemmanna! Molja'agi kakowadanna e bang-abang! 
Psalms150:2 Molja'agi Salerana lantaran kaparjuga'anna. Molja'agi Salerana lantaran kaagunganna se raja. 
Psalms150:3 Molja'agi Salerana ban monyena tarompet, molja'agi Salerana ban gambus sarta calempong." 
Psalms150:4 Molja'agi Salerana ban terbang sarta ri-tariyan, molja'agi Salerana ban calempong sarta soleng." 
Psalms150:5 Molja'agi Salerana ban canang se ngaranang, molja'agi Salerana ban canang se ngareneng." 
Psalms150:6 Sakabbinna mahlok se odhi', mara molja'agi PANGERAN! Molja'agi PANGERAN!" 
Proverbs1:1 Areya' babala'anna Sulaiman pottrana Daud, rato Isra'il." 
Proverbs1:2 Tojjuwanna kaangguy nolong oreng sopaja taowa baramma carana sopaja daddiya bicaksana, ban taowa tata tartebba odhi' sarta bisa paham ka maksodda ca'-oca'an se dhalem artena." 
Proverbs1:3 Babala'an reya ngajarragi baramma oreng bisa odhi' bicaksana, jujur, adil ban bendher." 
Proverbs1:4 Oreng se ta' andhi' pangalaman eajari sampe' andhi' pekkeran se tajem, ban ngangodhadan eajari daddi oreng se penter ban bisa apekker sacara dibasa." 
Proverbs1:5 Kalaban babala'an reya reng-oreng se bicaksana bakal atamba'a pangataowanna, ban oreng se la narema pandhidhikan bakal olleya petodu." 
Proverbs1:6 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya oreng bisa tao ka arte se kaalengan e dhalem babala'an ban paham ka cap-ocabanna reng-oreng se bicaksana sarta ra-parkara se eajuwagi reng-oreng jareya. 
Proverbs1:7 Mon terro andhi'a elmo pangataowan, oreng kodu andhi' kaadha' parasa'an hormat ban tako' ka PANGERAN. Oreng budhu ta' ngargai hekmat ban ta' endha' eajari." 
Proverbs1:8 Gateyagi apa se ekoca'agi rama ebuna ba'na, na'," 
Proverbs1:9 sabab pangajaranna se kadhuwa jareya nambai kabecce'anna ba'na akantha surban ban kalong se nambai bagussa robana ba'na. 
Proverbs1:10 Mon ba'na egudha oreng dusa, na', ja' torodi gudha'an jareya." 
Proverbs1:11 Mon oreng jareya ngoca', “Mara nyare oreng pas karoyo' kambuli'i. Kaangguy seng-iseng, mara nyerrang oreng se ta' sala." 
Proverbs1:12 Sateya reng-oreng jareya odhi' senneng ban baras, tape dhaggi' tanto daddi akantha oreng se satengnga mate." 
Proverbs1:13 Rang-barangnga se aji mara kala', me' olle bengkona sengko' ban ba'na possa' ban barang rampasan." 
Proverbs1:14 Mara noro'! Dhaggi' barang keco'anna bagi kambuli'i!” 
Proverbs1:15 Ja' norodi reng-oreng se kantha jareya, na'! Jauwi reng-oreng jareya." 
Proverbs1:16 Reng-oreng jareya ta' nyaman neng-enneng mon gi' ta' alako jahat; terro duliya mate'e oreng. 
Proverbs1:17 Mano' bai ta' kera maso' ka dhalem jaring se eampar e adha'na matana," 
Proverbs1:18 tape reng-oreng jareya la'-mala' masang jira' kaangguy aba'na dibi' - jira' se macalaka'a aba'na dibi'. 
Proverbs1:19 Pajat, oreng se nyare kasap kalaban ngangguy kakerrasan bakal majara ban nyabana dibi'." 
Proverbs1:20 Edhingngagi! Hekmat lok-ologan e rong-lorong ban ra'-era'an e lon-alon! 
Proverbs1:21 Rat-tharadan e bang-labang saketheng ban e kennengngan-kennengngan se ramme: 
Proverbs1:22 “He, reng-oreng budhu! Sampe' bila ba'na pagguna kantha jareya? Bila ba'na se ambuwa ngenthengngagi pangataowan ban nolak pangajaran?" 
Proverbs1:23 Edhingngagi mon sengko' maenga' ba'na, bi' sengko' ba'na pas ebala'ana essena tang ate sarta eajarana tang pangataowan." 
Proverbs1:24 Ba'na la eolok bi' sengko', tape ba'na ta' endha' ngedhingngagi." 
Proverbs1:25 Tang babala'an bi' ba'na eenthengngagi kabbi ban mon sengko' maenga' ba'na ta' endha' narema. 
Proverbs1:26 Daddi mon ba'na calaka', bi' sengko' ekala'-gella'a. Mon ba'na katako'en, bi' sengko' eco-kocowa." 
Proverbs1:27 Onggu, bi' sengko' ba'na eco-kocowa mon ba'na kobater ban nanggung kasossa'an polana nemmo balai se padhatengnga akantha kaleng busbus." 
Proverbs1:28 E bakto jareya ba'na bakal ngologa sengko', tape sengko' ta' nyaoda. Ba'na bakal nyareya sengko' san-kassannagi, tape sengko' ta' kera etemmo." 
Proverbs1:29 Ba'na akantha oreng se ta' tao endha' narema pangataowan, ban sengka se ta'ada ka PANGERAN." 
Proverbs1:30 Ba'na ta' tao endha' narema tang babala'an otabana agateyagi mon sengko' maenga'. 
Proverbs1:31 Daddi ba'na bakal ngarassa'agiya ollena lalakonna ban ja-sajjana se juba'. 
Proverbs1:32 Oreng se ta' andhi' pangalaman bakal mateya polana ngenthengngagi sengko', ban oreng se budhu bakal ancora polana ta' parduli ka sengko'." 
Proverbs1:33 Tape oreng se ngedhingngagi sengko' bakal salamedda. Odhi'na bakal amana ban ta' parlo tako'.” 
Proverbs2:1 Tarema pa-apa se eajarragi sengko' reya, na', ban kaenga'e terros tang babala'an ka ba'na." 
Proverbs2:2 Tetene apa se bicaksana ban ehteyarragi sopaja ba'na pahama ka maksodda. 
Proverbs2:3 Onggu na', ehteyarragi sopaja ba'na andhi'a pekkeran se tajem ban nyo'on sopaja ba'na eparenge pangarteyan." 
Proverbs2:4 Sare jareya pakantha se nyare emmas, serser pakantha se nyerser arta se tabendhem." 
Proverbs2:5 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na bakal taowa apa artena tako' ka PANGERAN ban ba'na bakal olleya pangataowan parkara Allah. 
Proverbs2:6 PANGERAN se apareng hekmat ban dhari Salerana manossa narema pangataowan ban pangarteyan. 
Proverbs2:7 Oreng se atena berse ban tadha' calena eparenge partolongan ban pangaoban. 
Proverbs2:8 Pangeran ajaga reng-oreng se adil, sarta ngaobi reng-oreng se taresna ka Salerana." 
Proverbs2:9 Mon ba'na norodi sengko', na', ba'na tanto tao apa se adil, jujur ban bagus. Ba'na bakal taowa keya baramma carana ba'na kodu odhi'." 
Proverbs2:10 Ba'na bakal daddiya bicaksana, ban pangataowanna ba'na bakal masennengnga atena ba'na." 
Proverbs2:11 Pangarteyan ban kapenterranna ba'na bakal ngaobana ba'na," 
Proverbs2:12 sarta lang-ngalange ba'na atoro' cara odhi' se ta' becce', bariya keya majau ba'na dhari reng-oreng se juba' colo'na." 
Proverbs2:13 Reng-oreng jareya ta' endha' atoro' jalan se becce' e dhalem odhi'na; se epele jalan se petteng ban possa' dusana. 
Proverbs2:14 Reng-oreng jareya nemmo kasennengngan dhari lalakonna se jahat. 
Proverbs2:15 Reng-oreng jareya roce ban odhi'na ta' teppa'. 
Proverbs2:16 Ba'na, na', tanto bisa nolak mon ecacae babine' se nakal se aehteyar ngangguy ca'-oca' se manes sopaja ba'na kapencoda." 
Proverbs2:17 Babine' jareya ta' esto ka lakena sarta loppa ka janjina ka Allah. 
Proverbs2:18 Mon ba'na entar ka bengkona, ba'na padha ban se ajalan ngamba'a pate. Entar ka jadhiya padha ban oreng se entar ka dunnyana oreng mate." 
Proverbs2:19 Oreng se entar ka babine' jareya tadha' se abali ka jalan se nojju ka kaodhi'an. 
Proverbs2:20 Daddi, na', toro' contona oreng se becce', ban mara ba'na odhi' menorot kasokanna Allah." 
Proverbs2:21 Sabab oreng se odhi'na atoro' ka kasokanna Allah, iya areya reng-oreng se berse atena, jareya se ngennengngana nagara se ejanjiyagi Pangeran." 
Proverbs2:22 Tape oreng se jahat ban dusa bakal ebuwanga kalowar dhari nagara jareya bi' Allah, akantha rebba se edabu' dhari tana." 
Proverbs3:1 Ja' kaloppae apa se la eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na, na'. Kaenga'e terros tang parenta," 
Proverbs3:2 sopaja ba'na lanjang omorra ban nyaman odhi'na. 
Proverbs3:3 Ba'na papaggun parcaja sarta esto ka Allah ban sasamana. Kaenga'e jareya ban sempen e dhalem atena," 
Proverbs3:4 sopaja ba'na ekaleburi ban eargai bi' Allah sarta manossa. 
Proverbs3:5 Paparcaja ka PANGERAN kalaban gu-onggu ate, ban ja' ngandellagi pangarteyanna ba'na dibi'." 
Proverbs3:6 Kaenga'e PANGERAN e dhalem ba'na alako apa'a bai, tanto Pangeran noduwagi ka ba'na carana odhi' se becce'." 
Proverbs3:7 Ja' sampe' ba'na nganggep aba'na apenterran dhari se sabendherra; toro' dhabuna PANGERAN ban jauwi sabarang se jahat. 
Proverbs3:8 Lalakon se kantha jareya bakal daddiya akantha obat ka ba'na se mabaras badanna ban masegger atena. 
Proverbs3:9 Hormadi PANGERAN kalaban cara ngatorragi ka Salerana dhi'-andhi'na ba'na ban hasel bumena se paleng bagus," 
Proverbs3:10 tanto bung-lombungnga ba'na pas possa' ban gandum, ban aeng anggurra ba'na bakal bannya'a sampe' baddhana ta' kabuwa'." 
Proverbs3:11 Mon PANGERAN ngajar ba'na, na', tarema jareya menangka parengeddan, ban ja' sampe' ba'na arassa caremmet e dhalem atena lantaran pangajaran jareya." 
Proverbs3:12 PANGERAN ngajar oreng se ekataresnae akantha oreng towa lake' se ngajar ana'na se ekaneserre. 
Proverbs3:13 Ontong oreng se daddi bicaksana ban olle pangarteyan. 
Proverbs3:14 Kaontonganna alebbiyan dhari se ekaolle dhari salaka, ban lebbi aji dhari emmas." 
Proverbs3:15 Hekmat lebbi aji dhari mamatan; sabarang se ekaterro ba'na ta' ekenneng bandhingngagi ban hekmat jareya. 
Proverbs3:16 Hekmat reya malanjang omor, madhateng kasogiyan ban kahormadan." 
Proverbs3:17 Hekmat masenneng ban mataremtem odhi'na ba'na. 
Proverbs3:18 Oreng se neggu'i hekmat bakal olleya odhi' se saongguna ban se senneng. 
Proverbs3:19 Kalaban hekmat PANGERAN nyepta'agi bume; kalaban akkal buddina Salerana ngampar langnge'. 
Proverbs3:20 Kalaban pangataowanna Salerana abadhi ber-somberra aeng e babana tana ban magili aengnga, abadhi ondhem e langnge' se magaggar ojan ka bume." 
Proverbs3:21 Daddi, teggu'i hekmat ban partembangan se massa', na'. Ja' sampe' ocol," 
Proverbs3:22 sopaja odhi'na ba'na bisa'a salamet – lebur ban senneng. 
Proverbs3:23 Ba'na bakal amana mon ajalan, ta' kera dhung-tatandhung." 
Proverbs3:24 Mon tedhunga ba'na ta' kera tako', mon tedhung bakal ngeddha'a samalem benteng." 
Proverbs3:25 Ba'na ta' osa tako' mon badha balai se dhateng sakaleng adha' akantha kaleng busbus, akantha se nebane oreng jahat." 
Proverbs3:26 Sabab ba'na tanto ejaga bi' PANGERAN. Bi' Salerana ba'na ta' kera edina sampe' tabalusok ka jebbak. 
Proverbs3:27 Mon ba'na nemmo kasempadan agabaya kabecce'an ka oreng se marlowagi kabecce'an jareya, ba'na ja' nolak kasempadan jareya." 
Proverbs3:28 Ja' nyoro sasamana anante' sampe' lagguna mon ba'na bisa nolong sateya keya. 
Proverbs3:29 Ja' aneyat apa'a bai marogiya sasamana se badha e seddi'na ba'na ban se parcaja ka ba'na. 
Proverbs3:30 Ja' atokar ta' kalaban badha margana ban oreng se ta' tao atengka juba' ka ba'na. 
Proverbs3:31 Ja' ere ate ka oreng se ngalakone kakerrasan, ban ja' nero tengkana reng-oreng jareya." 
Proverbs3:32 Sabab PANGERAN baji' ka oreng se atengka juba', tape semma' ban oreng se loros odhi'na." 
Proverbs3:33 PANGERAN abasto bengkona oreng jahat, tape aberkadi bengkona oreng se ta'at ka Salerana." 
Proverbs3:34 Pangeran baji' ka oreng se angko, tape aberkadi oreng se andhap asor." 
Proverbs3:35 Oreng bicaksana bakal sajana ro'om nyamana, tape oreng budhu sajan ecale oreng." 
Proverbs4:1 Edhingngagi babala'anna eppa'na ba'na, kana'. Gateyagi pateppa' sopaja ba'na ngarteya." 
Proverbs4:2 Se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na reya becce', daddi ja' enthengngagi." 
Proverbs4:3 E bakto sengko' gi' kene', sengko' reya ana' nonggalla tang oreng towa," 
Proverbs4:4 sengko' eajari bi' eppa'. Dhabuna, “Kaenga'e tang babala'an, ja' sampe' kaloppae. Jalannagi tang du-petodu sopaja odhi'na ba'na sennengnga." 
Proverbs4:5 Pabicaksana ban papenter! Kaenga'e terros tang babala'an reya, ja' sampe' buwang.”" 
Proverbs4:6 Argai hekmat, tanto hekmat jareya ngaobi ba'na; kaleburi hekmat, tanto hekmat jareya terros ajaga ba'na sopaja teptebba aman." 
Proverbs4:7 Se paleng penting se kodu elakone kaadha' bi' ba'na iya areya ba'na kodu aehteyar sopaja ba'na daddiya bicaksana. Apa'a bai se eserser ba'na, se paleng otama iya areya ehteyarragi sopaja ba'na olleya pangarteyan." 
Proverbs4:8 Jungjung patenggi hekmat, tanto ba'na epatenggi keya bi' hekmat jareya. Gellu' hekmat jareya, tanto ba'na epadhatengnge kahormadan." 
Proverbs4:9 Hekmat jareya bakal aberri'ana ba'na kembang se eto'or epabagus kaangguy ekagabay jamangnga ba'na. 
Proverbs4:10 Edhingngagi sengko', na'! Gateyagi pateppa' tang babala'an reya, tanto ba'na pas lanjang omor." 
Proverbs4:11 Sengko' la ngajarragi hekmat ka ba'na ban noduwagi carana odhi' se bendher. 
Proverbs4:12 Mon ba'na odhi' kantha jareya, ba'na ta' kera nemmo alangan e bakto ajalan, ban ta' kera tatandhung e bakto berka'." 
Proverbs4:13 Kaenga'e terros pangajaran se etarema ba'na dhari sengko'. Jaga pateppa', sabab kalaban pangajaran jareya ba'na tanto ahasel e dhalem odhi'na." 
Proverbs4:14 Ja' noro' cara odhi'na oreng jahat, ban ja' nerowe tengkana reng-oreng jareya." 
Proverbs4:15 Ja' agateyagi reng-oreng jareya! La'-mala' jauwi ban ba'na ajalan terros! 
Proverbs4:16 Oreng jahat ta' bisa tedhung sabellunna ngalakone se ta' becce', ta' ngantok sabellunna macalaka' oreng laen." 
Proverbs4:17 Kajahadan ban kakejjemman reya akantha kakanan ban nom-enoman monggu ka reng-oreng jareya. 
Proverbs4:18 Jalanna oreng jahat petteng akantha malem. Sokona tatandhung laju labu ta' kalaban tao sababba. Sabaligga jalan se elebadi oreng becce' akantha moncarra are; sajan abit sajan tera', sampe' dhi-budhina tera' tar-kataran." 
Proverbs4:19  
Proverbs4:20 Edhingngagi tang ca'-oca' reya, na'. Edhingngagi tang babala'an." 
Proverbs4:21 Ja' buwang, sempen terros e dhalem atena." 
Proverbs4:22 Oreng se paham ka jareya bakal odhi'a ban baras. 
Proverbs4:23 Jaga atena ba'na pateppa', sabab atena ba'na nantowagi jalanna odhi'na ba'na." 
Proverbs4:24 Ja' sampe' ba'na ca'-ngoca' barang se ta' bendher. Jauwagi caca lecek ban caca se emaksoddagi ngeba'a oreng ka jalan se sala. 
Proverbs4:25 Mowana ba'na kodu nyonarragi kajujuranna atena; ta' parlo ba'na top-notobi maksod se ta' becce'. 
Proverbs4:26 Pekker pateppa' sabellunna ngalakone apa'a bai, sopaja ba'na bisa'a ahasel e dhalem sakabbinna ehteyarra." 
Proverbs4:27 Jauwi se jahat, pajujur odhi'na. Ja' nyempang dhari jalan se bendher." 
Proverbs5:1 Mara edhingngagi sengko', na'! Edhingngagi pagu-onggu kabicaksana'an ban pangarteyan se eajarragi sengko' ka ba'na," 
Proverbs5:2 sopaja ba'na taowa baramma koduna ba'na ngator tengkana ban acaca menangka oreng se andhi' pangataowan. 
Proverbs5:3 Babine' se nakal bibirra manes akantha maddu ban cacana ngapencot ate," 
Proverbs5:4 tape mon kabbi la mare, kare nyandhang pae'na ban kasossa'anna." 
Proverbs5:5 Ba'na eeret toron ka dunnyana oreng mate; jalan se elebadi nojju ka maot. 
Proverbs5:6 Babine' jareya ta' paggun e jalan se nojju ka odhi'; o-tao la etemmo nyaleyot dhari jalan jareya ta' kalaban apangrasa. 
Proverbs5:7 Daddi, na', mara kabbi edhingngagi tang oca' reya ban ja' enthengngagi." 
Proverbs5:8 Jauwi babine' se kantha jareya! La'-mala' ja' semma'e bengkona. 
Proverbs5:9 Mon ba'na ma'-nyemma' ka babine' se kantha jareya, ba'na bakal kaelangana kahormadanna, ban nyabana ba'na bakal erengguda gi' ngodhana bi' reng-oreng se ta' andhi' bellas ase sakale." 
Proverbs5:10 Artana ba'na bakal obusa ekakan oreng laen, ban hasel ollena pello konengnga ba'na bakal ekaandhi'a oreng se ta' ekataowe ba'na." 
Proverbs5:11 Dhi-budhina ba'na bakal aserrowa, mon badanna ba'na tompes ekakan panyaket." 
Proverbs5:12 Ba'na tanto pas ngoca', “Ah, arapa sengko' me' baji' ka babala'an? Arapa sengko' me' ta' endha' epaenga'?" 
Proverbs5:13 Sengko' ta' endha' ngedhingngagi tang ru-guru ban ta' atoro' ka dhabuna. 
Proverbs5:14 O-tao sengko' la tadha' argana e dhalem masarakat.” 
Proverbs5:15 Daddi, paesto ka binena dibi', ban bagi kataresna'anna ba'na ka binena jareya malolo." 
Proverbs5:16 Tadha' gunana ba'na nyare kane'madan dhari oreng se banne binena. 
Proverbs5:17 Kane'madan jareya pera' kaangguy ba'na ban binena malolo, banne ban oreng laen." 
Proverbs5:18 Daddi ba'na kodu pasenneng pera' ban binena dibi'; sare kane'madan pera' e babine' se la akabin bi' ba'na – 
Proverbs5:19 paraban se raddin ban lebur gulina akantha keddang. Dina badanna se lebur abasanna matagiyur atena ba'na ban asmarana mamabu' ba'na. 
Proverbs5:20 Apa gunana anapso ka babine' laen, na'? Arapa'a me' tedhunga ban babine' nakal?" 
Proverbs5:21 PANGERAN ngoladi sabarang se elakone manossa. Dha' emma'a bai manossa, bi' Pangeran eoladi terros." 
Proverbs5:22 Dusana oreng jahat padha ban jebbak se ajira' aba'na dibi'. 
Proverbs5:23 Aba'na mate polana ta' narema babala'an. Kabudhuwanna maancor aba'na dibi'. 
Proverbs6:1 Na', olle daddi ba'na tao ajanji ka oreng ja' ba'na nanggunga otangnga." 
Proverbs6:2 Ban olle daddi ba'na la tajira' bi' cacana dibi' ban tajebbak ban janjina dibi'. 
Proverbs6:3 Mon kantha jareya, na', ba'na la ekobasae oreng jareya. Tape reya' carana mon ba'na terro leppasa: duli entar ka oreng jareya; menta pagu-onggu sopaja oreng jareya mabebasa ba'na." 
Proverbs6:4 Ja' tedhung ban ja' aistirahat gallu. 
Proverbs6:5 Pabebas gallu ba'na dhari jira' jareya akantha mano' otabana keddang se mabebas aba'na dhari panganjur. 
Proverbs6:6 Oreng se males kodu ngabas cara odhi'na bilis ban ajar dhari bilis jareya. 
Proverbs6:7 Bilis reya ta' andhi' pamimpin, ta' andhi' pangobasa otabana pangawas," 
Proverbs6:8 tape saabidda mosem anye bilis reya mapolong parsadhiya'anna kakanan kaangguy mosem laep. 
Proverbs6:9 Sampe' bila oreng se males tedhunga terros? Bila se jaga'a? 
Proverbs6:10 Lakona pera' toju' ta' alalakon sarta ngoca' kantha reya, “Sengko' tedhunga gallu sakejja', sengko' ngantok.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Tape sabatara tedhung, oreng jareya katebanan kakorangan ban kameskenan se dhateng akantha bigal se nyekep gagaman."
