Proverbs6:12 Oreng jahat ban korang ajar acaca lecek ka man-dhimman. 
Proverbs6:13 Oreng jareya amaen mata aberri' tandha kaangguy nepo. 
Proverbs6:14 Pekkeranna se juba' possa' ban neyat jahat se madhateng tokar e man-dhimman. 
Proverbs6:15 Jareya kabbi bakal madhatengnga calaka' se dhateng sakaleng adha' ka aba'na dibi', sampe' aba'na ancor." 
Proverbs6:16 Badha pettong parkara se ekabaji'i PANGERAN se bi' Salerana ta' epanneng: Tengka se sombong, colo' se lecegan, tanang se mate'e oreng se ta' sala, otek se ngator sajja se jahat, soko se gancang ajalan nojju ka kajahadan, sakse se lecek terros, ban oreng se mamosowan reng-oreng se sakanca'an." 
Proverbs6:17  
Proverbs6:18  
Proverbs6:19  
Proverbs6:20 Lakone, na', pa-apa se eparenta'agi eppa'na, ban ja' kaloppae babala'anna ebuna." 
Proverbs6:21 Kaenga'e terros dhabuna rama ebuna, sempen e dhalem atena." 
Proverbs6:22 Pangajaranna rama ebuna jareya bakal nontona ba'na e dhalem parjalanan, ajaga'a ba'na e baja malem, ban aberri' petodu ka ba'na e bakto ba'na jaga." 
Proverbs6:23 Babala'anna oreng towana ba'na akantha damar se tera'; parengeddanna noduwagi ka ba'na carana odhi' se becce'. 
Proverbs6:24 Kalaban cara se kantha jareya ba'na epajau dhari babine' se nakal, ban dhari caca se manes tape agandhu' racon dhari binena oreng laen." 
Proverbs6:25 Ja' sampe' ba'na tagudha bi' karaddinanna, ja' kapencot bi' matana se agudha ate." 
Proverbs6:26 Sondel ekenneng sewa ban argana nase' sapereng, tape azina ban binena oreng laen kodu ebajar ban nyaba." 
Proverbs6:27 Ba' bisa'a oreng marangko apoy tape kalambina ta' ekello'? 
Proverbs6:28 Ba' bisa'a oreng ngenyek mardha tape sokona ta' bulla'? 
Proverbs6:29 Kantha jareya keya babajana oreng tedhung ban binena oreng laen. Sapa'a bai se alako kantha jareya ta' kera lopot dhari okoman. 
Proverbs6:30 Mon oreng ngeco' kakanan, maskeya lapar, oreng jareya tanto eya-seya." 
Proverbs6:31 Ban mon oreng jareya ekenneng pega', kodu majar pettong kalena; daddi kodu kaelangan sakabbinna dhi'-andhi'na." 
Proverbs6:32 Tape baramma mon lalake' azina? Jareya nyamana arosak aba'na dibi'! Budhu onggu! 
Proverbs6:33 Oreng jareya bakal eseksa'a ban ebi-cebbi oreng. Nyamana bakal juba'a salanjangnga. 
Proverbs6:34 Sabab kalaban tengkana se kantha jareya, lakena babine' gella' tanto tamburuwan, sampe' ce' peggella. Ban mon lalake' jareya males sake'na atena, oreng jareya ta' kera andhi' ate neser." 
Proverbs6:35 Ta' kera ekenneng pos-apose ban pesse; maske eri'-berri'ana saapa'a bai bannya'na peggella atena ta' kera elang. 
Proverbs7:1 Kaenga'e tang ca'-oca', na', ban ja' kaloppae apa se eparenta'agi sengko' ka ba'na." 
Proverbs7:2 Toro' tang babala'an sopaja odhi'na ba'na senneng. Toro' tang pangajaran pagu-onggu akantha mon ba'na ajaga bigina matana dibi'. 
Proverbs7:3 Kaenga'e terros tang pangajaran jareya kabbi, sempen e dhalem atena." 
Proverbs7:4 Anggep hekmat reya menangka taretanna ba'na ban pangataowan menangka kanca kenthella. 
Proverbs7:5 Hekmat bakal majauwa ba'na dhari babine' se nakal, dhari babine' se kalaban ca'-oca' se manes aehteyar matagiyura atena ba'na." 
Proverbs7:6 E settong are sengko' ngabas dhari candhelana tang bengko. 
Proverbs7:7 Sengko' nangale'e lalake'an se gi' ngodha ban gi' ta' andhi' pangalaman; tape e antarana badha settong se budhu, bi' sengko' oreng jareya eabas terros." 
Proverbs7:8 E bakto para' compet are ban la molae petteng, oreng jareya lan-jalanan e lorong e seddi'na luk-bilugan se semma' ka bengkona settong oreng bine'." 
Proverbs7:9  
Proverbs7:10 Babine' jareya oreng se ta' betta neng e bengkona. Ja'-sakejja' badha e penggir lorong, saellana pas badha e lon-alon, otabana manjeng e parapadan. Tengkana bangal ban ta' tao todhus. Sengko' nangale'e babine' jareya kalowar akalambi akantha sondel, nyander ka lalake' se ngodha gella', katonna andhi' sajja juba'." 
Proverbs7:11  
Proverbs7:12  
Proverbs7:13 Lalake' se gi' ngodha jareya egellu' sarta eseyom. Pas ngoca' kantha reya, tadha' todhussa," 
Proverbs7:14 “Are mangken kaula kodu ngessa'agi neyat, ban kaula ampon ngatorragi kurban." 
Proverbs7:15 Ganeka sababba aponapa kaula me' kalowar nyareya sampeyan, sopaja sampeyan adha'ar e compo' kaula. Samangken kaula ampon apanggi sareng sampeyan!" 
Proverbs7:16 Ranjang kaula ampon epobuwi sepere dhari kaen se ana-barna dhari Messer," 
Proverbs7:17 sareng eparo'om ngangguy mennyan, candhana, sareng manes jangan." 
Proverbs7:18 Samangken tore neng-sennengngan kadhuwa'an, ngarassa'agi kobassana asmara samalem benteng." 
Proverbs7:19 Lake kaula tadha' e compo', kalerressan ajalanan jau." 
Proverbs7:20 Se mangkat abakta pesse bannya', ta' kera abali sabellunna dhu menggu.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Kantha jareya babine' jareya nyacae lalake' gella' bi' ca'-oca' se makapencot ate sampe' lalake' jareya tagiyur. 
Proverbs7:22 Ta' kalaban apekker lalake' jareya noro' babine' gella' akantha sape se eeret ka pajagalan ban akantha oreng tahanan se egiba kaangguy narema'a okoman se esadhiya'agi kaangguy reng-oreng se budhu; 
Proverbs7:23 sakejja' aggi' pana bakal naccegga ka atena sampe' terbas. Akantha mano' se ngabber ka jira', oreng ngodha jareya ta' apangrasa ja' odhi'na ngadhebbi babaja." 
Proverbs7:24 Daddi, na', edhingngagi sengko'. Gateyagi tang babala'an." 
Proverbs7:25 Ja' sampe' atena ba'na tagiyur ka babine' kantha jareya; ja' entar nyare babine' jareya," 
Proverbs7:26 sabab la bannya' lalake' se eparosak odhi'na. Ta' kabitong bannya'na se mate polana babine' jareya. 
Proverbs7:27 Mon entar ka bengkona artena padha ban se nyerang lebat jalan se asemma'an ka pate. 
Proverbs8:1 Edhingngagi! Kabicaksana'an lok-ologan, sowarana hekmat epakaja." 
Proverbs8:2 Hekmat jareya manjeng e mo'-gumo' e penggir jalan, ban e rong-lorong parapadan." 
Proverbs8:3 E bang-labang saketheng, jalan mon maso'a ka kottha, e jadhiya oreng ngedhing sowarana." 
Proverbs8:4 “He, ommat manossa, sengko' aera' ka ba'na; saneyap manossa e bume, edhingngagi tang sowara." 
Proverbs8:5 Ba'na se gi' ta' andhi' pangalaman, mara ajar sopaja tajem pekkeranna; ba'na se budhu, mara ajar ngangguy pekkeran." 
Proverbs8:6 Edhingngagi tang ca'-oca' reya, sabab kabbi teppa' ban bagus essena." 
Proverbs8:7 Se ekoca'agi sengko' kabbi tadha' salana, sabab sengko' baji' ka caca se lecek essena." 
Proverbs8:8 Jujur kabbi essena tang oca', tadha' se alet-bulet otaba sala." 
Proverbs8:9 Monggu ka oreng penter, tang oca' ekarassa teppa'na, ka oreng se tabukka' pekkerra, tang caca tadha' salana." 
Proverbs8:10 Argai tang babala'an alebbiyan dhari salaka asli, parlowagi pangataowan ngalebbi'i emmas morne." 
Proverbs8:11 Sengko' reya hekmat, lebbi aji dhari barleyan; ta' ekenneng bandhingngagi bi' apa'a bai se daddi pangaterrona ba'na." 
Proverbs8:12 Sengko' reya hekmat, sengko' agandhu' pangarteyan, kabicaksana'an ban pangataowan." 
Proverbs8:13 Hormat ka PANGERAN artena baji' ka kajahadan; sengko' ta' lebur ka kasombongan ban kaangkowan. Sengko' baji' ka tengka se jahat, ban ca'-oca' se agandhu' tepowan." 
Proverbs8:14 Sengko' se aberri' ilham, ban sengko' keya se awujuddagi ilham jareya. Sengko' penter sarta kowat." 
Proverbs8:15 To-rato bi' sengko' ebanto ajalannagi pamarenta'an, para pangobasa etolong ajalannagi kaadilan." 
Proverbs8:16 Lantaran tang partolongan, para pangraja ban kaom oreng agung marenta ban ajalannagi kaadilan." 
Proverbs8:17 Sengko' taresna ka oreng se lebur ka sengko'; sapa se nyare'e sengko' tanto tatemmo. 
Proverbs8:18 E sengko' badha kasogiyan, kama'moran ban kahormadan." 
Proverbs8:19 Se ekaolle ba'na dhari sengko' alebbiyan dhari emmas morne, aajiyan dhari salaka asli." 
Proverbs8:20 Sengko' lebat e jalan kaadilan, sengko' atengka' e jalan kajujuran." 
Proverbs8:21 Oreng se taresna ka sengko' bi' sengko' epasogi, bengkona epossa'e bi' arta." 
Proverbs8:22 Sengko' ecepta'agi PANGERAN angadha'an dhari laenna, sengko' hasella karyana se dha'-adha' e jaman lamba'na." 
Proverbs8:23 Sengko' ekagabay molae parmola'anna jaman, dha'-adha' kadibi' sabellunna bume ecepta." 
Proverbs8:24 Sengko' lahir sabellunna tase' raja ecepta, sabellunna aeng nyomber dhari tana." 
Proverbs8:25 Sengko' lahir sabellunna nong-gunong epajaga, sabellunna mo'-gumo' epaddek," 
Proverbs8:26 sabellunna Pangeran nyepta'agi bume ban lon-talonna, la'-mala' sabellunna ecepta tana sakeppel se dha'-adha'na." 
Proverbs8:27 Sengko' nangale e bakto langnge' eampar, e bakto bang-abang ebarbar e attassa tase' raja," 
Proverbs8:28 e bakto Pangeran nyaba' ondhem e langnge', ban mokka' ber-somberra tase' raja," 
Proverbs8:29 e bakto Pangeran adhabu ka tase' sopaja ta' sampe'a ngalebadi tes-batessa. Sengko' hadir keya e bakto langganna bume epasang. 
Proverbs8:30 Sengko' badha e seddi'na Pangeran akantha ana' emmassa, sabban are sengko' se masenneng panggaliyanna; sengko' ros-terrosan en-maenan e ajunanna." 
Proverbs8:31 Sengko' neng-sennengngan e attas bumena, ban senneng apolong ban manossa." 
Proverbs8:32 Daddi, edhingngagi sengko', kana' ngodha! Toro' tang petodu, tanto ba'na senneng odhi'na." 
Proverbs8:33 Tarema babala'anna sengko', ban pabicaksana, ja' sampe' enthengngagi." 
Proverbs8:34 Pojur oreng se ngedhingngagi sengko', se sabban are toju' anante' e labangnga tang bengko, ban aga-jaga e labang sakethengnga tang bengko." 
Proverbs8:35 Sapa se nemmo sengko' nemmo kaodhi'an, oreng jareya katarema ka PANGERAN." 
Proverbs8:36 Sapa se ta' nemmo sengko' rogi dibi'; oreng se baji' ka sengko' lebur ka pate.” 
Proverbs9:1 Hekmat la maddek bengkona, ban masang canggana se papetto'." 
Proverbs9:2 La nyambelli ebin ekapesta'a, ngola aeng anggur sarta nyadhiya'agi ka'-angka'." 
Proverbs9:3 Reng-bareng babine'an esoro entar ra'-era'an dhari kennengngan se gi-tenggi e kottha," 
Proverbs9:4 “Sapa se ta' andhi' pangalaman, mara dha' enna'!” Ka se ta' andhi' akkal buddi, hekmat ngoca'," 
Proverbs9:5 “Mara rassae kobassana tang kakanan ban cepcep anggur se eola sengko' reya. 
Proverbs9:6 Dina'agi kabudhuwan, me' olle ba'na odhi' senneng. Toro' jalanna oreng se penter.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Mon oreng se ta' endha' eajari bi' ba'na ebalai kasala'anna, tanto ba'na ekala'-gella' bi' oreng jareya. Mon ba'na gigir ka oreng jahat, tanto ba'na eca'-koca'e." 
Proverbs9:8 Ja' nyale oreng se ta' endha' eajari, dhaggi' ba'na ekabaji'i bi' oreng jareya. Tape mon oreng se bicaksana bi' ba'na eduduwi kasala'anna, ba'na tanto eargai bi' oreng jareya." 
Proverbs9:9 Mon oreng se bicaksana bi' ba'na ela-balai, oreng jareya tanto sajan bicaksana. Ban mon oreng se ta'at ka Allah bi' ba'na eajari, pangataowanna tanto sajan atamba." 
Proverbs9:10 Mon terro bicaksana'a, dha'-adha'na oreng kodu andhi' ate hormat ban tako' ka PANGERAN. Mon ba'na tao ka Se Mahasocce, ba'na tanto andhi' pangarteyan." 
Proverbs9:11 Hekmat bakal malanjanga omorra ba'na. 
Proverbs9:12 Mon ba'na andhi' hekmat, ba'na dibi' se ontong. Tape mon ba'na nolak hekmat, ba'na dibi' keya se bakal rogiya." 
Proverbs9:13 Kabudhuwan reya akantha babine' se careme se ta' andhi' pangalaman ban ta' tao todhus. 
Proverbs9:14 Kennengnganna e labangnga bengkona otabana e labang sakethengnga kottha. 
Proverbs9:15 Dhari jadhiya kabudhuwan jareya lok-ologan ka reng-oreng se lebat. Reng-oreng se berse atena ecacae," 
Proverbs9:16 “Mara nyepper dha' enna', kabbi se gi' ta' andhi' pangalaman!” Ban ka reng-oreng se ta' andhi' akkal buddi ngoca' kantha reya," 
Proverbs9:17 “Aeng ollena ngeco' rassana manes, ban roti se ekakan tek-ngetek anyamanan rassana.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Reng-oreng se daddi mangsana ta' tao ja' reng-oreng se entar ka jadhiya mate e jadhiya; ban reng-oreng se la maso' ka bengkona, sateya badha e dunnyana oreng mate." 
Proverbs10:1 Areya babala'anna Sulaiman: Ana' se bicaksana magumbira atena eppa'na; ana' se budhu masossa atena ebuna. 
Proverbs10:2 Kasogiyan se ekaolle kalaban cara se roce ta' madhateng kaontongan; sabaligga, kajujuran bakal madhatengnga kasalameddan." 
Proverbs10:3 Oreng becce' bi' PANGERAN ta' kera epakalaparan; tape pangaterrona oreng jahat elang-alange sopaja ta' ekaolleya. 
Proverbs10:4 Oreng males tanto daddi oreng ta' andhi' oreng se bajeng tanto daddi oreng sogi. 
Proverbs10:5 Oreng se bicaksana makompol hasella anye mon teppa' mosem, tape oreng se tedhung malolo e mosem anye, madhateng malo ka aba'na." 
Proverbs10:6 Oreng becce' bakal narema'a berkat. Tape cacana oreng jahat agandhu' kakejjemman. 
Proverbs10:7 Ngen-angen ka oreng becce' madhateng berkat, tape oreng jahat lekkas ekaloppae oreng." 
Proverbs10:8 Oreng penter lebur narema babala'an; oreng se budhu cacana bakal sala'a jalan. 
Proverbs10:9 Oreng jujur aman odhi'na, tape tokang tepo bakal etemmowa." 
Proverbs10:10 Sapa se ngerrep se bendher, parkara bakal madhatengnga kasossa'an, tape oreng se nyale rang-terrangan padha ban se aehteyar madhatengnga kasejahtera'an." 
Proverbs10:11 Pacacana oreng se becce' masenneng odhi'na oreng, tape cacana oreng jahat notobi ate se kejjem." 
Proverbs10:12 Kabaji'an madhateng tokar; kataresna'an nyapora sakabbinna kasala'an. 
Proverbs10:13 Oreng se tajem pekkeranna notorragi ca'-oca' se bicaksana; oreng se budhu parlo narema okoman. 
Proverbs10:14 Oreng se bicaksana makompol pangataowan; mon oreng budhu acaca manceng kacalaka'an. 
Proverbs10:15 Kasogiyan ngaobi oreng sogi, kamalaradan maancor oreng se ta' andhi'." 
Proverbs10:16 Mon alako becce' opana odhi' senneng taremtem, mon alako dusa, se ekaolle dusa se abannya'an." 
Proverbs10:17 Sapa se endha' epaenga' bakal taremtemma odhi'na, sapa se ta' endha' ngakone kasala'anna badha e dhalem babaja." 
Proverbs10:18 Oreng se notobi kabaji'anna atena jareya tokang tepo. Oreng se abirbir petenna jareya oreng budhu. 
Proverbs10:19 Sajan bannya' acaca, sajan semma' ka dusa; oreng se bisa neggu'i jilana jareya oreng bicaksana." 
Proverbs10:20 Cacana oreng becce' akantha salaka se asli; pekkeranna oreng se jahat tadha' artena. 
Proverbs10:21 Cacana oreng becce' daddi berkat ka oreng bannya', kabudhuwanna oreng se budhu mate'e aba'na dibi'." 
Proverbs10:22 Oreng bisa sogi coma lantaran berkadda PANGERAN; alako berra' ta' bisa nambai kasogiyan. 
Proverbs10:23 Oreng budhu lebur agabay sala; oreng bicaksana lebur nyare hekmat. 
Proverbs10:24 Oreng se berse atena narema sabarang se daddi pangaterrona; oreng jahat narema se paleng ekatako'e atena. 
Proverbs10:25 Mon dhateng kaleng busbus, oreng jahat mosna, tape oreng jujur teptep teggu salanjangnga." 
Proverbs10:26 Ja' nyoro oreng males, oreng males mapeggel ate; akantha cokka se manyelo gigi otaba okos se mapeddi mata." 
Proverbs10:27 Hormadi ALLAH, tanto ba'na abit odhi'na; oreng jahat mate sabellunna baktona." 
Proverbs10:28 Pangarebbanna oreng becce' masenneng atena; pangarebbanna oreng jahat kosong tadha' pa-apana. 
Proverbs10:29 PANGERAN ngaobi oreng se jujur, tape matompes oreng se alako jahat." 
Proverbs10:30 Oreng se berse atena odhi'na taremtem ban aman, oreng se jahat ta' kera ngennengnge tana sangkolan." 
Proverbs10:31 Oreng se berse atena notorragi ca'-oca' se bicaksana; oreng jahat bakal edunggemma colo'na. 
Proverbs10:32 Ca'-oca'na oreng se berse atena masenneng ate, cacana oreng jahat nyake'e ate." 
Proverbs11:1 PANGERAN baji' ka oreng se ngangguy tembangan se ta' cocok, tape lebur ka oreng se ngangguy tembangan se teppa'." 
Proverbs11:2 Oreng se sombong bakal eya'-seya'a; oreng se andhap asor reya bicaksana. 
Proverbs11:3 Oreng becce' etonton bi' kajujuran; oreng se lecegan epaancor bi' kaleceganna. 
Proverbs11:4 Mon ngadhebbi maot arta tadha' artena; odhi'na ba'na tanto salamet mon ba'na berse atena. 
Proverbs11:5 Kajujuran magampang jalanna odhi'na oreng becce', tape oreng jahat maancor odhi'na dibi'." 
Proverbs11:6 Oreng jujur salamet lantaran kabagusanna atena; oreng se ta' ekenneng parcaja tabalusok lantaran kadhakka'anna. 
Proverbs11:7 Mon oreng jahat mate, pangarebbanna noro' mate keya, pangarep se esandharragi ka kakowadan dibi' tadha' gunana." 
Proverbs11:8 Oreng alem epalopot dhari kasossa'an; oreng jahat se agante narema kasossa'anna. 
Proverbs11:9 Cacana oreng jahat mamateyan oreng; hekmadda oreng becce' masalamet oreng laen. 
Proverbs11:10 Kottha perak mon oreng jujur nemmo rajekke; ra'yat rak-soragan mon oreng jahat mate. 
Proverbs11:11 Berkadda oreng jujur malebur kottha; cacana oreng jahat marosak kottha. 
Proverbs11:12 Ya-nyeya oreng laen reya lalakon budhu; oreng se alos buddina neng-enneng ta' acaca'an. 
Proverbs11:13 Oreng se dujan arasanan ta' bisa neggu' roseya, tape oreng se ekenneng parcaja bisa neggu' roseya." 
Proverbs11:14 Bangsa bakal ancora mon tadha' pamimpinna; sajan bannya' panasehat sajan aman kasalameddanna. 
Proverbs11:15 Ajanji majarana otangnga oreng laen alamat calaka'a; lebbi becce' ja' ro'-noro' parkara jareya mon terro salamedda. 
Proverbs11:16 Babine' se bagus buddina ehormadi oreng; oreng se kejjem marogi aba'na dibi. 
Proverbs11:17 Oreng se bagus atena maontong aba'na dibi'; oreng se kejjem marogi aba'na. 
Proverbs11:18 Kaontonganna oreng jahat banne kaontongan se sabendherra, kaontonganna oreng se alako becce' ganjaran raja." 
Proverbs11:19 Sapa se ta' ambu alako becce' bakal sennengngan odhi'na; sapa se maksa alako jahat bakal mateya. 
Proverbs11:20 PANGERAN baji' ka oreng se jahat atena, tape taresna ka oreng se odhi'na tadha' calena." 
Proverbs11:21 Oreng jahat masthe olle okoman, oreng becce' bakal salamedda." 
Proverbs11:22 Karaddinanna oreng babine' se juba' tengkana akantha sello' emmas e elongnga babi. 
Proverbs11:23 Pangaterrona oreng becce' madhateng kabecce'an, pangarebba oreng jahat mapeggel oreng bannya'." 
Proverbs11:24 Badha oreng se dujan ari'-berri', tape atamba sogi, badha se dujan ra'-nyerra' tape atamba ta' andhi'." 
Proverbs11:25 Oreng se bannya' ari'-berri' bakal narema'a sabannya'na, oreng se lebur atatolong tanto etolong oreng keya." 
Proverbs11:26 Sapa se nombuk gandum bakal ebastowa oreng, tape se ajuwal gandum bakal ealemma oreng." 
Proverbs11:27 Sapa se bajeng alako becce' ekaleburi oreng; sapa se nyare kajahadan bakal nemmowa kasossa'an. 
Proverbs11:28 Sapa se ngandellagi arta bakal ngalotora akantha dhaun se towa, oreng se alem bakal tombuwa akantha selbi' se ngodha." 
Proverbs11:29 Sapa se madhateng kasossa'an ka saessena bengkona bakal ta' andhi'a pa-apa. Oreng budhu bakal aladinana oreng se bicaksana. 
Proverbs11:30 Oreng se alem bakal salamedda odhi'na; oreng se bicaksana sajan bannya' etoro' oreng. 
Proverbs11:31 Mon e dunnya reya oreng becce' narema'a ganjaran, la terrang oreng jahat ban se dusa bakal narema'a okoman." 
Proverbs12:1 Oreng se lebur ka pangataowan senneng narema parengeddan; tape oreng se ta' endha' epaenga' jareya oreng budhu. 
Proverbs12:2 Oreng becce' ekaleburi PANGERAN, tape oreng se andhi' sajja jahat bakal narema'a okoman." 
Proverbs12:3 Tadha' oreng se paggun jaja polana kajahadan; tape oreng se jujur teptep koko, ta' ekenneng gundhek." 
Proverbs12:4 Bine se becce' magumbira ban masenneng atena lakena; bine se matodhusan lakena marabut panyaket se mabucco' tolangnga. 
Proverbs12:5 Oreng jujur mekkere sabarang se becce'; oreng jahat mekker carana se nepowa oreng. 
Proverbs12:6 Cacana oreng jahat mamateyan oreng; cacana oreng jujur madhateng kasalameddan. 
Proverbs12:7 Oreng jahat bakal gaggara ban mate tadha' lampadda, tape oreng becce' bakal pagguna koko ron-temoron." 
Proverbs12:8 Oreng ealem satembang ban kabicaksana'anna; oreng eya-seya satembang ban kagendhengnganna. 
Proverbs12:9 Lebbi becce' daddi oreng kene' se andhi' lalakon, etembang gi-masogi tape sanyatana kakorangan kakan." 
Proverbs12:10 Oreng becce' mekkere ebinna; tape oreng jahat nyeksa ebinna. 
Proverbs12:11 Oreng tane se alako berra' bannya' kakananna, tape se wang-mowang baktona kaangguy barang se ta' aguna jareya oreng budhu nyamana." 
Proverbs12:12 Oreng jahat terro olleya kaontongan dhari oreng daraka; oreng becce' akantha bungka se abuwa. 
Proverbs12:13 Oreng jahat tajira' bi' cacana se juba', oreng becce' lopot dhari kasossa'an." 
Proverbs12:14 Saneyap oreng narema ganjaran menorot caca ban lalakonna; kabbi padha eberri' opa bang-sebang se sabandhing. 
Proverbs12:15 Oreng gendheng apangrasa aba'na ta' tao sala, tape oreng bicaksana lebur ngedhingngagi babala'an." 
Proverbs12:16 Mon oreng budhu epapeggel oreng, laju ekoca'agi bakto jareya keya; tape oreng bicaksana ta' parduli maske ecale baramma'a." 
Proverbs12:17 Oreng se acaca bendher madekdek kaadilan, oreng se acaca lecek madhateng barang se ta' adil." 
Proverbs12:18 Caca se ban-saromban bisa maloka ate akantha se ejujju ban peddhang, caca se bicaksana akantha obat se mabaras." 
Proverbs12:19 Barang se lecek tanto tabungkar e dhalem saparngedep, tape caca se teppa' bakal teptebba salanjangnga." 
Proverbs12:20 Oreng se andhi' sajja jahat lebur ka barang se ta' adil, oreng se nyare kabecce'an bakal sennengnga." 
Proverbs12:21 Oreng becce' ta' kera ekenneng mosiba; oreng jahat tanto ros-terrosan sossa. 
Proverbs12:22 PANGERAN baji' ka oreng se lecegan; tape lebur ka oreng se jujur. 
Proverbs12:23 Oreng se bicaksana ta' ngedirragi pangataowanna, oreng budhu ngobral kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs12:24 Oreng se alako berra' neggu' kakobasa'an; oreng se males tapaksa daddi dunor. 
Proverbs12:25 Kakobateran e dhalem ate mapotong samangat, tape caca se manes maraja ate." 
Proverbs12:26 Oreng se bendher apojuran dhari tatanggana, oreng jahat posang polana kajahadanna." 
Proverbs12:27 Oreng males ta' kera ngaolle pangaterrona; mon alako berra' tanto olle arta. 
Proverbs12:28 Oreng se noro' jalan se bendher tanto senneng odhi'na; oreng se noro' jalan se sala nojju ka maot. 
Proverbs13:1 Ana' se penter agateyagi babala'anna eppa'na; oreng sombong ta' endha' narema parengeddan. 
Proverbs13:2 Cacana oreng becce' madhateng kaontongan; oreng se ta' jujur lebur ka kakerrasan. 
Proverbs13:3 Oreng se te-ngate acaca tanto aman odhi'na; oreng se acaca ban-saromban tanto calaka'. 
Proverbs13:4 Oreng males bannya' pangaterrona tape tadha' se ekaolleya; oreng se alako berra' katekkan sakabbinna pangaterrona. 
Proverbs13:5 Oreng jujur baji' ka dusa, tengka gulina oreng jahat matodhusan ban ecale oreng." 
Proverbs13:6 Kajujuran ngaobi oreng se loros odhi'na; kajahadan maancor oreng se dusa. 
Proverbs13:7 Badha se gi-masogi, tape sanyatana ta' andhi' pa-apa, badha se ken-mamesken tape sanyatana ce' sogina." 
Proverbs13:8 Oreng sogi kodu makalowar pessena sopaja aman odhi'na; oreng mesken tadha' oreng se ngara. 
Proverbs13:9 Oreng alem akantha sonar se tar-kataran; oreng jahat akantha damar se mate. 
Proverbs13:10 Kaangkowan pera' madhateng tokar; oreng se bicaksana endha' narema pangajaran. 
Proverbs13:11 Kasogiyan se gampang ekaolle gampang keya elangnga; tape arta se epakompol gan sakone' sajan abit sajan bannya'. 
Proverbs13:12 Mon pangaterro ta' katekkan ate sompek ta' karowan; mon pangaterro katorodan, ate gumbira." 
Proverbs13:13 Oreng se ngenthengngagi pangajaranna Pangeran, macalaka' aba'na dibi'; oreng se atoro' ka dhabuna Allah bakal narema'a ganjaranna." 
Proverbs13:14 Pangajaranna oreng se bicaksana reya somberra kasennengngan, e dhalem babaja, pangajaran jareya panyalamedda ba'na." 
Proverbs13:15 Oreng se bagus buddina bakal ealemma; oreng se ta' ekenneng parcaja bakal malarada odhi'na. 
Proverbs13:16 Oreng bicaksana apekker gallu sabellunna alako apa'a bai, oreng budhu ngobral kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs13:17 Otosan se ta' bendher madhateng calaka'; otosan se ekenneng parcaja tanto ahasel. 
Proverbs13:18 Oreng se ta' endha' edhidhi' daddi mesken ban nespa; oreng se ngedhingngagi babala'an bakal ehormada oreng. 
Proverbs13:19 Ce' nyamanna mon ngaolle pa-apa se ekaterro! Oreng budhu ta' endha' adina'agi kajahadan. 
Proverbs13:20 Oreng se akanca'an ban oreng bicaksana, bakal daddiya bicaksana; oreng se akanca'an ban oreng budhu, bakal calaka'a." 
Proverbs13:21 Oreng dusa ros-terrosan eserser kasossa'an, oreng becce' ros-terrosan olle kasennengngan." 
Proverbs13:22 Oreng becce' nyangkollagi kasogiyan ka na' potona; artana oreng dusa esempen kaangguy oreng se loros odhi'na. 
Proverbs13:23 Tana kosong bisa ngasellagi kakanan sabannya'na kaangguy oreng mesken; tape lalakon se ta' adil andaddiyagi tana jareya ta' elakone. 
Proverbs13:24 Ta' mokol ana' artena ta' neser ka kana' jareya; mon neser kodu bangal mokol kana' jareya. 
Proverbs13:25 Oreng becce' cokop saterrossa, tape oreng jahat kakorangan salanjangnga." 
Proverbs14:1 Roma tangga epaddek bi' kabicaksana'anna babine', tape epagujur bi' kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs14:2 Oreng se jujur tako' ban hormat ka Guste ALLAH, oreng se odhi'na ta' loros ya-nyeya Salerana," 
Proverbs14:3 Dhari angga'na, oreng budhu matenggi aba', oreng bicaksana bakal eaobana bi' cacana dibi'." 
Proverbs14:4 Mon tadha' sape teggal ta' kera badha hasella; kalaban kakowadanna sape, hasella tana ce' bannya'na." 
Proverbs14:5 Sakse se jujur acaca sabendherra, sakse se ta' ekenneng parcaja ros-terrosan lecegan." 
Proverbs14:6 Oreng sombong ta' kera daddi bicaksana, oreng penter mon ajar gampang." 
Proverbs14:7 Ja' akanca'an oreng budhu; tadha' se bisa eajarragi oreng jareya ka ba'na. 
Proverbs14:8 Oreng bicaksana tao apa se kodu elakone, oreng budhu ekenneng co-koco kabudhuwanna dibi'." 
Proverbs14:9 Oreng budhu ta' parduli dusana esapora otaba ta' esapora; oreng becce' terro esapora'a dusana. 
Proverbs14:10 Senneng otaba sossa esempen e dhalem dhadha; oreng laen ta' kera noro' ngarassa'agi. 
Proverbs14:11 Bengkona oreng becce' paggun koko; bengkona oreng jahat bakal gujura. 
Proverbs14:12 Badha jalan se katonna loros, tape nyatana jareya jalan ka maot." 
Proverbs14:13 Samarena agella'an olle daddi oreng pas nanges; samarena perak olle daddi pas dhateng kasossa'an. 
Proverbs14:14 Oreng juba' bakal molonga hasella kajuba'anna, oreng becce' bakal metthega buwana kabecce'anna." 
Proverbs14:15 Oreng budhu parcaja ka caca apa'a bai, oreng bicaksana te-ngate tengka gulina." 
Proverbs14:16 Oreng se bagus buddina te-ngate ban ajauwi kajahadan, oreng budhu norodi napsona pas arassa aman." 
Proverbs14:17 Oreng se lekkas peggel reya budhu nyamana; oreng bicaksana sabbar salanjangnga. 
Proverbs14:18 Oreng se ta' andhi' pangalaman tanto daddi budhu; oreng bicaksana tanto atamba pangataowanna. 
Proverbs14:19 Oreng juba' noro' parentana oreng se loros atena, polana terro ekaneserrana." 
Proverbs14:20 Oreng mesken ta' ekaleburi oreng maske bi' ca-kancana sakale; tape oreng sogi bannya' kancana. 
Proverbs14:21 Sapa ya-nyeya oreng laen jareya dusa; sapa se becce' ka oreng mesken tanto senneng odhi'na. 
Proverbs14:22 Sapa se ngehteyarragi barang se becce' tanto eparcaja ban ehormadi oreng; sapa se andhi' sajja jahat badha e jalan se sala. 
Proverbs14:23 E dhalem saneyap ehteyar badha kaontonganna; oreng se asebbal malolo ngoba oreng daddi mesken. 
Proverbs14:24 Oreng bicaksana ealem polana kabicaksana'anna; oreng budhu kalonta polana kabudhuwanna. 
Proverbs14:25 Mon sakse acaca sabendherra, tanto masalamet nyabana oreng; mon sakse lecek, macalaka' sasamana." 
Proverbs14:26 Oreng se tako'ban ta'at ka PANGERAN taremtem atena, kalowargana bakal salmedda odhi'na." 
Proverbs14:27 Tako'ban ta'at ka PANGERAN reya somberra kasennengngan, ban jalan kaangguy ajauwi pate." 
Proverbs14:28 Kajaja'anna rato targantong ka bannya'na ra'yadda; mon tadha' ra'yadda ta' bisa kobasa. 
Proverbs14:29 Oreng bicaksana ta' gampang peggel; oreng budhu peggella ta' ekenneng ampet. 
Proverbs14:30 Se taremtem atena baras badanna; ere ate padha ban panyaket se madhateng pate. 
Proverbs14:31 Se alako becce' ka oreng mesken ahormadi Allahna; se nendhes oreng kene' ya-nyeya Panceptana. 
Proverbs14:32 Oreng jahat mate polana kajahadanna, oreng becce' salamet polana kaberseyanna atena." 
Proverbs14:33 Hekmat terros badha e dhalem pekkeranna oreng se bagus buddina; tape ta' tombu e dhalem oreng se budhu pekkerra. 
Proverbs14:34 Kaadilan ban kabecce'an matenggi martabadda bangsa, tape dusa majuba' nyamana bangsa jareya." 
Proverbs14:35 Rato lebur ka ponggaba se cakep, tape peggel ka ponggaba se ta' bisa ajalannagi kawajibanna." 
Proverbs15:1 Mon nyaot epalaba, ate peggel daddi sabbar; jawaban se peddhes mapeggel ate." 
Proverbs15:2 Cacana oreng bicaksana andaddiyagi pangataowan masen-neng ate; cacana oreng budhu coma aesse kabudhuwan. 
Proverbs15:3 PANGERAN ngoladi sabarang se kadaddiyan e dhimma'a bai; Salerana ngoladi ka sabarang se becce' ban se juba'. 
Proverbs15:4 Ca'-oca' se bagus nambai samangat, ca'-oca' se nyake'e ate mamateyan karep." 
Proverbs15:5 Oreng budhu ta' parduli babala'anna eppa'na, oreng bicaksana agateyagi parengeddan." 
Proverbs15:6 E bengkona oreng becce' bannya' artana; artana oreng jahat mosna lantaran karekongan. 
Proverbs15:7 Ca'-oca'an oreng bicaksana aesse pangataowan, tape pekkeranna oreng budhu ta' kantha jareya." 
Proverbs15:8 PANGERAN narema du'ana oreng se becce', tape baji' ka tor-atorra oreng se juba' ate." 
Proverbs15:9 PANGERAN baji' ka cara odhi'na oreng daraka, tape taresna ka oreng se aehteyar ajalannagi kasokanna." 
Proverbs15:10 Oreng se alako juba' bakal eseksa'a; oreng se ta' endha' epateppa' bakal mateya. 
Proverbs15:11 PANGERAN ngagali ka dunnyana oreng mate ban ke'-lekke'na; baramma se bisa'a pekkeranna manossa eerrep dhari Salerana? 
Proverbs15:12 Oreng se dujan ya-nyeya ta' endha' mon epaenga'; ta' endha' menta babala'an dhari oreng se bicaksana. 
Proverbs15:13 Se senneng atena binar mowana; ate sossa maorem sonarra mata. 
Proverbs15:14 Oreng bicaksana nyare pangataowan; oreng budhu repot ban kabudhuwanna. 
Proverbs15:15 Oreng se orem kodu aperrang terros e dhalem odhi'na, tape oreng se gumbira senneng terros atena." 
Proverbs15:16 Lebbi becce' sakone' artana tape tako' ka PANGERAN, katembang bannya' dhi-andhi'na tape tako' ros-terrosan." 
Proverbs15:17 Lebbi becce' ngakan ngan-gangan etoro'e ate taresna, katembang ngakan daging se nyaman etoro'e kabaji'an." 
Proverbs15:18 Oreng se lekkas peggel madhateng tokar, oreng se sabbar madhateng karokonan." 
Proverbs15:19 Oreng males tanto terros nemmo karekongan; oreng jujur ta' nemmo kasossa'an. 
Proverbs15:20 Ana' se bicaksana masenneng atena eppa'na; ana' se budhu ta' ngargai ebuna. 
Proverbs15:21 Kabudhuwan reya se masenneng atena oreng gendheng, oreng bicaksana odhi'na loros." 
Proverbs15:22 Apa se ekasajja ta' ahasel mon ta' etoro'e partembangan; se ekasajja ahasel mon bannya' se aberri' babala'an. 
Proverbs15:23 Caca se ekoca'agi teppa' baktona masenneng pekkeran. 
Proverbs15:24 Oreng bicaksana lebat e ga'-ongga'an se nojju ka kaodhi'an, banne ron-toronan se nojju ka pate." 
Proverbs15:25 PANGERAN bakal magujura bengkona oreng se angga', tape ngaobana tanana randha." 
Proverbs15:26 PANGERAN baji' ka sajja se juba', tape ca'-oca' se bagus masenneng panggaliyanna." 
Proverbs15:27 Sapa se nyare kaontongan se ta' halal, maancor kaliwargana dibi'. Sapa se ta' endha' ka pesse go'-sogo' bakal sennengnga odhi'na." 
Proverbs15:28 Oreng becce' mon ca'-ngoca'a epekker sabellunna; oreng jahat dujan ngoca'agi parkara se juba'. 
Proverbs15:29 Du'ana oreng becce' bi' PANGERAN epeyarsa'agi, tape oreng daraka ta' eparduli." 
Proverbs15:30 Mowa se binar masenneng ate, kabar becce' masegger tolang." 
Proverbs15:31 Oreng se endha' epaenga' nyamana oreng bicaksana. 
Proverbs15:32 Oreng se ta' endha' narema babala'an, ta' ngargai aba'na dibi'; oreng se endha' narema babala'an daddi oreng se tenggi buddina." 
Proverbs15:33 Tako' ka PANGERAN reya dhasarra pangajaran se teppa'; oreng kodu andhap asor sabellunna olle kahormadan. 
Proverbs16:1 Manossa olle andhi' sajja ban neyat, tape Allah se apareng kapotosan." 
Proverbs16:2 Saneyap lalakonna oreng olle daddi bagus e dhalem panganggebba dibi', tape PANGERAN se nantowagi juba' becce'na maksod e dhalem atena." 
Proverbs16:3 Passra'agi ka PANGERAN apa se daddi sajjana ba'na, tanto ba'na ahasel e dhalem ajalannagi maksod jareya." 
Proverbs16:4 Sabarang se ebadhi PANGERAN badha tojjuwanna; tojjuwanna oreng jahat maancor odhi'na 
Proverbs16:5 Oreng sombong kabbi ekabaji'i PANGERAN; ban ta' kera epalopot dhari okoman. 
Proverbs16:6 Oreng se esto ka Allah bakal esapora'a; oreng se tako' ban abakte ka PANGERAN bakal lopoda dhari kajahadan. 
Proverbs16:7 Mon ba'na masenneng panggaliyanna PANGERAN, so-mosona ba'na tanto epaoba daddi kanca." 
Proverbs16:8 Lebbi becce' pangaselan sakone' se ekaolle dhari jalan jujur, katembang pangaselan raja ollena jalan ta' adil." 
Proverbs16:9 Manossa olle andhi' sajja, tape Allah se nantowagi jalanna odhi'na." 
Proverbs16:10 Rato narema kobasa dhari Allah, daddi potosanna ta' sala." 
Proverbs16:11 Kasokanna PANGERAN oreng kodu jujur mon adagang, bariya keya mon ngokor sarta nembang." 
Proverbs16:12 Monggu ka pangobasa, mon alako jahat reya kejjem, sabab pamarenta'anna koko lantaran kaadilan." 
Proverbs16:13 Mon narema katerrangan se bendher pangobasa senneng atena, taresna ka oreng se jujur cacana." 
Proverbs16:14 Dadukanna rato padha ban kabar okoman mate; oreng bicaksana tanto aehteyar masabbara rato jareya. 
Proverbs16:15 Kabecce'anna rato madhateng odhi' se rajja, akantha ondhem se e mosem nemor madhateng ojan." 
Proverbs16:16 Olle hekmat abecce'an parana katembang olle emmas; olle pangataowan aajiyan dhari se olle salaka. 
Proverbs16:17 Oreng becce' ajauwi se jahat; oreng se ajaga cara odhi'na bakal salamedda. 
Proverbs16:18 Oreng sombong bakal ancora, oreng angko bakal ngalotora." 
Proverbs16:19 Lebbi becce' andhap asor ban ta' andhi' pa-apa, etembang noro' oreng sombong ban noro' melo barang rampasanna." 
Proverbs16:20 Tetene apa se eajarragi ka ba'na, tanto ba'na olle sabarang se becce'. Paparcaja ka PANGERAN, tanto ba'na senneng odhi'na." 
Proverbs16:21 Oreng bicaksana etemmo dhari pekkeranna se tajem; cacana lebur, daddi ca'-oca'na sajan mayakin oreng laenna." 
Proverbs16:22 Kabicaksana'an reya somberra kasennengnganna odhi'na oreng se tenggi buddina; oreng budhu eseksa bi' kabudhuwanna dibi'. 
Proverbs16:23 Oreng se bagus buddina cacana bicaksana, ban babala'anna sajan mayakin atena oreng laenna." 
Proverbs16:24 Caca se manes akantha maddu; manes rassana ban masegger badan. 
Proverbs16:25 Badha jalan se katonna loros, tape aherra nojju ka maot." 
Proverbs16:26 Oreng se terro ngakana tanto pas aehteyar; oreng tapaksa alako polana tabu'na. 
Proverbs16:27 Oreng jahat aehteyar macalaka'a sasamana; cacana jahat akantha mardha. 
Proverbs16:28 Oreng se ta' jujur daddi lantaranna tokar; tokang petenna mapegga' oreng se sakanca'an. 
Proverbs16:29 Oreng kejjem nepo ca-kancana, ngeba ca-kancana ka dhalem babaja." 
Proverbs16:30 Te-ngate ngadhebbi oreng se mesem ban amaen mata, oreng jareya andhi' sajja jahat e dhalem atena." 
Proverbs16:31 Oreng jujur bakal eparengngana lanjang omor; obanna marabut jamang se agalirap e cethagga rato. 
Proverbs16:32 Ta' lekkas peggel abecce'an dhari andhi' kakobasa'an; ngobasane ate lebbi becce' dhari ngobasane kottha. 
Proverbs16:33 Oreng ngocco' ellot polana terro taowa papasthenna aba'na, tape pera' PANGERAN se nantowagi jawabanna." 
Proverbs17:1 Lebbi becce' nase' saompa'an e dhalem kataremtemman, etembang kakanan nyaman ta' sakera-kera tape atokaran." 
Proverbs17:2 Kabula se penter bakal ngobasa'ana ana' se matodhusan, ban bakal narema'a sangkolan abareng ban tan-taretanna kana' jareya." 
Proverbs17:3 Emmas ban salaka eoji e apoy se panas, tape atena manossa eoji bi' PANGERAN." 
Proverbs17:4 Oreng jahat atoro' ka babala'an se juba', oreng se lecegan lebur ngedhingngagi petenna." 
Proverbs17:5 Sapa se ya-nyeya oreng mesken se nespa, padha ban se ya-nyeya Allah Panceptana. Sapa se perak polana oreng laen palang, tanto narema okoman." 
Proverbs17:6 Se magumbira oreng se la towa reya na' potona, se magumbira ana' iya areya oreng towana." 
Proverbs17:7 Oreng se molja ta' patot acaca lecek; oreng budhu ta' pantes makalowar ca'-oca' se aji. 
Proverbs17:8 Badha se nyangka pesse go'-sogo' bisa madhateng kaajiban; kalaban pesse go'-sogo' apa'a bai bisa kalakon. 
Proverbs17:9 Mon terro ekaleburana oreng, ba'na kodu nyapora kasala'anna. Nga'-ngenga'e kasala'an marosagan se akanca'an." 
Proverbs17:10 Settong parengeddan lebbi raja artena monggu ka oreng penter etembang saratos peccodan ka oreng se budhu. 
Proverbs17:11 Oreng jahat mabaridhuwan malolo, tape maot dhateng ka oreng jareya akantha otosan se kejjem." 
Proverbs17:12 Lebbi becce' tatemmo ban korbina baruwang se kaelangan budhu'na, etembang ban oreng budhu se repot ban kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs17:13 Sapa se males kabecce'an ban kajahadan, kajahadan ta' kera kalowar dhari bengkona." 
Proverbs17:14 Amolae tokar padha ban abeddhul tanggulla aeng; daddi duli nyorot sabellunna tokar molae. 
Proverbs17:15 PANGERAN baji' ka oreng se abendherragi oreng daraka, ban se nyala'agi oreng se ta' sala." 
Proverbs17:16 Parcoma oreng budhu matadha' pesse kaangguy nyare hekmat, sabab aba'na ta' andhi' pekkeran sehat." 
Proverbs17:17 Kanca kodu esto ka kancana, tape taretan noro' nanggung kasossa'an." 
Proverbs17:18 Oreng se ajanji nanggunga otangnga sasamana jareya oreng budhu nyamana. 
Proverbs17:19 Oreng se lebur ka dusa, dujan atokar, oreng se raja caca, nyare kaancoran." 
Proverbs17:20 Tokang tepo ta' kera senneng odhi'na, oreng se acangka jilana tanto calaka'." 
Proverbs17:21 Andhi' ana' se gendheng artena nemmo kasossa'an, daddi eppa'na oreng budhu ta' masenneng ate." 
Proverbs17:22 Ate se gumbira masehat badan; ate se sossa mapotongan samangat. 
Proverbs17:23 Hakim se ta' jujur tek-ngetek narema go'-sogo', ban ta' ajalannagi kaadilan." 
Proverbs17:24 Tojjuwanna oreng se penter nyareya hekmat, tape tojjuwanna oreng budhu ta' etemmo karowanna." 
Proverbs17:25 Ana' se budhu masossa eppa'na, ban masossa atena ebuna." 
Proverbs17:26 Ta' patot adhindha oreng se ta' sala; ta' pantes nendhes oreng se bagus buddina. 
Proverbs17:27 Oreng se tajem pekkerra ta' bannya' cacana. Oreng se bicaksana terros ayem gulina. 
Proverbs17:28 Oreng budhu sakale tanto esangka penter ban bicaksana mon oreng jareya neng-enneng ta' bannya' caca. 
Proverbs18:1 Sapa se ta' endha' apolong ban oreng laenna artena pera' mekkere aba'na dibi' malolo; sabban panemmona oreng laen elaban terros. 
Proverbs18:2 Oreng budhu ta' endha' eberri' pangarteyan; se ekaterro pera' ngedirragiya essena atena. 
Proverbs18:3 Oreng dusa nespa odhi'na; mon la juba' nyamana, tanto eya-seya." 
Proverbs18:4 Cacana oreng bisa daddi somberra kabicaksana'an, dhalem akantha tase' raja, kobassa akantha aeng se agili." 
Proverbs18:5 Ta' bagus noro' ka oreng se daraka ban nendhes oreng se ta' sala. 
Proverbs18:6 Mon oreng budhu acaca matokaran, ban menta eokom menangka pangajaran." 
Proverbs18:7 Cacana oreng budhu maancor aba'na; aba'na tajira' bi' cacana dibi'. 
Proverbs18:8 Petenna reya nyaman rassana, mon ekalodhu' ekarassa kobassa." 
Proverbs18:9 Oreng se ngenthengngagi kawajibanna padha juba'na ban oreng se dujan marosak. 
Proverbs18:10 PANGERAN reya akantha manara se koko; ka jadhiya reng-oreng se jujur entar ban nemmo kennengngan se aman. 
Proverbs18:11 Tape oreng sogi nyangka artana panyalamedda aba'na akantha geddhung tenggi ban koko e sakalenglengnga kottha. 
Proverbs18:12 Oreng se angko bakal ngalotora, oreng se andhap asor bakal ehormadana." 
Proverbs18:13 Nyaot sabellunna ngedhingngagi reya tamaso' lalakon se budhu ban ta' teppa'. 
Proverbs18:14 Oreng se terro odhi'a kellar nanggung kasossa'an; mon pangaterro jareya tadha', elang keya pangarebban." 
Proverbs18:15 Oreng se tenggi buddina terro nyareya elmo terros; oreng bicaksana terro olleya pangajaran malolo. 
Proverbs18:16 Tor-ator reya pamokka'na jalan mon nyabisa ke oreng raja. 
Proverbs18:17 Oreng se acaca dha'-adha' e pangadilan katonna bendher cacana, tape cacana etemmo bendher salana mon la dhateng mosona." 
Proverbs18:18 Ngangguy ellot tokar bisa epamare, la'-mala' partantangan e antara oreng se kobasa sakale bisa eahere." 
Proverbs18:19 Taretan se esake'e atena mon esemma'ana amalaradan dhari kottha se kowat; tokar reya akantha palangnga labang sakethengnga kottha se abinteng. 
Proverbs18:20 Kaangguy ca'-oca' se ekoca'agi, badha ollena se kodu ekarassa." 
Proverbs18:21 Jila andhi' kobasa masalamet otaba marosak odhi'na manossa; oreng kodu nanggung hasella cacana. 
Proverbs18:22 Oreng se nemmo bine, olle kaontongan; bine reya paparengnga PANGERAN." 
Proverbs18:23 Oreng mesken nyo'on kalaban tatakrama; oreng sogi nyaot sambi tak-nyentak. 
Proverbs18:24 Badha kanca se ta' esto, badha keya se alebbidan ban taretan." 
Proverbs19:1 Lebbi becce' daddi oreng mesken se loros odhi'na, etembang oreng budhu se lecegan cacana." 
Proverbs19:2 Bajeng tape ta' andhi' pangataowan reya ta' bagus; oreng se ru-kaburu tanto la-sala. 
Proverbs19:3 Manossa marogi aba'na dibi' ban kabudhuwanna, mon la kantha jareya pas nyala'agi PANGERAN." 
Proverbs19:4 Oreng sogi kancana sajan aba-tamba; oreng mesken kancana ondur sampe' tadha'. 
Proverbs19:5 Oreng se acaca lecek e pangadilan ta' kera lopot dhari okoman. 
Proverbs19:6 Saneyap oreng padha aehteyar ngala' atena oreng penting; sakabbinna oreng terro akanca'a ban oreng se dujan asandhekka. 
Proverbs19:7 Oreng mesken ta' eparduli bi' taretanna, apa pole bi' kancana. Maske baramma'a ehteyarra ta' kera bisa esemma'e reng-oreng jareya." 
Proverbs19:8 Sapa se nyerser pangataowan, neser ka aba'na dibi'; ban sapa se ngenga'e sabarang se la eajari aba'na tanto senneng odhi'na." 
Proverbs19:9 Sapa se acaca lecek e pangadilan, tanto eokom epanapa' ka ajalla." 
Proverbs19:10 Ta' pantes oreng budhu odhi' mewah, ta' pantes keya dunor marenta lorana." 
Proverbs19:11 Oreng bicaksana bisa ngampet peggella; ealem oreng polana ta' marduli kasala'anna oreng ka aba'na. 
Proverbs19:12 Dukana rato padha ban gaungnga macan; kabecce'anna rato akantha ebbun se mabacca men-tamennan. 
Proverbs19:13 Ana' se budhu bisa maancor eppa'na. Bine se dujan ngacepek akantha aeng se nyapcap tadha' ambuna. 
Proverbs19:14 Bengko ban arta bisa ekaolle dhari oreng towa, tape bine se bicaksana paparengnga PANGERAN." 
Proverbs19:15 Males andaddiyagi oreng tedhung tangeddha, dhi-budhina se males daddi kalaparan." 
Proverbs19:16 Oreng se ta'at ka papakonna Allah bakal salamedda, oreng se ta' ngargai papakon jareya bakal mateya." 
Proverbs19:17 Nolong oreng mesken padha ban maenjam ka PANGERAN; dhaggi' PANGERAN keya se malessa. 
Proverbs19:18 Patartep ana'na ba'na pongpong gi' kana', mon enja', artena ba'na ngarep rosagga ana'na." 
Proverbs19:19 Dina oreng se gampang peggel, me' nanggung dibi' hasella babatek jareya. Mon ba'na nolonge oreng jareya, ba'na nambai peggella atena." 
Proverbs19:20 Mon ba'na endha' ajar ban ngedhingngagi babala'an, pagi' ba'na daddi oreng se andhi' hekmat." 
Proverbs19:21 Manossa andhi' sajja sabannya'na, tape se kalakon pera' potosanna PANGERAN." 
Proverbs19:22 Babatek se earep dhari oreng iya areya kaestowan. Bango'an mesken etembang lecegan. 
Proverbs19:23 Hormadi PANGERAN, tanto ba'na senneng odhi'na; ba'na bakal arassa'a ban lopot dhari calaka'." 
Proverbs19:24 Badha oreng se males tadha' bandhinganna, ngompa' kakanan bai arassa sengka." 
Proverbs19:25 Mon oreng sombong eokom, oreng se ta' apangalaman olle pangajaran. Mon oreng se alos buddina epaenga' bakal sajana bicaksana." 
Proverbs19:26 Ana' se nganeyaja otaba nondhung oreng towana, jareya ana' se matodhusan ban juba' nyamana." 
Proverbs19:27 Na', mon ba'na ta' endha' ajar pole, tanto apa se la eajari ba'na pas ekaloppae." 
Proverbs19:28 Sakse se aberri' katerrangan palsu artena ta' marduli ka hokom; macalaka' oreng ekarassa nayaman bi' oreng jahat. 
Proverbs19:29 Oreng budhu se sombong kodu epokol. 
Proverbs20:1 Non-enoman kerras andaddiyagi oreng korang ajar ban baridhu. Oreng se ngenom sampe' mabu' reya budhu. 
Proverbs20:2 Dukana rato akantha gaungnga macan; oreng se maduka salerana padha ban macalaka' aba'na dibi'. 
Proverbs20:3 Pera' oreng budhu se dujan atokar; se patot ealem iya areya ajauwi tokar. 
Proverbs20:4 Oreng tane se males ta' agarap tanana teppa' baktona; dhi-budhina mon mosem anye ta' molong pa-apa. 
Proverbs20:5 Essena atena oreng akantha aeng somor se dhalem; tape bisa etemba bi' oreng se andhi' pangarteyan. 
Proverbs20:6 Bannya' oreng ngako kanca, tape kanca se esto onggu malarat sareyanna." 
Proverbs20:7 Na'-kana' pojur mon andhi' eppa' se jujur ban becce' odhi'na. 
Proverbs20:8 Mon rato alenggi e korse pangadilan, bisa ngoladi sabarang se jahat." 
Proverbs20:9 Ba' badha'a oreng se bisa ngoca', “Tang ate berse, sengko' ta' andhi' dusa?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Tembangan ban okoran se ta' cocok reya ta' ekasokane PANGERAN. 
Proverbs20:11 Dhari lalakonna na'-kana' bisa etemmo apa kana' jareya becce' ban jujur. 
Proverbs20:12 Kopeng angguy ngedhingngagi, mata angguy ngabas, se dhadhuwa' jareya PANGERAN se nyepta'agi." 
Proverbs20:13 Oreng se dujan tedhung bakal meskena, oreng se bajeng alalakon bakal bannya'a kakananna." 
Proverbs20:14 Oreng se melle terros aserro parkara arga se larang, tape samarena melle arassa gumbira lantaran arga se ekaolle jareya." 
Proverbs20:15 Ca'-oca' se agandhu' pangataowan lebbi aji dhari emmas ban barleyan. 
Proverbs20:16 Sapa se endha' nanggung otangnga oreng laen, pantes ekala' dhi'-andhi'na menangka tanggunganna janjina." 
Proverbs20:17 Arta hasella nepo dha'-adha'na nyaman rassana, tape dhi-budhina ekarassa akantha baliker." 
Proverbs20:18 Se ekasajja ahasel lantaran partembangan; daddi ja' aperrang sabellunna sajjana jareya massa'. 
Proverbs20:19 Oreng se dujan arasanan ta' bisa nyempen roseya; ja' apolongan ban oreng se dujan acaca. 
Proverbs20:20 Oreng se abasto oreng towana bakal mosna'a odhi'na akantha damar se mate e baja malem se petteng. 
Proverbs20:21 Arta se ekaolle kalaban gampang nyatana ta' madhateng berkat. 
Proverbs20:22 Ja' males kajahadan ban kajahadan keya; paparcaja ka PANGERAN, Salerana se nolonga." 
Proverbs20:23 Tembangan ban batona se ta' cocok ta' ekasokane bi' PANGERAN. 
Proverbs20:24 PANGERAN la nantowagi jalanna odhi'na manossa e dunnya reya; daddi manossa ta' bisa ngarte jalanna odhi'na dibi'. 
Proverbs20:25 Pekker pateppa' sabellunna ajanjiyagi kurban ka Pangeran, tako' me' ba'na kasta e budhi arena." 
Proverbs20:26 Rato se bicaksana tanto tao sapa oreng se jahat, oreng jareya tanto eokom, ta' kera esapora." 
Proverbs20:27 Sowarana atena manossa reya terrang dhari PANGERAN, se nera'e batenna." 
Proverbs20:28 Mon rato marenta kalaban bellas ase, jujur ban adil saterrossa, tanto salanjangnga teptep kobasa." 
Proverbs20:29 Oreng ngodha ekasambu'i polana kakowadanna, oreng towa eargai polana obanna." 
Proverbs20:30 Kadhang pangalaman pae' maelang kajahadan, ban maberse atena manossa." 
Proverbs21:1 Akantha PANGERAN se ngator aeng songay sopaja agili menorot kasokanna, bariya keya Salerana nonton pekkeranna rato." 
Proverbs21:2 Sakabbinna lalakonna oreng olle daddi eanggep becce' bi' aba'na dibi', tape PANGERAN se nantowagi juba' becce'na maksodda atena." 
Proverbs21:3 Lalakon se bendher ban adil lebbi masenneng PANGERAN etembang sakabbinna tor-ator sarta kurban. 
Proverbs21:4 Oreng jahat reya dusa, sabab ekobasae kaangkowan ban kasombonganna." 
Proverbs21:5 Sajjana oreng se bajeng madhateng hasel sabannya'na; lalakon se ru-kaburu madhateng kakorangan. 
Proverbs21:6 Kasogiyan se ekaolle kalaban jalan ta' jujur lekkas tadha' ban ngeba oreng ka lobangnga kobur. 
Proverbs21:7 Oreng jahat ta' endha' atoro' ka hokom; aba'na eseksa bi' kakejjemmanna dibi'. 
Proverbs21:8 Oreng se sala ayut-liyut jalanna; oreng se becce' terros jujur odhi'na. 
Proverbs21:9 Enneng e padduna loteng lebbi nyaman etembang sabengko ban bine se dujan atokar. 
Proverbs21:10 Oreng jahat terro alakowa juba' ros-terrosan; ka sapa'a bai ta' andhi' bellas e dhalem atena. 
Proverbs21:11 Okoman ka oreng se dujan ya-nyeya daddi pangajaran ka oreng se ta' andhi' pangalaman. Mon oreng se bagus buddina epaenga' kasala'anna, oreng jareya sajan bicaksana." 
Proverbs21:12 Allah Se Mahaadil ngagali apa se kadaddiyan e bengkona oreng daraka. Salerana bakal maancora oreng jareya. 
Proverbs21:13 Sapa se ta' endha' ngedhingngagi serrona oreng se kakorangan ta' kera eedhingngagi oreng mon aba'na kakorangan keya. 
Proverbs21:14 Mon terro maelanga peggella atena oreng, ri'-berri'i, tape ja' la-bala ka pa-sapa." 
Proverbs21:15 Mon kaadilan ejalannagi, oreng becce' senneng atena, tape oreng jahat arassa ngadhebbi babaja odhi'na." 
Proverbs21:16 Oreng se odhi'na ta' atoro' ka cara se becce', tanto bakal napa'a ka dunnyana oreng mate." 
Proverbs21:17 Oreng se lebur neng-sennengngan tanto teptep kakorangan; oreng se dujan yal-royalan ta' kera andhi' pa-apa. 
Proverbs21:18 Mon oreng jahat manyangsara'a oreng laen, kasangsara'an jareya teba ka aba'na dibi'." 
Proverbs21:19 Lebbi becce' enneng e ra-ara, etembang apolong ban bine se ngacepek ban gigir salanjangnga." 
Proverbs21:20 Oreng bicaksana teptep ma'mor ban sogi salanjangnga, tape oreng budhu wang-mowang artana." 
Proverbs21:21 Sapa se aehteyar sopaja kaadilan ban kataresna'an ejalannagi bakal olleya kabajjra'an, kahormadan ban omor lanjang." 
Proverbs21:22 Oreng se penter sanggup arebbu' kottha se ejaga tantara se parjuga; ban maancor teng-binteng se eandellagi kottha jareya. 
Proverbs21:23 Mon terro lopoda dhari kasossa'an, pangastete mon acaca." 
Proverbs21:24 Oreng sombong ban tenggi ate, korang ajar ban dujan nyale." 
Proverbs21:25 Oreng males se ta' endha' alalakon mate'e aba'na kalaban pangaterrona. 
Proverbs21:26 Lakona re-saare tadha' laenna, coma mekkere apa se daddi pangaterrona. Sabaligga, oreng se loros odhi'na bisa aberri' sanya'-bannya'na." 
Proverbs21:27 PANGERAN ta' kasokan ka tor-atorra oreng daraka, bi-lebbi mon tor-ator jareya etoro'e maksod se ta' teppa'." 
Proverbs21:28 Oreng lecegan mon nyakse'e ta' kera eparcaja; tape cacana oreng se tao ke'-lekke'na parkara tanto etarema. 
Proverbs21:29 Oreng jujur yakin ka aba'na dibi'; oreng jahat kandel mowana. 
Proverbs21:30 Tadha' kapenterran otaba kabicaksana'an se bisa nandhinge PANGERAN. 
Proverbs21:31 Maske oreng aperrang genna' ban jaran perrangnga, se nantowagi kamennangan coma PANGERAN." 
Proverbs22:1 Nyama se bagus lebbi aji etembang arta sabannya'na; ekataresnae oreng lebbi becce' etembang eberri' emmas ban salaka. 
Proverbs22:2 Oreng sogi ban oreng mesken padha bai e dhalem settong parkara, iya areya: padha cepta'anna PANGERAN." 
Proverbs22:3 Oreng bicaksana majau mon nangale babaja; oreng budhu ajalan terros sampe' calaka'. 
Proverbs22:4 Oreng se ta'at ka PANGERAN ban andhap asor tengkana bakal sennengnga, ma'mor ban ehormadi odhi'na." 
Proverbs22:5 Jira' ban jebbak badha e jalanna oreng juba'; jauwi jareya mon ba'na terro salamedda. 
Proverbs22:6 Ajari na'-kana' carana odhi' se teppa', sampe' towana kana' jareya tanto odhi' kantha jareya." 
Proverbs22:7 Oreng sogi ngobasane oreng mesken; oreng se ngenjam ngobasane se maenjame. 
Proverbs22:8 Oreng se nabur barang se ta' jujur bakal calaka'a; dhi-budhina kobasana kaangguy ngala' karebba dibi' bakal mosna'a. 
Proverbs22:9 Oreng se bagus atena eberkadi Pangeran, polana gi-magi rajekkena ka oreng se kakorangan." 
Proverbs22:10 Tondhung oreng se dujan ya-nyeya, sopaja tadha' pole oreng atokaran, saleng cale ban amosowan." 
Proverbs22:11 Oreng se berse atena ban manes cacana, bakal daddiya sahabadda rato." 
Proverbs22:12 Kalaban abungkar kaleceganna oreng se ta' jujur, PANGERAN ajaga sopaja pangataowan se bendher teptep aman." 
Proverbs22:13 Oreng se males lebur enneng e bengkona; ca'na oca'na, “E lowar badha macan, sengko' tako' eceppa' mon ajalanan.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Cacana sondel se lemma' manes reya jebbagan, oreng se ebendune PANGERAN tabalusok ka dhalemmanna." 
Proverbs22:15 La sapantessa na'-ana' ngalakone sabarang se budhu, tape tengka jareya ekenneng oba bi' tongket manjalin." 
Proverbs22:16 Sapa se terro sogiya kalaban nendhes oreng mesken ban ngeba tor-ator ka oreng sogi dhi-budhina bakal malarada odhi'na. 
Proverbs22:17 Mara edhingngagi, sengko' ngajarragiya ka ba'na babala'anna oreng penter! Edhingngagi pateppa' tang pangajaran reya." 
Proverbs22:18 Ba'na bakal sennengnga mon tang pangajaran reya bi' ba'na esempen e dhalem atena. Sabab kalaban cara se kantha jareya, bila'a bai bi' ba'na ekaparlo, bisa eangguy." 
Proverbs22:19 Sengko' ngajarragiya ka ba'na sateya polana sengko' terro sopaja ba'na parcaja'a ka PANGERAN. 
Proverbs22:20 Bi' sengko' ba'na la enolessagi babala'an tello polo meggi' – babala'an se agandhu' pangataowan ban petodu se gus-bagus; 
Proverbs22:21 babala'an jareya bakal ngajarragiya ka ba'na parkara apa se bendher ongguwan, sopaja ba'na bisa'a aberri' jawaban se teppa' mon ba'na etanyae oreng." 
Proverbs22:22 Ja' marogi oreng mesken, pera' lantaran oreng mesken jareya ta' andhi' kakowadan; ban mon e pangadilan ja' nyek-ngenyek oreng se ta' bisa apa-rapa." 
Proverbs22:23 Sabab PANGERAN bakal nolongana reng-oreng jareya e dhalem parkarana, ban bakal nyabuda nyabana oreng se nendhes reng-oreng jareya." 
Proverbs22:24 Ja' apolongan ban oreng se lekkas peggel ban se ceppet panas atena. 
Proverbs22:25 Dhaggi' ba'na pas nerowe, pas ta' bisa pole maelang kabiyasa'an jareya." 
Proverbs22:26 Ja' ajanji nanggunga otangnga oreng laen. 
Proverbs22:27 Dhaggi' mon ba'na ta' sanggup alonase, katedhunganna ba'na tanoro' erampas keya." 
Proverbs22:28 Ja' sampe' ba'na ngerset batessa tana se la eteptebbagi bi' bangatowana ba'na. 
Proverbs22:29 Ba' taowa ba'na nangale'e oreng se penter ngalakone panggabayanna? Oreng jareya bakal epalakowa e karatonna to-rato, banne e bengko biyasa." 
Proverbs23:1 Mon ba'na toju' ngakan ban pangraja, kaenga'e sapa oreng jareya." 
Proverbs23:2 Mon napsona ba'na se ngakana talebat rajana, ampet pangaterro jareya." 
Proverbs23:3 Ja' padhakka ka kakanan se nyaman se eangka'agi, sapa tao pola oreng jareya me' ajebbaga ba'na." 
Proverbs23:4 Ta' osa abanteng tolang polana terro sogiya. Paburung neyadda jareya. 
Proverbs23:5 Sabab e dhalem saparngedep arta bisa mosna, akantha se akalembang pas ngabber ka langnge' akantha mano' rajabali." 
Proverbs23:6 Ja' ngakan ban oreng se cerre'. Bariya keya ja' terro ka kakananna se nyaman. 
Proverbs23:7 Sabab oreng jareya tanto ngoca' kantha reya, “Ngereng dha'ar; ngereng aorok,” mangkana sanyatana e atena ta' kantha jareya. Bibirra manes, tape atena laen." 
Proverbs23:8 Dhaggi' apa se la ekalodhu' bi' ba'na pas eota'agi pole, ban sakabbinna cacana ba'na se manes ka oreng jareya tadha' gunana." 
Proverbs23:9 Ja' la-malae oreng budhu; babala'anna ba'na ta' kera eargai. 
Proverbs23:10 Ja' sampe' ba'na ngerset batessa tana sangkolan otabana ngala' tana andhi'na kana' jatim. 
Proverbs23:11 Sabab PANGERAN reya kowat, ban Salerana se abilla'ana reng-oreng jareya ngadhebbi ba'na." 
Proverbs23:12 Edhingngagi pangajaranna guruna, sarta ajar sanya'-bannya'na." 
Proverbs23:13 Ja' ka-sengka ngajar ana'na. Mon ba'na mokol ana'na ban tongket manjalin, kana' jareya ta' kera mate," 
Proverbs23:14 la'-mala' salamet. 
Proverbs23:15 Na', sengko' ce' sennengnga mon ba'na bicaksana." 
Proverbs23:16 Sengko' gumbira mon ngedhing ba'na nyebbuttagi ca'-oca' se teppa'. 
Proverbs23:17 Ja' ere ka oreng se dusa. Papaggun ta'at ka ALLAH," 
Proverbs23:18 sopaja ba'na salamedda odhi'na e budhi are, ban pangarebbanna ba'na ta' sampe'a elang." 
Proverbs23:19 Edhingngagi, na'! Ba'na pabicaksana. Tetene pagu-onggu cara odhi'na ba'na." 
Proverbs23:20 Ja' apolongan ban oreng se dujan mabu' otaba oreng se dhakka," 
Proverbs23:21 sabab reng-oreng jareya bakal meskena. Mon lakona ba'na pera' tedhung malolo, tanto ba'na ta' abit pole bakal akalambiya bing-carbing." 
Proverbs23:22 Toro' dhabuna eppa'na; sabab mon tadha' eppa'na, ta' kera badha ba'na. Mon ebuna ba'na la towa, duduwagi ja' ba'na ngargai ebuna jareya." 
Proverbs23:23 Pangajaran se bendher, hekmat ban pandhidhigan sarta pangarteyan, jareya kabbi patot ebelli, tape talebat aji kaangguy ejuwal." 
Proverbs23:24 Mon ana' bagus buddina, eppa'na tanto perak; atena tanto gumbira mon andhi' ana' se bicaksana." 
Proverbs23:25 Mandar rama ebuna ba'na bunga'a atena polana ba'na; mandar sennengnga babine' se alahirragi ba'na. 
Proverbs23:26 Abassagi pateppa', pas conto odhi'na sengko' reya, na'." 
Proverbs23:27 Babine' nakal se nyondel reya daddi jebbak se babaja. 
Proverbs23:28 Ngaddhang akantha bigal ban daddi lantaranna bannya' lalake' azina. 
Proverbs23:29 Ba' taowa ba'na baramma daddina oreng se tabannya' gallu ngenom anggur, ban seggut nyepcep nom-enoman kerras? Oreng jareya nyangsara ban nanggung sossa. Atokar ban aserro terros. Matana mera ban badanna ka-loka, mangkana jareya kabbi bisa esenglae." 
Proverbs23:30  
Proverbs23:31 Ja' sampe' ba'na tagudha bi' anggur maske barnana ngapencot ate, katon agalirap e dhalem gellas ban agili maso' ka gerrungan ce' kobassana." 
Proverbs23:32 Kalagguwanna ba'na arassa akantha se ecangnga' olar se mandi opassa. 
Proverbs23:33 Matana ba'na anang-konang, pekkeranna salbut ban colo'na ngacepek terros." 
Proverbs23:34 Ba'na apangrasa akantha se badha e konco'na canggana kapal e tengnga tase' raja; ba'na pettengngen ban dhing-tabarindhing. 
Proverbs23:35 Ba'na tanto pas ngoca' kantha reya, “Ropa-ropana sengko' reya epokol ban etamper oreng, tape sengko' ta' enga' kadaddiyana. Adhu, sengko' ce' ngantogga! Sengko' parlo ngenom pole!”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ja' ere ka oreng jahat ban ja' terro akanca'a ban reng-oreng jareya. 
Proverbs24:2 Se epekker reng-oreng jareya coma kakejjemman ban se ekacaca coma barang se macalaka'a oreng. 
Proverbs24:3 Roma tangga reya epaddek kalaban hekmat ban pangarteyan. 
Proverbs24:4 Ban mon badha pangataowan, mar-kamarra bakal genna'a aesse rang-barang se aji ban bagus." 
Proverbs24:5 Oreng bicaksana lebbi wibawa ban ehormadi oreng etembang oreng kowat; pangataowan lebbi penting etembang kakowadan. 
Proverbs24:6 Sabab sabellunna aperrang kodu agabay rancangan se massa' gallu, ban sajan bannya' babala'anna oreng, sajan raja pangarep se mennanga." 
Proverbs24:7 Oreng budhu ta' bisa ngarte ka hekmat, ta' bisa ngoca' pa-apa mon oreng acaca parkara se ting-penting." 
Proverbs24:8 Oreng se ros-terrosan andhi' sajja jahat, bakal enyama'ana tokang mabaridhu." 
Proverbs24:9 Saneyap siyasadda oreng budhu reya dusa. Oreng se ros-terrosan nyale oreng laen, ta' ekaleburi sapa'a bai." 
Proverbs24:10 Mon ba'na kaelangan pangarep e dhalem kabadha'an gawat, ba'na reya oreng se ta' kowat." 
Proverbs24:11 Ja' mangmang mabebasa oreng se la etantowagi eokom mate; pasalamet oreng se eeret ka cangga pagantongan. 
Proverbs24:12 Ba'na olle ngoca', “Jareya banne tang orosan.” Tape Allah ngoladi ka ba'na; ngagali ban ngadili pekkeranna ba'na. Allah reya males manossa menorot tengka gulina." 
Proverbs24:13 Na', ngakan maddu, sabab jareya bagus. Akantha maddu dhari kalapkabanna nyarowan, manes mon ekakan," 
Proverbs24:14 bariya keya hekmat reya bagus kaangguy sokmana ba'na. Mon ba'na bicaksana, tanto tera' odhi'na ba'na e budhi are." 
Proverbs24:15 Ja' akantha oreng jahat se asakongkel arampok oreng jujur ban arampas bengkona. 
Proverbs24:16 Sabab oreng jujur reya, maske labuwa pan-barampan kale, gi' jaga'a pole. Tape sabaligga, oreng jahat bakal ancora mon katebanan balai." 
Proverbs24:17 Ja' perak mon mosona ba'na nemmo calaka', ban ja' perak mon mosona jareya labu." 
Proverbs24:18 Sabab PANGERAN tanto ngoladi lalakonna ba'na se kantha jareya ban nganggep lalakon jareya juba', pas ta' kasokan ngokom mosona ba'na pole." 
Proverbs24:19 Ja' peggel otabana ere ka oreng jahat. 
Proverbs24:20 Oreng jahat ta' andhi' se ekenneng arep kaangguy odhi'na se bakal dhateng, ban ta' andhi' pangarebban." 
Proverbs24:21 Mara patako' ka PANGERAN, na', ban pahormat ka rato. Ja' ro'-noro'an oreng se nangtang ka PANGERAN ban ka rato jareya." 
Proverbs24:22 Oreng se kantha jareya bisa ancor e dhalem saparngedep, sabab balai se epadhateng bi' Allah otabana rato banne barang kene'." 
Proverbs24:23 Reng-oreng penter tao ngoca' kantha reya: Hakim ta' olle berra' salaja. 
Proverbs24:24 Mon oreng se sala ekoca' ta' sala, hakim jareya tanto ebasto ban epesowe sakabbinna oreng." 
Proverbs24:25 Tape hakim se ngokom oreng se sala tanto senneng odhi'na ban ehormadi oreng. 
Proverbs24:26 Oreng se aberri' jawaban se bendher tandhana ja' jareya kanca se saongguna. 
Proverbs24:27 Ja' ako-bengko sabellunna ba'na masadhiya teggalla ban sabellunna ba'na andhi' kasap. 
Proverbs24:28 Ja' nyakse'e parkarana oreng mon tadha' lantaranna se patot; bariya keya ja' sampe' aberri' sakse se lecek parkara oreng jareya. 
Proverbs24:29 Ja' ngoca', “Sengko' malessa ka oreng jareya apa se la eteba'agi ka sengko' bi' aba'na.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Sengko' tao lebat e teggal ban kebbun anggurra oreng se males ban budhu. 
Proverbs24:31 Se etangale'e sengko' e jadhiya tadha' laen kajabana ombut se adhuri ban lalang. Pagar alassa la gujur. 
Proverbs24:32 Saellana parkara jareya bi' sengko' epekker epadhalem, sengko' olle pangajaran kantha reya:" 
Proverbs24:33 Kalaban ngantok ban tedhung sakejja', kalaban toju' asandhakep ban neng-enneng sakejja'," 
Proverbs24:34 kakorangan ban kameskenan dhateng nyerrang akantha bigal se asekep gagaman. 
Proverbs25:1 Areya' babala'an laenna dhari Sulaiman se esalen bi' ba-ponggabana e karatonna Hizkiya, rato Yehuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Allah eagungngagi lantaran pa-apa se eroseya'agi Salerana; rato ehormadi lantaran sabarang se bisa eterrangngagi salerana. 
Proverbs25:3 Akantha tase' raja se dhalem ban langnge' se tenggi, bariya keya pekkeranna rato ta' ekenneng tebbak oreng." 
Proverbs25:4 Berse'e gallu salaka dhari camporanna se ta' morne, buru seniman bisa agabay barang se lebur dhari salaka jareya." 
Proverbs25:5 Paondur para panasehat se jahat dhari karaton, buru pamarenta'anna koko lantaran kaadilanna rato." 
Proverbs25:6 Mon ngadhep rato kodu paandhap asor ja' makaton akantha oreng se tenggi pangkadda. 
Proverbs25:7 Lebbi becce' esoro ngalle ka katoju'an se anyamanan katembang ba'na esoro magi katoju'anna ka oreng se pangkadda atenggiyan dhari ba'na. 
Proverbs25:8 Ja' ru-kaburu ngeba parkara ka pangadilan, sabab mon pas etemmo ja' ba'na sala, ba'na pas arapa'a?" 
Proverbs25:9 Sala paham ban kanca, oros ban oreng jareya malolo, tape roseyana oreng laen ja' sampe' kacaca." 
Proverbs25:10 Sabab dhaggi' ba'na ekoca' oreng se bucor colo'na ban nyamana ba'na pas juba' saomorra. 
Proverbs25:11 Panemmo se epanapa' kalaban cara se teppa' padha ban wa'-buwa'an emmas e pereng salaka. 
Proverbs25:12 Parengeddanna oreng penter ka oreng se endha' narema, padha ban sello' emmas otaba pareyasan emmas." 
Proverbs25:13 Otosan se esto masenneng atena se ngotos, padha ban aeng se makobassa oreng anye e saba." 
Proverbs25:14 Ji-janji se tadha' daddina padha ban ondhem sarta angen se ta' madhateng ojan. 
Proverbs25:15 Kasabbaran se etoro'e caca se lemma' manes bisa mayakin oreng se kobasa, ban makala sakabbinna oreng se nangtang." 
Proverbs25:16 Mon ngakan maddu ja' nya'-bannya'; dhaggi' ba'na ngota. 
Proverbs25:17 Ja' gut-seggut entar ka bengkona tatanggana, dhaggi' tatanggana busen ban baji' ka ba'na." 
Proverbs25:18 Da'wa'an palsu mamateyan oreng, akantha peddhang, tokol otaba pana se tajem." 
Proverbs25:19 Parcaja ka pangkiyanat e jaman sossa padha bi' se ngael ngangguy gigi oga otaba ajalan ban soko se dippang ban lanjang salaja. 
Proverbs25:20 Anyanye kaangguy oreng se karekongan padha ban abangkange oreng jareya e bakto cellep kabadha'anna, akantha se nyelen cokka ka lokana." 
Proverbs25:21 Mon mosona ba'na lapar, berri'i ngakan; ban berri'i ngenom mon teppa'na pelka'." 
Proverbs25:22 Kalaban cara jareya, oreng jareya todhus ka ba'na, ban ba'na tanto eberkadi bi' PANGERAN." 
Proverbs25:23 Angen dhaja tanto ngeba ojan, bariya keya rarasan tanto mapeggel oreng." 
Proverbs25:24 Enneng e padduna gabak anyamanan, etembang sabengko ban bine se dujan atokar." 
Proverbs25:25 Ngedhing kabar nyaman dhari jauna akantha se ngenom aeng e bakto pelka'. 
Proverbs25:26 Oreng becce' se ngala ka oreng se daraka padha ban somber se lekko otaba somor se kotor aengnga. 
Proverbs25:27 Ngakan maddu nya'-bannya' gallu reya ta' becce', bariya keya mon tabannya' gallu ngalem oreng." 
Proverbs25:28 Oreng se ta' bisa ngobasane aba'na akantha kottha se la gujur partahananna. 
Proverbs26:1 Akantha ojan e mosem nemor ban salju e mosem panas, pangalem ka oreng budhu reya ta' pantes." 
Proverbs26:2 Marabut mano' se ber-abberran e bang-abang, babaston ta' kera bisa teba ka oreng se ta' sala." 
Proverbs26:3 Hemar kodu ekaddhali'i, jaran kodu epeccot, bariya keya oreng budhu kodu epokol." 
Proverbs26:4 Oreng se nyaodi partanya'anna oreng budhu, padha budhuna ban se atanya." 
Proverbs26:5 Partanya'an se budhu kodu esaodi bi' jawaban se budhu keya, sopaja se atanya apangrasa ja' aba'na ta' penter akantha pangrasana." 
Proverbs26:6 Ngotos oreng budhu manapa' kabar, padha ban motel sokona dibi' ban nyare calaka'." 
Proverbs26:7 Oreng budhu se aberri' babala'an, padha ban oreng empon se ngangguy sokona." 
Proverbs26:8 Ngalem oreng se ta' andhi' pangataowan, padha ban oreng nale'e bato epaserret ka dhibal." 
Proverbs26:9 Akantha oreng mabu' se makalowar dhuri dhari tanangnga, kantha jareya oreng budhu se aberri' babala'an." 
Proverbs26:10 Sapa se malako oreng budhu otaba oreng ban-saromban tanto marogi oreng bannya'. 
Proverbs26:11 Akantha pate' se abali entar ka otana, bariya keya oreng budhu se ngolange kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs26:12 Oreng se ce' budhuna gi' lebbi becce' etembang oreng se nganggep penter aba'na dibi'. 
Proverbs26:13 Oreng males ta' endha' kalowaran; oca'na, “E lowar badha macan, sengko' tako' eceppa'.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Akantha labang se apoter e engsella, bariya keya oreng se males lu'-gulu'an e katedhunganna." 
Proverbs26:15 Badha oreng se malessa tadha' bandhinganna; ngompa'a nase' balakka' sengka. 
Proverbs26:16 Oreng males apangrasa aba'na lebbi penter etembang oreng kapetto se nyaot kalaban bendher. 
Proverbs26:17 Ro'-noro' oreng se atokar se banne orosanna padha ban oreng mega' pate' alas kalaban nyandhak kopengnga. 
Proverbs26:18 Oreng se nepo, tape ngoca', “Sengko' pera' agaja',” padha ban oreng gila se en-maenan gagaman se babaja." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Mon kaju la tadha', apoyya mate; mon se bucor colo'na la tadha', ta' kera badha tokar pole." 
Proverbs26:21 Mon gi' badha arengnga mardhana rabak, mon gi' badha kajuna apoyya rabbang, bariya keya oreng se dujan atokar mapanas kabadha'an." 
Proverbs26:22 Petenna reya nyaman rassana; mon ekalodhu' ekarassa kobassa. 
Proverbs26:23 Akantha polo' se esempo bi' salaka, bariya jareya oreng se manes cacana, tape juba' atena." 
Proverbs26:24 Oreng se baji' manes cacana, tape atena possa' ban kasalenterran." 
Proverbs26:25 Maske oreng jareya manes cacana, ja' parcaja; sabab atena ekobasae kabaji'an." 
Proverbs26:26 Maske oreng bisa notobi kabaji'anna, oreng kabbi bakal nangaleyana kajahadanna." 
Proverbs26:27 Sapa se ngale lobang kaangguy oreng laenna tanto tabalusok dibi' ka dhalemmanna. Sapa se magulu' bato nyecce'a oreng laenna tanto taence' dibi' bi' bato jareya. 
Proverbs26:28 Co-ngoco oreng padha bai ban baji' ka oreng jareya. Bibir manes madhateng calaka'. 
Proverbs27:1 Ja' asebbal parkara lagguna, sabab ba'na ta' tao apa se kadaddiyana dhaggi'." 
Proverbs27:2 Ja' ngalemman aba' dibi', dina se ngalem me' oreng laen bai, la'-mala' reng-oreng se ba'na gi' ta' kennal." 
Proverbs27:3 Bato ban beddhi reya gi' dhammang mon ebandhingngagi ban sake'na ate se esababbagi oreng budhu. 
Proverbs27:4 Kapeggellan reya kejjem ban marosagan, tape ta' saapa mon ebandhing ban tamburuwan." 
Proverbs27:5 Lebbi becce' malae rang-terrangan etembang kataresna'an se ta' eduduwagi. 
Proverbs27:6 Kanca reya mokol kalaban kataresna'an, tape moso agellu' bi' racon." 
Proverbs27:7 Mon kennyang, maske maddu etolak; mon lapar, se pae' ekarassa nyaman." 
Proverbs27:8 Oreng se adina'agi bengkona, padha ban mano' se ondur dhari lebunna." 
Proverbs27:9 Mennya' ro'om ban om-ro'oman laenna masenneng ate, bariya keya kabecce'anna kanca masegger sokma." 
Proverbs27:10 Ja' paloppa ka kancana ba'na otabana kancana eppa'na. E dhalem kasossa'an ja' menta tolong ka taretanna; tatangga se semma' lebbi aguna etembang taretan se badha e jauna. 
Proverbs27:11 Na', ba'na pabicaksana, sopaja sengko' senneng ban ngenneng nyaot mon badha oreng se nyale sengko' reya." 
Proverbs27:12 Oreng bicaksana nyengla mon badha babaja, oreng budhu nyander sampe' calaka'." 
Proverbs27:13 Sapa se endha' nanggung otangnga oreng laenna, dhi'-andhi'na kodu ekala' menangka tanggunganna janjina." 
Proverbs27:14 Oreng se gu-laggu aberri' salam ka kancana epakaja sowarana, eanggep ngoca'agi la'nat." 
Proverbs27:15 Bine se dujan atokaran akantha ojan se saare benteng toron ros-terrosan. 
Proverbs27:16 Bine se kantha jareya ta' kera bisa esoro neng-enneng, akantha angen se ta' ekenneng tahan ban mennya' se ta' ekenneng pergem e tanang." 
Proverbs27:17 Akantha baja se agangse baja, bariya keya manossa ajar dhari sasamana." 
Proverbs27:18 Sapa se meyara bungkana tanto ngakan buwana. Bareng se ajaga lorana tanto eargai oreng laenna. 
Proverbs27:19 E dhalem aeng ba'na nangale'e robana, bariya keya atena ba'na noduwagi sapa ba'na reya." 
Proverbs27:20 E dunnyana oreng mate terros badha kennengngan; bariya keya pangaterrona manossa tadha' batessa. 
Proverbs27:21 Apoy epangoji emmas ban salaka; oreng etemmo dhari pangalem se etarema aba'na. 
Proverbs27:22 Oreng budhu maske epokol epace'kajana, ta' kera elang kabudhuwanna." 
Proverbs27:23 Peyara pateppa' ebinna ba'na," 
Proverbs27:24 sabab kasogiyan reya ta' kera salanjangnga, la'-mala' kakobasa'an kaangguy marenta ta' kera teptep salanjangnga keya." 
Proverbs27:25 Rebba e teggal ban e gunong eketthok pas epakompol kaangguy ebinna ba'na jareya, tape sabatara jareya tombu rebba se anyar." 
Proverbs27:26 Dhari buluna ba-dumbana ba'na olle kalambi, ban dhari pesse ollena ajuwal sabagiyan dhari embi'na ba'na bisa melle tana." 
Proverbs27:27 Dhari embi'na se laen ba'na olle susu se ekenneng enom ba'na sabala sarta ban reng-barengnga ba'na. 
Proverbs28:1 Oreng jahat buru maske ta' eserser oreng, tape oreng jujur bangal akantha macan." 
Proverbs28:2 Mon bangsa andhi' dusa, pangobasana ate-gante salanjangnga; mon pamimpin bicaksana, bangsa kowat ban jaja saterrossa." 
Proverbs28:3 Pangobasa se nendhes oreng mesken, akantha ojan lebat se marosak hasella anye." 
Proverbs28:4 Sapa se ngenthengngagi hokom, noro' ka oreng jahat; se atoro' ka hokom nangtang oreng se bejjat." 
Proverbs28:5 Oreng daraka ta' ngarte ka kaadilan, tape oreng se abakte ka PANGERAN ngarte ongguwan." 
Proverbs28:6 Lebbi becce' mesken tape bagus atena etembang oreng sogi tape ta' jujur tengkana. 
Proverbs28:7 Oreng ngodha se ta'at ka hokom reya oreng bicaksana. Tape se abarengngan ban oreng se wang-mowang pesse matodhusan eppa'na. 
Proverbs28:8 Oreng se sogi ollena ngala' budhu'na pesse ban ngoro' kaontongan sabannya'na, dhi'-andhi'na bakal gaggara ka oreng se neser ka oreng mesken." 
Proverbs28:9 Mon ba'na ta' atoro' ka hokomma Allah, Allah bakal baji'a keya ka du'ana ba'na." 
Proverbs28:10 Sapa se nyacae oreng jujur eajak alako jahat, aba'na dibi' bakal maso'a ka dhalem jebbak. Oreng se berse atena bakal eberkadana sampe' senneng odhi'na." 
Proverbs28:11 Oreng sogi ros-terrosan apangrasa aba'na bicaksana, tape oreng mesken se tenggi buddina tao sapa sanyatana aba'na." 
Proverbs28:12 Mon oreng becce' kobasa, kabbi padha perak, mon oreng jahat marenta, ra'yat ngetek ta' kalowaran." 
Proverbs28:13 Sapa se ngerrep dusana ta' kera ontong odhi'na. Sapa se ngakone dusana ban ta' agabay dusa pole bakal ekabellasana Pangeran. 
Proverbs28:14 Hormadi terros PANGERAN, tanto ba'na senneng odhi'na. Mon ba'na ta' atoro' ka Salerana, ba'na tanto calaka'." 
Proverbs28:15 Oreng jahat se ngobasane oreng se kakorangan, akantha macan se agaung otaba baruwang se nyerranga." 
Proverbs28:16 Pangobasa se nendhes oreng laen, ta' andhi' akkal se baras; pangobasa se baji' ka sabarang se ta' jujur bakal marenta'a sampe' ataonan." 
Proverbs28:17 Sapa se mate'e oreng bakal apangrasa'a eserser terros sampe' ajalla; tadha' oreng se bisa'a ngalang oreng jareya. 
Proverbs28:18 Oreng se odhi'na tadha' calena bakal salamedda, oreng se ta' loros odhi'na bakal labuwa." 
Proverbs28:19 Oreng tane se alako berra' cokop se ekakana, tape se wang-mowang bakto bakal kakorangana." 
Proverbs28:20 Oreng se jujur bakal eberkadana Pangeran, tape oreng se terro ceppedda sogi, ta' lopot dhari okoman." 
Proverbs28:21 Ta' becce' ada'-bida'agi oreng; tape badha keya hakim se roce pera' kaangguy ngaolle pesse sakone'. 
Proverbs28:22 Oreng se dhakka terro duliya sogi; oreng jareya ta' apangrasa ja' aba'na bakal lekkassa mesken. 
Proverbs28:23 Sapa se maenga' kasala'anna oreng laenna dhi-budhina lebbi eargai etembang oreng se lem-ngalem. 
Proverbs28:24 Sapa se ngeco' dhi'-andhi'na oreng towana ban nyangka jareya ta' dusa, tadha' bidana ban maleng laenna." 
Proverbs28:25 Oreng se pera' mekkere aba'na dibi' matokaran; ba'na aontongan mon parcaja ka PANGERAN. 
Proverbs28:26 Sapa se ngandellagi pekkeranna dibi', akkalla ta' baras. Sapa se atoro' ka pangajaranna oreng bicaksana bakal salamedda." 
Proverbs28:27 Sapa se aberri' ka oreng mesken ta' kera kakorangan. Sapa se notop matana ka kabutowanna oreng mesken bakal ekennenga babaston. 
Proverbs28:28 Mon oreng jahat neggu' kakobasa'an, ra'yat ngetek ta' kalowaran; mon oreng jahat mate, oreng se adil bakal bebasa mimpin ra'yat." 
Proverbs29:1 Sapa se terros alaban mon ela-balai oreng e settong bakto tanto ancor ta' ekenneng tolong pole. 
Proverbs29:2 Mon oreng adil neggu' kakobasa'an, ra'yat perak. Tape mon oreng jahat kobasa, ra'yat nyangsara." 
Proverbs29:3 Sapa se lebur ka hekmat, masenneng atena eppa'na. Sapa se apolongan ban sondel wang-mowang pessena." 
Proverbs29:4 Mon pangobasa agateyagi kaadilan, nagarana tanto koko, tape mon se epekkere pesse malolo, nagarana tanto ngalotor." 
Proverbs29:5 Sapa se lem-ngalem sasamana, masang jebbak kaangguy aba'na dibi'." 
Proverbs29:6 Oreng jahat tajira' bi' dusana, oreng jujur senneng ban bajjra odhi'na." 
Proverbs29:7 Oreng becce' tao ka ha'na oreng se ta' kellar apa-rapa, tape oreng jahat ta' ngarte ka parkara jareya." 
Proverbs29:8 Oreng se dujan nyale bisa masalbut kottha, tape se bicaksana mataremtem kabadha'anna." 
Proverbs29:9 Mon oreng bicaksana ban oreng budhu aparkara, se budhu pera' ngamok ban agella'an mabaridhu kabadha'an." 
Proverbs29:10 Oreng se bagus atena ekabaji'i oreng se terro ngero'a dhara, tape eaobi bi' oreng se becce' atena." 
Proverbs29:11 Oreng budhu mon peggel rang-terrangan, tape oreng bicaksana sabbar ban ngampet napsona." 
Proverbs29:12 Mon pangobasa ngedhingngagi kabar lecegan, kabbi ponggabana tanto daddi jahat." 
Proverbs29:13 Oreng mesken ban oreng se nganeyaja aba'na padha andhi' settong parkara se tadha' bidana, bi' PANGERAN padha eparenge mata sopaja nangale sonar se tera'." 
Proverbs29:14 Mon rato abillai ha'na oreng se ta' andhi' kakowadan, tanto marenta sampe' ataonan." 
Proverbs29:15 Pangajaran ban babala'an andaddiyagi oreng bicaksana. Na'-kana' se etorot bakal matodhusa ebuna. 
Proverbs29:16 Mon oreng jahat kobasa, sajan bannya' oreng ta' atoro' parenta. Tape oreng jujur bakal sempada nangaleyana oreng jahat ancor odhi'na." 
Proverbs29:17 Ajari ana'na ba'na, sopaja kana' jareya madhateng kataremtemman ka ba'na, ban daddi panglepor ka atena ba'na." 
Proverbs29:18 Bangsa se ta' etonton bi' Pangeran daddi bangsa se salbut kabadha'anna. Senneng odhi'na oreng se atoro' ka hokomma Pangeran. 
Proverbs29:19 Bareng reya ta' ekenneng balai ban caca malolo; maske ngarte, ta' emaso'agi ka dhalem atena." 
Proverbs29:20 Abannya'an pangarebban kaangguy oreng se budhu, etembang oreng se acaca ta' kalaban epekker gallu." 
Proverbs29:21 Bareng se emanja dhari gi' ngodhana, dhi-budhina daddi oreng se cengkal." 
Proverbs29:22 Oreng se dhuson atena andaddiyagi bannya' oreng atokaran ban agabay dusa. 
Proverbs29:23 Oreng se angko bakal ekababa'agiya, oreng se andhap asor bakal earga'ana." 
Proverbs29:24 Oreng se saleng tolong ban maleng, artena baji' ka aba'na dibi'. Mon e pangadilan oreng rang-terrangan, tanto narema okoman. Tape mon neng-enneng ta' ca'-ngoca' tanto narema babaston dhari Allah." 
Proverbs29:25 Tako' ka cacana oreng madhateng kasossa'an. Paparcaja ka PANGERAN, ba'na tanto aman." 
Proverbs29:26 Bannya' oreng se ngala' ate ka pangobasa, tape se apareng pangadilan pera' PANGERAN." 
Proverbs29:27 Oreng becce' ta' lebur ka oreng jahat. Oreng jahat baji' ka oreng becce'. 
Proverbs30:1 Areya' babala'anna Agur ana'na Yake dhari Masa: “Abdidalem lesso, Guste Allah, abdidalem ce' lessona! Abdidalem ampon ta' gadhuwan kakowadan!" 
Proverbs30:2 Abdidalem budhu akadi keban; ta' gadhuwan pangarteyan pa-ponapa. 
Proverbs30:3 Abdidalem ta' oneng ajar parkara hekmat, ta' oneng pa-ponapa parkara Allah." 
Proverbs30:4 Manossa ka'imma se oneng ongga toron sowarga? Se oneng mergem angen e dhalem tanangnga, otaba mondu' aeng sareng kalambina, sareng neptebbagi tes-batessa dunnya? Pasera oreng gapaneka, ban pasera ana'na? Tanto Junandalem ngagali!" 
Proverbs30:5 Allah neptebbi saneyap janjina. Allah reya akantha tameng ka sakabbinna oreng se ngaop ka Salerana. 
Proverbs30:6 Mon ba'na nambai apa se edhabuwagi Salerana, ba'na tanto epaenga' ban Salerana tanto abukteyagi ja' ba'na reya oreng lecegan.”" 
Proverbs30:7 “Ya Allah, abdidalem nyo'ona ka Junandalem sabellunnepon abdidalem mate, kasokana Junandalem marenge abdidalem parkara se dhadhuwa' ka'dhinto." 
Proverbs30:8 Ja' kantos abdidalem acaca ta' jujur sareng lecek, jugan ja' kantos abdidalem mesken otaba sogi. Parenge abdidalem namong se ekaparlo abdidalem saos." 
Proverbs30:9 Sabab, manabi abdidalem sogi, olle daddi abdidalem ngoca' ja' abdidalem ta' buto ka Junandalem. Ban manabi abdidalem mesken, olle daddi abdidalem ngeco' kantos abdidalem macemmer asmaepon Junandalem.”" 
Proverbs30:10 Ja' metenna bareng ka lorana, dhaggi' ba'na ebasto ban eanggep sala." 
Proverbs30:11 Badha oreng se abasto eppa'na ban ta' ngargai ebuna. 
Proverbs30:12 Badha oreng se nganggep socce aba'na, mangka sabendherra aba'na ce' kotorra." 
Proverbs30:13 Badha oreng se apangrasa aba'na ce' becce'na – ce' becce'na parana! 
Proverbs30:14 Badha oreng se nyare kasap kalaban cara se kejjem; bengnges ban merres oreng mesken se ta' andhi' kakowadan. 
Proverbs30:15 Lenta darat andhi' ana' dhadhuwa', se dhadhuwa' nyamana “Kaangguy sengko'!” Badha empa' parkara se ta' tao badha tobugga:" 
Proverbs30:16 dunnyana oreng mate, babine' se ta' tao andhi' ana', tana kerreng se ngarep ojan ros-terrosan, ban apoy se ngolap ka man-dhimman." 
Proverbs30:17 Oreng se ngethessagi eppa'na otaba ebuna se la towa, sapantessa eontallagi kalowar me' olle matana ecocco' dhangdhang ban mayyidda ekakan mano' rajabali." 
Proverbs30:18 Badha empa' parkara se sengko' ta' duli ngarte polana malarat: 
Proverbs30:19 mano' rajabali se ngabber e bang-abang, olar se agalajar e attassa bato karang, kapal se alajar e tengnga tase' raja, ban sapasang ngangodhadan se teppa'na saleng taresna." 
Proverbs30:20 Areya' kasalenterranna babine' se ta' esto ka lakena: Samarena azina laju ngakan pas ngessot colo'na, laju ngoca', “Sengko' ta' alako pa-apa!”" 
Proverbs30:21 Badha empa' parkara se ta' gampang etarema reng-oreng sadunnya: 
Proverbs30:22 bareng se daddi rato, oreng budhu se ngaolle sabarang se ekaterro," 
Proverbs30:23 babine' se bisa nemmo lake mangkana babine' jareya ta' ekaleburi oreng, bareng bine' se arampas kennengnganna lora bine'na." 
Proverbs30:24 E bume reya badha keban kene' tape ce' penterra, bannya'na pa' macem, iya areya:" 
Proverbs30:25 Bilis, keban se ta' kowat, tape nyadhiya'agi kakanna e mosem panas." 
Proverbs30:26 Kancel, keban se ta' andhi' kakowadan, tape agabay rongkangnga e gumo' bato." 
Proverbs30:27 Balang, keban se ta' andhi' rato, tape abaris bagus atoranna." 
Proverbs30:28 Cekcek, keban se ekenneng pega' bi' tanang, tape badha e karaton." 
Proverbs30:29 Badha empa' parkara se nyarepsep ka ate mon etetene carana ajalan, iya areya:" 
Proverbs30:30 Macan, keban se kowat e antarana sakabbinna keban ban ta' tako' ka pa-apa;" 
Proverbs30:31 embi' lake', ajam lake' se sodek pajalanna, ban rato e adha'anna ra'yadda." 
Proverbs30:32 Mon lantaran kabudhuwanna ba'na kalaban angko andhi' sajja se jahat, senga'!"
