Proverbs30:33 Sabab mon ba'na ngocco' susu ba'na tanto olle mantega. Mon ba'na mokol elongnga oreng, tanto kalowar dhara. Mon ba'na mapeggel oreng, tanto ba'na pas atokar." 
Proverbs31:1 Areya' ca'-oca' se edhabuwagi ebu Lemuwel, rato Masa ka pottrana," 
Proverbs31:2 “Na', buwana tang ate, se lahir ollena tang du'a. Apa se ekoca'agiya sengko' ka ba'na?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ja' wang-mowang kakowadan ka oreng babine'. La bannya' rato se ancor polana babine'. 
Proverbs31:4 Kaenga'e Lemuwel! Ngenom anggur ban mato ka nom-enoman kerras, ta' pantes monggu ka pangobasa." 
Proverbs31:5 Sabab, mon rato ngenom nom-enoman kerras, tanto pas loppa ka hokom ban ta' marduli ha'na oreng se ta' andhi' kakowadan." 
Proverbs31:6 Nom-enoman kerras reya kaangguy oreng se nyangsara ban sossa atena. 
Proverbs31:7 Reng-oreng jareya ngenom terro loppa'a ka kameskenanna ban ka kasossa'anna. 
Proverbs31:8 Tolonge oreng se ta' bisa nolong aba'na dibi'. Pasalamettagi ha'na oreng se ta' bisa apa-rapa. 
Proverbs31:9 Aperrang kaangguy reng-oreng jareya, mara daddi hakim se adil. Pasalamettagi ha'na oreng mesken ban oreng se tatendhes.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Bine se cakep malarat sareyanna; bine se kantha jareya alarangan dhari enten ban barleyan. 
Proverbs31:11 Lakena ta' kera kakorangan pa-apa, sabab la parcaja ka binena jareya." 
Proverbs31:12 Babine' se kantha jareya ta' tao agabay sala ka lakena, saomorra becce' ka lakena jareya." 
Proverbs31:13 Babine' jareya bajeng makompol rame ban buluna dumba, terros etennon tadha' ambuna." 
Proverbs31:14 Dhari jauna babine' jareya madhateng kakanan, padha ban se ejalannagi pal-kapalla dagang." 
Proverbs31:15 Gi' petteng la jaga nyadhiya'agiya kakanna saessena bengkona, sarta gi-magiya lalakon ka reng-barengnga." 
Proverbs31:16 Babine' jareya nyare tana pas ebelli, pas namenne kebbun anggur dhari hasella lakona." 
Proverbs31:17 Babine' jareya nyadhiya'agi badanna alalakona salar-kellarra. 
Proverbs31:18 Babine' jareya tao sabarang se elakone madhateng kaontongan; mon alalakon sampe' ce' malemma. 
Proverbs31:19 Bennang epente, kaen etennon." 
Proverbs31:20 Ta' cerre' ka oreng se kakorangan, bagus atena ka oreng se marlowagi partolongan." 
Proverbs31:21 Babine' jareya ta' kobater mon la mosem cellep, sabab la nyadhiya'agi kalambi panas kaangguy saessena bengkona." 
Proverbs31:22 Babut e bengkona gabayanna dibi', bariya keya kalambina se dhari kaen linen bungo terrong se bagus." 
Proverbs31:23 Lakena oreng se kalonta nyamana, sala settong dhari pamimpin e kotthana." 
Proverbs31:24 Kalambi ban sabbu' ekagabay, pas ejuwal ka sodagar." 
Proverbs31:25 Babine' jareya ehormat ban ekatako'e oreng, ta' kobater ngadhebbi bakto e budhi are." 
Proverbs31:26 Pacacana lemma' manes ce' alossa; ca'-oca'na bicaksana. 
Proverbs31:27 Mon alalakon ce' bajengnga, ta' nga-satengnga ngoros kabutowanna roma tatanggana." 
Proverbs31:28 Babine' jareya ehormat bi' na'-ana'na, sarta ealem bi' lakena." 
Proverbs31:29 “Bannya' babine' se becce',” ca'na lakena, “tape ba'na se paleng becce' dhari sakabbinna.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Roba se raddin ta' ekenneng parcaja, raddinna mowa bisa elang; tape babine' se ta'at ka PANGERAN pantes ealem salanjangnga." 
Proverbs31:31 Bales kabecce'anna, jareya babine' se patot ehormadi e man-dhimman." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ca'-oca' e dhalem ketab reya asalla dhari Oreng Se Ahli Pekker, pottrana Daud, se agante Daud jumenneng rato e Yerusalim." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Oreng Se Ahli Pekker jareya adhabu: Kabbi padha tadha' gunana! Odhi' reya parcoma, kabbi tadha' artena." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Saomorra sengko' ban ba'na alalakon, sampe' kalowar pello koneng. Tape, kemma ollena se ekenneng andellagi?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Toronan se settong dhateng, toronan settonganna mosna, tape dunnya paggun bai tadha' obana." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Are gi' moncar ban gi' compet. Kalaban lesso abali ka kennengngan asalla, pas moncar pole." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Angen dhateng dhari lao', terros ka dhaja; ater-poter, pas abali pole." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Songay agili ka tase' kabbi, tape tase' ta' endha' possa' keya. Aengnga abali ka olona songay, pas molae agili pole." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Kabbi mabusen, ban kabusennan jareya ta' kaocap. Mata tadha' tobugga se nangale; kopeng tadha' tobugga se ngedhing." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Apa se tao kadaddiyan, bakal kadaddiyan pole. Apa se tao elakone, bakal elakonana pole. Tadha' barang se anyar e dunnya reya." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Badha oreng se ngoca', ‘Abas, reya anyar!’ Tape jareya la badha sabellunna sengko' ban ba'na lahir." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Oreng ta' kera enga' ka kadaddiyan e jaman lamba'. Bariya keya kadaddiyan e antarana sateya ban pagi' ta' kera ekaenga'e bi' reng-oreng e jaman pagi'. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Sengko', Se Ahli Pekker, marenta e Yerusalim menangka rato Isra'il." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Sengko' la atekat nalektegana ban ajara kalaban bicaksana parkara sabarang se kadaddiyan e dunnya reya. Papasthen se esadhiya'agi Allah ka sengko' ban ba'na mangennes onggu. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Sengko' la nangale'e sabarang lalakonna oreng e dunnya reya. Ba'na paparcaja, ya, jareya kabbi tadha' gunana, akantha oreng nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Se bilu' ta' ekenneng paloros, se tadha' ta' ekenneng bitong." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ca'na tang pekker, “Sengko' reya la daddi oreng penting ban penter, apenterran parana dhari sakabbinna oreng se marenta e Yerusalim sabellunna sengko'. Sengko' makompol pangataowan ban elmo sabannya'na.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Daddi sengko' la atekat aehteyara sopaja tao bidana antarana pangataowan ban kabudhuwan, antarana kabicaksana'an ban kagendhengngan. Tape nyatana sengko' padha ban oreng nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Sabab sajan bannya' hekmadda oreng, sajan tako' rassana atena. Sajan bannya' pangataowanna oreng, sajan bannya' keya kasossa'anna." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Sengko' la neptebbagi neng-sennengngana bai sopaja sengko' taowa apa sanyatana se esebbut senneng reya. Tape nyatana jareya parcoma keya. 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Sengko' apangrasa ja' agella' reya kabudhuwan, ban kasennengngan reya tadha' gunana." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Dhari terrona daddiya oreng penter sengko' atekat neng-sennengngana, nom-ngenomana anggur ban ata'-pesta'a. Ca'na sengko' jareya cara se paleng bagus monggu ka manossa kaangguy arassa'agi kobassana odhi'na se pandha' e dunnya reya." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Sengko' la ngalakone lalakon se ja-raja. Sengko' maddek ko-bengko, agabay bun-kebbunan ban bun-kebbun se bi' sengko' etamenne anggur ban acem-macem bungkana wa'-buwa'an." 
Ecclesiastes2:5  
Ecclesiastes2:6 Sengko' ngale man-taman se eangguya nyerame tang bun-kebbunan ban tang bun-kebbun. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Tang dunor bannya', badha se ollena melle, badha keya se lahir e tang bengko. Tang ebin abannya'an dhari ebinna sapa'a bai se tao enneng e Yerusalim." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Sengko' makompol salaka ban emmas ollena pesse opet dhari to-rato e ra-nagara tang jaja'an. Para tokang nyanye lalake' ban babine' padha anyanye masenneng tang ate. Bannya'na tang seller baramma ca'na se ekaterro sengko'. 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Pajat bendher, sengko' reya araja'an dhari sapa'a bai se tao enneng e Yerusalim, ban tang hekmat paggun ta' kala." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Sengko' norodi apa'a bai se ekaterro sengko'. Sengko' ta' tao ngampet pangaterro kaangguy ane'madi kasennengngan apa'a bai. Sengko' arassa gumbira polana hasella sabarang se elakone sengko', ban jareya tang opa." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tape saellana jareya sengko' mekkere sabarang hasella tang lalakon, ban sabarang se elakone sengko' kaangguy mamare sakabbinna lalakon jareya, sengko' pas apangrasa ja' jareya kabbi tadha' gunana. Sabarang se elakone sengko' jareya parcoma, akantha oreng se nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Maske baramma'a rato pera' bisa ngalakone pa-apa se la ejalannagi to-rato sabellunna. Sengko' pas molae apekker: Apa artena oreng daddi penter otaba budhu otaba gendheng? 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Iya, sengko' tao, “Hekmat reya abecce'an dhari kabudhuwan, akantha terrang abecce'an dhari petteng." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Oreng bangket bisa nangale'e dha' emma tojjuwanna; oreng budhu padha ban se ajalan ga'-raga'an.” Tape sengko' tao keya ja' sakabbinna oreng bakal narema'a papasthen se padha bai. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Daddi ca'na tang pekker, “Sengko' bakal nanggunga keya papasthen se etanggung oreng se budhu. Daddi, apa gunana tang hekmat reya?” Sengko' pas ngoca' e dhalem ate ja' hekmat jareya pajat tadha' gunana sakale." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Oreng se budhu bakal ceppedda ekaloppae bi' oreng, tape oreng se andhi' hekmat ta' kera abit keya ekaenga'e oreng. Dhi-budhina manossa kabbi bakal elanga ta' ekaenga'e oreng. Manossa kodu mate, ta' parduli se penter otaba se budhu." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Daddi odhi' reya la tadha' artena ka sengko', coma madhateng kasossa'an. Parcoma, tadha' bidana bi' oreng nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Sabarang se elakone sengko' ban hasel ollena tang lalakon tadha' gunana ka sengko', sabab sengko' tao jareya kabbi kodu edina'agi ka se aganteya sengko'." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ban sapa se taowa, apa se aganteya sengko' jareya penter otaba budhu? Tape maske baramma'a se aganteya sengko' jareya se bakal ngaandhi'a hasella tang lalakon se ekaolle sengko' saabidda sengko' odhi' e dunnya reya lantaran sengko' alako berra' ban lantaran tang hekmat. Daddi, jareya parcoma keya." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Sateya sengko' kasta polana la alako ce' berra'na. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Sabab manossa alako berra' ngangguy sakabbinna hekmadda, pangataowanna ban kaahliyanna mon badha se ekaterro ekaolleya. Tape dhi-budhina ollena lessona jareya kodu edina'agi kabbi ka oreng se ta' makalowar pello sakale. Daddi jareya parcoma, ban ta' adil!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Saomorra manossa alako berra' ban malarat; pas kemma hasella pello konengnga se bisa magumbira atena? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Apa'a bai se elakone saomorra, madhateng kasossa'an ban sake' ate monggu ka aba'na. E baja malem atena ngalengsang keya. Daddi jareya parcoma kabbi." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Monggu ka manossa tadha' se abagusan dhari ngakan, ngenom ban ane'madi ollena lalakonna. Sengko' apangrasa ja' jareya paparengnga Allah keya." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Sapa se bisa ngakan ban neng-sennengngan ta' kalaban Allah? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Allah apareng hekmat, pangataowan ban kasennengngan ka oreng se masenneng panggaliyanna. Tape oreng se dusa epakon alako kaangguy nyare kasap ban nompo' hasella kaangguy epassra'agi ka oreng se masenneng panggaliyanna Allah. Daddi, jareya kabbi tadha' gunana, akantha oreng nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Sabarang se badha e dunnya reya kadaddiyan e bakto se la etantowagi bi' Allah. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Allah nantowagi bila baktona se lahirra ban bila se mateya, bila se namenna ban bila se molonga," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 bila se mateyana ban bila se mabarasa, bila baktona se magujura ban bila se maddegga." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Allah nantowagi bila baktona se agella'a ban bila se nangesa, bila baktona se agingginga ban bila se atariya," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 bila lalake' ban babine' se tedhunga apolong otaba se alaena, bakto alu'-gellu'a ban bakto ngampedda napsona." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Allah nantowagi bakto bila se nemmowa ban bila se kaelangana, bakto kaangguy nyempen pesse ban bila se wang-mowanga," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 bakto kaangguy nyebbit ban bakto kaangguy ajai', bakto kaangguy neng-enneng ban bakto kaangguy acaca." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Allah nantowagi baktona se baji'a ban bila se taresna'a, bila baktona se aperranga ban bila se rokona." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Apa ollena sengko' ban ba'na se alako sampe' lesso? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Sengko' tao bi' Allah manossa eparenge tanggungan se berra'. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Salerana la nantowagi bakto se teppa' kaangguy apa'a bai. Sengko' ban ba'na padha eparenge pekkeran terro taowa parkara se bakal dhatengnga, tape ta' sanggup ngarte apa se elampa'agi Allah dhari awwal sampe' aher." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Sengko' tao ja' monggu ka sengko' ban ba'na tadha' se lebbi becce' dhari neng-sennengngan ban ngarassa'agi kobassana odhi' saomorra. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Lebbi becce' sengko' ban ba'na kabbi ngakan ban ngenom ban ngarassa'agi hasella lakona. Jareya paparengnga Allah. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Sengko' tao ja' sakabbinna ollena se elampa'agi Allah bakal badha'a terros salanjangnga. Manossa ta' bisa nambai otaba ngorange. Bi' Allah epakantha jareya sopaja sengko' ban ba'na tako'a ka Salerana. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Se kalakon sateya, la kalakon sabellunna. Se bakal badha'a, la abit se badha. Allah nantowagi sopaja se la kadaddiyan, kadaddiyan pole." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Badha pole se etangale'e sengko' e dunnya reya: e kennengngan se samasthena badha kaadilan ban kabecce'an, e jadhiya badha kajahadan." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ca'na tang pekker, Allah bakal ngadilana oreng se becce' ban se jahat, sabab saneyap parkara ban saneyap lalakon bakal kalakona teppa' e bakto se la etantowagi bi' Allah." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Daddi pandha'na ca'na sengko': Allah reya ngoji sengko' ban ba'na kaangguy noduwagi ja' papasthenna sengko' ban ba'na reya tadha' bidana ban papasthenna keban. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Maske baramma'a, papasthenna manossa ban keban reya padha bai. Se settong mate, se laenna bariya keya. Se dhadhuwa' jareya padha mahlok. Daddi, manossa ta' apojuran dhari burun alas, sabab monggu ka se dhadhuwa' jareya odhi' reya tadha' gunana." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Kennengngan se etojju se dhadhuwa' jareya padha. Asalla padha dhari abu ban padha abaliya ka abu. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Sengko' ban ba'na ta' tao apa errohna manossa reya ongga ka attas ban errohna keban toron ka tana. 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Daddi sengko' apangrasa ja' monggu ka manossa tadha' se lebbi becce' dhari ane'madi hasella lalakonna. Laen dhari jareya tadha' pole se bisa elakone. Manossa ta' kera tao apa se kadaddiyana saellana mate. 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Saellana jareya sengko' netene pole sabarang se ta' adil se kadaddiyan e dunnya reya. Reng-oreng se etendhes nanges, ban tadha' se endha' nolonge. Tadha' oreng se endha' abanto sabab reng-oreng se nendhes neggu' kakobasa'an se raja." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Daddi ca'na tang pekker, reng-oreng se la mate, se la abit mate, asennengngan dhari oreng odhi', se sateya gi' padha odhi'." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Tape se lebbi senneng pole iya areya reng-oreng se gi' ta' lahir, sabab reng-oreng jareya gi' ta' nangale'e ka kajahadan se badha e dunnya reya." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Sengko' tao keya ja' reng-oreng e dunnya reya alako talebat berra'na, tadha' laen kajabana polana ere nangale'e hasella lalakonna tatanggana. Jareya lalakon se parcoma, akantha oreng nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Pera' oreng budhu se ju'-toju' ta' alalakon, neng-enneng sampe' mate kalaparan." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Olle daddi jareya bendher, tape lebbi becce' andhi' arta sakone' tape ate taremtem etembang alako berra' ngangguy tanang dhu kalaja ban nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Gi' badha pole barang se tadha' gunana e dunnya reya. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Badha oreng se odhi' karathongtheng, ta' andhi' ana' otaba taretan. Maske kantha jareya, oreng jareya terros alako berra', ban atena gi' arassa korang malolo, maske la bannya' artana. Ebagiya ka sapa arta ollena makalowar pello koneng ban nolak kasennengngan jareya? Jareya parcoma keya, pera' nyare sangsara e dhalem odhi'na." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kadhuwa'an lebbi ngontonge etembang kadibi'an. Mon alako kadhuwa'an, hasella tanto lebbi becce'." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Mon se settong labu, settonganna bisa nolonge. Tape mon oreng labu, mangkana kadibi'an, palang oreng jareya, sabab tadha' se bisa nolong." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 E baja malem mon teppa'na cellep, oreng kadhuwa se tedhung ajar-jajar bisa saleng maanga', tape baramma oreng se bisa'a anga' mon kadibi'an?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mon oreng kadhuwa'an ajalan abareng, bisa nangkes serrangan, tape oreng se kadibi'an gampang epakala. Tale tello lambar se epentel epadaddi settong malarat se epapegga'a." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Apojuran oreng ngodha se mesken tape penter katembang rato se la towa tape budhu ban ta' endha' narema babala'anna oreng. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Sabab oreng mesken bisa daddi rato, bariya keya oreng se kalowar dhari tahanan bisa ngalle ka korse karaja'an." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Sengko' mekkere parkara reng-oreng e dunnya reya, sengko' laju apangrasa ja' e antarana reng-oreng jareya tanto badha settong oreng ngodha se bakal aganteya rato." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ra'yat se epimpin olle daddi ta' kaetong bannya'na, tape saellana rato jareya tadha', tadha' oreng se asakalangkong ngenga'e kabecce'anna. Bendher onggu, kabbi jareya parcoma, akantha nyerser angen." 
Ecclesiastes4:17 Te-ngate mon entara ka Padalemman Socce. Lebbi becce' entar ka jadhiya ngedhingngagiya pangajaran etembang ngatorragiya kurban akantha reng-oreng se budhu. Reng-oreng jareya ta' bisa abida'agi se kemma se bendher ban se kemma se sala. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Pekker gallu sabellunna acaca, ban ja' ru-kaburu ajanji ka Allah. Sabab Allah badha e sowarga ban ba'na badha e bume, daddi ja' nya'-bannya' acaca." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Sajan waswas ate sajan gampang edhatengnge mempe juba'. Sajan bannya' acaca, sajan gampang makalowar caca se budhu." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Daddi, mon ba'na ajanji ka Allah, duli teptebbi janji jareya. Allah ta' kasokan ka oreng se atengka budhu. Daddi, teptebbi janjina." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Lebbi becce' ja' ajanji katembang ajanji tape ta' eteptebbi. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ja' sampe' ba'na makalowar ca'-oca' se andaddiyagi ba'na dusa, sampe' ba'na kapaksa ngoca' ka imam se aladine Pangeran, ja' ba'na kalero ajanji. Arapa'a ba'na me' maduka'a Allah ka ba'na sampe' hasella lalakonna ba'na epaancor kabbi?" 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Akantha mempe rowa bannya' se tadha' artena, bariya keya bannya' caca se tadha' gunana. Tape patako' ka Pangeran." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ba'na ja' getton mon nangale'e pangobasa nendhes oreng mesken, arampas ha'na reng-oreng jareya ban ta' adil ka reng-oreng jareya. Saneyap ponggaba eaobi bi' attasanna, dineng ponggaba ban attasanna jareya eaobi bi' pangraja se atenggiyan pole pangkadda." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 La'-mala' odhi'na rato targantong keya dhari hasella tamennan. 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Oreng se amata pesse ta' tao arassa cokop pessena; oreng se gila ka arta arassa kaontonganna korang terros. Jareya kabbi parcoma. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Sajan bannya' artana oreng, sajan bannya' keya oreng se kodu epakane. Orengnga se andhi' ta' ontong pa-apa, pera' tao ja' aba'na sogi." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Oreng se daddi koli olle daddi ngakan ta' cokop, tape sakone'na bisa tedhung ngeddha. Sabaligga oreng sogi se talebat bannya' artana, ta' ngeddha tedhung polana tako'." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Sengko' nangale'e barang se mangennes ate e dunnya reya: Oreng nompo' arta kaangguy e bakto kakorangan. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Tape arta jareya elang lantaran palang, sampe' tadha' se esangkollagiya ka na'-ana'na." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Manossa reya kalowar dhari gandhu'anna ebuna abangkang; bariya keya adina'agiya dunnya reya ta' kalaban ngeba pa-apa dhari sabarang ollena se alako berra'. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ngennes onggu! Manossa ondur akantha padhatengnga. Arapa'a me' so-lesso nyerser angen, apa ollena?" 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Saomorra manossa reya ga'-raga'an e pettengnga, sossa, waswas, peggel ban sake' ate." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Daddi sateya sengko' ngarte ja' se paleng bagus ka manossa reya iya areya ngakan, ngenom ban ngarassa'agi kobassana hasella lalakonna saabidda odhi'na se sakejja', se eparengngagi Allah ka manossa; Sabab jareya papasthenna manossa." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Mon oreng narema kasogiyan ban arta dhari Allah, ban oreng jareya eedine ane'madi kasogiyan jareya, oreng jareya kodu arassa sokkor ban ane'madi hasella lalakonna. Jareya paparengnga Allah keya." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Allah mossa'e atena oreng jareya bi' kagumbira'an, daddi oreng jareya ta' kene' ate mekkere odhi'na se pera' sakejja' reya." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Sengko' nangale'e pole barang se ta' adil se talebat nyeksa manossa e dunnya reya. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Kadhang Allah marenge kasogiyan, kahormadan, ban arta ka oreng sampe' tadha' pole se ekaterrowe oreng jareya, tape bi' Allah oreng jareya ta' eedine ane'madi papareng jareya. Sabaligga, oreng laen se ta' ekataowe oreng jareya se bakal ane'madi papareng jareya. Daddi jareya kabbi parcoma ban mangennes ate." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Maske oreng andhi' ana' saratos sarta odhi' abit sampe' towa, tape mon odhi'na ta' senneng ban ta' ekoburragi sapantessa, menorot tang panemmo, babaji' se mate e bakto lahir lebbi becce' katembang oreng jareya." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Sabab monggu ka babaji' jareya ta' daddi so'al apa aba'na elahirragi otaba enja'; babaji' jareya ondur ka pettengnga, pas ta' ekaenga'e oreng." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Babaji' jareya ta' tao nangale'e sonarra are, ban ta' ngarte apa artena odhi' reya, daddi bisa tedhung taremtem." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Jareya abecce'an katembang oreng se odhi' dhu ratos taon tape ta' tao senneng atena. Sabab se kadhuwa jareya padha nojju ka settong kennengngan se padha, ta' iya?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Manossa reya alako pera' sopaja bisa'a ngakan, tape ta' tao arassa cokop." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Daddi apa ontongnga oreng penter mon ebandhing ban oreng budhu? Apa pole gunana mon oreng mesken atengka bagus e nga'-tengnga'anna masarakat? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Jareya kabbi parcoma, akantha oreng nyerser angen. Lebbi bagus atena narema sabarang se bisa ekaandhi' aba'na, katembang ros-terrosan terro jang bannya'an pole." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Sabarang se badha reya la badha dhari lamba'. Ba'na tao ja' manossa ta' bisa alaban ka oreng se akowadan dhari aba'na. 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Sajan abit se alaban, sajan ta' eanggep cacana, la'-mala' ta' olle kaontongan pa-apa." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Baramma oreng se taowa apa se paleng becce' ka aba'na e dhalem odhi'na se pandha' ban ta' aguna, se pera' lebat akantha jang-bajangan reya? Baramma oreng se bisa'a ngarte apa se kadaddiyana e dunnya reya saellana aba'na la tadha'?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Nyama se ro'om aparlowan dhari mennya' se larang; are e bakto mate lebbi becce' dhari are e bakto buru egandhu' ebu. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lebbi becce' entar ka bengko kasossa'an katembang entar ka kennengnganna pesta. Sabab manossa kodu ros-terrosan ngenga'e ja' maot anante' saneyap oreng. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kasossa'an lebbi becce' katembang kaperagen. Sanajjan mowa orem asal ate loggang. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Oreng budhu terros nyerser kasennengngan; oreng penter ros-terrosan mekker kamateyan. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Lebbi becce' epaenga' salana bi' oreng se bicaksana katembang ealem oreng se budhu. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Gella'na oreng budhu tadha' artena, akantha monyena dhuri se ekello' apoy." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Mon oreng se bicaksana nepo oreng, jareya lalakon se budhu; mon oreng narema pesse sogo', rosak babategga." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Aherra settong parkara lebbi becce' dhari parmola'anna; ate sabbar lebbi bagus dhari ate gumbira. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ja' ru-kaburu norodi peggella ate; pera' oreng budhu se nyempen sake' ate. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ja' atanya, ‘Arapa jaman lamba' me' anyamanan dhari jaman sateya?’ Pera' oreng gendheng se atanya kantha jareya." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Oreng odhi' masthena andhi' hekmat; argana hekmat reya padha ban sangkolan; 
Ecclesiastes7:12 padha ban pesse se mataremtem ate. Apa pole pangataowan parkara hekmat! Sapa se andhi' pangataowan jareya bakal salamedda. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Kodda' tetene sabarang se elampa'agi Allah. Sapa se bisa'a maloros sabarang se epabilu' bi' Allah? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Daddi pagumbira mon ba'na teppa'na pojur. Tape mon ba'na teppa'na palang, ja' loppa ja' kasennengngan ban kasossa'an jareya padha dhari Allah asalla. Manossa ta' tao apa se bakal dhatengnga." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Odhi'na sengko' reya tadha' gunana, tape e dhalem tang odhi' reya badha se etangale'e sengko', iya areya: Badha oreng se becce' mate, maske aba'na abakte ka Allah jareya, ban badha oreng se jahat lanjang omorra maske terros agabay dusa." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ja' ce'-becce' gallu, ban ja' bicaksana parana. Apa gunana aradda'?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Bariya keya ja' hat-jahat parana ban ja' dhu-budhu gallu. Arapa'a ba'na me' terro mateya sabellunna baktona? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Jauwi se dhadhuwa' jareya. Mon ba'na tako' ka Allah, tanto becce' hasella." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Oreng se andhi' hekmat lebbi parjuga katembang sapolo pangobasa e settong kottha. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 E bume reya tadha' oreng se samporna; tadha' oreng se terros becce' ban ta' tao agabay dusa. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ja' dujan ngedhingngagi cacana oreng, sopaja ba'na ta' sampe' ngedhing ja' ba'na ebasto barengnga." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Ba'na dibi' apangrasa ja' ba'na tao abasto oreng keya. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Jareya kabbi bi' sengko' eoji ngangguy tang hekmat. Tape sajan esare hekmat jareya, sajan jau dhari sengko'." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Sapa se bisa nemmo artena odhi' reya? Talebat dhalem, malarat se epahamana." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Tape sengko' bajeng ajar ban nyare pangataowan, sopaja olleya hekmat ban jawabanna sakabbinna tang partanya'an. Sengko' ngoddi sopaja ngarteya ja' dusa reya lalakon se budhu parana ban kajahadan reya kanekadan." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Sengko' sateya tao ja' babine' reya apae'an dhari maot. Kataresna'anna babine' reya akantha jala ban jebbak se to-sabakto bisa ajira' mangsana. Pagellu'na akantha kalenthong se cekka' ce' serredda. Oreng se ajalannagi kasokanna Allah epalopot dhari jira'na, tape oreng se dusa bakal etawana." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Abas, dhabuna Se Ahli Pekker. Jareya kabbi se etemmo bi' sengko', e bakto gan satengka' sengko' nyare jawaban." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Sengko' gi' terros keya nyare jawaban laenna, tape ta' ahasel. E antarana oreng saebu sengko' nemmo lalake' settong se ehormadi bi' sengko'. Tape e antarana reng-oreng jareya tadha' babine' settonga se ehormadi bi' sengko'." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Pera' reya se ekataowe sengko': Allah abadhi manossa reya majja ban biyasa. Manossa dibi' se agabay aba'na daddi malarat ban alet-bulet. 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Senneng onggu oreng se bicaksana. Oreng jareya tao jawabanna sakabbinna parkara. Hekmadda manossa andaddiyagi mowana nyonar ban bibirra mesem gumbira. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ta'adi papakonna rato bit sompana ba'na ka Allah. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Rato bisa alampa'agi apa'a bai sakencengnga, mon rato ta' cocok, lebbi becce' duli jauwi." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Dhabuna rato epakalowar kalaban wibawa, tadha' se bangal alaban ka salerana." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Oreng se ta'at ka rato jareya aman taremtem odhi'na; oreng penter tao bila ban baramma atoro' dhabuna ratona. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Sabarang reya badha baktona ban carana tape talebat sakone' se epahame manossa! 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Tadha' oreng settonga se tao papasthen apa se bakal etarema'a, ban tadha' se bisa ngoca' apa se bakal kadaddiyana." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Tadha' oreng settonga bisa nahan otaba manyorot ajalla. Jareya perrang se ta' bisa esenglae; manossa ta' bisa lopot dhari jareya, maske ngangguya akkal apa'a bai." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Sengko' nangale'e reya kabbi e bakto sengko' netene sakabbinna kadaddiyan e dunnya reya. Kadhang manossa ngangguy kakobasa'anna kaangguy macalaka' sasamana. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Sengko' tao nangale'e oreng jahat mate laju ekoburragi. Tape e bakto reng-oreng jareya mole samarena pangoburanna, reng-oreng jareya ngalem oreng jahat buru e kottha kennengnganna oreng jareya alako jahat. Jareya barang se parcoma keya." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Arapa oreng me' ce' gampangnga ngalakone kajahadan? Lantaran ta' duli eberri' okoman. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Maske oreng jahat agabay dusa saratos kale bannya'na, oreng jareya paggun odhi' lanjang omorra. Tape oreng se ta'at ka Allah gampang odhi'na." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Sabaligga oreng jahat bannya' nemmo kasossa'an. Odhi'na ceppet lebat akantha jang-bajangan. Bakal mateya gi' dha-ngodhana, lantaran ta' ta'at ka Allah." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Tape jareya lecek kabbi. Abas bai apa se sabendherra badha e dunnya reya: Badha oreng se abakte ka Allah eokom epakantha oreng daraka, badha oreng jahat se eberri' ganjaran epakantha oreng se ta'at ka Allah. Jareya barang se parcoma keya." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Daddi pandha'na, ca'na sengko' oreng reya kodu pagumbira. Sabab e dhalem odhi'na e dunnya reya tadha' kasennengngan laen monggu ka aba'na, kajabana ngakan, ngenom ban anga-bunga. Pera' jareya se bisa ene'madi aba'na e dhalem lessona se alalakon, saabidda odhi'na se eparengngagi Allah ka aba'na." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 E bakto sengko' aehteyar sopaja andhi'a hekmat, ban netene sakabbinna kadaddiyan e dunnya reya, sengko' apangrasa ja' maske manossa reya alako berra' seyang malem tadha' ambuna," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 manossa ta' kera ngarte sabarang se elampa'agi Allah. Maske aehteyar baramma'a bai, ta' kera badha se paham parkara jareya. Oreng penter ngako tao, tape sanyatana ta' tao." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Jareya kabbi bi' sengko' epekker epagu-onggu. Sengko' tao ja' Allah reya se ngator odhi'na oreng se teppa' ban se bicaksana, bariya keya mon oreng jareya andhi' ate taresna otaba ate baji'. Tadha' se taowa apa se bakal kadaddiyana e budhi are." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Pajat bendher papasthenna oreng reya padha kabbi: Oreng se jujur otabana se daraka, oreng se bagus otaba se jahat, oreng se berse otabana se najjis, oreng se ngatorragi kurban otabana se ta' ngatorragi kurban. Oreng becce' ta' apojuran dhari oreng se dusa, oreng se asompa padha ban oreng se ta' endha' asompa." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Daddi reng-oreng jareya kabbi papasthenna padha. Ban jareya tamaso' settong parkara se mangennes akantha kadaddiyan se kemma'a bai e dunnya reya. Saomorra atena manossa possa' ban kajahadan, pekkeranna possa' ban kabudhuwan. O-tao pas napa' ka ajalla." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Tape saabidda oreng gi' odhi', gi' badha pangarebban. Sabab pate' se odhi' asennengngan dhari macan se ta' anyaba." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Paleng enja', oreng odhi' tao ja' aba'na mateya, dineng oreng mate ta' tao pa-apa. Monggu ka oreng mate tadha' opana, la'-mala' nyamana la ta' ekaenga'e oreng laenna." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ate taresna, baji' ban napsona, noro' mate kabbi ban aba'na. Aba'na la ta' ro'-noro' pa-apa e dhalem sakabbinna kadaddiyan e dunnya." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Mara, kakan bai ban pasenneng. Enom anggurra paperak. Allah ta' kaberradan, la'-mala' Salerana kasokan." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Dina mowana ba'na me' olle cengngar. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ne'madi odhi' reya ban binena ba'na se kataresnan saabidda odhi'na ba'na tadha' gunana se eparengngagi Allah ka ba'na e dunnya. Ne'madi sabban are maske tadha' gunana. Sabab opana pello konengnga ba'na pera' jareya. 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Lakone sakabbinna tugassa ba'na paamba' pate. Sabab dhaggi' tadha' pekkeran otaba lako pole. Tadha' elmo otaba hekmat e dunnyana oreng mate. Ban ka jadhiya se bi' ba'na kodu eentare. 
Ecclesiastes9:11 E dunnya reya badha pole se etangale sengko': Se mennang parlomba'an ta' salanjangnga oreng se santa' paberka'na, se mennang perrang ta' salanjangnga oreng se kowat. Oreng bicaksana ta' salanjangnga nemmo kasap. Ban oreng se penter ta' salanjangnga olle kasogiyan. Bariya keya para ahli ta' salanjangnga kasohor. Sabab sapa'a bai bisa ekenneng papasthen se juba'." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Manossa ta' tao bila sa'adda se dhapa'a. Akantha mano' se tajira' ban juko' se ekenneng jala, bariya keya manossa kateban balai e sa'at se ta' eka-sangka." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Areya' conto se paleng teppa' baramma oreng ngargai hekmat e dunnya reya: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Badha kottha kene' se pandhudhu'na sakone'. E settong are kottha jareya elorok rato raja. Kottha jareya ekeppong ban pagar alassa la para' epagujura. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 E kottha jareya badha oreng mesken se bicaksana. Kalaban kabicaksana'anna jareya oreng buru masalamet kottha jareya. Tape sarrena aba'na mesken, jasana ceppet ekaloppae; tadha' oreng settonga se enga' ka oreng jareya." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Daddi, bendher ca'na sengko' ja' hekmat reya alebbiyan dhari kakowadan. Sanajjan kantha jareya hekmadda oreng mesken ta' eparduli oreng. Cacana tadha' se ngedhingngagi." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Lebbi becce' ngedhingngagi cacana oreng se andhi' elmo se ekoca'agi kalaban ayem, katembang cacana pangobasa se eera'agi e dhalem kompolanna reng-oreng gendheng." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Hekmat lebbi aguna dhari sanjata, tape oreng kasorang se kalero bisa majuba' oreng bagus sabannya'na." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Babathangnga lala' mabaceng mennya' ro'om sabutol, hekmat se tenggi epaelang kabudhuwan se sakone'." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 La kappra mon oreng penter ajalannagi kabecce'an ban oreng budhu ajalannagi kajahadan. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Kabudhuwanna katon dhari tengka gulina. Kagendhengnganna eduduwagi ka sakabbinna oreng. 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Mon ba'na edukane pangobasa, ja' menta ambu dhari lalakonna. Maske raja kasala'anna ba'na, mon sabbar ban kalem ba'na esapora keya." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Badha kajahadan laen se etangale sengko' e dunnya reya, iya areya panyalewenganna para pangobasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Oreng budhu eberri'i pangkat se molja, oreng raja eberri' kennengngan se mandhap." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Sengko' tao nangale'e nor-dunor nompa' jaran, dineng oreng agung ajalan soko akantha dunor." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Sapa se ngale lobang tanto tabalusok ka dhalemmanna; sapa se agubang geddhung bakal ekekke'a olar se mandi opassa. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Sapa se alako e pangaleyanna bato tanto loka polana bato jareya. Sapa se nyeba' kaju olle daddi calaka' sampe' ena badanna. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Mon birangnga ba'na tompol ban ta' egangse ba'na kodu alako lebbi berra'. Angguy akkalla se sehat, apa se elakonana ator kaadha' sabellunna." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Mon olar ngekke' sabellunna epanotot bi' wa'-duwa', dhukonna olar tanto la tadha' gunana." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Cacana oreng penter andaddiyagi aba'na ehormadi, tape oreng budhu mate polana cacana dibi'." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Dha'-adha'na molae ban caca se tadha' parlona, dhi-budhina cacana akantha oreng gila." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Oreng budhu pajat bannya' cacana. Tadha' oreng se tao kadaddiyan apa se bakal dhatengnga. Tadha' se bisa nebbak apa se kadaddiyana mon sengko' ban ba'na la tadha'. 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Coma oreng budhu se ta' tao jalan ka bengkona, alako berra' tadha' ambuna." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Palang nagara se ratona gi' ce' ngodhana, ban ja-pangrajana samalem benteng apesta tadha' ambuna." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Pojur nagara se ratona ehormat ban ekatako'e ra'yat, se ja-pangrajana pera' ngakan mon la napa' baktona, ta' endha' mabu' ban penter ngampet atena." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ata'na bengko tanto bucor mon ta' epateppa', dhi-budhina bengko jareya mopok lantaran kamalessan." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Pesta magella' oreng, ban anggur maperak atena oreng. Tape se epamajara parlo pesse." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ja' ca'-ngoca'e rato, maske pera' e dhalem ate. Ja' mesowe oreng sogi, maske e katedhunganna dibi'. Olle daddi mano' ngedhing se ekoca'agi ba'na, pas ekabala ka orengnga." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Saba' pessena ba'na e dhalem usaha e nagara manca, tanto e budhi are ba'na olle kaontonganna." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Saba' bandhana ba'na e pan-barampan usaha dagang; nyare usaha sanya'-bannya'na. Sabab oreng kodu aga-jaga sabellunna dhateng mosiba. 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Mon kajuwan robbu, addhep dha' emma'a bai parobbuna tanto malang e kennengnganna parobbuna keya. Mon ondhem agandhu' aeng sampe' sarat, tanto ojan derres gaggar ka bume reya." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Mon oreng anante' angen ban mosem sampe' samporna, ta' kera tao rassana namen ban molong hasella." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Allah se agabay sakabbinna, manossa ta' kera ngarte ka se elampa'agi Salerana; ban ta' kera ngarte keya baramma tombuna mahlok se anyar e dhalem gandhu'anna ebuna." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Tabur ne-binena ba'na e baja laggu, maske la malem ja' sampe' ambu. Sabab ba'na ta' tao taburan se kemma se bagus tombuna. Olle daddi se etabur malem ban se etabur seyang padha samporna tombuna." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Tera'na are masenneng ate; saapa gumbirana mon bisa ngarassa'agi nyamanna. 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ba'na kodu asokkor mon atamba omor. Tape senga', maske ba'na abit odhi' e bume, baktona ba'na e alam maot jang abidan pole. Daddi apa pole se earebba? Jareya kabbi parcoma ban tadha' gunana." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Para ngangodhadan, ne'madi odhi'na ba'na gi' ngodhana. Pagumbira saabidda ba'na gi' ta' towa. Torodi apa pangaterrona ba'na, jalannagi sakabbinna neyadda atena. Tape kaenga'e, Allah se badha e sowarga, pagi' ngadilana sabarang lalakonna ba'na." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Buwang kakobateran ban kasossa'anna dhari atena, sabab bakto ngodha reya ta' saapa abidda." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kaenga'e Panceptana ba'na pongpong ba'na gi' ngodha, sabellunna ngadhebbi on-taon se ngeba sangsara. E bakto jareya ba'na tanto ngoca' kantha reya, “Ta' bajjra onggu tang odhi' reya.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Mon bakto jareya la napa', matana ba'na la ta' terrang, la ta' pasda ka sonarra are, bulan ban bintang. Ondhem kandel se ngeba ojan, bakal terrosa noro' bunte' ba'na, ngara ba'na salanjangnga." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Lengngenna ba'na ngetter ban ta' bisa ajaga kasalameddan pole. Bettessa se thengtheng ta' jekjek tadha' kakowadanna sakale. Gigina la ta' genna' ta' ekenneng pangael kakanan. Matana rabeng, pangabassa ta' terrang." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Rammena lorong ta' saapa ekaedhing ka kopengnga, mosik ban panggilingan katon mar-samar monyena. Ba'na ta' ngeddha patedhungnga, ngedhing monyena mano' bai ba'na laju jaga." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ba'na tako' ongga'a ka kennengngan se tenggi, mon ajalan kodu te-ngate. Obu'na la pote, mon ajalan sokona eeret. Ate la ta' andhi' karep ban pangaterro sakale. Sengko' ban ba'na reya entara ka kennengngan se dhi-budhina, reng-oreng e salanjangnga lorong padha nanges sarta sossa." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Rantay salaka bakal pegga'a ban asa-pesa; damar emmas bakal gaggara terros bella; talena temba pegga' ban rosak; gendhi ancor car-kalacer sabalattrana. 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Badanna sengko' ban ba'na bakal abaliya daddi abu ban tana. Nyaba se maodhi' sengko' ban ba'na bakal abaliya ka Allah. Salerana se apareng nyaba jareya ka sengko' ban ba'na. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Ca'na sengko', jareya kabbi pajat tadha' gunana, kabbi parcoma, tadha' artena." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Se Ahli Pekker jareya penter ban bicaksana, daddi eajarragi ka ommat sakabbinna pangataowanna. Bannya' bangsalan se eajari, bendher enja'na laju eoji." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Pangkotbah jareya nyare ca'-oca' se alepor ate, ca'-oca' se etoles reya jujur, ta' lecek." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Cacana oreng se penter reya akantha tongkedda oreng ngowan se tajem konco'na, tongket se eangguy ajaga dumbana. Kompolanna bangsalan ban babala'an, akantha pako se naccek koko. Jareya kabbi paparengnga Allah keya, se ngowan sengko' ban ba'na, se settong tadha' dhuwa'na." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Na', badha pole se kodu epekker ba'na kalaban te-ngate. Noles buku tadha' marena, tabannya' gallu ajar malesso badan ban sokma." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Saellana kabbi bi' sengko' etembang, areya' rengkessan se etemmo bi' sengko'. Patako' ka Allah, ban toro' sakabbinna papakonna, sabab manossa ecepta'agi pera' kaangguy kaparlowan jareya." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Allah ngadilana sakabbinna lalakonna sengko' ban ba'na, se juba' ban se bagus, la'-mala' keya sabarang se ta' etangale oreng." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Mastekana jung-kejungan anggidanna Sulaiman. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Seyom abdidalem sareng latheepon junandalem; kataresna'annepon junandalem akobassa'an dhari anggur. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Junandalem asareddhemman ro'omma, akadi mennya' ro'om se nompa; daddi junandalem ekaleburi ban-paraban sadajana!" 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ngereng duliyan asareng abdidalem, Guste Rato bakta'agi abdidalem ka kamar. Lantaran junandalem abdidalem sadaja padha perak, sareng ngalem kataresna'annepon junandalem ngalangkonge anggur; pantes ban-paraban padha lebur ka junandalem." 
SongOfSongs1:5 E, babine'an Yerusalim, maske celleng sengko' raddin; celleng akantha mah-kemah Kedar, tape lebur akantha dhen-kordhen e karatonna Sulaiman!" 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ja' abas tang kole' se celleng, sabab sengko' kapanasan sonarra are. Tang ka'-kaka' gigir ka sengko'; sengko' esoro alako e kebbun anggur; sampe' ta' andhi' bakto ngorosa tang aba' dibi'." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngereng dhabuwagi, kakase, e ka'dhimma junandalem ngowan ba-dumbana, epatedhung e ka'dhimma sareng junandalem e baja asar? Masa' abdidalem alenglenga nyare'e se junandalem e antarana ba-dumbana ca-kancaepon junandalem?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Masa' ba'na ta' tao kennengnganna, e, se raddin e antara babine'an? Toro' bai lampadda sokona ba-dumba se bannya' rowa, owan bi'-embi'na ba'na e seddi'na parkemahanna reng-oreng ngowan." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Kakase, ba'na akantha jaran bine' se narek karetana rato Messer." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Pepena ba'na ce' leburra katotoban eyasan, le'erra bagus ngangguy kalong mamatan." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sengko' kabbi agabayyagi ba'na eyasan dhari emmas epobuwi ne'-mane' salaka. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Sabatara tang rato ren-sarenan, tang mennya' ro'om asareddhemman." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Tang kakase akantha mennyan ro'omma, e bakto marobbu e tang dhadha." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Tang kakase akantha bungkana kembang pacar e bun-kebbun anggur En-Gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Raddin onggu ba'na, le', raddin onggu ba'na! Matana nyonar agandhu' taresna." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Junandalem bagus onggu, kaka', junandalem gantheng onggu! Katedhunganna junandalem sareng abdidalem neng e rebba se biru." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Kalenggiyannepon junandalem sareng abdidalem ngangguy cangga bungkana aras, ata'na dhari bungkana comara." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Abdidalem namong mawar dhari Saron, kembang kacobung e ra-cora." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Akantha kembang kacobung e ombut se adhuri, kantha jareya tang kakase e antarana para pottre." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Akantha bungkana appel e tengngana ka'-bungka'an e alas, kantha jareya tang kakase e antarana lalake'an. Sengko' senneng ngaop e baba'anna, buwana padha manes rassana." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Sengko' egiba ka kennengnganna pesta, pangabassa ka sengko' noduwagi taresnana." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mara, ra, sengko' reya pakowattagi bi' manesan buwana anggur, paseggerragi sengko' reya bi' buwana appel, sabab sengko' reya sake' asmara." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Tanang kacerra nagenne tang cethak, tanang kanganna agellu' tang badan." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Mara ajanji, e, babine'an Yerusalim, demi dang-keddang ban manjangan e ra-ara, ja' ba'na ta' agangguwa kataresna'an reya, sabellunna katekkan se daddi pangaterrona." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Edhingngagi! Tang kakase rabu, akantha budhu'na manjangan otabana keddang. Ca'-lonca'an e nong-gunong, ca'-kenca'an e mo'-gumo'. Abas, rowa' ngadek e budhina geddhung, socana re-sareyan, nyorne' dhari ca'-raca'na candhela." 
SongOfSongs2:9  
SongOfSongs2:10 Edhingngagi, tang kakase adhabu ka sengko'. Mara dha' enna', le', mara dha' enna'!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Abas, mosem cellep la lebat nembara' la lobar." 
SongOfSongs2:12 E teggal bang-kembang padha mekkar; mosem notto la napa'; oreng ngedhing monyena keteran e tanana sengko' ban ba'na. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Bungkana ara la molae badha buwana; bungkana anggur aro'oman kembangnga. Mara dha' enna', le', mara dha' enna'." 
SongOfSongs2:14 O, tang dara se badha e ke'-lekke'na bato, e pangeteggan e bung-lambungnga gunong se durjet, mara patao robana ba'na ka sengko', mara pakaedhing sowarana, sabab robana ba'na raddin, sowarana tenne." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Pega' rang-garangan rowa, rang-garangan ne'-kene' se marosak kebbun anggur, sabab tang kebbun anggur teppa'na ngembang." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Tang kakase reya tang andhi', ban sengko' reya kaagunganna; salerana se ngowan ba-dumbana e antarana bang-kembang kacobung" 
SongOfSongs2:17 sampe' angen laggu molae dhateng, ban jang-bajangan elang. Ngereng abali, kakase, pakadi keddang, pakadi budhu'epon manjangan e Pagunongan Beter." 
SongOfSongs3:1 E baja malem, e tang katedhungan, e dhalem mempe sengko' nyare tang kakase, sengko' nyare, tape ta' etemmo." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Sengko' jaga'a alenglenga e kottha, kabbi lorong ejalanana. Sengko' nyareya buwana tang ate; bi' sengko' esare, tape ta' etemmo." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Sengko' etemmo oreng se apattrol e kottha, sengko' laju atanya, “Ponapa sampeyan ta' tapanggi sareng buwana ate kaula?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Sengko' buru nyengla dhari reng-oreng se apattrol jareya laju tatemmo ban tang buwana ate. Bi' sengko' eteggu', ta' eocol pole, pas egiba ka bengkona tang ebu, ka kamarra oreng se alahirragi sengko'." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Mara ajanji, babine'an Yerusalim, demi dang-keddang ban manjangan e ra-ara, ja' ba'na ta' agangguwa tang kataresna'an reya, sabellunna katekkan se daddi pangaterrona." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Apa rowa se dhateng dhari sagara beddhi, akantha okos se apel-kempel? Ro'omma akantha dupa ban mennyan, ban beddha'na gang-dagang se aro'oman." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Abas, rowa' tandhuna Sulaiman, ekalenglenge oreng se parjuga sabidak oreng, reng-oreng parjuga dhari bangsa Isra'il," 
SongOfSongs3:8 se padha andhi' pangalaman e dhalem perrang. Reng-oreng jareya padha nyongkel peddhang, asadhiya ngadhebbi serrangan e baja malem." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Sulaiman abadhi tandhu dhari kaju se paleng bagus. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Canggana dhari salaka, panyandharanna dhari emmas. Kalenggiyanna barnana bungo terrong, esolam babine'an Yerusalim kalaban senneng ate." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Mara kalowar, babine'an Siyon, tenggu Rato Sulaiman se ngagem jamang se epasangngagi ebuna, e bakto akabin, e are se magumbira panggaliyanna." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ba'na ce' raddinna, le', ba'na raddin onggu! Mata e budhiyanna totobba mowana ba'na akantha dara; obu'na ba'na akantha embi' saambalan, se toron dhari mo'-gumo' Gileyad." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Gigina ba'na pote akantha dumba saambalan se buru ecokor ban epandhi'i badanna; sang-sapasang akantha budhu'na dumba kembar, maske settonga tadha' se elang." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Bibirra ba'na akantha pita mera, colo'na ba'na ce' leburra. Pepena akantha dalima saseba', ngetek e budhiyanna totobba mowana." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Le'erra ba'na akantha manarana Daud se epaddek epanyempen sanjata. Kalongnga akantha tameng saebu, gadana para pahlawan." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Sosona ba'na akantha budhu'na manjangan dhadhuwa', otaba budhu'na keddang kembar se teppa'na amba e antarana bang-kembang kacobung." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Sengko' ce' terrona entara ka gunong ban ka gumo' mennyan, sampe' angen laggu ngalesser, mamosna papetteng baja malem." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ba'na ce' raddinna, le', tadha' calena sakale." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mara toron ban sengko' dhari Gunong Libanon, le', mara toron ban sengko' dhari Gunong Libanon. Toron dhari konco'na Amana, dhari konco'na Senir ban Hermon, kennengnganna macan ban macan toltol." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ba'na ngapencot tang ate, le', tang pangantan, tang ate kapencot ban pangabassa matana, kalaban kalong mamatan se ngeyase le'erra." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Kobassa onggu taresnana ba'na, le', tang pangantan, akobassa'an dhari anggur. Mennya'na ba'na ro'om asareddhemman, alebbidan dhari racegan apa'a bai." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Cacana ba'na manes, le', akantha maddu se morne ban susu. Kalambina ba'na ro'omma akantha Gunong Libanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Tang kakase kebbun se apagar geddhung, kebbun se apagar geddhung, somber se ekonci." 
SongOfSongs4:13 E dhissa' tombu ka-bungkana dalima, se buwana paleng nyaman. Kembangnga pacar ban om-ro'oman," 
SongOfSongs4:14 om-ro'oman ban konye', kaju manes ban tebbu, ban bungkana mennyan acem-macem. Mennyan ban garu, ban om-ro'oman se acem-macem." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Dhari somber e tang kebbun nancel aeng odhi' se agili dhari Libanon. 
SongOfSongs4:16 Mara jaga, angen dhaja, mara dha' enna' angen lao'! Mara dhateng ka tang kebbun, me' olle ro'omma asareddhemman. Moga tang kakase rabuwa ka kebbunna, ban adha'ar wa'-buwa'an se nyaman." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Sengko' dhateng ka tang kebbun, le', tang pangantan, sengko' makompol mennyan ban racegan om-ro'oman; sengko' ngakan lebunna nyarowan ban tang maddu, ngenom tang aeng anggur ban susu. Mara ngakan ban nom-enoman, kanca, enom pasampe' mabu' kasmaran!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Sengko' tedhung, tape tang ate jaga. Edhingngagi, tang kakase nokthok labang. Bukka' labangnga, le', tang kakase, tang mano' dara, tang buwana ate; tang cethak bacca ekenneng ebbun, tang obu' ecapcabi ebbun malem." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Kalambi abdidalem ampon ebukka'; ponapa epasanga pole? Soko abdidalem ampon ebaccowe, ponapa epakotora pole?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Tang ate dhek-gadheggan polana tang kakase neggu' gu'-teggu'na labang. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Daddi sengko' jaga mokka'ana labang tang kakase. Mennyan nyapcap dhari tang tanang ban tang garigi', sampe' gu'-teggu'na kancengnga labang bacca." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Tang kakase bi' sengko' ebukka'e labang, tape tang kakase la ondur. Sengko' ce' kerrongnga ka sowarana; bi' sengko' esare, tape ta' etemmo keya. Bi' sengko' eolok asmana tape ta' nyaot sakeccaba balakka'." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Sengko' etemmo bi' reng-oreng se apattrol e kottha; sengko' epokol ban epaloka; tang salendhang erampas ban ekala'. 
SongOfSongs5:8 Mara ajanji, babine'an Yerusalim, mon ba'na nemmo tang kakase, kabala'agi ja' sengko' sake' kasmaran." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Paraban se paleng raddin, apa kakasena ba'na alebbiyan dhari kakase en-laenna? Apa kakasena ba'na alebbiyan dhari kakase en-laenna, me' bi' ba'na sengko' kabbi esoro ajanji kantha jareya?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Tang kakase gaga' gantheng, settong e antarana salaksa." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Serana akantha emmas, emmas morne, rambudda aba'-omba' ban celleng, celleng akantha dhangdhang." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Socana akantha dara se badha e somberra aeng, dara se mandhi susu, toju' e penggirra taman." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Pepena akantha kebbun palappa se ro'om, lathena akantha kembang kacobung se agili mennyan se asli." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Astana bagus, asesser emmas ban mamatan, badanna akantha gaddhing ataretes bato mamatan." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Bettessa akantha ga-cangga marmar se pote, se elanggane emmas morne. Paraba'anna gaga' akantha nong-gunong Libanon lebur akantha bungkana aras." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Padhabuna lemma' manes, apana bai ngapencot ate. Kantha jareya tang kakase, ban tang kanca, babine'an Yerusalim." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Entar dha' emma kakasena ba'na paraban se paleng raddin? Entar dha' emma kakasena ba'na, mara etolongana nyare?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Tang kakase meyos ka kebbunna, ka kebbunna pa-palappa ngowan ba-dumbana e kebbun, ban metthek bang-kembang kacobung." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Sengko' reya kaagunganna tang kakase, salerana tang andhi', salerana ngowan ba-dumba e nga'-tengnga'anna kembang kacobung." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ba'na raddin, le' raddinna akantha kottha Yerusalim, akantha kottha Tirzah. Ba'na ngapencot ate, akantha tantara ban bul-ombulla." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Mara atole ka sengko', sabab sengko' bingong nangale'e pangabassa ba'na. Obu'na ba'na akantha embi' se pak-ampagan, se toron dhari mo'-gumo' Gileyad." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Gigina ba'na pote akantha ba-dumba se buru ecokor ban epandhi'i sabadan; sang-sapasang akantha dhu'-budhu'na dumba se kembar tadha' se elang settonga balakka'. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Pepena ba'na akantha dalima saseba', ta' etangale, badha e budhina kodhungnga mowana." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Maske badha sabidak prameswari, ban ballung polo seller, sarta ban-paraban ce' bannya'na," 
SongOfSongs6:9 tape pera' settong buwana ate se ekaterrowe sengko', se raddin akantha dara, ana' nonggal kakasena ebuna. Ban-paraban padha ngabas ban padha ngalem, para prameswari ban para seller heran nangale'e robana." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Sapa rowa se dhateng akantha pajjar se buru ngombar, lebur akantha bulan pornama, tera' akantha are? Ngapencot ate, akantha tantara se ngeba bul-ombulla?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Sengko' entar ka kebbun konale, ngabasa bang-kembang e cora; pola bungkana anggur me' la kalowar pocedda kembang, ban bungkana dalima la padha ngembang." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Sengko' rep-ngarep kataresna'anna ba'na, akantha oreng se terro nompa'a kareta perrang abarengnga ban oreng agung." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Mara, paraban Sulam, mara padha atari, sopaja sengko' ngennenga nenggu. Arapa ba'na me' terro nangaleyana sengko' teppa'na atari e antarana barisanna reng-oreng se padha nenggu?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Adhu, paraban se anggun, leburra sokona ba'na se ngangguy sandhal jareya. Leggu'na pokangnga akantha eyasan gabayanna seniman." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Bujella akantha tobung se bungkol se ta' tao kakorangan anggur campor. Tabu'na akantha tombuganna gandum se ekalenglenge bang-kembang kacobung. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Sosona akantha budhu'na manjangan dhadhuwa', akantha keddang se kembar." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Le'erra akantha manara gaddhing. Matana akantha man-taman e Hesybon, e seddi'anna labang saketheng Batrabim. Elongnga akantha manara e Gunong Libanon, se ngadhep ka kottha Damsyik." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Cethagga akantha Gunong Karmel; obu'na se ekoncer agalirap akantha kaen saten se paleng bagus; sampe' ngapencot atena rato. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Raddin onggu ba'na reya, se paleng ekataresnae e antarana se ekaleburi." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Badanna anggun akantha bungkana korma, sosona akantha gundhunganna buwana." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Terrona sengko' nae'a ka bungkana korma jareya, ban metthega gundhunganna buwana. Sosona ba'na akantha gundhunganna anggur, nyabana ro'om akantha appel," 
SongOfSongs7:9 colo'na manes akantha buwana anggur! Dina anggur jareya me' olle terros agili ka tang kakase tadha' ambuna; madhateng kasmaran, la'-mala' ka reng-oreng se teppa'na tedhung." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Sengko' kaagunganna tang kakase, se terro ka sengko'." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ngereng ja' meyosa ka talon, kakase, kelem e teggal e antarana bang-kembang pacar." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngereng ja' meyosa ka kebbun gu-laggu, nengale ponapa anggurra ampon kalowar pocedda kembang, ponapa kembangnga ampon mekkar; ponapa bungkana dalima ampon padha ngembang. E ka'dhissa' abdidalem ngatorragiya kataresna'an abdidalem ka junandalem." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Bungkana arak ro'om bauna, e seddi'anna labangnga junandalem sareng abdidalem badha wa'-buwa'an se nyaman acem-macem, se ampon abit sareng se gi' buru epetthek; sadaja sareng abdidalem esempen kaator junandalem." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Adhu, ja' sakenga junandalem ka'dhinto taretan abdidalem tonggal rama tonggal ebu, se oneng nyoso ka ebu abdidalem, tanto junandalem sareng abdidalem eseyom manabi tapanggi e lorong, sabab ta' kera badha se ngoca'e abdidalem." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Junandalem sareng abdidalem ebakta'a ka compo'na ebu sopaja junandalem kengenga ngajari abdidalem. Junandalem eatorana anggur se ro'om, sareng aengnga buwana dalima." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Asta kacerra junandalem neggu'i abdidalem, asta kanganna agellu' abdidalem." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Mara ajanji, babine'an Yerusalim, ba'na ta' agangguwa tang kataresna'an sabellunna katekkan se daddi pangaterrona." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Sapa se dhateng dhari sagara beddhi rowa, se nyandhar ka kakasena? Abdidalem abungowe junandalem e babana bungkana appel, kennengngannepon junandalem egandhu' sareng elahirragi." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Padaddiyagi abdidalem ka'dhinto buwana atena junandalem, ja' kantos junandalem agellu' oreng laenna kajabana abdidalem malolo; sabab kataresna'an ka'dhinto kowadda akadi maot, akadi dunnyana oreng mate kobasana napso. Rabbangnga akadi apoy, bar-galabaran kantos oreng padha tako'." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Aeng sabannya'na ta' mampo mamate kataresna'anna ate, banjir ta' kobasa alanyo'. Manabi oreng marengngagi sadaja artana epamondhuda kataresna'an, se ekaolle tanto namong eya-seya." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Sengko' kabbi andhi' ale' babine' se sosona gi' kene'. Epabaramma'a bi' sengko' kabbi ale' jareya mon badha oreng dhateng alamar? 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ja' sakenga tang ale' jareya geddhung, bi' sengko' sataretan epaddeggana manara salaka e attasanna. Ja' sakenga ale' jareya labang saketheng, bi' sengko' sataretan epalanga ban kaju comara." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Sengko' reya geddhung bato, ban manarana tang soso. Tang kakase ngagali ja' e dhalem salerana, sengko' nemmo kasennengngan." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Sulaiman kaagungan kebbun anggur e Ba'al-Hamon; kebbun jareya epagarap ka oreng se ajaga. Se agarap kebbun jareya rang-sorangnga majar saebu pesse salaka, menangka gantena hasella," 
SongOfSongs8:12 ban narema pesse dhu ratos menangka opana lessona. Dina pesse jareya kala' ba'na, Sulaiman, ban bagi ka para panjagana kebbunna ba'na. Tape tang kebbun anggur tang andhi' dibi', badha e adha'anna sengko' reya." 
SongOfSongs8:13 He, reng-oreng se ngennengnge kebbun, ca-kanca terro ngedhinga sowarana ba'na; mara sengko' ngedhingngagiya keya!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Ngereng duli rabu, buwana ate, ngereng rabu akadi keddang, akadi budhu'na manjangan e Pagunongan Beter." 
Isaiah1:1 Ketab reya aesse sen-pessen parkara Yehuda ban Yerusalim se enyata'agi Allah ka Yesaya, pottrana Amos, e bakto Uziya, Yotam, Ahas ban Hizkiya marenta e Yehuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Ketab reya aesse sen-pessen parkara Yehuda ban Yerusalim se enyata'agi Allah ka Yesaya, pottrana Amos, e bakto Uziya, Yotam, Ahas ban Hizkiya marenta e Yehuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Mara edhingngagi, langnge', mara edhingngagi pagu-onggu bume! Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Na'-ana' se epeyara bi' Sengko' sateya aberonta' ka Sengko'." 
Isaiah1:3 Sape bai tao ka lorana, hemar gi' tao ka baddhana kakanna se esadhiya'agi lorana. Tape Tang ommat Isra'il ta' kantha jareya; kabbi padha ta' ngarte.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Palang ba'na, bangsa se dusa, reng-oreng se bejjat ban daraka! Ba'na tabalusok polana dusana dibi'! Ba'na nolak PANGERAN ban mongkore Allah Se Mahasocce se kodu esemba bi' ba'na." 
Isaiah1:5 Arapa ba'na me' gi' terros alaban? Apa ba'na terro eokoma jang berra'an? Cethagga ba'na la bannya' porona, ate ban pekkeranna ba'na sake'." 
Isaiah1:6 Dhari cethak sampe' ka pa'-dapa'na sokona ba'na tadha' se barasa. Ba'na bannya' barana, dhang-malendhang ban ka-loka. Ka-lokana ba'na jareya gi' ta' eberse'e otaba ebetbet, ban gi' ta' etambai bi' mennya'." 
Isaiah1:7 Nagarana ba'na la epaancor; tha-kotthana la eobbar, tadha' karena. Tanana ba'na ekala' ban sabarang epaancor kabbi bi' reng-oreng manca e adha'na matana." 
Isaiah1:8 Pera' kare Yerusalim se la ekeppong ban ta' bisa apa-rapa, akantha ranggun e kebbun anggur otabana ko-bengkowan e kebbun temon." 
Isaiah1:9 Ja' sakenga PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa ta' apareng partolongan sampe' badha reng-oreng se gi' salamet e antarana sengko' ban ba'na, tanto kabbi la padha mate tadha' karena akantha Sodom ban Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Yerusalim, para pamimpin ban bangsana ba'na la daddi akantha Sodom ban Gomora. Edhingngagi apa dhabuna PANGERAN ka ba'na; tetene apa se eajarragi Allahna sengko' ban ba'na." 
Isaiah1:11 PANGERAN adhabu, “Ca'na ba'na Sengko' esanggu senneng narema kurban se ros-terrosan eatorragi ba'na ka Sengko'? Sengko' busen ka ba-dumba kurban obbaranna ba'na ban ka gajina budhu'na sapena ba'na. Dharana sape lake', dumba ban embi', Sengko' ta' endha'." 
Isaiah1:12 Sapa se nyoro ba'na ngeba sakabbinna tor-ator jareya e bakto ba'na entar abakte ka Sengko'? Sapa se nyoro ba'na abek-lembek e Tang Padalemman Socce? 
Isaiah1:13 Parcoma ba'na ngeba tor-ator jareya. Sengko' ngalennyer ngedhing bauna. Sengko' baji' nangale'e ba'na araya'agi Bulan Anyar, re-are Sabat ban re-are raja sarta kompolan-kompolan kaagama'an. Jareya kabbi bi' ba'na epagedda' bi' sa-dusana ba'na ban jareya maberra' Sengko'; Sengko' la lesso se nanggung." 
Isaiah1:14  
Isaiah1:15 Mon ba'na ngangka' tanangnga kaangguy adu'a, Sengko' ta' ngedhingngagiya. Maske saapa bannya'na du'ana ba'na, bi' Sengko' ta' eedhingngagiya, sabab tanangnga ba'na jareya la seggut eangguy mate'e oreng." 
Isaiah1:16 Baccowe badanna ba'na pasampe' berse. Ambuwi sakabbinna lalakonna ba'na se daraka jareya. Onggu, ambu, ja' alako daraka pole," 
Isaiah1:17 mara ajar alako becce'. Pajaga kaadilan ban patadha' panganeyaja'an; bagi ha'na na'-kana' jatim ban billai parkarana randha.” 
Isaiah1:18 PANGERAN adhabu, “Mara oros pamare parkara reya. Maske ba'na mera metthal polana sa-dusana, bi' Sengko' ebaccowa epasampe'a pote ngetthak. Maske dusana ba'na bannya' ban berra', bi' Sengko' esapora'a kabbi." 
Isaiah1:19 Mon ba'na endha' ta'at ka Sengko', ba'na bakal arassa'agiya kobassana sakabbinna se bagus se ehasellagi nagarana ba'na." 
Isaiah1:20 Tape mon ba'na ta' endha' atoro' ka Sengko', ba'na bakal mateya e dhalem perrang. Sengko', PANGERAN, la ngoca'.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Kottha se lamba' esto, sateya akantha sondel! Lamba' pandhudhu'na kabbi adil ban jujur, tape sateya aesse reng-oreng se dujan mate'e oreng." 
Isaiah1:22 Yerusalim, lamba' ba'na akantha salaka, tape sateya la tadha' ajina. Lamba' ba'na akantha anggur se nyaman, tape sateya pera' aeng malolo." 
Isaiah1:23 Para pamimpinna ba'na pamberonta' ban daddi ro-sorona maleng; dujan narema tor-ator ban pesse sogo'. Ta' endha' abillai na'-kana' jatim e pangadilan; ta' endha' ngedhingngagi gugadda dha-randha. 
Isaiah1:24 Daddi PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa, Allahna Isra'il adhabu, “He, Tang so-moso, Sengko' malessa sake' ate ka ba'na, sampe' ba'na ta' marepot Sengko' pole." 
Isaiah1:25 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eokoma. Akantha oreng se mamorne logam, bariya keya bi' Sengko' ba'na epamorneya; tor-kotorra epanyeseya dhari ba'na." 
Isaiah1:26 Bi' Sengko' ba'na eberri'ana pole kim-hakim ban panasehat akantha lamba'. Daddi Yerusalim bakal esebbuda kottha se adil ban esto.” 
Isaiah1:27 PANGERAN reya adil, daddi tanto masalamet Yerusalim ban reng-oreng se atobat." 
Isaiah1:28 Tape reng-oreng dusa se aberonta' ka Salerana bakal epamateya, ban se ajauwi Salerana bakal epamosna'a." 
Isaiah1:29 Reng-oreng jareya bakal todhusa polana nyemba ka ka'-bungka'an ban andhi' bun-kebbun se eangguy abakte ka ba-diba. 
Isaiah1:30 Reng-oreng jareya bakal daddiya akantha kajuwan raja se elop dhaunna, ban akantha kebbun se ta' eseram." 
Isaiah1:31 Akantha darameyan se katonon polana elette'e apoy, bariya keya reng-oreng se andhi' kakobasa'an bakal epamateya polana lalakonna dibi' se daraka, ban tadha' se bisa'a nahan sopaja reng-oreng jareya ta' sampe'a epaancor." 
Isaiah2:1 Areya' pessen se edhabuwagi Allah parkara Yehuda ban Yerusalim se etarema Yesaya pottrana Amos: 
Isaiah2:1 Areya' pessen se edhabuwagi Allah parkara Yehuda ban Yerusalim se etarema Yesaya pottrana Amos: 
Isaiah2:2 E re-are se bakal dhateng reya gumo' kennengnganna Padalemman Socce e nonggul ce' tenggina ban manjeng sodek e attas nong-gunong ban mo'-gumo'. Sa-bangsa bakal entara ka jadhiya anyo-ronyo," 
Isaiah2:3 kabbi padha ngoca', “Mara ja' ongga'a ka Gumo'na PANGERAN, ka Padalemmanna Allah Isra'il. Salerana bakal ngajarragiya sengko' ban ba'na apa se kodu elakone sengko' ban ba'na. Sengko' ban ba'na noro'a jalanna, sabab pangajaranna PANGERAN dhari Yerusalim asalla, Salerana abu-dhabu dhari Siyon.”" 
Isaiah2:4 Salerana bakal ahakimana e antarana sa-bangsa, ban motose parkara e antarana ku-suku bangsa. Peddhang bakal etempa'a epadaddi salaga, ban tombak epadaddi ladding panyokor. Sa-bangsa ambuwa se saleng serrang, ban ambu se aya-sadhiya entara aperrang." 
Isaiah2:5 He, toronanna Yakub, mara ja' ajalana e dhalem tera'na PANGERAN!" 
Isaiah2:6 Ya Allah, Junandalem ampon adinggallagi ommadda, toronanna Yakub! Sabab e man-ka'dhimman e nagara ka'dhinto oreng ngangguy elmo tennong sareng elmo seher se asalla dhari oreng temor sareng oreng Filistin. Reng-oreng gapaneka nerowe adadda reng-oreng manca se talebat bannya'na apolong e ka'dhinto." 
Isaiah2:7 Nagarana bannya' emmas sareng salakana, artana ta' sakera-kera. Jaranna talebat bannya'na, karetana ta' kabilang." 
Isaiah2:8 E man-ka'dhimman badha brahala, sarengngan reng-oreng gapaneka nyemba ca-arca badhiyanna dibi'." 
Isaiah2:9 Saneyap oreng badhi eya'-seya'a sareng eaebbagiya. Ja' parenge sapora reng-oreng gapaneka, GUSTE!" 
Isaiah2:10 Reng-oreng jareya bakal maso'a ka dhalem wa-guwa e mo'-gumo' karang, otabana ngaleya lobang e dhalem tana sopaja lopoda dhari babendunna PANGERAN ban dhari kobasana se molja." 
Isaiah2:11 Manossa se sombong bakal eaebbagiya ban se angko epasojuda. Pera' PANGERAN se bakal eagungngagiya. 
Isaiah2:12 PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa la neptebbagi settong are kaangguy ngaebbagi reng-oreng se matenggi aba'na ban ngokoma reng-oreng se sombong ban se angko. 
Isaiah2:13 Ka-bungkana comara Libanon se tenggi ban sakabbinna kajuwan raja e Basan bakal epamateya. 
Isaiah2:14 Nong-gunong ban mo'-gumo' se tenggi bakal eparata'a. 
Isaiah2:15 Ra-manara se tenggi ban dhung-geddhungnga binteng bakal epagujura. 
Isaiah2:16 Pal-kapal se paleng raja ban paleng bagus bakal epanyellemma. 
Isaiah2:17 Manossa se sombong bakal eaebbagiya ban se angko epasojuda. Pera' PANGERAN se bakal eagungngagiya. 
Isaiah2:18 La-brahala bakal mosna'a kabbi. 
Isaiah2:19 E bakto PANGERAN ngadek ban magundhek bume, oreng bakal maso'a ka wa-guwa e mo'-gumo' karang otabana ngaleya lobang e dhalem tana sopaja lopoda dhari babendunna PANGERAN ban dhari kobasana se molja. Mon are jareya la napa', la-brahala emmas ban salaka se esemba reng-oreng jareya, la-brahala gabayanna tanangnga reng-oreng jareya dibi', bakal edina'agiya ka tekos ban babburu." 
Isaiah2:20  
Isaiah2:21  
Isaiah2:22 Daddi, ja' ngarep ka manossa se ta' langgeng, sabab manossa reya tadha' ajina." 
Isaiah3:1 Saongguna PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa bakal manyengla'a dhari Yerusalim ban Yehuda sakabbinna parsadhiya'anna kakanan ban nom-enoman. Bariya keya sakabbinna oreng se eandellagi e jadhiya, iya areya:" 
Isaiah3:2 para pahlawan ban parjurit, hakim ban para nabbi, tokang ramal ban panasehat," 
Isaiah3:3 parwira, oreng penting ban nagarawan, tokang seher ban tokang tennong." 
Isaiah3:4 PANGERAN bakal ngangkada ngangodhadan epadaddiya pamimpinna ra'yat, se bakal marenta'a sakarebba dibi'." 
Isaiah3:5 Oreng bakal padha'a saleng seksa. Se ngodha ta' marduli se towa, se kene' ta' ngargai se raja." 
Isaiah3:6 E bakto jareya oreng bakal noddu'a sala settong dhari balana sambi ngoca', “Pera' ba'na se gi' andhi' angguy se pantes; daddi mara ba'na daddi pamimpinna sengko' kabbi e jaman se possa' ban kasossa'an reya.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Tape oreng jareya bakal nyaoda, “Sengko' banne dhukon! Sengko' ta' andhi' kakanan ban angguy keya. Ella, sengko' ja' soro daddi pamimpinna bangsa!”" 
Isaiah3:8 Ongguwan, Yerusalim la gaggar! Yehuda la ngalotor! Sabab sabarang oca'na ban lalakonna reng-oreng jareya alaban ka PANGERAN ban nangtang kakobasa'anna." 
Isaiah3:9 Tengkana se sombong noduwagi kajahadanna. Reng-oreng jareya rang-terrangan alako dusa akantha oreng Sodom lamba' rowa. Palang reng-oreng jareya! Reng-oreng jareya madhateng calaka' ka aba'na dibi'. 
Isaiah3:10 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Kabala ka reng-oreng se ta'at ka Sengko' ja' aba'na bakal sennengnga atena ban bakal salamedda. Reng-oreng jareya bakal ngarassa'agiya kobassana hasella lalakonna." 
Isaiah3:11 Tape palang oreng se daraka! Reng-oreng jareya bakal epakantha'a oreng laen se nanggung lalakonna reng-oreng jareya. 
Isaiah3:12 Tang ommat bakal enyek-enyegga tokang riba ban eperressa lenta darat. Tang ommat bakal egiba'a ka jalan se sala bi' para pamimpinna sampe' ta' tao pole jalan se kemma se kodu elebadi.” 
Isaiah3:13 PANGERAN la siyap se agugada ban ngadilana ommadda. 
Isaiah3:14 PANGERAN bakal daddiya hakimma para pamimpinna ommadda. Areya' se earannagi PANGERAN ka reng-oreng jareya: “Ba'na se arampok hasella bun-kebbun anggur; bengkona ba'na possa' ban rang-barang ollena arampas andhi'na oreng mesken. 
Isaiah3:15 Arapa ba'na me' nyeksa Tang ommat ban merres oreng mesken? Sengko', Guste ALLAH Se Mahatenggi ban Mahakobasa la ngoca'.”" 
Isaiah3:16 Dhabuna PANGERAN, “Ce' sombongnga babine'an Yerusalim reya! Leter, dujan amaen mata ban angko pajalanna. Tengka'na ela-pola, lang-gellang sokona patang pakarincing." 
Isaiah3:17 Tape bi' Sengko' babine'an jareya eokoma; cethagga epabannya'a korengnga ban epagundhula.” 
Isaiah3:18 Bakal napa'a baktona Pangeran mondhuda dhari babine'an Yerusalim jareya sakabbinna barang eyasanna se daddi andellanna: eyasanna cethagga, gellang sokona, kalongnga," 
Isaiah3:19 gellangnga tanangnga, totobba mowana," 
Isaiah3:20 burgu'na, mat-jimat e lengngenna ban e tengngana," 
Isaiah3:21 sello' ban teng-antengnga elongnga," 
Isaiah3:22 kalambi pestana se gus-bagus, gaun ban jubana, dhompedda," 
Isaiah3:23 kalambina se tepes, kalambi linenna, syalla le'erra ban burgu' lanjangnga." 
Isaiah3:24 Sateya ngangguy mennya' ro'om, dhaggi' menangka gantena mennya' ro'om, reng-oreng jareya bakal bacengnga bauna; sabbu'na se alos bakal eganteya tampar se kasar; cethagga se bagus obu'na bakal buthaga; menangka gantena kalambina se gus-bagus reng-oreng jareya bakal aganteya ngangguy kalambi dha-beddha; robana se raddin bakal aganteya daddi juba' matodhusan." 
Isaiah3:25 Lalake'an e kottha jareya, bariya keya se wat-kowat, bakal mateya e dhalem paperrangan." 
Isaiah3:26 E bang-labang sakethengnga kottha oreng bakal nangesa polana sossa, ban kotthana bakal padha'a ban babine' se ebangkange, ju'-toju' e tana." 
Isaiah4:1 E bakto jareya oreng babine' kapetto bakal nyandhaga settong lalake' sambi ngoca', “Edine kaula nyebbut sampeyan lake kaula, sopaja kaula ta' todhus polana ta' alake. Diggal kaula nyareya kakan sareng angguy dibi'.”" 
Isaiah4:2 E settong bakto PANGERAN bakal matombuwa men-tamennan ban ka'-bungka'an e kottha reya sampe' daddi raja ban bagus. E bakto jareya oreng Isra'il se salamet bakal peraga ban gumbira polana hasella tanana. 
Isaiah4:3 Saneyap oreng se gi' badha e Yerusalim, reng-oreng se epele epasalamedda bi' Allah, bakal ekoca'a socce." 
Isaiah4:4 Kalaban kobasana PANGERAN bakal ngadilana ban mamorneya ommadda. Yerusalim bakal epaberseya dhari dharana reng-oreng se epate'e e kottha jareya. 
Isaiah4:5 Saellana jareya e attassa Gumo' Siyon ban e attassa sakabbinna oreng se akompol e jadhiya PANGERAN bakal mabadha'a ondhem e bakto seyang ban okos sarta apoy se rabbang tera' e baja malem. Kamolja'anna Allah dibi' bakal ngaobana saantero kottha jareya. 
Isaiah4:6 Kottha jareya bakal eaobana dhari panas se ngeltak e baja seyang, ban bakal epadaddiya kennengnganna pangaobanna oreng dhari ojan derres ban kaleng busbus." 
Isaiah5:1 Edhingngagi tang nyanyeyan reya parkara kebbun anggurra tang kanca. Tang kanca andhi' kebbun anggur e erenganna gumo' se landhu. 
Isaiah5:2 Tang kanca jareya alandhu' tanana ban mowang to-batona. Tanana pas etamenne anggur peleyan, sarta epobuwi manara panjaga'anna. Saellana pas ngale tanana kaangguy kennengnganna merres anggurra. Buwana enante' sampe' massa'na, tape anggurra celo' rassana." 
Isaiah5:3 Daddi sateya tang kanca jareya ngoca', “Ba'na kabbi, oreng Yerusalim ban Yehuda, mara adili Sengko' ban Tang kebbun anggur reya." 
Isaiah5:4 Apa pole se koduna elakone Sengko' ka Tang kebbun anggur reya, tape bi' Sengko' gi' ta' ejalannagi sampe' sateya? Arapa buwana me' celo' rassana, ta' akantha se earep Sengko' re-saarena?" 
Isaiah5:5 Tang kebbun anggur reya sateya bi' Sengko' epakantha'a reya: Pagar e sakalenglengnga bi' Sengko' edabu'a, geddhung se ngaobi epagujura. Bi' Sengko' pas epannengnga erosak ban enyek-enyek burun alas." 
Isaiah5:6 Dina me' olle etombuwi but-ombut alas. Bungkana anggurra bi' Sengko' ta' etottowa, ban rebbana ta' eraowa. Dina me' olle etombuwi rebba ban ombut se bannya' dhurina, la'-mala' bi' Sengko' ondhem ta' ebagiya magaggar ojan ka attasanna.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Sabab kebbun anggurra PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa jareya ommat Isra'il ban reng-oreng Yehuda reya bungkana anggurra se etamen e tana jareya. Dhari ommadda jareya Pangeran ngarep kaadilan, tape se badha pera' kakejjemman. Pangeran ngarep ommadda ajalannagi barang se teppa', tape se badha coma serrona oreng menta kaadilan." 
Isaiah5:8 Palang ba'na se melle ko-bengko ban nyarobot gal-teggal polana namba'ana dhi'-andhi'na dibi'! Sakejja' aggi' reng-oreng laen pas ta' andhi' kennengngan, daddi pas pera' kare ba'na malolo se badha e nagara reya." 
Isaiah5:9 Sengko' ngedhing PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa asompa, “Ko-bengko se raja ban bagus jareya bakal kosonga ta' ekennengnge oreng." 
Isaiah5:10 Hasella bume rosak, bun-kebbun anggur se lebarra sapolo hektar coma bakal ngasellagiya aeng anggur sapolo liter. Bibit saratos liter bakal ngasellagiya gandum pera' sapolo liter.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Palang ba'na! Sabab dhari gu-laggu sampe' malem lakona ba'na coma ngenom nom-enoman kerras ban bu'-mabu'an. 
Isaiah5:12 E dhalem ta-pestana ba'na badha monyena calempong, gambus, terbang ban soleng sarta nom-enoman aeng anggur. Tape ba'na ta' parduli ka karyana Allah ban sabarang se elampa'agi Salerana." 
Isaiah5:13 Daddi Tang ommat se ta' tao pa-apa bakal egiringa epadaddi tawanan. Para pamimpin ban ra'yat bakal mateya kalaparan ban pelka'. 
Isaiah5:14 Congorra maot abukka' ce' lebarra ngontal reng-oreng penting e Yerusalim ban ra'yadda se teppa'na mabadha men-rammen. 
Isaiah5:15 Saneyap oreng bakal epamalowa ban se sombong eaebbagiya. 
Isaiah5:16 Tape PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa noduwagi kaagunganna kalaban alampa'agi sabarang se bendher. Pangeran bakal noduwagiya kasocceyanna kalaban ngadili bangsana. 
Isaiah5:17 E jur-gujuranna kottha budhu'na embi' ban dumba bakal ngamba'a ban ta' kakorangan kakan. 
Isaiah5:18 Palang ba'na se ros-terrosan agabay dusa! 
Isaiah5:19 Ca'na ba'na, “Dina GUSTE Allah se socce se esemba Isra'il me' olle duli madhateng okoman! Dina Guste Allah me' olle alampa'agi apa kasokanna sopaja sengko' ban ba'na nangaleyana.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Palang ba'na se alik-balik se bagus ban se jahat, se petteng ban se tera', se pae' ban se manes!" 
Isaiah5:21 Palang ba'na se nganggep aba'na bicaksana ban ce' penterra! 
Isaiah5:22 Palang ba'na se daddi jago ngenom anggur. Ba'na bangalan mon esoro nyampor nom-enoman kerras! 
Isaiah5:23 Tape pera' lantaran terro narema'a pesse go'-sogo' ba'na mabebas oreng se sala, ban lang-ngalange oreng se ta' sala narema kaadilan." 
Isaiah5:24 Ba'na nolak pangajaranna PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa ban ya-nyeya papakonna Allah se socce se esemba Isra'il. Lantaran jareya, akantha darameyan ban rebba kerreng se obus ekello' apoy, bariya keya mo'-ramo'na ba'na bakal bucco'a, bang-kembangnga bakal kerrenga ban obus eabber angen." 
Isaiah5:25 PANGERAN duka ka bangsana; astana la epangaceng se ngokoma reng-oreng jareya. Nong-gunong bakal gundhegga; yit-mayyit bakal ajalamperrana akantha rombu e rong-lorong. Tape dukana gi' ta' terep, ban astana gi' paggun epangaceng se ngokoma." 
Isaiah5:26 PANGERAN adikanana bangsa se jau ban reng-oreng jareya bakal duliya dhateng! 
Isaiah5:27 Reng-oreng jareya terros asadhiya se aperranga ban ta' tao lesso. Ta' tao tedhung otaba ngantok. 
Isaiah5:28 Panana tajem ban gandhibana la esadhiya'agi. Kokona jaranna akantha batona korek, rodhana karetana apoter akantha ola' taon." 
Isaiah5:29 Rit-parjuridda agaung akantha macan se gi' buru nyargep keban kakananna, se pas egiba buru ka kennengngan se kerana tadha'a se bisa arebbu' kakanan jareya." 
Isaiah5:30 E are jareya e saantero nagara Isra'il bakal ekaedhinga cerrengnga paperrangan se kajana akantha garudhu'na tase'. Abas, saantero nagara jareya petteng sarta possa' ban karekongan. Terrang aoba daddi petteng calemodan." 
Isaiah6:1 E taon pasedana Uziya sengko' nangale'e Pangeran alenggi e korse karaja'anna se tenggi ban molja. Jubana notobi saantero Padalemman Socce. 
Isaiah6:2 Badha lok-mahlok se rabbang akantha apoy manjeng e sakalenglengnga, kabbi padha andhi' kalembang nem-ennem. Kalembangnga se dhadhuwa' notobi mowana, se dhadhuwa' notobi badanna, ban dhadhuwa'na eangguy ngabber." 
Isaiah6:3 Lok-mahlok jareya aera' kantha reya: “Socce, socce, socce. Socce PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa. Bume possa' ban kamolja'anna.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Langganna Padalemman Socce agundhek polana sowara jareya, ban Padalemman Socce jareya dibi' possa' ban okos." 
Isaiah6:5 Sengko' pas ngoca', “Palang! Sengko' ta' andhi' pangarebban pole, sabab tang colo' gedda' ban dusa, ban sengko' apolong ban bangsa se kantha jareya keya. Maske kantha jareya, tang mata dibi' la nangale'e Rato, PANGERAN Se Mahakobasa!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Saellana jareya sala settong e antarana lok-mahlok jareya ngabber ka tang kennengngan, ngeba mardha se ekala' ban pe'-gipe' dhari mezba." 
Isaiah6:7 Mardha jareya eseddingngagi ka tang bibir, laju ngoca', “Mardha reya la nyedding ka bibirra ba'na. Sateya kasala'anna ba'na la epaelang ban dusana ba'na la esapora bi' PANGERAN.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Sengko' pas ngedhing PANGERAN adhabu kantha reya, “Sapa se eotosa Sengko'? Sapa se ngeba'a berta dhari Sengko' ban ba'na?” Sengko' nyaot, “Ka'dhinto abdidalem. Ngereng otos abdidalem!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Pangeran laju ngotos sengko' esoro manapa' pessen reya ka ommat, “Maske ba'na terrosa ngedhingngagi, ba'na ta' kera ngarte. Maske ba'na terros netene, ba'na ta' kera tao badha kadaddiyan apa.”" 
Isaiah6:10 Salerana laju adhabu ka sengko', “Patopo pekkeranna reng-oreng jareya, pakopok kopengnga ban pabuta matana, me' olle reng-oreng jareya ta' nangale, ta' ngedhing ban ta' ngarte, sopaja pas padha abalik nyabis ka Sengko', ban Sengko' pas epabarasa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Sengko' atanya, “Saponapa abittepon se epakadiya ka'dhinto, Guste?” Dhabuna, “Sampe' tha-kottha jareya ancor kabbi ban ta' ekennengnge oreng, ko-bengko tadha' se ngennengnge ban tanana kosong ta' ekenneng men-tamenne," 
Isaiah6:12 pandhudhu'na tha-kottha jareya bi' Sengko' eojuga ka kennengngan se jau, sampe' tana jareya seppe tadha' orengnga." 
Isaiah6:13 La'-mala', mon dhari sapolo oreng badha settong se gi' odhi', se gi' odhi' jareya epamateya keya. Tape akantha bungkana baringen mon epoger gi' badha bungkella, bariya keya bangsa jareya masthe gi' badha karena se daddiya parmola'anna ommat se socce.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Rato Ahas reya pottrana Yotam, bajana Uziya. E bakto Rato Ahas marenta Yehuda, badha perrang. Rezin, rato Siria, ban Pekah pottrana Remaliya rato Isra'il, nyerrang Yerusalim. Tape se kadhuwa jareya ta' ahasel arebbu' kottha jareya." 
Isaiah7:2 E bakto rato Yehuda meyarsa ja' pasukan Siria la maso' ka baba kakobasa'anna Isra'il menangka kanca, rato Yehuda jareya ban ra'yadda laju katako'en, sampe' padha ngetter akantha kajuwan se etongngo' angen." 
Isaiah7:3 PANGERAN adhabu ka Yesaya, “Kassa' ba'na entar ka Rato Ahas, giba Sye'ar Yasyub ana'na. Ba'na bakal tatemmowa ban Ahas jareya e konco'na sellogan li-giliyanna taman se paleng attas, e lorong kennengnganna kang-tokang panatu alako." 
Isaiah7:4 Kabala ka rato sopaja terros asadhiya, tape paggun pakalem. Ta' osa tako' otaba bingong. Kapeggellanna Rato Pekah ban Rato Rezin sarta tantarana reng-oreng Siria rowa babajana pera' padha ban tomper dhadhuwa' se gi' ngokos." 
Isaiah7:5 Siria asakongkel ban Isra'il sarta ratona. 
Isaiah7:6 Reng-oreng jareya nyerranga Yehuda ban ko'-nako'ana reng-oreng e jadhiya sopaja padha'a nolonge Siria; saellana jareya ana'na Tabe'el pas epadaddiya rato. 
Isaiah7:7 Tape Sengko', PANGERAN, ngoca' ja' jareya ta' kera kalakon," 
Isaiah7:8 sabab kakowadanna Siria ta' lebbi dhari kakowadanna Damsyik, ibu kotthana, ban kakowadanna Damsyik ta' lebbi dhari kakowadanna Rato Rezin. Dineng e dhalem bakto sabidak lema' taon, Isra'il bakal eca'-pecca'a sampe' ta' ekenneng sebbut bangsa pole." 
Isaiah7:9 Isra'il ta' akowadan dhari Samaria, ibu kotthana, ban Samaria ta' lebbi kowat dhari Rato Pekah. Mon ba'na ta' pate parcaja ka Sengko', tanto ba'na ta' kera kowat.”" 
Isaiah7:10 PANGERAN apareng pessen laen pole ka Ahas," 
Isaiah7:11 “Ba'na nyo'on sopaja GUSTE Allahna apareng tandha ka ba'na, ta' tao apa tandha jareya dhari dunnyana oreng mate e baba otaba dhari langnge' e attas.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Saodda Ahas, “Kaula ta' nyo'ona tandha. Kaula ta' nyoba'a PANGERAN.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Atorra Nabbi Yesaya, “Manabi saka'dhinto, ngereng peyarsa'agi, toronanna Rato Daud! Ponapa ta' cokop junandalem ngoji kasabbaranna manossa, me' junandalem ngojiya kasabbaranna Allah abdidalem jugan?" 
Isaiah7:14 Samangken, Pangeran dibi' se aparenga tandha ka junandalem: Badha paraban bubut, badhi alahirragi pottra lalake' se eparengngana nyama Immanuwil." 
Isaiah7:15 E bakto kana' gapaneka ampon cokop omorra kaangguy motose dibi' parkara ponapa'a saos, nagara gapaneka bakal ma'mora." 
Isaiah7:16 Sabab sabellunnepon bakto gapaneka napa', nagara dhadhuwa' se eparenta to-rato se ekatako'e junandalem gapaneka bakal kosonga tadha' orengnga." 
Isaiah7:17 PANGERAN madhatengnga rato Asyur, junandalem sakalowarga sareng ra'yadda bakal ngalamana karekongan se alebbiyan dhari sadaja se ampon oneng ealame junandalem molae peccana karaja'an Isra'il sareng Yehuda." 
Isaiah7:18 E bakto gapaneka PANGERAN bakal aparenga tandha nembali oreng Messer sareng oreng Asyur, se padha dhatengnga akadi lala' sareng nyarowan dhari nagarana, ngaromo'a ra-cora se durjet sareng ke'-lekke'na bato karang, notobi but-ombut se bannya' dhurina sareng lon-talon se bannya' rebbana."
